Genesis1:1 Glan i rah rah tsiro kras o Devel o bolepen oun i phoub. 
Genesis1:2 Har i phoub kerdo vas, his či koy pre. Kek djipen his koy. His rati oun zorelo pani his pral halauter. Oun o Debleskro dourho his pral o pani." 
Genesis1:3 Oun o Devel penas: “Mou vell dives!” Koy vas dives. 
Genesis1:4 O Devel dikas, kay ko dives mishto hi. Oun o Devel das yek tsiro o diveske oun yek tsiro i ratsyake." 
Genesis1:5 Oun o Devel das o dives ko lab dives oun ap i rati penas yob rati. Yaake vas rati oun pale taysarlakro. Kova his o ersto dives. 
Genesis1:6 Oun o Devel penas, te vell o bolepen, oun pani koy pral oun pani koy tel. Oun yaake vas kova." 
Genesis1:7 O Devel kras o bolepen. Oun pani his koy pral, oun pani his koy tel ap i phoub." 
Genesis1:8 Oun o Devel das o bolepen o lab bolepen. Oun vas rati oun pale taysarlakro. Kova his o douyto dives. 
Genesis1:9 Oun o Devel penas, te vell ko pani ap i phoub khetne ap yek rig, te vell o trouk them diklo. Oun yaake vas kova." 
Genesis1:10 Oun o Devel penas: “Ko trouk them kharella phoub.” Oun kova, kay o pani khetne hi, kharas lo baro pani. Oun o Devel dikas, kay kova mishto hi." 
Genesis1:11 Oun o Devel penas: “Mou vell hako zenlepen dran i phoub vin, an koleste hi tikno djob dren, yaake te vell lestar pale nevo zenlepen. Mou venna ninna rouka dran i phoub vin, kolendar hakeno peskre roukengre hidjrella. An kolende hi tikno djob, yaake te vell lendar pale neve rouka baro.” Oun yaake vas kova." 
Genesis1:12 Oun dran i phoub vas zenlepen vin. Hako zenlepen moukas peskro tikno djob bares te vell, yaake te vell lestar pale nevo zenlepen. Ninna rouka van baro. Hako rouk hidjras peskre roukengre, an kolende tikno djob hi, yaake te venn lendar pale neve rouka baro. Oun o Devel dikas, kay kova mishto hi." 
Genesis1:13 Oun vas rati oun pale taysarlakro. Kova his o triinto dives. 
Genesis1:14 Oun o Devel penas, te venn momlia an o bolepen, hoy sikrenna: Kanna hi dives, oun kanna hi rati. Kolla sikrenna ninna: Kanna vell niyal, kanna vell o vend. Kanna vell i baro dives, kanna i nevo bersh." 
Genesis1:15 Yon hi an o bolepen tardo, te denn le momeli ap i phoub. Oun kova vas yaake." 
Genesis1:16 Oun o Devel kras kol douy bare momlia: o kham, te vell lo ray pral o dives, oun o čon, te vell lo ray pral i rat, oun ninna i vavar bolepangre momlia." 
Genesis1:17 Oun o Devel čivas len an o bolepen, te denn le momeli ap i phoub." 
Genesis1:18 Yon hi ray pral o dives oun pral i rat, te dell yek tsiro o diveske oun i vavar tsiro o ratsyake. Oun o Devel dikas, kay kova mishto hi." 
Genesis1:19 Oun vas rati oun pale taysarlakro. Kova his o starto dives. 
Genesis1:20 Oun o Devel penas, te venn boud firhe an o pani oun boud čirkle an o bolepen." 
Genesis1:21 Yaake kras o Devel bare panyengre firhen, oun ninna hako vavar firho, hoy an o pani hi, ninna hake čirkle. Oun o Devel dikas, kay kova mishto hi." 
Genesis1:22 Oun o Devel rakras lače laba pral lende vin oun penas: “Lenn boud terne, te venn boud t'mendar an o baro pani oun boud čirkle an o bolepen.”" 
Genesis1:23 Oun vas rati oun pale taysarlakro, o pančto dives." 
Genesis1:24 Oun o Devel penas, te dell i phoub hake firhenge o djipen: i divye firhenge oun kolenge, kay gar divye hi, ninna i tsele tikne firhe. Oun yaake vas kova." 
Genesis1:25 Oun o Devel kras hake divye firhen oun hake firhen, kay gar divye hi, ninna i tsele tikne firhen ap i phoub. Oun yob dikas, kay kova mishto hi." 
Genesis1:26 Oun o Devel penas: “Kanna krah menshen. Yon venn yaake har mer. Yon hi ray pral i mačende an o baro pani oun pral i čirklende an o bolepen, pral i divye firhende oun pral kolende, kay gar divye hi, ninna pral i tikne firhende, hoy djan pral i phoub.”" 
Genesis1:27 Oun o Devel kras i menshen yaake har yob hi. Ava, yaake har yob hi, kras lo len: o morshes oun i djouvyat." 
Genesis1:28 Oun o Devel rakras lače laba pral lende vin oun penas: “Anenn boud čaven ap i phoub, te vell i phoub t'mendar pherdo! Oun avenn ray pral i phoub! Avenn ray pral i mačende an o baro pani, pral i čirklende an o bolepen, oun pral hake firhende, hoy ap i phoub hi!”" 
Genesis1:29 Oun o Devel penas: “Shounenn, t'mer nay rhan halauterestar, hoy vell baro ap i phoub oun an koleste tikno djob hi. Ninna i tsele roukengre, kay tikno djob an lende hi, dau t'men te rhal." 
Genesis1:30 I tsele firhen, kay djivenn ap i phoub, ninna i tsele čirklen oun tikne firhen dau me o tselo zenlepen te rhal.” Oun yaake vas kova." 
Genesis1:31 Oun o Devel dikas halauter, hoy yob kras, oun čačepah halauter his mishto. Oun vas rati oun pale taysarlakro. Kova his o shobto dives." 
Genesis2:1 Yaake vas o bolepen oun i phoub kerdo, oun halauter, hoy koy hi." 
Genesis2:2 Ap o eftato dives his o Debleskri boudi kerdo. Yob boudras bouder gar. Halauter his kerdo. 
Genesis2:3 Oun o Devel penas: “Ko eftato dives hi i baro dives mange. Ko dives hi miro.” Ap o eftato dives his leskri boudi halauter kerdo, oun yob boudras bouder gar." 
Genesis2:4 Kova hi ko liil, kay činlo hi, har o bolepen oun i phoub kerdo van." 
Genesis2:5 Ap ko tsiro, har o baro Devel, maro ray, i phoub oun o bolepen kras, his kek rouka ap i phoub, vitar kek zenlepen. O baro Devel, maro ray, das kek brishin ap i phoub. Oun his kek mensho koy, kay boudras ap i phoub." 
Genesis2:6 I sapeno dourho vas dran i phoub oun kras lauter sapenes. 
Genesis2:7 Oun o baro Devel, maro ray, kras o romes dran čik i phoubyatar. Oun phourdas peskro dourho, hoy della o djipen, an o romeste. Oun o rom vas djido." 
Genesis2:8 Oun o baro Devel, maro ray, kras i baar an Eden, ap koy rig, kay o kham pre djala. Kote čivas yob ko romes, koles yob kras." 
Genesis2:9 Oun o baro Devel, maro ray, moukas boud rouka baro te vell dran i phoub. Kolla his shoukar. Oun lengre roukengre his lačo rhapaske. Mashkral i baar his ko rouk tardo, kay della djipen, ninna ko rouk, kay della gosvepen, hoy hi lačo oun hoy hi čilačo." 
Genesis2:10 Oun i lengsto pani nashas an Eden, hoy krell koy baar sapenes. Oun ko pani nashas dran i baar vin, oun dran ko pani van star panya." 
Genesis2:11 O lab o ersto panyestar hi Pison. Kova nashell troul o tselo them Havila. Koy hatsenn le sonakay. 
Genesis2:12 Oun o sonakay dran ko them hi mishto. Kote hi ninna kouč hartsa, hoy soungella mishto, ninna kouč barra, hoy kharenna Onyx." 
Genesis2:13 Oun ko lab o douyto panyestar hi Gihon. Kova nashell troul o tselo them Koush. 
Genesis2:14 Oun ko lab o triinto panyestar hi Tigris. Kova nashell ap koy rig o themestar Assour, kay o kham pre djala. Oun o starto pani hi o Eufrat." 
Genesis2:15 Oun o baro Devel, maro ray, las o romes oun čivas les an i baar Eden, te boudrell yob kote, ninna te dell yob yak ap i baar." 
Genesis2:16 Oun o baro Devel, maro ray, penas zoreles ap o romeste: “Tou nay rhah hako roukestar an i baar, har tou kameh." 
Genesis2:17 Kokres ko rouk, kay della gosvepen, hoy hi lačo oun hoy hi čilačo, kolestar te rhas tou gar. Te rhah kolestar, mereh.”" 
Genesis2:18 Oun o baro Devel, maro ray, penas: “Hi gar mishto, te ačell o rom kokres. Me krau yekes har yob, kay pash leste hi.”" 
Genesis2:19 Oun o baro Devel, maro ray, kras dran čik i tsele firhen ap o them oun i tsele čirklen an o bolepen. Oun yob anas len pash o romeste, te dikell lo, havo lab yob len della." 
Genesis2:20 Ko lab, hoy ko rom len das, yaake kharan yon. Oun o rom das hake firhen oun hake čirklen i lab. O mensheske his kek koy, kay yaake hi har yob, oun pash leste hi." 
Genesis2:21 Koy moukas o baro Devel, maro ray, o romes zoreles dren te sovell. Oun o Devel las yek kokalo dran leskri rig vin oun kras ko kotar o masseha pale khetne." 
Genesis2:22 Oun yob kras i djouvyat dran ko kokalo o romestar. Oun anas lat pash o romeste. 
Genesis2:23 Oun o rom penas: “Ake li! Yoy hi har me: miro kokalo oun mass. O romestar hi li lino. Doleske kharell li romni.” 
Genesis2:24 Doleske moukella i rom peskro dades oun peskri dat oun djala peskri romyah. Oun yon venna yek. 
Genesis2:25 Oun yon douy, o rom oun peskri romni, his nango. Oun yon ladjan gar." 
Genesis3:1 O sap his gosveder har i tsele vavar firhe, hoy kras o baro Devel, maro ray. Oun o sap penas ap i romyate: “Penas o Devel čačepah, te hounte rhan gar i roukendar an i baar?”" 
Genesis3:2 Koy penas i romni ap o sap: “Mer nay rhah i roukendar an i baar. 
Genesis3:3 Kokres ko roukestar, hoy mashkral an i baar tardo hi, penas o Devel Ma rhan kolestar, taprenn les gar an, te merenn gar! ”" 
Genesis3:4 Koy penas o sap ap i romyate: “Čačepah, t'mer merenna gar." 
Genesis3:5 O Devel djinell, kay djana t'menge i yaka pre ap ko dives, kay rhan ko roukestar. Oun t'mer venna har o Devel oun djinenna, hoy lačo oun čilačo hi.”" 
Genesis3:6 Oun koy romni dikas ap ko rouk oun penas ap peste: “Mishto vals, te rhaus ko roukestar. Shoukar hi lo! Oun mishto vals, te vaus gosevo.” Oun yoy las o roukestar, rhas oun das ninna peskro romeste, kay pash late his. Oun yob rhas ninna." 
Genesis3:7 Koy djan lenge i yaka pre. Oun yon hayvan, kay yon nango hi. Oun yon pandan patria khetne i faygetikro roukestar oun kran penge ripya." 
Genesis3:8 I rati, har bouder gar tato his, shounan yon, kay djas o baro Devel, maro ray, trouyel an i baar. O rom oun peskri romni khatran pen o Deblestar, maro rayestar, mashkral kol rouka an i baar." 
Genesis3:9 Oun o baro Devel, maro ray, das o romes gole: “Kay hal tou?”" 
Genesis3:10 Penas o rom: “Me shounom, kay hal an i baar. Oun man his traash. Me hom nango. Koy khatrom man.”" 
Genesis3:11 Oun o Devel poučas lestar: “Koon penas touke, te hal nango? Rhal tou ko roukestar, kay penom touke zoreles, te rhas gar lestar?”" 
Genesis3:12 Penas o rom: “Koy romni, kay tou man dal, koya das man ko roukestar. Oun me rhom.”" 
Genesis3:13 Oun o baro Devel, maro ray, penas ap i romyate: “Hoske kral tou kova?” “O sap rhorhras man”, penas i romni, “yaake kay rhom.”" 
Genesis3:14 Koy penas o baro Devel, maro ray, ap o sap: “Praasedo vess koleske, hoy tou kral. Touke djan le dran o drom, – touke kokres oun gar i tsele vavar firhenge. Tou djas ap tiro per oun rhas čik tiro tselo djipen." 
Genesis3:15 Tou oun koy romni, t'men hi rholi yek ap o vavareste. Ninna tire čaven hi rholi ap lakre čavende. Oun lakre čaven hi rholi ap tire čavende. Yek lakre čavendar stakrell tiro shero khetne. Oun tou dandreh les an leskri heri.”" 
Genesis3:16 Ap i romyate penas o Devel: “Me kamau touke phares te krell, te veh an vavar koova. Doukentsa aneh tou čaven ap i phoub. Oun tiro dji dell gole pal tiro romeste. Yob hi pral toute o ray.”" 
Genesis3:17 Oun ap o romeste penas o Devel: “Tou shounal ap tiri romyate oun rhal ko roukestar, kay penom touke: Ma rha kolestar. Doleske vell bibarht ap i harhetikri phoub. Tou boudress phares ap i phoub, te vell tout rhapaske, yaake rah har djiveh." 
Genesis3:18 Soubyengre bourra venn baro ap tiri harhetikri phoub oun tou rhah ko zenlepen, hoy vell koy pre baro." 
Genesis3:19 Tou hounte boudress yaake phares tiro rhapaske, te nashell o pani pral tiro mouy, bis te veh pale phoub. Tou hal kerdo dran i čik i phoubyatar. Oun tou veh pale, hoy tou hals.”" 
Genesis3:20 Oun o rom – leskro lab his Adam – das peskri romyat o lab Eva. Yoy hi i day i tsele menshendar. 
Genesis3:21 Oun o baro Devel, maro ray, kras ripya dran felle o Adameske oun i Evake oun rivas kolla lenge an." 
Genesis3:22 Oun o baro Devel, maro ray, penas: “Dikenn, o mensho vas yaake har mer: Yob djinell, hoy hi lačo oun hoy hi čilačo. Kanna hi gar mishto, te rhal lo ninna ko roukestar, hoy della o djipen. Palle djivell yob hako tsireske.”" 
Genesis3:23 Oun o baro Devel, maro ray, bičras les vin dran i baar Eden, te boudrell yob ap i harhetikri phoub. Dran i čik i phoubyatar vas o mensho kerdo. Oun kanna hounte boudrell yob koy pre." 
Genesis3:24 Oun o Devel tradas len vin. Glan i baar Eden, ap koy rig, kay o kham pre djal, čivas o Devel bolepangre i rhareha, hoy rhačella oun djal yek rigyatar ap i vavar, te denn le garda, te djal kek pash ko rouk, hoy della o djipen." 
Genesis4:1 O Adam vas khetne peskri romyah Eva. Oun yoy vas an vavar koova oun anas i čaves ap i phoub oun das les o lab Kayn. Oun yoy penas: “Me lom i morsh čavo. O baro Devel das les mande.” 
Genesis4:2 Oun pal kova anas yoy i douyto čaves ap i phoub. Koles das li o lab Abel. O Abel vas i bakrengro. O Kayn vas i harho oun boudras ap i harhetikri phoub. 
Genesis4:3 Pal i tsiro las o Kayn kolestar, hoy ap leskri phoub baro vas oun rhačras les o baro Debleske." 
Genesis4:4 Oun o Abel las tikne bakren, kay i phoureder čave pengre dayendar hi, maras len oun rhačras lengre feteder kotya o Debleske. Oun o baro Devel dikas lačes ap o Abel oun ap kova, hoy yob rhačras leske." 
Genesis4:5 Ap o Kayn dikas yob gar lačes, vitar gar ap kova, hoy yob rhačras o Debleske. Koy las o Kayn i bari rholi oun dikas rhoyedo tele ap i phoub." 
Genesis4:6 Koy penas o baro Devel ap o Kayn: “Hoske hal tou rhoyedo? Hoske dikeh tele? 
Genesis4:7 Kova hi yaake: Te kreh, hoy mishto hi, nay dikeh tou i menshen an i yaka. Te kreh, hoy gar mishto hi, hi o čilačepen gar dour toutar, oun kamell ray pral toute te vell. Tou hounte vess ray pral o čilačepen.”" 
Genesis4:8 O Kayn penas ap peskro phraleste Abel: “Am! Djas vin ap o them!” Oun har yon vin ap o them his, hadas pes o Kayn ap peskro phraleste Abel oun das les moulo." 
Genesis4:9 Koy penas o baro Devel ap o Kayn: “Kay hi tiro phraal Abel?” Penas yob: “Djinau gar. Dap me hounte yak ap miro phraleste?” 
Genesis4:10 Oun o Devel penas: “Hoy kral tou? Shoun! Tiro phraleskro rat dell gole pal mande dran i phoub. 
Genesis4:11 I phoub kras peskro mouy pre oun piyas tiro phraleskro rat, koles tou moulo dal. Kanna nay boudress bouder gar ap i phoub. Tou vess praasedo ap i phoub." 
Genesis4:12 Te kreh tiri boudi ap i harhetikri phoub, vell kote či touke baro. Tou hounte djas trouyel ap i phoub. Tout vella kek them, kay khere hal.”" 
Genesis4:13 Koy penas o Kayn ap o baro Debleste: “Miri phagi hi yaake baro, kay rikrau lat nay gar vin." 
Genesis4:14 Tou tradeh man kava dives vin dran o them! Me hounte khatrap man glan toute. Man vella kek them, kay khere hom. Me hounte dap man trouyel. Hakeno, koon hatsell man, nay dell man moulo.”" 
Genesis4:15 Koy penas o baro Devel: “Na-a! Hakeno, koon o Kaynes moulo della, koleskre menshendar venn efta menshe moulo dino.” Oun o baro Devel kras i sikepen glan ap leskro shero, te djinell hakeno, koon hatsell les, te nay marell lo les gar." 
Genesis4:16 Oun o Kayn djas peske o baro Deblestar. Oun djas an ko them Nod vergel i baar Eden, ap koy rig, kay o kham pre djala." 
Genesis4:17 Oun o Kayn vas khetne peskri romyah. Kaya vas an vavar koova oun anas o Henok ap i phoub. Oun o Kayn kras i foro, oun das ko fores ko lab peskro čavestar Henok." 
Genesis4:18 O Henok las i čavo. Leskro lab his Irad. Koleskro čavo his o Mehouyael Koleskro čavo his o Metoushael Oun koleskro čavo his o Lamek. 
Genesis4:19 O Lamek las peske douy romyen. O lab kol yekatar his Ada. Koy vavar kharas Silla. 
Genesis4:20 I Ada anas i čaves ap i phoub. Leskro lab his Yabal. Yob vas o dad kolendar, kay an plarhtene khera djivenn oun ap i firhende yak denn." 
Genesis4:21 Oun o lab leskro phralestar his Yubal. Kova vas o dad halauterendar, kay hayvenn ap doryengre bashepangre oun tikne phourdepangre te bashrell." 
Genesis4:22 I Silla anas ninna i čaves ap i phoub. Leskro lab his Toubal-Kayn. Yob vas o dad halauterendar, kay hayvenn sasterno koova te krell. Leskri pheen his i Naama." 
Genesis4:23 Oun o Lamek penas ap peskre romyende: Ada oun Silla, shounenn, hoy me penau! T'mer, mire romya, denn garda ap mire laba! Te doukrell man i morsh, koles dau moulo. Te dell man i terno morsh dava, dau les me moulo." 
Genesis4:24 Koon o Kaynes moulo della, koleskre menshendar venna efta moulo dino. Koon man, o Lamekes, moulo della, koleskre menshendar venna 77 (efta-deesh-te-efta) menshe moulo dino." 
Genesis4:25 Oun o Adam vas pale khetne peskri romyah. Oun yoy anas i čaves ap i phoub, oun das les ko lab Set, oun penas: “O Devel das man i vavar čaves miro čaveske Abel, koles o Kayn moulo das.”" 
Genesis4:26 Oun o Set las ninna i čavo. Koles das yob ko lab Enosh. An ko tsiro mangan i menshe o ersto kopo o baro Debles an. 
Genesis5:1 Kova hi ko liil, kay i laba činlo hi kol menshendar, kay van pal o Adam. Ap ko dives, har o Devel o menshes kras, kras les lo yaake har yob hi." 
Genesis5:2 Yob kras o morshes oun i djouvyat oun čivas peskri zoor ap lende oun das len ko lab mensho. 
Genesis5:3 Har o Adam 130 (sheel-te-triyanda) bersha phouro his, vas yob o dad i čavestar, kay vin dikas har yob. Oun das les ko lab Set." 
Genesis5:4 Koy pal, har o Set boldo vas, djivas o Adam 800 (orhta-sheel) bersha. Oun lestar van boud čave oun ča bolde." 
Genesis5:5 Leskro tselo djipen his 930 (enya-sheel-te-triyanda) bersha. Oun yob meras. 
Genesis5:6 Har o Set 105 (sheel-te-panč) bersha phouro his, vas lestar o Enosh boldo." 
Genesis5:7 Koy pal, har o Enosh boldo vas, djivas o Set 807 (orhta-sheel-te-efta) bersha. Oun lestar van boud čave oun ča bolde." 
Genesis5:8 Leskro tselo djipen his 912 (enya-sheel-te-deesh-te-douy) bersha, oun yob meras." 
Genesis5:9 Har o Enosh 90 (enya-deesh) bersha phouro his, vas lestar o Kenan boldo." 
Genesis5:10 Koy pal, har o Kenan boldo vas, djivas o Enosh 815 (orhta-sheel-te-deesh-te-panč) bersha. Oun lestar van boud čave oun ča bolde." 
Genesis5:11 Leskro tselo djipen his 905 (enya-sheel-te-panč) bersha. Oun yob meras. 
Genesis5:12 Har o Kenan 70 (efta-deesh) bersha phouro his, vas lestar o Mahalalel boldo." 
Genesis5:13 Pal kova, har o Mahalalel boldo vas, djivas o Kenan 840 (orhta-sheel-te-star-deesh) bersha. Oun lestar van boud čave oun ča bolde." 
Genesis5:14 Leskro tselo djipen his 910 (enya-sheel-te-deesh) bersha. Oun yob meras. 
Genesis5:15 Har o Mahalalel 65 (shob-deesh-te-panč) bersha phouro his, vas lestar o Yered boldo." 
Genesis5:16 Koy pal, har o Yered boldo vas, djivas o Mahalalel 830 (orhta-sheel-te-triyanda) bersha. Oun lestar van boud čave oun ča bolde." 
Genesis5:17 Oun leskro tselo djipen his 895 (orhta-sheel-te-enya-deesh-te-panč) bersha. Oun yob meras. 
Genesis5:18 Har o Yered 162 (sheel-te-shob-deesh-te-douy) bersha phouro his, vas lestar o Henok boldo." 
Genesis5:19 Koy pal, har o Henok boldo vas, djivas o Yered 800 (orhta-sheel) bersha. Oun lestar van boud čave oun ča bolde." 
Genesis5:20 Leskro tselo djipen his 962 (enya-sheel-te-shob-deesh-te-douy) bersha. Oun yob meras. 
Genesis5:21 Har o Henok 65 (shob-deesh-te-panč) bersha phouro his, vas lestar o Matusalem boldo." 
Genesis5:22 Koy pal, har o Matusalem boldo vas, djivas o Henok 300 (triin-sheel) bersha o Debleha. Oun lestar van boud čave oun ča bolde." 
Genesis5:23 Leskro tselo djipen his 365 (triin-sheel-te-shob-deesh-te-panč) bersha. 
Genesis5:24 Oun o Henok djivas o Debleha. Palle his yob bouder gar koy. O Devel las les krik. 
Genesis5:25 Har o Matusalem 187 (sheel-te-orhta-deesh-te-efta) bersha phouro his, vas lestar o Lamek boldo." 
Genesis5:26 Koy pal, har o Lamek boldo vas, djivas o Matusalem 782 (efta-sheel-te-orhta-deesh-te-douy) bersha. Oun lestar van boud čave oun ča bolde." 
Genesis5:27 Leskro tselo djipen his 969 (enya-sheel-te-shob-deesh-te-enya) bersha. Oun yob meras. 
Genesis5:28 Har o Lamek 182 (yek-sheel-te-orhta-deesh-te-douy) bersha phouro his, vas lestar yek čavo boldo." 
Genesis5:29 Oun yob das les ko lab Noah oun penas: “Mari boudi hi pharo ap i harhetikri phoub, kay čivas o baro Devel i bibarht pre. O Noah dell mare djia nevi zoor.”" 
Genesis5:30 Koy pal, har o Noah boldo vas, djivas o Lamek 585 (panč-sheel-te-enya-deesh-te-panč) bersha. Oun lestar van boud čave oun ča bolde." 
Genesis5:31 Leskro tselo djipen his 777 (efta-sheel-te-efta-deesh-te-efta) bersha. Oun yob meras. 
Genesis5:32 O Noah his 500 (panč-sheel) bersha phouro oun lestar van o Sem, o Ham oun o Yafet boldo." 
Genesis6:1 I menshe van boud oun boudeder ap i phoub. Oun ča van boldo lendar. 
Genesis6:2 Koy dikan i Debleskre čave, har shoukar i menshengre ča hi. Oun yon lan penge kolen, kay yon kaman, te romedinerenn yon len." 
Genesis6:3 Koy penas o baro Devel: “Miro djipaskro dourho ačell gar hako tsiro an o mensheste. Yob hi mass. Yob vell gar phoureder har 120 (sheel-te-biish) bersha.” 
Genesis6:4 An ko tsiro, har i Debleskre čave khetne van i menshengre čentsa oun lendar čave bolde van, djivan bare menshe ap i phoub. Ninna pal ko tsiro. Kolla his čače morsha an ko phouro tsiro: baro oun an-diklo." 
Genesis6:5 O baro Devel dikas, kay o menshengro čilačepen baro hi ap i phoub. Halauter, hoy len an lengre djia hi, his čilačo o tselo dives." 
Genesis6:6 Kova doukas les an leskro dji. Oun o baro Debles khaytas, kay kras yob i menshen ap i phoub." 
Genesis6:7 Doleske penas o baro Devel: “Me lau i tsele menshen, kay me krom, pale krik i phoubyatar, ninna i firhen, i baren oun i tiknen, oun i čirkle. Khaytell man, kay krom len.”" 
Genesis6:8 O Noah kokres his lačo glan o baro Debleskre yaka. 
Genesis6:9 Kova hi ko liil, kay činlo hi pral o Noah peskre čaventsa. O Noah his i morsh, kay lačo oun čačo his. I tsele menshendar an ko tsiro kras yob kokres kek čilačepen. O Noah djivas o Debleha." 
Genesis6:10 Les his triin čave: o Sem, o Ham oun o Yafet." 
Genesis6:11 Oun i phoub his bouder gar lačo glan o Debleskre yaka. I menshe kran, kay his i phoub pherdo čilačepen oun midjak koova. Har o Devel ap i phoub dikas, dikas lo, te djan i tsele menshe ap i čilačo drom." 
Genesis6:12  
Genesis6:13 Doleske penas o Devel ap o Noah: “Kolla, kay djivenn ap i phoub, kran, te vas i phoub pherdo čilačepen oun midjak koova. Kamau gar, te djivenn le doureder. Ava, me krau, te merenn i tsele menshe oun halauter, hoy ap i phoub hi." 
Genesis6:14 Kre touke i panyeskro kheer dran zorelo kasht. Kre boud isema dren. Oun mak vin oun dren teera pre! 
Genesis6:15 Kre ko panyeskro kheer yaake: 150 (sheel-te-panč-desha) metarya lengsto, 25 (biish-te-panč) metarya bourhlo oun 15 (deesh-te-panč) metarya pral." 
Genesis6:16 Kre i dacha! Oun tel i dacha mouk i paash metari pre troul o tselo kheer! Oun kre i voudar ap i rig! Kre ko panyeskro kheer yaake, te venn triin isema yek pral o vavar. Yaake hi les boud isema tella, mashkral oun pral." 
Genesis6:17 Dik! Me moukau i baro pani te vell pral i tseli phoub, te tassenn lauter, kay djipen an lende hi. Halauter merella, hoy ap i phoub djivella." 
Genesis6:18 Tout dau miro lab, kay ačeh djido. Koy dau miro vast pre. Oun tou djas tire čaventsa oun tiri romyah oun tire čavengre romyentsa an o panyeskro kheer dren." 
Genesis6:19 I tsele firhendar, an douy kotar an o panyeskro kheer dren: i morsh oun i djouvel, te ačenn le ninna djido." 
Genesis6:20 Douy kotar hake čirklendar oun hake firhendar, ninna hake tikne firhendar ap i phoub, hounte djan pash toute an o panyeskro kheer, te ačenn le djido." 
Genesis6:21 Le hako firheske peskro rhapen peha oun ninna doha touke oun tire menshenge!” 
Genesis6:22 Oun o Noah kras lauter yaake, har o Devel leske penas." 
Genesis7:1 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Noah: “Dja an ko panyeskro kheer: tou oun tiri tseli familya. I tsele menshendar ap i phoub hal tou kokres lačo oun čačo glan mande. 
Genesis7:2 Le firhen touha an o panyeskro kheer: Hake firhendar, kay hi gar pale-čiddo, le efta morshen pengre djouvyentsa! Oun hake pale-čidde firhendar le yek morshes oun peskri djouvel." 
Genesis7:3 I čirklendar le ninna efta morshen oun efta djouvyen! Kre kova, te lenn le čave oun merenn gar vin ap i phoub." 
Genesis7:4 An efta divessa moukau me brishin tele te vell ap i phoub: star-desha divessa oun star-desha rati, yaake te merell ap i phoub o tselo djipen, hoy krom.”" 
Genesis7:5 Oun o Noah kras halauter yaake, har o baro Devel leske penas." 
Genesis7:6 Oun o Noah his 600 (shob-sheel) bersha phouro, har vas o baro pani pral i phoub." 
Genesis7:7 Oun o Noah djas an o panyeskro kheer. Khetne leha djan leskre čave, leskri romni oun leskre čavengre romya, te tassenn le gar." 
Genesis7:8 Ninna i firhe van pash o Noah an o panyeskro kheer, hakenestar douy: o morsh oun peskri djouvel: i firhendar, kay gar pale-čiddo hi oun kolendar, kay pale-čiddo hi, ninna i čirklendar oun i tsele tikne firhendar ap i phoub, yaake har o Devel leske penas." 
Genesis7:9  
Genesis7:10 Oun pal efta divessa vas o baro pani pral i phoub. 
Genesis7:11 Har o Noah 600 (shob-sheel) bersha phouro his, an o douyto čon an ko bersh, ap o deesh-te-eftato dives vas o pani, hoy an i phoub hi, i zoryah vin." 
Genesis7:12 Oun dran o bolepen vas baro zorelo brishin ap i phoub: star-desha divessa oun star-desha rati. 
Genesis7:13 Ap ko dives djas o Noah peskri romyah oun peskre čaventsa, o Sem, o Ham oun o Yafet, oun kolengre romya an o panyeskro kheer." 
Genesis7:14 Khetne lentsa djan ninna hake firhendar – kolendar, kay divyo hi oun kolendar, kay gar divyo hi, ninna hake tikne firhendar, hoy djan pral i phoub, oun hake čirklendar." 
Genesis7:15 Yon djan pash o Noah an o panyeskro kheer douy hakenestar, hoy djivella: yek morsh oun peskri djouvel," 
Genesis7:16 yaake har o Devel leske penas, te krell lo kova. Oun o baro Devel kras o voudar pandlo pal lende." 
Genesis7:17 Oun o baro pani vas pral i phoub 40 (star-desha) divessa, oun djas pre oun hadas o panyeskro kheer pre oun hidjras les." 
Genesis7:18 Oun o pani vas boud oun boudeder pral i phoub. Oun o panyeskro kheer rikras pes pral o pani. 
Genesis7:19 Oun o pani vas yaake baro ap i phoub, kay his i tsele bare berge tel o pani." 
Genesis7:20 O pani ačas tardo efta metarya pral i berge, yaake kay i tsele berge tel o pani his." 
Genesis7:21 Oun koy meras halauter ap i phoub, hoy djido his: i čirkle oun i firhe, – kolla, kay divyo hi oun kolla, kay gar divyo hi, ninna i tikne firhe, hoy djan pral i phoub, oun i tsele menshe." 
Genesis7:22 Halauter meras, hoy ap i phoub djivas." 
Genesis7:23 Yaake vas o tselo djipen ap i phoub tassedo: i menshe, i firhe, i bare oun i tikne, ninna i čirkle. Halauter vas tassedo. O Noah kokres ačas djido oun kolla, kay djan khetne leha an o panyeskro kheer." 
Genesis7:24 O pani his tardo ap i phoub 150 (sheel-te-paash-sheel) divessa. 
Genesis8:1 O Devel bistras o Noah gar, vitar gar i firhen, kay pash leste an o panyeskro kheer his: kol divye firhe oun kolla, kay gar divye hi. Oun o Devel moukas i baro dourho pral i phoub te phourdell. Koy djas o pani tele." 
Genesis8:2 Kek zorelo pani vas bouder dran i phoub. Oun o bolepen rikras o baro brishin pale. 
Genesis8:3 Pal 150 (sheel-te-paash-sheel) divessa djas o pani pale. 
Genesis8:4 Ap o deesh-te-eftato dives, an o eftato čon ačas o panyeskro kheer ap kol berge Ararat tardo." 
Genesis8:5 Oun o pani djas doureder pale bis an o deshto čon. Ap o ersto dives an o deshto čon van i berge dran o pani vin – lengre pralstoune kotya. 
Genesis8:6 Pal 40 (star-deesh) divessa kras o Noah koy vorhni an leskro panyeskro kheer pre," 
Genesis8:7 oun moukas i korako vin. Kova djas peske, oun vas pale pale, yaake rah bis te his i phoub bouder gar sapeno." 
Genesis8:8 Oun yob moukas i tauba vin, te dikell lo, te his o pani tele naashedo." 
Genesis8:9 I tauba hatsas kek platsa, kay nashte beshas pes li tele. His yaake boud pani ap i phoub. Doleske vas yoy an o panyeskro kheer pale. Oun o Noah las koy tauba o vasteha an o panyeskro kheer dren." 
Genesis8:10 Pal efta divessa moukas yob pale i tauba dran o panyeskro kheer vin. 
Genesis8:11 Oun i tauba vas pale ap i rati. Oun an lakro mouy his i nevi patri i djeteskro roukestar. Kanna djinas o Noah, te his bouder gar boud pani ap i phoub." 
Genesis8:12 Pal vavar efta divessa bičras yob i tauba pale vin. Oun i tauba vas bouder gar pale. 
Genesis8:13 Oun ap o ersto dives an o ersto čon ko bershestar, kay o Noah 601 (shob-sheel-te-yek) bersh phouro vas, his bouder kek pani ap i phoub tardo. Oun o Noah las i kotar dran i dacha tele oun dikas, kay i phoub bouder gar sapeno his." 
Genesis8:14 Ap o biish-te-eftato dives an o douyto čon his i tseli phoub trouk. 
Genesis8:15 Oun o Devel penas ap o Noah: 
Genesis8:16 “Kanna dja vin dran o panyeskro kheer, tou oun tiri romni oun tire čave oun lengre romya." 
Genesis8:17 Kol tsele firhe, kay pash toute hi, mouk len vin te djal: i čirkle, i bare firhe, oun i tikne firhe, kay djan pral i phoub. Kamau, te lenn le čave, yaake te vell lendar i phoub pherdo.”" 
Genesis8:18 Koy djas o Noah peskre čaventsa oun peskri romyah oun peskre čavengre romyentsa dran o panyeskro kheer vin. 
Genesis8:19 I tsele firhe, i bare oun i tikne, oun i tsele čirkle, halauter, hoy djivell ap i phoub, djas ninna dran o panyeskro kheer. Hako kopo djan kolla khetne, kay his i emlige firhendar." 
Genesis8:20 Oun o Noah kras i rhačepaskri platsa oun las hake firhendar, kay gar pale-čiddo hi oun hake čirklendar, kay gar pale-čiddo hi. Oun das len moulo oun rhačras len ap koy platsa, te parkrell lo pes pash o baro Debleste." 
Genesis8:21 Oun o baro Devel soungas ko lačo soungepen oun penas ap peste: “Me dau man sovel, te anau bouder gar havi bari bibarht pral i phoub doleske, hoy i menshe krenna. Djinau, o mensheskro dji hi čilačo foun tiknes pre. Me kamau bouder gar o tselo djipen ap i phoub te marell, yaake har krom." 
Genesis8:22 Yaake rah, har i phoub koy hi, vitsrenn le djob ap i phoub oun anenn le pale nevo djob dren. Yaake rah, har i phoub koy hi, ačenna shilapen oun tatepen, niyal oun vend, dives oun rati.”" 
Genesis9:1 Oun o Devel rakras lače laba pral o Noah oun pral leskre čavende vin oun penas: “Anenn boud čaven ap i phoub, te vell i phoub t'mendar pherdo!" 
Genesis9:2 I tsele firhe ap i phoub oun i tsele čirkle an o bolepen hounte darenn oun trashenn t'mendar. Halauter, hoy djivella ap i phoub, oun i tsele mače an o baro pani, dau an t'mare vasta." 
Genesis9:3 Halauter, hoy djivella, dau me t'mende, te rhan kova nashte. Me dau les t'men te rhal, yaake har dom t'men o zenlepen." 
Genesis9:4 Kokres o mass, kay hi gomme rat dren, kova hounte rhan gar; an o rat hi o djipen." 
Genesis9:5 Kek hounte lell t'maro djipen. Hakeno koon lell t'maro djipen, kolestar lau me ninna leskro djipen: hako firhestar oun hako menshestar." 
Genesis9:6 O Devel kras o menshes, yaake har yob hi. Doleske hounte vell kova moulo dino i menshestar, kay i menshes moulo das." 
Genesis9:7 Anenn čaven ap i phoub, – boud čaven, te vell i phoub t'mendar pherdo!”" 
Genesis9:8 Oun o Devel penas ap o Noah oun ap leskre čavende: 
Genesis9:9 “Shounenn, me dau t'men miro lab oun dau miro vast koy pre. Ko lab hi t'menge oun t'mare čavenge, kay pal t'mende venna," 
Genesis9:10 oun lauterenge pash t'mende, hoy djido hi, – lauterenge, kay djan vin dran o panyeskro kheer: hake čirkle oun hake firhe ap i phoub, kolla, kay divye hi oun kolla, kay gar divye hi." 
Genesis9:11 Kova hi ko lab, kay dau miro vast koy pre: Me anau bouder gar savo baro pani pral i phoub, te tassell hako djipen ap i phoub. Savo baro pani vell bouder gar pral i phoub.”" 
Genesis9:12 Oun o Devel penas: “Me dau t'men i sikepen, te djinenn t'mer, ko lab, hoy dom me t'mende oun hake firhende pash t'mende, ninna lauterende, kay venna pal t'mende, ko lab ačella hako tsireske:" 
Genesis9:13 Me čivom miro brishineskro bogo an o bolepen. Te dikenn les, djinenn t'mer, kay vell bouder gar savo baro pani pral i phoub." 
Genesis9:14 Hako kopo, kay dau brishin pral i phoub oun ko brishineskro bogo tardo hi an o bolepen," 
Genesis9:15 vell ko lab an miro shero, hoy me dom t'men oun lauteren, kay djivenna: Me moukau kek pani bouder te vell, hoy yaake baro vell, te tassell o tselo djipen." 
Genesis9:16 Te hi miro brishineskro bogo an o bolepen tardo, dikau les, oun ko lab, hoy dom, vell an miro shero. Ko lab ačell tardo hako tsiro mange oun hakeneske, kay djivella ap i phoub.”" 
Genesis9:17 Oun o Devel penas ap o Noah: “Ko brishineskro bogo hi ko sikepen, te rikrau miro lab, hoy me dom hakeneske, hoy ap i phoub djivella.”" 
Genesis9:18 Oun o Noaheskre čave, kay djan dran o panyeskro kheer, his o Sem, o Ham oun o Yafet. (O Ham hi kova, kolestar o Kanaan vell.)" 
Genesis9:19 Kolla triin hi i čave o Noahestar. Lendar venna i tsele menshe ap i phoub. 
Genesis9:20 Oun o Noah his i harho oun čivas drakengre rouka an i phoub. 
Genesis9:21 Dran i drake kras yob mool, vas lo mato, rivas peskre koola vin oun his nanges an peskri plarhteno kheer čiddo." 
Genesis9:22 Oun o Ham, koleskro čavo o Kanaan hi, dikas peskro dades nanges, oun djas vin oun penas kova peskre douy phralenge." 
Genesis9:23 Koy lan o Sem oun o Yafet i ripen oun čivan les pral pengre phika oun djan pengro doumo glan-vi pash pengro dadeste, yaake kay dikan les yon nashte gar. Oun yon čakran les." 
Genesis9:24 Har o Noah djangelo vas dran peskro matepen oun shounas, hoy leskro terneder čavo kras, penas yob:" 
Genesis9:25 “Bibarht ap o Kanaan! Yob vella o telstouno boudepaskro peskre phralenge!” 
Genesis9:26 Palle penas yob: “Me sharau o baro Debles, ko Debles kones o Sem an-mangella. Oun o Kanaan vell peskro phraleskro boudepaskro!" 
Genesis9:27 Mou krell o Devel o Yafeteskro them yaake bourhlo, te djivenn leskre menshe mashkral i menshende, kay venna pal o Sem. Oun o Kanaan vell leskro boudepaskro!”" 
Genesis9:28 O Noah djivas 350 (triin-sheel-te-paash-sheel) bersha pal o baro pani, hoy vas pral i phoub." 
Genesis9:29 Leskro tselo djipen his 950 (enya-sheel-te-paash-sheel) bersha. Oun yob meras. 
Genesis10:1 Kova hi ko liil, kay i laba činlo hi kol menshendar, kay van o Noaheskre čavendar: o Sem, o Ham oun o Yafet. Kolenge van čave boldo pal o baro pani." 
Genesis10:2 O Yafet: Leskre čave hi o Gomer, o Magog, o Madai, o Yavan, o Toubal, o Meshek oun o Tiras." 
Genesis10:3 I menshe, kay van pal o Gomer, hi: o Ashkenas, o Rifat oun o Togarma." 
Genesis10:4 I menshe, kay van pal o Yavan, hi o Elisha, o Tarsis, i Kitarya oun Rodanarya." 
Genesis10:5 Kolendar venna i menshe, kay djivenna an i themma pash o baro pani. Kolla hi i čave o Yafetestar pengre menshentsa. Lendar van bare familye. Hakeni rakras peskro rakepen oun djivas an peskro them." 
Genesis10:6 O Ham: Leskre čave hi: o Koush, o Misrayim, o Pout oun o Kanaan." 
Genesis10:7 I menshe, kay van pal o Koush, hi: o Seba, o Havila, o Sabta, o Ragma, oun o Sabteka. I menshe, kay van pal o Ragma hi: o Seba oun o Dedan." 
Genesis10:8 O Koush, les his i čavo, leskro lab his Nimrod. Kova his o ersto, kay las bari zoor pral vavar menshende ap i phoub." 
Genesis10:9 Oun yob his i baro yegari glan o baro Debleste. Doleske vell penlo: Kova hi i baro yegari glan o baro Debleste har o Nimrod. 
Genesis10:10 An ko ersto tsiro vas yob o ray pral i forya Babel, Erek, Akkad oun Kalne an o them Shinar." 
Genesis10:11 Kotar djas yob an o them Assour oun kras i forya Ninive, Rehobot-Ir, Kela" 
Genesis10:12 oun ninna Resen, kay mashkral Ninive oun ko baro foro Kela hi." 
Genesis10:13 O Misrayim vas o dad kol menshendar Loud, Anam, Lehab, Naftou," 
Genesis10:14 Patros, Kaslou oun Kaftor, kolendar venna i Filistarya." 
Genesis10:15 O Kanaan: Leskre čave hi o Sidon oun o Het. O Sidon hi o phoureder čavo. 
Genesis10:16 O Kanaan vas ninna o dad kol menshendar Yebous, Amor, Girgash," 
Genesis10:17 Hiv, Ark, Sin," 
Genesis10:18 Arvad, Zemar oun Hamat. Pal i tsiro ačan kolla bare familye, kay van pal o Kanaan, bouder gar khetne oun djan doureder." 
Genesis10:19 Lengro tselo them djas pral pash o foro Sidon oun tele pash o foro Gaza. Oun ap koy rig, kay o kham pre-djala, djas lo pash o foro Gerar oun doureder pash kol forya Sodom, Gomorra, Adma, oun Seboyim pash o foro Lesha." 
Genesis10:20 Kolla hi i čave o Hamestar pengre menshentsa. Lendar van bare familye. Hakeni rakras peskro rakepen oun djivas an peskro them. 
Genesis10:21 O Yafeteskro phoureder phraal, o Sem, las ninna čave. Yob his o dad i tsele menshendar Eber." 
Genesis10:22 Kolla hi i čave o Semestar: o Elam, o Assour, o Arpaksad, o Loud, oun o Aram." 
Genesis10:23 O Aram: Leskre čave hi: o Ous, o Houl, o Geter, oun o Mash." 
Genesis10:24 O Arpaksad las i čavo, o Shela. Koleskro čavo hi o Eber." 
Genesis10:25 O Eber las douy čave: Yek kharas Peleg. An leskro tsiro ačan i menshe bouder gar khetne. Haki bari familya las peskro them. O Peleges his i phraal. Kova kharas Yoktan. 
Genesis10:26 Koleskre čave his: o Almodad, o Shelef, o Hazarmavet, o Yera," 
Genesis10:27 o Hadoram, o Ouzal, o Dikla," 
Genesis10:28 o Obal, o Abimael, o Saba," 
Genesis10:29 o Ofir, o Havila, oun o Yobab. Kolla halauter van pal o Yoktan." 
Genesis10:30 Oun o them, kay yon khere his, his mashkral Mesha oun Sefar, kay hi čiddo an kol berge kote, kay o kham pre djala." 
Genesis10:31 Kolla hi i čave o Semestar pengre menshentsa. Lendar van bare familye. Hakeni rakras peskro rakepen oun djivas an peskro them. 
Genesis10:32 Kolla hi halauter i menshe, kay venna o Noaheskre čavendar. Lengre laba hi yaake pre činlo, te vell diklo, koon lengro dad hi, oun have menshe lendar venna. Kol menshendar venna i tsele menshe ap i phoub pal o baro pani." 
Genesis11:1 An ko tsiro his i tsele menshen yek rakepen. 
Genesis11:2 Oun yon moukan pengro them oun djan kote, kay o kham pre djala. An o them Shinar hatsan le i bourhlo them oun ačan koy." 
Genesis11:3 Oun yon penan yek ap o vavareste: “Avenn, las čik, te kras barra dran lende, oun rhačras len, te venn le zoreles.” Oun yon lan čik oun kran barra dran. Oun lan teera te čivenn le lat mank i barra, te ačenn kol barra khetne." 
Genesis11:4 Oun yon penan: “Avenn, mer krah menge i foro oun i baro kheer, hoy djal an o bolepen. Yaake sikrah hakeneske, har baro mer ham. Oun mer ačah khetne an ko them.”" 
Genesis11:5 Koy vas o baro Devel tele, te dikell lo ko foro oun ko baro kheer, hoy kol menshe krenn." 
Genesis11:6 Oun o baro Devel penas: “Dik, yon hi halauter khetne an yek them oun rakrenn yek rakepen. Kanna krenn le kava foro. Hoy krenn le pal kova? Dell či, hoy yon gar hayvenna. Yon krenn lauter, hoy lenge an o shero vella." 
Genesis11:7 Avenn, djas tele pash lende oun das hakenes i vavar rakepen, yaake, kay yek i vavares bouder gar hayvella.”" 
Genesis11:8 O baro Devel kras yaake, te ačan le koy bouder gar khetne oun hounte djan dran yek them an i vavar pral i tseli phoub. Oun yon moukan tele, te krenn le ko foro." 
Genesis11:9 Doleske kharell ko foro Babel. Kote kras o baro Devel, kay yek i vavareskro rakepen bouder gar hayvella. Yaake kras yob, te ačan le koy bouder gar khetne oun hounte djan dran yek them an i vavar pral i tseli phoub." 
Genesis11:10 Kova hi ko liil, kay činlo hi i laba kol menshendar, kay van pal o Sem. Har o Sem 100 (sheel) bersha phouro his, vas lestar o Arpaksad boldo. Kova his douy bersha pal o baro pani." 
Genesis11:11 Koy pal, har o Arpaksad boldo vas, djivas o Sem panč-sheel (500) bersha. Oun lestar van vavar čave oun ča bolde." 
Genesis11:12 Har o Arpaksad 35 (triyanda-te-panč) bersha phouro his, vas lestar o Shela boldo." 
Genesis11:13 Koy pal, har o Shela boldo vas, djivas o Arpaksad 403 (star-sheel-te-triin) bersha. Oun lestar van čave oun ča bolde." 
Genesis11:14 Har o Shela 30 (triyanda) bersha phouro his, vas lestar o Eber boldo." 
Genesis11:15 Koy pal, har o Eber boldo vas, djivas o Shela 403 (star-sheel-te-triin) bersha. Oun lestar van čave oun ča bolde." 
Genesis11:16 Har o Eber 34 (triyanda-te-star) bersha phouro his, vas lestar o Peleg boldo." 
Genesis11:17 Koy pal, har o Peleg boldo vas, djivas o Eber 430 (star-sheel-te-triyanda) bersha. Oun lestar van čave oun ča bolde." 
Genesis11:18 Har o Peleg 30 (triyanda) bersha phouro his, vas lestar o Regou boldo." 
Genesis11:19 Koy pal, har o Regou boldo vas, djivas o Peleg 209 (douy-sheel-te-enya) bersha. Oun lestar van čave oun ča bolde." 
Genesis11:20 Har o Regou 32 (triyanda-te-douy) bersha phouro his, vas lestar o Seroug boldo." 
Genesis11:21 Koy pal, har o Seroug boldo vas, djivas o Regou 207 (douy-sheel-te-efta) bersha. Oun lestar van čave oun ča bolde." 
Genesis11:22 Har o Seroug 30 (triyanda) bersha phouro his, vas lestar o Nahor boldo." 
Genesis11:23 Koy pal, har o Nahor boldo vas, djivas o Seroug 200 (douy-sheel) bersha. Oun lestar van čave oun ča bolde." 
Genesis11:24 Har o Nahor 29 (biish-te-enya) bersha phouro his, vas lestar o Tera boldo." 
Genesis11:25 Koy pal, har o Tera boldo vas, djivas o Nahor 119 (sheel-te-deesh-te-enya) bersha. Oun lestar van čave oun ča bolde." 
Genesis11:26 Har o Tera 70 (efta-deesh) bersha phouro his, vas yob dad. Leskre čave his o Abram, o Nahor, oun o Haran." 
Genesis11:27 Kova hi ko liil, kay činlo hi i laba kol menshendar, kay van pal o Tera. O Tera: Leskre čave his o Abram, o Nahor oun o Haran. O Haran las i čavo, o Lot." 
Genesis11:28 O Haran meras glan peskro dadeste an peskro dadeskro them Kaldea, an o foro Our." 
Genesis11:29 O Abram romedineras i Saray. Oun o Nahor romedineras i Milka, kolakro dad o Haran his. Koles his kol douy ča, i Milka oun i Yiska." 
Genesis11:30 I Saray nashte las kek čave. 
Genesis11:31 Oun o Tera las peskro čaves Abram peha oun o Lot, ko čavo peskro čavestar Haran, oun i Saray, koy romni peskro čavestar Abram. Oun khetne moukan le ko foro Our, hoy an o them Kaldea čiddo hi, te djan le an o them Kanaan. Oun yon van pash o foro Haran oun ačan kote." 
Genesis11:32 O Tera vas 205 (douy-sheel-te-panč) bersh phouro oun meras an o foro Haran. 
Genesis12:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Abrameste: “Dja vin dran tiro them! Mouk tire menshen oun tiro dadeskro kheer! Oun dja an ko them, hoy me sikrau toute!" 
Genesis12:2 Me kamau te vell toutar i bari natsyona. Me čivau miri zoor oun miri barht ap toute, oun kamau tiro lab bares te krell. Oun koy barht, hoy me tout dau, djal doureder ap i vavar menshenge." 
Genesis12:3 Kolla kay penenna, te vell tout boud barht, ap kolende čivau miri barht. Oun kolla, kay penenna, te vell tout bibarht, ap kolende anau ninna bibarht. Koy barht, hoy me tout dau, djal doureder ap i tsele menshende, kay ap i phoub hi.”" 
Genesis12:4 Oun o Abram djas peske, yaake har o baro Devel leske penas. Oun o Lot djas leha. Har djas o Abram dran o foro Haran, his yob 75 (efta-deesh-te-panč) bersh phouro." 
Genesis12:5 Yob las peskri romyat Saray peha oun peskro phraleskro čaves Lot. Yob las ninna pengro tselo koova peha, pengre firhen oun pengre boudepangren, kay lengre an o foro Haran van. Oun yon tserdan vin oun van an ko them Kanaan." 
Genesis12:6 Oun yob djas doureder an o them oun vas an o foro Sichem pash ko baro rouk More. An ko tsiro djivan i Kanaanitarya an ko them. 
Genesis12:7 Oun o baro Devel moukas pes o Abramestar te dikell, oun penas ap leste: “Tire čaven oun kolengre čaven oun lauteren, kay pal toute venna, kolen kamau kava them te dell.” Koy kras o Abram i rhačepaskri o baro Debleske, kay venn firhe leske rhačedo – kote, kay o Devel moukas pes lestar te dikell." 
Genesis12:8 Kotar djas o Abram doureder an i berge pash o foro Betel. Mank kol forya Betel oun Ai čivas yob peskro plarhteno kheer pre. Ko foro Betel hi čiddo ap koy rig, kay o kham tele djala. Oun o foro Ai hi čiddo ap koy rig, kay o kham pre djala. Kote kras yob pale i rhačepaskri o baro Debleske, kay venn firhe leske rhačedo, oun kharas o baro Debles an." 
Genesis12:9 Pal kova djas yob doureder oun vas pash ko them Negev. 
Genesis12:10 Koy vas i tsiro an ko them, kay his i menshen oun i firhen či te rhal. Len his bari bok. Dran kova djas o Abram doureder, te djivell lo an o them Egiptia." 
Genesis12:11 Yob his bouder gar dour o themestar Egiptia. Koy penas yob ap peskri romyate: “Saray, me djinau, kay hal i shoukar djouvel." 
Genesis12:12 Te dikenn tout kol Egiptarya, penenn yon: Koya hi leskri romni. Palle denn le man temerl oun tout moukenn le te djivell." 
Genesis12:13 Pen lenge, tou hal miri pheen. Yaake lenn le tout penge, oun doleske hi le lačes ap mande oun moukenn man te djivell.”" 
Genesis12:14 Har yon an o them Egiptia van, dikan i Egiptarya, havi shoukar djouvel yoy hi." 
Genesis12:15 Oun i pralstoune boudepangre o baro rayestar pral o them dikan lat oun sharan lat glan lengro rayeste. Oun yon anan lat an o baro rayeskro kheer. 
Genesis12:16 Oun doleske kras o baro ray o Abrameske lačepen. Oun o Abram las bakre, groumya, bourike, khamele oun boudepangre: morsha oun djouvya." 
Genesis12:17 Har las o baro ray peske o Abrameskri romyat, i Saray, anas o baro Devel i bari bibarht ap leste oun ap leskro tselo kheer." 
Genesis12:18 Koy moukas o baro ray o Abrames te kharell, oun penas ap leste: “Hoy kral tou mantsa? Hoske penal mange gar, kay hi yoy tiri romni?" 
Genesis12:19 Hoske penal tou, kay yoy tiri pheen hi? Yaake, kay lom lat mange, te vell li miri romni. Ake! Le tiri romyat oun dja touke!”" 
Genesis12:20 Oun o baro ray penas ap peskre lourdende, te anenn yon o Abrames vin dran o them: les, leskri romyat oun halauter, hoy pash leste his." 
Genesis13:1 O Abram djas dran o them Egiptia: yob oun leskri romni oun halauter hoy les his, oun leskro phraleskro čavo Lot. Oun yon djan an o them Negev." 
Genesis13:2 O Abram his bravelo: Les his boud firhe, roup oun sonakay." 
Genesis13:3 Oun ko themestar Negev djas yob doureder foun yek platsa ap i vavar. Oun vas pash o foro Betel ap koy platsa mank Betel oun Ai, kay leskro plarhteno kheer o ersto kopo tardo his." 
Genesis13:4 Kote his koy platsa, kay yob i Debleskri rhačepaskri kras. Oun kote kharas yob pale o baro Debles an." 
Genesis13:5 O Lot, kay djal o Abrameha, koles his ninna bakre, groumya oun plarhtene khera." 
Genesis13:6 O Abrameskro bravlepen oun o Loteskro bravlepen his yaake baro, kay nashte djivan yon bouder gar khetne. Lengre firhe hatsan gar doha te rhal." 
Genesis13:7 Yaake čingran pen o Abrameskre boudepangre oun o Loteskre boudepangre, kay dan garda ap lengre firhende. An ko tsiro djivan ninna i Kanaanitarya oun i Perisarya an ko them." 
Genesis13:8 Koy penas o Abram ap o Lot: “Me kamau kek čingepen mank mende, vitar gar mank tire boudepangre oun mire boudepangre. Mer ham phrala." 
Genesis13:9 Rode touke vin, havo them tou kameh. Oun dja touke mandar! Kameh tou serves te djal, djau me čačes. Oun te kameh tou čačes te djal, djau me serves.”" 
Genesis13:10 O Lot dikas ap o tselo them pash o pani Yordan. Kova his halauter sapeno. Bis pash o foro Soar his ko them har o baro Debleskri baar oun har o them Egiptia. Kova his glan ko tsiro, kay kol forya Sodom oun Gomorra rhačedo van." 
Genesis13:11 Oun o Lot rodas peske o tselo them pash o pani Yordan vin. Oun djas kote, kay o kham pre djala. Oun hakeno djas i vavar drom:" 
Genesis13:12 O Abram djivas an o them Kanaan. Oun o Lot djivas an kol forya pash o pani Yordan, oun čivas peskre plarhtene khera pre bis pash o foro Sodom." 
Genesis13:13 Kol menshe an Sodom his čilačo oun djivan an baro čilačepen glan o baro Debleste. 
Genesis13:14 Har o Lot peske djas, penas o baro Devel ap o Abrameste: “Dik tout trouyel oun dik kote, kay tardo hal, ap haki rig: serves, čačes, glan toute oun pal toute!" 
Genesis13:15 Ko tselo them, hoy dikeh, kova dau tout oun tire čaven, kay pal toute venna. Ko them hi t'maro hako tsiro." 
Genesis13:16 Oun me dau tout boud čaven, kay pal toute venna, – yaake boud har i čik ap i phoub. Kek mensho nay djinell, har boud čik ap i phoub hi. Yaake djinell nay kek, kitse menshe toutar venna." 
Genesis13:17 Dja trouyel an o tselo them! Tout dau ko tselo them.” 
Genesis13:18 Oun o Abram djas peskre plarhtene kherentsa trouyel, oun vas pash o foro Hebron oun ačas tel i bare rouka ko morshestar Mamre. Oun kote kras yob i rhačepaskri o baro Debleske, kay venn firhe leske rhačedo." 
Genesis14:1 An ko tsiro his i kourepen. Star bare raya kouran pen panč foryengre rayentsa. Kolla bare raya his: o Amrafel, ko baro ray pral o them Shinar, o Aryok, ko baro ray pral o them Ellasar, o Kedor-Laomer, ko baro ray pral o them Elam, o Tidal, ko baro ray pral o them Goyim." 
Genesis14:2 Kol panč foryengre raya his: o Bera, ko ray pral o foro Sodom, o Birsha, ko ray pral o foro Gomorra, o Shinab, ko ray pral o foro Adma, o Shemeber, ko ray pral o foro Seboyim, o ray pral o foro Bela. Kova hi kanna o foro Soar." 
Genesis14:3 Kol panč raya kran vin, te rikrenn yon khetne oun van an i tala Siddim. Kova hi kanna o Londo Baro Pani." 
Genesis14:4 Deesh-te-douy bersha his o Kedor-Laomer o baro ray pral kol panč foryengre rayende. Oun yon boudran leske. An o deesh-te-triinto bersh hadan pen le pral leste oun shounan bouder gar ap leste. 
Genesis14:5 An o deesh-te-starto bersh vas o baro ray Kedor-Laomer oun kol vavar bare raya, kay leha khetne his. Oun yon kouran pen: kol menshentsa an o foro Asterot-Karnayim – kolla his i Refayarya; kol menshentsa an o foro Ham, – kolla his i Zouzarya; kol menshentsa, kay djivenna an o them, kay o foro Kiryatayim tardo hi, – kolla his i Emarya;" 
Genesis14:6 kol menshentsa ap i berge Seir, – kolla his i Horarya. Oun yon dan len bis El-Paran, hoy pash o moulo tato them čiddo hi." 
Genesis14:7 Koy pal rissran pen kol star bare raya trouyel oun van an ko foro En-Mishpat. Kova hi kanna Kadesh. Oun yon maran i tsele menshen an ko them, kay i Amalekarya djivan, ninna i Amorarya, kay an Hazezon-Tamar djivan." 
Genesis14:8 Kanna djan kol panč raya pral i forya Sodom, Gomorra, Adma, Seboyim oun Bela dran i forya vin. Bela kharella kanna Soar. Oun yon djan pengre lourdentsa an i tala Siddim." 
Genesis14:9 Kote kouran pen le kol star bare rayentsa. Kolla his: o baro ray Kedor-Laomer pral o them Elam, o baro ray Tidal pral o them Goyim, o baro ray Amrafel pral o them Shinar, o baro ray Aryok pral o them Ellasar." 
Genesis14:10 An i tala Siddim his boud rhebya an i phoub, kay pherdo teera his. I raya pral i forya Sodom oun Gomorra pengre lourdentsa hounte nashan penge. Oun boud peran an kol rhebya. Oun kol vavar, kay pral ačan, nashan an i berge." 
Genesis14:11 Oun kol star bare raya lan lauter peha, hoy yon an i forya Sodom oun Gomorra hatsan. Yon lan ninna o tselo rhapen dran kol forya oun djan penge." 
Genesis14:12 O Abrameskro phraleskro čavo Lot, kay djivas an Sodom, koles lan yon ninna peha, oun leskro tselo koova, hoy les his." 
Genesis14:13 Oun yek kolendar, kay peske nashas, vas pash o Abrameste oun penas leske halauter. O Abram his i Hebreari. An ko tsiro djivas o Abram pash i bare rouka ko morshestar Mamre. Kova his i Amorari. Leskre phrala his o Eshkol oun o Aner. Kolla triin kran o Abrameha vin, te rikrenn yon khetne, oun dan pengro dadeskro vast koy pre." 
Genesis14:14 Har o Abram shounas, kay leskro phraleskro čavo pandlo oun krik anlo vas, kharas yob peskre morshen. Les his 318 (triin-sheel-deesh-te-orhta) čače morsha, kay pash leste boldo van. Kolentsa tradas yob i star bare rayen oun lengre lourden bis pash ko foro Dan." 
Genesis14:15 An i rati bičras yob peskre morshen ap douy rigya. Oun yob oun leskre morsha djan ap lende pre oun dan len, oun lan len palla bis pash ko foro Hoba, hoy ap i servi rig o forestar Damaskus čiddo hi." 
Genesis14:16 Oun o Abram anas kova pale, hoy čoredo vas, ninna peskro phraleskro čaves, o Lot. Oun leskro koova anas yob pale, ninna i tsele djouvyen oun i tsele menshen." 
Genesis14:17 Yaake das o Abram o baro rayes Kedor-Laomer oun kol bare rayen, kay pash leste his. Koy pal djas o Abram khere. Ap o drom khere an i tala Shave vas o ray pral o foro Sodom pash leste. Koy tala kharella ninna Rayeskri tala." 
Genesis14:18 Oun o Melkisedek, ko ray pral o foro Salem, anas lenge maro oun mool dran o foro. Yob his i rashay ko Deblestar, kay hi o Devel pral halauter." 
Genesis14:19 Oun yob sharas o Abrames oun penas: “Tou, Abram, ap toute hi čiddo i zoor oun i barht ko Deblestar, kay hi o Devel pral halauter oun kras o bolepen oun i phoub." 
Genesis14:20 Oun sharedo vell o Devel pral halauter, kay das kolen an tire vasta, kay touha kouran pen.” Oun o Abram das les o deshto kotar halauterestar, hoy yob pale anas." 
Genesis14:21 Oun o ray pral Sodom penas ap o Abram: “De man mire menshen pale! Ko vavar, hoy hatsal, rikreh nashte.”" 
Genesis14:22 Koy penas o Abram ap leste: “Me dau man sovel glan o baro Debleste, kay hi o Devel pral halauter, oun kras o bolepen oun i phoub:" 
Genesis14:23 Kek kotar thab, vitar kek dori, hoy i kirrha khetne pandella, lau toutar. Te peness tou gar, tou kral man bravelo." 
Genesis14:24 Me rikrau či, kokres kova, hoy i morsha rhan. Oun kol morsha, kay mantsa djan, o Aner, o Eshkol oun o Mamre, kolla lenn pengro kotar peha.”" 
Genesis15:1 Koy pal moukas o baro Devel o Abrames leskri gole te shounell oun penas ap leste: “Ma traash, Abram! Me rikrau mire vasta pral toute. Oun me hom touke i baro bravlepen.”" 
Genesis15:2 Koy penas o Abram: “Miro ray, baro Devel, hoy kameh man te dell? Man hi kek čave. Me te merau, lell halauter, hoy man hi, o Eliyeser, ko vell dran o foro Damaskus." 
Genesis15:3 Man dal tou kek čaven. Oun miro pralstouno boudepaskro lell pal mande halauter, hoy miro hi.”" 
Genesis15:4 Koy penas o baro Devel ap o Abrameste: “Na-a, kova lell gar, hoy tiro hi. Tou veh dad i čavestar. Oun tiro čavo lell halauter, hoy tiro hi.”" 
Genesis15:5 Oun o Devel anas les vin oun penas: “Dik an o bolepen! Oun dik i bolepangre momlia! Nay peneh tou, har boud kolla hi? Yaake boud menshe venna toutar.”" 
Genesis15:6 Oun o Abram patsas o baro Debles. Oun doleske kras o Devel les čačo glan peskre yaka. 
Genesis15:7 Oun o baro Devel penas ap leste: “Me hom o baro Devel, kay anom tout dran o foro Our, hoy an o them Kaldea hi. Kava them, kay tou kanna hal, dau tout, te vell kova tiro them.”" 
Genesis15:8 Koy penas o Abram: “Miro ray, baro Devel, har djinau me, te vell kava them miro?”" 
Genesis15:9 Koy penas o Devel ap leste: “An mange i terni groumni – triin bersh phouro, i bouzni – triin bersh phouro oun i bakro – triin bersh phouro, i divyi tauba oun i vavar tauba!”" 
Genesis15:10 Oun yob anas leske kol tsele firhen oun činas len mashkral khetne. Oun čivas yek kotar ap kay rig, ko vavar kotar ap koy rig. Kokres i čirkle činas yob gar an kotya." 
Genesis15:11 Koy van divye čirkle oun moukan pen ap kol moule firhende te perell. Oun o Abram tradas len krik. 
Genesis15:12 Har o kham tele djas, sovas o Abram zoreles dren. Oun ap leste vas bari daar. Oun rati vas troul leste." 
Genesis15:13 Oun o Devel penas ap o Abrameste: “Čačepah, tou djiness: Tire menshe, kay toutar venna, venn vi-themarya an i them, kay gar lengro hi. Oun i menshe an ko them djan zoreles ap lende oun krenn boudepangre lendar. Oun yon hounte boudrenn lenge 400 (star-sheel) bersha." 
Genesis15:14 Kolla, kay krenn lendar boudepangre, lenn i phagi mandar. Koy pal djan tire menshe vin baro bravlepah." 
Genesis15:15 Oun touke penau me: Te mereh, soveh barhtelo dren. An i mishto phourepen veh tou paskedo." 
Genesis15:16 Oun pal star menshengro phourepen venna tire menshe kate pale. Koy doosh kolendar, kay kanna kate djivenn – kolla hi i Amorarya – hi kanna gar bares doha, te tradap len vin.”" 
Genesis15:17 Oun har o kham tele djas oun rati vas, dikas o Abram i bob, dran koleste i yagakro dourho pre djas. Oun yag djas mank kol kotya mass." 
Genesis15:18 Yaake das o baro Devel o Abrameste ap ko dives peskro lab, oun penas: “Tire čaven, kay toutar venna, dau me kava them mank o lengsto pani o themestar Egiptia oun o baro lengsto pani Eufrat." 
Genesis15:19 Oun kolla, kay an kava them khere hi, dau me an tiro vast: i Kenarya, i Kenasarya, i Kadmonarya," 
Genesis15:20 i Hetarya, i Perisarya, i Refayarya," 
Genesis15:21 i Amorarya oun i Kanaanitarya, i Girgasharya oun i Yebousarya.”" 
Genesis16:1 O Abrameskri romni, i Saray, anas leske kek čaven ap i phoub. Pash late boudras i boudepaskretsa dran o them Egiptia. Lakro lab his Hagar." 
Genesis16:2 Oun i Saray penas ap o Abrameste: “Tou dikeh, o baro Devel das man kek čave. Le miri boudepaskretsa, oun dja lah khetne! Yaake nay vell man latar i čavo.” Oun o Abram shounas ap peskri romyate." 
Genesis16:3 Oun o Abrameskri romni, i Saray, las peskri boudepaskretsa, i Hagar, kay dran o them Egiptia his, oun das lat peskro romes Abram, te vell li leskri romni. An ko tsiro djivas o Abram deesh bersha an o them Kanaan." 
Genesis16:4 Oun o Abram djas lah khetne. Oun i Hagar vas lestar an vavar koova. Har i Hagar hayvas, kay vell li day, molas lakri rani an lakre yaka či bouder." 
Genesis16:5 Koy penas i Saray ap o Abram: “Kay bibarht, hoy man hi, hi tiri doosh. Me dom tout miri boudepaskretsa, te vell li tiri romni. Kanna, kay yoy hayvella, kay vell li day, hom me bouder či moldo an lakre yaka. O baro Devel mou vell miro čačepaskro ray.”" 
Genesis16:6 Koy penas o Abram ap i Saray: “Tiri boudepaskretsa hi an tiro vast. Kre tou lah, hoy an tire yaka mishto hi!” Oun i Saray his čilačo ap late. Oun i Hagar nashas peske latar." 
Genesis16:7 Oun o baro Debleskro bolepaskro hatsas lat pash i pani, hoy vella dran i phoub. Ko pani his an o moulo tato them pash o drom, hoy djala an Shour." 
Genesis16:8 Oun o bolepaskro poučas latar: “Hagar, tou i Sarayakri boudepaskretsa, kay veh tou oun kay djah tou?” Penas yoy: “Me nashom mange miri ranyatar Saray.”" 
Genesis16:9 Penas o bolepaskro ap late: “Dja pale pash tiri rani! Oun shoun ap late!” 
Genesis16:10 Palle penas o baro Debleskro bolepaskro ap late: “Me kamau tire čaven, kay pal toute venna, yaake boud te krell, kay nay djinell kek mensho, har boud yon hi." 
Genesis16:11 Tou hal an vavar koova. Tou leh i morsh čavo. Koles dess tou o lab Ismael. O baro Devel shounas, har dal gole i bibarhtyatar." 
Genesis16:12 Tiro čavo vella i mensho har i divyi bourika. Yob kourell pes hakeneha. Oun hakeno kourell pes leha. Yob lell peske i kotar them gar dour peskre phralendar, te rhoyrell lo len.”" 
Genesis16:13 Koy poučas i Hagar pestar: “Dikom me čačepah o Debles, kay man dikell?” Oun yoy das o baro Debles, kay lah rakras, ko lab Tou hal i Devel, kay man dikell." 
Genesis16:14 Doleske kharell ko pani, kay yoy his Beer-Lahay-Roy. Kova hi čiddo mank kol forya Kadesh oun Bered." 
Genesis16:15 Oun i Hagar anas o Abrameske i čaves ap i phoub. Oun o Abram das peskro čaves o lab Ismael. 
Genesis16:16 Har o Ismael boldo vas, his o Abram 86 (orhta-deesh-te-shob) bersha phouro." 
Genesis17:1 O Abram his 99 (enya-deesh-te-enya) bersh phouro. Koy moukas pes o baro Devel glan leste te dikell, oun penas ap leste: “Me hom o zorelo Devel. Dja ap miro drom, te hatsap kek čilačepen ap toute!" 
Genesis17:2 Me kamau touha vin te krell, te vap tiro Devel, oun tou oun tire menshe venn mire menshe. Oun me dau tout boud boud čave, kay pal toute venna.”" 
Genesis17:3 Koy moukas pes o Abram ap i phoub te perell. Oun o Devel rakras leha oun penas: 
Genesis17:4 “Shoun, kova hi, hoy me touke krau: Tou veh o dad boud menshendar. Yon venn yaake boud, kay lendar boud natsyone venna." 
Genesis17:5 Doleske kharess tou bouder gar Abram. Kanna vell tiro lab Abraham. Me krau te vess o dad boud natsyonendar. 
Genesis17:6 Me dau tout yaake boud čaven, kay pal toute venna, te venn lendar natsyone. Ninna bare raya venna toutar." 
Genesis17:7 Kova, hoy me touha vin krau, ačell hako tsiro mange oun touke, tire čavenge, kolengre čavenge oun lauterenge, kay pal toute venna. Me hom tiro Devel oun ko Devel tire čavendar, kay pal toute venna." 
Genesis17:8 Oun me dau tout oun tire čaven kava them, kay tou kanna i vi-themari hal. Kava tselo them Kanaan vell lengro hako tsiro. Oun me hom lengro Devel.”" 
Genesis17:9 Oun o Devel penas pale ap o Abrahameste: “Tou oun tire čave oun kolengre čave oun lauter, kay pal toute venna, t'mer hounte krenn t'maro kotar kolestar, hoy mer vin kram." 
Genesis17:10 Kava hounte krenn t'mer, tou oun tire čave, kay pal toute venna: Činenn hake morshen pash t'mende ap lengro mass." 
Genesis17:11 Kova hi o sikepen, kay han mire menshe." 
Genesis17:12 Hako morsh čavo pash t'mende hounte vell činlo, te hi yob orhta divessa phouro. Krenn kova ninna i tsele morsh čaventsa, kay pal t'mende venna! Činenn ninna i morsh čaven t'mare boudepangrendar: kolla, kay pash t'mende boldo van, oun kolla, kay ginan vavarendar, kay gar t'mare menshendar hi." 
Genesis17:13 Činlo hounte vell hako boudepaskro, kay pash t'mende boldo vas oun t'mendar ginlo vas. Ap t'maro mass dikenn t'mer, kay han mire menshe. Kava koova ačell yaake hako tsiro." 
Genesis17:14 Hako morsh, kay gar činlo hi ap peskro mass, kova hounte ačell bouder gar djido mashkral peskre menshende. Yob rikras pes gar ap kova, hoy mer vin kram.”" 
Genesis17:15 Oun o Devel penas pale ap o Abrahameste: “Tou peness bouder gar Saray ap tiri romyate. Lakro lab vell kanna Sara. 
Genesis17:16 Oun me čivau miri zoor oun miri barht ap late. Oun ninna latar dau tout i čaves. Ava, me čivau miri zoor ap late. Yoy vell i day boud menshendar. Latar venna yaake boud menshe, kay lendar natsyone venna. Ninna bare raya pral boud menshende venna latar.”" 
Genesis17:17 Koy moukas pes o Abraham ap i phoub te perell, sanas oun penas peske: “Me hom sheel bersh phouro. Oun man te vell i čavo? Oun i Sara hi enya-deesh bersh phouro. Yoy te lell i ternepen?”" 
Genesis17:18 Oun o Abraham penas ap o Debleste: “Ah, mouk kova, hoy tou mange penal, ap o Ismael te vell!”" 
Genesis17:19 “Na-a”, penas o Devel, “tiri romni, i Sara, anell touke i čaves ap i phoub. Koles dess tou o lab Isaak. Koleske oun leskre čavenge ačell kova, hoy me touha vin krom hako tsireske." 
Genesis17:20 Ninna, hoy tou mandar mangal tiro čaveske Ismael, kamau me te krell. Shoun, me čivau miri zoor oun miri barht ap leste. Oun me dau les boud čaven, te venn lestar boud boud menshe. Yob vell o dad deesh-te-douy rayendar oun lestar vell i bari natsyona." 
Genesis17:21 Kokres ko koova, hoy me touha vin krom, te vap t'maro Devel oun te venn t'mer mire menshe, kova djal doureder ap o Isaak. Koles leh tou tiri romyatar Sara ko vavar bersh an kava tsiro.”" 
Genesis17:22 Oun o Devel heras pre, te rakrell lo o Abrahameha oun djas peske." 
Genesis17:23 Oun o Abraham las peskro čaves Ismael oun kol morshen, kay pash leste boldo van oun kolen, kay yob i vavarendar ginas. Oun činas len ap lengro mass. Ap kava dives činas yob i tsele morshen an peskro kheer, yaake har o Devel leske penas." 
Genesis17:24 Har o Abraham ap peskro mass činlo vas, his lo 99 (enya-deesh-te-enya) bersha phouro." 
Genesis17:25 Oun leskro čavo Ismael his 13 (deesh-te-triin) bersh phouro, har yob ap peskro mass činlo vas." 
Genesis17:26 Yaake van o Abraham oun peskro čavo Ismael ap kava dives činlo. 
Genesis17:27 Oun i tsele morsha an leskro kheer, kay pash leste boldo van, ninna kolla, kay i vavarendar ginlo van, van lentsa činlo." 
Genesis18:1 Oun o baro Devel moukas pes te dikell o Abrahamestar pash kol bare rouka Mamre, har o dives tato his oun o Abraham glan peskro plarhteno kheer beshdo his." 
Genesis18:2 Ap yek kopo dikas yob triin morshen. Kolla his i kotar glan leste tardo. Har yob len dikas, stas lo pre, nashas pash lende oun moukas pes glan lende ap i phoub te perell." 
Genesis18:3 Oun penas: “Miro ray! Te hal tou mange lačo, dja mandar gar doureder! Me mangau tout: Ač kay!" 
Genesis18:4 T'menge vell pani anlo, te thovenn t'mare herya. Oun beshenn t'men tel ko rouk!" 
Genesis18:5 Me lau t'menge maro, te venn pale zoreles. Pal kova nashte djan doureder, har t'mer kamenna. Yaake van gar čičeske pash mande.” Oun yon penan: “Kre yaake, har tou penal!”" 
Genesis18:6 Koy nashas o Abraham sik an o plarhteno kheer pash i Sara oun penas: “Le sik triin khore parno yarro oun kre merklia!” 
Genesis18:7 Oun yob nashas pash i groumyende, oun rodas peske i lači terni groumni vin. Oun das lat o boudepaskreste, te krell yob sik i lačo rhapen." 
Genesis18:8 Oun o Abraham las lačo khil, thoud oun ko mass. Oun čivas lauter glan lende tel ko rouk. Oun yob ačas glan lende tardo, har yon rhan." 
Genesis18:9 Koy poučan yon lestar: “Kay hi tiri romni Sara?” “Kote an o plarhteno kheer”, penas yob." 
Genesis18:10 Koy penas yek kol trinendar ap leste: “Čačepah, vavar bersh an kava tsiro vau me pale pash toute. Koy hi tiri romyat, i Sara, i čavo.” Oun i Sara his tardo pal leste, pal o voudar ko plarhteno kherestar, oun shounas lengro rakepen." 
Genesis18:11 O Abraham oun i Sara his hake douy phouro. Oun i Sara djinas, kay nay lell li bouder kek čave." 
Genesis18:12 Koy sanas yoy peske oun penas: “Kanna hom me phouro. Oun miro ray, miro rom, hi ninna phouro! Har nay lau me i ternepen?”" 
Genesis18:13 Koy penas o baro Devel ap o Abrahameste: “Hoske sanas i Sara oun penas: Kanna, kay phouro hom, lau me i ternepen?" 
Genesis18:14 Dell či, hoy o baro Devel gar hayvella. Vavar bersh an kava tsiro, vau me pale pash toute. Koy hi lat i čavo.”" 
Genesis18:15 Koy las i Sara daar oun das bourhoste oun penas: “Me som gar!” “Na-a, tou sal”, penas o Devel." 
Genesis18:16 Oun i morsha stan pre oun djan penge. Oun o Abraham djas i kotar lentsa. Oun yon dikan ap ko them, kay o foro Sodom tardo hi." 
Genesis18:17 Koy penas o baro Devel peske: “Penap me o Abrahameske gar, hoy me kamau te krell? Na-a!" 
Genesis18:18 Me dom les miro lab: Yob vell o dad yaake boud menshendar, te vell lendar i bari oun zoreli natsyona. Oun koy barht, hoy dau leste, djal doureder ap i tsele natsyone, kay ap i phoub hi." 
Genesis18:19 Me rodom les mange vin, te penell lo peskre čavenge oun kolenge, kay pal leste venna, te rikrenn pen le ap miro drom oun krenn, hoy mishto oun čačo hi, te nay moukap me halauter ap o Abrahameste te vell, hoy me leske penom.”" 
Genesis18:20 Oun o baro Devel penas: “Boud djoungelo koova vas pral i forya Sodom oun Gomorra rakedo, kay yon an baro čilačepen djivenna." 
Genesis18:21 Doleske kamau me tele te djal, te dikap: Hi kova ninna čačo, hoy rakedo vas? Oun te hi vavarčandes, kamau kova ninna te djinell.”" 
Genesis18:22 Oun kol douy morsha rissran pen trouyel oun djan an o foro Sodom. O baro Devel ačas glan o Abrahameste tardo. 
Genesis18:23 Oun o Abraham djas pash leste oun penas: “Kameh tou čačepah lauteren temerl dell, kolen, kay kek čilačepen kran – khetne kolentsa, kay čilačo hi?" 
Genesis18:24 Te hi an ko foro 50 (paash-sheel) menshe, kay krenn, hoy mishto oun čačo hi, kameh tou kolen ninna te marell? Te hatseh kote 50 (paash-sheel) menshen, kay kek čilačepen kran, de o fores kek phagi!" 
Genesis18:25 Ko nashte kreh tou gar, te dess kolen temerl, kay kek čilačepen kran – khetne kolentsa, kay čilačo hi. Yaake te djal koleske, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, har koleske, kay čilačo hi. Tou hal o čačepaskro ray pral i tseli phoub. Kameh tou čomone te krell, hoy gar mishto oun čačo hi?”" 
Genesis18:26 Koy penas o baro Devel: “Te hatsau me 50 (paash-sheel) menshen an o foro Sodom, kay krenna, hoy mishto oun čačo hi, dau o tselo fores kek phagi.”" 
Genesis18:27 Penas o Abraham: “Shoun, miro ray, me lom man khetne, te rakrap touha, kay me čik oun či moldo hom." 
Genesis18:28 Hoy kameh te krell, te hi panč kol 50 (paash-sheel) menshendar gar an o čačepen tardo? Kameh dran kol pančende ko tselo foro te marell?” Koy penas yob: “Te hatsau me 45 (star-deesh-te-panč) menshen kote, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, kamau ko foro či te krell.”" 
Genesis18:29 Oun o Abraham rakras pale leha oun penas: “Te hatseh lendar kote 40 (star-deesh), hoy kameh te krell?” Penas o Devel: “Te hi kote 40 (star-deesh) menshe, kay krenna, hoy mishto oun čačo hi, kamau ko foro či te krell.”" 
Genesis18:30 Oun o Abraham penas: “Miro ray, ab gar rhoyedo, te rakrau pale touha. Hoy, te hatseh kote 30 (triyanda)?” Penas yob: “Te hatsau 30 (triyanda), kamau ko foro či te krell.”" 
Genesis18:31 Koy penas o Abraham: “Shoun miro ray, me lom man khetne, te rakrap pale touha. Hoy, te hatseh kote 20 (biish)?” Penas yob: “Te hi kote 20 (biish), kamau ko foro či te krell.”" 
Genesis18:32 Koy penas o Abraham: “Miro ray, me mangau tout, ab gar rhoyedo! Me kamau gomme yek kopo touha te rakrell. Hoy, te hatseh kote deesh?” Penas yob: “Te hi kote deesh, kamau ko foro či te krell.”" 
Genesis18:33 Oun o baro Devel heras pre, te rakrell lo o Abrahameha oun djas peske. Oun o Abraham djas pale khere." 
Genesis19:1 Har i rati vas, van i douy bolepangre an o foro Sodom. Koy his o Lot an o baro voudar ko forestar beshdo. Har o Lot len dikas, stas lo pre, djas pash lende oun moukas pes glan lende ap i phoub te perell." 
Genesis19:2 Oun penas: “Mire raya, avenn an miro kheer! Me mangau t'men, ačenn i rati pash mande! Thovenn t'mare herya! Oun djan taysarlakro t'maro drom!” “Na-a”, penan le, “mer kamah i tseli rati vin te ačell.”" 
Genesis19:3 Yob moukas gar tele, te mangell lo len, bis te djan yon leha an leskro kheer. Oun yob kras lenge i rhapen oun pekas lenge maro, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi. Oun yon rhan." 
Genesis19:4 Har yon kaman pen tele te čivell, van i morsha o forestar Sodom pash o Loteskro kheer khetne. I tsele morsha dran o foro, kol terne oun kol phoure his tardo troul ko kheer," 
Genesis19:5 oun dan pal o Lot gole oun poučan lestar: “Kay hi kol morsha, kay i rati pash toute van? De len mende, te kras dinelo koova lentsa!”" 
Genesis19:6 Koy djas o Lot vin pash lende glan o voudar. Oun kras o voudar pal peste pandlo. 
Genesis19:7 Oun penas: “Kamle mala, ma krenn lentsa savo djoungelo koova!" 
Genesis19:8 Dikenn, man hi douy ča. Kol van kek morshestar an-tapedo. Kolen anau t'menge vin. Krenn lentsa, hoy t'mer kamenna! Me mangau t'men, ma taprenn kal morshen an, kay pash mande an miro kheer van!”" 
Genesis19:9 Yon dan gole: “Dja touke! Tou hal i vi-themari oun kameh tout ray pral mende te krell. Kanna shoun, mer kamah touha djoungleder koova te krell har kolentsa, kay pash toute an o kheer hi.” Oun yon djan ap o Lot pengri tseli zoryah, oun kaman o voudar pre te phagell." 
Genesis19:10 Koy tserdan kol douy morsha o Lotes pash pende an o kheer dren, oun pandan o voudar tele." 
Genesis19:11 Palle kran le, te venn kol tsele morsha korelo, kay glan o kheer tardo hi. Lauter, tikne oun bare, dikan bouder či. Yaake nashte hatsan yon bouder gar o voudar." 
Genesis19:12 Kol douy morsha, kay pash o Lot an o kheer his, poučan lestar: “Hi tout kate an kava foro gomme yek tire menshendar: i čakro rom, morsh čave oun ča, vavar menshe? An len sik vin dran ko foro!" 
Genesis19:13 Boud djoungelo koova vas glan o baro Debleskre kanda, hoy i menshe an kava foro kran. Doleske bičras men o baro Devel, te kras kava foro paash.”" 
Genesis19:14 Koy djas o Lot vin, oun penas ap kol morshende, kay romedinerenn leskre čen: “Stenn pre! Djan sik dran kava foro! O baro Devel kamell lauteren an kava foro temerl dell!” An lengre yaka his yob har yek, kay rakrell narvelo koova." 
Genesis19:15 Sik taysarlakro penan i bolepangre ap o Lot: “Kre sik! Ste pre, le tiri romyat oun tire douy čen, kay pash toute hi! Oun dja dran kava foro, te vess tou gar maredo, te lenn i menshe an kava foro pengri phagi.”" 
Genesis19:16 O Lot las peske boud tsiro. Koy tapran kol morsha les, leskri romyat oun leskre douy čen pash o vast oun anan len vin dran o foro. O baro Devel kamas gar, te merenn le." 
Genesis19:17 Har yon glan o foro his, penas ko yek bolepaskro ap o Lot: “Naash, te ačess tou djido! Ma dik pal toute! Ma ač tardo kate an kava them pash o pani Yordan! Naash ap kol berge, te vess tou gar maredo!”" 
Genesis19:18 “Ah, na-a, miro Ray”, penas o Lot." 
Genesis19:19 “Tou sikral, kay hal mange lačo. Oun tiro kamlepen hi bares mange, te moukeh man te djivell. Kol berge hi dour. Me nashte nashau gar kote. Koy bibarht nay lell man palla, te merap me." 
Genesis19:20 Dik! Koy hi i foro gar dour. Koy nashau me, te ačap djido. Ko hi i tikno foro.”" 
Genesis19:21 “Mishto”, penas yob ap o Loteste. “Me shounau ap toute an ko koova. Me dau i menshen an ko foro gar moulo." 
Genesis19:22 Kanna naash sik kote! Me nashte krau či, bis te tou an ko foro hal.” Dran kova hi o lab ko forestar Soar." 
Genesis19:23 Har o Lot an o foro Soar vas, djas o kham pral i phoub pre." 
Genesis19:24 Koy moukas o baro Devel yag oun yagakri khand pral i forya Sodom oun Gomorra te perell dran o bolepen. 
Genesis19:25 Yaake rhačras yob kol forya oun ko tselo them pash o pani Yordan. I tsele menshe an kol forya oun o tselo zenlepen ap ko them vas rhačedo. 
Genesis19:26 Oun o Loteskri romni dikas pal peste. Dran late vas i loneskro bar. 
Genesis19:27 Taysarlakro stas o Abraham pre oun djas kote, kay yob o vavar dives pash o baro Debleste tardo his." 
Genesis19:28 Oun o Abraham dikas tele ap kol forya Sodom oun Gomorra oun pral ko tselo them pash o pani Yordan, oun dikas i bari yagakro dourho pre te djal har dran i baro bob." 
Genesis19:29 Har o Devel rhačras kol forya an ko them pash o pani Yordan, kay o Lot khere his, bistras yob o Abrahames gar oun anas o Lotes vin dran kol forya." 
Genesis19:30 O Lot trashas, te ačell lo an o foro Soar. Doleske djas yob peskre douy čentsa dran ko foro an i berge. Oun yob djivas peskre douy čentsa an i grotta." 
Genesis19:31 His i dives, koy penas koy phoureder čay ap koy terneder čate: “Maro dad hi phouro. Oun kek morsha hi bouder an kava them, te romedinerenn men, yaake har i tsele menshe krenna." 
Genesis19:32 Djineh hoy? Mer dah maro dadeste mool te piyell, oun čivah men pash leste, te vell men čave lestar, te meras gar vin.”" 
Genesis19:33 Oun an koy rati dan le pengro dadeste mool te piyell. Oun i phoureder čay djas pash lakro dadeste oun čivas pes pash leste. Yob hayvas gar, har yoy pes pash leste čivas, vitar gar, har yoy lestar pre stas." 
Genesis19:34 Oun o vavar dives, koy penas i phoureder čay ap o terneder čate: “Shoun, me čivom man taysar rati pash miro dadeste. Kay rati dah les pale mool te piyell. Koy čiveh tout tou pash leste, te vell men čave maro dadestar, te meras gar vin.”" 
Genesis19:35 Koy dan yon rati pengro dades mool te piyell. Oun i terneder čay djas oun čivas pes pash leste. Ninna kava kopo hayvas yob gar, har yoy pes pash leste čivas, vitar gar, har yoy lestar pre stas." 
Genesis19:36 Koy van kol douy pengro dadestar Lot an vavar koova. 
Genesis19:37 Oun i phoureder čay anas i čaves ap i phoub. Koles das yoy ko lab Moab. Kolestar venna kol menshe, kay hi kava dives i Moabarya." 
Genesis19:38 Oun i terneder čay anas ninna i čaves ap i phoub. Koles das yoy ko lab Ben-Ammi. Kolestar venna kol menshe, kay hi kava dives i Ammonarya." 
Genesis20:1 Oun o Abraham djas doureder oun vas an o them Negev. Yob ačas mank kol douy forya Kadesh oun Shour oun djivas an o foro Gerar. 
Genesis20:2 Kote penas yob peskri romyatar Sara: “Yoy hi miri pheen.” Oun o baro ray pral o foro Gerar – leskro lab his Abimelek – bičras morshen, te anenn le i Sara pash leste." 
Genesis20:3 An i rati vas o Devel an i souni pash o Abimelek oun penas ap leste: “Tou hounte meress. Koy djouvel, kay tou lal, hi romedino.”" 
Genesis20:4 O Abimelek tapras lat gar an oun penas: “Miro ray, kameh tou čačepah kolen te marell, kay kek čilačepen kran?" 
Genesis20:5 O Abraham penas ap mande: Yoy hi miri pheen. Oun yoy penas ninna: Yob hi miro phraal. Me djinom gar, kay yoy romedino hi. Miro dji oun mire vasta hi djoudjo.”" 
Genesis20:6 Koy penas o Devel ap leste an i souni: “Me djinau, kay djinal kova gar. Me rikrom tout pale, te kress kek čilačepen glan mire yaka, oun moukom gar, te tapress lat an." 
Genesis20:7 Oun kanna, de koy romyat pale o romeste! Yob hi i Debleskro rakepaskro. Oun te mangell o Abraham touke, ačeh tou djido. Te deh lat gar pale, hounte meress oun lauter, hoy tiro hi.”" 
Genesis20:8 Taysarlakro stas o Abimelek pre, das peskre tsele morshen khetne gole, oun penas lenge kol tsele laba, te shounenn le kova lauter. Koy lan kol morsha bari traash." 
Genesis20:9 Oun o Abimelek kharas o Abrahames, te vell lo pash leste oun penas: “Hoy kral tou mentsa? Oun hoy krom me tout, kay tou anal bari doosh ap mande oun ap miro tselo them! Tou kral čomone, hoy hounte krals tou gar!" 
Genesis20:10 Pen mange, hoske kral tou kova?”" 
Genesis20:11 O Abraham penas: “Me patsom, kay an kava foro kek menshe hi, kay patsenn o djiyestar ap o Debleste oun krenn, hoy o Devel kamell. Darom, kay yon man moulo denna, te lenn le miri romyat." 
Genesis20:12 Čačepah hi li miri pheen: i čay miro dadestar. Lat hi i vavar day har man. Yaake nay vas yoy miri romni. 
Genesis20:13 An ko tsiro, har o Devel mange penas, te djap dran miro dadeskro kheer an i dour them, penom me ap late: Yaake nashte sikreh mande, kay kameh man: Kote, kay mer vah, hounte peness tou, kay me tiro phraal hom. ”" 
Genesis20:14 Koy las o Abimelek bakre, groumya oun boudepangre: morsha oun djouvya. Oun das len o Abrahameste. Oun das les ninna leskri romyat, i Sara, pale." 
Genesis20:15 Oun o Abimelek penas: “Miro tselo them hi glan toute čiddo. Ač kote, kay tou kameh!”" 
Genesis20:16 Oun ap i Sara penas yob: “Shoun, me dom tiro phrales 1.000 (yek zero) roupene beme. Kol love sikrenn kolende, kay pash toute hi, kay tou hounte ladjess gar. Yaake hal tou čačo glan i menshengre yaka.”" 
Genesis20:17 Har o Abimelek o Abrahameskri romyat las, kras o baro Devel, kay kek djouvel an o Abimelekeskro kheer i ternepen lella. Oun kanna mangas o Abraham o Debles lenge. Oun o Devel kras o Abimelekes sasto oun leskri romyat oun i djouvyen, kay leske boudran, yaake, te lan le pale čave." 
Genesis20:18  
Genesis21:1 Oun o baro Devel bistras i Sara gar. Oun yob rikras peskro lab. 
Genesis21:2 Oun i Sara vas an vavar koova. Oun yoy anas o Abrahameske an leskro phourepen i čaves ap i phoub, an ko tsiro, har o Devel lenge penas." 
Genesis21:3 Oun o Abraham das peskro čaves, kay i Saratar boldo vas, ko lab Isaak." 
Genesis21:4 Ap o orhtato dives činas yob peskro čaves Isaak, yaake har o Devel leske penas." 
Genesis21:5 O Abraham his sheel bersh phouro, har peskro čavo Isaak boldo vas." 
Genesis21:6 Oun i Sara penas: “O Devel das man i sapen. Hakeno, kay shounella, hoy mange djas, sal mantsa." 
Genesis21:7 Koon penals ap o Abrahameste, te dell i Sara i ternepen i beč te piyell? Oun me anom leske an leskro phourepen i čaves ap i phoub.”" 
Genesis21:8 Oun ko čavo vas bareder oun piyas bouder gar ap i beč. Ap ko dives, har yob bouder gar ap i beč piyas, kras o Abraham i baro rhapen." 
Genesis21:9 Oun o Abrahameskro čavo Ismael, koleskri day i Hagar dran o them Egiptia his, kova sanas pral o Isaak. Oun i Sara dikas kova." 
Genesis21:10 Koy penas yoy ap o Abrahameste: “Trade kol boudepaskretsa peskro čaveha krik, te lell lakro čavo pal maro merepen či kolestar, hoy maro hi. Te lell o Isaak kokres halauter.”" 
Genesis21:11 Ko rakepen his gar mishto an o Abrahameskre yaka. O Ismael his ninna leskro čavo. 
Genesis21:12 Koy penas o Devel ap o Abraham: “Ab gar rhoyedo pral kova, hoy i Sara pral tiro čaveste Ismael oun leskri day penas. Shoun ap late oun kre halauter, hoy yoy touke penell. O Isaak vell o dad kol čavendar, kolendar me touke penom, te dap len tout." 
Genesis21:13 Ko čavo, koleskri day i boudepaskretsa hi, kova vell ninna o dad yaake boud menshendar, te venn lendar i natsyona. Kova krau doleske, kay yob tiro čavo hi.”" 
Genesis21:14 Sik taysarlakro stas o Abraham pre, las maro oun i gono pherdo pani oun čivas kova i Hagar ap o phiko, das late ninna o čaves, oun bičras len pestar krik. Koy djas yoy peske oun nashas trouyel an o moulo tato them pash o foro Beersheba." 
Genesis21:15 Har len kek pani bouder his, čivras yoy kol čaves tel i bourra." 
Genesis21:16 Oun beshas pes i tselo kotar lestar. Yoy penas peske: “Me nashte dikau kova gar, har miro čavo merella.” Har yoy kote beshdo his, rovas yoy zoreles." 
Genesis21:17 Oun o Devel shounas ko čaveskri gole. Oun o Debleskro bolepaskro das i Hagar gole dran o bolepen oun penas ap late: “Hoy hi tout, Hagar? Ma traash! O Devel shounas ko čaveskri gole, kote kay yob čiddo hi." 
Genesis21:18 Dja pash tiro čaveste oun hade les pre! Oun le les ap o vast. Me kamau te vell yob o dad boud menshendar, te venn lendar i natsyona.”" 
Genesis21:19 Oun o Devel kras lake i yaka pre. Oun yoy dikas i tikno pani, djas kote, kras ko gono pherdo pani, oun das kol čaves te piyell." 
Genesis21:20 Oun o Devel his kol čaveha. Oun yob vas baro oun djivas an o moulo tato them, oun vas i morsh, kay hayvas mishto karye te dell i bogeha." 
Genesis21:21 Oun yob djivas an ko moulo tato them, hoy kharella Paran. Oun leskri day las leske i romni dran o them Egiptia." 
Genesis21:22 An ko tsiro vas o Abimelek peskro pralstouno lourdeha Pikol pash o Abrahameste oun penas ap leste: “O Devel hi touha an halauter, hoy tou kreh." 
Genesis21:23 Kanna de tout sovel ap o Debleste, te rhorhess man gar, vitar gar mire čaven oun kolengre čaven. Me homs touke lačo. Ab tou ninna lačo ap mande oun ap ko them, kay tou djiveh.”" 
Genesis21:24 Penas o Abraham: “Me dau man sovel koy pre. 
Genesis21:25 T'mendar kamau te djinell, hoske tire boudepangre mari brounna krik lan.”"
