Genesis21:26 Koy penas o Abimelek: “Me djinau gar, koon kova kras. Mange vas či penlo, gar toutar, vitar gar i vavarendar. Kava dives shounau kova o ersto kopo.”" 
Genesis21:27 Koy las o Abraham bakre oun groumya, oun das len o Abimelekes. Oun yon dan pengro vast koy pre, kay kek o vavares rhorhella." 
Genesis21:28 Oun o Abraham rodas efta terne bakre vin, oun čivas len ap i rig." 
Genesis21:29 Koy poučas o Abimelek: “Hoy kreh tou kol efta terne bakrentsa, kay čival ap i rig?”" 
Genesis21:30 O Abraham penas: “Kol efta terne bakre less tou mandar. Yaake sikreh, kay me koy brounna krom, oun koya miro hi.”" 
Genesis21:31 Dran kova kharella koy platsa, kay dan pen kol douy sovel, Beersheba." 
Genesis21:32 Yaake dan le pengro vast koy pre an Beersheba, kay kek o vavares rhorhella. Pal kova djas o Abimelek oun peskro pralstouno lourdo Pikol pale an ko them, kay i Filistarya djivenna." 
Genesis21:33 O Abraham čivas i rouk an i phoub an Beersheba. Oun kote mangas yob o baro Debles an, ko Debles, kay hako tsiro koy hi." 
Genesis21:34 Oun o Abraham ačas i rah tsiro an o them Filistia. 
Genesis22:1 Pal kava koova kamas o Devel te dikell, te shounell o Abraham ap leste o tselo djiyeha, oun penas ap leste: “Abraham!” Oun yob penas: “Kate hom.”" 
Genesis22:2 Penas o Devel: “Le tiro yek čaves, koles, kay tou o djiyestar kameh, o Isaakes. Oun dja leha an ko them Moriya ap koy berga, hoy me touke penau! Oun mare oun rhač les mange kote!”" 
Genesis22:3 Koy stas o Abraham sik taysarlakro pre, kras kasht tikno rhačepaske, čivas ko kasht ap peskri bourika oun las douy boudepangre oun peskro čaves Isaak peha, oun djas kote, kay o Devel leske penas." 
Genesis22:4 Ap o triinto dives dikas o Abraham koy platsa dour glan peste. 
Genesis22:5 Oun penas ap peskre boudepangre: “Ačenn koy bourikah kay! Me oun miro čavo djah ap koy berga, te mangas o Debles an. Pal kova vah mer pale.”" 
Genesis22:6 O Abraham las ko kasht rhačepaske, oun das ko kasht peskro čaveste te hidjrell. Yob kokres las i yag oun i čouri. Yaake djan yon douy khetne doureder." 
Genesis22:7 Koy penas o Isaak ap peskro dadeste: “Tata!” “Hoy kameh tou, miro čavo?” poučas o Abraham. Penas o Isaak: “Men hi yag oun kasht! Kay hi ko bakro, te rhačras les o Debleske?”" 
Genesis22:8 Koy penas o Abraham leske: “O Devel della o bakres, te rhačras les leske, miro čavo.” Oun yon douy djan khetne doureder." 
Genesis22:9 Yaake van le ap koy platsa, hoy o Devel leske penas. Kote kras o Abraham i rhačepaskri o Debleske, čivas ko kasht koy pre, las peskro čaves, pandas les oun čivas les ap ko kasht pral pre." 
Genesis22:10 Oun las ko čouri, te marell lo o čaves." 
Genesis22:11 Koy das o baro Debleskro bolepaskro dran o bolepen gole: “Abraham, Abraham!” Penas yob: “Kate hom!”" 
Genesis22:12 Penas o bolepaskro: “Tape kol čaves gar an! Oun kre les či! Kanna djinau me, kay shouneh o tselo djiyeha ap o Debleste oun kreh, hoy yob penell. Tou rikral tiro yek čaves mandar gar pale.”" 
Genesis22:13 Koy dikas pes o Abraham trouyel. Pal leste hi i bakro mank i bourra. Leskre shinga hi an kal bourra oun yob nay vas gar vin. O Abraham djas koy, las ko bakro, maras les oun rhačras les o Debleske, gar peskro čaves." 
Genesis22:14 O Abraham das koy platsa ko lab O baro Devel dikella. Yaake vell bis kay dives penlo: Ap koy berga, kay o baro Devel dikella." 
Genesis22:15 Oun o baro Debleskro bolepaskro das i douyto kopo ap o Abrahameste gole dran o bolepen 
Genesis22:16 oun penas: “O baro Devel penell: Tou kamal tiro yek čaves mange te marell. Kova kamal tou mange te krell. Doleske dau man ap mande sovel, te čivap miri zoor oun miri barht ap toute. Oun toutar venna boud boud menshe. Yon venn yaake boud har bolepangre momlia ap o bolepen hi, oun har i santa pash o baro pani. Oun tire čave, kay pal toute venna, venna ray pral kolende, kay kourenn pen lentsa oun lenn kolengre forya krik." 
Genesis22:17  
Genesis22:18 Tou kral, hoy me touke penom. Doleske djal koy barht, hoy dau tire menshende, doureder ap i tsele natsyone, kay ap i phoub hi.”" 
Genesis22:19 Pal kova djas o Abraham pale pash peskre boudepangre. Oun khetne djan le an Beersheba. Oun o Abraham ačas koy. 
Genesis22:20 Pal kova vas o Abrahameske penlo: “I Milka, koy romni tiro phralestar Nahor, anas leske ninna morsh čaven ap i phoub:" 
Genesis22:21 O phoureder kharell Ous, o douyto hi o Bouz, oun o triinto hi o Kemuel, kolestar i Aramarya venna." 
Genesis22:22 Koy pal vell o Kesed, o Haso, o Pildash, o Yidlaf oun o Betouel.”" 
Genesis22:23 O Betouel hi o dad i čatar Rebekka. Kolla orhta hi i morsh čave, kolen o Abrahameskro phraal Nahor peskri romyatar Milka las." 
Genesis22:24 Oun les his ninna i vavar romni. Lakro lab his Rehouma. Koya las ninna čave. Kolengre laba hi: Teba, Gaham, Tahash oun Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Oun i Sara vas 127 (sheel-biish-te-efta) bersh phouro. 
Genesis23:2 Oun yoy meras an o foro Kiryat-Arba. Kova hi kanna Hebron an o them Kanaan. Oun o Abraham vas pash late, rovas oun das i djiyestar gole pral lakro merepen." 
Genesis23:3 Pal kova stas o Abraham peskri mouli romyatar pre, oun djas pash i Hetarya, te rakrell lo lentsa." 
Genesis23:4 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Me hom mank t'mende i vi-themari. Man hi kek kotar them pash t'mende. Kanna mangau t'men: Denn man i kotar them pash t'mende, te paskrap miri mouli romyat.”" 
Genesis23:5 I Hetarya penan ap o Abrahameste: 
Genesis23:6 “Shoun ap mende, maro ray: Tou hal i Debleskro morsh mashkral mende. Paske tiri mouli romyat an o feteder moulengro kheer, hoy men hi. Hakeno mendar dals tout i kotar them, te paskress tiri romyat koy.”" 
Genesis23:7 Koy stas o Abraham pre oun parkras pes pash lende. 
Genesis23:8 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Te kamenn t'mer, te paskrap miri mouli romyat kay, palle mangau t'men: Rakrenn o morsheha Efron, – leskro dad hi o Sohar –" 
Genesis23:9 oun mangenn les, te dell lo man leskri grotta, hoy kharella Makpela. Koy grotta hi ap i palstouni rig ap leskro kotar them čiddo. Me kamau te playsrell, hoy koy grotta moldo hi, te lap i moulengro kheer pash t'mende.”" 
Genesis23:10 O Hetari Efron his mank peskre menshende beshdo. Oun yob penas ap o Abrahameste glan kolende, kay pashel his, glan hakeneste, kay an o baro voudar o forestar his:" 
Genesis23:11 “Na-a, miro ray, shoun, hoy me penau: Tou hounte playsress mange či. Me dau tout ko kotar them oun koy grotta. Glan mire menshende dau tout kova, te paskress tiri mouli romyat.”" 
Genesis23:12 Koy parkras pes o Abraham pash kol menshende," 
Genesis23:13 oun penas ap o Efron glan lauterende: “Mangau tout, te shouness ap mande: Me playsrau, hoy ko kotar them moldo hi. Le mandar kal love! Yaake nashte paskrau miri mouli romyat.”" 
Genesis23:14 Penas o Efron ap o Abrahameste: 
Genesis23:15 “Miro ray, shoun ap mande! Hoy hi i kotar them mange oun touke, hoy molella star-sheel roupene beme? Kova hi či! Paske tiri romyat kote!”" 
Genesis23:16 Oun o Abraham das o Efrones kol love, hoy yon glan i Hetarya vin kran: star-sheel roupene beme. Yek bema his yaake pharo har yek bema pash i parepangre pharo his." 
Genesis23:17 Yaake las o Abraham o Efroneskro kotar them, kay pash Makpela glan Mamre čiddo hi: ko kotar them oun koy grotta oun kol rouka, kay kote tardo his." 
Genesis23:18 Oun kol Hetarya, kay an o voudar o forestar his, his pashel, har o Abraham lauter ginas." 
Genesis23:19 Pal kova paskras o Abraham peskri romyat, i Sara, an koy grotta pash Makpela vergel Mamre. Kova hi kanna o foro Hebron an o them Kanaan." 
Genesis23:20 Yaake bikran i Hetarya ko kotar them oun koy grotta o Abrahameske, te vell kote i moulengro kheer peskri familyake." 
Genesis24:1 O Abraham his phouro. Oun o baro Debleskri zoor oun barht his čiddo ap halauter, hoy les his." 
Genesis24:2 Koy penas o Abraham ap peskro pralstouno boudepaskro, kay das garda ap halauter, hoy o Abrahames his: “De tiro vast koy pre," 
Genesis24:3 oun de tout sovel ap o baro Debleste, ap o Debleste pral o bolepen oun i phoub, te less miro čaveske kek romyat, kay vell kate dran o them Kanaan." 
Genesis24:4 Dja an miro dadeskro them, pash mire menshende! Kolengre čendar le miro čaveske Isaak i romyat!”" 
Genesis24:5 Penas o boudepaskro ap leste: “Oun hoy krap me, te kamell koy djouvel gar mantsa an kava them te djal? Lap tiro čaves pale an ko them, kay tou vin djal?”" 
Genesis24:6 Koy penas o Abraham: “De tout garda! Ma an miro čaves an ko them pale, kay me vin djom!" 
Genesis24:7 O baro Devel, o Devel pral o bolepen, anas man vin dran miro dadeskro kheer oun miro dadeskro them, oun rakras mantsa. Oun das pes sovel, te dell lo mire čaven kava them, kay kanna hom. Kova bičrell peskro bolepaskres glan toute, te less miro čaveske i romyat mire menshendar." 
Genesis24:8 Te kamell koy djouvel gar touha te djal, vell koy sovel toutar krik lino. An kek tsiro aness tou miro čaves pale an ko them!”" 
Genesis24:9 Koy das o boudepaskro peskro vast koy pre oun das pes sovel, te krell lo yaake, har leskro ray Abraham leske penas." 
Genesis24:10 Pal kova las o boudepaskro deesh khamele oun kouč koova peskro rayestar peha, oun djas an o them Mesopotamia an o foro, kay o Nahor djivell." 
Genesis24:11 Oun yob moukas i khamele tele te čivell pash o pani glan o foro. His an i rati, har i djouvya o pani lenna." 
Genesis24:12 Oun yob penas: “Baro Devel, o Devel miro rayestar Abraham, de man kanna barht ap miro drom! Oun ab miro rayeske Abraham lačo!" 
Genesis24:13 Dik, me hom kate pash kava pani tardo. Oun i ča dran ko foro venna, te lenn le pani." 
Genesis24:14 Me te penau ap yekate: De man dran tiro khoro te piyell! Oun yoy penella ap mande: Pi! Oun yoy della ninna i khamelen te piyell, palle hi li koya, kay tou o Isaakeske vi-rodal. Ap kova dikau me, kay hal miro rayeske lačo.”" 
Genesis24:15 Yob rakras gar vin, koy vas i Rebekka oun hidjras i khoro ap peskro phiko. Lakro dad his o Betouel. Koleskri day his i Milka. Kolakro rom his o Nahor, kay o Abrahameskro phraal his." 
Genesis24:16 Koy čay his shoukar. Oun lat his kek morsh. Yoy djas tele pash o pani, kras o khoro pherdo pani oun vas pale pre." 
Genesis24:17 Koy nashas ko boudepaskro pash late oun penas ap late: “De man pani dran tiro khoro te piyell!” 
Genesis24:18 “Pi, miro ray!” penas yoy, oun las sik o khoro tele an lakro vast, te piyell lo." 
Genesis24:19 Har les kek troush bouder his, penas yoy: “Tire khamelenge kamau ninna pani te anell, yaake boud, te hi len bouder kek troush.”" 
Genesis24:20 Oun yoy djas sik oun čoras ko pani dran lakro khoro an o firhengro čaro. Oun nashas boud kope oun las i tsele khamelenge pani. 
Genesis24:21 O morsh las lat an i yak oun penas či. Yob kamas te djinell, te das les o baro Devel barht ap leskro drom." 
Genesis24:22 Har i khamele čalo his, las yob i sonakaskri goustri: shob gramme pharo, oun douy sonakangre moussyengre goustria: 120 (sheel-te-biish) gramme pharo. Oun das kova late. Oun yob poučas latar:" 
Genesis24:23 “Koneskri čay hal tou? Pen mange: Della an tiro dadeskro kheer i čiben, te nay sovah pash t'mende?”" 
Genesis24:24 Koy penas yoy ap leste: “Miro dad hi o Betouel. Leskri day hi i Milka oun leskro dad hi o Nahor. 
Genesis24:25 Men hi doha phouss oun firhengro rhapen. Ninna i čiben, te nay sovenna pash mende.”" 
Genesis24:26 Koy parkras pes ko morsh pash o baro Debleste oun vitsras pes tele glan leste," 
Genesis24:27 oun penas: “Sharedo vell o baro Devel, o Devel miro rayestar Abraham. Yob rikras peskro lačepen oun čačepen gar pale miro rayestar. O baro Devel anas man ap o drom pash o kheer miro rayeskre menshendar.”" 
Genesis24:28 Koy nashas koy čay an peskri dakro kheer oun penas lenge kova lauter. 
Genesis24:29 I Rebekka, lat his i phraal, ko kharella Laban." 
Genesis24:30 Har dikas o Laban i goustri oun i moussyengre goustria ap lakre moussya oun shounas, hoy ko morsh peskri phenyake Rebekka penas, nashas lo sik pash leste. Kova his i khamelentsa pash ko pani tardo." 
Genesis24:31 Oun o Laban penas ap leste: “Am kay dren! I zoor oun i barht o baro Deblestar hi ap toute čiddo. Hoske hal tou vin tardo? Me krom touke o kheer djoudjo. Oun i khamelenge hi ninna platsa.” 
Genesis24:32 Koy vas o morsh an o kheer. Oun yon lan i khamelendar o koova tele. Oun dan len phouss oun rhapen. O morsheske oun kolenge, kay pash leste his, anan le pani, te thovenn yon pengre herya." 
Genesis24:33 Koy pal anan le lenge te rhal. Koy penas o boudepaskro ap o Laban: “Me kamau gar te rhal, bis te rakrom man vin.” Oun o Laban penas: “Rake!”" 
Genesis24:34 Koy penas yob: “Me hom o Abrahameskro boudepaskro. 
Genesis24:35 O baro Devel čivas bari zoor oun boud barht ap miro ray. Yaake vas yob bravelo. O Devel das les bakre oun groumya, roup oun sonakay, boudepangre: morsha oun djouvya, ninna khamele oun bourike." 
Genesis24:36 Har i Sara, miro rayeskri romni, phouro his, anas li miro rayeske i čaves ap i phoub. Koleste das yob halauter, hoy les his." 
Genesis24:37 Ap mande penas miro ray: De tout sovel, te less miro čaveske kek romni dran o them Kanaan." 
Genesis24:38 Dja an miro dadeskro kheer oun pash mire menshende. Kolendar le miro čaveske i romyat. 
Genesis24:39 Oun me penom ap miro rayeste: Oun hoy krap me, te kamell koy djouvel gar mantsa te djal?" 
Genesis24:40 Koy penas o Abraham ap mande: O baro Devel, kay djau ap leskro drom, bičrell peskro bolepaskres glan toute oun dell barht ap tiro drom, te less miro čaveske i romyat mire menshendar oun dran miro dadeskro kheer." 
Genesis24:41 Te veh tou pash mire menshende, oun yon te denn tout kek djouvel, vell koy sovel hoy tou dal, krik lino." 
Genesis24:42 Yaake vom kava dives pash kava pani oun penom: Baro Devel, o Devel miro rayestar Abraham, te deh tou čačepah barht ap ko drom, kay me djau, sike les mande!" 
Genesis24:43 Me hom kate tardo pash kava pani. Te penau me kanna ap koy čate, kay vella, te lell li pani: De man i mouy pherdo pani dran tiro khoro te piyell. Oun yoy penell ap mande:" 
Genesis24:44 Pi, oun tire khamelen kamau ninna pani te dell, hi yoy koy romni, kay o baro Devel miro rayeskro čaveske vi-rodas." 
Genesis24:45 Har me yaake an miro dji rakrom, koy vas i Rebekka. Lakro khoro his ap lakro phiko. Yoy djas pash ko pani tele, te lell li pani. Koy penom me ap late: De man te piyell!" 
Genesis24:46 Oun yoy las sik o khoro peskro phikestar tele oun penas: Ake, pi! Tire khamelen kamau ninna pani te dell. Koy piyom me. Oun yoy das ninna i khamelen te piyell." 
Genesis24:47 Oun me poučom latar: Koneskri čay hal tou? Koy penas li: Miro dad hi o Betouel. Leskro dad hi o Nahor oun leskri day hi i Milka. Oun me čivom i goustri ap lakro nak oun i moussyengre goustria ap lakre moussya. 
Genesis24:48 Koy pal vitsrom man tele glan o baro Debleste oun parkrom man pash leste. Oun sharom les, o Debles miro rayestar Abraham. Yob anas man ap o čačo drom, te anap miro rayeskro čaveske i čay leskro phraleskro čavestar." 
Genesis24:49 Kanna penenn mange, kamenn t'mer miro rayeske lačepen oun kamlepen te krell? Oun te hi kova gar yaake, penenn mange kova ninna. Oun me djinau, hoy te krap.”" 
Genesis24:50 Koy penan o Laban oun o Betouel: “Kava koova kras halauter o baro Devel. Pral ko koova nay penah mer či, kek lačo koova, vitar kek čilačo koova." 
Genesis24:51 Dik, i Rebekka hi glan toute. Le lat peha oun dja kote, te vell li tiro rayeskro čaveskri romni, yaake har o baro Devel rakras.”" 
Genesis24:52 Har o Abrahameskro boudepaskro lengre laba shounas, vitsras pes lo tele glan o baro Debleste, te parkrell lo pes pash leste." 
Genesis24:53 Koy pal las yob roupeno oun sonakaskro koova vin, ninna shoukar ripya. Oun das kova i Rebekka. Lakro phrales oun lakri dat das lo ninna kouč koova." 
Genesis24:54 Oun yob oun kol morsha, kay pash leste his, rhan oun piyan. Oun yon ačan pral i rati pash lende. O vavar dives, taysarlakro, penas yob: “Kanna moukenn man pale pash miro rayeste te djal!”" 
Genesis24:55 Koy penas lakro phraal oun lakri day ap leste: “Mouk kay čat yaake deesh divessa pash mende te ačell. Pal ko tsiro, mou djal li touha.”" 
Genesis24:56 Koy penas o boudepaskro ap lende: “Ma rikrenn man pale! O baro Devel das barht ap miro drom. Kanna moukenn man te djal, te vap pale pash miro rayeste.”" 
Genesis24:57 Koy penan yon: “Mer dah i čat gole, te poučas latar, hoy yoy penella.”" 
Genesis24:58 Oun yon dan i Rebekka gole oun poučan latar: “Kameh tou kava morsheha te djal?” Oun yoy penas: “Me kamau te djal.” 
Genesis24:59 Koy moukan yon pengri phenyat Rebekka te djal, khetne koy djouvyah, kay das garda ap late, har his li tikno, te djan le o Abrahameskro boudepaskreha oun leskre morshentsa." 
Genesis24:60 Oun yon rakran i barht pral late vin oun penan: “Tou, mari pheen, toutar te venna boud zerya menshe: zerya kope deesh-zerya! Mou venn tire čave ray pral kolende, kay kourenn pen lentsa, te lenn le kolengre forya krik!”" 
Genesis24:61 Oun i Rebekka oun kol djouvya, kay boudrenn lake, stan pre, beshan pen ap i khamele, oun djan ko morsheha. Yaake las ko boudepaskro i Rebekka peha." 
Genesis24:62 An ko tsiro djivas o Isaak an o them Negev pash o pani Lahay-Roy. 
Genesis24:63 Ap yek rati djas yob vin, te vell lo peske kokres. Oun har yob pre dikas, dikas lo, kay khamele venna." 
Genesis24:64 Oun i Rebekka dikas pes ninna trouyel oun dikas o Isaakes. Koy stas yoy sik tele i khamelatar oun poučas o boudepaskrestar: 
Genesis24:65 “Koon hi ko morsh, kay kote pash mende vella?” “Kova hi miro ray”, penas o boudepaskro. Koy čivas yoy i diklo glan peskro mouy, te khatrell li peskro mouy." 
Genesis24:66 O boudepaskro penas o Isaakeske halauter, hoy yob kras." 
Genesis24:67 Oun o Isaak anas i Rebekka an o plarhteno kheer, kay leskri day i Sara, djivas, oun romedineras lat. Oun yob kamas lat. Oun o Isaakeskri douk an peskro dji pral peskro dakro merepen vas krik lino." 
Genesis25:1 Oun o Abraham las peske i nevi romni. Lakro lab his Ketura. 
Genesis25:2 Oun yoy anas leske čaven ap i phoub. Kolengre laba hi: Simran, Yokshan, Medan oun Midian, Yishbak oun Shoua." 
Genesis25:3 O Yokshan vas o dad douy čavendar: o Saba oun o Dedan. O Dedan vas o dad kol menshendar, kay kharenna Ashourarya, Letusharya oun Leummarya." 
Genesis25:4 O Midianeskre čave his: o Efa, o Efer, o Henok, o Abida oun o Eldaa. Kolla lauter hi i čave oun čavengre čave o Abrahameskri romyatar Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Oun o Abraham das halauter, hoy leskro hi, o Isaakeste." 
Genesis25:6 Oun kol čaven, kay leskre vavar romyendar bolde van, das o Abraham kouč koova pestar. An ko tsiro har yob djivas, bičras lo len dour krik peskro čavestar Isaak an ko them, hoy kote čiddo hi, kay o kham pre-djala." 
Genesis25:7 O Abraham vas 175 (sheel-efta-deesh-te-panč) bersh phouro. 
Genesis25:8 Les his i rah djipen. Oun yob meras an o mishto phourepen oun vas paskedo. 
Genesis25:9 Leskre čave, o Isaak oun o Ismael, paskran les an koy grotta, hoy kharella Makpela, ap ko kotar them, hoy hi čiddo glan Mamre. Glan kava tsiro his ko kotar them o Efrones, koleskro dad o Sohar hi." 
Genesis25:10 Kolla his Hetarya oun o Abraham ginas les lendar. Kote vas yob oun peskri romni Sara paskedo. 
Genesis25:11 Pal o Abrahameskro merepen čivas o Devel peskri zoor oun peskri barht ap leskro čaveste Isaak. An ko tsiro djivas o Isaak pash ko pani, hoy kharella Lahay-Roy." 
Genesis25:12 Kova hi ko liil, kay činlo hi i laba kol menshendar, kay venna o Abrahameskro čavestar Ismael. Koleskri day his i Hagar dran o them Egiptia, koy boudepaskretsa, kay boudras i Sarake." 
Genesis25:13 Oun kolla hi i laba o Ismaeleskre čavendar yaake har yon boldo van: O phoureder his o Nebayot. Palle vas o Kedar, o Adbeel, o Mibsam," 
Genesis25:14 o Mishma, o Douma, o Massa," 
Genesis25:15 o Hadad, o Tema, o Yetour, o Nafish oun o Kedema." 
Genesis25:16 Kolla his i deesh-te-douy čave o Ismaelestar. Hakeno his o pralstouno pral i bari familya. Yon dan pengro lab kol gaba oun platse, kay lengre plarhtene khera tardo his." 
Genesis25:17 O Ismael vas 137 (sheel-te-triyanda-te-efta) bersha phouro. Oun yob meras oun vas paskedo. 
Genesis25:18 Leskre čave, kay pal leste van, djivan an o them mashkral Havila oun Shour. Shour hi čiddo glan o them Egiptia ap o drom, hoy djala an Assour. Yaake vas čačo, hoy pral o Ismael penlo vas: Yob lell peske i kotar them gar dour peskre phralendar, te rhoyrell lo len." 
Genesis25:19 Kova hi ko liil, kay činlo hi pral o Abrahameskro čaveste Isaak." 
Genesis25:20 O Isaak his star-desha bersh phouro, har yob romedineras i Rebekka. Lakro dad his o Betouel, oun lakro phraal his o Laban. Kolla his Aramarya dran o them Paddan-Aram." 
Genesis25:21 Yoy nay las kek čave. Oun o Isaak mangas o baro Deblestar peskri romyake. Oun o baro Devel shounas ap o Isaak. Oun i Rebekka, leskri romni, vas an vavar koova." 
Genesis25:22 Oun i čave stakran pen an lakro per. Koy penas yoy: “Hoske djal mange kova?” Oun yoy djas te poučell li o baro Deblestar. 
Genesis25:23 O baro Devel penas ap late: “Tou veh i day douy čavendar. Kol douyendar venna boud menshe, yaake boud, kay hakenestar yek natsyona vella. Ko terneder vell zorleder har ko phoureder oun vell o ray pral leste.”" 
Genesis25:24 Har lakro tsiro koy his, van douy morsh čave boldo." 
Genesis25:25 Ko ersto, kay boldo vas, his lolo. Oun les his boud bal ap leste, yaake har i balni plaashka. Oun doleske las yob ko lab Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Pal leste vas leskro phraal boldo. Yob rikras peskro vasteha i heri peskro phralestar Esau. Doleske las yob ko lab Yakob. O Isaak his 60 (shob-deesh) bersh phouro, har kol čave boldo van." 
Genesis25:27 I čave van baro. O Esau vas i vesheskro, kay hayvas mishto firhen te taprell. O Yakob vas i morsh, kay his pokones. Yob ačas pash i plarhtene khera." 
Genesis25:28 O Isaak kamas te rhal i firhendar, kay o Esau tapras. Oun yob kamas o Esaes boudeder har o Yakobes. I Rebekka kamas o Yakobes boudeder har o Esaes." 
Genesis25:29 His i dives, kay keras o Yakob i rhapen. Har o Esau dran o veesh khere vas, his yob khino oun les his i bari bok." 
Genesis25:30 Koy penas o Esau ap o Yakobeste: “Mouk man sik te rhal ko lolo rhapastar. Hom khino oun man hi bari bok.” Doleske dan le les ko lab Edom. 
Genesis25:31 Penas o Yakob ap leste: “Tou hal o phoureder čavo oun leh halauter, hoy o phoureder čavo lella. Kanna de tiro vast pre, kay me hom har o phoureder, oun kova lauter lella, hoy o phoureder čavo lella.”" 
Genesis25:32 Penas o Esau: “Dik! Hoy molell man kova lauter, te merau i bokatar?”" 
Genesis25:33 Penas o Yakob: “De tout sovel!” Oun yob das pes sovel, te lell o Yakob halauter, hoy o phoureder čavo lella." 
Genesis25:34 Oun o Yakob das maro oun i linsengro rhapen o Esaes te rhal. Koy rhas oun piyas yob, stas pre oun djas peske. Yaake his leske lauter či moldo, hoy o phoureder čavo lella." 
Genesis26:1 His i tsiro, kay vas i bari bok an o them, yaake har an o Abrahameskro tsiro. Doleske djas o Isaak an o foro Gerar pash o Abimelek. Kova his o baro ray pral i Filistarya." 
Genesis26:2 Koy moukas pes o baro Devel o Isaakestar te dikell oun penas ap leste: “Ma dja tele an o them Egiptia! Djib an ko them, kay me touke penau." 
Genesis26:3 Ač i tsiro an kava them. Me hom pash toute, te čivap miri zoor oun miri barht ap toute. Kalla tsele themma dau me tout oun tire čaven, kay pal toute venna. Me rikrau miro lab, hoy dom tiro dadeste Abraham, oun kay dom miro vast koy pre." 
Genesis26:4 O Abraham shounas ap mande oun kras kova, hoy me leske penom. Yob rikras pes ap mire laba oun djivas pal miro čačepen. Doleske krau me, te venn tire čave yaake boud har i bolepangre momlia. Oun me dau len kalla tsele themma. Oun koy barht, hoy dau tire čavende, djal doureder ap i tsele natsyone, kay ap i phoub hi.”" 
Genesis26:5  
Genesis26:6 Yaake ačas o Isaak an o foro Gerar. 
Genesis26:7 Har i menshe an ko foro leskri romyat dikan, poučan le: “Koon hi koya?” Penas yob: “Yoy hi miri pheen.” Les his traash te penell: Yoy hi miri romni. Yob daras, te denn le les moulo, te lenn yon lat, yaake shoukar his li." 
Genesis26:8 Har yob i rah tsiro koy his, dikas o Abimelek, ko ray pral kol Filistarya, dran i vorhni. Oun dikas, har las o Isaak peskri romyat, i Rebekka, an i moussi." 
Genesis26:9 Koy moukas o Abimelek o Isaakes te kharell oun penas ap leste: “Dik! Koya hi tiri romni. Hoske penal tou, kay yoy tiri pheen hi?” Penas o Isaak ap leste: “Me darom, te denn man le moulo oun lenn yon lat.”" 
Genesis26:10 Penas o Abimelek: “Hoske kral tou kova mentsa? Har sik nashte vals yek i morshendar oun lals tiri romyat oun čivals pes pash late. Tou anals bari doosh ap mende!” 
Genesis26:11 Koy pal penas o Abimelek ap lauterende: “Koon kol morshes ninna leskri romyat an-tapella, ko hounte merella.”" 
Genesis26:12 O Isaak čivas djob an i phoub an ko them. Oun o baro Devel čivas peskri zoor koy pre. Yaake las o Isaak an ko bersh sheel kope yaake boud djob, har lo an i phoub čivras." 
Genesis26:13 Oun o Isaak vas bravelo oun bravleder, oun les his i baro bravlepen:" 
Genesis26:14 boud bakre, bouzya, groumya oun boudepangre. Oun i Filistarya dikan čilače yakentsa ap leskro bravlepen." 
Genesis26:15 Oun i tsele brounne, kay leskro dadeskre boudepangre kran an o Abrahameskro tsiro, vitsran le pherdo čik, te nay lenn yon kek pani bouder." 
Genesis26:16 Oun o Abimelek penas ap o Isaak: “Dja dran maro them! Tou val zorleder har mer.” 
Genesis26:17 Yaake djas o Isaak peske oun čivas peskre plarhtene khera pre an i tala pash o foro Gerar oun ačas koy. 
Genesis26:18 Oun moukas kol brounne pale neves te krell, hoy yon kran an ko tsiro, kay leskro dad Abraham djivas, oun kolen i Filistarya pherdo čik vitsran pal leskro merepen. Oun o Isaak das kol brounne ko lab, har leskro dad len das." 
Genesis26:19 Oun o Isaakeskre boudepangre hadan čik vin an koy tala oun hatsan pani. 
Genesis26:20 Koy čingran i bakrengre dran o foro Gerar ap o Isaakeskre bakrengre oun penan: “Kava pani hi maro.” Koy das o Isaak koy brounna ko lab Esek. 
Genesis26:21 Oun o Isaakeskre boudepangre kran i vavar brounna. Pral koya das ninna čingepen. Koy das o Isaak kay brounna ko lab Sitna. 
Genesis26:22 Oun yob djas doureder oun kras i vavar brounna. Pral koya čingran pen le gar. Koy das lo lat ko lab Rehobot, oun penas: “Kanna das men o baro Devel i bourhlo them. Mer nay vah an kava them boud menshe oun boud firhe.”" 
Genesis26:23 Kotar djas yob an Beersheba. 
Genesis26:24 An koy rati moukas pes o baro Devel lestar te dikell oun penas: “Me hom o Devel tiro dadestar Abraham. Ma traash! Me hom touha. Me čivau miri zoor oun miri barht ap toute. Tire čave, kay pal toute venna, venna boud oun boudeder. Yaake dom miro lab o Abrahameste, kay mange koy his.”" 
Genesis26:25 Oun kote kras o Isaak i rhačepaskri, te venn firhe rhačedo o Debleske, oun mangas o baro Debles an. Oun kote čivas yob peskro plarhteno kheer pre. Oun peskre boudepangre hadan kote i brounna vin." 
Genesis26:26 Oun o Abimelek vas dran o foro Gerar peskro maleha Ahoussat oun peskro pralstouno lourdeha Pikol pash o Isaak. 
Genesis26:27 Oun o Isaak penas ap lende: “Hoske venn pash mande? T'mer kamenn man gar oun tradan man t'mendar krik.” 
Genesis26:28 Penan le: “Mer dikah oun hayvah, kay o baro Devel touha hi. Doleske penam menge: Mer hounte kras touha vin, oun das men sovel, te krah bouder kek čingepen yek o vavareha." 
Genesis26:29 De tiro dadeskro vast koy pre, te kress menge kek čilačepen, yaake har mer hams touke lačo oun moukam tout te djal, har tou kamal. Ap toute hi i barht o baro Deblestar čiddo.”" 
Genesis26:30 Koy kras o Isaak lenge i rhapen, te rhan oun piyan le." 
Genesis26:31 Taysarlakro stan le pre, oun yek pal o vavar das pes sovel. Oun o Isaak moukas len te djal. Oun yon djan penge an o lačepen." 
Genesis26:32 Ap ko dives van o Isaakeskre boudepangre pash leste, oun rakran leha pral koy brounna, hoy yon vi-hadan, oun penan: “Mer hatsam pani.”" 
Genesis26:33 Koy das yob koy brounna ko lab Shiba. Doleske kharell ko foro gomme kava dives Beersheba. 
Genesis26:34 O Esau his star-deesh bersh phouro. Oun yob romedineras i Yehoudit, – lakro dad his o Beeri. Ninna romedineras yob i Basmat. Lakro dad his o Elon. O Beeri oun o Elon his Hetarya." 
Genesis26:35 Kalla douy romya kran o djipen pharo o Isaakeske oun i Rebekkake. 
Genesis27:1 O Isaak vas phouro oun nay dikas bouder či. Oun yob kharas peskro phoureder čaves, o Esau, oun penas ap leste: “Miro čavo!” “Ake hom”, penas kova." 
Genesis27:2 Oun o Isaak penas ap leste: “Dik, me vom phouro. Djinau gar havo dives me merau." 
Genesis27:3 Le tire fayle oun tiro bogo! Oun dja vin ap o them! Oun de mange i firhes karye! 
Genesis27:4 Oun kre mange i lačo rhapen, yaake har me kova kamau. Oun an les mange, te rhap oun te rakrap nay glan miro merepen o Debleskri barht pral toute vin.”" 
Genesis27:5 Har o Isaak peskro čaveha Esau rakras, shounas i Rebekka kova. Oun o Esau djas vin, te dell lo i firhes karye, te anell lo kova khere." 
Genesis27:6 Koy penas i Rebekka ap peskro čaveste Yakob: “Djineh tou? Me shounom, har tiro dad penas ap tiro phraleste Esau:" 
Genesis27:7 An mange i firhes, oun kre mange i lačo rhapen, te rhap oun te rakrap o baro Debleskri barht pral toute vin glan miro merepen. ”" 
Genesis27:8 “Kanna, miro čavo”, penas i Rebekka doureder, “shoun ap mande oun kre, hoy touke penau." 
Genesis27:9 Dja pash i firhende oun an mange douy lače terne bouzya. Kolendar kamau i lačo rhapen tiro dadeske te krell, yaake har yob kova kamella." 
Genesis27:10 Kova an tiro dadeske, te rhal lo les, oun rakrell o Debleskri barht vin pral toute glan leskro merepen.”" 
Genesis27:11 Koy penas o Yakob ap peskri date Rebekka: “Tou djineh, kay miro phrales, o Esau, boud balla ap peste hi. Ap mande hi gar boud balla." 
Genesis27:12 Nashte vell, kay miro dad taprell man an. Palle homs i rhorheno glan leste oun anaus bari bibarht ap mande oun kek barht.”" 
Genesis27:13 Koy penas leskri day ap leste: “Koy bibarht mou vell ap mande, miro čavo. Shoun ap mande! Dja oun an mange kol firhen!”" 
Genesis27:14 Oun yob djas, las douy bouzya oun anas len peskri dake. Oun yoy kras i lačo rhapen, yaake har leskro dad kova kamas." 
Genesis27:15 Oun i Rebekka las kouč ripya peskro phoureder čavestar Esau, hoy pash late an o kheer his. Oun rivas len lakro terneder čaveske Yakob an." 
Genesis27:16 Kol felle kol bouzyendar čivas yoy troul leskre moussya oun troul leskri meen, kay kek balla his." 
Genesis27:17 Oun yoy das peskro čaveste Yakob ko lačo rhapen oun ko maro, hoy yoy kras." 
Genesis27:18 Oun yob djas dren pash peskro dadeste oun penas: “Miro dad!” Kova penas: “Ake hom. Koon hal tou, miro čavo?”" 
Genesis27:19 Koy penas o Yakob ap peskro dadeste: “Me hom o Esau, tiro phoureder čavo. Me krom, hoy tou mange penal. Ste kanna pre oun besh tout oun rha ko mass, hoy anom touke, yaake te rakress nay o Debleskri barht pral mande vin.”" 
Genesis27:20 Koy poučas o Isaak peskro čavestar: “Har hatsal kova yaake sik, miro čavo?” “O baro Devel, tiro Devel, das man barht”, penas o Yakob." 
Genesis27:21 Koy penas o Isaak ap o Yakobeste: “Am pash mande, miro čavo, te taprap tout an, te djinap, kay hal čačepah miro čavo Esau.”" 
Genesis27:22 Kanna djas o Yakob glan peskro dadeste Isaak. Oun o Isaak tapras les an oun penas: “Te rakreh, shounau o Yakobes. Kal moussya hi o Esaeskre moussya.”" 
Genesis27:23 Yob prindjras les gar. Ap leskre moussya his boud balla har ap i moussya leskro phralestar Esau. 
Genesis27:24 Har yob kamas o Debleskri barht pral leste vin te rakrell, poučas lo pale: “Hal tou miro čavo Esau?” “Ava, me hom kova”, penas o Yakob." 
Genesis27:25 Kanna penas o Isaak: “Miro čavo, an mange ko rhapen, te rhap ko massestar, hoy anal mange, yaake te rakrap nay o Debleskri barht pral toute vin.” Oun o Yakob anas kova leske, te rhal lo. Oun yob rhas. Oun anas leske ninna mool, te piyell lo. Oun yob piyas." 
Genesis27:26 Pal kova penas o Isaak ap leste: “Am pash mande oun de man i čoum, miro čavo!”" 
Genesis27:27 Koy vas o Yakob pash leste oun čoumras les. Koy soungas yob leskre koola oun rakras o Debleskri barht pral leste vin oun penas: Dik, o soungepen miro čavestar hi har ko soungepen i phoubyatar, kay o baro Devel čivas peskri zoor pre." 
Genesis27:28 Mou dell tout o Devel brishin dran o bolepen oun boud rhapaske dran i phoub, boud djob oun mool." 
Genesis27:29 Menshe dran vavar themma hounte boudrenn touke oun vitsrenn pen tele glan toute. Vess ray pral tire phralende. Oun tiri dakre čave hounte vitsrenn pen tele glan toute. Kolla kay penenna, te vell tout bibarht, ap kolende vell bibarht. Oun kolla, kay penenna, te vell tout barht, ap kolende vell barht." 
Genesis27:30 Har o Isaak kol lače laba pral o Yakobeste rakras oun o Yakob vin djas peskro dadestar, vas leskro phraal, o Esau, khere." 
Genesis27:31 Oun yob kras ninna i lačo rhapen, anas les peskro dadeske oun penas ap leste: “Miro dad, ste pre oun rha ko massestar, hoy anom touke, yaake kay nashte rakress o Debleskri barht pral mande vin!”" 
Genesis27:32 Koy penas leskro dad Isaak ap leste: “Koon hal tou?” “Me hom o Esau, tiro phoureder čavo”, penas yob." 
Genesis27:33 Koy vas i bari daar ap o Isaakeste. Oun yob poučas: “Koon his kova, kay das i firho karye oun anas mange o rhapen, oun me rhom? Koy pal val tou. Me rakrom o Debleskri barht vin pral koleste, kay anas mange o rhapen. Oun koy barht ačell ap leste. Me nashte lau lat gar pale.”" 
Genesis27:34 Har o Esau shounas kol laba peskro dadestar, das lo i bari gole i rholyatar oun doukatar, oun penas ap peskro dadeste: “Rake o Debleskri barht pral mande vin, ninna pral mande, tata!”" 
Genesis27:35 Koy penas leskro dad: “Tiro phraal vas rhorhepah pash mande oun las peske i Debleskri barht, hoy touke his.”" 
Genesis27:36 Koy penas o Esau: “Leskro lab hi čačepah Yakob. Yob rhorhras man kanna douy kope. Yob las mandar kova, hoy loms me, ko phoureder čavo. Oun kanna las lo peske ninna o Debleskri barht, hoy mange vals.” Oun palle poučas yob: “Hi tout kek lače laba mange?”" 
Genesis27:37 Koy penas o Isaak ap o Esau: “Shoun, me krom, kay yob o ray pral toute hi. Oun leskre tsele phralen krom, te venn yon leskre boudepangre. Dom les ninna djob oun mool. Hoy nay krau kanna touke, miro čavo?”" 
Genesis27:38 “Tata”, penas o Esau, “nay rakreh tou gar douy kope i barht vin? Rake ninna i Debleskri barht pral mande vin!” Oun o Esau rovas zoreles." 
Genesis27:39 Koy penas leskro dad Isaak ap leste: Shoun, kote, kay djiveh, dell o bolepen kek brishin, vitar gar anell i phoub boud rhapaske." 
Genesis27:40 Tou djiveh kolestar, hoy tiro rharo anella touke, oun hounte boudress tiro phraleske. I dives vella, kay hadeh tout ap leste, oun moukeh les bouder gar ray pral toute te vell." 
Genesis27:41 Kol lače laba, hoy o Isaak pral o Yakobeste rakras, kran, te vas o Esau rhoyedo ap o Yakobeste. Doleske penas o Esau ap peste: “Ko tsiro vella sik, kay rovenn le pral miro dadeskro merepen. Te hi lo moulo, dau miro phrales moulo.”" 
Genesis27:42 Har i Rebekka shounas, hoy lakro phoureder čavo Esau kamell te krell, moukas li lakro terneder čaves Yakob te kharell oun penas ap leste: “Shoun, tiro phraal Esau kamell tout moulo te dell." 
Genesis27:43 Kanna, shoun ap mande, miro čavo. Kre tout ap o drom, dja touke sik oun dja pash miro phraleste Laban an o foro Haran." 
Genesis27:44 Ač i tsiro pash leste, bis te djal tiro phraleskri rholi krik," 
Genesis27:45 oun yob bistras, hoy tou les kral. Palle bičrau yekes, kay anell tout pale. Hoske nashrap me t'men douyen ap yek dives?”" 
Genesis27:46 Oun i Rebekka penas ap o Isaakeste: “Kol douy rhalya, kol Hetarya, kolen o Esau romedineras, krenn mange miro djipen pharo. Te romedinerell ninna o Yakob i čat dran kava them, i Hetaretsa, vals feteder, te merap.”" 
Genesis28:1 Koy das o Isaak o Yakobes gole oun penas: “Dja o Debleha! Ma le i romni dran o them Kanaan! 
Genesis28:2 Dja an o them Paddan-Aram, an o kheer tiro dakro dadestar Betouel. Le touke kote i čay tiri dakro phralestar, o Laban." 
Genesis28:3 O zorelo Devel čivell peskri zoor oun peskri barht ap toute oun dell tout boud čave, te venn toutar boud natsyone!" 
Genesis28:4 Koy barht oun koy zoor, hoy o Devel čivas ap o Abrahameste, mou vell ap toute oun ap tire menshende! Tou leh kava them, kay tou kanna i vi-themari hal – ko them, hoy o Devel o Abrahameste das.”" 
Genesis28:5 Oun o Isaak moukas o Yakobes te djal. Oun yob djas an o them Paddan-Aram pash o Laban. Koleskro dad his o Aramari Betouel. O Labaneskri pheen his i Rebekka, koy day o Yakobestar oun o Esaestar." 
Genesis28:6 O Esau dikas, kay o Isaak o Debleskri barht pral o Yakobeste vin rakras oun les an o them Paddan-Aram bičras, te lell yob peske kote i romni. Oun yob shounas, kay o Isaak o Yakobeske zoreles penas: Ma le i romni dran o them Kanaan." 
Genesis28:7 Yob dikas ninna, kay o Yakob shounas ap peskro dadeste oun ap peskri date oun djas an o them Paddan-Aram." 
Genesis28:8 Koy hayvas o Esau, kay leskre romya, kay van dran o them Kanaan, gar lačo his glan peskro dadeskre yaka." 
Genesis28:9 Oun o Esau djas pash o Abrahameskro čaveste Ismael, oun las peske koleskri čat, i Mahalat. Koya vas leskri triinti romni. Lakro phraal his o Nebayot." 
Genesis28:10 O Yakob djas dran ko foro Beersheba oun kras pes ap ko drom, kay djal an o them Haran." 
Genesis28:11 Har o kham tele djas, vas yob ap i platsa oun ačas i rati koy. Yob las yek bar, hoy kote čiddo his, čivas les tel leskro shero oun čivas pes tele." 
Genesis28:12 Koy das lo souni: Yob dikas i treppa ap i phoub tardo. Koya djas bis an o bolepen. Oun o Debleskre bolepangre djan pre oun tele. 
Genesis28:13 Oun o baro Devel his tardo pral pre oun penas: “Me hom o baro Devel, ko Devel tiro papestar Abraham oun ninna o Isaakeskro Devel. Kava them, kay tou čiddo hal, dau tout oun tire čaven, kay pal toute venna." 
Genesis28:14 Yon venna yaake boud har i čik, hoy ap i phoub hi. Oun krau lengro them baro oun bourhlo ap hake rigya. Oun koy barht, hoy dau toute oun tire čavende, djal doureder ap i tsele menshende, kay ap i phoub hi." 
Genesis28:15 Tou djiness, me hom touha oun dau garda ap toute, kote, kay tou djah. Oun anau tout pale an kava them. Me moukau tout gar, bis te krom halauter, hoy touke penom.”" 
Genesis28:16 Koy djangras o Yakob dran o sopen pre oun penas: “Čačepah, o baro Devel hi ap koy platsa. Oun me djinom kova gar.”" 
Genesis28:17 Oun yob daras oun penas: “Har darenes hi kay platsa, – hi čačepah o Debleskro kheer oun o voudar an o bolepen.”" 
Genesis28:18 Taysarlakro stas o Yakob pre, las ko bar, hoy tel leskro shero čiddo his, čivas les pre, oun čoras djet koy pre." 
Genesis28:19 Oun yob das kol platsa ko lab Betel. Glan ko tsiro his o lab ko forestar Louz. 
Genesis28:20 Oun o Yakob das pes sovel oun penas: “Hi o baro Devel mantsa oun dell garda ap mande ap miro drom, kay me djau, oun dell man rhapaske oun an-ripaske," 
Genesis28:21 yaake te vap pale mishto an miro dadeskro kheer, hi yob miro Devel." 
Genesis28:22 Oun kava bar, hoy čivom pre, kova mou vell i Debleskro kheer. Oun halauterestar, hoy tou man deh, dau me tout o deshto kotar pale.”" 
Genesis29:1 Oun o Yakob djas doureder oun vas an ko them, kay kote čiddo hi, kay o kham pre djala." 
Genesis29:2 Oun yob dikas pes trouyel oun dikas i brounna ap o them. Ap triin platse pash i brounna his boud bakre oun bouzya čiddo. Dran koy brounna lan i bakrengre o pani, hoy denn le pengre firhen te piyell. Oun i baro bar his ap i brounna čiddo." 
Genesis29:3 Te his i tsele bakre khetne anlo, lenn le ko bar tele oun denn i bakren te piyell. Pal kova čivenn le ko bar pale ap i brounna." 
Genesis29:4 O Yakob penas ap i bakrengre: “Kamle phrala, kay venn t'mer?” “Ham dran o foro Haran”, penan yon." 
Genesis29:5 “Prindjrenn o Labanes?” poučas yob lendar. “Koleskro papo hi o Nahor.” 
Genesis29:6 “Prindjrah les”, penan le. “Djal leske mishto?” poučas yob. “Ava”, penan le. “Leske djal mishto. Ake, koy vell leskri čay Rachel i bakrentsa.”" 
Genesis29:7 Koy penas yob: “O tselo dives hi glan mende. Ko tsiro, kay venn i bakre khetne tradedo, hi gar koy. Denn i bakren te piyell oun djan lentsa koy, kay hi len te rhal.”" 
Genesis29:8 Koy penan yon: “Kanna krah nay či. Te hi i tsele bakre khetne anlo, lah ko bar o panyestar tele oun dah i bakren te piyell.”" 
Genesis29:9 Har yob lentsa rakras, vas i Rachel peskro dadeskre bakrentsa. Yoy das garda ap lende." 
Genesis29:10 Har dikas o Yakob o Labaneskri ča, i Rachel, ninna o Labaneskre bakre, djas lo pash i brounna, las ko bar tele, oun das i firhen peskro kakestar te piyell. O Laban his o phraal leskri datar." 
Genesis29:11 Oun o Yakob čoumras i Rachel oun rovas zoreles, kay lauter kova shounan." 
Genesis29:12 Oun penas lake, kay yob lakro dadeskre menshendar hi, oun leskri day i Rebekka. Koy nashas yoy oun penas lauter peskro dadeske." 
Genesis29:13 Har o Laban shounas, kay vas peskri phenyakro čavo, o Yakob, nashas lo pash leste, čivas peskre moussya troul leste, čoumras les oun anas les an peskro kheer. Oun o Yakob penas o Labaneske halauter, hoy djas." 
Genesis29:14 Koy penas o Laban: “Čačepah, tou hal mire menshendar.” Oun o Yakob ačas pash o Labaneste yek čon." 
Genesis29:15 Pal yek čon penas o Laban ap o Yakobeste: “Tou hal mire menshendar. Tou boudress mange gar čičeske. Pen mange, hoy playsrap touke!”" 
Genesis29:16 O Labanes his douy ča. Koy phoureder kharas Lea, koy terneder Rachel." 
Genesis29:17 I Leakre yaka his gar sasto. I Rachel his i shoukar oun rayli čay. 
Genesis29:18 Oun o Yakob kamas i Rachel oun penas ap o Laban: “Me kamau te boudrap touke efta bersha. Koy pal deh tou man i Rachel, tiri terneder čay, te romedinerap lat.”" 
Genesis29:19 Koy penas o Laban: “Hi feteder te dap lat toute har i vavareste. Ač pash mande!” 
Genesis29:20 Yaake boudras o Yakob efta bersha, te romedinerell lo i Rachel. Oun kal bersha his an leskre yaka har i tikno tsiro, yaake boud kamas lo lat." 
Genesis29:21 Pal ko tsiro penas o Yakob ap o Laban: “De man kanna miri romyat! Ko tsiro hi koy, te romedinerap lat.”" 
Genesis29:22 Oun o Laban penas hakeneske an ko foro, te venn le koy ap i biyab. Oun yob kras i bari biyab." 
Genesis29:23 Ap i rati las o Laban peskri čat Lea oun anas lat pash o Yakobeste. Oun yob vas lah khetne. 
Genesis29:24 O Labanes his i boudepaskretsa. Koya kharas Silpa. Kolat das lo peskri čate Lea, te vell li kanna lakri boudepaskretsa." 
Genesis29:25 Taysarlakro dikas o Yakob, kay yoy his i Lea. Koy penas lo ap o Laban: “Hoske kral kova? Boudrom touke, te lap i Rachel. Hoske rhorhral man tou?”" 
Genesis29:26 Penas o Laban ap leste: “An maro them krenn le kova gar yaake, kay denn le koy terneder čat krik glan koy phoureder." 
Genesis29:27 Kre i biyab efta divessa kalah. Koy pal dau tout ninna koy vavar. Oun tou boudreh mange pale efta bersha lake.” 
Genesis29:28 Oun o Yakob kras yaake oun kras i biyab efta divessa mit i Lea. Koy pal das o Laban les peskri čat Rachel, te romedinerell yob lat." 
Genesis29:29 O Labanes his i vavar boudepaskretsa. Koya kharas Bilha. Kolat das lo peskri čate Rachel, te vell li kanna lakri boudepaskretsa." 
Genesis29:30 Oun o Yakob oun i Rachel van khetne. Oun o Yakob kamas i Rachel boudeder har i Lea. Oun yob boudras pale o Labaneske efta bersha. 
Genesis29:31 Har o baro Devel dikas, kay o Yakob i Lea gar kamas, kras yob, kay i Lea anas nay čaven ap i phoub. I Rachel nay las kek čaven." 
Genesis29:32 Oun i Lea vas an vavar koova oun anas i čaves ap i phoub. Koles das yoy ko lab Ruben oun penas: “O baro Devel dikas miri bibarht. Čačepah, kanna kamell man miro rom.”" 
Genesis29:33 Oun yoy vas pale an vavar koova oun anas i čaves ap i phoub oun penas: “O baro Devel shounas, kay miro rom man gar kamell. Doleske das lo man ninna kava čaves.” Oun yoy das les o lab Simeon." 
Genesis29:34 Oun yoy vas pale an vavar koova oun anas i čaves ap i phoub. Oun yoy penas: “Kava kopo djal miro romeskro dji ap mande. Me anom leske triin čaven ap i phoub.” Doleske dan le kava čaves ko lab Levi. 
Genesis29:35 Oun yoy vas pale an vavar koova oun anas i čaves ap i phoub oun penas: “Kanna sharau o baro Debles.” Doleske das yoy les ko lab Youda. Pal kova anas yoy i tsiro bouder kek čaven ap i phoub. 
Genesis30:1 Har i Rachel dikas, kay anas yoy o Yakobeske kek čaven ap i phoub, zilveras yoy ap peskri phenyate, oun penas ap o Yakob: “De man čave! Te deh man kek, merau me.”" 
Genesis30:2 Koy las o Yakob i bari rholi ap i Rachel oun penas: “Hom me o Devel, te nay dap tout čave!”" 
Genesis30:3 Koy penas yoy: “Me dau tout miri boudepaskretsa Bilha. Ab lah khetne, te anell li mange i ternepen ap i phoub, te vap ninna pral i ternepen day.”" 
Genesis30:4 Oun yoy das les lakri boudepaskretsa Bilha, te vell yoy leskri romni. Oun o Yakob djas pash late." 
Genesis30:5 Oun i Bilha vas an vavar koova oun anas o Yakobeske i čaves ap i phoub. 
Genesis30:6 Koy penas i Rachel: “O Devel das man miro čačepen. Yob shounas ap miri gole oun das man i čavo.” Dran kova das les li o lab Dan. 
Genesis30:7 Oun i Bilha vas pale an vavar koova oun anas o Yakobeske i douyto čaves ap i phoub. 
Genesis30:8 Koy penas i Rachel: “Man his i baro kourepen miri phenyah oun homs zorleder har yoy.” Oun yoy das les ko lab Naftali. 
Genesis30:9 Har i Lea dikas, kay las yoy kek čave bouder, das yoy peskri boudepaskretsa Silpa peskro romeste, te vell yoy leskri romni." 
Genesis30:10 Oun i Silpa anas o Yakobeske i čaves ap i phoub. 
Genesis30:11 Koy penas i Lea: “Havi barht! Oun yoy das les ko lab Gad.” 
Genesis30:12 Oun i Silpa anas o Yakobeske i douyto čaves ap i phoub. 
Genesis30:13 Koy penas i Lea: “Har barhtelo hom me. I romya sharenna man oun penenna Havi barhteli romni! ” Oun yoy das les ko lab Asser. 
Genesis30:14 Ap ko tsiro, har anan le o djob dren, djas o Ruben vin ap o them oun hatsas kamlepaskre phabya, oun anas len peskri dake Lea. Koy penas i Rachel ap i Lea: “De man douy, triin kamlepaskre phabya, hoy tiro čavo hatsas!”" 
Genesis30:15 “Hi touke gar doha, te lal mange miro romes mandar krik”, penas i Lea. “Kanna kameh ninna i kamlepaskre phabya miro čavestar mandar te lell?” Koy penas i Rachel: “Te deh man kolla, sovell o Yakob kay rati pash toute.”" 
Genesis30:16 O Yakob boudras ap i harhetikri phoub. Har yob i rati khere vas, djas i Lea o paash drom pash leste oun penas: “Tou hounte vess kay rati pash mande. Me ginom tout oun playsrom mit kol kamlepaskre phabya miro čavestar.” Oun yob sovas koy rati pash late." 
Genesis30:17 Oun o Devel shounas ap i Lea. Oun yoy vas an vavar koova oun anas o Yakobeske o pančto čavo ap i phoub. 
Genesis30:18 Oun i Lea penas: “Me dom miri boudepaskretsa miro romeste. Doleske his o Devel lačo ap mande.” Oun yoy das peskro čaves ko lab Issakar. 
Genesis30:19 Oun i Lea vas pale an vavar koova oun anas o Yakobeske i shobto čaves ap i phoub. 
Genesis30:20 Oun penas: “O Devel das man i kouč koova. Kava kopo sharell man miro rom. Anom leske shob čaven ap i phoub.” Oun yoy das les ko lab Zabulon. 
Genesis30:21 Pal kova anas li i čay ap i phoub oun das lat ko lab Dina. 
Genesis30:22 Oun o Devel bistras i Rachel gar. Yob shounas ap late oun kras, te vell yoy day." 
Genesis30:23 Yoy vas an vavar koova oun anas i čaves ap i phoub oun penas: “O Devel las miri ladj mandar krik.” 
Genesis30:24 Oun yoy das les ko lab Yosef oun penas: “Mou dell man o baro Devel i vavar čavo.” 
Genesis30:25 Har i Rachel o Yosefes ap i phoub anas, penas o Yakob ap o Labaneste: “Mouk man te djal pash mire menshende an miro them!" 
Genesis30:26 De man mire romyen oun mire čaven, kolenge boudrom touke. Oun mouk men te djal! Tou djineh, har mishto boudrom touke.”" 
Genesis30:27 Koy penas o Laban ap leste: “Ab mange lačo oun ač kay! Hayvau, kay o baro Devel peskri zoor oun peskri barht ap mande čivella yaake rah, har tou pash mande hal." 
Genesis30:28 Pen mange, hoy te playsrap touke! Dau tout, hoy kameh.”" 
Genesis30:29 Koy penas o Yakob ap leste: “Tou djineh, har me boudrom touke mishto, oun tire firhe van boud oun boudeder, yaake rah har me pash toute hom." 
Genesis30:30 Har vom pash toute, his tout gar boud firhe. Kanna hi tout boud. O baro Devel čivas peskri zoor oun peskri barht ap tiro koova – ap halauter, hoy lom an miro vast. Kanna hounte boudrap ninna mange oun miri familyake.”" 
Genesis30:31 Koy penas o Laban: “Hoy te playsrap touke?” “Tou hounte dess man či”, penas o Yakob. “Te kreh kova, hoy touke penau, kamau te dap doureder yak ap tire firhende:" 
Genesis30:32 Kay dives djau mank tire tsele firhende, te čivap hake tikne bakre ap i rig, kay kalo hi oun kolen kalo bal hi mank pengro parno bal. Ninna čivau ap i rig hake tikne bouzya, kolen parno bal hi mank pengro kalo bal. Yon hi mire. Kolentsa playsreh tou man." 
Genesis30:33 Hake bouzya, kay hi len kek parne balla, hi tire, ninna hake parne bakre. Te rhorhau tout, dikeh tou kova sik an ko tsiro, kay vella. Te hatseh tou mank mire firhende bouzya, kay hi len kek parne balla, ninna parne bakre, kolla hi, har te čoroms len toutar.”" 
Genesis30:34 Oun o Laban penas: “Mishto. Mer krah kova yaake, har tou peneh.”" 
Genesis30:35 Ko dives čivas o Laban ap i rig: hake bouzya, kay his len ninna parne balla, oun hake kale bakre. Oun yob das len peskre čavende an o vast, te denn yon yak ap lende." 
Genesis30:36 Oun yob bičras len krik o Yakobestar, te djan le triin divessa dour. O Yakob das yak ap o Labaneskre vavar firhende." 
Genesis30:37 Oun o Yakob las kashta kol roukendar, hoy kharenna: pappeltikro rouk, mandeltikro rouk oun platantikro rouk, oun činas kotya dran lende vin, yaake kay dikan le o parno kasht." 
Genesis30:38 Kol činle kashta čivas yob an i firhengre čare, kay kol firhe dran piyenna, te venn yon koy an vavar koova." 
Genesis30:39 Oun i firhe van an vavar koova glan i kashta oun lan terne, kay his kalo-un-parno." 
Genesis30:40 Kal terne čivas o Yakob peske ap i rig. I vavar firhe anas yob khetne kol morsh firhentsa, kay his len parne oun kale kotya mashkral o Labaneskre firhende. Yaake kras yob peske boud firhe khetne. Kolen anas yob gar o Labaneskre firhentsa khetne." 
Genesis30:41 Har i zorele firhe bipandlo his, čivas o Yakob kol činle kashta glan lende an i firhengre čare, yaake kay van le an vavar koova glan kol kashta." 
Genesis30:42 Kol firhe, kay gar zorelo his, glan kolende čivas yob kek kashta. Yaake van o Labaneske kolla boldo, kay gar zorelo his. O Yakobes van i zorele." 
Genesis30:43 Yaake vas o Yakob hako dives bravleder. Oun les his boud firhe oun boudepangre: djouvya oun morsha. Ninna boud khamele oun bourike his les. 
Genesis31:1 Oun o Yakob shounas, hoy o Labaneskre čave pal leste rakran oun penan: “O Yakob las peske halauter, hoy maro dadeskro his. Kova, hoy maro dadeskro his, kolestar vas lo yaake bravelo.”" 
Genesis31:2 Oun o Yakob hayvas, kay o Laban bouder gar lačo ap leste his, har glan kava tsiro." 
Genesis31:3 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Yakobeste: “Dja khere an tiro dadeskro them pash tire menshende! Me hom pash toute.” 
Genesis31:4 Oun o Yakob bičras yekes pash i Rachel oun i Lea, te penell yob len: “Avenn vin pash mande ap o them, kay mire firhe hi!”" 
Genesis31:5 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Hayvom, kay t'maro dad dikell bouder gar lačo ap mande har glan kava tsiro. Miro dadeskro Devel his mantsa." 
Genesis31:6 Oun t'mer djinenn, har boudrom t'maro dadeske miri tseli zoryah." 
Genesis31:7 T'maro dad rhorhras man: Deesh kope kras lo miro playsepen vavarčandes. O Devel moukas les gar te krell lo mange čilačepen. 
Genesis31:8 Te penas o Laban: Tou leh kol firhe, hoy hi len tikne kotya vavar ballentsa har ko vavar bal, palle his kol tsele ternen, kay bolde van, tikne kotya vavar ballentsa. Oun te penas yob: Me playsrau tout kol firhentsa, hoy hi len lengste sane kotya vavar balentsa, palle his i tsele ternen, kay bolde van, lengste sane kotya." 
Genesis31:9 O Devel las kol tsele firhen t'maro dadestar oun das len mande. 
Genesis31:10 Har ko tsiro vas, kay van i firhe bipandlo, dikom an i souni i morsh bouzya, kay djan ap i firhende. Len his kotya vavar ballentsa har ko vavar bal. Kol kotya his lengsto oun sano, ninna boud oun tikne, ninna bare kotya." 
Genesis31:11 Oun o Debleskro bolepaskro penas ap mande an i souni: Yakob! Penom: Ake hom. 
Genesis31:12 Koy penas yob: Me dikom halauter, hoy o Laban tout kras. Doleske krom me, kay kol tsele morsh bouzya, kay djan ap i firhende pre, kolen hi kotya vavar ballentsa: lengste oun sane kotya, ninna boud oun tikne kotya, ninna bare kotya." 
Genesis31:13 Me hom o Devel, kay moukas pes toutar te dikell an o foro Betel, kay čival mange i bar pre, čoral djet koy pre oun dal tout sovel ap mande. Kanna ste pre, dja dran kava them! Oun dja khere an ko them tire menshendar! ”" 
Genesis31:14 I Rachel oun i Lea penan ap o Yakobeste: “Men vell kek bravlepen oun kek vavar koova bouder an maro dadeskro kheer pal leskro merepen. 
Genesis31:15 Ham leske har rhale. Yob bikras men. Oun kol love, hoy yob menge las, das lo lauter vin." 
Genesis31:16 Čačepah o tselo bravlepen, hoy o Devel maro dadestar krik las, hi menge oun mare čavenge. Kre yaake, har o Devel touke penas!”" 
Genesis31:17 Koy hadas o Yakob peskre čaven oun romyen ap i khamele," 
Genesis31:18 oun tradas peskre tsele firhen glan peste. Ninna las lo peskro tselo bravlepen, hoy yob kras peske khetne an o them Paddan-Aram, te djal lo pash peskro dadeste Isaak an o them Kanaan." 
Genesis31:19 Glan lengro naashepen, har his o Laban vin, te činell lo o bal peskre bakrendar, čoras i Rachel i khereskre deblen, hoy lakro dad an-mangell. Oun yoy las len peha." 
Genesis31:20 Oun o Yakob rhorhras o Labanes, ko Aramari oun penas leske gar, kay yon kaman penge te djal." 
Genesis31:21 Oun o Yakob oun halauter, hoy les his, nashan oun djan pral o lengsto pani Eufrat. Oun djan ap o drom an i berge, kay kharenna Gilead." 
Genesis31:22 Ap o triinto dives vas o Labaneske penlo, kay o Yakob nashas peske." 
Genesis31:23 Oun o Laban las peskre phralen peha. Oun khetne lan le o Yakobes palla efta divessa oun hatsan les ap i berge Gilead. 
Genesis31:24 An i rati vas o Devel an i souni pash o Laban, ko Aramari. Oun penas ap leste: “Kre o Yakobes kek čilačepen oun de yak ap tire laba, hoy rakreh o Yakobeha!”" 
Genesis31:25 Oun o Laban vas pash o Yakobeste ap kol berge, kay yob peskro plarhteno kheer pre čivas. Oun ninna o Laban peskre phralentsa čivas peskro plarhteno kheer pre ap kol berge Gilead." 
Genesis31:26 Oun o Laban penas ap o Yakobeste: “Hoy kral tou? Hoske rhorhral man oun čoral mire čen mandar krik, har te vans yon an o kourepen tapedo?" 
Genesis31:27 Hoske nashal touke čorrhanes? Hoske rhorhral man oun penal mange gar, kay kameh touke te djal? Barhteles djoms me t'mentsa i kotar peha ap o drom i gipah oun i bashepah." 
Genesis31:28 Hoske moukal man gar te čoumrap mire čengre čaven oun mire čen? Kova his dinelo toutar! 
Genesis31:29 Kova hi an miro vast, te krap touke čilačepen. Krau kova gar. O Devel t'maro dadestar rakras mantsa taysar rati oun penas ap mande: Kre o Yakobes kek čilačepen oun de yak ap tire laba, hoy rakreh o Yakobeha!" 
Genesis31:30 Me djinau, tiro dji hi pash tire menshende. Doleske djal touke. Pen mange, hoske čoral mire deblen, kolen me an-mangau?”" 
Genesis31:31 “Čačepah”, penas o Yakob ap o Labaneste, “man his traash, te less tire čen mandar krik." 
Genesis31:32 Tire deblen lom me gar. Pash koneste tou len hatseh, kova hounte merella! Glan mare menshende nay rodeh pash mande! Te hatseh čomone, hoy tiro hi, le kova!” O Yakob djinas gar, kay i Rachel čoras kol deblen." 
Genesis31:33 Yaake djas o Laban an i plarhtene khera, kay djivas o Yakob, i Lea, ninna kol douy boudepangre leskre čendar oun hatsas či. Palle djas yob vin dran i Leakro plarhteno kheer oun djas an o plarhteno kheer, kay i Rachel djivas." 
Genesis31:34 I Rachel las kol khereskre deblen, khatras len tel i khamelakri pernitsa, oun beshas pes pral pre. Oun o Laban rodas an o tselo plarhteno kheer oun hatsas či." 
Genesis31:35 Oun yoy penas ap peskro dadeste: “Ab gar rhoyedo, miro dad, kay nay stau gar pre glan toute. Man hi i djouvyakro koova.” Doleske hatsas yob kol khereskre deblen gar, yaake boud yob ninna rodas." 
Genesis31:36 Kanna vas o Yakob rhoyedo oun čingras ap o Labaneste oun penas ap leste: “Havo čilačo koova krom me? Hoy hi miri doosh, kay leh man palla?" 
Genesis31:37 Tou rodal an miro tselo koova. Hatsal tou čomone, hoy tiro hi? Te hi kova yaake, čip kova, hoy hatsal, glan mire menshende oun tire menshende, te penenn yon, koon mendar čilačo koova kras!" 
Genesis31:38 Biish bersha homs pash toute. An ko tselo tsiro anas kek tire bakrendar oun bouzyendar i moulo ternepen ap i phoub. Me lom mange kek morsh bakro tire bakrendar rhapaske. 
Genesis31:39 Kol bakren, hoy kol divye firhe maran, anom me gar pash toute. Me hounte playsrom touke kolen oun dom tout mire bakrendar. Kova kamal tou yaake. Touke his yek, te his dives, te his rati, kay van kol firhe čoredo." 
Genesis31:40 Yaake djas mange: Ap o dives maras man o kham oun an i rati o shilapen. Boud kope nay sovom me gar. 
Genesis31:41 Biish bersha his kova yaake. Deesh-te-star bersha boudrom touke, te lap tire douy čen. Shob bersha boudrom tire firhenge. Deesh kope kral tou miro playsepen vavarčandes." 
Genesis31:42 O Devel miro dadestar, kay ninna o Abrahameskro Devel hi, oun kolestar trashell miro dad Isaak, te vals ko Devel gar ap miri rig, čačepah, moukals man čorveles te djal. O Devel dikas, har marom man touke tele oun har pharo miri boudi his. Doleske his yob taysar rati ap miri rig tardo.”" 
Genesis31:43 Koy penas o Laban ap o Yakobeste: “Mire ča hi mire. Lengre čave hi mire, kol firhe hi mire. Halauter, hoy dikeh hi miro. Kanna nay krau me či bouder mire čenge oun lengre čavenge." 
Genesis31:44 Kanna am, mer dah maro dadeskro vast koy pre, kay krah mer bouder kek čingepen yek o vavareha.”" 
Genesis31:45 Oun o Yakob las i bar oun čivas les o Debleske pre. 
Genesis31:46 Oun yob penas ap peskre menshende: “Rodenn barra!” Koy anan le barra oun čivan len khetne. Oun ap kol barra rhan le i rhapen. 
Genesis31:47 O Laban das kol barra ko lab Yegar-Sahaduta. Oun o Yakob das kol barra ko lab Gal-Ed. 
Genesis31:48 Oun o Laban penas: “Čačepah, kol barra hi i sikepen oun sikrenn mande oun toute, kay dam men mer sovel kay.”" 
Genesis31:49 Doleske venn le Gal-Ed kharedo, ninna Mispa. O Laban penas: “O baro Devel mou dell yak, te rikras men ap kova an ko tsiro, kay vella, kay ham bouder gar khetne." 
Genesis31:50 Te hal tou čilačo ap mire čende oun te leh tou vavar romyen, djiness, o Devel dikell kova, ninna te djinau me kova gar.”" 
Genesis31:51 Oun palle penas o Laban ap o Yakobeste: “Ake! Kal barra, hoy čivom pre, oun ko bar, hoy čival o Debleske pre, hi koy tardo." 
Genesis31:52 Kol barra penenn mange oun touke, te djap gar ap tiri rig oun tou gar ap miri rig, te krell kek o vavareske čilačepen." 
Genesis31:53 Ko Devel, kay hi o Abrahameskro Devel oun o Nahoreskro Devel, kova mou dell koles i phagi, kay rikrell pes gar ap kova.” Yaake das pes o Yakob sovel ap ko Debleste, kay leskro dad Isaak daras lestar." 
Genesis31:54 Oun yob maras i firho o Debleske ap koy berga oun kras i rhapen peskre menshenge. Oun yon rhan oun ačan i rati koy. 
Genesis32:1 Taysarlakro stas o Laban pre, čoumras peskre čengre čaven oun peskre čen oun penas ap lende: “Ačenn miro Debleha!” Oun djas khere." 
Genesis32:2 Oun o Yakob djas doureder. Oun o Debleskre bolepangre tapran les ap o drom. 
Genesis32:3 Har o Yakob len dikas, penas lo: “Kate hi o Debleskri platsa.” Oun das koy platsa ko lab: Mahanayim." 
Genesis32:4 Oun o Yakob bičras morshen glan peste pash peskro phraleste Esau an o them Seir an o them Edom. 
Genesis32:5 Ap lende penas yob: Penenn miro rayeske Esau: “Yaake penell tiro boudepaskro Yakob: Me homs o tselo tsiro pash o Laban oun vau kanna pale. 
Genesis32:6 Man hi groumya oun bourike, bakre oun bouzya, oun boudepangre: morsha oun djouvya. Bičrau kal morshen, te penenn le kova touke, miro rayeske, te vess lačo ap mande. ”" 
Genesis32:7 I morsha van pale pash o Yakobeste oun penan ap leste: “Mer hams pash tiro phraleste Esau. Yob hi ap o drom te vell lo pash toute. Star-sheel morsha hi pash leste.” 
Genesis32:8 Koy trashas o Yakob. Oun les his bari daar. Oun yob bičras i paash leskre boudepangrendar, leskre bakrendar, groumyendar oun khamele ap yek rig. Oun koy vavar paash bičras lo ap i vavar rig." 
Genesis32:9 Yob penas peske: “Te vell o Esau oun dell kolen ap koy yek rig moulo, nashenn nay kolla ap koy vavar rig.”" 
Genesis32:10 Oun o Yakob penas ap o Debleste: “Tou, o Devel miro papestar Abraham oun miro dadestar Isaak, tou hal o baro Devel, kay penal ap mande: Dja pale an tiro them oun pash tire menshende. Me krau touke lačepen." 
Genesis32:11 Me, tiro boudepaskro, hom gar moldo, kay hal yaake lačo oun kamlo ap mande. Har djom pral o pani Yordan, his man či har i kasht an o vast. Kanna hi man i bari familya oun kal boud firhe, kay hi ap douy bare platse." 
Genesis32:12 De yak ap mande, te krell miro phraal o Esau mange či! Man hi daar lestar, te vell lo oun marell man, ninna i daya pengre čaventsa." 
Genesis32:13 Tou penal: Čačepah, kamau te vap touke lačo. Kamau te krap tire čaven, kay pal toute venna, yaake boud har i tikne barra pash o baro pani, kolendar kek djinell kitse yon hi. ”" 
Genesis32:14 Oun o Yakob ačas i rati koy. Oun las i firhendar, hoy pash leste his, te dell lo len peskro phraleste Esau:" 
Genesis32:15 i bouzyendar: douy-sheel djouvya oun biish morsha; i bakrendar: douy-sheel djouvya oun biish morsha; 
Genesis32:16 i khamelendar: triin-desha djouvya oun lengre terne; i groumyendar: star-desha djouvya oun deesh morsha; i eslendar: biish djouvya oun deesh morsha. 
Genesis32:17 Oun yob das len peskre boudepangrende an o vast oun penas ap lende: “Djan glan mande, yek pal o vavareste leskre firhentsa! Moukenn i kotar drom mank hakeneste!”" 
Genesis32:18 Ap o glanstuneste penas lo: “Te dikell miro phraal Esau tout oun poučell toutar: Koon hi tiro ray? Kay djah tou? Kones hi kol firhe? 
Genesis32:19 Peness: Yon hi tiro boudepaskres Yakob. Yob anell len touke, leskro rayeske. Tiro boudepaskro Yakob vell pal mende. ”" 
Genesis32:20 Ap o douyto boudepaskro, ap o triinto oun ap i tsele vavarende, kay djan pal i firhende, penas o Yakob: “Te dikenn o Esaes, penenn kal laba ap leste!" 
Genesis32:21 Bistrenn gar te penenn leske kova: Dik, tiro boudepaskro Yakob vell pal mende. ” O Yakob penas peske: “Kamau, te bistrell o Esau peskri rholi ap mande. Te dikell lo kova, hoy me les dau, nashte vell, kay lell man lo lačes pre.”" 
Genesis32:22 Yaake djan i boudepangre i firhentsa glan o Yakobeste. Oun yob ačas i rati ap koy platsa. 
Genesis32:23 Mashkral an i rati stas o Yakob pre, las peskre douy romyen, i Rachel oun i Lea, oun leskre douy vavar romyen, oun leskre deesh-te-yek morsh čaven, oun djas lentsa vergel ko pani, hoy kharella yabbok." 
Genesis32:24 Pal lende anas lo lauter, hoy les his, ap i vavar rig." 
Genesis32:25 Yob kokres ačas pale. Oun i morsh kouras pes leha i tseli rat. 
Genesis32:26 Har ko morsh dikas, kay nashte vitsrell lo gar o Yakobes ap i phoub an kava kourepen, das lo les ap o kokalo ap leskri rig. Oun ko kokalo djas vin kote, kay lo dren his." 
Genesis32:27 Koy penas o morsh: “Mouk man te djal, o dives vella.” Penas o Yakob: “Me moukau tout gar te djal, bis te tou rakral o Debleskri barht pral mande vin.”" 
Genesis32:28 Koy poučas lestar ko morsh: “Har khareh tou?” “Yakob”, penas yob." 
Genesis32:29 Penas ko morsh: “Tiro lab hi bouder gar Yakob. Kanna vell tiro lab Israel. Tou koural tout o Debleha oun i menshentsa. Oun tou hals zorleder har yon.” 
Genesis32:30 Penas o Yakob ap leste: “Kanna pen mange tiro lab!” Penas yob: “Hoske poučeh pal miro lab?” Oun yob penas Ač o Debleha! ap o Yakobeste. 
Genesis32:31 Oun o Yakob das koy platsa ko lab Penouel. Yob penas: “Me dikom o Debles an i yaka. Oun me merom gar.” 
Genesis32:32 Har moukas lo koy platsa Penouel, djas o kham pre pral leste. Oun yob djas bango. O kokalo ap leskri rig his bouder gar ap peskri platsa." 
Genesis32:33 Ko morsh, kay kouras pes leha, das les ap ko kokalo. Doleske rhan i Israelitarya bis kava dives gar ko firhengro mass, hoy ap ko kokalo hi." 
Genesis33:1 Oun o Yakob dikas dour glan peste oun dikas, kay vas o Esau pash leste. Khetne leha van star sheel morsha. Koy čivas o Yakob peskre čaven pash lengre dayende: pash i Lea, pash i Rachel oun pash kol douy boudepangre." 
Genesis33:2 Oun yob čivas kol douy boudepangre pengre čaventsa glan i vavarende. Pal lende čivas lo i Lea pengre čaventsa oun pal kolate i Rachel oun o Yosef. 
Genesis33:3 O Yakob djas glan lende oun čivas pes efta kope tele ap i phoub, bis te vas yob pash peskro phraleste." 
Genesis33:4 Koy nashas o Esau pash leste, las les troul i meen oun čoumras les. Oun hake douy rovan." 
Genesis33:5 Oun o Esau dikas pre oun dikas i djouvyen i čaventsa oun poučas lestar: “Koon hi kolla, kay pash toute hi?” Penas o Yakob: “Miro Ray, kalla hi mire čave. O Devel his mange yaake lačo, kay das lo man kal čave.”" 
Genesis33:6 Kanna van kol douy boudepangre pengre čaventsa glan oun čivan pen tele glan o Esau. 
Genesis33:7 Ninna i Lea peskre čaventsa vas glan oun čivas pes tele glan o Esau. Pal halauterende van o Yosef oun i Rachel oun čivan pen tele glan o Esau. 
Genesis33:8 “Hoy kameh tou kol tsele firhentsa, hoy pash mande van?” poučas o Esau. “Kamau te dap len toute, te vess mange lačo, miro ray”, penas o Yakob." 
Genesis33:9 “Man hi doha, miro phraal”, penas o Esau. “Rike kova, hoy tiro hi.”" 
Genesis33:10 “Na-a”, penas o Yakob. “Mangau tout: Te hal mange lačo, le mandar kova, hoy me tout dau dran mire vasta. Me dikom an tiro mouy, har te dikap an o Debleskro mouy, yaake kamlo dikal ap mande." 
Genesis33:11 Le kova, hoy touke bičrom. O Devel das man halauter. Oun man hi doha.” Oun yob moukas gar tele te mangell lo les, bis te las o Esau kova." 
Genesis33:12 Oun o Esau penas: “Djas mer doureder! Me djau glan toute.” 
Genesis33:13 Penas o Yakob: “Miro ray, tou djineh, kay i čave tikno hi. Pash mande hi ninna groumya oun bakre, kay len terne hi. Te nashens yon hounte yek dives sik, merans i tsele firhe." 
Genesis33:14 Miro ray, dja touke glan vin. Oun me djau i firhentsa oun i čaventsa pal toute, yaake sik har djala, bis te vau pash toute, miro ray, an o them Seir.”" 
Genesis33:15 Penas o Esau ap leste: “Me kamau mire morshendar pash toute moukell.” “Hoske?” poučas o Yakob. “Mange hi doha, kay tou, miro ray, mange lačo hal.”" 
Genesis33:16 Yaake kras pes o Esau ko dives pale ap o drom an o them Seir. 
Genesis33:17 Oun o Yakob djas doureder an Soukot, kras peske i kheer oun khera i firhenge. Doleske das lo koy platsa ko lab Soukot." 
Genesis33:18 Pal kova vas o Yakob mishto pash o foro Sichem, kay an o them Kanaan čiddo hi. Kate ačas lo, har yob dran o them Paddan-Aram vas, oun čivas peskre plarhtene khera pre glan o foro." 
Genesis33:19 Oun ginas ko kotar phoub, kay leskro plarhteno kheer tardo his, oun das sheel roupene kotya i čavende ko morshestar Hamor. Leskro čavo hi o Sichem." 
Genesis33:20 Kote kras o Yakob i rhačepaskri o Debleske, te venn firhe leske rhačedo, oun das koy rhačepaskri ko lab O Devel hi o Israeleskro Devel." 
Genesis34:1 Oun i Dina, koy čay, hoy i Lea o Yakobeske ap i phoub anas, djas vin te dikell li i djouvyen an ko them." 
Genesis34:2 Koy dikas lat o Sichem, koleskro dad o Hivari Hamor his. O Hamor his o ray pral ko them. Oun o Sichem tapras lat i zoryah oun čivas pes pash late." 
Genesis34:3 Oun yob kamas lat o djiyestar oun rakras lače labentsa ap late. 
Genesis34:4 Ap peskro dadeste penas yob: “Le mange koy čay, te romedinerap lat.”" 
Genesis34:5 Har o Yakob shounas, kay leskri čay an-tapedo vas i zoryah, kras lo či, bis te leskre čave khere van. Kolla his leskre firhentsa vin ap o them." 
Genesis34:6 Oun o Sichemeskro dad, o Hamor, vas vin pash o Yakobeste, te rakrell lo leha." 
Genesis34:7 Har o Yakobeskre čave khere van oun shounan, hoy o Sichem kras, doukas kova len an o dji oun len vas i bari rholi pral o Sichem. Yob kras čomone, hoy te vell gar kerdo oun anas bari ladj pral o Israel." 
Genesis34:8 Oun o Hamor rakras o Yakobeha oun leskre čaventsa oun penas: “Miro čavo Sichem kamell t'mari phenyat o djiyestar. Denn lat leste te romedinerell lo lat! 
Genesis34:9 Oun mer čivah men khetne. Denn men t'mare čen! Oun lenn t'menge mare čen! 
Genesis34:10 Oun djivenn pash mende! Kava them hi ninna t'menge. Ačenn kay! Oun djan trouyel parepaske oun krenn t'menge khera!” 
Genesis34:11 Oun o Sichem penas ap o Yakobeste oun ap leskre čavende: “Avenn mange lačo oun penenn mange, hoy te dap t'men! Me dau t'men, hoy t'mer mandar kamenna." 
Genesis34:12 Mangenn mandar boud. Me playsrau, hoy mangenn mandar. Denn man koy čat, te romedinerap lat!”" 
Genesis34:13 Koy rakran o Yakobeskre čave rhorhepah kol douy morshentsa, o Sichem oun leskro dadeha Hamor doleske, kay tapras o Sichem lengri phenyat i zoryah an. Oun yon penan:" 
Genesis34:14 “Mer krah nay kova gar, te das mari phenyat i romeste, kay gar činlo hi. Kova vals menge i bari ladj." 
Genesis34:15 Te venn t'mer har mer, yaake te vell hako morsh pash t'mende činlo, palle krah mer, hoy t'mer kamenna." 
Genesis34:16 Mer dah t'men mare čen oun lah menge t'mare čen, oun djivah pash t'mende, yaake kay vell yek natsyona dran mende oun t'mende." 
Genesis34:17 Te shounenn gar ap mende oun kamenn t'men gar činell moukell, lah mer mari pheen oun djah menge.”" 
Genesis34:18 Hoy yon koy penan his mishto glan o Hamor oun leskro čavestar Sichem. 
Genesis34:19 Oun ko terno morsh Sichem nashras kek tsiro, te krell lo kova. Yob kamas koy ča. Oun leskre tsele menshe an leskro dadeskro kheer shounan ap leste." 
Genesis34:20 Oun o Hamor oun leskro čavo Sichem djan an o baro voudar lengro forestar, te rakrenn le i morshentsa an ko foro oun penan ap lende: “Kal morsha kamenn kek čingepen mentsa. Doleske mou ačenn le an kava them, te djan le trouyel parepaske. Hi doha platsa koy. Oun mer kamah lengre čen te romedinerell. Oun mer dah len mare čen." 
Genesis34:21  
Genesis34:22 Kova hi, hoy te kras mer: Yon kamenn, te činas mer hako morshes mendar, yaake har yon činlo hi. Te krah kova, kamenn yon ap mende shounell oun ačenn pash mende oun venn yek natsyona mentsa." 
Genesis34:23 Lengre firhe, lengro bravlepen oun lauter, hoy len hi, vell maro! Kras, hoy yon kamenna, te ačenn le pash mende!”" 
Genesis34:24 Oun kolla lauter, kay djan an o foro dren oun vin, shounan ap o Hamor oun ap o Sichem, leskro čaveste. Oun hako morsh an ko foro vas činlo." 
Genesis34:25 O triinto dives, har len douka his, lan douy čave o Yakobestar, o Simeon oun o Levi, i Dinakre phrala, hakeno peskro rharo oun van an ko foro, har kek yak das. Oun yon maran i tsele morshen pengre rharentsa," 
Genesis34:26 ninna o Hamor oun leskro čaves Sichem. Dran leskro kheer lan le i Dina peha oun djan penge. 
Genesis34:27 Palle čoran o Yakobeskre čave kol moulendar an ko foro, kay lengri pheen i zoryah an-tapedo vas." 
Genesis34:28 Lengre bakre, lengre groumya, lengre bourike oun halauter, hoy an o foro oun glan o foro his, lan le penge." 
Genesis34:29 Lengro tselo bravlepen oun lengre tsele čaven oun djouvyen lan le penge. Ninna čoran le halauter, hoy an i khera his." 
Genesis34:30 Koy penas o Yakob ap o Simeon oun ap o Levi: “T'mer anan bibarht oun ladj ap mande pash kolende, kay djivenn an kava them: pash i Kanaanitarya oun i Perisarya. Mer ham gar boud menshe. Te venn yon lauter khetne oun perenn pral mende, denn le men moulo. Oun me merau miri tseli familyah.”" 
Genesis34:31 Penan kol douy ap leste: “Yob las mari phenyat, har te vals yoy i loubni. Oun mer te kras či?”" 
Genesis35:1 Oun o Devel penas ap o Yakobeste: “Kre tout ap o drom, dja an o foro Betel! Ač kote oun kre kote i rhačepaskri, te rhačress mange firhen. Me hom ko Devel, kay moukas pes toutar te dikell, har tou tiro phralestar Esau krik nashal.”" 
Genesis35:2 Koy penas o Yakob ap peskri familya oun ap lauterende, kay pash leste his: “Čivenn t'mendar krik kol deblen dran barra oun kashta, hoy t'mer an-mangenna! Thovenn t'men oun rivenn t'men djoudje ripya an!" 
Genesis35:3 Avenn, djas an o foro Betel. Kote krau i rhačepaskri o Debleske, kay shounas man ap ko dives, kay an i bibarht homs. Ko Devel his pash mande ap miro drom bis kanna.”" 
Genesis35:4 Oun yon dan o Yakobeste pengre tsele deblen dran barra oun kashta, hoy yon an-mangan, oun i tsele kanengre, hoy an lengre kanda his. Oun o Yakob paskras len tel o baro rouk pash o foro Sichem." 
Genesis35:5 Oun yon kran pen ap o drom. Oun o Devel čivas i daar ap kol menshende, kay djivan an i forya troul lende. Oun kolla lan len gar palla." 
Genesis35:6 Yaake vas o Yakob lauterentsa, kay pash leste his, an o them Kanaan an o foro Louz. Ko foro kharell kanna Betel." 
Genesis35:7 Har o Yakob peskro phralestar krik nashas, moukas pes o Devel kote lestar te dikell. Doleske kras yob kote i rhačepaskri o Debleske, kay venn firhe leske rhačedo. Oun das koy platsa ko lab El-Betel." 
Genesis35:8 Kote meras i Debora, koy djouvel, kay das garda ap i Rebekka, har his yoy tikno. Oun i Debora vas paskedo tel ko baro rouk, kay pash o foro Betel tardo his. Oun o Yakob das kol roukes o lab ropaskro rouk." 
Genesis35:9 Har o Yakob dran o them Paddan-Aram an o foro Betel vas, moukas pes o Devel pale lestar te dikell oun rakras lače laba pral leste vin." 
Genesis35:10 Oun penas: “Tou khareh Yakob. Kanna khareh tou bouder gar Yakob. Kanna vell tiro lab Israel.” Yaake las o Yakob ko lab Israel. 
Genesis35:11 Oun o Devel penas ap leste: “Me hom o zorelo Devel. Me dau tout boud čave. Yaake boud menshe venna toutar, kay lendar yek bari natsyona oun boud vavar natsyone venna. Ninna bare raya hi mank tire menshende." 
Genesis35:12 Oun ko them, hoy dom o Abrahameste oun o Isaakeste, dau toute ninna oun tire menshende.”" 
Genesis35:13 Oun o Devel djas peske kotar, kay yob o Yakobeha rakras." 
Genesis35:14 Oun ap koy platsa, kay o Devel rakras leha, čivas o Yakob i bar pre. Oun čoras mool oun djet koy pre o Debleske." 
Genesis35:15 Oun yob das koy platsa ko lab Betel. 
Genesis35:16 Pal kova moukan le ko foro Betel oun djan an o foro Efrata. Oun ap o drom anas i Rachel i čaves ap i phoub. Oun lat his bare douka. 
Genesis35:17 Har lakre douka baro his, penas koy rhačepaskri gadji ap late: “Ma traash! Ninna kova hi i morsh čavo.”" 
Genesis35:18 I Rachel his ap o merepen čiddo. Har yoy meras, das yoy kol čaves ko lab Ben-Oni. Leskro dad das les ko lab Ben-Yamin." 
Genesis35:19 Oun i Rachel meras oun vas paskedo ap o drom pash o foro Efrata. Kova hi kanna Betlehem. 
Genesis35:20 Oun o Yakob, kay kharella ninna Israel, čivas i bar pre kote, kay li paskedo hi. Kova nashte vell diklo bis kay dives." 
Genesis35:21 Oun o Israel djas doureder oun čivas peskro plarhteno kheer pre vergel koy platsa Migdal-Eder. 
Genesis35:22 An ko tsiro har o Israel an ko them djivas, djas o Ruben pash o Yakobeskri vavar romyate, i Bilha, oun čivas pes pash late. Oun o Yakob shounas kova. O Yakobes his deesh-te-douy čave." 
Genesis35:23 I čave, kolen i Lea ap i phoub anas his o Ruben, ko phoureder čavo o Yakobestar. Pal leste vas o Simeon, o Levi, o Youda, o Issakar oun o Zabulon." 
Genesis35:24 I čave, kolen i Rachel ap i phoub anas his o Yosef oun o Benyamin." 
Genesis35:25 I čave, kolen i Bilha ap i phoub anas, his o Dan oun o Naftali. I Bilha his koy boudepaskretsa, kay his i Rachelake koy." 
Genesis35:26 I čave, kolen i Silpa ap i phoub anas, his o Gad oun o Asser. I Silpa his koy boudepaskretsa, kay his i Leake koy. Kolla his o Yakobeskre čave, kay bolde van an o them Paddan-Aram." 
Genesis35:27 Oun o Yakob vas pash peskro dadeste Isaak an Mamre pash o foro Kiryat-Arba. Kova hi kanna Hebron, kay ninna o Abraham oun o Isaak djivan." 
Genesis35:28 Oun o Isaak his 180 (sheel-te-orhta-deesh) bersh phouro. 
Genesis35:29 Oun yob meras oun vas paskedo. Les his i lengsto djipen oun meras an o mishto phourepen. Oun leskre čave, o Esau oun o Yakob, paskran les." 
Genesis36:1 Kova hi ko liil, kay činlo hi pral o Esau peskre čaventsa. Yob kharell ninna Edom." 
Genesis36:2 O Esau las peske douy romyen dran o them Kanaan: i Ada, lakro dad hi o Elon, ko Hetari; oun i Oholibama, lakro dad hi o Ana. Koleskro dad hi o Sibeon, ko Hivari." 
Genesis36:3 Leskri triinti romni his i Basmat, lakro dad hi o Ismael. Lakro phraal hi o Nebayot." 
Genesis36:4 I Ada anas o Elifas ap i phoub. I Basmat anas o Regouel ap i phoub. 
Genesis36:5 I Oholibama anas o Yehoush ap i phoub, ninna o Yalam oun o Korah. Kolla hi i čave, kay o Esaeske bolde van an o them Kanaan." 
Genesis36:6 Oun o Esau las peskre romyen oun peskre čaven oun čen oun i tsele menshen, kay an leskro kheer his, ninna peskre bakren oun peskre tsele firhen oun halauter, hoy les vas an o them Kanaan, oun djas peske an i vavar them, oun moukas peskro phrales Yakob." 
Genesis36:7 Kova, hoy kol douyen his, his yaake boud, kay nashte djivenn le gar an yek them. An ko them his gar doha rhapaske lengre boud firhenge." 
Genesis36:8 Oun o Esau, djivas ap o pralstouno them, hoy kharella Seir. O Esau hi o Edom." 
Genesis36:9 Kolla hi i laba kol menshendar, kay venna pal o Esau. Yon hi i Edomarya, kay djivan ap o pralstouno them Seir:" 
Genesis36:10 Kolla hi i laba o Esaeskre čavendar: Elifas, ko čavo leskri romyatar Ada; Regouel, ko čavo leskri romyatar Basmat." 
Genesis36:11 O Elifas las čave. Kolla his: o Teman, o Omar, o Zefo oun o Gatam oun o Kenas." 
Genesis36:12 O Elifas, les his i douyti romni. Lakro lab hi Timna. Yoy anas o Amalek ap i phoub. Kolendar lauterendar hi o Esaeskri romni Ada i mami." 
Genesis36:13 Ninna o Regouel las čave: Kolla his: o Nahat oun o Zera, o Shamma oun o Missa. Lengri mami hi o Esaeskri romni Basmat." 
Genesis36:14 Oun kolla hi i čave o Esaeskri romyatar Oholibama: o Yehoush, o Yalam, o Korah. I Oholibama hi i čay ko morshestar Ana, leskro dad hi o Sibeon." 
Genesis36:15 Oun kolla hi i raya, kay venna o Esaeskre čavendar: Leskro phoureder čavestar, o Elifas, venna o ray Teman, o ray Omar, o ray Zefo, o ray Kenas, o ray Korah, o ray Gatam, o ray Amalek. Kolla hi i raya, kay venna pal o Elifas an o them Edom. Lengri mami hi i Ada." 
Genesis36:16  
Genesis36:17 Oun kolla hi i raya, kay venna o Esaeskro čavestar Regouel: o ray Nahat, o ray Zera, o ray Shamma, o ray Missa. Kolla hi i raya, kay venna pal o Regouel an o them Edom. Lengri mami hi o Esaeskri romni Basmat." 
Genesis36:18 Oun kolla hi i čave o Esaeskri romyatar Oholibama: o ray Yehoush, o ray Yalam oun o ray Korah. Kolla hi i raya, kolengri day o Esaeskri romni Oholibama hi, kolakro dad o Ana hi." 
Genesis36:19 Kol tsele menshe oun lengre raya venna pal o Esau. Yon khetne hi i Edomarya. 
Genesis36:20 Har vas o Esau peskre čaventsa oun lengre familye an ko them Edom, djivan kote i Horarya. Lengro phouro dad his o Seir. Leskre čave his i raya pral i Horarya: o Lotan, o Shobal, o Sibon, o Ana, o Dishon, o Ezer oun o Dishan." 
Genesis36:21  
Genesis36:22 O Lotan his o dad douy čavendar: o Hori oun o Hemam. O Lotanes his i pheen. Koya his i Timna. 
Genesis36:23 O Shobal his o dad panč čavendar: o Alvan oun o Manahat oun o Ebal, o Shefi oun o Onam." 
Genesis36:24 O Sibon his o dad douy čavendar: o Aya oun o Ana. Kova hi ko Ana, kay hatsas o tato pani an o moulo them, har das lo yak ap i bourike peskro dadestar Sibon." 
Genesis36:25 O Ana his o dad i čavestar oun i čatar. Leskro čavo his o Dishon oun leskri čay his i Oholibama. 
Genesis36:26 O Dishon his o dad star čavendar: o Hemdan oun o Eshban oun o Yitran oun o Keran. 
Genesis36:27 O Ezer his o dad triin čavendar: o Bilhan oun o Saavan oun o Akan. 
Genesis36:28 O Dishan his o dad douy čavendar: o Ous oun o Aran. 
Genesis36:29 Kolla hi i raya pral i Horarya an o them Seir: o ray Lotan, o ray Shobal, o ray Sibon, o ray Ana, o ray Dishon, o ray Ezer, o ray Dishan. Pal lende van lengre menshe kharedo." 
Genesis36:30  
Genesis36:31 Oun kolla hi i bare raya an o them Edom glan ko tsiro, har vas i baro ray pral o them Israel:" 
Genesis36:32 O Bela his o baro ray pral o Edom. Leskro dad his o Beor. Oun ko lab leskro forestar his Dinaba. 
Genesis36:33 Har o Bela meras, vas o Yobab dran o foro Bozra o baro ray. Leskro dad his o Zera." 
Genesis36:34 Har o Yobab meras, vas o Housham o baro ray. Yob his dran o them Teman." 
Genesis36:35 Har o Housham meras, vas o Hadad o baro ray. Leskro dad his o Bedad. Kova kouras pes i Midianarya an o them Moab oun das len. Oun ko lab o forestar, kay o Hadad djivas, his Avit." 
Genesis36:36 Har o Hadad meras, vas o Samla dran Masreka o baro ray."
