Genesis36:37 Har o Samla meras, vas o Shaul o baro ray. Yob his dran Rehobot pash o lengsto pani Eufrat." 
Genesis36:38 Har o Shaul meras, vas o Baal-Hanan o baro ray. Leskro dad his o Akbor." 
Genesis36:39 Har meras o Baal-Hanan, koleskro dad o Akbor his, vas o Hadar o baro ray. Oun ko lab peskro forestar his Paou. Oun ko lab peskri romyatar his Mehetabel. Lakri day his i Matred, kolakro dad o Mesahab his." 
Genesis36:40 Oun kolla hi i laba kol rayendar, kay venna pal o Esau. Pal lende van pengre menshe kharedo. Ninna kol forya, kay djivan le, lan lengro lab: o ray Timna, o ray Alva, o ray Yetet, o ray Oholibama, o ray Ela, o ray Pinon, o ray Kenas, o ray Teman, o ray Mibzar, o ray Magdiel, o ray Iram. Kolla hi i raya pral i Edomarya an lengre forya an o them, kay lengro his. Lengro phouro dad hi o Esau. Lestar venna i Edomarya." 
Genesis36:41  
Genesis36:42  
Genesis36:43  
Genesis37:1 O Yakob djivas an ko them Kanaan, kay ninna leskro dad djivas." 
Genesis37:2 Kova hi ko liil, kay činlo hi pral o Yakobeskre čavende. O Yosef, i terno morsh, – yob his deesh-te-efta bersha phouro, – das yak ap i bakrende khetne peskre phralentsa. Kolla his i čave leskro dadeskre romyendar, i Bilha oun i Silpa. Oun te kran leskre phrala čilačo koova, penas lo kova pengro dadeske." 
Genesis37:3 O Yosef vas boldo, har leskro dad Israel phouro his. Oun o Israel kamas les boudeder har peskre tsele vavar čaven oun kras leske i shoukar ripen." 
Genesis37:4 Har leskre phrala dikan, kay lengro dad les boudeder kamas har len, van le čilačo ap pengro phraleste oun rakran nay bouder gar lačes leha." 
Genesis37:5 Oun o Yosef das souni, oun penas kova peskre phralenge. Koy van yon čilačeder ap leste." 
Genesis37:6 “Shounenn, hoy dom souni”, penas lo ap lende." 
Genesis37:7 “Mer pandam djob khetne ap i harhetikri phoub. Oun ap yek kopo stas miri djob pre oun ačas tardo. Oun t'mari djob vas oun his troul miri djob tardo oun vitsras pes tele glan miri djob.” 
Genesis37:8 Koy penan leskre phrala ap leste: “Kameh te vess ray pral mende? Kameh čačepah te vess o pralstouno mendar?” Oun yon his leske boudeder čilačo pral leskri souni oun leskro rakepen. 
Genesis37:9 Oun yob das i vavar souni oun penas kova peskre phralenge: “Shounenn, me dom i vavar souni. Kava kopo vitsras pes o kham oun o čon oun deesh-te-yek bolepangre momlia glan mande tele.”" 
Genesis37:10 Har yob kova peskro dadeske oun peskre phralenge penas, čingras leskro dad ap leste oun penas: “Hoy dal tou souni? Hounte vitsrap man me, tiri day oun tire phrala glan toute tele?”" 
Genesis37:11 Oun leskre phrala dikan čilače yakentsa ap leste. Leskro dad rikras kol laba an peskro dji. 
Genesis37:12 His i dives, koy his leskre phrala ap o them pash o foro Sichem, te denn le garda ap pengro dadeskre bakrende." 
Genesis37:13 Oun o Israel penas ap o Yosefeste: “Tire phrala denn garda ap i bakrende pash o foro Sichem. Kamau te bičrap tout pash lende.” “Mishto”, penas o Yosef, “me krau, hoy peneh.”" 
Genesis37:14 Koy penas o Israel: “Dja koy oun dik, har lenge oun i bakrenge djala. Oun pen les mange!” Yaake bičras yob les dran o telstouno them Hebron. Oun yob vas pash o foro Sichem." 
Genesis37:15 Koy hatsas les i rom, har yob ap o them trouyel nashas. Oun ko rom poučas lestar: “Hoy rodeh tou?”" 
Genesis37:16 “Me rodau mire phralen”, penas o Yosef. “Pen mange, kay yon ap i bakrende garda denna!”" 
Genesis37:17 “Yon djan doureder”, penas ko rom. “Me shounom, har yon penan: Mer kamah an Dotan te djal. ” Koy djas o Yosef koy, kay leskre phrala hi oun hatsas len an Dotan." 
Genesis37:18 Har i phrala dikan, kay o Yosef vella, lan yon penge glan, te denn le les moulo." 
Genesis37:19 Yek penas ap o vavareste: “Kote vell kova, kay dell narvelo koova souni." 
Genesis37:20 Avenn, mer dah les moulo oun vitsrah les an i grouba oun penah, kay i divyo firho les rhas. Yaake dikah mer, hoy leskre sounya molenna.”" 
Genesis37:21 Har shounas o Ruben kova, kamas yob les vin te lell dran lengre vasta, te vell yob gar maredo, oun penas ap lende: “Mer dah les gar moulo!" 
Genesis37:22 Moukenn les djido! Vitsrenn les an kay grouba, kay an o moulo them! Oun krenn leske či!” Yob penas kova, te lell lo les vin dran lengre vasta, te anell yob les pale pash leskro dadeste." 
Genesis37:23 Har o Yosef pash pengre phralende vas, rivan yon leskro ripen vin – kova shoukar ripen, hoy ap leste his." 
Genesis37:24 Oun lan o Yosefes oun vitsran les an i grouba. Koy his kek pani dren. 
Genesis37:25 Palle beshan pen le tele oun rhan. Dour glan lende dikan le Ismaelarya. Kolla van dran ko them Gilead oun djan an o them Egiptia. Len his khamele. Kolla hidjran kouč roukengro djet, hoy soungella mishto." 
Genesis37:26 Koy penas o Youda ap peskre phralende: “Hoy molell menge, te dah mer maro phrales moulo oun anah doosh ap mende, te nashell leskro rat?" 
Genesis37:27 Avenn, mer bikrah les ap i Ismaelarya. Yaake moukah mer les djido. Yob hi maro phraal oun maro mass oun rat.” Oun yon shounan ap leste." 
Genesis37:28 Har i parepangre dran o them Midian pashel van, tserdan les o Yosefeskre phrala dran i grouba vin, oun bikran les ap i Ismaelarya, oun lan lendar biish roupene kotya. Oun yon anan o Yosefes an o them Egiptia." 
Genesis37:29 Har vas o Ruben pale pash i grouba oun dikas, kay o Yosef bouder gar dren his, kras yob peskre ripya paash i doukatar." 
Genesis37:30 Oun yob vas pale pash peskre phralende oun penas: “Ko čavo hi bouder gar koy. Hoy krap me kanna?” 
Genesis37:31 Koy lan yon o Yosefeskro ripen, maran i bouzni oun čivan ko ripen an o rat." 
Genesis37:32 Palle bičran le ko ripen lengro dadeske oun moukan leske te penell: “Mer hatsam kova. Dik, hi kova gar o ripen tiro čavestar?”" 
Genesis37:33 Oun o Yakob prindjras ko ripen oun penas: “Kova hi miro čaveskro ripen. I divyo firho dandras les an kotya oun rhas les pre.” 
Genesis37:34 Oun o Yakob kras peskre ripya paash i doukatar. Oun čivas i gono troul peste oun rovas i rah tsiro pral peskro čaveste. 
Genesis37:35 Oun leskre tsele čave oun ča van pash leste, te rakrenn le leha lačes. Oun yob kamas gar, te vell leskri douk krik lino. “Na-a” penas yob, “miro dji rovella, bis te merau oun vau pash miro čaveste.” Yaake rovas leskro dad pral o Yosefeste." 
Genesis37:36 Oun i parepangre dran o them Midian bikran o Yosefes an o them Egiptia ap yekeste kol rayendar, kay an o baro rayeskro kheer hi. Leskro lab his Potifar. Yob his o pralstouno kolendar, kay denn garda ap o baro rayeste pral o them Egiptia." 
Genesis38:1 Ap ko tsiro moukas o Youda peskre phralen oun djas tele pash i romeste dran Adullam. Leskro lab his Hira. 
Genesis38:2 Kote dikas o Youda yek čat i morshestar, kay kharas Shoua. Kova his i Kanaanitari. Oun o Youda romedineras lat oun vas lah khetne." 
Genesis38:3 Oun yoy vas an vavar koova oun anas i čaves ap i phoub. Oun yob das les ko lab Er. 
Genesis38:4 Oun yoy vas pale an vavar koova oun anas i čaves ap i phoub. Oun yoy das les o lab Onan. 
Genesis38:5 Oun pale anas yoy i čaves ap i phoub. Oun yoy das les o lab Shela. Ap ko tsiro, har ko čavo boldo vas, his o Youda an o foro Kesib." 
Genesis38:6 Oun o Youda das peskro phoureder čaveste, o Er, i romyat. Lakro lab his Tamar." 
Genesis38:7 Oun o Er his čilačo an o baro Debleskre yaka. Oun o baro Devel moukas les te merell. 
Genesis38:8 Koy penas o Youda ap o Onan: “Ab khetne koy romyah tiro phralestar, te vell tiro phrales i čavo, har pash mende kova yaake hi.”" 
Genesis38:9 O Onan djinas, kay kol čave gar leskre hi. Doleske kras yob yaake, kay peskro phraleskri romni gar an vavar koova vella, hako kopo har vas lo lah khetne. Yob kamas gar, te vell i čavo leskro phraleske boldo." 
Genesis38:10 Oun kova, hoy yob kras, his čilačo an o baro Debleskre yaka. Oun yob moukas les ninna te merell." 
Genesis38:11 Koy penas o Youda ap i Tamar, peskro čaveskri romyate: “Ač kokres an tiro dadeskro kheer, yaake rah bis te miro čavo, o Shela, baro vas.” O Youda penas peske: Te merell yob gar har leskre phrala! Oun i Tamar djas peske oun ačas pash peskro dadeste." 
Genesis38:12 Pal i rah tsiro meras i romni o Youdaestar, kolakro dad o Shoua hi. Oun har o tsiro o ropaske trouyel his, djas o Youda an o foro Timna pash peskre boudepangre, kay činenn i bal i bakrendar. Leskro maal, o Hira dran Adullam, djas leha." 
Genesis38:13 Oun vas penlo ap i Tamar: “Ake, tiro romeskro dad djal an o foro Timna, te činell yob i bal peskre bakrendar.”" 
Genesis38:14 Yoy djinas, kay o Shela baro vas, oun kay yoy leste gar dino vas, te vell li leskri romni. Doleske rivas yoy kanna kol ripya vin, hoy i romni hidjrella, kolakro rom moulo hi. Oun čivas i diklo pral peskro mouy, yaake kay dikan le nay gar lakro mouy. Oun beshas pes pash o baro voudar glan o foro Enayim. Kova hi čiddo ap o drom an o foro Timna." 
Genesis38:15 Oun o Youda dikas lat oun patsas, kay yoy i loubni hi. Yoy his pash o drom beshdo oun lat his i diklo glan o mouy." 
Genesis38:16 Oun yob djas ap i rig pash late oun penas: “Mouk man pash toute te vell!” Yob djinas gar, kay yoy leskro čaveskri romni hi. Oun yoy penas: “Hoy deh man, te veh mantsa khetne?”" 
Genesis38:17 Penas yob: “Bičrau touke i terni bouzni – i morsh.” “De man čomone”, penas yoy, “hoy me nay rikrau, bis te man koy bouzni deh.”" 
Genesis38:18 “Hoy dap tout?” poučas yob. Koy penas yoy: “Tiri goustri tiro labeha, oun koy dori, kay i goustri pandlo hi, ninna tiro kasht, hoy an tiro vast hi.” Oun yob das kova late oun djas lah khetne. Oun yoy vas lestar an vavar koova." 
Genesis38:19 Oun yoy djas khere oun las peskro diklo tele. Oun rivas kol ripya ap peste, kay i romni hidjrella, kolakro rom moulo hi." 
Genesis38:20 Oun o Youda bičras peskro males, ko Adullamari pash late, oun das les i terni bouzni peha lake, te lell yob kova latar pale, hoy o Youda lat das. Oun yob hatsas lat gar." 
Genesis38:21 Koy poučas yob i menshendar ko forestar: “Kay hi koy loubni, kay pash o foro Enayim ap o drom his?” Oun yon penan: “Kek loubni his kay.”" 
Genesis38:22 Oun yob djas pale pale pash o Youda oun penas: “Hatsau lat gar. Ninna i menshe kote penan: Kek loubni his kay.” 
Genesis38:23 Koy penas o Youda: “Yoy nay rikrell kova, hoy me lat dom. Te rodah mer lat doureder, rakrenn i menshe pral mande. Mer kram, hoy nashte kram. Me bičrom lake koy bouzni, oun tou hatsal lat gar.”" 
Genesis38:24 Pal triin čon vas o Youdaeske penlo: “I Tamar, tiro čaveskri romni loubras pes trouyel, oun yoy hi an vavar koova.” Koy penas o Youda: “Anenn lat vin, te vell li pre rhačedo.”" 
Genesis38:25 Har yoy vin anlo vas, moukas yoy lakro romeskro dadeske te penell: “Ko morshestar hom me an o vavar koova, koneske kava hi. Prindjreh tou, koneskri goustri oun dori oun kasht kova hi?”" 
Genesis38:26 Oun o Youda prindjras kova oun penas: “Yoy hi feteder an o čačepen tardo har me. Me dom lat gar miro čaveste Shela. Doleske kras yoy kova.” O Youda vas bouder gar khetne lah. 
Genesis38:27 Oun yoy las douy čave. 
Genesis38:28 Oun har yon boldo van, čivas yek peskro vast vin. Oun i rhačedi gadji pandas i loli dori trouyel oun penas: “Kova vas glan peskro phraleste vin.”" 
Genesis38:29 Oun har yob peskro vast pale tserdas, vas leskro phraal vin. Oun yoy penas: “Tou val zoryah vin.” Oun leske vas o lab Perez dino." 
Genesis38:30 Oun pal leste vas leskro phraal vin, kova kay koy loli dori troul leskro vast his. Oun yon dan les o lab Zera." 
Genesis39:1 I Ismaelarya anan o Yosefes an o them Egiptia. Kote ginas les lendar i Egiptari. Leskro lab his Potifar. Kova his yek kol rayendar, kay an o kheer o baro rayestar pral o them Egiptia hi. Yob his ninna o pralstouno i lourdendar, kay denn garda ap o baro rayeste." 
Genesis39:2 Oun o baro Devel his pash o Yosefeste. Lauter, hoy yob kras, his mishto. Oun yob ačas an o kheer peskro egiptikro rayestar." 
Genesis39:3 Har leskro ray Potifar dikas, kay o baro Devel pash o Yosefeste his oun les barht das an lauter, hoy yob peskre vastentsa kras, his yob lačes ap leste." 
Genesis39:4 Oun yob moukas o Yosefes peske boudrell oun čivas les pral peskro kheer oun das lauter, hoy leskro his, an o Yosefeskro vast." 
Genesis39:5 Ap ko tsiro, har o Egiptari Potifar das peskro kheer oun halauter, hoy leskro his, an o Yosefeskre vasta, čivas o baro Devel peskri zoor oun peskri barht ap i menshende an o Potifareskro kheer. Yaake rah har o Yosef koy his, his o baro Debleskri zoor oun peskri barht ap halauter, hoy les his an o kheer oun ap o them." 
Genesis39:6 Yaake moukas o Potifar halauter, hoy les his, an o Yosefeskro vast oun dikas ap či, kokres ap peskro rhapen. Oun o Yosef his i shoukar oun raylo morsh." 
Genesis39:7 Ko dives vas, kay leskro rayeskri romni kamas les oun penas: “Čip tout pash mande!”" 
Genesis39:8 Yob kamas kova gar oun penas ap late: “Dik, miro ray dikell ap či an peskro kheer, yaake rah har me koy hom. Lauter krau me. Oun hoy les hi, das yob an miro vast." 
Genesis39:9 Kek hi bareder an kava kheer har me. Oun miro ray rikras či peske har tout kokres. Tou hal leskri romni. Har nay anau havi bari doosh ap mande, te krap kova, hoy o Devel gar kamella?”" 
Genesis39:10 Yek dives pal o vavar vas yoy kol labentsa. Oun yob shounas gar ap late oun čivas pes gar pash late. Vitar gar kamas yob pash late te vell. 
Genesis39:11 Ap yek dives, har yob an o kheer vas, te krell lo peskri boudi, his kek vavar boudepaskro koy." 
Genesis39:12 Koy tapras yoy les ap leskro ripen oun penas: “Čip tout pash mande!” Koy moukas yob peskro ripen an lakro vast oun nashas dran o kheer vin. 
Genesis39:13 Har yoy dikas, kay moukas yob peskro ripen an lakro vast oun nashas peske, kharas yoy i boudepangre an lakro kheer." 
Genesis39:14 “Dikenn”, penas yoy ap lende, “ko Hebreari, koles miro rom anas pash mende, kamell te krell lo dinelo koova mentsa. Yob vas, te čivell lo pes pash mande. Oun me dom bari gole." 
Genesis39:15 Oun har yob shounas, kay dom bari gole, moukas yob peskro ripen pash mande oun nashas peske.”" 
Genesis39:16 Oun yoy rikras leskro ripen pash peste, bis te o Yosefeskro ray khere vas." 
Genesis39:17 Ninna ap leste penas yoy kol laba: “Ko Hebreari, koles anal pash mende, vas pash mande, te krell yob dinelo koova mantsa." 
Genesis39:18 Har dom bari gole, moukas yob peskro ripen pash mande oun nashas peske.”" 
Genesis39:19 Har o Potifar kol laba peskri romyatar shounas, har yoy penas yaake kras tiro boudepaskro mantsa, vas yob an i bari rholi." 
Genesis39:20 Oun yob las o Yosefes oun čivas les an o stilepen, kote, kay i stilde o baro rayestar stildo his." 
Genesis39:21 Har yob kote an o stilepen his, his o baro Devel pash leste, oun his kamlo ap leste oun kras, kay hi o pralstouno pral o stilepen lačes ap leste." 
Genesis39:22 Oun o pralstouno pral o stilepen das i tsele stilden an o Yosefeskro vast. Oun les his penepaske pral i tseli boudi. 
Genesis39:23 Yaake rah, har lauter an o Yosefeskro vast his, hounte kras o pralstouno pral o stilepen či. O baro Devel his pash o Yosefeste oun das les barht an halauter, hoy yob kras." 
Genesis40:1 Pal ko tsiro anan douy pralstoune boudepangre an o baro rayeskro kheer doosh ap pende. Kol douy his i pralstoune pral o pipen oun o pral o maro. 
Genesis40:2 Oun o baro ray vas an i bari rholi pral kol douyende," 
Genesis40:3 oun čivas len stildo an ko kheer o pralstunestar i lourdendar. An ko stilepen his ninna o Yosef. 
Genesis40:4 Oun ko pralstouno lourdo bičras lenge o Yosefes, te vell yob lenge koy. Oun yon his i tsiro an o stilepen." 
Genesis40:5 Yek rati dan kol douy souni, o pralstouno pral o pipen oun o pralstouno pral o maro. Hakeno das souni. Oun koy souni kamas lenge čomone te penell." 
Genesis40:6 Taysarlakro vas o Yosef pash lende oun dikas, kay djal lenge gar mishto." 
Genesis40:7 Koy poučas yob kol douyendar: “Hoske djal t'menge gar mishto?” 
Genesis40:8 Penan yon ap leste: “Mer dam souni. Oun kek hi koy, kay penell nashte, hoy mare sounya menge penenna.” Penas o Yosef ap lende: “O Devel penell nay, hoy kol sounya penenna. Penenn t'mare sounya mange!”" 
Genesis40:9 Koy penas o pralstouno pral o pipen peskri souni o Yosefeske oun penas: “An miri souni dikom i drakengro rouk glan mande tardo. 
Genesis40:10 Ap ko drakengro rouk his triin kashta. Kolla van zenelo oun lan bloume. Oun yaake sik har bloume koy his, djan le pre oun drake van baro ap lende." 
Genesis40:11 Man his o baro rayeskro khoro an miro vast, čivom i mool dran kol drake an o baro rayeskro khoro, oun dom les o baro rayeste te piyell.”" 
Genesis40:12 Oun o Yosef penas ap leste: Kay souni penella: “Kol triin drakengre kashta hi triin divessa. 
Genesis40:13 An triin divessa moukell tout o baro ray dran o stilepen vin oun dell tout pale tiri boudi. Oun tou deh o baro rayeste pale te piyell, yaake har tou kral, har tou o pralstouno pral leskro pipen hals.”" 
Genesis40:14 O Yosef penas doureder: “Te djal touke mishto, biste man gar! Rake mange lačo pash o baro rayeste! Oun an man dran kava kheer vin!" 
Genesis40:15 Hom čoredo dran o them, kay djivenn i Hebrearya. Oun kate krom me vitar či, kay hounte djap an o stilepen.”" 
Genesis40:16 Har o pralstouno pral o maro dikas, kay kova lačo his, hoy ko vavar souni das, penas yob ap o Yosefeste: “Me dom ninna souni: Ap miro shero his triin čare pherdo mare." 
Genesis40:17 An o pralstouno kashteno čaro his lauter lačo peklo koova o baro rayeske. Oun čirkle van oun rhan lauter dran o čaro ap miro shero krik.” 
Genesis40:18 Penas o Yosef: “Kay souni penell menge: Kol triin čare hi triin divessa. 
Genesis40:19 An triin divessa moukell tout o baro ray dran o stilepen vin oun bladell tout ap i kasht. Oun i čirkle rhan tiro mass toutar krik.” 
Genesis40:20 Ap o triinto dives his o dives, kay vas o baro ray i bersh phoureder. Oun yob kras i baro rhapen kol tsele pralstunenge, kay leske boudran, oun moukas kol douyen, ko pralstounes pral o pipen oun o pralstounes pral o maro, dran o stilepen vin." 
Genesis40:21 Oun yob das o pralstounes pral o pipen pale leskri boudi, te dell yob o baro rayes pale te piyell." 
Genesis40:22 Oun o pralstounes pral o maro moukas yob te bladell ap i kasht, yaake har o Yosef lenge glan-vi penas." 
Genesis40:23 Oun o pralstouno pral o pipen bistras o Yosefes. Oun yob vas leske bouder gar an o shero. 
Genesis41:1 Pal douy bersha das o baro ray souni: An i souni dikas pes yob tardo pash o pani Nil. 
Genesis41:2 Dran o pani Nil van efta shoukar oun thoulle groumya vin. Kolla rhan o zenlepen pash o pani. 
Genesis41:3 Pal i tsiro van pal lende efta vavar groumya dran o pani vin. Kolla his djoungelo. Len his kek thoullo mass. Oun yon his tardo pash kol shoukar groumya pash o pani. 
Genesis41:4 Oun kol djoungele groumya, kay gar thoullo his, rhan kol shoukar oun thoulle groumyen. Oun o baro ray djangras pre." 
Genesis41:5 Oun yob sovas pale dren oun das i douyto kopo souni: An i souni dikas yob efta halme, hoy hidjrenn djob. Kolla van dran yek halmo vin. Yon hi pesso oun sasto." 
Genesis41:6 Pal lende van efta vavar halme dran i phoub vin. Kolla hidjrenn djob, hoy hi gar pesso. I tato dourho, hoy phourdas dran o moulo tato them, kras len trouk." 
Genesis41:7 Oun kol halme, kay gar pesso his, rhan kol efta vavar pre, kay pesso oun pherdo djob his. Oun o baro ray djangras pre oun hayvas, kay yob souni das." 
Genesis41:8 Taysarlakro daras yob. Oun yob moukas i tsele dourkepangre oun goseve an o them Egiptia te kharell. Oun o baro ray penas lenge, hoy yob souni das. Oun kek his koy, kay penell nashte, hoy koy souni leske penella." 
Genesis41:9 Koy penas o pralstouno pral o pipen ap o baro rayeste: “Kava dives vell mange miri doosh an miro shero. 
Genesis41:10 O baro rayes his i bari rholi ap mande oun ap o pralstouno pral o maro oun čivas men stildo an o kheer o pralstouno lourdestar. 
Genesis41:11 Mer douy dam souni an yek rati. Koy souni penas menge, hoy vella." 
Genesis41:12 Oun kote his pash mende i terno morsh, i Hebreari. Kova his i boudepaskro kol pralstouno lourdestar. Leske penam, hoy souni dam. Oun yob penas hakeneske mendar, hoy koy souni penella." 
Genesis41:13 Oun yaake har yob penas, yaake vas kova. Man das o baro ray pale miri boudi. Oun o vavares moukas yob ap i kasht te bladell.”" 
Genesis41:14 Koy bičras o baro ray yekes, te kharell yob o Yosefes. Oun yon moukan les sik dran o stilepen vin. Oun yob činas peskri čor tele, rivas neve ripya ap peste oun vas pash o baro rayeste." 
Genesis41:15 Oun o baro ray penas ap o Yosefeste: “Me dom souni. Oun kek hi koy, kay penell nay, hoy miri souni penella. Toutar penan yon mange: Te shouneh i souni, peneh nay, hoy i souni penella.”" 
Genesis41:16 Koy penas o Yosef ap o baro rayeste: “Me nay krau kova gar. O Devel penella, hoy o baro rayeske mishto hi.”" 
Genesis41:17 Koy penas o baro ray ap o Yosefeste: “An miri souni hom tardo pash o pani Nil. 
Genesis41:18 Oun dikom, kay van dran o pani efta thoulle oun shoukar groumya vin. Kolla rhan o zenlepen pash o pani." 
Genesis41:19 Pal lende van efta vavar groumya dran o pani vin. Kolla his gar thoullo. Yon his djoungelo oun sano. An o tselo them Egiptia dikom kek djoungleder groumyen har kolla. 
Genesis41:20 Oun kol sane djoungele groumya rhan kol efta thoulle groumyen. 
Genesis41:21 Oun har yon len pre rhan, dikan yon vin, har te rhans le len gar. Yon ačan djoungeles, har yon his. Koy djangrom pre." 
Genesis41:22 Dom pale souni oun dikom efta halme, hoy hidjrenn djob. Kolla van dran yek halmo vin oun his pesso oun sasto." 
Genesis41:23 Pal lende van efta vavar halme dran i phoub vin. Kolla hidjran djob, hoy his gar pesso. I tato dourho, hoy phourdas dran o moulo tato them, kras len sano oun trouk." 
Genesis41:24 Oun kol sane halme rhan kol efta pesse halme. Oun me penom kova, hoy dom souni, kol dourkepangre. Oun kek his koy, kay penell nashte mange, hoy kol sounya mange penenna.”" 
Genesis41:25 O Yosef penas ap o baro rayeste: “O baro rayeskre douy sounya hi yek souni. Hoy o Devel kamell te krell, sikras yob toute." 
Genesis41:26 Kol efta shoukar groumya hi efta bersha. Oun kol efta shoukar halme mit djob hi ninna efta bersha. Kova hi yek souni. 
Genesis41:27 Oun kol efta sane oun djoungele groumya, kay djan pal lende dran o pani vin, hi efta bersha. Yaake hi ninna kol efta halme, hoy hi sano oun trouk, efta bersha, kay bokenn le." 
Genesis41:28 Hi yaake har penom touke: O Devel sikrell toute, hoy kamell lo te krell." 
Genesis41:29 Efta lače bersha venna, kay hi boud rhapen an o tselo them Egiptia." 
Genesis41:30 Oun pal kova venna efta bersha, kay bokenn le. Ko boud lačo rhapen, hoy len his, vella bistedo an o them Egiptia. Yaake baro vell koy bok an o them." 
Genesis41:31 Lauter bistrenn ko tsiro, kay boud rhapen koy his. Yaake baro vell i bok koy pal." 
Genesis41:32 Kay o baro ray das kova douy kope souni, penell menge, te krell o Devel kova čačepah, oun te krell lo les sik." 
Genesis41:33 Kanna mou rodell o baro ray i gosevo morshes, te lell lo o tselo them Egiptia an o vast." 
Genesis41:34 Mou čivell yob ninna pralstunen pral o them, te lenn le o pančto kotar ko djobestar an kal efta lače bersha, kay venna." 
Genesis41:35 Oun čivenn ko djob khetne oun anenn les an i forya. Oun o baro ray mou dell garda, kay kova yaake kerdo vella." 
Genesis41:36 Ko djob hi i menshenge oun i firhenge, te merenn le gar i bokatar an kol efta bersha, kay hi či te rhal an o them Egiptia.”" 
Genesis41:37 Oun ko lab his mishto o baro rayeske oun leskre tsele pralstoune boudepangre. 
Genesis41:38 Oun o baro ray poučas peskre pralstoune boudepangrendar: “Nay hatsah mer i morsh har kava, kay o gosvepen o Deblestar an leste hi?”" 
Genesis41:39 Ap o Yosefeste penas o baro ray: “O Devel sikras toute kava tselo koova. Kekes hi yaake boud gosvepen har tout. 
Genesis41:40 Tou vess ray pral miro baro kheer. I tsele menshe an miro them hounte krenn kova, hoy tou peneh. Me kokres hom bareder har tou oun ačau baro ray pral o them Egiptia.”" 
Genesis41:41 Oun o baro ray penas doureder ap o Yosefeste: “Me dau o tselo them Egiptia an tire vasta.” 
Genesis41:42 Oun o baro ray las peskri goustri peskro vastestar oun čivas les ap o Yosefeskro vast. Oun das les ripya dran shoukar layntikro than. Ninna čivas lo i sonakaskri verkli troul leskri meen. 
Genesis41:43 Oun moukas les te oulerell ap o douyto vourdin. Glan leste dan le vin gole: “Vitsrenn t'men tele glan leste!” Yaake das o baro ray o tselo them Egiptia an o Yosefeskre vasta. 
Genesis41:44 Oun o baro ray penas ap o Yosefeste: “Ninna te hom me o baro ray pral o them Egiptia, nay hadell kek mensho an o tselo them Egiptia peskro vast oun peskre pire pre, te kameh tou kova gar.”" 
Genesis41:45 Oun o baro ray das o Yosefes o lab Zafenat-Panea. Ninna das yob les i romni, i Asnat. Lakro dad his o Potifera. Kova his o rashay an o foro On. Yaake las o Yosef i zoor pral o tselo them Egiptia." 
Genesis41:46 O Yosef his 30 (triyanda) bersha phouro, har das les o baro ray pral Egiptia koy boudi. Oun o Yosef djas peske o baro rayestar oun djas an o them Egiptia trouyel." 
Genesis41:47 Oun o them das boud djob an kol efta lače bersha. 
Genesis41:48 Oun o Yosef čivas ap i rig ko boud djobestar, hoy len his an kol efta lače bersha an ko them Egiptia. Oun anas kova an i forya, – hako kopo an i foro, hoy gar dour his." 
Genesis41:49 Oun o Yosef čivas boud djob khetne, yaake boud har i tikne barra pash o baro pani. Oun yon moukan tele, te činell an i liil, har boud kova his." 
Genesis41:50 Glan ko tsiro, kay i bok pral o them vas, van o Yosefeske douy morsh čave boldo. Lengri day his i Asnat, kolakro dad o rashay Potifera an o foro On his." 
Genesis41:51 Oun o Yosef das o phoureder čaves ko lab Manasse oun penas: O Devel kras te bistrap miri tseli bibarht oun mire tsele menshen. 
Genesis41:52 Oun o douyto čaves das yob ko lab Efrayim oun penas: O Devel das man čaven an o them, kay djas mange gar mishto." 
Genesis41:53 Oun kol efta bravele bersha djan trouyel an o them Egiptia. 
Genesis41:54 Oun palle van kol bersha, kay bokenn le, yaake har o Yosef penas. Oun an i tsele themma bokan le. Kokres an o them Egiptia his doha rhapaske." 
Genesis41:55 Har i bok ninna an o them Egiptia vas, dan i Egiptarya gole ap o baro rayeste, te dell yob len te rhal. Koy penas o baro ray ap lende: “Djan pash o Yosefeste! Krenn, hoy yob t'menge penella!”" 
Genesis41:56 Oun i bok vas bareder. An o tselo them his i menshen gar doha te rhal. Koy kras o Yosef i voudya pre an kol tsele khera, kay djob dren hi. Oun bikras o djob ap i Egiptarya." 
Genesis41:57 Ninna dran i tsele vavar themma van i menshe pash o Yosefeste an o them Egiptia, te ginenn le djob. Yaake baro his i bok an i tsele themma." 
Genesis42:1 Har o Yakob shounas, kay hi djob an o them Egiptia, penas yob ap peskre čavende: “Hoske krenn t'mer či?" 
Genesis42:2 Shounom, koy hi djob an o them Egiptia. Djan koy oun ginenn menge djob, te djivas mer oun meras gar!”" 
Genesis42:3 Oun o Yosefeskre deesh phrala djan, te ginenn le djob an o them Egiptia." 
Genesis42:4 O Benyamin, o Yosefeskro terneder phraal, djas gar lentsa. O Yakob kamas gar, te djal yob peskre phralentsa. Yob penas: “Te taprell les kek bibarht!”" 
Genesis42:5 Oun har i bok baro vas an o them Kanaan, djan ninna vavar an o them Egiptia, te ginenn le djob. Lentsa khetne van o Yakobeskre čave an o them Egiptia." 
Genesis42:6 Oun o Yosef his o ray pral o them Egiptia oun bikras djob ap kol menshende an ko them. Har leskre phrala van, vitsran pen le tele glan leste o mouyeha ap i phoub." 
Genesis42:7 O Yosef dikas peskre phralen oun prindjras len. Oun yob kras, har te prindjrell lo len gar, oun rakras zoreles ap lende oun penas: “Kay venn t'mer?” Penan yon: “Dran o them Kanaan, te ginas djob.”" 
Genesis42:8 O Yosef prindjras peskre phralen, yon prindjran les gar." 
Genesis42:9 Oun kova, hoy yob lendar souni das, vas an leskro shero. Oun yob penas ap lende: “T'mer han phoukepangre oun kamenn te dikenn, har zorelo o them hi. Dran kova han t'mer kay.”" 
Genesis42:10 Penan yon ap leste: “Na-a, miro ray. Mer vam te ginas menge djob." 
Genesis42:11 Mer halauter ham i čave yek romestar. Mer djah i čačo drom. Mer ham kek phoukepangre, kay kamenn te dikell, har zorelo t'maro them hi.”" 
Genesis42:12 “Na-a”, penas o Yosef. “T'mer van te dikenn, har zorelo maro them hi.”" 
Genesis42:13 Penan yon: “Miro ray, deesh-te-douy phrala ham mer. Ham čave yek romestar an o them Kanaan. O terneder hi kanna pash maro dadeste. Oun yek hi bouder gar koy.”" 
Genesis42:14 Penas o Yosef ap lende: “Kova hi yaake, har me penom: T'mer han phoukepangre." 
Genesis42:15 Ap kova kamau te dikell, kay penenn t'mer o čačepen: Te vell t'maro terneder phraal kate! Pash o djipen o baro rayestar dau man sovel: Te vell lo gar, venn t'mer gar bouder krik." 
Genesis42:16 Bičrenn yekes t'mendar, te lell lo t'maro terneder phrales. T'mer vavar ačenn an o stilepen. Yaake dikau me, kay t'mare laba čačo hi. Pash o djipen o baro rayestar! Te rhorhran man, djinau, kay han phoukepangre.”" 
Genesis42:17 Oun yob čivas len an o stilepen. Koy ačan yon triin divessa. 
Genesis42:18 Ap o triinto dives penas o Yosef ap lende: “Te krenn t'mer, hoy penau, ačenn t'mer djido. Me darau o Deblestar." 
Genesis42:19 Te penenn t'mer o čačepen, palle moukenn yek t'mendar kate an o stilepen. T'mer vavar djan khere oun lenn t'menge doha djob khere t'mare menshenge oun firhenge!" 
Genesis42:20 Anenn t'maro terneder phrales pash mande! Koy pre dikau me, kay t'mare laba čačo hi. Oun t'mer merenna gar.” Oun yon penan: “Mishto, kova krah mer.”" 
Genesis42:21 Oun yek penas ap o vavareste: “Čačepah, kanna lah koy phagi, hoy mer maro phraleske kram. Mer dikam leskri daar, hoy les his, har yob men mangas, te moukas les te djivell. Oun mer shounam gar ap leste. Dran kova vell koy bibarht pral mende.”" 
Genesis42:22 Oun o Ruben penas ap lende: “Penom me gar ap t'mende: Ma krenn čilačepen o čaveske? T'mer shounan gar. Kanna vell leskro rat ap mende.” 
Genesis42:23 Yon djinan gar, kay o Yosef lengro rakepen hayvas. Yob rakras lentsa an o egiptikro rakepen. Oun i vavar penas lenge, hoy yob penas." 
Genesis42:24 Har o Yosef kanna lengre laba shounas, rissras pes lo lendar krik oun rovas. Koy pal vas yob pale, te rakrell lo lentsa. Oun yob moukas o Simeones te pandell glan lengre yaka." 
Genesis42:25 Oun o Yosef penas ap peskre boudepangre, te krenn le lengre gone pherdo djob, oun te denn le len lengre love pale, – hakeneske an leskro gono, oun te denn le len rhapen ap o drom. Kova kran yon." 
Genesis42:26 Oun o Yakobeskre čave čivan ko djob ap pengre bourike oun djan penge. 
Genesis42:27 Ap koy platsa, kay yon i rati ačan, kras yek lendar peskro gono pre, te dell lo leskri bourika te rhal. Oun yob dikas, kay kol love an leskro gono hi." 
Genesis42:28 Koy penas yob ap peskre phralende: “Mire love hi an miro gono!” Koy lan yon traash. Oun yon dikan pen darenes an oun penan: “Hoske kras o Devel kova mentsa?” 
Genesis42:29 Oun yon van an o them Kanaan pash pengro dadeste Yakob oun penan leske halauter, hoy lenge djas oun penan:" 
Genesis42:30 “Ko rom, kay hi o ray pral o them Egiptia, rakras zoreles mentsa oun kras, har te vams phoukepangre, kay kamenn te dikenn, har zorelo leskro them hi." 
Genesis42:31 Oun mer penam ap leste: Mer djah i čačo drom. Mer ham kek phoukepangre. 
Genesis42:32 Ham deesh-te-douy phrala, kol čave yek dadestar. Yek hi bouder gar koy. Oun ko terneder hi kanna pash maro dadeste an o them Kanaan." 
Genesis42:33 Oun ko rom, kay hi o ray pral o them Egiptia, penas ap mende: Ap kova dikau, kay t'mer o čačepen penenna: Yek t'mare phralendar moukenn pash mande. Oun t'mer vavar lenn doha rhapen t'mare familyenge oun djan t'menge." 
Genesis42:34 Oun anenn t'maro terneder phrales pash mande! Ap kova dikau, kay rhorhenn gar, oun kay han kek phoukepangre. Yaake dau t'men t'maro phrales pale. Oun t'mer nay parenn an kava them. ”" 
Genesis42:35 Har čoran kol phrala pengre gone vin, hatsas hakeno peskre love an peskro gono! Har yon oun lengro dad kol love dikan, vas len daar." 
Genesis42:36 Oun lengro dad, o Yakob, penas ap lende: “T'mer čoran mire čaven mandar: O Yosef hi bouder gar koy. Oun o Simeon hi bouder gar koy. Oun o Benyamines kamenn t'mer ninna mandar te lell. Kova lauter vell ap mande!”" 
Genesis42:37 Koy penas o Ruben ap peskro dadeste: “Te dau me les toute gar pale, nay mareh tou mire douy čaven. Tou deh les an mire vasta oun me dau les toute pale.”" 
Genesis42:38 “Na-a”, penas o Yakob. “Miro čavo djal gar t'mentsa! Leskro phraal hi moulo. Oun yob kokres ačas mange leskri datar i Rachel. Me hom i phouro rom. Te taprels les i bibarht ap o drom, meraus i bari doukatar.”" 
Genesis43:1 Oun i bok his baro an o them. 
Genesis43:2 Har yon o tselo djob pre rhan, hoy lan yon dran o them Egiptia, penas o Yakob ap peskre čavende: “Djan pale an o them Egiptia oun ginenn menge boudeder djob!”" 
Genesis43:3 Koy penas o Youda ap leste: “Ko rom penas zoreles ap mende: Te hi t'maro phraal gar pash t'mende, dikenn t'mer man bouder gar." 
Genesis43:4 Te bičreh maro phrales mentsa, djah mer kote te ginas touke rhapaske." 
Genesis43:5 Te bičreh les gar mentsa, djah mer gar. O rom penas ap mende: T'mer dikenn man gar pale, te hi t'maro phraal gar pash t'mende. ”" 
Genesis43:6 Koy penas o Yakob, koleskro lab hi ninna Israel: “Hoske anenn t'mer havi douk ap mande oun penan ko romeske, kay hi t'men i vavar phraal?”" 
Genesis43:7 Penan yon: “Ko rom poučas men vin pral mende oun pral mari familya. Yob poučas: Djivell t'maro dad? Hi t'men i vavar phraal? Yaake penam, hoy yob kamas te djinell. Djinam gar, kay yob penell: Anenn t'maro phrales kay! ”" 
Genesis43:8 Oun o Youda penas ap peskro dadeste Israel: “Biče ko čaves mantsa! Oun mer nay djah kanna, te djivas oun meras gar i bokatar – tou oun mer oun mare čave!" 
Genesis43:9 Me dau miro vast koy pre, kay anau les pale. Te anau les touke gar pale, vell i doosh ap mande oun ačell ap mande, yaake rah har djivau!" 
Genesis43:10 Čačepah, te ačams gar yaake rah kate, vams kanna o douyto kopo pale.”" 
Genesis43:11 Oun o Israel, lengro dad, penas ap lende: “Te djal gar vavarčandes, krenn kova: Lenn o feteder dran maro them oun anenn les ko romeste: kouč roukengro djet oun gvin, khorya oun mandle." 
Genesis43:12 Lenn douy kope yaake boud love peha har o ersto kopo. T'mer hounte denn kol love pale, kay hatsan an t'mare gone. Nashte vell yekeskri doosh, hoy yob gar djinas." 
Genesis43:13 Lenn t'maro phrales oun krenn t'men ap o drom! Djan pale pash o romeste! 
Genesis43:14 Oun o zorelo Devel mou krell, te vell o rom t'menge lačo, yaake kay moukell lo t'maro vavar phrales oun o Benyamines t'mentsa pale te djal. Me krau nay či. Nashrau mire čaven, nashrau len!”" 
Genesis43:15 Kanna lan i morsha ko kouč koova, hoy anenn le o romeske. Oun lan ninna douy kope love oun o Benyamines pentsa oun kran pen ap o drom, te djan le an o them Egiptia. Oun yon van glan o Yosefeste." 
Genesis43:16 Har o Yosef dikas o Benyamines pash lende, penas lo ap koleste, kay ap leskro kheer garda das: “An kol morshen an o kheer! Marenn firhen oun krenn i rhapen! Kol morsha rhan kava dives mantsa.”" 
Genesis43:17 Oun o rom kras yaake, har o Yosef penas oun anas i morshen an o Yosefeskro kheer." 
Genesis43:18 Har yon dikan, kay van le an o Yosefeskro kheer anlo, vas len daar. Oun yek penas ap o vavareste: “Kol love, hoy an mare gone his o vavar kopo, hi, hoske vah kanna kate anlo. I Egiptarya kamenn mare bourike te lell oun men te taprell, te boudras lenge.”" 
Genesis43:19 Oun yon djan pash koleste, kay ap o Yosefeskro kheer garda das, oun rakran leha glan o voudar." 
Genesis43:20 “Miro ray”, penan le. “Mer vam kate o vavar kopo te ginas djob." 
Genesis43:21 Har mer pale djam, kram mare gone pre kote, kay ačam pral i rati. Oun hakeno mendar hatsas peskre love an o gono, yaake boud, har playsram. Kanna anam mer kal love pale pale." 
Genesis43:22 Vavar love anam ninna mentsa, te ginas djob. Mer djinah gar, koon čivas mare love an mare gone.”" 
Genesis43:23 “Hi mishto”, penas ko rom. “Ma darenn! T'maro Devel, kay ninna t'maro dadeskro Devel hi, čivas kol love an t'mare gone. Me lom t'mare love, hoy dan man.” Oun yob anas o Simeones pash lende." 
Genesis43:24 Oun ko rom anas len an o Yosefeskro kheer oun das len pani, te thovenn le pengre herya, oun das lengre bouriken te rhal." 
Genesis43:25 Oun yon lan ko kouč koova, hoy anan le peha, oun čivan les yaake, te denn le les o Yosefeste. Yon shounan, te vell yob ap o paash dives oun te rhan yon leha." 
Genesis43:26 Har o Yosef khere vas, anan le ko kouč koova an o kheer. Oun vitsran pen glan leste ap i phoub." 
Genesis43:27 Oun yob poučas lendar: “Har djal t'menge? Djal t'maro phouro dadeske mishto, kolestar rakran? Hi lo djido?”" 
Genesis43:28 Penan le: “Miro ray, maro dadeske djal mishto. Yob hi djido.” Oun yon vitsran pen ap i phoub glan leste." 
Genesis43:29 Oun yob dikas pes trouyel oun dikas peskro phrales Benyamin, ko čaves peskri datar, oun poučas: “Hi kova t'maro terneder phraal, kolestar rakran?” Oun ap leste penas lo: “O Devel mou dell tout lačepen, miro čavo.”" 
Genesis43:30 Har o Yosef peskro phrales dikas, his leske ropaske. Oun yob djas sik an peskri isema oun rovas koy." 
Genesis43:31 Pal kova thovas lo peskre yaka, djas vin oun las pes khetne oun penas: “Anenn o rhapen!”" 
Genesis43:32 Oun yon anan o Yosefeske o rhapen ap i vavar rhapaskri har peskre phralenge. Ninna i Egiptarya, kay leha rhan, rhan ap i vavar rhapaskri. I Egiptarya rhan gar khetne kolentsa, kay kharenn Hebrearya. Kolla hi lenge pale-čiddo." 
Genesis43:33 O Yosefeskre phrala van glan leste vergel beshdo, pal lengro phourepen: o phoureder, o douyto, o triinto bis pash o terneder. Koy dikan le bare yakentsa yek ap o vavareste." 
Genesis43:34 O Yosef moukas leskro rhapastar peskre phralenge te anell. Oun ko rhapen, hoy moukas yob o Benyamineske te anell, his panč kope yaake boud, har o rhapen leskre vavar phralenge. Oun yon rhan oun piyan oun van barhtelo leha." 
Genesis44:1 Oun yob penas ap koleste, kay ap leskro kheer garda das: “Kre i gone kol morshendar pherdo djob, yaake boud har dren djala. Oun čip hakeneskre love pral an lengre gone!" 
Genesis44:2 Oun miro roupeno khoro čip khetne lengre loventsa pral an o gono ko terneder morshestar!” Oun ko rom kras, har o Yosef leske penas." 
Genesis44:3 Taysarlakro djan i morsha pengre bourikentsa penge. 
Genesis44:4 Har yon gar dour glan o foro his, penas o Yosef ap koleste, kay ap leskro kheer garda das: “Le sik kol morshen palla! Te tapreh len, pen ap lende: Hoske kran t'mer čilačo koova ap miro rayeste? Yob his lačo ap t'mende." 
Genesis44:5 T'mer čoran miro rayeskro roupeno khoro, dran koleste yob piyell oun dourkrell. Hi gar mishto, hoy kran!”" 
Genesis44:6 Oun ko pralstouno pral o Yosefeskro kheer las len palla, tapras len oun penas kal laba ap lende." 
Genesis44:7 Kolla penan ap leste: “Hoske rakrell miro ray save laba? Savo koova kram mer gar. 
Genesis44:8 Kol love, hoy hatsam pral an mare gone, anam touke pale dran o them Kanaan. Hoske čorams dran tiro rayeskro kheer roup oun sonakay?" 
Genesis44:9 Miro ray, tou te hatseh ko khoro pash yekeste mendar, nay deh les moulo! Oun mer vavar vah tire boudepangre.”" 
Genesis44:10 “Mishto”, penas yob. “Mer krah yaake, har penan. Kova vell miro boudepaskro, kay hatsau o khoro pash leste. T'mer vavar nay djana.”" 
Genesis44:11 Koy las hakeno sik peskro gono tele ap i phoub oun kras les pre. 
Genesis44:12 Oun yob rodas an o gono hakenestar: pash o phoureder bis pash o terneder. Oun yob hatsas o khoro an o Benyamineskro gono. 
Genesis44:13 Koy kran le pengre koola an kotya i doukatar. Oun hadan pengre gone pale ap i bourike oun djan pale an o foro. 
Genesis44:14 Oun o Youda djas peskre phralentsa an o Yosefeskro kheer. O Yosef his gomme koy. Oun yon vitsran pen glan leste ap i phoub. 
Genesis44:15 Oun o Yosef penas ap lende: “Havo čilačo koova kran t'mer? Djinenn gar, kay i rom har man, dourkrell nay?”" 
Genesis44:16 Penas o Youda ap leste: “Hoy penas mer touke, miro ray? Har nay sikrah, kay hi men kek doosh an kava koova? O Devel dell men i phagi. Miro ray, mer ham kanna tire boudepangre: mer oun kova, kay hatsan o khoro pash leste.”" 
Genesis44:17 Penas o Yosef: “Savo koova krau gar. Ko rom, kay hatsan o khoro pash leste, hounte vell miro boudepaskro. T'mer vavar nay djan an o lačepen khere pash t'maro dadeste.”" 
Genesis44:18 Koy vas o Youda glan oun penas ap leste: “Mangau tout, miro ray, mouk man touha te rakrell! Ab gar rhoyedo ap mande, miro ray! Tou hal yaake baro har o baro ray pral o them Egiptia." 
Genesis44:19 Tou, miro ray, poučal mendar, har hams o vavar kopo kay: Hi t'men i dad, ninna i vavar phraal?" 
Genesis44:20 Oun mer penam ap toute, miro ray: Men hi i phouro dad oun i terno phraal, kay boldo vas, har maro dad phouro his. Leskro phraal hi moulo. Oun yob kokres ačas pral peskri datar. Oun leskro dad kamell les i djiyestar." 
Genesis44:21 Oun tou, miro ray, penal ap mende: Anenn les pash mande, te dikap les!" 
Genesis44:22 Oun mer penam ap toute, miro ray: Ko čavo moukell nay gar peskro dades. Moukell yob les, merell leskro dad." 
Genesis44:23 Koy penal tou, miro ray, ap mende: Te vell gar t'maro terneder phraal t'mentsa, kamau te dikap t'men gar pale." 
Genesis44:24 Har vam khere pash maro dadeste, penam leske tire laba, miro ray." 
Genesis44:25 Har maro dad penas Djan, ginenn menge rhapaske, penam mer:" 
Genesis44:26 Te vell maro terneder phraal gar mentsa, nay djah gar. Te hi yob gar pash mende, nay vah gar glan ko romeskre yaka." 
Genesis44:27 Oun miro dad, penas ap mende: Djinenn, kay miri romni anas mange douy čaven ap i phoub." 
Genesis44:28 Ko yek djas peske mandar oun me penom mange: I divyo firho maras les. Oun me dikom les bouder gar pale bis kanna. 
Genesis44:29 Me hom i phouro rom. Te lenn t'mer ninna o douytes mandar oun te taprels les i bibarht, merau me i doukatar." 
Genesis44:30 Oun kanna, miro ray, te vau me pale pash miro dadeste, oun yob dikell, kay o čavo gar pash mande hi, merell yob i doukatar." 
Genesis44:31 Leskro dji hi pandlo ap ko čaveste. Man vals doosh, te merals maro phouro dad i doukatar." 
Genesis44:32 Miro ray, me dom miro vast koy pre, kay anau o čaves pale. Me penom ap miro dadeste: Te anau les touke gar pale, vell i doosh ap mande oun ačell ap mande, yaake rah har djivau!" 
Genesis44:33 Doleske, mouk man te vap tiro boudepaskro, miro ray! Mouk kol čaves te djal peskre phralentsa!" 
Genesis44:34 Me nay djau gar pash miro dadeste, te hi ko čavo gar pash mande. Me nay dikoms gar koy douk, hoy vell ap miro dadeste, te hi ko čavo gar pashel!”" 
Genesis45:1 Koy rikras pes nay o Yosef bouder gar pale glan lauterende, kay troul leste tardo hi. Oun yob bičras i tsele Egiptaryen vin. Oun kek his pashel, har yob penas, kay yob lengro phraal hi." 
Genesis45:2 Oun yob rovas zoreles. Oun i Egiptarya shounan kova, ninna i menshe an o kheer o baro rayestar." 
Genesis45:3 Oun o Yosef penas ap peskre phralende: “Me hom o Yosef. Djivell miro dad?” Leskre phrala penan nay či ap leste. Lenge ačas o rakepen krik i trashatar. 
Genesis45:4 Koy penas o Yosef ap peskre phralende: “Avenn pash mande!” Oun yon djan pash leste. Oun yob penas pale: “Me hom o Yosef, t'maro phraal, kova, kay bikran t'mer ap i parepangre, kay anan man an o them Egiptia." 
Genesis45:5 Kanna hounte khaytell t'men kova gar, kay bikran man! Rhoyrenn t'men gar pral kova! O Devel bičras man glan t'mende kay, te merenn i menshe gar i bokatar." 
Genesis45:6 Douy bersha bokan le an kava them. Oun panč bersha hi glan lende, kay čivrenn le nay kek djob an i phoub, vitar gar anenn le djob dren." 
Genesis45:7 Oun o Devel bičras man glan t'mende an kava them, te lell yob t'men dran i bari bok vin, te ačenn t'mer oun t'mare čave djido ap i phoub." 
Genesis45:8 Yaake han gar t'mer, kay anan man kate. O Devel anas man kay. Oun yob kras man dad pral o baro rayeste an o them Egiptia oun ray pral koleskro tselo kheer oun pral o tselo them Egiptia." 
Genesis45:9 Kanna, djan sik pash miro dadeste pale oun penenn leske: Yaake penell tiro čavo Yosef: O Devel kras man ray pral o tselo them Egiptia. Kanna am pash mande! Am sik!" 
Genesis45:10 Tou djivess an o them Gosen, hoy hi gar dour mandar: tou oun tire čave oun tire čavengre čave, ninna tire bakre oun bouzya, tire groumya oun halauter, hoy tout hi." 
Genesis45:11 Oun me dau tout halauter, hoy tout hounte vell djipaske. Yaake te vess gar čorvelo, tou oun tiri familya oun lauter hoy tout hi. Panč bersha hi glan mende, kay hi i menshen či te rhal." 
Genesis45:12 T'mer dikenn t'mare yakentsa, ninna miro phraal Benyamin dikell, kay čačepah me hom, kay rakrell t'mentsa." 
Genesis45:13 Penenn miro dadeske, havo raylepen man hi an o them Egiptia. Penenn leske halauter, hoy dikan! Oun anenn les kay! Anenn les sik!”" 
Genesis45:14 Oun yob peras peskro phraleske Benyamin troul i meen oun rovas. Oun ninna o Benyamin rovas ap leskro beč. 
Genesis45:15 Oun yob čoumras peskre tsele phralen oun rovas ap lengro beč. Oun koy pal rakran leskre phrala leha. 
Genesis45:16 An o kheer o baro rayestar shounan le, kay o Yosefeskre phrala van. Oun kova his mishto o baro rayeske oun i pralstunenge an leskro kheer." 
Genesis45:17 Oun o baro ray penas ap o Yosefeste: “Pen tire phralenge: Krenn yaake: Čivenn t'maro koova ap t'mare firhe oun djan an o them Kanaan! 
Genesis45:18 Oun lenn t'maro dades oun t'mare tsele menshen, oun avenn pash mande! Oun kamau te dap t'men o feteder kotar them an o them Egiptia, te rhan t'mer o lačeder rhapen ko themestar." 
Genesis45:19 Ap toute penau, te dess len vourdya dran o them Egiptia lengre čavenge oun romyenge, te lenn le pengro dades kay!" 
Genesis45:20 Pen lenge, len hounte khaytell kova gar, te moukenn le lauter čiddo. O feteder an o them Egiptia lenn yon.”" 
Genesis45:21 Oun o Israeleskre čave kran yaake. O Yosef das len vourdya, yaake har o baro ray leske penas, ninna rhapaske ap o drom." 
Genesis45:22 Hakenes das yob yek shoukar ripen. O Benyamin las triin-sheel roupene kotya love oun panč shoukar ripya. 
Genesis45:23 Oun peskro dadeske bičras yob deesh bourike, – kolla hidjran o feteder dran o them Egiptia; oun deesh vavar bourike. Kolla hidjran djob oun maro oun rhapaske leskro dadeske ap o drom." 
Genesis45:24 Oun yob bičras peskre phralen khere. Oun penas ap lende: “Ma čingrenn t'men ap o drom!” 
Genesis45:25 Oun yon djan dran o them Egiptia oun van an o them Kanaan pash lengro dadeste Yakob. 
Genesis45:26 Oun yon penan ap leste: “O Yosef djivella. Oun yob hi o ray pral o tselo them Egiptia.” Koy ačas leskro dji tardo. Oun yob patsas len gar. 
Genesis45:27 Oun yon penan leske lauter, hoy o Yosef penas. Oun har yob dikas kol vourdya, hoy o Yosef bičras leske, vas lo pale zoreles." 
Genesis45:28 Oun o Israel penas: “Kanna hi doha! Me patsau t'men! O Yosef, miro čavo, djivella. Me djau kote, te dikap les glan miro merepen.”" 
Genesis46:1 Oun o Israel kras pes ap o drom mit halauter, hoy les his, oun vas an o foro Beersheba. Oun yob maras firhen oun rhačras len o Debleske peskro dadestar Isaak." 
Genesis46:2 I rati rakras o Devel leha an i souni oun penas ap leste: “Yakob, Yakob!” Oun yob penas: “Ake hom.”" 
Genesis46:3 Oun o Devel penas: “Me hom o Devel, ko Devel tiro dadestar. Ma traash te djas an o them Egiptia! Koy krau me, te vess o dad i bari natsyona." 
Genesis46:4 Me djau touha an o them Egiptia. Oun čačepah me anau tout pale pale. Oun te mereh, krell o Yosef tire yaka pandlo.”" 
Genesis46:5 Koy moukas o Yakob Beersheba. Oun o Yakobeskre čave hadan pengro dades, pengre čaven oun pengre romyen an kol vourdya, hoy o baro ray pral Egiptia lenge bičras." 
Genesis46:6 Oun yon lan pengre firhen oun halauter, hoy lengre an o them Kanaan vas, oun djan an o them Egiptia: o Yakob peskri tseli familyah:" 
Genesis46:7 Leskre čave oun leskre čavengre čave, leskre ča oun čavengre ča, leskri tseli familya anas yob peha an Egiptia." 
Genesis46:8 Kolla hi i laba o Israeleskre čavendar, kay van an o them Egiptia: O Yakob oun leskre čave. O Yakobeskro phoureder his o Ruben." 
Genesis46:9 Leskre čave his: o Henok, o Pallou, o Hesron oun o Karmi." 
Genesis46:10 O Simeon oun leskre čave: o Yemouel, o Yamin, o Ohad, o Yakin oun o Sohar, ninna o Shaul, ko čavo i djouvyatar dran o them Kanaan." 
Genesis46:11 O Levi oun leskre čave: o Gershon, o Kohat oun o Merari." 
Genesis46:12 O Youda oun leskre čave: o Er, o Onan, o Shela, o Perez oun o Zera. O Er oun o Onan meran an o them Kanaan. O Perez his o dad douy čavendar: o Hesron oun o Hamoul." 
Genesis46:13 O Issakar oun leskre čave: o Tola, o Pouva, o Yashoub oun o Shimron." 
Genesis46:14 O Zabulon oun leskre čave: o Sered, o Elon oun o Yaleel." 
Genesis46:15 Kolla hi i čave oun čavengre čave o Yakobestar oun i Lea, kay an Paddan-Aram bolde van, ninna lengri čay, i Dina. Lauter khetne his yon 33 (triyanda-te-triin) čave oun čavengre čave." 
Genesis46:16 O Gad oun leskre čave: o Sifyon oun o Haggi, o Shouni oun o Ezbon, o Eri, o Arod oun o Areli." 
Genesis46:17 O Asser oun leskre čave: o Yimna, o Yishva, o Yishvi, o Beria oun lengri pheen, i Zera. O Beria, les his douy čave: o Heber oun o Malkiel." 
Genesis46:18 Kolla his i čave oun čavengre čave o Yakobestar oun i Silpa. I Silpa his koy boudepaskretsa, kay o Laban peskri čate Lea das. Lauter khetne his yon 16 (deesh-te-shob) čave oun čavengre čave." 
Genesis46:19 I čave o Yakobeskri romyatar Rachel his o Yosef oun o Benyamin. 
Genesis46:20 O Yosefeske van douy čave boldo an o them Egiptia: o Manasse oun o Efrayim. Lengri day his i Asnat. Kolakro dad his o rashay Potifera dran o foro On. 
Genesis46:21 O Benyamin oun leskre čave: o Bela, o Beker, o Ashbel, o Gera, o Naaman, o Ehi, o Rosh, o Mouppim, o Houppim oun o Ard." 
Genesis46:22 Kolla his i čave oun čavengre čave o Yakobestar oun i Rachel. Lauter khetne his yon 14 (deesh-te-star) čave oun čavengre čave. 
Genesis46:23 O Dan oun leskro čavo: o Houshim. 
Genesis46:24 O Naftali oun leskre čave: o Yassiel, o Gouni, o Yesser oun o Shillem." 
Genesis46:25 Kolla his i čave oun čavengre čave o Yakobestar oun i Bilha. I Bilha his koy boudepaskretsa, kay o Laban peskri čate Rachel das. Lauter khetne his yon efta čave oun čavengre čave." 
Genesis46:26 I tsele čave oun čavengre čave o Yakobestar, kay leha an o them Egiptia djan, his 66 (shob-deesh-te-shob). Koy pashel venna leskre čavengre romya." 
Genesis46:27 O Yosefes his douy čave, kay an o them Egiptia bolde van. Khetne lentsa his yon efta-desha menshe an o Yakobeskri familya, kay djan an o them Egiptia." 
Genesis46:28 Har yon an Egiptia van, bičras o Yakob peskro čaves Youda glan vin pash o Yosefeste, te sikrell yob lende o drom an o them Gosen." 
Genesis46:29 Har yon an o them Gosen van, pandas o Yosef i graya glan peskro vourdin oun ouleras an o them Gosen pash peskro dadeste Israel. Har o Yosef les dikas, čivas yob peskre moussya troul leste, oun rovas ap leskro beč oun nay heras gar pre." 
Genesis46:30 Oun o Israel penas ap o Yosefeste: “Kanna nay merau, kanna, kay dikom tout oun djinau, tou djiveh.”" 
Genesis46:31 Oun o Yosef penas ap peskre phralende oun ap i vavarende an peskro dadeskri familya: “Me djau pash o baro rayeste te penap leske: Mire phrala oun kol vavar dran miro dadeskri familya, kay an o them Kanaan djivan, van pash mande." 
Genesis46:32 I morsha hi bakrengre oun denn yak ap pengre firhende. Oun lengre bakre oun groumya oun lauter, hoy len hi, anan le pentsa." 
Genesis46:33 Oun kanna, te kharell o baro ray t'men oun poučell: Hoy krenn t'mer?" 
Genesis46:34 Penenn ap leste: Miro ray, mer ham bakrengre foun tiknes pre, yaake har mare phoure. Penenn kova, te nay ačenn an o them Gosen.” Hako bakrengro hi i pale-čiddo glan i Egiptarya." 
Genesis47:1 Oun o Yosef djas pash o baro rayeste oun penas ap leste: “Miro dad oun mire phrala pengre bakrentsa oun pengre groumyentsa oun halauter, hoy len hi, van dran o them Kanaan oun hi kanna an o them Gosen.”" 
Genesis47:2 Oun o Yosef rodas panč peskre phralendar vin oun anas len glan o baro ray. 
Genesis47:3 Oun o baro ray poučas lendar: “Hoy krenn t'mer?” Oun yon penan ap leste: “Miro ray, mer ham bakrengre yaake har mare phoure.”" 
Genesis47:4 Oun yon penan ninna: “I bok hi baro an o them Kanaan. Hi kek zenlepen rhapaske mare bakrenge. Doleske vam mer, te ačas i tsiro kay. Kanna mangah tout, miro ray, mouk men te djivell an o them Gosen.”" 
Genesis47:5 Koy penas o baro ray ap o Yosefeste: “Tiro dad oun tire phrala van pash toute. 
Genesis47:6 O them Egiptia hi ninna touke koy. Rode tiro dadeske oun tire phralenge o feteder kotar them vin, te djivenn le kote! Mouk len te djivell an o them Gosen! Oun te dikeh, kay hi morsha mank lende, kay krenn pengri boudi mishto, kre te venn le pralstoune pral mire firhende.”" 
Genesis47:7 O Yosef anas peskro dades, o Yakobes, glan o baro rayeste. Oun o Yakob penas ap leste: “Lačo dives! Mou dell tout o Devel peskri zoor oun barht!”" 
Genesis47:8 Oun o baro ray poučas lestar: “Har phouro hal tou?” 
Genesis47:9 Penas o Yakob: “Hom 130 (sheel-te-triyanda) bersh phouro. Kova hi kek phourepen. Man hi kek shoukar djipen. Mire phoure van phoureder har me.” 
Genesis47:10 Oun o Yakob penas ap o baro rayeste: “Ač mo Debleha!” oun djas lestar. 
Genesis47:11 Oun o Yosef sikras peskro dadeste oun peskre phralende, kay yon djivenn nay. Oun das len o feteder kotar them, hoy an o them Egiptia his, ko them Ramses, yaake har o baro ray penas." 
Genesis47:12 Ninna maro das yob peskro dadeste oun peskre phralende lengre familyentsa, yaake boud, kay hakenes doha his." 
Genesis47:13 Oun i bok vas baro an o them Egiptia oun Kanaan, yaake kay bouder či rhapaske his an i tsele themma. Oun i menshe oun i firhe merans i bokatar." 
Genesis47:14 Oun o Yosef anas i tsele love khetne, kay i menshe an o them Egiptia oun an o them Kanaan playsran o rhapaske. Oun anas kol love an o baro rayeskro kheer." 
Genesis47:15 Har bouder kek love his an o them Egiptia oun an o them Kanaan, van i tsele Egiptarya pash o Yosefeste oun penan: “De men rhapaske! Hoske meras mer glan tire yaka? Men hi bouder kek love.”" 
Genesis47:16 Koy penas o Yosef ap lende: “Te hi t'men bouder kek love, anenn t'mare firhe! Oun me dau t'men te rhal.”" 
Genesis47:17 Yaake anan le pengre firhen pash o Yosefeste. Oun yob das len rhapaske lengre grayenge, lengre bakre, groumya oun bourike an ko tselo bersh." 
Genesis47:18 O vavar bersh van le pale pash leste oun penan ap leste: “Miro ray, mer dam tout mare love oun mare firhen. Men hi bouder či, hoy mer tout nay dah. Kanna le men oun maro them!" 
Genesis47:19 Mouk men gar nashedo te djal, men oun maro them! Gin men oun maro them oun de men te rhal! Mer kamah o baro rayeske te boudrell. Oun maro them dah leste. De men djob, te djivas oun meras gar! Oun de men djob, te čivras kova an i phoub, te vell dran maro them kek moulo them!”" 
Genesis47:20 Oun o Yosef ginas o tselo them Egiptia o baro rayeske. I bok his yaake baro, kay bikras hako Egiptari peskro kotar phoub. Yaake vas o tselo them an o baro rayeskre vasta." 
Genesis47:21 Oun o Yosef ginas i menshen an o tselo them Egiptia – foun yek rig o themestar ap i vavar rig, te venn le boudepangre o baro rayeske." 
Genesis47:22 O them i rashayendar ginas yob gar. I rashayen his doha love te ginenn le penge rhapen. Yon van playsedo o baro rayestar. Doleske bikran yon pengro them gar. 
Genesis47:23 Oun o Yosef penas ap i menshende: “Kava dives ginom t'men oun t'maro them o baro rayeske. Ake, kava djob čivrenn nay an i phoub." 
Genesis47:24 Oun te hi t'men nevo djob, denn o pančto kotar o baro rayeste! Kol vavar star kotya mou ačenn t'menge, yaake te hi t'men doha, kay nay vitsrenn an i phoub. Ninna hi t'men rhapaske t'menge oun t'mare čavenge, oun kolenge, kay djivenn an t'mare khera.”" 
Genesis47:25 Penan yon: “Tou kral, kay meram gar. Ab menge lačo oun le men, te vas mer boudepangre o baro rayeske!”" 
Genesis47:26 Yaake rakras o Yosef i lab, hoy hounte rikrenn le: I tsele menshen an o them Egiptia hounte denn o pančto kotar o baro rayeste. O rashayengro them las o baro ray gar. Yaake hi kova gomme kava dives." 
Genesis47:27 Oun i Israelitarya djivan an o them Egiptia, an o them Gosen, lan boud čave oun van boud boud menshe." 
Genesis47:28 Oun o Yakob djivas an o them Egiptia 17 (deesh-te-efta) bersha. Oun yob vas 147 (sheel-te-star-deesh-te-efta) bersha phouro. 
Genesis47:29 Har ko tsiro vas, kay merell lo, kharas yob peskro čaves, o Yosef, oun penas ap leste: “Ab mange lačo, de tiro vast koy pre, kay rikreh tiro lab: Paske man gar an o them Egiptia!" 
Genesis47:30 Te hom moulo, an man dran o them Egiptia oun paske man an o moulengro kheer mire menshendar!” “Me krau, har tou peneh”, penas o Yosef." 
Genesis47:31 “De tout sovel!” penas o Yakob. Oun yob das pes sovel. Oun o Israel parkras pes glan leste ap peskro čiben. 
Genesis48:1 Pal i tsiro vas o Yosefeske penlo: “Tiro dad hi nasselo.” Koy las o Yosef peskre douy čaven, o Efrayim oun o Manasse, oun yon djan pash leste." 
Genesis48:2 Oun o Yakobeske vas penlo: “Tiro čavo o Yosef vell pash toute.” Koy las o Israel peskri tseli zoor khetne oun beshas pes an o čiben pre. 
Genesis48:3 Oun o Yakob penas ap o Yosefeste: “O zorelo Devel moukas pes mandar te dikell an o foro Louz an o them Kanaan. Oun yob rakras lače laba ap mande oun penas: 
Genesis48:4 Čačepah, me dau tout boud čaven, te venn toutar yaake boud menshe, te venn le boud natsyone. Oun kava them dau me tout oun tire menshende, te vell kova t'maro hako tsireske. ”" 
Genesis48:5 Oun o Yakob penas doureder ap o Yosefeste: “Kanna shoun, tire douy čave, kay bolde van glan ko tsiro, kay vom pash toute an o them Egiptia, – o Efrayim oun o Manasse – kamau te venn yon mire, yaake har o Ruben oun o Simeon." 
Genesis48:6 Te leh tou vavar čave, hi kolla tire. Yon lenn pengro kotar them an o them pengre phralendar, pash o Efrayim oun o Manasse." 
Genesis48:7 Me krau kova miri romyake Rachel, kay hi tiri day. Yoy meras an o them Kanaan, har vom dran Paddan. Homs ap o drom, i tikno kotar glan o foro Efrata. Oun me paskrom lat kote pash o drom, hoy djal an Efrata. Kova hi kanna Betlehem.”" 
Genesis48:8 Har o Israel o Yosefeskre čaven dikas, poučas yob: “Koon hi kalla?”" 
Genesis48:9 Oun o Yosef penas peskro dadeske: “Kolla hi mire čave, kay o Devel das man kay.” “An len pash mande”, penas o Yakob, “te rakrap o Debleskri barht pral lende vin.”" 
Genesis48:10 O Israeleskre yaka hi bouder gar mishto. Yob his phouro oun dikas nay bouder gar. Doleske anas o Yosef kol čaven pash leste. Oun yob tapras len trouyel oun das hakenes i čoum. 
Genesis48:11 Oun o Israel penas ap o Yosefeste: “Patsom gar, te dikap tout pale. Oun ake, o Devel kamas te dikap ninna tire čaven.”" 
Genesis48:12 Oun o Yosef las len lestar krik oun vitsras pes glan leste tele, peskro mouy ap i phoub." 
Genesis48:13 Oun o Yosef las kol douyen: Peskro čaves Efrayim las yob ap peskro čačo vast oun anas les glan o Israeleskro servo vast. Oun peskro čaves Manasse las yob ap peskro servo vast oun anas les glan o Israeleskro čačo vast. 
Genesis48:14 Oun o Israel čivas peskri yek moussi pral o vavar oun čivas peskro čačo vast ap o Efrayimeskro shero. Kova his ko terneder. Oun peskro servo vast čivas lo ap o Manasseskro shero. Kova his o phoureder. 
Genesis48:15 Oun yob rakras o Debleskri barht vin pral o Yosefeste oun penas: Ko Devel, kay djas miro papo Abraham oun miro dad Isaak ap leskro drom, ko Devel, kay das garda ap mande bis kava dives, har dell garda i bakrengro ap peskre bakre," 
Genesis48:16 ko bolepaskro, kay las man vin dran hako čilačepen, kova mou čivell peskri barht oun zoor ap kol čavende, te djivell miro lab doureder an lende, ninna o lab miro papestar Abraham oun miro dadestar Isaak. Oun lendar venna boud menshe ap i phoub." 
Genesis48:17 Har o Yosef dikas, kay leskro dad čivas peskro čačo vast ap o Efrayimeskro shero, his leske kova gar mishto. Oun yob tapras peskro dadeskro vast, te čivell lo les ap o Manasseskro shero." 
Genesis48:18 Oun o Yosef penas ap peskro dadeste: “Kre gar yaake, tata! Kava hi o phoureder. Čip tiro čačo vast ap leskro shero!”" 
Genesis48:19 Leskro dad kamas gar oun penas: “Me djinau, čava, me djinau. Ninna kolestar venna yaake boud menshe, te vell lendar yek natsyona. Leskro terneder phraal vell bareder har yob. Lestar venna yaake boud menshe, te venn lendar boud natsyone.”" 
Genesis48:20 Yaake rakras o Israel ap ko dives o Debleskri barht vin pral kol čavende oun penas: “T'mare labentsa sharenn pen i menshe an Israel. Yon penenna: O Devel mou krell tout har o Efrayim oun o Manasse!” Yaake čivas o Israel o Efrayimes glan o Manasse. 
Genesis48:21 Oun o Israel penas ap o Yosefeste: “Me merau. O Devel hi pash t'mende oun anell t'men pale an t'maro dadengro them. 
Genesis48:22 Me dau toute oun gar tire phralende ko kotar them Sichem, hoy lom miro rhareha oun miro bogo dran o vast foun i Amorarya.”" 
Genesis49:1 Oun o Yakob das peskre čaven gole oun penas: Avenn khetne! Me penau t'menge, hoy t'menge djala an ko tsiro, kay vella." 
Genesis49:2 T'mer, o Yakobeskre čave, avenn oun shounenn! Shounenn, hoy t'maro dad, o Israel, t'menge penell!" 
Genesis49:3 Tou, o Ruben, miro phoureder čavo hal, miri zoor hi an toute. Har homs terno oun zorelo, vom tiro dad. Tou hal bareder oun zorleder har tire phrala." 
Genesis49:4 Divyo har i pani hals, pash yekate miri romyendar soval. Ap tiro dadeste i ladj anal. Doleske bouder gar ko pralstouno hal." 
Genesis49:5 O Simeon oun o Levi hi phrala. Lengre rharentsa maran le. 
Genesis49:6 Kamau gar te vap yek lendar, har krenn le čilačo koova vin. Kamau gar te vap pash lende, kay yon khetne venna. I rholyatar dan le morshen moulo oun dan gourma bango čičeske." 
Genesis49:7 Lengri rholi rhačrell sik baro. An lengri rholi krenn le savo čilačo dareno koova. Doleske venn le praasedo! Kamau te venn le yaake tradedo, te ačenn le bouder gar khetne an Israel. Ava, kate te kote an o tselo them hounte djivenn lengre čaven, kay pal lende venna." 
Genesis49:8 Tou, o Youda hal kova, kones leskre phrala sharenna. Tiro vast hi zoreles ap o shero kolendar, kay kamenn touke čilačepen. Glan toute vitsrenn pen tele tire phrala." 
Genesis49:9 Miro čavo, tou hal zorelo har i terno levo, kay hi čalo o firhestar, hoy maras lo, oun djal pale, kay lo khere hi, beshell pes oun čivell pes tele. Oun hakenes hi daar, te taprell lo les an." 
Genesis49:10 Hako tsiro vell o baro ray dran o kheer Youda, oun yek leskre menshendar rikrell o rayeskro kasht an o vast yaake rah, bis te vell kova, kay čačepah o baro ray hi. Ap koleste shounenn i natsyone ap i phoub." 
Genesis49:11 Yob pandell peskri bourika ap i drakengro rouk. Oun lakro ternepen pandell lo ap o lačo drakengro rouk. Peskro ripen thovell lo an mool, peskri baya an loli mool." 
Genesis49:12 Leskre yaka hi kalo i molyatar. Leskre danda hi parno i thoudatar. 
Genesis49:13 O Zabulon djivell pash o baro pani, kote, kay i shiffe čiddo hi. Leskro them djal bis pash o foro Sidon." 
Genesis49:14 O Issakar hi har i zoreli bourika, kay čiddo hi mashkral douy gone." 
Genesis49:15 Yob dikas, har shoukar leskri platsa hi oun har kamlo o them hi, oun čivas peskro phiko tele, te hidjrell lo pharo koova oun boudrell i vavarenge." 
Genesis49:16 O Dan dell yak, te vell o čačepen dren rikedo pash peskre menshende. Doleske sharenn les leskre phrala an Israel." 
Genesis49:17 O Dan hi har i sap ap o drom, hoy dandrella o grayes an i herya. Oun kova, kay hi beshdo ap o gray, perell tele." 
Genesis49:18 Baro Devel, ab ap miri rig!" 
Genesis49:19 O Gad, boud lourde tradenn les. Oun yob rissrell pes trouyel oun lell len palla." 
Genesis49:20 O Asser, ap leskro them vell lačo djob baro, leskri phoub anell shoukar rhapen vin – rhapen, hoy i bare raya rhana!" 
Genesis49:21 O Naftali hi har i vesheskri groumni, hoy nashell trouyel oun lell shoukar terne." 
Genesis49:22 O Yosef hi har i terno rouk pash o pani, hoy hidjrell boud roukengre. Leskre kashta venn baro oun djan pral i pre-čidde barra, kay lo tardo hi." 
Genesis49:23 I kourepangre his rhoyedo ap leste. Ninna te dan le ap leste karye oun lan les palla," 
Genesis49:24 his leskro bogo zoreles an leskro vast, oun leskre moussya his zoreles kerdo, o Yakobeskro zorelo Devel das les zoor. Yob dell garda ap o Israel har i bakrengro ap peskre bakre, oun dell len gar pre." 
Genesis49:25 Tiro dadeskro Devel vell ap tiri rig. Yob hi o zorelo Devel. Yob dell tout brishin dran o bolepen oun pani dran i phoub, ninna boud čave oun firhe." 
Genesis49:26 Dik i berge, hoy djan pral bis an o bolepen oun ačenna hako tsiro! Tiro bravlepen vell bareder har kolla. Ava, bareder har ko lačo koova ap i berge, hoy ačenna hako tsiro. Kova lauter lell o Yosef, kay hi o vi-rodedo mank leskre phralende." 
Genesis49:27 O Benyamin hi har i divyo djouklo, kay marella. Taysarlakro rhal lo kova, hoy dandras yob an kotya. Oun rati dell yob i vavaren kolestar, hoy pral ačas." 
Genesis49:28 Kolla lauter hi i deesh-te-douy bare familye, hoy venna o Israeleskre deesh-te-douy čavendar. Kol labentsa penas lenge lengro dad, har lenge djala an ko tsiro, kay vella. Hakeneske his les i vavar lab." 
Genesis49:29 Oun o Yakob penas zoreles ap lende: “Te vau me paskedo, paskrenn man pash mire phourende an koy grotta, hoy hi ap ko kotar phoub, hoy o Hetares Efron his." 
Genesis49:30 Koy grotta hi pash Mamre ap ko kotar phoub, hoy kharella Makpela an o them Kanaan. Ko kotar phoub ginas o Abraham o foun o Hetari, o Efron, te vell kote peskri familya paskedo." 
Genesis49:31 Kote paskran le o Abrahames oun leskri romyat Sara. Kote paskran le ninna o Isaakes oun leskri romyat Rebekka. Oun kote paskrom miri romyat Lea. 
Genesis49:32 Ko kotar phoub, kay i grotta čiddo hi, hi maro. Mer ginam les foun i Hetarya.”" 
Genesis49:33 Har o Yakob kova peskre čavenge penas, tserdas yob peskre herya ap o čiben oun meras." 
Genesis50:1 Koy peras o Yosef ap peskro dadeskro mouy oun rovas pral leste oun čoumras les. 
Genesis50:2 Oun yob penas ap i dramangre, kay leske boudran, te makenn le leskro dades kouč djeteha dren. Oun kol dramangre makan o Israel kouč djeteha dren." 
Genesis50:3 Star-desha divessa makan le les dren. Kova hi o tsiro o makepaske. Oun i Egiptarya rovan pral leste 70 (efta-desha) divessa. 
Genesis50:4 Pal kol 70 (efta-desha) divessa rakras o Yosef ap o baro rayeskri familya oun penas: “Avenn mange lačo oun rakrenn o baro rayeha oun penenn leske mandar: 
Genesis50:5 Miro dad moukas man sovel te dell oun penas: Me merau. Paske man an miro moulengro kheer, hoy krom mange an o them Kanaan! Kanna mouk man te djal, te paskrap miro dades an o them Kanaan. Pal kova vau pale.”" 
Genesis50:6 O baro ray moukas leske te penell: “Dja koy, paske tiro dades, yaake har dal tout glan tiro dadeste sovel.”" 
Genesis50:7 Yaake djas o Yosef, te paskrell lo peskro dades. Khetne leha djan i tsele pralstoune boudepangre o baro rayestar, i phoureder an leskro kheer oun i tsele pralstoune pral o them Egiptia." 
Genesis50:8 Ninna i tsele menshe dran o Yosefeskro kheer oun leskre phrala oun i vavar menshe dran leskro dadeskro kheer djan leha. Kokres lengre čave, lengre bakre oun groumya moukan yon an o them Gosen." 
Genesis50:9 Ninna vourdya oun klissepangre djan lentsa. Halauter khetne his boud boud menshe. 
Genesis50:10 Oun yon van ap i platsa, hoy kharella Goren-Atad. Koy platsa hi čiddo ap i vavar rig o panyestar Yordan. Kote rovan le oun dan bari gole pral o Yakobeskro merepen. Oun o Yosef rovas lentsa efta divessa pral peskro dadeste." 
Genesis50:11 Har i Kanaanitarya, kay koy djivan, dikan, har yon rovan ap i platsa Goren-Atad, penan le: “Havo baro ropen krenn i Egiptarya kote!” Doleske dan le koy platsa ko lab Abel-Mizrayim. Koy platsa hi čiddo ap i vavar rig o panyestar Yordan." 
Genesis50:12 Oun o Yakobeskre čave kran leha yaake, har o Yakob lenge penas." 
Genesis50:13 Yon anan les an o them Kanaan oun paskran les an i grotta ap ko kotar phoub pash Mamre, hoy kharella Makpela. Ko kotar phoub ginas o Abraham foun o Hetari, o Efron, te vell kote leskri familya paskedo." 
Genesis50:14 Har o Yosef peskro dades paskras, vas yob pale an o them Egiptia: yob oun leskre phrala oun lauter, kay leha djan." 
Genesis50:15 Har o Yosefeskre phrala dikan, kay lengro dad moulo his, penan le: “Hoy krah mer, te hi o Yosef menge čilačo oun dell men o čilačepen pale, hoy mer ap leste kram?”" 
Genesis50:16 Doleske bičran le yekes pash o Yosefeste oun penan leske: “Tiro dad penas glan peskro merepen: 
Genesis50:17 Yaake hounte penenn ap o Yosefeste: Mangau tout, biste ko čilačo koova, hoy tire phrala ap toute kran! Doleske mangah mer, kay ninna tiro dadeskro Debles an-gole dah: Biste ko čilačepen, hoy mer kram!” Har o Yosef kova shounas, rovas yob." 
Genesis50:18 Oun leskre phrala djan pash leste oun čivran pen tele glan leste oun penan: “Ake, mer ham tire boudepangre!”" 
Genesis50:19 O Yosef penas ap lende: “Ma darenn! Hom me o Devel? 
Genesis50:20 T'mer kaman te krenn mange čilačepen. O Devel las peske glan, te krell lo lauter mishto, yaake har hi kava dives: Boud menshe ačan djido." 
Genesis50:21 Ma darenn! Me dikau ap t'mende oun t'mare čavende.” Yaake rakras yob lače labentsa ap lengre djia. 
Genesis50:22 Oun o Yosef djivas an o them Egiptia, yob oun peskro dadeskri familya. Oun o Yosef vas 110 (sheel-te-deesh) bersha phouro." 
Genesis50:23 Oun yob dikas i čavengre čaven peskro čavestar Efrayim. Ninna i čave peskro čaveskro čavestar, o Makir, van pash leste baro. O Makir his o Manasseskro čavo." 
Genesis50:24 Oun o Yosef penas ap peskre phralende: “Me merau kanna. O Devel dikella lačes ap t'mende, oun anell t'men dran kava them vin, an ko them, kay yob peskro vast pre das, te dell lo les o Abrahameste, o Isaakeste oun o Yakobeste.”" 
Genesis50:25 Oun o Yosef kamas te denn pen o Israeleskre čave sovel oun penas ap lende: “Te anell o Devel t'men khere, lenn man t'mentsa!” Oun yon dan pen sovel glan leste." 
Genesis50:26 Oun o Yosef meras, har yob 110 (sheel-te-deesh) bersha phouro his. Oun yob vas dre-maklo o kouč djeteha oun čiddo an i morhton an o them Egiptia." 
Exodus1:1 Kolla hi kol laba kol morsh čavendar, kay van o Yakobeha an o them Egiptia. Hakeno vas peskri familyah:" 
Exodus1:2 o Ruben, o Simeon, o Levi, o Youda, o Issakar, o Zabulon, o Benyamin, o Dan, o Naftali, o Gad, o Asser" 
Exodus1:3  
Exodus1:4  
Exodus1:5 Khetne pengre čaventsa oun čavengre čaventsa his le 70 (efta-deesh). O Yosef his glan lende an o them Egiptia. 
Exodus1:6 Pale meras o Yosef oun peskre phrala oun leskre tsele menshe, kay an ko tsiro djivan." 
Exodus1:7 Lengre čave lan yaake boud čave, kay vas o them pherdo lendar." 
Exodus1:8 Pal boud bersha vas i nevo baro ray an o them Egiptia. Kava djinas o Yosefestar či," 
Exodus1:9 oun rakras peskre menshentsa oun penas: “Kol menshe, i Israelitarya, hi boudeder oun zorleder har mer." 
Exodus1:10 Mer hounte hatsas i drom, te venn yon gar gomme boudeder. Te phagals i baro kourepen vin, nay dans pen yon ap i vavar rig, oun mer hounte kourams men lentsa, oun yon djans dran ko them vin.”" 
Exodus1:11 I Egiptarya čivan pralstoune pral i Israelitarya. Kolla dan garda te boudran i Israelitarya phares, oun yaake rikran le len tele. Oun yon kran i forya Pitom oun Ramses, te vell kote o rhapen čiddo o baro rayeske, o Farao." 
Exodus1:12 Ninna te djan le zoreles ap lende, van yon boudeder oun zorleder. Oun i Egiptarya daran lendar," 
Exodus1:13 oun kran, te boudrenn i Israelitarya gomme phareder." 
Exodus1:14 Len his kek dji lenge oun kran lengro djipen phares. Oun i Israelitarya hounte rhačan barra dran čik. Ninna hounte boudran le phares ap i harhetikri phoub. 
Exodus1:15 O baro ray pral o them Egiptia das kol douy rhačede rhalya, i Shifra oun i Poua, gole. Kolla his hebretikre djouvya. Oun yob penas ap lende:" 
Exodus1:16 “Te lenn kol hebretikre djouvya čaven, pale krenn i morsh čaven moules, kol čen moukenn te djivell!”" 
Exodus1:17 Kol douy rhačede rhalya daran o Deblestar oun shounan gar ap o baro rayeste, hoy yob penas. Yon moukan ninna kol morsh čaven te djivell." 
Exodus1:18 Palle moukas o baro ray kol rhačede rhalya te vell oun penas: “Hoske shounan t'mer gar ap mande oun moukan kol morsh čaven te djivell?” 
Exodus1:19 Kol rhačede rhalya penan ap o Farao: “Kol hebretikre djouvya hi gar yaake har kol egiptikre djouvya, yon hi zorleder djouvya. Glan kova, kay mer vah, hi i čave boldo.”" 
Exodus1:20 I rhačede rhalya daran o Deblestar. Doleske moukas o Devel lenge mishto te djal oun das len bari barht. I Israelitarya van boud oun boudeder oun zorelo oun zorleder. 
Exodus1:21  
Exodus1:22 Kanna penas o Farao ap i Egiptarya an peskro tselo them: “Kol tsele morsh čave, hoy neves boldo van, vitsrenn an o pani Nil! Oun i čen moukenn te djivell!”" 
Exodus2:1 Koy his i morsh kol menshendar, kay venna pal o Levi. Kova las peske i romni, kay his ninna i Leviteskre menshendar." 
Exodus2:2 Yoy vas an vavar koova oun las i čavo. Har dikas yoy, kay hi o čavo sasto oun shoukar, khatras yoy les triin čon." 
Exodus2:3 Har khatras li les nay bouder gar, kras yoy i tikni korba, makas i korba mit čomone dren, kay djal kek pani dren, oun čivas lakro ternepen koy dren, las koy korba, čivas les mank ko baro panyeskro khass pash o pani Nil." 
Exodus2:4 O tikno čaveskri pheen khatras pes gar dour, te dikell yoy, hoy leha djala." 
Exodus2:5 Koy vas o baro rayeskri čay oun kamas pes an ko pani Nil te thovell. Oun kol djouvya, kay lake boudran, nashan pash o pani. Ap yek kopo dikas yoy koy korba mank ko baro panyeskro khass, oun bičras lakri boudepaskretsa koy, te anell li koy korba." 
Exodus2:6 Har yoy koy korba pre kras, dikas yoy i tikno čaves, hoy rovas. Kova khaytas lat oun yoy penas: “Kova hi i hebretikro čavo.”" 
Exodus2:7 O tikno čaveskri pheen poučas o rayeskri čatar: “Dap me i hebretikri djouvel gole, hoy dell kol ternepen o beč te piyell?”" 
Exodus2:8 “Ava, kre kova!” penas yoy. Koy las koy čay o ternepaskri dat." 
Exodus2:9 Oun o rayeskri čay penas ap late: “Le ko ternepen oun de leste te piyell! Me playsrau tout mishto.” Yaake las i day peskro ternepen pale oun das les te piyell. 
Exodus2:10 Har his o čavo bares doha, anas yoy les pale o rayeskri čake. Koya las ko čaves har te vals lo lakro čavo. Yoy penas: “Me tserdom les dran o pani vin.” Doleske das yoy les o lab Mose." 
Exodus2:11 Har his o Mose baro, vas i dives, kay djas lo pash peskre menshende. Koy dikas yob har yon phares hounte boudrenn, oun har das yek Egiptari i Hebreares." 
Exodus2:12 Koy dikas o Mose pes trouyel, te nay dikell les kek. Palle das yob o Egiptari moulo, oun čivas les tel i phoub." 
Exodus2:13 O vavar dives djas yob pale vin. Yob dikas har čingran pen douy Hebretikre morsha. Oun yob penas ap koleste, hoy gar an o čačepen his: “Hoske deh tou i romes, kay hi tire menshendar?”" 
Exodus2:14 Kava penas: “Koon penas, te vess tou ray pral mende? Kameh tou man ninna moules te dell har ko Egiptares?” Kote las o Mose traash oun penas peske: “Har vas kova vin?”" 
Exodus2:15 Har o Farao kova shounas, kamas yob o Moses te marell. O Mose nashas an ko them Midian. Kote beshas yob pes pash i brounna." 
Exodus2:16 O rashay an ko them Midian his efta ča. Kolla van pash i brounna, te denn le pengro dadeskre bakre oun bouzya pani te piyell." 
Exodus2:17 Palle van bakrengre oun tradan len ap i rig. O Mose stas pre oun vas ap lengri rig, oun das lengre bakre oun bouzya pani te piyell." 
Exodus2:18 Har van i ča khere pash pengro dadeste, o Regouel, poučas lo len: “Hoske van t'mer yaake sik pale?”" 
Exodus2:19 Koy penan yon: “Yek Egiptari vas ap mari rig, oun das mare bakre oun bouzya te piyell.”" 
Exodus2:20 “Kay hi lo? Hoske moukan les vin?” poučas o Regouel peskre ča. “Anenn les, te rhal lo mentsa!”" 
Exodus2:21 O Regouel poučas o Mosestar, te ačell yob pash leste, oun o Mose penas: “Ava! Mishto!” O rashay das peskri čay, i Sefora, leste, te romedinerell yob lat." 
Exodus2:22 Har yoy i morsh čavo ap i phoub anas, penas o Mose: “Me nashom an i them, hoy hi gar miro them. Doleske dau les ko lab Gershon.”" 
Exodus2:23 Pal i rah tsiro meras o baro ray pral o them Egiptia. Fothe phares hounte boudran i Israelitarya tel dava oun dan gole, te shounas len o Devel." 
Exodus2:24 Oun yob shounas lengri gole, oun bistras gar ko lab, hoy das yob o Abraham, o Isaak, oun o Yakob, te vell lo lengro Devel oun yon peskre menshe." 
Exodus2:25 Oun o Devel dikas lačes ap i Israelitarya oun vas ap lengri rig. 
Exodus3:1 O Moseskri romyakro dad his o Yetro, ko rashay an o them Midian. Koles his bakre oun bouzya. Oun o Mose das yak ap lende, oun anas len pral o tato moulo them, oun vas pash o Debleskri berga, hoy kharella Horeb." 
Exodus3:2 Oun kote moukas pes o baro Debleskro bolepaskro lestar te dikell, an i yag an i bourra. O Mose dikas, kay i bourra rhačan oun rhačran gar pre." 
Exodus3:3 Oun yob penas ap peste: “Kova hayvau me gar. Me djau kote oun kamau te dikell, hoske rhačrenna gar i bourra pre.”" 
Exodus3:4 Oun o baro Devel dikas, har vell o Mose, te dikell lo feteder. Oun o Devel das ap leste gole dran i bourra: “Mose! Mose!” Oun o Mose penas: “Kate hom.”" 
Exodus3:5 Penas o Devel: “Ma dja doureder! Rib tire kirrha vin! Kay tou tardo hal, hi o Debleskri phoub.”" 
Exodus3:6 Oun pale penas lo ap o Moseste: “Me hom tiro dadeskro Devel, oun o Abrahameskro Devel, oun o Isaakeskro Devel oun o Yakobeskro Devel.” Oun o Mose čivas i diklo glan peskre yaka. Yob daras, te dikell lo ap o Debleste." 
Exodus3:7 Oun o baro Devel penas: “Me dikom har djoungelo mire menshenge djala an o them Egiptia. Me shounom lengri gole, har dan i pralstoune rhale len dava. Me prindjrau lengre douka." 
Exodus3:8 Me vom tele, te lap len dran o vast kol menshendar an o them Egiptia vin, oun anau len dran kava them vin oun dau len i lačo oun baro them, kay hi boud thoud oun gvin. An ko them djivenn kanna i Kanaanitarya, i Hetarya, i Amorarya, i Perisarya, i Hivarya oun i Yebousarya." 
Exodus3:9 Me shounom i Israelengri gole oun dikom, hoy i Egiptarya ap lende krenna. Yon phagenn len, fothe denn le len dava." 
Exodus3:10 Kanna dja pash o Farao! Me bičrau tout, te less mire menshen, i Israelitarya, vin dran o them Egiptia.”" 
Exodus3:11 Koy penas o Mose ap o Debleste: “Me, koon hom me, te djap me pash o Farao, oun anap i tsele Israelitarya dran o them Egiptia vin?”" 
Exodus3:12 Koy penas o Devel: “Me hom pash toute. Te anal tou mire menshen dran o them Egiptia vin, palle djan t'mer pash kay berga oun marenn kate firhen mange. Kova hi i sikepen, te bičrom me tout.”" 
Exodus3:13 O Mose penas ap o Debleste: “Dik, me te djau pash i Israelitarya oun penau lenge: O Devel, koles t'mare phoure an-mangan, kova bičras man pash t'mende. Hoy te penap lenge, te poučenn le mandar, havo lab tout hi?”" 
Exodus3:14 O Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Me hom, koon me hom. Pen ap i Israelitarya: O baro Devel, kay kharella Me-Hom bičras man pash t'mende. Yob hi o baro Devel, kones t'mare phoure dada, o Abraham, o Isaak oun o Yakob an-mangan. Baro Devel hi miro lab i tsele tsirya. Oun yaake hounte kharenn man tire menshe, kay venna pal toute." 
Exodus3:15  
Exodus3:16 Dja kanna an o them Egiptia, oun de i phoureden i menshendar Israel khetne gole, oun pen ap lende: O baro Devel, ko Devel t'mare phoure dadendar, moukas pes te dikell glan mande. Yob hi o Devel, koles o Abraham, o Isaak oun o Yakob an-mangan. Oun yob penas ap mande: Me dom ap lauter yak, hoy yon t'mentsa an o them Egiptia kran." 
Exodus3:17 Me dau miro vast pre: Kava djoungelo djipen herell pes pre. Me, o baro Devel, lau t'men dran o them Egiptia vin, oun anau t'men an ko them, kay djivenna i Kanaanitarya, i Hetarya oun i Amorarya, i Perisarya, oun i Hivarya oun i Yebousarya. Oun kova hi i them, kay hi boud thoud oun gvin." 
Exodus3:18 Oun i phoureder shounenna ap tiro lab. Palle dja lentsa pash o baro rayeste pral o them Egiptia. Oun penenn ap leste: O baro Devel, koles i Hebrearya an-mangenna, vas pash mende. Kanna mouk men triin divessa dour an o moulo tato them te djal, te maras firhen maro Debleske. ”" 
Exodus3:19 Oun palle penas o baro Devel: “Me djinau, o baro ray pral o them Egiptia, te vell lo gar phagedo, moukell lo t'men gar dran o them vin te djal." 
Exodus3:20 Doleske čivau bari bibarht ap i Egiptarya, oun krau baro koova mank lende, hoy sikrella miri zoor. Pal kova moukenn le t'men te djal." 
Exodus3:21 Oun daryatar krenn le pengre djia t'menge pre oun denn t'men boud lačo koova peha.
