Exodus3:22 T'mare djouvya djan pash kolende, kay langs lende khere hi oun mangenn lendar sonakay oun roup, oun shoukar ripya. Kava lauter lenn lendar oun denn les t'mare čavende, te hidjrenn le les.”" 
Exodus4:1 O Mose poučas o baro Deblestar: “Hoy hi, te patsenn i Israelitarya gar, hoy me lenge penau, oun yon shounenn gar ap mande? Nay vell, yon penenna ap mande: O baro Devel moukas pes gar glan toute te dikell. ”" 
Exodus4:2 Penell o baro Devel ap o Mose: “Hoy hi tout kote an o vast?” “Yek kotar kasht”, penell o Mose." 
Exodus4:3 “Vitse o kasht ap i phoub”, penell leske o baro Devel. Oun o Mose vitsras o kasht ap i phoub. Koy vas o kasht yek djido sap. Oun i daryatar nashas o Mose peske." 
Exodus4:4 Koy penas o baro Devel ap o Mose: “Čip tiro vast vin! Oun tape o sap ap i pori!” Oun o Mose tapras o sap. Oun har his o sap an leskro vast, vas o sap pale i kasht." 
Exodus4:5 Oun o baro Devel penas: “Mose, kre kava glan i Israelitarya! Palle patsenn le ap toute, te moukom man me, o baro Devel, glan toute te dikell. Palle djinenn le, te hom me o Devel, koles lengre phoure, o Abraham, o Isaak oun o Yakob an-mangan.”" 
Exodus4:6 Oun pale rakras o baro Devel ap o Moseste: “Čip tiro vast tel tiri plaashka!” Oun o Mose čivas peskro vast tel peskri plaashka. Oun har las lo les pale vin, his leskro vast nasselo oun parno har gib." 
Exodus4:7 Oun o baro Devel penas ap leste: “Čip tiro vast pale tel i plaashka!” Oun yob čivas peskro vast pale tel i plaashka! Oun har las lo les pale vin, his o vast pale sasto." 
Exodus4:8 Oun o baro Devel penas: “Te dikenn le ko baro koova, hoy me tiro kashteha krom, oun yon patsenn tout gar, palle patsenn le, te sikreh tou len kava douyto baro koova." 
Exodus4:9 Oun te patsenn le tout pale gar, ninna te dikan le ko baro koova, hoy krom o kashteha oun o vasteha, oun shounenn gar koy pre, hoy tou lenge peneh, palle le pani dran o Nil, oun čore o pani ap i phoub! Palle vell ko pani rat.”" 
Exodus4:10 Oun o Mose penas ap o baro Debleste: “Miro Ray, me hayvau gar mishto te rakrell, ninna kanna kay rakreh mantsa, hi mange phares te rakrap.”" 
Exodus4:11 Pale penas o baro Devel ap o Moseste: “Koon krell, te nay rakrenn i menshe? Oun koon krell kova, te nay rakrell oun shounell yek gar? Koon krell kova, te nay dikenn le? Oun koon krell, te nay dikell yek gar? Hom kova gar me?" 
Exodus4:12 Oun kanna dja pash lende! Me kamau tiro mouy te vell, oun kamau touke lauter sikrell, hoy tou lenge te peness!”" 
Exodus4:13 Koy penas o Mose: “Miro ray, mangau tout, biče yek vavares!”" 
Exodus4:14 Oun har penas o Mose kova, las o baro Devel rholi ap o Moseste, oun yob penas ap leste: “Tiro phraal, o Levitari Aron, me djinau, te hayvell lo mishto te rakrell. Shoun, yob vella pash toute. Oun te dikell yob tout, palle hi les baro shoukapen an peskro dji." 
Exodus4:15 Oun pen tiro phraleske halauter, hoy yob hounte rakrell! Oun me, t'maro Devel, čivau mire laba an tiro mouy oun leskro mouy oun sikrau t'men halauter, hoy hounte krenn." 
Exodus4:16 O Aron rakrell touke ap i Israelitarya, oun lauter, hoy tou leske peneh, kova penell lo! Yob hi har tiro mouy. Oun tou hal leske har i devel, kay leske i laba an o mouy čivell." 
Exodus4:17 Oun kava kasht le an tiro vast! Koleha kress tou ko baro koova.” 
Exodus4:18 Oun palle djas o Mose pash peskro romyakro dadeste, o Yetro, pale, oun penas leske: “Me kamau pale an o them Egiptia pash mire menshende te djal, te dikap, te hi le djido!” Oun o Yetro penas ap o Moseste: “Dja o Debleha!”" 
Exodus4:19 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Moseste an o them Midian: “Dja an o them Egiptia palpale! Kol tsele morsha, kay kaman tout te marell, djivenn bouder gar.”" 
Exodus4:20 Kote las o Mose peskri romyat oun peskre čaven, oun čivas len ap i bourika. Oun yon djan an o them Egiptia. Oun o Debleskro kasht las yob peha." 
Exodus4:21 Oun o baro Devel rakras ap o Moseste: “Te hal an o them Egiptia, palle kre ko tselo baro koova, hoy me tout an tiro vast dom, glan o Farao! Oun me kamau leskro dji har i bar te krell, te moukell yob gar tire menshen dran i Egiptia vin." 
Exodus4:22 Oun rake ap leste: Yaake rakrella o baro Devel: O Israel hi miro phoureder čavo. 
Exodus4:23 Oun me penau touke: Mouk miro čaves te djal, te mangell lo man an! Oun te moukeh les gar te djal, palle marau me tiro phoureder čavo. ”" 
Exodus4:24 Oun har his o Mose ap o drom, djas lo an i kheer, kote ačas lo pral i rat. Ap yek kopo vas o baro Devel ap leste, oun kamas les te marell." 
Exodus4:25 Palle las i Sefora sik i čouri, oun činas peskro čaves ap o mass, oun čivas kova, hoy yoy tele činas, ap o Moseskre pire. Oun yoy penas: “Rat ratas, oun tou hounte meress gar. Tiro djipen vas touke neves dino. Yaake val i douyto kopo miro rom.”" 
Exodus4:26 Kava lab penas li doleske, kay činas li peskro čaves ap o mass. Palle moukas o baro Devel o Moseske tele." 
Exodus4:27 An ko tsiro penas o baro Devel ap o Aron: “Dja pash o Moseste an o moulo tato them!” Oun o Aron djas koy. Oun yon hatsan pen pash i Debleskri berga, oun lan pen an i moussi oun čoumran pen." 
Exodus4:28 Oun o Mose penas o Aroneske halauter, hoy o baro Devel leske penas, ninna ko baro koova, hoy yob an o Debleskri zoor krell." 
Exodus4:29 Oun khetne djan le an o them Egiptia oun dan i phoureden i menshendar Israel khetne gole. 
Exodus4:30 Oun o Aron penas lenge i tsele laba, hoy o baro Devel ap o Moseste penas. Palle kras o Mose glan lengre yaka ko baro koova an o Debleskri zoor." 
Exodus4:31 Oun yon patsan len. Oun har shounan i Israelitarya, te dikas o baro Devel lengro pharo djipen, oun kamell lenge lačepen te krell, koy vitsran pen le ap i phoub, oun mangan o Debles an." 
Exodus5:1 Palle djas o Mose oun o Aron pash o Farao oun penan ap leste: “Yaake rakrella o baro Devel, kay o Israeleskro Devel hi: Mouk mire menshen te djal, te djan le an o moulo tato them, oun kote sharenn le man. ”" 
Exodus5:2 Oun o Farao penas ap o Moseste oun ap o Aroneste: “Havo devel hi kova, kay me shounap ap leste? Hoske moukap me i Israelitarya te djal? Me prindjrau ko debles gar, oun me moukau gar i Israelitaryen te djal.”" 
Exodus5:3 O Mose oun o Aron penan ap o Farao: “O baro Devel, ko Devel, koles i Hebrearya an-mangenn, yob moukas pes glan mende te dikell. Kanna, mouk men triin divessa dour te djal an o moulo tato them. Mer kamah maro Debleske kote firhen te marell. Oun kova te krah mer gar, nay vell lo rhoyedo ap mende, yaake te vell baro nasslepen oun kourepen ap mende.”" 
Exodus5:4 Koy penas o Farao ap lende: “T'mer, Mose oun Aron, hoske kamenn t'mer kol menshen dran pengri boudi te lell? Yon hi boudeder har i Egiptarya. Oun t'mer kamenn len pale te rikrell, te krenn le bouder gar pengri boudi! Djan t'menge! Hakeno pash peskri boudi!”" 
Exodus5:5  
Exodus5:6 Ap kava dives penas o Farao ap kol pralstoune Egiptarya oun ap kol pralstoune Israelitarya, kay dan yak ap i boudepangre:" 
Exodus5:7 “Denn len bouder kek phouss, te čivenn le kova an koy čik, kolatar yon barra rhačenna! Moukenn len ko phouss penge kokres khetne te čivell!" 
Exodus5:8 Ninna te hounte čivenn le ko phouss penge kokres khetne, hounte krenn le yaake boud barra, har kran le glan kava tsiro. Penenn lenge, te moukenn le gar tele. Yon kamenn gar te boudrell. Doleske poučan le mandar, te moukap len te djal, te marenn le firhen lengro debleske." 
Exodus5:9 Denn len yaake boud boudi, te shounenn le gar ap kava rhorheno rakepen!”" 
Exodus5:10 Koy djan kol pralstoune Egiptarya oun kol Israelitarya, kay dan yak ap i boudepangre, pash lende oun penan lenge: “O Farao penas, te das mer t'men bouder kek phouss." 
Exodus5:11 Djan t'menge koy, oun čivenn t'men kokres phouss khetne! Krenn yaake boud barra har kran hako dives!”" 
Exodus5:12 Koy djan kol menshe trouyel an o tselo them Egiptia, te čivenn le penge phouss khetne." 
Exodus5:13 Oun kol pralstoune Egiptarya tradan len oun penan: “Krenn yaake boud barra har an ko tsiro, kay dan le t'mende phouss!”" 
Exodus5:14 Oun kol Israelitarya, kolen i pralstoune Egiptarya pral i boudepangre čivan, te denn le yak lende, kolla rhan dava. Oun lenge vas penlo: “Hoske kran t'mer gar kava dives oun vitar gar taysar yaake boud barra har glan kova?”" 
Exodus5:15 Koy djan kol Israelitarya, kay ap i boudepangre yak dan, pash o Farao oun penan leske: “Maro ray, hoske kreh tou yaake mentsa?" 
Exodus5:16 Kek dell men phouss, oun menge vell penlo: Krenn barra! Oun mer, tire boudepangre, rhah dava. Tire menshe krenn mentsa, hoy gar mishto hi.”" 
Exodus5:17 O Farao penas: “T'mer kamenn gar te boudrell. Yaake hi kova! Doleske penan: Mer kamah te djal, te maras firhen o baro Debleske." 
Exodus5:18 Kanna djan ap t'mari boudi! Kek phouss vell t'mende dino! Oun yaake boud barra har glan kova hounte krenna!” 
Exodus5:19 Har shounan i morsha, kay hounte krenn le hako dives yaake boud barra har glan kova, koy dikan le, te dikell lenge gar mishto vin." 
Exodus5:20 An ko tsiro his o Mose oun o Aron vin tardo. Har van i morsha dran o Faraeskro kheer vin, djan le pash lende oun penan lenge:" 
Exodus5:21 “O baro Debleskri rholi vell ap t'mende! T'mer kran, te ham o Faraeske oun leskre pralstunenge har djoukle. Kanna hi an lengre vasta, te nay marenn le men.”" 
Exodus5:22 Oun o Mose vas pale glan o baro Debleste oun penas ap leste: “Miro ray, hoske kreh tou savo čilačepen ap kal menshende? Hoske bičral tou man pash lende?" 
Exodus5:23 Hako kopo, har djom pash o Farao oun penom leske, hoy tou kamal, kras lo i menshenge o djipen gomme phareder. Tou kral či, te less tire menshen koy vin!”" 
Exodus6:1 Koy penas o baro Devel ap o Mose: “Kanna dikess tou, hoy me o Faraeske krau. Dran miri bari zoor moukell lo len te djal. Miro vast vell yaake zorelo ap leste, te tradell lo len dran o them vin.”" 
Exodus6:2 Oun o Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas leske: “Me hom o baro Devel," 
Exodus6:3 oun sikrom man o Abrahameste oun o Isaakeste oun o Yakobeste. Har vom pash lende, sikrom lende, kay hom o zorelo Devel. Miro lab baro Devel, moukom len gar te djinell." 
Exodus6:4 Ninna dom lende miro vast koy pre, te dap len o them Kanaan, ko them, kay yon vi-themarya his." 
Exodus6:5 Ninna shounom me i gole, har i Israelitarya gole dan i doukatar, har i Egiptarya lenge i zoryah phari boudi pre čivan. Oun me bistrom miro lab gar oun rikrau les." 
Exodus6:6 Doleske pen ap i Israelitarya: Me hom o baro Devel! Me lau t'men vin dran t'mari phari boudi, hoy i Egiptarya ap t'mende čivan. Miri bari rholi vell ap lende, oun bari zoryah lau t'men vin." 
Exodus6:7 Kamau, te venn t'mer mire menshe, oun me kamau t'maro Devel te vell. Oun t'mer dikenn oun hayvenn, te hom me, o baro Devel, t'maro Devel, kay las t'men vin dran i phari boudi, hoy i Egiptarya ap t'mende čivan." 
Exodus6:8 Palle anau me t'men an ko them, koleske me miro vast dom, oun man sovel dom, te dau les o Abrahameste oun o Isaakeste oun o Yakobeste. Kava them dau me t'mende, te vell lo t'maro them. Me, o baro Devel, dau les t'mende. ”" 
Exodus6:9 Kal laba penas o Mose ap i Israelitarya. Ninna har rakras yob yaake ap lende, shounan le gar ap leste. Yaake phari his lengri boudi ap lende, oun an lengre djia his bouder kek zoor." 
Exodus6:10 Kote rakras o baro Devel ap o Moseste oun penas: 
Exodus6:11 “Dja dren pash o Farao, ko baro ray pral o them Egiptia, oun pen leske, te moukell lo i Israelitarya dran leskro them te djal.”" 
Exodus6:12 O Mose penas ap o baro Debleste: “Dik, i Israelitarya shounan gar ap mande. Har shounell palle o Farao ap mande? Ninna hayvau gar mishto te rakrell.”" 
Exodus6:13 Oun o baro Devel rakras ap o Moseste oun ap o Aroneste oun bičras len pash i Israelitarya oun pash o Farao, ko baro ray pral o them Egiptia, te moukell lo i Israelitaryen dran o them Egiptia te djal." 
Exodus6:14 Kalla hi i laba kol phoure dadendar, kolendar i Israelitarya van: O Ruben his o Israeleskro phoureder čavo. Leskre čave hi: o Henok, o Pallou, o Hesron oun o Karmi. Lendar van bare familye, kolengro phouro dad o Ruben his." 
Exodus6:15 O Simeon his i vavar Israeleskro čavo. Leskre čave hi: o Yemouel, o Yamin, o Ohad, o Yakin, o Sohar oun o Shaul. O Shauleskri day his i Kanaanitetsa. Lendar van bare familye, kolengro phouro dad o Simeon his." 
Exodus6:16 O Levi his i vavar Israeleskro čavo. Leskre čave hi: o Gershon, o Kohat oun o Merari. Kolendar van i Levitarya. Oun o Levi vas 137 (sheel-te-triyanda-te-efta) bersha phouro." 
Exodus6:17 O Gershon, les his douy čave. Kolla hi: O Libni oun o Shimi oun lengre familye." 
Exodus6:18 O Kohat, les his čave. Kolla hi: o Amram, o Yizhar, o Hebron oun o Ouziel. O Kohat vas 133 (sheel-te-triyanda-te-triin) bersha phouro." 
Exodus6:19 O Merari, les his čave. Kolla hi: o Mali oun o Moushi. Kalla hi lauter i menshe, kay van pal o Levi, hakeno an ko tsiro, kay yob djivas." 
Exodus6:20 Oun o Amram las peske i romni, i Yokebed, i pheen leskro dadestar. Oun koya las douy čave: o Aron oun o Mose. Oun o Amram vas 137 (sheel-te-triyanda-te-efta) bersha phouro." 
Exodus6:21 O Yizhar, les his triin čave. Kolla hi: O Korah, o Nefeg oun o Zikri." 
Exodus6:22 O Ouziel, les his triin čave. Kolla hi: O Mishael, o Elizafan oun o Sitri." 
Exodus6:23 O Aron las peske i romni: i Elisheba. Lakro dad hi o Amminadab. Oun lakro phraal hi o Nashon. Oun yoy las čave: o Nadab, oun o Abihu, o Elazar oun o Itamar." 
Exodus6:24 O Korah, les his triin čave. Kolla his: O Assir, o Elkana oun o Abyasaf. Kolendar van i bare familye, hoy kharenna Koraharya." 
Exodus6:25 O Aroneskro čavo, o Elazar, las peske i romni. Kolakro dad his o Poutiel. Oun yoy las i čavo, o Pinhas. Kal phoure dadendar venna bare familye, yon hi lauter Levitarya." 
Exodus6:26 Kova Aron oun kova Mose hi kolla, ap kolende o baro Devel penas: “Anenn i Israelitarya vin dran o them Egiptia! Anenn len yaake vin, te djal haki bari familya khetne!”" 
Exodus6:27 Yon his kol morsha, kay penan ap ko baro rayeste pral o them Egiptia, o Farao, te moukell yob i Israelitaryen dran o them Egiptia vin te djal." 
Exodus6:28 Ap ko dives har o baro Devel ap o Moseste rakras an o them Egiptia," 
Exodus6:29 penas lo: “Me hom o baro Devel. Pen ap o Farao, ko baro rayeste pral i Egiptia, halauter, hoy me touke penom.”" 
Exodus6:30 Oun o Mose penas ap o baro Debleste: “Tou djineh, me hayvau gar mishto te rakrell. Har shounell o Farao ap mande?”" 
Exodus7:1 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Shoun, me krom, te vess har o Devel o Faraeske. Oun tiro phraal Aron rakrell touke. Yob rakrell, hoy leske peneh." 
Exodus7:2 Tou peness o Aroneske lauter, hoy me touke penau. Oun yob penell les ap o Farao, te moukell yob i Israelitaryen dran peskro them te djal." 
Exodus7:3 Me kamau leskro dji har i bar te krell, yaake te nay krap boud baro koova an o tselo them Egiptia, te sikrap miri bari zoor." 
Exodus7:4 Oun o Farao shounella gar ap t'mende, ninna te vell miri rholi boud kope pral leste oun leskro them. Oun palle lau mire menshen, i Israelitarya, vin dran o them Egiptia." 
Exodus7:5 Oun kol Egiptarya dikenn oun hayvenn, kay hom me o baro Devel, te hadau me miro vast pral o them Egiptia oun lau i Israelitarya mashkral lende vin.”" 
Exodus7:6 Oun o Mose oun o Aron kran yaake, har o baro Devel lenge penas." 
Exodus7:7 Oun o Mose his 80 (orhta-deesh) bersha oun o Aron 83 (orhta-deesh-te-triin) bersha phouro, har yon ap o Farao rakran." 
Exodus7:8 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose oun ap o Aron: 
Exodus7:9 “Te rakrell o Farao ap t'mende oun penell: Krenn yek baro koova an o Debleskri zoor, yaake te patsap t'men, palle peness tou ap o Aron: Le tiro kasht oun vitse les glan o Farao! Palle vell o kasht i sap.”" 
Exodus7:10 Kote djan o Mose oun o Aron pash o Farao dren, oun kran les yaake, har o baro Devel lenge penas. Oun o Aron vitsras peskro kasht ap i phoub glan o Farao oun glan kol pralstunende an o rayeskro kheer. Oun o kasht vas i sap." 
Exodus7:11 Kote moukas o Farao i goseve morshen oun i dourkepangren gole te dell. Oun kol egiptikre dourkepangre kran emligo koova an pengri zoor. 
Exodus7:12 Yon vitsran ninna pengre kashta ap i phoub. Oun ninna lendar van sapa. O Aroneskro kasht rhas ko vavar kashta pre. 
Exodus7:13 Har dikas o Farao kova, ačas leskro dji pandlo, oun yob shounas gar ap lende. Yaake vas, hoy o baro Devel penas." 
Exodus7:14 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose: “O Faraeskro dji hi har dran bar. Yob moukell gar i Israelitaryen te djal. 
Exodus7:15 Dja taysarlakro pash o Farao! Yob djala tele pash o pani Nil. Le ko kasht an tiro vast, kolestar i sap vas." 
Exodus7:16 Oun pen ap leste: O baro Devel, o Devel pral i Hebrearya, bičras man pash toute, oun moukell touke te penell: Mouk mire menshen te djal, te mangenn le man an an o moulo tato them. O tselo tsiro shounal tou gar." 
Exodus7:17 Doleske penell o baro Devel: Dikess oun hayvess, te hom me o baro Devel. Dik, me dau o kashteha, hoy an miro vast hi, ap o pani Nil. Oun ko pani vell rat." 
Exodus7:18 Palle merenn i tsele mače dren. Oun o Nil khandella yaake djoungeles, te nay piyell kek Egiptari o pani bouder. ”" 
Exodus7:19 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose: “Pen ap o Aron: Le tiro kasht oun rike tiro vast pral i panya an o them Egiptia: pral i panya, hoy nashenna oun pral o pani, hoy tardo hi. Yaake te vell o tselo pani rat an o tselo them Egiptia. Ninna an i khore dran kasht oun bar hi palle rat dren.”" 
Exodus7:20 Oun o Mose oun o Aron kran yaake, har o baro Devel lenge penas. Oun yob hadas o kasht oun das ap o pani Nil. Oun o Farao oun i pralstoune an leskro kheer dikan kova. Oun o tselo pani an o Nil vas rat." 
Exodus7:21 Oun i mače an o Nil meran. Oun o Nil vas khandlo oun khandas yaake zoreles, te nay piyas kek Egiptari o pani dran o Nil. Oun o rat his an o tselo them Egiptia." 
Exodus7:22 Oun i dourkepangre an o them Egiptia kran ninna yaake an pengri zoor. Oun o Faraeskro dji ačas pale pandlo, oun yob shounas gar ap lende. Yaake vas, hoy o baro Devel penas." 
Exodus7:23 Oun o Farao rissras pes trouyel oun djas pale an peskro kheer oun moukas peske kova gar an o dji te djal. 
Exodus7:24 I tsele Egiptarya hadan i phoub vin pash o pani Nil, te hatsenn le pani te piyell. O pani dran o Nil nay piyan le gar." 
Exodus7:25 Oun efta divessa djan trouyel pal ko dives, kay o baro Devel ap o pani Nil das." 
Exodus7:26 Koy rakras o baro Devel ap o Mose: “Dja pash o Farao dren, oun pen ap leste: Kava penell o baro Devel: Mouk mire menshen te djal, te nay mangenn le man an." 
Exodus7:27 Te moukeh tou len gar te djal, palle dau me o tselo them yaake, te vell lo pherdo djambe." 
Exodus7:28 O tselo Nil vell pherdo djambe. Oun yon venn pre an tiro kheer, an tiri isema, kay soveh, oun an tiro čiben, ninna an i khera, kay i pralstoune djivenna, ninna an i tsele khera, kay i Egiptarya djivenna, an lengre boba, oun an i čare, kay yon o maro dren krenn." 
Exodus7:29 Ava, i djambe venna pre ap toute oun ap i tsele Egiptarya, ninna ap i tsele pralstunende. ”" 
Exodus8:1 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose: “Pen ap o Aron, te rikrell lo peskro kasht pral i tsele panya, kolla, hoy nashenna oun kolla, hoy tardo hi! Oun mouk i djambe pral o tselo them Egiptia pre te vell.”" 
Exodus8:2 Kote rikras o Aron peskro vast pral i panya an o them Egiptia. Oun i djambe van pre, oun his yaake boud, te his o tselo them lentsa pherdo." 
Exodus8:3 Koy van i dourkepangre oun kran pengri zoryah ninna yaake, oun moukan ninna djambe pral o them Egiptia te vell." 
Exodus8:4 Kote moukas o Farao o Moses oun o Arones pash peste gole te dell oun penas: “Mangenn o baro Debles, te lell lo i djambe mandar oun mire menshendar krik! Palle moukau i Israelitaryen te djal, te nay denn le o baro Debleske firhen temerl.”" 
Exodus8:5 Oun o Mose penas ap o Farao: “Tou nay peneh mange, kaana te mangap touke oun i pralstunenge an tiro kheer, oun tire menshenge, te hounte merenn i djambe pash toute oun an tiro kheer, te ačenn le kokres an o Nil.”" 
Exodus8:6 Oun yob penas: “Taysar.” Oun o Mose penas: “Yaake har tou penal, yaake te dikess oun hayvess, te hi kek vavar yaake, har maro baro Devel." 
Exodus8:7 Oun i djambe hounte djan penge toutar oun dran tiro kheer, ninna dran i khera kol pralstunendar oun tire tsele menshendar. Kokres an o Nil ačenn le pral.”" 
Exodus8:8 Oun o Mose oun o Aron djan dran o Faraeskro kheer vin. Oun o Mose das o baro Debles gole oun mangas les, te lell lo i djambe krik, hoy yob pral o Farao anas." 
Exodus8:9 Oun o baro Devel kras yaake, har o Mose lestar mangas. Oun i djambe meran an i khera oun glan i khera oun ap lengri harhetikri phoub." 
Exodus8:10 Oun yon čoran kol boud djambe khetne. Oun o tselo them khandas lendar. 
Exodus8:11 Har dikas o Farao, te hi i bibarht lestar krik, yaake har leske penlo vas, kote pandas yob pale peskro dji oun shounas gar ap lende. Yaake vas, hoy o baro Devel penas." 
Exodus8:12 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose: “Pen ap o Aron: Hade tiro kasht pre oun de an i čik ap i phoub! Palle vell koy čik an o tselo them Egiptia matsille, kay denn čourye.”" 
Exodus8:13 Oun yaake kran le kova: O Aron hadas peskro kasht, oun das an i čik ap i phoub. Kote van i matsille pral i menshende oun firhende. I tseli čik vas matsille an o tselo them Egiptia." 
Exodus8:14 I dourkepangre kaman kova ninna pengri zoryah te krell. Oun yon hayvan les gar. Oun i matsille his ap i menshende oun ap i firhende. 
Exodus8:15 Kote penan i dourkepangre ap o Farao: “Kava hi o Debleskro vast!” Ninna kanna rikras o Farao peskro dji pandlo oun shounas gar ap lende. Yaake vas, hoy o baro Devel penas." 
Exodus8:16 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose: “Taysarla, te djal o Farao pash o pani Nil, dja pash leste oun pen ap leste: Kava penell o baro Devel: Mouk mire menshen te djal, te mangenn le man an!" 
Exodus8:17 Te moukeh tou mire menshen gar te djal, palle moukau me vavar matsille te vell, hoy čourye denn. Yon venna pral toute oun tire pralstunende oun tire tsele menshende. T'mare khera venna pherdo matsille, hoy čourye denn. Ninna i phoub, kay i Egiptarya djivenna, vella pherdo lendar." 
Exodus8:18 Ap ko dives krau kova an ko them Gosen, kay mire menshe djivenna, vavarčandes. Kote venn kek matsille, hoy čourye denn. Yaake te dikess oun te hayvess, te hom me o baro Devel kate an kava them." 
Exodus8:19 Oun tou dikess, te hi vavarčandes pash mire menshende har pash tire menshende. Ko baro koova vell taysar pral t'mende. ”" 
Exodus8:20 Oun o baro Devel kras kova yaake. Oun i matsille, hoy čourye denn, van an o Faraeskro kheer oun an i khera kol pralstunendar oun an o tselo them Egiptia. Yaake vas kova i bari bibarht o tselo themeske." 
Exodus8:21 Kote moukas o Farao o Moses oun o Arones gole te dell oun penas ap lende: “Djan oun marenn kate an o them firhen t'maro Debleske!” 
Exodus8:22 O Mose penas: “Kova djal gar. Kol firhen, hoy mer maro baro Debleske marah, hi pale-čiddo pash i Egiptarya. Te marah mer kol firhen kote, kay i Egiptarya nay dikenn men, palle hadenn yon barra pre oun vitsrenn men lentsa moules." 
Exodus8:23 Triin divessa kamah mer te nashell dour an o moulo tato them dren, oun kote kamah mer maro baro Debleske firhen te marell, yaake har yob menge penas, te hounte kras kova.”" 
Exodus8:24 Kote penas o Farao: “Me moukau t'men te djal, te nay marenn firhen leske an o moulo tato them. Ma djan yaake dour krik! Oun mangenn t'maro Debles mange!”" 
Exodus8:25 Oun o Mose penas: “Ava, te djom me toutar vin, palle mangau o baro Deblestar, te djan i matsille, hoy čourye denn, taysar penge t'mendar lauterendar: toutar, o Farao, ninna tire pralstunendar oun tire tsele menshendar. Yek koova penau touke: Rike tiro lab! Ma pen pale, te moukals men te djal, te nay marah mer firhen o baro Debleske. – Oun palle moukeh tou men gar te djal.”" 
Exodus8:26 Oun o Mose djas vin dran o Faraeskro kheer oun mangas o baro Debles leske. 
Exodus8:27 Oun o baro Devel kras yaake har o Mose lestar mangas, oun las i tsele matsille, hoy čourye denn, krik o Faraestar oun leskre pralstunendar, ninna leskre tsele menshendar, yaake te ačas gar yek pral." 
Exodus8:28 Oun ninna kava kopo pandas o Farao peskro dji oun moukas i Israelitarya gar te djal. 
Exodus9:1 Kote penas o baro Devel ap o Mose: “Dja pash o Farao dren oun pen leske: Kava penell o baro Devel, o Devel pral i Hebrearya: Mouk mire menshen te djal, te nay mangenn le man an." 
Exodus9:2 Te moukeh len tou gar te djal, oun rikreh len pale pale," 
Exodus9:3 palle dikeh tou, te vell o baro Debleskro vast pral tire firhende: pral tire graya, tire bourike, tire khamele, tire groumya oun tire bakre oun bouzya. Yek baro nasslepen vell ap lende." 
Exodus9:4 Kava baro nasslepen vell gar ap i firhende, hoy i Israelitaryen hi. O baro Devel krell vavarčandes pash i Egiptarya har pash i Israelitarya. Kolendar merell kek firho.”" 
Exodus9:5 Ninna penas o baro Devel o tsiro, kaana yob kova krella, oun penas: “Taysar moukell o baro Devel kay bibarht pral o them te vell.”" 
Exodus9:6 Oun o baro Devel kras kova ap o vavar dives yaake. Oun i tsele firhe, hoy i Egiptaryen his, meran. Kol firhendar, hoy i Israelitaryen his, meras kek firho." 
Exodus9:7 Oun o Farao bičras morshen pash lende, te dikenn le palla, hoy i Israeltikre firhentsa hi. Oun har kolla koy his, dikan le, te meras pash lende kek lengre firhendar. Ninna kava kopo ačas o Faraeskro dji pandlo oun yob moukas i Israelitaryen gar te djal." 
Exodus9:8 Kote penas o baro Devel ap o Mose oun ap o Aron: “Lenn t'menge i douy vastentsa čik dran o bob vin, oun o Mose vitsrell lat glan o Faraeskre yaka pre an o bolepen." 
Exodus9:9 Palle vell i čik phourdedo pral o tselo them Egiptia. Oun i menshe oun i firhe taprenn i djoungelo nasslepen ap pengro mass.” 
Exodus9:10 Oun o Mose oun o Aron lan čik dran o bob oun djan glan o Farao. Oun o Mose vitsras koy čik pre an o bolepen. Koy tapran i menshe oun i firhe i djoungelo nasslepen ap pengro mass. 
Exodus9:11 Kava kopo nay van i dourkepangre gar glan o Mose, te krenn le yaake har yob. Ko djoungelo nasslepen his ninna ap lende har ap hako Egiptari." 
Exodus9:12 Oun o baro Devel pandas o Faraeskro dji, oun yob shounas gar ap lende. Yaake vas, hoy o baro Devel ap o Mose penas." 
Exodus9:13 Kote penas o baro Devel ap o Moseste: “Taysarla ste sik pre, dja glan o Farao oun pen ap leste: Kava penell o baro Devel, o Devel pral i Hebrearya: Mouk mire menshen te djal, te nay mangenn le man an." 
Exodus9:14 Te shouneh tou kava kopo pale gar, palle kamau me i djoungleder bibarht pral toute oun tire pralstunende oun pral tire tsele menshende te bičrell, te dikess oun hayvess, te hi kek ap kay phoub yaake har me." 
Exodus9:15 Me nay hadoms glan rah tsiro miro vast pre oun doms tout i nasslepah temerl, tout oun tire tsele menshen, yaake te vans t'mendar kek bouder ap kay phoub." 
Exodus9:16 Me moukom tout doleske djido, te dikess miri bari zoor, oun te rakrenn le mandar ap i tseli phoub." 
Exodus9:17 Tou patseh, tou nay kreh mire menshentsa, hoy kameh, oun moukeh len gar te djal." 
Exodus9:18 Dik, taysar an ko emligo tsiro moukau brishin te dell, hoy hi har barra. Kol brishineskre barra hi yaake baro, har an o them Egiptia gar das, yaake rah kava them della." 
Exodus9:19 Kanna pen, te lenn le i firhen dren. Oun kova, hoy vin tardo hi, te anenn le les khere. Lauter, hoy vin hi, menshe har firhe hounte merenna. ”" 
Exodus9:20 Kol Faraeskre pralstoune, kay daran, hoy o baro Devel penas, kolla moukan pengre boudepangren oun firhen an i khera te anell." 
Exodus9:21 Kolla, kay moukan penge kol laba, hoy o baro Devel penas, gar an o dji te djal, kolla moukan pengre boudepangren oun pengre firhen vin." 
Exodus9:22 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose: “Hade tiro vast pre ap o bolepen! Palle dell brishin, hoy hi har barra, ap i menshende, ap i firhende oun ap o tselo zenlepen ap i harhetikri phoub an o tselo them Egiptia.”" 
Exodus9:23 Kote hadas o Mose peskro kasht pre ap o bolepen. Oun o baro Devel moukas barrengro brishin ap i phoub te perell. Oun o bolepen das bari gole, oun das yag karye pral oun tele ap i phoub. Ko brishin, kay yag pral oun tele karye das, oun brishineskre barra ap i phoub peran, kova his yaake pharo, har gomme gar das, yaake rah har i menshe an o them Egiptia djivenna." 
Exodus9:24  
Exodus9:25 Oun kol brishineskre barra dan an o tselo them Egiptia lauter paash, hoy vin his: menshe har firhe, ninna o tselo zenlepen ap i harhetikri phoub. Oun i rouka van tele phagedo." 
Exodus9:26 Kokres an o them Gosen, kay i Israelitarya djivan, kote peras kek barrengro brishin tele." 
Exodus9:27 Kote bičras o Farao pash o Mose oun o Aron, te venn le, oun penas ap lende: “Kava kopo anom doosh ap mande. O baro Debles hi čačes. Man oun mire menshen hi gar čačo." 
Exodus9:28 Mang o baro Debles, te vell kanna o barrengro brishin doha, oun te dell o bolepen bouder gar gole! Palle moukau me t'men te djal, oun rikrau t'men bouder gar kay.”" 
Exodus9:29 O Mose penas leske: “Yaake sik har djom dran o foro vin, kamau mire vasta pre te hadell ap o baro Debleste. Palle dell o bolepen bouder kek gole, oun kek barrengro brishin perell bouder, te dikess oun hayvess, te hi i phoub o baro Debleske." 
Exodus9:30 Tou oun tire pralstoune, kova hayvom, t'mer darenna gomme gar o baro Deblestar.”" 
Exodus9:31 Yaake vas o djob paash dino, ninna ko zenlepen, hoy kharella Flaks. O djob his baro oun pherdo, oun o Flaks djas pre." 
Exodus9:32 O gib oun o vavar djob, hoy gomme gar pre djas, van gar paash dino." 
Exodus9:33 Palle djas o Mose vin dran o Faraeskro kheer oun dran o foro, oun hadas peskre vasta pre ap o baro Debleste. Oun o bolepen das bouder kek gole. Oun bouder kek barrengro brishin peras tele. Oun kek depen das bouder ap i phoub." 
Exodus9:34 Har o Farao dikas, te heras kova lauter pre, kras lo gar, hoy o baro Devel lestar kamella, oun pandas pale peskro dji. Oun yaake kran ninna i pralstoune an leskro them." 
Exodus9:35 Yaake vas čačo, hoy o baro Devel ap o Moseste penas oun o Mose i Israelenge doureder penas: O Faraeskro dji ačas pandlo, oun yob moukas i Israelitaryen gar te djal." 
Exodus10:1 Pal kova penas o baro Devel ap o Mose: “Dja pash o Farao dren! Me pandom leskro dji, ninna i djia leskre pralstunendar, te nay krom kava baro koova an miri zoor mashkral lende." 
Exodus10:2 Kova krom, te nay peness tou tire čavenge oun tire čavengre čavenge, har krom me ap i Egiptarya, oun havo baro koova me krom mank lende an miri zoor. T'mer hounte djinenn, te hom me o baro Devel.”" 
Exodus10:3 Kote djas o Mose oun o Aron pash o Farao dren oun penan ap leste: “Kava penell o baro Devel, o Devel pral i Hebrearya: Har rah kameh tou gar te dikell, kay hom zorleder har tou? Mouk mire menshen te djal, te nay mangenn le man an!" 
Exodus10:4 Te moukeh tou gar mire menshen te djal, palle kamau me taysar stepangre pral tiro them te bičrell." 
Exodus10:5 Kolla čakrenn o them, oun hi yaake boud, te nay dikeh i phoub bouder gar. Oun kolla rhan kova pre, hoy pral ačas, har o barrengro brishin peras oun boud djob paash das. Ninna i patria ap i rouka rhan le pre." 
Exodus10:6 Oun tiro kheer oun i khera, kay tire pralstoune oun i vavar Egiptarya djivenn, venn pherdo stepangre. Savo koova vas gar diklo an o them Egiptia, yaake rah har tire phoure an kava them djivan. ” Pal kova rissras pes o Mose oun djas peske dran o Faraeskro kheer vin." 
Exodus10:7 Kote penan i pralstoune ap o Farao: “Har rah anell kava morsh gomme bibarht pral mende? Mouk kol menshen te djal, te mangenn le lengro baro Debles an. Hayveh tou gar, te djal i tseli Egiptia nashedo?”" 
Exodus10:8 Kote pre vas o Mose oun o Aron pale glan o Farao anlo. Oun yob penas ap lende: “Djan oun mangenn t'maro baro Debles an! Koon hi kolla t'mendar, kay djan?”" 
Exodus10:9 Oun o Mose penas: “Mer djah i ternentsa oun i phourentsa, mare čaventsa oun čentsa. Ninna mare bakre, bouzya oun groumya lah mentsa. Mer kamah maro baro Debles te sharell oun leske firhen te marell.”" 
Exodus10:10 O Farao penas ap lende: “O baro Debleskri barht pral t'mende! Patseh tou čačepah, kay me moukau t'men t'mare čaventsa te djal? Ap kova dikenn, te hi t'men čilačepen an o shero." 
Exodus10:11 Na-a, yaake gar! T'mer morsha kokres, djan oun mangenn t'maro baro Debles an! Kova hi, hoy t'mer kaman.” Oun yon tradan len dran o Faraeskro kheer vin." 
Exodus10:12 Kote penas o baro Devel ap o Mose: “Hade tiro vast pral o them Egiptia pre, te venn i stepangre pral o tselo them, oun rhan lauter hoy pral ačas, har o barrengro brishin ap o them peras.”" 
Exodus10:13 Oun o Mose hadas peskro kasht pral o them Egiptia. Kote moukas o baro Devel ko tselo dives oun i tseli rat yek zorelo dourho pral o them te phourdell, hoy vas katar, kay o kham pre djal. Oun taysarlakro phourdas ko dourho i stepangre an o them." 
Exodus10:14 Oun yaake van i stepangre pral o tselo them Egiptia. Yon his yaake boud, har gomme gar koy his oun gar bouder venna," 
Exodus10:15 oun čakran i phoub, yaake te vas o tselo them kales. Oun yon rhan o tselo zenlepen oun lauter, hoy ap i rouka baro vas, hoy pral ačas, har o barrengro brishin ap o them peras. Kek zenlepen ačas pral ap i rouka oun ap i harhetikri phoub an o tselo them Egiptia." 
Exodus10:16 Kote moukas o Farao o Moses oun o Arones sik gole te dell, oun penas ap lende: “Me anom doosh ap mande glan t'maro baro Debleste, oun ninna glan t'mende." 
Exodus10:17 Yaake mangau t'men, bistrenn miri doosh kokres kava yek kopo, oun mangenn t'maro baro Debles, te lell lo kava merepen mandar krik.”" 
Exodus10:18 Oun o Mose djas vin dran o Faraeskro kheer oun mangas o baro Debles leske. 
Exodus10:19 Oun o baro Devel kras, te phourdas ko baro dourho kanna zoreles katar, kay o kham tele djal. Oun ko dourho hadas i stepangre pre oun vitsras len an o baro pani, hoy kharella Baro Lolo Pani. An o tselo them Egiptia ačas kek stepaskro pral." 
Exodus10:20 Ninna kava kopo pandas o baro Devel o Faraeskro dji. Oun yob moukas i Israelitaryen gar te djal. 
Exodus10:21 Kote penas o baro Devel ap o Mose: “Hade tiro vast pre pash o bolepen! Palle vell savi kali rat pral o tselo them Egiptia, kay dikeh nay tiro vast gar glan i yaka.”" 
Exodus10:22 Oun o Mose hadas peskro vast pash o bolepen pre. Kote vas i kali rat pral o tselo them Egiptia. Triin divessa ačas li. 
Exodus10:23 Yaake kales his, te nay dikas yek o vavares gar. Oun kek stas kote pre, kay yob his. Pash i Israelitarya his dives, kote kay yon djivan." 
Exodus10:24 Kote moukas o Farao o Moses gole te dell, oun penas ap leste: “Djan oun mangenn t'maro baro Debles an! Ninna t'mare romya oun čave nay djan t'mentsa. Kokres t'mare bakren, bouzya oun groumyen moukenn kay!”" 
Exodus10:25 O Mose penas: “Na-a, ninna te kamals tou men firhen te dell, hoy mer maro baro Debleske marah oun rhah, ninna saven, hoy mer leske tseles rhačrah," 
Exodus10:26 ninna palle djan mare tsele firhe mentsa. Kek heri lendar nay ačella kay. Kol firhendar lah mer, te das len maro baro Debleske. Oun mer djinah gar, have firhe te maras mer leske ap o drom, kote kay djah.”" 
Exodus10:27 Oun pale pandas o baro Devel o Faraeskro dji, te moukas lo len pale gar te djal." 
Exodus10:28 Oun o Farao penas ap leste: “Dja touke mandar! Oun de tout yak, te vess bouder gar glan mire yaka! Ap ko dives, kay tou pale glan mire yaka veh, dau tout moulo.”" 
Exodus10:29 Koy penas o Mose: “Yaake har tou penal, me vau touke bouder gar glan tire yaka.”" 
Exodus11:1 Palle penas o baro Devel ap o Mose: “Yek vavar bibarht kamau me pral o Farao oun pral o tselo them Egiptia te anell. Pal koya moukell lo t'men te djal. Oun kova hi gar doha: yob tradell t'men vin. 
Exodus11:2 Yaake pen kanna ap i Israelitarya, te mangell hako rom peske roup oun sonakay ko egiptikro morshestar, kay langs leste djivella. Ninna haki romni mangell kova koy egiptikri djouvyatar, kay langs late djivella.”" 
Exodus11:3 Oun o baro Devel kras, te venn i Egiptarya lačes ap lende. Ninna his o Mose boud an-diklo an o them Egiptia an i yaka kol pralstunendar an o Faraeskro kheer oun ninna pash i tsele Egiptarya." 
Exodus11:4 Har his o Mose gomme pash o Farao, penas lo leske: “Kava penell o baro Devel: Mashkral an i rat kamau me mank o them Egiptia te djal." 
Exodus11:5 Palle merenna i tsele morsh čave an o them Egiptia, kay hi i phoureder čave pengre dayendar: o Faraeskro phoureder čavo, kay ap o rayeskri beshepaskri beshdo hi, oun ninna o phoureder čavo kol djouvyatar, kay dran o djob yarro krella. Oun ninna kol morsh firhe, kay hi i phoureder čave pengre dayendar hounte merenn." 
Exodus11:6 Oun palle vell i baro ropen an o tselo them Egiptia, yaake har his gomme kek ropen oun vell bouder kek ropen." 
Exodus11:7 Hi vavarčandes pash i Israelitarya. Kote dell kek djouklo gole, gar ap i mensheste, vitar gar ap i firheste. Yaake te dikenn oun hayvenn t'mer, te djinell o baro Devel, koon Egiptari hi oun koon Israelitari hi." 
Exodus11:8 Palle venna tire pralstoune lauter pash mande oun vitsrenn pen glan mire pire tele oun mangenn man an oun penenn: Djan t'menge, tou oun tire tsele menshe, djan! Oun palle djah mer menge.” Oun moulo rhoyedo djas o Mose peske dran o Faraeskro kheer vin." 
Exodus11:9 Yaake vas kova čačo, hoy o baro Devel penas ap o Mose: “O Farao shounella gar ap t'mende, yaake te krau boud oun baro koova, oun sikrau miri zoor an o tselo them Egiptia.”" 
Exodus11:10 Oun o Mose oun o Aron kran ko tselo baro koova an o Debleskri zoor glan o Farao. Oun o baro Devel pandas leskro dji, te moukas lo i Israelitaryen gar dran peskro them te djal." 
Exodus12:1 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose oun ap o Aron an o them Egiptia: 
Exodus12:2 “Kava čon vell t'menge o ersto čon an o bersh. 
Exodus12:3 Rakrenn ap i tsele Israelitarya oun penenn: Ap o deshto dives an kava čon lell peske hako dad i terno bakro peskre menshenge an peskro kheer. 
Exodus12:4 Te hi gar doha menshe an leskro kheer, te rhan le ko tselo bakro, palle rhan le les khetne kol menshentsa, kay langs lende djivenna. Hakenes te vell i kotar mass." 
Exodus12:5 Lenn yek firho, hoy sasto hi, i morsh, hoy yek bersh phouro hi, nay vell i bakrendar, nay vell i bouzyendar." 
Exodus12:6 Oun rikrenn les pash t'mende bis ap o deesh-te-starto dives. Rati ap ko dives, hounte marell haki Israeltikri familya peskro bakro." 
Exodus12:7 Palle lenn le ko rat oun makenn les ap kol kashta, hoy čačes oun serves pash o voudar hi, oun pral o voudar ninna, an ko kheer, kay rhan le o bakro." 
Exodus12:8 Ko mass vell peklo pral i yag. Oun yon hounte rhan les an koy rat khetne o maro, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi. Oun shoutlo zenlepen rhan le pashel." 
Exodus12:9 Ma rhan ko mass yales, vitar gar keredo an o pani! Pral i yag vell o tselo bakro peklo, o shero, i herya, ninna i bouke." 
Exodus12:10 Či kolestar ačell pral bis ap o vavar dives. Te ačas čomone pral, hounte rhačrenn kova." 
Exodus12:11 Yaake hounte rhan les: troul t'maro per i dori pandlo, i kirrha ap t'mare herya, oun i kasht an t'maro vast. Rhan o rhapen sik! Ko rhapen kharell Passa. T'mer rhan les, te sharenn man, t'maro baro Debles." 
Exodus12:12 Oun me djau an kaya rat mashkral o tselo them Egiptia, oun dau i tsele morsh čaven temerl, kay hi i phoureder čave pengre dayendar, kolla, kay i menshestar, ninna i firhestar boldo van. Yaake dau me kolende lauterende i phagi, kay kharenn pen devel, oun kolen i Egiptarya an-mangenna. Me hom o baro Devel." 
Exodus12:13 O rat ap i khera sikrell mande, kay t'mer han. Oun dikau me o rat, djau me doureder, te djal t'menge či. Oun ko merepen, hoy anau ap o them Egiptia, vell gar ap t'mende." 
Exodus12:14 Bistrenn kava dives gar! Krenn lestar i baro dives, kay sharenn o baro Debles, t'mer oun t'mare čave, kay venna pal t'mende! Hako bersh vell kava yaake pash t'mende kerdo kanna oun hako tsiro." 
Exodus12:15 Efta divessa rhan t'mer maro, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi. Ap o ersto dives čivenn t'mer o shoutlo yarro krik. Kova, kay an kol efta divessa maro rhal, kay shoutlo yarro dren hi, kova vell pale-čiddo, oun hounte djivell bouder gar mank i Israelitarya." 
Exodus12:16 Ap o ersto dives avenn khetne, te mangenn man an. Ninna ap o eftato dives krenn kova! Ma boudrenn ap kol douy divessa! Kokres o rhapen, hoy hakeno rhala, nay krenn t'mer." 
Exodus12:17 Rikrenn t'men ap kal laba: An kol efta divessa rhan t'mer maro, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi. Ap kava dives lom me t'men lauteren dran o them Egiptia vin. Doleske rikrenn t'men ap kava, oun krenn kova hako bersh, t'mer oun t'mare čave, kay venna pal t'mende hako tsiro." 
Exodus12:18 An o ersto čon ap o deesh-te-starto dives ap i rat rhan t'mer maro, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi, bis ap o biish-te-yekto dives ap i rat." 
Exodus12:19 Efta divessa hounte vell kek shoutlo yarro an t'mare khera hatslo. Hakeno, kay maro rhala, kay shoutlo yarro dren hi, vell pale-čiddo, oun hounte djivell bouder gar mashkral i Israelitarya. Kova nay vell i vi-themari, ninna i Israelitari." 
Exodus12:20 Ma rhan shoutlo maro, kay t'mer ninna djivenn! Rhan kokres maro, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi!”" 
Exodus12:21 Oun o Mose moukas i tsele phoureden i menshendar Israel pash peste te vell, oun penas ap lende: “Lenn t'menge t'mare familyenge bakre vin ko rhapaske, hoy kharella Passa! Marenn len!" 
Exodus12:22 Palle lenn patria kol kashtestar, hoy kharella Hysop, oun rikrenn len an ko čaro, hoy o rat dren hi! Oun makenn lentsa o rat vin pral o voudar oun ap kol douy kashta, hoy čačes oun serves pash o voudar hi! Oun kek t'mendar djal dran o voudar vin koy tseli rati." 
Exodus12:23 Oun o baro Devel djala mashkral o them, te dell lo i Egiptarya temerl. Te dikell lo o rat pral ap o voudar oun ap kol douy kashta, hoy čačes oun serves pash o voudar hi, palle djal yob doureder oun moukell koles, kay anell o merepen, gar pash t'mende dren te djal, te dell lo yekes t'mendar temerl." 
Exodus12:24 Doleske rikrenn t'men ap kal laba, t'mer oun t'mare čave, kay venna pal t'mende, kanna oun hako tsiro." 
Exodus12:25 Ninna an ko tsiro, kay venn t'mer an ko them, hoy o baro Devel t'menge peskro lab das, te anell yob t'men koy dren, krenn pal kal laba!" 
Exodus12:26 Oun te poučenna t'mare čave t'mendar: Hoske krah mer kova? 
Exodus12:27 Palle penenn lenge: Kava bakro, hoy maram ap ko dives, hoy kharella Passa, kava bakro maram o baro Debleske. Har das yob an o them Egiptia i Egiptarya temerl, djas yob gar an i khera, kay i Israelitarya djivan. Yob djas doureder. I menshe an mare khera moukas lo te djivell. ” Kote vitsran pen i Israelitarya tele oun mangan o Debles an." 
Exodus12:28 Palle djan le oun kran yaake, har o baro Devel o Moseske oun o Aroneske penas." 
Exodus12:29 Oun mashkral an i rat maras o baro Devel i tsele morsh čaven, kay his i phoureder čave pengre dayendar, an o tselo them Egiptia: o Faraeskro phoureder čaves, kay ap o rayeskri beshepaskri beshdo hi, oun ninna i phoureder čaven kolendar, kay stilde hi. Ava, ninna i morsh firhe, hoy his i phoureder čave pengre dayendar, van temerl dino." 
Exodus12:30 Koy rati stas o Farao pre, ninna i tsele pralstoune oun i tsele Egiptarya, oun kote djas i ropaskri gole an, hoy o dji činella. O merepen his an hako kheer." 
Exodus12:31 Oun o Farao moukas an kaya rat o Moses oun o Arones gole te dell oun penas ap lende: “Sik, moukenn kava them, t'mer oun i vavar Israelitarya! Djan t'menge mire menshendar krik! Djan oun mangenn t'maro baro Debles an, yaake har t'mer kaman." 
Exodus12:32 Lenn t'mare bakre oun bouzya oun t'mare groumya, yaake har t'mer kaman! Oun djan oun mangenn t'maro baro Debles, te vell lo mange lačes.”" 
Exodus12:33 Oun i tsele Egiptarya mangan len, te djan le yaake sik har djala, oun tradan len dran o them. Yon penan penge: “Te djan le gar sik, hounte meras mer lauter.”" 
Exodus12:34 Yaake lan i Israelitarya i čare, kay ko maro dren hi, hoy gomme gar peklo vas, oun kay kek shoutlo yarro dren his, oun čivan kol čare an pengre koola, oun hidjran len ap pengro phik." 
Exodus12:35 Oun i Israelitarya kran pal i laba, hoy o Mose ap lende penas, oun djan pash i Egiptarya oun moukan pen lendar roupeno oun sonakaskro koova te dell, ninna shoukar ripya." 
Exodus12:36 Oun o baro Devel das i Egiptaryen an o dji, te venn le kamles ap i Israelitarya, yaake te nay mangens le, hoy yon kaman. Oun i Egiptarya dan len lauter. Yaake lan i Israelitarya kolendar lengro bravlepen krik oun lan les lentsa." 
Exodus12:37 Oun i Israelitarya djan vin dran o foro Ramses oun djan pash o foro Soukot. Kokres i morsha his 600.000 (shob-sheel-zerya). Ninna lengre romya oun čave his pashel. 
Exodus12:38 Lentsa djan ninna boud menshe, kay his kek Israelitarya, ninna boud boud bakre, bouzya oun groumya." 
Exodus12:39 I Israelitarya moukan o them Egiptia yaake sik, te nay čivan le kek rhapen penge khetne, te lan le les lentsa ap o drom. Kokres kol mare, hoy gar peklo his, lan le peha. Kolla mare, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi, pekan le kanna." 
Exodus12:40 Ko tsiro, kay i Israelitarya an o them Egiptia djivan, his 430 (star-sheel-te-triyanda) bersha." 
Exodus12:41 Oun har kal bersha trouyel his, ap ko dives, djan o baro Debleskre menshe vin dran o them Egiptia." 
Exodus12:42 Koya rat, kay o baro Devel kokres ap lende garda das, te lell lo len vin dran o them Egiptia, kaya rat hounte vell o baro Debleske an hako bersh. An kaya rat hounte ačenn i Israelitarya pre, te sovenn le gar. Yaake sharenn le o baro Debles." 
Exodus12:43 Oun o baro Devel rakras ap o Mose oun ap o Aron: “Hako kopo, kay rhan t'mer o rhapen, hoy kharella Passa, rikrenn t'men ap kal laba: Kek vi-themari rhal kava rhapen." 
Exodus12:44 Hako ginlo boudepaskro vell činlo ap peskro mass. Palle nay rhal lo ko Passa. 
Exodus12:45 I vi-themari, kay djivell yek tsiro pash t'mende, kova hounte rhal gar ko Passa, vitar kek boudepaskro, kay boudrell i lovenge t'menge." 
Exodus12:46 Ko tselo mass vell an o kheer rhalo. Kek kotar mass hidjress tou vin glan o voudar! Oun kek kokale phagess tou! 
Exodus12:47 I tsele Israelitarya hounte rhan ko Passa. 
Exodus12:48 Te djivell i vi-themari pash t'mende, kay kamell o baro Debleske o Passa te rhal, palle hounte vell hako morsh an leskri familya činlo ap peskro mass. Kova te kras lo, palle vell lo, oun nay rhal lo. Oun yob vell har yek t'mendar. Kova, kay gar činlo hi ap peskro mass, kova rhal ko Passa gar." 
Exodus12:49 Ko lab hi t'menge oun kolenge dran vavar themma, kay mashkral t'mende djivenna.”" 
Exodus12:50 Har i tsele Israelitarya shounan, hoy o baro Devel ap o Mose oun ap o Aron penas, kran le les yaake har yon lenge penan." 
Exodus12:51 Oun ap kava dives anas o baro Devel i tsele Israeleskre familyen vin dran o them Egiptia, yek familya pal i vavar." 
Exodus13:1 Pal kova rakras o baro Devel ap o Moseste oun penas: 
Exodus13:2 “Hako morsh čavo, kay hi o phoureder peskri datar pash i Israelitarya, ninna pash lengre firhende, dess tou mange. Kova hi miro.”" 
Exodus13:3 Oun o Mose penas ap i tsele menshende: “Kava dives an o čon Abib djan t'mer vin dran o them Egiptia. Kote, kay t'mer pandle boudepangre hans, las t'men o baro Devel peskro zorelo vasteha vin. Rikrenn kava dives an t'mare shere! Oun rhan kek shoutlo maro!" 
Exodus13:4  
Exodus13:5 O baro Devel das pes sovel glan t'mare phourende, te dell lo t'men ko them, kay djivenn kanna i Kanaanitarya, i Hetarya, i Amorarya, i Hivarya oun i Yebousarya. Kova hi i them, kay hi boud thoud oun gvin dren. Ap ko tsiro, kay anas t'men o baro Devel an ko them, krenn pale yaake hako bersh an o čon Abib:" 
Exodus13:6 Efta divessa rhan t'mer maro, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi. Oun o eftato dives vell i baro dives, kay venn khetne o baro Debleske." 
Exodus13:7 Kol efta divessa rhan t'mer maro, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi. Oun kek shoutlo yarro, vitar kek shoutlo maro, vell pash t'mende diklo, kote kay djivenna." 
Exodus13:8 Oun ap kava dives penenn t'mer t'mare čavenge: O baro Devel anas men dran o them Egiptia vin. Doleske rikrah mer kova. 
Exodus13:9 Kava vell touke har i sikepen ap tiro vast, oun i sikepen mashkral tire yaka, te bistress tou kova gar, oun peness i vavarenge, har las tout o baro Devel peskro zorelo vasteha vin dran o them Egiptia." 
Exodus13:10 Yaake rikress tou kal laba hako bersh an o emligo tsiro. 
Exodus13:11 Ap ko tsiro, kay anas t'men o baro Devel an o them, har yob pes glan toute oun tire phourende sovel das, te dell lo les t'mende, – ko them, kay kanna i Kanaanitarya djivenna, –" 
Exodus13:12 aness tou leske i tsele morsh čaven, kay hi i phoureder čave pengre dayendar. Ninna hako morsh firho, hoy hi o phoureder ternepen peskri datar, hi o baro Debleske." 
Exodus13:13 Te hi ko firho i bourikakro ternepen, hounte dess tou kova leste gar. Tou nay deh i terno bakro. Te kameh tou kova gar te krell, palle phage koy bourikake i meen! Hako phoureder morsh čaveske maress tou i firho." 
Exodus13:14 An ko tsiro, hoy vella, te poučenn toutar tire čave: Hoske kreh tou kova? palle peness tou ap lende: O baro Devel las men i zorelo vasteha vin dran o them Egiptia, kay hounte boudram tel dava." 
Exodus13:15 Har pandas o Farao peskro dji oun moukas men gar te djal, maras o baro Devel an o tselo them Egiptia i tsele morsh čaven, kay his i phoureder čave pengre dayendar pash i menshende oun ninna pash i firhende. Doleske dau me ko phoureder morsh ternepen, hoy i firhestar boldo vella, o baro Debleske. Pash mire čavende hi vavarčandes. Hako phoureder morsh čaveske marau i firho." 
Exodus13:16 Kava vell touke har i sikepen ap o vast oun mashkral tire yaka, te bistress gar, te las men o baro Devel peskro zorelo vasteha dran o them Egiptia vin.”" 
Exodus13:17 Oun har moukas o Farao i menshen te djal, anas len o baro Devel gar mashkral o them, kay i Filistarya djivenn, ninna te his kava drom o tikneder. O baro Devel penas peske: “Te dikenn i Israelitarya, kay hounte kourenn le pen, nay khaytals len kova. Oun yon kamenn pale pale an o them Egiptia te djal.”" 
Exodus13:18 Doleske moukas lo len i baro drom troul o Filistarengro them te djal. Ko drom anas len an o moulo tato them pash ko baro pani, hoy kharella Baro Lolo Pani. Oun i Israelitarya djan penge dran o them Egiptia yaake har te djan le an o kourepen." 
Exodus13:19 O Mose las o Yosefeskre kokale peha. Har o Yosef meras, penas lo ap peskre phralende: “O Devel bistrell t'men gar oun lell t'men vin dran kava them. Denn t'men sovel, te lenn palle ninna mire kokale t'mentsa.”" 
Exodus13:20 Oun yon moukan o foro Soukot oun djan doureder oun van an Etam, kay pash o moulo tato them čiddo hi oun ačan kote i tsiro." 
Exodus13:21 O baro Devel djas glan lende ap o dives an i bari folka, te anell lo len ap o čačo drom, oun rati an i bari yag, te vell lenge i momeli, yaake te nay djan le ap o dives oun ninna an i rat." 
Exodus13:22 Oun koy folka djas peske gar, oun ačas glan lende ap o dives. Oun koy yag djas peske gar lendar an i rat." 
Exodus14:1 Oun o baro Devel rakras ap o Moseste oun penas: 
Exodus14:2 “Pen, te rissrenn pen i Israelitarya, oun te djan le pash ko foro Pi-Hahirot mashkral Migdol oun o baro pani. Glan Baal-Zefon ap i vavar rig pash o baro pani ačenn!" 
Exodus14:3 O Farao patsella palle: Yon nashran pen an o moulo them oun hatsenn kek drom vin. 
Exodus14:4 Palle pandau me leskro dji, te lell lo len palla. Oun me sikrau miro barepen oun miri zoor ap leste oun ap leskre tsele lourdende. Oun i Egiptarya hayvenn: Me hom o baro Devel.” Oun i Israelitarya kran yaake har o Mose lenge penas." 
Exodus14:5 Har o rayeske pral o them Egiptia penlo vas, te nashan i Israelitarya penge, khaytas les oun leskre pralstunen, te moukan le len te djal. Oun yon penan: “Hoske kram mer kova, te moukam i Israelitarya te djal? Mer nashram mare boudepangren!”" 
Exodus14:6 Yaake moukas o Farao peskro kourepaskro vourdin te anell, oun las peskre lourden peha." 
Exodus14:7 Ninna las lo peskre shob-sheel feteder vourdya peha, oun i tsele vavar vourdya, hoy an o them Egiptia hi. Ap hako vourdin his kourepangre tardo." 
Exodus14:8 Oun o baro Devel pandas o Faraeskro dji, yaake te las yob i Israelitarya palla, har yon i hadede vastentsa barhteles vin djan." 
Exodus14:9 Oun i Egiptarya lan len palla pengre grayentsa, vourdyentsa oun morshentsa. I tsele rayeskre lourde lan len palla, oun dikan len, har his le beshdo pash o baro pani pash ko foro Pi-Hahirot glan o foro Baal-Zefon." 
Exodus14:10 Har i Israelitarya pre dikan, oun dikan, te lell len o Farao peskre lourdentsa palla, vas i bari traash pral lende. Oun yon dan ap o baro Debleste gole." 
Exodus14:11 Oun yon penan ap o Moseste: “Lal tou men doleske kay an o moulo tato them, te meras kate? His an o them Egiptia kek phoub, te vas mer paskedo? Hoske kral tou kova, oun lal men dran o them Egiptia vin?" 
Exodus14:12 Penam touke gar, har hams an o them Egiptia: Mouk tele mendar! Mer kamah i Egiptarenge te boudrell. Feteder i Egiptarenge te boudrell, har kate an o moulo them te merell.”" 
Exodus14:13 O Mose penas ap i tsele menshende: “Ma darenn! Ačenn zoreles! Dikenn har o baro Devel t'men kava dives vin lell dran i vasta kol Egiptarendar! Kal Egiptaryen, kay t'mer kava dives dikenna, kolen dikenn t'mer bouder gar, vitar gar an ko tsiro, hoy vella." 
Exodus14:14 O baro Devel kourell pes t'menge. T'mer hounte krenn či.” 
Exodus14:15 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Hoske deh tou ap mande gole? Pen ap i Israelitarya, te djan le doureder!" 
Exodus14:16 Tou, hade tiro kasht pre oun tiro vast pral o baro pani, te krell lo pes pre oun djal ap douy rigya. Yaake te nay djan i Israelitarya mashkral o baro pani ap i drom, hoy gar sapenes hi." 
Exodus14:17 Me krau, te pandenn i Egiptarya pengre djia yaake, te lenn le t'menge palla. Oun me sikrau miro barepen oun miri zoor ap o Farao, ap leskre vourdya oun ap leskre kourepangre." 
Exodus14:18 Palle dikenn i Egiptarya, te hom me o baro Devel, te sikrom me miro barepen oun miri zoor ap o Farao, ap leskre vourdya oun leskre kourepangre.”" 
Exodus14:19 Oun o Debleskro bolepaskro, kay djal glan i Israelitarya, stas pre oun djas pal lende. Oun koy bari folka glan lende hadas pes, oun čivas pes pal lende yaake," 
Exodus14:20 te vas li mashkral i Egiptarya oun i Israelitarya. Oun yoy his kali glan i Egiptarya. Pash i Israelitarya his li i momeli an i rat. Oun i tseli rat nay van i Egiptarya gar pash lende. 
Exodus14:21 Oun o Mose hadas peskro vast pral o baro pani. Oun o baro Devel moukas i baro zorelo dourho pral o pani te phourdell, hoy vas kotar, kay o kham pre djal. Ko dourho phourdas i tseli rat. Oun o baro pani djas pale. Kote, kay pani his, hi kanna phoub, hoy gar sapenes hi. Oun o baro pani kras pes pre, te vas i drom." 
Exodus14:22 Koy djan i tsele Israelitarya mashkral o baro pani ap i drom, hoy gar sapenes hi. Oun o pani his tardo ap i čači rig, ninna ap i servi rig lendar, har bare barra troul i foro tardo hi." 
Exodus14:23 I Egiptarya lan len palla. Oun kol tsele rayeskre graya oun kourepangre vourdya, ninna i lourde djan pal lende ap o drom mank o baro pani." 
Exodus14:24 Sik taysarlakro, har o kham gomme gar pre djas, dikas o baro Devel dran koy yagakri folka tele ap i tsele Egiptikre lourdende oun čivas i daar ap lende." 
Exodus14:25 Lengre vourdya ačan an i čik yaake te van le phares glan. Oun i Egiptarya penan: “O baro Devel kourell pes lenge oun hi ap lengri rig. Djas menge katar!” 
Exodus14:26 O baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Hade tiro vast pral o baro pani, te vell o pani pale oun perell ap i Egiptarya, lengre vourdya oun kourepangre.”" 
Exodus14:27 Kote hadas o Mose peskro vast pral o baro pani. Oun har o kham pre djas, vas o pani pale oun peras ap kol Egiptarya, kay ap o naashepen his. Yaake tradas len o baro Devel mashkral an o baro pani." 
Exodus14:28 Oun o baro pani vas pale pale oun čakras i tsele vourdya oun kolen, kay klissan, oun i tsele rayeskre lourden, kay djan lenge mashkral o pani palla. Kolendar his kek, kay pral ačas." 
Exodus14:29 Yaake djan i Israelitarya mashkral o baro pani ap i vavar rig. Yon djan ap i drom, hoy gar sapenes hi. Oun o pani his tardo ap i čači rig, ninna ap i servi rig lendar, har bare barra, hoy troul i foro tardo hi." 
Exodus14:30 Yaake las o baro Devel i Israelitaryen ap kava dives vin dran o vast i Egiptarendar. Oun i Israelitarya dikan i moule Egiptaryen pash o baro pani čiddo. 
Exodus14:31 Yaake dikan le, havi bari zoryah o baro Devel i Egiptaryen das. Oun i Israelitarya daran o baro Deblestar, oun patsan, hoy penas yob oun o Mose, koles leskro čačo vast his." 
Exodus15:1 An kova tsiro givas o Mose oun i Israelitarya kaya gili, oun yon penan: Me kamau te givap i gili o baro Debleske. Baro oun zorelo hi lo! Graya oun morsha vitsras lo an o baro pani." 
Exodus15:2 Peskri zoryah vas o baro Devel ap miri rig. Miri gilyah sharau les dran o dji. Yob las man vin. Miro Devel hi lo, oun me kamau les te sharell. Miro dadeskro Devel hi lo, oun me kamau les pre te hadell." 
Exodus15:3 I kourepaskro hi lo. Leskro lab hi čačo: Baro Devel kharell lo. 
Exodus15:4 I vourdya oun i lourden, hoy o Farao bičras, an o baro pani – mo Devel len vitsras. I zorele kourepangre, hoy ap i vourdya djan, an o Baro Lolo Pani yon lauter sik tassan." 
Exodus15:5 I panya van oun len čakran; har barra djan le tele, har barra djan le tele." 
Exodus15:6 Tou, mo baro Devel, har zorelo hi tiro čačo vast! Tou, baro Devel, tiro čačo vasteha dal tou kolen an kotya, kay kouran pen touha." 
Exodus15:7 Raylo oun baro hal, oun khetne stakral, koon pes pral toute hadas. Tiri rholi vas har i yag pral lende. Har i yag o phouss rhačrell, yaake lendar či ačell." 
Exodus15:8 Tou phourdal tiro dourho, oun o pani hadas pes bares pre, oun ačas tardo har i kheer, oun nashas gar bouder." 
Exodus15:9 I Egiptarya penan: Las len palla, las len dren! Las menge, hoy lengro hi! Hakenes hi doha koy! Las mare rhare, das len temerl!" 
Exodus15:10 Tou phourdal tiro dourho, – oun o baro pani čakras len. Yon tassan oun djan tele har saster an o baro pani." 
Exodus15:11 Kek hi yaake har tou, o baro Devel. Kek hi yaake har tou mank lauterende, kay kharenn pen Devel! Tou hal o čačo Devel, oun kek vavar hi yaake zorelo har tou! Tou kral dareno koova, hoy kek vavar nay krella." 
Exodus15:12 Tou hadal tiri čači moussi, oun i phoub rhas kolen pre, kay hadan pen pral toute." 
Exodus15:13 Tire menshenge kamlo hal, kolenge, kay tou i zoryah vin lal oun ap i lačo drom anal, hoy pash tiro Debleskro kheer djal." 
Exodus15:14 An i vavar themma i menshe shounan, hoy tou tire menshenge kral. I daar tapras len oun yon trissan, ninna kol menshen, kay an o them Filistia djivan." 
Exodus15:15 I bare raya an o them Edom trashan, oun kol zorele raya an o them Moab trissan. I tsele menshe an o them Kanaan daran, ava, lauteren tapras i daar." 
Exodus15:16 I trashatar his le har bango. Tiri zoryatar van le har barra, har tou moukal tire menshen glan lende vin te djal, tire menshen, kay tou touke vin rodal, baro Devel." 
Exodus15:17 Tou aneh len ap i berga, hoy tou touke vin rodal, kote, kay tou khere hal, te djivenn le pash toute. Koya berga hi tiro kheer, baro Devel, hoy tou touke tire vastentsa kral, te vess kote sharedo." 
Exodus15:18 O baro Devel hi o baro ray kanna oun hako tsireske. 
Exodus15:19 Ap ko tsiro har o Farao oun leskre graya oun vourdya oun kourepangre mashkral an o baro pani djan, moukas o baro Devel o pani pral lende pale te vell. I tsele Israelitarya djan ap i drom, hoy gar sapenes his, mashkral o baro pani ap i vavar rig." 
Exodus15:20 Oun i Miryam, o Aroneskri pheen, his i Debleskri rakepaskretsa. Oun yoy las peskri bashepaskri, hoy kharella pauka, an o vast, oun i tsele djouvya lan ninna pengre bashepangre, oun djan lake palla, oun bashran oun khelan." 
Exodus15:21 Oun i Miryam givas lenge glan: Me kamau te givap i gili o baro Debleske. Baro oun zorelo hi lo! Graya oun morsha vitsras lo an o baro pani. 
Exodus15:22 Oun i Israelitarya moukan o Baro Lolo Pani pal pende. Oun o Mose anas len an o moulo tato them, hoy kharella Shour. Oun yon djan triin divessa trouyel an o moulo them, oun hatsan kek pani." 
Exodus15:23 Palle van le pash i pani. Ko pani his shoutlo, oun yon nay piyan les gar. Doleske kharan le les Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Oun i menshe van rhoyedo ap o Moseste oun penan: “Hoy piyas mer?” 
Exodus15:25 Koy das lo gole ap o baro Debleste. Oun o baro Devel sikras les i kotar kasht. Kova vitsras lo an o pani, oun o pani vas lačo. Kote das o baro Devel len laba, hoy sikrenna, hoy lo lendar kamell, oun har te djivenn le an leskro čačepen. Oun kote kamas lo ninna te dikell, te shounenn le ap leste." 
Exodus15:26 Oun yob penas: “Te shouneh tou ap mande, tiro baro Debleste, oun kreh, hoy me penau, lauter, hoy an mire yaka čačo hi, oun rikreh tout ap mire laba oun kreh, hoy me toutar kamau, palle čivau me kek nasslepen ap toute, hoy čivom ap i Egiptarya. Me hom o baro Devel, kay tout sasto krell.”" 
Exodus15:27 Pal kova van le ap koy platsa, hoy kharella Elim. Oun kote his deesh-te-douy panyengre oun efta-deesh palmtikre rouka. Kote pash o pani ačan le." 
Exodus16:1 An o douyto čon, ap o deesh-te-pančto dives pal ko dives, kay yon penge dran o them Egiptia djan, moukan le koy platsa Elim oun djan doureder. Oun i tsele Israelitarya van an o moulo tato them Sin. Kova hi mashkral Elim oun i berga Sinay." 
Exodus16:2 Kote an o moulo tato them van le rhoyedo ap o Moseste oun o Aroneste. 
Exodus16:3 Oun yon penan: “Vals feteder, te dals men o baro Devel moulo an o them Egiptia, har hams beshdo pash i pirya pherdo mass, oun kay his men doha maro, te nay rham men čalo. T'mer anan men kate an o moulo tato them, te meras halauter i bokatar.”" 
Exodus16:4 Kote rakras o baro Devel ap o Moseste: “Me moukau t'menge maro dran o bolepen tele te perell. Pen i menshenge te djan le hako dives vin, te lenn le penge yaake boud, har yon an yek dives nay rhan. Yaake nay dikap me palla, te kamenn le čačepah pal miro lab te djivell." 
Exodus16:5 Ap o shobto dives lenn le douy kope yaake boud khetne har hako dives oun pekenn les.” 
Exodus16:6 Oun o Mose oun o Aron penan ap i tsele Israelitarya: “Kava dives ap i rat dikenn t'mer, te hi kova o baro Devel, kay las t'men vin dran o them Egiptia." 
Exodus16:7 Oun taysarlakro dikenn t'mer o raylepen o baro Deblestar. Yob shounas, har t'mer t'men ap leste rhoyran. Har rhoyran t'men ap mende, rhoyran t'men čačepah ap leste, gar ap mende. Hoy ham mer, te rhoyrenn t'men ap mende?”" 
Exodus16:8 Palle penas o Mose: “Ap i rat dell lo t'men mass oun taysarlakro yaake boud maro, te venn čalo. O baro Devel shounas, har rhoyran t'men ap leste. Koon ham mer? Gar ap mende rhoyran t'men, na-a, han rhoyedo ap o baro Debleste.”" 
Exodus16:9 Oun o Mose penas ap o Aroneste: “Pen ap i tsele Israelitarya: Avenn glan o baro Debleste! Yob shounas t'mari rholi. ” 
Exodus16:10 Har o Aron ap i tsele Israelitarya rakras, dikas hakeno kote, kay o moulo tato them hi. Oun ap yek kopo vas o raylepen o baro Deblestar an i folka diklo." 
Exodus16:11 Oun o baro Devel rakras ap o Moseste oun penas: 
Exodus16:12 “Me shounom, har rhoyedo i Israelitarya his. Rake ap lende oun pen: An i rat rhan t'mer mass. Oun taysarlakro rhan t'mer t'men čalo ap o maro, te dikenn, te hom me t'maro baro Devel. ”" 
Exodus16:13 Oun har i rat vas, van pesse čirkle, oun van tele ap i tseli platsa. Oun taysarlakro his i phoub sapeno troul i tseli platsa." 
Exodus16:14 Oun har o kham vas, oun i phoub bouder gar sapeno his, his tikne sane kotya ap i phoub čiddo, hoy dikan vin har tikne kotya djayedo pani." 
Exodus16:15 Kava dikan i Israelitarya oun penan yek ap o vavareste: “Hoy hi kava?” Yon djinan gar, hoy kova hi. O Mose penas ap lende: “Kava hi ko maro, hoy o baro Devel t'menge bičras." 
Exodus16:16 Oun kava hi o lab o baro Deblestar, hoy hounte rikrenn: Hakeno lell yaake boud khetne, har yob nay rhala. I khoro yekeske an t'mare familye.”" 
Exodus16:17 Oun yaake kran i tsele Israelitarya, oun lan khetne, ko yek boud oun ko vavar gar yaake boud." 
Exodus16:18 Har yon palla dikan, har boud hakeno khetne las, his koles, kay boud khetne las, gar boudeder har les hounte vals. Oun koles, kay gar boud khetne las, his ninna doha. Hakenes his yaake boud, har les hounte vell rhapaske." 
Exodus16:19 Oun o Mose penas ap lende: “Kek t'mendar hadell čomone pre pral i rat.” 
Exodus16:20 His save koy, kay shounan gar ap o Moseste oun moukan čomone pral o vavar diveske. Kova vas lauter khandlo, oun kirme his dren. Oun o Mose rhoyras pes pral lende." 
Exodus16:21 Oun hako dives taysarlakro djan le vin oun lan o maro khetne, yaake boud har yek nay rhal. Pal i tsiro, har o kham tateder vas, nashas kova har pani." 
Exodus16:22 Ap o shobto dives lan le douy kope yaake boud maro khetne: douy khore yekeske. Oun i tsele pralstoune pral i Israelitarya van pash o Moseste oun penan kova leske. 
Exodus16:23 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Kava hi, hoy o baro Devel penas: Taysar hi i dives, kay vell kek boudi kerdo. Kova hi i dives o baro Debleske, te vell yob sharedo. Kava maro, hoy kamenn te pekell, kova pekenn! Kova, hoy kamenn te kerell an o pani, kova kerenn an o pani! Lauter, hoy pral ačella, hadenn pre i taysarlake!”" 
Exodus16:24 Kote hadan le pre o vavar diveske taysarlakro, yaake har o Mose penas. Oun či khandas oun kek kirmo vas dren." 
Exodus16:25 O Mose penas: “Rhan les kava dives! Kava dives hi o baro Debleskro dives. Kava dives hatsenn t'mer kek maro vin. 
Exodus16:26 Shob divessa lenn t'men maro khetne! O eftato dives hi o Debleskro dives. Ap ko dives dell kek maro.” 
Exodus16:27 Har o eftato dives vas, his save koy, kay djan vin, te lenn le maro khetne. Yon hatsan či." 
Exodus16:28 Kote rakras o baro Devel ap o Moseste: “Har rah krenn t'mer kova gar, hoy me t'menge penau, oun djivenn gar yaake, har me t'menge penom?" 
Exodus16:29 Dom me, o baro Devel, t'men gar o Debleskro dives? Doleske dau me t'men ap o shobto dives doha maro, te nay rhan les douy divessa. Yaake ačell hakeno t'mendar khere. Kek moukell ap o eftato dives i platsa, kay lo khere hi.”" 
Exodus16:30 Yaake kran i tsele Israelitarya či ap ko dives. 
Exodus16:31 Oun i Israelitarya dan ko maro o lab Manna. Oun yob his har tikno parno djob, oun lačo har i merkli, kay gvin dren hi." 
Exodus16:32 Oun o Mose penas: “Kava hi, hoy o baro Devel menge penas, te kras mer: Yek khoro pherdo vell pre hadedo mare menshenge, kay pal mende venna. Yaake nay dikenn le o maro, hoy das lo men te rhal an o moulo tato them, har anas lo men dran o them Egiptia.”" 
Exodus16:33 Oun o Mose penas ap o Aroneste: “Le i khoro oun čip yaake boud Manna dren, har yek morsh ap yek dives rhal. Oun čip ko khoro glan o baro Debleste tardo, te dikenn les t'mare čave, kay pal t'mende venna.”" 
Exodus16:34 Yaake har o baro Devel o Moseske penas, čivas o Aron ko khoro glan o sonakaskro morhton, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi, te ačell ko khoro koy." 
Exodus16:35 Oun i Israelitarya rhan ko Manna star-deesh bersha, yaake rah bis te van le pash ko them Kanaan." 
Exodus16:36 Kova, hoy hakeno ap yek dives rhas his i khoro pherdo. Kova hi yaake douy litarya." 
Exodus17:1 Oun i tsele Israelitarya djan vin dran o moulo tato them, hoy kharella Sin, oun djan doureder hako kopo har o baro Devel les lenge penas. Oun yon van ap i platsa, hoy kharella Refidim. Kote his kek pani te piyell." 
Exodus17:2 Oun yon čingran ap o Moseste oun penan: “De men pani te piyell!” Oun o Mose penas: “Hoske čingrenn t'mer ap mande? Hoske patsenn gar, te hi o baro Devel pash mende oun dell men kova, hoy men hounte vals?”" 
Exodus17:3 Oun lengri troush vas yaake baro, te penan le i rholyatar ap leste: “Hoske lal tou men dran o them Egiptia vin? Kameh, te meras mer kate i troushatar, mer oun mare čave oun mare firhe?”" 
Exodus17:4 Kote das o Mose ap o baro Debleste gole: “Hoy krap me kal menshentsa? An i tikno tsiro vitsrenn le man i barrentsa moules.” 
Exodus17:5 Oun o baro Devel penas ap leste: “Le morshen kol phourendar touha oun dja lentsa glan i Israelitarya! Le ninna ko kasht an tiro vast, hoy dal ap o pani Nil!" 
Exodus17:6 Oun me čivau man glan toute tardo ap o baro bar pash i berga Horeb. Oun palle dess tou ap o baro bar, oun dran leste nashella pani, yaake te vell len te piyell.” Oun o Mose kras kova yaake glan i yaka kol phourendar." 
Exodus17:7 Koy platsa, kay i menshe čingran ap leste oun kay yon gar patsan, te hi o baro Devel pash lende oun dell len kova, hoy len hounte vell, koy platsa das o Mose i laba Massa oun Meriba." 
Exodus17:8 Har i Israelitarya an Refidim his, peran i Amalekarya pral lende." 
Exodus17:9 Oun o Mose penas ap o Yosua: “Rode menge morsha vin oun dja lentsa an o kourepen oun denn i Amalekarya! Taysar kamau me man ap koy berga tardo te čivell, o Debleskro kasht an miro vast.”" 
Exodus17:10 Oun o Yosua kras, hoy o Mose leske penas, oun anas i Israelitarya an o kourepen. Oun yon kouran pen kol menshentsa Amalek. Oun o Mose djas pre ap i berga. Khetne leha djan o Aron oun o Hour." 
Exodus17:11 Oun yaake djas, te hidjrell o Mose peskre moussya pre, palle his o Israel zorleder har o Amalek. Te moukell lo i moussya tele, palle his o Amalek zorleder." 
Exodus17:12 Har o Moseskre moussya leske phares van, lan kol douy vavar i bar, te beshell lo pes. Oun yek čivas pes čačes oun yek serves pash leste tardo, oun yon rikran leskre moussya pre. Yaake kran le bis te o kham tele djas." 
Exodus17:13 Oun o Yosua das i Amalekarya temerl. 
Exodus17:14 Palle penas o baro Devel ap o Moseste: “Čin kava pre, te bistrenn le kova gar! Oun rake les o Yosua an o dji, te bistrell lo kava kourepen gar. Oun pen leske ninna, te kamau me te marap i tsele Amalekarya yaake, te venn le hakenestar bistedo ap kay phoub.”" 
Exodus17:15 Oun o Mose kras i rhačepaskri o Debleske, te venn kote firhe rhačedo o Debleske, oun das koy rhačepaskri o lab O baro Devel krell man zoreles an o kourepen." 
Exodus17:16 Oun o Mose penas: “Kova vas, har hadom mire vasta pre ap o baro Debleste. An ko tsiro, hoy vella, dell o baro Devel i Amalekarya pale te pale.”" 
Exodus18:1 O rashay an o them Midian, – leskro lab his Yetro, his o Moseskri romyakro dad. Yob shounas kava lauter, hoy o baro Devel ap i tsele Israelitarya oun ap o Moseste kras, te las lo len dran o them Egiptia vin." 
Exodus18:2 Pash leste djivas o Moseskri romni, i Sefora. Kolat bičras o Mose pale pash lakro dadeste, har djas lo pash o Farao. Kanna kras pes o Yetro ap o drom, las peskri čat Sefora peha," 
Exodus18:3 lakre douy morsh čaventsa. Ko yek kharas Gershon. Har kova boldo vas, penas o Mose: “Me vom i vi-themari an o vi-them.” Doleske kharas lo les Gershon." 
Exodus18:4 Ko vavar kharas Eliyeser. Har kava boldo vas, penas o Mose: “O Devel miro dadestar vas ap miri rig. Yob las man vin dran o vast o Faraestar, kay kamas man moulo te dell.”" 
Exodus18:5 Kanna vas o Yetro o Moseskre čaventsa oun leskri romni an o moulo tato them pash i Debleskri berga, kay i Israelitarya beshdo hi." 
Exodus18:6 Oun yob moukas o Moseske te penell: “Me, o Yetro, tiri romyakro dad, vau pash toute. Oun tiri romni oun tire čave hi pash mande.”" 
Exodus18:7 Kote djas o Mose vin pash leste, djas ap i čanga glan leste oun čoumras les. Oun yon poučan yek o vavarestar, har lenge djala." 
Exodus18:8 Oun o Mose penas peskri romyakro dad lauter, hoy o baro Devel ap o Faraeste oun ap i tsele Egiptarya kras, har las lo i Israelitarya vin. Ninna penas lo leske, har phares his ap o drom oun har o baro Devel pale te pale ap lengri rig vas." 
Exodus18:9 Kote vas o Yetro barhtelo pral ko tselo lačepen, hoy o baro Devel ap i Israelitarya kras, te las lo len dran o vast i Egiptarendar vin." 
Exodus18:10 Oun o Yetro penas: “Me sharau o baro Debles, kay las t'men vin dran o vast i Egiptarendar oun dran o vast o Faraestar." 
Exodus18:11 Kanna hayvom, te hi o baro Devel bareder har hako vavar devel. Yob las i Israelitarya vin dran o vast i Egiptarendar, kay kran pen bares pral lende.”" 
Exodus18:12 Oun o Yetro las i firho, hoy yob o Debleske maras oun tseles rhačras, oun ninna vavar firhe, hoy yob maras, te rhan le len khetne glan o Debleste. Oun o Aron oun i tsele phoureder dran Israel van oun rhan khetne o Moseskri romyakro dadeha kote, kay yon o Debles an-mangan." 
Exodus18:13 O vavar dives beshas pes o Mose tele, te rakrell lo o čačepen pral i Israelitarya vin. Oun o tselo dives his i menshe kote troul leste tardo." 
Exodus18:14 Har o Moseskri romyakro dad kova dikas, hoy o Mose i tsele menshenge kras, penas yob: “Hoy hi kava, hoy tou kate kreh? Hoske hal tou kokres o čačepaskro ray kol boud menshenge? Oun i tsele menshe hounte venn pash toute tardo o tselo dives!”" 
Exodus18:15 Oun o Mose penas ap leste: “I menshe venn pash mande, te nay poučenn le o Deblestar, hoy yob lendar kamella." 
Exodus18:16 Te hi len čingepen mashkral pende pral i koova, palle venn yon pash mande. Oun me penau lenge, hoy te krenn le, yaake har o Devel lendar kamella oun lenge penell.”" 
Exodus18:17 Kote penas leskri romyakro dad: “Kava, hoy tou kate kreh, hi gar mishto." 
Exodus18:18 Tou mareh tout tele oun kol tsele menshen, kay troul toute hi. Kay boudi hi yaake baro, te nay krell lat kek kokres." 
Exodus18:19 Shoun ap mande: Me kamau touke te penell, hoy te kress. Oun tiro Devel vell ninna touha. Ab tou lenge glan o Debleste oun mang lestar, hoy len hounte vell." 
Exodus18:20 Oun sike tou len, hoy o Devel kamella oun lenge penella, te djan le ap leskro drom oun krenn, hoy yob lendar kamella." 
Exodus18:21 Tou, rode touke dran i tsele menshende čače morshen vin, hoy ap o Debleste shounenna, save morsha, hoy pengro lab rikrenna, oun kekes i lovenge rhorhenna! Oun kolen čip pral i Israelitarya! Kre pralstunen lendar pral i zerya, vavaren pral i sheel, oun pale pral i paash-sheel oun pral deesh." 
Exodus18:22 Kolla venn i čačepangre morsha, kay rakrenn hako tsiro o čačepen pral i menshende vin. Pral hako tikno čingepen rakrenn yon kokres o čačepen vin. Oun o baro koova anenn le glan toute. Yaake vell touke gar yaake phares, oun yon hidjrenna touha khetne." 
Exodus18:23 Te kreh tou kova yaake, palle hi touke koy boudi gar yaake pharo, hoy o Devel tout das. Oun i tsele Israelitarya nay djan khere i čalo djiyeha.”" 
Exodus18:24 Oun o Mose shounas ap peskri romyakro dad oun kras lauter, hoy yob leske penas." 
Exodus18:25 Yaake rodas o Mose peske čače morshen vin oun kras lendar pralstoune pral i Israelitarya: Pralstoune pral i zerya oun pralstoune pral i sheel, ninna pral i paash-sheel oun pral deesh." 
Exodus18:26 Kolla rakran pral i menshende o čačepen vin. Pral i tikno čingepen rakran yon kokres o čačepen vin. Oun o bareder koova anan le glan o Mose. 
Exodus18:27 Palle moukas o Mose peskri romyakro dad pale te djal. Oun kova djas pale pale an peskro them. 
Exodus19:1 Oun i Israelitarya djan penge dran Refidim oun van an o moulo tato them Sinay. Ap kova dives his triin čonna, har nashan le dran o them Egiptia. Oun yon ačan glan i berga." 
Exodus19:2  
Exodus19:3 Oun o Mose djas pre ap i berga pash o Debleste. Kote das o baro Devel ap leste gole: “Kava peness tou ap i Israelitarya, kol menshende, kay venna pal o Yakob:" 
Exodus19:4 T'mer dikan, hoy krom me halauter ap kol Egiptarya, oun har anom t'men pash mande yaake har i baro čirklo hidjrell peskre čaven ap peskro doumo." 
Exodus19:5 Kanna shounenn: Te rikrenn t'mer lauter, hoy me t'menge penau, oun shounenn ap mire tsele laba, palle han t'mer mange koučeder har i tsele vavar menshe ap kay phoub. Ninna te hi i tseli phoub miro, han t'mer kokres mire menshe," 
Exodus19:6 oun han vi-rodedo, te venn bare raya oun rashaya, kay hi mange koy. Kal laba peness tou ap i tsele Israelitarya.”" 
Exodus19:7 Koy djas o Mose pale oun das i tsele phoureden gole oun penas lenge kal laba, hoy o baro Devel leske penas." 
Exodus19:8 Oun i tsele menshe penan har dran yek mouy: “Lauter kova, hoy o baro Devel penas, kova kamah te krell.” Oun o Mose penas o baro Debleske, hoy i tsele Israelitarya penan." 
Exodus19:9 Kote penas o baro Devel ap o Mose: “Shoun, an i pessi folka khatemen vau me pash toute. Yaake te nay shounenn i tsele Israelitarya, hoy me touke penau, yaake te patsenn le tout hako tsireske.” Oun o Mose penas o baro Debleske, hoy i Israelitarya penan." 
Exodus19:10 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose: “Dja pash lende oun pen lenge, te krenn le pen djoudjo mange kava dives oun taysar, te thovenn le pengre koola." 
Exodus19:11 Yaake te venn le djoudjes mange koy tardo o triinto dives. Ap o triinto dives vau me, o baro Devel, glan i tsele menshende tele ap i berga Sinay." 
Exodus19:12 Pen lenge, har dour nay djan le, te denn le yak, te djal kek lendar ap koy berga. Kek čivell peskri heri ap i berga! Hakeno, koon kova krella, hounte merell." 
Exodus19:13 Koles hounte taprell kek an. Vitsrenn les moulo i barrentsa! T'mer nay denn les ninna tele karye. Krenn kova ninna i firheske, hoy čivas peskre herya ap koy berga. Kova ačell gar djido. Te vell ko tsiro, kay shounenn, har phourdell yek ap i phourdepaskri, palle venn pre ap i berga!”" 
Exodus19:14 Koy djas o Mose i berga tele oun penas i menshenge, te krenn le pen djoudjo o Debleske. Oun hakeno thovas peskre koola." 
Exodus19:15 Oun yob penas: “Rikrenn t'men djoudjo o triinto diveske! Oun kek morsh taprell an kava tsiro peskri romyat an!” 
Exodus19:16 Ap o triinto dives taysarlake das o bolepen bari gole, oun yag das tele karye, oun i pessi folka his pral i tseli berga, oun i phourdepaskri das bari gole. Oun i tsele Israelitarya lan i bari traash, te trissan lengre kokale." 
Exodus19:17 O Mose anas len pash i berga, kay o Devel hi. Oun yon ačan tardo tele glan i berga." 
Exodus19:18 Oun troul koy tseli berga Sinay his yagakro dourho, har vas o baro Devel an i yag tele ap i berga. Oun i yagakro dourho djas pre dran i berga yaake har dran i baro bob. Oun koy tseli berga trissas zoreles." 
Exodus19:19 Oun koy phourdepaskri das zorleder oun zorleder gole. Oun o Mose rakras o Debleha. Oun o Devel rakras pale ap leste yaake zoreles, har o bolepen gole della." 
Exodus19:20 Oun o baro Devel vas tele ap i berga Sinay, oun das o Mose pre gole. Oun kova djas pre ap i berga." 
Exodus19:21 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: “Dja tele oun pen lenge, te venn le gar doureder pre, te dikenn le man. Te venn le pre, hounte merenn boud lendar." 
Exodus19:22 Ninna i rashaya, hoy venn glan mande, hounte krenn pen djoudjo mange, te merenn le gar!”" 
Exodus19:23 O Mose penas ap o baro Debleste: “I menshe nay venn gar pre ap i berga. Tou penal menge, te hi kay berga touke, oun penal mange, te sikrom len, har dour nay djan le.”" 
Exodus19:24 O baro Devel penas: “Dja tele! Oun ab pale kay pre! Oun an o Arones touha! Kek rashay oun kek vavar Israelitari hounte vell doureder har vas lenge penlo, te merenn le gar.”" 
Exodus19:25 Yaake djas o Mose pale tele oun penas i menshenge, hoy o baro Devel penas." 
Exodus20:1 Oun o Devel penas: 
Exodus20:2 Me, o baro Devel, hom tiro Devel, koon tout vin las dran o them Egiptia, kay tou i pandlo boudepaskro hals." 
Exodus20:3 Oun tout vell kek vavar Devel har man. 
Exodus20:4 Oun tou kress touke kek devel, hoy vi-dikell har čomone an o bolepen, vitar gar har čomone ap i phoub oun vitar gar har čomone an o baro pani." 
Exodus20:5 Tou vitsress tout gar glan i vavar debleste tele, oun mangess les gar an. Me, o baro Devel, hom tiro Devel, oun kamau, te kamess man kokres. Kolen, kay kamenn mandar či te djinell oun anenn doosh ap pende, dau me i phagi. Me dau ninna i phagi lengre čavende oun kolengre čavende yaake rah har triin-te-star familye yek pal i vavar djivenn." 
Exodus20:6 Lačepen oun kamlepen dau me ap kolende, hoy man o djiyestar kamenn oun krenn, hoy me penau. Ninna lengre čavenge, kay pal lende venna, hom lačo, yaake rah har i seri familye yek pal i vavar djivenn." 
Exodus20:7 Ma le miro lab baro Devel čičeske an tiro mouy! Me, o baro Devel, hom tiro Devel oun dau i phagi hakenes, koon kova krella." 
Exodus20:8 Ma biste, kay o eftato dives o Debleskro dives hi!" 
Exodus20:9 Shob divessa dja ap tiri boudi oun kre tiri tseli boudi! 
Exodus20:10 O eftato dives hi mange, tiro baro Debleske. Ap ko dives kress tou kek boudi, vitar gar tire čave oun ča, vitar gar tiro boudepaskro oun tiri boudepaskretsa, vitar gar tire firhe, vitar gar kol vi-themarya, kay an tiro foro djivenna." 
Exodus20:11 An shob divessa kras o baro Devel o bolepen oun i phoub, o pani oun halauter, hoy koy dren hi. Oun o eftato dives kras lo či. Doleske penas lo: Kava dives hi i baro dives mange. Kava dives hi miro." 
Exodus20:12 Dik ap tiro dadeste oun ap tiri date, te djal lenge mishto. Yaake djiveh i rah djipen an ko them, hoy tout tiro baro Devel della." 
Exodus20:13 Ma mare kekes! 
Exodus20:14 Romeha, ma dja i vavar djouvyah! Romniya, ma dja i vavar morsheha!" 
Exodus20:15 Ma čore!
