Exodus20:16 Ma an kek rhorhepen pre ap yekeste! 
Exodus20:17 Ma rode, har nay less tou kova touke, hoy i vavares hi: leskro kheer, leskri romni, boudepaskro, boudepaskretsa, groumni, bourika, či, hoy i vavares hi." 
Exodus20:18 Oun i tsele Israelitarya shounan, har o bolepen gole das, oun dikan, har yag dran o bolepen tele karye das. Ninna shounan le, har yek ap i phourdepaskri phourdas, oun dikan i yagakro dourho. Oun har yon kava shounan oun dikan, nashan le penge oun ačan i kotar doureder tardo oun trissan i daryatar." 
Exodus20:19 Oun yon penan ap o Moseste: “Rake tou mentsa, oun mer kamah kova te shounell oun krell, hoy tou peneh. Mer kamah gar, te rakrell o Devel mentsa, te meras gar.”" 
Exodus20:20 Koy penas o Mose: “Ma darenn! O Devel vas, te dikell lo, te krenn t'mer, hoy yob t'menge penas. Yob kamell te shounenn ap leste oun krenn kek čilačo koova.”" 
Exodus20:21 Oun i menshe ačan i kotar doureder tardo. Oun o Mose djas pash koy kali folka, an koya o Devel his." 
Exodus20:22 Koy penas o baro Devel ap o Moseste: Yaake peness tou ap i tsele Israelitarya: T'mer dikan, te rakrom me dran o bolepen t'mentsa." 
Exodus20:23 Doleske krenn t'menge kek vavar debles, kek dran roup, vitar kek dran sonakay." 
Exodus20:24 Hi mange doha, te krenn mange i rhačepaskri dran phoub! Koy pre anenn mange kol marede bakren oun groumyen, hoy rhačrenn tseles mange, ninna kolen, hoy mange marenn, te rhan t'mer lengro mass khetne glan mande. Kote, kay kamau, te mangenn man an, kote vau me pash t'mende oun dau t'men miri barht oun miri zoor." 
Exodus20:25 Te krenn t'mer mange i rhačepaskri dran barra, palle lenn i barra yaake, har hi le. Denn či lendar tele! Te vell i saster pral lende, hi le mange pale-čiddo." 
Exodus20:26 Čivenn i barra gar yaake pre, te nay dikell yek tel i ripya kolestar, kay djal i barra pre." 
Exodus21:1 Kolla hi i laba, hoy lenge peness. Ap kolende hounte rikrenn le pen." 
Exodus21:2 Te gineh tou touke i hebretikro boudepaskro, palle boudrell lo touke shob bersha. Oun an o eftato bersh mouk les te djal! Yob hounte playsrell touke či." 
Exodus21:3 Te vas lo kokres pash toute, djal lo ninna kokres. Te his lo romedino, lell lo ninna peskri romyat pale peha." 
Exodus21:4 Te das les peskro ray i romyat, oun les hi ninna čave lah, ačell i romni oun i čave pash leskro rayeste. Yob hounte djal peske kokres." 
Exodus21:5 Te penell o boudepaskro: “Me kamau miro rayes oun miri romyat oun mire čaven. Me kamau te ačap pandlo ap miro rayeste oun kamau gar te djal.” 
Exodus21:6 Palle lell les leskro ray oun anell les glan o Debleste, oun čivell les glan o voudar tardo, oun dell i kashteni soub an leskro kand čourye. Kova sikrell, te ačell lo peskro tselo djipen leskro boudepaskro." 
Exodus21:7 Te bikrell i morsh peskri čat, te vell li i pandli boudepaskretsa, palle hounte ačell li pandli. Oun yoy nay djal peske gar, har i pandlo boudepaskro morsh nay djal peske." 
Exodus21:8 Te ginas lakro ray lat, te vell li peskri romni, oun palle kamell lo lat bouder gar, hi les gar o čačepen, te bikrell lo lat ap i vi-themari. Kova vals i ladj. Yob hounte moukell lat lakre menshenge, te ginenn yon lat pale." 
Exodus21:9 Te ginas o ray lat peskro čaveske, palle hounte vell li leske har yek leskre čendar." 
Exodus21:10 Te lell i rom peske i douyti romyat, palle hounte dell lo i glanstunate lauter yaake har glan ko tsiro: rhapen, ripya, oun yob hounte sovell lah har glan ko tsiro." 
Exodus21:11 Te rikrell lo pes gar ap kal triin koova, palle nay djal li peske oun hounte playsrell či. Oun kek hounte playsrell lake." 
Exodus21:12 Kova, kay dell i menshes yaake phares, te merell lo, kova hounte merell." 
Exodus21:13 Te kamas lo les gar temerl te dell, oun o Devel moukas, te vas kova yaake, palle nay nashell lo an i foro, hoy o baro Devel vi-rodas save menshenge." 
Exodus21:14 Te das lo les čorrhanes oun an o čilačepen temerl, dell kek platsa, kay ačell lo nay djido, vitar gar, te nashell lo an o Debleskro kheer pash o Debleskri sasterni rhačepaskri. Lenn les kotar krik oun denn les temerl!" 
Exodus21:15 Kova, hoy dell peskro dades oun peskri dat, kova hounte merell." 
Exodus21:16 Kova, kay čoras i menshes, hounte merell. Te bikras lo les, oder te hatsenn le les pash leste, kova hi yek. Yob hounte merell." 
Exodus21:17 Ma rake bibarht vin pral tiro dadeste, vitar gar pral tiri date! Koon kova krell, hounte merell." 
Exodus21:18 Te čingrenn pen morsha, oun yek dell ko vavares i barreha, oder i kashteha, yaake te hounte vell kova an o čiben čiddo, oun yob merell gar," 
Exodus21:19 oun nay stell pale pre, oun nay djal ap i kasht vin trouyel, palle lell kova, kay das les, kek phagi. Yob hounte playsrell o tsiro, kay hounte ačas ko vavar khere oun nay djas gar ap peskri boudi. Ninna hounte playsrell lo lauter, te vell kova pale sasto." 
Exodus21:20 Te dell yek peskro boudepaskres i kashteha, yaake te merell lo, palle lell lo i phagi. Kova vell ninna yaake kerdo pash i boudepaskretsa." 
Exodus21:21 Te ačell ko boudepaskro yek te douy divessa djides čiddo oun merell palle, lell leskro ray kek phagi. Kova hi leskri phagi, te nashras lo peskro boudepaskres, koleske yob love playsras." 
Exodus21:22 Te čingrenn pen douy morsha, oun i romni, hoy an vavar koova hi, lell i dap, yaake te nashrell li peskro ternepen, oun yoy vell pale sasto, palle hounte playsrell kova, hoy das lat koy dap, love. Glan i čačepangre hounte playsrell lo yaake boud love, har lakro rom mangella." 
Exodus21:23 Te vas koy romni yaake doukedo, te ačell li nasselo, palle djal kova yaake: I djipen yek djipaske," 
Exodus21:24 i yak i yakeske, i dand i dandeske, i vast i vasteske, i heri i heryake," 
Exodus21:25 i rhačepaskro doukepen i rhačepaskro doukepaske, i činepen i činepaske, i dap i dapeske." 
Exodus21:26 Koon dell peskro boudepaskro i yak vin, kova hounte moukell les te djal o yakeske, hoy das lo les vin. Ninna kova, kay das peskro boudepaskro i dand vin, hounte moukell les te djal o dandeske, hoy das lo les vin. Kova vell ninna yaake kerdo pash i boudepaskretsa." 
Exodus21:27  
Exodus21:28 Te dell i groumni i morshes i dap, yaake te merell lo, palle vitsrenn i groumyat i barrentsa moules! Kova vell ninna yaake kerdo, te dell i groumni i djouvyat i dap, te merell li. Kek rhal o mass koy groumyatar! Oun koleske koy groumni hi, kova lell kek phagi." 
Exodus21:29 Djinas yob, te dell koy groumni pale oun pale peskre shingentsa, oun yob pandas lat gar dren, oun yoy das pale yekes, yaake te meras lo, palle vell koy groumni i barrentsa moules vitsedo. Oun koleske i groumni hi, kova hounte merell ninna." 
Exodus21:30 Te kamenn le les gar te marell, oun čivenn le i playsepen ap leste, palle hounte playsrell lo lauter, hoy yon mangenna, koleske te nay ačell lo djido." 
Exodus21:31 Ninna te das i groumni i čaves i dap, rikrenn t'men ap kal laba, ninna pash i čate!" 
Exodus21:32 Te das i groumni i boudepaskres i dap, yaake te merell lo, palle hounte dell kova, koleske koy groumni hi, 30 (triyanda) kotya roup koleste, kay nashras peskro boudepaskres. Kova vell ninna yaake kerdo pash i boudepaskretsa. Koy groumni hounte vell i barrentsa moulo vitsedo." 
Exodus21:33 Te moukas yek peskri brounna pre, oun i firho perell dren – nay vell i groumni, nay vell i bourika, – oun ko firho merella, palle hounte playsrell lo love koleske, koles ko firho his. Ko moulo firho nay rikrell lo peske. Kova hi ninna yaake, te krell lo peske i brounna an i phoub oun čakrell lat gar tele." 
Exodus21:34  
Exodus21:35 Te das i groumni i vavareskri groumyat i dap, yaake te meras li, palle bikrenn le i djidi groumyat, oun hakeno lell i paash love, oun yek paash mouli groumni." 
Exodus21:36 Djinas lo, te dell leskri groumni peskre shingentsa oun pandas lat gar dren, palle dell lo i djidi groumni kolake, hoy meras. Koy mouli nay rikrell lo peske." 
Exodus21:37 Te čoras yek i groumyat, oun marell lat, hounte dell lo koy yek groumyake panč vavar groumyen. Te čorell lo i bakro, oun marell les, hounte dell lo ko yek bakreske star vavar bakren pale. Kova hounte krell lo ninna yaake, te bikras lo kol čorede firhen." 
Exodus22:1 Te vell i čorepaskro tapedo, har yob rati an i kheer dren phagell, oun vell yaake dino, te merell lo, hi koles, hoy les das, kek doosh ap leskro rat." 
Exodus22:2 Djas o kham pre, har phagas lo dren, hi koles, hoy les moules das, i doosh ap leskro rat. I čorepaskro hounte dell lauter pale, hoy yob čoras. Te nay krell yob kova gar, palle vell lo bikedo oun vell i pandlo boudepaskro." 
Exodus22:3 Te čoras lo i firho, – i groumni, i bourika, i bakro, – oun kova vell djides pash leste hatslo, palle hounte dell lo douy kope yaake boud pale." 
Exodus22:4 Te dell i morsh gar yak ap peskre firhende, oun moukell len ap i vavareskro them te djal oun kote te rhal, palle hounte dell lo kova pale. Te rhan i firhe djob, palle dell lo o lačeder djob, hoy leskro hi. Te rhan i firhe drake, palle dell lo peskre lačeder drake." 
Exodus22:5 Te krell yek i yag, oun koy yag taprella i soubyengre bourra, oun palle djob, hoy tardo hi, ninna djob, hoy khetne pandlo hi, palle hounte playsrell kova, kay koy yag kras, ko tselo djob, hoy i yag rhačras." 
Exodus22:6 Te dell i morsh i vavares love, ninna kouč koova, te dell lo yak koy pre, oun ko koova vell dran leskro kheer čoredo, oun ko čorepaskro vell hatslo, palle dell kova douy kope yaake boud pale." 
Exodus22:7 Te vell ko čorepaskro gar hatslo, palle dell pes ko morsh, dran koleskro kheer ko koova čoredo vas, glan o Debleste sovel, te čoras lo ko koova gar kokres." 
Exodus22:8 Kote, kay douy morsha čingrenn pen pral i groumni, i bourika, i bakro, i ripen, ninna pral vavar koova, hoy nashedo vas, kote hounte venn kol douy glan o Debleste. Oun kones o Devel i doosh dell, kova dell ko vavares douy kope yaake boud pale." 
Exodus22:9 Te dell yek o vavares i bourika, i groumni, i bakro, ninna i vavar firho, te dell lo yak ap leste, oun ko firho merell, doukrell pes, oder vell krik tradedo oun kek dikas čomone," 
Exodus22:10 palle dell yob pes ap o baro Debleste sovel, te tapras leskro vast ap či, hoy o vavares hi. Palle hounte lell ko vavar koy sovel an, yaake te dell les ko vavar či pale." 
Exodus22:11 Te vas ko firho leske čoredo, palle hounte playsrell lo ko firheske, hoy čoredo vas." 
Exodus22:12 Te vas ko firho khetne dandedo i vavar firhestar, palle anell lo ko moulo firhes, hoy dandedo vas, oun sikrell, te vas lo khetne dandedo. Kova te krell lo, hounte dell lo či pale." 
Exodus22:13 Te patsell yek peske i firho, oun ko firho phagell peske i kokale, oder merell, oun kova, koleske ko firho hi, hi gar pashel, palle hounte playsrell lo leske ko firho." 
Exodus22:14 Te his kova pashel, koleske o firho hi, hounte dell lo koles či pale. Te playsras lo love, har yob ko firho patsas, palle das lo doha love. Yob hounte dell gar boudeder." 
Exodus22:15 Te krell pes yek ap i čate, hoy hi lat gomme kek romes, vitar kek pirnes, oun rakrell ap late oun sovell lah, hounte romedinerell lo lat, oun hounte dell lo i love, hoy hi glan činlo i čake, hoy romedino vella." 
Exodus22:16 Te kamell lakro dad les gar peskri čat te dell, ninna palle hounte playsrell yob kol love." 
Exodus22:17 I dourkepaskretsa hounte denn temerl. 
Exodus22:18 Hakeno, hoy i firheha sovell, hounte merell." 
Exodus22:19 Kova, hoy dell i vavar debleske i firho temerl, oun gar o baro Debleske, kova vell infam." 
Exodus22:20 Ma krenn kolen o djipen phares, kay hi vi-themarya pash t'mende! Oun moukenn len gar čičeske t'menge te boudrell! Bistrenn gar, te hans t'mer ninna vi-themarya an o them Egiptia." 
Exodus22:21 Ma krenn o djipen i djouvyenge phares, kolenge o rom meras! Ma krenn o djipen i čavenge phares, kolen kek dad bouder hi!" 
Exodus22:22 Te kreh tou lenge o djipen phares, oun yon denn ap mande gole, shounau me len." 
Exodus22:23 Oun me taprau savi bari rholi, te dau t'men o rhareha temerl, yaake te hi palle t'mare djouvyen bouder kek rom oun t'mare čaven bouder kek dades." 
Exodus22:24 Te patseh love i čorveleske mire menshendar, palle kre tout ap leste gar braveles! Oun le lestar gar boudeder pale, har les dal." 
Exodus22:25 Te hi yek tire menshendar touke love siyaan, oun tou leh leskri baya ko tsireske, kay yob touke love siyaan hi, palle dik, te dess leste peskri baya pale glan ko tsiro, kay o kham tele djal." 
Exodus22:26 Leskri baya hi leskri plarhta, kolah čakrell lo pes, oun tatsrell lo pes. Te deh tou les peskri baya gar pale oun yob dell ap mande gole, palle shounau me les. Me krau miro dji leske pre." 
Exodus22:27 Ma praase o Debles! Oun ma rake bibarht vin pral i pralstouno tire menshendar! 
Exodus22:28 An ko tsiro, kay aneh tiro djob oun tire drake dren, de tiro Debles, hoy leske hi! Tiro phoureder morsh čaves dess tou tiro Debles." 
Exodus22:29 Yaake kress ninna tire groumyentsa oun tire bakrentsa oun bouzyentsa. Efta divessa ačenn le pash pengri date. Oun ap o orhtato dives dess len mande. 
Exodus22:30 T'mer han mire vi-rodede menshe. Doleske ma rhan o mass kol firhendar, hoy van moulo dandedo divye firhendar. Denn ko moulo firhes t'mare djouklen!" 
Exodus23:1 Tou rakress kek koova doureder, hoy tou shounal, oun tou gar djineh, te hi kova čačo! Ma rhorhe i vavareske, kay anas doosh ap peste!" 
Exodus23:2 Ma rike pash kolende, hoy djan ap i čilačo drom, ninna te hi yon boud! Te poučenn toutar i čačepangre, ma pen čomone vavares har o čačepen, ninna te rhorhenn i tsele vavar." 
Exodus23:3 Pen o čačepen, ninna te hi kova i čorvelo, kay rhorhras." 
Exodus23:4 Te dikeh tou i groumni, i bourika, hoy nashedo hi, hounte aness ko firho pale pash koleste, koles ko firho hi, ninna te hal tou leha an o čingepen." 
Exodus23:5 Te phagas i bourika khetne tel ko kova, hoy ap late čiddo vas, dja koy oun dja koleske pash o vast, koleske i bourika hi, ninna te hal tou leha an o čingepen, oun dik, te vell koy bourika pale ap i herya!" 
Exodus23:6 Te hal tou i čačepaskro, hounte dess tou koles peskro čačepen, koon an o čačepen hi, ninna te hi lo čorvelo." 
Exodus23:7 Ma shoun ap kolende, hoy anenn rhorhepen pre ap i vavareste! Ma pen, te vell kova temerl dino, kay kek čilačo koova kras oun kay an o čačepen tardo hi. Miri phagi vell ap koleste, kay savo čilačo koova krella." 
Exodus23:8 Te hi yek an o čingepen i vavareha oun kamell tout te ginell, te dess les čačepen, ma le kova, hoy yob kamell tout dell! Koon sau koova an-lell, vell korelo o čačepaske oun dikell bouder gar, koon an o čačepen hi." 
Exodus23:9 Ma krenn kolenge o djipen phares, kay vi-themarya hi! T'mer djinenn, har kova hi! T'mer hans vi-themarya an o them Egiptia." 
Exodus23:10 Shob bersha vitsress tou o djob ap tiri phoub vin. Oun te vas ko djob bares, aness les dren." 
Exodus23:11 An o eftato bersh ma vitse tiri djob ap tiri phoub vin! Oun ko djob, hoy an ko bersh pre djal oun bares vell, kova mouk i čorvelenge tardo! Oun kova, hoy i čorvele pral moukenn, kova mouk i divye firhenge tardo! An ko eftato bersh mouk ninna i molengre drake oun i olivtikre drake ap i rouka i čorvelenge. Oun kova, hoy yon pral moukenn, vell i divye firhenge." 
Exodus23:12 Shob divessa boudress tou! Ap o eftato dives boudress tou gar! Ninna tire groumya, tiri bourika, tire boudepangre oun i vi-themarya, hoy pash toute hi, boudrenn ap ko dives gar, yaake te nay lenn le pale nevi zoor." 
Exodus23:13 Denn yak oun rikrenn ap lauter, hoy me t'menge penom! Ma mangenn vavar deblen an! Lengre laba hounte venn gar dran t'mare mouya vin!" 
Exodus23:14 Triin kope an o bersh rikress tou mange bare divessa dren: 
Exodus23:15 kol bare divessa, kay rhah tou efta divessa ko maro, an koleste kek shoutlo yarro dren hi. Kol divessa rikress tou an o čon Abib. Kova kress tou, te bistress gar, te nashal an ko čon dran o them Egiptia. Oun ab gar an o Debleskro kheer, te hi či an tiro vast, hoy tou leske aneh!" 
Exodus23:16 Rikrenn ninna bare divessa mange an ko tsiro, kay anenn o nevo djob dren. Oun bare divessa rikrenn mange ninna an ko tsiro pal i niyal, te anan i drake dren, oun lauter, hoy bares vas ap i rouka oun ap tiri phoub." 
Exodus23:17 An kal bare divessa, triin kope an o bersh, hounte venn i tsele morsha glan o baro Debleste, pengro rayeste an leskro kheer." 
Exodus23:18 Te mareh tou i firho o Debleske, palle dess tou kek maro pashel, hoy shoutlo yarro dren hi. Oun o thulepen o firhestar, hoy maral tou o Debleske, hounte vell ko dives rhačedo oun ačell gar pral i rat čiddo." 
Exodus23:19 Tou aness o feteder halauterestar, hoy ap tiri phoub bares vas tiro baro Debleske an leskro kheer. Tou keress gar i terni bouzni an i thoud peskri datar." 
Exodus23:20 Me bičrau i bolepaskro glan t'mende, koon dell yak ap t'mende ap o drom, hoy t'mer djan. Oun kova anell t'men an ko them, hoy me t'menge vi-rodom." 
Exodus23:21 Denn yak, te shounenn ap kova, hoy yob t'menge penell! Me bičrom les. Te shounenn t'mer gar ap leste, bistrell lo t'mari doosh gar." 
Exodus23:22 Te shounenn t'mer ap leste oun krenn halauter, hoy me t'menge penau, palle djau me ap kolende, hoy ap t'mende djan. Oun kolla, hoy t'menge o djipen phares krenn, kolenge krau me les ninna phares." 
Exodus23:23 Ava, miro bolepaskro djal glan toute oun anell tout an o them, kay djivenna i Amorarya, i Hetarya, i Perisarya, i Kanaanitarya, i Hivarya oun i Yebousarya. Oun me dau len temerl." 
Exodus23:24 Ma mangenn lengre deblen an! Ma anenn firhen, te rhačrenn len lenge! Ma krenn yaake har kolla, kay an ko them djivenna! Denn lengre tsele deblen paash, oun phagenn kol bare barra, hoy yon lenge pre-čivan!" 
Exodus23:25 Mangenn man, t'maro baro Debles, kokres an! Palle krau, te hi t'men doha maro oun boud pani. Oun me lau hako nasslepen, hoy mashkral t'mende hi, t'mendar krik." 
Exodus23:26 Kek romni, hoy vavarčandes hi, nashrell peskro ternepen. Oun haki romni nay lell i ternepen. Hakeno vell phouro." 
Exodus23:27 An hako them, kay tou djah, krau me i menshenge savi daar glan toute, te nashenn le i daryatar penge." 
Exodus23:28 I Hivarya, i Kanaanitarya oun i Hetarya nashenn i daryatar glan toute penge, te veh tou pash lende." 
Exodus23:29 Hi yaake: Gar an yek bersh tradau len toutar krik. Te kroms kova yaake, vals o them divyo oun anals bouder kek rhapen vin. Oun i divye firhe vans boudeder oun boudeder. Oun kova vals gar mishto t'menge." 
Exodus23:30 Dran yek them pal o vavar tradau len glan toute vin. Yaake dau i tsiro te venn t'mer yaake boud, te nay lenn o tselo them t'menge dren." 
Exodus23:31 Oun me penau, har bares tiro them vella. Yob djal foun ko Baro Lolo Pani bis pash ko baro pani, kay i Filistarya djivenn, oun foun o moulo tato them bis pash o lengsto pani Eufrat. Kolla, hoy kote djivenna, dau an tiro vast, te tradenn t'mer len dran o them vin." 
Exodus23:32 Ma avenn lengre mala! Ma mangenn čomone lengre deblendar! 
Exodus23:33 Moukenn len gar t'mentsa khetne an t'maro them te djivell! Te krans le kova, nay anans le t'men yaake dour, te mangenn t'mer lengre deblen an oun shounenn bouder gar ap mande. Oun kova vals t'maro merepen." 
Exodus24:1 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Ab kate pre pash mande, tou oun o Aron, o Nadab, o Abihu oun 70 (efta-desha) i phourendar dran Israel. Kal morsha ačenn doureder krik tardo oun mangenn man kote an!" 
Exodus24:2 Tou, o Mose, ab kokres pash mande! Kolla vavar venn gar pash mande! Oun i tsele vavar Israelitarya ačenn tele glan i berga!”" 
Exodus24:3 Oun o Mose vas pash i menshende oun penas lenge hako lab, hoy o baro Devel penas, kol tsele laba, hoy penenn, hoy yob lendar kamella. Oun i tsele Israelitarya penan har dran yek mouy: “Lauter, hoy o baro Devel penas, kamah mer te krell.”" 
Exodus24:4 Koy činas o Mose hako lab, hoy o baro Devel penas, an i liil. Oun sik taysarlakro stas yob pre oun kras i rhačepaskri tele glan i berga, kote pre firhe rhačedo venna o baro Debleske. Ninna čivas lo deesh-te-douy barra pre kol deesh-te-douy bare familyenge, kay van o Israeleskre čavendar: yek bar haki familyake." 
Exodus24:5 Oun yob bičras terne morshen vin, te marenn le firhen oun rhačrenn len o baro Debleske. Koy pashel his ninna terne gourma. Kolen maran le, te nay rhan i Israelitarya ko mass khetne glan o baro Debleste." 
Exodus24:6 Oun o Mose las o rat oun čoras yek paash an čare. Oun o vavar paash čoras lo ap i rhačepaskri, kay i firhe rhačedo van o Debleske." 
Exodus24:7 Oun yob las o liil, kay yob dren činas, hoy o baro Devel peskre menshendar kamella, oun draveras kava liil i menshenge glan. Oun i tsele menshe penan: “Lauter, hoy o baro Devel penas, kamah mer te krell, oun ap leste shounell.”" 
Exodus24:8 Koy las o Mose o rat oun vitsras les ap i Israelitarya oun penas: “Dikenn, kava hi o rat, hoy sikrella, te vas o baro Devel t'maro Devel, oun t'mer van leskre menshe, kay rikrenn kal tsele laba, hoy yob t'menge penas.”" 
Exodus24:9 Palle djas o Mose, o Aron, o Nadab, o Abihu oun 70 (efta-deesh) i phourendar dran Israel ap i berga pre." 
Exodus24:10 Oun yon dikan o Israeleskro Debles. Oun tel leskre herya his čomone, hoy vi-dikas har kol kouč barra, hoy kharenna Safire. Oun kova his yaake djoudjo oun blaueto har o bolepen." 
Exodus24:11 Ninna te dikan kol pralstoune Israelitarya o Debles, hadas lo gar peskro vast pral lende, te marell lo len. Oun pal kova rhan le oun piyan le." 
Exodus24:12 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Ab pash mande ap i berga pre oun ač kote, te dap tout kol barra, kay činom mire laba dren, te sikrap mire menshende, har te djivenn le, te djinenn yon, hoy te krenn oun hoy te krenn gar.”" 
Exodus24:13 Koy djas o Mose pre ap o Debleskri berga. Leskro boudepaskro Yosua djas leha. 
Exodus24:14 Ap i phourende penas o Mose: “Kate ačenn, bis te vau me pale! O Aron oun o Hour ačenn pash t'mende. Te hi yekes i čingepen i vavareha, nay djan le pash lende! Yon penenn palle, hoy kerdo te vell.”" 
Exodus24:15 Har o Mose ap i berga djas, čakras koy folka i tseli berga." 
Exodus24:16 Oun o raylepen o baro Deblestar moukas pes tele ap i berga Sinay. Oun i folka čakras i berga shob divessa. Oun ap o eftato dives das o baro Devel dran koy folka ap o Moseste gole. 
Exodus24:17 O raylepen o baro Deblestar his glan i Israelengre yaka har i bari yag, hoy pral ap koy berga rhačella." 
Exodus24:18 O Mose djas mashkral dren an koy folka, oun djas doureder pre ap i berga, oun ačas star-deesh divessa oun star-deesh ratsya pral ap koy berga." 
Exodus25:1 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Exodus25:2 Pen ap i Israelitarya: Hakeno, hoy les an o dji rhačella, te dell lo man pestar čomone, kova anell les pash t'mende." 
Exodus25:3 Kava hi ko koova, hoy yon t'menge anenna: Sonakay, roup, oun lolo saster," 
Exodus25:4 ninna kouč bakrengro bal, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas, lačo layntikro than oun bouzyengre balla." 
Exodus25:5 Bakreskri ledertikre plarhte, hoy lolo kerdo van, vavar lače ledertikre plarhte oun kasht i roukestar, hoy kharella Akatsia," 
Exodus25:6 momelengro djet, kouč soungepaskro koova, hoy vell rhačedo, ninna kouč soungepaskro koova, hoy vell an o makepaskro djet čiddo, te nay makenn le yekes dren." 
Exodus25:7 Lenn lendar ninna kol kouč barra, hoy kharenna Onyx oun vavar kouč barra, te venn le ap o rashayeskri damdira oun ap o bečeskri possita sido." 
Exodus25:8 Kamau lendar, te krenn le mange i kheer, te djivap nay mashkral lende." 
Exodus25:9 Yaake har me les tout kanna sikrau, yaake krenn t'mer o kheer, ninna ko tselo koova, koleha boudrenn le an miro kheer. Krenn lauter yaake, har me les tout sikrau." 
Exodus25:10 Kre i morhton dran o kasht ko roukestar, hoy kharella Akatsia, 125 (sheel-te-biish-te-panč) centimetarya lengsto, 75 (efta-deesh-te-panč) centimetarya bourhlo oun 75 (efta-deesh-te-panč) centimetarya pral." 
Exodus25:11 Pral o kasht, dren oun vin, čip lačo sonakay! Oun pral troul o tselo morhton čip i sonakaskro pandepen!" 
Exodus25:12 Kre ninna star sonakangre goustria! Oun kre len ap o morhton, ap leskre star herya, douy ap kay yek rig oun douy ap i vavar rig!" 
Exodus25:13 Palle čin lengste kashta dran akatstikro kasht oun čip sonakay troul lende! 
Exodus25:14 Kol kashta čip an kol goustria, hoy ap o morhton hi, yaake te nay hidjrenn le ko morhton trouyel." 
Exodus25:15 Kol kashta hounte ačenn an kol goustria oun kek lell len vin. 
Exodus25:16 An ko morhton čip kol douy barra kol deesh labentsa, hoy me tout dau." 
Exodus25:17 Kre i pralstouno kotar dran lačo sonakay, hoy čiveh ap o morhton. Ko pralstouno kotar vell 125 (sheel-biish-te-panč) centimetarya lengsto oun 75 (efta-deesh-te-panč) centimetarya bourhlo." 
Exodus25:18 Kre ninna douy bolepangre, hakeno dran yek kotar sonakay. Oun čip ko yek glan ap o pralstouno kotar oun ko vavar palla ap o pralstouno kotar!" 
Exodus25:19  
Exodus25:20 Yon hadenn pengre moussya pre, yaake te čakrenn le o pralstouno kotar. Oun lengre shere dikenn pen an. Oun lengre yaka dikenn tele ap o pralstouno kotar." 
Exodus25:21 Čip o pralstouno kotar pral ap o morhton. Oun an o morhton čip i douy barra kol deesh labentsa, hoy me tout dau." 
Exodus25:22 Kote kamau pash toute te vell. Mashkral kol douy bolepangre, hoy ap o morhton hi, kay i deesh laba dren hi, kotar rakrau touha oun penau touke lauter, hoy i Israelitarya hounte krenn." 
Exodus25:23 Kre ninna i rhapaskri dran o kasht ko roukestar, hoy kharella Akatsia, yek metari lengsto, yek paash metari bourhlo, oun 75 (efta-deesh-te-panč) centimetarya pral." 
Exodus25:24 Čip troul i tseli rhapaskri lačo sonakay! Oun pral troul i tseli rhapaskri čip i sonakaskro pandepen! 
Exodus25:25 Čip ninna i tikno kasht troul i rhapaskri, hoy yek vast bourhlo hi. Oun troul kava kasht vell ninna i sonakaskro pandepen." 
Exodus25:26 Kre star sonakangre goustria! Oun čip yek goustri ap haki heri tel ko kasht, hoy troul i rhapaskri djal, yaake te nay čivenn le lengste kashta dren, kolentsa nay hidjrenn le koy rhapaskri." 
Exodus25:27  
Exodus25:28 Kol hidjepaskre kashta kress tou dran o kasht ko roukestar, hoy kharella Akatsia. Oun makess sonakay troul lende!" 
Exodus25:29 Dran lačo sonakay kress tou ninna kol čare oun khore, an kolende i mool o Debleske čoredo vell." 
Exodus25:30 Ap i rhapaskri venn hako tsiro i Debleskre mare čiddo, te dikap len." 
Exodus25:31 Oun tou kress i momelengri dran yek kotar lačo sonakay. Lakre tsele kotya, o piro oun o mashkralstouno kotar, ninna i čare oun i bloume, hoy koy pre hi, lauter vell kerdo dran yek kotar sonakay. Hi save bloume koy pre, hoy hi pandlo oun vavar, hoy hi pre." 
Exodus25:32 Shob moussya djan latar vin: Triin djan ap yek rig vin, oun triin djan ap i vavar rig vin." 
Exodus25:33 Ap haki moussi hi triin čare, hoy dikenna vin har i bloume ko roukestar, hoy kharella mandeltikro rouk. Hi save bloume koy pre, hoy hi pandlo oun save, hoy hi pre. Yaake vell kova ap haki moussi kol shob moussyendar." 
Exodus25:34 Dran o mashkralstouno kotar venn star čare vin, hoy vin dikenna har mandeltikre bloume. Ap kolende hi bloume, hoy hi pandlo oun ninna save, hoy hi pre." 
Exodus25:35 Triin bloume, hoy pandlo hi, hi kote, kay i moussya vin venna, hako kopo yek blouma tel douy moussya." 
Exodus25:36 Koy tseli momelengri peskre moussyentsa oun bloume vell kerdo dran yek kotar lačo sonakay. 
Exodus25:37 Kre ninna efta momlia oun čip len pral ap i momelengri yaake, te dikenn le glan." 
Exodus25:38 Kre ninna čare, kay i momelengri čik dren vella, oun činepangre, kolentsa i dorya an i momlia tele činlo venna. Kolla lauter venn dran o lačo sonakay kerdo." 
Exodus25:39 Tout hounte vell 35 (triyanda-te-panč) kilogramme lačo sonakay, te kress kay momelengri peskre tsele koola." 
Exodus25:40 Oun tou kress lat yaake, har kova touke ap i berga sikedo vas." 
Exodus26:1 Ko kheer kress tou dran deesh pesse plarhte. Oun kolla venn sido dran lačo zorelo layntikro than, kay ninna kouč bakrengro bal dren hi. Kova hi blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag. An kol plarhte venna bolepangre dren sido an shoukar vastengri boudi." 
Exodus26:2 Kre haki plarhta 14 (deesh-te-star) metarya baro oun douy metarya bourhlo. 
Exodus26:3 Panč save plarhte venn khetne sido, oun kol vavar panč ninna." 
Exodus26:4 Ap kol rigya, kay kol douy bare kotya khetne pandlo venn, kre doryengre goustria dran blaueto kouč bakrengro bal:" 
Exodus26:5 50 (panč-deesh) ap hako baro kotar, yaake te vell yek doryengri goustri vergel ko vavar." 
Exodus26:6 Kre panč-deesh sonakangre rikepangre! Kolla čip yaake an i doryengre goustria, te pandess kol douy bare kotya khetne." 
Exodus26:7 Kre 11 (deesh-te-yek) pesse plarhte dran bouzyengre balla, te venn le pral o kheer čiddo." 
Exodus26:8 Yek plarhta vell 15 (deesh-te-panč) metarya lengsto oun douy metarya bourhlo. Haki plarhta vell yaake baro har koy vavar. 
Exodus26:9 Sib panč plarhte penge khetne! Oun i vavar shob sib ninna penge khetne! Oun čip koy shobti plarhta yaake ap i pančti plarhta, te venn glan ap o kheer douy plarhte yek ap o vavar." 
Exodus26:10 Kre 50 (paash-sheel) doryengre goustria oun pande len ap kol douy bare kotya kote, kay i kotya khetne pandlo venna." 
Exodus26:11 Palle kre panč-deesh rikepangre dran lolo saster, oun čip len yaake an i doryengre goustria, te venn kol douy bare kotya khetne pandlo." 
Exodus26:12 Ko kotar plarhta dran bouzyengre balla hi yek metari bareder har o kheer. Doleske mouk yek metari ap i palstouni rig pral tele bladell! 
Exodus26:13 Oun serves oun čačes mouk yek paash metari pral tele bladell, te vell o kheer ap kol douy rigya čakedo." 
Exodus26:14 Palle kre i vavar kotar dran bakrengri ledertikre plarhte, hoy tou loles kral. Kova vell čiddo pral o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. Oun pral koleste vell i vavar kotar dran lače ledertikre plarhte čiddo." 
Exodus26:15 Dran ko rouk, hoy kharella Akatsia, kre činle kashta, te venn le pre tardo." 
Exodus26:16 Yek činlo kasht vell panč metarya baro oun 75 (efta-deesh-te-panč) centimetarya bourhlo. 
Exodus26:17 Hako kashtes vell douy tikne goushte, kolentsa venn i činle kashta khetne rikedo." 
Exodus26:18 Biish činle kashta venn pre tardo ap koy rig, kay o kham pralstounes hi." 
Exodus26:19 Tel ko biish činle kashta čivess tou star-deesh roupene herya, kay i goushte dren čiddo venna: tel hako činlo kasht douy herya, kay douy goushte dren čiddo venna." 
Exodus26:20 Ninna ap i vavar rig, kay o kham gar vella, venn biish činle kashta pre tardo." 
Exodus26:21 Tel kolende kress tou ninna star-deesh roupene herya: douy herya tel hako činlo kasht. 
Exodus26:22 Ap i palstouni rig, koy rig, kay o kham tele djal, venn shob činle kashta pre tardo," 
Exodus26:23 ninna douy vavar kashta, hoy krenn serves oun čačes i ekka ap i palstouni rig." 
Exodus26:24 Kol douy kashta venn tele oun pral khetne rikedo kol činle kashtentsa ap i servi rig oun ap i čači rig, yaake te krenn le serves oun čačes i ekka." 
Exodus26:25 Yaake venn orhta činle kashta ap i palstouni rig oun deesh-te-shob roupene herya: tel hako činlo kasht douy herya. 
Exodus26:26 Kre pandepangre kashta dran o kasht ko roukestar, hoy kharella Akatsia, oun čip panč lendar ap kol činle kashta ap koy yek lengsti rig o kherestar," 
Exodus26:27 pale panč ap i činle kashta ap i vavar lengsti rig, oun pale panč ap i palstouni rig o kherestar kote, kay o kham tele djala." 
Exodus26:28 Kre ninna i pandepaskro kasht, hoy djal mashkral ap i činle kashta foun yek rig ap i vavar." 
Exodus26:29 Čip sonakay troul kol činle kashta, ninna troul i pandepangre kashta! Oun kre sonakangre goustria! An kolende venn i pandepangre kashta dren čiddo." 
Exodus26:30 Dran kol tsele kotya čivess tou ko kheer yaake pre, har sikrom touke ap i berga." 
Exodus26:31 Mouk ninna i kotar lačo zorelo layntikro than te krell, kay ninna kouč bakrengro bal dren hi. Kova hi blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag. An ko kotar than venn bolepangre dren sido an shoukar vastengri boudi." 
Exodus26:32 Čin star pesse kashta dran akatstikro kasht, čip sonakay troul lende oun čip len ap star roupene herya. Čip sonakangre rikepangre pral ap lende oun pande ko kouč kotar than koy pre. Kava kouč than vell o voudar mank o Debleskri glanstouni isema oun o Debleskri palstouni isema, hoy leskri koučeder isema hi. Palle an ko morhton, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi, oun čip les pal ko voudar dran o kouč kotar than an o Debleskri palstouni isema!" 
Exodus26:33  
Exodus26:34 Oun ap o morhton, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi, čip ko pralstouno kotar, hoy sikrella, kay o Devel peskre menshenge lačes hi." 
Exodus26:35 O Debleskri rhapaskri čip glan o voudar dran o kouč kotar than ap i servi rig! Oun i momelengri čip ap i čači rig! 
Exodus26:36 Kre ninna i plarhta, hoy vell an ko voudar, kay veh dren an o kheer. Kre lat an shoukar vastengri boudi dran lačo zorelo layntikro than, kay ninna kouč bakrengro bal dren hi, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas." 
Exodus26:37 Čin panč pesse kashta dran akatstikro kasht. Čip sonakay troul lende! Oun kre lenge panč herya dran lolo saster, ninna sonakangre rikepangre! Ap lende vell koy plarhta pandlo." 
Exodus27:1 O Debleskri rhačepaskri kress tou dran o kasht ko roukestar, hoy kharella Akatsia. Pral i tseli rhačepaskri vell lolo saster. I rhačepaskri vell 2,50 (douy-te-paash) metari lengsto oun ninna yaake bourhlo, oun vell 1,50 (yek-te-paash) metari pral. Ap haki pralstouni ekka vell i shing vin. Kol shinga venn kerdo dran yek kotar kasht har i rhačepaskri." 
Exodus27:2  
Exodus27:3 Kre ninna kol tsele koola dran saster, kolentsa boudrenn le ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri: pirya, an kolende i yagakri čik dren vella, bare roya, čare, kay o rat dren vella, massengre forshette, yagakre čare." 
Exodus27:4 Kre ninna i sasterni netsa, kay i yagakri čik tele perella. Oun čip star sasterne goustria ap lakre star rigya, kote kay i rigya khetne venna." 
Exodus27:5 Čip kay sasterni netsa yaake tele an i sasterni rhačepaskri, te vell li paash pre har i rhačepaskri oun djal bis kote, kay o tikno kasht troul i rhačepaskri hi." 
Exodus27:6 Kre douy lengste kashta dran akatstikro kasht, oun de lolo saster troul lende. Kol kashta venn an i goustria ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri čiddo, yaake te nay hidjrenn le lat." 
Exodus27:7  
Exodus27:8 Dran činle kashta vell o Debleskri rhačepaskri kerdo – dren vell či, yaake har les toute ap i berga sikedo vas." 
Exodus27:9 Glan o Debleskro kheer kress tou i platsa. Troul koy platsa pandess tou layntikre kotya dran lačo zorelo than mank pesse kashta, hoy tardo hi ap lole sasterne herya. I rikepangre oun kol shelle, hoy rikrenn i layntikre kotya, kress tou dran roup. I platsa vell ap koy rig, kay o kham pralstounes hi, 50 (paash-sheel) metarya lengsto. Kote venn kol layntikre kotya ap biish pesse kashta rikedo, hoy ap biish sasterne herya tardo hi." 
Exodus27:10  
Exodus27:11 Ninna koy rig, kay o kham gar vella, vell 50 (paash-sheel) metarya baro. Ninna kate rikrenn biish pesse kashta kol layntikre kotya. Yaake har ap i vavar rig venn kal pesse kashta tardo ap biish sasterne herya. Oun lengre rikepangre oun kol shelle, hoy rikrenn kol kotya, kress tou dran roup." 
Exodus27:12 Ap i rig, kay o kham tele djal, vell koy platsa 25 (biish-te-panč) metarya bourhlo. Kote venn i layntikre kotya ap deesh pesse kashta rikedo, hoy ap deesh sasterne herya tardo hi." 
Exodus27:13 Ninna glan o kheer, ap i rig, kay o kham pre djala, vell i platsa 25 (biish-te-panč) metarya bourhlo." 
Exodus27:14 Činess pesse kashta, hoy venn serves oun čačes pash o voudar tardo: ap haki rig triin kashta ap triin herya. Mank kol kashta venn i layntikre kotya pandlo. Kolla venn ap haki rig efta-te-paash metarya lengsto." 
Exodus27:15  
Exodus27:16 Kote, kay veh ap i platsa, čip star pesse kashta ap star herya, te kress i baro voudar. An o voudar vell i bari plarhta pandlo. Koya kress an shoukar vastengri boudi dran lačo zorelo layntikro than, kay ninna kouč bakrengro bal dren hi, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas. Kay plarhta vell deesh metarya bourhlo." 
Exodus27:17 I tsele pesse kashta, hoy troul i platsa tardo hi, kolen hi herya dran lolo saster oun roupene rikepangre oun roupene shelle, hoy rikrenn kol layntikre kotya." 
Exodus27:18 I platsa hi paash-sheel metarya lengsto oun biish-te-panč metarya bourhlo. I pesse kashta ap pengre sasterne herya hi douy-te-paash metarya baro. I layntikre kotya hi kerdo dran lačo zorelo layntikro than. 
Exodus27:19 O tselo koova, koleha boudrenn le an o Debleskro kheer, vell kerdo dran lolo saster, ninna kol tikne kotya, hoy denn le an i phoub, te vell o plarhteno kheer oun i plarhte troul i platsa zoreles rikedo." 
Exodus27:20 Pen ap i Israelitarya, te anenn le touke o lačeder olivtikro djet, te nay rhačenn le haki rat i tikne momlia ap i momelengri an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. Kay momelengri vell tardo vin glan ko kouč kotar than, hoy glan ko morhton pandlo hi, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi. Kote dell o Aron oun leskre čave yak, te rhačell i momelengri i tseli rat an o Debleskro kheer. Kava te vell yaake kerdo hako tsireske pash i Israelitarya oun lengre čavende, kay pal lende venna." 
Exodus27:21  
Exodus28:1 Mouk tiro phrales, o Arones, oun leskre morsh čaven glan toute te anell. Kolen rodom vin dran i vavar Israelitarya, te venn le mange rashaya: o Nadab, o Abihu, o Elazar oun o Itamar." 
Exodus28:2 Mouk tiro phraleske, o Aroneske, shoukar rayle koola te sivell, yaake har i rashayeske moldo hi." 
Exodus28:3 Rake kolentsa, kolen me lače vasta oun o gosvepen dom, te hayvenn le mishto te sivell. Pen lenge, te krenn le ripya o Aroneske, te vell yob mange i rashay." 
Exodus28:4 Kolla hi i koola, hoy te krenn le: i bečeskri possita, i rashayeskri damdira, i baya oun i gad, i shereskro pandepen, oun i layntikro pandepen, hoy yob troul peskro per pandell. Kol rashayengre koola krenn le o Aroneske oun leskre čavenge, te venn yon mange rashaya." 
Exodus28:5 I sibangre hounte lenn sonakay, lačo layntikro than, ninna kouč bakrengro bal, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag hi. Dran kova krenn le kol koola." 
Exodus28:6 O rashayeskri damdira krenn le an shoukar vastengri boudi dran lačo zorelo layntikro than, kay sonakay dren sido vell, ninna kouč bakrengro bal, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas." 
Exodus28:7 Douy kotya than venn ap i damdira sido kote, kay i phika hi. Oun i pandepen pandell i damdira troul o per khetne." 
Exodus28:8 Ko pereskro pandepen vell yaake kerdo har koy damdira: dran lačo zorelo layntikro than, kay sonakay dren sido vell, ninna kouč bakrengro bal, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas. I damdira oun lakro pandepen hi dran yek kotar than." 
Exodus28:9 Le douy kouč barra, hoy kharenna Onyx! Oun an kolende mouk i laba o Israeleskre čavendar dren te činell:" 
Exodus28:10 Shob laba ap ko yek bar oun shob ap ko vavar bar pal lengro phourepen. 
Exodus28:11 Mouk koy boudi yekestar te krell, hoy hayvell mishto laba an bar te činell. Oun kol barra venn čiddo an sonakangre goustria." 
Exodus28:12 Palle kre kol douy barra ap i damdira pre, kote kay i phika hi. Yaake hidjrell o Aron i laba o Israeleskre čavendar ap peskre phika, te djal lo an o Debleskro kheer. Oun yon venn mange, o baro Debleske, an o shero, te vap lenge lačo." 
Exodus28:13 Kre ninna douy vavar tikne sonakangre goustria," 
Exodus28:14 oun pande douy dorya dran lačo sonakay ap lende, hoy hi khetne lino har i lengste balla i djouvyatar." 
Exodus28:15 Mouk i bečeskri possita yaake te krell, har kran le o rashayeskri damdira: dran i lačo zorelo layntikro kotar than, kay sonakay dren sido vell, ninna kouč bakrengro bal, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas. An koy possita hi kol douy tikne koola dren, hoy lell o rashay, te hatsell lo vin, hoy o Devel peskre menshendar kamella." 
Exodus28:16 I possita hi biish-te-panč centimetarya baro oun ninna yaake bourhlo. Ko layntikro kotar than vell douy kope khetne lino. 
Exodus28:17 Kre deesh-te-douy kouč barra ap late pre, hako kopo triin barra tel i vavar: pralstounes kol barra, hoy kharenna Rubin, Topas oun Smaragdo." 
Exodus28:18 Tel kolende kol barra, hoy kharenna Karfunkel, Safiro, oun Diamanto." 
Exodus28:19 Tel kolende kol barra, hoy kharenna Hiazint, Agat, oun Ametist." 
Exodus28:20 Telstounes kol barra, hoy kharenna: Krisolit, Onyx oun Yaspis. Čip kol barra an sonakangre goustria." 
Exodus28:21 Oun čin an lende i laba o Israeleskre čavendar, kolendar i deesh-te-douy bare familye venn. Čin an hako bar yek lab." 
Exodus28:22 Ap i bečeskri possita kre tikne dorya dran lačo sonakay, hoy khetne lino hi har i lengste balla i djouvyatar." 
Exodus28:23 Kre ninna douy sonakangre goustria oun sib len serves oun čačes ap i pralstouni rig ap i possita. 
Exodus28:24 Oun čip kol douy sonakangre dorya yek rigyah an kol douy sonakangre goustria, hoy hi serves oun čačes ap i possita." 
Exodus28:25 Koy vavar rig čip an kol sonakangre goustria, hoy ap kol kotya hi, hoy glanstounes ap i damdira sido hi, kote, kay i phika hi." 
Exodus28:26 Palle kre douy sonakangre goustria oun sib len dren an i possita ap i telstouni rig, kote, kay i possita ap i damdira sido hi." 
Exodus28:27 Oun palle čip douy vavar sonakangre goustria ap kol douy kotya, hoy kote ap i damdira sido hi, kay i phika hi. Sib len ap i glanstouni rig kote, kay kol kotya khetne lino hi, pral o pereskro pandepen, hoy rikrell i damdira khetne." 
Exodus28:28 Palle čip i dori dran blaueto kouč bakrengro bal an kol douy goustria, hoy ap o bečeskri possita hi, oun pande lat yaake ap i goustria ap i damdira, te hi li zoreles rikedo pral o pereskro pandepen." 
Exodus28:29 Yaake hidjrell o Aron i laba kol deesh-te-douy Israeleskre čavendar ap peskro dji hako kopo, kay djal lo an o Debleskro kheer. Oun me bistrau len gar, te vap lenge lačo hako tsiro." 
Exodus28:30 An ko bečeskri possita čip kol douy tikne koola, hoy kharenna momeli oun čačepen, te venn le ap o dji o Aronestar, te djal o Aron dren pash mande. Kol douy tikne koola, kolentsa t'mer vin hatsenn, hoy me, o baro Devel, i Israelendar kamau, kolen hidjrell lo ap peskro dji, te vell lo glan mande." 
Exodus28:31 Tel i damdira rivell o rashay i baya. Oun koy tseli baya kress tou dran blaueto kouč bakrengro bal. 
Exodus28:32 Pral moukess tou lat pre, te nay vell kote o shero vin. Ko kotar troul i meen sivess tou yaake zoreles har pash i ledertikri baya, te nay djal li gar paash." 
Exodus28:33 Ap o telstouno kotar i bayatar kress tou tikne phabya dran kouč bakrengro bal, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas. Kal phabya djan troul i tseli baya. Mank lende venn tikne sonakangre bashepangre yaake troul o tselo ripen," 
Exodus28:34 te vell yek phabi, palle yek bashepaskri, palle yek phabi, oun yaake doureder troul i tseli baya." 
Exodus28:35 Koy baya rivell o Aron an, te shounell yek les, te djal lo glan o baro Debleste an leskro kheer dren, ninna te vell lo pale vin. Kava krell lo, te merell lo gar." 
Exodus28:36 An i tikno kotar lačo sonakay čin kol laba: “Kova hi o baro Debleske”, oun pande ko kotar sonakay ap i dori dran blaueto kouč bakrengro bal glan ap o shereskro pandepen." 
Exodus28:37  
Exodus28:38 Ko tikno kotar sonakay hidjrell o Aron glan ap peskro shero, te vell lo glan mande. Kova sikrella, te lell o Aron i doosh ap peste, hoy ap ko koova hi, hoy i Israelitarya man dan. Oun me dikau lačes ap lende." 
Exodus28:39 Kre o gad dran i lačo layntikro kotar than an shoukar vastengri boudi. Kre ninna o shereskro pandepen dran lačo layntikro than, oun i pereskro pandepen an shoukar vastengri boudi." 
Exodus28:40 Ninna o Aroneskre čavenge kre gada, pereskre pandepangre oun rashayengre stadja, hoy raylo oun shoukar hi." 
Exodus28:41 Palle rib o Aroneske oun leskre čavenge kol koola an. Le djet oun mak len o Debleske oun de len an lengri boudi, te venn le mange rashaya." 
Exodus28:42 Mouk lenge ninna layntikre telstoune rholopya te krell. Kolla rivenn le tel i vavar koola, te venn le kote gar nanges." 
Exodus28:43 Hako kopo kay djan le an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer, ninna te rhačrenn le i firho ap o Debleskri sasterni rhačepaskri, hounte rivell o Aron oun leskre čave kol telstoune rholopya. Yaake čivenn le penge kek doosh ap pende oun hounte merenn gar. Oun kova vell yaake o Aroneske oun leskre čavenge, hoy pal leste venna, lauterenge, kay venna rashaya, o tselo tsireske." 
Exodus29:1 Oun kova kre, te vell o Aron oun leskre čave rashaya mange. Le i terno gouroum oun douy morsh bakre, hoy sasto hi." 
Exodus29:2 Le ninna lačo yarro, čip kek shoutlo yarro dren, oun kre pesse oun sane mare, ninna merklia. An i merklia čip djet dren, oun ap i sane mare mak djet pre." 
Exodus29:3 Čip len an i korba oun an len o Debleske! Ko terno gouroum oun kol douy bakre an leske ninna! 
Exodus29:4 An o Arones oun leskre čaven pash o voudar glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer, oun le pani oun thob len!" 
Exodus29:5 Palle le i koola oun rib o Arones an: o gad oun i baya, o rashayeskri damdira oun i bečeskri possita ninna. Pande ko pereskro pandepen, hoy ap i damdira hi, troul leste!" 
Exodus29:6 Palle čip o shereskro pandepen troul leskro shero! Oun čip o tikno sonakaskro kotar glan ap koleste! 
Exodus29:7 Le o makepaskro djet oun čore les pral leskro shero, mak les o Debleske!" 
Exodus29:8 Mouk ninna leskre čave pash toute te vell! Kolenge rib ninna i gada an! 
Exodus29:9 Palle čip lenge o pereskro pandepen trouyel oun čip i rashayengre stadja ap lengre shere, te venn le mange rashaya hako tsireske. Oun yaake aneh tou len an lengri boudi:" 
Exodus29:10 An ko terno gouroum glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. Oun o Aron oun leskre čave čivenn pengre vasta ap leskro shero. 
Exodus29:11 Oun tou mareh les pash o baro Debleskri rhačepaskri glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer glan o voudar. 
Exodus29:12 Čip tiro goushto an o rat oun mak les ap i shinga, hoy pral ap o Debleskri sasterni rhačepaskri hi. Oun o tselo vavar rat čore tella glan o Debleskri rhačepaskri vin!" 
Exodus29:13 Le o tselo thulepen, hoy ap i bouke hi oun ko thoullo kotar, hoy pral i lebra hi, oun kol douy nire oun lengro thulepen, hoy ap lende hi! Kova lauter rhačress tou ap o Debleskri sasterni rhačepaskri, te djal lauter an i yagakro dourho pre." 
Exodus29:14 O mass, i hauta oun ko rhapen, hoy an i bouke hi, rhačress tou vin glan koy platsa, kay t'mer djivenna. Kova lauter vell yaake kerdo, te vell i rashayengri doosh krik lino." 
Exodus29:15 Palle le ko yek bakro! Oun o Aron oun leskre čave čivenn pengre vasta ap leskro shero. 
Exodus29:16 Palle mare les, le leskro rat oun čore les troul o Debleskri rhačepaskri vin." 
Exodus29:17 Čin o mass an kotya! Thob leskre bouke oun leskre herya, oun čip o shero oun kol vavar kotya ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri!" 
Exodus29:18 Oun rhače o tselo bakro ap i rhačepaskri, yaake te djal lauter pre an i yagakro dourho. Ko bakro hi mange, o baro Debleske, oun vell tseles rhačedo. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy vell vin, soungell mange mishto." 
Exodus29:19 Le o douyto bakro! Oun o Aron oun leskre čave čivenn pengre vasta ap leskro shero. 
Exodus29:20 Palle mare les, le leskro ratestar oun čip les tella ap o Aroneskro čačo kand, ninna ap i čače kanda leskre čavenge! Ninna ap o pesso goushto ap lengro čačo vast, oun ap o baro tsebo ap lengro čačo piro čivess tou o rat. O tselo vavar rat čoress tou troul o Debleskri rhačepaskri vin." 
Exodus29:21 Le ko ratestar, hoy ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri hi, oun čip les an o makepaskro djet oun vitse les ap o Aron oun leskre koola oun ap leskre čavende oun lengre koola, te vell yob oun leskre koola o Debleske, ninna leskre čave oun lengre koola, te venn le o Debleske." 
Exodus29:22 Kava douyto bakro vell doleske maredo, te nay vell o Aron peskre čaventsa an pengri boudi dren čiddo. Le o thulepen kay maredo bakrestar: i thoulli pori, ninna o thulepen, hoy ap i bouke hi oun ko kotar, hoy pral i lebra hi oun kol douy nire oun lengro thulepen, hoy ap lende hi! Le ninna o pralstouno kotar i čači heryatar." 
Exodus29:23 Palle le yek pesso maro, ninna yek sano maro oun yek djeteskri merkli dran koy korba, kay o maro dren hi, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi, oun hoy pash o voudar glan o baro Debleskro kheer tardo hi." 
Exodus29:24 Čip kova lauter an o Aroneskre vasta oun an i vasta leskre čavendar. Oun yon hadenn kova pre glan mande, o baro Debleste, te sikrenn le, kay kova mange hi." 
Exodus29:25 Palle le les dran lengre vasta oun rhače les pre ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri pral ko vavar bakro, hoy tou tseles rhačral, yaake te djal kava lauter ninna pre an i yagakro dourho. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy vell vin, soungell mange, o baro Debleske, mishto." 
Exodus29:26 Le o beč kava douyto bakrestar, oun hade les pre glan o baro Debleste, te sikress, kay kova leske hi. Palle nay rhah tou les." 
Exodus29:27 Hako kopo, kay vell i morsh mange i rashay, vell o beč kava bakrestar oun o pralstouno kotar i heryatar glan o baro Debleste pre hadedo, te sikrenn le, kay kova o Debleske hi." 
Exodus29:28 Kol douy kotya mass venn pre hadedo glan mande, o baro Debleste. Palle nay rhal len o Aron peskre čaventsa. Oun yaake vell kova kerdo hako kopo, kay marenn i Israelitarya i bakres mange, hoy rhan le palle khetne glan mande." 
Exodus29:29 Oun i rashayengre koola, hoy o Aron rivas, lenn pal leste leskre čave ap ko dives, kay venn le rashaya." 
Exodus29:30 Koon leskre čavendar rashay vella, kova rivell o Aroneskre koola an ap ko dives, kay vell lo rashay. Yob hidjrell len an kol efta divessa, kay djal lo an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer, te boudrell lo o Debleske." 
Exodus29:31 Ko mass ko douyto bakrestar keress tou an pani ap i Debleskri platsa. 
Exodus29:32 Palle rhan o Aron oun leskre čave o mass o bakrestar khetne o maro dran i korba pash o voudar glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. 
Exodus29:33 Yon kokres rhan kol kotya mass ko firhestar, hoy maredo vas, te vell lengri doosh krik lino, te nay venn le o Debleskre rashaya. Kek vavar nay rhal ko mass, – kova hi o Debleskro rhapen." 
Exodus29:34 Te ačell mass oun maro pral i rati pral, hounte vell kova rhačedo. Kek nay rhal les. Kova hi o Debleskro rhapen." 
Exodus29:35 Yaake kress tou o Aroneha oun leskre čaventsa lauter, hoy me touke penom. Efta divessa kress tou yaake, te venn le rashaya." 
Exodus29:36 An kol efta divessa maress tou hako dives i terno gouroum o Debleske, te vell i doosh krik lino. Leskro rateha vell i doosh krik lino, hoy ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri vas. Palle mak djet ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri! Yaake vell diklo, te hi kay rhačepaskri o Debleske." 
Exodus29:37 Efta divessa kress tou kava hako dives, te vell i doosh ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri krik lino. Ninna makess tou koy rhačepaskri o djeteha dren, te vell li o Debleske kokres oun kek vavareske. Oun hakeno, koon taprell lat an, kova hi o Debleskro." 
Exodus29:38 Oun kava hi, hoy tou hako dives ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri rhačress: douy terne bakre, hoy yek bersh phouro hi," 
Exodus29:39 ko yek bakro taysarlakro oun ko vavar bakro ap i rat. 
Exodus29:40 Le ninna i khoro lačo yarro oun yek litari olivtikro djet, oun čore o djet an o yarro, oun kre les khetne, oun čip kova pash ko bakro pashel! Oun le yek litari mool oun čore les vin glan o Debleste!" 
Exodus29:41 Kova kre taysarlakro oun rati ninna! Yaake aneh tou rhapen oun pipen o Debleske. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy vell vin, te vell kova lauter rhačedo an i yag, soungella mishto o baro Debleske." 
Exodus29:42 An o tsiro, hoy vella, krenn yaake, t'mer oun t'mare čave, hoy pal t'mende venna! Oun denn man hako dives taysarlakro oun rati i bakro! Kova rhačrenn glan mande pash o voudar glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer! Oun kote vau pash t'mende oun rakrau touha." 
Exodus29:43 Kote vau pash i Israelitarya. Oun miro raylepen vell mantsa an ko kheer. Oun yaake vell o kheer miro kheer. 
Exodus29:44 Yaake lau miro plarhteno kheer oun i sasterni rhačepaskri mange, ninna o Arones oun leskre čaven, te venn le mange rashaya." 
Exodus29:45 Oun me djivau mashkral i Israelitarya oun hom lengro Devel. 
Exodus29:46 Oun yon dikenna, te hom me o baro Devel, oun lom len vin dran o them Egiptia, te djivap mashkral lende, me, lengro baro Devel." 
Exodus30:1 Kre i bob dran o kasht ko roukestar, hoy kharella Akatsia. Koy pre vell savo koova rhačedo, hoy o Debleske shoukar soungella." 
Exodus30:2 Kre kava bob i paash metari lengsto oun ninna yaake bourhlo. Les hi star rigya, oun kote, kay yon khetne venna, vell i kotar vin oun djal pre har i shing. O tselo bob hi yek metari baro." 
Exodus30:3 Troul o tselo bob čip lačo sonakay: pral pre oun ninna ap i star rigya oun ap i shinga. Oun čip i sonakaskro pandepen troul o bob. 
Exodus30:4 Mouk star sonakangre goustria te krell. Kolla venn ap kol douy rigya o bobestar kerdo: ap haki rig douy sonakangre goustria tel ko sonakaskro pandepen, hoy djal troul o bob. An kol goustria venn lengste kashta čiddo. Kolentsa hidjrenn le o sonakaskro bob." 
Exodus30:5 Kre kol kashta dran akatstikro kasht oun de sonakay trouyel. 
Exodus30:6 Čip o sonakaskro bob glan o voudar dran o kouč kotar than. Pal ko voudar hi o morhton, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi, oun kay o pralstouno kotar pre hi, hoy sikrella, kay o Devel peskre menshenge lačo hi." 
Exodus30:7 Ap ko sonakaskro bob rhačrell o Aron ko kouč koova, hoy o Debleske shoukar soungella. Kova krell lo hako dives taysarlakro, te čorell lo o djet an i momlia," 
Exodus30:8 ninna haki rat, te rhačell lo i momlia an. Oun kova vell hako dives mange kerdo. Ninna pash t'mare čavende oun lauterende, kay pal lende venna, vell kova yaake kerdo." 
Exodus30:9 T'mer rhačrenn či ap kava bob, hoy o Devel t'menge gar penas, vitar kek firho oun kek rhapen dran yarro. Oun kek mool vell ap leste vin čoredo." 
Exodus30:10 Yek kopo an o bersh lell o Aron o rat o bakrestar, hoy maredo vas, te lell lo i doosh krik, oun djal pash o Debleskro sonakaskro bob oun makell ko rat ap i shinga, hoy pral ap o bob hi. Kova krell lo, te vell i doosh krik lino, hoy ap o bob hi. Ninna pash t'mare čavende oun kolende, kay pal lende venna, vell kova hako bersh yek kopo yaake kerdo. O sonakaskro bob hi o baro Debleske kokres." 
Exodus30:11 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Exodus30:12 Dik, har boud morsha hi mank i Israelitarya! Oun pen lenge, te hounte denn le man love, te ačenn le djido, te vell kek bibarht ap lende an kol divessa, kay venn lengre laba pre činlo." 
Exodus30:13 Hako morsh, kay hi biish bersh oun phoureder, kova dell man i paash kotar roup. Ko paash roupeno kotar hounte vell yaake pharo har kolla an o Debleskro kheer: shob gramme pharo." 
Exodus30:14  
Exodus30:15 O bravelo dell gar i bareder kotar, oun o čorvelo gar i tikneder kotar. Hako morsh dell i paash kotar roup o baro Debleske, te ačell lo djido." 
Exodus30:16 Oun tou less kol love, hoy i Israelitarya tout denna, oun dess len kolende, kay ap o Debleskro plarhteno kheer boudrenna. Yaake bistrau i Israelitarya gar oun dikau lačes ap lende, te ačenn le djido." 
Exodus30:17 Oun o baro Devel rakras ap o Moseste oun penas: 
Exodus30:18 Kre i thopaskro čaro dran lolo saster, oun čip les ap herya, hoy ninna dran lolo saster hi. Oun čip les mashkral o Debleskro plarhteno kheer oun o Debleskri sasterni rhačepaskri. Oun čore pani dren," 
Exodus30:19 yaake te nay thovell o Aron oun leskre čave pengre vasta oun herya," 
Exodus30:20 glan kova kay djan le an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer oun pash o Debleskri sasterni rhačepaskri, te rhačrenn le i firhes o baro Debleske." 
Exodus30:21 Te thovenn le pen gar, hounte merenn le. Ko lab hi o Aroneske oun leskre čavenge oun kolenge, kay pal lende venna, hako tsireske." 
Exodus30:22 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Exodus30:23 Tou less i khoro olivtikro djet oun čivess kouč soungepaskro koova dren: shob kilo myrrhe, triin kilo cinnamome, triin kilo goudlo soungepaskro khass oun shob kilo soungepaskro kasht, hoy kharella Kassia. Yek kilo hi yaake boud har yek kilo an o Debleskro kheer hi." 
Exodus30:24  
Exodus30:25 Kre kolestar i kouč djet, hoy maklo vell ap o tselo koova, hoy o Debleske hi. Mouk les yekestar khetne te krell, kay kova mishto hayvell." 
Exodus30:26 Tou makess ko djet ap o Debleskro plarhteno kheer, ap ko morhton, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi," 
Exodus30:27 ninna ap i rhapaskri oun ap o tselo koova, hoy koy pre hi, ninna ap i momelengri oun lauter, hoy koy pashel hi. Ninna ap o Debleskro sonakaskro bob, kay kouč soungepaskro koova pre rhačedo vella, vell ko djet maklo," 
Exodus30:28 ninna ap o Debleskri sasterni rhačepaskri, kay i firhe o Debleske rhačedo venna, oun ap kol tsele koola, kolentsa boudrenn le. Mak ninna o thopaskro čaro, oun leskre herya, hoy les hidjrenna." 
Exodus30:29 Te makeh len yaake, sikreh tou, kay hi le o Debleske, oun leske kokres. Oun hakeno, koon taprell len an, hi o Debleskro." 
Exodus30:30 Yaake kress kova ninna o Aroneha oun leskre čaventsa. Mak len o djeteha, te venn le rashaya mange." 
Exodus30:31 Ap i Israelitarya pen: Ko djet hi o Debleskro djet. Lenn les kokres te makenn i rashaya mange. Ma makenn les ap i vavar mensheste. Oun ma krenn t'menge i djet, hoy ninna kova lauter dren hi har an kava djet. O Debleskro djet ačell lo. Rikrenn t'men ap kova hako tsiro, t'mer oun t'mare čave, hoy pal t'mende venna." 
Exodus30:32  
Exodus30:33 Koon peske savo djet krella, nay ačell gar djido mank peskre menshende. Temerl dino vell ninna kova, kay makell yekeste, kay hi kek rashay." 
Exodus30:34 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose: Le touke ko kouč koova, hoy mishto soungella: roukengro djet, Onyx, bourrengro djet, ninna djoudjo soungepaskro koova, hoy kharella encens. Hakenestar le yaake boud har ko vavarestar!" 
Exodus30:35 Oun čip kova yaake khetne, har kolla krenna, kay kova mishto hayvenna, te vell lestar i soungepaskro koova, hoy rhačedo vell o Debleske. Čip ninna loon koy pashel, te vell ko koova djoudjo. O Debleske hi lo." 
Exodus30:36 Palle kre les tiknes, yaake tiknes har djala, oun čip ninna lestar glan ko morhton, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi, an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer, kote, kay vau me pash toute. Denn yak! Kava soungepaskro koova, hoy t'mer o Debleske kran, hi leske kokres!" 
Exodus30:37 Ma krenn savo koova t'menge. Shounenn, mange kokres hi kova!" 
Exodus30:38 Koon savo koova peske krella, te nay soungell lo o shoukar soungepen, kava nay ačell gar djido mank peskre menshende." 
Exodus31:1 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Exodus31:2 Shoun, me rodom yekes vin, te krell lo kay boudi mange. Kova hi o Bezalel. Leskro dad hi o Ouri. Koleskro dad his o Hour dran o kheer Youda." 
Exodus31:3 Me čivom miro dourho an leste, oun dom les gosvepen oun vasta, hoy hayvenn mishto te boudrell," 
Exodus31:4 te nay krell lo shoukar koova dran sonakay, roup oun lolo saster." 
Exodus31:5 Ninna hayvell lo kouč barra te činell oun an goustria te čivell. Ninna nay dell lo shoukar koova vin čourye dran kasht, yaake te nay krell lo haki boudi." 
Exodus31:6 Shoun, me rodom ninna i vavares vin, te djal lo leske pash o vast. Kova hi o Oholiab. Leskro dad hi o Ahisamak, dran o kheer Dan. Lentsa boudrenn hake vavar, kay hayvenn mishto lengre vastentsa te boudrell. Lenge dom me o gosvepen an o dji, te krenn le lauter yaake, har me touke penom:" 
Exodus31:7 O Debleskro plarhteno kheer, o morhton, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi, o pralstouno kotar koy pre, hoy sikrella, kay o Devel lačo ap peskre menshende hi, ninna o tselo vavar koova, hoy an o kheer vell:" 
Exodus31:8 i rhapaskri oun lauter, hoy pre hi, i sonakaskri momelengri oun lauter, hoy pashel hi, o Debleskro sonakaskro bob, kay kouč soungepaskro koova pre rhačedo vella," 
Exodus31:9 koy sasterni rhačepaskri, kay i firhe o Debleske rhačedo venna, oun ko tselo koova, hoy pashel hi, oun o thopaskro čaro oun koleskre herya;" 
Exodus31:10 ninna kol rashayeskre koola, hoy o Aron oun leskre čave rivenna pash pengri boudi an o Debleskro kheer;" 
Exodus31:11 ninna ko makepaskro djet, hoy ap kova maklo vell, hoy o Debleske hi; oun ko kouč soungepaskro koova, hoy rhačedo vella an o Debleskro kheer. Kova lauter krenn le yaake, har me les touke penom." 
Exodus31:12 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Exodus31:13 Pen ap i tsele Israelitarya: Rikrenn o Debleskro dives t'menge! Kova sikrell t'men, kay me t'maro Devel hom, oun t'mer mire menshe han an hako tsiro. Kova hi t'menge oun t'mare čavenge oun lauterenge, kay pal t'mende venna, te dikenn t'mer, te rodom me, o baro Devel, t'men vin, te venn mire menshe." 
Exodus31:14 Rikrenn o Debleskro dives t'menge! Koon les gar rikrella, vell temerl dino. Ava, hakeno, hoy ap o Debleskro dives boudrella, hounte djivell bouder gar mank peskre menshende." 
Exodus31:15 Shob divessa boudress tou. O eftato dives kress tou či. Ko dives hi o baro Debleske. Kova, kay boudrella, vell moulo dino." 
Exodus31:16 Doleske hounte rikrenn i Israelitarya o Debleskro dives hako tsiro, yon oun lengre čave oun lauter, kay pal lende venna, yaake har krom me kova lentsa vin." 
Exodus31:17 O Debleskro dives hi i sikepen mange oun mire menshenge, i Israelitarya, hoy hako tsiro ačella. An shob divessa kras o baro Devel o bolepen oun i phoub. Oun o eftato dives kras yob či oun las nevi zoor." 
Exodus31:18 Oun har o baro Devel kova lauter ap o Mose rakras ap i berga Sinay, das yob les i douy barra, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren činlo hi. O Devel činas len peskro goushteha dren." 
Exodus32:1 Har dikan i menshe, kay o Mose i rah tsiro krik ačas, oun gar bouder koy berga tele vas, van le khetne pash o Aron oun penan ap leste: “Dja, kre menge i devel, kay djal glan mende! Mer djinah gar, hoy ko Moseha djas, kay anas men dran o them Egiptia vin.”" 
Exodus32:2 O Aron penas ap lende: “Lenn i sonakangre kanengre, hoy t'mare romya, morsh čave oun ča an i kanda hi, oun anenn len mange.”" 
Exodus32:3 Yaake lan i tsele menshe pengre kanengre dran i kanda, oun anan len pash o Aron." 
Exodus32:4 Oun yob las len dran lengre vasta, oun čivas len an i yag, oun kras i devel, hoy dikas vin har i terno gouroum. Oun yon penan: “Kava hi tiro Devel, Israel, kova, kay tout dran o them Egiptia vin anas.”" 
Exodus32:5 Har dikas kova o Aron, kras yob i rhačepaskri glan ko gouroum, te rhačrenn le firhen leske koy pre, oun moukas vi-gole te dell: “Taysar hi i baro dives, kay sharah o baro Debles!”" 
Exodus32:6 Oun yon stan taysarlakro pre oun maran firhen, oun rhačran len ko debleske, hoy kran le penge. Ninna vavar firhen anan le pashel, te rhan le len khetne. Oun yon beshan pen, te rhan le oun te piyenn le. Oun yon stan pre oun khelan." 
Exodus32:7 O baro Devel rakras ap o Mose: “Naash, dja tele, tire menshe, kay tou dran o them Egiptia vin anal, kran djoungelo koova." 
Exodus32:8 Sik djan le ko dromestar tele, kay me sikrom lende. Yon kran penge i devel, – i terno gouroum, – oun mangan les an, maran firhen leske oun penan: Kava hi tiro Devel, Israel, kova, kay anas tout dran o them Egiptia vin. ”" 
Exodus32:9 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose: “Me dikau, kay djivenn kol menshe pal pengro shero oun kamenn gar te shounell." 
Exodus32:10 Ma rike man pale, te anap miri bari rholi pral lende, oun dap len temerl. Tire čavendar krau me i bari natsyona.”" 
Exodus32:11 O Mose mangas o baro Debles, kay leskro Devel his, oun penas: “Baro Devel, tiro zorelo vasteha anal tou tire menshen dran o them Egiptia vin, oun sikral tiri tseli zoor. Hoske kameh tou len kanna an tiri rholi temerl te dell?" 
Exodus32:12 Kameh, te penenn i Egiptarya: Kava Devel anas i Israelitaryen dran maro them vin, te marell lo len an i berge, te ačell kek lendar pral ap i phoub. Mangau tout, dja pale tiri rhačedi rholyatar! Mouk kay bibarht gar pral lende te vell!" 
Exodus32:13 Ma biste tire boudepangren, o Abraham, o Isaak oun o Yakob! Kolenge dal tout sovel oun penal: Me moukau t'mare čaven boudeder te vell har i momlia an o bolepen. Kava tselo them, kay me penom, te vell lo t'maro, dau t'mare čavende, te djivenn le kote hako tsireske. ”" 
Exodus32:14 Koy rikras pes o baro Devel pale oun moukas gar koy bari bibarht pral peskre menshende te vell. 
Exodus32:15 O Mose djas pale koy berga tele. An leskro vast his les kol barra, kay o Debleskre deesh laba ap hake douy rigya dren činlo hi." 
Exodus32:16 Kol barra kras o Devel kokres oun činas kol laba dren. 
Exodus32:17 O Yosua, kay his pash o Moseste, shounas har i Israelitarya gole dan, oun penas ap o Moseste: “I menshe denn bari gole, har te kourans le pen.”" 
Exodus32:18 Koy penas o Mose leske: “Kaya hi kek gole, har pal i kourepen, kay vans le i zorleder, vitar kek gole, har te nashans le penge. Me shounau i gole, har te givenn le oun khelenn le.”" 
Exodus32:19 Har vas o Mose pash i menshende, oun dikas ko terno gouroum, oun har i menshe khelan, vas an leste i bari rholi. Yob vitsras kol barra dran peskre vasta oun phagas len an kotya tella pash i berga." 
Exodus32:20 Ko terno gouroum, hoy kran i Israelitarya penge, vitsras yob an i yag, te rhačrell lo. Oun das les tiknes, bis te stauba pral ačas. Koy stauba vitsras lo an o pani, oun das les i Israelitarya te piyell." 
Exodus32:21 Pale penas lo ap o Aron: “Hoy kran touke kol menshe? Hoske anal tou len ap savo čilačo drom!” 
Exodus32:22 O Aron penas: “Am gar rhoyedo, mo ray! Tou djineh kokres, kay kol menshe čilačo hi." 
Exodus32:23 Yon penan ap mande: Kre menge i devel, kay men o drom sikrella! Koon djinella, hoy ko morsheske Mose djas, kova, kay anas men dran o them Egiptia vin." 
Exodus32:24 Me poučom: Kones hi sonakay? Yaake lan le pengro sonakay tele oun dan les mande. Me lom ko sonakay oun čivom les an i yag, oun hoy vin vas, his ko terno gouroum.”" 
Exodus32:25 O Mose dikas, kay i Israelitarya bipandle van. O Aron moukas len te krell, hoy yon kaman. Yon kran pen sapaske kolenge, kay kamenn pen lentsa te kourell." 
Exodus32:26 Koy djas o Mose an o voudar glan koy platsa, kay i menshe djivenn, oun das gole: “Koon kamell o baro Debles, kova te vell pash mande!” Yaake van i tsele Levitarya pash leste." 
Exodus32:27 Oun yob penas ap lende: “O baro Devel, o Devel pral o Israel, penell t'menge: Lenn hakeno peskro rharo, oun djan pral koy tseli platsa, kate te kote! Hakeno lell peskro phrales, peskro males, oun koles, kay langs leste djivell, oun dell les moulo. ”" 
Exodus32:28 I Levitarya kran, har o Mose lenge penas. Oun ap kova dives meran yaake triin zerya morsha." 
Exodus32:29 O Mose penas ap i Levitarya: “Kava dives van t'mer rashaya o baro Debleske. T'mer rikran t'men gar pale, te maran ninna t'mare morsh čaven oun phralen. Doleske čivell o baro Devel peskri barht ap t'mende.”" 
Exodus32:30 O vavar dives rakras o Mose ap i Israelitarya: “T'mer anan bari doosh oun ladj ap t'mende. Kanna kamau pale pash o baro Debleste ap i berga te djal, te mangap lestar, te bistrell lo t'mari doosh.”" 
Exodus32:31 O Mose djas pash o baro Debleste pale oun penas: “Ah, kol menshe anan bari doosh oun ladj ap pende. I debles dran sonakay kran yon penge." 
Exodus32:32 Mangau tout: Biste lengri doosh! Te kameh tou kova gar te krell, palle le miro lab krik dran tiro liil, hoy tou činal.”" 
Exodus32:33 Oun o baro Devel penas: “Me lau kokres o lab kolestar krik dran miro liil, kay miro drom moukas." 
Exodus32:34 Oun kanna dja pale! An kol menshen an ko them, kay me rakrom lestar. Miro bolepaskro djal glan toute. Te vell miro tsiro, dau i Israelitaryen pengri phagi.”" 
Exodus32:35 Oun o baro Devel das i Israelitaryen doleske, kay yon mangan ko terno gouroum an, hoy o Aron kras." 
Exodus33:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Djan doureder, tou oun kol menshe, kolen tou dran o them Egiptia vin anal. Djan an ko them, kay me man sovel dom glan o Abraham, o Isaak oun o Yakob oun lenge penom: T'mare čaven dau me kava them." 
Exodus33:2 Oun me bičrau i bolepaskro. Kova djal glan t'mende. Oun me tradau i vavar menshen an kava them vin: i Kanaanitarya, i Amorarya, i Hetarya, i Perisarya, i Hivarya oun i Yebousarya." 
Exodus33:3 Yaake anau t'men an ko them, kay hi boud thoud oun gvin. Me vau gar t'mentsa. T'mer djivenn pal t'maro shero oun kamenn gar te shounell. Oun me doms nay t'men moulo ap o drom, te djoms t'mentsa.”" 
Exodus33:4 Har i Israelitarya kol phare laba shounan, rovan lengre djia, oun kek lendar čivas bouder peskro sonakay oun roup ap peste." 
Exodus33:5 Yaake kran le, hoy o baro Devel o Moseske penas. Leske penas lo: “Pen ap i Israelitarya: T'mer djivenn pal t'maro shero oun kamenn gar te shounell. Te voms me t'mentsa i tikno tsiro ap o drom, doms me t'men moulo. Čivenn kanna t'maro sonakay oun roup tele! Pal kova kamau me dikell, hoy t'mentsa krau.”" 
Exodus33:6 Yaake čivan i Israelitarya pengro sonakay oun roup tele, har his le pash i berga Horeb." 
Exodus33:7 Hako kopo, kay djan i Israelitarya ap i vavar platsa, čivas o Mose o plarhteno kheer pre vin glan koy platsa, kay i menshe hi. Yob penas: “Kova hi ko kheer, kay o baro Devel t'mentsa khetne vell.” Hako Israelitari, kay kamas o baro Deblestar čomone te poučell, hounte djas kote." 
Exodus33:8 Hako kopo har djas o Mose vin pash o Debleskro plarhteno kheer, stan i tsele Israelitarya pre oun djan an i voudya glan lengre plarhtene khera, oun ačan koy tardo. Yon dikan o Moseske palla, har yob pash o Debleskro plarhteno kheer djas." 
Exodus33:9 Vas lo koy, vas i bari folka tele oun ačas pral ko voudar tardo. Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha." 
Exodus33:10 Har dikan i Israelitarya koy folka pash ko voudar, vitsran pen le tele hakeno glan peskro khereskro voudar, te mangenn le o Debles an." 
Exodus33:11 O baro Devel rakras o Moseha, har mala rakran khetne, kay dikenn pen an i yaka. Palle djas o Mose pale ap i platsa, kay i menshe hi. Leskro terno boudepaskro, o Yosua, – koleskro dad hi o Noun, – ačas an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer." 
Exodus33:12 O Mose penas ap o baro Debleste: “Tou penal mange, te anap me kal menshen an o them Kanaan. Tou sikral man gar, kones tou mantsa bičreh. Tou penal, te prindjreh man oun djineh miro lab, oun te dikeh lačes ap mande." 
Exodus33:13 Te dikeh lačes ap mande, mouk man tiro drom te djinell. Me kamau tout feteder te hayvell, te krap, hoy mishto hi glan tire yaka. Biste kova gar: Kol menshe hi tire menshe.”" 
Exodus33:14 O Devel penas: “Me djau glan toute oun anau tout an i them, kay tou khere hal.”" 
Exodus33:15 O Mose penas ap leste: “Te djah tou gar mentsa, palle biče men gar katar krik!" 
Exodus33:16 Tou te djah mentsa, palle hayvell hakeno, te dikeh lačes ap mande oun ap kal menshende. Yaake sikreh i tsele vavar menshende ap kay phoub, te ham kouč touke.”" 
Exodus33:17 O baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Ninna kava, hoy tou mandar mangal, kamau me te krell. Tou hal lačes glan mire yaka, me prindjrau tout oun djinau tiro lab.”" 
Exodus33:18 O Mose mangas: “Mouk man tiro raylepen te dikell!” 
Exodus33:19 “Mishto”, penas o baro Devel: “Me kamau glan toute te djal, te dikess tou miro tselo lačepen. Oun miro lab Baro Devel rakrau me glan toute vin. Me hom lačo koneske, kones me kamau. Oun krau miro dji pre koneske me kamau." 
Exodus33:20 Mire yaka oun miro mouy dikess tou gar. Kek mensho, kay dikas man, ačell djido." 
Exodus33:21 Tou nay ačeh pash mande kate ap i baro bar tardo. 
Exodus33:22 Te djau me an miro raylepen glan toute, čivau me tout mank i bare barra, oun rikrau miro vast pral toute, bis te djom doureder." 
Exodus33:23 Palle lau miro vast pale, oun tou nay dikeh mange palla. Mire yaka oun miro mouy nay dikell kek.”" 
Exodus34:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Kre touke douy bare barra, har kolla his, kay tou paash dal! Palle kamau me pale kol laba dren te činell, hoy an i vavar barra činlo his." 
Exodus34:2 Le touha, hoy tout hounte vell, te djas sik taysarlakro pral ap i berga Sinay pre. Kote am pash mande!" 
Exodus34:3 Kek nay vell touha. Ap koy tseli berga hounte moukell pes kek te dikell, vitar kek bakre oun groumya, te rhan le pash i berga.”" 
Exodus34:4 O Mose kras douy neve bare barra har kol phoure. Sik taysarlakro stas yob pre, oun djas ap koy berga Sinay, har o baro Devel penas leske. An leskre vasta rikras lo kol douy bare barra." 
Exodus34:5 O baro Devel vas an i folka tele, djas pash o Moseste oun kharas peskro lab Baro Devel." 
Exodus34:6 Yob djas glan o Moseste doureder oun das gole: “Me hom o baro Devel. O baro Devel hom me. Man hi i baro dji, pherdo kamlepen. Me vau gar sik rhoyedo. Miro lačepen hi baro oun me dau mire menshen gar pre." 
Exodus34:7 Me sikrau miro lačepen ap lengre čavende oun kolengre čavende oun kolengre čavende oun zerya kope yaake doureder. Oun bistrau lengri doosh oun lau lengro čilačepen krik. Koles, kay kamell mandar či te djinell, dau i phagi, oun gar koles kokres, na-a ninna leskre čaven oun kolengre čaven yaake rah har triin, star familye, yek pal i vavar, djivan.”" 
Exodus34:8 Koy vitsras pes o Mose sik ap i phoub oun mangas o Debles an: 
Exodus34:9 “Miro ray, te dikeh tou lačes ap mande, palle dja mentsa, ninna te djan kal menshe pal pengro shero. Biste mari doosh oun ko čilačo koova, hoy kram, oun mouk men pale tire menshe te vell.”" 
Exodus34:10 O baro Devel penas ap leste: Me dau t'men miro lab, oun dau miro vast pre: Glan t'mare yaka kamau me zorelo oun baro koova te krell, har an kek vavar them oun pash kek vavar menshende kerdo vas. Te dikenna i tsele menshe, kay troul t'mende hi, havo baro koova me t'menge krau, palle darenn le oun krenn bare yaka." 
Exodus34:11 Me tradau kol Amorarya, Kanaanitarya, Hetarya, Perisarya, Hivarya oun Yebousarya dran lengro them oun dau les t'mende. Rikrenn kal laba, hoy me penau t'menge kava dives!" 
Exodus34:12 Ma avenn mala kol menshenge an ko them, kay t'mer venna! Te vans lengre mala, nay anans le t'men miro dromestar tele." 
Exodus34:13 Vitsrenn kol pre-čidde barra trouyel, kay marenn oun rhačrenn le firhen lengro debleske. Phagenn kol bare barra paash, hoy le leske pre-čivan! Oun denn kol figuren tele, hoy sikrenn i debletsa Ashera." 
Exodus34:14 Mangenn kek vavar Debles an! Me, o baro Devel, kamau, te kamenn man kokres. Me kamau kokres te vap t'maro Devel." 
Exodus34:15 Ma avenn mala kol vavar menshenge an o them! Yon mangenn pengre deblen dran kasht oun bar an, oun marenn firhen lenge. Te vans t'mer lengre mala, nay djals, te djan lentsa oun rhan ko rhapen, hoy yon anan lengre deblen." 
Exodus34:16 T'mer romedinerans t'mare morsh čaven lengre čentsa. Oun kolla djouvya anans t'mare morsh čaven o Debleskro dromestar tele, te mangenn le ninna kol deblen dran kasht oun bar an." 
Exodus34:17 Ma krenn t'men kek debles dran saster, sonakay oun roup!" 
Exodus34:18 Ma bistrenn kol bare divessa, kay rhan kek maro dran shoutlo yarro. An o čon Abib rhan efta divessa kek maro dran shoutlo yarro yaake har me t'menge penom! An ko čon djan t'mer vin dran o them Egiptia." 
Exodus34:19 T'mare phoureder morsh čave hi mange, ninna hako phoureder morsh ternepen, hoy i firhestar boldo vella, nay vell i gouroum, nay vell i bakro." 
Exodus34:20 Te hi o ternepen i bourikakro ternepen, dess tou man leske i terno bakro. Kamenn t'mer kova gar, palle phagenn koy terni bourika i meen! T'mare phoureder morsh čave, ma marenn len! Kolenge denn mange i firho, hoy mange marenn. Kek vell an miro Debleskro kheer i vastentsa, kay či dren hi." 
Exodus34:21 Shob divessa krenn t'mari boudi! Ap o eftato dives krenn či! Kova te vell yaake hako tsireske, ninna ko tsireske, kay t'mer boudrenn ap t'maro kotar phoub oun kay t'mer anenn o djob dren." 
Exodus34:22 Rikrenn bare divessa mange dren ap ko tsiro, kay t'mer o nevo djob dren anenn! Oun palle rikrenn bare divessa dren pal i niyal, te anan i drake dren oun lauter, hoy ap i rouka oun ap t'mari phoub bares vas." 
Exodus34:23 Ap kol bare divessa, triin kope an o bersh, hounte venn i tsele morsha glan mande, lengro rayeste. Me hom o baro Devel, o Devel pral o Israel." 
Exodus34:24 Me tradau i tsele vavar menshen glan t'mende krik, oun krau t'maro them bareder. Yaake vell kek an t'maro them, te lell lo peske i kotar them ap ko tsiro, kay djan t'mer triin kope an o bersh pash t'maro baro Debleste, te venn khetne glan leste." 
Exodus34:25 Te marenn t'mer i firhes mange, anenn leskro rat gar glan mande khetne o shoutlo mareha! Ko firho, hoy t'mer marenn mange ap o dives, hoy kharella Passa, kolestar hounte ačell či pral o vavar diveske." 
Exodus34:26 Hako bersh anenn o feteder halauterestar, hoy ap t'mari phoub bares vas, an o Debleskro kheer! Yob hi t'maro baro Devel. Kerenn gar i terni bouzni an o thoud lakro datar!" 
Exodus34:27 O baro Devel penas o Moseske: “Čin kal laba an i liil, te rikrenn t'men ap lende. Palle han mire menshe, oun me rikrau miro lab, hoy dom miro vast pre oun krau touke oun i Israelenge, hoy me penom.”" 
Exodus34:28 Star-desha divessa oun ratsya ačas o Mose ap i berga pash o baro Debleste. An kova tsiro rhas lo či oun piyas lo či. Yob činas kol deesh laba ap kol douy barra, – kol laba, kay penenna, hoy o Devel peskre menshendar kamella." 
Exodus34:29 Har o Mose kol douy barrentsa an o vast i berga Sinay tele djas, djinas lo gar, kay vas leskro mouy har o kham, har rakras lo o Debleha." 
Exodus34:30 Oun o Aron oun kol vavar Israelitarya dikan, har leskro mouy hi har o kham, oun daran, te djan le pash leste." 
Exodus34:31 Koy kharas o Mose len pash peste. Oun o Aron oun kol vavar pralstoune djan pash leste. Oun o Mose rakras lentsa. 
Exodus34:32 Palle van ninna kol vavar Israelitarya. Oun o Mose penas lenge kol tsele laba, hoy o baro Devel leske penas ap i berga Sinay, te rikrenn le len." 
Exodus34:33 Har o Mose lenge lauter penas, čivas lo i diklo ap peskro mouy." 
Exodus34:34 Hako kopo har djas o Mose an o Debleskro kheer, te rakrell lo leha, las yob ko diklo tele, bis te djals lo pale vin dran o kheer." 
Exodus34:35 Har vas lo vin, te penell lo ap i Israelitarya, hoy o baro Devel leske penas, dikan yon, har leskro mouy hi har o kham. Palle khatras o Mose peskro mouy pale tel ko diklo, bis te djas lo pale dren, te rakrell lo o baro Debleha." 
Exodus35:1 O Mose das i tsele Israelitarya khetne gole oun penas ap lende: “O baro Devel penas t'menge: 
Exodus35:2 Shob divessa krenn t'mari boudi! O eftato dives hi o Debleskro dives. Ap ko dives krenn či! Ko dives hi o baro Debleske. Koon ap kava dives boudrella, hounte merella." 
Exodus35:3 Ap ko dives krenn kek yag an t'mare tsele khera!” 
Exodus35:4 O Mose penas ap i tsele Israelitarya: O baro Devel penell t'menge: 
Exodus35:5 Hakeno, hoy les an o dji rhačella, te dell lo man pestar čomone, kova nay dell man: Sonakay, roup oun lolo saster," 
Exodus35:6 bakrengro bal, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas, lačo layntikro than oun bouzyengre balla." 
Exodus35:7 Bakreskri ledertikre plarhte, hoy lolo kerdo van, vavar lače ledertikre plarhte oun kasht ko roukestar, hoy kharella Akatsia," 
Exodus35:8 momelengro djet, kouč soungepaskro koova, hoy čivenn le an o makepaskro djet, oun ninna kouč soungepaskro koova, hoy vell rhačedo ap o sonakaskro bob," 
Exodus35:9 ninna save barra, hoy kharenna Onyx oun vavar kouč barra, te venn le ap o rashayeskri damdira oun ap o bečeskri possita kerdo." 
Exodus35:10 Koon mank t'mende hayvell shoukar koova te krell, kova te vell oun boudrell mentsa, te nay kras mer, hoy o baro Devel penas menge:" 
Exodus35:11 ko Debleskro plarhteno kheer peskre plarhtentsa, peskre rikepangre, činle kashta, pandepangre kashta oun pesse kashta ap herya;" 
Exodus35:12 ko sonakaskro morhton i kashtentsa hidjepaske, o pralstouno kotar koy pre, oun ko kouč kotar than, hoy mank i douy iseme pandlo vell;" 
Exodus35:13 koy rhapaskri i kashtentsa hidjepaske oun lauter, hoy pashel hi, ninna i Debleskre mare;" 
Exodus35:14 koy momelengri oun lauter, hoy pashel hi, lakre momlia oun lakro djet;" 
Exodus35:15 ko bob, kay ko soungepaskro koova rhačedo vella oun leskre hidjepaskre kashta; ko makepaskro djet; ko kouč soungepaskro koova; koy plarhta an o khereskro voudar;" 
Exodus35:16 koy sasterni rhačepaskri, kay firhe rhačedo venna o Debleske, ninna koy netsa dran lolo saster, kol hidjepaskre kashta oun lauter, hoy koy pashel hi; ko thopaskro čaro oun leskre herya;" 
Exodus35:17 kolla layntikre kotya oun i pesse kashta ap herya, hoy troul i glanstouni platsa hi; koy plarhta an o voudar glan i glanstouni platsa;" 
Exodus35:18 kol tikne sasterne kotya, hoy denn le an i phoub, te rikrenn le i plarhte zoreles, kolla plarhte hoy hi ap o kheer, ninna kolla, hoy hi troul i glanstouni platsa, oun kol shelle, hoy hi kote an-pandlo;" 
Exodus35:19 o rashayengre kouč ripya, hoy o Aron oun leskre čave an-rivenn, te boudrenn le an o Debleskro kheer." 
Exodus35:20 Pal kova djan i tsele Israelitarya penge.
