Exodus35:21 Halauter, kolengre djia rhačan, oun kay kaman pendar čomone te dell, van oun anan čomone o baro Debleske, te vell leske i plarhteno kheer kerdo, kay i rashaya nay boudrenn leske, oun te nay krenn le ripya kolenge." 
Exodus35:22 Morsha oun djouvya anan pendar sonakaskro koova: sonakangre soubya, kanengre, goustria, verklia oun vavar sonakangre koola o baro Debleske." 
Exodus35:23 Kones kouč bakrengro bal his, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas, kova anas les pash o Moseste, ninna lačo layntikro than, bouzyengre balla, bakrengri ledertikre plarhte, hoy lolo kerdo van, oun vavar lače ledertikre plarhte." 
Exodus35:24 Kones roup, lolo saster, akatstikro kasht his, anas les o baro Debleske o boudepaske ap o Debleskro kheer." 
Exodus35:25 I tsele djouvya, kay hayvan mishto thaba dran kouč bakrengro bal te krell, kran kova oun anan yaake thaba, hoy blaueto, lolo, oun lolo har yag kerdo vas, ninna lačo layntikro than." 
Exodus35:26 Vavar djouvya, kay hayvan oun kaman thaba te krell dran bouzyengro bal, kran kova ninna." 
Exodus35:27 Kol deesh-te-douy pralstoune morsha, kay his i pralstoune pral kol deesh-te-douy bare familye, kay van o Israeleskre čavendar, kolla anan kouč barra, hoy kharenna Onyx, oun vavar kouč barra, te venn le ap o rashayeskri damdira oun ap o bečeskri possita kerdo." 
Exodus35:28 Ninna anan le momelengro djet oun ko koova, hoy mishto soungella, te vell lo rhačedo, ninna kouč soungepaskro koova, hoy vell an o makepaskro djet čiddo." 
Exodus35:29 Yaake anan i Israelitarya, morsha oun djouvya, kolengre djia rhačan, boud koova pendar, te vell koy tseli boudi kerdo, hoy o baro Devel o Moseske penas." 
Exodus35:30 O Mose penas ap o Israelitarya: “Shounenn, o baro Devel rodas o Bezalel vin. Leskro dad hi o Ouri, oun leskro papo hi o Hour, dran o kheer Youda." 
Exodus35:31 O baro Devel čivas peskro dourho an o Bezalel, oun das les gosvepen oun vasta, hoy hayvenn mishto te boudrell," 
Exodus35:32 te nay krell lo shoukar koova dran sonakay, roup oun lolo saster." 
Exodus35:33 Ninna hayvell lo kouč barra te činell oun an goustria te čivell. Ninna nay dell lo shoukar koova vin čourye dran kasht, yaake te nay krell lo hako shoukar koova." 
Exodus35:34 O Devel das les ninna o gosvepen an o dji, te sikrell lo i vavaren, har te krenn le kay boudi. Ko gosvepen das o baro Devel ninna o Oholiab. Koleskro dad hi o Ahisamak, dran o kheer Dan." 
Exodus35:35 O baro Devel das kol douyen, o Bezalel oun o Oholiab, o gosvepen, te hayvenn le mishto sonakaskro koova te krell, ninna shoukar plarhte dran lačo layntikro than oun dran kouč bakrengro bal, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas. Ninna nay sivenn le shoukar koova an kol kotya than. Yaake nay krenn le haki boudi, oun hayvenn, an pengro shero glan-vi te dikell, har te krenn le lat." 
Exodus36:1 O Bezalel, o Oholiab oun kol vavar, kolen o baro Devel o gosvepen oun vasta das, te hayvenn le mishto halauter te krell, hoy lo penas, kolla te krenn leske kanna i kheer oun kol tsele koola, hoy koy dren hi.”" 
Exodus36:2 O Mose kharas o Bezalel oun o Oholiab pash peste, ninna kol tsele vavaren, kay o baro Devel gosvepen an lengro dji das oun vasta, te boudrenn le mishto, oun kay van pendar, te krenn le koy boudi." 
Exodus36:3 Oun o Mose das len ko tselo kouč koova, hoy i Israelitarya anan, te krenn le o baro Debleske i kheer. Oun hako dives taysarlakro van le pale te pale pash o Moseste oun anan leske boudeder kouč koova pendar." 
Exodus36:4 Koy moukan i tsele boudepangre, kay ap o kheer boudrenn, pengri boudi čiddo, djan pash o Mose" 
Exodus36:5 oun penan: “Kol menshe anenn boudeder, har men hounte vell, te kras ko kheer, hoy o baro Devel penas te kras.”" 
Exodus36:6 Koy moukas o Mose ap i tseli platsa vi-gole te dell: “T'mer morsha oun djouvya, kek t'mendar hounte anenn bouder čomone o Debleskro khereske!” Yaake anan i Israelitarya bouder či." 
Exodus36:7 Vas boudeder har doha anlo, te vell i tseli boudi kerdo, hoy hounte krenn le." 
Exodus36:8 Yaake kran kol tsele boudepangre, kay hayvan mishto shoukar koova te krell, o Debleskro kheer dran deesh pesse plarhte. Kolla van sido dran lačo zorelo layntikro than, kay ninna kouč bakrengro bal dren hi. Kova his blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag. An kol plarhte van bolepangre dren sido an shoukar vastengri boudi." 
Exodus36:9 Haki plarhta his deesh-te-star metarya lengsto oun douy metarya bourhlo. 
Exodus36:10 Panč plarhte sivan le khetne, oun kol vavar panč ninna." 
Exodus36:11 Ap kol rigya, kay kol douy bare kotya khetne pandlo venn, sivan le doryengre goustria dran blaueto kouč bakrengro bal:" 
Exodus36:12 paash-sheel ap hako baro kotar, yaake te vell yek doryengri goustri vergel ko vavar." 
Exodus36:13 Pale kran le paash-sheel sonakangre rikepangre. Kolentsa pandan le kol douy bare kotya khetne. Yaake vas dran kol douy kotya yek kheer. 
Exodus36:14 Oun yon kran deesh-te-yek pesse plarhte dran bouzyengre balla, te venn le pral o kheer čiddo." 
Exodus36:15 Haki plarhta his deesh-te-panč metarya lengsto oun douy metarya bourhlo. 
Exodus36:16 Panč kolla plarhte van khetne sido, te vas yek baro kotar. Oun kolla vavar shob van ninna khetne sido, te vas i douyto baro kotar." 
Exodus36:17 Oun yon kran paash-sheel doryengre goustria ap hako baro kotar ap koy rig, kay kol douy bare kotya khetne pandlo venna." 
Exodus36:18 Ninna kran le paash-sheel sasterne rikepangre dran lolo saster, te venn kol douy bare kotya kolentsa khetne pandlo." 
Exodus36:19 Oun yon kran yek baro kotar dran bakrengri ledertikre plarhte, hoy le lolo kran, te čivenn le les pral o Debleskro plarhteno kheer, oun pral koleste i vavar kotar dran lače ledertikre plarhte." 
Exodus36:20 Oun yon kran činle kashta dran o kasht ko roukestar, hoy kharella Akatsia, te venn le pre tardo." 
Exodus36:21 Hako činlo kasht his panč metarya baro oun 75 (efta-deesh-te-panč) centimetarya bourhlo. 
Exodus36:22 Hako kashtes hi douy tikne goushte, kolentsa venn i činle kashta khetne rikedo. Yaake kran le i tsele činle kashta o khereske." 
Exodus36:23 Biish činle kashta kran le, te venn le ap koy rig tardo, kay o kham pralstounes hi." 
Exodus36:24 Oun yon kran star-desha roupene herya tella, tel hako kasht douy herya, kay i goushte dren čiddo venna." 
Exodus36:25 Ninna biish činle kashta kran le, te venn le ap koy vavar rig o kherestar tardo, kote, kay o kham gar vella." 
Exodus36:26 Tel kolende čivan le star-desha roupene herya, douy herya tel hako činlo kasht." 
Exodus36:27 I palstouni rigyake, koy rig, kay o kham tele djal, van shob činle kashta kerdo," 
Exodus36:28 oun douy vavar, hoy venn yaake khetne tardo, te krenn le serves oun čačes i ekka ap i palstouni rig o kherestar." 
Exodus36:29 Kol kashta venn tella oun pral i goushtentsa khetne rikedo. 
Exodus36:30 Yaake hi orhta činle kashta ap i palstouni rig oun deesh-te-shob roupene herya: tel hako činlo kasht douy herya. 
Exodus36:31 Oun yon kran pandepangre kashta dran o kasht ko roukestar, hoy kharella Akatsia, te čivenn le panč lendar ap kol činle kashta ap koy yek lengsti rig o kherestar," 
Exodus36:32 pale panč ap i činle kashta ap i vavar lengsti rig, oun pale panč ap i palstouni rig o kherestar kote, kay o kham tele djala." 
Exodus36:33 Oun yon kran ko mashkralstouno pandepaskro kasht, hoy djal mashkral ap i činle kashta yek rigyatar ap i vavar." 
Exodus36:34 Oun yon čivan sonakay troul i činle kashta. Ninna dran sonakay kran le lengre goustria, kay venn i pandepangre kashta dren činlo. Oun čivas ninna sonakay troul kolende." 
Exodus36:35 Oun yon kran i kotar lačo zorelo layntikro than, kay kouč bakrengro bal dren hi. Kova hi blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag. An ko kotar than van bolepangre dren sido an shoukar vastengri boudi." 
Exodus36:36 Oun yon činan star pesse kashta dran akatstikro kasht, te vell ko kotar than kote pre pandlo. Troul kol pesse kashta čivan le sonakay, oun kran star roupene herya tella. I rikepangre kran le dran sonakay." 
Exodus36:37 Oun yon kran i bari plarhta, te vell li an o voudar, kote kay yek dren djal an o kheer. Yon kran les an shoukar vastengri boudi dran lačo zorelo layntikro than, kay kouč bakrengro bal dren hi, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas." 
Exodus36:38 Ninna činan le panč pesse kashta dran akatstikro kasht, te vell koy plarhta kote pre pandlo. Pralstounes troul kol pesse kashta vas sonakay maklo, ninna troul kol shelle, hoy hidjrenn koy plarhta. Koy pashel kran le rikepangre. Tel kol panč pesse kashta kran le panč herya dran lolo saster." 
Exodus37:1 Oun o Bezalel kras ko morhton dran akatstikro kasht, 125 (sheel-te-biish-te-panč) centimetarya lengsto, oun 75 (efta-desha-te-panč) centimetarya bourhlo oun ninna yaake pral." 
Exodus37:2 Dren oun vin čivas lo lačo sonakay pre, oun kras i sonakaskro pandepen trouyel." 
Exodus37:3 Oun yob kras star sonakangre goustria oun čivas len ap hake star herya, douy ap haki rig." 
Exodus37:4 Ninna kras lo lengste kashta dran akatstikro kasht, čivas sonakay troul lende," 
Exodus37:5 oun čivas len an kol goustria, yaake te nay hidjrenn le ko morhton trouyel." 
Exodus37:6 Oun yob kras o pralstouno kotar, hoy čakrell o morhton dran lačo sonakay. Kova his 125 (sheel-te-biish-te-panč) centimetarya lengsto oun 75 (efta-desha-te-panč) centimetarya bourhlo." 
Exodus37:7 Oun yob kras douy bolepangre, hakenes dran yek kotar sonakay, oun čivas ko yekes glan ap o pralstouno kotar oun ko vavares palla ap o pralstouno kotar." 
Exodus37:8  
Exodus37:9 Oun kol bolepangre hadan pengre moussya pre oun čakran lentsa o pralstouno kotar. Oun lengre shere dikan pen an. Oun lengre yaka dikan tella ap o pralstouno kotar. 
Exodus37:10 Oun yob kras koy rhapaskri dran akatstikro kasht, yek metari lengsto, i paash metari bourhlo oun 75 (efta-desha-te-panč) centimetarya pral," 
Exodus37:11 oun čivas lačo sonakay troul late. Ninna čivas lo i sonakaskro pandepen troul late. 
Exodus37:12 Troul i rhapaskri čivas lo i tikno kasht ap haki rig, hoy i vast bourhlo hi. Oun troul ko tikno kasht vas ninna i sonakaskro pandepen." 
Exodus37:13 Oun yob kras star sonakangre goustria oun pandas len ap kol star herya," 
Exodus37:14 tel ko tikno kasht, hoy djal troul i rhapaskri, yaake te nay čivan le lengste kashta dren, te hidjrenn le koy rhapaskri." 
Exodus37:15 Oun yob činas kol lengste kashta dran akatstikro kasht, te nay hidjrenn le koy rhapaskri, oun čivas sonakay troul lende." 
Exodus37:16 Oun yob kras ninna ko tselo koova, hoy ap i rhapaskri vell, dran lačo sonakay: čare oun khore, an kolende i mool o Debleske dren anlo vell." 
Exodus37:17 Oun yob kras koy momelengri dran yek kotar lačo sonakay: Lakro piro oun ko mashkralstouno kotar oun kol čare. Ap kolende hi bloume, save, hoy pandlo hi oun save, hoy pre hi." 
Exodus37:18 Shob moussya djan dran i momelengri vin, triin ap yek rig oun triin ap i vavar rig." 
Exodus37:19 Ap haki moussi hi triin čare, hoy vin dikenn har bloume, save, hoy pandlo hi oun save, hoy pre hi." 
Exodus37:20 Ap ko mashkralstouno kotar hi star čare, hoy vin dikenn har i bloume, save, hoy hi pandlo, oun save, hoy hi pre." 
Exodus37:21 Hako kopo hi yek blouma, hoy pandlo hi, tel douy kol shob moussyendar, hoy dran o mashkralstouno kotar vin djan." 
Exodus37:22 Oun kol bloume oun i moussya hi leha khetne kerdo dran yek kotar lačo sonakay. 
Exodus37:23 Oun ninna dran lačo sonakay kras lo kol efta momlia, lengre činepangre, kolentsa i dorya an i momlia tele činlo venna, oun i čare, kay i momelengri čik dren vella." 
Exodus37:24 Les hounte vas yek centnari lačo sonakay, te krell lo kay momelengri oun lakro tselo koova." 
Exodus37:25 Yob kras ninna i bob dran akatstikro kasht. Koy pre vell soungepaskro koova rhačedo. Ko bob his i paash metari lengsto oun ninna yaake bourhlo oun yek metari pral. Ap hake star rigya, kote, kay le khetne venna, vas i kotar vin, hoy vin dikella har i shing." 
Exodus37:26 Yob čivas lačo sonakay troul o bob, pral pre oun ninna ap i star rigya oun ap i shinga. Oun čivas i sonakaskro pandepen troul o bob." 
Exodus37:27 Ap i douy rigya čivas lo douy sonakangre goustria tel o sonakaskro pandepen, te nay čivenn le lengste kashta dren oun yaake te hidjrenn le les." 
Exodus37:28 Oun kol lengste kashta kras lo dran akatstikro kasht, oun čivas sonakay troul lende." 
Exodus37:29 Oun yob kras o makepaskro djet, koleha yon o Debleskro koova dren makenn. Ninna kras lo ko kouč soungepaskro koova, hoy rhačedo vell. Kova lauter kras yob yaake har kolla, kay kova mishto hayvenna." 
Exodus38:1 Oun yob kras i sasterni rhačepaskri, kay venna firhe o Debleske rhačedo. Yob kras lat dran akatstikro kasht, douy-te-paash metarya lengsto oun ninna yaake bourhlo oun yek-te-paash metari pral. Pral i tseli rhačepaskri vas lolo saster dino. Ap haki pralstouni ekka vas i shing vin. Kol shinga van kerdo dran yek kotar kasht har i rhačepaskri." 
Exodus38:2  
Exodus38:3 Oun yob kras kol tsele koola dran lolo saster, kolentsa boudrenn le ap i sasterni rhačepaskri: i pirya, an kolende i yagakri čik dren vella, bare roya, čare, kay o rat dren vella, massengre forshette, yagakre čare." 
Exodus38:4 Oun yob kras i netsa dran lolo saster, hoy vas tella yaake an i sasterni rhačepaskri čiddo, te djal li paash pre har i sasterni rhačepaskri." 
Exodus38:5 Ap lakre star rigya, kote, kay i rigya khetne venna, čivas lo star goustria dran lolo saster, te venn an lende lengste kashta čiddo." 
Exodus38:6 Kolla kras lo dran akatstikro kasht, čivas lolo saster troul lende," 
Exodus38:7 oun čivas len an i goustria yaake, te nay hidjrenn le koy sasterni rhačepaskri. An late his či dren." 
Exodus38:8 Oun yob kras o thopaskro čaro dran lolo saster oun čivas les ap herya, hoy ninna dran lolo saster hi. Ko lolo saster las lo dran kol blendarya, hoy dan les kol djouvya, kay pash o voudar glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer pengri boudi kran." 
Exodus38:9 Oun yon kran kol layntikre kotya dran lačo zorelo than, hoy venn troul koy platsa pandlo, hoy hi glan o Debleskro kheer. Ninna kran le kol pesse kashta, mank kolende kol layntikre kotya pandlo venna. Ap koy rig, kay o kham pralstounes hi, hi koy platsa paash-sheel metarya baro. Kate rikrenn biish pesse kashta kol layntikre kotya. Kal pesse kashta venn tardo ap biish herya dran lolo saster. I rikepangre oun kol shelle, hoy rikrenn i layntikre kotya, kran le dran roup." 
Exodus38:10  
Exodus38:11 Koy rig, kay o kham gar vella, hi yaake baro har koy rig, kay o kham pralstounes hi: paash-sheel metarya lengsto. Ninna kate rikrenn biish pesse kashta kol layntikre kotya. Kal pesse kashta venn tardo ap biish herya dran lolo saster. I rikepangre oun kol shelle, hoy rikrenn i layntikre kotya, kran le dran roup." 
Exodus38:12 Ap i rig, kay o kham tele djal, hi koy platsa biish-te-panč metarya bourhlo. Kote venn i layntikre kotya ap deesh pesse kashta rikedo, hoy ap deesh herya tardo venn. I rikepangre oun i shelle, hoy rikrenn i layntikre kotya, kran le dran roup." 
Exodus38:13 Ninna glan o kheer, ap i rig, kay o kham pre djala, hi i platsa biish-te-panč metarya bourhlo." 
Exodus38:14 Mashkral hi i voudar. Ap koy yek rig hi efta-te-paash metarya: kote venn triin pesse kashta tardo ap triin herya. Ap koy vavar rig hi ninna efta-te-paash metarya: Kote venn ninna triin pesse kashta tardo ap triin herya. 
Exodus38:15  
Exodus38:16 I tsele layntikre kotya his dran lačo zorelo layntikro than. 
Exodus38:17 Oun i herya tel kol pesse kashta his dran lolo saster. Oun i rikepangre oun shelle, hoy rikrenn i layntikre kotya, his dran roup. Oun i pesse kashta, len his shere, kay roup troul čiddo his." 
Exodus38:18 Oun koy bari plarhta, hoy vell pandlo an o voudar glan i glanstouni platsa kran le an shoukar vastengri boudi dran lačo zorelo layntikro than, kay ninna kouč bakrengro bal dren hi. Kova his blaueto oun lolo oun lolo har yag. Koy plarhta his deesh metarya lengsto oun douy-te-paash metarya baro, yaake baro har ninna i vavar layntikre kotya hi, hoy troul i platsa pandlo venn." 
Exodus38:19 Koy pashel kran le star pesse kashta oun star herya dran lolo saster, ninna roupene rikepangre oun roupene shelle, hoy rikrenn koy bari plarhta. I pesse kashta, len hi shere, kay roup troul čiddo his." 
Exodus38:20 Ninna kol tikne kotya his dran lolo saster, hoy denn le an i phoub, te vell o plarhteno kheer oun i plarhte troul i platsa zoreles rikedo." 
Exodus38:21 O Bezalel, – leskro dad his o Ouri oun leskro papo o Hour, dran o kheer Youda – yob kras koy tseli boudi yaake, har o baro Devel kova o Moseske penas. Oun o Oholiab, – leskro dad hi o Ahisamak, dran o kheer Dan – yob vas leske pash o vast. Oun peskre vastentsa kras lo shoukar koova dran lolo saster, sonakay, roup oun kasht. Ninna hayvas lo mishto lačo layntikro than te krell, oun sivas shoukar koova dran kouč bakrengro bal dren, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag his. O Mose penas ap o Itamar, ko čavo o rashayestar Aron: “Pen ap i Levitarya, te činenn le lauter an i liil, hoy i Israelitarya khetne čivan, te krenn le o Debleskro kheer, – ko kheer, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi.”" 
Exodus38:22  
Exodus38:23  
Exodus38:24 Ko sonakay, hoy yon pendar dan, his boudeder har 29 (biish-te-enya) centnarya. Yek centnari his yaake boud har yek centnari an o Debleskro kheer pharo his." 
Exodus38:25 Ko roup, hoy vas khetne, har an i liil činlo vas, har boud morsha koy hi, ko roup his boudeder har 100 (sheel) centnarya. Yek centnari his yaake boud har yek centnari an o Debleskro kheer pharo his." 
Exodus38:26 I tsele morsha, kay phoureder his har biish bersha, his 603.550 (shob-sheel-te-triin-zerya-panč-sheel-te-panč-desha) morsha. Hakeno lendar das i paash roupeno kotar. Yek paash kotar roup his yaake boud har yek paash kotar roup an o Debleskro kheer pharo his." 
Exodus38:27 Sheel centnarya roup lan le oun kran lestar kol sheel herya, ap kolende i činle kashta tardo venna, ninna kolla, kay rikrenn o voudar dran o kouč kotar than. Haki roupeni heri his yek centnari pharo." 
Exodus38:28 Ko roup, hoy pral ačas, his yaake deesh-te-triin kilogramme. Kolestar kran le i goustria oun i shelle, hoy i layntikre kotya rikrenna. Ninna čivan le les troul i shere kol pesse kashtendar." 
Exodus38:29 Ko lolo saster, hoy i menshe pendar dan, his boudeder har efta-desha centnarya." 
Exodus38:30 Kolestar moukas o Bezalel kol herya te krell, ap kolende i pesse kashta tardo hi, hoy hi serves oun čačes pash o voudar. Ninna kran le kolestar koy sasterni rhačepaskri oun koy sasterni netsa, hoy koy pashel hi, oun i tsele koola, kolentsa i rashaya boudrenna." 
Exodus38:31 Dran o lolo saster kran le ninna i herya, ap kolende i pesse kashta troul i glanstouni platsa tardo venn, ninna i herya tel i pesse kashta pash o voudar glan i glanstouni platsa, oun ninna i tsele tikne kotya, hoy venn an i phoub dino, te rikrenn le zoreles ko kheer oun kol layntikre kotya troul i glanstouni platsa." 
Exodus39:1 Oun yon kran shoukar rashayengre ripya dran kouč bakrengro bal, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas, te rivell len o Aron pash peskri boudi an o Debleskro kheer. Yon kran kal ripya yaake har o baro Devel o Moseske penas, te krenn le len." 
Exodus39:2 O rashayeskri damdira kran le dran lačo zorelo layntikro than, kay sonakay dren sido vas, ninna kouč bakrengro bal, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas." 
Exodus39:3 Yon dan sonakangre kotya khetne, te venn le sano, oun činan len an tikne thaba, te nay sivenn le len an o lačo layntikro than oun mank o bakrengro bal, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas. Kova vas an lačo vastengri boudi kerdo." 
Exodus39:4 Palle lan le douy kotya than oun sivan len ap i damdira kote, kay i phika hi. Oun i damdira vas khetne pandlo." 
Exodus39:5 Ko pereskro pandepen vas yaake kerdo har i damdira: dran lačo zorelo layntikro than, kay sonakay dren sido vas, ninna kouč bakrengro bal, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas. I damdira oun lakro pandepen his dran yek kotar than. Yon kran kova yaake, har o baro Devel o Moseske penas." 
Exodus39:6 Oun yon lan douy kouč barra, hoy kharenna Onyx, oun čivan len an sonakangre goustria. Oun kolla morsha, kay hayvenn mishto laba an barra te činell, činan i laba kol Israeleskre čavendar an i barra dren." 
Exodus39:7 Oun yon kran kol barra ap i damdira pre, kote, kay i phika hi, te bistrell o baro Devel gar i Israelitarya. Yon kran kova yaake har o baro Devel o Moseske penas." 
Exodus39:8 Oun yon kran i shoukar bečeskri possita yaake har i damdira: dran lačo zorelo layntikro than, kay sonakangre thaba dren sido van, ninna kouč bakrengro bal, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas." 
Exodus39:9 Koy possita his yaake baro har bourhlo oun vas douy kope khetne lino. Haki rig his biish-te-panč centimetarya baro. 
Exodus39:10 Oun yon kran deesh-te-douy kouč barra ap koy possita pre: hako kopo triin barra tel i vavar: pralstounes kol barra, hoy kharenna Rubin, Topas oun Smaragdo." 
Exodus39:11 Tel kolende kol barra, hoy kharenna Karfunkel, Safiro, oun Diamanto." 
Exodus39:12 Tel kolende kol barra, hoy kharenna Hiazint, Agat, oun Ametist." 
Exodus39:13 Telstounes kol barra, hoy kharenna: Krisolit, Onyx oun Yaspis. Hako bar his čiddo an i sonakaskri goustri." 
Exodus39:14 An kol barra van i laba dre-činlo kol deesh-te-douy Israeleskre čavendar, kolendar i deesh-te-douy bare familye venn. Ap hako bar his yek lab." 
Exodus39:15 Ap i bečeskri possita kran le tikne dorya dran lačo sonakay, hoy khetne lino his har i lengste balla i djouvyatar." 
Exodus39:16 Ninna kran le douy tikne sonakangre goustria oun douy vavar sonakangre goustria. Kolen sivan le serves oun čačes ap i pralstouni rig ap i possita. 
Exodus39:17 Oun čivan kol douy sonakangre dorya yek rigyah an kol douy sonakangre goustria ap i possita. 
Exodus39:18 Koy vavar rig čivan le an kol tikne sonakangre goustria, hoy ap kol kotya hi, hoy glanstounes ap i damdira sido hi, kote, kay i phika hi." 
Exodus39:19 Palle kran le douy vavar sonakangre goustria oun sivan len dren an i possita ap i telstouni rig, kote, kay i possita ap i damdira sido hi." 
Exodus39:20 Oun palle kran le douy vavar sonakangre goustria oun čivan len ap kol douy kotya, hoy kote ap i damdira sido hi, kay i phika hi. Oun sivan len ap i glanstouni rig kote, kay kol kotya khetne lino hi, pral o pereskro pandepen, hoy rikrell i damdira khetne." 
Exodus39:21 Palle čivan le i dori dran blaueto kouč bakrengro bal an kol douy goustria, hoy ap o bečeskri possita hi, oun pandan lat yaake ap i goustria ap i damdira, te hi li zoreles rikedo pral o pereskro pandepen, hoy rikrell i damdira khetne. Kova kran le yaake har o baro Devel o Moseske penas." 
Exodus39:22 Koy pashel kran le i baya, hoy rivell o rashay tel i damdira. Oun koy tseli baya kran le dran blaueto kouč bakrengro bal." 
Exodus39:23 Pral moukan le lat pre, te vell nay o shero vin. Troul i meen sivan le lat zoreles yaake har pash i ledertikri baya, te nay djal li gar paash." 
Exodus39:24 Telstounes troul i tseli baya kran le tikne phabya dran lače zorele layntikre thaba oun kouč bakrengro bal, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas." 
Exodus39:25 Ninna kran le tikne bashepangre dran lačo sonakay oun čivan len yaake mank i phabya," 
Exodus39:26 te vell yek phabi, palle yek bashepaskri, palle yek phabi, oun yaake troul i tseli baya. Kay baya rivell o rashay te djal lo an o Debleskro kheer. Lauter kran le yaake har o baro Devel o Moseske penas." 
Exodus39:27 O Aroneske oun leskre čavenge kran le ninna i gada, o shereskro pandepen, i rashayengre stadja, oun i telstoune rholopya dran lačo zorelo layntikro than." 
Exodus39:28  
Exodus39:29 Oun o Aroneske kran le i pereskro pandepen an shoukar vastengri boudi dran lačo zorelo layntikro than, kay ninna kouč bakrengro bal dren hi, hoy blaueto, lolo oun lolo har yag kerdo vas. Lauter kran le yaake har o baro Devel o Moseske penas." 
Exodus39:30 An i tikno kotar lačo sonakay činan le kol laba: “Kova hi o baro Debleske”, oun pandan ko kotar sonakay ap i dori dran blaueto kouč bakrengro bal glan ap o Aroneskro shereskro pandepen. Kova vas kerdo yaake har o baro Devel o Moseske penas." 
Exodus39:31  
Exodus39:32 Yaake vas koy tseli boudi kerdo: kol tsele kotya o Debleskro plarhteno khereske, oun lauter, hoy koy pashel hi. I Israelitarya kran lauter yaake, har o baro Devel o Moseske penas." 
Exodus39:33 Oun yon anan lauter pash o Moseste: kol plarhte o Debleskro khereske oun leskre tsele koola: rikepangre, činle kashta, pandepangre kashta, oun pesse kashta ap herya;" 
Exodus39:34 kol plarhte, hoy čakrenn o kheer: ko kotar dran bakrengri ledertikre plarhte, hoy le lolo kran oun ko vavar kotar dran lače ledertikre plarhte. Ninna anan le ko kouč kotar than o voudareske;" 
Exodus39:35 ko morhton, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi, oun leskre hidjepaskre kashta, oun o pralstouno kotar, hoy čakrell o morhton oun hoy sikrella, kay o Devel peskre menshenge lačo hi;" 
Exodus39:36 koy rhapaskri oun lauter, hoy pashel hi, ninna i Debleskre mare;" 
Exodus39:37 koy momelengri dran lačo sonakay oun lakre momlia oun lauter, hoy pashel hi, oun lakro djet;" 
Exodus39:38 ko sonakaskro bob, kay o soungepaskro koova rhačedo vella; ko makepaskro djet; ko soungepaskro koova, hoy rhačedo vell; koy bari plarhta glan o khereskro voudar;" 
Exodus39:39 koy sasterni rhačepaskri, kay firhe rhačedo venna o Debleske, koy sasterni netsa, lakre hidjepaskre kashta oun i tsele koola, hoy koy pashel hi; ko thopaskro čaro oun leskre herya;" 
Exodus39:40 kolla layntikre kotya oun pesse kashta ap herya, hoy troul i glanstouni platsa hi; oun koy plarhta o voudareske ap i glanstouni platsa; kol tikne sasterne kotya, hoy denn le an i phoub, te rikrenn le o plarhteno kheer zoreles, oun kol shelle, hoy hi kote an-pandlo; ninna kol tsele koola, hoy kolen hounte vell, kay boudrenn an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer." 
Exodus39:41 Ninna anan le i rashayengre kouč ripya, hoy o Aron oun leskre čave an-rivenn, te boudrenn le an o Debleskro kheer." 
Exodus39:42 Yaake har o baro Devel o Moseske penas, kran i Israelitarya i tseli boudi." 
Exodus39:43 Oun o Mose dikas kova lauter oun hayvas, yon kran lauter yaake har o baro Devel penas. Oun yob rakras o Debleskri barht pral lende vin." 
Exodus40:1 O baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Exodus40:2 Čip o Debleskro plarhteno kheer pre ap o ersto dives an o ersto čon. 
Exodus40:3 Oun čip ko morhton dren, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi. Glan o morhton pande ko kouč kotar than pre!" 
Exodus40:4 An ninna koy rhapaskri dren oun čip i Debleskre mare pre! Ninna koy momelengri čip an o kheer, oun čip i momlia pre." 
Exodus40:5 Glan o morhton, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi, čip o sonakaskro bob, kay soungepaskro koova rhačedo vella! Oun an o voudar pande koy bari plarhta pre!" 
Exodus40:6 Glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer čip i sasterni rhačepaskri, kay i firhe o Debleske rhačedo venna." 
Exodus40:7 Mank o kheer oun i sasterni rhačepaskri čip o thopaskro čaro oun čore pani dren! 
Exodus40:8 Troul i platsa glan o kheer čip i pesse kashta pre, oun pande kol layntikre kotya mank lende! Oun an o voudar glan i platsa pande koy bari plarhta pre!" 
Exodus40:9 Le ko makepaskro djet oun mak leha o kheer oun lauter, hoy koy dren hi, te vell lo o Debleske!" 
Exodus40:10 Mak ninna i sasterni rhačepaskri oun lakre tsele koola, te vell li o Debleske oun leske kokres!" 
Exodus40:11 Mak ninna o thopaskro čaro oun kol herya, ap kolende o čaro tardo hi, te vell lauter o Debleske." 
Exodus40:12 Pen o Aroneske oun leskre čavenge, te venn le glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer, oun thob len!" 
Exodus40:13 Rib o Aroneske o rashayeskre ripya an, mak les o djeteha, te vell lo miro rashay." 
Exodus40:14 An ninna leskre čave koy oun rib lenge i rashayengre gada an! 
Exodus40:15 Oun mak len o djeteha yaake har makal lengro dad, te venn le mire rashaya. Yon oun lengre čave pal lende te venn le maklo o djeteha, te venn le mire rashaya hako tsireske." 
Exodus40:16 O Mose kras lauter har o baro Devel leske penas. 
Exodus40:17 Yaake vas o Debleskro kheer pre tardo an o douyto bersh ap o ersto dives an o ersto čon. 
Exodus40:18 O Mose čivas i činle kashta ap herya oun pandas len i pandepangre kashtentsa khetne. Palle van i pesse kashta pre tardo. 
Exodus40:19 Oun koy pral čivas lo kol douy ledertikre plarhte, hoy čakrenn o kheer. Lauter kras lo yaake har o baro Devel leske penas." 
Exodus40:20 Oun yob las i barra, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren činlo hi, oun čivas len an o sonakaskro morhton, oun čivas i hidjepaskre kashta an i goustria ap o morhton. Oun pral ap o sonakaskro morhton čivas lo o pralstouno kotar, hoy sikrella, kay o baro Devel peskre menshenge lačo hi." 
Exodus40:21 Oun yob anas o morhton an o kheer oun pandas ko kouč kotar than glan o morhton, te vell lo gar diklo. Yob kras kova yaake, har o baro Devel leske penas." 
Exodus40:22 Oun yob anas i rhapaskri an o kheer oun čivas lat glan o kouč kotar than ap i servi rig," 
Exodus40:23 oun čivas o Debleskre mare pre glan o baro Debleste. Yob kras kova yaake har o baro Devel leske penas. 
Exodus40:24 Ap i čači rig an o kheer, vergel i rhapaskri, čivas lo i momelengri," 
Exodus40:25 oun čivas i momlia pre yaake har o baro Devel leske penas. 
Exodus40:26 Glan o kouč kotar than čivas lo o sonakaskro bob," 
Exodus40:27 oun rhačras ap leste kouč soungepaskro koova. Yob kras les yaake har o baro Devel leske penas. 
Exodus40:28 An o khereskro voudar pandas lo koy bari plarhta. 
Exodus40:29 Vin glan o khereskro voudar čivas lo i sasterni rhačepaskri, oun ap leste rhačras lo firhen oun rhapen o baro Debleske, yaake har yob leske penas." 
Exodus40:30 Mank o kheer oun i sasterni rhačepaskri čivas lo o thopaskro čaro oun čoras pani dren thopaske. 
Exodus40:31 Oun o Mose, o Aron oun leskre čave thovan pengre vasta oun herya koy dren." 
Exodus40:32 Yon hounte thovenn pen hako kopo, kay djan le an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer oun pash i sasterni rhačepaskri. Yaake penas kova o baro Devel o Moseske." 
Exodus40:33 Oun troul o kheer oun i sasterni rhačepaskri čivas lo i pesse kashta pre oun pandas kol layntikre kotya mank lende, te vas i platsa. Oun an o voudar glan i platsa čivas lo koy bari plarhta. Yaake kras o Mose koy tseli boudi." 
Exodus40:34 Koy vas i folka ap o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. Oun o kheer vas pherdo raylepen o baro Deblestar. 
Exodus40:35 Oun har i folka pral o kheer ačas oun o kheer pherdo raylepen o baro Deblestar his, nay djas o Mose gar dren." 
Exodus40:36 Hako kopo, kay hadas pes i folka, djan i Israelitarya doureder yaake rah, har his le ap pengro drom an o moulo tato them." 
Exodus40:37 Te ačas i folka pral o Debleskro kheer, ačan le kote oun djan gar doureder yaake rah bis te hadas li pes." 
Exodus40:38 Oun i tsele Israelitarya dikan koy folka. Ap o dives his li pral o Debleskro kheer, ap i rat his li pherdi yag yaake rah har i Israelitarya ap o drom his." 
Leviticus1:1 Oun o baro Devel das o Moses gole, oun rakras dran o Debleskro plarhteno kheer vin oun penas:" 
Leviticus1:2 Rake i Israelentsa oun pen lenge: Te kamell i mensho t'mendar i firhes o baro Debleske te anell, palle lell lo yekes peskre groumyendar, peskre bakrendar oder peskre bouzyendar." 
Leviticus1:3 Te kamell lo leske i groumni te anell, te vell li leske tseles rhačedo, palle hounte lell lo i morshkani groumni, hoy gar nasselo hi. Oun yob anell lat glan o voudar o Debleskro plarhteno kherestar, te dikell o baro Devel lačes ap leste." 
Leviticus1:4 Oun o morsh čivell peskro vast ap o shero ko firhestar, te dikell o Devel lačes ap leste oun lell leskri doosh, hoy lo ap peste las, krik." 
Leviticus1:5 Palle marell lo kay groumni glan o baro Debleskro kheer. Oun kol rashaya dran o kheer Aron lenn o rat oun čorenn les troul o Debleskri rhačepaskri ap leskre star rigya. Kay rhačepaskri hi tardo glan o voudar o plarhteno kherestar. 
Leviticus1:6 Oun ko morsh, kay anas ko firhes, tserdell leske i hauta tele oun činell les an kotya." 
Leviticus1:7 Oun i rashaya dran o kheer Aron krenn i yag ap i rhačepaskri oun čivenn kasht ap koy yag," 
Leviticus1:8 palle čivenn le kol kotya mass ap kava kasht, ninna o shero oun o thulepen." 
Leviticus1:9 I bouke oun i herya hounte van thodo. Kova krell ko morsh, kay anas ko firhes. Oun o rashay moukell halauter ap i rhačepaskri pre te rhačrell. Yaake hounte vell i firho anlo glan o Debleste, hoy vell leske tseles rhačedo. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy vell vin, soungell mishto o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus1:10 Te kamell yek i bakro oder i bouzni o baro Debleske te anell, te vell ko firho tseles leske rhačedo, palle anell lo i morshkano firho, hoy gar nasselo hi." 
Leviticus1:11 Oun yob marell les glan o baro Debleste pash koy rhačepaskri, ap koy rig, kay norden hi. Oun i rashaya dran o kheer Aron lenn o rat oun čorenn les troul o Debleskri rhačepaskri ap leskre star rigya." 
Leviticus1:12 Oun ko morsh činell les an kotya, thovell i bouke oun i herya o panyeha. Oun o rashay čivell kol kotya mass, ninna o shero oun o thulepen ap o kasht pral koy yag, hoy ap i rhačepaskri hi. Oun moukell halauter pre te rhačrell. Yaake hounte vell i firho anlo glan o Debleste, hoy vell leske tseles rhačedo. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy vell vin, soungell mishto o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus1:13  
Leviticus1:14 Te kamell yek i čirklo o baro Debleske te anell, te vell ko čirklo tseles leske rhačedo, palle anell lo i divyi tauba oder i vavar tauba." 
Leviticus1:15 Oun o rashay anell koy tauba pash i rhačepaskri oun phagell lake o shero tele, rhačrell o shero ap i rhačepaskri, oun moukell o čirkleskro rat vin ratell ap i rig foun i rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus1:16 Leskri meen oun kova, hoy an late hi, vitsrell lo vin ap i yagakri čik, hoy pash o rhačepaskri čiddo hi ap koy rig, kay o kham pre djal." 
Leviticus1:17 Palle taprell o rashay o čirkleskre moussya oun tserdell o čirkles pre, oun rhačrell les ap i kasht pral i yag, hoy ap i rhačepaskri hi. Yaake hounte vell i čirklo anlo glan o Debleste, hoy vell leske tseles rhačedo. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy vell vin, soungell mishto o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus2:1 Te kamell yek i rhapen dran djob glan o baro Debleste te anell, palle anell lo lačo yarro oun čorell djet pral vergel oun čivell soungepaskro koova koy pral." 
Leviticus2:2 Oun yob anell kova pash i rashayende dran o kheer Aron. Yek lendar lell i vast pherdo yarro o djeteha oun ko tselo soungepaskro koova, oun moukell kova ap i rhačepaskri te rhačrell. Kova sikrell, kay ko tselo rhapen, hoy anlo vas, o Debleske hi. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy vell vin, soungell mishto o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus2:3 Kova, hoy o yarrestar o djeteha pral ačell, hi o Aroneske oun leskre čavenge. Kova hi i Debleskro rhapen oun hi i rashayenge kokres." 
Leviticus2:4 Te kameh i rhapen glan o baro Debleste te anell, hoy peklo hi an i bob, palle an čomone, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi, nay venn merklia dran lačo yarro khetne kerdo djeteha, nay venn sane mare, hoy djet pral maklo vell." 
Leviticus2:5 Te kameh i merkli te anell, hoy peklo hi ap i sasterno čaro, palle le yarro, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi, oun hoy kerdo hi o djeteha." 
Leviticus2:6 Tou phagess koy merkli an kotya oun čoress djet pral. Yaake hounte vell i rhapen dran djob anlo glan o Debleste. 
Leviticus2:7 Te kameh i rhapen glan o baro Debleste te anell, hoy hi keredo an i piri, palle kre les dran lačo yarro, kerdo o djeteha." 
Leviticus2:8 oun an kova glan o baro Debleste, oun de les o rashayeste. Oun kova hidjrell les glan o Debleskri rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus2:9 Oun o rashay lell čomone lestar oun rhačrell les ap i rhačepaskri. Kova sikrell, kay ko tselo rhapen, hoy anlo vas, o Debleske hi. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy vell vin, soungell mishto o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus2:10 Kova, hoy pral ačell, hi o Aroneske oun leskre čavenge. Kova hi i Debleskro rhapen, oun hi i rashayenge kokres." 
Leviticus2:11 Ko tselo rhapen dran djob, hoy yek o baro Debleske anell, an koleste hounte vell kek shoutlo yarro. T'mer hounte denn kek shoutlo yarro, vitar kek gvin an ko rhapen, hoy rhačrenn o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus2:12 Ap ko tsiro, kay anenn o nevo djob o baro Debleske, nay anenn t'mer shoutlo yarro oun gvin, – ap leskri rhačepaskri nay rhačrenn kova gar. Kova hi kek koova, hoy rhačedo vell, te soungell lo lačes o Debleske." 
Leviticus2:13 Ko tselo rhapen, hoy tou o baro Debleske aneh, hounte vell londo. Ko loon hi i sikepen, kay kova, hoy o Devel t'mentsa vin kras, hako tsiro ačell. Doleske aneh leske kek rhapen dran djob, vitar kek firhen, kay kek loon pashel kerdo vas." 
Leviticus2:14 Te kameh tou tiro nevo djob glan o baro Debleste te anell, palle le ko djob oun peke les pral i yag, oun kre les tikno oun an les glan o Debleste!" 
Leviticus2:15 Čore djet koy pre oun čip soungepaskro koova pre. Yaake hounte vell i rhapen dran djob, hoy glan o baro Debleste anlo vell." 
Leviticus2:16 O rashay lell i kotar kol djobendar oun djetestar tele, oun rhačrell kova khetne ko tselo soungepaskro koova. Kova hi i sikepen, kay ko tselo djob, hoy anlo vas, o baro Debleske hi." 
Leviticus3:1 Te kamell yek o baro Debleske i groumyat te anell, hoy rhan i menshe khetne glan leste, palle nay vell ko firho i morsh groumni har ninna i djouvel groumni. Kava firho hounte vell gar nasselo." 
Leviticus3:2 Yob čivell peskro vast ap o firheskro shero oun marell les glan o voudar o Debleskro plarhteno kherestar. Oun i rashaya dran o kheer Aron lenn o rat oun čorenn les troul o Debleskri rhačepaskri ap leskre star rigya. 
Leviticus3:3 I feteder kotya o firhestar venn rhačedo o baro Debleske. Kal kotya hi: o thulepen, hoy ap oun pral i bouke hi," 
Leviticus3:4 kol douy nire oun ko thulepen, hoy ap lende hi, ninna ko thoullo kotar, hoy ap i lebra hi. Pash i nire hounte vell lo tele činlo." 
Leviticus3:5 Oun i rashaya dran o kheer Aron rhačrenn kova lauter ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri, ap ko kasht, hoy pral i yag hi. Yon rhačrenn kova khetne ko vavar firheha, hoy vell o Debleske tseles rhačedo. Oun o soungepen, hoy vell vin, soungell mishto o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus3:6 Te kamell yek o baro Debleske i bakro oder i bouzni te anell, hoy rhan i menshe khetne glan leste, palle nay vell ko firho i morshengro firho har ninna i djouvyengro firho. Kava firho hounte vell sasto." 
Leviticus3:7 Te kamell lo i bakro te anell glan o baro Debleste," 
Leviticus3:8 palle čivell yob peskro vast ap leskro shero oun marell les glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. Oun i rashaya lenn o rat oun čorenn les troul o Debleskri rhačepaskri vin. 
Leviticus3:9 I feteder kotya o firhestar venn rhačedo o baro Debleske. Kal kotya hi: o thulepen, i thoulli pori, tele činlo pash o palstouno kokalo, ninna ko thulepen ap oun pral i bouke," 
Leviticus3:10 kol douy nire, oun ko thulepen, hoy ap lende hi, ninna ko thoullo kotar ap i lebra. Pash i nire hounte vell lo tele činlo." 
Leviticus3:11 Oun o rashay rhačrell kova lauter ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri. Kolla hi kol kotya o firhestar, hoy o baro Debleske hi." 
Leviticus3:12 Te kamell lo i bouzni te anell glan o baro Debleste," 
Leviticus3:13 palle čivell yob peskro vast ap lakro shero oun marell lat glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. Oun i rashaya lenn o rat oun čorenn les troul o Debleskri rhačepaskri ap leskre star rigya. 
Leviticus3:14 I feteder kotya o firhestar venn rhačedo o baro Debleske. Kal kotya hi: o thulepen, hoy ap oun pral i bouke hi," 
Leviticus3:15 kol douy nire, oun ko thulepen, hoy ap lende hi, ninna ko thoullo kotar ap i lebra. Pash i nire hounte vell lo tele činlo." 
Leviticus3:16 Oun o rashay rhačrell kova lauter ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri. Kolla hi kol kotya o firhestar, hoy o baro Debleske hi. Oun o soungepen, hoy vell vin, soungell leske mishto. O tselo thulepen hi o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus3:17 Kek t'mendar hounte rhal o thulepen oun o rat. Ap kova hounte rikrenn t'men oun t'mare čave kanna oun hako tsiro, kay t'mer ninna djivenna." 
Leviticus4:1 O baro Devel rakras ap o Mose oun penas: 
Leviticus4:2 Rake i Israelentsa oun pen lenge: Te kras yek čomone, hoy hounte krals lo gar, anas lo doosh ap peste, ninna te djinas yob gar, te penas o baro Devel: Ma kre kova!" 
Leviticus4:3 Te hi kova o pralstouno rashay, kay rikras pes gar ap o Debleskro lab, oun anas yaake doosh ap i tsele Israelitaryen, palle lell lo i terno gouroum, hoy gar nasselo hi, oun anell les o baro Debleske, te vell leskri doosh, hoy lo ap peste anas, krik lino." 
Leviticus4:4 Oun yob anell ko gouroum glan o baro Debleste, pash o voudar glan o Debleskro kheer, oun čivell peskro vast ap o firheskro shero oun marell les kote glan o baro Debleste." 
Leviticus4:5 Oun o pralstouno rashay lell o ratestar oun hidjrell les an o plarhteno kheer. 
Leviticus4:6 Yob čivell peskro goushto an ko rat, oun vitsrell efta kope ko ratestar glan o layntikro kotar than, hoy hi glan o Debleskri kouč isema." 
Leviticus4:7 Ninna makell lo ko ratestar ap i shinga, hoy ap i star ekke o bobestar hi, kay o soungepaskro koova rhačedo vell. Ko bob hi tardo an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. O tselo vavar rat čorell lo vin tella pash koy rhačepaskri, kay i firhe rhačedo venna. Koy rhačepaskri hi tardo vin glan o voudar o Debleskro plarhteno kherestar." 
Leviticus4:8 Palle činell lo o tselo thulepen dran ko firho vin: ko thulepen hoy ap oun pral i bouke hi," 
Leviticus4:9 kol douy nire oun ko thulepen, hoy ap lende hi, ninna ko thoullo kotar, hoy ap i lebra hi. Pash i nire hounte činell lo les tele." 
Leviticus4:10 Kava vell yaake kerdo har kova kerdo vell pash ko firheste, hoy yek glan o Debleste anell, te rhan le les khetne. Oun ko rashay rhačrell kal kotya ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus4:11 Kol tsele vavar kotya ko gouroumestar, leskri hauta, leskro tselo mass, leskro shero, leskre herya, leskre bouke oun hoy koy dren hi," 
Leviticus4:12 kova lauter hidjrell lo vin, krik dran koy platsa, kay i menshe hi. Oun anell kova ap i djoudji platsa, kote kay i yagakri čik vin čoredo vell. Kote rhačrell lo lauter an i yag dran kasht." 
Leviticus4:13 Te kran i tsele Israelitarya čomone, hoy gar čačo his glan o Debleskre yaka, anan le doosh ap pende, ninna te djinan le gar, te penas o baro Devel, te krenn le kova gar." 
Leviticus4:14 Te hayvenn le pal i tsiro, kay kova, hoy yon kran, gar čačo his glan o Debleskre yaka, palle hounte anenn le i terno gouroum o baro Debleske, te vell lengri doosh krik lino. Yon hounte anenn les glan o voudar o Debleskro plarhteno kherestar." 
Leviticus4:15 Oun i phoureder lendar čivenn pengre vasta ap o firheskro shero oun marenn les kote glan o baro Debleste. 
Leviticus4:16 Oun o pralstouno rashay lell o ratestar oun hidjrell les an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. 
Leviticus4:17 Yob čivell peskro goushto an ko rat, oun vitsrell efta kope ko ratestar glan o layntikro kotar than, hoy hi glan o Debleskri kouč isema, kay o baro Devel djivell." 
Leviticus4:18 Ninna makell lo ko ratestar ap i shinga, hoy ap i star ekke o bobestar hi, kay o soungepaskro koova rhačedo vell. Ko bob hi tardo glan o baro Debleste an leskro plarhteno kheer. O tselo vavar rat čorell lo vin tella pash koy rhačepaskri, kay i firhe rhačedo venna. Koy rhačepaskri hi tardo vin glan o voudar o Debleskro plarhteno kherestar." 
Leviticus4:19 Palle činell lo o tselo thulepen dran ko firho vin oun rhačrell les ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri. 
Leviticus4:20 Oun yob krell kava firheha yaake har yob kova ko firheha kras, hoy yob peskri doshake maras. Yaake krell o rashay, te vell lauter pale mishto mank i Israelitarya oun o baro Debleste. Oun o baro Devel bistrell lengri doosh." 
Leviticus4:21 Kova, hoy kava gouroumestar pral ačas, anell yob vin, krik dran koy platsa, kay i menshe hi, oun rhačrell les yaake har yob kova rhačras, hoy ko gouroumestar pral ačas, hoy yob peskri doshake maras. Yaake hounte vell i gouroumeha kerdo, hoy maredo vell, te vell i doosh i tsele Israelendar krik lino." 
Leviticus4:22 Te kras i pralstouno čomone, hoy hounte krals lo gar, anas lo doosh ap peste, ninna te djinas yob gar, te penas o baro Devel: Ma kre kova!" 
Leviticus4:23 Te hayvell lo pal i tsiro, kay kova, hoy lo kras, gar čačo hi glan o Debleskre yaka, palle hounte anell lo leske i morsh bouzni, hoy gar nasselo hi." 
Leviticus4:24 Oun čivell peskro vast ap o firheskro shero oun marell les glan o baro Debleste, kote kay i firhe maredo venn, hoy o Debleske rhačedo venn. Yaake vell i firheha kerdo, hoy maredo vell, te vell i doosh krik lino." 
Leviticus4:25 Oun o rashay lell peskro goushteha ko ratestar oun makell les ap i shinga, hoy ap i star ekke pral ap koy rhačepaskri hi, kay i firhe rhačedo venna. O tselo vavar rat čorell lo vin tella pash i rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus4:26 Oun o tselo thulepen rhačrell lo ap i rhačepaskri yaake, har rhačrell lo o thulepen ko firhestar, hoy yek o Debleske anell, te rhan le les khetne glan leste. Yaake krell o rashay, te vell lauter pale mishto mank o pralstuneste oun o baro Debleste. Oun o baro Devel bistrell leskri doosh." 
Leviticus4:27 Te kras yek i Israelendar čomone, hoy hounte krals lo gar, anas lo doosh ap peste, ninna te djinas yob gar, te penas o baro Devel: Ma kre kova!" 
Leviticus4:28 Te hayvell lo pal i tsiro, kay kova hoy lo kras, gar čačo hi glan o Debleskre yaka, palle hounte anell lo leske i bouzni, hoy gar nasselo hi. Kova hounte krell lo, te vell leskri doosh krik lino." 
Leviticus4:29 Oun yob hounte čivell peskro vast ap o firheskro shero oun marell les kote kay i firhe maredo venn, hoy rhačedo venn o Debleske." 
Leviticus4:30 Oun o rashay lell peskro goushteha ko ratestar oun makell les ap i shinga, hoy ap i star ekke pral ap koy rhačepaskri hi, kay i firhe rhačedo venna. O tselo vavar rat čorell lo vin tella pash i rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus4:31 Oun o tselo thulepen činell lo tele, yaake har činell lo o thulepen tele ko firhestar, hoy yek o Debleske anell, te rhan le les khetne glan leste. Oun ko rashay rhačrell kal thoulle kotya ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri, te vell i lačo soungepen vin, hoy baro Debleske mishto soungella. Yaake krell o rashay, te vell lauter pale mishto mank ko mensheste oun o baro Debleste. Oun o baro Devel bistrell leskri doosh." 
Leviticus4:32 Te kamell yek i bakro o Debleske te anell, te vell leskri doosh krik lino, palle anell lo i bakri, hoy gar nasselo hi," 
Leviticus4:33 oun čivell peskro vast ap o firheskro shero, oun marell les kote, kay i firhe maredo venn, hoy o Debleske rhačedo venn. Kova hounte krell lo, te vell leskri doosh krik lino." 
Leviticus4:34 Oun o rashay lell peskro goushteha ko ratestar oun makell les ap i shinga, hoy ap i star ekke pral ap koy rhačepaskri hi, kay i firhe rhačedo venna. O tselo vavar rat čorell lo vin tella pash i rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus4:35 Oun o tselo thulepen činell lo tele yaake har činell lo o thulepen tele ko bakrestar, hoy yek o Debleske anell, te rhan le les khetne glan leste. Oun ko rashay rhačrell kal thoulle kotya ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri khetne ko vavar masseha, hoy o baro Debleske rhačedo vell. Yaake krell o rashay, te vell lauter pale mishto mank o baro Debleste oun ko mensheste, kay doosh ap peste anas. Oun o baro Devel bistrell leskri doosh." 
Leviticus5:1 Te vell yek glan i čačepangre anlo, te penell lo, hoy lo dikas oun shounas, oun yob rikrell kova peske, oun penell či, ninna te dikas oder shounas lo, hoy koy his. Palle anas lo i doosh ap peste oun hounte hidjrell lat." 
Leviticus5:2 Te taprell yek čomone an, hoy pale-čiddo hi, nay vell i moulo divyo firho, nay vell i vavar moulo firho, ninna i tikno moulo firho, hoy djal pral i phoub, palle hi lo pale-čiddo, oun anas doosh ap peste, ninna te hayvas lo gar, hoy lo kras." 
Leviticus5:3 Ninna te taprell lo ap i mensheste, kay hi pale-čiddo, hoy kova ninna hi, palle anas lo doosh ap peste, ninna te hayvas lo gar, hoy lo kras." 
Leviticus5:4 Te dell yek pes sovel, yaake te rakrell leskro mouy sik, oun yob hayvell pal i tsiro, hoy lo kras, – hi yek, te hi kova, hoy lo penas, lačo oder čilačo leske – palle anas lo i doosh ap peste." 
Leviticus5:5 Te anas yob yaake te yaake doosh ap peste, palle hounte penell lo, havo koova yob kras." 
Leviticus5:6 Koy doshake hounte anell lo o baro Debleske i bakri oder i bouzni, oun marell lat, te vell leskri doosh krik lino. Oun o rashay lell ko firho oun rhačrell leskro thulepen, oun yaake krell lo, te vell lauter pale mishto mank ko mensheste oun o baro Debleste." 
Leviticus5:7 Te hi ko morsh čorvelo oun nay anell kek bakri vitar kek bouzni, nay anell lo douy taube. Kolla nay hi douy divye taube oder douy vavar taube, yek, te vell i doosh krik lino, oun yek, hoy o baro Debleske tseles rhačedo vell." 
Leviticus5:8 Yob anell len pash o rashayeste. Oun kova anell glanstounes koy tauba hoy i doshake anlo vas, oun phagell lake i meen, o shero tele činell lo lake gar." 
Leviticus5:9 Yob vitsrell ko ratestar ap i rig foun i rhačepaskri, oun moukell o tselo vavar rat vin ratell tella pash i rhačepaskri. Yaake hounte vell i firheha kerdo, hoy maredo vell, te vell i doosh krik lino." 
Leviticus5:10 Oun koy vavar tauba rhačrell lo yaake, har o baro Devel penas, te vell kerdo i firheha, hoy tseles rhačedo vell. Yaake krell o rashay, te vell lauter pale mishto mank ko mensheste oun o baro Debleste. Oun o baro Devel bistrell koy doosh, hoy ko mensho ap peste anas." 
Leviticus5:11 Te hi kova, kay doosh ap peste anas, yaake čorvelo, te nay anell lo gar douy taube, palle anell lo yek kilogrammi lačo yarro o baro Debleske, te vell leskri doosh krik lino. Yob hounte čivell kek djet pre, vitar kek soungepaskro koova. Kava hi i rhapen, hoy o Debleske anlo vell, te vell i doosh krik lino." 
Leviticus5:12 Yob anell ko yarro pash o rashayeste, oun o rashay lell i vast pherdo, oun moukell kava ap i rhačepaskri te rhačrell o baro Debleske. Kava sikrell, kay ko tselo rhapen, hoy anlo vas, o baro Debleske hi. Kava hi i rhapen, hoy o baro Debleske anlo vell, te vell i doosh krik lino." 
Leviticus5:13 Yaake krell o rashay, te vell i doosh kolestar krik lino, hoy doosh ap peste anas an hako koova, kolestar kate penlo vell. Oun lauter vell pale mishto mank ko mensheste oun o baro Debleste. Oun o baro Devel bistrell leskri doosh. O yarro, hoy pral ačell, hi o rashayeske, yaake har pash o vavar rhapen dran djob, hoy o Debleske dino vas." 
Leviticus5:14 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus5:15 Te dals yek gar o baro Debleste, hoy hounte dals lo leste, rhorhras lo o baro Debles, ninna te djinas lo kova gar. Yob hounte anell o Debleske i bakro, hoy sasto hi, te vell leskri doosh pale mishto. Kava bakro hounte vell yaake boud roupene beme moldo, har tou peneh. Yek roupeni bema hi yaake pharo har i roupeni bema an o Debleskro kheer hi." 
Leviticus5:16 Oun ninna hounte anell lo ko koova, hoy anas lo gar o baro Debleske, oun o pančto kolestar gomme pashel. Oun kova lauter dell lo o rashayeste an o vast. Oun o rashay marell ko bakro oun rhačrell leskro thulepen, te vell lauter pale mishto mank o Debleste oun o mensheste. Oun o baro Devel bistrell koy doosh." 
Leviticus5:17 Te krell yek čomone, kolestar o baro Devel penas, te krell lo les gar, anas lo i doosh ap peste, ninna te djinas lo gar, te penas o baro Devel: “Ma kre kova!”" 
Leviticus5:18 Yob hounte anell o rashayeske i bakro, hoy sasto hi, te vell leskri doosh pale mishto. Kava bakro hounte vell yaake boud moldo, har tou peneh. Koleha krell o rashay, te vell lauter pale mishto mank o Debleste oun ko mensheste, kay gar djinas, kay kova, hoy lo kras, i doosh his. Oun o baro Devel bistrell leskri doosh." 
Leviticus5:19 Yaake hounte krell kova, kay kras i čilačepen ap o baro Debleste, te vell leskri doosh pale mishto." 
Leviticus5:20 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus5:21 Hakeno, kay i vavares rhorhell, krell i čilačepen ap mande, o baro Debleste. Koon penell kolestar, hoy i vavar leske patsas, oder das, te dell lo yak pre kova hi mange, kova anell doosh ap peste. Kova hi ninna yaake, te čoras yek i vavares, oder las čomone lestar rhorhepah," 
Leviticus5:22 oder hatsas čomone, hoy nashedo his, oun penell, te hatsas lo či. Oun dell pes i rhorheni sovel an kava koova oder an vavar koova, hoy i mensho lauter nay krell, koleha yob doosh ap peste lell," 
Leviticus5:23 palle las lo doosh ap peste. Oun yob hounte dell ko koova pale, hoy lo o vavarestar rhorhepah las oun rikras," 
Leviticus5:24 oder pral kova yob pes rhorhenes sovel das. Kava tselo koova hounte dell lo pale, oder yaake boud har kova moldo his, oun i pančto kolestar gomme pashel. Oun koneske kova his, koleste vell kova pale dino ap ko dives, kay yob o baro Debleske i firhes anell, te vell leskri doosh pale mishto." 
Leviticus5:25 Ko firho hounte vell i bakro, hoy sasto hi, oun kolestar tou penal, har boud kova hounte moldo vell. Oun yob anell les pash o rashayeste, te vell leskri doosh pale mishto." 
Leviticus5:26 Oun o rashay marell ko bakro oun rhačrell leskro thulepen, te vell lauter pale mishto glan o baro Debleste oun ko mensheste. Oun o baro Devel bistrell halauter, hoy ko mensho kras, oun koleha yob doosh ap peste anas." 
Leviticus6:1 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus6:2 Pen ap o Aron oun leskre morsh čavende: Yaake hounte krenn t'mer o firheha, koleskro tselo mass mange rhačedo vell: Ko mass ačell ap i rhačepaskri koy tseli rat, bis te vell o nevo dives. Oun koy yag ap i rhačepaskri hounte rhačell i tseli rat oun djal gar vin." 
Leviticus6:3 O rashay rivell peskro layntikro gad an, oun ninna kol layntikre rholopya. Yob lell i yagakri čik krik, hoy vell ko firhestar, koleskro tselo mass rhačedo vas. Oun yob čorell koy čik vin pash i rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus6:4 Palle rivell lo peskre koola vin oun vavar koola an, oun hidjrell koy yagakri čik vin dran koy platsa, kay i menshe hi, ap i platsa, hoy hi djoudjo o Debleske." 
Leviticus6:5 Oun koy yag ap i rhačepaskri rhačell doureder, oun djal ko tselo tsiro gar vin. Haki taysarla čivell o rashay kasht pre, oun koy pre ko mass ko firhestar, hoy vell tseles rhačedo, ninna kol kotya thulepen ko firhestar, hoy i menshe khetne rhan. Oun o rashay moukell lauter pre te rhačrell." 
Leviticus6:6 Koy yag ap i rhačepaskri hounte rhačell hako tsiro, oun hounte djal gar vin." 
Leviticus6:7 Oun yaake hounte vell kerdo o yarreha, hoy o baro Debleske dino vell. I rashaya dran o kheer Aron anenn les glan o baro Debleste pash koy rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus6:8 Yek lendar lell kolestar i vast pherdo yarro, kay djet dren hi, ninna ko tselo soungepaskro koova, hoy pral o yarro čiddo hi, oun moukell kova ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri pre te rhačrell. Yaake sikrell lo, te hi ko tselo rhapen o baro Debleske. Oun ko lačo soungepen, hoy vell vin, soungell mishto o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus6:9 Ko yarro oun ko djet, hoy pral ačell, kova hi o Aroneske oun leskre morsh čavenge. Te krenn le pengro maro kolestar, hounte čivenn le kek shoutlo yarro dren. Ap koy platsa glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer hounte rhan le les. Kaya hi i Debleskri platsa. Kava rhapen dell o baro Devel lenge kolestar, hoy i menshe leske anan. Kova hi i Debleskro rhapen. Doleske nay rhan les kokres i rashaya, yaake har ninna ko mass kol firhendar, hoy venn maredo, te vell i doosh oun o pale-čiddo koova krik lino, oun o mass kol firhendar, hoy venn maredo, te vell i doosh pale mishto." 
Leviticus6:10  
Leviticus6:11 Kokres kol morsh čave, kay venn o Aronestar, nay rhan kolestar. Kova hi hako tsireske lengro kotar kolestar, hoy i menshe o baro Debleske anenna. Hako vavar, kay taprell kova an, lell peskri phagi." 
Leviticus6:12 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus6:13 Ap ko dives, kay vell yek dran o kheer Aron an peskri boudi dren čiddo, te vell lo miro rashay, hounte anell lo mange i khoro lačo yarro – yaake boud har ko rhapaske lino vell, hoy hako dives o baro Debleske anlo vell. Ko yek paash anell lo leske taysarlakro oun ko vavar paash rati." 
Leviticus6:14 An o sasterno čaro vell o yarro khetne kerdo o djeteha, palle peklo, an kotya phagedo oun o baro Debleske rhačedo. Oun ko lačo soungepen, hoy vell vin, soungell mishto o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus6:15 Oun ko rashay dran o kheer Aron, kay pal Aroneskro merepen o pralstouno rashay vell, kava krell kova, oun rhačrell ko tselo rhapen ap i rhačepaskri. Yaake hounte vell kava kerdo o baro Debleske hako tsireske." 
Leviticus6:16 Hako kopo, kay anell i rashay peske i rhapen dran djob o baro Debleske, hounte vell ko tselo rhapen rhačedo. Kek rhal les." 
Leviticus6:17 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: 
Leviticus6:18 Pen o Aroneske oun leskre morsh čavenge, har i firheha kerdo vell, hoy i menshe o baro Debleske anenn, te vell lengri doosh krik lino. Glan o baro Debleskro kheer, ap koy platsa, kay vell ninna ko firho maredo, koleskro tselo mass rhačedo vell, ap kay platsa maress tou ninna ko firhes, hoy hounte merell, te vell i doosh krik lino. O mass sau firhestar, hoy o Debleske anlo vas, nay rhan kokres i rashaya oun kek vavar." 
Leviticus6:19 Ko rashay, kay leskre feteder kotya o Debleske rhačrell, rhal o mass ap i glanstouni platsa glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. Kaya hi i Debleskri platsa." 
Leviticus6:20 Hako vavar, kay ko mass an-taprell, lell peskri phagi. Te vell čomone ko ratestar ap yekeskre koola, palle hounte thovell lo ko kotar ap i platsa, hoy djoudjo hi o Debleske." 
Leviticus6:21 Te vas ko mass keredo an i piri, hoy dran čik kerdo vas, hounte vell koy piri an kotya phagedo. Te vas ko mass an i sasterni piri keredo, palle vell li zoryah oun panyeha vin thodo." 
Leviticus6:22 I tsele morsha oun morsh čave an i rashayengre familye nay rhan kava mass. Yon kokres doleske, kay kava mass ko firhestar vas, hoy o baro Debleske anlo vas." 
Leviticus6:23 Te vas o rat sau firhestar an o Debleskro kheer dren lino, te vell lauter pale mishto mank i menshende oun o baro Debleste, palle hounte rhal kek leskro mass. Kava mass vell an i yag rhačedo." 
Leviticus7:1 Yaake hounte vell kerdo ko firheha, hoy i menshe anenn, te vell lengri doosh pale mishto kerdo. O mass sau firhestar nay rhan kokres i rashaya oun kek vavar." 
Leviticus7:2 Ap koy platsa, kay vell ninna ko firho maredo, koleskro tselo mass rhačedo vell, ap kay platsa hounte vell ko firho maredo, hoy yek anas, te vell leskri doosh pale mishto kerdo. Oun o firheskro rat vell vin čoredo troul o Debleskri rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus7:3 Leskro tselo thulepen anell o rashay o baro Debleske, koy thoulli pori oun ko thulepen, hoy ap i bouke hi," 
Leviticus7:4 kol douy nire oun ko thulepen, hoy ap lende hi, oun ko thoullo kotar, hoy ap i lebra hi. Pash i nire hounte vell o thulepen tele činlo." 
Leviticus7:5 O rashay moukell kova lauter ap i rhačepaskri pre te rhačrell o baro Debleske. Yaake vell ko mensheskri doosh pale mishto kerdo. 
Leviticus7:6 I morsha oun i morsh čave dran i rashayengre familye nay rhan o mass ap i Debleskri platsa. Ko mass vell i firhestar, hoy o baro Debleske anlo vas. Doleske nay rhal les kek vavar." 
Leviticus7:7 Yaake har pash ko firho, hoy i doshake maredo vell, yaake hi ninna pash ko firho, hoy maredo vell, te vell o mensheskri doosh pale mishto kerdo. O firheskro mass hi ko rashayeske, kay o firheskro thulepen rhačrell, te vell pale lauter mishto mank ko mensheste oun o Debleste." 
Leviticus7:8 Ko rashay, kay o firho yekestar glan o baro Debleste anell, koleskro tselo mass rhačedo vell, koleske hi o firheskri hauta." 
Leviticus7:9 Oun o tselo rhapen dran djob, hoy an o bob peklo vas, an i piri keredo vas, oder an i sasterno čaro peklo vas, kova hi ko rashayeske, kay ko rhapen glan o baro Debleste anas." 
Leviticus7:10 Ko vavar rhapen dran djob, o djeteha oder kek djeteha, kova hi i tsele rashayenge dran o kheer Aron, ko yekeske har ko vavareske." 
Leviticus7:11 Oun yaake hounte vell kerdo ko firheha, hoy vell glan o baro Debleste anlo, te rhan les i menshe palle khetne." 
Leviticus7:12 Te anell yek les, te kamell lo pes pash o baro Debleste te parkrell, palle hounte anell lo ninna merklia kerdo djeteha, an kolende kek shoutlo yarro hi, oun sane mare an kolende kek shoutlo yarro hi, kay djet pral maklo vas, ninna merklia kerdo dran lačo djob oun djet." 
Leviticus7:13 Pash kova, hoy anenn le, te parkrenn le pen pash o baro Debleste, anenn le mare, hoy shoutlo yarreha kerdo vas." 
Leviticus7:14 Yek kotar hakenestar vell glan o baro Debleste anlo. Kova lell o rashay, kay o rat ko maredo firhestar troul o Debleskri rhačepaskri čoras." 
Leviticus7:15 Ko mass kava firhestar, hoy yek glan o baro Debleste anas, te parkrell lo pes pash leste, hounte vell ap kava emligo dives rhalo, oun či kolestar ačell čiddo bis taysarlakro." 
Leviticus7:16 Te das yek pes sovel te dell lo čomone o Debleste, oun anell doleske sau firho o Debleske, vell ko mass ko emligo dives rhalo. Te ačell čomone pral, nay rhan le les o vavar dives ninna. Yaake hounte vell ninna kerdo, te das yek i firho pestar o baro Debleste." 
Leviticus7:17 Hi gomme o triinto dives čomone pral, hounte vell kova an i yag rhačedo." 
Leviticus7:18 Te rhal yek ap o triinto dives gomme ko massestar, palle dikell o baro Devel gar lačes ap kova oun ap koleste, kay anas ko firho glan leste. O mass vas pale-čiddo. Oun koon rhal kolestar, hounte hidjrell peskri doosh, hoy yob koleha ap peste las." 
Leviticus7:19 Ko mass, hoy čomoneha khetne vell, hoy pale-čiddo hi, kova hounte vell gar bouder rhalo. An i yag vitsedo oun rhačedo hounte vell ko mass. Kokres kova, kay gar pale-čiddo hi glan o baro Debleste, nay rhal ko mass, hoy o baro Debleske anlo vas." 
Leviticus7:20 Kova kay rhal ko mass, hoy o baro Debleste dino vas, oun ap leste hi i pale-čiddo koova, kova vell infam oun hi bouder kek Israelitari." 
Leviticus7:21 Te taprell yek čomone an, hoy pale-čiddo hi, i menshestar oder i firhestar oder i vavar pale-čiddo koova, oun palle rhal lo kava mass, hoy glan o baro Debleste anlo vas, kova vell infam oun hi bouder kek Israelitari." 
Leviticus7:22 Oun o baro Devel rakras ap o Mose: 
Leviticus7:23 Rake ap i Israelitarya oun pen lenge: “Ma rhan o thulepen i groumyendar, bakrendar oun bouzyendar!" 
Leviticus7:24 O thulepen kol firhendar, kay meran, oder van moulo dandedo divye firhendar, nay lenn oun krenn čomone koleha. Ma rhan les!" 
Leviticus7:25 Kova, kay rhal ko thulepen save firhendar, kay o baro Debleske anlo van, kova vell infam oun hi bouder kek Israelitari." 
Leviticus7:26 Ma rhan vitar kek rat – kek rat i firhestar oun kek rat i čirklestar, kay t'mer ninna djivenna!" 
Leviticus7:27 Hakeno, kay rhal o rat, vell infam oun hi bouder kek Israelitari.”" 
Leviticus7:28 Oun o baro Devel rakras ap o Mose: 
Leviticus7:29 Rake ap i Israelitarya oun pen lenge: Kova kay anell o baro Debleske i firho, hoy rhan i menshe palle khetne glan leste, kova dell o baro Debleste kolestar ko kotar, hoy o Debleske hi." 
Leviticus7:30 Peskre vastentsa hounte anell lo les, te vell lo rhačedo o baro Debleske: Ko thulepen oun ko beč. Ko beč vell pre hadedo glan o baro Debleste." 
Leviticus7:31 O rashay moukell o thulepen te rhačrell ap i rhačepaskri. I beč hi o Aroneske oun leskre morsh čavenge. 
Leviticus7:32 O čači heri kava firhestar hi ninna ko rashayeske," 
Leviticus7:33 kay anell o rat oun o thulepen glan o baro Debleste kol firhendar, hoy rhan i Israelitarya palle khetne glan o Debleste." 
Leviticus7:34 O baro Devel penell i Israelenge, kay anenn leske i firhes, te rhan le les khetne glan leste, te denn le o beč oun i čači heri o rashayeste, o Aroneste, oun leskre morsh čavende. Kal kotya mass hi i rashayenge dran o kheer Aron hako tsireske foun ko dives, kay van le dren čiddo an pengri rashayengri boudi. Oun i Israelitarya hounte denn len i rashayende. Kava lab ačell yaake hako tsireske, hoy vella." 
Leviticus7:35  
Leviticus7:36  
Leviticus7:37 Kava hi hoy glan činlo vas: pral ko firho, koleskro tselo mass rhačedo vell; pral o rhapen dran djob, hoy o Debleske anlo vell; pral ko firho, hoy maredo vell, te vell i doosh oun o pale-čiddo koova krik lino; pral ko firho, hoy maredo vell, te vell o mensheskri doosh pale mishto kerdo; pral ko firho, hoy maredo vell ap ko dives, kay vell o rashay an peskri boudi dren čiddo; pral ko firho, hoy rhan le khetne, koleskre feteder kotya o Debleske rhačedo van." 
Leviticus7:38 Yaake penas kova o baro Devel ap o Moseste, har his lo pral ap i berga Sinay, ap ko dives, kay yob i Israelenge penas, te anenn le firhen o baro Debleske an o moulo tato them Sinay." 
Leviticus8:1 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus8:2 Le o Arones oun leskre morsh čaven touha, oun i rashayengre koola, oun o djet oun ko terno gouroum, hoy i doshake maredo vell, oun kol douy morsh bakre oun koy korba, kay i mare dren hi, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi." 
Leviticus8:3 Mouk i tsele Israelitaryen glan o voudar o Debleskro plarhteno kherestar khetne te vell. 
Leviticus8:4 O Mose kras yaake har o baro Devel penas. Oun i tsele Israelitarya van khetne glan o voudar o Debleskro plarhteno kherestar. 
Leviticus8:5 Oun o Mose penas ap lende: Kava hi, hoy o baro Devel penas, te hounte kras mer." 
Leviticus8:6 Oun yob moukas o Arones oun leskre morsh čave glan te vell, oun thovas len o panyeha." 
Leviticus8:7 Yob rivas o Aroneske o layntikro gad an oun čivas leske o pereskri dori trouyel, palle i baya oun o rashayeskri damdira. Palle pandas lo ko pereskro pandepen, hoy ap i damdira hi, troul leste." 
Leviticus8:8 Palle čivas lo o bečeskri possita ap leste. Oun an koy possita čivas lo kol douy tikne koola, hoy kharenna momeli oun čačepen." 
Leviticus8:9 Palle čivas lo o shereskro pandepen troul leskro shero, oun glan ap koleste i tikno sonakaskro kotar, yaake har o baro Devel les o Moseske penas." 
Leviticus8:10 O Mose las o djet oun vitsras kolestar čomone ap o tselo plarhteno kheer, kay o baro Devel djivell, oun ap lauter hoy dren hi. Yaake sikras lo, kay kova lauter o baro Debleske hi." 
Leviticus8:11 Efta kope vitsras lo ko djetestar čomone ap i rhačepaskri oun kol tsele koola, kolentsa boudrenn le, ninna ap o panyeskro čaro oun ap kol herya koy tel, te vell kova lauter o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus8:12 Palle las o Mose ko djet, oun čoras kolestar ap o Aroneskro shero, oun kras yaake, te vell yob o baro Debleskro rashay." 
Leviticus8:13 Oun o Mose moukas o Aroneskre čave glan te vell, oun rivas lenge i layntikre gada an, oun pandas lenge i pereskro pandepen trouyel, oun čivas i rashayengre stadja ap lengre shere. Kova lauter kras lo yaake, har o baro Devel kova leske penas." 
Leviticus8:14 Yob moukas o terno gouroum te anell, hoy i doshake maredo vell. O Aron oun leskre čave čivan pengre vasta ap o shero ko terno firhestar." 
Leviticus8:15 Oun o Mose maras les kote, oun las čomone ko ratestar, oun makas peskro goushteha ko rat ap i shinga, hoy pral ap i star ekke ap i rhačepaskri hi. Ko tselo vavar rat čoras lo tella pash i rhačepaskri vin. Yaake las lo koy tseli doosh oun ko tselo pale-čiddo koova krik, hoy ap koy rhačepaskri his, te nay vell li o Debleske dino." 
Leviticus8:16 Yob las o tselo thulepen, hoy ap i bouke hi, oun ko thoullo kotar, hoy pral i lebra hi, oun kol douy nire oun lengro thulepen, hoy ap lende hi! Kova lauter rhačras lo ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus8:17 Kova, hoy pral ačas kava firhestar, leskri hauta oun leskro mass, oun ko rhapen, hoy an leskre bouke his, rhačras lo an i yag vin glan koy platsa, kay i menshe his, yaake har o baro Devel leske penas, te krell lo." 
Leviticus8:18 Palle las lo ko yek bakro, koleskro tselo mass rhačedo vell o baro Debleske. Oun o Aron oun leskre čave čivan pengre vasta ap o firheskro shero." 
Leviticus8:19 Oun o Mose maras les, las leskro rat oun čoras les troul o Debleskri rhačepaskri vin." 
Leviticus8:20 Oun yob činas o mass an kotya, oun čivas o shero, kol kotya mass oun o thulepen ap i rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus8:21 Oun yob thovas leskre bouke oun leskre herya o panyeha, oun čivas len ninna ap i rhačepaskri, oun moukas ko tselo firhes pre te rhačrell ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri. Yaake har o baro Devel penas, vas ko tselo bakro leske rhačedo. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy vas vin, soungas mishto o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus8:22 Yob moukas o douyto morsh bakro te anell, kay doleske maredo vell, te venn i rashaya an pengri boudi dren čiddo. Oun o Aron oun leskre čave čivan pengre vasta ap o firheskro shero." 
Leviticus8:23 Oun o Mose maras les, las leskro ratestar oun makas les tella ap o Aroneskro čačo kand, ninna ap o pesso goushto ap leskro čačo vast, oun ap o baro tsebo leskro čačo pirestar." 
Leviticus8:24 Palle moukas lo o Aroneskre morsh čave te vell. oun makas ko ratestar tella ap lengro čačo kand, ninna ap o pesso goushto ap lengre čače vasta, oun ap o baro tsebo lengre čače pirendar. O tselo vavar rat čoras o Mose troul i rhačepaskri vin." 
Leviticus8:25 Yob las o thulepen kava maredo bakrestar: i thoulli pori, ninna o thulepen, hoy ap i bouke hi, oun ko kotar, hoy pral i lebra hi, oun kol douy nire oun lengro thulepen, hoy ap lende hi, oun o pralstouno kotar i čači heryatar." 
Leviticus8:26 Dran koy korba an kolate o maro hi, an koleste kek shoutlo yarro hi, oun hoy o baro Debleske dino vas, las lo yek merkli, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi, yek djeteskri merkli, oun yek sano maro. Oun čivas len ap ko kotya thulepen, oun ap ko pralstouno kotar o čači heryatar." 
Leviticus8:27 Kova lauter das lo an i vasta o Aronestar oun leskre morsh čavendar. Oun yon hadan les pre glan o baro Debleste, te sikrenn le, kay kova leske hi." 
Leviticus8:28 Oun o Mose las lauter pale dran lengre vasta, čivas les ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri pral pre ap ko mass ko firhestar, hoy vell tseles rhačedo, oun moukas les te rhačrell. Kava hi ko rhapen, hoy vas o baro Debleske rhačedo, har van i rashaya an pengri boudi dren čiddo. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy vas vin, soungas mishto o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus8:29 O Mose las o beč ko douyto bakrestar, oun hadas les pre glan o baro Debleste, te sikrell lo, kay kova leske hi. Kava beč his ko kotar, hoy nay las o Mose peske, te rhal lo les. Yaake penas kova o baro Devel." 
Leviticus8:30 Palle las o Mose ko djetestar, hoy o Aroneske oun leskre čavenge ap lengre sherya čoredo vas, ninna ko ratestar hoy ap i rhačepaskri his, oun vitsras čomone kolestar ap o Aron oun ap leskre koola, ninna ap leskre morsh čavende oun ap lengre koola. Yaake čivas lo len ap i rig o baro Debleske, te venn le leskre rashaya." 
Leviticus8:31 O Mose penas ap o Aron oun leskre čavende: Kerenn ko mass pash o voudar glan o Debleskro kheer, oun rhan les kote, khetne ko mareha dran koy korba! Yaake penas mange kova o baro Devel." 
Leviticus8:32 Kova, hoy o massestar oun ko marestar pral ačell, rhačrenn an i yag!" 
Leviticus8:33 Ačenn efta divessa glan o voudar o baro Debleskro kherestar! Djan gar kotar krik, bis te kol divessa trouyel hi, kay i firhe maredo oun rhačedo venn doleske, kay venn t'mer dren čiddo an t'mari boudi." 
Leviticus8:34 Yaake har kava dives firhe oun rhapen glan o baro Debleste anlo van, yaake hounte vell kerdo ap kol divessa, kay venna, te vell t'mari doosh krik lino. Kova penas o baro Devel." 
Leviticus8:35 Efta divessa oun ratsya hounte ačenn t'mer glan o voudar o baro Debleskro plarhteno kherestar. Krenn, hoy yob penas, te merenn gar! Yaake penas lo kova mange." 
Leviticus8:36 O Aron oun leskre morsh čave kran lauter yaake, hoy o baro Devel ap o Moseste penas." 
Leviticus9:1 Har o orhtato dives vas, kharas o Mose o Arones oun leskre morsh čaven oun i phoureder dran Israel pash peste," 
Leviticus9:2 oun penas ap o Aron: “Le touke i terno gouroum oun i morsh bakro, ko gouroum, te vell lo maredo, te vell i doosh krik lino, oun ko bakro, te vell lo maredo, oun leskro tselo mass o baro Debleske rhačedo. Kal douy hounte venn sasto. Kolla an glan o baro Debleste:" 
Leviticus9:3 Oun rake i Israelentsa oun pen lenge: Anenn yek morsh bouzni, hoy vell maredo, te vell i doosh krik lino, ninna i terno gouroum oun i terno bakro, hoy yek bersh phouro hi, te vell lengro mass tseles rhačedo o Debleske. Kol douy hounte venn sasto." 
Leviticus9:4 Anenn ninna i gouroum oun i morsh bakro, te maras mer len glan o baro Debleste, oun rhan len kote khetne. Koy pashel anenn yarro, kay djet dren hi, te rhačras mer les o baro Debleske. Kava dives hi ko dives, kay o baro Devel pes t'menge sikrell.”" 
Leviticus9:5 Yon anan kova, hoy o Mose penas, glan o voudar o baro Debleskro plarhteno kherestar. Oun i tsele Israelitarya van kote khetne glan o baro Debleste." 
Leviticus9:6 oun o Mose penas: “O baro Devel penas, te krenn t'mer kava, te sikrell lo pes t'menge an peskro raylepen.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Oun o Mose penas ap o Aron: “Ab glan o Debleskri rhačepaskri, oun an leske ko firhes, koleha tiri doosh krik lino vell, oun mare ninna touke ko firhes, koleskro tselo mass o Debleske rhačedo vell. Palle kre kova kol firhentsa, hoy i Israelitarya anan, te vell lengri doosh krik lino. Yaake penas kova o baro Devel.”" 
Leviticus9:8 O Aron vas glan i rhačepaskri oun maras ko terno gouroum, hoy yob anas, te vell peskri doosh krik lino." 
Leviticus9:9 Oun leskre morsh čave anan leske o rat. Oun yob čivas peskro goushto an o rat, oun makas čomone ko ratestar ap i shinga, hoy ap i star ekke pral ap i rhačepaskri hi. Oun o vavar rat čoras lo tella pash i rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus9:10 O thulepen oun i nire oun ko thoullo kotar ap i lebra rhačras lo ap i rhačepaskri, yaake har o baro Devel kova o Moseske penas." 
Leviticus9:11 O mass oun i hauta rhačras lo vin glan koy platsa, kay i menshe his." 
Leviticus9:12 Palle maras lo ko firhes, koleskro tselo mass o baro Debleske rhačedo vell. Oun leskre čave anan leske o rat. Oun yob čoras les troul o Debleskri rhačepaskri ap leskre star rigya." 
Leviticus9:13 Oun yon anan leske kol kotya mass, ninna o shero. Oun yob rhačras len ap i rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus9:14 Yob thovas i bouke, oun i palstoune herya, oun čivas len pral ap ko vavar mass ap i rhačepaskri, oun rhačras len." 
Leviticus9:15 Pal kova anas lo glan o baro Debleste kol firhen, hoy i Israelitarya anan. Yob maras koy morsh bouzni, te vell i doosh i Israelendar krik lino, oun kras kava firheha yaake, har lo glan kova koleha kras, hoy lo peskri doshake maras." 
Leviticus9:16 Palle maras lo ko firho, koleskro tselo mass rhačedo vell, oun kras leha har o baro Devel penas." 
Leviticus9:17 Ninna anas lo ko yarro, kay djet dren hi, las i vast pherdo oun rhačras les ap i rhačepaskri, yaake har kras lo ap i tsalla, har lo o firhes o Debleske anas, koleskro tselo mass rhačedo vas." 
Leviticus9:18 Palle maras lo ko gouroum oun ko bakro ko rhapaske, hoy i menshe khetne rhan glan o baro Debleste. Leskre čave anan leske o rat. Oun o Aron las ko rat oun čoras les troul i rhačepaskri ap leskre star rigya." 
Leviticus9:19 Ko thulepen kol douy firhendar, koy thoulli pori oun o thulepen ap i bouke, oun i nire oun o thoullo kotar, hoy ap i lebra hi," 
Leviticus9:20 kava tselo thulepen čivas lo ap i bečeskre kotya. Oun o Aron rhačras ko thulepen. 
Leviticus9:21 Kol bečeskre kotya oun i čače palstoune herya hadas o Aron glan o baro Debleste pre, te sikrell lo, kay kal tsele firhe o baro Debleske his. Yaake penas kova o baro Devel o Moseske." 
Leviticus9:22 Har anas o Aron kal tsele firhen o Debleske, hadas lo peskre vasta pre pral i tsele menshende, oun rakras o Debleskri barht pral lende vin. Palle djas lo koy treppa tele foun koy rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus9:23 Oun o Mose oun o Aron djan pale an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. Oun har le pale vin van, rakran le o Debleskri barht vin pral i tsele menshende. Kote sikras pes o baro Debleskro raylepen glan i tsele menshende." 
Leviticus9:24 I yag djas vin o baro Deblestar, oun rhačras ko mass pre kol firhendar, koleskro tselo mass rhačedo vell, ninna kol thoulle kotya, hoy ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri čiddo his. Har kova i tsele menshe dikan, dan le i barhtyatar gole, oun čivan pen tele glan o baro Debleste ap i phoub." 
Leviticus10:1 Douy morsh čave o Aronestar, o Nadab oun o Abihu, lan hakeno peskro sasterno čaro an o vast, čivan yag dren oun soungepaskro koova, oun djan koleha an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer, te anenn le kova glan o baro Debleste. Kova kran le pestar. O baro Devel penas lenge gar, te krenn le kova." 
Leviticus10:2 Kote djas yag o baro Deblestar vin, oun rhačras len pre. Yon meran kote glan o baro Debleste." 
Leviticus10:3 O Mose penas ap o Aron: Kava hi, hoy o baro Devel rakras, har penas lo: Kamau, te dikenn kolla, kay venn glan mande, te hom me kokres o čačo Devel. Glan i tsele menshende kamau te vap sharedo. O Aron penas kek lab." 
Leviticus10:4 O Mose das o Mishael oun o Elizafan gole. Kolengro dad his o Ouziel. Kova his o Aroneskro kak. Lenge penas lo: “Avenn kay, hidjrenn t'mare phralen vin dran o Debleskro kheer glan koy platsa, kay i menshe hi!”" 
Leviticus10:5 Kol douy van oun hidjran len an lengre rashayeskre gada vin glan koy platsa, kay i menshe his, yaake har o Mose penas." 
Leviticus10:6 O Mose penas ap o Aron oun koleskre vavar douy čavende, o Elazar oun o Itamar: “Moukenn t'mare phralen, kol vavar Israelitaryen, te rovenn le kolenge, kay o baro Devel koy yagah maras. T'mer hounte moukenn gar t'mare balla ap t'maro shero divyes trouyel čiddo, oun hounte tserdenn gar t'mare koola an kotya, te sikrenn, har phares t'mare djia hi. Te krenn kova, hounte merenn. Oun o baro Debleskri rholi vell pral o tselo kheer Israel." 
Leviticus10:7 Ma djan vitar gar krik o voudarestar o Debleskro plarhteno kherestar, te merenn gar. O baro Debleskro djet vas čoredo ap t'mare sherya, te venn leskre rashaya.” Oun yon kran yaake, har o Mose lenge penas." 
Leviticus10:8 O baro Devel penas ap o Aron: 
Leviticus10:9 “Tou oun tire morsh čave, ma piyenn mool oun zorelo pipen, te kamenn an miro kheer te djal, te hounte merenn gar. Ap kova hounte rikrenn t'men oun t'mare čave kanna oun hako tsiro." 
Leviticus10:10 T'mer hounte dikenn dren, hoy o baro Debleske hi, oun hoy gar o baro Debleske hi, oun hoy erligo hi oun hoy pale-čiddo hi glan leste." 
Leviticus10:11 Oun hounte sikrenn i Israelende ko tselo koova, hoy me, o baro Devel, lendar kamau, halauter hoy me o Moseske penom, oun yob lenge doureder penas.”" 
Leviticus10:12 O Mose penas ap o Aron oun ap koleskre douy morsh čavende, kay leske pral ačan, ap o Elazar oun o Itamar: “Kova, hoy pral ačas ko yarrestar, hoy glan o baro Debleste anlo vas, nay lenn t'menge. Čivenn kek shoutlo yarro koy pashel. Rhan les pash o Debleskri rhačepaskri. Kava rhapen hi i Debleskro rhapen. Kokres i rashaya nay rhan les, oun kek vavar." 
Leviticus10:13 Kava rhapen hi tiro oun tire čavengro kotar kolestar, hoy o baro Debleste rhačedo vell. Doleske rhan les ap i Debleskri platsa. Yaake penas kova mange o baro Devel." 
Leviticus10:14 Ko beč oun koy čači palstouni heri, hoy pre hadedo van glan o baro Debleste, hi ninna t'menge. Rhan len khetne t'mare čaventsa oun čentsa ap i vavar platsa, hoy djoudjo hi o Debleske. Kal kotya mass hi tiro kotar oun tire čavengro kotar kol firhendar, hoy i Israelitarya o baro Debleske anan, te rhan le len khetne glan leste." 
Leviticus10:15 Glan te rhan t'mer kova, venn koy palstouni heri oun kava beč čiddo pash kol kotya thulepen, hoy rhačedo venn. Kolentsa khetne venn le pre hadedo glan o baro Debleste. Pal kova hi kal kotya mass touke oun tire morsh čavenge. Yaake te vell kova kerdo hako tsireske. Kova penas o baro Devel.”" 
Leviticus10:16 O Mose rodas koy morsh bouzni, hoy o Debleske anlo vas, te vell i doosh krik lino, oun hatsas vin, te vas lakro mass rhačedo. Kote vas o Mose rhoyedo pral o Elazar oun o Itamar, kol douy čave o Aronestar, oun poučas lendar:" 
Leviticus10:17 “Hoske rhan t'mer ko mass gar ap i Debleskri platsa? Kava mass vas i firhestar, hoy o baro Debleske anlo vas, oun his i rashayenge kokres, te rhan le les. O baro Devel das les t'mende, te hidjrenn i doosh i Israelendar krik, te vell lauter pale mishto mank lende oun o baro Debleste." 
Leviticus10:18 T'mer djinenn, te vas ko firheskro rat gar an o Debleskro kheer dren anlo. Doleske hounte vals ko firho gar rhačedo. Ko mass hounte rhayans t'mer ap i Debleskri platsa. Kova penom t'menge.”" 
Leviticus10:19 O Aron penas ap o Mose: “Dik, kava dives maran le o baro Debleske ko firho pengri doshake, ninna ko firho, koleskro tselo mass rhačedo vas. Oun hoy djas, dikeh tou! Har nay rhoms kava dives ko firhestar, hoy i doshake maredo vas? Vals kova an o baro Debleskre yaka palle yaake, te dikals lo mishto ap kova?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Har shounas o Mose kova, his kova leske mishto." 
Leviticus11:1 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose oun o Aron:
