Leviticus11:2 Penenn ap i Israelitarya: Kalla hi i firhe, hoy nay rhan kolendar, kay djivenn ap o them:" 
Leviticus11:3 Hako firho, koles pre-phagede pire hi, tseles pre-phagedo hounte venn le, oun hoy o rhapen douy kope rhal, kolen nay rhan." 
Leviticus11:4 Mank kolende, kay o rhapen douy kope rhan, hi save, hoy hounte rhan t'mer gar: I khamela oun o shoshoy, oun o bergetikro shoshoy. Ninna te rhan le pengro rhapen douy kope, len hi kek pre-phagede pire. Pale-čiddo hi le t'menge!" 
Leviticus11:5  
Leviticus11:6  
Leviticus11:7 Oun o bales hounte rhan gar, ninna te hi les pre-phagede pire. O balo rhal o rhapen gar douy kope. Pale-čiddo vell lo t'menge." 
Leviticus11:8 O mass kek kal firhendar hounte rhan. Vitar gar taprenn len an, te hi le moulo. Pale-čiddo venn le t'menge." 
Leviticus11:9 Kalla hi i firhe, hoy nay rhan t'mer kolendar, kay djivenn an o pani: Halauter, hoy les flosse oun shouppe hi, oun djivell an o baro pani oun an i lengste panya, kova nay rhan t'mer." 
Leviticus11:10 Halauter, hoy djivell an o baro pani oun an i lengste panya, oun les hi kek flosse oun kek shouppe, ma rhan! Pale-čiddo vell kova t'menge!" 
Leviticus11:11 Ma rhan leskro massestar! Oun te hi sau firho moulo, vell lo t'menge pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus11:12 Lauter, hoy an o pani hi, oun les kek flosse oun kek shouppe hi, vell t'menge djoungeles." 
Leviticus11:13 Kalla hi i čirkle, hoy hounte rhan gar. Kalla venn t'menge pale-čiddo: i adlarya, kay rhan tikne bakre, karhya oun mače;" 
Leviticus11:14 vavar massengre čirkle 
Leviticus11:15 hake korake," 
Leviticus11:16 ninna i straussetikre karhya oun i moulengre čirkle, panyeskre meve, oun o habichto oun hake čirkle dran leskri familya;" 
Leviticus11:17 oun o tikno ratsyakro čirklo, o panyeskro čirklo, hoy kharell cormorano, oun o baro ratsyakro čirklo," 
Leviticus11:18 vavar ratsyakre čirkle oun i moulo-massengre čirkle 
Leviticus11:19 oun o storko; oun hake mačengre čirkle; oun o vesheskro bashno oun i čirklengre kermuse. 
Leviticus11:20 Ninna kal tsele tikne firhe, hoy len čirklengre moussya hi oun ap star herya djan, hi t'menge pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus11:21 Kokres kolla kolendar, kay nay stenn, nay rhan t'mer." 
Leviticus11:22 Yaake nay rhan t'mer hake stepangre. 
Leviticus11:23 Kol tsele vavar tikne firhe, kolen čirklengre moussya hi oun ap star herya djan, venn t'menge pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus11:24 Kalla hi kol firhe, kay hounte taprenn len gar an, te hi le moule: Hakeno, kay taprell savo moulo firho an, kova hi pale-čiddo bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus11:25 Koon sau moulo firhes hidjrell, hounte thovell peskre koola, oun vell pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus11:26 Kalla hi kol firhe: Hako firho, koles pre-phagede pire hi, kay hi gar tseles pre-phagedo, oun hoy rhal o rhapen gar douy kope. Kal firhe hi t'menge pale-čiddo. Koon taprell les an, vell pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus11:27 Kol tsele firhe, kay djan ap tatse, hi t'menge pale-čiddo. Koon yekes lendar an-taprell, te hi kova moulo, vell pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus11:28 Kova, kay sau moulo firho hidjrell, hounte thovell peskre koola, oun vell pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati. Kal moule firhe hi t'menge pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus11:29 Kalla hi i firhe, hoy hi t'menge pale-čiddo mank i tikne firhende, hoy djan pral i phoub: o phoubyakro djouklo, i kermuse, hake aidekse, o gekko, o salamander oun o caméléon." 
Leviticus11:30  
Leviticus11:31 Kalla hi t'menge pale-čiddo mank kol tsele tikne firhende. Hakeno, kay len an-taprell, te hi le moulo, vell pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus11:32 Halauter, ap kova sau moulo firho perell, vell pale-čiddo: hako kashteno koova, ninna ripya, fella oun gone, ninna hako kova, koleha yek i boudi krell. Kova lauter hounte vell an o pani čiddo, oun ačell pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati. Pal kova hi ko koova bouder gar pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus11:33 Te perell sau moulo firho an i piri, hoy dran čik kerdo vas, palle vell lauter, hoy an koy piri hi, pale-čiddo. Savi piri hounte phagenn t'mer paash." 
Leviticus11:34 Te vell pani dran savi piri pash i rhapen dino, vell ko tselo rhapen pale-čiddo, ninna hako pipen dran savi piri." 
Leviticus11:35 Ap lauter, kay sau moulo firho perell, kova vell pale-čiddo. Te perell lo ap i bob, ap kolate peklo oder keredo vell, vell ko bob pale-čiddo, oun t'mer hounte phagenn les tele. Pale-čiddo hi lo t'menge." 
Leviticus11:36 Kokres te perell i moulo firho an i brounna, kay pani dren hi, palle vell ko pani gar pale-čiddo. Kokres kova, kay taprell ko moulo firhes an, hoy koy dren hi, kova hi pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus11:37 Te perell sau moulo firho ap djob, hoy vell vin vitsedo ap i phoub, vell ko djob gar pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus11:38 Te vas pani ap ko djob čoredo, oun palle perell sau moulo firho koy pre, palle vell ko djob t'menge pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus11:39 Te merell i firho, hoy nay rhan t'mer, oun yek t'mendar taprell les an, kova vell pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus11:40 Koon savo firhestar rhal, kova hounte thovell peskre koola, oun vell pale-čiddo bis te vell rati. Koon ko moulo firho hidjrell, kova hounte thovell peskre koola, oun vell pale-čiddo bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus11:41 Kol tsele tikne firhe, hoy djan pral i phoub, kolla, kay djan ap pengro per, ninna kolla, kay len hi star oun boudeder herya, yon hounte venn pale-čiddo t'menge. Kek rhal len!" 
Leviticus11:42  
Leviticus11:43 Ma krenn t'men pale-čiddo sau tikno firheha, hoy rhan." 
Leviticus11:44 Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel. Kek vavar hi har me. An mande hi kek čilačepen. Oun t'mer hounte djivenn yaake, te vell či tardo mank mande oun t'mende. Ma krenn t'men pale-čiddo ap i tikno firho, hoy djal pral i phoub." 
Leviticus11:45 Me hom o baro Devel, oun anom t'men dran o them Egiptia vin, te vap t'maro Devel. Kek vavar hi har me. An mande hi kek čilačepen. Oun t'mer hounte djivenn yaake har i Debleskre menshe djivenn." 
Leviticus11:46 Kava hi hoy glan činlo hi pral i firhende oun pral i čirklende oun pral halauter, hoy djivell an o pani, oun pral kol firhende, kay djan ap o per oder ap tikne herya pral i phoub." 
Leviticus11:47 Yaake nay djinenn t'mer, hoy pale-čiddo hi oun hoy gar pale-čiddo hi, oun havo firho nay rhan t'mer, oun havo firho nay rhan t'mer gar." 
Leviticus12:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus12:2 Pen ap i Israelitarya: Te anell i djouvel i morsh čaves ap i phoub, palle vell li efta divessa pale-čiddo, har an kol divessa, kay lat i djouvyakro koova hi." 
Leviticus12:3 Ap o orhtato dives vell ko ternepen ap leskro mass činlo. 
Leviticus12:4 Oun yoy ačell 33 (triyanda-te-triin) divessa gomme khere, bis te vell li pale erligo. An kava tsiro taprell li či an, hoy o Debleske hi. Oun an o Debleskro kheer vell li gar, bis te kal divessa trouyel hi." 
Leviticus12:5 Te vell lake i čay boldo, palle vell li douy kourke pale-čiddo, har te vals lat peskri djouvyakro koova. Oun 66 (shob-deesh-te-shob) divessa ačell li khere, bis te vell li pale erligo." 
Leviticus12:6 Pal kal divessa, kay his li pale-čiddo, anell li o rashayeske i bakro, hoy yek bersh hi glan o voudar o Debleskro kherestar. Ninna anell li leske i terni tauba oder i divyi tauba. O bakro vell maredo oun leskro tselo mass vell rhačedo o baro Debleske. Oun i tauba vell maredo, te vell o pale-čiddo koova krik lino." 
Leviticus12:7 O rashay rhačrell kol firhe glan o baro Debleste, te vell koy djouvel pale erligo. Yaake vell o pale-čiddo koova krik lino, hoy ap koy djouvyate his. Yaake hounte krenn i djouvya, kay anan i morsh čaves oder i čay ap i phoub." 
Leviticus12:8 Te hi li yaake čorvelo, te nay anell li kek bakro, palle anell li douy divye taube oder douy terne taube, yek, hoy o baro Debleske rhačedo vell, oun yek, hoy maredo vell, te vell o pale-čiddo koova latar krik lino. Yaake krell o rashay, te vell li pale erligo." 
Leviticus13:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose oun ap o Aron: 
Leviticus13:2 Te vell pash i mensheste i kotar hauta pesso oder nasselo oder parno, yaake te darenn le, kay kova i djoungelo nasslepen hi, palle vell ko mensho pash o rashayeste anlo, pash o Aroneste oder pash yekeste leskre morsh čavendar." 
Leviticus13:3 Oun ko rashay hounte dikell peske koy nasseli kotar hauta an. Te van i balla kote parno, oun koy nasseli kotar hauta hi doureder tele an o mass har koy vavar hauta trouyel, palle hi kova i djoungelo nasslepen. Kova te dikell o rashay ap koleste, palle hounte rakrell lo vin, te hi ko mensho pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus13:4 Te hi ko parno kotar ap leskri hauta gar doureder tele an leskro mass har koy vavar hauta, oun i balla van gar parno, palle pandell ko rashay ko menshes efta divessa an i kheer dren." 
Leviticus13:5 Ap o eftato dives dikell lo les pale an. Te patsell lo, te djas ko parno kotar gar doureder, oun ačas yaake har glan kova, palle pandell ko rashay les i douyto kopo efta divessa dren." 
Leviticus13:6 Pal kol efta divessa dikell o rashay pale koy kotar hauta an. Te hi kova bouder gar yaake parno oun vas gar bareder, palle hounte rakrell lo vin, te hi ko mensho erligo. Kava hi i nasslepen ap i hauta, hoy gar djoungelo hi. Ko mensho hounte thovell peskre koola oun hi erligo." 
Leviticus13:7 Te vell ko nasselo kotar bareder pal kova, kay o rashay pre dikas, palle hounte sikrell lo pes o rashayeste i douyto kopo." 
Leviticus13:8 Te dikell o rashay palle, kay vas ko nasselo kotar bareder, palle hi kova i djoungelo nasslepen, oun o rashay hounte rakrell vin, te hi ko mensho pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus13:9 Te hi yekes i doukepen ap peskri hauta, hoy vi dikell har i djoungelo nasslepen, palle anenn le saves pash o rashayeste." 
Leviticus13:10 Te dikell ko rashay palle, te hi ko doukepen parno oun pesso, oun i balla an ko doukepen van parno, oun ko doukepen hi pre oun lolo," 
Leviticus13:11 palle hi kova ap leskri hauta i phouro djoungelo doukepen. O rashay hounte rakrell vin, te hi ko mensho pale-čiddo. Yob hounte pandell les gar an o kheer dren, pale-čiddo hi lo." 
Leviticus13:12 Te phagell i nasslepen ap i tseli hauta vin, foun leskro shero bis pash leskre pire, oun halauter hi parno, hoy o rashay nay dikell, palle hi ko nasslepen čomone, hoy ko menshes gar pale-čiddo krell. Oun o rashay rakrell vin, te hi kova erligo." 
Leviticus13:13  
Leviticus13:14 Hatsell o rashay, kay les an-dikell, i doukepen, hoy hi pre oun lolo, hi kova i djoungelo nasslepen. Oun o rashay, kay kova dikell, hounte rakrell vin, te hi ko mensho pale-čiddo. Ko lolo mass, hoy pre hi, hi pale-čiddo, oun hi i sikepen, kay kova i djoungelo nasslepen hi." 
Leviticus13:15  
Leviticus13:16 Te djal ko lolo mass palpale oun vell parno, palle vell ko mensho pale pash o rashayeste." 
Leviticus13:17 Te dikell o rashay, te vas ko lolo mass parno, hi ko mensho bouder gar pale-čiddo. Oun o rashay hounte rakrell vin, te hi lo erligo." 
Leviticus13:18 Te phagell pash yekeste i doukepen pre ap leskri hauta, oun vell pale sasto," 
Leviticus13:19 oun pal kova vell i hauta ap ko emligo kotar pale pesso oun parno oder parno-te-lolo, palle sikrell lo kova o rashayeste." 
Leviticus13:20 Te dikell o rashay koy kotar hauta, oun kova hi doureder tele an o mass har i vavar hauta trouyel, oun i balla ap ko doukepen van parno, palle hi kova i djoungelo nasslepen, hoy an o doukepen vin phagas. Palle rakrell ko rashay vin, te hi ko mensho pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus13:21 Te dikell o rashay koy kotar hauta oun dikell kek parne balla, oun koy kotar hauta hi gar doureder tele an o mass har i tseli vavar hauta, oun hi bouder gar yaake parno oder lolo-te-parno, palle pandell o rashay ko menshes efta divessa dren." 
Leviticus13:22 Te vell ko kotar bareder, palle hi kova i djoungelo nasslepen. Oun o rashay hounte rakrell vin, te hi ko mensho pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus13:23 Te vell ko kotar gar bareder, palle hi i doukepen, hoy sasto vas, oun mass hoy kote pale khetne djas. O rashay hounte rakrell vin, te hi ko mensho erligo." 
Leviticus13:24 Te hatsell pes ap yekeste i kotar hauta, hoy rhačedo vas, oun ko doukepen vell lolo-te-parno oder parno," 
Leviticus13:25 hounte sikrell lo kova o rashayeste. Te dikell o rashay, te van i balla kote dren parno, oun ko kotar hauta hi doureder tele har i vavar hauta trouyel, palle hi kova i djoungelo nasslepen, hoy an ko kotar hauta, hoy rhačedo vas, vin phagas. O rashay hounte rakrell vin, te hi ko mensho pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus13:26 Te dikell o rashay kek parne balla ap ko doukepen, oun koy hauta hi gar doureder tele har i tseli vavar hauta, oun hi bouder gar yaake parno, palle pandell o rashay ko menshes efta divessa dren." 
Leviticus13:27 Ap o eftato dives dikell o rashay ko doukepen pale an. Te vas ko parno kotar bareder, hi kova i djoungelo nasslepen. Oun o rashay hounte rakrell vin, te hi ko mensho pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus13:28 Te ačas ko doukepen yaake har lo his, oun vas gar bareder, oun hi bouder gar yaake parno, palle hi kova mass, hoy khetne djas pal ko rhačepen. O rashay hounte rakrell vin, te hi ko mensho erligo." 
Leviticus13:29 Te hi i morshes oder i djouvyat i nasslepen ap o shereskri hauta oder ap i čor," 
Leviticus13:30 hounte dikell o rashay les peske an. Te hi i hauta kote doureder tele har i vavar hauta trouyel, oun van i balla kote djelto oun sano, palle hi kova i djoungelo nasslepen ap o shero oder ap i čor. O rashay hounte rakrell vin, te hi ko mensho pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus13:31 Te dikell o rashay, kay i balla kote bouder gar kalo hi, ninna te hi i nasseli hauta gar doureder tele har koy vavar hauta trouyel, palle pandell o rashay ko menshes efta divessa dren." 
Leviticus13:32 Te dikell lo pal kol efta divessa palla, oun koy nasseli kotar hauta vas gar bareder, oun hi gar doureder tele har i vavar hauta, oun kek djelto bal hi koy," 
Leviticus13:33 palle hounte činell ko mensho peskre balla troul ko doukepen tele. Oun o rashay pandell les pale efta divessa dren. 
Leviticus13:34 Te dikell o rashay ap o eftato dives palla, oun ko doukepen vas gar bareder, oun hi gar doureder tele an o mass har i vavar hauta, palle hounte rakrell o rashay vin, te hi ko mensho erligo. Ko mensho hounte thovell peskre koola oun hi erligo." 
Leviticus13:35 Te vell ko doukepen bareder, pal kova yob erligo kerdo vas," 
Leviticus13:36 hounte dikell ko rashay les pale. Te dikell o rashay, te vas ko doukepen bareder, hounte rodell o rashay bouder gar pal i balla, hoy djelto van. Pale-čiddo hi lo." 
Leviticus13:37 Te dikell an i rashayeskre yaka vin, har te vas ko doukepen gar bareder, oun te van kote kale balla vin, palle vas ko mensho sasto. O rashay hounte rakrell vin, te hi lo erligo." 
Leviticus13:38 Te hi i morshes oder i djouvyat parne kotya ap pengri hauta," 
Leviticus13:39 hounte dikell o rashay palla, hoy kova hi. Te hi kal kotya gar yaake parno, palle hi kova kek djoungelo nasslepen, hoy an i hauta vin phagas. Pale-čiddo hi ko mensho gar." 
Leviticus13:40 Te perenn yekeske i balla ap o shero vin, palla oder glan, hi lo doleske gar pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus13:41  
Leviticus13:42 Te hi kote, kay i balla vin peran, palla oder glan, i kotar hauta, hoy parno-te-lolo hi, hounte dikell o rashay pal, hoy kova hi. Hatsell o rashay i pessepen ap koy hauta, kay i balla vin peran, oun ko pessepen hi lolo-te-parno, oun dikell vin har i djoungelo nasslepen," 
Leviticus13:43  
Leviticus13:44 palle hi les čačepah kava djoungelo nasslepen ap peskro shero. Pale-čiddo hi lo. Oun o rashay rakrell vin, te hi lo pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus13:45 Ko morsh ap koleste ko djoungelo nasslepen hi, hounte rivell koola, hoy paash hi, oun hounte moukell leskri balla divyes, oun hounte čivell i diklo troul peskri čor, oun dell vin gole: pale-čiddo, pale-čiddo!" 
Leviticus13:46 Oun yaake rah, har ko djoungelo nasslepen ap leste hi, hi lo pale-čiddo. Yob djivell kokres, oun krell peskro kheer vin glan koy platsa, kay i vavar menshe djivenn." 
Leviticus13:47 Te sikrell pes i djoungelo kotar ap i ripen oder ap koola, hoy hi dran bakrengre balla, layna oder ledera, oun ko djoungelo kotar hi zenelo oder lolo, hounte dikell pes kova o rashay an." 
Leviticus13:48  
Leviticus13:49  
Leviticus13:50 Yob dikell les peske an oun pandell les efta divessa dren. 
Leviticus13:51 Ap ko eftato dives dikell lo les pale an. Te vas ko djoungelo kotar bareder, hi kova i djounglepen, hoy hi pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus13:52 Ko ripen oder kol koola, ap kolende ko djounglepen hi, hounte venn pre rhačedo an i yag." 
Leviticus13:53 Hi vavarčandes, te dikell o rashay ko koova an, oun ko djoungelo kotar vas gar bareder," 
Leviticus13:54 palle penell o rashay, te lenn le ko koova oun thovenn les. Palle pandell lo les o douyto kopo efta divessa dren." 
Leviticus13:55 Pal kol efta divessa dikell les o rashay pale an. Te ačas ko djoungelo kotar koy, hi kava ripen pale-čiddo, ninna te vas ko djoungelo kotar gar bareder. Kava djounglepen rhas pes dren glan oder palla. Doleske hounte vell kava ripen oder kal koola rhačedo." 
Leviticus13:56 Te dikell o rashay, te vas ko kotar, hoy zenelo oder lolo his, bouder gar yaake zenelo oder lolo pal o thopen, palle činell lo les tele dran o ripen oder dran i koola dran bakrengre balla oder layna oder ledera." 
Leviticus13:57 Te sikrell pes ko djounglepen pal kova pale, vell diklo, te hi čomone, hoy doureder djal. Palle hounte vell kava koova rhačedo, kay sikrell pes kava djounglepen ap leste." 
Leviticus13:58 Te hi ko djounglepen bouder gar koy pal o thopen, hounte vell kava koova thodo i douyto kopo. Pal kova hi lo gar pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus13:59 Yaake hounte vell kerdo, te sikrell pes i djoungelo kotar ap i ripen oder ap koola, hoy hi dran bakrengre balla, layna oder ledera, te vell siklo, hi le pale-čiddo oder gar." 
Leviticus14:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus14:2 Yaake hounte krenn t'mer yekeha, kay les i djoungelo nasslepen ap peskri hauta his, oun pale sasto vas, te vell lo pale erligo. Yob vell glan o rashayeste anlo." 
Leviticus14:3 O rashay djal vin glan koy platsa, kay i menshe hi, oun dikell les peske an. Te vas ko doukepen ap leste sasto," 
Leviticus14:4 palle penell o rashay, te anenn le douy djide čirkle, hoy hi gar pale-čiddo, ninna cedertikro kasht, oun lole thaba, oun patria i bourrestar, hoy kharell Hysop." 
Leviticus14:5 Oun o rashay penell, te marenn le ko yek čirklo pral i čaro, kay djoudjo pani dren hi." 
Leviticus14:6 Palle rikrell lo o djido čirkles an ko čaro, kay pani oun o rat o maredo čirklestar dren hi. Khetne leha čivell lo ko cedertikro kasht, kol lole thaba oun kol patria Hysop koy dren, an ko čaro," 
Leviticus14:7 oun vitsrell ko ratlo panyestar efta kope ap koleste, kay pale-čiddo his, te vell lo erligo. Oun moukell ko djido čirkles krik te djal." 
Leviticus14:8 Kova, kay sasto vas, thovell peskre koola oun činell peskre tsele balla tele, oun thovell pes. Palle hi lo erligo, oun nay vell pale ap i platsa, kay i menshe djivenn. Efta divessa ačell lo vin glan peskro plarhteno kheer." 
Leviticus14:9 Pal kol efta divessa činell lo i douyto kopo i tsele balla ap o shero tele, ninna leskri čora oun kol balla pral i yaka oun leskre tsele vavar balla, oun thovell pes oun peskre koola Palle hi lo erligo." 
Leviticus14:10 Ap o orhtato dives anell lo douy terne bakre, hoy morsha hi oun sasto, oun yek bakri, hoy yek bersh phouro oun sasto hi. Ninna anell lo triin kilogramme lačo yarro, kay djet dren hi, te vell kova glan o baro Debleste anlo. Koy pashel anell lo i khoro djet." 
Leviticus14:11 Ko rashay anell koles, kay sasto vas, oun kava tselo koova glan o baro Debleste, glan o voudar koleskro plarhteno kherestar." 
Leviticus14:12 O rashay lell ko yek terno bakro oun ko yek-paash litari djet, oun hadell kova pre glan o baro Debleste, te vell ko mensho pale erligo kerdo glan o Debleste." 
Leviticus14:13 Pal kova marell lo ko terno bakres kote, kay venn ninna firhe maredo, te vell i doosh oun o pale-čiddo koova krik lino, oun kol vavar, kolengro tselo mass rhačedo vell. Kay platsa hi i Debleskri platsa. Yaake har hi o rashayeske ko mass i firhestar, hoy vell maredo, te vell i doosh oun o pale-čiddo koova krik lino, yaake hi ninna o rashayeske ko mass i firhestar, hoy vell maredo, te vell ko mensho pale erligo kerdo glan o Debleste. O mass sau firhestar, hoy o Debleske anlo vas, nay rhan kokres i rashaya oun kek vavar." 
Leviticus14:14 O rashay lell o ratestar ko firhestar, hoy maredo vas, te vell o mensho pale erligo glan o Debleste, oun makell čomone tella ap o čačo kand kolestar, kay sasto vas, ninna ap leskro čačo pesso goushto oun ap o čačo pesso tsebo." 
Leviticus14:15 O rashay lell ko khoro djet oun čorell čomone kolestar an peskro servo vast. 
Leviticus14:16 Palle čivell lo peskro čačo goushto an ko djet, hoy an leskro servo vast hi, oun vitsrell ko djetestar efta kope ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus14:17 Palle makell lo ko djetestar, hoy an leskro servo vast pral ačas, čomone tella ap o čačo kand oun ap o čačo pesso goushto oun ap o čačo tsebo kolestar, kay sasto vas, ap ko rat hoy lo glan kova kote pre makas." 
Leviticus14:18 Ko djet, hoy gomme an leskro vast hi, makell lo ap o shero kolestar, kay sasto vas. Yaake krell lo les pale erligo glan o baro Debleste." 
Leviticus14:19 Pal kova marell o rashay ko firho, hoy maredo vell, te vell ko pale-čiddo koova krik lino kolestar, kay sasto vas. Yaake krell lo les pale erligo. Palle marell lo ko firho, koleskro tselo mass o Debleske rhačedo vell," 
Leviticus14:20 oun rhačrell kova ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri khetne ko rhapen dran yarro hoy glan o baro Debleste anlo vas. Oun yaake krell lo, te vell kova, kay sasto vas, pale erligo." 
Leviticus14:21 Te hi lo čorvelo oun nay anell gar yaake boud, palle lell lo i terno bakro, hoy maredo vell, te vell o mensho pale erligo. Kava bakro vell pre hadedo glan o baro Debleste, te vell i pale-čiddo koova krik lino. Koy pashel lell lo yek kilogrammi yarro, kay djet dren hi, te vell kova ninna glan o baro Debleste anlo. Ninna anell lo yek khoro djet," 
Leviticus14:22 douy divye taube oder douy vavar taube. Koy yek vell maredo, te vell o pale-čiddo koova krik lino, koy vavar, te vell li tseles rhačedo o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus14:23 Ap o orhtato dives foun ko tsiro, kay lo erligo kerdo vell, anell lo len pash o rashayeste glan o voudar o plarhteno kherestar, kay o baro Devel djivell." 
Leviticus14:24 O rashay lell ko terno bakro, hoy maredo vell, te vell o mensho pale erligo, oun hadell les pre glan o baro Debleste. Yaake krell lo ninna o djeteha." 
Leviticus14:25 Palle marell lo ko terno bakro oun makell o ratestar tella ap o čačo kand kolestar, kay sasto vas, ninna ap leskro čačo pesso goushto oun ap o čačo pesso tsebo." 
Leviticus14:26 O rashay lell ko khoro djet oun čorell čomone kolestar an peskro servo vast. 
Leviticus14:27 Palle čivell lo peskro čačo goushto an ko djet, hoy an leskro servo vast hi, oun vitsrell ko djetestar efta kope ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus14:28 Palle makell lo ko djetestar, hoy an leskro servo vast pral ačas, tella ap o čačo kand oun ap o čačo pesso goushto oun ap o čačo tsebo kolestar, kay sasto vas, ap ko rat, hoy lo glan kova kote pre makas." 
Leviticus14:29 Ko djet, hoy gomme an leskro vast hi, makell lo ap o shero kolestar, kay sasto vas. Yaake krell lo, te vell ko mensho pale erligo glan o baro Debleste." 
Leviticus14:30 Pal kova marell o rashay koy yek tauba, hoy ko mensho anas – nay vell i divyi tauba, nay vell i vavar tauba –" 
Leviticus14:31 te vell o pale-čiddo koova krik lino, oun koy pal koy vavar tauba, hoy vell tseles rhačedo ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri. Oun koy pashel anell lo ko rhapen dran yarro glan o baro Debleste. Yaake krell o rashay, te vell kova, kay sasto vas, pale erligo glan o baro Debleste." 
Leviticus14:32 Yaake hounte vell kerdo koleha, kay i djoungelo nasslepen ap peskri hauta his, oun kova gar yaake bravelo hi, te nay anell lo triin bakre, te vell lo pale erligo kerdo." 
Leviticus14:33 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose oun ap o Aron: 
Leviticus14:34 Te venn t'mer an o them Kanaan, hoy me t'men dau, te vell kava them t'menge, oun me moukau kote an i kheer i djoungelo kotar vin te vell," 
Leviticus14:35 palle hounte djal kova, koleske ko kheer hi, pash o rashayeste oun penell leske: “Mange dikell kova vin, har te phagals i djoungelo kotar ap miro kheer vin.”" 
Leviticus14:36 Glan te djal o rashay an ko kheer, te dikell lo peske kova an, moukell lo ko tselo koova dran ko kheer vin te anell, te vell gar kova lauter pale-čiddo. Palle djal lo dren oun dikell pes ko kheer an." 
Leviticus14:37 Te dikell lo djoungele zenele oder lole kotya ap i barra, oun kova dikell vin, har te rhals pes ko djounglepen an i barra dren," 
Leviticus14:38 palle djal o rashay dran ko kheer vin oun pandell ko kheer efta divessa tele. 
Leviticus14:39 Pal efta divessa vell lo pale an ko kheer, oun dikell peske kol djoungele kotya pale an. Te vas ko djounglepen bareder ap i barra ko kherestar," 
Leviticus14:40 palle penell o rashay, te venn kal barra vi-phagedo, kay ko djounglepen pre hi, oun venn vin vitsedo glan o foro ap i pale-čiddi platsa." 
Leviticus14:41 Oun ko čik, hoy dren an o kheer ap i barra maklo vas, hounte vell tele lino oun vell vi-čoredo vin glan o foro ap i pale-čiddi platsa." 
Leviticus14:42 Oun kote, kay i barra vin phagedo van, venn vavar barra dren čiddo. Oun vavar čik vell ap i barra pre maklo." 
Leviticus14:43 Te vell ko djounglepen pale vin ap i barra an ko kheer," 
Leviticus14:44 palle vell ko rashay oun dikell kova peske an. Te djas ko djounglepen doureder, palle hi i djounglepen, hoy troul peste rhal. Ko kheer hi pale-čiddo," 
Leviticus14:45 oun hounte vell tele phagedo. Oun leskre barra oun leskro kasht oun koy čik ap i barra, kova lauter vell vin anlo glan o foro ap i pale-čiddi platsa." 
Leviticus14:46 Kova, kay djal dren an ko kheer, yaake rah har kova tele pandlo hi, kova vell pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus14:47 Kova, kay sovell oder rhal an ko kheer, hounte thovell peskre koola." 
Leviticus14:48 Te djal o rashay pale dren, oun yob dikell, te djas ko djounglepen gar doureder pal kova, kay makan le vavar čik ap i barra, palle rakrell o rashay vin, te hi o kheer bouder gar pale-čiddo. Ko djounglepen djas krik." 
Leviticus14:49 Palle krell lo čomone, te nay djivenn i menshe pale an ko kheer: Yob lell douy čirkle, ninna cedertikro kasht, oun lole thaba, oun patria i bourrestar, hoy kharell Hysop." 
Leviticus14:50 Oun yob marell ko yek čirklo pral i čaro, kay djoudjo pani dren hi." 
Leviticus14:51 Palle čivell lo o djido čirkles an ko čaro, kay pani oun o rat o maredo čirklestar dren hi. Khetne leha čivell lo ko cedertikro kasht, kol lole thaba oun kol patria Hysop koy dren, an ko čaro, oun vitsrell ko ratlo panyestar efta kope ap ko kheer," 
Leviticus14:52 te vell o pale-čiddo koova dran ko kheer krik lino. 
Leviticus14:53 Palle moukell lo ko djido čirkles vin te djal dran o foro. Yaake lell lo ko pale-čiddo koova ko kherestar krik. Oun i menshe nay djivenn pale an o kheer. 
Leviticus14:54 Pal kal laba hounte vell kerdo, te hi yekes i nasslepen ap peskri hauta, djoungelo oder gar djoungelo," 
Leviticus14:55 kote, kay sikrell pes i pessepen, nassele kotya oun parne kotya ap i hauta. Oun pal kal laba hounte vell kerdo, te sikrell pes i djounglepen ap ripya oder an khera." 
Leviticus14:56  
Leviticus14:57 Yaake nay vell vin hatslo, hi i mensho oder i koova pale-čiddo oder gar." 
Leviticus15:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose oun ap o Aron: 
Leviticus15:2 Pen ap i Israelende: Te nashell čomone dran i morsheskro mass, palle hi lo pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus15:3 Hi yek te nashell kova o tselo tsiro oder pale te pale; pale-čiddo hi lo. 
Leviticus15:4 Hako čiben, ap koleste yob čiddo hi, oun haki beshepaskri, ap kolate yob beshdo hi, hi pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus15:5 Koon koleskro čiben an-tapras, hounte thovell pes oun peskre koola, oun hi pale-čiddo bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus15:6 Koon beshas pes ap čomone, kay ko nasselo beshdo his, kova hounte thovell pes oun peskre koola, oun hi pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus15:7 Koon ko nasseles an-tapras, kova hounte thovell pes oun peskre koola, oun hi pale-čiddo bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus15:8 Te čoungrell ko nasselo ap yekeste, kay gar pale-čiddo hi, hounte thovell pes kova oun ninna peskre koola, oun hi pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus15:9 Ninna ko ledertikro kotar, ap koleste ko nasselo klissas, hi pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus15:10 Koon čomone an-taprell, ap koleste ko nasselo čiddo oder beshdo his, vell pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati. Koon čomone hidjrell, ap koleste ko nasselo čiddo oder beshdo his, hounte thovell pes oun peskre koola, oun hi pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus15:11 Te taprell ko nasselo yekes an, oun leskre vasta his gar thodo, palle hounte thovell pes kova, kay an-tapedo vas, oun peskre koola, oun hi pale-čiddo bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus15:12 Kol čare, hoy dran čik kerdo hi, oun kolen ko nasselo an-tapras, hounte venn paash dino. Halauter, hoy dran kasht kerdo vas, oun kolestar an-tapedo vas, hounte vell an pani tele thodo." 
Leviticus15:13 Te vell ko nasselo pale sasto, ginell lo peske efta divessa tele. Palle thovell lo peskre koola oun thovell pes djoudjo panyeha tele; palle hi lo pale erligo." 
Leviticus15:14 Ap o orhtato dives anell lo douy divye taube oder douy vavar taube pash o rashayeste glan o voudar o plarhteno kherestar, kay o baro Devel djivell." 
Leviticus15:15 Ko rashay marell koy yek, te vell ko pale-čiddo koova krik lino, oun koy vavar, te vell li tseles rhačedo o baro Debleske. Yaake krell o rashay, te vell ko morsh, kay dran peskro nasslepen pale-čiddo his, pale erligo glan o baro Debleste." 
Leviticus15:16 Te djal i morsheske yek tele, palle thovell lo peskro tselo kerpro tele, oun yob vell pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus15:17 Leskro tselo an-ripen oun haki ledertikro kotar, ap koleste kova vas, hounte vell tele thodo oun vell pale-čiddo bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus15:18 Te sovell i morsh i djouvyah, oun leske djal yek tele, hounte thovenn pen kol douy, oun hi pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus15:19 Te hi i djouvyat peskri djouvyakro koova, palle ačell li efta divessa pale-čiddo. Hakeno, kay lat an-taprell, vell pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus15:20 Oun halauter, kay li an kava tsiro pre čiddo oder beshdo his, hi pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus15:21 Hakeno, kay lakro čiben an-taprell, hounte thovell pes oun peskre koola, oun ačell pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus15:22 Hakeno, kay kova an-taprell, kay li pre-beshdo his, hounte thovell pes oun peskre koola oun ačell pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus15:23 Oun koon čomone an-taprell, hoy kote čiddo his, kay li čiddo oder beshdo his, ačell pale-čiddo bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus15:24 Te hi i morsh pash yekate čiddo, oun lat vell peskri djouvyakro koova, palle hi lo efta divessa pale-čiddo. Oun ko čiben, kay yob čiddo his, vell pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus15:25 Te hi i djouvyat peskri djouvyakro koova boud divessa oder an i tsiro, kay hounte vell kova gar, palle hi li an kava tselo tsiro pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus15:26 Hako čiben, kay li čiddo hi, oun hako koova, kay li pre-beshdo hi an ko tsiro, hi pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus15:27 Kova, kay čomone kolestar an-taprell, kova hi pale-čiddo, oun hounte thovell pes oun peskre koola, oun ačell pale-čiddo bis te vell rati." 
Leviticus15:28 Te vas li pale sasto oun ratell bouder gar, ginell li peske efta divessa tele, pal kolende hi li pale erligo." 
Leviticus15:29 Ap o orhtato dives anell li douy divye taube oder douy vavar taube pash o rashayeste glan o voudar o Debleskro plarhteno kherestar. 
Leviticus15:30 Ko rashay marell koy yek tauba, te vell o pale-čiddo koova krik lino, oun koy vavar, te vell li tseles rhačedo o baro Debleske. Yaake krell o rashay, te vell koy djouvel, kay ratas oun doleske pale-čiddo his, pale erligo." 
Leviticus15:31 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose oun ap o Aron: Denn i Israelitaryen trad, te ačenn le i kotar dour miro kherestar an ko tsiro, kay hi le pale-čiddo, te krenn le gar koy platsa pale-čiddo, kay me djivau mank lende, te merenn le gar." 
Leviticus15:32 Pal kal laba hounte vell kerdo i morsheha, dran koleskro mass čomone vin nashell, oun koleske yek tele djal, yaake te vas lo pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus15:33 Oun pal kal laba hounte vell kerdo i djouvyah, kolat peskri djouvyakro koova hi, oun i morsheha, kay sovell khetne i djouvyah, kolat peskri djouvyakro koova hi." 
Leviticus16:1 Pal kova, kay anan o Aroneskre douy čave yaake soungepaskro koova glan o baro Debleste, har kova gar čačo his, oun doleske meran, penas o baro Devel ap o Moseste:" 
Leviticus16:2 Pen tiro phraleske, o Aroneske, te djal lo gar hako tsireske an o kouč isema an o Debleskro kheer, te merell lo gar. An koy isema, hoy pal ko kotar than hi, sikrau me man an i folka pral ko sonakaskro pralstouno kotar, hoy ap o morhton čiddo hi, kay mire deesh laba dren hi." 
Leviticus16:3 Te djal lo koy dren, hounte anas lo glan kova i terno gouroum, hoy vell maredo, te vell i doosh oun o pale-čiddo koova krik lino, ninna hounte anas lo i bakro, koleskro tselo mass rhačedo vell o Debleske." 
Leviticus16:4 Glanstounes hounte thovell lo pes, oun rivell i rashayengre koola an: ko layntikro gad, oun ko layntikro rholop koy tel. Yob pandell i pereskro layntikro pandepen troul peste, oun i shereskro pandepen troul peskro shero." 
Leviticus16:5 I Israelitarya anenn leske douy morsh bouzya oun yek bakro. I bouzya venn maredo, te vell i doosh oun o pale-čiddo koova krik lino. Oun o bakro vell maredo, te vell leskro tselo mass rhačedo o Debleske." 
Leviticus16:6 O Aron anell peske oun peskri familyake i gouroum, te vell lo maredo, te vell lengri doosh oun lengro pale-čiddo koova krik lino, oun lauter pale mishto mank o baro Debleste oun lende." 
Leviticus16:7 Palle lell yob kol douy morsh bouzya oun anell len pash o baro Debleste glan o voudar leskro plarhteno kherestar. 
Leviticus16:8 O Aron vitsrell douy tikne barra, te sikrenn le, havi bouzni o baro Debleske hi, oun havi bouzni an o moulo tato them tradedo vell." 
Leviticus16:9 Palle marell lo koy bouzni, hoy o baro Debleske hi, te vell i doosh oun o pale-čiddo koova krik lino." 
Leviticus16:10 Koy vavar bouzni vell djides glan o baro Debleste tardo, oun lake vell i doosh i menshendar pre-čiddo. Palle vell li an o moulo tato them tradedo." 
Leviticus16:11 O Aron marell ko gouroum, te vell i doosh oun o pale-čiddo koova lestar oun leskri familyatar krik lino, oun yon čačo oun erligo tardo hi glan o baro Debleste." 
Leviticus16:12 Palle djal lo pash ko sonakaskro bob, hoy glan o baro Debleste tardo hi, oun lell kolestar i sasterno čaro pherdo kasht, hoy rhačell, oun douy vasta pherdo soungepaskro koova, oun djal koleha pal ko voudar dran than an i kouč isema." 
Leviticus16:13 Kote čivell lo ko soungepaskro koova ap i yag, te djal i yagakro dourho vin oun čakrell ko pralstouno kotar ap ko morhton, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi. Kova hounte krell lo doleske, te merell lo gar." 
Leviticus16:14 Oun yob lell ko ratestar ko gouroumestar, oun vitsrell kova peskro goushteha glan ap o pralstouno kotar. Oun ap koy platsa glan o morhton vitsrell lo peskro goushteha efta kope čomone ko ratestar." 
Leviticus16:15 Palle marell yob koy morsh bouzni, te vell i doosh oun o pale-čiddo koova i menshendar Israel krik lino. Oun yob djal ko rateha pal i voudar dran than an i kouč isema, oun krell ko rateha yaake, har lo les ko rateha ko gouroumestar kras. Yob vitsrell peskro goushteha čomone ap o pralstouno kotar, hoy ap o morhton čiddo hi, oun ap koy platsa glan o morhton." 
Leviticus16:16 Oun yaake krell lo, te vell o pale-čiddo koova oun koy doosh, hoy i Israelitarya ap pende anan – lengro tselo čilačo koova, dran o Debleskri kouč isema krik lino. Oun yaake hounte krell lo ko tselo Debleskro plarhteno khereha. Kava kheer hi tardo ap i platsa, kay i Israelitarya djivenn. Oun koy doosh, hoy yon ap pende anenn oun lengro pale-čiddo koova krell ninna o Debleskro kheer pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus16:17 Kek mensho hounte vell an o Debleskro kheer an ko tselo tsiro, kay djal o Aron an o kouč isema dren, oun krell te vell o pale-čiddo koova oun koy doosh krik lino lestar, leskri familyatar oun i tsele Israelendar." 
Leviticus16:18 Palle djal yob vin pash koy rhačepaskri, hoy glan o baro Debleskro plarhteno kheer tardo hi, oun lell čomone ko gouroumeskro ratestar oun koy bouzyakro ratestar, oun makell kova ap i shinga, hoy ap i star ekke ap koy rhačepaskri hi, te vell koy doosh oun ko pale-čiddo koova krik lino foun koy rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus16:19 Oun yob čivell peskro goushto an o rat, oun vitsrell čomone ko ratestar ap i rhačepaskri. Kova krell lo efta kope, te vell i Israelengri doosh oun lengro pale-čiddo koova krik lino, hoy ap i rhačepaskri hi. Oun i rhačepaskri vell pale djoudjo glan o baro Debleskre yaka." 
Leviticus16:20 Te kras o Aron halauter, te vell i doosh oun o pale-čiddo koova krik lino dran o Debleskri kouč isema, dran o tselo Debleskro plarhteno kheer oun dran i rhačepaskri, palle anell lo koy djidi morsh bouzni kay," 
Leviticus16:21 oun čivell peskre douy vasta ap lakro shero, oun penell haki doosh oun hako čilačepen, hoy i Israelitarya kran. Yaake čivell lo kova lauter ap i bouzyakro shero. Palle moukell lo lat i morshestar, kay koleske koy tardo hi, krik te tradell an o moulo tato them." 
Leviticus16:22 Kay morsh bouzni hidjrell lengri tseli doosh peha an o divyo moulo them. Oun kote ačell li. 
Leviticus16:23 Pal kova djal o Aron an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer oun rivell kol layntikre koola vin, hoy yob ap peste rivas, har djas lo an o kheer dren. Oun kote čivell lo len pale tele." 
Leviticus16:24 Palle thovell lo pes ap i Debleskri platsa, oun rivell peskre koola an. Palle djal lo pale vin, marell kol douy bakre, ko yek peske, oun ko vavar i menshenge Israel, oun rhačrell lengro tselo mass o baro Debleske, te vell i doosh oun o pale-čiddo koova krik lino lestar oun kol menshendar Israel." 
Leviticus16:25 Kol thoulle kotya kol firhendar, hoy maredo van, te vell i doosh oun o pale-čiddo koova krik lino, kal kotya rhačrell lo ninna ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus16:26 Ko morsh, kay tradas koy morsh bouzni an o moulo divyo them, hounte thovell pes oun peskre koola, glan te nay djal lo pale ap i platsa, kay i menshe djivenn." 
Leviticus16:27 Kova, hoy pral ačas ko terno gouroumestar oun koy morsh bouzyatar, kolengro rat an i kouč isema anlo vas, te vell i doosh oun o pale-čiddo koova krik lino, kol kotya anell yek vin glan i platsa, kay i menshe hi, oun rhačrell kote lauter, koy hauta, ko mass, oun kol bouke." 
Leviticus16:28 Ko morsh, kay kova lauter rhačras, kova hounte thovell pes oun peskre koola. Pal kova nay vell lo pale ap i platsa, kay i menshe djivenn." 
Leviticus16:29 Kava lauter hounte vell kerdo ap o deshto dives an o eftato čon. Oun yaake hounte krenn t'mer hako tsireske. Ma rhan ap ko dives! Ma krenn i boudi, t'mer gar oun vitar gar i vi-themarya, kay mank t'mende djivenn." 
Leviticus16:30 Ap kava dives vell t'mari tseli doosh oun ko tselo pale-čiddo koova, hoy ap t'mende hi, krik lino. Oun lauter vell pale mishto mank o baro Debleste oun t'mende." 
Leviticus16:31 Kava Debleskro dives hi i dives, kay han kokres o baro Debleske koy. Oun t'mer nay krenn kek boudi, oun rhan či. Yaake vell kava kerdo an hako tsiro, hoy vella." 
Leviticus16:32 Oun kokres savo rashay krell, te vell i doosh oun o pale-čiddo koova krik lino, koleske djet ap leskro shero čoredo vas, te vas lo rashay pal peskro dadeste, o Aroneste. Oun yob hounte rivell kol layntikre koola an, hoy i rashayenge hi," 
Leviticus16:33 oun lell i doosh oun o pale-čiddo koova krik, hoy hi an o Debleskri kouč isema, an o tselo Debleskro plarhteno kheer, ap i rhačepaskri, ap i rashaya oun ap i tsele menshende Israel." 
Leviticus16:34 Yek kopo an o bersh hounte vell kova yaake kerdo, te vell i tseli doosh oun o tselo pale-čiddo koova i Israelendar krik lino. Ap kava lab hounte rikrenn t'men hako tsireske. Oun o Aron kras halauter yaake, har o baro Devel kova o Moseske penas." 
Leviticus17:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus17:2 Pen ap o Aron oun leskre morsh čavende oun ap i tsele Israelitarya: Kava hi, hoy o baro Devel t'menge penell:" 
Leviticus17:3 Hako morsh dran o kheer Israel, kay kamell i gouroum, i bakro oder i bouzni te marell, hounte krell kova glan o voudar o Debleskro plarhteno kherestar, te vell ko firho o baro Debleske dino. Yob hounte krell kova gar ap i platsa, kay i menshe djivenn, vitar gar glan koy platsa. Te rikrell lo pes gar ap kova, anell lo rat ap peste har yek, kay i menshes marell. Savo mensho vell pale-čiddo oun nay djivell bouder gar mank peskre menshende." 
Leviticus17:4  
Leviticus17:5 Bis kanna maran i Israelitarya pengre firhen vin ap o them. Kanna hounte anenn le len o baro Debleske glan o voudar leskro plarhteno kherestar pash o rashayeste. Oun kote venn le maredo, te rhan le len khetne glan o baro Debleste." 
Leviticus17:6 O rashay lell ko rat oun vitsrell čomone lestar ap o baro Debleskri rhačepaskri, hoy glan o voudar leskro plarhteno kherestar tardo hi. Oun rhačrell o thulepen ko firhestar koy pre. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy vell vin, soungell mishto o baro Debleste." 
Leviticus17:7 I Israelitarya hounte marenn bouder kek firhen i bengenge, kolenge yon kanna gomme palla nashenn. Ap kova hounte rikrenn le pen, ninna lengre čavenge oun kolengre čavenge oun yaake doureder hako tsireske." 
Leviticus17:8 Tou peness lenge: Hako morsh dran o kheer Israel, ninna hako vi-themari, kay mank t'mende djivell, kay kamell i firhes o baro Debleske te marell, sau firho, koleskro tselo mass rhačedo vell, oder sau firho, hoy rhan le khetne glan o baro Debleste," 
Leviticus17:9 kova hounte anell les glan o voudar o Debleskro plarhteno kherestar, te vell lo kote o baro Debleske maredo. Koon kova gar krell, vell pale-čiddo oun nay djivell bouder gar mank peskre menshende." 
Leviticus17:10 Hako Israelitari, ninna hako vi-themari, kay mank t'mende djivell, kay rat rhal, havo ninna hi, koleske sikrau miro doumo, oun krau, te djivell lo bouder gar mank mire menshende." 
Leviticus17:11 An o rat hi o djipen. Oun me kamau, te vell lo ap i rhačepaskri anlo, te vell i doosh oun o pale-čiddo koova t'mendar krik lino. An o rat hi o djipen. Doleske lau leha i doosh oun o pale-čiddo krik." 
Leviticus17:12 Doleske penom me ap i Israelitarya: Kek t'mendar rhal rat. Vitar kek vi-themari, kay mank t'mende djivell, rhal rat." 
Leviticus17:13 Hako Israelitari oun hako vi-themari, kay taprell penge i divyo firho oder i čirklo, hoy yek nay rhal, hounte moukell leskro rat vin nashell ap i phoub oun čakrell čik koy pre." 
Leviticus17:14 An o rat hi o djipen. Doleske penom me ap i Israelitarya: Ma rhan rat! Koon les rhal, vell pale-čiddo oun nay djivell bouder gar mank peskre menshende!" 
Leviticus17:15 Hakeno, kay rhal i firho, hoy meras oder moulo dandedo vas, kova hounte thovell pes oun peskre koola, oun ačell pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati. Koy pal hi lo pale erligo. Hi yek, te hi kova i Israelitari oder i vi-themari." 
Leviticus17:16 Te thovell lo pes gar, vitar gar peskre koola, hounte hidjrell lo peskri phagi." 
Leviticus18:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus18:2 Pen ap i Israelitarya: Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel." 
Leviticus18:3 Ma djivenn yaake har i Egiptarya, an kolengro them djivan, vitar gar har kolla an o them Kanaan, kote kay t'men anau. Ma djivenn pal lengro koova." 
Leviticus18:4 Pal miro čačepen hounte djivenn, oun krenn, hoy me t'mendar kamau. Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel." 
Leviticus18:5 Doleske krenn, hoy me t'mendar kamau, oun djivenn pal miro čačepen. I mensho, kay rikrell pes ap kova, koles hi čačepah o djipen. Me hom o baro Devel." 
Leviticus18:6 Kek t'mendar hounte sovell i djouvyah dran peskri familya. Kova penau me, o baro Devel." 
Leviticus18:7 Tou sovess gar tiri dah, te aness kek ladj ap tiro dadeste. Yoy hi tiri day." 
Leviticus18:8 Tou sovess gar i vavar romyah tiro dadestar, te aness kek ladj ap tiro dadeste." 
Leviticus18:9 Tou sovess gar tiri phenyah, koy čay tiro dadestar oder tiri datar; hi yek te vas li bares an tiri familya oder an i vavar familya." 
Leviticus18:10 Tou sovess gar i mit i čay tiro čavestar oder tiri čatar, te aness kek ladj ap toute." 
Leviticus18:11 Tou sovess gar mit i čay tiro dadeskri romyatar. Yoy hi tiri pheen. 
Leviticus18:12 Tou sovess gar tiri bibyah, koy pheen tiro dadestar. Yoy hi leskro ratestar." 
Leviticus18:13 Tou sovess gar tiri bibyah, koy pheen tiri datar. Yoy hi lakro ratestar." 
Leviticus18:14 Tou sovess gar i romyah tiro kakestar. Yoy hi tiri bibi. 
Leviticus18:15 Tou sovess gar tiro čaveskri romyah. 
Leviticus18:16 Tou sovess gar tiro phraleskri romyah, te aness kek ladj ap tiro phraleste." 
Leviticus18:17 Tou sovess gar i djouvyah oun ninna mit lakri čay, oder lakro čaveskri čay oder lakri čakri čay. Kalla hi lakro ratestar. Kava vals i vi-ladjedo koova." 
Leviticus18:18 Tou less gar i phenyat tiri romyatar, te vell li tiri douyti romni, yaake rah har tiri romni djivell." 
Leviticus18:19 Tou sovess gar i djouvyah yaake rah har lat peskri djouvyakro koova hi. 
Leviticus18:20 Tou sovess gar i romyah i vavarestar, te kress tout gar pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus18:21 Tou rhačress kek tire čavendar o rhorheno debleske Molok. Sau koova sikrals, te hom me, tiro Devel, touke či moldo. Me hom o baro Devel!" 
Leviticus18:22 Kek morsh te sovell i vavar morsheha. I baro pale-čiddo koova hi sau kova. 
Leviticus18:23 Kek morsh oun kek djouvel te sovell i firheha. Koon kova krell, krell pes pale-čiddo oun anell bari ladj ap peste." 
Leviticus18:24 Ma krenn t'men sau koveha pale-čiddo! Kova lauter kras kol vavar menshe pale-čiddo, kolen me glan t'mende dran o them vin tradau." 
Leviticus18:25 O tselo them vas koleha pale-čiddo kerdo. Me anau lengri doosh ap lende pale, oun krau, te venn kol menshe vin tradedo dran ko them, kay le djivenn." 
Leviticus18:26 Doleske krenn kova, hoy me t'mendar kamau, oun djivenn pal miro čačepen, t'mer oun ninna ko vi-themari, kay mank t'mende djivell! Krenn kek savo pale-čiddo koova," 
Leviticus18:27 hoy kolla kran, kay glan t'mende kate djivan oun o them pale-čiddo kran." 
Leviticus18:28 Te krenn t'mer kava them ninna pale-čiddo, venn t'mer dran kava them vin tradedo har kol vavar menshe, kay glan t'mende kay his." 
Leviticus18:29 Hakeno, koon sau pale-čiddo koova krell, vell infam, oun nay djivell bouder gar mank peskre menshende." 
Leviticus18:30 Doleske, djivenn yaake har me t'menge penom! Ma krenn ko pale-čiddo koova, hoy kolla kran, kay glan t'mende kate his! Ma krenn t'men savo koveha pale-čiddo! Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel." 
Leviticus19:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus19:2 Pen ap i tsele Israelitarya: Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel. Kek vavar hi har me. An mande hi kek čilačepen. Oun t'mer hounte djivenn yaake har i Debleskre menshe djivenn." 
Leviticus19:3 Hakeno t'mendar hounte dikell pre ap peskri date oun ap peskro dadeste, oun hounte rikrell o Debleskro dives! Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel." 
Leviticus19:4 Ma nashenn i rhorhene deblen palla! Krenn t'men kek debla t'mare vastentsa! Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel." 
Leviticus19:5 Te anenn t'mer i firho o baro Debleske, te rhan les khetne glan leste, palle krenn kova yaake, te dikap lačes ap t'mende!" 
Leviticus19:6 Rhan ko mass ko emligo dives, kay maran ko firhes, oder ko vavar dives. Hi gomme o triinto dives čomone pral, hounte vell kova an i yag rhačedo." 
Leviticus19:7 Te rhal yek ap o triinto dives gomme ko massestar, palle dikell o baro Devel gar lačes ap kova oun ap koleste, kay anas ko firho glan leste. O mass vas pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus19:8 Oun koon rhal kolestar, hounte hidjrell peskri doosh, hoy yob koleha ap peste las. Yob kras, har te vals ko firho, hoy mange, o baro Debleske, dino vas, gar feteder har hako vavar mass. Savo mensho vell pale-čiddo oun nay djivell bouder gar mank peskre menshende." 
Leviticus19:9 Te anenn t'mer o djob dren ap t'maro them, činenn gar o djob ap i tseli kotar phoub tele. Moukenn čomone ap i rigya tardo. Djan vitar gar i douyto kopo pral ko kotar phoub, te hadenn kova pre, hoy tele peras." 
Leviticus19:10 Yaake krenn ninna t'mare drakentsa. Har anan len dren, ma djan i douyto kopo ap ko kotar phoub, te anenn kolla dren, kay pral ačan, vitar gar save, kay tele peran. Kol čorvelenge, oun kolenge dran i vi-them, moukenn len pral! Me, baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel." 
Leviticus19:11 Ma čorenn! Ma rakrenn rhorhepen! Ma krenn rhorheno koova yek o vavareske! 
Leviticus19:12 Ma denn t'men i rhorheno sovel pash miro lab! Sau koveha anenn t'mer ladj ap miro lab. Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel." 
Leviticus19:13 Tou rikress gar o vavares tele oun randess les gar vin. Tou dess i boudepaskres, kay boudrell touke yek dives peskre love ap i rat, oun rikress kol love gar pral i rat pash toute." 
Leviticus19:14 Ma praase yekes, kay nay shounell gar. Oun ma čip i koreleske čomone an o drom, te perell lo vergel. Rike touke tiro Debles glan i yaka pash halauter, hoy kreh! Me hom o baro Devel." 
Leviticus19:15 Te vell o čačepen vin kerdo, palle de koles peskro čačepen, koles čačo hi! Ma tserde koles glan, kay čorvelo hi, vitar gar koles, kay bravelo hi. Hakeno hounte lell peskro čačepen." 
Leviticus19:16 Ma dja trouyel oun pen rhorhepen pral i vavarende! Te hounte peneh vin glan i čačepangre, ma pen rhorhepen, te aness o vavares an o merepen. Me hom o baro Devel." 
Leviticus19:17 Te rhoyral tout pral yekeste tire menshendar, ma hidje tiri rholi touha trouyel. Pen leske, hoy lo gar mishto kras, te aness kek doosh ap toute." 
Leviticus19:18 Ma de o čilačepen pale, hoy i vavar ap toute kras, oun hidje leske či palla. Tou vess yaake lačes ap leste, har hal lačes ap toute kokres. Me hom o baro Devel." 
Leviticus19:19 Djivenn pal kol laba, hoy t'mende sikrenn, hoy me t'mendar kamau! Fiche dran douy vavar mass, moukess tou gar khetne te vell, te nay krenn le terne. Ap tiro kotar phoub, ma vitse douy koova vin, te vell kova bares. I ripen kerdo dran douy vavar thaba, vell gar ap toute!" 
Leviticus19:20 Te hi i morshes i pirni, kay i ginli boudepaskretsa hi, oun yoy hi gar vin mouklo oder vin ginlo, oun i vavar morsh sovell lah, hounte lell lo peskri phagi. Kal douy hounte merenn gar." 
Leviticus19:21 Ko morsh anell i bakro glan o voudar o baro Debleskro kherestar, te vell peskri doosh pale mishto." 
Leviticus19:22 Ko rashay marell ko bakro glan o baro Debleste, te vell ko morsheskri doosh pale mishto. Oun o baro Devel bistrell leskri doosh, hoy lo ap peste anas." 
Leviticus19:23 Te venn t'mer an ko them, oun čivenn boud rouka an i phoub, kolendar t'mer nay rhan, palle rhan gar lendar i glanstoune triin bersha, har te vans le pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus19:24 O starto bersh vell lauter, hoy kol rouka hidjran, o baro Debleske anlo, te parkrenn t'men pash leste." 
Leviticus19:25 An o pančto bersh rhan t'mer kova, hoy kol rouka hidjrenn. Te krenn t'mer kova yaake, palle vell kova hoy t'men dren lenn, boudeder oun boudeder. Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel." 
Leviticus19:26 Ma rhan mass, kay rat dren hi. Ma dourkrenn! Ma krenn bengeskro koova!" 
Leviticus19:27 Ma činenn t'mare balla ap i rigya t'maro sherestar! Ma činenn t'mari čor tiknes! 
Leviticus19:28 Ma činenn t'men an t'maro mass, te meras yek. Kek sikepen krenn ap t'mende! Me hom o baro Devel." 
Leviticus19:29 Ma biče tiri čay kote, kay i rhorhene debla an-mangedo venn, te vell li kote i loubni. Tou te kreh kova, hi sik boud loubya an o them, oun o tselo them vell pherdo vi-ladjedo koova." 
Leviticus19:30 Rikrenn mire Debleskre divessa dren, oun anenn kek ladj ap miro kheer. Me hom o baro Devel." 
Leviticus19:31 Ma djan pash i dourkepangre oun pash kolende, kay i moulen poučenn! Ma rodenn saven pre, te krenn t'men gar pale-čiddo ap lende. Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel." 
Leviticus19:32 Glan phoure menshende stess tou pre oun dikess pre ap lende. Tou rikress tiro Debles glan tire yaka pash halauter, hoy kreh! Me hom o baro Devel." 
Leviticus19:33 Te djivell i vi-themarya an t'maro them, palle rikrenn les gar tele!" 
Leviticus19:34 Djan leha yaake trouyel, har te vals lo yek t'mendar! Tou vess yaake lačes ap leste har hal lačes ap toute. T'mer ninna hans vi-themarya an o them Egiptia. Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel." 
Leviticus19:35 Krenn kek rhorhepen, te venn khetne te krenn o čačepen vin! Ma rhorhenn vitar gar te dikenn palla, har baro oder pharo oder boud čomone hi!" 
Leviticus19:36 I vaga, hoy sikrell har pharo čomone hi, hounte sikrell kova an o čačepen. Ninna kol barra, hoy pre čivenn, hounte venn yaake pharo har čačo hi. Oun kol pirya, kolentsa t'mer palla dikenn, har boud čomone hi, kolla hounte venn yaake baro har čačo hi. Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel, kay t'men dran o them Egiptia vin anas." 
Leviticus19:37 Krenn halauter, hoy me t'mendar kamau, oun rikrenn ap miro čačepen! Me hom o baro Devel." 
Leviticus20:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus20:2 Pen ap i Israelitarya: Koon t'mendar yek peskre čavendar o rhorheno debleste, o Molok, das, kova hounte merell. I tsele menshe hounte vitsrenn les i barrentsa moulo. Kova hi ninna yaake, te krell sau koova i vi-themari, kay pash t'mende djivell." 
Leviticus20:3 Me dikau čilačes ap hakeneste, kay kova krell, oun me moukau les bouder gar te djivell mank peskre menshende. Yob das yek peskre čavendar o Molokeste, oun kras yaake miro kheer pale-čiddo, oun kras mantsa, har te voms gar kokres o čačo Devel." 
Leviticus20:4 Te pandan i Israelitarya pengre yaka glan kova, hoy ko morsh kras, oun denn les gar moulo," 
Leviticus20:5 palle dau me kokres ko morshes peskri phagi, ninna leskre menshen. Me moukau les oun hakenes, kay ko debles Molok pal nashas, bouder gar mank pengre menshende te djivell." 
Leviticus20:6 Miri rholi vell ninna ap koleste, kay djal pash i dourkepangre oun pash kolende, kay i moulen poučenn, te poučell lo lendar, hoy te krell lo. Me moukau les bouder gar mank peskre menshende te djivell." 
Leviticus20:7 Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel. Doleske avenn mange kokres koy. Či hounte vell tardo mank mande oun t'mende!" 
Leviticus20:8 Krenn, hoy me t'mendar kamau! Rikrenn t'men ap kova! Me, o baro Devel, rodom t'men vin, te venn mire menshe." 
Leviticus20:9 Te rakrell yek pral peskro dadeste oder peskri date bibarht vin, palle hounte vell lo moulo dino. Koon savo koova krell, ap koleste vell leskro rat." 
Leviticus20:10 Te sovell yek i romyah i vavarestar, hounte venn kol douy maredo." 
Leviticus20:11 Te sovell i morsh i romyah peskro dadestar, anell lo ladj ap peskro dadeste. Yob oun koy djouvel hounte hidjrenn pengri phagi, oun hounte venn maredo." 
Leviticus20:12 Te sovell i morsh peskro čaveskri romyah, hounte hidjrenn le pengri phagi oun hounte venn maredo. I baro vi-ladjedo koova kran le." 
Leviticus20:13 Te sovell i morsh i vavar morsheha, krenn le i baro pale-čiddo koova. Kol douy hounte hidjrenn le pengri phagi oun hounte venn maredo." 
Leviticus20:14 Te lell i morsh i romyat oun lakri dat gomme pashel, hi kova i vi-ladjedo koova. Yob hounte vell an i yag rhačedo, oun kol douy djouvya ninna. Kamau te vell kek vi-ladjedo koova mank t'mende." 
Leviticus20:15 Te sovell i morsh i firheha, palle hounte vell lo moulo dino. Oun ko firho vell ninna maredo." 
Leviticus20:16 Te sovell i djouvel i firheha, palle dess tou koy djouvyat oun ko firhes moulo. Yon hounte hidjrenn pengri phagi, oun hounte merenn." 
Leviticus20:17 Te sovell i morsh peskri penyah, i čay leskro dadestar oder leskri datar, hi kova i bari ladj. Kol douy hounte venn moulo dino glan i tsele menshende. Ko morsh sovas peskri phenyah, oun hounte hidjrell peskri doosh." 
Leviticus20:18 Te sovell i morsh i djouvyah, kolat peskri djouvyakro koova hi, krenn pen kol douy pale-čiddo, oun nay djivenn bouder gar mank pengre menshende." 
Leviticus20:19 Kek te sovell i phenyah peskri datar oder peskro dadestar. Koon savo koova krell, anell ladj ap peskri bibi. Yon hounte hidjrenn pengri doosh." 
Leviticus20:20 Koon i romyah peskro kakestar sovell, anell ladj ap peskro kakeste. Kol douy hounte hidjrenn pengri doosh. Yon merenn kek čaventsa." 
Leviticus20:21 Te sovell i morsh i romyah peskro phralestar, hi kova i pale-čiddo koova. Yob anas ladj ap peskro phraleste. Kek čave vell len." 
Leviticus20:22 Krenn kova, hoy me t'mendar kamau oun rikrenn t'men ap miro čačepen, te venn gar vin tradedo dran ko them, an kova me t'men anau, te djivenn koy dren." 
Leviticus20:23 Ma djivenn pal ko koova, pal kova i vavar menshe djivenn, kolen me glan t'mende vin tradau. Yon kran kava tselo pale-čiddo koova, oun van infam glan mire yaka." 
Leviticus20:24 T'menge penau: Lengro them dau t'mende, te vell lo t'maro. Kova hi i them, kay boud thoud oun gvin hi. Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel, oun rodom t'men mange dran i vavar themma vin." 
Leviticus20:25 Doleske ma rhan save firhen oun čirklen, hoy čivom ap i rig, te venn le t'menge pale-čiddo. T'mer hounte djinenn, have firhen nay rhan oun haven nay rhan gar, ninna have čirklen nay rhan oun haven nay rhan gar. Ma krenn t'men pale-čiddo kol firhentsa oun čirklentsa oun tikne firhentsa, hoy djan pral i phoub, hoy hi t'menge pale-čiddo. Te rhan t'mer save firhen, venn t'mer ninna pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus20:26 Me hom o baro Devel. Kek vavar hi har me. An mande hi kek čilačepen. Oun t'men rodom vin dran i vavar themma, te venn t'mer miro. Doleske hounte venn kokres mange oun djivenn har i Debleskre menshe djivenn." 
Leviticus20:27 Hako morsh oun haki djouvel, kay dourkrell oder poučell i moulen, hounte hidjrell peskri phagi oun merell. T'mer hounte vitsrenn len moulo i barrentsa." 
Leviticus21:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: Pen i rashayenge dran o kheer Aron: Ma taprenn i moules an, te venn gar pale-čiddo!" 
Leviticus21:2 Kokres saven dran t'mare familye nay taprenn an, ninna te venn t'mer palle pale-čiddo: T'mari day, t'maro dad, t'maro čavo, t'mari čay, t'maro phraal," 
Leviticus21:3 t'mari pheen, kay gomme gar romedini hi, oun an t'maro kheer djivell. Kal moulen nay taprenn an, ninna te krell kova t'men pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus21:4 Ma krenn t'men pale-čiddo ap yekeste, kay hi romedino yekeha t'mare menshendar!" 
Leviticus21:5 T'mer rashaya, ma činenn t'mare balla pral ap t'maro shero tele, vitar gar t'mari čor. Krenn t'menge kek činepen an t'maro mass!" 
Leviticus21:6 T'mer rashaya hounte djivenn yaake, te han kokres t'maro Debleske, oun hounte krenn či, hoy anell ladj ap leskro lab. T'mer han kolla, kay anenn leske rhapen, hoy vell leske rhačedo. Doleske hounte krenn či, hoy krell t'men pale-čiddo." 
Leviticus21:7 I rashay hounte vell peskro Debleske koy. Doleske hounte romedinerell lo kek loubni, vitar gar i čay, kay i morshestar an-tapedo vas, vitar gar i djouvel, kay peskro romestar mouklo vas." 
Leviticus21:8 T'mer Israelitarya, i rashay hi t'menge i Debleskro morsh! Yob rhačrell glan mande o rhapen, hoy mange anlo vell. Doleske vell lo t'menge i morsh, koles vi-rodom, te boudrell lo mange. Me hom o baro Devel. Kek vavar hi har me. Oun t'men rodom mange vin, te venn mire menshe." 
Leviticus21:9 Te vell i rashayeskri čay i loubni, anell i bari ladj ap peste oun peskro dadeste. Yoy vell an i yag rhačedo." 
Leviticus21:10 O pralstouno rashay, ap koleskro shero o djet čoredo vas, har vas lo an peskri boudi dren čiddo, oun ap koleste i rashayengre koola hi, kova moukell peskro shero gar divyes vin dikell. Oun kol koola, hoy lo ap peste hi, tserdell lo gar an kotya, ap ko tsiro, kay rovell leskro dji pral i mouleste." 
Leviticus21:11 Pash kek mouleste djal lo, te vell lo gar pale-čiddo, vitar gar, te hi ko moulo peskro dad oder peskri day." 
Leviticus21:12 Yaake rah har i moulo an peskro kheer hi, hounte djal lo gar dran o Debleskro kheer vin, te krell lo gar o kheer peskro Deblestar pale-čiddo. Yob vas djeteha maklo, te vell lo i rashay peskro Debleske. Me hom o baro Devel." 
Leviticus21:13 Yob nay romedinerell kokres i čat, kay kek morshestar an-tapedo vas," 
Leviticus21:14 kek djouvel kolakro rom meras, kek djouvel, kay peskro romestar mouklo vas, kek loubni, – kokres i čay i menshendar Israel." 
Leviticus21:15 Kova hounte krell lo, te lell lo gar čave, kay pale-čiddo vans. Me hom o baro Devel, oun rodom les mange vin, te vell lo miro rashay." 
Leviticus21:16 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus21:17 Pen ap o Aron: Kek tire čavendar, kay pal toute venna, vell glan o Debleskri rhačepaskri, te anell lo rhapen glan peskro Debleste," 
Leviticus21:18 te hi lo korelo, bango, te hi leskro shero oder leskro kerpro gar yaake, har hounte vals lo," 
Leviticus21:19 te hi les i phagedo piro oder i phagedo vast," 
Leviticus21:20 te hi les i bango doumo, te hi lo yek, kay tikno ačas, oder koles i parno kotar an i yak hi, oder i nasslepen ap peskri hauta hi, oder yek, koleske tella lauter pash dino hi." 
Leviticus21:21 Kek morsh, kay vell o rashayestar o Aronestar, oun kay savo koova ap peste hi, nay vell glan o Debleskri rhačepaskri, te rhačrell lo rhapen o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus21:22 Ko rhapen, hoy o Debleske anlo vas, nay rhal lo, ninna ko rhapen, hoy kokres i rashayenge hi." 
Leviticus21:23 Pash ko voudar dran than, hoy glan koy kouč isema hi, nay djal lo gar, vitar gar pash o Debleskri rhačepaskri, te krell lo o Debleskro kheer gar pale-čiddo. Me hom o baro Devel, oun rodom kava kheer vin, te hi lo mange." 
Leviticus21:24 Yaake rakras o Mose ap o Aroneste oun ap leskre morsh čavende oun ap i tsele Israelitaryen. 
Leviticus22:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus22:2 Pen ap o Aron oun ap leskre morsh čavende, te djan le mishto trouyel ko koveha, hoy i Israelitarya mange anenn, te anenn le kek ladj ap mande. Me hom o baro Devel." 
Leviticus22:3 Pen lenge: Kava lab hi hakeneske t'mare morsh čavendar, kay pal t'mende venna: Hakeno lendar, koles i pale-čiddo koova ap leste hi, oun kay vell pash kova, hoy anan i Israelitarya mange, o baro Debleske, kova nay ačell bouder gar miro rashay. Me hom o baro Devel." 
Leviticus22:4 Kones o Aroneskre čavendar i djoungelo nasslepen ap peskri hauta hi, oder koleske čomone dran leskro morshkano mass nashell, kova te rhal gar foun ko rhapen, hoy mange anlo vas, bis te hi lo pale erligo. Hako rashay, koon yekes an tapras, kay kras pes i mouleha pale-čiddo, oder koleske yek tele djas," 
Leviticus22:5 kova vell pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati. Kova hi ninna yaake, te tapras lo i tikno pale-čiddo firhes an, hoy djal pral i phoub, oder i menshes, kay pale-čiddo hi, hoy kova ninna hi. Savo ačell pale-čiddo, bis te vell rati, oun nay rhal gar foun ko rhapen, hoy o baro Debleske anlo vell, bis te thovas lo pes." 
Leviticus22:6  
Leviticus22:7 Te djas o kham tele, palle hi lo pale erligo, oun nay rhal foun ko rhapen, hoy o Debleske anlo vas. Kova hi kova, kolestar yob djivell." 
Leviticus22:8 I moulo oun khetne dandedo firhes rhal lo gar, te krell lo pes koleha gar pale-čiddo. Me hom o baro Devel." 
Leviticus22:9 I rashaya hounte rikrenn halauter, hoy lenge penom, te lenn le kek doosh ap pende, oun merenn doleske, kay djan le gar o Debleskro koova yaake trouyel, har hounte krans le. Me hom o baro Devel, oun rodom len vin, te venn le mire rashaya." 
Leviticus22:10 Kek vavar rhal foun ko rhapen, hoy mange anlo vell, vitar gar kova, kay yek tsiro pash o rashayeste djivell, oder kova, kay i dives pash o rashayeste boudrell oun lestar playsedo vell." 
Leviticus22:11 I boudepaskro, koles o rashay peskre loventsa ginas, kova nay rhal kolestar. Ninna i boudepaskres, kay an leskro kheer boldo vas, kova nay rhal foun ko rhapen." 
Leviticus22:12 Te vell o rashayeskri čay i romni i morshestar, kay kek rashay hi, palle rhal li gar bouder foun ko rhapen, hoy glan o baro Debleske anlo vas." 
Leviticus22:13 Te meras lakro rom oder moukas lat, oun lat hi kek čave, oun yoy djal pale an peskro dadeskro kheer, palle nay rhal li foun peskro dadeskro rhapen yaake har kras li, har li terni his. Kokres kolla dran o rashayeskri familya nay rhan foun ko rhapen, hoy o baro Debleske anlo vas." 
Leviticus22:14 Te rhas i vavar kolestar, hoy i rashayeske hi, oun djinas kova gar, hounte dell lo ko rhapen o rashayeste pale, oun gomme o pančto kotar pashel." 
Leviticus22:15 I rashaya hounte moukenn kek vavares kolestar te rhal, hoy mange, o baro Debleske, dino vas, oun kokres i rashaya nay rhan." 
Leviticus22:16 Te moukenn le vavar Israelitaryen kolestar te rhal, anenn le bari doosh ap i Israelitaryen. Me hom o baro Devel. Oun kova, hoy i Israelitarya mange anenn, hi kokres mange." 
Leviticus22:17 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus22:18 Pen ap o Aron oun ap leskre morsh čavende, oun ap i tsele Israelitaryen: Hako Israelitari oun hako vi-themari, kay pash t'mende djivell, oun kay kamell o baro Debleske i firhes te anell, te vell kova leske rhačedo, – nay vell te dell lo les pestar, nay vell, te dell lo les pal kova, hoy lo pes sovel das," 
Leviticus22:19 palle hounte rodell lo i firhes vin i groumyendar, bakrendar oder bouzyendar, hoy i morsh hi oun sasto, te dikell o baro Devel lačes ap leste." 
Leviticus22:20 Te anenn t'mer leske i firhes, hoy gar sasto hi, dikell lo gar lačes ap t'mende." 
Leviticus22:21 Te anell yek i groumyat oder i bakres glan o baro Debleste, hoy rhan i menshe glan leste – nay vell i firho, hoy lo pestar das, nay vell i firho, koleha yob kamell peskri sovel, hoy yob das, dren rikrell – palle hounte vell ko firho sasto, te dikell o baro Devel lačes ap leste." 
Leviticus22:22 I firho, hoy korelo oder doukedo hi, yek, koles i phagedi heri hi, oder i doukepen oder i nasslepen ap i hauta hi, saves ma anenn glan o baro Debleste, te rhačrenn les ap leskri rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus22:23 Grumya oun bakre, kolen i lengsteder heri hi oder i tikneder heri, sau firhes nay anell yek glan o baro Debleste, te dell lo les pestar kokres. Te anell lo les, te rikrell lo peskri sovel dren, hi kova gar lačo glan o baro Debleskre yaka." 
Leviticus22:24 I firho koleskre yare paash dino, oder vin činlo hi, ma anenn glan o baro Debleste! An t'maro them ma krenn sau koova ap i firheste!" 
Leviticus22:25 Ginenn vitar gar sau firho yekestar, kay kek Israelitari hi, te anenn les glan t'maro Debleste. Save firhe hi bouder gar boud moldo. Ap savende dikell o baro Devel bouder gar lačes." 
Leviticus22:26 O baro Devel penas doureder ap o Mose: 
Leviticus22:27 Te vell i tikni groumni, i tikno bakro oder i tikni bouzni boldo, palle vell kava ternepen efta divessa pash peskri date. Pal o orhtato dives nay aneh les o baro Debleske, te vell les leske maredo. Palle dikell lo lačes ap leste." 
Leviticus22:28 Ma marenn i groumni oder i bakro oun leskro ternepen ap ko emligo dives! 
Leviticus22:29 Te marenn t'mer i firhes o baro Debleske, te parkrenn t'men koleha pash leste, palle rhan les ap ko emligo dives, te dikell o baro Devel lačes ap t'mende! Ma moukenn čomone pral bis ap o vavar dives! Me hom o baro Devel." 
Leviticus22:30  
Leviticus22:31 Rikrenn t'men ap kova, hoy t'menge penau! Oun djivenn pal kova! Me hom o baro Devel." 
Leviticus22:32 Ma anenn ladj ap miro lab! T'mer, Israelitarya, hounte djinenn, te hom me kokres t'maro Devel! Me, o baro Devel, rodom t'men vin, te venn mire menshe," 
Leviticus22:33 oun anom t'men dran o them Egiptia vin, te vap t'maro Devel, me, o baro Devel." 
Leviticus23:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus23:2 Pen ap i Israelitarya: Kalla hi i bare divessa, kay venn t'mer khetne, te vell o baro Devel sharedo." 
Leviticus23:3 Rikrenn o Debleskro dives! Shob divessa boudrenn, ap o eftato dives krenn kek boudi! Ko dives hi o baro Debleske. Ap leste avenn khetne glan leste! Ap kava dives krenn kek boudi, kay t'mer ninna djivenna!" 
Leviticus23:4 Kalla hi i bare divessa, kay venn t'mer khetne, te vell o baro Devel sharedo. Denn kal divessa vin gole ap pengro tsiro." 
Leviticus23:5 Ap o 14. (deesh-te-starto) dives an o ersto čon, har o kham tele djas, vell ko dives, hoy hi o baro Debleske. Kava dives kharell Passa." 
Leviticus23:6 Oun o 15. (deesh-te-pančto) dives ninna an ko čon, hi ko ersto dives kol divessa, kay hounte rhan kek maro dran shoutlo yarro. Efta divessa rhan t'mer kek maro, an koleste shoutlo yarro hi." 
Leviticus23:7 Ap o ersto dives hounte venn khetne glan o baro Debleste. Kek hounte boudrell ap ko dives. 
Leviticus23:8 Efta divessa rhačrenn firhen o baro Debleske. Ap o eftato dives hounte venn pale khetne, te vell o baro Devel sharedo. Ap ko dives hounte krenn vitar kek boudi." 
Leviticus23:9 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus23:10 Pen ap i Israelitarya: Te venn an ko them, hoy me t'men dau, oun t'mer činenn o nevo djob tele oun pandenn les khetne, palle anenn ko ersto pandepen nevo djob glan o rashayeste." 
Leviticus23:11 Yob hadell kova pre glan o baro Debleste, te sikrell lo, kay kova o Debleske hi. Palle dikell o baro Devel lačes ap t'mende. Kova krell o rashay ap o dives pal o Debleskro dives." 
Leviticus23:12 Ap ko dives, kay hadell o rashay t'maro nevo djob pre glan o Debleste, hounte anenn t'mer i terno bakro, hoy yek bersh phouro hi oun sasto hi, te vell lo rhačedo o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus23:13 Koy pashel anenn glan leste douy-te-paash kilogramme lačo yarro, kay djet dren hi. Kava rhapen vell leske rhačedo. Oun ko lačo soungepen, hoy vell vin, soungella mishto o baro Debleske. Koy pashel anenn yek litari mool, hoy vell vin čoredo glan leste." 
Leviticus23:14 Rhan kek maro dran o nevo djob, vitar gar peklo djob oder terno djob, bis te anan t'maro Debleske leskro kotar kolestar. Kava lab hi t'menge oun t'mare čavenge, kay pal t'mende venna, kanna oun hako tsireske, kay t'mer ninna djivenna." 
Leviticus23:15 Efta tsele kourke pal ko Debleskro dives, kay anas o rashay t'maro nevo djob o baro Debleske," 
Leviticus23:16 ap ko dives pal o eftato Debleskro dives – kova hi o 50. (paash-sheelto) dives – anenn t'mer i nevo rhapen o baro Debleske. 
Leviticus23:17 Haki familya anell douy mare, hakeno kerdo dran douy-te-paash kilogramme lačo yarro. Kol douy mare hadell o rashay pre glan o baro Debleste, te sikrell lo, kay kolla leske hi. Kal mare hi peklo yarreha, kay shoutlo yarro dren hi. Kal mare, hoy o baro Debleske anlo venn, hounte venn kerdo dran nevo gib." 
Leviticus23:18 Pash ko maro anenn t'mer efta bakre, yek bersh phouro oun sasto, ninna yek terno gouroum oun douy morsh bakre. Kolla venn maredo oun rhačedo o baro Debleske. Khetne lentsa vell leske o rhapen dran yarro rhačedo, oun i mool glan leste vin čoredo. Oun ko lačo soungepen, hoy vell vin, soungella mishto o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus23:19 Koy pashel anenn leske i morsh bouzni, te vell t'mari doosh oun t'maro pale-čiddo koova krik lino. Marenn ninna douy bakre, hoy yek bersh phouro hi, te rhan len khetne glan o baro Debleste." 
Leviticus23:20 O rashay hadell kolen pre glan o baro Debleste, ninna kol mare dran o nevo yarro, te sikrell lo, kay yon o baro Debleske hi. Oun i rashaya nay rhan kova." 
Leviticus23:21 Denn vin gole, te venn khetne ap kava dives o baro Debleske. Kek boudi hounte krenn t'mer ap ko dives. Kava lab hi t'menge oun t'mare čavenge, kay pal t'mende venna, kanna oun hako tsireske, kay t'mer ninna djivenna." 
Leviticus23:22 An ko tsiro, kay činenn o djob tele, hoy ap t'maro kotar phoub bares vas, moukenn čomone ap i rigya tardo. Ma djan vitar gar i douyto kopo pral ko kotar phoub, te hadenn kova pre, hoy tele peras. Moukenn kova i čorvelenge oun kolenge dran i vi-them! Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel." 
Leviticus23:23 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus23:24 Pen ap i Israelitarya: Ko ersto dives an o eftato čon hounte vell t'men savo dives, kay boudrenn gar. Ap ko dives phourdenn an i phourdepangre, oun avenn khetne glan o baro Debleste." 
Leviticus23:25 Krenn kek boudi, oun anenn o baro Debleske firhen oun rhapen, hoy vell leske rhačedo ap leskri rhačepaskri." 
Leviticus23:26 O baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun moukas les i Israelenge te penell: 
Leviticus23:27 O deshto dives an kava eftato čon hi o dives, kay vell halauter krik lino, hoy mank t'mende oun o baro Debleste tardo hi. Ap ko dives rhan či oun avenn khetne glan leste oun anenn leske firhen oun rhapen, hoy venn leske rhačedo." 
Leviticus23:28 Kek boudi krenn ap ko dives! Kava dives hi o dives, kay vell halauter krik lino, hoy mank t'mende oun t'maro baro Debleste tardo hi." 
Leviticus23:29 Hakeno, koon rikrell pes gar pale o rhapastar, kova vell pale-čiddo hako tsireske, oun nay djivell bouder gar mank peskre menshende." 
Leviticus23:30 Oun hakeno, kay boudrell ap ko dives, koles moukell o baro Devel te merell." 
Leviticus23:31 Doleske, krenn kek boudi! Kava lab hi t'menge oun t'mare čavenge, kay pal t'mende venna, kanna oun hako tsireske, kay t'mer ninna djivenna." 
Leviticus23:32 Kava dives hi i baro dives t'menge, kay hounte krenn kek boudi, oun rhan či foun rati ap o enyato dives bis te vell pale rati ap o vavar dives." 
Leviticus23:33 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus23:34 Pen ap i Israelitarya: An o eftato čon hi kol bare divessa, kay djivenn t'mer an patyengre khera efta divessa, te vell o baro Devel sharedo. Ko ersto dives hi o 15. (deesh-te-pančto) dives an kava čon." 
Leviticus23:35 Ap kava dives avenn khetne glan o baro Debleste! Kek boudi hounte krenn t'mer. 
Leviticus23:36 Efta divessa anenn firhen o baro Debleske, te venn le leske maredo oun rhačedo. Ap o orhtato dives avenn pale khetne glan o baro Debleste, oun marenn oun rhačrenn firhen leske. An kal bare divessa venn t'mer khetne o baro Debleske, oun hounte krenn kek boudi." 
Leviticus23:37 Kalla hi kol bare divessa, kay hounte venn t'mer khetne glan o baro Debleste, te anenn leske firhen oun rhapen, yaake har hako diveske glan činlo hi: save firhe, kay tseles rhačedo venn, oun save, kolen rhan t'mer khetne glan o baro Debleste, ninna rhapen dran djob, oun mool, hoy glan leste vin čoredo vell." 
Leviticus23:38 Ninna rikrenn t'mer hako kourko o Debleskro dives dren! Oun anenn o baro Debleske ko vavar koova, hoy glan činlo hi, oun kova, hoy t'mer t'mendar denn, oun kova, hoy t'mer sovel dan, leske te dell." 
Leviticus23:39 Ap o 15. (deesh-te-pančto) dives an o eftato čon, an ko tsiro, har anan halauter dren, hoy ap t'mari phoub bares vas, krenn efta divessa i festo o baro Debleske. O ersto dives oun o orhtato dives hi i dives, kay krenn kek boudi." 
Leviticus23:40 Ap o ersto dives lenn shoukar roukengre, hoy ap i rouka bares van, ninna palmtikre patria, pappeltikre kashta pengre patyentsa oun vavar kashta boud patyentsa, oun avenn efta divessa barhteles glan t'maro baro Debleste." 
Leviticus23:41 Krenn kova leske hako bersh efta divessa an o eftato čon. Kava lab hi t'menge oun t'mare čavenge, kay pal t'mende venna, kanna oun hako tsireske." 
Leviticus23:42 Djivenn an ko tsiro an patyengre khera, hakeno, kay an o them Israel djivell." 
Leviticus23:43 Krenn kova yaake, te djinenn t'mare čave, te moukom me, o baro Devel, i Israelitaryen an patyengre khera te djivell, har anom len vin dran o them Egiptia. Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel." 
Leviticus23:44 Kal tsele laba penas o Mose i Israelenge, te djinenn le har te rikrenn le kol bare divessa dren, te vell o baro Devel sharedo." 
Leviticus24:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus24:2 Pen ap i Israelitarya, te anenn le touke o lačeder olivtikro djet, te nay rhačenn le haki rat i tikne momlia ap i momelengri an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. Kay momelengri vell tardo vin glan ko kouč kotar than, hoy glan ko morhton pandlo hi, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi. Kote dell o Aron yak, te rhačell i momelengri i tseli rat. Kava te vell yaake kerdo hako tsireske pash i Israelitarya oun lengre čavende, kay pal lende venna." 
Leviticus24:3  
Leviticus24:4 O Aron hounte dell yak ap i momlia ap i sonakaskri momelengri, te rhačenn le hako tsiro glan o baro Debleste." 
Leviticus24:5 Mouk deesh-te-douy mare te pekell dran lačo yarro, hako maro dran douy-te-paash kilogramme yarro!" 
Leviticus24:6 Oun čip len douy kope shob kotya khetne ap koy sonakaskri rhapaskri glan o baro Debleste. 
Leviticus24:7 Čip lačo soungepaskro koova ap kal mare. Ko soungepaskro koova vell rhačedo o baro Debleske, oun yaake vell siklo, te hi kal mare o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus24:8 Hako kourko ap o Debleskro dives čivell o Aron neve mare glan o baro Debleste. Yaake hounte krenn i Israelitarya hako tsiro, hoy vella." 
Leviticus24:9 Kal mare hi o Aroneske oun leskre morsh čavenge. Oun yon hounte rhan len ap i Debleskri platsa. Kal mare hi lengro kotar kolestar, hoy o baro Debleske rhačedo vell, oun hi kokres i rashayenge. Yaake hounte vell kova kerdo hako tsireske." 
Leviticus24:10 Mank i Israelitarya his i morsh, koleskri day i Israeltikri djouvel his oun leskro dad i Egiptari. Leskri day kharas Shelomit. Lakro dad hi o Dibri dran o kheer Dan. Ko morsh čingras pes i morsheha dran Israel. An kava čingepen čingras lo ap o baro Debleste djoungele labentsa. Koy anan le les pash o Moseste," 
Leviticus24:11  
Leviticus24:12 oun stilan les, bis te penas lenge o baro Devel, hoy te krenn le leha." 
Leviticus24:13 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus24:14 An ko morshes vin glan koy platsa, kay i menshe hi! Hakeno, kay shounas, hoy lo penas, kova čivell peskre vasta ap leskro shero. Palle vitsrenn i tsele menshe les moulo i barrentsa." 
Leviticus24:15 Ap i Israelitarya peness: Koon praasell peskro Debles, hounte hidjrell peskri phagi." 
Leviticus24:16 Kova, kay čingrell ap o baro Debleste djoungele labentsa, hounte vell moulo dino. I tsele menshe hounte vitsrenn les i barrentsa moules. Hi yek, te hi lo i Israelitari oder i vi-themari." 
Leviticus24:17 Koon i menshes moulo dell, hounte vell moulo dino." 
Leviticus24:18 Koon i firhes moulo dell, kova hounte dell sau firho pale: I djipen i djipaske." 
Leviticus24:19 Koon i vavares doukrell, koleske vell kerdo, hoy yob kras:" 
Leviticus24:20 Te phagas lo yekeske i kokalo, hounte vell leske i kokalo phagedo. Te das lo leske i yak oder i dand vin, hounte vell leske i yak oder i dand vin dino. Yaake har yek o vavareske kras, yaake vell leske pale dino." 
Leviticus24:21 Koon i firhes moulo dell, hounte dell sau firhes pale. Koon i menshes moulo dell, hounte merell." 
Leviticus24:22 T'menge oun kolenge dran i vi-them, kay pash t'mende djivenna, hounte vell yek čačepen, pal kova lauter vin kerdo vell. Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel." 
Leviticus24:23 O Mose penas kova i Israelenge. Oun yon kran yaake, har penas o baro Devel ap o Moseste, oun anan ko morshes, kay o baro Debles praasas, vin glan koy platsa, kay i Israelitarya his, oun vitsran les i barrentsa moulo." 
Leviticus25:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose ap i berga Sinay: 
Leviticus25:2 Pen ap i Israelitarya: Te venn t'mer an ko them, hoy me t'men dau, palle te vell ko themes hako eftato bersh i Debleskro bersh, kay vitsrenn či an i phoub dren, te vell kova baro. Krenn kova yaake, te sharenn man!" 
Leviticus25:3 Shob bersha vitsress djob an i phoub, oun činess tire drakengre rouka, oun aness dren, hoy moukas o them touke bares te vell." 
Leviticus25:4 O eftato bersh hi i Debleskro bersh, kay i phoub nay lell nevi zoor. Kava bersh hi o baro Debleske. Ap tiro kotar phoub vitsress či vin, oun činess gar tire drakengre rouka." 
Leviticus25:5 Kova, hoy pre djal ap tiro kotar phoub, aness gar dren. I drake hoy venn, kay tou kol rouka gar činal, činess gar tele. Koy phoub hounte lell pale nevi zoor." 
Leviticus25:6 Hakeno t'mendar nay lell khetne, hoy lo hatsell ap o them: t'mer oun t'mare boudepangre, morsha har djouvya, ninna kolla, kay boudrenn hako kopo yek dives pash t'mende, oun kolla, kay yek tsiro pash t'mende djivenn." 
Leviticus25:7 Ninna t'mare firhe oun kol divye firhe, kay an o them djivenn, kolla nay rhan kolestar, hoy an ko bersh pestar bares vas." 
Leviticus25:8 Ap ko tsiro, kay rikran efta kope ko Debleskro bersh dren, kova hi pal 49 (star-deesh-te-enya) bersha," 
Leviticus25:9 moukenn an o 50. (paash-sheelto) bersh, an o eftato čon, ap o deshto dives an i phourdepaskri te phourdell an o tselo them. Kova hi o dives, kay halauter krik lino vell, hoy mank t'mende oun o baro Debleste tardo hi." 
Leviticus25:10 O 50. (paash-sheelto) bersh hi o baro Debleske. An kava bersh denn vin gole, te vell hakeneske, kay an ko them djivell, peskri siyaan mouklo.
