Oun te his leskri siyaan yaake baro, te bikras pes lo ap i vavareske, hounte moukell kova les pale te djal. Hakeno t'mendar lell kova pale, hoy leskro his, oun nay djal khere pash peskre menshende." 
Leviticus25:11 An kava 50. (paash-sheelto) bersh hounte vell i tseli siyaan mouklo. Vitsrenn kek djob an i phoub, oun činenn kek djob tele, hoy pestar dran i phoub vas. Činenn vitar kek drake tele, hoy van bares an kava bersh, kay t'mer kol rouka gar činan." 
Leviticus25:12 An kava tselo bersh hounte vell kek boudi kerdo ap t'mari kotar phoub. Hakeno nay rhal kova, hoy hatsell lo, kova hoy pestar bares vas." 
Leviticus25:13 An ko bersh, kay i tseli siyaan mouklo vell, lell hakeno peskri phoub pale, hoy leskro his." 
Leviticus25:14 Te bikreh i kotar phoub ap i vavar Israelitari, oder te gineh lestar i kotar phoub, palle dess les gar pal o kand!" 
Leviticus25:15 Kova, hoy tou leske playsreh oder yob touke playsrell, hounte djal pal kol bersha, hoy venna, bis te vell ko bersh, kay i tseli siyaan mouklo vell. Kol love djal pal kova, kitse bersha nay anell o ginepaskro kova dren, hoy ap ko kotar phoub bares vell." 
Leviticus25:16 Ačenn boud bersha, palle hounte vell boudeder playsedo har te ačenn gar boud bersha. Playssedo venn kol bersha, kay djob nay dren anlo vell, oun gar ko kotar phoub." 
Leviticus25:17 Kek te dell o vavares pal o kand! Rikrenn t'menge t'maro Debles glan i yaka pash halauter, hoy krenn! Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel." 
Leviticus25:18 Doleske krenn, hoy t'mendar kamau, oun djivenn pal miro čačepen! Palle nay djivenn t'mer an kava them kek daryah." 
Leviticus25:19 Oun o them anell t'menge yaake boud vin, te hi t'men doha rhapaske. Oun t'mer nay djivenn an kava them, oun t'men hounte vell kek daar." 
Leviticus25:20 Te poučenn: “Hoy rhas an ko eftato bersh? Te vitsrah či ap i phoub vin, nay anah ninna či dren.”" 
Leviticus25:21 Palle penau me: Me čivau miri barht ap t'mari phoub an o shobto bersh, te anell i phoub yaake boud djob vin, te rikrell kova triin bersha." 
Leviticus25:22 Te vitsrenn t'mer palle an o orhtato bersh djob vin ap t'mari phoub, palle hi t'men gomme doha te rhal kolestar, hoy an o shobto bersh dren anan. Oun t'men hi doha, bis te lenn o nevo djob dren." 
Leviticus25:23 Ma bikrenn ko them yaake, te vell kova hako tsireske i vavareske! Ko them hi mange. Oun t'mer han har vi-themarya, kay moukau pash mande te djivell." 
Leviticus25:24 Te bikrenn i kotar them, palle krenn kova yaake, te nay vell ko them palpale ginlo." 
Leviticus25:25 Te vas tiro phraal – i vavar Israelitari – čorvelo oun hounte bikrell i kotar leskri phoubyatar, palle hounte ginell les yek dran leskri familya pale." 
Leviticus25:26 Te hi les kek, kay ko kotar phoub nay pale ginell, oun leskro vast anell doha love khetne, te nay ginell yob kokres les pale," 
Leviticus25:27 palle playsrell lo yaake boud, har an kol bersha dren anlo vals, kay ačenn, bis te vell ko bersh, kay i tseli siyaan mouklo hounte vell. Yaake vell ko kotar phoub pale leskro." 
Leviticus25:28 Te anell leskro vast kova gar khetne, hoy yob hounte pale playsrell, palle ačell ko kotar phoub an o vast kolestar, kay les ginas. An ko bersh, kay i tseli siyaan mouklo vell, lell les kova pale, koleske ko kotar phoub his." 
Leviticus25:29 Te bikrell yek i kheer an i foro, kay i massouri troul ko foro hi, palle vell les i tselo bersh, te nay ginell lo les pale vin." 
Leviticus25:30 Te vell ko kheer gar vin ginlo, oun ko bersh hi trouyel, palle rikrell les o ginepaskro oun kolla, kay pal leste venna hako tsireske. Kava kheer vell gar pale dino koleske kova his, an ko bersh, kay i siyaan mouklo vell." 
Leviticus25:31 Hi vavarčandes, te hi ko kheer an i gab tardo, kay kek massouri trouyel hi. Palle hi ko kheer har i kotar phoub. Ko kheer nay vell vin ginlo, oun palpale dino an o bersh, kay i siyaan mouklo vell." 
Leviticus25:32 An kol forya, kolen i Levitarya hi, nay ginenn kolla hako tsiro lengre khera pale." 
Leviticus25:33 Te ginell yek lendar peskro kheer gar pale, vell ko kheer leske pale dino an ko bersh, kay i siyaan mouklo vell. I khera, kolen i Levitarya hi an i forya, hoy lenge dino van an o them Israel, kol forya ačenn lengre." 
Leviticus25:34 Ninna ko them glan i forya, kay i firhe rhan, vell nay gar bikedo. Kova hi lenge hako tsireske." 
Leviticus25:35 Te vell tiro phraal čorvelo, oun nay rikrell gar, hoy leskro hi, palle vess ap leskri rig. Mouk les pash toute te djivell, har te vals lo i vi-themari oder yek, kay i tsiro pash toute boudrell." 
Leviticus25:36 Te patseh leske love, pouč gar boudeder love pale. Rike touke o baro Debles glan i yaka, oun kre, te nay djivell tiro phraal pash t'mende!" 
Leviticus25:37 Tou poučess lestar gar boudeder love pale, har tou leste dal, vitar gar boudeder rhapen har tou leske patsal." 
Leviticus25:38 Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel, oun anom t'men dran o them Egiptia vin, te dap t'men o them Kanaan, te vap t'maro Devel." 
Leviticus25:39 Te vell tiro phraal yaake čorvelo, te bikrell lo pes ap toute, palle moukess les gar kova te krell, hoy i ginlo boudepaskro hounte krell." 
Leviticus25:40 Yob te vell touke har yek, kay boudrell pash toute oun vell haki rat playsedo. Har yek, kay yek tsiro pash toute djivell oun boudrell, ačell lo pash toute, bis te vell ko bersh, kay i tseli siyaan mouklo vell." 
Leviticus25:41 Palle moukess les tou pale djal, ninna leskre čave leha, te nay djan le pale pash lengre menshende oun pash lengro kotar phoub, hoy yon lengre phourendar lan." 
Leviticus25:42 I tsele Israelitarya hi mire boudepangre, kolen me dran o them Egiptia vin anom. Yon nay venn gar bikedo, te venn le ginle boudepangre." 
Leviticus25:43 Tou vess gar zoryah ray pral lende! Rike tiro Debles glan tire yaka! 
Leviticus25:44 Te kameh touke boudepangre te ginell, morsha oun djouvya, palle gin len kol vavar menshendar, kay an i themma troul t'mende djivenna," 
Leviticus25:45 ninna foun kol vi-themarya, kay pash t'mende djivenn. Len oun lengre čaven, kay an t'maro them boldo van, nay ginenn t'menge, te venn le t'mare boudepangre." 
Leviticus25:46 Kolen nay denn ap t'mare čavende doureder, te venn le lengro pal t'maro merepen. Yon ačenn lengre ginle boudepangre yaake rah har djivenn le. Tire phrala, kol vavar Israelitarya, pral kolende hounte vess gar zoryah ray." 
Leviticus25:47 Te vell yaake, kay vell i vi-themari, kay pash t'mende djivell, bravelo, ninna yek, kay i tsiro pash t'mende djivell. Oun tiro phraal, i vavar Israelitari, vell čorvelo, oun bikrell pes ap ko braveleste oder leskre čavende," 
Leviticus25:48 palle hounte vell yaake, te nay ginell les yek pale. Leskro phraal," 
Leviticus25:49 leskro kak, koleskro čavo oder i vavar dran leskri familya ginell les vin. Te nay anell lo kokres yaake boud love khetne, palle ginell lo pes kokres vin." 
Leviticus25:50 Oun khetne koleha, kay ginas les, dikell lo palla, kitse bersha yob leske boudras oun kitse bersha ačenn, bis te vell ko bersh, kay i tseli siyaan mouklo vell. Ko tsiro, hoy yob pash koleste boudras, vell tele tserdedo. Kol bershenge, kay ačenn pral, hounte playsrell lo yaake boud, har yekeske playsedo vell, kay haki rat peskri boudjake playsedo vell." 
Leviticus25:51 Te hi gomme boud bersha, bis te vell ko bersh, kay i tseli siyaan mouklo vell, hounte playsrell lo boudeder, har te ačenn gar boud bersha pral." 
Leviticus25:52  
Leviticus25:53 Leskro ray hounte djal leha trouyel, har te vals lo i boudepaskro, kay haki rat playsedo vell. Denn yak, te krell lo leha gar, har te vals lo leskro ginlo boudepaskro." 
Leviticus25:54 Nay ginell kek les vin, hounte vell yob peskre čaventsa vin mouklo an ko bersh, kay i tseli siyaan mouklo vell." 
Leviticus25:55 T'mer Israelitarya han mange. Mire boudepangre han t'mer, kolen anom me dran o them Egiptia vin. Me, o baro Devel hom t'maro Devel." 
Leviticus26:1 Ma krenn t'men rhorhene deblen, vitar kek figure oun pre-čiddo barra, oder barra an kolende i shero dino hi, te mangenn len an! Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel." 
Leviticus26:2 Rikrenn mire Debleskre divessa dren, oun anenn kek ladj ap miro kheer. Me hom o baro Devel." 
Leviticus26:3 Te djivenn yaake, har me t'mendar kamau oun rikrenn kova hoy me penom," 
Leviticus26:4 palle moukau me brishin te dell an ko tsiro, kay hounte vell. Oun o them moukell t'menge lauter bares te vell, oun i rouka hidjrenn pengre roukengre." 
Leviticus26:5 Ko tsiro kay t'mer o djob vin denn, djal bis te vell ko tsiro, kay činenn i drake tele. Oun ko tsiro, kay činenn i drake tele, djal bis te vell ko tsiro, kay vitsrenn o djob pale vin an i phoub. Oun t'men vell boudeder har doha rhapen. Kek krell t'menge čilačepen." 
Leviticus26:6 T'mer nay djivenn an o lačepen kolentsa, kay troul t'mende djivenn, te nay sovenna, oun kek tserdell t'men dran o sopen. Kol divye firhen tradau me dran o them vin. Kek lourde venna an t'maro them, te marenn le t'men." 
Leviticus26:7 T'mer lenn kolenge palla, kay kamenn pen t'mentsa te kourell, oun t'mer denn len o rhareha moulo." 
Leviticus26:8 Panč t'mendar lenn i sheel lourdenge palla, oun i sheel t'mendar nashenn 10.000 (deesh-zerya) lourdenge palla, te denn le len moulo. Kolla, kay kamenn t'men te marell, venn t'mendar o rhareha moulo dino." 
Leviticus26:9 Me dikau lačes ap t'mende, oun krau, te lenn boud čave, yaake te venn boud. Oun hoy man sovel dom, te dap t'mende, rikrau dren." 
Leviticus26:10 T'mer anenn yaake boud djob dren, te hi t'men gomme phouro djob te rhal, te vell o nevo djob dren anlo. Oun t'mer hounte vitsrenn ko phouro djob krik, te vell platsa, kay čivenn o nevo djob koy." 
Leviticus26:11 Oun me djivau mashkral t'mende, oun sikrau t'men gar miro doumo." 
Leviticus26:12 Me djivau pash t'mende, oun hom t'maro Devel, oun t'mer han mire menshe." 
Leviticus26:13 Me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel, oun anom t'men dran o them Egiptia vin, te ačenn gar bouder lengre pandle boudepangre. Kote hans har groumya, kay hounte boudrenn i kashteha troul lengri meen. Ko kashtes phagom me, te nay djan pale pre hadede sherya." 
Leviticus26:14 Te shounenn t'mer gar ap mande, oun rikrenn kol laba gar dren, hoy me t'menge penom," 
Leviticus26:15 oun krenn gar, hoy t'mendar kamau, oun djivenn gar pal miro čačepen, oun rikrenn yaake gar dren, hoy t'mentsa vin krom," 
Leviticus26:16 palle krau t'mentsa yaake: Bari bibarht anau pral t'mende, pharo nasslepen, hoy t'menge o djipen randell. T'mer rhačenn glan fibro, t'mare yaka nay dikenn bouder gar mishto, oun kek zoor ačell an t'mende. Čičeske vitsrenn djob vin an i phoub. Kolla, kay kourenn pen t'mentsa, rhan les pre." 
Leviticus26:17 Me dikau bouder gar lačes ap t'mende, oun t'mer venn dino kolendar, kay kourenn pen t'mentsa. Kolla, kay kamenn t'maro merepen, venn ray pral t'mende. T'mer han ap o naashepen, ninna te lell t'men kek palla." 
Leviticus26:18 Te shounenn t'mer ninna palle gar ap mande, dau t'men i phagi, hoy hi efta kope phareder har kaya, hoy bis kanna dom." 
Leviticus26:19 T'maro pre-phourdepen oun t'maro pesso shero phagau, oun dau t'men bouder kek brishin. Ko bolepen pral t'mende vell har saster, oun koy phoub tel t'mare pire zorelo har barra." 
Leviticus26:20 T'mari phari boudi hi čičeske. Ap t'mari harhetikri phoub vell či bares. Oun i rouka an o them hidjrenn kek roukengre. 
Leviticus26:21 Oun te sikrenn mange o doumo oun kamenn gar ap mande te shounell, palle dau me t'men i phagi, hoy gomme efta kope phareder hi har kaya bis kanna." 
Leviticus26:22 Divye firhe bičrau mank t'mende, te rhan le t'mare čaven oun firhen, oun marenn yaake boud t'mendar, te venn t'mare dromma mouklo." 
Leviticus26:23 Te moukenn t'mer t'menge mandar pale ninna gomme či te penell, oun sikrenn mange o doumo," 
Leviticus26:24 palle sikrau me t'menge o doumo, oun dau t'men i phagi, hoy efta kope phareder hi har kaya bis kanna." 
Leviticus26:25 Me moukau kourepen an t'maro them vin te phagell, oun dau t'men pale, te rikran gar dren, hoy mantsa vin kran. Oun te khatrenn t'mer t'men palle an t'mare forya, palle bičrau i pharo nasslepen mashkral t'mende, oun dau t'men an i vasta kolendar, kay kourenn pen t'mentsa." 
Leviticus26:26 T'men vell bouder gar doha djob, te pekenn maro. Deesh djouvya nay pekenn pengro maro an yek bob. O maro vell ap i vaga čiddo, oun hakeno lell i kotar. Oun t'mer rhan oun venn gar čalo." 
Leviticus26:27 Te shounenn t'mer ninna palle gar ap mande, oun sikrenn mange o doumo," 
Leviticus26:28 palle djau me an rholi ap t'mende, oun dau t'men i phagi hoy hi efta kope phareder har kaya, hoy bis kanna ap t'mende vas." 
Leviticus26:29 I bokatar rhan t'mer o mass t'mare čavendar oun čendar. 
Leviticus26:30 Me krau kol moulne platse paash, kay t'mer t'mare deblenge firhen rhačrenna. Oun kol boba, kay t'mer lenge soungepaskro koova rhačrenn, phagau khetne. T'mare moulen vitsrau ap kol paash-dine figuren, oun t'mendar kamau bouder či te djinell." 
Leviticus26:31 Me moukau t'mare forya an kotya te dell, oun dau kol platse paash, kay t'mare rhorhene deblen an-mangan. Oun kova, hoy t'mer mange rhačrenn, oun ko lačo soungepen, hoy vell vin, kova kamau bouder gar te soungell." 
Leviticus26:32 Me krau te vell t'maro them i moulo them. Oun kolla, kay kouran pen t'mentsa, oun venn, te djivenn le koy, lenge ačell o rakepen krik, te dikenn le kova." 
Leviticus26:33 T'men tradau me mank i menshende an i vavar themma, oun lau t'men o rhareha palla. T'maro them vell i moulo them, oun t'mare foryendar ačell či pral har barra." 
Leviticus26:34 Palle nay lell t'maro them peskri zoor pale. Har t'mer koy dren djivan, moukan les gar pale zoor te lell. An kol bersha, kay hounte moukans les čiddo, kran t'mer kova gar. Palle, an ko tsiro, kay t'mer pandle han an o them kolendar, kay anan t'men krik, oun t'maro them mouklo čiddo hi, nay lell lo i tsele bersha palla, oun nay lell pale zoor." 
Leviticus26:35  
Leviticus26:36 Kolla, kay t'mendar pral ačenn an kol vavar themma, kay le pandle hi, kolen krau yaake dareno, te vell len daar glan i patri, hoy krik phourdedo vell. Lestar nashenn le, har te lals yek len o rhareha palla. Oun yon perenn, oun yek perell pral o vavareste, ninna te hi kek koy, kay len palla las. Oun t'men hi kek zoor, te kourenn t'men kolentsa, kay ap t'mende djan." 
Leviticus26:37  
Leviticus26:38 An kol themma kol vavar menshendar merenn t'mer. Ko them, kay venn pandles anlo, rhal t'men pre." 
Leviticus26:39 Kolla, kay pral ačenn t'mendar, lendar merell yek pal o vavar an kol themma kolendar, kay len pandles krik anan. Kova djal lenge doleske, kay moukan le o baro Debleskro drom, yon oun ninna lengre phoure." 
Leviticus26:40 Palle penenn yon, te his lengri doosh oun i doosh lengre phourendar, te rikran le gar ap mande oun sikran mange o doumo." 
Leviticus26:41 Doleske sikrom lenge o doumo, oun tradom len an o them kolendar, kay kouran pen lentsa. Kote krenn le pen tiknes glan mande. Te hidjran le pengri phagi tele," 
Leviticus26:42 palle kamau koy sovel, hoy o Yakobeske dom, gar bistrell, vitar gar koy sovel, hoy o Isaakeha dren djom, oun koy sovel, hoy o Abrahameha krom. Oun bistrau gar, te penom lenge, te dap o them lengre čavenge, kay pal lende venna." 
Leviticus26:43 Glan kova hounte djan le dran ko them vin, te ačell o them čiddo, oun nay lell pale nevi zoor an yaake boud bersha, hoy leske gar dren rikedo van. Oun i Israelitarya hidjrenn pengri phagi tele. Yon djivan gar pal miro čačepen, oun kolestar, hoy lendar kamom, kaman le či te djinell." 
Leviticus26:44 Ninna te hi le an o them kolendar, kay lan len pandles, hi kova gar yaake, te rissroms man krik lendar, oun kamoms či bouder lendar te djinell. Me moukau len gar lauter te merell. Miri sovel, hoy lende dom, phagau gar. Me, o baro Devel, hom lengro Devel." 
Leviticus26:45 Lengre phourentsa krom vin, te vap lengro Devel, har anom len dran o them Egiptia vin glan i yaka kol menshendar an i vavar themma. Kova bistrau me gar, me, o baro Devel." 
Leviticus26:46 Kava hi kol laba, hoy o Mose i Israelenge yaake doureder penas, har o baro Devel leske penas ap i berga Sinay, te djinenn le, hoy o baro Devel lendar kamell, oun djivenn pal leskro čačepen, oun djan ap leskro drom." 
Leviticus27:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Mose: 
Leviticus27:2 Pen ap i Israelitarya: Te das yek pes sovel, te dell lo man, o baro Debleste, i menshes, palle nay ginell lo koles pale vin." 
Leviticus27:3 I morsheske, kay mashkral 20 (biish) bersha oun 60 (shob-deesh) bersha hi, koleske playsrell lo i 50 (paash-sheel) roupene beme. Yek bema hounte vell yaake pharo har i roupeni bema an o Debleskro kheer pharo hi." 
Leviticus27:4 I djouvyake venn 30 (triyanda) roupene beme playsedo. 
Leviticus27:5 I čaveske mashkral 5 (panč) oun 20 (biish) bersha venn 20 (biish) roupene beme playsedo, i čake an o emligo phourepen 10 (deesh) roupene beme." 
Leviticus27:6 I tikno čaveske mank yek čon oun panč bersha venn panč roupene beme playsedo, oun i čake triin roupene beme." 
Leviticus27:7 I morsheske, kay 60 (shob-deesh) bersha hi oun pral shob-deesh, venn 15 (deesh-te-panč) roupene beme playsedo, oun i djouvyake 10 (deesh) roupene beme." 
Leviticus27:8 Te hi kova, kay pes sovel das, yaake čorvelo, te nay anell leskro vast kova gar khetne, palle anell lo ko menshes pash o rashayeste. Oun ko rashay dikell peske koles an, oun penell har boud love leske playsedo hounte venn, pal kova hoy kova nay dell, kay pes sovel das." 
Leviticus27:9 Te das yek pes sovel, te dell lo o baro Debleste i firhes, savo firhes, hoy nay vell leske maredo oun rhačedo, hi ko firho o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus27:10 Yob parell les gar vin, oun dell kek vavar firho koleske, kek lačo firho i djoungelo firheske, vitar kek djoungelo firho i lačo firheske. Te parell yek sau firhes i vavar firheske, palle venn kol douy firhe o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus27:11 Te das yek pes sovel, te dell lo o baro Debleske i firhes, hoy pale-čiddo hi, hoy nay vell gar maredo oun leske rhačedo, palle anell lo ko firhes glan o rashayeste." 
Leviticus27:12 O rashay dikell peske ko firhes an, oun dikell, hoy lačo oun hoy čilačo ap leste hi, oun penell, har boud ko firho moldo hi. Yaake har o rashay penell, yaake vell." 
Leviticus27:13 Te kamell yek ko firhes palpale te ginell, palle dell lo ko pančto kolestar pashel, hoy o rashay penas." 
Leviticus27:14 Te das yek pes sovel, te dell lo peskro kheer o baro Debleste, palle dikell o rashay les peske an, oun dikell, hoy lačo oun hoy čilačo ap leste hi, oun penell, har boud kova moldo hi. Yaake har ko rashay penell, yaake vell." 
Leviticus27:15 Te kamell kova, koleske ko kheer his, peskro kheer pale vin te ginell, palle dell lo pash kova hoy o rashay penas, o pančto kotar pashel. Palle vell ko kheer pale leskro." 
Leviticus27:16 Te das yek pes sovel, te dell lo i kotar phoub o baro Debleste, palle vell diklo, har boud djob ap ko kotar phoub vin vitsedo vell. Hi kova yek gono djob, palle hi ko kotar phoub 50 (paash-sheel) roupene beme moldo." 
Leviticus27:17 Te kamell lo ko kotar phoub o Debleske te dell an ko ersto bersh pal ko bersh, kay i tseli siyaan mouklo vas, ačell kova pash kol 50 roupene beme." 
Leviticus27:18 Te kamell lo les i tsiro pal kova te dell, palle dikell o rashay pal, har boud bersha trouyel hi, bis te vell ko bersh, kay i siyaan mouklo vell. Oun kal bersha venn tele tserdedo." 
Leviticus27:19 Te kamell kova, kay ko kotar phoub o baro Debleste das, ko kotar palpale ginell, palle dell lo kova, hoy koy phoub moldo hi, oun o pančto kotar pashel. Palle vell li pale leskri." 
Leviticus27:20 Te ginas lo koy phoub gar tele o baro Deblestar, oun bikrell lat ap i vavareske, palle nay vell ko kotar phoub gar bouder vin ginlo." 
Leviticus27:21 An ko tsiro, kay vell i siyaan mouklo, ačell ko kotar phoub o baro Debleske. Oun o rashay lell les." 
Leviticus27:22 Te das yek pes sovel, te dell lo o baro Debleste i kotar phoub, hoy ginas lo, oun hoy las lo gar peskro dadestar pral leskro merepen," 
Leviticus27:23 palle dikell o rashay har boud ko kotar phoub moldo hi, bis te vell ko bersh, kay i siyaan mouklo vell. Oun kal love playsrell ko morsh gomme kava dives. Kal love hi o baro Debleske." 
Leviticus27:24 An ko bersh, kay i siyaan mouklo vell, djal ko kotar phoub palpale ap koleste, konestar yob les ginas, koleskri familyake koy phoub hi." 
Leviticus27:25 Kol roupene beme hoy playsedo venn, te vell čomone pale ginlo, hounte venn yaake pharo har i roupene beme an o Debleskro kheer pharo hi. Yek roupeni bema hi 12 (deesh-te-douy gramme) pharo." 
Leviticus27:26 I firho, hoy o phoureder leskri datar hi, kova hi o baro Debleske. Te hi savo firho i gouroum, i bakro, i morsh bouzni, nay lell les kek mensho, te dell lo les o baro Debleske. Leskro hi lo." 
Leviticus27:27 Te hi ko firho kol firhendar, kay pale-čiddo hi, palle ginell les peskro ray pale, pal kova hoy o rashay penell, te hi ko firho moldo. Oun yob dell o pančto kotar gomme pashel. Te vell ko firho gar vin ginlo, palle vell lo kol lovenge, hoy o rashay penas, bikedo." 
Leviticus27:28 Halauter, hoy das yek kolestar, hoy leskro hi, te vell kova hako tsireske o baro Debleske, nay vell gar bikedo, vitar gar pale ginlo – nay vell i mensho, i firho oder i kotar phoub. Kova hoy o baro Debleske hako tsireske dino vas, čačepah, kova ačell leske." 
Leviticus27:29 Te hi kova i mensho, nay vell lo gar vin ginlo. Yob hounte vell maredo." 
Leviticus27:30 O deshto kotar halauterestar, hoy baro vas ap i harhetikri phoub oun ap i rouka, hi o baro Debleske, oun hounte vell leske anlo." 
Leviticus27:31 Te kamell yek kova te rikrell, hounte playsrell lo les, oun dell o pančto kotar pashel." 
Leviticus27:32 Ninna i groumyendar, i bakrendar oun i bouzyendar hi hako deshto firho o baro Debleske. Kek dikell palla, hi ko firho lačo, hi lo gar lačo. Vitar gar vell i firho vin paredo. Yaake har djan le glan o bakrengro koy, yaake lell lo hako deshto ap i rig. Te parell lo yekes vin, hi kol douy firhe o baro Debleske, oun nay venn gar vin ginlo." 
Leviticus27:33  
Leviticus27:34 Kava hi kol laba, hoy penas o baro Devel o Moseske, har his lo ap i berga Sinay, te rikrenn pen i Israelitarya ap lende." 
Numbers1:1 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha an o moulo tato them Sinay, an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer, ap o ersto dives, an o douyto čon, an o douyto bersh, har yon dran ko them Egiptia vin djan. Oun o baro Devel penas:" 
Numbers1:2 Tou oun o Aron, činenn an i liil har boud morsh Israelitarya koy hi, kay hi zoreles doha, te venn le lourde. Činenn i laba hake morshendar pre, kay hi biish bersha phouro oun phoureder! Činenn ninna pre dran havi familya yon venna oun koon lengro dad hi!" 
Numbers1:3  
Numbers1:4 Lenn deesh-te-douy morshen, yek dran haki bari familya, hoy vell kol deesh-te-douy Yakobeskre čavendar, te venn le ap t'mari rig pash koy boudi. Kal morsha hounte venn i pralstoune pral pengre menshende." 
Numbers1:5 Kalla hi kol laba kol morshendar, kay ap t'mari rig venn: Dran o kheer Ruben: o Elizour, leskro dad hi o Shedehour." 
Numbers1:6 Dran o kheer Simeon: o Sheloumiel, leskro dad hi o Sourishadday." 
Numbers1:7 Dran o kheer Youda: o Nashon, leskro dad hi o Amminadab." 
Numbers1:8 Dran o kheer Issakar: o Netanel, leskro dad hi o Souar." 
Numbers1:9 Dran o kheer Zabulon: o Eliab, leskro dad hi o Helon." 
Numbers1:10 Dran o kheer Efrayim, kay hi o Yosefeskro čavo: o Elishama, leskro dad hi o Ammihoud. Dran o kheer Manasse, kay hi ninna o Yosefeskro čavo: o Gamaliel, leskro dad hi o Pedazur." 
Numbers1:11 Dran o kheer Benyamin: o Abidan, leskro dad hi o Gidoni." 
Numbers1:12 Dran o kheer Dan: o Ahiyeser, leskro dad hi o Ammishadday." 
Numbers1:13 Dran o kheer Asser: o Pagiel, leskro dad hi o Okran." 
Numbers1:14 Dran o kheer Gad: o Elyasaf, leskro dad hi o Degouel." 
Numbers1:15 Dran o kheer Naftali: o Ahira, leskro dad hi o Enan." 
Numbers1:16 Kolla van vi-rodedo dran i tsele Israelitarya. Hakeno his o pralstouno pral peskre menshende. Oun yon van i pralstoune pral kol boud zerya menshende an Israel. 
Numbers1:17 Oun o Mose oun o Aron lan kal deesh-te-douy pralstunen pash pende. 
Numbers1:18 Oun yon anan i tsele Israelitarya khetne ap o ersto dives an o douyto čon. Oun i tsele morsha, hoy his biish bersh oun phoureder, moukan pengre laba an lila dren te činell. Yon van yaake pre-činlo, te vas diklo dran havi familya hakeno vas oun koon leskro dad his." 
Numbers1:19 Kova kran le an o moulo tato them Sinay yaake har o baro Devel ap o Moseste penas. 
Numbers2:1 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun o Aroneha oun penas lenge," 
Numbers2:2 har i Israelitarya hounte čivenn pengre plarhtene khera pre. Oun yob penas: Hakeno hounte čivell peskro kheer pre pash koy pre-čiddo kotar than, hoy sikrella, have menshendar yob hi. I tsele khera venn pre-čiddo troul o Debleskro plarhteno kheer." 
Numbers2:3 I platsa kol menshenge dran o kheer Youda hi glan o Debleskro kheer ap koy rig, kay o kham pre-djala, pash pengri pre-čiddi plarhta. Pash lende hi ninna lengre lourde, 74.600 (efta-deesh-te-star-zerya-shob-sheel) morsha. Lengro pralstouno hi o Nashon, koleskro dad o Amminadab hi." 
Numbers2:4  
Numbers2:5 Langs lende hounte čivenn kol menshe pengre plarhtene khera pre, kay venna dran o kheer Issakar, ninna lengre lourde, 54.400 (panč-deesh-te-star-zerya-star-sheel) morsha pengro pralstuneha, o Netanel. Leskro dad hi o Souar." 
Numbers2:6  
Numbers2:7 Koy pashel venna kol menshe, kay venna dran o kheer Zabulon, ninna lengre lourde, 57.400 (panč-deesh-te-efta-zerya-star-sheel) morsha pengro pralstuneha, o Eliab, koleskro dad o Helon hi." 
Numbers2:8  
Numbers2:9 Kol tsele lourde, kay dran kal triin bare familye venn, hi halauter khetne 186.400 (sheel-orhta-deesh-te-shob-zerya-star-sheel) morsha. Oun kolla hounte djan glan kol vavarende." 
Numbers2:10 Oun kote, kay o kham tato hi, hounte čivenn kolla pengre plarhtene khera pre pash pengri pre-čiddi plarhta, kay venna dran o kheer Ruben. Pash lende hi ninna lengre lourde, 46.500 (star-deesh-shob-zerya-panč-sheel) morsha pengro pralstuneha, o Elizour, leskro dad hi o Shedehour." 
Numbers2:11  
Numbers2:12 Langs lende hounte čivenn kol menshe pengre plarhtene khera pre, kay venna dran o kheer Simeon, ninna lengre lourde, 59.300 (panč-deesh-te-enya-zerya-triin-sheel) morsha. Lengro pralstouno hi o Sheloumiel, leskro dad hi o Sourishadday." 
Numbers2:13  
Numbers2:14 Koy pashel venna kol menshe, kay venna dran o kheer Gad, ninna lengre lourde, 45.650 (star-deesh-te-panč-zerya-shob-sheel-te-panč-deesh) morsha pengro pralstuneha o Elyasaf, leskro dad hi o Degouel." 
Numbers2:15  
Numbers2:16 Kol tsele lourde, kay venn dran kal triin bare familye, hi halauter khetne 151.450 (sheel-panč-deesh-te-yek-zerya-star-sheel-te-panč-deesh) morsha. Oun kolla hounte venn kol douyte, kay djan glan kol vavarende." 
Numbers2:17 Pal lende djan i Levitarya. Yon hounte lenn o Debleskro plarhteno kheer lentsa, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi, oun djan mashkral kol vavar menshende. Oun yaake har yon pengre plarhtene khera pre čivenn, yaake hounte djan yon ninna doureder: hakeno ap koy platsa, kay lengre pre-čiddi plarhta hi." 
Numbers2:18 Ap koy rig, kay o kham tele djala, hounte čivenn kolla pengre plarhtene khera pre pash pengri pre-čiddi plarhta, kay venna dran o kheer Efrayim. Pash lende hi ninna lengre lourde 40.500 (star-deesh-zerya-panč-sheel) morsha. Lengro pralstouno hi o Elishama, leskro dad hi o Ammihoud." 
Numbers2:19  
Numbers2:20 Langs lende hounte čivenn kol menshe pengre plarhtene khera pre, kay venna dran o kheer Manasse, ninna lengre lourde, 32.200 (triyanda-te-douy zerya-douy-sheel) morsha. Lengro pralstouno hi o Gamaliel, leskro dad hi o Pedazur." 
Numbers2:21  
Numbers2:22 Koy pashel venna kol menshe, kay venna dran o kheer Benyamin, ninna lengre lourde, 35.400 (triyanda-te-panč-zerya-star-sheel) morsha. Lengro pralstouno hi o Abidan, leskro dad hi o Gidoni." 
Numbers2:23  
Numbers2:24 Kol tsele lourde, kay venn dran kal triin bare familye, hi halauter khetne 108.100 (sheel-te-orhta-zerya-yek-sheel) morsha. Oun kolla hounte venn kol triinte, kay djan glan kol vavarende." 
Numbers2:25 Ap koy rig, kay o kham gar vella, hounte čivenn kolla pengre plarhtene khera pre pash pengri pre-čiddi plarhta, kay venna dran o kheer Dan. Pash lende hi lengre lourde 62.700 (shob-deesh-te-douy-zerya-efta-sheel) morsha. Lengro pralstouno hi o Ahiyeser, leskro dad hi o Ammishadday." 
Numbers2:26  
Numbers2:27 Langs lende hounte čivenn kol menshe pengre plarhtene khera pre, kay venna dran kheer Asser, pengre lourdentsa, 41.500 (star-deesh-te-yek-zerya-panč-sheel) morsha. Lengro pralstouno hi o Pagiel, koleskro dad o Okran hi." 
Numbers2:28  
Numbers2:29 Koy pashel venna kol menshe, kay venna dran o kheer Naftali, pengre lourdentsa, 53.400 (panč-deesh-te-triin-zerya-star-sheel) morsha. Lengro pralstouno hi o Ahira, koleskro dad o Enan hi." 
Numbers2:30  
Numbers2:31 Kol tsele lourde, kay dran kal triin bare familye venn, hi halauter khetne: 157.600 (sheel-panč-deesh-te-efta-zerya-shob-sheel) morsha. Yon djan pal kol vavarende." 
Numbers2:32 Har i tsele morsha, kay nay venn lourde, dran haki familya an lila dre-činlo his, his le khetne 603.550 (shob-sheel-triin-zerya-panč-sheel-panč-deesh) morsha." 
Numbers2:33 Kokres i Levitarya van gar pre-činlo. Yaake penas kova o baro Devel ap o Moseste. 
Numbers2:34 Oun i Israelitarya kran halauter yaake, har o baro Devel kova o Moseske penas. Yon čivan pengre plarhtene khera pre, hakeno pash koy pre-čiddi plarhta, hoy sikras, have menshendar yob hi. Oun yaake djan le ninna doureder, hakeno peskre menshentsa oun peskri familyah." 
Numbers3:1 Kolla hi i laba o Aroneskre oun o Moseskre menshendar, kay djivan ap ko tsiro, har rakras o baro Devel o Moseha ap i berga Sinay." 
Numbers3:2 O Arones his star čave: Ko phoureder kharell Nadab, koy pal vell o Abihu, palle o Elazar, oun o Itamar." 
Numbers3:3 Kal star van o djeteha dre-maklo, te venn yon rashaya, oun boudran an o Debleskro kheer." 
Numbers3:4 Douy lendar, o Nadab oun o Abihu meran an o moulo tato them Sinay glan o baro Debleste, har rhačran yon glan leste vavar koova, hoy yob gar penas. Oun len his kek čave. O Elazar oun o Itamar kran pengri rashayeskri boudi, khetne pengro dadeha, o Aroneha." 
Numbers3:5 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: 
Numbers3:6 “An kol menshen dran o kheer Levi kay! An len glan o rashayeste Aron, te venn le leske koy." 
Numbers3:7 Yon boudrenna leske oun i tsele Israelenge glan o Debleskro kheer, oun hakeno lendar krell koy boudi pash o Debleskro kheer, hoy leste dino vell." 
Numbers3:8 Oun yon hounte denn yak ap o tselo koova an o Debleskro kheer. Oun yaake krenn yon koy boudi, hoy i tsele Israelitarya hounte krans mange." 
Numbers3:9 Oun tou aness kol Levitaryen pash o Aron oun leskre čavende. Kova hi yaake, har te anans len i Israelitarya pash lende, te krans le kolengri boudi." 
Numbers3:10 Ap o Aroneste oun ap leskre čavende hounte peness tou, te denn yon yak, te krell kek vavar lengre rashayeskri boudi. Te vell i vavar, te krell lo kay boudi, hounte merell yob.”" 
Numbers3:11 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: 
Numbers3:12 “Djiness, me rodom kol Levitaryen vin dran kol Israelitarya, te venn yon mire. Ap ko dives, har marom i tsele phoureder morsh čaven an o them Egiptia, čivom i tsele phoureder morsh čaven an o Israel mange ap i rig, te venn yon mire: kolla, kay i menshestar bolde van har ninna kolla, kay i firhestar bolde van. I tsele phoureder morsh čave hi mange, o baro Debleske. Kanna lau gar kolen, kanna lau i Levitarya mange.”" 
Numbers3:13  
Numbers3:14 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha an o moulo tato them Sinay oun penas: 
Numbers3:15 “Čin i laba kol morshendar dran o kheer Levi an i liil! Čin ninna pre dran havi familya yon venna oun koon lengro dad hi! Čin kolen pre, kay hi yek čon phouro oun phoureder!”" 
Numbers3:16 Oun o Mose kras yaake har o baro Devel leske penas. 
Numbers3:17 O Levi, les his triin čave: o Gershon, o Kohat, oun o Merari." 
Numbers3:18 O Gershon: les his douy čave: o Libni oun o Shimi. 
Numbers3:19 O Kohat: leskre čave his: o Amram, Yizhar, Hebron oun Ouziel." 
Numbers3:20 O Merari: leskre čave his o Mali oun o Moushi. Kova hi i menshe, kay venna pal o Levi peskre familyentsa." 
Numbers3:21 I menshe, kay venna o Leviteskro čavestar Gershon hi i Libnarya oun i Shimarya:" 
Numbers3:22 Khetne his le 7.500 (efta-zerya-panč-sheel) morsha, halauter, kay hi yek čon phouro oun phoureder." 
Numbers3:23 Oun len hi pengri platsa pal o Debleskro kheer, ap koy rig, kay o kham tele djala." 
Numbers3:24 Oun lengro pralstouno hi o Elyasaf, leskro dad hi o Lael." 
Numbers3:25 Lengri boudi pash o Debleskro kheer hi, te denn le garda ap kova, hoy vin ap o kheer hi: kol plarhte, hoy čakrenn o kheer, koy plarhta an o khereskro voudar," 
Numbers3:26 ninna kol plarhte, kay hi troul i platsa, hoy glan o kheer hi, kay ninna i sasterni rhačepaskri hi, kay firhe o Debleske rhačedo venna. Ninna denn le yak ap koy plarhta an o voudar glan koy platsa oun ap i shelle oun ko vavar koova, hoy koy pashel hi." 
Numbers3:27 I menshe, hoy venna o Leviteskro čavestar Kohat hi i Amramarya, i Yizhararya, i Hebronarya, oun i Ouzielarya." 
Numbers3:28 Khetne his le 8.600 (orhta-zerya-shob-sheel) morsha, halauter, hoy hi yek čon phouro oun phoureder. Lengri boudi hi, te boudrenn le ap ko koova an o Debleskro kheer." 
Numbers3:29 Lengri platsa hi pash o Debleskro kheer, ap koy rig, kay o kham tato hi." 
Numbers3:30 Lengro pralstouno hi o Elizafan, koleskro dad o Ouziel hi." 
Numbers3:31 Oun yon hounte denn garda ap ko sonakaskro morhton, koy rhapaskri, koy momelengri, o Debleskro sonakaskro bob oun o Debleskri sasterni rhačepaskri, kay firhe rhačede venna. Ninna denn le garda ap i tselo Debleskro koova an leskro kheer, koleha yon boudrenna, ninna ap koy plarhta mank kol douy iseme oun ap halauter, hoy koy pashel hi." 
Numbers3:32 O ray pral i tsele pralstunende mank i Levitarya vell o Elazar, ko čavo o rashayestar Aron, te dell yob yak ap kolende, kay boudrenn an o Debleskro kheer." 
Numbers3:33 I menshe, hoy venna o Leviteskro čavestar Merari hi i Malarya oun i Mousharya." 
Numbers3:34 Khetne his le 6.200 (shob-zerya-douy-sheel) morsha, halauter, hoy hi yek čon phouro oun phoureder." 
Numbers3:35 Lengro pralstouno hi o Souriel, koleskro dad o Abihayil hi. Lengri platsa hi pash o Debleskro kheer ap koy rig, kay o kham gar vella." 
Numbers3:36 Oun lengre boudi hi, te denn le garda ap kol kotya, dran kolende o kheer kerdo vell: i činle kashta, i pandepaskre kashta, i pesse kashta oun lengre pire, ap kolende yon tardo venna, ninna o tselo vavar koova, hoy koy pashel hi." 
Numbers3:37 Ninna hounte denn le garda ap kol kotya, hoy troul o glanstouni platsa hi: kol pesse kashta oun lengre pire, ap kolende yon tardo venna, kol tikne sasterne kotya, hoy denn le an i phoub, oun i shelle." 
Numbers3:38 Glan o Debleskro kheer, ap koy rig, kay o kham pre djala, hounte vell koy platsa o Moseske oun o Aroneske peskre čaventsa, te denn yon garda, te vell o Debleskri boudi mishto kerdo i tsele Israelenge. Oun te vell i vavar pash o Debleskro kheer, te krell lo kay boudi, hounte merell lo." 
Numbers3:39 I tsele morsha, kay venna o Leviteskre morsh čavendar, his khetne 22.000 (biish-te-douy-zerya). Kova hatsas o Mose oun o Aron vin, har činan le i laba kolendar an i liil, kay hi yek čon phouro oun phoureder. Kova kran le yaake, har o baro Devel les lenge penas." 
Numbers3:40 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Hatse vin har boud morsha mank i Israelitarya hi, kay hi i phoureder čave pengre dayendar. Čin i laba kolendar an i liil, kay hi yek čon oun phoureder." 
Numbers3:41 Hako phoureder morsh čavo mank i Israelitarya hi miro. Me hom o baro Devel. Hako phoureder morsh čaveske dess tou mande yek Levitari. Ninna hako phoureder morsh firho, hoy i Israelitaryen hi, hi miro. Hakeneske lendar dess tou mande yek firho, hoy i Levitares hi.”" 
Numbers3:42 Oun o Mose kras, hoy o baro Devel leske penas, oun činas i laba kol tsele morshendar an i liil, hoy i phoureder čave pengre dayendar hi." 
Numbers3:43 Oun halauter, hoy yek čon hi oun phoureder, his khetne 22.273 (biish-te-douy-zerya-douy-sheel-efta-deesh-te-triin)." 
Numbers3:44 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers3:45 “Hako phoureder morsh čaveske mank i Israelitarya le i Levitari, te vell lo mange, o baro Debleske! Oun le kol firhen, hoy i Levitaryen hi, oun gar kolen, hoy i Israelitaryen hi!" 
Numbers3:46 Kanna hi 273 (douy-sheel-efta-deesh-te-triin) morsha boudeder, kay phoureder čave hi, har dell Levitarya. Kolen hounte ginenn t'mer mandar pale." 
Numbers3:47 Hakeneske lendar less tou panč kotya roup. Yek kotar roup hounte vell yaake pharo har kol kotya roup an o Debleskro kheer hi: deesh-te-douy gramme pharo. 
Numbers3:48 Oun tou dess ko roup o Aroneste oun leskre čavende. Ko roup vell kol morshenge playsedo, kay boudeder hi har kol Levitarya.”" 
Numbers3:49 Koy las o Mose ko roup kolendar, kay boudeder hi har kol Levitarya." 
Numbers3:50 Yaake las lo kol morshendar oun čavendar, hoy i phoureder čave his, khetne 1.365 kotya roup, hako kotar roup yaake pharo har kol kotya an o Debleskro kheer." 
Numbers3:51 Oun o Mose das ko roup o Aroneste oun leskre čavende, yaake har o baro Devel kova leske penas." 
Numbers4:1 O baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun o Aroneha oun penas: 
Numbers4:2 Čin i laba kol morshendar an i liil, kay venna o Leviteskro čavestar, o Kohat. Čin ninna pre, dran havi familya hakeno vella oun koon leskro dad hi." 
Numbers4:3 Le kokres kolen, hoy mank triyanda oun paash-sheel bersha phouro hi, halauter kolen, kay nay venn boudepaske ap o Debleskro kheer." 
Numbers4:4 Kava hi koy boudi, hoy kol Kohatarya ap o Debleskro kheer hounte krenna: Yon hidjrenna o Debleskro koova, hoy an o kouč isema hi." 
Numbers4:5 Ap ko tsiro, kay stenn i Israelitarya pre, te djan le doureder, djal o Aron peskre čaventsa an o Debleskro kheer, oun yon lenn ko kouč kotar than tele, hoy an o voudar glan o kouč isema hi. Ko kotar than čivenn le troul o sonakaskro morhton, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi." 
Numbers4:6 Koy pre čivenn le i lači ledertikri plarhta oun pral pre i blaueti plarhta. Palle čivenn le kol hidjepaskre kashta an pengre goustria, yaake te hidjrenn nay le kova." 
Numbers4:7 Oun pral i rhapaskri, kay o Debleskro maro pre čiddo vell, hounte čivenn le ninna i blaueti plarhta. Oun koy pre čivenn le kol pirya oun roya, kol čare oun khore, kay i mool o Debleske dren vella. Ninna o Debleskro maro hounte vell koy pre čiddo." 
Numbers4:8 Pral kova halauter hounte čivenn le i plarhta, hoy hi lolo har yag, oun koy pral i lači ledertikri plarhta, oun čivenn i hidjepaskre kashta an pengre goustria." 
Numbers4:9 Oun yon hounte lenn i blaueti plarhta oun čivenn koya troul koy momelengri oun lakre momlia, ninna troul i činepangre, kolentsa i dorya an i momlia tele činlo venn, ninna troul i yagakre čare oun i djeteskre khore, hoy koy pashel hi." 
Numbers4:10 Troul kova halauter čivenn le i lači ledertikri plarhta, oun čivenn kova ap i hidjepaskre kashta." 
Numbers4:11 Ninna hounte čivenn le i blaueti plarhta pral o sonakaskro bob, oun koy pral i lači ledertikri plarhta. Palle čivenn le i hidjepaskre kashta an i goustria ap o bob." 
Numbers4:12 Ko tselo vavar koova, kay boudrenn yon leha an o Debleskro kheer, hounte lenn yon oun čivenn les an i blaueti plarhta, oun čivenn i lači ledertikri plarhta pral pre oun čivenn kova ap hidjepaskre kashta." 
Numbers4:13 Yon hounte khossenn ninna koy yagakri čik ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri tele, oun čivenn i loli plarhta koy pral." 
Numbers4:14 Oun ko tselo koova, kay boudrenn yon peha, čivenn le koy pral pre: yagakre čare, massengre forshette, bare roya, kolentsa lenn le i yagakri čik krik, čare, kay o rat dren vella, oun ko tselo koova, hoy koy pashel hi. Pral halauter čivenn le i lači ledertikri plarhta. Palle čivenn le kol hidjepaskre kashta an i goustria ap o bob." 
Numbers4:15 Ap ko tsiro, kay djan i Israelitarya doureder, hounte krenn o Aron oun leskre čave kava halauter oun hounte čakrenn kol tsele kotya o Debleskro plarhteno khereske oun halauter, hoy koy pashel hi. Pal kova venn kol Kohatarya oun hidjrenn kova. Kaya hi lengre boudi. Yon taprenn kokres kol plarhte an, hoy troul ko tselo koova čiddo hi, oun gar ko Debleskro koova, te merenn yon gar." 
Numbers4:16 Oun o Elazar, ko čavo o rashayestar Aron, yob dell garda ap o momelengro djet, oun ap ko djet, hoy lenn le te makenn le i rashayen dren, oun ap ko soungepaskro koova, hoy vell rhačedo o Debleske. Ninna dell lo garda ap o rhapen, hoy hako dives o Debleske rhačedo vella. Oun yob dell garda ap o tselo Debleskro kheer oun ap ko tselo Debleskro koova, hoy koy dren hi." 
Numbers4:17 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun o Aroneha, oun penas:" 
Numbers4:18 “Denn yak, te ačenn kol Kohatarya djido mashkral kol Levitarya," 
Numbers4:19 oun merenna gar ap ko tsiro, kay djan yon pash o Debleskro koova! Doleske krenn yaake: O Aron oun leskre čave djan glan lende an o Debleskro kheer dren oun sikrenn hakeneste, hoy yob hounte hidjrella." 
Numbers4:20 I Kohatarya hounte djan gar kokres koy dren, vitar gar dikenn yon o Debleskro koova, te merenn yon gar.”" 
Numbers4:21 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers4:22 Čin ninna i laba kol morshendar an i liil, kay venna pal o Gershon! Čin pre dran havi familya hakeno vella, oun koon leskro dad hi." 
Numbers4:23 Le halauter kolen, kay mank triyanda oun paash-sheel bersha phouro hi. Oun de lauteren, kay venn boudepaske lengre boudi ap o Debleskro kheer." 
Numbers4:24 Kaya hi koy boudi, hoy kol Gershonarya hounte krenna:" 
Numbers4:25 Yon hidjrenn kol plarhte, hoy čakrenn o Debleskro kheer, koy telstouni layntikri plarhta, koy plarhta dran bakrengro bal, hoy vell koy pre oun koy lači ledertikri plarhta, hoy vell pral pre čiddo. Ninna hidjrenn le ko kouč kotar than, hoy an ko voudar hi an o Debleskro kheer," 
Numbers4:26 ninna i layntikre kotya troul i glanstouni platsa, oun koy bari plarhta an o voudar glan i platsa, hoy troul o kheer oun i sasterni rhačepaskri hi, ninna i shelle oun ko tselo koova, hoy koy pashel hi." 
Numbers4:27 O Aron oun leskre čave hounte penenn lenge, hoy te hidjrenn le. Oun t'mer hounte denn garda, te krenn yon pengri boudi mishto." 
Numbers4:28 Kaya hi koy boudi, hoy krenna i Gershonarya ap o Debleskro kheer. Oun o Itamar, ko čavo o rashayestar Aron hi o pralstouno pral lende." 
Numbers4:29 Čin ninna i laba kol morshendar an i liil, kay venna pal o Merari! Oun čin pre dran havi familya hakeno vella, oun koon leskro dad hi." 
Numbers4:30 Le halauter kolen, kay hi mank triyanda oun paash-sheel bersha phouro, kay venn boudepaske. Oun de len lengre boudi ap o Debleskro kheer!" 
Numbers4:31 Kaya hi lengre boudi ap o Debleskro kheer: Yon hidjrenna kol činle kashta, hoy venn pre tardo, te krenn le o kheer, lengre pandepangre kashta, oun kol pesse kashta, hoy venn pre tardo, te hidjrenn le o kheer, ninna lengre pire," 
Numbers4:32 ninna kol pesse kashta, hoy venn pre tardo troul koy glanstouni platsa, lengre pire oun kol tikne sasterne kotya, kay deh an i phoub, kol shelle oun ko tselo vavar koova, yaake har kova lengre boudi hi. Oun t'mer hounte sikrenn lende hako kotar, hoy hidjrenn le." 
Numbers4:33 Kaya hi koy boudi, hoy i Merarya hounte krenna ap o Debleskro kheer. Oun o Itamar, ko čavo o rashayestar Aron, hi o pralstouno pral lende." 
Numbers4:34 Oun o Mose oun o Aron khetne kol pralstunentsa činan i laba kol morshendar an i liil, kay van pal o Kohat. Hakenestar činan le pre dran havi familya yob vas oun koon leskro dad his." 
Numbers4:35 Yon lan halauter kolen, kay mank triyanda oun paash-sheel bersh phouro his, oun nay van boudepaske, te krenn yon pengri boudi ap o Debleskro kheer." 
Numbers4:36 Khetne his yon 2.750 (douy-zerya-efta-sheel-te-panč-deesh) morsha. 
Numbers4:37 Yaake boud morsha his kol Kohatarya, kay nay boudran ap o Debleskro kheer, oun kay o Mose oun o Aron an i liil činan, yaake har o baro Devel kova o Moseske penas, te krenn le." 
Numbers4:38 Oun i laba kol morshendar, kay van pal o Gershon, van ninna pre činlo. Hakenestar činan le pre dran havi familya yob vas oun koon leskro dad his." 
Numbers4:39 Yon lan halauter kolen, kay mank triyanda oun paash-sheel bersh phouro his oun nay van boudepaske, te krenn yon pengri boudi ap o Debleskro kheer." 
Numbers4:40 Khetne his yon 2.630 (douy-zerya-shob-sheel-triyanda) morsha. 
Numbers4:41 Yaake boud morsha his kol Gershonarya, kay nay boudran ap o Debleskro kheer, oun kay o Mose oun o Aron an i liil činan, yaake har o baro Devel kova penas." 
Numbers4:42 Oun i laba kol morshendar, kay van pal o Merari van ninna pre činlo. Hakenestar činan le pre dran havi familya yob vas oun koon leskro dad his." 
Numbers4:43 Yon lan halauter kolen, kay mank triyanda oun paash-sheel bersh phouro his, oun nay van boudepaske, te krenn yon pengri boudi ap o Debleskro kheer." 
Numbers4:44 Khetne his yon 3.200 (triin-zerya-douy-sheel) morsha. 
Numbers4:45 Yaake boud morsha his kol Merarya, kolengre laba o Mose oun o Aron an i liil činan, yaake har o baro Devel kova o Moseske penas, te krenn le." 
Numbers4:46 Khetne his kol tsele Levitarya 8.580 (orhta-zerya-panč-sheel-orhta-deesh) morsha. O Mose oun o Aron khetne kol pralstunentsa an Israel činan lengre laba an i liil, oun činan ninna pre, dran havi familya hakeno vas oun koon leskro dad his. Kolla halauter his mank triyanda oun paash-sheel bersh phouro, oun nay van boudepaske ap o Debleskro kheer oun hidjran pharo koova." 
Numbers4:47  
Numbers4:48  
Numbers4:49 Hakeno las peskri boudi oun leske vas penlo, havo koova yob hounte hidjrell. Kova halauter vas yaake har o baro Devel kova o Moseske penas, te krenn yon." 
Numbers5:1 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers5:2 Pen ap kol Israelitarya: “Bičrenn hakenes vin glan t'mari platsa, kay yaake nasselo ap peskro mass hi, te merell leskro mass tele! Bičrenn ninna halauteren vin, kay nashell doukepaskro pani dran lende vin, oun kolen, kay kran pen pale-čiddo ap kolende, kay moulo hi!" 
Numbers5:3 Morshen oun djouvyen hounte bičrenn vin glan koy platsa, kay t'mare plarhtene khera tardo hi, te krenn yon gar koy platsa pale-čiddo, kay me pash t'mende djivau.”" 
Numbers5:4 Oun kol Israelitarya kran kova yaake, oun bičran len vin glan i platsa, yaake har o baro Devel kova ap o Moseste penas." 
Numbers5:5 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers5:6 Pen ap i Israelitarya: Hakeno, morsh har djouvel, kay krell čilačepen ap yekeste, oun yaake ninna ap o baro Debleste, kova anell i doosh ap peste." 
Numbers5:7 Oun yob hounte penell o čilačo koova, hoy yob kras, oun krell kova pale mishto, oun dell ko pančto kotar koy pashel, ap koleste yob o čilačepen kras." 
Numbers5:8 Kek te hi koy, koneste nay dell lo kova, palle dell lo les o baro Debleste o rashayeske. Ninna dell lo i divyo bakro, hoy o rashay marella, te vell leskri doosh krik lino oun halauter pale mishto." 
Numbers5:9 Ninna ko vavar koova, hoy i Israelitarya o baro Debleste denn, hi i rashayenge." 
Numbers5:10 Oun kova, hoy yek ap i rig čivella, te vell lo o Debleske, kova hi ninna o rashayeske. Oun hoy yek i rashayenge della, kova hi lenge." 
Numbers5:11 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers5:12 Pen kol Israelenge: Nay vell, te rhorhell i djouvel peskro romes i vavar morsheha, oun lakro rom djinell kova gar, oun kek dikas, te anas li i ladj ap peste oun tapras lat koy pashel," 
Numbers5:13  
Numbers5:14 oun lakro rom zilveras, oun poučell pestar: Kras li kova? – Kras li les gar?" 
Numbers5:15 Palle hounte anell ko morsh lat pash o rashayeste, oun anell o Debleske yek kilogrammi yarro. Oun yob hounte čorell kek djet pral pre, oun dell vitar kek soungepaskro koova koy pashel. Ko yarro dell lo o Debleste, te vell o čačepen vin, te djinenn le: rhorhras li les, – rhorhras li les gar." 
Numbers5:16 Oun ko rashay hounte anell lat glan o baro Debleste," 
Numbers5:17 oun čorell Debleskro pani an i piri, hoy hi kerdo dran pekli čik, oun lell phoubyakri čik dran o Debleskro kheer, oun čivell kova an o pani." 
Numbers5:18 Oun yob hounte anell koy djouvyat glan o baro Debleste, oun krell lakre balla pre, oun čivell ko yarro an lakro vast, te vell diklo, rhorhras li peskro romes, rhorhras li les gar. Oun an peskro vast lell ko rashay ko djoungelo nasselo pani." 
Numbers5:19 Oun yob dell koy djouvyat trad oun penell ap late: “Te his kek morsh pash toute čiddo oun rhorhral tiro romes gar i vavareha, te anal ladj ap toute, palle nay piyeh ko djoungelo nasselo pani, oun tou veh gar nasselo." 
Numbers5:20 Tou te rhorhral tiro romes i vavareha, oun anal ladj ap toute," 
Numbers5:21 palle anell o baro Devel i bibarht ap toute, yaake te venn tire rigya tikneder oun tiro per pesseder. Palle penell yek, kay kamell i bibarht pral i vavareste te anell: Mou djal touke har kay djouvyake!” Kol labentsa hounte dell o rashay kol djouvyat trad, oun palle penell lo ap late:" 
Numbers5:22 “Yaake djal ko nasselo pani an tiro per, oun tiro per vell pesseder, oun tire rigya perenn khetne.” Oun koy djouvel hounte penella: “Amen, yaake te vell kova!”" 
Numbers5:23 Palle hounte činell o rashay kol laba ap i patri, oun thovell len an ko djoungelo pani tele." 
Numbers5:24 Ko djoungelo nasselo pani hi kol djouvyake pipaske, te vell i nasslepen an late dren." 
Numbers5:25 Palle lell ko rashay ko yarro dran lakro vast, te hadell lo les pre glan o Debleste. Oun yaake sikrell lo: Kova hi o baro Debleske." 
Numbers5:26 Oun yob rhačrell yek vast pherdo yarro ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri, te sikrell lo, te hi o tselo yarro o baro Debleske. Oun pal kova dell lo koya djouvyat ko pani pipaske." 
Numbers5:27 Oun te rhorhras koy djouvyat peskro romes oun anas ladj ap peste, palle djal ko nasselo pani an late dren, oun yoy nay vell bouder gar an vavar koova. Lakro per vell pesso, oun lakre rigya perenn khetne. Oun te kamell yek i vavares te praasell, penell lo: Mou djal touke har kay djouvyake!" 
Numbers5:28 Te anas savi djouvel gar ladj ap peste, oun kek doosh hi ap late, palle vell yoy gar nasselo, oun nay vell an vavar koova." 
Numbers5:29 Yaake hounte krenn t'mer kova, te zilverell i morsh oun patsell, te rhorhras les peskri romni i vavareha. Yob hounte anell lat glan o baro Debleste. Oun ko rashay hounte krell lah kova yaake har kate penlo hi." 
Numbers5:30  
Numbers5:31 Te his ko morshes gar čačo, lell lo kek phagi. Koy djouvel, te anas li doosh ap peste, hounte hidjrell peskri phagi." 
Numbers6:1 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers6:2 Pen ap i Israelitarya: Te dell yek pes sovel, – nay vell i morsh, ninna i djouvel, – oun penell o baro Debleske, te vell lo leske i tsireske koy," 
Numbers6:3 palle hounte piyell kova kek mool oun zoreli rhačedi, vitar kek vavar pipen, hoy dran drake kerdo vas. Yob hounte rhal vitar kek drake, kek, hoy pesso hi, vitar kek, hoy trouk hi." 
Numbers6:4 Yaake rah har yob koy sovel das, hounte rhal yob či, hoy i drakengro roukestar vella, vitar kek drake, hoy yalo hi, vitar kek, hoy pral o tsiro ap o rouk hi." 
Numbers6:5 Yaake rah har yob koy sovel das, hounte vell gar leskro bal činlo, bis te ko tsiro trouyel hi, kay das yob pes an o baro Debleskro vast. Yob hi o Debleskro, oun hounte moukell peskro bal ap o shero lengsto te vell." 
Numbers6:6 An ko tselo tsiro, kay das yob pes an o baro Debleskro vast, hounte djal yob gar pash yekeste, kay meras." 
Numbers6:7 Ninna te hi ko moulo leskro dad, leskri day, leskro phraal oun leskri pheen, hounte djal lo gar pash lende, te vell lo gar pale-čiddo an ko tsiro, kay hi lo peskro Debleske koy." 
Numbers6:8 Ko tselo tsiro, kay das yob pes sovel, hi yob kokres o baro Debleske koy." 
Numbers6:9 Te his yob pashel, har meras yek ap yek kopo, venn leskre balla pale-čiddo shob divessa. Ap o eftato dives hounte činell yob peskro bal ap o shero, oun yob vell pale erligo." 
Numbers6:10 Oun ap o orhtato dives hounte lell yob douy divye taube oder douy vavar taube oun anell kolen pash o rashayeste pash o voudar glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. 
Numbers6:11 Oun o rashay hounte dell koy yek tauba o Debleste, te vell i doosh krik lino. Oun koy vavar hounte rhačrell yob o Debleske, te vell lo pale erligo oun koy doosh lestar krik lino, hoy yob ap peste anas, har tapras lo i moules an, oun vas doleske pale-čiddo. Palle moukell yob peskro bal pale lengsto te vell," 
Numbers6:12 te vell lo neves o baro Debleske koy ko tsireske, kay das lo pes sovel. Oun yob hounte lell i bakro, hoy yek bersh phouro hi, oun dell les o Debleste, te vell halauter pale mishto. Kol divessa glan te van leskre balla pale-čiddo, his čičeske." 
Numbers6:13 Kova hi ko lab, hoy penell koleske, kay hi i tsireske o Debleske koy, hoy te krell lo: Te hi ko tsiro trouyel, kay das yob pes sovel, hounte vell lo pash o voudar glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer anlo." 
Numbers6:14 Oun yob hounte dell o baro Debles i bakro, yek bersh phouro oun sasto, te vell kova tseles rhačedo o Debleske. Ninna dell yob o Debles i bakri, yek bersh phouro oun sasto, te vell leskri doosh krik lino. Oun pale anell lo leske i vavar sasto morsh bakro, hoy rhan le khetne glan o Debleste." 
Numbers6:15 Ninna anell lo i kashteni piri, kay merklia oun mare dren hi, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi: merklia dran lačo yarro oun djet, oun sane mare, kay djet pre maklo hi, ninna ko tselo rhapen dran yarro oun koy mool, hoy koy pashel hi, te vell lo dino o Debleske." 
Numbers6:16 Oun o rashay hounte anell kova glan o baro Debleste. Palle marell lo ko yek bakro, te vell leskri doosh krik lino oun ko douyto, hoy o Debleske tseles rhačedo vella." 
Numbers6:17 Palle dell lo o morsh bakro o baro Debleste, ninna koy kashteni piri, kay o maro dren hi, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi. Ko koova dell lo o Debleste, te rhan le les khetne glan leste. Pal kova anell lo ko vavar rhapen dran yarro, oun koy mool, te vell kova o Debleske dino." 
Numbers6:18 Oun ko morsh, kay his i tsireske o Debleske koy, hounte činell o bal ap peskro shero, hoy moukas lo lengsto te vell o Debleske. Oun yob činell les pash o voudar glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer, oun lell les oun vitsrell les ap i yag, kay rhačrenn kol thoulle kotya ko bakrestar, hoy rhan le khetne glan o Debleste." 
Numbers6:19 Oun pal kova lell o rashay i kotar keredo mass o bakreskro phikestar, ninna i merkli oun i maro, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi, dran i kashteni piri oun čivell koleske, kay his i tsireske o Debleske koy, an leskre vasta." 
Numbers6:20 Palle lell o rashay kova an peskre vasta oun hadell les pre, te dell lo les o baro Debleste. Ko koova, khetne o beč oun i palstouni heri o bakrestar, hi o rashayeske. Koy pal nay piyell kova, kay i tsireske o Debleske koy his, pale mool." 
Numbers6:21 Yaake hounte krell ko mensho, kay his i tsireske o Debleske koy, oun dell kava koova o baro Debleste, ninna ko vavar koova, hoy yob pes sovel das. Yaake har yob pes sovel das, yaake hounte krell yob ninna." 
Numbers6:22 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers6:23 “Pen ap o Aroneste oun ap leskre čavende: Yaake hounte penenn t'mer ap kol Israelitarya, te rakrenn miri barht pral lende vin:" 
Numbers6:24 Mou dell tout o baro Devel barht oun zoor, oun dell garda ap toute!" 
Numbers6:25 O baro Devel dikell lačes ap t'mende oun krell peskro dji t'menge pre! 
Numbers6:26 O baro Devel dikell kamles ap t'mende oun dell t'men shoukapen an o dji! 
Numbers6:27 T'mer te rakrenn yaake miro lab pral i Israelitarya vin, dau me len barht oun zoor.”" 
Numbers7:1 Oun har o Mose o Debleskro plarhteno kheer pre čivas, makas lo les o djeteha o Debleske. Ninna ko tselo koova, hoy koy dren hi, ninna o Debleskri rhačepaskri oun halauter, hoy pashel hi, makas yob o djeteha o Debleske." 
Numbers7:2 Koy van kol pralstoune pral i Israelitarya oun anan kouč koova o Debleske. Hakeno his o pralstouno pral yek kol deesh-te-douy bare familyendar, kay van kol deesh-te-douy Yakobeskre čavendar. Oun yon his kolla, kay činan i laba kolendar pre, kay an lengre familye hi." 
Numbers7:3 Oun yon anan ko kouč koova glan o baro Debleste: shob zorele vourdya oun deesh-te-douy groumya. Douy pralstoune khetne anan yek vourdin, oun hakeno lendar anas yek groumni. Oun yon anan len glan o Debleskro kheer." 
Numbers7:4 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers7:5 “Le kova lendar oun de les kol Levitaryen, te nay krenn yon pengri boudi ap o Debleskro kheer oun nay hidjrenn pengre kotya!”" 
Numbers7:6 Koy las o Mose kol vourdya oun groumya oun das kova kol Levitaryen. 
Numbers7:7 Douy vourdya oun star groumya das yob kolen, kay van pal o Gershon, te nay hidjrenn le pengre kotya." 
Numbers7:8 Oun star vourdya oun orhta groumya das yob kolen, kay van pal o Merari, te nay hidjrenn yon pengre kotya. Oun o Itamar, ko čavo o rashayestar Aron, das garda ap halauter." 
Numbers7:9 Kolen, kay van pal o Kohat, das yob či. Lengri boudi his, te hidjrenn le o Debleskro koova, hoy an leskro kheer his. Kova hounte hidjrenn le ap pengre phika." 
Numbers7:10 Oun kol pralstoune dan kouč koova o Debleske oun anan kova glan o Debleskri rhačepaskri ap ko dives, kay vas koy rhačepaskri o djeteha dre-maklo." 
Numbers7:11 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Mouk hako dives yekes kol pralstunendar te vell, te anell yob peskro koova. Kova te djal yaake deesh-te-douy divessa, te vell koy rhačepaskri mange koy.”" 
Numbers8:1 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers8:2 Rake o Aroneha oun pen leske: Te čiveh tou i momlia ap koy momelengri pre, hounte čivess len yaake, te dikenn hake efta momlia glan." 
Numbers8:3 O Aron kras kova, oun čivas kol momlia yaake ap i momelengri, te dikan le glan i momelengri, yaake har o baro Devel ap o Moseste penas." 
Numbers8:4 Koy momelengri his dran yek kotar lačo sonakay, leskro mashkralstouno kotar oun kol blumtikre moussya. Yaake har o baro Devel les o Moseste sikras, kran le koy momelengri." 
Numbers8:5 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers8:6 Rode i Levitarya dran i Israelitarya vin, oun kre len erligo mange!" 
Numbers8:7 Yaake hounte kress tou lentsa, te kreh tou len erligo: Tou čivess pani ap lende, te vell lengri doosh krik lino. Oun yon hounte činenn halauter pengre balla tele, oun thovenn pengre koola, oun krenn pen yaake djoudjo oun erligo." 
Numbers8:8 Tou less i terno gouroum, oun koy pashel rhapen o Debleske: yarro, kay djet mashkral hi. Oun i vavar terno gouroum less tou rhačepaske o Debleske, te vell i doosh krik lino." 
Numbers8:9 Oun aness kol Levitaryen glan o Debleskro kheer. Oun koy hounte venn i tsele Israelitarya khetne. 
Numbers8:10 Oun tou aness kol Levitaryen glan o baro Debleste. Oun kol Israelitarya hounte čivenn pengre vasta ap lende, te sikrenn le, yon hi kolla, kolen i Israelitarya o baro Debleste denna, te krenn yon i boudi an leskro kheer. Oun o Aron anell i Levitaryen glan o baro Debleste." 
Numbers8:11  
Numbers8:12 Oun kol Levitarya hounte čivenn pengre vasta ap kol terne gourmengre shere. Ko yek vell rhačedo, te vell i doosh krik lino. Ko vavar vell tseles rhačedo o baro Debleske. Yaake vell i doosh i Levitarendar krik lino." 
Numbers8:13 Oun tou aness kol Levitaryen glan o Aroneste oun leskre čavende, oun yaake glan o baro Debleste, te venn le leske koy." 
Numbers8:14 Yaake less tou kol Levitaryen dran kol Israelitaryen ap i rig, te venn le miro." 
Numbers8:15 Pal kova nay djan yon koy, te krenn le pengri boudi an o Debleskro kheer. I Israelitarya dan len mande. Doleske hounte kress len djoudjo mange oun aness len glan mande. Kolen lom mange oun gar i vavar morsh čaven an Israel, kay hi i phoureder čave pengre dayendar." 
Numbers8:16  
Numbers8:17 Hakeno, kay hi o phoureder morsh čavo peskri datar mashkral kol Israelitarya hi mange, hako mensho oun hako firho. Ap ko dives, kay marom i tsele morshen, kay his i phoureder čave pengre dayendar an o them Egiptia, penom: Hako morsh, kay hi i phoureder čavo peskri datar, hi miro." 
Numbers8:18 Oun kanna lom i Levitaryen oun gar kol vavar morshen, kay hi i phoureder čave pengre dayendar an Israel." 
Numbers8:19 Oun me dom kol Levitaryen o Aroneste oun leskre čavende, te krenn le koy boudi an o Debleskro kheer. Yaake krenn le, hoy i boudi lauterendar an Israel vals. Oun yaake vell kek bibarht ap i Israelitarya, hoy hounte vals ap lende, te vans yon ap i Debleskri platsa." 
Numbers8:20 O Mose, o Aron, ninna kol tsele menshe an o Israel kran kolentsa dran o kheer Levi halauter yaake, har o baro Devel kova ap o Moseste penas." 
Numbers8:21 Oun kol Levitarya moukan pani ap pende te čorell, te vell lengri doosh tele thodo, oun thovan pengre koola. Oun o Aron anas kol Levitaryen glan o baro Debleste oun rhačras kol firhen o baro Debleske, te vell i doosh i Levitarendar krik lino, te venn yon erligo glan o Debleste." 
Numbers8:22 Koy pal djan yon kote, te krenn yon pengri boudi an o Debleskro kheer glan o Aroneste oun leskre čavende. Lauter vas yaake kerdo, har o baro Devel o Moseske penas, te krenn le kolentsa dran o kheer Levi." 
Numbers8:23 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers8:24 “I Levitarya, kay hi 25 (biish-te-panč) bersh phouro oun phoureder, hounte venn boudepaske, te krenn le pengri boudi ap o Debleskro kheer." 
Numbers8:25 Te venn yon paash-sheel bersh, hounte boudrenn le bouder gar." 
Numbers8:26 Yon nay venn ap i rig pengre phralenge, kay boudrenn ap o Debleskro kheer. Koy boudi, hoy yon kran, hounte krenn yon bouder gar. Yaake hounte kress tou kolentsa dran o kheer Levi, te krell hakeno peskri boudi.”" 
Numbers9:1 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha an o moulo tato them Sinay, an o douyto bersh, har yon dran o them Egiptia vin djan, an o ersto čon, oun penas:" 
Numbers9:2 “I Israelitarya hounte rikrenn o baro dives, hoy kharella Passa ap o čačo tsiro:" 
Numbers9:3 Ap o deesh-te-starto dives, an kay čon, ap i rati, ap i čačo tsiro hounte rhan le ko rhapen Passa yaake har t'menge penom, oun hounte krenn pal mire tsele laba.”" 
Numbers9:4 Oun o Mose penas lenge kal laba. 
Numbers9:5 Oun yon kran ko rhapen, hoy kharella Passa, ap o deesh-te-starto dives, an ko ersto čon, ap i rati, an o moulo tato them Sinay. Yaake har o baro Devel o Moseske penas, yaake kran i Israelitarya." 
Numbers9:6 Koy his morsha, kay tapran i moules an, oun van pale-čiddo. Kolla nay van gar glan o Debleste ap ko dives, te rhan le ko Passa. Yon van glan o Moseste oun glan o Aroneste," 
Numbers9:7 oun penan ap lende: “Mer tapram i moules an oun vam pale-čiddo. Hounte rikras men pale oun nay vah gar glan o baro Debleste, te anas leske i bakro khetne i vavar Israelitarya?”" 
Numbers9:8 Oun o Mose penas ap lende: “Ačenn kate. Me kamau te shounell, hoy o baro Devel t'menge penell.”" 
Numbers9:9 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers9:10 Pen ap i Israelitarya: Te vas yek t'mendar, ninna t'mare čavendar, pale-čiddo ap i mouleste, nay rhal lo ko rhapen gar ap kava dives. Kova hi ninna yaake kolenge, kay hi ap o drom." 
Numbers9:11 Yon hounte rhan ko rhapen an o douyto čon ap o deesh-te-starto dives, ap i rati, oun hounte rhan koy pashel ko maro, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi, ninna shoutlo zenlepen." 
Numbers9:12 Oun yon hounte moukenn či čiddo pral i rat. Vitar kek kokalo hounte vell phagedo. Oun halauter hounte vell yaake kerdo har pash o Passa, hoy rhan le ap o čačo tsiro." 
Numbers9:13 Koon gar pale-čiddo hi oun gar ap o drom hi, kova hounte rikrell o Passa ap o čačo dives. Te krell lo kova gar, hounte vell lo infam oun ačell bouder gar pash peskre menshende. Koy phagi lell lo doleske, kay vas lo gar ap o čačo tsiro glan o baro Debleste, te anell lo leske i bakro. Leskri doosh ačell ap leste." 
Numbers9:14 Oun te hi yek mank t'mende, kay gar t'mendar hi, oun kova kamell ninna o baro Debleske o dives Passa te rikrell, yaake nay krell yob kova yaake, har t'menge penom, pal mire tsele laba. Kol laba hi leske har t'menge." 
Numbers9:15 Oun ap ko dives, kay vas o Debleskro kheer pre-čiddo, ko kheer, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi, vas i folka tele pral o kheer. Oun an i rati his i yag an late." 
Numbers9:16 Yaake his kova o tselo tsiro: ap o dives his koy folka pral ko kheer tardo. Oun ap i rati dikas li vin har i yag. 
Numbers9:17 Hako kopo, kay hadas pes koy folka, djan i Israelitarya doureder. Oun kote, kay koy folka tardo ačas, koy ačan i Israelitarya ninna tardo." 
Numbers9:18 O baro Devel te penas Djan!, palle djan yon. Oun o baro Devel te penas, te ačenn yon, palle ačan yon oun čivan pengre plarhtene khera pre. Yaake rah, har koy folka pral o kheer tardo ačas, yaake rah ačan yon." 
Numbers9:19 Oun ninna te ačas koy folka boud divessa pral o kheer tardo, shounan i Israelitarya ap o baro Debleste, oun djan gar doureder." 
Numbers9:20 Oun te ačas koy folka i tikno tsiro oun gar boud divessa pral o kheer tardo, ačan le i tikno tsiro koy, oun palle djan le doureder, hako kopo yaake har o baro Devel penas." 
Numbers9:21 Te his koy folka yek rat koy, oun palle hadas li pes, djan yon doureder. Oun ap ko tsiro, kay hadas pes koy folka, nay vell ap o dives, nay vell ap i rati, palle djan yon ninna doureder." 
Numbers9:22 Te ačas koy folka douy divessa, yek čon, ninna boudeder tsiro pral o kheer tardo, yaake ačan i Israelitarya, oun djan gar doureder. Oun te hadas pes koy folka, djan yon doureder." 
Numbers9:23 Oun te penas o baro Devel, te ačenn yon, čivan yon pengre plarhtene khera pre, oun te penas yob, te djan yon, yaake djan yon. Oun yaake shounan yon ap o baro Debleste oun kran halauter yaake, har yob ap o Moseste penas." 
Numbers10:1 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers10:2 Kre touke douy phourdepangre dran lačo roup! An kolende vell dren phourdedo, te kameh tou, te venn i tsele Israelitarya khetne, ninna te hounte djan le doureder." 
Numbers10:3 Oun te phourdenn le kol douyentsa, hounte venn i tsele Israelitarya pash toute khetne glan o Debleskro kheer." 
Numbers10:4 Te phourdenn le ap yekeste, hounte venn kolla pash toute, kay hi pralstoune pral kol boud zerya menshende an Israel." 
Numbers10:5 Te phourdenn t'mer zoreles, hounte stenn kolla pre, kay hi lengre platsa kote, kay i kham pre djala, te djan le doureder." 
Numbers10:6 Oun te phourdenn t'mer o douyto kopo zoreles ap i phourdepaskri, hounte stenn kolla pre, kay hi lengre platsa kote, kay i kham tato hi, te djan le doureder. Yaake djinenn le: Te vell zoreles phourdedo, hounte djan yon doureder." 
Numbers10:7 Te kamenn, te venn i tsele Israelitarya khetne, hounte phourdenn gar zoreles." 
Numbers10:8 Kol rashaya, o Aroneskre čave, hi kolla, kay hounte phourdenn an i phourdepangre. Kova hounte ačell yaake t'menge oun t'mare čavenge hako tsireske." 
Numbers10:9 Te perenn vavar menshe an t'maro them dren oun kamenn ray pral t'mende te vell, oun t'mer djan an o kourepen, te kourenn t'men lentsa, palle hounte phourdenn zoreles an i phourdepangre, te venn t'mer t'maro baro Debleske an o shero. Oun yob lell t'men vin dran lengre vasta." 
Numbers10:10 Phourdenn ninna an i phourdepangre ap kol bare divessa, kay han t'mer barhtelo, oun ap ko dives, kay vell i nevo čon, oun kay t'mer o baro Debleske firhen anenn, save, hoy t'mer leske tseles rhačrenna oun save, hoy rhan t'mer glan leste khetne. Palle venn t'mer mange, t'maro Debleske, an o shero. Me hom t'maro baro Devel." 
Numbers10:11 Ap o biishto dives an o douyto čon an o douyto bersh hadas pes koy bari folka, hoy pral o Debleskro kheer his, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi." 
Numbers10:12 Oun kol Israelitarya djan dran ko moulo tato them Sinay. Oun koy folka djas glan lende oun ačas tardo an ko moulo tato them Paran. 
Numbers10:13 Kova his o ersto kopo, kay djan le yaake doureder har o baro Devel kova ap o Moseste penas:" 
Numbers10:14 Kol menshe dran o kheer Youda his i glanstoune, kay djan vin. Lengro pralstouno his o Nashon, koleskro dad o Amminadab hi. Lentsa djan kol menshe dran o kheer Issakar oun dran o kheer Zabulon. I pralstouno pral o kheer Issakar his o Netanel. Leskro dad hi o Souar. Oun o pralstouno pral o kheer Zabulon his o Eliab. Leskro dad hi o Helon." 
Numbers10:15  
Numbers10:16  
Numbers10:17 Palle kran yon o Debleskro plarhteno kheer tele. Oun kol menshe dran i familye Gershon oun Merari djan oun hidjran ko plarhteno kheer. 
Numbers10:18 Pal lende djan kol menshe dran o kheer Ruben. Lengro pralstouno his o Elizour, koleskro dad o Shedehour hi. Lentsa djan kol menshe dran o kheer Simeon oun dran o kheer Gad. O pralstouno pral o kheer Simeon his o Sheloumiel, koleskro dad o Sourishadday hi. Oun o pralstouno pral o kheer Gad his o Elyasaf, koleskro dad o Degouel hi." 
Numbers10:19  
Numbers10:20  
Numbers10:21 Pal lende djan kol Kohatarya, oun hidjran ko koova o Debleskro plarhteno khereske. Kava kheer hounte vas pale pre-čiddo, bis te kol Kohatarya pal van." 
Numbers10:22 Pal lende djan kol menshe dran o kheer Efrayim. Lengro pralstouno his o Elishama, koleskro dad o Ammihoud hi. Lentsa djan kol menshe dran o kheer Manasse oun dran o kheer Benyamin. O pralstouno pral o kheer Manasse hi o Gamaliel, leskro dad hi o Pedazur. Oun o pralstouno pral o kheer Benyamin his o Abidan, leskro dad hi o Gidoni." 
Numbers10:23  
Numbers10:24  
Numbers10:25 Pal lende djan kol menshe dran o kheer Dan. Lengro pralstouno his o Ahiyeser, koleskro dad o Ammishadday hi. Lentsa djan kol menshe dran o kheer Asser oun dran o kheer Naftali. O pralstouno pral o kheer Asser his o Pagiel. Leskro dad hi o Okran. Oun o pralstouno pral o kheer Naftali his o Ahira, koleskro dad o Enan hi." 
Numbers10:26  
Numbers10:27  
Numbers10:28 Hako kopo, kay djan i Israelitarya doureder, kran le les yaake." 
Numbers10:29 Oun o Mose penas ap peskri romyakro phraleste, o Hobab, koleskro dad o Regouel hi dran o them Midian: “Mer djah an ko them, hoy o baro Devel penas: Me dau kova t'mende. Kanna, ab mentsa! Palle krah touke lačo koova. O baro Devel penas: Me kamau lačepen te krell ap o Israel.”" 
Numbers10:30 Koy penas o Hobab: “Me kamau gar t'mentsa te djal. Me kamau an miro them oun pash mire menshende te djal.” 
Numbers10:31 O Mose penas: “Dja gar krik mendar, tou djineh i platse an o moulo tato them, kay mer nay djivah. Tou nay sikreh menge o drom." 
Numbers10:32 Oun te djah tou mentsa, krah mer touke o lačepen, hoy o baro Devel ap mende krella.”" 
Numbers10:33 Yaake moukan le o baro Debleskri berga pal pende oun djan triin divessa dour. Oun kolla, kay hidjran o sonakaskro morhton, kay o baro Debleskre deesh laba dren hi, djan glan lende oun sikran lende, kay ačenn le tardo." 
Numbers10:34 Oun ap o dives, har djan le doureder, his o baro Debleskri folka pral lende." 
Numbers10:35 Oun har djas ko sonakaskro morhton doureder, penas o Mose: “Baro Devel, ste pre, oun trade kolen krik, kay kamenn touke čilačepen! Kre, te nashenn le halauter penge toutar!”" 
Numbers10:36 Oun te čivan yon ko morhton tele, penas yob: “Am pale, baro Devel, pash kol boud zerya menshende an Israel!”" 
Numbers11:1 Oun kol menshe penan glan o baro Debleskre kanda, kay lenge djoungeles djala. Oun har o baro Devel kova shounas, vas yob rhoyedo oun bičras i yag, hoy rhačras vin ap i platsa, kay lengre plarhtene khera his." 
Numbers11:2 Koy dan i menshe ap o Moseste gole. Oun o Mose mangas o baro Debles. Koy djas i yag krik. 
Numbers11:3 Oun yon dan koy platsa ko lab Tabera, te bistrenn le gar, kay kote i yag o baro Deblestar mank lende rhačras." 
Numbers11:4 Mank i Israelitarya his ninna vavar menshe, kay lentsa djan. Kolen vas i bari bok pal mass. Koy rovan kol Israelitarya ninna pale, oun penan: “Koon dell men mass rhapaske?" 
Numbers11:5 Har shoukar his an o them Egiptia, kay men mače čičeske rhapaske his. Men his goudle meloni oun vavar meloni, zenlepen, pourma oun sirya." 
Numbers11:6 Kate dikah či vavar har ko manna, oun kova vell men dran o nak vin.”" 
Numbers11:7 Ko manna dikas vin har tikno djob, parno-djelto." 
Numbers11:8 Oun kol menshe nashan kate te kote, oun lan kova khetne, oun kran yarro dran leste, oun keran kova an pirya, oun kran merklia kolestar. Ko manna his an o mouy har maro, kay djet dren hi." 
Numbers11:9 Oun te vell rati i platsa sapeno, perell o manna koy pre." 
Numbers11:10 Har o Mose shounas, kay i tsele menshe khetne tardo his an i voudya glan lengre plarhtene khera oun rovan, koy tapras o baro Debles i rholi, oun ninna o Moseske his kova doha." 
Numbers11:11 Oun o Mose penas ap o baro Debleste: “Hoske kreh tou mange, kay tiro boudepaskro hom, o djipen yaake pharo? Hoske hi tout kek dji mange, oun me hounte marap man tele kol tsele menshentsa?" 
Numbers11:12 Hi kalla halauter mire čave? Van yon mandar boldo? Har nay peneh tou ap mande: Hidje len an tire moussya, har i djouvel, kay hidjrell i ternepen, te anap len an ko them, kolestar penal lengre phourenge, te dess ko them lenge?" 
Numbers11:13 Kay lap me mass, te dap les kal tsele menshende? Yon rovan glan mande, oun penan: De men mass te rhal!" 
Numbers11:14 Me nay hidjrau kal tsele menshen gar kokres! Kova hi yaake pharo mange, te nay krau les bouder gar." 
Numbers11:15 Te kameh tou mantsa yaake te krell, palle ab mange lačo oun de man moulo, te dikap gar miri bibarht.”" 
Numbers11:16 Oun o baro Devel penas leske: “Le touke efta-deesh morsha kol phourendar an Israel, kolendar, kay tou djineh, kay hi yon pralstoune pral i menshende. An len glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. Kote venn le glan toute tardo." 
Numbers11:17 Me kamau tele te vell, oun kote touha rakrell, oun lau i kotar ko dourhestar, hoy ap toute hi, oun čivau les ap lende, te nay krenn yon khetne touha kay phari boudi, hoy hi har i pharo koova ap tire phika. Tou hounte hidjress kova gar lauter kokres." 
Numbers11:18 Oun ap i menshende hounte peness tou: Krenn t'men djoudjo o Debleske! Taysarlake lenn t'mer mass rhapaske. T'maro ropen vas glan o baro Debleste. Yob shounas har penan: Koon dell men mass te rhal? Menge djas mishto an o them Egiptia. Doleske dell t'men o baro Devel mass te rhal. 
Numbers11:19 Gar yek dives, gar douy, gar panč, gar deesh, gar biish divessa." 
Numbers11:20 Kova djal yek čon, bis te nay soungenn les bouder gar, oun kova dran t'maro nak vin vell. T'mer čivan o baro Debles ap i rig, koles, kay mashkral t'mende hi. Oun t'mer rovan glan leste oun penan: Hoske djam mer dran o them Egiptia? Doleske vell kava koova kanna ap t'mende.”" 
Numbers11:21 Oun o Mose penas ap o baro Debleste: “Shob-sheel-zerya menshe hi kay, kolentsa me djivau, oun tou peneh: Me kamau len mass te dell, te vell len yek čon rhapaske." 
Numbers11:22 Nay maras mer yaake boud bakre oun groumya, te hi len doha mass? Nay tapras mer kol tsele mače an o baro pani, te vell lenge lauterenge doha?”" 
Numbers11:23 O baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Hi miro vast gar zorelo doha, te krap, hoy penom? Tou dikess kanna: Vell kova yaake, har me touke penom? Vell kova yaake gar?”" 
Numbers11:24 Oun o Mose djas vin oun penas i menshenge o baro Debleskre laba, oun las khetne efta-deesh morsha kol phourendar, oun čivas len troul o Debleskro kheer." 
Numbers11:25 Koy vas o baro Devel tele an i folka oun rakras o Moseha, oun las i kotar ko dourhestar, hoy ap leste his, oun čivas les ap kol efta-deesh phoureder. Oun har o Debleskro dourho ap lende his, kharan le laba vin har kol Debleskre rakepangre. Yon kran kova kokres kava yek kopo." 
Numbers11:26 Koy his douy morsha pash i plarhtene khera, ko yek kharas Eldad, ko vavar Medad. Lengre laba his ninna pre-činlo an ko liil, kay i efta-desha phoureder dren činlo hi. Yon ačan pash i plarhtene khera oun djan gar vin pash o Debleskro kheer. Oun o Debleskro dourho vas ninna pral lende. Oun ap i platsa mank i khera kharan le laba vin har kol Debleskre rakepangre." 
Numbers11:27 Koy nashas i terno morsh pash o Moseste oun penas: “O Eldad oun o Medad kharenn laba vin har kol Debleskre rakepangre!” 
Numbers11:28 Koy his o Yosua, koleskro dad o Noun hi, kova boudras o Moseske foun tiknes pre. Oun yob penas leske: “Mose, miro ray, pen te moukenn le kova!”" 
Numbers11:29 O Mose penas ap leste: “Kreh tou kova mange? Me kamoms, te dals o baro Devel peskre tsele menshende peskro dourho, te vans le halauter Debleskre rakepangre, kay leskre laba vin kharenna.”" 
Numbers11:30 Pal kova djas o Mose pale pash i plarhtene khera oun kol Israeleskre phoureder djan leha. 
Numbers11:31 Koy bičras o baro Devel i baro dourho pral o them, hoy vas kotar, kay o baro pani hi, oun anas pesse čirklen peha, oun moukas len ap i platsa te perell, yek dives dour troul i platsa, yaake yek metari pral i phoub." 
Numbers11:32 Koy djan kol menshe oun lan kol čirklen khetne o tselo dives, oun i tseli rati, oun ko vavar tselo dives. Oun ninna koles, kay gar boud khetne las, his yaake yek zero kilogramme. Oun yon čivan kol čirklen troul i platsa, te venn le trouk, te rikrell pes o mass." 
Numbers11:33 Oun har yon ko mass rhan oun kova gomme mashkral lengre danda his, vas o baro Debleskri rholi pral i menshende, oun yob das len i phari phagi oun boud lendar meran." 
Numbers11:34 Oun yon kharan koy platsa Kibrot-Taava. Kote van kolla paskedo, kolen rhanč hi pal o mass." 
Numbers11:35 Oun yon moukan Kibrot-Taava pal pende oun djan doureder an Hazerot, oun yon ačan kote." 
Numbers12:1 Koy rakras i Miryam oun o Aron djoungeles pral o Moseste oun penan: “Kova hi gar mishto, te las yob peske i romyat, kay hi i menshendar Koush. Rakras o baro Devel kokres ap o Moseste? Rakras lo mentsa gar?” Oun o baro Devel shounas kova." 
Numbers12:2  
Numbers12:3 O Mose his i mensho, kay kras pes gar bares. Kek mensho his ap i phoub, kay his yaake har o Mose oun hadas pes gar." 
Numbers12:4 Koy penas o baro Devel ap o Moseste oun ap o Aroneste oun ap i Miryam: “Djan vergel t'mer triin pash miro kheer!” Oun yon djan hake triin kote. 
Numbers12:5 Oun koy vas o baro Devel tele an i folka, oun djas an ko voudar glan o Debleskro kheer, oun kharas o Aron oun i Miryam. Oun kol douy djan kote." 
Numbers12:6 Oun yob penas: “Shounenn mire laba! Te bičrau me yekes pash t'mende, kay penell t'menge mire laba, sikrau leste čomone an i dikepen oun rakrau leha an sounya." 
Numbers12:7 O Moseha, koles miro čačo vast hi, krau gar yaake. Leste dom miro tselo kheer an o vast." 
Numbers12:8 Yaake har rakrell i mensho i vavareha, rakrau me leha, an laba, kay lo mishto hayvella oun gar an parmisse. Oun yob dikell man, o baro Debles, har hom. Hoske his t'men kek traash, te rakrenn djoungeles pral o Mose, koles miro čačo vast hi?”" 
Numbers12:9 Oun o baro Debleskri rholi vas pral lende. Oun yob djas krik. 
Numbers12:10 Ninna koy folka pral o Debleskro kheer djas krik. Oun ap yek kopo vas i Miryam nasselo ap peskro mass, ko his parno har gib. Oun har rissras pes o Aron pash i Miryam oun dikas ko nasslepen ap lakro mass," 
Numbers12:11 penas yob ap o Moseste: “Miro Ray, mouk kay doosh gar ap mende te ačell! Kova his dinlepen, hoy mer kram, oun anam doosh ap mende." 
Numbers12:12 Kre, te vell i Miryam gar yaake har i ternepen, kay vas i datar moulo boldo, oun koleskro mass paash krik hi!”" 
Numbers12:13 Oun o Mose das ap o baro Debleste gole: “Ah Devel, kre lat sasto!”" 
Numbers12:14 O baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Te čoungrals lakro dad lat an o mouy, hounte ladjals yoy efta divessa. Moukenn lat kokres efta divessa vin glan koy platsa, kay i plarhtene khera hi! Pal kova lenn lat pale pash t'mende!”" 
Numbers12:15 Yaake vas i Miryam vin anlo glan i platsa, kay i plarhtene khera hi, oun hounte ačas kote efta divessa. An ko tsiro djan i menshe gar doureder. Har nay vas i Miryam palpale," 
Numbers12:16 djan le doureder, moukan Hazerot pal pende, oun djivan an o moulo tato them Paran." 
Numbers13:1 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers13:2 “Biče morshen, te hatsenn le vin, har zorelo ko them Kanaan hi! Kava them kamau me i Israelitaryen te dell. Biče yek morshes dran haki bari familya, hoy vell kol deesh-te-douy Yakobeskre čavendar! Biče kolen, kay hi i pralstoune pral pengre menshende!”" 
Numbers13:3 Oun o Mose kras yaake har o baro Devel leske penas, oun rodas deesh-te-douy morshen vin, kay pralstoune hi mank i Israelitarya, oun bičras len dran o moulo tato them Paran an o them Kanaan." 
Numbers13:4 Oun lengre laba hi: Shamoua, koleskro dad o Zakour hi, dran o kheer Ruben." 
Numbers13:5 O Shafat, koleskro dad o Hori hi, dran o kheer Simeon." 
Numbers13:6 O Kaleb, koleskro dad o Yefunne hi, dran o kheer Youda." 
Numbers13:7 O Yigal, koleskro dad o Yosef hi, dran o kheer Issakar." 
Numbers13:8 O Hoshea, koleskro dad o Noun hi, dran o kheer Efrayim."
