Numbers13:9 O Palti, koleskro dad o Rafou hi, dran o kheer Benyamin." 
Numbers13:10 O Gaddiel, koleskro dad o Sodi hi, dran o kheer Zabulon." 
Numbers13:11 O Gaddi, koleskro dad o Zouzi hi, dran o kheer Manasse, koleskro dad o Yosef hi." 
Numbers13:12 O Ammiel, koleskro dad o Gemalli hi, dran o kheer Dan." 
Numbers13:13 O Setour, koleskro dad o Mikael hi, dran o kheer Asser." 
Numbers13:14 O Nabi, koleskro dad o Vofsi hi, dran o kheer Naftali." 
Numbers13:15 O Gehouel, koleskro dad o Maki hi, dran o kheer Gad." 
Numbers13:16 Kalla hi i laba kol morshendar, kolen o Mose bičras, te hatsenn le vin, har ko them hi. Oun o Mose das o Hoshea o lab Yosua. Koleskro dad his o Noun." 
Numbers13:17 Oun o Mose bičras len, te hatsenn le vin har ko them Kanaan hi. Oun yob penas ap lende: “Djan koy pre an o moulo tato them Negev, oun palle djan ap o pralstouno them!" 
Numbers13:18 Oun dikenn t'men an ko them trouyel, har kova hi, oun kitse menshe kote djivenn, oun har zorelo yon hi." 
Numbers13:19 Dikenn, har nay djivenn le kote: mishto? – gar mishto? Dikenn ninna, har lengre forya hi! Djivenn i menshe an plarhtene khera khetne? – Djivenn le an barrengre khera an forya?" 
Numbers13:20 Dikenn ninna, havi phoub koy hi! Hi li mishto, te nay vell djob kote bares? Hi rouka kote tardo oun have? Ma trashenn, te anenn menge kolestar, hoy an ko them bares vas!” Kova his an ko tsiro, kay i molengre drake mishto his." 
Numbers13:21 Oun yon djan koy, oun dikan, har ko them hi an o moulo tato them Tsin oun doureder pre, o tselo drom bis pash o foro Rehob pash Lebo-Hamat." 
Numbers13:22 Oun yon djan an o them Negev, oun van bis pash o foro Hebron. Kote djivas o Ahiman oun o Sheshay oun o Talmay, kolengro dad o Anak his. O foro Hebron vas nevo kerdo efta bersha glan o foro Soan an o them Egiptia." 
Numbers13:23 Oun yon van pash o pani Eshkol, oun činan kote i kasht molengre drake tele, oun hidjran kova douyentsa ap i hidjepaskro kasht, yaake pharo hi lo. Koy pashel anan le ninna granatikre phabya oun fayge." 
Numbers13:24 Koy platsa kharan le tala Eshkol pal kol drake, hoy kol Israelitarya kote tele činan." 
Numbers13:25 Oun pal star-deesh divessa, har yon pen an ko tselo them trouyel dikan, djan yon pale pale." 
Numbers13:26 Oun van pash o Mose oun o Aron oun pash kol tsele Israelitarya, kay ačan an o moulo tato them Paran pash i panyeskro kotar them, hoy kharella Kadesh. Oun yon penan lenge kova, hoy yon dikan, oun sikran lende kol drake, phabya oun fayge dran ko them." 
Numbers13:27 Oun yon penan: “Mer vam an ko them, kay tou bičral men. Oun čačepah an ko them hi boud thoud oun gvin. Dikenn i drake, fayge oun phabya, hoy kote bares van!" 
Numbers13:28 Yek koova hi gar mishto: Kol menshe, kay djivenn kote, hi zorelo. Kol forya hi baro oun zorelo kerdo. Oun mer dikah kote ninna kol menshen, kay venn pal o Anak." 
Numbers13:29 An o them Negev djivenn i Amalekarya. An o pralstouno them djivenn i Hetarya, i Yebousarya oun i Amorarya. Pash o baro pani oun pash o pani Yordan djivenn i Kanaanitarya.”" 
Numbers13:30 Har i menshe kova shounan, trashan le oun čingran ap o Moseste. Koy das o Kaleb len trad, oun penas: “Avenn, mer djah kote, oun lah ko them menge! Mer nay ham zorleder har yon.”" 
Numbers13:31 Kol morsha, kay djan leha, penan: “Na-a, mer nay kourah men gar kol menshentsa! Yon hi zorleder har mer.”" 
Numbers13:32 Oun yon anan djoungelo koova pre pral ko them, kay dikan le pen trouyel, oun penan ap i Israelitarya: “Ko them, kay djam trouyel, te dikas, har kova hi, rhal kolen, kay djivenn kote. Oun kol tsele menshen, kay dikam kote, hi bareder har mer." 
Numbers13:33 Mer dikam kote ninna i Nefilim, kay hi bare menshe. Lengro phouro dad hi o Anak. Mer hams an mare yaka har stepangre, oun yaake hams ninna an lengre yaka.”" 
Numbers14:1 Koy stan kol tsele Israelitarya pre, oun dan gole i trashatar. Oun kol menshe rovan i tseli rat." 
Numbers14:2 Oun i tsele Israelitarya his rhoyedo ap o Mose oun o Aron oun penan: “Ah, te merams mer an ko them Egiptia! Te merams kate an o moulo tato them!" 
Numbers14:3 Hoske anell men o baro Devel an kava them, kay vah moulo dino o rhareha? Oun mare djouvya oun čave perenn an i vasta kolendar, kay kouram men mer. Hi feteder, te djah pale an o them Egiptia.”" 
Numbers14:4 Oun yek penas ap i vavareste: “Mer rodas yekes vin, te vell lo o pralstouno pral mende, oun mer djah pale an o them Egiptia.”" 
Numbers14:5 Oun o Mose oun o Aron vitsran pen glan i tsele Israelitarya ap pengro mouy. 
Numbers14:6 Oun o Yosua, koleskro dad o Noun his, oun o Kaleb, koleskro dad o Yefunne his, his douy kolendar, kay pen an o them trouyel dikan. Yon kran pengre koola an kotya i rholyatar," 
Numbers14:7 oun penan ap i tsele Israelitarya: “Ko them, kay mer trouyel djam, te dikas, har kova hi, hi mishto." 
Numbers14:8 Te hi o baro Devel kamlo ap mende, anell yob men an ko them oun dell les mende. Kova hi i them, kay hi boud thoud oun gvin." 
Numbers14:9 Ma perenn o baro Deblestar tele, oun trashenn gar kol menshendar an ko them! Mer kamah len pre te rhal har maro. Lengro devel, kay das yak ap lende, moukas len. O baro Devel hi mentsa. Ma trashenn lendar!”" 
Numbers14:10 Kol tsele menshe penan: “Vitsrenn len moulo i barrentsa!” Koy vas o baro Debleskro raylepen pral o Debleskro kheer. Oun i tsele Israelitarya dikan kova. 
Numbers14:11 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Mose: “Har rah rakrenn kol menshe djoungeles pral mande? Oun har rah kamenn yon gar ap mande te patsell, vitar gar, kay krom yaake boud baro oun zorelo koova pash lende?" 
Numbers14:12 Me kamau i pharo nasslepen pral lende te anell oun len te marell. Oun kamau te venn toutar yaake boud menshe, te venn le i natsyona, hoy bareder oun zorleder hi har kal menshe.”" 
Numbers14:13 O Mose penas ap o baro Debleste: “I Egiptarya djinenn, kay tou lal kol menshen tiri zoryah mashkral lende vin. Te shounenn le kanna, hoy kral tire menshentsa," 
Numbers14:14 penenn le kova kol menshenge an kava them. Kolla shounan, kay tou, baro Devel, mashkral tire menshende hal, oun kay nay dikenn yon tout, oun tiri folka pral lende tardo hi, oun kay tou, o baro Devel, glan lende djah, an i folka ap o dives, oun rati an i yag." 
Numbers14:15 Te deh tou kanna ap yek kopo tire menshen moulo, palle penenn kol vavar menshe, kay shounenn kova, pral toute:" 
Numbers14:16 O baro Devel nay anas kalla menshen gar an ko them, hoy kamas lo lende te dell, kay das yob i sovel pre. Doleske maras yob len an o moulo tato them." 
Numbers14:17 Kanna mangau tout, miro ray, sike tiri zoor oun kre yaake, har penal." 
Numbers14:18 Tou penal: Me, o baro Devel, vau gar sik rhoyedo, oun man hi i lačo oun baro dji, oun me bistrau ko čilačo koova, hoy kran oun lau i doosh krik. Koles kokres, kay kamell mandar či te djinell, dau i phagi, oun gar koles kokres, na-a ninna leskre čaven oun kolengre čaven yaake rah har triin, star familye, yek pal i vavar djivan." 
Numbers14:19 Kanna sike tiro baro lačepen oun biste ko djoungelo koova kal menshendar yaake har tou boud kope lengri doosh bistral ap o drom dran o them Egiptia bis kate.” 
Numbers14:20 Oun o baro Devel penas: “Me bistrau lengro djoungelo koova, yaake har tou kova mangal." 
Numbers14:21 Yek koova hi yaake čačo har me djivau, oun i tseli phoub pherdo miro raylepen vell:" 
Numbers14:22 Kol tsele morsha, kay dikan miro raylepen oun ko baro oun zorelo koova, hoy krom an o them Egiptia oun an o moulo tato them, oun kaman boud kope gar te patsell, kay hom lentsa, oun shounan gar ap kova, hoy me penom," 
Numbers14:23 kolendar dikell kek ko them, kay lengre phourenge penom oun man sovel pre dom, te dap les lende. Vitar gar dikell kek ko them, kay rakras djoungeles pral mande." 
Numbers14:24 Kokres miro boudepaskro, o Kaleb, les hi i vavar dji oun djas mange hako tsiro palla, koles anau an ko them, an koleste yob vas. Leskre čavende oun čavengre čavende dau ko them." 
Numbers14:25 Kol Amalekarya oun kol Kanaanitarya, kay kanna kote djivenn, ačenn an o telstouno them. Taysar rissrenn t'men trouyel oun djan pale an o moulo tato them ap ko drom pash o Baro Lolo Pani!”" 
Numbers14:26 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun o Aroneha oun penas: 
Numbers14:27 “Har rah čingrenn kol čilače menshe ap mande? Me shounom, har kol Israelitarya djoungeles pral mande rakran." 
Numbers14:28 Doleske pen ap lende: Yaake čačo har kova hi, kay me djivau, penell o baro Devel, me kamau kova te krell t'mentsa, hoy t'mer glan mire kanda penan." 
Numbers14:29 T'mer merenn an kava moulo tato them. T'mer halauter, kay han biish bersha phouro oun phoureder, oun rakran djoungeles pral mande," 
Numbers14:30 čačepah, t'mer venn gar an ko them, kay me hadom miro vast oun dom man sovel, te nay djivenn koy dren. Kokres o Kaleb, koleskro dad o Yefunne hi, oun o Yosua, koleskro dad o Noun hi, kolla douy venn koy dren." 
Numbers14:31 T'mare čave, kolendar t'mer penan: Yon perenn an i vasta kolendar, kay kouram men mer, kolen anau an ko them, kay t'mer gar kaman. Ko them vell lengro." 
Numbers14:32 T'mer merenn an o moulo tato them. 
Numbers14:33 T'mer rikran t'men gar ap mire laba. Doleske hounte djan t'mare čave pengre firhentsa trouyel an o moulo tato them, star-deesh bersha, bis te ačell kek t'mendar bouder pral." 
Numbers14:34 Star-deesh divessa dikan t'men trouyel, har ko them hi, oun star-deesh bersha hounte hidjrenn t'mari doosh: yek bersh hako diveske, te hayvenn t'mer har kova hi, te tserdau miro vast t'mendar krik." 
Numbers14:35 Me, o baro Devel, penom kova, oun čačepah, kova kamau me ninna te krell kal tsele menshentsa, kay hadan pen ap mande. An kava moulo tato them merenn le, bis te kek lendar bouder koy hi.”" 
Numbers14:36 Kol morshen, kay o Mose bičras, te dikenn le pen trouyel an o them, oun kay anan čilačo rakepen pre pral o them, har van le pale, oun kay kran i tsele menshen rhoyedo ap o Moseste, kolen das o baro Devel pengri phagi: Yon meran halauter ap yek kopo." 
Numbers14:37  
Numbers14:38 Kokres o Yosua, koleskro dad o Noun hi, oun o Kaleb, koleskro dad o Yefunne hi, ačan djido kol morshendar, kay djan, te dikenn le pen trouyel, har ko them hi." 
Numbers14:39 Har o Mose kol laba ap kol tsele Israelitarya penas, his kol tsele menshenge ropaske." 
Numbers14:40 Oun yon djan taysarlake pral ap i berga, oun penan: “Mer anam doosh ap mende. Ake ham, oun kamah an ko them te djal, kolestar o baro Devel rakras.”" 
Numbers14:41 O Mose penas: “Hoske kamenn t'mer gar ap o baro Debleskro lab te shounell? Kova djal gar mishto t'menge! 
Numbers14:42 O baro Devel hi gar pash t'mende. Djan gar koy pre, te venn t'mer gar maredo kolendar, kay kamenn t'maro merepen!" 
Numbers14:43 Kol Amalekarya oun kol Kanaanitarya hi koy vergel tardo glan t'mende, oun t'mer venn moulo dino o rhareha. T'mer djan o baro Deblestar krik. Doleske hi lo gar t'mentsa.”" 
Numbers14:44 Ninna te rakras yob yaake, kran yon pal pengro shero, oun djan pral ap i berga. O Mose ačas ap i platsa oun djas gar lentsa, vitar gar ko sonakaskro morhton, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi." 
Numbers14:45 Koy van kol Amalekarya oun kol Kanaanitarya, kay ap i berga djivan, tele, oun dan len, oun lan len palla bis pash o foro Horma." 
Numbers15:1 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha, oun penas:" 
Numbers15:2 Rake ap kol Israelitarya, oun pen lenge: Te venn t'mer an ko them, hoy dau me t'mende, te djivenn koy," 
Numbers15:3 oun t'mer anenn i firhes t'mare groumyendar oun bakrendar rhačepaske o baro Debleske, hounte denn t'mer i rhapen koy pashel. Krenn kova pash hako firho, hoy mange anenn: pash ko firho, hoy vell tseles rhačedo mange; pash ko firho, hoy rhan t'mer khetne glan mande; pash ko firho, koleha i mensho sikrell, te das lo pes sovel, te dell lo man čomone; pash ko firho, hoy kamell i mensho pestar mande te dell; pash ko firho, hoy rhačrenn t'mer mange ap t'mare bare divessa. O lačo soungepen kol firhendar hi mishto mange. Ko rhapen, hoy anenn pashel, hounte vell yek kilogrammi lačo yarro, oun yek litari djet. Kova vell halauter khetne kerdo." 
Numbers15:4  
Numbers15:5 Anenn ninna mool koy pashel! Pash hako terno bakro, hoy vell tseles rhačedo, čorenn yek litari mool, ninna pash hako terno bakro, hoy rhan t'mer khetne glan o Debleste." 
Numbers15:6 Pash hako baro bakro, hoy rhačreh tou o Debleske, dess tou douy kilogramme lačo yarro, kay yek-te-paash litarya djet dren hi." 
Numbers15:7 Ninna čoress tou yek-te-paash litarya mool koy pashel. Kova hi i rhapen oun i pipen, hoy soungella mishto o baro Debleske." 
Numbers15:8 Te kameh tou o Debleske i groumni te anell, nay vell yek, hoy vell leske tseles rhačedo, nay vell yek, kolah tou sikreh, te dal tout sovel, te deh čomone o Debleste; nay vell yek, hoy deh, te rhan t'mer o mass khetne glan o baro Debleste," 
Numbers15:9 palle hounte dess koy pashel triin kilogramme lačo yarro, kay douy litarya djet dren hi." 
Numbers15:10 Ninna čoress tou douy litarya mool koy pashel. Te vell kova halauter rhačedo o baro Debleske, djal i soungepen pre, hoy soungella mishto o baro Debleske." 
Numbers15:11 Yaake hounte kress tou, te aneh mange i groumni, i baro morsh bakro, i terno bakro, ninna pash i bouzni." 
Numbers15:12 Pash hako firheste, hoy o Debleske anlo vell, hounte vell ninna yarro oun mool anlo, yaake boud har glan-činlo hi." 
Numbers15:13 Hako Israelitari, kay anell čomone rhačepaske o baro Debleske, hoy leske shoukar soungella, hounte krell pal kal laba." 
Numbers15:14 Oun te djivell i vi-themari mashkral t'mende, ninna pash t'mare čavende, hoy pal t'mende venna, oun yob kamell o baro Debleske čomone te rhačrell, hoy leske shoukar soungella, palle hounte krell yob yaake har t'mer ninna krenna." 
Numbers15:15 Kal laba, hoy penenn t'menge, hoy te krenn an kava koova hi t'menge lauterenge: t'menge, kol Israelitarya, oun ninna kol vavar menshenge, kay mank t'mende djivenna. Kol laba ačenna hako tsiro t'mare čavenge, hoy pal t'mende venna: Glan o baro Debleste hi o vi-themari yaake har t'mer han." 
Numbers15:16 I emlige čačepaskre laba oun o emligo čačepen hi t'menge oun kolenge, kay hi vi-themarya mank t'mende." 
Numbers15:17 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers15:18 Rake kol tsele menshentsa, oun pen ap lende: Te venn t'mer an ko them, kay me t'men anau," 
Numbers15:19 oun t'mer rhan ko maro dran ko them, palle hounte anenn t'mer o baro Debleske čomone:" 
Numbers15:20 Dran ko ersto yarro hounte pekenn t'mer leske i merkli. 
Numbers15:21 Ninna hounte denn t'mer leste ko ersto yarro. Ko lab ačella hako tsireske. 
Numbers15:22 Oun te kran t'mer yek kol labendar gar, hoy o baro Devel o Moseske penas, oun djinan gar, kay hounte krans kova," 
Numbers15:23 čomone lauterestar, hoy o baro Devel o Moseske penas, hoy t'mer hounte krenna, palle hounte denn t'mer o baro Debleske i firho, te vell i doosh krik lino." 
Numbers15:24 Te kran i tsele Israelitarya čomone, hoy i doosh hi, oun djinan gar, kay yon hounte krans kova gar, palle hounte anenn i tsele menshe i terno gouroum rhačepaske o baro Debleske, te soungell o soungepen, hoy pre djal ko firhestar, mishto o baro Debleske. Koy pashel denn le ninna i rhapen dran yarro oun koy mool, yaake boud har čačo hi, ninna i morsh bouzni, te vell i doosh krik lino." 
Numbers15:25 Oun yaake krell o rashay i tsele menshenge Israel, te vell lauter pale mishto mank lende oun o Debleste. Oun koy doosh vell lendar krik lino, – koy doosh, kolatar yon gar djinan, kay kaya i doosh hi, oun kolake yon firhen anan oun rhapen rhačepaske o baro Debleske." 
Numbers15:26 Ava, kay doosh, hoy ap i tsele menshende Israel čiddo hi, vell lendar krik lino, ninna kolendar, kay vi-themarya hi mank t'mende." 
Numbers15:27 Te anell yek i doosh ap peste oun djinas gar, kay kaya i doosh his, palle hounte dell yob yek bouzni, kay yek bersh phouro hi, te vell leskri doosh krik lino." 
Numbers15:28 Oun ko rashay rhačrell lat glan o baro Debleste, te vell lauter pale mishto mank o Debleste oun koleste, kay djinas gar, kay yob čomone čilačes kras. Oun leskri doosh vell lestar krik lino." 
Numbers15:29 Oun yaake hounte vell kova hakeneske, kay anas i doosh ap peste oun djinas gar, kay kaya i doosh hi – nay vell i Israelitari, nay vell i vi-themari, kay mank t'mende djivell." 
Numbers15:30 Koon krell i čilačo koova, oun djinell, kova hi čilačo, ko mensho praasas o baro Debles. Savo mensho hounte vell infam oun nay djivell bouder gar mank peskre menshende. Kova hi yek, koon yob hi, – i Israelitari, – i vi-themari." 
Numbers15:31 Yob shounas gar ap o baro Debleskro lab. Oun kova, hoy o baro Devel penas, kras yob gar. Doleske vell yob infam, oun leskri doosh ačell ap leste." 
Numbers15:32 Har i Israelitarya an o moulo tato them his, tapran le i morshes, kova rodas kashta khetne ap o Debleskro dives." 
Numbers15:33 Oun kolla, kay hatsan les koy pashel, har yob kashta pre hadas, anan les pash o Moseste oun pash o Aroneste oun glan i tsele menshende." 
Numbers15:34 Oun yon čivan les stildo, oun djinan gar, hoy te krenn leha." 
Numbers15:35 O baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Ko morsh hounte merella. Kol tsele menshe hounte vitsrenn les moulo i barrentsa vin glan i platsa.” 
Numbers15:36 Koy kran le yaake har o baro Devel ap o Moseste penas oun anan ko morshes vin glan i platsa oun vitsran barra ap leste, yaake te meras yob." 
Numbers15:37 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: 
Numbers15:38 “Pen ap kol Israelitarya, te sivenn yon tella ap pengre koola khetne pandle blauete dorya. Kova hounte krenn ninna lengre čave, kay pal lende venna." 
Numbers15:39 Oun kol dorya hi koleske koy: Yaake boud kope har t'mer kolla an-dikenn, vell t'menge an o shero halauter, hoy o baro Devel penas, – kol tsele laba, hoy hounte krenn. Yaake moukenn t'men gar o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell t'mare yakendar, vitar gar shounenn t'mer ap kova, hoy an t'maro shero trouyel djal." 
Numbers15:40 T'menge hounte vell halauter pale an o shero, hoy me penom. Oun kova krenna! Palle han mire menshe, kolla mange kokres koy hi." 
Numbers15:41 Me hom t'maro baro Devel, kay las t'men dran ko them Egiptia vin, te vap me t'maro Devel. Oun me, o baro Devel, hom t'maro Devel.”" 
Numbers16:1 Oun o Korah, – leskro dad his o Yizhar, – i Levitari kolendar, kay van pal o Kohat, ko Korah vas rhoyedo ap o Moseste. Khetne leha his morsha, kay van dran o kheer Ruben: o Datan oun o Abiram, kolengro dad o Eliab his, oun o On, koleskro dad o Pelet his. Pash lende his ninna 250 (douy-sheel-te-paash-sheel) vavar Israelitarya, kay pralstoune his mank i Israelitarya, vi-rodede oun an-dikle morsha." 
Numbers16:2  
Numbers16:3 Oun yon halauter van khetne pash o Mose oun o Aron, čingran ap lende oun penan: “T'mer krenn, har te vans bareder har mer vavar! O tselo kheer Israel hi o Debleskre menshe. Oun o baro Devel hi mashkral lende. Hoske hadenn t'mer t'men pral o baro Debleskre menshende?”" 
Numbers16:4 Har o Mose kova shounas, vitsras lo pes ap peskro mouy," 
Numbers16:5 oun penas ap o Korah oun ap kolende, kay pash leste his: “Taysar penell o baro Devel, koon leskre menshe hi, kones yob peske vi-rodas, oun koon nay vell pash leste. Oun kones yob vin rodella, kova nay vell pash leste." 
Numbers16:6 Taysarlakro lenn t'menge pirya, tou o Korah oun kol tsele morsha, kay pash toute hi!" 
Numbers16:7 Oun krenn yag koy dren, oun čivenn soungepaskro koova koy pre, oun anenn kova glan o baro Debleste! Kones koy o baro Devel vi-rodella, kova hi leskro. T'mer, i Levitarya, han kolla, kay krenn, har te vans i bareder!”" 
Numbers16:8 Oun o Mose penas ap o Korah: “Shounenn, t'mer Levitarya!" 
Numbers16:9 Hi kova t'menge gar doha, kay o Israeleskro Devel t'men vin rodas dran i tsele Israelitarya, te venn pash leste, te krenn t'mari boudi ap o Debleskro kheer? T'mer nay venn i tsele menshenge Israel koy." 
Numbers16:10 Yob moukas tout, o Korah, oun tire tsele phralen, kol Levitarya, pash leste te vell. Oun t'mer kamenn kanna ninna rashay te vell!" 
Numbers16:11 Tou oun tire tsele menshe čivan t'men khetne, te hadenn t'men pral o baro Debleste. Kova hi gar o Aron, pral koleste hadan t'men.”" 
Numbers16:12 Oun o Mose moukas kol douy morshen, o Datan oun o Abiram, pash peste te kharell. Kolengro dad hi o Eliab. Yon penan: “Mer vah gar." 
Numbers16:13 Hi kova touke gar doha, kay lal men dran ko them, kay hi boud thoud oun gvin, oun moukeh men te merell an o moulo tato them? Kameh tou ninna ray pral mende te vell?" 
Numbers16:14 Hi kava them i them, kay hi boud thoud oun gvin? Oun dal tou men i harhetikri phoub oun drakengre themma, kay menge hi? Ma pande kol menshen i yaka! Mer vah gar.”" 
Numbers16:15 Koy vas o Mose rhoyedo, oun penas ap o baro Debleste: “Ma dik lačes ap kova, hoy yon tout denna! Me lom gar i bourika lendar, oun krom len kek čilačepen.”" 
Numbers16:16 Oun o Mose penas ap o Korah: “Tou oun tire tsele menshe hounte venn taysar glan o baro Debleste, tou oun yon oun o Aron!" 
Numbers16:17 Oun hakeno lell peskri piri, oun čivell soungepaskro koova dren, oun vell glan o baro Debleste, hakeno peskri piryah, douy-sheel oun paash-sheel pirya, – ninna tou oun o Aron, hakeno peskri piryah.”" 
Numbers16:18 Oun hakeno las peskri piri, oun čivas yag koy dren, oun ko soungepaskro koova koy pre. Oun yon djan pash o voudar glan o Debleskro kheer, ninna o Mose oun o Aron." 
Numbers16:19 Oun o Korah las i tsele menshen khetne ap peskri rig, oun vas lentsa glan o Debleskro kheer pash o voudar. Koy vas o baro Debleskro raylepen glan i tsele menshende." 
Numbers16:20 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun o Aroneha, oun penas:" 
Numbers16:21 “Djan kol menshendar krik, te marap len sik.”" 
Numbers16:22 Kol douy moukan pen ap pengro mouy te perell, oun penan: “Ah Devel, tou hal o Devel, kay das hakenes o djipen! Te kras yek morsh i čilačo koova, kameh tou doleske tiri rholi pral i tsele menshende te čivell?”" 
Numbers16:23 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha, oun penas:" 
Numbers16:24 “Pen ap i tsele menshende: Djan halauter krik, kay djivenn troul koy platsa, kay djivell o Korah, o Datan, oun o Abiram!”" 
Numbers16:25 O Mose stas pre, oun djas pash o Datan oun o Abiram, oun kol phoureder mank i Israelitarya djan leske palla." 
Numbers16:26 Oun yob penas ap i tsele menshende: “Djan krik kol plarhtene kherendar kol menshendar, kay shounenn gar ap o Debleste! Oun taprenn ap či, hoy len hi, te merenn t'mer gar ap ko tselo čilačo koova, hoy yon kran!”" 
Numbers16:27 Oun yon djan penge oun moukan koy platsa, kay djivas o Korah oun o Datan oun o Abiram. O Datan oun o Abiram djan vin dran lengre plarhtene khera oun his tardo glan o voudar pengre djouvyentsa, čaventsa, oun čavengre čaventsa." 
Numbers16:28 Oun o Mose penas: “Koy pre hounte dikenn t'mer, kay bičras man o baro Devel, te krap ko tselo koova, oun kay me kova gar mandar krau." 
Numbers16:29 Yon te merenna yaake har i tsele menshe merenna, palle bičras man o baro Devel gar." 
Numbers16:30 Te krell o baro Devel čomone neves, kay i phoub krell peskro mouy pre, oun tserdell len dren lauterentsa, hoy len hi, yaake te djan yon djides tele an o moulengro them, palle djinenn t'mer, kay kalla morsha pral o baro Debleste djoungeles rakran.”" 
Numbers16:31 Oun pal kova, har yob kol tsele laba penas, djas koy phoub tel lende pre," 
Numbers16:32 oun kras peskro mouy pre, oun tserdas len tele pengre familyentsa oun kol tsele menshentsa, kay pash o Korah his, ninna halauter, hoy len hi." 
Numbers16:33 Oun yon djan djides tele an o moulengro them lauterentsa, hoy len hi. Oun i phoub čakras len. Oun yon meran mashkral vin dran kol tsele menshende." 
Numbers16:34 Har i vavar Israelitarya, kay troul lende his, shounan, har yon gole dan, nashan le penge. Yon trashan, te rhal len i phoub ninna pre." 
Numbers16:35 Oun o baro Devel bičras yag, kay rhas kol 250 (douy-sheel-te-paash-sheel) morshen pre, kay anan ko soungepaskro koova o Debleske." 
Numbers17:1 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers17:2 “Pen ap o Aroneskro čaveste, o rashayeste Elazar, te lell yob kol pirya dran i yag, oun vitsrell koy yag dour krik! Kol čilače, kay meran, anan kal pirya glan o baro Debleste. Doleske hi kal pirya o Debleskro oun hounte venn an o Debleskro kheer. Denn kol pirya bourhlo, te venn sane bourhle sasterne patria dran lende! Oun kolen denn troul o Debleskri rhačepaskri, te venn le i sikepen, te bistrenn i Israelitarya gar, hoy djas!”" 
Numbers17:3  
Numbers17:4 Oun o rashay Elazar las kol sasterne pirya, hoy anan kolla, kay his djides rhačedo, oun das i pirya bourhlo, te venn le troul o Debleskri rhačepaskri dino," 
Numbers17:5 yaake har penas o baro Devel kova o Moseske. Kol sane sasterne patria his i sikepen, te denn kol Israelitarya yak, te vell kek morsh, kay gar o Aroneskre menshendar hi, oun anell soungepaskro koova glan o baro Debleste, te djal leske gar yaake har o Koraheske oun kolenge, kay pash leste his." 
Numbers17:6 O vavar taysarlakro his kol tsele Israelitarya rhoyedo ap o Moseste oun ap o Aroneste, oun penan: “T'mer kran o baro Debleskre menshen moulo.”" 
Numbers17:7 Oun har kol tsele menshe troul o Mose oun o Aron tardo his, dikan yon pash o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. Oun ap yek kopo vas koy folka pral o kheer. Oun o baro Debleskro raylepen vas diklo." 
Numbers17:8 Oun o Mose oun o Aron djan glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. 
Numbers17:9 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers17:10 “Djan vin kol menshendar. Me kamau len ap yek kopo te marell.” Oun kol douy vitsran pen ap pengro mouy. 
Numbers17:11 Oun o Mose penas ap o Aroneste: “Le koy piri, dja pash o Debleskri rhačepaskri oun čip yag lestar an koy piri, oun čip soungepaskro koova koy pre, oun dja sik pash i tsele menshende, oun rhače ko soungepaskro koova, te vell lengri doosh krik lino! O baro Debleskri rholi vas ap lende, oun lengri phagi hi kay.”" 
Numbers17:12 Oun o Aron kras yaake, har o Mose leske penas, oun nashas mashkral i tsele menshende oun dikas, kay boud menshe moulo his. Koy rhačras yob soungepaskro koova, te dikell o Devel bouder gar ap i menshengri doosh." 
Numbers17:13 Oun yob his tardo mashkral kol moulende oun kol djidende. Koy djas koy phagi krik. 
Numbers17:14 Kolla, kay meran ap koy phagi, his 14.700 (deesh-te-star-zerya-efta-sheel) menshe. Mank lende his gar kolla, kay meran khetne o Koraheha." 
Numbers17:15 Oun o Aron vas pale pash o Moseste pash o voudar glan o Debleskro kheer. Koy phagi his krik. 
Numbers17:16 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers17:17 “Rake i Israelentsa oun le lendar deesh-te-douy lengste kashta. Le len kol pralstunendar pral kol deesh-te-douy bare familye, kay venna kol deesh-te-douy Yakobeskre čavendar: hako pralstunestar yek kasht. Oun čin hakeneskro lab koy dren!" 
Numbers17:18 O Aroneskro lab hounte činess an ko kasht, hoy o khereske Levi hi. Hako pralstuneske hounte vell yek kasht koy." 
Numbers17:19 Oun čip kol kashta an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer glan ko morhton, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi, kote, kay vau khetne t'mentsa." 
Numbers17:20 Palle sikrau i Israelende, kones me vi-rodau: Koleskro kasht vell zenelo. Yaake krau, te venn yon bouder gar rhoyedo ap t'mende.”" 
Numbers17:21 Oun o Mose rakras kol menshentsa Israel. Oun lengre tsele pralstoune dan les deesh-te-douy kashta. Hako pralstouno pral i bari familya das les yek kasht. Oun o Aroneskro kasht his ninna mank kol kashta. 
Numbers17:22 Oun o Mose čivas kol kashta glan o baro Debleste tele an o Debleskro kheer, kay i deesh Debleskre deesh laba dren hi." 
Numbers17:23 Ap o vavar dives, har o Mose an o Debleskro kheer djas, dikas yob, kay van patria vin dran o Aroneskro kasht, hoy o khereske Levi his. Ninna bloume djan pre, oun roukengre his ap ko kasht." 
Numbers17:24 Oun o Mose hidjras kol kashta halauter vin o baro Deblestar, pash kol tsele Israelitarya, te dikenn yon kova. Oun hakeno las peskro kasht." 
Numbers17:25 O baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Hidje o Aroneskro kasht pale glan ko morhton, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi, te ačell ko kasht koy, te dikenn les kolla, kay kaman gar te shounell, oun yon te čingrenn gar bouder ap mande oun merenn.”" 
Numbers17:26 Oun o Mose kras, har o baro Devel kova penas." 
Numbers17:27 Oun i Israelitarya penan ap o Moseste: “Dik kay, koon pash o Debleskro kheer vella, kova hounte merella. Sik vella, kay merah halauter oun kek mendar ačell pral. Kameh, te djas mer halauter tele?”" 
Numbers17:28  
Numbers18:1 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Aron: Tou oun tire čave, oun tire menshe, i tsele Levitarya, t'mer hounte hidjrenn koy doosh, te krell yek čomone, hoy gar čačo hi pash peskri boudi an o Debleskro kheer. Te vas čomone kerdo, hoy gar čačo hi pash i rashayeskri boudi, hounte less tou kokres tire morsh čaventsa koy doosh ap toute." 
Numbers18:2 I Levitarya hi tire phrala, kolen less tou pash toute, te ačenn yon pash toute oun boudrenn touke. Tou kokres tire čaventsa han mire rashaya oun boudrenn glan o Debleskro kheer, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi." 
Numbers18:3 Oun kol vavar Levitarya hounte boudrenn touke, oun krenn koy boudi ap o tselo Debleskro kheer. O Debleskri rhačepaskri oun ko tselo Debleskro koova, koleha boudreh tou an o Debleskro kheer, kova taprenn le gar an, te merenn yon gar, oun t'mer lentsa." 
Numbers18:4 I Levitarya hounte venn t'menge pash o vast pash i tseli boudi ap o Debleskro kheer. Moukenn kek vavares t'menge pash o vast te vell! 
Numbers18:5 Yaake har kanna penom, krenn koy boudi an o Debleskro kheer, oun koy boudi ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri, te vell bouder gar miri rholi pral kol Israelitarya!" 
Numbers18:6 Oun me lom t'mare phralen, i Levitarya, dran i vavar Israelitarya vin, te dap len t'mende, te venn le mange koy, o baro Debleske, oun krenn koy boudi ap o Debleskro plarhteno kheer." 
Numbers18:7 Tou oun tire čave, t'mer han mire rashaya, te krenn t'mari boudi pash o Debleskri rhačepaskri oun dren an o kouč isema, hoy pal o voudar dran o kouč kotar than hi. Kay boudi dom me t'men. Te vell yek vavar pash o Debleskro koova, hoy koy dren hi, hounte merell lo." 
Numbers18:8 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Aroneste: Shoun, tou boudreh mange. Doleske dau me tout oun tire čaven i kotar lauterestar, hoy i Israelitarya mange anenna. Kova te vell yaake hako tsireske." 
Numbers18:9 Touke hi kol tsele kotya, hoy venn gar pre-rhačedo kol tsele firhendar, hoy denn le mande, te vell lengri doosh krik lino oun te vell lauter pale mishto, ninna ko tselo rhapen, hoy denn le pashel. Kova halauter hi mange kouč, oun me dau les toute oun tire čavende." 
Numbers18:10 Ko rhapen hi i Debleskro rhapen. Doleske rhan kova ap i Debleskri platsa! Oun kokres i morsha oun morsh čave nay rhan les. 
Numbers18:11 Ninna ko vavar koova, hoy i Israelitarya mange anenn, dau me toute oun tire čavende oun čende, hako tsireske. Koon gar pale-čiddo hi an tiro kheer nay rhal kolestar." 
Numbers18:12 Ko tselo lačeder djet, oun ko lačeder mool oun djob, ninna lauterestar hoy glanstounes bares vas ap i harhetikri phoub, kova halauter, hoy yon o baro Debles dan, dau me t'mende. Koon gar pale-čiddo hi an tiro kheer nay rhal kolestar." 
Numbers18:13  
Numbers18:14 Lauter, hoy i Israelitarya an mire vasta dan, hi t'menge." 
Numbers18:15 Hako morsh, kay o phoureder čavo peskri datar hi, – pash i menshende, ninna pash i firhende, – koles yon o baro Debleske anenna, hi t'menge. I menshes dess tou pale oun less love leske. Ninna i firho, hoy pale-čiddo hi, dess tou pale oun less love leske." 
Numbers18:16 I morsh čaveske less tou panč roupene kotya ap ko tsiro, kay hi lo yek čon phouro. Yek kotar roup hi deesh-te-douy gramme pharo. Yek grammi hi yaake boud har yek grammi an o Debleskro kheer hi." 
Numbers18:17 I groumni, i bakro oun i bouzni dess tou gar pale oun less kek love lenge. Yon venn mange. Lengro rat čoress tou ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri. Oun lengro thulepen rhačress tou o baro Debleske, te soungell o soungepen, hoy pre djala, mishto o Debleske." 
Numbers18:18 Lengro mass hi touke, yaake har ko beč oun koy čači heri, te rhan t'mer kova khetne glan mande." 
Numbers18:19 Ko tselo koova, hoy i Israelitarya o baro Debleske anenna, dau me touke oun tire čavenge oun tire čenge. Oun t'menge hi kova hako tsireske. Ap ko lab dau me miro vast. Kek nay lell ko lab krik, hoy dom tout oun tire čavende, kay pal toute venna." 
Numbers18:20 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Aroneste: Ap ko tsiro, kay venn i Israelitarya an lengro them, leh tou kek kotar phoub, hoy djal o dadestar ap o čaveste doureder, yaake har kova i vavar Israelitarya lenna. Me hom tiro, oun hom tiro bravlepen." 
Numbers18:21 Kol Levitaryen dau me ko deshto kotar lauterestar, hoy an o them Israel bares vella. Yon boudrenn ap miro kheer. Doleske lenn yon kova." 
Numbers18:22 Kanna oun an ko tsiro, hoy vella, hounte djan kokres i Levitarya pash o Debleskro kheer, oun gar i vavar Israelitarya, te lenn yon kek doosh ap pende oun merenna. Kol Levitarya hounte krenn koy boudi ap o Debleskro kheer. Oun yon hounte hidjrenn i doosh ap pende, te vell čomone kerdo, hoy gar čačo hi. Kova hounte vell yaake hako tsireske pash kolende, kay pal t'mende venna. Oun len hounte vell kek kotar phoub, hoy djal doureder o dadestar ap o čaveste, har kova i vavar Israelitarya lenna." 
Numbers18:23  
Numbers18:24 Kova, hoy i Israelitarya mange anenna, ko deshto kotar lauterestar, hoy ap lengre phoub bares vas, kova dau me kol Levitaryen. Kova hi lengro bravlepen. Doleske penom me ap lende, te vell len kek kotar phoub, har kol vavar Israelitarya lenna." 
Numbers18:25 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers18:26 Pen ap i Levitarya: Te anenn t'men i Israelitarya o deshto kotar kolestar, hoy ap lengre harhetikri phoub bares vas, – kova hi, hoy dau t'menge, – palle hounte denn t'mer kolestar mande ninna o deshto kotar." 
Numbers18:27 Oun kava, hoy t'mer mande denna, hi yaake, har te dans t'mer djob oun mool." 
Numbers18:28 Yaake har hako vavar Israelitari della, yaake hounte denn ninna t'mer man, o baro Debles, o deshto kotar lauterestar, hoy denn t'men kol Israelitarya. T'maro kotar hounte denn kol rashayeste, o Aroneste." 
Numbers18:29 Lauterestar, hoy denn le t'mende, hounte denn t'mer o baro Debles o feteder kotar." 
Numbers18:30 Te kran kova, palle nay rikrenn t'menge, hoy pral ačell, yaake har o harho rikrell o djob oun i mool, hoy pral ačell." 
Numbers18:31 T'mer nay rhan kova ap haki platsa, t'mer oun t'mare čave. Kova hi o playsepen t'mari boudjake ap o Debleskro plarhteno kheer." 
Numbers18:32 T'mer anenn koy pashel kek doosh ap t'mende, yaake rah har dan t'mer ko feteder kotar o baro Debleste. Kova, hoy i Israelitarya anenna hi mange, o baro Debleske oun hounte ačell mange. Doleske denn yak, te denn man glanstounes o feteder kotar, oun palle nay rhan t'mer. Te krenn kova gar, hounte merenn!" 
Numbers19:1 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun o Aroneha oun penas: 
Numbers19:2 Kova, hoy kanna penau, hounte krenn yaake har penau, ninna an ko tsiro, hoy vella: Pen ap kol Israelitarya, te anenn le pash toute i loli groumni, kay kek nasslepen ap late hi, oun kay boudras gar ap i harhetikri phoub, yaake rah har djivell li." 
Numbers19:3 Oun de lat ko rashayeste Elazar. Kova hounte anell lat vin glan i plarhtene khera. Oun kote glan leskre yaka moukell lo lat te marell. 
Numbers19:4 Oun ko rashay Elazar hounte lell lakro ratestar peskro goushteha, oun vitsrell kova efta kope kote ap koy rig, kay o Debleskro plarhteno kheer tardo hi." 
Numbers19:5 Oun yob hounte moukell koy groumyat glan leskre yaka pre rhačrell, lakri fella oun lakro mass, ninna lakro rat oun foul." 
Numbers19:6 Oun ko rashay hounte lell kasht ko roukestar, hoy kharella Ceder, ninna patria ko bourrestar, hoy kharella Hysop, ninna lolo bakrengro bal, oun vitsrell kova ap koy groumyate, hoy rhačella." 
Numbers19:7 Pal kova hounte thovell lo pes oun ninna peskre koola. Oun pal kova djal lo pash i plarhtene khera oun ačell pale-čiddo bis ap i rati. 
Numbers19:8 Oun ko morsh, kay rhačras koy groumyat pre, kova ninna hounte thovell pes oun peskre koola, oun ačell pale-čiddo bis ap i rati." 
Numbers19:9 Oun i morsh, kay gar pale-čiddo hi, hounte lell koy yagakri čik koy groumyatar, oun čivell lat vin glan i plarhtene khera ap i djoudji platsa, te ačell kay yagakri čik kote o tselo khereske Israel, te nay krenn le latar i pani thopaske, hoy lell i pale-čiddo koova i menshendar krik." 
Numbers19:10 Oun ko morsh, kay koy yagakri čik koy groumyatar khetne las, hounte thovell peskre koola, oun ačell pale-čiddo bis ap i rati. Kova, hoy kanna penau, ačell yaake t'menge, i Israelitarya, oun ninna i vavar menshenge, kay mank t'mende djivenna, hako tsireske:" 
Numbers19:11 Koon i moulo menshes an-tapella, kova hi efta divessa pale-čiddo." 
Numbers19:12 Yob hounte thovell pes ap o triinto dives oun ap o eftato dives ko panyeha, hoy lell i pale-čiddo koova i menshestar krik. Palle vell lo djoudjo oun erligo. Te thovell lo pes gar yaake ap o triinto dives oun ap o eftato dives, ačell lo pale-čiddo." 
Numbers19:13 Te taprell yek i moulo menshes an oun kamell pes gar yaake te thovell, palle krell lo o Debleskro kheer pale-čiddo. Oun savo mensho hounte vell infam kerdo oun nay djivell bouder gar mank i Israelitarya. Ko pani, hoy lell o pale-čiddo koova krik, vas gar ap leste vitsedo. Doleske ačell lo pale-čiddo, oun ko pale-čiddo koova ačell ap leste." 
Numbers19:14 Kova hi hoy mer hounte kras: Te merell i mensho an peskro plarhteno kheer, hounte vell hakeno, koon an ko kheer djala, oun koon an ko kheer hi, efta divessa pale-čiddo." 
Numbers19:15 Ninna haki piri, hako čaro oun khoro, hoy pre oun gar pandlo hi, vell pale-čiddo." 
Numbers19:16 Ninna kova, kay tapras i menshes an, kay meras vin ap o them, hi pale-čiddo efta divessa. Kova hi ninna yaake, te vas ko moulo mensho kote temerl dino o rhareha. Ninna kova vell pale-čiddo efta divessa, koon taprell ap i mouleskre kokale, ninna kova, kay taprell ap koy phoub, kay o moulo paskedo hi, – yob vell pale-čiddo efta divessa." 
Numbers19:17 Koleske, kay pale-čiddo hi, hounte lenn t'mer yagakri čik kol groumyatar, hoy pre rhačedo vas, čivenn kova an i piri, oun čorenn djoudjo pani pre." 
Numbers19:18 Oun i morsh, kay gar pale-čiddo hi, hounte lell kol patria, hoy kharenna Hysop oun čivell len an ko pani oun vitsrell kova ap o plarhteno kheer oun ap kol pirya, čare oun khore, hoy koy dren hi, ninna ap hakeneste, kay an ko kheer hi. Ninna hounte vitsrell lo ko pani ap koleste, kay tapras i moules an, leskre kokale, ninna koy phoub, kay vas yob paskedo." 
Numbers19:19 Yek, kay gar pale-čiddo hi, hounte vitsrell ko pani ap koleste, kay pale-čiddo hi ap o triinto dives oun ap o eftato dives. Oun ko pale-čiddo hounte thovell pes an ko pani oun peskre koola. Palle vell yob ap i rati djoudjo oun erligo." 
Numbers19:20 Koon vas pale-čiddo oun kamell gar, te vell lo thodo ko panyeha, kova hounte vell infam kerdo oun nay djivell bouder gar mank i Israelitarya. Yob kras o baro Debleskro kheer pale-čiddo, oun ko pani, hoy lell o pale-čiddo koova krik, vas gar ap leste vitsedo. Doleske ačell lo pale-čiddo." 
Numbers19:21 Yaake vell kova pash t'mende kerdo hako tsireske. Oun ninna kova, kay vitsras ko pani ap ko pale-čiddo, hounte thovell peskre koola. Oun koon taprell ko pani an, hoy lell o pale-čiddo koova krik, kova hounte ačell pale-čiddo bis ap i rati." 
Numbers19:22 Oun halauter, hoy ko pale-čiddo an-tapella, vell pale-čiddo. Oun koon koles an-tapella, kay pale-čiddo hi, hounte vell pale-čiddo bis ap i rati." 
Numbers20:1 Oun kol tsele Israelitarya van an o moulo tato them Tsin, an o ersto čon. Oun i menshe čivan pengre plarhtene khera pre pash o foro Kadesh. Oun i Miryam meras koy oun vas paskedo." 
Numbers20:2 Oun i tsele menshen his kek pani, oun van khetne pash o Moseste oun o Aroneste." 
Numbers20:3 Oun yon čingran ap o Mose oun penan: “Ah, te merams mer an ko tsiro, har mare menshe meran glan o baro Debleste!" 
Numbers20:4 Hoske anan t'mer o baro Debleskre menshen an kava moulo tato them, te meras mer kate mare firhentsa?" 
Numbers20:5 Oun hoske anan men dran o them Egiptia ap koy čilači platsa, kay nay čivah či an i phoub, hoy vell baro, kay kek fayge, kek drake, oun kek phabya hi, oun vitar kek pani pipaske koy hi?”" 
Numbers20:6 Koy djas o Mose oun o Aron i tsele menshendar krik, pash o voudar glan o Debleskro kheer, oun yon vitsran pen ap pengro mouy. Oun o Debleskro raylepen moukas pes lendar te dikell." 
Numbers20:7 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers20:8 “Le ko lengsto kasht oun le i tsele menshen khetne, tou oun tiro phraal, o Aron, oun rakrenn ap ko baro bar glan lengre yaka! Kova dell t'men pani. Yaake aness tou lenge pani dran ko baro bar, oun dess i tsele menshende te piyell oun lengre firhen ninna.”" 
Numbers20:9 Koy las o Mose ko lengsto kasht, kay glan o baro Debleste čiddo his, yaake har yob kova leske penas." 
Numbers20:10 Oun o Mose oun o Aron lan kol tsele menshen khetne glan ko baro bar. Oun o Mose penas ap lende: “Shounenn, t'mer kay djan hako tsiro pal t'maro shero! Nay lah mer t'menge pani dran kava baro bar?”" 
Numbers20:11 Oun o Mose hadas peskro vast, oun das ko lengsto kashteha douy kope ap ko baro bar. Koy vas yaake boud pani dran vin, kay piyan i tsele menshe oun lengre firhe." 
Numbers20:12 O baro Devel penas ap o Moseste oun ap o Aroneste: “T'mer patsan gar, hoy penom, oun sharan man gar glan kol Israelitarya. Doleske anenn t'mer gar kol menshen an ko them, hoy me len dau.”" 
Numbers20:13 Kava pani kharan le Meriba. Kate čingran i Israelitarya ap o baro Debleste. Oun kate sikras lo lende, kay yob čačepah o baro oun zorelo Devel hi." 
Numbers20:14 Har hi le an o foro Kadesh, bičras o Mose yekes pash o baro rayeste pral kol Edomarya, oun moukas leske te penell: “Kova moukell touke tiro phraal Israel te penell: Tou djineh, havo pharo tsiro ap mende vas," 
Numbers20:15 kay mare phoure an o them Egiptia djan, oun mer i rah tsiro an o them Egiptia djivam, oun kay kol Egiptarya menge oun mare phourenge o djipen phares kran." 
Numbers20:16 Oun mer dam pal o baro Debleste gole. Kova shounas men oun bičras i bolepaskres. Oun yob anas men dran o them Egiptia vin. Kanna ham an Kadesh, i foro gar dour tiro themestar." 
Numbers20:17 Mouk men mank tiro them te djal ap i vavar rig! Mer kamah ap o drom te ačell oun gar ap i harhetikri phoub oun an i drakengre themma te djal. Kamah vitar gar pani dran i brounne te piyell. Na-a, mer djah gar čačes, vitar gar serves, bis te vam ap i vavar rig.”" 
Numbers20:18 O baro ray pral o Edom penas ap lende: “Tou djas gar mank miro them! Te veh, vau me pash toute o rhareha.”" 
Numbers20:19 I Israelitarya penan ap leste: “Mer kamah ap ko shoukar drom te djal. Oun te piyah mer tiro pani, mer oun mare firhe, kamah mer kova playsrell. Mer kamah či har te djas mare heryentsa koy vergel.”" 
Numbers20:20 O baro ray penas: “Tou djas gar koy vergel.” Oun kol Edomarya djan vin ap ko drom pash lende boud zorele lourdentsa. 
Numbers20:21 Yaake kran kol Edomarya, te djan kol Israelitarya gar mank lengro them. Oun o Israel djas i vavar drom." 
Numbers20:22 Oun i tsele Israelitarya djan dran o foro Kadesh doureder, oun van pash koy berga Hor." 
Numbers20:23 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun o Aroneha pash koy berga Hor, hoy gar dour o themestar Edom hi, oun penas:" 
Numbers20:24 “O Aroneskro tsiro nashas tele, oun yob vell gar an ko them, kay dom i Israelitaryen. T'mer shounan gar ap kova, hoy penom pash o pani Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Le o Arones oun leskro čaves Elazar, oun an len ap koy berga Hor," 
Numbers20:26 oun rib o Aroneske peskre rashayeskre koola vin, oun rib len leskro čaveste Elazar an! Oun o Aron merella kote.”" 
Numbers20:27 Koy kras o Mose yaake har o baro Devel leske penas. Oun yon djan ap koy berga Hor glan kol tsele menshende Israel. 
Numbers20:28 Oun o Mose rivas o Aroneske i rashayeskre koola vin, oun rivas len leskro čaveste Elazar an. Oun o Aron meras koy, pre ap i berga. Oun o Mose oun o Elazar djan i berga tele." 
Numbers20:29 Oun har kol tsele menshe dikan, kay o Aron moulo hi, rovas o tselo kheer Israel pral leste 30 (triyanda) divessa." 
Numbers21:1 Oun har ko baro ray pral o foro Arad, ko Kanaanitari, kay djivell an ko them, kay o kham pralstounes hi, shounas, kay vas o Israel ap ko drom pash Atarim, djas yob peskre lourdentsa pash lende oun kouras pes lentsa, oun čivas menshen lendar pandlo." 
Numbers21:2 Koy das pes o Israel sovel glan o baro Debleste, oun yon penan: “Te deh tou kal menshen an mare vasta, kamah mer lengre forya paash te krell.”" 
Numbers21:3 Oun o baro Devel shounas ap o Israel oun das kol Kanaanitaryen an lengre vasta. Oun yon maran len oun kran lengre forya paash. Oun dan ko kotar them o lab Horma. 
Numbers21:4 Palle moukan yon koy berga Hor pal pende oun djan doureder ap ko drom, kay djal pash o Baro Lolo Pani. Yaake djan le troul ko them, kay djivan kol Edomarya. Oun i Israelitarya van rhoyedo ap o drom." 
Numbers21:5 Oun yon čingran ap o Debleste oun ap o Moseste oun penan: “Hoske anal tou men dran o them Egiptia vin, te meras mer an o moulo tato them, kay hi kek maro oun kek pani? Oun menge vell djoungelo ko rhapastar, kay kek thulepen dren hi?”" 
Numbers21:6 Koy bičras o baro Devel čilače sapa mank kol menshende. Kolla dandran len yaake, te meran boud Israelitarya." 
Numbers21:7 Koy van yon pash o Moseste oun penan: “Mer anam doosh ap mende, har čingram ap o baro Debleste oun ap toute. Mange o Debles menge, te lell yob kol sapa mendar!” Oun o Mose mangas kol menshenge." 
Numbers21:8 Koy penas o baro Devel ap o Moseste: “Kre touke i sap dran saster! Oun čip les ap i lengsto kasht! Koon dandedo vas oun dikell koy pre, kova ačell djido.”" 
Numbers21:9 Koy kras o Mose i sap dran saster oun čivas les pre ap i kasht. Kanna te vas yek i sapestar dandedo, dikas kova ap ko sasterno sap oun ačas djido." 
Numbers21:10 Oun kol Israelitarya djan doureder, oun ačan i tsiro ap i platsa Obot." 
Numbers21:11 Oun kotar djan le doureder oun ačan i tsiro ap i platsa Iye-Abarim an ko moulo tato them, ap koy rig ko themestar Moab, kay o kham pre djal." 
Numbers21:12 Kotar djan le doureder, oun ačan i tsiro pash ko pani Sered." 
Numbers21:13 Kotar djan le doureder, oun ačan i tsiro an ko moulo tato them pash o pani Arnon ap koy rig, kay o kham tato hi. O pani Arnon nashell mank o them Moab oun o them, kay i Amorarya djivenn." 
Numbers21:14 Doleske hi činlo an ko liil, hoy o baro Debleskre lourdendar rakrell: “Ko foro Vaheb an o them Soufa oun ko pani Arnon," 
Numbers21:15 hoy i berga tele nashella pash ko foro Ar oun djal bis pash o them Moab.” 
Numbers21:16 Oun kotar djan yon pash o pani Beer. Koya hi koy brounna, kay o baro Devel ap o Moseste penas: “Le kol menshen khetne! Me kamau len pani te dell.”" 
Numbers21:17 Ap ko tsiro givas o Israel koy gili: Pani, ab pre! Givenn pral leste!" 
Numbers21:18 Kaya hi koy brounna, hoy kol pralstoune vi-hadan. Lengre kashtentsa, ava, lengro rayeskro kashteha, hadan le lat vin. Palle moukan le o pani Beer pal pende oun djan doureder oun van pash Mattana." 
Numbers21:19 Oun kotar djan le doureder oun van pash Nahaliel, oun kotar pash Bamot-Baal." 
Numbers21:20 Oun yon moukan Bamot-Baal pal pende oun van an ko telstouno them, hoy an o them Moab čiddo hi, pash koy berga Pisga, hoy tele dikella ap ko pani Yordan." 
Numbers21:21 Oun o Israel bičras morshen pash o baro rayeste pral i Amorarya, – kova kharas Sihon, – oun moukas leske te penell:" 
Numbers21:22 “Mouk man mank tiro them te djal ap i vavar rig! Mer kamah ap o drom te ačell oun gar ap i harhetikri phoub oun an o drakengro them te djal. Kamah vitar gar dran t'mare brounne pani te piyell. Ap o drom kamah mer te ačell, bis te vah ap i vavar rig.”" 
Numbers21:23 O Sihon moukas i Israelitaryen gar an leskro them. Yob las peskre tsele lourden khetne, oun djas vin an o moulo tato them, te kourell lo pes lentsa. Oun har yob pash o foro Yahaz vas, djas lo pral lende oun kouras pes lentsa." 
Numbers21:24 O Israel his zorleder oun das les o rhareha oun las lestar ko them peske, hoy hi mank o pani Arnon oun o pani Yabbok oun djal bis pash o them, kay kol Ammonarya djivenna. Ko them, kay i Ammonarya djivan, djas bis pash o foro Yaser." 
Numbers21:25 Yaake las o Israel peske kal tsele forya, kay djivan i Amorarya, ninna o foro Heshbon oun kol tsele forya, kay koy pashel hi. Oun i Israelitarya djivan kote." 
Numbers21:26 Heshbon hi ko baro foro, kay djivas o Sihon, ko baro ray pral i Amorarya. Kova kouras pes glan i tsiro o baro rayeha pral i Moabarya, oun las leske leskro tselo them krik, bis pash o pani Arnon." 
Numbers21:27 Doleske vell penlo an i gili: Avenn an Heshbon, te vell o Sihoneskro foro pale kerdo." 
Numbers21:28 I yag vas dran o foro Heshbon, dran o Sihoneskro foro vas i yag. Koya rhas o foro Ar an o them Moab, oun kol berge pash o pani Arnon rhas li pre." 
Numbers21:29 Djungelo touke Moab! T'mer menshe ko deblestar Kemosh han nashedo. Tire čave van dino oun nashan, oun tire ča van pandlo anlo pash o Sihon, ko baro ray pral i Amorarya." 
Numbers21:30 O Heshbon hi paash, oun o tselo them bis pash o Dibon. Či ačas. I yag rhačras halauter pre bis pash i forya Nofa oun Medeba." 
Numbers21:31 Yaake djivas o Israel an o them, kay i Amorarya djivan." 
Numbers21:32 Oun o Mose bičras morshen vin pash o foro Yaser, te hatsenn le vin, har zorelo ko foro hi. Oun i Israelitarya lan ko fores penge dren, ninna kol gaba, hoy koy pashel hi. Oun yon tradan kol Amorarya krik, kay koy dren his." 
Numbers21:33 Palle rissran le pen oun djan pral ap ko drom, kay djal an o them Bashan. Koy vas o baro ray pral o them Bashan, – leskro lab hi Og, – peskre tsele lourdentsa pash lende, te kourell lo pes lentsa, oun tapras len pash o foro Edrei." 
Numbers21:34 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Ma traash lendar! Me dom les an tire vasta, ninna o them i menshentsa. Oun tou kress leha yaake, har kral o baro rayeha pral i Amorarya, o Sihoneha, kay an Heshbon djivas.”" 
Numbers21:35 Oun i Israelitarya dan o baro rayes Og oun leskre čaven oun leskre tsele lourden, – kek lendar ačas pral. Oun yon lan lengro them penge." 
Numbers22:1 Pal kova djan i Israelitarya doureder, oun djivan an ko telstouno them pash o pani Yordan, kay i Moabarya djivan, ap i vavar rig o forestar Yericho." 
Numbers22:2 Oun o Balak, koleskro dad o Sippor hi, dikas halauter, hoy o Israel ap kol Amorarya kras." 
Numbers22:3 Oun kol Moabaryen his bari daar kol menshendar Israel, kay yaake boud his. Oun kol Moabarya trashan lendar." 
Numbers22:4 Oun yon penan ap kol phourende mank kol Midianarya: “Kanna rhan kol tsele menshe halauter pre, hoy troul mende hi, har i groumni koy zenlepen ap i phoub pre rhala.” O Balak his an ko tsiro o baro ray pral i Moabarya." 
Numbers22:5 Oun yob bičras morshen pash o Bileam, koleskro dad o Beor hi. O Bileam djivas mank peskre menshende an o foro Petor, kay pash ko pani Eufrat čiddo hi. O baro ray moukas leske te penell: “Am pash mande! I bari natsyona djas dran o them Egiptia vin oun hi kate an o tselo them. Kal menshe čivan pengre plarhtene khera pre ap i vavar rig mandar." 
Numbers22:6 Oun yon hi zorleder har mer. Am kanna ap miri rig! Rake i bibarht vin pral kal menshende! Nay vell yaake, kay marau len, oun tradau len dran kava them vin. Me djinau: Pral koneste tou rakreh i barht vin, ap koleste hi i barht čiddo. Oun pral koneste tou rakreh i bibarht vin, ap koleste hi i bibarht čiddo.”" 
Numbers22:7 Oun i phoureder kol menshendar Moab oun Midian djan khetne pash o Bileam. Oun love his an lengre vasta o dourkepaske. Oun yon van pash leste, oun penan leske kol laba, hoy o Balak penas." 
Numbers22:8 Oun o Bileam penas ap lende: “Ačenn kay pral i rati! Yaake kamau me t'menge te penell, har o baro Devel mange kova penella!” Koy ačan kol pralstoune pral i Moabarya pash o Bileam." 
Numbers22:9 Oun o baro Devel vas pash o Bileam, oun penas: “Koon hi kol menshe, kay pash toute hi?”" 
Numbers22:10 O Bileam penas ap o baro Debleste: “O Balak, koleskro dad o Sippor hi, ko baro ray pral kol Moabarya bičras len pash mande oun moukas mange te penell:" 
Numbers22:11 I bari natsyona vas dran o them Egiptia kate, oun hi an o tselo them. Am ap miri rig oun rake i bibarht vin pral kal menshende! Nashte vell yaake, kay kourau man lentsa, oun tradau len. ”" 
Numbers22:12 O Devel penas ap o Bileam: “Ma dja lentsa! Ma rake i bibarht pral kol menshende vin! Miri barht oun zoor hi ap lende čiddo.” 
Numbers22:13 Koy stas o Bileam taysarlake pre, oun penas ap kol pralstunende, kolen o Balak bičras: “Djan an t'maro them pale! O baro Devel kamell gar, te djap me t'mentsa.”" 
Numbers22:14 Oun kol pralstoune pral kol Moabarya djan pale, oun van pash o Balak, oun penan: “O Bileam kamas gar mentsa te djal.”" 
Numbers22:15 Koy bičras o Balak boudeder oun an-dikleder pralstunen har kolla his, pash o Bileam." 
Numbers22:16 Har kolla pash leste van, penan le ap leste: “Yaake moukell touke te penell o Balak, koleskro dad o Sippor hi: Mouk touke či an o drom te čivell, te vess pash mande!" 
Numbers22:17 Me kamau touke bravlepen te dell. Oun hoy tou mange peneh, kamau me te krell. Am ap miri rig oun rake i bibarht vin pral kal menshende!”" 
Numbers22:18 O Bileam penas ap kolende, kay bičras o Balak: “Ninna te dell man o Balak peskro kheer pherdo roup oun sonakay, nay čivau me gar i lab ap i rig, hoy vell o baro Deblestar, kay miro Devel hi – gar an i tikno koova, vitar gar an o baro koova." 
Numbers22:19 Ačenn ninna t'mer kay rati pash mande, te djinap me, hoy o baro Devel mantsa rakrella!”" 
Numbers22:20 Koy vas o baro Devel an i rati pash o Bileam, oun penas ap leste: “Van kol morsha, te denn yon tout gole, te djas lentsa, palle dja lentsa!”" 
Numbers22:21 Koy stas o Bileam taysarlake pre, oun čivas i ledertikri plarhta ap peskri bourika oun djas kol pralstunentsa pral kol Moabarya." 
Numbers22:22 Koy vas o Devel rhoyedo koy pral, kay yob lentsa djas. Oun o bolepaskro o baro Deblestar djas leske an o drom, te rikrell lo les pale. Oun o Bileam his beshdo ap peskri bourika. Oun douy boudepangre djan leha." 
Numbers22:23 Oun koy bourika dikas o baro Debleskro bolepaskro ap o drom tardo i rhareha an o vast. Oun koy bourika djas o dromestar tele, oun djas ap i kotar phoub. O Bileam das lat, te anell yob lat pale ap ko drom." 
Numbers22:24 Koy vas o baro Debleskro bolepaskro ap ko drom mashkral kol drakengre berge, kay ap kol douy rigya massurya his." 
Numbers22:25 Oun har koy bourika o baro Debleskro bolepaskres dikas, djas yoy yaake dour ap i rig, te vas o Bileameskri heri doukedo ap kol massouri. Oun yob das lat o douyto kopo." 
Numbers22:26 Koy djas o baro Debleskro bolepaskro doureder, oun vas pale kote ap o drom, kay gar bourhlo his, kay kek platsa his, te djas yob nay čačes, vitar gar serves." 
Numbers22:27 Oun har koy bourika o baro Debleskro bolepaskres dikas, čivas pes li tele. Oun o Bileam his pre-beshdo. Koy tapras o Bileames i rholi. Oun yob das koy bourika i kashteha." 
Numbers22:28 Koy kras o baro Devel koy bourikake o mouy pre. Oun yoy penas ap o Bileam: “Hoy krom me tout, kay dal tou man triin kope?”" 
Numbers22:29 O Bileam penas ap i bourika: “Tou rikral man dineleske! Te vals man kanna i rharo an o vast, doms tout moulo.”" 
Numbers22:30 Koy bourika penas ap o Bileam: “Hom me gar tiri bourika, kay tou beshal pre tiro tselo djipen? Krom me yaake touha glan ko tsiro?” Yob penas: “Na-a!”" 
Numbers22:31 Koy kras o baro Devel o Bileameske i yaka pre, kay nay dikas yob o baro Debleskro bolepaskres ap o drom tardo i rhareha an o vast. Oun o Bileam čivas pes ap peskre čanga tele oun vitsras pes ap peskro mouy." 
Numbers22:32 Oun o baro Debleskro bolepaskro penas ap leste: “Hoske dal tou tiri bourika triin kope? Dik, me vom pash toute, te rikrap tout pale. Tiro drom, hoy tou djah, hi gar mishto an mire yaka." 
Numbers22:33 Oun koy bourika dikas man, oun djas peske triin kope mandar. Te djals yoy gar mandar, yaake doms me tout moulo. Oun koy bourika moukoms te djivell.”" 
Numbers22:34 Koy penas o Bileam ap o baro Debleskro bolepaskro: “Me anom doosh ap mande. Me djinom gar, kay tou kamal man pale te rikrell ap o drom. Oun kanna, te hi kova touke gar mishto, yaake djau me pale pale.”" 
Numbers22:35 O baro Debleskro bolepaskro penas ap leste: “Dja kol morshentsa! Ma rake vavar koova har me touke penau!” Yaake djas o Bileam kol pralstunentsa, kay o Balak bičras." 
Numbers22:36 Har o Balak shounas, kay o Bileam vas, djas yob pash leste an o foro Ar, kay pash o pani Arnon čiddo hi, – kote kay veh an o them Moab." 
Numbers22:37 Oun penas ap leste: “Bičrom me gar morshen pash toute oun moukom tout te kharell? Hoske val tou gar pash mande? Patseh tou gar, kay me nay dau tout bravlepen?”" 
Numbers22:38 Penas o Bileam ap leste: “Ake hom. Shoun, me nay rakrau či vavar har kova, hoy mange o baro Devel an o mouy čivas. Kova kokres nay rakrau me.”" 
Numbers22:39 Yaake djas o Bileam o Balakeha. Oun yon van an o foro Kiryat-Houzot. 
Numbers22:40 Oun o Balak maras groumyen oun bakren o Debleske, oun bičras ko massestar pash o Bileam, oun pash kol pralstunende, kay pash leste his." 
Numbers22:41 Oun taysarlakro las o Balak o Bileames peha, oun anas les pral ap i berga Bamot-Baal, te dikell yob kotar ap kol tsele menshende Israel." 
Numbers23:1 O Bileam penas ap o Balak: “Mouk kate ap efta platse barra pre te čivell, kay nay rhačrau firhen o Debleske, oun an mange efta terne gourma oun efta bakre!”" 
Numbers23:2 O Balak kras yaake har o Bileam penas. Oun hake douy, o Balak oun o Bileam, rhačran o Debleske ap haki rhačepaskri yek terno gouroum oun yek bakro." 
Numbers23:3 Oun o Bileam penas ap o Balak: “Dja pash ko firho, hoy rhačreh o Debleske. Me kamau doureder te djal. Nay vell, te moukell pes o baro Devel glan mande te dikell. Palle kamau touke te penell, hoy yob mande sikrella.” Oun yob djas ap i berga, kay hi kek veesh." 
Numbers23:4 Oun o Devel moukas pes glan o Bileam te dikell. Kova penas ap leste: “Efta rhačepangre krom me, oun ap haki rhačepaskri rhačrom i terno gouroum oun i bakro.”" 
Numbers23:5 O baro Devel čivas o Bileameske o lab an o mouy oun penas: “Dja pale pale pash o Balak oun pen yaake!” 
Numbers23:6 Oun har yob pash o Balak vas, his yob pash ko firho tardo, hoy rhačras yob o Debleske. Oun pash leste his kol tsele pralstoune pral i Moabarya." 
Numbers23:7 Koy penas o Bileam kal laba: O Balak, ko baro ray pral i Moabarya, moukas man te anell dran o them Aram, dran kol berge, kay o kham pre djala. Oun yob penas ap mande: Am ap miri rig, oun rake i bibarht pral o Yakobeskre menshende vin! Ava, am oun praase i Israeleskre menshen!" 
Numbers23:8 Har nay rakrau me i bibarht vin pral kolende, ap kolende o baro Devel kek bibarht čivella? Har nay praasau me yekes, koles o baro Devel gar praasella?" 
Numbers23:9 Pral ap i berga hom tardo, oun dikau tele ap kol menshende. Yon hi menshe, kay djivenn penge, oun djinenn, kay yon gar hi har i vavar menshe." 
Numbers23:10 Kek djinell, har boud menshe o Yakobeskre menshe hi. Ava, kek nay hatsell vin, har boud zerya i Israelitarya hi? Me kamau, te merap yaake har yek lendar, kol čače menshendar. Miro merepen mou vell har lengro merepen!" 
Numbers23:11 Koy penas o Balak ap o Bileam: “Hoy kre tou mantsa? Me moukom tout kate te anell, te rakress i bibarht vin pral kolende, kay man pre rhana. Tou rakreh i barht pral lende vin.”" 
Numbers23:12 O Bileam penas: “Rikrap me gar kova dren oun rakrap, hoy o baro Devel mange an o mouy čivas?”" 
Numbers23:13 O Balak penas ap leste: “Am mantsa ap i vavar platsa, kay dikeh i tsele menshen oun gar i tikno kotar lendar har kate! Oun kote rake i bibarht vin pral o Israel!”" 
Numbers23:14 Oun yob anas les pash i phoub, hoy kharella dour dikepen, ap koy berga Pisga, oun kras efta rhačepangre, oun rhačras ap haki rhačepaskri o Debleske i terno gouroum oun i bakro." 
Numbers23:15 Oun o Bileam penas ap o Balak: “Dja pash tiro firho, hoy rhačreh o Debleske! Me kamau doureder te djal, te vap khetne o Debleha.”" 
Numbers23:16 Oun o baro Devel vas pash o Bileam, oun čivas leske o lab an o mouy, oun penas: “Dja pale pash o Balak oun pen yaake.”" 
Numbers23:17 Oun har yob pash leste vas, his yob pash ko firho tardo, hoy rhačrell yob o Debleske. Oun kol tsele pralstoune pral kol Moabarya his pash leste tardo. Oun o Balak poučas lestar: “Hoy penas o baro Devel?”" 
Numbers23:18 Koy penas o Bileam kal laba ap leste: Tou, o Balak, koleskro dad o Sippor hi, ste pre, oun shoun! Mouk kova an tiro shero dren te djal, hoy me penau!" 
Numbers23:19 O Devel hi gar i mensho, kay rhorhella, vitar gar i mensheskro čavo, koles khaytell, hoy yob kras. Penell yob čomone, hoy yob gar krella? Penell yob kova, kay rikrell yob gar?" 
Numbers23:20 Shoun, yob penas mange te rakrap i barht pral kol menshende vin. Yob čivas i barht pral lende. Oun me nay krau či vavares." 
Numbers23:21 Me dikau kek bibarht ap o Yakob oun kek čilačepen ap o Israel. O baro Devel hi lengro Devel oun hi pash lende. Yob hi lengro baro ray, koleske givenn le i barhtyatar." 
Numbers23:22 O Devel las len dran o them Egiptia vin, oun kourell pes lenge har i divyo gouroum." 
Numbers23:23 Koy hi kek dourkepen, hoy rakreh nay vin pral o Israel, vitar kek bengeskro koova, hoy nay krals tou o Yakobeskre menshentsa. Pral lende vell penlo: Dikenn, havo baro koova o Devel lenge kras!" 
Numbers23:24 Kay natsyona hi har i terni bari margodja, oun vell zorelo har i bari margodja, hoy čivell pes gar tele, bis te rhas li pre, hoy yoy maras, oun piyas ko rat kolendar, hoy yoy moulo das." 
Numbers23:25 Koy penas o Balak ap o Bileam: “Te rakreh tou gar i bibarht vin pral lende, hounte rakress tou vitar gar i barht vin pral lende!”" 
Numbers23:26 O Bileam penas ap leste: “Penom me touke gar: Lauter, hoy o baro Devel penella, kova rakrau me.”" 
Numbers23:27 O Balak penas ap leste: “Am kay! Me kamau tout ap i vavar platsa te anell. Nay vell yaake, kay hi kova mishto glan o Debleskre yaka, kay tou kote pral lende i bibarht vin rakreh.”" 
Numbers23:28 Oun o Balak anas les pash i berga Peor, kay nay dikas lo tele ap koy telstouno them pash o pani Yordan." 
Numbers23:29 Oun o Bileam penas ap o Balak: “Kre mange kate efta rhačepangre, oun an mange kate efta terne gourma oun efta bakre!”" 
Numbers23:30 O Balak kras, har o Bileam penas, oun rhačras ap haki rhačepaskri yek terno gouroum oun yek bakro." 
Numbers24:1 Har o Bileam kanna dikas, kay o baro Debleske kova mishto hi, te rakrell lo i barht pral o Israel vin, rodas yob gar pal i sikepen, hoy leske penell, hoy o Devel kamella, yaake har kras yob kol vavar kope. Yob rissras pes oun dikas ap o moulo tato them," 
Numbers24:2 oun dikas kol Israelitarya, har lengre plarhtene khera tardo hi, haki bari familya peske. Oun o Debleskro dourho vas ap leste." 
Numbers24:3 Oun yob penas kal laba: Kova penell o Bileam, koleskro dad o Beor hi. Kova penell ko morsh, kay van leske i yaka pre kerdo." 
Numbers24:4 Kova penella, kay shounell o Debleskro rakepen. Me dikau, hoy o zorelo Devel mande sikrella. Mire yaka venn pre kerdo, te djau ap i čanga." 
Numbers24:5 Har shoukar hi tire plarhtene khera, Yakob, kay tou djiveh, Israel." 
Numbers24:6 Har i telstouno them, hoy vell bourhlo, har i baar pash o pani, har kol zorele rouka, hoy o baro Devel an i phoub čivas, har kol cedertikre rouka, hoy pash o pani tardo hi." 
Numbers24:7 An o Israeleskro them hi boud pani, oun leskri phoub, kay o djob oun o gib bares venna, hi boudeder har doha pani. Leskro baro ray vell bareder har o Agag. Oun leskro them oun leskre menshe venn zorleder har i vavar menshe troul lende." 
Numbers24:8 O baro Devel anas len vin dran o them Egiptia, oun kourell pes lenge har i divyo gouroum. Yon rhan kol menshen, kay len palla lenna, oun denn lengre kokale paash, oun denn len moulo karye." 
Numbers24:9 O Israel čivas pes tele har i bari margodja, ava, har i terni bari margodja. Kek kamell lat pre djangrell. Barht oun zoor vell koles, kay rakrell i barht pral toute vin, Israel! Oun bibarht vell ap koleste, kay rakrell i bibarht vin pral toute." 
Numbers24:10 Koy vas o Balak rhoyedo ap o Bileam. Oun yob das i vasta khetne, oun penas ap leste: “Me dom tout gole, te rakress i bibarht vin pral kolende, kay man pre rhana. Oun dik, tou rakral triin kope i barht pral lende vin." 
Numbers24:11 Dja kanna touke! Dja an tiro them! Me kamom te dap tout boud bravlepen. O baro Devel kamas gar te dap tout bravlepen.” 
Numbers24:12 Koy penas o Bileam ap leste: “Penom me gar ap tire morshende, kolen pash mande bičral:" 
Numbers24:13 Ninna te dell man o Balak peskro kheer pherdo roup oun sonakay, nay čivau me gar o Debleskro lab ap i rig. Me nay rakrau gar lačepen oun čilačepen har me kamau. Hoy o baro Devel rakrella, kova rakrau ninna." 
Numbers24:14 Oun kanna djau pash mire menshende. Glan kova kamau touke te penell, hoy kal menshe tire menshenge krenna an o tsiro, hoy vella!”" 
Numbers24:15 Oun yob penas kal laba: Kova penell o Bileam, koleskro dad o Beor hi. Kova penell ko morsh, kay van leske i yaka pre kerdo." 
Numbers24:16 Kova penell, kay shounell o Debleskro rakepen, oun koon djinella, hoy ko pralstouno krella. Me dikau, hoy o zorelo Devel mange sikrell. Mire yaka venn pre kerdo, te djau ap i čanga." 
Numbers24:17 Me dikau yekes. Kova hi kanna gar koy. Doural dikau les. Dran o Yakob vell yek, kay djal pre har i bolepaskri momeli. Dran o Israel vell i baro ray, oun dell i Moabarya khetne. Oun kol morshenge, kay venna pal o Set, dell lo ap o shero." 
Numbers24:18 O tselo them Seir lell yob peske, ko them, kay djivenn i Edomarya, kolla, kay kamenn o Israel pre te rhal. O Israel hi zorleder har yon." 
Numbers24:19 Dran o Yakob vell kova, koles penepaske hi, oun marell ninna kolen, kay pral ačan an lengre forya." 
Numbers24:20 Oun har o Bileam kol Amalekarya dikas, penas lo kal laba: “Amalek hi ko pralstouno mashkral kol natsyone. Ninna yob vell maredo an ko tsiro, hoy vella.”" 
Numbers24:21 Oun har yob kol Kenarya dikas, penas lo kal laba: “Zorelo hi tiro kheer. Oun tou kral tiro kheer har i čirklengro kheer pral ap i zorelo oun baro bar." 
Numbers24:22 Ninna tou, o Kayn, veh maredo. Oun ap ko tsiro anell o Assour tout pandlo krik.”" 
Numbers24:23 Oun yob rakras pale oun penas kal laba: “Koon ačell djido ap ko tsiro, kay krell o Devel kova?" 
Numbers24:24 Oun shiffe venna dran o them Kittim oun anenn lourden, kay perenn an i themma Assour oun Eber. Pal halauter djal ninna Kittim paash.”" 
Numbers24:25 Oun o Bileam hadas pes oun djas kote, oun vas pale an peskro them. Oun o Balak djas peskro drom." 
Numbers25:1 Oun i Israelitaryen his pengre plarhtene khera pash o foro Shittim. Kote moukan pen i morsha dren kol čentsa dran o them Moab. 
Numbers25:2 Kolla kaman, te venn i Israelitarya lentsa, te anenn yon firhen pengre deblenge. Oun i Israelitarya van lentsa oun rhan ko massestar oun mangan kolengre deblen an." 
Numbers25:3 Yaake nashas o Israel o rhorheno debleske, o Baal-Peor, palla. Koy vas o baro Debleskri rholi pral o Israel." 
Numbers25:4 Oun yob penas ap o Moseste: “Le kol tsele pralstunen pral i Israelitarya oun pande len glan mande pre, mashkral o dives, te dikell len hakeno. Palle lau miri bari rholi i menshendar Israel krik!”" 
Numbers25:5 Oun o Mose penas ap kol Israeleskre čačepangre: “Denn moulo hakeno peskre menshen, kay nashan o Baal-Peor palla!”" 
Numbers25:6 Oun i tsele Israelitarya his čiddo o ropah glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. Koy anas i morsh dran Israel i Midianetsa an o plarhteno kheer peskri familyatar. Oun o Mose oun i tsele israelitarya dikan kova. 
Numbers25:7 Har o Pinhas, koleskro dad o Elazar hi, oun koleskro papo o rashay Aron his, kova dikas, stas lo pre, moukas i vavaren, kay kote khetne his, las i vitsepaskro čouri an o vast," 
Numbers25:8 oun djas pal kol Israelitari an leskri isema, oun das an kol douyende khetne dren čourye, an ko morsheste, kay vell dran Israel oun an koy djouvel. Koy heras ko nasslepen pre, hoy ap i Israelitarya čiddo his." 
Numbers25:9 Oun lestar meran 24.000 (biish-te-star-zerya) menshe. 
Numbers25:10 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers25:11 “O Pinhas, koleskro dad o Elazar hi, oun koleskro papo o rashay Aron his, kova las miri rholi kol Israelendar krik. Yob his yaake rhoyedo har me homs, oun kras, te marom me gar i tsele Israelitaryen an miri rholi." 
Numbers25:12 Doleske pen leske: Dik, me kamau touha vin te krell, te vas mer mala," 
Numbers25:13 oun doleske vess tou oun tire čave pal toute hako tsireske mire rashaya. Tiro dji rhačas tiro Debleske oun tou kral, te vas kol Israelenge i doosh krik lino. ”" 
Numbers25:14 Ko morsh dran Israel, kay vas moulo dino khetne koy Midianetsa, kharas Simri, leskro dad his o Salu. Kova his i pralstouno i menshendar Simeon." 
Numbers25:15 Koy djouvel dran Midian, kay ninna moulo dino vas, kharas Kosbi. Lakro dad his o Sur. Kova his o pralstouno i bari familyatar mank kol Midianarya." 
Numbers25:16 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers25:17 “Djan ap i Midianarya oun marenn len! 
Numbers25:18 Yon anan t'men an i bibarht, har anan le t'men yaake dour, te mangan o Baal-Peor an. Oun yon anan t'men an i bibarht lengri phenyah Kosbi, kolakro dad i pralstouno pral kol Midianarya his. Koya vas moulo dino ap ko dives, kay vas ko nasslepen pral t'mende pash i berga Peor.”" 
Numbers25:19  
Numbers26:1 Pal ko pharo nasslepen, rakras o baro Devel ap o Moseste oun ap o Elazareste, koleskro dad o rashay Aron his, oun penas:" 
Numbers26:2 “Činenn an i liil har boud morsh Israelitarya koy hi, kay hi zoreles doha, te venn le lourde. Činenn kolen pre, kay hi biish bersha phouro oun phoureder! Činenn ninna pre have menshendar yon venna!”" 
Numbers26:3 Oun o Mose oun o rashay o Elazar kran kova yaake, har o baro Devel o Moseske penas, oun dan kol tsele morshen, kay biish bersh oun phoureder his, khetne gole pash o pani Yordan an o telstouno them, kay i Moabarya djivan, vergel o forestar Yericho. Kolla his kol Israelitarya, kay van dran o them Egiptia vin:" 
Numbers26:4  
Numbers26:5 O kheer Ruben: O Ruben his o Yakobeskro phoureder čavo. Leskre čave his o Henok, o Pallou," 
Numbers26:6 o Hesron oun o Karmi. Kolendar venna i Henokarya, i Palluarya, i Hesronarya oun i Karmarya." 
Numbers26:7 Kalla halauter van o Rubenestar. Oun khetne his le 43.730 (star-deesh-te-triin-zerya-efta-sheel-triyanda) morsha. 
Numbers26:8 Oun kolla, kay van pal o Pallou his leskro čavo, o Eliab," 
Numbers26:9 oun koleskre čave, o Nemouel, o Datan oun o Abiram. Kolla hi ko Datan oun o Abiram, kay van vi-rodedo, te venn le pralstoune, oun pal i tsiro hadan le pen pral o Mose oun o Aron, oun kran pen khetne kol menshentsa, kay van pal o Korah, har yon hadan pen pral o baro Debleste." 
Numbers26:10 Oun i phoub kras peskro mouy pre, oun tserdas len tele khetne o morsheha, o Korah. Oun kol 250 (douy-te-paash-sheel) morsha, kay djan lentsa, meran an i yag. Yaake van le i sikepen, te dikan i menshe, hoy hi." 
Numbers26:11 Kol čave o Korahestar meran gar halauter. 
Numbers26:12 O kheer Simeon: Leskre čave his o Nemouel, o Yamin, o Yakin, o Zera oun o Shaul. Lendar venna i Nemouelarya, i Yaminarya, i Yakinarya, i Zerarya oun i Shaularya." 
Numbers26:13  
Numbers26:14 Kalla halauter van o Simeonestar. Oun khetne his le 22.200 (biish-te-douy-zerya-douy-sheel) morsha. 
Numbers26:15 O kheer Gad: Leskre čave his o Sifyon, o Haggi, o Shouni, o Osni, o Eri, o Arod oun o Areli. Lendar venna i Sifyonarya, i Haggarya, Shounarya, i Osnarya oun i Erarya, i Arodarya oun i Arelyarya." 
Numbers26:16  
Numbers26:17  
Numbers26:18 Kalla halauter van o Gadestar. Oun khetne his le 40.500 (star-deesh-zerya-panč-sheel) morsha. 
Numbers26:19 O kheer Youda: Leskre phoureder čave his o Er oun o Onan. Kol douy meran an o them Kanaan. 
Numbers26:20 Pal lende vas o Shela, o Perez, oun o Zera. Kolendar van i Shelanarya, i Perezarya oun i Zerarya. Kol čave foun o Perez his o Hesron oun o Hamoul. Kolendar venna kol Hesronarya oun kol Hamoularya." 
Numbers26:21  
Numbers26:22 Kalla halauter van o Youdaestar. Oun khetne his le 76.500 (efta-deesh-te-shob-zerya-panč-sheel) morsha. 
Numbers26:23 O kheer Issakar: Leskre čave his o Tola, o Pouva, o Yashoub, oun o Shimron. Kolendar venna kol Tolarya, kol Pouvanarya, kol Yashoubarya oun kol Shimronarya." 
Numbers26:24  
Numbers26:25 Kalla halauter van o Issakarestar. Khetne his le 64.300 (shob-deesh-te-star-zerya-triin-sheel) morsha. 
Numbers26:26 O kheer Zabulon: Leskre čave his o Sered, o Elon, oun o Yaleel. Kolendar venna kol Seredarya, kol Elonarya oun kol Yaleelarya." 
Numbers26:27 Kalla halauter van o Zabulonestar. Khetne his le 60.500 (shob-deesh-zerya-panč-sheel) morsha. 
Numbers26:28 O Yosefes his douy čave: o Manasse oun o Efrayim. 
Numbers26:29 O Manasse his o dad yek čavestar, kova his o Makir. Kolestar venna kol Makirarya. O Makir las i čavo, kova kharas Gilead. Kolestar venna kol Gileadarya." 
Numbers26:30 O Gileadeskre čave hi: o Yeser, o Helek, o Asriel, o Sichem, o Shemida, oun o Hefer. Kolendar venna kol Yeserarya, kol Helekarya, kol Asriyelarya, kol Sichemarya, kol Shemidarya, oun kol Heferarya." 
Numbers26:31  
Numbers26:32  
Numbers26:33 O Hefer las i čavo. Kova his o Selofad. Oun koles his kek čave. Les his ča. Kolla kharan Mala, Noa, Hogla, Milka, oun Tirza." 
Numbers26:34 Kalla halauter van o Manassestar. Khetne his le 52.700 (panč-deesh-te-douy-zerya-efta-sheel) morsha. 
Numbers26:35 O Efrayim his o dad triin čavendar: o Shoutelak oun o Beker, oun o Tahan. Kolendar venna kol Shoutelakarya, kol Bekerarya oun kol Tahanarya." 
Numbers26:36 O Shoutelak las i čavo. Kova his o Eran. Kolestar venna kol Eranarya. 
Numbers26:37 Kalla halauter van o Efrayimestar. Khetne his le 32.500 (triyanda-te-douy-zerya-panč-sheel) morsha. 
Numbers26:38 O kheer Benyamin: Leskre čave his o Bela, o Ashbel, o Ahiram, o Shoufam, o Houfam. Kolendar venna kol Belarya, kol Ashbelarya, kol Ahiramarya, kol Shoufamarya, kol Houfamarya." 
Numbers26:39  
Numbers26:40 O Bela his o dad douy čavendar. Kolla his o Ard oun o Naaman. Kolendar venna kol Naamanarya oun kol Ardarya. 
Numbers26:41 Kalla halauter venn o Benyaminestar. Khetne his le 45.600 (star-deesh-te-panč-zerya-shob-sheel) morsha. 
Numbers26:42 O kheer Dan: Leskro čavo his o Shouham. Kolestar venna kol Shouhamarya. Kalla hi halauter, kay van pal o Dan." 
Numbers26:43 Khetne his kol Shouhamarya 64.400 (shob-deesh-te-star-zerya-star-sheel) morsha. 
Numbers26:44 O kheer Asser: Leskre čave his o Yimna, o Yishvi oun o Berya. Kolendar venna kol Yimnarya kol Yishvarya oun kol Beryarya." 
Numbers26:45 O Berya las čave. Kolla his o Heber oun o Malkiel. Kolendar venna kol Heberarya oun kol Malkiyelarya. 
Numbers26:46 O Asser, les his i čay, koya kharas Zera." 
Numbers26:47 Kalla halauter van pal o Asser. Khetne his le 53.400 (panč-deesh-te-triin-zerya-te-star-sheel) morsha. 
Numbers26:48 O kheer Naftali: Leskre čave his o Yassiel, o Gouni, o Yesser, o Shillem. Kolendar venna kol Yassielarya, kol Gounyarya, kol Yesserarya oun kol Shillemarya." 
Numbers26:49  
Numbers26:50 Kalla halauter van pal o Naftali. Khetne his le 45.400 (star-deesh-te-panč-zerya-star-sheel) morsha. 
Numbers26:51 I tsele Israelitarya his khetne 601.730 (shob-sheel-te-yek-zerya-efta-sheel-te-triyanda) morsha. 
Numbers26:52 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers26:53 “Tou dess hako khereske, kay vell o Yakobeskre deesh-te-douy čavendar, lengro kotar them pal kova har boud yon hi, te vell ko them lengro." 
Numbers26:54 Kol familyenge, kolen boud menshe hi, hounte dess tou boud them, te vell lo lengro. Oun kol familyenge, kolen gar boud menshe hi, hounte dess gar yaake boud." 
Numbers26:55 Vitsrenn i barhtyakre barra, te hatsenn vin, koon o Yakobeskre čavendar havo kotar them lella." 
Numbers26:56 Yaake har i barra sikrenn, de len lengro them, i bari familyake i baro them oun i tikneder familyake i tikneder them.”" 
Numbers26:57 O kheer Levi: Lengre laba van pre činlo pal kol triin čavende o morshestar Levi: o Gershon, o Kohat oun o Merari. Lendar venna kol Gershonarya, kol Kohatarya oun kol Merarya." 
Numbers26:58 Kalla hi kol familye, kay venn pal o Levi: kol Libnarya, kol Hebronarya, kol Malarya, kol Mousharya, kol Koraharya. O morshestar Kohat vell o Amram." 
Numbers26:59 Koleskri romni kharas Yokebed, lakro dad his o Levi. Koya vas boldo an o them Egiptia. Oun yoy anas o Aron, o Mose oun lengri pheen, i Miryam ap i phoub." 
Numbers26:60 O Aroneske van čave boldo. Kolla his o Nadab, o Abihu, o Elazar, oun o Itamar." 
Numbers26:61 O Nadab oun o Abihu meran, har anan yon glan o baro Debleste savo soungepaskro koova, hoy gar yaake kerdo his, har o baro Devel kova kamas." 
Numbers26:62 Oun i tsele morsh Levitarya, kay his yek čon oun phoureder, his khetne 23.000 (biish-te-triin-zerya). Yon lan kek them har i vavar Israelitarya. Doleske van le gar lentsa khetne ginlo." 
Numbers26:63 Yaake boud his kol Israelitarya, kolengre laba o Mose oun o rashay Elazar an i liil činan, har anan le len khetne pash o pani Yordan an o telstouno them, kay kol Moabarya djivan, vergel o foro Yericho." 
Numbers26:64 Mashkral kolende his kek bouder djido kolendar, kolengre laba o Mose oun o rashay Aron an i liil činan, har dikan le pal, har boud yon hi, an o moulo tato them Sinay." 
Numbers26:65 O baro Devel penas lenge, kay yon hounte merenn an o moulo tato them. Oun yaake ačan kek lendar djido har kokres o Kaleb, koleskro dad o Yefunne his, oun o Yosua, koleskro dad o Noun his." 
Numbers27:1 Oun o Selofad, koleskro dad o Hefer his, koleskro dad o Gilead his, koleskro dad o Makir his, koleskro dad o Manasse his, koleskro dad o Yosef his, les his panč ča: i Mala, i Noa, i Hogla, i Milka, oun i Tirza." 
Numbers27:2 Kolla van pash o voudar glan o Debleskro kheer oun penan ap o Moseste oun ap o Elazar, ko rashayeste, glan kol pralstunende oun i tsele Israelitarya, kay koy hi:" 
Numbers27:3 “Maro dad meras an o moulo tato them, oun his gar mashkral kolende, kay djan o Koraheha oun hadan pen pral o baro Debleste. Yob meras peskri doshake, hoy yob kras. Oun les his kek morsh čave." 
Numbers27:4 Hoske hounte djal maro dadeskro lab tele doleske, kay les kek morsh čave hi? De men ninna i kotar them an o them kol phralendar maro dadestar!”" 
Numbers27:5 O Mose anas lengro koova glan o baro Debleste. 
Numbers27:6 Oun o baro Devel penas ap leste: 
Numbers27:7 “Kol ča foun o Selofad penan o čačepen. Tou hounte dess len i kotar them an ko them, hoy deh kol phralende lengro dadestar, oun hounte dess lengro dadeskro them lende." 
Numbers27:8 Oun pen kol Israelenge: Te merell yek, oun koles hi kek morsh čavo, hounte denn leskro them leskri čate." 
Numbers27:9 Oun te hi les kek čay, hounte denn kova leskre phralende." 
Numbers27:10 Te hi les kek phrala, hounte denn kova kol phralende leskro dadestar." 
Numbers27:11 Te hi leskro dades kek phrala, hounte denn kova leskre menshende, kay lestar venna, te lenn yon kova halauter. Kova hounte vell pash i Israelitarya yaake har o baro Devel kova o Moseske penas.”" 
Numbers27:12 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Dja pre ap koy berga Abarim oun dik ap ko them, hoy dau me i Israelende." 
Numbers27:13 Oun te dikal tou kova, mereh tou, yaake har tiro phraal Aron ninna meras." 
Numbers27:14 Kova vell doleske, kay shounan gar ap miro lab an o moulo tato them Tsin, har i Israelitarya rhoyedo his oun pal pani gole dan, oun t'mer moukan man gar te sikrap, te hom čačepah o baro oun zorelo Devel, kay nay dell len pani.” Kova his pash o foro Kadesh an o moulo tato them Tsin. Ko pani vas kharedo čingepaskro pani." 
Numbers27:15 Oun o Mose rakras o baro Debleha oun penas: 
Numbers27:16 “Mo ray, tou baro Devel, kolestar o tselo djipen vell, čip i morshes pral i Israelitarya," 
Numbers27:17 yekes, kay djal glan lende vin oun dren, oun anell len vin oun dren, te venn o baro Debleskre menshe gar har bakre, kay len kek bakrengro hi.”" 
Numbers27:18 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Moseste: “Le o Yosua pash toute, koleskro dad o Noun hi. O Yosua hi i morsh, ap koleste miro dourho čiddo hi. Oun čip tire vasta ap leste," 
Numbers27:19 oun an les glan o rashayeste Elazar oun glan i tsele Israelitarya. Oun pen lenge halauterenge, te hi yob kova, kay pal toute lengro ray vell." 
Numbers27:20 Oun de les tiro čačo vast, te shounenn i tsele Israelitarya ap leste." 
Numbers27:21 Oun an tsirya, kay djinell lo gar, hoy te krell, hounte vell lo glan o rashayeste Elazar.
