Kova hounte poučell mandar oun hounte vitsrell kol Debleskre barra, te hatsell lo vin, hoy me, o baro Devel, an kava koova kamau. Yaake te sikrell o Elazar o Yosueske oun i tsele Israelenge, hoy te krenn le.”" 
Numbers27:22 O Mose kras yaake har leske o baro Devel penas, oun las o Yosua, oun moukas les glan o rashayeste Elazar te djal oun glan kol tsele Israelitarya," 
Numbers27:23 oun čivas peskre vasta ap leste, oun čivas les an peskri boudi dren, yaake har o baro Devel leske kova penas." 
Numbers28:1 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers28:2 Pen ap i Israelitarya: T'mer hounte denn yak, te anenn an o čačo tsiro ko koova, hoy denn o Debleste, – ko rhapen, hoy vell leske rhačedo oun koleskro soungepen leske shoukar soungella." 
Numbers28:3 Oun pen ap lende: Kalla hi kol firhe, hoy hounte rhačrenn tseles o baro Debleske: hako dives douy bakre, kay yek bersh phouro oun gar nasselo hi." 
Numbers28:4 Yek bakro taysarlakro, ko vavar ap i rati." 
Numbers28:5 Koy pashel yaake yek kilogrammi lačo yarro, hoy vas khetne dino yek litari djeteha." 
Numbers28:6 Kova hi ko rhapen, hoy te rhačrenn hako dives, yaake har anan les o ersto kopo pash koy berga Sinay. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy pre djal, te vell kova halauter rhačedo an i yag, soungell mishto o baro Debleske." 
Numbers28:7 Koy pashel vell yek litari mool vin čoredo o baro Debleske an leskro kheer. 
Numbers28:8 Ap i rati aness ko vavar terno bakro! Koy pashel o rhapen oun i mool har taysarlakro. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy pre djal, te vell kova halauter rhačedo an i yag, soungella mishto o baro Debleske." 
Numbers28:9 Ap o Debleskro dives aness douy bakre, hoy yek bersh phouro hi. Yon hounte venn gar nasselo. Koy pashel aness douy kilogramme lačo yarro khetne dino djeteha. Ninna čoress mool vin o Debleske." 
Numbers28:10 Kova vell o Debleske hako Debleskro dives anlo. Koy pashel kova, hoy vell leske hako dives rhačedo, oun koy mool, hoy vell leske vin čoredo." 
Numbers28:11 Ap o ersto dives an hako čon hounte rhačrenn t'mer o baro Debleske douy terne morsh groumya, yek morsh bakro oun efta yek-bershengre bakre, kay gar nasselo hi." 
Numbers28:12 Oun pash hako firho denn o Debleste i rhapen dran lačo yarro djeteha: pash i morsh groumni triin kilogramme yarro, pash i morsh bakro douy kilogramme yarro," 
Numbers28:13 oun pash i terno bakro yek kilogrammi yarro. Kava vell rhačedo o baro Debleske. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy djal pre, te vell kova halauter rhačedo an i yag, soungella mishto o baro Debleske." 
Numbers28:14 Oun koy pashel čorenn mool vin o Debleske: douy litarya pash haki terni morsh groumni, yek-te-paash litarya pash i morsh bakro, oun yek litari pash hako terno bakro. Kava vell rhačedo hako nevo čon." 
Numbers28:15 Koy pashel hounte anenn i morsh bouzni o baro Debleske, te vell t'mari doosh krik lino. Kova halauter vell pash kol firhe oun ko yarro oun koy mool, hoy vell hako dives o Debleske anlo." 
Numbers28:16 Ap o deesh-te-starto dives an o ersto čon hi ko dives, hoy hi o baro Debleske, oun hoy kharell Passa." 
Numbers28:17 Oun ap o deesh-te-pančto dives ninna an ko čon, hi ko ersto dives kol efta divessa, kay hounte rhan kek maro dran shoutlo yarro." 
Numbers28:18 Ap o ersto dives hounte venn khetne glan o baro Debleste. Kek hounte boudrell ap ko dives. 
Numbers28:19 Oun hounte rhačrenn o baro Debleske douy terne morsh groumya, yek morsh bakro, oun efta yek-bershengre bakre, kay gar nasselo hi." 
Numbers28:20 Koy pashel ko rhapen dran lačo yarro djeteha: triin kilogramme haki terni morsh groumyake oun douy kilogramme hako morsh bakreske," 
Numbers28:21 oun yek kilogrammi hakeneske kol efta terne bakrendar. 
Numbers28:22 Koy pashel i morsh bouzni, te vell t'mari doosh krik lino oun lauter pale mishto, hoy mank t'mende oun o Debleste tardo his." 
Numbers28:23 Oun kova halauter hounte anenn pash kova pashel, hoy hako dives rhačrenn o Debleske taysarlakro, oun pash koy mool, hoy leske vin čorenn. Yaake hounte krenn hako dives efta divessa. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy djal pre, te vell kova halauter rhačedo an i yag, soungella mishto o baro Debleske." 
Numbers28:24  
Numbers28:25 Ap o eftato dives hounte venn pale khetne, te sharenn o baro Debles. Ap ko dives hounte krenn kek boudi." 
Numbers28:26 Oun ko dives, kay anenn t'mer o baro Debleske ko nevo djobestar, hoy dren anlo vas, ko dives vell t'menge i baro dives, kay venn khetne glan o baro Debleste. Kek boudi hounte krenn t'mer ap ko dives." 
Numbers28:27 Oun hounte rhačrenn o baro Debleske douy terne morsh groumya, yek morsh bakro, oun efta yek-bershengre bakre, kay gar nasselo hi. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy djal pre, te vell kova halauter rhačedo an i yag, soungella mishto o baro Debleske." 
Numbers28:28 Koy pashel ko rhapen dran lačo yarro djeteha: triin kilogramme haki terni morsh groumyake oun douy kilogramme hako morsh bakreske," 
Numbers28:29 oun yek kilogrammi hakeneske kol efta terne bakrendar. 
Numbers28:30 Koy pashel anenn i morsh bouzni, te venn t'mari doosh krik lino." 
Numbers28:31 Oun kova halauter hounte anenn pash kol firhe oun ko yarro oun koy mool, hoy vell hako dives o Debleske anlo. Kol firhe, hoy anenn o Debleske, hounte venn sasto." 
Numbers29:1 Oun ap o ersto dives an o eftato čon hounte venn khetne glan o baro Debleste. Kek boudi hounte krenn ap ko dives. Kava hounte vell t'menge i dives, kay phourdenn i phourdepaskri." 
Numbers29:2 Oun t'mer hounte rhačrenn firhen o Debleske. Oun ko lačo soungepen, hoy pre djal, te venn le rhačedo, soungella mishto o baro Debleske. Kolla hi kol firhe, hoy hounte rhačrenn leske tseles: yek terni morsh groumni, yek morsh bakro, oun efta yek-bershengre bakre, kay gar nasselo hi." 
Numbers29:3 Oun pash hako firheste denn o Debleste i rhapen dran lačo yarro djeteha: pash koy terni morsh groumni triin kilogramme yarro, pash ko morsh bakro douy kilogramme yarro," 
Numbers29:4 oun pash hako terno bakro kol efta terne bakrendar yek kilogrammi yarro. 
Numbers29:5 Koy pashel hounte anenn i morsh bouzni o baro Debleske, te vell t'mari doosh krik lino." 
Numbers29:6 Kova halauter hounte anenn pash kova pashel, hoy rhačrenn hako nevo čon oun hako dives o Debleske, kol firhen oun ko yarro oun koy mool, hoy leske vin čorenn, yaake har glan činlo hi. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy djal pre, te vell kova halauter rhačedo an i yag, soungella mishto o baro Debleske." 
Numbers29:7 Ap o deshto dives an o eftato čon hounte venn khetne glan o baro Debleste. Rhan či ap ko dives! Krenn vitar kek boudi! 
Numbers29:8 Ap ko dives rhačrenn o Debleske firhen. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy djal pre, te venn le tseles rhačedo an i yag, soungella mishto o baro Debleske. Kalla hi kol firhe, hoy hounte rhačrenn: yek terni morsh groumni, yek morsh bakro, efta yek-bershengre bakre, kay gar nasselo hi." 
Numbers29:9 O lačo soungepen, hoy djal pre, te vell kova halauter rhačedo an i yag, soungella mishto o baro Debleske. Oun pash hako firheste denn o Debleste i rhapen dran lačo yarro djeteha: pash koy terni morsh groumni triin kilogramme yarro, pash ko morsh bakro douy kilogramme yarro," 
Numbers29:10 oun pash hako terno bakro kol efta terne bakrendar yek kilogrammi yarro. 
Numbers29:11 Koy pashel hounte anenn i morsh bouzni o baro Debleske, te vell t'mari doosh krik lino. Kova halauter vell pash kova pashel, hoy denn o Debleste ap ko dives: i morsh bouzni i doshake, oun kol firhe, hoy venn leske hako dives rhačedo, khetne ko rhapen dran yarro oun koy mool, hoy vell leske vin čoredo." 
Numbers29:12 Ap o deesh-te-pančto dives an o eftato čon hounte venn khetne glan o baro Debleste. Kek boudi krenn ap ko dives! Krenn i festo o Debleske efta divessa," 
Numbers29:13 oun rhačrenn leske firhen. Oun o lačo soungepen, hoy djal pre, te venn le rhačedo, soungella mishto o baro Debleske. Ap o ersto dives rhačrenn leske deesh-te-triin terne morsh groumya, douy morsh bakre, oun deesh-te-star yek-bershengre bakre, kay gar nasselo hi." 
Numbers29:14 Oun pash hako firheste denn o Debleste i rhapen dran lačo yarro djeteha: pash haki terni morsh groumni kol triin-te-deesh groumyendar triin kilogramme yarro, pash hako morsh bakro kol douy morsh bakrendar douy kilogramme yarro," 
Numbers29:15 oun pash hako terno bakro kol deesh-te-star terne bakrendar yek kilogrammi yarro. 
Numbers29:16 Koy pashel hounte anenn i morsh bouzni o baro Debleske, te vell t'mari doosh krik lino. Pash kova halauter venn kol firhe, hoy venn hako dives o Debleske rhačedo, khetne ko yarreha oun koy molyah, hoy vell koy pashel vin čoredo." 
Numbers29:17 Ap o douyto dives bis ap o eftato dives denn o Debleste kova, hoy leske hako dives hounte vell, oun koy pashel save firhen, kay gar nasselo hi, oun ko rhapen dran yarro oun koy mool, hoy koy pashel vell, yaake har glan činlo hi: ap o douyto dives: deesh-te-douy terne morsh groumya, douy morsh bakre, oun deesh-te-star yek-bershengre bakre, ninna i morsh bouzni i doshake; ap o triinto dives: deesh-te-yek terne morsh groumya, douy morsh bakre, oun deesh-te-star yek-bershengre bakre, ninna i morsh bouzni i doshake; ap o starto dives: deesh terne morsh groumya, douy morsh bakre, oun deesh-te-star yek-bershengre bakre, ninna i morsh bouzni i doshake; ap o pančto dives: enya terne morsh groumya, douy morsh bakre, oun deesh-te-star yek-bershengre bakre, ninna i morsh bouzni i doshake; ap o shobto dives: orhta terne morsh groumya, douy morsh bakre, oun deesh-te-star yek-bershengre bakre, ninna i morsh bouzni i doshake; ap o eftato dives: efta terne gourma, douy morsh bakre, oun deesh-te-star yek-bershengre bakre, ninna i morsh bouzni i doshake;" 
Numbers29:18 Ap o orhtato dives hounte venn khetne oun krenn i festo. Kek boudi hounte krenn ap ko dives. 
Numbers29:19 Oun t'mer hounte rhačrenn firhen o baro Debleske. Oun ko lačo soungepen, hoy pre djal, te venn le rhačedo, soungella mishto o Debleske. Kolla hi kol firhe, hoy hounte rhačrenn leske tseles: yek morsh groumni, yek morsh bakro, oun efta yek-bershengre bakre, kay gar nasselo hi." 
Numbers29:20 Oun pash hako firheste denn o Debleste o yarro oun i mool yaake har glan činlo hi: pash koy morsh groumni, pash ko morsh bakro oun pash hako terno bakro." 
Numbers29:21 Koy pashel hounte anenn i morsh bouzni o baro Debleske, te vell t'mari doosh krik lino. Kova halauter vell pash kol firhe oun ko yarro oun koy mool, hoy vell hako dives o Debleske anlo." 
Numbers29:22 Kova halauter hounte anenn t'mer o baro Debleske ap kol bare divessa, kay venn khetne glan leste. Koy pashel vell kova, hoy denn leste hakeno pestar, ninna kova, hoy dan t'men sovel, te denn les kova: firhe, hoy venn leske tseles rhačedo, djob oun mool, ninna firhe, hoy rhan t'mer khetne glan leste." 
Numbers30:1 Oun o Mose penas kol Israelenge halauter, hoy o baro Devel leske penas." 
Numbers30:2 Oun o Mose rakras lengre pralstunentsa, oun penas: Kava hi kova, hoy o baro Devel kamell, te krenn t'mer kova." 
Numbers30:3 Te penell yek ap o baro Debleste: “Me dau miro lab, te krap kava te kova” oder čivell glan leste i sovel tele, palle hounte phagell yob gar peskro lab oun hounte krell halauter, hoy yob penas." 
Numbers30:4 Te hi i djouvel kote, kay penell ap o baro Debleste: “Me dau man sovel, te krap kava te kova”, yaake rah yoy an ko kheer lakro dadeste hi, oun yoy gar romedino hi," 
Numbers30:5 oun lakro dad shounas lakro labestar, hoy yoy o Debleste das, oun yob penas či koy pre, palle hounte rikrell yoy halauter, kay das li pes sovel pre. Oun halauter, hoy las li ap peste, hounte rikrell li ninna." 
Numbers30:6 Te kamell lakro dad kova gar an ko dives har yob kolestar shounas, palle hounte rikrell yoy gar, hoy das li pes sovel, oun hoy yoy las ap peste. Oun o baro Devel djinell, kay lakro dad gar kamas te krell yoy kova, oun yob hidjrell lake či palla." 
Numbers30:7 Te romedinerell yoy, oun ap late hi i sovel čiddo, ninna te das li pes sovel oun djinas gar, hoy yoy penella, oun pandas pes yaake ap kova, hoy yoy penas," 
Numbers30:8 oun lakro rom penell či koy pre ap ko dives, kay shounell lo kova, palle hounte rikrell yoy peskri sovel, oun hounte krell, hoy li ap peste las." 
Numbers30:9 Te kamell lakro rom kova gar ap ko dives, kay yob kova shounas, palle hounte rikrell yoy koy sovel gar dren, hoy ap late čiddo hi, vitar gar ko lab, ap koleste pandas li pes. Oun o baro Devel hidjrell lake či palla." 
Numbers30:10 Koy sovel, hoy das i romni, kolakro rom meras, ninna i djouvel, kay mouklo vas, halauter, hoy yoy ap peste las, hounte rikrell yoy." 
Numbers30:11 Te dell i djouvel peskro lab an ko kheer peskro romestar, te krell li čomone o Debleske, oun dell pes koy pre sovel," 
Numbers30:12 oun lakro rom shounell kova, oun penell či koy pre, oun penell gar, te hounte krell yoy kova gar, palle hounte rikrell li halauter, ap hoy yoy pes sovel das." 
Numbers30:13 Te penell lakro rom, te krell li kova gar, ap hoy das li pes sovel, ap ko dives, kay yob kova shounas, palle hounte rikrell li gar peskri sovel oun peskro lab. Oun o baro Devel hidjrell lake či palla. Yob djinell, kay lakro rom kova gar kamas." 
Numbers30:14 Lauter, kay i djouvel peskro lab pre das, ninna lakre tsele sobya, kolentsa yoy penas, te rikrell li pes pale čomonestar, nay hadell lakro rom pre oder moukell kova yaake." 
Numbers30:15 Te penell yob či koy pre bis ap ko vavar dives, sikrell yob, te nay krell li kova, ap hoy yoy pes sovel das, oun hoy yoy ap peste las." 
Numbers30:16 Te shounas yob kova, oun hadas kova pal yek tsiro pre, hounte hidjrell yob lakri doosh." 
Numbers30:17 Kolla hi kol laba, hoy o baro Devel o Moseske penas, har te vell mashkral o morsheste oun i djouvyate, mashkral o dadeste oun i čate, yaake rah har koy čay gar romedino hi oun djivell an lakro dadeskro kheer." 
Numbers31:1 O baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers31:2 “De kol Midianaryen ko čilačepen pale, hoy kran le ap i Israelitaryen! Oun pal kova vell ko dives, kay mereh tou.”" 
Numbers31:3 Koy penas o Mose ap i Israelitaryen: “Lenn lourden t'mendar, te kourenn yon pen kolentsa dran Midian. Yaake te lenn kol Midianarya pengri phagi, hoy o baro Devel len dell." 
Numbers31:4 Lenn yek zero morshen dran hakeneste kol deesh-te-douy bare familyendar, hoy venn o Yakobeskre čavendar, oun bičrenn len an o kourepen.” Oun yaake kran le, oun 12.000 (deesh-te-douy-zerya) morsha van khetne kourepaske." 
Numbers31:5  
Numbers31:6 Oun o Mose bičras len an o kourepen. Lentsa djas o Pinhas, koleskro dad o rashay Elazar his. Oun o Pinhas las o Debleskro koova peha, ninna kol kourepaskre phourdepangre." 
Numbers31:7 Oun yon djan an o kourepen an o them Midian, te kourenn le pen lentsa, yaake har o baro Devel kova o Moseske penas, oun dan i tsele morshen kote moulo." 
Numbers31:8 Ninna maran le kol panč bare rayen pral i Midianarya. Yon kharan Evi, Rekem, Sur, Hour, oun Reba. Ninna dan le o Bileames o rhareha moulo, koleskro dad o Beor his." 
Numbers31:9 Oun kol Israelitarya pandan kol djouvyen foun kol Midianarya oun lengre čaven. Lengre firhe, oun halauter, hoy len hi, čoran yon." 
Numbers31:10 Oun rhačran lengre tsele forya, lengre khera oun plarhtene khera, kay yon djivan." 
Numbers31:11 Oun yon lan ko tselo čoredo koova, oun halauter, hoy yon nay lan, menshe oun firhe," 
Numbers31:12 oun anan len pash o Moseste oun o rashayeste, o Elazar, oun pash i tsele vavar Israelitarya. Kolla his ap pengri platsa pash o pani Yordan an o telstouno them, kay kol Moabarya djivan, vergel o foro Yericho." 
Numbers31:13 Oun o Mose oun o rashay Elazar oun kol vavar pralstoune djan pash lende, vin glan i platsa." 
Numbers31:14 Oun o Mose vas rhoyedo pral i pralstoune lourdende oun pral kol pralstoune pral i zerya oun pral sheel lourdende, kay dran o kourepen van." 
Numbers31:15 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Hoske moukan t'mer i tsele djouvyen djido? 
Numbers31:16 Ma bistrenn, te his kol djouvya, kay kran, hoy o Bileam lenge penas, oun tserdan i Israelitaryen o baro Deblestar krik, yaake te nashan le o rhorheno debles Baal-Peor palla. Doleske vas ko baro nasslepen ap o Debleskre menshende." 
Numbers31:17 Kanna, denn moulo kol tsele morsh čaven, oun kol tsele djouvyen, kolen i rom his." 
Numbers31:18 Kol tsele ča, kay van kek morshestar an-tapedo, kolen moukenn t'menge djido!" 
Numbers31:19 Oun t'mer halauter, kay dan yekes moulo oder kay tapran i moules an, ačenn efta divessa glan koy platsa, kay t'mare plarhtene khera hi. Ap o triinto dives oun ap o eftato dives thovenn t'men yaake har glan činlo hi, te venn pale djoudjo oun erligo. Ninna kol ča, kay lan t'menge pandlo, hounte thovenn pen yaake." 
Numbers31:20 Ninna kol tsele ripaskre koola, oun halauter, hoy dran ledera, bouzyengro bal oun kasht kerdo vas, hounte vell djoudjo kerdo.”" 
Numbers31:21 Oun o Elazar, ko rashay, penas ap kol lourdende, kay his an o kourepen: “Kova hounte vell yaake kerdo, har o baro Devel kova o Moseske penas." 
Numbers31:22 Ko koova dran sonakay, roup, lolo saster, saster, cinno oun blayo," 
Numbers31:23 oun halauter, hoy i yag gar pre rhačrell, kova hounte rikrenn an i yag, te vell kova djoudjo. Oun pal kova vitsrenn pani koy pre. Oun kova halauter, hoy rhačrals pre an i yag, čivenn an o pani." 
Numbers31:24 Oun t'mer hounte thovenn t'mare ripaskre koola ap o eftato dives. Palle venn t'mer djoudjo. Pal kova nay venn pale ap i platsa, kay i plarhtene khera tardo hi.”" 
Numbers31:25 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers31:26 “Le kol tsele menshen oun kol firhen, kay tapran, kay krik anlo van, pash t'mende pre, tou oun ko rashay Elazar oun kol pralstoune pral i bare familyende." 
Numbers31:27 oun de i paash kolende, kay his an o kourepen, oun kol vavar paash de i vavar Israelitaryen." 
Numbers31:28 Oun kolla, kay his an o kourepen, hounte denn čomone o baro Debleske. Kolestar, hoy yon pandles lan, le yek menshes hake panč-shelendar oun yek firho hake panč-shelendar, i groumyendar, i bakrendar oun foun i bourike. Oun de les o rashayeste Elazar, te dell yob kova o baro Debleste." 
Numbers31:29  
Numbers31:30 Kol vavar Israelitarya hounte denn ninna čomone o Debleske. Lendar less tou yek menshes hake paash-shelendar oun yek firho hake paash-shelendar, i groumyendar, i bakrendar, foun i bourike, oun i tsele vavar firhendar, oun hounte dess len kol Levitaryen, kay krenn pengri boudi ap o Debleskro kheer.”" 
Numbers31:31 O Mose oun o rashay Elazar kran yaake har o baro Devel kova o Moseske penas. 
Numbers31:32 Oun kova, hoy i lourde tapran oun hoy djido ačas his 675.000 (shob-sheel-efta-deesh-te-panč-zerya) bakre." 
Numbers31:33 72.000 (efta-douy-zerya) groumya," 
Numbers31:34 61.000 (shob-deesh-te-yek zerya) bourike," 
Numbers31:35 32.000 (triyanda-te-douy-zerya) djouvya, kay kek morshestar an-tapedo van." 
Numbers31:36 Oun ko paash, kay kolenge hi, kay an o kourepen djan, his 337.500 (triin-sheel-triyanda-te-efta-zerya-panč-sheel) bakre." 
Numbers31:37 Kolendar hounte dan yon o baro Debleste 675 (shob-sheel-efta-deesh-te-panč) bakre. 
Numbers31:38 Ninna 36.000 (triyanda-te-shob-zerya) groumya. Kolendar hounte dan yon o baro Debleske 72 (efta-deesh-te-douy) groumya. 
Numbers31:39 Ninna 30.500 (triyanda-zerya-te-panč-sheel) bourike. Kolendar hounte dan yon o baro Debleste 61 (shob-deesh-te-yek). 
Numbers31:40 Ninna 16.000 (deesh-te-shob-zerya) djouvya. Kolendar dan le o baro Debleste 32 (triyanda-te-douy). 
Numbers31:41 Oun o Mose das kova, hoy dan kolla leske o baro Debleske, ko rashayeste Elazar, yaake har o baro Devel leske kova penas." 
Numbers31:42 Ko vavar paash, hoy o Mose ap i rig čivas kol vavar Israelenge, his yaake baro har kol lourdengro paash." 
Numbers31:43  
Numbers31:44  
Numbers31:45  
Numbers31:46  
Numbers31:47 Oun o Mose las kolestar, hoy i Israelengre hi, o 50. (paash-sheelto) kotar hake firhendar oun hake menshendar, oun das len kol Levitaryen, kay boudrenn ap o Debleskro kheer, yaake har o baro Devel kova o Moseske penas." 
Numbers31:48 Oun pash o Moseste van kolla, kay penepaske hi pral kol boud lourdende, kol pralstoune pral i zero lourdende oun pral i sheel lourdende," 
Numbers31:49 oun penan ap leste: “Mer, tire boudepangre, lan pre, har boud lourde koy hi, kay men pral lende penepaske hi; oun halauter his koy." 
Numbers31:50 Doleske anah mer o baro Debleske ko sonakaskro koova, hoy hakeno mendar hatsas: brassleta, vastengre verklia, goustria, kanengre oun verklia. Mer dah kova o baro Debleste, te playsras maro djipaske, te vell či tardo mank o baro Debleste oun mende.”" 
Numbers31:51 O Mose oun o rashay Elazar lan ko tselo sonakaskro koova. 
Numbers31:52 Oun ko tselo sonakay, kay kol pralstoune o baro Debleske anan, his 200 (douy-sheel) kilogramme pharo." 
Numbers31:53 Kol lourde, kay his kek pralstoune, rikran penge kova, hoy tapran yon an o kourepen." 
Numbers31:54 O Mose oun ko rashay Elazar lan ko sonakay kol pralstunendar oun anan kova an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer, te bistrell o baro Devel gar, te dikell lo lačes ap i Israelitarya." 
Numbers32:1 I menshen dran o kheer Ruben oun dran o kheer Gad his boud firhe. Oun yon dikan, te hi lačo zenlepen i firhenge an ko them Yaser oun Gilead." 
Numbers32:2 Koy van le pash o Moseste oun ko rashayeste Elazar oun pash kol pralstunende pral i Israelitarya, oun penan ap lende:" 
Numbers32:3 “Ko them pash kol forya Atarot, Dibon, Yaser, Nimra, Heshbon, Elale, Sibma, Nebo, oun Beon," 
Numbers32:4 hoy las o baro Devel dren peskre menshenge Israel, kote hi boud zenlepen i firhenge, oun men, tire boudepangren, hi firhe." 
Numbers32:5 Te hal menge lačo, de men kava them, te hounte djas mer gar pral o pani Yordan.”" 
Numbers32:6 O Mose penas ap lende: “T'mare phrala hounte djan an o kourepen, oun t'mer kamenn kate te ačell?" 
Numbers32:7 Te krenn kova, lenn i vavar Israelitarya daar oun kamenn gar an ko them te djal, kay o baro Devel len della." 
Numbers32:8 Yaake kran ninna t'mare phoure, har me len vin bičrom dran Kadesh-Barnea, te dikenn le pal, har ko them hi." 
Numbers32:9 Oun har yon koy pre van pash ko pani Eshkol, oun dikan ko them, van le pale pale oun rakran yaake i Israelentsa, te lan yon daar, oun kaman gar an ko them te djal, kay kamas o baro Devel lende te dell." 
Numbers32:10 Oun o baro Debleskri rholi vas baro an ko tsiro, oun yob das pes sovel oun penas:" 
Numbers32:11 Kova hi čačo, hoy penau: Kalla menshe, kay dran o them Egiptia vin djan, oun hi biish bersha oun phoureder, dikenn ko them gar, kay dom man sovel, te dap les o Abrahameste, o Isaakeste, oun o Yakobeste. Yon djan mantsa gar o djiyeha." 
Numbers32:12 Kokres o Kaleb, koleskro dad o Yefunne hi, kol menshendar Kenas, oun o Yosua, koleskro dad o Noun hi, venn kote dren. Yon djan mantsa o tselo djiyeha." 
Numbers32:13 Yaake vas o baro Debleskri rholi pral i Israelitarya, oun yob moukas len trouyel te djal an o moulo tato them star-deesh bersha, bis te kek bouder koy his kol tsele menshendar, kay rhoyran o baro Debles." 
Numbers32:14 Oun kanna krenn t'mer ko emligo koova! T'mer han čače čave t'mare dadendar! Morsha, kay o Debleskro drom tele djan oun krenn, te vell o baro Debleskri rholi pral Israel bareder." 
Numbers32:15 Te djan t'mer lestar krik, moukell yob kal menshen i rah tsiro an o moulo tato them, oun t'men hi doosh, te djan le halauter tele.”" 
Numbers32:16 Koy van yon glan pash leste, oun penan: “Mer kamah kate khera te krell mare bakrenge, oun forya mare čavenge." 
Numbers32:17 Palle djah mer khetne mare phralentsa an o kourepen. Mer djah glan lende, bis te anam len an lengro them. An ko tsiro ačenn mare čave an kol zorele forya, te krenn lenge kol menshen an kava them či." 
Numbers32:18 Mer kamah gar khere te djal, bis te hako Israelitari peskro kotar them las." 
Numbers32:19 Mer kamah gar lentsa i kotar them te lell ap i vavar rig o panyestar Yordan. Maro them lah ap kay rig o panyestar Yordan, kay o kham pre djal.”" 
Numbers32:20 O Mose penas ap lende: “Te kamenn t'mer kova čačepah te krell, palle lenn t'mare rhare oun hoy t'men hounte vell kourepaske, oun djan an o kourepen glan o baro Debleste!" 
Numbers32:21 Oun djan vergel o pani Yordan glan o baro Debleskre yaka, oun ačenn kote, bis te tradell yob kolen glan peste vin, kay kourenn pen t'mentsa," 
Numbers32:22 oun bis te hi lo o ray pral ko them. Koy pal nay djan t'mer pale pale, oun kek doosh lan t'mer ap t'mende glan o baro Debleste oun glan Israel. Oun o them ap kay rig kate vell t'mende dino glan o baro Debleste." 
Numbers32:23 Te kamenn t'mer kova gar te krell, palle lenn i doosh ap t'mende glan o baro Debleste. Oun kova dikenn t'mer, te vell koy phagi ap t'mende." 
Numbers32:24 Čivenn kanna forya pre t'mare čavenge oun barra troul kol platse, kay t'mare firhe hi, oun krenn, hoy t'mer penan.”" 
Numbers32:25 “Maro ray, mer krah, har tou penal,” penan kol morsha dran o kheer Gad oun dran o kheer Ruben." 
Numbers32:26 “Mare čave oun djouvya, halauter hoy men hi, oun mare tsele firhe ačenn an kol forya an o them Gilead." 
Numbers32:27 Mer, t'mare boudepangre, lah mare rhare oun djah i vavar lourdentsa an o kourepen glan o baro Debleste, har tou, maro ray, penal.”" 
Numbers32:28 Koy penas o Mose ap o rashayeste Elazar oun ap o Yosua, koleskro dad o Noun his, oun ap kol pralstunende pral i bare familye:" 
Numbers32:29 “Te djan i morsha dran o kheer Gad oun dran o kheer Ruben t'mentsa vergel o Yordan, oun kourenn pen yaake rah glan o baro Debleste, bis te ko them t'menge hi, yaake denn lende ko them Gilead, te vell kova lenge." 
Numbers32:30 Djan yon gar t'mentsa vergel o pani Yordan an o kourepen, yaake lenn yon i kotar them mashkral t'mende an ko them Kanaan.”" 
Numbers32:31 I morsha dran o kheer Gad oun dran o kheer Ruben penan pale: “Yaake har o baro Devel menge penas, krah mer." 
Numbers32:32 Mer lah mare rhare oun djah glan o baro Debleste an o them Kanaan, te las maro kotar them kate ap kay rig o panyestar Yordan.”" 
Numbers32:33 Yaake das o Mose kol menshen dran o kheer Gad oun dran o kheer Ruben oun ko paash kol menshendar dran o kheer Manasse, kay o Yosefeskro čavo his, ko them, kay o Sihon o baro ray pral i Amorarya his oun ko them, kay o Og o baro ray pral Bashan his. Yob das len o tselo them oun kol forya koy dren." 
Numbers32:34 Oun i morsha dran o kheer Gad kran kol forya Dibon, Atarot, Aroer," 
Numbers32:35 Atrot-Shofan, Yaser, Yogboha" 
Numbers32:36 Bet-Nimra oun Bet-Haran, halauter zorele forya; oun yon čivan barra pre troul kol platse, kay lengre bakre hi." 
Numbers32:37 I morsha dran o kheer Ruben kran kol forya Heshbon, Elale, Kiryatayim," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo, Baal-Meon oun Sibma oun dan kol foryen, kay yon kran, neve laba." 
Numbers32:39 Oun i morsha dran o kheer Makir, koleskro dad o Manasse his, djan an o them Gilead, kouran pen kol menshentsa koy, lan ko them penge oun tradan kol Amoraryen krik, kay koy dren djivan." 
Numbers32:40 Koy das o Mose ko morshes Makir ko them Gilead, oun yob djivas koy." 
Numbers32:41 O Yayr, koleskro dad o Manasse his, djas koy, oun las gaba peske dren oun das len ko lab Yayreskre gaba." 
Numbers32:42 O Noba djas koy, oun las o foro Kenat peske dren oun kol gaba trouyel, oun das les ko lab Noba, yaake har yob kharell." 
Numbers33:1 Kalla hi kol platse, kay čivan i Israelitarya pengre plarhtene khera pre, har djan le vin dran o them Egiptia pengre lourdentsa. Vi las len o Mose oun o Aron." 
Numbers33:2 Oun yaake har o baro Devel o Moseske penas, činas kova pre, havo drom yon djan oun ap have platse yon ačan. Kalla hi kol platse, kay yon pengre plarhtene khera pre čivan ap lengro drom." 
Numbers33:3 Yon djan dran o foro Ramses ap o 15. (deesh-te-pančto) dives an o ersto čon. Kova his o douyto dives kol bare divessa Passa. Peskro zorelo vasteha anas len o baro Devel vin glan i yaka kol tsele Egiptarya," 
Numbers33:4 har kolla pengre phoureder morsh čaven paskran, kolen o baro Devel maras mashkral lende. Yaake sikras lo i Egiptarende, te hi lo zorleder har lengre debla." 
Numbers33:5 Dran o foro Ramses djan i Israelitarya an o foro Soukot," 
Numbers33:6 oun kotar doureder an Etam. Kova hi pash o moulo tato them čiddo. 
Numbers33:7 Dran Etam djan le doureder oun ačan an Pi-Hahirot, kay vergel o foro Baal-Zefon hi oun čivan pengre plarhtene khera pre glan Migdol." 
Numbers33:8 Dran Pi-Hahirot djan le vin oun djan mashkral o baro pani an o moulo tato them. Oun pal triin divessa an o moulo tato them Etam van le an Mara. 
Numbers33:9 Dran Mara djan le vin oun van an Elim. Koy his 12 (deesh-te-douy) panya pipaske oun 70 (efta-deesh) palmtikre rouka. Oun kote čivan le pengre plarhtene khera pre. 
Numbers33:10 Dran Elim djan le doureder oun čivan pengre plarhte khera pre pash o Baro Lolo Pani. 
Numbers33:11 Kotar djan yon doureder oun djivan i tsiro an o moulo tato them Sin. 
Numbers33:12 Dran o moulo tato them Sin djan le doureder oun van an Dofka," 
Numbers33:13 foun kotar an Aloush," 
Numbers33:14 foun kotar an Refidim. Koy his i menshen kek pani pipaske. 
Numbers33:15 Dran Refidim djan le doureder oun djivan i tsiro an o moulo tato them Sinay. 
Numbers33:16 Foun kotar djan le doureder oun van an Kibrot-Taava," 
Numbers33:17 pal kova an Hazerot," 
Numbers33:18 an Ritma," 
Numbers33:19 an Rimmon-Perez," 
Numbers33:20 an Libna," 
Numbers33:21 an Rissa," 
Numbers33:22 an Kehelata," 
Numbers33:23 pash i berga Shefer," 
Numbers33:24 palle an Harada," 
Numbers33:25 an Makelot," 
Numbers33:26 an Tahat," 
Numbers33:27 an Tera," 
Numbers33:28 an Mitka," 
Numbers33:29 an Hashmona," 
Numbers33:30 an Moserot," 
Numbers33:31 an Bene-Yaakan," 
Numbers33:32 an Hor-Gidgad," 
Numbers33:33 an Yotbata," 
Numbers33:34 an Abrona," 
Numbers33:35 an Ezyon-Geber," 
Numbers33:36 an Kadesh, hoy hi čiddo an o moulo tato them Tsin." 
Numbers33:37 Oun palle van le pash koy berga Hor, hoy hi čiddo ap i rig pash ko them Edom." 
Numbers33:38 Kote djas ko rashay Aron ap koy berga Hor, har o baro Devel leske kova penas, oun meras kote an o star-deshto bersh, har kol Israelitarya dran o them Egiptia vin djan, ap o ersto dives an o pančto čon," 
Numbers33:39 har yob 123 (sheel-biish-te-triin) bersha phouro his. 
Numbers33:40 Oun ko baro ray pral i Kanaanitarya, kay djivas an o foro Arad ap koy rig o themestar, kay o kham pralstounes hi, yob shounas, kay kol Israelitarya van." 
Numbers33:41 Oun foun koy berga Hor djan yon doureder oun van an Zalmona," 
Numbers33:42 palle an Pounon," 
Numbers33:43 oun palle an Obot," 
Numbers33:44 oun an Iye-Abarim. hoy hi čiddo an ko them Moab. 
Numbers33:45 Kotar djan le doureder oun van an Dibon-Gad," 
Numbers33:46 oun an Almon-Diblatayim. 
Numbers33:47 Foun kotar van le an kol berge Abarim, vergel o foro Nebo ap koy rig, kay o kham pre djal." 
Numbers33:48 Palle van le an ko telstouno them pash o pani Yordan, vergel o foro Yericho. Kote djivan i Moabarya." 
Numbers33:49 Kote an o telstouno them Moab čivan i Israelitarya pengre plarhtene khera pre pash o pani Yordan, mank Bet-Yeshimot oun Abel-Shittim." 
Numbers33:50 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha an o telstouno them Moab pash o pani Yordan, ap i vavar rig o forestar Yericho oun penas:" 
Numbers33:51 “Rake kol Israelentsa oun pen lenge: Ap ko tsiro, kay djan t'mer pral o pani Yordan an o them Kanaan," 
Numbers33:52 hounte tradenn kol tsele menshen, kay djivenn kote, glan t'mende krik. Oun lengre tsele barrengre oun sasterne deblen, hoy kran yon penge, krenn paash, ninna kol pre-čidde barra." 
Numbers33:53 Oun lenn ko them t'menge, oun djivenn kote dren. Kava them dom me t'mende, te lenn kova t'menge." 
Numbers33:54 Oun t'mer hounte denn hakenes i kotar them. Vitsrenn i barhtyakre barra, te hatsenn vin, have menshe havo kotar them lenna. Kal familyen, kolen boud menshe hi, hounte denn boud them. Oun kol familyen, kolen gar boud menshe hi, hounte denn gar yaake boud." 
Numbers33:55 Te tradenn t'mer gar kol menshen krik, kay djivenn an ko them, palle doukrenn t'men kolla, kay t'mer djido moukan, har i kasht an o yak, oun har i čoupni, kolah i groumni glan tradedo vell. Oun yon krenn t'menge o djipen phares an ko them kay t'mer djivenna." 
Numbers33:56 Palle krau t'mentsa yaake har kamom kol vavarentsa te krell.” 
Numbers34:1 O baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers34:2 Pen ap kol Israelitarya: Djan an o them Kanaan! Ko them vell t'menge yek rigyatar ap i vavar: Kolla hi i rigya: 
Numbers34:3 Ap i čači rig djal t'maro them bis pash o moulo them Tsin oun bis pash o them Edom. I čači rig djal foun o Londo Baro Pani, kotar, kay o kham pre djal," 
Numbers34:4 bis pash i berga Akrabbim pre, oun kotar doureder an Tsin, oun pale doureder bis pash Kadesh-Barnea an o Negev oun bis Hazar-Addar, oun Azmon." 
Numbers34:5 Foun Azmon djal ko them bis pash koy tala, pal late o them Egiptia hi, oun doureder bis pash o Mashkralstouno Baro Pani." 
Numbers34:6 Kote, kay o kham tele djal, djal t'maro them bis pash o Mashkralstouno Baro Pani." 
Numbers34:7 Ap koy servi rig djal t'maro them foun o Mashkralstouno Baro Panyestar bis pash koy berga Hor. 
Numbers34:8 Oun kotar doureder bis kote, kay djal an Hamat, oun doureder pash Zedad," 
Numbers34:9 oun doureder bis Sifron oun bis Hazar-Enan. Kova hi i servi rig t'maro themestar. 
Numbers34:10 Oun ap koy rig, kay o kham pre djal, djal t'maro them foun Hazar-Enan bis Shefam." 
Numbers34:11 Oun doureder tele foun Shefam bis Ribla. Kova hi ap kay rig o forestar Ayin, kay o kham pre djal. Pal kova djal tele kol tikne berge pash o pani Génésareth, kote, kay o kham pre djal," 
Numbers34:12 oun doureder tele bis pash o pani Yordan oun bis pash o Londo Baro Pani. Kova hi t'maro them peskre rigyentsa koy trouyel. 
Numbers34:13 Palle penas o Mose ap kol Israelitarya: “Kol menshe dran o kheer Ruben, dran o kheer Gad, oun ko paash kol menshendar dran o kheer Manasse lan pengro kotar them ap kay rig o panyestar Yordan, vergel o forestar Yericho, ap koy rig, kay o kham pre djala. Kava kate hi ko them, kay lenn t'mer vavar. Yaake kamell kova o baro Devel. Vitsrenn barhtyakre barra te hatsenn vin, koon havo kotar lella.”" 
Numbers34:14  
Numbers34:15  
Numbers34:16 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers34:17 Kalla hi kol laba kol morshendar, kay denn hakenes t'mendar i kotar them: ko rashay Elazar oun o Yosua, koleskro dad o Noun hi." 
Numbers34:18 Koy pashel hounte lenn yek pralstouno dran hako kheer o Yakobeskre čavendar, te denn le hakenes i kotar them." 
Numbers34:19 Oun kalla hi kol laba kol morshendar: dran o kheer Youda: Kaleb, koleskro dad hi o Yefunne; dran o kheer Simeon: Shemuel, koleskro dad hi o Ammihoud; dran o kheer Benyamin: Elidad, koleskro dad hi o Kislon; dran o kheer Dan: Boukki, koleskro dad hi o Yogli; dran o kheer Manasse: Hanniel, koleskro dad hi o Efod; dran o kheer Efrayim: Kemuel, koleskro dad hi o Shiftan; dran o kheer Zabulon: Elizafan, koleskro dad hi o Parnak; dran o kheer Issakar: Paltiel, koleskro dad hi o Asan; dran o kheer Asser: Ahihoud, koleskro dad hi o Shelomi; dran o kheer Naftali: Pedahel, koleskro dad hi o Ammihoud." 
Numbers34:20  
Numbers34:21  
Numbers34:22  
Numbers34:23  
Numbers34:24  
Numbers34:25  
Numbers34:26  
Numbers34:27  
Numbers34:28  
Numbers34:29 Kal morshenge penas o baro Devel, te denn le kol Israelitaryen lengro kotar them an ko them Kanaan." 
Numbers35:1 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha an o telstouno them Moab pash o pani Yordan, ap i vavar rig o forestar Yericho, oun yob penas:" 
Numbers35:2 Pen ap kol Israelende: T'mer lenna them oun forya. Denn kol foryendar ninna forya kolende dran o kheer Levi, kay yon nay djivenn. Denn lende ninna them lengre firhenge, ko themestar, hoy troul kol forya hi," 
Numbers35:3 te hi len forya, kay djivenn le oun them lengre firhenge, kay lengre groumya, bakre oun vavar firhe nay rhana." 
Numbers35:4 Ko them i firhenge, hoy glan kol forya hi, hoy t'mer kol Levitaryen denna, hounte djal vin o forestar 500 metarya an hake star rigya, yaake te vell i platsa, kay haki rig 1.000 yek zero metarya baro hi, oun o foro hi mashkral dren." 
Numbers35:5  
Numbers35:6 Kol foryendar, kay denn t'mer kol Levitaryen, hounte venn shob forya save menshenge koy, kay dan yekes moulo oun hounte nashenn penge. Kolla nay nashenn an kol forya dren. Koy pashel hounte denn lenge 42 (star-deesh-te-douy) vavar forya." 
Numbers35:7 Kol tsele forya, kay t'mer kol Levitaryen denna, hi khetne 48 (star-deesh-ta-orhta). Koy pashel vell ko them i firhenge." 
Numbers35:8 Hakeni kol deesh-te-douy bare familyendar an Israel hounte dell lenge peskre foryendar. Kolen, kay boud them oun forya hi, kolla hounte denn i Levitaryen boudeder forya har kolla, kay len gar boud hi." 
Numbers35:9 Oun o baro Devel rakras o Moseha oun penas: 
Numbers35:10 Rake kol Israelentsa oun pen ap lende: Te venn t'mer vergel o pani Yordan, an ko them Kanaan," 
Numbers35:11 hounte rodenn t'mer forya vin, kay nay hakeno dren djala, kay naashepaskro hi, oun yekes moulo das, oun kamas kova gar." 
Numbers35:12 Oun kol forya hi savenge, kay hounte khatrenn pen kolendar, kay kamenn o rat kol marede menshendar ap lengro shero pale te anell. Yaake hounte merell kova gar, kay das yekes moulo, bis te yob glan i tsillo tardo hi, glan kolende, kay rakrenn o čačepen pral leste vin." 
Numbers35:13 Oun kol forya, kay hako naashepaskro nay djal koy dren, hounte venn shob forya," 
Numbers35:14 triin ap kay rig o panyestar Yordan, oun triin an o them Kanaan." 
Numbers35:15 Kal shob forya hi kol Israelenge oun kol menshenge, kay pash t'mende djivenn, ninna te hi le gar t'mendar, te nay nashenn kolla kote, kay dan yekes moulo, oun kaman kova gar." 
Numbers35:16 Te das yek i vavares mit i kotar saster yaake, te merell yob, hi lo i marepaskro oun hounte vell moulo dino." 
Numbers35:17 Vitsras yob i barreha ap leste, hoy bares doha hi, te nay marell lo yekes, oun kova meras koy pre, hi lo i marepaskro oun hounte vell moulo dino." 
Numbers35:18 Das yob yekes i kashteha yaake, te meras kova koy pre, hi lo i marepaskro oun hounte vell moulo dino." 
Numbers35:19 Kova, kay les an peskre vasta hi, te anell lo o rat o moulo morshestar ap o marepaskro shero, kova hounte marell kol marepaskres. Kay yob les taprella, hounte dell lo les moulo." 
Numbers35:20 Te das yek i vavares dran rholi i ladini oder vitsras čorrhanes čomone ap leste, te meras kova," 
Numbers35:21 oder te das yob les dran rholi o vasteha yaake, te meras kova, palle hounte vell kova, kay das les, maredo. Yob hi i marepaskro. Kova, kay les an peskre vasta hi, te anell lo o rat o moulo morshestar ap o marepaskro shero, kova hounte marell kol marepaskres. Kay yob les taprella, hounte dell lo les moulo." 
Numbers35:22 Hi vavarčandes yekeha, kay das yekes i ladini oun kamas kova gar, oun les hi kek rholi ap leste, oder vitsras čomone ap leste, oun kras kova gar bisemake," 
Numbers35:23 oder vitsras i bar ap leste, kay nay merell koy pre, oun yob dikas kova gar, oun ko vavar merell, oun les his kek rholi ap leste oun kamas les kek čilačepen te krell." 
Numbers35:24 Palle hounte vell lo glan i tsillo anlo glan kolende, kay rakrenn o čačepen vin mank ko morsheste oun koleste, kay kamell o rat o moulo morshestar pale te anell ap o shero kolestar, kay maras les." 
Numbers35:25 Oun i Israelitarya hounte lenn kava morshes vin dran o vast kolestar, kay kamell les te marell, oun hounte anenn les pale pale an ko foro, kay nashas lo peske dren. Oun yob hounte ačell koy, bis ko pralstouno rashay meras, kay vas o Debleskro djeteha dren maklo." 
Numbers35:26 Djal ko marepaskro dran ko foro vin, kay nashas lo peske dren," 
Numbers35:27 oun ko morsh, kay kamell les te marell, hatsell les vin glan o naashepangro foro, oun dell les moulo, palle anas yob kek doosh ap peste." 
Numbers35:28 Ko naashepaskro hounte ačas an ko foro, bis te ko pralstouno rashay moulo hi. Pal leskro merepen nay djal yob khere an peskro them." 
Numbers35:29 Kal laba hounte venn čačepaskre laba t'menge, ap kolende hounte rikrenn hako tsiro, kay t'mer ninna djivenna." 
Numbers35:30 Koon i menshes moulo das, koles hounte denn moulo, te hi menshe koy, kay dikan oun penan kova. Hi gar doha, te penell yek mensho kokres, hoy lo dikas, yaake te vell ko vavar maredo." 
Numbers35:31 Te das yob čačepah yekes moulo, nay ginell lo pes gar vin. T'mer hounte lenn kek love lestar, vitar gar leskre menshendar. Maredo hounte vell lo." 
Numbers35:32 Oun kova, kay nashas an ko naashepangro foro, nay ginell pes gar vin, te djal lo khere. Yob hounte ačell koy, bis te ko pralstouno rashay meras." 
Numbers35:33 Ma krenn ko them pale-čiddo, kay djivenn! Pale-čiddo vell ko them dran o rat, hoy ratell, te vell yek maredo. Kokres ko rateha kolestar, kay maras yekes, nay vell o them pale djoudjo." 
Numbers35:34 Krenn ko them gar pale-čiddo, kay djivenn t'mer, oun kay ninna me djivau. Me hom o baro Devel, oun djivau mashkral t'mende." 
Numbers36:1 Oun i pralstoune pral i menshende, kay venn pal o Gilead, van pash o Moseste. O Gileadeskro dad his o Makir, oun leskro papo his o Manasse dran o kheer Yosef. Kal pralstoune rakran o Moseha oun kol vavar pralstunentsa i menshendar Israel," 
Numbers36:2 oun penan: “O baro Devel penas touke, maro rayeske, te vell ko them i Israelitaryen yaake dino, har i barhtyakre barra sikrenn, te vell kova lenge. Ninna penas lo touke, te dess ko them, hoy maro phrales, o Selofades his, leskre čende." 
Numbers36:3 Te romedinerell yek kol menshendar Israel i čat o morshestar Selofad, vell lakro them pash ko them kol menshendar lakro romestar. Oun ko them mare phourendar vell tikneder." 
Numbers36:4 Te vell kanna ko bersh, kay lell hakeno pale, hoy glan i tsiro leskro his, palle vell ko them kol čendar hako tsireske kol menshenge, kolendar lengre romma hi. Oun yaake vell ko them mare menshendar tikneder.”" 
Numbers36:5 O Mose penas i Israelenge, hoy o baro Devel leske an kava koova penas: Kol menshe dran o kheer Yosef rakran o čačepen." 
Numbers36:6 Kava hi, hoy o baro Devel rakras pral kol čende o morshestar Selofad, hoy te kras mer. Yob penas: Mouk len romedinerell, har yon kova kamenna. Kokres yek koova hounte rikrenn le dren: Lengre romma hounte venn kol menshendar lengro dadestar." 
Numbers36:7 Kek them te perell koy yek bari familyatar ap i vavar familyate. Hako Israelitari rikrell ap peskro kotar them an o them kol menshendar peskro dadestar. 
Numbers36:8 Oun kol tsele ča, kay lenn i kotar them mashkral kol menshende Israel, hounte romedinerenn yekes kol menshendar lengro dadestar, te rikrell hakeno mashkral kol Israelitarya ko them leskre phourendar." 
Numbers36:9 Yaake djal kek kotar them kol yek menshendar ap i vavarende. Hakeno kol 12 bare familyendar an Israel hounte rikrell zoreles peskro them. 
Numbers36:10 Yaake har o baro Devel kova o Moseske penas, kran kol ča o morshestar Selofad:" 
Numbers36:11 I Mala, i Tirza, i Hogla, i Milka, oun i Noa romedineran kol čaven lengre kakendar." 
Numbers36:12 dran o kheer Manasse, koleskro dad o Yosef his. Yaake ačas lengro kotar them pash kol menshende lengro dadestar." 
Numbers36:13 Kalla hi kol čačepaskre laba, kay o baro Devel o Moseske penas, te rikrenn pen i Israelitarya ap lende. Yob penas len lenge an o telstouno them Moab pash o pani Yordan, vergel o foro Yericho." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Kalla hi i laba, hoy o Mose ap i tsele Israelitarya penas, har his le an o moulo tato them ap i vavar rig o panyestar Yordan, an ko telstouno kotar them pash Souf mashkral o foro Paran ap yek rig oun kol forya Tofel, Laban, Hazerot oun Di-Sahab ap i vavar rig." 
Deuteronomy1:2 [Deesh-te-yek divessa hi o drom lengsto mank i berga Horeb oun o foro Kadesh-Barnea ap i berge Seir.] 
Deuteronomy1:3 An o star-deshto (40) bersh ap o ersto dives an o deesh-te-yekto čon penas o Mose ap i tsele Israelitarya halauter, hoy o baro Devel leske penas, te hounte krenn le." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Kova his pal kova yob kol douy bare rayen das: o Sihon, ko baro rayes pral i Amorarya, kay an o foro Heshbon djivas, oun palle pash Edrei o Og, ko baro rayes pral Bashan, kay an o foro Astarot djivas." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Ap i vavar rig o panyestar Yordan an o them Moab, sikras o Mose i menshende o baro Debleskro drom. Kalla hi leskre laba:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 Maro baro Devel rakras mentsa pash i berga Horeb oun penas: Doha hans kanna pash kay berga: 
Deuteronomy1:7 Stenn kanna pre oun djan doureder pash i berge, kay i Amorarya djivenn, oun kote, kay kol Kanaanitarya djivenn: an o telstouno them o panyestar Yordan, oun an o pralstouno them, oun an o divyo them Shefelah oun an o them Negev pash o baro pani bis pash i berge Libanon oun o baro lengsto pani Eufrat." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Kava tselo them čivom me glan t'mende, djan t'mer koy, oun lenn les t'menge dren! Kova hi ko them, kolestar o baro Devel t'mare phourende, o Abrahameste oun o Isaakeste oun o Yakobeste pes sovel das, te dell lo les lende oun lengre čavende oun kolende, kay pal lende venna." 
Deuteronomy1:9 O Mose penas doureder: Kote pash i berga Horeb penom t'menge: “Me kokres nay hidjrau t'men gar. 
Deuteronomy1:10 T'maro baro Devel kras t'men yaake boud. T'mer han kava dives yaake boud har kol momlia an o bolepen hi. 
Deuteronomy1:11 Mou čivell yob, ko Devel t'mare phourendar, gomme yek zero (1.000) kope yaake boud pashel. Mou čivell lo peskri barht oun zoor ap t'mende, yaake har yob pral t'mende vin rakras." 
Deuteronomy1:12 Djinenn, me nay hidjrau koy boudi hoy t'mer mange krenn, gar kokres, nay rakrau gar kokres o čačepen vin an t'maro tselo koova, oun t'maro tselo čingepen!" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Lenn t'menge dran t'mare bare familyen goseve oun an-dikle morshen, kay hayvenn, hoy mishto oun gar mishto hi! Kolen čivau pral t'mende, te venn le t'mare čačepangre morsha.”" 
Deuteronomy1:14 T'mer penan koy pre: “Mishto hi ko kova, hoy tou kameh te krell.”" 
Deuteronomy1:15 Oun me lom i pralstoune morshen dran t'mare bare familyen, goseve oun an-dikle morshen oun čivom len pral t'mende, te venn le t'mare čačepangre morsha. Yon van pralstoune pral 1.000 (yek zero), pral 100 (yek sheel) oun pral 50 (i paash-sheel) oun pral 10 (deesh)." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Ap kal čačepangre morshende penom ko tsireske, hoy te krenn le, oun penom: “Shounenn, hoy t'mare phralen, kay čingepen mashkral pende hi, t'menge penenna. Kova nay vell i čingepen mashkral t'men Israelitaryen, nay vell ninna i čingepen mashkral yekeste t'mare menshendar oun yekeste dran i vavar them, kay pash t'mende djivell. Denn koles o čačepen, kay an o čačepen hi." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Oun dikenn gar koy pre, koon glan t'mende tardo hi! Shounenn i tiknen oun i baren! Ma darenn kekestar! Krenn yaake o čačepen vin, har te krals kova o Devel! Savo koova, hoy t'menge phares hi, kova anenn pash mande, te shounap me kova.”" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Ko tsireske penom me t'menge ninna ko vavar koova, hoy hounte krenn." 
Deuteronomy1:19 Mer kram, hoy maro baro Devel menge penas, oun djam doureder oun moukam i berga Horeb pal mende, oun kram men ap o drom an o pralstouno them, kay i Amorarya djivan. Ap maro drom hounte djam an o baro moulo them trouyel, hoy yaake dareno hi, har t'mer dikan, oun vam pash o foro Kadesh-Barnea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Kote penom t'menge: “Kanna ham tardo glan o pralstouno them, kay i Amorarya djivenn. Kava them dell t'men maro baro Devel." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Yob das kava them an t'mare vasta. Djan koy oun lenn les dren, te vell lo t'maro, yaake har penas t'menge o baro Devel, ko Devel, kones t'mare phoure an-mangan. Ma trashenn oun moukenn t'menge kek daar te krell!”" 
Deuteronomy1:22 Oun t'mer van halauter pash mande oun penan: “Mer kamah morshen glan vin te bičrell, te dikenn le pen trouyel an ko them, te penenn la menge ap havo drom mer dren djas, oun have forya koy hi.”" 
Deuteronomy1:23 Oun kova his mishto an mire yaka oun me lom deesh-te-douy morshen dran t'mende, yek morshes dran haki bari familya." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Kolla kran pen ap o drom, oun djan pre an o pralstouno them, oun van bis pash i tala Eshkol, oun dikan pen kote trouyel." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Yon lan kolestar, hoy an ko them bares vas, oun anan les pash mende. Oun penan menge hoy le halauter dikan, oun penan: Kava them hi mishto, hoy o baro Devel men dell." 
Deuteronomy1:26 T'mer kaman gar koy te djal, oun shounan gar ap i laba o baro Deblestar, kay t'maro Devel hi." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Oun t'men čingran an t'mare plarhtene khera oun penan: O baro Devel hi rhoyedo ap mende. Doleske las lo men dran o them Egiptia vin, te dell lo men an i vasta foun o Amorarya, te denn kolla men moulo." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Kay djas koy? Mare phrala kran mare djia darenes, har penan le ap mende: Kolla menshe hi zorleder oun bareder har mer, lengre forya hi baro oun lengre massurya djan pre bis pash o bolepen. Oun ninna dikam mer o Anakarya kote!" 
Deuteronomy1:29 Kote penom me ap t'mende: “Ma moukenn t'menge daar te krell oun ma trashenn lendar! 
Deuteronomy1:30 T'maro baro Devel djal glan t'mende vin oun kourell pes t'menge, yaake har lo glan t'mare yaka an o them Egiptia t'menge kras." 
Deuteronomy1:31 Oun an o moulo tato them hidjras lo t'menge har i dad peskro čaves ap t'maro tselo drom, hoy djan bis kate, kay kanna han.”" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Ninna te dikan t'mer kova lauter, kaman t'mer t'maro baro Debles gar te patsell," 
Deuteronomy1:33 koles, kay o tselo drom glan t'mende djas, te sikrell lo t'mende i platsa, kay nay čivenn t'men tele, Yob sikras t'menge o drom rati an i yag, oun pral o dives an i folka." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Har o baro Devel shounas koy gole hoy dan, vas lo rhoyedo, oun das pes sovel, oun penas:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 “Ma patsenn, te dikell yek morsh kal tsele morshendar kava lačo them, hoy me man pash lengre phourende sovel dom, te dap les lenge." 
Deuteronomy1:36 Kokres o Kaleb, koleskro dad o Yefunne hi, dikell ko them. Oun les oun leskre čaven dau ko them, kay yob pre stakras. Yob patsas man oun kras, hoy penom.”" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Oun dran kova, hoy t'mer kran, vas o baro Devel ninna rhoyedo ap mande oun penas: “Ninna tou, o Mose, vess gar an ko them!" 
Deuteronomy1:38 O Yosua, koleskro dad o Noun hi, kova, kay glan t'mende tardo hi, kova vell an ko them. Koles kre zoreles! Yob anell i Israelenge an kava them, te lenn le les dren.”" 
Deuteronomy1:39 Palle penas o baro Devel ap mende lauterende: “T'mer penan: Mare čave perenn kolenge an i vasta, kay hi rhoyedo ap mende. Me penau t'menge: Yon, kay kava dives gomme gar djinenn, hoy mishto oun hoy čilačo hi, hi kolla, kay venn an o them dren, te lenn le les dren." 
Deuteronomy1:40 T'mer, rissrenn t'men oun djan an o moulo them, ko drom, hoy pash o Baro Lolo Pani djal!”" 
Deuteronomy1:41 Kote penan t'mer ap mande: “Mer kram čilačepen glan o baro Debleste. Kanna kamah pre te djal oun men lentsa te kourell, yaake har maro baro Devel penas, te kras kova.” Oun hakeno t'mendar pandas peskre kourepaskre koola troul peste. Oun t'mer patsan, te hi gar phares pre te djal an o kourepen." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Kote penas o baro Devel ap mande: “Pen lenge: Ma djan pre, te kourenn t'men lentsa! – Me hom gar t'mentsa. – Te venn gar kolendar moulo dino, kay kamenn t'men te marell.”" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Har penom me kova ap t'mende, kaman gar te shounell, oun kran gar, hoy o baro Devel t'menge penas. T'mer djan pal t'maro shero, oun djan pre an o pralstouno them." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Oun i Amorarya, kay kote djivan, van vin oun djan ap t'mende pre, oun tradan t'men an o them Seir, har bine yekes palla lenn. Oun dan t'men pash o foro Horma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Kote van t'mer pale pale, oun rovan glan o baro Debleste; o baro Devel shounas gar ap t'mende, oun das gar yak ap t'mari gole." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Yaake ačan t'mer ap i panyengri platsa Kadesh i rah tsiro. 
Deuteronomy2:1 Koy pre stam pre oun rissram men oun djam pale an o moulo tato them ap o drom, hoy djal pash o Baro Lolo Pani, yaake har o baro Devel kova mange penas. I rah tsiro nasham troul kol berge Seir." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Palle penas o baro Devel ap mande: 
Deuteronomy2:3 “Doha tsiro nashan an kal berge trouyel. Djan kanna doureder ap koy servi rig. 
Deuteronomy2:4 Oun pen i menshenge Israel: Ap t'maro drom venn t'mer kanna an o them t'mare phralendar, kol menshendar, kay venn pal o Esau, oun djivenn ap i berge Seir. Oun yon darenn t'mendar. Yaake denn yak," 
Deuteronomy2:5 te moukenn t'men ap kek čingepen lentsa dren. Me dau t'men kek piro baro kotar lengro themestar. I berge Seir dom me o Esaeste, te hi le leske." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Te venn an lengro them, ginenn rhapen loventsa lendar, te vell t'men čomone te rhal. Oun ninna pani ginenn loventsa lendar, te vell t'men čomone te piyell.”" 
Deuteronomy2:7 Ma bistrenn, maro baro Devel das men barht an halauter, hoy mare vasta kran. Yob das yak ap mende ap o drom an kava baro moulo them: Star-deesh (40) bersha his o baro Devel mentsa, oun halauter hoy men hounte vas, das lo men." 
Deuteronomy2:8 Yaake djam doureder oun moukam mare phralen pal mende, kol menshen, kay van o Esaestar, oun djivenn ap i berge Seir. Oun mer moukam o drom, hoy djal dran i forya Elat oun i Ezyon-Geber an i tala Yordan bis pash o Moulo Baro Pani, oun rissram oun lam o drom, hoy djal an o moulo tato them Moab." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Oun o baro Devel penas ap mande: “Kre i menshenge an o them Moab kek čilačepen, oun ma mouk tout an i čingepen lentsa dren! Ma bistrenn, yon hi i menshe, kay venna pal o Lot. Lenge dom o foro Ar oun ko them trouyel, te djivenn le kote. Me kamau tout či lengro themestar te dell.”" 
Deuteronomy2:10 Glan lende djivan kol Emarya koy. Kolla his boud oun bare lengste menshe, yaake baro har kol menshe Anak." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Yon oun kol Anakarya van ninna kharedo rise. I Moabarya penenn Emarya ap lende. 
Deuteronomy2:12 Ap i berge Seir djivan glan kova i Horarya. Oun kol menshe, kay van pal o Esau, tradan len kotar krik oun dan len moulo, oun djivan palle koy, yaake har o Israel les ninna kras ko themeha, hoy les dino vas o baro Deblestar." 
Deuteronomy2:13 O Mose penas doureder: Palle kram men ap o drom, yaake har o baro Devel menge penas, oun djam vergel ko lengsto pani, hoy kharella Sered." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Kova his 38 (triyanda-te-orhta) bersha pal ko dives, kay djam o ersto kopo dran Kadesh-Barnea. An ko tsiro bersha meran i tsele kourepangre dran Israel, yaake har o baro Devel pes sovel das, te vell kova yaake." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Leskro vast his phares ap lende, bis te kol tsele kourepangre moulo his, oun kek lendar pral ačas." 
Deuteronomy2:16 Oun har i kourepangre dran Israel halauter moulo his," 
Deuteronomy2:17 penas o baro Devel ap mande: 
Deuteronomy2:18 “Tou djah kava dives an o them, kay i Moabarya djivenn, pash o foro Ar." 
Deuteronomy2:19 Oun tou veh pash o them, kay i Ammonarya djivenn, kol menshe, kay venna pal o Lot. Kolenge kress kek čilačepen! Oun mouk tout ap kek čingepen lentsa dren. Me dau tout kek kotar lengro themestar, hoy dom lende.”" 
Deuteronomy2:20 Ninna an ko them djivan glan i rah tsiro bare lengste menshe, kay venn rise kharedo. I Ammonarya kharenn len Zamsoumarya." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Kolla his boud oun bare lengste menshe, yaake bares har i Anakarya. Oun o baro Devel tradas len krik dran o them glan i Ammonarya, te lenn kolla ko them oun djivenn palle koy dren." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Yaake kras o baro Devel kova ninna i menshenge, kay van o Esaestar oun djivenn an i berge Seir. Glan lende tradas yob i Horarya vin, oun das len kolengro them. Kote djivenn le bis ap kava dives." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Oun an i gaba pash o Mashkralstouno Baro Pani djivan menshe, kay his kharedo Avarya. Pral lende van Filistarya dran Kreta, oun dan len moulo, oun lan lengro them bis pash o foro Gaza. Oun djivan palle kote." 
Deuteronomy2:24 Har djam vin dran o them Moab, penas o baro Devel ap mende: “Krenn t'men ap o drom, oun djan pral ko lengsto pani Arnon! An tiro vast dom o baro rayes pral i Amorarya, o Sihon, kay djivell an o foro Heshbon. Kourenn t'men leha, oun lenn leskro them t'menge dren!" 
Deuteronomy2:25 Kava divesseha krau te darenn t'mendar i menshe an hake themma. Koon t'mendar shounella, trashell oun trissell i daryatar.”" 
Deuteronomy2:26 Koy bičrom morshen dran o moulo them Kedemot pash o Sihon, ko baro ray an o foro Heshbon, te penenn le leske: “Mashkral mende vell kek čingepen oun marepen:" 
Deuteronomy2:27 Mouk men ap koy vavar rig tiro themestar te djal. Ap o drom kamah te ačell, gar čačes oun gar serves lestar kamah te djal." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Hoy men hounte vell rhapaske, ginah mer loventsa t'mendar. Ninna pani denn t'mer men lovenge, te vell men čomone te piyell. Mer kamah či vavar har te djal ap koy vavar rig tiro themestar," 
Deuteronomy2:29 bis te vas mer vergel o pani lengsto Yordan an ko them, hoy maro baro Devel men della. Dik, ninna i Edomarya, kay djivenn an Seir, oun i Moabarya, kay djivenn an Ar, kolla moukan men vergel lengre themma te djal.”" 
Deuteronomy2:30 O Sihon, ko baro ray an Heshbon, kamas men gar vergel leskro themestar te djal. T'maro baro Devel moukas leskro dji har bar te vell, yaake te dikas lo či dren. Yaake das o baro Devel les oun leskro them an t'mare vasta. Oun kova his gomme kava dives yaake." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Oun o baro Devel penas ap mande: “Shoun, me moukau t'men o Sihones oun leskre lourden te dell, oun leskro them dren te lell. Djan koy oun lenn les dren, te vell les t'menge.”" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Oun o Sihon djas vin dran o foro peskre tsele lourdentsa, te kourenn le pen mentsa pash o foro Yahaz." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Oun maro baro Devel das len an mare vasta, yaake te maram les oun leskre čaven oun leskre tsele lourden." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Palle lam leskre tsele forya dren, oun dam hakenes moulo: morsha oun djouvya oun čave, kek lendar ačas djido." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Kokres lengre firhen randam lendar, oun čoram lengre forya vin, hoy dren lam." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Maro baro Devel das i tsele forya an mare vasta: ko foro Aroer, hoy pash o lengsto pani Arnon čiddo hi, oun ko foro hoy tella an o panyeskri tala čiddo hi, oun i tsele forya bis pash o them Gilead. Kek foro his koy, hoy zorleder his har mer." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Pash ko them, hoy i Ammonarya djivenn, djam gar, gar pash o lengsto pani Yabbok, vitar gar pash i forya ap i berge. Yaake kamas kova maro baro Devel." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Kote rissram oun lam o drom, hoy an o them Bashan pre djal. Oun o Og, ko baro ray pral Bashan, djas vin peskre tsele lourdentsa, te kourenn le pen mentsa pash o foro Edrei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Oun o baro Devel penas ap mande: “Ma dare lestar, me dom les oun leskre tsele lourden oun leskro them an tiro vast. Kre leha har kova o Sihoneha kral, ko baro rayeha pral i Amorarya, kay an o foro Heshbon djivas.”" 
Deuteronomy3:3 Oun o baro Devel das ninna o Og, ko baro rayes pral Bashan peskre tsele lourdentsa an mare vasta. Oun mer dam len yaake rah bis te kek lendar bouder pral ačas." 
Deuteronomy3:4 An ko tsiro lam ko tselo kotar them Argob dren an o them Bashan, pral kova o Og o ray his, oun leskre tsele forya. Das kek foro lestar, hoy mer gar dren lam. Kolla his 60 (shob-deesh) forya." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Hako foro his i zorelo foro, koles bare massurya troul peste his. An lende his bare voudya, hoy sasterentsa pandlo van. Ninna his kote boud gaba, kolen kek massurya his." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Oun mer dam hakenes moulo, kay kote djivell: morsha oun djouvya oun čave, yaake har les ninna o baro rayeha Sihon an Heshbon kram." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Lengre firhe oun ko kouč koova, hoy an i forya his, randam menge." 
Deuteronomy3:8 Yaake lam menge an ko tsiro ko them dren, hoy his an i vasta kol douy bare rayendar pral i Amorarya, – ko them, hoy ap i vavar rig o lengsto panyestar Yordan čiddo hi, mank o lengsto pani Arnon oun i berga Hermon." 
Deuteronomy3:9 [Ap i berga Hermon penenn i menshe dran o foro Sidon berga Siryon. Oun i Amorarya penenn Senir ap late.] 
Deuteronomy3:10 Kolla his i tsele forya an o pralstouno them, ninna o tselo them Gilead, oun o them Bashan bis pash i forya Salka oun Edrei. Kol tsele forya pral kolende o Og dran Bashan o ray his, lam menge dren." 
Deuteronomy3:11 Kokres o Og, ko baro ray pral Bashan, ačas djido kol bare menshendar, kay rise kharedo van. Har meras lo, vas lo paskedo an i barrengro morhton. Kova hi yaake star metarya baro oun douy metarya bourhlo, oun hi tardo an o foro Rabba an o them Ammon." 
Deuteronomy3:12 Kava tselo them lam mer an ko tsiro menge dren. Ko them, hoy hi čiddo serves o forestar Aroer oun o lengsto panyestar Arnon dom me i familyake Ruben oun i familyake Gad. Ninna dom me len o paash them Gilead oun kol forya koy dren." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Oun ko vavar paash o themestar Gilead oun o tselo them Bashan, kay o Og o ray his, kova dom i paash familyake Manasse. Kova his o tselo kotar them Argob. [Kava tselo them Bashan vell kharedo o them foun i rise." 
Deuteronomy3:14 O Yayr dran i familya Manasse las ko tselo kotar them Argob bis pash o them, kay i Geshourarya oun i Maakatarya djivenn. O Yayr kharas kol gaba an o them Bashan pal peskro lab o Yayreskre gaba. Oun yaake kharenn le gomme kava dives.]" 
Deuteronomy3:15 O them Gilead dom me o morsheste Makir dran i familya Manasse. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Oun i menshenge dran i familya Ruben oun dran i familya Gad dom me ko kotar them čačes o themestar Gilead bis pash o lengsto pani Arnon – bis mashkral an kava pani. Ap koy rig, kay o kham pre djal, djas lengro them bis pash o lengsto pani Yabbok. Ap leskri vavar rig hi o them Ammon." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Ap i rig, kay o kham tele djal, djal o them bis pash o lengsto pani Yordan, oun kote foun o pani Génésareth bis pash o Londo Baro Pani, oun bis tella pash i berga Pisga, kote kay o kham pre djal." 
Deuteronomy3:18 An ko tsiro penom i morshenge dran kol familya Ruben, Gad oun Manasse: “T'maro baro Devel das t'men kava them, te lenn les t'menge dren. Kanna lenn t'maro kourepaskro koova oun djan t'mare phralenge, kol vavar Israelenge glan vin." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Moukenn t'mare djouvyen oun t'mare čaven an t'mare forya, hoy me dom t'men. Ninna t'mare firhen moukenn kote. Djinau, t'men hi boud firhe." 
Deuteronomy3:20 T'mer kourepangre, avenn t'mare phralenge pash o vast yaake rah bis te lan le ko them dren, hoy o baro Devel len della ap i vavar rig o panyestar Yordan, oun bis te moukell lo len kote te djivell kek kourepah, yaake har yob ninna t'menge kras. Palle nay djan t'mer pale an t'maro them, hoy t'mende dom.”" 
Deuteronomy3:21 An ko tsiro penom ap o Yosua: “Tire yaka dikan kova halauter, hoy t'maro baro Devel kal douy rayentsa kras. Oun yaake krell o baro Devel hako rayeha an hako them, kay tou djah." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Ma dare lendar! T'maro baro Devel hi kova, kay kourell pes t'menge.”" 
Deuteronomy3:23 An ko tsiro mangom o baro Debles miro tselo djiyeha oun penom: 
Deuteronomy3:24 “Baro Devel, miro ray, tou sikral man, tiro boudepaskres, tiro barepen oun tiro zorelo vast. An o bolepen oun ap i phoub hi kek vavar devel, kay nay krell savo baro koova an savi bari zoor har tou." 
Deuteronomy3:25 Mangau tout, mouk man pral o pani Yordan vergel te djal oun ko lačo them te dikell, hoy kote hi, kol shoukar berge oun o Libanon.”" 
Deuteronomy3:26 O baro Devel his rhoyedo pral mande dran kova har t'mer hans, oun shounas doleske gar ap mande. Oun penas: “Mouk tele! Kanna hi doha! Rake mange gar bouder pral ko koova!" 
Deuteronomy3:27 Dja pral pre ap i berga Pisga, oun dik tout trouyel, dik serves oun čačes oun glan oun pal toute! Dik lauter mishto an! Tou djiness, te djas tou gar pral o Yordan vergel." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Oun pen ap o Yosua: Ma traash, ab zoreles! Yob hi kova, kay djal glan i Israelitaryen vergel o pani Yordan, oun anell len dren an ko them, hoy tou dikeh, te lenn le les penge dren.”" 
Deuteronomy3:29 Oun mer ačam an o telstouno them, ap i vavar rig o forestar Bet-Peor." 
Deuteronomy4:1 Kanna shoun, Israel, hoy t'maro baro Devel t'mendar kamell. Denn yak ap leskre čačepaskre laba, hoy me t'men sikrau. Rikrenn t'men ap kova, te ačenn djido, oun te venn dren an ko them, te nay lenn les t'menge dren, ko them, ap koleste t'maro baro Devel t'mare phourenge pes sovel das, te dell lo les lende." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Čivenn kek lab koy pashel, hoy me penom, te hounte krenn! Lenn ninna či kolestar krik, te rikrenn les gar. Rikrenn t'men ap i laba t'maro baro Deblestar, hoy me t'menge penau." 
Deuteronomy4:3 T'mare yaka dikan, hoy o baro Devel kras pash i berga Baal-Peor. Hakenes, kay o rhorheno debles Baal an-mangas, maras t'maro baro Devel mashkral t'mende." 
Deuteronomy4:4 T'mer, kay rikrenn t'men ap t'maro baro Debleste, t'mer halauter djivenn ninna kava dives." 
Deuteronomy4:5 Dikenn, me sikrom t'mende, hoy o baro Devel t'mendar kamella, leskre tsele čačepaskre laba, yaake har miro baro Devel mange penas, te krenn t'mer an o them, an kova t'mer venna oun les t'menge dren lenna." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Yaake denn yak ap kol laba, oun rikrenn len! Palle dikenn i menshe an i vavar themma, har goseve han. Te shounenn le, pal have laba t'mer djivenna, palle penenn le: “Have goseve menshe hi kolla, kay prindjrenn pen an halauter vin! Havi bari zoreli natsyona!”" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Kay hi savi bari natsyona, kolenge lengro devel ap i rig vell, har menge maro baro Devel ap i rig vell hako kopo, kay dah mer les an-gole?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Kek vavar bari natsyona della, kay i menshen save lače oun čače laba hi, hoy lende sikrenn har te djivenn le, har kal laba, hoy me kava dives glan t'mende čivau." 
Deuteronomy4:9 Denn zoreles yak ap t'mende, te bistrenn gar – yaake rah har djivenn, – hoy t'mare yakentsa dikan! Oun penenn t'mare čavenge oun lengre čavenge," 
Deuteronomy4:10 hoy djas ap ko dives, har t'mer glan t'maro baro Debleste tardo hans pash i berga Horeb. Kote penas yob ap mande: “An i tsele menshen khetne, te shounenn le, hoy lenge penau, te krenn le hako dives, hoy lendar kamau, yaake rah har djivenn le, oun te penenn le kova ninna pengre čavenge.”" 
Deuteronomy4:11 Kote van t'mer oun hans tella pash i berga tardo, oun i berga rhačas bis pre an o bolepen. Troul late his kale volke oun baro tamlepen." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Oun o baro Devel rakras ap t'mende dran koy yag vin. Leskro rakepen shounan t'mer, oun dikan kekes." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Oun yob kras t'mentsa vin, te hi lo t'maro Devel, oun t'mer han leskre menshe. Oun yob das t'men kol deesh laba, hoy činas lo an douy barra, oun penas t'menge, te hounte rikrenn t'men ap kova, hoy t'mer leha vin kran oun hounte djivenn pal kol deesh laba." 
Deuteronomy4:14 An ko tsiro penas o baro Devel mange, te sikrap t'men, hoy lo t'mendar kamell oun leskre čačepaskre laba, te djivenn pal lende an ko them, an kova t'mer dren djan, te lenn les t'menge dren." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Yaake denn yak, te bistrenn gar: Ap ko dives, har o baro Devel pash i berga Horeb, dran i yag vin t'mentsa rakras, dikan t'mer les gar." 
Deuteronomy4:16 Doleske krenn t'menge kek figura, hoy an-mangenn! Kova vals i čilačo koova glan o Debleskre yaka, te krans t'mer t'menge i devel, hoy vin dikell har i morsh, i djouvel," 
Deuteronomy4:17 i firho ap o them, i čirklo ap o bolepen," 
Deuteronomy4:18 i tikno firho, hoy djal pral i phoub, oder i mačo an o pani." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Te hadenn t'mare yaka pre pash o bolepen oun dikenn o kham oun o moonto oun i tsele bolepangre momlia, ma moukenn t'men kolendar krik te tserdenn, te čivenn t'men tele glan lende oun mangenn len an. T'maro baro Devel das len i menshenge an i vavar themma ap i phoub." 
Deuteronomy4:20 T'men las o baro Devel dran o them Egiptia vin, har dran i sasterno yagakro bob, yaake boud douka hounte lan kote ap t'mende. T'men las lo koy vin, te venn t'mer leskre menshe, kay kokres leske koy hi, yaake har kova ap kava dives kate ninna hi." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Oun dran kova, hoy t'mer kran, vas o baro Devel ninna rhoyedo ap mande, oun das pes sovel, te djap me gar vergel o lengsto pani Yordan, oun te vap gar an ko lačo them, hoy dell t'men t'maro baro Devel, te vell les t'menge." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Me merau an kava them, me djau gar vergel o pani Yordan. T'mer djan ap i vavar rig, oun lenn ko lačo them t'menge dren." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Kanna denn t'men yak, te bistrenn gar, hoy t'maro baro Devel t'mentsa vin kras! Ma krenn t'menge i figura čomonestar, hoy mangenn an, har te vals i devel. T'maro baro Devel penas t'menge zoreles, te krenn kova gar." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Yob hi i zoreli yag, hoy halauter pre rhačrell, oun kamell, te kamenn t'mer les kokres." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Te djivan t'mer an o them boud bersha oun t'men hi čave oun čavengre čave kote, ma krenn t'menge i debleskri figura čomonestar! Kova vals čilačo glan i yaka o baro Deblestar. Te krenn t'mer savo djoungelo koova, krenn t'mer les rhoyedo." 
Deuteronomy4:26 Kava dives dau man sovel glan o bolepen oun i phoub, te krenn t'mer savo koova, djivenn gar rah an o them, hoy t'mer dren lenna vergel o pani Yordan. Kokres i tikno tsiro ačenn t'mer koy. Palle venn t'mer lauter krik tradedo." 
Deuteronomy4:27 O baro Devel tradell t'men mank i menshende an i tsele themma, yekes kate oun ko vavares kote. Gar boud menshe ačenn t'mendar djido mank kol menshende an i vavar themma, kay o baro Devel t'men tradas." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Oun kote mangenn t'mer kol deblen dran kasht oun bar an, hoy menshengre vastentsa kerdo van. Oun kol debla nay dikenn oun shounenn, nay rhan oun soungenn gar." 
Deuteronomy4:29 An kol themma rodenn t'mer palle o baro Debles, kay t'maro Devel hi. Te poučenn pal leste t'maro tselo djiyeha oun t'mari tseli zoryah, hatsenn t'mer les." 
Deuteronomy4:30 An ko tsiro, hoy vella, kay ap t'mende ko tselo koova vas, hoy t'menge penom, an kol djoungele phare divessa venn t'mer pale pash t'maro baro Debleste, oun krenn, hoy yob t'menge penell." 
Deuteronomy4:31 O baro Devel hi i Devel, kay t'menge peskro dji pre krell. Yob moukell t'men gar, oun moukell t'men gar vin te merell, oun bistrell gar, hoy lo t'mare phourentsa vin kras." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Rakrenn pral ko phouro tsiro, har t'mer gomme gar koy hans, har o Devel o menshes ap kay phoub kras. Rodenn ap i tseli phoub: Vas sau baro koova diklo oun shounlo," 
Deuteronomy4:33 te shounan i menshe lengro Debles dran i yag ap lende te rakrell? Oun yon ačan djido, har t'menge djas?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Kek vavar devel djas oun las peske menshen vin dran i vavar them, har yob kras, har las lo t'men vin dran o them Egiptia. Yob sikras peskri bari zoor oun kras sau koova, hoy kek vavar nay krell, oun anas boud bibarht ap i Egiptaryen. Yob kouras pes t'menge. Peskro zorelo vasteha oun peskri pre-hadedi moussyah las lo t'men vin, oun kras i Egiptarenge bari daar. Kova lauter dikan t'mer." 
Deuteronomy4:35 T'men moukas lo kova te dikell, te djinenn, te hi o baro Devel o čačo Devel, oun te dell kek vavar debles har les kokres." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Dran o bolepen vin rakras lo ap t'mende, te sikrell lo t'men leskro drom. Oun ap i phoub moukas lo t'men peskri bari yag te dikell. Oun dran koy yag vin shounan t'mer kol laba, hoy yob ap t'mende rakras." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Yob kamas t'mare phouren o tselo djiyestar, oun rodas lengre čaven vin oun kolengre čaven, oun halauter kay lendar venna. Oun yob djas t'mentsa, har anas lo t'men vin dran o them Egiptia peskri bari zoryah," 
Deuteronomy4:38 oun tradas menshen vin dran lengre themma glan t'mende, natsyone, kay bareder oun zorleder hi har t'mer, te dell lo t'mende lengro them, yaake har kova kanna hi." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Yaake hounte djinenn kava dives oun bistrenn kova gar: Dell kek vavar Devel har o baro Devel kokres. Kek vavar devel hi an o bolepen oun vitar gar ap i phoub. 
Deuteronomy4:40 Denn yak ap kova, hoy yob t'mendar kamella, oun djivenn pal leskre laba, hoy t'menge kava dives penau. Palle djal mishto t'menge oun t'mare čavenge pal t'mende, oun t'mer djivenn i rah tsiro an kava them, hoy t'maro baro Devel t'menge della, te ačell les t'menge hako tsireske." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Palle rodas o Mose triin forya vin ap kay rig o panyestar Yordan, kay o kham pre djal," 
Deuteronomy4:42 te nay nashell kote hakeno, kay i vavares moulo das oun kamas kova gar, oun yob glan kova gar rhoyedo ap leste his. Yob nay nashell kote, te vell lo gar maredo." 
Deuteronomy4:43 An o them Ruben his kova o foro Bezer an o pralstouno moulo tato them; an o them Gad his kova o foro Ramot an o pralstouno them Gilead; oun an o them Manasse o foro Golan an o them Bashan. 
Deuteronomy4:44 O Mose sikras i Israelenge o Debleskro drom. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Har le dran o them Egiptia vin djan, penas lo lenge kol tsele laba, hoy lende sikran, har te djivenn le, oun hoy o Devel lendar kamella, oun leskre tsele čačepaskre laba." 
Deuteronomy4:46 An ko tsiro his le ap koy rig o panyestar Yordan, kay o kham pre djal, vergel o foro Bet-Peor an o them, kay his o Sihon o ray pral i Amorarya. Kova djivas an o foro Heshbon. Koles maran o Mose oun i Israelitarya, har djan le dran o them Egiptia vin." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Oun yon lan leskro them penge dren, ninna o them, kay o Og o ray his pral o them Bashan. O Sihon oun o Og, kol douy his i raya pral i Amorarya ap kay rig o panyestar Yordan, kay o kham pre djala." 
Deuteronomy4:48 Kava tselo them djas o forestar Aroer, hoy pash o lengsto pani Arnon čiddo hi, bis pash i berga Sihon, hoy kharella ninna berga Hermon." 
Deuteronomy4:49 An leste his ninna ko tselo telstouno them ap kay rig o panyestar Yordan, kay o kham pre djal, bis pash o Londo Baro Pani oun bis pash o piro i bergatar Pisga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Oun o Mose das i tsele menshen Israel khetne gole, oun penas ap lende: Shoun Israel kova, hoy o baro Devel kamell t'mendar, leskre tsele čačepaskre laba, hoy kava dives glan t'mare kanna penom. Rikrenn len an o shero, oun denn yak ap lende, oun djivenn pal lende!" 
Deuteronomy5:2 Maro baro Devel djas mentsa i sovel dren pash i berga Horeb. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Gar mare phourentsa kokres djas lo koy sovel dren, na-a mentsa lauterentsa, kay kava dives djivah oun kate ham." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Kote ap i berga rakras yob dran i yag vin, yak an yak t'mentsa." 
Deuteronomy5:5 Oun me homs mashkral t'mende oun o baro Debleste tardo an ko tsiro, te penap t'menge, hoy lo penas. T'mer daran i yagatar oun djan gar ap i berga pre. Oun o baro Devel penas:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 Me, o baro Devel, hom tiro Devel, koon tout vin las dran o them Egiptia, kay tou i pandlo boudepaskro hals." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Oun tout vell kek vavar Devel har man. 
Deuteronomy5:8 Oun tou kress touke kek devel, hoy vi-dikell har čomone an o bolepen, vitar gar har čomone ap i phoub oun vitar gar har čomone an i pani tel i phoub." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Tou vitsress tout gar glan i vavar debleste tele, oun mangess les gar an. Me, o baro Devel, hom tiro Devel, oun kamau, te kamess man kokres. Kolen, kay kamenn mandar či te djinell oun anenn doosh ap pende, dau me i phagi. Me dau ninna i phagi lengre čavende oun kolengre čavende yaake rah har triin-te-star familye yek pal i vavar djivenn." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Lačepen oun kamlepen dau me ap kolende, hoy man o djiyestar kamenn oun krenn, hoy me penau. Ninna lengre čavenge, kay pal lende venna, hom lačo, yaake rah har zerya familye yek pal i vavar djivenn." 
Deuteronomy5:11 Ma le miro lab baro Devel čičeske an tiro mouy! Me, o baro Devel, hom tiro Devel oun dau i phagi hakenes, koon kova krella." 
Deuteronomy5:12 Rike o Debleskro dives! Ma boude ap leste. Yaake penas touke tiro baro Devel. 
Deuteronomy5:13 Shob divessa dja ap tiri boudi oun kre tiri tseli boudi! 
Deuteronomy5:14 O eftato dives hi mange, tiro baro Debleske. Ap ko dives kress tou kek boudi, vitar gar tire čave oun ča, vitar gar tiro boudepaskro oun tiri boudepaskretsa, vitar gar tiri groumni, tiri bourika tire vavar firhe, vitar gar kol vi-themarya, kay an tiro foro djivenna. Yaake har tou hounte boudress gar, hounte boudrenn tire boudepangre vitar gar." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Ma biste, kay hals i boudepaskro an o them Egiptia, oun me, tiro baro Devel, las tout vin miro zorelo vasteha oun pre-hadedi moussyah. Doleske penau me touke: Rike miro dives yaake." 
Deuteronomy5:16 Dik ap tiro dadeste oun ap tiri date, te djal lenge mishto. Yaake djiveh i rah djipen an ko them, hoy tout tiro baro Devel della." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Ma mare kekes! 
Deuteronomy5:18 Romeha, ma dja i vavar djouvyah! Romniya, ma dja i vavar morsheha!" 
Deuteronomy5:19 Ma čore! 
Deuteronomy5:20 Ma an kek rhorhepen pre ap yekeste! 
Deuteronomy5:21 Ma rode gar, har nay less tou kova touke, hoy i vavares hi: leskri romni, leskro kheer, leskri phoub, leskro boudepaskro, boudepaskretsa, groumni, bourika, či, hoy i vavares hi." 
Deuteronomy5:22 Kal laba rakras o baro Devel ap t'mende halauter, har van khetne pash i berga. Dran i yag vin, dran koy kali pessi folka vin rakras lo bari golyah. Kek vavar lab čivas lo pashel. Oun yob činas len ap douy barra oun das len mande." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Oun har shounan t'mer ko rakepen dran ko kalepen oun dikan har i berga rhačas, koy van t'mare pralstoune pral i deesh-te-douy bare familyende oun t'mare phoureder pash mande," 
Deuteronomy5:24 oun penan: “Dik, maro baro Devel sikras men peskro raylepen oun barepen. Oun mer shounam leskro rakepen dran i yag vin. Kava dives hayvam mer, te rakrell o baro Devel i menshentsa, oun o yon ačenn djides." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Oun kanna, hoske meras mer? Kay bari yag rhal men pre. Te shounah mer o rakepen maro baro Deblestar gomme doureder, palle merah mer." 
Deuteronomy5:26 An kek tsiro nay shounas i mensho o rakepen o djido Deblestar dran i yag vin, yaake har mer, oun ačas djides?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Dja tou koy, oun shoun halauter, hoy maro baro Devel penell, oun pen kova menge. Halauter, hoy maro baro Devel touke penell, kamah te shounell oun les krell.”" 
Deuteronomy5:28 Oun o baro Devel shounas t'mare laba, hoy t'mer ap mande penan. Oun o baro Devel penas ap mande: “Me shounom, hoy kal menshe touha rakran. Lauter, hoy yon penan, hi mishto yaake." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Har kamoms, te ačans lengre djia hako tsiro yaake, te rikrenn le man glan pengre yaka, oun te denn le yak ap mire tsele laba! Palle djals lenge oun lengre čavenge mishto o tselo tsireske." 
Deuteronomy5:30 Dja pash lende oun pen lenge: Djan an t'mare plarhtene khera pale! 
Deuteronomy5:31 Tou, ač kay pash mande! Oun me penau touke o tselo lab, halauter hoy t'mendar kamau, oun mire tsele čačepaskre laba. Kolla lauter peness lenge, te djivenn le pal lende an ko them, hoy me dau lende, te lenn le les lenge dren.”" 
Deuteronomy5:32 Kanna denn yak, te krenn halauter yaake, har t'maro baro Devel kova t'menge penas. Rikrenn leskre tsele laba. Čivenn kek lendar ap i rig." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Djan yaake ap leskro drom, har yob t'menge sikras! Palle ačenn djido, oun djal t'menge mishto. Oun t'mer nay djivenna i rah tsiro an ko them, hoy t'mer dren lenn, te vell lo t'maro." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Oun kava hi o lab, lauter, hoy t'maro baro Devel t'mendar kamella, oun leskre čačepaskre laba, hoy lo mande das, te penap len t'menge, te nay djivenn pal lende an o them, an kova t'mer kanna djan, te lenn les t'menge dren," 
Deuteronomy6:2 yaake te rikrenn t'maro baro Debles glan i yaka t'maro tselo djipen, oun denn yak ap halauter, hoy lo t'mendar kamella, ap leskre tsele laba, hoy me t'menge penau, te rikrenn t'men ap lende, t'mer oun t'mare čave oun čavengre čave. Yaake djivenn t'mer i rah tsiro an t'maro them." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Yaake shoun kanna, Israel, oun de yak te kress kova halauter, te djal touke mishto. Oun t'mer venn i bari natsyona an ko them, kay hi boud thoud oun gvin, yaake har o baro Devel, o Devel t'mare phourendar, kova t'menge penas." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Shoun Israel! O baro Devel hi maro Devel, yob kokres oun kek vavar!" 
Deuteronomy6:5 Tou kamess les tiro tselo djiyestar oun tiro tselo djipah oun tiri tseli zoryah. 
Deuteronomy6:6 Oun kol laba, hoy me touke kava dives penau, less an tiro dji," 
Deuteronomy6:7 oun peness len ninna tire čavenge, te bistrenn le len gar. Rake lendar, te hal khere beshdo, oun te djah ap o drom, oun te čiveh tout tele oun te steh pale pre." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Pande kol laba ap i pandepen troul tiro vast oun troul tiro shero pral i yaka, te bistress len gar." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Oun tou činess len ap i pesse kashta čačes oun serves pash tiro khereskro voudar oun ap i voudar pral. 
Deuteronomy6:10 O baro Devel, kay tiro Devel hi, anell tout an ko them, kay yob pes pash o Abraham, o Isaak oun o Yakob sovel das, te dell lo les toute. Kote hi bare oun shoukar forya, hoy tou gar kral," 
Deuteronomy6:11 ninna khera pherdo lačo koova, hoy tou gar khetne lal, oun vi-dine brounne, hoy tou gar dran o bar vin dal, ninna drakengre rouka oun djeteskre rouka, hoy tou gar an i phoub čival. Oun palle, te rhah kolestar lauter oun veh čalo,"
