Deuteronomy6:12 palle de yak, te bistress gar o baro Debles, kay anas tout vin dran o pandepen dran o them Egiptia." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Tou mangess o baro Debles an, oun rikress les glan tire yaka pash halauter, hoy kreh. Te deh tout sovel, dess tiri sovel pash leskro lab." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Ma dja vavar deblenge palla, kolen i menshe dran i themma troul t'mende, an-mangenn." 
Deuteronomy6:15 Tiro baro Devel hi mank t'mende oun kamell te kamess les kokres. Te rikreh gar pash leste, vell leskri rholi pral toute, oun yob lell tout krik i phoubyatar." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Ma krenn yaake, har te vals o baro Devel gar pash t'mende oun dals t'men gar kova, hoy t'men hounte vell djipaske, yaake har kova kran, har hans an o foro Massa!" 
Deuteronomy6:17 Rikrenn mishto o baro Debleskre laba oun djivenn yaake, har t'maro Devel t'menge sikras. Krenn, hoy yob t'mendar kamell!" 
Deuteronomy6:18 Te krenn, hoy čačo oun lačo hi glan leskre yaka, djal t'menge mishto. Oun t'mer venn dren an ko lačo them, kolestar o baro Devel t'mare phourenge penas, te tradell lo kolen glan t'mende kote vin, kay t'men gar kamenn. Oun yob das ninna peskro vast koy pre." 
Deuteronomy6:19  
Deuteronomy6:20 Te vell ko tsiro, kay poučell tout tiro čavo: Hoske hounte rikras kol laba, hoy sikrenn, har te djivas, oun hoy maro baro Devel mendar kamell, oun hounte djivas pal leskre čačepaskre laba?" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Palle peness tou ap tiro čaveste: “Mer hams boudepangre o baro rayestar an o them Egiptia. Oun o baro Devel anas men vin dran Egiptia peskri bari zoryah. 
Deuteronomy6:22 Oun o baro Devel kras baro oun zorelo koova, hoy kek vavar nay krell oun anas bari bibarht pral i Egiptarya oun pral o baro rayeste oun koleskro tselo kheer. Kova dikam mare yakentsa." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Oun men las lo koy vin, te anell lo men an kava them, yaake har yob pes sovel das glan mare phourende, te dell lo men kava them." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Oun maro baro Devel penas, te kras kova lauter, hoy yob mendar kamell, oun te rikras les glan mare yaka pash halauter, hoy krah, te djal menge mishto an maro tselo djipen, yaake har kova kava dives ninna hi." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Mer te krah pal kal tsele laba oun shounah ap kova, hoy maro baro Devel menge penas, palle ham glan leste an o čačepen tardo.”" 
Deuteronomy7:1 T'maro baro Devel anell t'men an ko them, hoy t'maro vell. Oun yob tradell boud menshen glan t'mende vin: I Hetarya oun i Girgasharya oun i Amorarya oun i Kanaanitarya oun i Perisarya oun i Hivarya oun i Yebousarya. Kolla hi efta natsyone, kay hi bareder oun zorleder har t'mer." 
Deuteronomy7:2 Te dell t'maro baro Devel len an t'mare vasta, oun t'mer denn len, palle hounte marenn len halauteren. T'mer hounte krenn gar lentsa vin, te venn lengre mala, oun hounte sikrenn kek lačepen ap lende." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Ma romedinerenn kek lentsa! T'mare čen denn gar lengre morsh čavende! Oun lengre čen lenn gar t'mare morsh čavenge, te romedinerenn le len." 
Deuteronomy7:4 Kol ča anens t'mare morsh čaven o baro Debleskro dromestar tele, yaake te mangens le vavar deblen an. Palle vals o baro Debleskri rholi pral t'mende, oun sik marals yob t'men." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Doleske krenn kava lentsa: Vitsrenn kol pre-čidde barra trouyel, kay marenn le oun rhačrenn le firhen lengro debleske. Phagenn kol bare barra paash, hoy le leske pre-čivan! Oun denn kol kashta tele, hoy sikrenn i debletsa Ashera. Oun rhačrenn lengre figuren pre." 
Deuteronomy7:6 T'mer han menshe, kay hi o baro Debleske kokres koy. T'men rodas lo vin dran i menshen an i tsele themma, kay ap i phoub hi, te venn t'mer leskre menshe." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Kova kras lo gar doleske, kay hans boudeder har kol vavar. Na-a, t'mer han i tikneder natsyona har kol vavar." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Dran peskro kamlepen t'menge rodas o baro Devel t'men vin, te rikrell lo peskri sovel dren, hoy yob t'mare phourende das. Doleske anas lo t'men peskro zorelo vasteha vin dran o them, kay pandlo hans, dran o vast o Faraestar, ko rayestar pral Egiptia." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Djinenn: t'maro baro Devel hi kokres o čačo Devel. Yob rikrell peskro lab, oun hoy lo t'mentsa vin kras. Lačepen oun kamlepen dell lo kolende, hoy les o djiyestar kamenn oun krenn, hoy lo penell. Ninna lengre čavenge, kay pal lende venna, hi lo lačo, yaake rah har seri familye yek pal i vavar djivenn." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Oun kolen, kay kamenn lestar či te djinell, dell lo i phagi, oun marell len sik. Kek tsiro moukell lo pes, te anell lo lenge lengro čilačepen pale ap lengre sherya." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Yaake rikrenn t'men hako tsiro ap leskre laba, krenn, hoy lo t'mendar kamell, oun djivenn pal leskre čačepaskre laba, hoy kava dives t'menge penau." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Te shounenn t'mer leskro čačepen, oun rikrenn t'men ap leskre laba, oun djivenn pal lende, palle rikrell t'maro baro Devel, hoy lo t'mare phourentsa vin kras, oun peskro vast pre das, oun vell t'menge lačes." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Dran peskro kamlepen dell yob t'men barht oun boud čaven, ninna boud djob, mool oun djet. Oun t'mare groumya oun bakre venna boud an o them, kolestar yob glan t'mare phourende pes sovel das, te dell lo les t'mende." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Kek vavar menshe an i tsele themma lenn yaake boud barht. Kek hi mank t'mende, vitar gar mank t'mare firhende, kay nay lell kek ternepen." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Oun o baro Devel lell hako nasslepen t'mendar, oun anell kek savo nasslepen ap t'mende, hoy ap i menshende an o them Egiptia van, oun hoy t'mer prindjrenn. Na-a gar ap t'mende čivell lo len, ap hakeneste, kay ap t'mende pre djal, čivell lo len." 
Deuteronomy7:16 T'mer hounte marenn i tsele natsyone, hoy t'maro baro Devel an t'mare vasta dell. Yon hounte khaytenn t'men gar, oun lengre deblen hounte mangenn gar an. Yon anans t'men an i bibarht." 
Deuteronomy7:17 Te penenn t'mer an t'mare djia: “Kal natsyone hi bareder har mer, har nay tradas mer len vin?”" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Palle ma darenn lendar! Ma bistrenn, hoy t'maro baro Devel ap o Farao oun ap i tsele Egiptarya kras." 
Deuteronomy7:19 T'mer dikan, har lo peskri bari zoor sikras, oun kras sau koova, hoy kek vavar nay krell, oun anas boud bibarht ap i Egiptaryen. Peskro zorelo vasteha oun peskri pre-hadedi moussyah anas lo t'men vin. Yaake krell t'maro baro Devel i menshentsa an i tsele themma, kolendar t'mer darenn." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Kote pashel bičrell t'maro baro Devel bari bibarht oun daar ap lende bis te kolla, hoy pral ačenn oun pen glan t'mende khatrenn, ninna maredo van." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Doleske, ma dare lendar! T'maro baro Devel hi mashkral t'mende, ko baro zorelo Devel, glan koleste hakenes i daar taprell." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Yob tradell kal menshen vin glan t'mende, yek pal o vavar, oun hakeno peskro tsireske. T'mer nay denn len gar ap yek kopo moulo. Palle vans i divye firhe boudeder oun djans ap t'mende." 
Deuteronomy7:23 T'maro baro Devel dell len an tire vasta oun krell lenge dineles i daryatar, bis te halauter moulo dino hi." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Oun yob dell t'men lengre bare rayen an o vast. Oun t'mer marenn len, oun lengre laba venn bistedo. Kek nay vell zorleder har t'mer. T'mer marenn len halauter." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Rhačrenn i figure lengre deblendar! Ko roup oun ko sonakay, hoy ap lende hi, lenn gar tele t'menge, te venn t'mare djia gar pandles ap kova. Savo koova vals djoungeles glan t'maro baro Debleskre yaka." 
Deuteronomy7:26 T'mer hounte anenn kek savi figura an t'mare khera, te venn t'mer gar lentsa khetne moulo dino. Čačepah, dikenn ap lende har ap i djoungelo koova, oun denn len paash." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Rikrenn kol tsele laba, hoy t'menge kava dives penau. Djivenn pal lende! Yaake ačenn djido oun venn boud menshe, oun nay lenn ko them t'menge dren, kolestar o baro Devel glan t'mare phourende pes sovel das, te dell lo les lende." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Ma bistrenn, har djas t'maro baro Devel glan t'mende an kol 40 (star-deesh) bersha, har djan an o moulo tato them trouyel. Kote sikras lo t'men: Te hi lo gar t'mentsa, nay krenn či. Ninna kamas lo vin te hatsell, hoy an t'mare djia hi: Shounenn t'mer ap leskre laba oder gar?" 
Deuteronomy8:3 Oun yob moukas t'men te bokell, te hayvenn, t'maro rhapen vell lestar. Oun yob das t'men o Manna te rhal, hoy t'mer gar prindjran oun t'mare phoure vitar gar. Kova kras lo, te sikrell lo t'men, te djivell o mensho gar o rhapastar kokres. Na-a, i mensho djivell hako labestar, hoy dran o mouy o baro Deblestar vin djal." 
Deuteronomy8:4 An kol tsele star-deesh bersha djan t'mare koola ap t'mende gar paash, oun t'mare pire van gar pesso." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Yaake hayvenn t'mer an t'mare djia, t'maro baro Devel kras t'mentsa har i dad peskro čaveha." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Doleske denn yak ap i laba t'maro baro Deblestar, oun djan ap leskre drom, oun shounenn o tselo djiyeha ap leste." 
Deuteronomy8:7 T'maro baro Devel anell t'men an i lačo them. An kava them nashenna panya, hoy venn vin dran i phoub, oun nashenn i berge tele an i telstouno them." 
Deuteronomy8:8 An kava them vell gib oun djob bares, ninna drake, fayge, granatikre phabya. Djeteskre rouka oun gvin dell kote ninna." 
Deuteronomy8:9 Kova hi i them, kay hi boud rhapen t'menge. Halauterestar hi doha koy. An kava them hi ninna barra, kay saster dren hi. Oun an i berge nay denn lolo saster vin." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Oun te rhan oun van čales, palle sharenn t'maro baro Debles ko lačo themeske, hoy lo t'men das." 
Deuteronomy8:11 Denn t'men yak, te bistrenn gar t'maro baro Debles, yaake te denn gar bouder yak ap leskre laba, oun ap leskro čačepen, oun ap halauter, hoy yob t'mendar kamella, kova hoy me t'menge kava dives penau, te hounte krenn." 
Deuteronomy8:12 An ko tsiro, kay djal t'menge mishto, oun nay rhan t'menge čales, oun djivenn an shoukar khera," 
Deuteronomy8:13 oun t'men van boud groumya, bakre, roup oun sonakay, oun halauter hoy t'men hi, vas boudeder," 
Deuteronomy8:14 palle denn yak, te venn gar pre-phourdo, oun bistrenn t'maro baro Debles, koles, kay anas t'men vin dran o them Egiptia, kay t'mer pandle boudepangre hans." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Yob sikras t'men o drom an ko baro moulo tato them, kay t'men daar his, an koleste čilače sapa oun skorpione hi. Kote, kay o kham lauter pre rhačras, oun kek pani dell, moukas lo t'menge pani dran i baro zorelo bar te nashell," 
Deuteronomy8:16 oun das t'men Manna te rhal an o moulo tato them, ko maro, hoy t'mare phoure gar prindjran. Kote sikras lo t'men: Te hi lo gar t'mentsa, nay krenn či. Ninna kamas lo vin te hatsell, hoy an t'mare djia hi, te nay krell lo les t'menge pal kova mishto." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Oun t'mer te nay penenn gar an t'mare djia: Miri zoor oun mire vastengri boudi anas mange kava tselo bravlepen! 
Deuteronomy8:18 Doleske ma bistrenn t'maro baro Debles! Yob hi kova, kay tout i zoor das, te nay lenn t'menge bravlepen khetne. Oun yaake rikrell yob kova, hoy lo t'mare phourentsa vin kras. Ninna kava dives rikrell lo pes ap kova." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Ma bistrenn t'maro baro Debles! Ma nashenn vavar deblen palla! Oun ma vitsrenn t'men glan lende tele, te mangenn len an! Te krenn kova, palle dau t'men kava dives miro lab pre, te venn t'mer yaake moulo dino," 
Deuteronomy8:20 har kol vavar menshe, kay o baro Devel glan t'mende marell. Čačepah, t'mer te shounenn gar ap leskro rakepen, venn t'mer maredo." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Shounenn, t'mer menshe Israel! T'mer djan kava dives pral o pani Yordan, te lenn themma t'menge dren kol menshendar, kay hi bareder oun zorleder har t'mer. Lengre forya hi bares, oun bare massurya djan troul lende pre an o bolepen." 
Deuteronomy9:2 I menshe kote hi baro oun venn kharedo rise. T'mer shounan, har lendar penlo vas: Kek nay vell zorleder har yon." 
Deuteronomy9:3 Doleske djinenn kava dives, te djal t'maro baro Devel glan t'mende har i yag, hoy halauter pre rhačrell. Yob dell len, te hounte nashenn le penge t'mendar. Oun t'mer tradenn len vin oun denn len sik moulo. Yaake penas o baro Devel kova t'menge." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Pal kova, kay tradas len t'maro baro Devel glan t'mende vin, ma penenn: Dran maro čačo djipen anas men o baro Devel an kava them, te las le menge dren. Na-a, dran o čilačo djipen kol menshendar tradas len o baro Devel vin glan t'mende." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Hi gar doleske, te vans lače menshe oun t'men vals i djoudjo dji, te venn t'mer an ko them, te lenn les t'menge dren. Na-a, t'maro baro Devel tradell kol menshen vin ko čilačepaske, hoy le kran, te rikrell yob koy sovel dren, hoy lo t'mare phourende, o Abrahames oun o Isaakes oun o Yakobes, das." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Yaake djinenn kanna, hi gar dran t'maro čačo djipen, te dell t'men t'maro baro Devel kava lačo them, te lenn les t'menge dren. T'mer han menshe i djiyentsa har bar." 
Deuteronomy9:7 Ma bistrenn, har rhoyran t'maro baro Debles an o moulo them, Ko divesseha har djan t'mer vin dran o them Egiptia bis te van kate, kay kanna han, kaman gar ap leste te shounell." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Oun pash i berga Horeb kran t'mer o baro Debles yaake rhoyedo, te kamas lo t'men te marell." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Me homs pre ap i berga, te lap lestar kol barra, an koleste yob i deesh laba činas, hoy hounte rikrenn, te venn leskre menshe. Kote ačom me 40 (star-deesh) divessa oun ratsya. Maro rhom me kek, oun pani piyom me vitar gar." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Oun o baro Devel das man douy barra, an kolende yob peskro goushteha kol laba činas. Glan kova penas lo kol laba ap t'mende, har khetne van pash i berga, oun i berga pherdi yag his. Dran i yag vin rakras lo t'mentsa." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Har kol 40 (star-deesh) divessa oun ratsya trouyel his, das man o baro Devel kol douy barra, kay kol deesh laba dren činlo hi," 
Deuteronomy9:12 oun penas ap mande: “Naash, dja sik kay berga tele! Kol menshe, kay tou dran o them Egiptia vin anal, kran i čilačo koova. Sik djan le ko dromestar tele, kay me sikrom lende. Yon kran penge i devel dran sonakay.”" 
Deuteronomy9:13 Oun o baro Devel rakras pale mantsa oun penas: “Me dikau, kay djivenn kol menshe pal pengro shero oun kamenn gar te shounell." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Ma rike man pale, te anap miri bari rholi pral lende, oun dap len moulo, te vell lengro lab bistedo. Tire čavendar krau me i natsyona, hoy hi zorleder oun bareder har kaya.”" 
Deuteronomy9:15 Me rissrom man oun djom koy berga tele. Oun koy berga rhačas an i yag. Oun kol douy barra kol deesh labentsa his an mire vasta. 
Deuteronomy9:16 Oun me dikom, t'mer kran baro čilačepen ap t'maro baro Debleste. T'mer kran t'menge i sonakaskro terno gouroum oun djan sik tele ko dromestar, hoy o baro Devel sikras t'mende, te hounte djan." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Kote taprom me kol douy barra oun vitsrom len dran mire vasta vin, oun phagom len an kotya glan t'mare yaka." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Oun me vitsrom man tele glan o baro Debleste, oun homs čiddo glan leste har koy ersto kopo 40 (star-deesh) divessa oun ratsya. Maro rhom kek, oun pani piyom gar. Oun mangom les t'menge, te dikell lo gar ap t'mari bari doosh, hoy t'mer ap t'mende lan, har savo djoungelo koova kran, oun les yaake rhoyedo kran." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Leskri rholi ap t'mende his yaake baro, te darom, te marals yob t'men. Oun o baro Devel shounas ninna kava kopo ap mande." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Ninna ap o Aron his o baro Debles i bari rholi, oun yob kamas les te marell. Oun me mangom an ko tsiro ninna o Aroneske." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Oun ko terno gouroum, hoy kran t'menge oun yaake o Deblestar tele peran, kay figura lom me oun vitsrom lat an i yag, dom lat paash oun dom lat an save tikne kotya, te ačas či har stauba pral. Oun koy stauba vitsrom an ko pani, hoy kote i berga tele nashell." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Ninna kran t'mer t'maro baro Debles rhoyedo, har hans an Tabera oun Massa oun Kibrot-Taava." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Oun har bičras o baro Devel t'men dran o foro Kadesh-Barnea vin oun penas: “Djan pre oun lenn o them t'menge dren, hoy me t'men dom”, koy shounan gar ap leste, oun patsan les gar oun kran gar, hoy lo t'menge penas." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Yaake rah har prindjrau t'men, hi t'men sherya har barra oun krenn gar, hoy o baro Devel t'menge penell." 
Deuteronomy9:25 Oun har kamas o baro Devel t'men te marell, homs čiddo glan leste 40 (star-deesh) divessa oun 40 (star-deesh) ratsya." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Oun me mangom o baro Debles oun penom: “Baro Devel miro ray, ma mare tire menshen, kol menshen, kay tou vin lal dran o them Egiptia tiri bari zoryah oun tiro zorelo vasteha, te venn le tire menshe!" 
Deuteronomy9:27 Ma biste tire boudepangre, o Abraham oun o Isaak oun o Yakob! Ma dik koy pre, te hi kal menshen kay djia har barra. Ma dik ap lengro čilačepen, oun ap koy doosh hoy le ap pende anan." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Mouk i Egiptaryen gar te penell: O baro Devel nay anell len gar an ko them, kolestar yob penas, te dell lo les lenge. Mouk len gar te penell, te anal len vin an o moulo tato them dran tiri rholi, te merenn le kote." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Yon hi tire menshe, kolen tou vin lal dran o them Egiptia tiri bari zoryah oun tiro zorelo vasteha, te venn le tire menshe!”" 
Deuteronomy10:1 An ko tsiro penas o baro Devel ap mande: “De douy barra vin, har kol douy glanstoune, oun ab pre pash mande ap i berga, oun kre i kashteno morhton." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Oun me činau ap kol barra kol laba hoy ap kol glanstoune dren činlo his, kolen tou paash phagal. Oun tou čivess kol barra an kava morhton!”" 
Deuteronomy10:3 Oun me krom i morhton dran akatstikro kasht, oun dom douy barra vin, hoy yaake har kol glanstoune his, oun djom pre ap i berga. Oun kol douy barra his an mire vasta." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Oun har o glanstouno kopo činas yob kol deesh laba, kolen o baro Devel ap i berga dran i yag vin ap t'mende penas, har t'mer halauter koy khetne van. Oun o baro Devel das kol barra mande." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Oun me rissrom man oun djom i berga pale tele. Oun me čivom kol barra an ko morhton, hoy me krom. Oun kote hi le, yaake har o baro Devel mange penas." 
Deuteronomy10:6 Oun i Israelitarya moukan Beeroth-Bene-Yaakan pal pende oun djan doureder an Mosera. Kote meras o Aron oun vas paskedo. Oun leskro čavo, o Elazar vas rashay pal leste." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Foun kotar djan le doureder an Goudgoda oun kotar doureder bis pash Yotbata. Kote das boud pani. 
Deuteronomy10:8 Ko tsireske rodas peske o baro Devel kol morshen dran o kheer Levi vin, te hidjrenn yon o morhton, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi, oun te venn yon rashaya oun boudrenn leske, oun rakrenn an leskro lab barht vin pral i menshende. Oun kova krenn le ninna kava dives." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Doleske vell i Levitaryen kek them har lengre phralen. Kova hoy yon lenna, vell dran lengri boudi o baro Debleske. Kova penas lenge t'maro baro Devel." 
Deuteronomy10:10 Me ačom ap i berga star-deesh divessa oun star-deesh ratsya har ko ersto kopo. Oun o baro Devel shounas ninna kava kopo miro mangepen oun das t'men gar moulo. 
Deuteronomy10:11 Oun o baro Devel penas ap mande: “Ste pre! Oun dja glan i menshende vin, te venn le an ko them oun lenn les penge dren, ko them, kolestar man glan lengre phourende sovel dom, te dap les lende.”" 
Deuteronomy10:12 Oun kanna Israel, shoun, hoy t'maro baro Devel kamell, te kress! Tou mangess les an, djas ap leskro drom an halauter hoy tou kreh. Tou kamess les o tselo djiyestar, oun vess leske koy tiri tseli zoryah." 
Deuteronomy10:13 Djib pal leskro lab, oun rike leskre čačepaskre laba, hoy touke kava dives penau. Palle djal touke mishto." 
Deuteronomy10:14 O baro Debleske hi o bolepen, lauter hoy an o pralstunepen hi. Oun ninna i phoub oun lauter hoy dren hi, hi leskro." 
Deuteronomy10:15 T'mare phouren kamas lo o djiyestar. Oun t'mer, kay lendar van, rodas lo peske vin mank i menshende dran an i tsele vavar themma. Oun ninna kava dives han t'mer leskre vi-rodede menshe." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Doleske shounenn kanna ap o baro Debleste, oun djan gar bouder pal t'maro shero!" 
Deuteronomy10:17 T'maro baro Devel hi o Devel pral hako devel oun o ray pral hako ray. Yob hi o baro oun o zorelo, kolestar halauter darenn. Yob dikell gar koy pre, koon yek hi. Oun yob lell či an, hoy kamell yek les te dell, te rissrell lo o čačepen trouyel." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Yob dikell koy pre, te lenn pengro čačepen kol čave, kolen kek dad bouder hi, ninna kol djouvya, kolengro rom meras. Oun i vi-themaryen kamell yob o djiyeha oun dell len rhapen oun koola an-ripaske." 
Deuteronomy10:19 T'mer hans ninna vi-themarya an o them Egiptia. Doleske hounte kamenn t'mer i vi-themaryen ninna o tselo djiyestar. 
Deuteronomy10:20 Oun hounte shounenn ap t'maro baro Debleste oun mangenn les kokres an. Rikrenn t'men ap leste kokres. Te denn t'men sovel, denn t'maro sovel pash leskro lab." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Yob hi kova, koleske sharenn t'men i vavar menshe. Yob hi t'maro Devel, kay kras savo baro oun zorelo koova pash t'mende. Kova dikan t'mer t'mare yakentsa." 
Deuteronomy10:22 70 (efta-deesh) menshe his t'mare phoure, har le an o them Egiptia tele djan. Oun kanna kras t'maro baro Devel t'mendar yaake boud har i bolepangre momlia." 
Deuteronomy11:1 O Mose penas doureder ap i Israelitaryen: T'mer hounte kamenn t'maro baro Debles o tselo djiyestar! Krenn lauter, hoy lo t'mendar kamell. Rikrenn t'men ap leskre čačepaskre laba, oun djivenn pal leskre laba yaake rah har djivenn." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Oun lenn kava dives an o dji, hoy sikras o baro Devel t'mende, oun gar t'mare čavende. Kolla djinenn kova gar. Yon dikan les gar. T'mer han, kay dikan leskro raylepen oun hoy lo t'menge kras peskri zorelo vasteha oun pre-hadedi moussyah." 
Deuteronomy11:3 Savo baro koova, hoy kek vavar nay krella, kras yob ap i Egiptaryen, ap o Faraeste, ko rayeste pral o them Egiptia, oun ap leskro tselo them," 
Deuteronomy11:4 ninna ap leskre lourdende, kay t'menge palla lan. Pral lengre graya oun vourdya moukas yob o pani khetne te phagell. Oun yon lauter tassan an o Baro Lolo Pani. Yaake hi kova bis kava dives." 
Deuteronomy11:5 T'mer djinenn, hoy lo an o moulo tato them t'menge kras, bis te van kate ap kay platsa," 
Deuteronomy11:6 oun hoy lo kras ap o Datan oun ap o Abiram, kolengro dad o Eliab his dran o kheer Ruben: Har i phoub peskro mouy pre kras oun len mashkral i tsele menshende Israel pre rhas, len oun lengre tsele menshen oun lengre plarhtene khera, ninna lengre boudepangre oun firhe, hoy pash lende his." 
Deuteronomy11:7 T'mer dikan t'mare yakentsa ko tselo baro kova, hoy o baro Devel kras." 
Deuteronomy11:8 Doleske rikrenn t'men ap i tsele laba, hoy t'menge kava dives penau. Palle han zoreles doha, te lenn ko them t'menge dren, an koleste kanna djan." 
Deuteronomy11:9 Oun t'mer djivenn i rah tsiro an ko lačo oun bravelo them, hoy o baro Devel pes glan t'mare phourende sovel das, te dell lo les lende oun lengre čavende pal lende." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Kava them an kova t'mer venna, te lenn les t'menge dren, hi gar har ko them Egiptia, dran koleste t'mer vin djan. Kote hounte boudran phares te anenn o pani ap t'mari harhetikri phoub." 
Deuteronomy11:11 Kava them, kay kanna djan, hi i them, kay dell brishin, hoy perell dran o bolepen ap i berge oun ap o telstouno them," 
Deuteronomy11:12 hi i them, ap koleste t'maro baro Devel yak dell. Leskre yaka dikenn o tselo bersh lačes ap leste." 
Deuteronomy11:13 Yaake shounenn ap kol laba, hoy t'menge kava dives penau, te kamenn t'maro baro Debles o tselo djiyestar oun venn leske koy t'mari tseli zoryah." 
Deuteronomy11:14 Palle dell yob o brishin ap t'maro them an peskro tsiro, an o niyal oun an o vend, te nay anenn t'maro djob dren, ninna t'mari mool oun djet." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Oun me moukau o zenlepen ap tiri phoub pre te djal tire firhenge. T'men hi hako tsiro doha te rhal. 
Deuteronomy11:16 Denn t'men yak, te moukenn t'men gar krik te anell o baro Debleskro dromestar, oun perenn lestar tele oun mangenn vavar deblen an, oun vitsrenn t'men glan lende tele." 
Deuteronomy11:17 Te krenn savo koova, nashte vell i rholi o baro Deblestar pral t'mende, oun yob pandell o bolepen tele, te dell bouder gar brishin, oun i phoub nay moukell či pre te djal. Palle merenn t'mer sik vin an kava lačo them, hoy o baro Devel t'men das." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Ma bistrenn kal laba! Čivenn len ap t'mare djia, oun pandenn len troul t'mare moussya oun troul t'maro shero, te bistrenn len gar!" 
Deuteronomy11:19 Oun penenn len t'mare čavenge. Rakrenn kol labendar, te han khere, oun ninna te djan ap o drom, te čivenn t'men tele, oun ninna te stenn pre." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Oun činenn len ap i pesse kashta čačes oun serves pash t'maro khereskro voudar oun ap i foreskre voudya. 
Deuteronomy11:21 Palle ačenn t'mer an kava them, kolestar t'maro baro Devel glan t'mare phourende pes sovel das, te dell lo les t'mende, oun djivenn kote yaake rah har o bolepen pral i phoub hi." 
Deuteronomy11:22 Te krenn t'mer kova lauter, hoy me penom, te hounte krenn, oun kamenn t'maro baro Debles t'maro tselo djiyestar, oun djan ap leskre tsele dromma, oun rikrenn t'men ap leste," 
Deuteronomy11:23 palle tradell o baro Devel i menshen dran kal tsele themma glan t'mende vin. Oun t'mer lenn i themma save menshendar t'menge dren, kay hi boudeder oun zorleder har t'mer." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Hako kotar phoub ap koleste t'mare pire stakrenn, hi t'menge, o tselo them mank o moulo tato them oun i berge Libanon, oun mank o lengsto pani Eufrat oun o Mashkralstouno Baro Pani." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Kek nay ačell glan t'mende tardo, Traash oun daar moukell t'maro baro Devel ap i menshende an o tselo them te vell glan t'mende, yaake har yob les t'menge penas." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Kava dives moukau t'men vin rodell: Kamenn t'mer o Debleskri barht? Kamenn t'mer i bibarht o Deblestar? 
Deuteronomy11:27 I barht vell ap t'mende, te shounenn ap i laba t'maro baro Deblestar, kol laba, hoy me t'menge kava dives penau." 
Deuteronomy11:28 I bibarht vell ap t'mende, te shounenn t'mer gar ap i laba t'maro baro Deblestar, oun djan leskro dromestar tele, oun djan vavar deblenge palla, kolen t'mer gar prindjrenn." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Te anell t'men t'maro baro Devel an ko them, an koleste t'mer venn, te lenn les t'menge dren, palle denn koy barht vin gole ap i berga Garizim, oun i bibarht ap i berga Ebal." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Kolla hi kol douy berge ap i vavar rig o panyestar Yordan pash ko drom, hoy djal kote, kay o kham tele djal, an o telstouno them, kay o Yordan nashell oun kay i Kanaanitarya djivenn. Kol berge hi gar dour kol bare roukendar pash Gilgal." 
Deuteronomy11:31 T'mer djan čačepah pral o Yordan, oun venn an ko them dren, te lenn les t'menge dren. Kava them das t'men t'maro baro Devel, te lenn les t'menge dren oun djivenn koy." 
Deuteronomy11:32 Yaake denn yak ap halauter, hoy o baro Devel t'mendar kamell, oun ap leskre tsele čačepaskre laba, hoy me t'menge kava dives penau. Oun djivenn koy pal!" 
Deuteronomy12:1 Kanna penau t'menge, hoy o Devel t'mendar kamella oun leskre čačepaskre laba, hoy hounte rikrenn an ko them, hoy dell t'men o baro Devel, kay ninna o Devel t'mare phourendar his, te lenn les t'menge dren. Denn yak ap kal laba, oun rikrenn t'men ap lende yaake rah har djivenn." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Te vas ko tsiro, kay lan t'mer ko them dren oun tradan kol vavar menshen vin, palle denn kol tsele platse paash, kay yon pengre deblen an-mangan, ap i bare oun tikne berge, ninna tel bare zenele rouka." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Vitsrenn kol pre-čidde barra trouyel, kay maran le oun rhačran le firhen pengro debleske. Phagenn kol bare barra paash, hoy le leske pre-čivan! Oun rhačrenn kol kashta, hoy sikrenn i debletsa Ashera. Oun denn lengre figuren an kotya! Či te ačell lendar pral." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Ma mangenn t'maro baro Debles yaake an, har kol vavar menshe lengre deblen an-mangenn." 
Deuteronomy12:5 Mangenn o baro Debles ap i platsa an, hoy yob peske vin rodell mashkral an o them Israel, te djivell lo kote. Kote djan, te mangenn les an." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Oun kote anenn kol firhen, hoy kamenn leske te marell, save, hoy venn leske tseles rhačedo, oun save, kolengro rat leske rhačedo vell. Kote anenn ninna o deshto kotar kolestar, hoy t'menge dren anan, oun ko vavar koova, hoy glan činlo hi, oun kova hoy denna yaake, har t'men sovel dan, ninna kova, hoy hakeno pestar della, oun save bakre oun gourma, kay i phoureder lengre dayendar hi." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Oun t'mer oun t'mare familye rhan i rhapen kote glan t'maro baro Debleste, oun avenn barhtelo pral halauter, hoy t'menge khetne anan, ap koleste t'maro baro Devel peskri barht čivas." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Ma krenn yaake, har mer kava dives kate krah, kay hakeno krell, har an leskre yaka mishto hi." 
Deuteronomy12:9 Kanna van gomme gar khere an ko them, hoy t'men t'maro baro Devel dell, te vell les t'maro." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Te djan vergel o pani Yordan oun djivenn an ko them, hoy t'maro baro Devel t'men dell te venn kote khere, nay krell kek t'men kote čilačepen, oun kek rodell kourepen t'mentsa." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Palle hi vavarčandes har kanna: Palle anenn kova, hoy denn o baro Debleste, ap koy platsa, hoy yob peske vin rodas, te vell lo kote an-mangedo. Kote anenn lauter, hoy me t'menge penau: kol firhen, hoy kamenn leske te marell, save, hoy venn leske tseles rhačedo oun save, hoy rhan khetne. Kote anenn ninna o deshto kotar kolestar, hoy dren anan, oun ko vavar koova, hoy glan činlo hi, oun kova hoy denna yaake har t'men sovel dan." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Kote glan t'maro baro Debleste avenn barhteles, t'mer oun t'mare čave oun ča oun t'mare boudepangre, morsha oun djouvya, ninna i Levitarya, kay djivenn an t'mare forya, kolen kek them mank t'mende hi." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Denn t'men yak, te anenn gar kol firhen, hoy t'mer o Debleske rhačrenn, ap i vavar platsa, hoy hatsenn an o them!" 
Deuteronomy12:14 Kokres ap koy platsa, hoy o baro Devel vin rodell an t'maro them, kote anenn kol firhen, hoy kamenn leske te rhačrell, oun kote krenn halauter, hoy me t'menge penau." 
Deuteronomy12:15 An t'mare gaba oun forya nay marenn yaake boud t'mare firhendar har kamenn, oun har t'maro baro Devel t'mende das, oun nay rhan lengro mass. T'mer halauter nay rhan kolestar, erlige menshe har pale-čidde. Kova hi yaake, har rhans i vesheskri bouzni oder i tserfo." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Kokres o rat ma rhan! Koles čorenn ap i phoub har pani. 
Deuteronomy12:17 Kolestar, hoy o baro Debleske hi, ma rhan: ko deshto t'maro djobestar, molyatar oun djetestar, vitar gar kol groumya oun bakre, hoy i phoureder lengre dayendar hi, vitar gar kova koleske t'men sovel dan, oun kova hoy kamenn t'mendar kokres te dell, oun ko vavar koova, hoy glan činlo hi." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Kova vell anlo glan t'maro baro Debleste ap koy platsa, hoy yob peske vin rodell. Kote rhan t'mer les, t'mer oun t'mare čave oun ča, oun t'mare boudepangre, morsha har djouvya, oun i Levitarya, kay pash t'mende djivenn. Avenn barhtelo glan t'maro Debleste pral halauter, hoy t'mare vastentsa khetne lan." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Ma bistrenn i Levitaryen oun denn lende, hoy len hounte vell, yaake rah har an t'maro them djivenn." 
Deuteronomy12:20 Te dell t'maro baro Devel – yaake har lo rakras – t'mende boudeder them, oun t'men hi bok ap mass, palle rhan mass an t'mare gaba oun forya, yaake boud har kamenn!" 
Deuteronomy12:21 T'mer hounte djan doleske gar ap koy platsa, hoy t'maro baro Devel vin rodell, te vell lo kote an-mangedo. Lauter, kay djivenn dour koy platsa, nay marenn oun rhan lengre groumyendar, bakrendar oun bouzyendar, hoy o baro Devel len das, yaake boud har yon kamenn – kote an lengre forya, kay le djivenn. Yaake penau les t'menge." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Krenn yaake har te rhans i vesheskri bouzni oder i tserfo. Ko mensho, kay erligo hi, ninna kova, kay pale-čiddo hi, kol douy nay rhan ko massestar." 
Deuteronomy12:23 Kokres yek koova rikrenn dren! Ma rhan o mass, kay hi gomme o rat dren! An o rat hi o djipen. Oun t'mer hounte rhan gar o djipen khetne o masseha." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Čore o rat vin ap i phoub har pani. 
Deuteronomy12:25 Te krenn yaake, hi kova mishto glan o baro Debleskre yaka, oun t'menge oun t'mare čavenge pal t'mende djal mishto." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Ko vavar koova, hoy glan činlo hi, hoy hounte denn o Debleste, ninna koleske sovel dan, te denn les leste, kova anenn ap koy platsa, hoy o baro Devel peske vin rodell." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Kote rhačrenn leske kol firhen, hoy venn tseles rhačedo, lengro mass oun rat. Kol vavarendar, hoy t'mer rhan, čore o rat ap o baro Debleskri rhačepaskri vin." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Denn yak, te rikrenn mishto lauter dren, hoy penom t'menge. Te djivenn yaake, hi kova mishto oun lačo glan t'maro baro Debleskre yaka. Oun t'menge oun t'mare čavenge pal t'mende djal mishto hako tsireske." 
Deuteronomy12:29 T'maro baro Devel tradell i vavar menshen glan t'mende vin dran o them, kay t'mer venna. Oun t'mer lenn lengro them t'menge dren oun djivenn kote." 
Deuteronomy12:30 Ap ko tsiro, kay yon bouder gar koy hi, denn t'men yak, te moukenn t'men gar ap lengre dromma te anell! Ma poučenn: Har mangan kolla pengre deblen an? Yaake kamah mer les ninna te krell." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Ma krenn sau kova t'maro baro Debleha! Kova lauter, hoy yon pengre deblenge kran, hi djoungelo oun čilačo glan o baro Debleskre yaka. Ninna pengre morsh čaven oun pengre čen rhačran le lenge an i yag." 
Deuteronomy13:1 Lauter, hoy t'menge penom, hounte krenn oun rikrenn. Čivenn koleske či pashel, oun lenn či lestar krik!" 
Deuteronomy13:2 Te stell mashkral t'mende i rakepaskro pre, kay penell, te hi les i lab o Deblestar, oder i vavar, koles sounya hi, oun yob penell i debleskro sikepen oder i baro koova glan-vi," 
Deuteronomy13:3 oun penell ninna: “Mer djas vavar deblen palla, hoy t'mer gar prindjrenn, oun mangas len an”, palle shounenn gar ap saveste, ninna te vell kova čačo, hoy yob penas. T'maro baro Devel kamell te dikell, te kamenn les t'mare tsele djiyentsa oun t'mari tseli zoryah." 
Deuteronomy13:4  
Deuteronomy13:5 Leske djan palla! Rikrenn les t'menge glan i yaka pash halauter, hoy krenn! Lauter, hoy yob penas, krenn! Shounenn ap leste! Mangenn les an! Oun rikrenn t'men ap leste!" 
Deuteronomy13:6 Oun ko rakepaskro, ninna kova, koles kol sounya hi, yob hounte vell maredo. Yob kamas t'men t'maro baro Deblestar krik te anell, kolestar, kay anas t'men vin dran o them Egiptia oun las t'men vin dran o pandepen. Ko mensho kamas te djan t'mer tele o dromestar, hoy t'maro baro Devel penas, te hounte djan ap leste. Oun t'mer hounte vitsrenn vin o čilačepen, hoy mashkral t'mende hi." 
Deuteronomy13:7 Nay vell, te rakrell yek čorrhanes ap toute: Mer djas oun mangas vavar deblen an, kolen gar prindjreh, vitar gar tire phoure prindjran! Kova nay hi tiro phraal, tiro čavo oder tiri čay, tiri romni oder tiro maal, koles o djiyestar kameh." 
Deuteronomy13:8 Nay vell, te penell lo: Mange kol debles an kol menshendar, kay hi troul toute, oder ko debles kol menshendar, kay hi dour toutar. Kay le ninna hi ap i tseli phoub," 
Deuteronomy13:9 ma kre, hoy yob toutar kamell, oun shoun gar ap leste! Yob te khaytell tout gar! Tout vell kek dji leske! Ma khate leskri doosh!" 
Deuteronomy13:10 Na-a, tou dess les moulo. Tou vess o ersto, kay lell i bar an peskro vast, te vitsress ap leste, oun pal toute i tsele vavar." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Yob kamas tout krik te anell tiro baro Deblestar, kolestar, kay tout vin anas dran o pandepen an o them Egiptia. Doleske hounte vell yob moules vitsedo i barrentsa." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Palle shounenn kova i tsele Israelitarya oun darenn. Oun kek bouder krell sau čilačo koova mashkral t'mende. 
Deuteronomy13:13 Te shounenn i forestar, hoy t'maro baro Devel t'men das, te djivenn koy dren," 
Deuteronomy13:14 te hi kote či-molde, kay anan vavaren o čačo dromestar tele oun penan: Avenn, mer djas oun mangas vavar deblen an, kolen t'mer gar prindjrenn," 
Deuteronomy13:15 palle rodenn mishto, oun poučenn palla, oun dikenn pal, te hi čačo. Te kran le kova, oun savo djoungelo koova vas mashkral t'mende kerdo," 
Deuteronomy13:16 palle denn kol menshen an ko foro o rhareha moulo. Lauter hounte venn moulo dino, ninna lengre firhe." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Oun lengro tselo bravlepen anenn khetne mashkral ap o foreskri platsa! Oun rhačrenn ko tselo foro pre oun lauter, hoy an leste hi, t'maro baro Debleske! Či har barra hounte ačell pral ko forestar hako tsireske. Oun an kek tsiro vell lo bouder neves kerdo." 
Deuteronomy13:18 Oun rikrenn t'menge či kolestar, hoy hounte kran paash! Palle lell o baro Devel peskri bari rholi t'mendar krik, oun vell t'menge lačo, oun krell t'menge pale peskro dji pre, te krell lo t'mendar boud oun boudeder menshe, yaake har lo pes glan t'mare phourende sovel das." 
Deuteronomy13:19 Shounenn ap leskro rakepen oun rikrenn leskre tsele laba, hoy t'menge kava dives penau! Oun krenn, hoy glan i yaka t'maro baro Deblestar mishto hi!" 
Deuteronomy14:1 T'mer han i čave t'maro baro Deblestar. An ko tsiro, kay rovenn i mouleske, ma činenn t'maro mass leske! Oun ma činenn i balla pral t'mare yaka!" 
Deuteronomy14:2 T'mer han o baro Debleskre menshe. Yob hi t'maro Devel. T'men rodas lo vin dran i tsele themma ap i phoub, te venn i natsyona, hoy leske hi." 
Deuteronomy14:3 Tou rhas či, hoy glan o baro Debleskre yaka pale-čiddo hi." 
Deuteronomy14:4 Kalla hi i firhe, hoy nay rhan: Grumya, bakre, bouzya," 
Deuteronomy14:5 tserfe oun vesheskre bouzya, divye bakre oun bouzya, antilope," 
Deuteronomy14:6 oun hako firho, koles pre-phagede pire hi, tseles pre-phagedo hounte venn le, oun hoy o rhapen douy kope rhal. Kolen nay rhan." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Mank kolende, kay o rhapen douy kope rhan, hi save, hoy hounte rhan t'mer gar: I khamela oun o shoshoy, oun o bergetikro shoshoy. Kolen hi kek pre-phagede pire. Pale-čiddo venn le t'menge." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Oun o bales hounte rhan gar, ninna te hi les pre phagede pire. O balo rhal o rhapen gar douy kope. Pale-čiddo vell lo t'menge. O mass kek kal firhendar hounte rhan. Vitar gar taprenn len an, te hi le moulo." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Kalla hi i firhe, hoy nay rhan t'mer kolendar, kay an o pani djivenn: Halauter, hoy len flosse oun shouppe hi, nay rhan." 
Deuteronomy14:10 Halauter, hoy len kek flosse oun kek shouppe hi, ma rhan! Pale-čiddo venn le t'menge!" 
Deuteronomy14:11 Hi čirkle koy, kay nay rhan t'mer, oun vavar kay nay rhan gar. Kolla venn t'menge pale-čiddo." 
Deuteronomy14:12 Kalla hi i čirkle, hoy t'mer nay rhan gar: i adlarya, kay rhan tikne bakre, karhya oun mače," 
Deuteronomy14:13 vavar massengre čirkle," 
Deuteronomy14:14 hake korake; 
Deuteronomy14:15 ninna i straussetikre karhya oun i moulengre čirkle, panyeskre meve oun o habichto oun hake čirkle dran leskri familja;" 
Deuteronomy14:16 oun o tikno ratsyakro čirklo, o panyeskro čirklo, hoy kharell cormorano, oun o baro ratsyakro čirklo;" 
Deuteronomy14:17 vavar ratsyakre čirkle oun i moulo-massengre čirkle; 
Deuteronomy14:18 oun o storko oun hake mačengre čirkle; oun o vesheskro bashno oun i čirklengre kermuse. 
Deuteronomy14:19 Oun i tsele tikne firhe, hoy pral i phoub djan, hoy len čirklengre moussya hi, venn t'menge pale-čiddo. T'mer rhan len gar!" 
Deuteronomy14:20 I tsele čirkle, hoy gar pale-čiddo hi, nay rhan t'mer." 
Deuteronomy14:21 T'mer hounte rhan kek mass i firhestar, hoy moules trouyel čiddo hi. I vi-themares, kay djivell an t'maro foro, koles nay denn les, te rhal yob les. Ninna nay bikrenn les ap yekeste dran o vi-them. T'mer han menshe, kay hi o baro Debleske koy, kay t'maro Devel hi. Tou keress gar i bouzyakro ternepen an o thoud leskri datar." 
Deuteronomy14:22 Hako bersh čivess tou o baro Debleske ap i rig o deshto kotar halauterestar, hoy ap tiri harhetikri phoub bares vas." 
Deuteronomy14:23 An ko deshto kotar tiro djobestar, tiri molyatar oun tiro djetestar glan tiro baro Debleste ap koy platsa, hoy yob peske vin rodella, te vell lo kote an-mangedo. An leske ninna kol groumya, bakre oun bouzya, kay hi o phoureder lengre dayendar. Rha kote ko rhapen oun ko mass kal firhendar. Yaake bistreh gar, te djivess tiro baro Debleha tiro tselo djipen." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Te čivell tiro baro Devel peskri barht ap toute, oun tout vell boud rhapen, oun koy platsa, hoy yob peske vin rodas, te vell yob kote an-mangedo, hi yaake dour krik toutar, te nay hidjreh gar ko deshto kotar kote," 
Deuteronomy14:25 palle bike kova lauter, oun le kol love oun dja pash koy platsa, hoy tiro baro Devel peske vin rodas," 
Deuteronomy14:26 oun gin touke halauter, hoy tiro dji kamell: groumya, bakre, mool oun vavar zorelo pipen, oder vavar koova, hoy tiro dji kamell, oun rha kote glan tiro baro Debleste! Oun ab barhtelo, tou oun tiri familya oun tire boudepangre," 
Deuteronomy14:27 ninna i Levitarya, kay an tiro foro djivenn; kolen dess tou ninna tiro rhapastar. Yon lan o baro Deblestar kek them oun kek phoub, har tou lal." 
Deuteronomy14:28 Hako triinto bersh less o tselo deshto kotar halauterestar, hoy tou dren anal an ko bersh, oun čivess les an tiro foro." 
Deuteronomy14:29 Palle nay venn i Levitarya, kolen kek phoub hi, kay an tiro foro djivenn, ninna i vi-themarya, i čave, kolen kek dad bouder hi, oun i djouvya, kolengro rom meras, oun yon te rhan oun venn čales. Te krenn t'mer yaake, čivell t'maro baro Devel peskri barht ap halauter, hoy krenna." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Hake efta bersha, hounte moukenn t'mer koy siyaan, hoy yekes pash t'mende hi." 
Deuteronomy15:2 Krenn kova yaake: Hakeno, kay i vavar Israelitares love patsas, moukell leske kanna koy siyaan. Yob te mangell gar koy siyaan pale leskro phralestar. Hi i baro Debleskro bersh, kay i tseli siyaan mouklo vell." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Yekestar, kay hi i vi-themari, nay mangenn t'mer leskri siyaan pale. T'maro phraleske hounte moukenn lat." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Te shounenn t'mer ap t'maro baro Debleste oun djivenn pal kol tsele laba, hoy me t'menge kava dives penau, palle vell kek čorvelo mank t'mende. T'maro baro Devel čivell peskri barht ap t'mende an ko them, hoy yob t'men dell." 
Deuteronomy15:5  
Deuteronomy15:6 Yob rikrell peskro lab, hoy lo t'mende das, oun dell t'men yaake boud, te nay patsenn t'mer love i menshenge dran vavar themma. T'mer hounte patsenn t'menge kekestar love. T'mer venn i raya pral i menshende an boud vavar themma. Pral t'mende vell kek vavar them o ray." 
Deuteronomy15:7 Te hi i čorvelo pash toute, kote an ko foro, kay djiveh an ko them, hoy t'maro baro Devel t'men das, palle ma kre tiro dji pandles, kre tire vasta pre glan leste!" 
Deuteronomy15:8 Kre tire vasta leske dour pre! Oun pats leske love ap kova, hoy yob touke koy čivell, te vell les ap halauter pale doha." 
Deuteronomy15:9 De tout yak, te vell touke gar an o dji, te dess les či doleske, kay ko eftato bersh gar bouder dour hi. Ma pen touke: Palle hounte moukap leske koy tseli siyaan. Oun yaake dikeh čilačes ap leste oun deh leste či. Oun yob dell gole ap o baro Debleste pral toute. Oun ap toute vell i doosh!" 
Deuteronomy15:10 De leste o djiyestar! Ma ab bokelo! Palle dell tout tiro baro Devel barht an halauter, hoy kreh oun tiro vast an taprell." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Hako tsiro hi čorvele an o them. Doleske penau me t'menge: Krenn t'mare vasta pre t'mare phralenge, kolen gar doha djipaske hi!" 
Deuteronomy15:12 Te bikras pes i vavar Israelitari ap toute, – morsh oder djouvel – palle boudrell lo touke shob bersha, oun an o eftato bersh moukess les te djal." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Oun te moukeh les te djal, palle hounte djal lo gar vastentsa, kay či dren hi." 
Deuteronomy15:14 Tou dess les tire bakrendar, tiro djobestar oun tiri molyatar, halauterestar, hoy tiro baro Devel tout das." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Oun tou bistress gar, te hals i boudepaskro an o them Egiptia, oun tiro baro Devel las tout kote vin. Doleske penau me touke kova kava dives." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Yob te penell ap toute: “Me kamau gar toutar te djal. Kamau tout oun tiri familya o djiyestar. Pash toute djal mange mishto.” 
Deuteronomy15:17 Palle less i kashteni soub oun dess lat an leskro kand ap tiro voudar čourye. Yaake vell lo tiro boudepaskro hako tsireske. I boudepaskretsah kress kova ninna yaake. 
Deuteronomy15:18 Te hounte moukess i boudepaskres te djal, mouk kova touke gar phares te vell an tire yaka. Yob boudras touke shob bersha yaake boud har douy boudepangre, kolen hako dives hounte playsress. Palle dell tout tiro baro Devel barht an halauter, hoy tou kreh." 
Deuteronomy15:19 Tire tsele morsh groumya oun bakre, kay i phoureder lengre dayendar hi, hounte dess tiro baro Debleste. Kal groumyentsa boudress gar ap tiri harhetikri phoub, vitar gar činess kal bakrenge i balla." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Glan tiro baro Debleste rhas len tou oun tiro tselo kheer hako bersh ap koy platsa, hoy o baro Devel peske vin rodell." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Te hi čomone djoungelo ap ko firho, te hi les i bangi heri, te hi lo korelo, oder i vavar doosh hi ap leste, palle rhačress les tou gar tiro baro Debleske." 
Deuteronomy15:22 An tiro foro nay rhah les. Hi yek, te hal erligo oder pale-čiddo. Kova hi yaake, har rhals i vesheskri bouzni oder i tserfo." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Kokres lakro rat rhas tou gar! Tou čoress les ap i phoub har pani. 
Deuteronomy16:1 Denn yak, te bistrenn gar kol bare divessa, kay kharenn Passa! Rikrenn len an o čon Abib, te sharenn t'maro baro Debles! O čon Abib his, kay anas lo t'men rati dran o them Egiptia vin." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Djan ap koy platsa, hoy t'maro baro Devel peske vin rodell, te vell yob kote an-mangedo. Oun kote marenn leske i firho, nay vell i bakro, i bouzni oder i groumni, hoy rhan pash o rhapen, hoy vell Passa kharedo." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Te rhan t'mer ko rhapen, ma rhan maro koy pashel, kay shoutlo yarro dren hi. Har djan t'menge dran o them Egiptia vin, hounte rhan efta divessa maro, an koleste kek shoutlo yarro dren his, yaake sik hounte nashenn t'menge. Kanna rhan ninna efta divessa maro, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi, te bistrenn gar ko dives, kay djan dran o them Egiptia vin, kay anan le yaake boud douka ap t'mende. Doleske kharah mer kava maro doukengro maro." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Oun efta divessa vell kek shoutlo yarro pash t'mende diklo an t'maro tselo them. Oun ko mass ko firhestar, hoy t'mer an koy rat maran, hounte rhan t'mer an koy emligi rat. Či te ačell pral ap i tsalla." 
Deuteronomy16:5 T'mer nay marenn gar kol firhen o rhapaske Passa an t'mare gaba oun forya, kolen t'maro baro Devel t'men dell, te djivenn kote." 
Deuteronomy16:6 Na-a, ap koy platsa, hoy t'maro baro Devel peske vin rodell, kote marenn kol firhen o rhapaske Passa. Krenn kova ap i rat, te djal o kham tele. Kova hi ko tsiro, har t'mer dran o them Egiptia vin djan." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Kerenn ko mass, oun rhan les ap koy platsa, hoy t'maro baro Devel peske vin rodell. Oun o vavar dives taysarlakro djan pale khere!" 
Deuteronomy16:8 Palle rhan shob divessa savo maro, an koleste kek shoutlo yarro hi! Oun ap o eftato dives avenn khetne, te sharenn t'maro baro Debles! Ap ko dives krenn kek boudi!" 
Deuteronomy16:9 Efta kourke pal ko dives, kay djan vin ap t'mari phoub te činenn o djob tele," 
Deuteronomy16:10 avenn khetne glan t'maro baro Debleste, ap koy platsa, kay yob peske vin rodell, te vell lo kote an-mangedo. Anenn leske kolestar, hoy dren anan, kova, hoy kamenn t'mendar vin dran t'maro vast te dell, yaake har t'maro baro Devel t'mende peskri barht das. Oun avenn barhteles glan leste, t'mer oun t'mare čave, oun t'mare boudepangre oun i Levitarya oun i vi-themarya, kay pash t'mende djivenn, ninna kol čave kek dadeha oun kol djouvyen kolengro rom meras." 
Deuteronomy16:11  
Deuteronomy16:12 Oun ma bistrenn, te hans t'mer pandle boudepangre an o them Egiptia. Oun denn yak ap kal laba, te rikrenn t'men ap lende!" 
Deuteronomy16:13 Oun pal i niyal, te dan t'maro tselo djob vin oun anan i drake dren, rikrenn kol bare divessa dren, kay djivenn an patyengre khera. Efta divessa djivenn an lende," 
Deuteronomy16:14 rhan oun avenn barhtelo, t'mer oun t'mare čave oun ča, t'mare boudepangre oun i Levitarya oun vi-themarya, kay pash t'mende djivenn, ninna i čave, kolen kek dad bouder hi, oun kol djouvya, kolengro rom meras." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Efta divessa rhan oun avenn barhteles glan t'maro baro Debleste ap koy platsa, hoy yob peske vin rodell. Yob čivas peskri barht ap halauter, hoy ap t'mari phoub bares vas oun ap t'mari tseli boudi. Doleske avenn barhtelo!" 
Deuteronomy16:16 Triin kope an o bersh hounte venn t'mare tsele morsha glan t'maro baro Debleste ap koy platsa, hoy yob peske vin rodell: ap kol bare divessa, kay rhan kek maro dran shoutlo yarro, oun ap ko baro dives, kay anenn o baro Debleske o nevo djobestar, hoy t'mer dren anan, oun ap kol divessa, kay djivenn an patyengre khera. Oun kek vell, koles či pash peste hi, hoy yob o baro Debleske anella." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Hakeno della pal kova, hoy leskro vast nay pre anella, yaake har t'maro baro Devel leste peskri barht das." 
Deuteronomy16:18 Čivenn čačepangre morshen oun vavar pralstunen dren an t'mare forya, hoy t'men t'maro baro Devel della! Yaake te hi an hako them kol deesh-te-douy bare familyendar čačepangre, kay rakrenn o čačepen yaake vin pral pengre menshende, te lell hakeno peskro čačepen." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Te hal tou i čačepaskro, hounte dess tou koles peskro čačepen, koon an o čačepen hi. Tou dikess gar koy pre, koon glan toute tardo hi. Te dell yek tout kouč koova, te dess tou les čačepen, ma le kova an! Koon savo shoukar kouč koova an-lell, vell korelo o čačepaske, oun dikell bouder gar, koon an o čačepen hi." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Rike tout ap kova hoy čačes hi, te djivess an o them, hoy tiro baro Devel tout dell." 
Deuteronomy16:21 T'mer hounte čivenn kek kasht pre, hoy sikrell i debletsa Ashera, oun čivenn les pre pash koy rhačepaskri, hoy krenn t'mer t'maro baro Debleste." 
Deuteronomy16:22 T'mer hounte čivenn kek barra pre, te mangenn i vavar debles an. Savo koova hi djoungeles glan o baro Debleskre yaka." 
Deuteronomy17:1 Tou maress tiro baro Debleske kek groumni, kek bakro oder bouzni, hoy nasselo oder djoungelo hi. Kova vals i čilačo koova glan tiro baro Debleste." 
Deuteronomy17:2 Te shounenn t'mer i morshestar, i djouvyatar an yek foro t'mendar, hoy t'maro baro Devel t'men dell, oun kova oder koya krell sau koova, hoy an i yaka t'maro baro Deblestar djoungelo hi, oun phagell koy sovel, hoy t'mer leske dan," 
Deuteronomy17:3 oun djal koy oun mangell vavar deblen an, oun vitsrell pes tele glan o kham, o čon oun i bolepangre momlia, oun krell yaake savo koova, kolestar me penom, te krenn kova gar," 
Deuteronomy17:4 oun kova vell t'menge penlo, palle rodenn mishto oun poučenn palla oun dikenn, te hi kova čačo. Te hatsenn t'mer vin, te hi čačepah čačo, te vas savo djoungelo koova an Israel kerdo," 
Deuteronomy17:5 palle lenn ko morshes oder koy djouvyat, oun anenn len vin glan t'maro foro, oun vitsrenn barra ap lende bis te hi le moulo." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Ap o rakepen douy, triin menshendar, kay kova dikan, venn le moulo dino. Ap o rakepen yekestar kokres, nay vell kek mensho moulo dino." 
Deuteronomy17:7 Kolla, kay dikan ko djoungelo koova, venn i glanstoune, te vitsrenn le barra ap lende. Oun pal lende venn kol vavar, kay glan o foro van, oun vitsrenn len moulo. Yaake lenn t'mer o čilačepen mashkral t'mende krik." 
Deuteronomy17:8 Te vell čomone glan i čačepangre anlo, hoy hi yaake phares lenge, te djinenn le gar, hoy te krenn, – savo koova, te das yek i vavares moulo, oder doukas les, oder čingepen pral kova, hoy o yekeske oder o vavareske hi, palle krenn t'men ap o drom oun djan ap koy platsa, hoy t'maro baro Devel peske vin rodell." 
Deuteronomy17:9 Kote djan pash i rashayende dran o kheer Levi oun pash o čačepaskro morsheste, kay an kol divessa koy hi. Oun len poučenn! Oun yon penenn t'menge, hoy hounte krenn." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Oun kova, hoy le t'menge penenn, hounte krenn t'mer. Denn yak, te krenn halauter yaake, har yon t'menge sikran." 
Deuteronomy17:11 Ap lengre laba hounte rikrenn t'men, oun kolendar gar tele djan, gar čačes oun vitar gar serves." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Te hi yek koy, kay hi yaake pre-phourdo, te shounell lo gar ap o rashayeste, kay krell i boudi o baro Debleske, oder ap o čačepaskro morsheste, palle hounte vell ko morsh maredo. T'mer hounte lenn o čilačepen dran Israel vin." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Palle shounell hakeno kova, oun darell. Oun kek phourdell pes bouder pre, te krell savo koova." 
Deuteronomy17:14 Te venn t'mer an ko them, hoy dell t'men t'maro baro Devel, oun t'mer lenn les dren, oun djivenn koy dren, oun penenn palle: Mer kamah i ray pral mende, yaake har pash kol menshende an i vavar themma troul mende ninna hi," 
Deuteronomy17:15 palle vell kova o ray, koles t'mer pral t'mende čivenn, koles t'maro baro Devel vin rodell. Mashkral t'mare phralende lenn yekes oun čivenn les pral t'mende, te vell yob t'maro ray. Lenn kekes dran o vi-them, kay gar t'mare phralendar hi." 
Deuteronomy17:16 T'maro rayes hounte vell gar boud graya oun hounte bičrell gar i Israelitaryen pale an o them Egiptia, te ginenn le leske graya. O baro Devel penas t'menge, te djan t'mer kava drom gar bouder pale." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Vitar gar hounte lell peske t'maro baro ray boud djouvyen, te vell leskro dji gar tele anlo o čačo dromestar. Ninna lell lo peske gar boud roup oun sonakay khetne." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Ap ko tsiro, kay hi lo ap peskri rayeskri beshepaskri beshdo, hounte moukell lo peske kava liil tele te činell, kava liil, hoy pash i rashayende dran o kheer Levi čiddo hi." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Oun kava liil vell palle hako tsireske pash leste. Oun yob draverell hako dives an leste yaake rah, har djivell lo. Yaake te hayvell lo, har te djivell lo peskro baro Debleha, oun dell lo yak ap hako lab an kava liil, oun rikrell pes ap kal čačepaskre laba, oun krell pal lende." 
Deuteronomy17:20 Yob hounte krell pes gar bares pral peskre phralende oun hounte djal gar tele o baro Debleskro dromestar, gar ap i čači rig oun gar ap i servi rig kolestar, hoy činlo hi. Palle ačell lo i rah tsiro baro ray an Israel, yob oun leskre morsh čave pal leste." 
Deuteronomy18:1 I rashaya – yon hi lauter dran o kheer Levi, – kolla lenn kek them an Israel. Yon rhan kolestar, hoy i vavar Israelitarya o baro Debleske anenn, te vell kova leske rhačedo." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Kek them lenn i Levitarya an Israel har lengre phrala lenna. Kova hoy yon lenna, hi lengri boudi o baro Debleske. Yob kokres dikell ap lende, te hi len lauter, hoy len hounte vell. Yaake penas lo lenge." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Kava hi, hoy i rashayen hounte vell: Te anell yek i groumni, oder i bakro o baro Debleske, hounte dell lo kolestar o phik, kol douy čamya oun i bouke o rashayeske." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Ninna vell i rashayen hako bersh o nevo djobestar, i nevi molyatar oun o nevo djetestar, hoy t'mer dren anan. Ninna o bakrengro bal, hoy o ersto kopo tele činlo vell, hi lenge." 
Deuteronomy18:5 T'maro baro Devel rodas peske o kheer Levi vin dran i tsele Israelitaryen, te venn i morsha dran o kheer Levi leskre rashaya hako tsireske." 
Deuteronomy18:6 Te kamell i Levitari ko foro te moukell, kay djivell lo an Israel, oun kamell ap koy platsa te djal, hoy o baro Devel peske vi-rodell," 
Deuteronomy18:7 kova nay vell, te krell lo o baro Debleskri boudi yaake har kol vavar Levitarya ninna, kay kote i rashaya hi." 
Deuteronomy18:8 Palle lell yob ninna yaake boud rhapen har kol vavar ninna lenn. Oun kova, hoy lo peskro dadestar las, hi les gomme pral pre." 
Deuteronomy18:9 Te venn t'mer an o them, hoy t'maro baro Devel t'men dell, palle krenn gar ko djoungelo pale-čiddo koova, hoy krenn i menshe, kay kote djivenn." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Kek mank t'mende hounte rhačrell peskro morsh čaves oder peskri čat an i yag o Debleske. Kek mank t'mende hounte vell i dourkepaskro, kek i dravepaskro, kek, kay krell vavar bengeskri koova," 
Deuteronomy18:11 kek, kay rakrell bibarht vin an o bengeskri zoor, kek, kay i moulentsa rakrell oder i moulen poučell." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Koon savo koova krella, hi pale-čiddo glan o baro Debleskre yaka. Dran savo djoungelo pale-čiddo koova tradell t'maro baro Devel kol vavar menshen dran o them vin glan t'mende." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Pash t'mende hounte vell savo koova gar hatslo. T'mer han o baro Debleskre menshe. 
Deuteronomy18:14 Kol menshe, kolengro them t'mer dren lenna, kolla shounenn ap dravepangre oun dourkepangre. T'menge penas t'maro baro Devel, te krenn kova gar." 
Deuteronomy18:15 I Debleskro rakepaskro, har me yek hom, yek, kay vell t'mendar, koles bičrell t'maro baro Devel pash t'mende. Ap koleste shounenn!" 
Deuteronomy18:16 Ap ko dives, kay hans khetne pash i berga Horeb, mangan t'mer kova t'maro baro Deblestar, oun penan: Mer kamah bouder gar o rakepen maro baro Deblestar te shounell, oun kay bari yag kamah vitar gar bouder te dikell, te hounte meras gar!" 
Deuteronomy18:17 Oun o baro Devel penas ap mande: Mishto hi, hoy yon rakran." 
Deuteronomy18:18 I Debleskro rakepaskro har tou yek hal, kay vell lendar, koles bičrau me lenge. Oun me kamau leske mire laba an leskro mouy te čivell. Oun yob rakrell ap lende halauter, hoy me leske penau." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Oun ko mensho, kay gar ap mire laba shounell, hoy i rakepaskro an miro lab rakras, koleske dau me i phagi." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Te phourdell pes i Debleskro rakepaskro pre, oun penell i rakepen an miro lab, hoy me leske gar penom, te hounte rakrell lo, savo rakepaskro hounte merell. Ninna te rakrell yob an o lab i vavar deblestar, hounte merell lo." 
Deuteronomy18:21 Te poučenn t'menge t'mendar: Har djinas mer, havo lab o baro Devel gar rakras?" 
Deuteronomy18:22 Djinenn: Te rakrell ko Debleskro rakepaskro an o lab o baro Deblestar, oun kova hoy yob rakras vell gar čačo, yaake his ko lab hoy yob rakras gar o baro Deblestar. Ko rakepaskro kamas pes peskro rakepah bares te krell. Tou daress gar lestar!" 
Deuteronomy19:1 Ap ko tsiro, kay tradas t'maro baro Devel kol vavar menshen vin dran ko them, hoy lo t'mende dell, oun t'mer lan ko them dren, oun djivenn an lengre forya oun an lengre khera, palle hounte rodenn t'menge triin forya vin, kay nay djan kolla dren, kay naashepangre hi." 
Deuteronomy19:2  
Deuteronomy19:3 Krenn ko tselo themestar triin kotya, an hako kotar yek savo foro, yaake te hi ko drom koy gar dour koleske, kay yekes moulo das oun hounte nashell peske." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Savo foro hi koleske, kay das yekes moulo oun kamas kova gar, oun les his kek rholi ap leste. Kova nay nashell koy, te ačell lo djido." 
Deuteronomy19:5 Kova nay vas yaake: Douy morsha djan an o veesh, te denn le kasht tele, oun ko yek hadell peskro vast, an koya i tover hi, oun lell vin, te dell an o kasht, oun o saster phagell tele oun djal an koleste, kay pashel hi, oun kova merella. Savo nay nashell an sau foro oun ačell djido." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Te vals an o tselo them kokres yek sau foro, nay vals ko drom dour koleske, kay hounte nashell peske kote. Oun kova, kay kamell o rat o moulestar pale te anell ap o shero kolestar, kay maras les, oun lell les pherdi rholi palla, kova nay lals les dren oun dals les moulo – koles, kay kek doosh ap leste hi, kolake yob hounte merals. Yob his glan kova gar rhoyedo ap o vavareste." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Doleske penau me t'menge, te rodenn triin forya vin." 
Deuteronomy19:8 Te krenn t'mer halauter, hoy t'menge kava dives penau, te hounte krenn, te kamenn t'maro baro Debles o tselo djiyeha oun djan ap leskre dromma, palle krell t'maro baro Devel t'maro them bareder, yaake har yob pes glan t'mare phourende sovel das. Ap ko tsiro, kay das lo t'men o tselo them, palle rodenn t'menge triin vavar forya vin!" 
Deuteronomy19:9  
Deuteronomy19:10 Yaake hi t'men doha forya kay nay nashell yek dren. Oun yaake krenn t'mer, te vell an t'maro them, hoy t'maro baro Devel t'menge dell, kek mensho maredo, ap koleste kek doosh hi. Te vals savo mensho maredo, anans bari doosh ap t'mende." 
Deuteronomy19:11 Hi vavarčandes yekeha, kay his rhoyedo ap yekeste oun khatrell pes, oun dell yak te taprell lo les, oun djal ap leste pre oun dell les moulo. Te nashell savo mensho an sau foro," 
Deuteronomy19:12 palle hounte bičrenn i phoureder dran leskro foro morshen koy, te lenn le les khere, oun denn les an i vasta kolestar, kay anell o rat ko moulestar pale ap o koleskro shero, kay das les moulo." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Yob te khaytell t'men gar! Savo marepaskro hounte merell, te djal t'menge mishto an Israel. Yob maras yekes, ap koleste kek doosh his." 
Deuteronomy19:14 An ko tsiro, kay djivenn an ko them, hoy t'maro baro Devel t'men dell, te lenn les t'menge dren, palle hounte čivess gar kol barra ap i rig, hoy sikrenn har baro hi ko kotar them kolestar, kay langs toute djivell. Kolla his tire phoure, kay čivan kol barra koy." 
Deuteronomy19:15 Te vell i čilačo koova glan i čačepangre anlo, hi gar doha, te dikas kokres yek morsh kova. Na-a douy te triin hounte penenn, te dikan le koles koy pashel, har lo kava koova kras. Palle nay denn le les i phagi." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Te anell yek rhorhepah čomone ap i vavareste pre," 
Deuteronomy19:17 palle venn kol douy, kolen čingepen pentsa hi, pash o baro Debleskro kheer, glan i rashayende oun glan i čačepangre morshende, kolla an kol divessa koy hi." 
Deuteronomy19:18 Oun kol čačepangre morsha hounte rodenn mishto palla, hoy čačo hi. Te hatsenn le, te hi kova i rhorheno, hoy rhorhepen ap peskro phraleste pre anas," 
Deuteronomy19:19 palle krenn leha kova, hoy kamas yob peskro phraleha te krell. Yaake lenn t'mer o čilačepen mashkral t'mende krik." 
Deuteronomy19:20 Oun halauter an Israel hounte shounenn, har ko rhorheno peskri phagi las, te darenn le oun krenn bouder gar savo koova mashkral t'mende." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Ko rhorheno hounte khaytell t'men gar! Krenn yaake: Yek djipen i djipaske, yek yak i yakeske, yek dand i dandeske, yek vast i vasteske, yek piro i pireske!" 
Deuteronomy20:1 Te djan t'mer vin an o kourepen, te kourenn t'men kolentsa, kay kamenn t'men gar an o them, oun t'mer dikenn lengre graya oun kourepaskre vourdya oun lengre lourden, kay hi boud boudeder har t'mer, palle ma darenn lendar! T'maro baro Devel hi t'mentsa, kova kay t'men dran o them Egiptia vin anas." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Glan te stenn t'mer pre oun djan an o kourepen, stakrell o rashay glan oun penell ap t'mare kourepangre:" 
Deuteronomy20:3 “Morshale dran Israel, shounenn! T'mer djan kava dives an o kourepen, te kourenn t'men kolentsa, kay kamenn t'men gar an o them. Avenn zorelo! Ma darenn lendar! Oun ma moukenn t'men traash te krell!" 
Deuteronomy20:4 T'maro baro Devel hi kova, kay djal t'mentsa oun kourell pes t'menge lentsa. Yob hi ap t'mari rig.”" 
Deuteronomy20:5 Pal kova hounte rakrenn i pralstoune ap i kourepangre oun poučenn: Hi mank t'mende yek, kay i kheer pre tardo čivas oun moukas gomme gar o Debleskri barht pral kova vin te rakrell? Kova hounte djal pale an peskro kheer, te merell lo gar an o kourepen, oun i vavar morsh djivell an leskro kheer." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Hi mank t'mende yek, kay drakengre rouka an i phoub čivas, oun las gomme kek drake dren? Kova hounte djal pale an peskro kheer, te merell lo gar an o kourepen, oun i vavar morsh lell kol drake." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Hi mank t'mende yek, koles i pirni hi oun yob las lat gomme gar pash peste? Kova hounte djal pale an peskro kheer, te merell lo gar an o kourepen, oun i vavar morsh lell lat peske." 
Deuteronomy20:8 Oun i pralstoune hounte poučenn i morshendar pale: Hi mank t'mende yek, koles daar hi, oun koleskro dji trissella? Kova hounte djal pale an peskro kheer, te krell lo gar i djia peskre phralendar darenes." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Oun pal kava rakepen hounte čivenn i pralstoune morshen pral i lourdende, te djan yon glan i lourdende an o kourepen." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Te djan t'mer glan i foro, te kourenn t'men kolentsa, kay kote djivenn, pale poučenn lendar glanstounes, te kamenn le pre te dell kek kourepah." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Oun te penenn le, te kamenn le kek kourepen, oun krenn t'menge o foreskre voudya pre, palle lenn kol tsele menshen, kay kote dren hi, te hounte boudrenn t'menge i zilah." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Oun te kamenn le gar pre te dell, oun kamenn pen te kourell t'mentsa, palle djan troul ko foro oun pandenn les dren, yaake te nay djal kek bouder dren oun kek bouder vin." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Oun ap ko tsiro, kay dell t'maro baro Devel les an t'maro vast, denn i tsele morshen moulo o rhareha." 
Deuteronomy20:14 I djouvya oun i čave oun i tsele firhe oun halauter, hoy t'mer dran o foro randan, kova rikrenn t'menge! Oun t'mer nay rhan ko tselo rhapen, hoy his kolen, kay kaman t'men gar. T'maro baro Devel das les t'menge." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Yaake krenn t'mer i tsele foryentsa, kay hi dour t'mendar krik, oun gar kate an o them, hoy lenn t'mer dren." 
Deuteronomy20:16 An kol forya, hoy hi an ko them, hoy t'maro baro Devel t'men della, hounte moukenn t'mer kekes djido, kek menshes vitar kek firhes." 
Deuteronomy20:17 Moulo dino hounte venn le halauter: i Hetarya, i Amorarya, i Kanaanitarya, i Perisarya, i Hivarya oun i Yebousarya. Yaake penas t'menge t'maro baro Devel, te hounte krenn." 
Deuteronomy20:18 Te krenn t'mer kova gar, anenn le t'menge pashel, har te krenn ko tselo djoungelo koova, hoy yon pengre deblenge kran. Oun yaake anens t'mer doosh ap t'mende glan t'maro baro Debleste." 
Deuteronomy20:19 Te han boud divessa troul i foro tardo, koles t'mer kamenn te dell oun dren te lell, oun moukenn kekes dren oun kekes vin te djal, palle denn gar kol rouka kote tele. Kolendar nay rhan. Doleske ma denn len trouyel! Yon hi kek menshe, kolentsa hounte kourenn t'men!" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Save rouka, kolendar djinenn, te rhal kek lendar, kolen nay denn t'mer trouyel, oun nay krenn dromma lendar, te nay venn t'mer an ko foro, hoy an o kourepen t'mentsa hi, oun nay lenn les dren." 
Deuteronomy21:1 Te vell i moulo mensho vin glan o foro čiddo hatslo an o them, hoy t'maro baro Devel t'men dell, te lenn t'mer les dren, oun kek djinell, koon les moulo das," 
Deuteronomy21:2 palle djan i phoureder oun i čačepangre morsha vin pash koy platsa, kay lo čiddo hi, oun dikenn palla, har dour hi bis pash kol forya, hoy kote čiddo hi." 
Deuteronomy21:3 Oun i phoureder dran ko foro, hoy o glanstouno pash ko mouleste tardo hi, kolla lenn i terni groumni, hoy boudras gomme gar ap i harhetikri phoub," 
Deuteronomy21:4 oun anenn lat tele an i telstouno them, kay i pani nashell, oun hoy kek harhetikri phoub hi, oun kote phagenn le koy terni groumyake i meen." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Palle stakrenn i rashaya dran o kheer Levi glan. Kolen rodas t'maro baro Devel vin, te krenn le leskri boudi, oun te rakrenn le leskri barht vin pral i menshende. Oun an i čingepen oun pal i marepen rakrenn le o čačepen vin." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Oun kol tsele phoureder dran ko foro, hoy o glanstouno tardo hi pash ko mouleste, kolla thovenn pengre vasta panyeha tele pral koy mouli terni groumni." 
Deuteronomy21:7 Oun yon hounte penenn: “Mer dran kava foro, mer dam gar ko menshes moulo, oun mare yaka dikan gar, koon kova kras." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Baro Devel, mangah tout, le kay doosh mendar, tire menshendar Israel, kolen tou dran o pandepen vin lal. Ma dik ap mende, har te vams mer kolla, kay maram i menshes, ap koleste kek doosh čiddo hi.” Palle lell o baro Devel koy doosh lendar krik." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Yaake krenn t'mer, hoy mishto hi glan o baro Debleskre yaka, oun čivenn ko čilačepen krik mashkral t'mende. Oun yob dikell gar ap t'mende, har te vans t'mer, kay dan koles moulo." 
Deuteronomy21:10 Te djan t'mer an o kourepen, oun t'maro baro Devel dell kolen, kay kourenn pen t'mentsa an t'maro vast, yaake te anenn t'mer lendar pandlen krik," 
Deuteronomy21:11 oun yek t'mendar dikell i shoukar djouvel mank kol pandlende, oun kamell lat oun kamell te romedinerell lo lat," 
Deuteronomy21:12 palle nay anell lo lat an peskro kheer. Kote hounte činell li peskre shereskre bal oun peskre naya. 
Deuteronomy21:13 Oun yoy rivell peskre ripya vin, hoy ap late his, har li pandli vas. Oun yoy ačell an leskro kheer oun rovell i tselo čon pral peskro dad oun peskri day. Pal ko tsiro nay djal ko morsh pash late, te romedinerell lo lat." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Te vell i tsiro, kay kamell lo lat bouder gar, hounte moukell lo lat te djal, kay li kamell. Yek koova hounte krell yob gar: Yob nay bikrell lat gar lovenge, oun nay rikrell lat gar, te vell li leskri boudepaskretsa! Yoy his leskri romni." 
Deuteronomy21:15 Te hi i morshes douy romya, oun yob kamell koy yek boudeder har koy vavar, oun hakeni las lestar yek morsh čavo, oun o phoureder morsh čavo hi kolatar, kolat yob gar kamell," 
Deuteronomy21:16 ap ko dives, kay kamell ko morsh peskro bravlepen peskre čavende te dell, nay dell lo gar koleste boudeder, kay hi kolatar, hoy kamas lo, har te vals yob o phoureder." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Na-a, yob hounte dell ko vavares douy kope yaake boud, yob hi o phoureder, ninna te his lo koy romyatar, kolat kamell lo gar. Yob vas glanstounes boldo oun leske hi o čačepen, te lell lo, hoy o phoureder lell." 
Deuteronomy21:18 Te hi i romes i morsh čavo, kay hi bipandlo, oun krell halauter pal peskro shero oun shounell gar ap peskro dadeste oun peskri date, ninna te čingrenn le ap leste oun denn les dava," 
Deuteronomy21:19 palle hounte anenn o dad oun i day les pash i phourende an ko foro ap i platsa, kay venn le khetne." 
Deuteronomy21:20 Oun penenn ap lende: “Kava hi maro morsh čavo. Yob hi bipandlo, oun krell halauter pal peskro shero, oun shounell gar ap mende. Yob hi i pipaskro oun i rhapaskro.”" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Oun i tsele morsha dran ko foro hounte vitsrenn barra ap leste, bis te hi lo moulo. Yaake vitsrenn t'mer o čilačepen dran t'mende vin. Oun i tsele Israelitarya hounte shounenn kolestar oun darenn." 
Deuteronomy21:22 Te kras yek i čilačo koova, koleske yob moulo dino hounte vell, oun yob vas maredo oun ap i kasht pre pandlo," 
Deuteronomy21:23 palle ačell ko moulo gar pral i rat ap ko kashteste. Na-a, yob hounte vell paskedo ap ko emligo dives, te vell ko them gar pale-čiddo, hoy t'maro baro Devel t'men dell. Pash leste hi kova praasedo, kay hi pre-pandlo ap i kasht." 
Deuteronomy22:1 Te nashrell pes i groumni oder i bakro, hoy i vavar Israelitares hi, oun tou dikeh les, palle vess leske ap i rig oun aness les tiro phraleske pale." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Te djivell lo dour toutar krik, oun tou prindjreh les ninna gar, palle less ko firhes an tiro kheer pre, te ačell lo pash toute, yaake rah bis te tiro phraal vella oun les rodell. Oun palle de les leste pale." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Oun yaake kress tou ninna, te nashras lo peskri bourika, peskre koola oun vavar koova, oun tou hatsal les. Tou nay tserdeh tout kote gar vin." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Te dikeh tou, har peras i bourika ap o drom, ninna i groumni, hoy tiro phraleske hi, palle ab late ap i rig oun hade lat pale pre!" 
Deuteronomy22:5 I djouvel rivell kek morshengre koola an. Oun i morsh rivell kek djouvyengre koola an. Koon sau koova krell, kova krell hoy djoungeles hi glan t'maro baro Debleskre yaka." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Te hatseh tou i čirklengro kheer ap i rouk oder ap i phoub, oun i day hi beshdo ap i čave oder ap i yare, palle less tou gar i day khetne i čaventsa." 
Deuteronomy22:7 I čaven nay leh, te kameh. I dat moukess te djal, te djal touke mishto oun te djivess i rah djipen." 
Deuteronomy22:8 Te kreh tou touke i nevo kheer, pale čivess i rikepen troul i dacha, te perell kek tele oun tout hi doosh ap leskro merepen." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Ap tiro molyengro them čivess tou gar drake an i phoub oun ninna djob mashkral lende, te vell gar halauter o Debleske, hoy touke bares vas, o djob oun i mool." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Tou boudress gar ap i harhetikri phoub i morsh groumyah khetne i bourikah, te rissrenn le i phoub trouyel." 
Deuteronomy22:11 Tou rivess gar koola an, hoy dran douy thaba kerdo hi: dran bakrengro bal khetne sido layntikre thabentsa." 
Deuteronomy22:12 Ap tiri baya sivess khetne pandle dorya ap kol star rigya. 
Deuteronomy22:13 Te romedinerell i morsh i čat, oun pal i tsiro kamell lo lat bouder gar," 
Deuteronomy22:14 oun yob anell i djounglepen ap late pre oun penell: “Kay čat romedinerom, oun har pash late dren djom, hatsom vin, te his lat i vavarestar an-tapedo”," 
Deuteronomy22:15 palle djal o dad oun i day koy terni čatar ap o foreskri platsa oun lenn koy plarhta pentsa, hoy sikrell, te his koy čay kek morshestar an-tapedo. Oun koy plarhta sikrenn le i phourende koy." 
Deuteronomy22:16 Oun o dad koy terni čatar penell ap lende: “Me dom miri čat kava morshes te romedinerell lo lat. Oun kanna kamell lo lat bouder gar," 
Deuteronomy22:17 oun anell čilačo rakepen ap late pre oun penell: Me hatsom, te hi li i vavarestar an-tapedo. Oun kate hi kay plarhta, hoy sikrell, te tapras kek vavar morsh lat glan leste an.”" 
Deuteronomy22:18 Oun kol phoureder ko forestar hounte lenn ko romes, oun denn les dava," 
Deuteronomy22:19 oun penenn leske, te hounte dell lo sheel roupene beme lakro dadeste. Kova hi leskri phagi. Yob anas i čilačo rakepen pre ap i terni čate an Israel. Yob hounte rikrell lat, oun yob nay moukell lat gar an peskro tselo djipen." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Te his kova o čačepen, te vas koy čay i vavarestar an-tapedo," 
Deuteronomy22:21 palle hounte vell li vin anlo glan o kheer lakro dadestar. Oun i morsha dran ko foro vitsrenn barra ap late, bis te mouli hi li. Yoy kras i vi-ladjedo koova mank i Israelitarya, har loubras li trouyel an peskro dadeskro kheer. Yaake čivenn t'mer o čilačepen mank t'mende vin." 
Deuteronomy22:22 Te hatsell yek i morshes, kay hi čiddo pash i djouvel, koya i vavareskri romni hi, palle hounte merenn kol douy: ko morsh, kay pash late čiddo his, oun koy djouvel. Yaake čivenn t'mer o čilačepen dran Israel vin." 
Deuteronomy22:23 Te hi i čay, kolat kek morsh gomme an-tapras, oun lat hi i pirno, oun i vavar morsh hatsell lat an o foro, oun čivell pes pash late," 
Deuteronomy22:24 palle lenn kol douyen oun anenn len vin glan o foro, oun vitsrenn barra ap lende, bis te hi le moulo: Koy čay, kay gar gole das, ninna te his li an o foro, kay nay vals li shounlo. Oun ko morshes, kay ladj ap i pirnyate i vavarestar anas. Yaake čivenn t'mer o čilačepen mank t'mende vin." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Te hatsell ko morsh i čat vin ap o them, oun koy čat hi i pirno, oun ko vavar morsh taprell lat oun čivell pes pash late, palle hounte merell ko morsh kokres, kay pes pash late čivas." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Koy čake krenn či! Lat hi kek doosh, kolake yoy hounte merell. Kava koova hi yaake, har te djals yek morsh ap i vavareste pre, oun dals les moulo." 
Deuteronomy22:27 Yob hatsas koy terni čat vin ap o them. Oun koy čay, kolat i pirno his, das gole, oun kek his koy, kay ap lakri rig vas." 
Deuteronomy22:28 Te hatsell i morsh i terni čat, kolat kek pirno hi, oun taprell lat, oun čivell pes pash late, oun yon venn hatslo," 
Deuteronomy22:29 palle hounte dell ko morsh, kay pash late čiddo his, lakro dadeste i paash,sheel roupene beme, doleske kay yob ladj ap late anas. Oun yoy vell leskri romni. Oun yob nay moukell lat gar peskro tselo djipen." 
Deuteronomy23:1 Kek morsh hounte lell peskro dadeskri romyat oun anell yaake ladj ap peskro dadeste. 
Deuteronomy23:2 I morsh, kay yaake činlo oun doukedo hi ap peskro mass, te hi lo bouder kek morsh, savo morsh nay vell gar kote, kay o baro Debleskre menshe khetne venna." 
Deuteronomy23:3 Kek morsh, koleskri day gar romedini hi, nay vell kote t'mentsa khetne, kay o baro Debleskre menshe khetne venna. Ninna leskre čave nay venn gar kote, yaake rah har deesh familye yek pal i vavar djivenna." 
Deuteronomy23:4 Kek Ammonari oun kek Moabari vell kote t'mentsa khetne, kay o baro Debleskre menshe khetne venn, yaake rah har deesh familye yek pal i vavar djivenna. An kek tsiro nay venn le kote." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Yon van gar pash t'mende mareha oun panyeha, har hans ap drom dran o them Egiptia. Oun yon playsran love o morsheske Bileam, koleskro dad o Beor his, dran o foro Petor an o them Mesopotamia, te rakrell lo bibarht pral t'mende vin." 
Deuteronomy23:6 T'maro baro Devel kamas gar ap o Bileam te shounell. Yob kamas t'men o djiyestar. Doleske kras lo, te rakras o Bileam i barht pral t'mende vin, oun kek bibarht." 
Deuteronomy23:7 Ma rodenn koy pal, te djal kol menshenge mishto an i themma Moab oun Ammon, oun te venn le bravelo." 
Deuteronomy23:8 I Edomaryen čivenn gar pale! Yon hi t'mare phrala. Vitar gar čivenn i Egiptaryen pale. An lengro them djivan i rah tsiro. 
Deuteronomy23:9 I čave lengre čavengre čavendar, kolla nay venn kote t'mentsa khetne, kay o baro Debleskre menshe khetne venna." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Te djan t'mer vin, te kourenn t'men kolentsa, kay kamenn t'men gar an pengro them, palle denn t'men yak, te krenn koy platsa gar pale-čiddo, kay čivenn t'mare plarhtene khera pre." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Te djas i lourdeske mank t'mende čomone an i rat, oun yob vell yaake pale-čiddo, hounte djal lo vin glan i platsa oun ačell kote o tselo dives." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Ap i rati nay thovell lo pes. Oun har o kham tele djas, vell lo pale nay ap t'mari platsa." 
Deuteronomy23:13 Glan koy platsa, kay t'mare plarhtene khera tardo hi, rodenn i vavar platsa vin, kay nay djan t'mer ap i rig." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Oun hakeno, kay djal kote, lell i kasht peha, hadell i tikni rheb vin, beshell pes, oun čakrell palle kova, hoy lestar vin djas." 
Deuteronomy23:15 T'maro baro Devel djal t'mentsa oun hi mashkral t'mende ap i platsa, te vell lo t'menge ap i rig, oun te krell lo t'men zorleder har kol vavar, kolentsa kourenn t'men. Doleske hounte vell t'mari platsa djoudjo. Kek vi-ladjedo koova te vell mank t'mende diklo, te djal lo gar peske t'mendar." 
Deuteronomy23:16 I pandlo boudepaskro, kay peskro rayestar krik nashas oun pash t'mende vell, koles denn t'mer gar an o vast peskro rayestar pale." 
Deuteronomy23:17 Yob nay djivell pash t'mende an i foro t'mendar, hoy yob peske vin rodell, kote kay les an peskre yaka mishto hi. Oun t'mer rikrenn les gar i zoryah tele." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Mank i Israelitarya hounte vell kek djouvel oun kek morsh, kay bikrell pes lovenge an o kheer i vavar deblestar." 
Deuteronomy23:19 Kol love, hoy save menshe lenna, hounte anell kek an o kheer t'maro baro Deblestar, te playsrell lo kolentsa i sovel, hoy lo das. Save love hi djoungeles glan o baro Debleskre yaka." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Te patsal love tiro phrales, less tou kek love boudeder ap kol love, hoy tou les patsal, vitar gar pash rhapen oun vavar koova, hoy yek nay patsell. Tou less kova pale, hoy tou les dal, oun gar boudeder." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Yekestar, kay hi dran i vavar them, nay leh tou boudeder, har tou leske patsal, tiro phralestar less tou gar boudeder. Palle nay dell tout tiro baro Devel barht an halauter, hoy tou an-tapreh an ko them, an koleste t'mer venn, te lenn les t'menge dren." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Te dal tou tout sovel glan tiro baro Debleste, palle ma mouk touke kek tsiro, te playsress kova ninna. Tiro baro Devel dikell koy pre, te deh tou kova leste. Te deh les gar, aneh tou doosh ap toute." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Te deh tou tout gar sovel, palle hi ninna kek doosh ap toute." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Te kamal tou tout sovel te dell glan tiro baro Debleste, hounte rikress tou ninna, hoy penal, oun kress les yaake har tou vin rakral." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Te veh tou an i molyakro them, hoy i vavares hi, palle nay rhah tou yaake boud drake, har tou kameh, bis te čales hal. An i piri čivess tou kek drake khetne." 
Deuteronomy23:26 Te veh tou ap i harhetikri phoub i vavarestar, palle nay leh ko djob tiro vasteha tele. O djobeskro čouryeha činess tou kek djob tele, te aness les khere." 
Deuteronomy24:1 Te lell i morsh peske i romyat, oun palle hatsell lo čomone ap late, hoy kamell lo gar, oun činell lake i liil vin, an koleste tardo hi, te moukas lo lat, oun dell ko liil an lakro vast, oun tradell lat dran peskro kheer vin," 
Deuteronomy24:2 oun yoy djal dran leskro kheer oun vell i romni i vavar morshestar," 
Deuteronomy24:3 oun ko vavar morsh kamell lat bouder gar, oun činell lake ninna i liil, an koleste tardo hi, te moukas lo lat, oun dell les ninna an lakro vast, oun tradell lat dran peskro kheer, palle nay lell lat gar lakro ersto rom i douyto kopo. Kova nay krell lo vitar gar, te meras lakro douyto rom. Lakro ersto romeske vas li pale-čiddo. Te romedinerals lo lat i douyto kopo, vals kova djoungeles o baro Debleske. T'mer hounte krenn gar ko them pale-čiddo, kova t'maro baro Devel t'men dell, te vell lo t'menge." 
Deuteronomy24:4  
Deuteronomy24:5 I morsh, kay i tikno tsiro romedino hi, hounte djal gar an o kourepen, vitar gar hounte krell lo i boudi o foreske. Yek bersh nay ačell lo khere oun pash peskri romyate, te venn le barhteles."
