2Kings21:13 Oun me kamau ko emligo koova ap o foro Yerusalem te krell, har krom ap o foro Samaria. Oun dau o fores savi phagi har čivom ap o kheer Ahab. Oun kamau i menshen dran o foro Yerusalem vin thovell, yaake har čare vin thode venna, oun ap o shero čiddo venn." 
2Kings21:14 Oun kolla, kay mire menshendar pral ačenna, bičrau mandar krik, oun dau len an o vast kolendar, kay čorenn o them vin oun lenn i menshen pandlo pentsa." 
2Kings21:15 Mire menshe kran, hoy glan mande djoungeles hi, oun rhoyran man ko tselo tsiro, har lengre phoure dran o them Egiptia vin djan bis ap kava dives." 
2Kings21:16 Ninna moukas o Manasse boud menshen te marell, ap kolende kek doosh his. An o foro Yerusalem nashas lengro rat har pani. Koy pashel vas koy doosh, hoy lo ap o them Youda anas, har anas lo i menshen ap i čilačo drom, kay kran le, hoy gar mishto hi an o baro Debleskre yaka." 
2Kings21:17 Ko tselo vavar, hoy pral o Manasse penepaske hi, oun halauter, hoy lo kras, ninna peskri doosh, hoy lo ap peste anas, kova hi činlo an o familyakro liil kol bare rayendar pral o them Youda." 
2Kings21:18 Oun o Manasse meras oun vas paskedo an i baar pash leskro kheer, an koy baar, hoy o Ouzaes his. Oun leskro čavo, o Amon, vas baro ray pal leste." 
2Kings21:19 Har vas o Amon baro ray, his lo biish-te-douy bersha phouro; oun yob his douy bersha baro ray an o foro Yerusalem. Leskri day kharas Meshoullemet, lakro dad his o Harous dran Yotba." 
2Kings21:20 Oun o Amon kras, hoy čilačo hi glan o baro Debleskre yaka, yaake har leskro dad o Manasse les kras." 
2Kings21:21 Oun djas ap o čilačo drom, har leskro dad, oun mangas i moule deblen an, har leskro dad kova ninna kras, oun vitsras pes glan lende tele." 
2Kings21:22 Oun yob moukas o baro Debles, ko Debles, koles leskre phoure an-mangan, oun djas gar ap o baro Debleskro drom." 
2Kings21:23 Oun i bare morsha an leskro them čivan pen čorrhanes khetne, oun maran o rayes Amon an peskro kheer." 
2Kings21:24 I morsha dran Youda dan halauteren moulo, kay pen khetne čivan te marenn le o baro rayes Amon. Oun yon lan leskro čaves, o Yosia, te vell lo baro ray pal leste." 
2Kings21:25 Ko tselo vavar koova, hoy o Amon kras, kova hi činlo an o familyakro liil kol bare rayendar pral o them Youda." 
2Kings21:26 Oun yon paskran les an leskro moulengro kheer an i baar, hoy o Ouzaes his. Oun leskro čavo, o Yosia, vas ray pal leste." 
2Kings22:1 O Yosia his orhta bersha, har vas lo baro ray; oun yob his 31 (triyanda-te-yek) bersha baro ray an o foro Yerusalem. Leskri day kharas Yedida, lakro dad his o Adaya dran Bozkat." 
2Kings22:2 Oun yob kras, hoy mishto hi glan o baro Debleskre yaka, oun djas o drom, kay leskro phouro dad o David ninna djas, oun peras gar kava dromestar tele, gar ap i čači rig oun vitar gar ap i servi rig." 
2Kings22:3 Oun har o Yosia an o deesh-te-orhtato bersh baro ray his, bičras lo o Shafan, kay i lila činas, an o baro Debleskro kheer. O Shafaneskro dad his o Azalya oun leskro papo his o Meshoullam. Oun o Yosia penas:" 
2Kings22:4 “Dja pral pash o baro rashayeste o Hilkiya, te dikell lo palla, har boud kol love hi, hoy an o baro Debleskro kheer anlo vas, hoy kol morsha, kay ap o voudar garda denna, i menshendar dren lan." 
2Kings22:5 Oun o rashay mou dell kol love kol morshenge an o vast, kay pral i boudepangre tardo hi, kay ap o baro Debleskro kheer boudrenna, te krenn le kova pale neves, hoy ap o kheer paash djas." 
2Kings22:6 Kal loventsa hounte venn kol morsha playsedo, kay boudrenn o kashteha, ninna kolla, kay čivenn i barra pre. Ninna kasht oun činle barra venna dre-ginlo kol loventsa." 
2Kings22:7 Kol pralstoune boudepangre krenn pengri boudi an o čačepen. Doleske hounte poučell o rashay lendar gar, hoy le kol tsele loventsa kran.”" 
2Kings22:8 Har o Shafan kova lauter o baro rashayeha Hilkiya rakras, penas kova ap leste: “Me hatsom i liil an o baro Debleskro kheer, kay menge o Debleskro drom siklo vella.” Oun o Hilkiya das ko liil o Shafaneste, oun kova draveras les." 
2Kings22:9 Oun djas pash o baro rayeste oun penas leske, har halauter djas, oun penas: “Tire boudepangre, i rashaya, lan kol tsele love vin, hoy an o baro Debleskro kheer his, oun dan len kol morshenge ap o vast, kay pral kolende hi, kay boudrenna an o baro Debleskro kheer.”" 
2Kings22:10 O Shafan penas o baro rayeske ninna: “O rashay Hilkiya das man i liil.” Oun o Shafan draveras ko liil glan o baro rayeste. 
2Kings22:11 Yaake vas, har o baro ray i laba dran ko liil shounas, kras lo peskre koola paash, kay ap leste his." 
2Kings22:12 Oun o baro ray kharas kol morshen khetne: o rashay Hilkiya, o Ahikam, ko his i čavo o Shafanestar, o Akbor, koleskro dad o Mikaya hi, o Shafan, kay činas i lila, oun o Asaya, ko his i pralstouno an o baro rayeskro kheer. Oun o baro ray penas lenge:" 
2Kings22:13 “Djan koy oun poučenn o baro Debles mange oun i menshenge an o them Youda, pral kol laba an ko liil, hoy hatslo vas. Mare phoure shounan gar ap kol laba, hoy kote tardo hi, oun djivan gar yaake, har kote tele činlo hi. Doleske hi o baro Debleskri rholi bares ap mende čiddo.”" 
2Kings22:14 Kote djan o rashay Hilkiya, o Ahikam, o Akbor, o Shafan oun o Asaya pash i Debleskri rakepaskretsa Houlda. Koya djivas an o nevo kotar o forestar Yerusalem. Lakro rom his o Shalloum. Leskro dad his o Tikva. Koleskro dad his o Haras. O Shalloum das garda ap o ripyengro kheer. Oun kol morsha rakran lah." 
2Kings22:15 Yoy penas ap lende: Kava penell o baro Devel, ko Devel pral o Israel: Penenn ko morsheske, kay t'men pash mande bičras:" 
2Kings22:16 Kava penell o baro Devel: “Me anau čilačepen pral kava foro oun pral i menshende, kay kate djivenn. Ko tselo koova, hoy an ko liil tardo hi, oun hoy moukas peske o baro ray pral Youda glan te draverell, anau pral t'mende." 
2Kings22:17 I menshe an Yerusalem moukan man oun anan vavar aseblenge firhen, te rhoyrenn le man halautereha, hoy le pengre vastentsa kran; doleske vell miri rholi har i yag ap kava foro, oun kek nay krell les vin.”" 
2Kings22:18 Ko baro rayeske pral o them Youda, kova kay t'men pash mande bičras, te poučenn o baro Debles, nay penenn: Kava penell o baro Devel, ko Devel pral o Israel: “Tou shounal kol laba an kava liil." 
2Kings22:19 Oun kral tiro dji lenge pre. Oun kral tout tiknes glan o baro Debleste, har tou shounal, hoy me penom pral kava foro oun kol menshende, kay kate djivenna, te djal lenge yaake djoungeles, te ačell vavar menshenge o rakepen krik i trashatar. Oun kova, kay kamell te vell i bibarht pral i vavareste, penella: Touke te djal, har djas o foreske Yerusalem! Har tou kova shounal, kral tire koola paash, kay ap toute his, oun roval glan mande. Doleske shounom me tout ninna”, penell o baro Devel." 
2Kings22:20 “Oun anau kay bibarht gar pral kava foro yaake rah har tou djiveh. Tou dikeh lat gar tire yakentsa. Me moukau tout an o lačepen te merell. Oun tou veh paskedo an o moulengro kheer tire phourendar.” Oun kol morsha penan kal laba o baro rayeske. 
2Kings23:1 Oun o baro ray, o Yosia, bičras peskre bičepangre, oun moukas i tsele phoureder an o them Youda oun an o foro Yerusalem pash peste khetne gole te dell." 
2Kings23:2 Oun yob djas pral an o baro Debleskro kheer. Oun khetne leha djan i tsele morsha dran o them Youda oun i tsele menshe, kay djivan an o foro Yerusalem, i rashaya oun o Debleskre rakepangre oun kol vavar menshe, tikne oun bare. Oun kote moukas lo glan lende i tsele laba te draverell dran ko liil, hoy an o baro Debleskro kheer hatslo vas, kay činlo hi, hoy o Devel peskre menshendar kamella." 
2Kings23:3 Oun o baro ray his ap ko pralstouno kotar tardo glan o Debleskro kheer oun das o baro Debleste peskro lab, te djan le ap o Debleskro drom, oun rikrenn leskre laba, oun djivenn yaake, har yob len sikras oun pal leskro čačepen. Pengro tselo djiyeha oun pengri tseli zoryah kaman le pal kal laba te djivenn, hoy o Devel len das, oun hoy an kava liil činlo hi. Oun i tsele menshe pandan pen an pengro lab, te rikrenn le kova, hoy an o liil činlo hi." 
2Kings23:4 Oun o baro ray penas o pralstouno rashayeske Hilkiya oun vavar bare rashayenge, oun kolenge, kay denn garda ap o voudar, te vitsrenn le dran o baro Debleskro kheer kol tsele koola vin, hoy kol deblenge Baal oun Ashera oun kol tsele bolepangre momelenge kerdo van. Oun yob moukas halauter te rhačrell an i yag, vin glan o foro Yerusalem an o telstouno them, hoy kharell Kidron. Oun i yagakri čik moukas lo an o foro Betel te anell." 
2Kings23:5 Oun yob bičras i rashayen krik, kay i moule deblenge boudrenn, oun kolen i bare raya pral o them Youda moukan te vell, te rhačrenn le soungepaskro koova ap i moulne platse an i forya an o them Youda oun troul o foro Yerusalem. Kol moule debla, kolenge rhačran le soungepaskro koova, his: o Baal, o kham oun o čon, oun i tsele bolepangre momlia." 
2Kings23:6 Oun o Yosia moukas koy kashteni debletsa Ashera dran o baro Debleskro kheer te anell glan o foro Yerusalem pash ko tikno pani, kay kharell Kidron. Oun kote moukas lo lat te rhačrell. Oun hoy latar pral ačas, moukas lo tiknes te krell har phoubyakri čik, oun čivas kova khetne koy yagakri čik ap o handako, kay i čorvele paskedo van." 
2Kings23:7 Oun yob moukas kol tsele loubyengre khera tele te phagell, kay pash o baro Debleskro kheer tardo his. An kol khera kran i djouvya ripya i Asherake." 
2Kings23:8 Oun yob moukas i tsele rashayen dran o them Youda an o foro Yerusalem te vell, oun kras i moulne platse pale-čiddo, kay i rashaya i moule deblenge soungepaskro koova rhačran. Kova kras lo an o tselo them mank o foro Geba oun o foro Beersheba. Oun yob phagas koy rhačepaskri tele, hoy his tardo glan ko voudar, hoy o moskro, o Yosua, kras, ap i servi rig, te vell yek an o foro dren." 
2Kings23:9 Kol rashaya, kay kol rhorhene deblenge boudran, nay rhan ko maro, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi, khetne i vavar rashayentsa. Yon hounte rhačrenn kek firhen ap koy sasterni rhačepaskri o baro Deblestar an o foro Yerusalem." 
2Kings23:10 O Yosia kras ninna koy platsa pale-čiddo, hoy kharella Tofet, oun hi an i tala Hinnom čiddo. Kova kras lo, te nay rhačrell kek peskro čaves vitar gar peskri čay an i yag o rhorheno debleske Molok." 
2Kings23:11 Oun yob moukas i grayen krik te anell oun i vourdya te rhačrell, kolen i bare raya pral o them Youda koy anan, te mangenn le o kham an. Kol graya oun kol vourdya his tardo ap i platsa glan o baro Debleskro kheer, pash koy isema, kay djivas o pralstouno, o Natan-Melek." 
2Kings23:12 Oun yob kras kol rhačepangre paash, hoy pral ap o kheer koy tardo his, kay o Ahases leskri isema his. Kol rhačepangren moukan i bare raya pral o them Youda te krell. Ninna kolla, kay o Manasse kras, phagas lo tele. Kolla his tardo ap kol douy platse glan o baro Debleskro kheer. Oun o Yosia djas koy oun vitsras lengri čik an ko tikno pani, hoy kharell Kidron." 
2Kings23:13 Ninna kras lo kol moulne platse pale-čiddo, hoy kras o Salomo, ko baro ray pral Israel. Kolla his tardo ap koy rig o forestar Yerusalem, kay o kham pre-djal, ap i čači rig o djeteskri bergatar. O Salomo kras len, te venn kote kol djoungele moule debla an-mangedo: i Astarte, koy debletsa dran Sidon; oun o Kemosh, ko devel dran o them Moab; oun o Milkom, ko devel dran o them Ammon." 
2Kings23:14 Yob phagas kol bare barra paash, hoy le pengre deblenge pre-čivan, oun das kol figure tele, hoy sikran i Ashera. Oun kote, kay le tardo his, vitsras lo menshengre kokale pre." 
2Kings23:15 Ninna koy moulni platsa an Betel kras lo paash, hoy o Yerobeam, ko Nebateskro čavo kras, te anell lo o Israel o baro Debleskro dromestar tele. Koy rhačepaskri phagas lo tele, das lakre barra paash oun kras len yaake tiknes, te van le phoubyakri čik. Oun i figura, hoy sikras i debletsa Ashera, rhačras lo pre." 
2Kings23:16 Glan kova dikas o Yosia trouyel oun dikas i handako ap koy berga, oun bičras koy oun moukas i moulengre kokale vin te lell oun rhačras len ap i rhačepaskri oun kras lat pale-čiddo, yaake har o baro Debleskro rakepaskro vin kharas." 
2Kings23:17 Oun yob dikas pes trouyel oun poučas: “Koon hi kote paskedo?” Oun i menshe dran o foro penan ap leste: “Kote hi ko Debleskro morsh paskedo, kay dran o them Youda vas, oun vi-kharas, hoy tou kral ap kay rhačepaskri kate an Betel.”" 
2Kings23:18 Oun yob penas: “Moukenn les čiddo! Kek t'mendar hounte lell leskre kokale vin!” Yaake ačan leskre kokale čiddo, ninna kol kokale ko Debleskro rakepaskrestar, kay vas dran Samaria." 
2Kings23:19 Oun o Yosia las ninna i mangepaskre khera an i forya an o them Samaria krik. Kolen kran i bare raya pral o them Israel, te krenn le o baro Debles rhoyedo. Oun o Yosia kras halauter yaake har lo kova an o foro Betel kras." 
2Kings23:20 Oun moukas i tsele rashayen, kay i moule deblenge boudran, te marell ap lengre rhačepangre, oun rhačras menshengre kokale koy pre. Oun palle vas lo pale an o foro Yerusalem." 
2Kings23:21 Oun o baro ray, o Yosia, moukas i menshenge zoreles te penell: “Krenn t'maro baro Debleske ko rhapen, hoy kharell Passa, yaake har činlo hi an ko liil, kay tardo hi, hoy o Devel peskre menshendar kamella!”" 
2Kings23:22 Oun kek Passa vas yaake rikedo har kava, hoy yon kanna kran, gar an ko tsiro, kay i čačepangre raya i menshenge an Israel o čačepen penan, oun vitar gar an ko tsiro pal lende, kay bare raya pral o Israel oun o pral o Youda his." 
2Kings23:23 Kava rhapen Passa vas o baro Debleske rikedo an o deesh-te-orhtato bersh o baro rayestar Yosia an o foro Yerusalem. 
2Kings23:24 Ninna tradas o Yosia i tsele dravepangren krik, oun kolen, kay i moulen poučenn, oun moukas i khereskre deblen oun i vavar rhorhene deblen krik te anell dran o them Youda oun dran o foro Yerusalem. Kova kras lo, te vell halauter yaake kerdo, har činlo hi an ko liil, kay lenge o Debleskro drom siklo vell, – ko liil, hoy o rashay Hilkiya an o baro Debleskro kheer hatsas." 
2Kings23:25 Kek baro ray his glan leste, kay vas yaake har o Yosia pash o baro Debleste peskro tselo djiyeha oun peskro tselo djipah oun peskri tseli zoryah, oun djivas yaake har an o Moseskre lila činlo hi. Oun pal leste his vitar kek har yob." 
2Kings23:26 Ninna te kras o Yosia kova lauter, moukas o baro Devel gar tele peskri rholyah, hoy les his pral o them Youda, fothe rhoyras les ko tselo djoungelo koova, hoy o Manasse kras." 
2Kings23:27 Oun o baro Devel penas: “Me kamau ninna i menshen dran o them Youda mandar krik te čivell, yaake har me kolen dran o them Israel mandar krik čivom. Oun kamau kava foro pale te čivell, kava foro Yerusalem, hoy me mange vi-rodom, oun ko kheer, kolestar me penom: Kamoms te mangenn le man kote an. ”" 
2Kings23:28 Ko tselo vavar koova, hoy pral o Yosia penepaske hi, oun halauter, hoy lo kras, kova hi činlo an o familyakro liil o bare rayendar pral o them Youda." 
2Kings23:29 An ko tsiro djas o Farao Neko, ko baro ray pral o them Egiptia, pral pash ko pani, hoy kharella Eufrat, te kourell lo pes o baro rayeha pral o them Assour. Oun o baro ray Yosia čivas pes leske an o drom. Oun o Neko maras les pash o foro Megiddo, har lo les dikas." 
2Kings23:30 Oun i morsha, kay pash leste his, čivan ko moules ap o vourdin oun anan les dran Megiddo vin an o foro Yerusalem, oun paskran les an leskro moulengro kheer. Oun i morsha dran o them Youda kharan leskro čaves, o Yoakaz, oun čoran makepaskro djet pral leste, te vell yob lengro baro ray pal leskro dadeste." 
2Kings23:31 Biish-te-triin (23) bersh his o Yoakaz phouro, har lo baro ray vas. Oun yob his triin čonna baro ray an o foro Yerusalem. Leskri day kharas Hamoutal. Lakro dad his o Yirmeya dran Libna." 
2Kings23:32 Oun yob kras, hoy čilačo hi glan o baro Debleskre yaka, yaake har leskre phoure kran." 
2Kings23:33 O Farao Neko čivas les stildes an o foro Ribla an o them Hamat, te ačell lo bouder gar baro ray an o foro Yerusalem. Oun yob čivas i siyaan ap o them: 70 (efta-deesh) centnarya roup oun 35 (triyanda te panč) kilogramme sonakay." 
2Kings23:34 Oun o Farao Neko kras, te vell o Yosiyeskro čavo, o Elyakim, baro ray pal leskro dadeste Yosia. Oun das les i vavar lab oun kharas les Yoyakim. Leskro phrales, o Yoakaz, las lo peha oun anas les an o them Egiptia; kote meras lo." 
2Kings23:35 Oun o Yoyakim das o roup oun o sonakay o Faraeske. Doleske hounte čivas lo i siyaan ap o them, te nay anell lo kol love khetne, hoy o Farao kamella. Hakenestar dran o them las lo yaake boud roup oun sonakay dren, har koles bravlepen hi, te nay dell lo les o Farao Neko." 
2Kings23:36 Biish-te-panč bersh phouro his o Yoyakim, har lo baro ray vas; oun yob his deesh-te-yek bersh baro ray an o foro Yerusalem. Leskri day kharas Sebouda. Lakro dad his o Pedaya dran Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 Oun yob kras, hoy čilačo his glan o baro Debleskre yaka, yaake har leskre phoure kran." 
2Kings24:1 An ko tsiro, har o Yoyakim o baro ray his, djas o baro ray dran o them Babilonia peskre lourdentsa pre ap o them Youda. Leskro lab his Neboukadnezar. Oun o Yoyakim hounte vitsras pes tel leste oun hounte playsras leske boud love. Pal triin bersha phagas lo leha oun kras bouder gar, hoy kova kamas." 
2Kings24:2 Oun o baro Devel moukas boud lourden pral leste te vell, kay trouyel djan oun randan an o them Youda. Kolla van dran i themma Babilonia, Syria, Moab, oun Ammon, oun kran o them paash. Kova vas yaake, har o baro Devel rakras ap peskre rakepangre, kay leske koy his, oun har yon kova i menshenge doureder penan." 
2Kings24:3 Čačepah koy bibarht vas yaake pral i menshende an o them Youda, har o baro Devel penas, te čivell lo len pestar krik ko boud čilačepaske, hoy o Manasse kras. Kova anas i menshen o Debleskro dromestar tele," 
2Kings24:4 oun maras boud saven, kay kek čilačepen kran, oun anas lengro rat pral peste. Oun o tselo foro Yerusalem his pherdo rat. Kava koova kamas o baro Devel gar te bistrell." 
2Kings24:5 Kova, hoy boudeder penepaske hi pral o Yoyakim, oun halauter, hoy lo kras, kova hi činlo an i familyakro liil i bare rayendar pral o them Youda." 
2Kings24:6 Oun o Yoyakim meras oun vas paskedo pash peskre phourende. Oun leskro čavo, o Yoyakin, vas baro ray pal leste." 
2Kings24:7 Oun o baro ray pral o them Egiptia djas bouder gar dran peskro them vin. O baro ray pral o them Babilonia las leske halauter krik, hoy lo peske dren las: o tselo them mank o them Egiptia oun o pani Eufrat." 
2Kings24:8 Deesh-te-orhta bersh his o Yoyakin, har lo baro ray vas. Oun yob his baro ray triin čonna, oun djivas an ko tsiro an o foro Yerusalem. Leskri day kharas Nehoushta. Lakro dad his o Elnatan dran o foro Yerusalem." 
2Kings24:9 Oun o Yoyakin kras, hoy djoungeles his an o baro Debleskre yaka, yaake har leskro dad ninna kras." 
2Kings24:10 An ko tsiro bičras ko ray pral o them Babilonia, o Neboukadnezar, peskre lourden pash o foro Yerusalem. Oun yon čivan pen troul ko tselo foro, te nay nashell kek dran o foro vin te dren." 
2Kings24:11 Oun o Neboukadnezar vas pash ko foro, har leskre lourde ninna koy tardo his, oun moukan kekes dren te vin." 
2Kings24:12 Oun o Yoyakin, ko ray pral o them Youda, das pes an i vasta ko rayestar dran o them Babilonia, oun djas vin pash leste: yob oun leskri day oun leskre pralstoune boudepangre oun bare lourde, ninna kol raya, kay an leskro kheer his. Oun o Neboukadnezar, ko baro ray dran o them Babilonia, čivas les stildes. An ko tsiro his o Neboukadnezar an o orhtato bersh baro ray." 
2Kings24:13 Oun yob las peske o tselo bravlepen, hoy his an o baro Debleskro kheer oun an o rayeskro kheer. Oun kol tsele sonakangre koola, hoy moukas o Israeleskro ray, o Salomo, te krell o baro Debleskro khereske, kova moukas o Neboukadnezar khetne te dell. Lauter vas yaake, har o baro Devel les penas." 
2Kings24:14 Oun o Neboukadnezar anas i tsele menshen dran o foro Yerusalem an peskro them Babilonia, i pralstoune, i bare lourde, oun i tsele boudepangre, kay nay boudran mishto o kashteha oun o sasteha. Kolla lauter his 10.000 (deesh zerya) pandle. Kek ačas pale, kokres i čorvele an o them." 
2Kings24:15 Oun yob moukas an o them Babilonia te anell: o Yoyakin oun leskri day oun leskre romya; kol raya, kay an leskro kheer his; ninna pandas lo an o foro Yerusalem i pralstunen pral o them Youda, oun anas len an o them Babilonia;" 
2Kings24:16 koy pashel 7.000 kol feteder morshendar; oun 1.000 morsha kolendar, kay nay boudran mishto o kashteha oun o sasteha; oun i tsele kourepangre. Kolen lauteren anas lo an o pandepen an o them Babilonia." 
2Kings24:17 Oun o baro ray pral o them Babilonia las o Yoyakineskro kak, – leskro lab his Mattanya – oun kras, te vell lo o baro ray pal o Yoyakin pral o them Youda, oun das les i vavar lab, oun kharas les Sedekya." 
2Kings24:18 Biish-te-yek bersh his o Sedekya, har lo baro ray vas; oun deesh-te-yek bersha his lo baro ray an o foro Yerusalem. Leskri day kharas Hamoutal. Lakro dad his o Yirmeya dran Libna." 
2Kings24:19 Oun o Sedekya kras, hoy djoungeles his glan o baro Debleskre yaka, yaake har o Yoyakim ninna kras." 
2Kings24:20 Kova halauter kras o baro Debles yaake rhoyedo pral o foro Yerusalem oun o them Youda, te tradas lo len pestar krik. Oun o Sedekya phagas o baro rayeha pral o them Babilonia, oun kras bouder gar, hoy kova kamas." 
2Kings25:1 Har o Sedekya an o enyato bersh baro ray his, vas o baro ray pral o them Babilonia, o Neboukadnezar, peskre tsele lourdentsa pre glan o foro Yerusalem. Kova his ap o deshto dives an o deshto čon. Oun yob čivas peskre lourden troul o tselo foro, oun moukas čik pre te vitsrell troul o foro, te krell lo i drom, hoy djal pral ap o foreskri massouri." 
2Kings25:2 Yaake vas ko foro dren pandlo bis an o deesh-te-yekto bersh, kay o Sedekya baro ray his." 
2Kings25:3 Ap o enyato dives an o starto čon vas i bok bares an o foro, oun i menshen his bouder či te rhal." 
2Kings25:4 Kote phagan i Babilonarya an o foro dren. Oun an koy rati nashan i tsele kourepangre vin dran ko voudar mashkral kol douy massurya, hoy hi pash o rayeskro baar, ninna te his i Babilonarya troul o foro čiddo. Koy nashas o Sedekya peskre lourdentsa an o telstouno them, kay o pani Yordan nashell." 
2Kings25:5 Oun i lourde dran o them Babilonia lan sik o baro rayeske Sedekya palla. Oun yon lan les dren oun tapran les an o telstouno them pash o foro Yericho. Oun kol tsele kourepangre, kay pash leste his, nashan penge lestar krik, oun moukan les." 
2Kings25:6 I lourde dran o them Babilonia lan o baro rayes Sedekya oun pandan les oun anan les an o foro Ribla pash o baro rayeste pral o them Babilonia. Oun yon rakran i phagi pral leste vin. 
2Kings25:7 Oun leskre morsh čaven maran le kote glan leskre yaka. Oun leske van i yaka vin dino. Oun yon pandan les sasterne shellentsa oun anan les an o them Babilonia. 
2Kings25:8 O baro rayes pral o them Babilonia, o Neboukadnezar, les his i baro lourdo an peskro kheer. Koleskro lab his Nebousaradan. Yob his o pralstouno pral i lourdende. Har his o Neboukadnezar an o deesh-te-enyato bersh o baro ray pral o them Babilonia, koy vas o Nebousaradan ap o eftato dives an o pančto čon an o foro Yerusalem." 
2Kings25:9 Oun yob rhačras o baro Debleskro kheer tele, ninna ko kheer o baro rayestar oun kol vavar khera an o foro Yerusalem; ava, hako baro kheer rhačras lo tele." 
2Kings25:10 Oun kol tsele lourde dran o them Babilonia, kay leha van, phagan i massurya troul o foro Yerusalem tele." 
2Kings25:11 Oun kol menshen, kay pral ačan an o foro Yerusalem, anas o Nebousaradan pandles krik an o them Babilonia, ninna kolla, kay dan pen an o vast o baro rayestar pral o them Babilonia, khetne kolentsa, kay pral ačan kol boudendar, kay glan i tsiro koy djivan." 
2Kings25:12 Kokres i čorvelendar an o them moukas lo save koy, te boudrenn le ap o drakengro them oun ap o harhetikro them." 
2Kings25:13 Oun i lourde dran Babilonia phagan i bare turme paash, hoy dran lolo saster kerdo van oun glan o kheer o baro Deblestar tardo his. Ninna phagan le kol vourdya an kotya oun ko thopaskro čaro, hoy dran lolo saster kerdo vas, oun hoy an o baro Debleskro kheer tardo his. Oun ko tselo lolo saster anan i Babilonarya an o them Babilonia." 
2Kings25:14 Ninna lan le pentsa krik kol pirya, bare roya, i činepangre, kolentsa i dorya an i momlia tele činlo venn, oun čare, kay soungepaskro koova dren vell oun o tselo vavar koova dran lolo saster, kay boudran le leha an o Debleskro kheer." 
2Kings25:15 Ninna kol yagakre čare oun kol bare čare, kay o rat dren nashell, halauter, hoy dran sonakay oun roup kerdo vas, las ko pralstouno, o Nebousaradan, krik." 
2Kings25:16 Kolla douy turme, ko baro thopaskro čaro oun kol vourdya, kay o Salomo moukas te krell o baro Debleskro khereske, kolla lauter his dran yaake boud lolo saster kerdo, te djinas kek, har phares kova his." 
2Kings25:17 Enya metarya his kol douy turme bares tarde. Oun lengre sherya his ninna dran lolo saster kote pre kerdo. Hako shero his yek te paash metarya bares tardo. Oun troul hako shero his i shoukar pandepen phabyentsa, halauter dran lolo saster. Yek turmo his har ko vavar." 
2Kings25:18 Oun o pralstouno lourdo las o pralstouno rashayes, o Seraya, pandlo, ninna ko rashayes Sefanya, kay vas pal o Seraya, oun ninna kol triin morshen, kay dan yak ap o voudar." 
2Kings25:19 Oun an o foro his gomme: ko pralstounes pral i lourdende; vavar panč morshen, kay an hako tsiro glan o baro rayeste nay van; ko činepaskro, kay i laba i lourdendar pre činas oun i lourden vin rodas; oun shob-deesh vavar bare morsha." 
2Kings25:20 Kolen halauteren las o Nebousaradan, ko pralstouno lourdo pandlo, oun anas len pash o baro rayeste an o foro Ribla an o them Babilonia." 
2Kings25:21 Oun o baro ray pral o them Babilonia moukas len temerl te dell an o foro Ribla an ko kotar them, hoy kharell Hamat. Yaake van i menshe dran o them Youda krik anlo dran pengro them." 
2Kings25:22 Pral kol menshende, kay pral ačan an o them Youda, kolen o Neboukadnezar, ko ray pral o them Babilonia, pral moukas, čivas lo o morshes Gedalya, koleskro dad o Ahikam his, koleskro dad o Shafan his." 
2Kings25:23 Oun har i pralstoune lourde dran Youda shounan, kay o baro ray pral o them Babilonia o Gedalyes pral o them Youda dren čivas, van le i lourdentsa pash o Gedalya an o foro Mispa. Kol pralstoune lourde his: o Ismael, koleskro dad o Netanya his; o Yohanan, koleskro dad o Karea his; o Seraya, koleskro dad o Tanhoumet his dran Netofa oun o Yazania dran Maaka." 
2Kings25:24 Oun o Gedalya das pes glan lende oun kol vavar morshende sovel oun penas ap lende: “Ma trashenn i lourdendar dran o them Babilonia! Ačenn an o them oun boudrenn o baro rayeske dran o them Babilonia, palle djal t'menge mishto.”" 
2Kings25:25 Oun an o eftato čon vas o Ismael, koleskro dad o Netanya his, koleskro dad o Elishama his. Kolla his dran o baro rayeskri familya. Oun deesh morsha his pash leste. Oun yon dan o Gedalyes temerl. Koy pashel maran le ninna kol morshen dran o them Youda oun dran o them Babilonia, kay pash leste his an o foro Mispa." 
2Kings25:26 Oun i daryatar glan i Babilonarya kran pen i tsele menshe an o them ap o drom, tikne oun bare. Oun i pralstoune lourde his ninna pashel. Oun yon nashan penge an o them Egiptia." 
2Kings25:27 Har o Evil-Merodak o baro ray pral Babilonia vas, moukas lo gomme an kava bersh o Yoyakin, ko rayes pral o them Youda dran o stilepen te lell. Kova his an o 37. (triyanda-te-eftato) bersh, har o Yoyakin krik anlo vas, ap o 27. (biish-te-eftato) dives an o deesh-te-douyto čon." 
2Kings25:28 Oun o Evil-Merodak rakras kamles leha, oun hadas les pral kol vavar raya, kay pash leste his an o them Babilonia." 
2Kings25:29 Oun o Yoyakin čivas kol ripya pestar krik, hoy les an o stilepen ap leste his, oun rhas peskro tselo djipen pash o baro rayeste ap leskri rhapaskri." 
2Kings25:30 Oun leske vas dran o baro rayeskro vast hako dives kova dino, hoy les hounte vell djipaske, yaake rah har yob djivas." 
1Chronicles1:1 O Adam, o Set, o Enosh," 
1Chronicles1:2 o Kenan, o Mahalalel, o Yered" 
1Chronicles1:3 o Henok, o Matusalem, o Lamek" 
1Chronicles1:4 o Noah, o Sem, o Ham, o Yafet." 
1Chronicles1:5 O Yafet: Leskre čave his: o Gomer, o Magog, o Madai, o Yavan, o Toubal, o Meshek oun o Tiras." 
1Chronicles1:6 O Gomer: Leskre čave his: o Ashkenas, o Difat oun o Togarma." 
1Chronicles1:7 O Yavan: leskre čave his: o Elisha, o Tarsis, i Kitarya oun i Rodanarya." 
1Chronicles1:8 O Ham: Leskre čave his: o Koush, o Misrayim, o Pout oun o Kanaan." 
1Chronicles1:9 O Koush: Leskre čave his: o Seba, o Havila, o Sabta, o Ragma, oun o Sabteka. O Ragma: Leskre čave his: o Saba oun o Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:10 O Koush his o phouro dad ko morshestar Nimrod. Kova his o ersto, kay kras pes lo i zorelo ap kay phoub." 
1Chronicles1:11 O Misrayim: Leskre čave his: i Loudarya, i Anamarya, i Lehabarya, i Naftouharya," 
1Chronicles1:12 ninna i Patrusarya, oun i Kaslouharya oun i Kaftorarya; kolendar van i Filistarya." 
1Chronicles1:13 O Kanaan: leskro phoureder čavo his o Sidon. Pal leste vas o Het," 
1Chronicles1:14 ninna i Yebousarya, i Amorarya, oun i Girgasharya," 
1Chronicles1:15 oun i Hivarya, i Arkarya, oun i Sinarya," 
1Chronicles1:16 oun i Arvadarya, i Zemararya, oun i Hamatarya." 
1Chronicles1:17 O Sem: Leskre čave his: o Elam, o Assour, o Arpaksad, o Loud, o Aram, o Ous, o Houl, o Geter, oun o Meshek." 
1Chronicles1:18 O Arpaksad: leskro čavo his o Shela. Koleskro čavo his o Eber. 
1Chronicles1:19 O Eber: Leske van douy čave boldo. Ko yek kharas Peleg. An leskro tsiro ačan i menshe bouder gar khetne. Haki bari familya las peskro them. Doleske vas lo Peleg kharedo. Oun o lab leskro phralestar his Yoktan. 
1Chronicles1:20 O Yoktan: Leskre čave his: o Almodad, o Shelef, o Hazarmavet, o Yera," 
1Chronicles1:21 o Hadoram, o Ouzal, oun o Dikla," 
1Chronicles1:22 o Ebal, o Abimael oun o Saba," 
1Chronicles1:23 o Ofir, o Havila oun o Yobab. Kolla halauter van pal o Yoktan." 
1Chronicles1:24 Kolla van pal o Sem: leskro čavo his o Arpaksad, lestar vas o Shela," 
1Chronicles1:25 lestar vas o Eber, lestar vas o Peleg, lestar vas o Regou," 
1Chronicles1:26 lestar vas o Seroug, lestar vas o Nahor, lestar vas o Tera," 
1Chronicles1:27 lestar vas o Abram, kova hi o Abraham." 
1Chronicles1:28 O Abraham his o dad douy morsh čavendar: o Isaak oun o Ismael. 
1Chronicles1:29 O Ismaeles his deesh-te-yek čave, kay yaake boldo van: O phoureder his o Nebayot. Pal leste vas o Kedar oun o Adbeel, oun o Mibsam," 
1Chronicles1:30 o Mishma oun o Douma, o Massa, o Hadad, oun o Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 o Yetour, o Nafish, oun o Kedema. Kolendar lauterendar his o Ismael o dad." 
1Chronicles1:32 O Abrahames his shob čave peskri douyti romyatar Ketura: o Simran, o Yokshan, o Medan, o Midian, o Yishbak oun o Shoua. O Yokshan his o dad douy morsh čavendar: o Saba oun o Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:33 O Midian his o dad kol morshendar: o Efa, o Efer, o Henok, o Abida, oun o Eldaa. Kolendar halauterendar his i Ketura i day." 
1Chronicles1:34 O Abraham: Leskro čavo his o Isaak. Koleskre čave his o Esau oun o Yakob (Israel). 
1Chronicles1:35 O Esau: Leskre čave his: o Elifas, o Regouel, o Yehoush, o Yalam, oun o Korah." 
1Chronicles1:36 O Elifas: Leskre čave his: o Teman, oun o Omar, o Zefi oun o Gatam, o Kenas, i Timna oun o Amalek." 
1Chronicles1:37 O Regouel: Leskre čave his: o Nahat, o Zera, o Shamma oun o Missa." 
1Chronicles1:38 O Seir: Leskre čave his: o Lotan, o Shobal, o Sibon, o Ana, o Dishon, o Ezer oun o Dishan." 
1Chronicles1:39 O Lotan: Leskre čave his: o Hori oun o Hemam. O Lotaneskri pheen his i Timna. 
1Chronicles1:40 O Shobal: Leskre čave his: o Alvan, o Manahat, o Ebal, o Shefi, oun o Onam. O Sibon: Leskre čave his o Aya oun o Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 O Ana: Leskro čavo his o Dishon. Oun koleskre čave his: o Hemdan, o Eshban, o Yitran, oun o Keran." 
1Chronicles1:42 O Ezer: Leskre čave his. o Bilhan, o Saavan, oun o Akan. O Dishan: Leskre čave his o Ous oun o Aran." 
1Chronicles1:43 Kalla hi i bare raya an o them Edom, glan ko tsiro, kay i Israelitaryen i baro ray his: Yaake kharenn le: o Bela, koleskro dad o Beor his, oun leskro foro kharas Dinaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Har o Bela meras, vas pal leste o Yobab o ray, koleskro dad o Zera his, dran Bozra." 
1Chronicles1:45 Har o Yobab meras, vas pal leste o Housham o ray dran o them Teman." 
1Chronicles1:46 Har o Housham meras, vas pal leste o Hadad o ray, koleskro dad o Bedad his. Kova kouras pes i Midianarya, oun das len an o them Moab, oun vas o zorleder. Oun leskro foro kharas Avit." 
1Chronicles1:47 Har o Hadad meras, vas pal leste o Samla dran Masreka o ray." 
1Chronicles1:48 Har o Samla meras, vas pal leste o Shaul dran Rehobot o ray. O foro Rehobot hi čiddo pash o lengsto pani." 
1Chronicles1:49 Har o Shaul meras, vas pal leste o Baal-Hanan o ray, koleskro dad o Akbor his." 
1Chronicles1:50 Har o Baal-Hanan meras, vas pal leste o Hadad o ray. Oun leskro foro kharas Paou. Oun leskri romni his i Mehetabel, kolakri day i Matred his, oun kolakro papo o Mesahab his." 
1Chronicles1:51 Oun har o Hadad meras, his kolla i pralstoune raya pral Edom: o Timna, o Alva, o Yetet," 
1Chronicles1:52 o Oholibama, o Ela, o Pinon," 
1Chronicles1:53 o Kenas, o Teman, o Mibzar," 
1Chronicles1:54 o Magdiel, oun o Iram. Kolla his i pralstoune pral Edom." 
1Chronicles2:1 Kalla hi o Israeleskre morsh čave: o Ruben, o Simeon, o Levi, oun o Youda, o Issakar, oun o Zabulon," 
1Chronicles2:2 o Dan, o Yosef oun o Benyamin, o Naftali, o Gad oun o Asser." 
1Chronicles2:3 O Youda his o dad triin morsh čavendar: o Er, o Onan oun o Shela. Kolla triin van leske bolde peskri romyatar, koy Kanaanitetsa, kolakro dad o Shoua his. Oun o Er, ko phoureder čavo his čilačes an i yaka o baro Deblestar; doleske maras lo les." 
1Chronicles2:4 Oun i Tamar, leskro čaveskri romni anas leske o Perez oun o Zera ap i phoub. Yaake his o Youda o dad panč morsh čavendar." 
1Chronicles2:5 O Perez: Leskre čave his: o Hesron oun o Hamoul. 
1Chronicles2:6 O Zera: Leskre čave his: o Simri, o Etan, o Heman oun o Kalkol oun o Darda; khetne his le panč." 
1Chronicles2:7 O Karmi: Leskro čavo his o Akan. Kova anas Israel an i bibarht. Yob rikras peske savo koova, hoy o baro Debleske his." 
1Chronicles2:8 O Etan: Leskro čavo his o Asarya. 
1Chronicles2:9 O Hesron: Leskre čave his: o Yerameel oun o Ram oun o Keloubay. 
1Chronicles2:10 O Ram: Leskro čavo his o Amminadab, oun koleskro čavo his o Nashon, ko pralstouno pral o kheer Youda." 
1Chronicles2:11 O Nashon: Leskro čavo his o Salma, oun koleskro čavo his o Boas." 
1Chronicles2:12 Oun koleskro čavo his o Obed, oun koleskro čavo his o Isay." 
1Chronicles2:13 Oun o Isay las čave: o phoureder his o Eliab, o douyto his o Abinadab, o Shimea his o triinto," 
1Chronicles2:14 o Netanel his o starto, o Radday his o pančto," 
1Chronicles2:15 o Ozem his o shobto, o David his o eftato." 
1Chronicles2:16 Oun lengre phenya his: i Serouya oun i Abigal. Oun i čave foun i Serouya his: o Abishay oun o Yoab oun o Asahel; khetne his le triin. 
1Chronicles2:17 Oun i Abigal vas i day ko morshestar Amasa. Leskro dad his o Yeter, ko Ismaelari." 
1Chronicles2:18 O Kaleb, koleskro dad o Hesron his, romedineras i Azouba. Lengri čay his i Yeriot. Oun lakre čave his: o Yesher, o Shobab, oun o Ardon." 
1Chronicles2:19 Oun har i Azouba meras, las peske o Kaleb i Efrata, oun yoy anas leske o Hour ap i phoub." 
1Chronicles2:20 Koleskro čavo his o Ouri, oun koleskro čavo his o Bezalel." 
1Chronicles2:21 Har o Hesron shob-deesh bersha phouro his, romedineras lo i čat ko morshestar Makir, koleskro dad o Gilead his. Oun yoy anas leske i čavo ap i phoub. Ko kharas Segoub." 
1Chronicles2:22 Koleskro čavo his o Yayr. Koles his biish-te-triin forya an o them Gilead. 
1Chronicles2:23 Pal i tsiro van i Geshourarya oun i Syrarya, oun lan lenge shob-deesh forya krik. Mashkral lende his kol Yayreskre gaba oun ko foro Kenat oun kol gaba trouyel. Hakeno an ko kotar them vas pal ko morsheste Makir, koleskro dad o Gilead his." 
1Chronicles2:24 Oun har o Hesron meras, romedineras o Kaleb i Efrata, koy romyat peskro dadestar Hesron. Oun yoy anas leske o Ashehour ap i phoub. Kova kras o foro Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 O Yerameel, ko phoureder čavo ko morshestar Hesron, las čave: o phoureder his o Ram, pal leste vas o Bouna, o Oren oun o Ozem oun o Ahia." 
1Chronicles2:26 Oun o Yerameeles his koy pashel i vavar romni. Koya kharas Atara. Lakro čavo his o Onam. 
1Chronicles2:27 O Ram, ko phoureder čavo o morshestar Yerameel las čave: o Maas, o Yamin oun o Eker." 
1Chronicles2:28 O Onam: Leskre čave his: o Shammay oun o Yada. O Shammay his o dad kol douy morshendar: o Nadab oun o Abishour. 
1Chronicles2:29 O Abishoures his i romni. Lakro lab his Abihayil. Oun yoy anas leske o Aban oun o Molid ap i phoub. 
1Chronicles2:30 O Nadab: Leskre čave his: o Seled oun o Appayim. O Seled meras oun les his kek čave. 
1Chronicles2:31 O Appayimeskro čavo his o Yishi. Oun koleskro čavo his o Sheshan. Oun koleskro čay his i Alayi. 
1Chronicles2:32 O Yada, ko phraal foun o Shammay, les his douy čave: o Yeter oun o Yonatan. Oun o Yeter meras oun les his kek čave." 
1Chronicles2:33 O Yonatan, les his douy čave: o Pelet oun o Sasa. Kalla his i morsha, kay van pal o Yerameel." 
1Chronicles2:34 Oun o Sheshan, les his kek morsh čave. Kokres ča van les. Oun les his i boudepaskro, kova vas dran o them Egiptia oun kharas Yara." 
1Chronicles2:35 Leske das o Sheshan yek peskre čendar, te vell li leskri romni. Koya anas leske i čaves ap i phoub. Kova his o Attay." 
1Chronicles2:36 Koleskro čavo his o Natan. Koleskro čavo his o Sabad. 
1Chronicles2:37 Koleskro čavo his o Eflal. Koleskro čavo his o Obed. 
1Chronicles2:38 Koleskro čavo his o Yehou. Koleskro čavo his o Asarya. 
1Chronicles2:39 Koleskro čavo his o Helez. Koleskro čavo his o Elasa. 
1Chronicles2:40 Koleskro čavo his o Sismay. Koleskro čavo his o Shalloum. 
1Chronicles2:41 Koleskro čavo his o Yekamya. Koleskro čavo his o Elishama. 
1Chronicles2:42 O Kaleb, koleskro phraal o Yerameel his, les his čave: leskro phoureder his o Mesha. Koleskro čavo his o Sif. O douyto his o Maresha. Koleskro čavo his o Hebron." 
1Chronicles2:43 O Hebron: Leskre čave his: o Korah, o Tapoua, o Rekem, oun o Shema." 
1Chronicles2:44 O Shema: Leskro čavo his o Raham, koleskro čavo his o Yorkoam. O Rekem: Leskro čavo his o Shammay." 
1Chronicles2:45 Koleskro čavo his o Maon. Koleskro čavo his o Bet-Zur. 
1Chronicles2:46 O Kaleb, les his boudeder romya. Yek kharas Efa. Yoy anas o Haran, o Moza oun o Gases ap i phoub. O Haraneskro čavo his o Yaday." 
1Chronicles2:47 Koleskre čave his: o Regem, o Yotam, o Geshan, o Pelet, o Efa, oun o Shaaf." 
1Chronicles2:48 Yek vavar romni ko morshestar Kaleb his i Maaka. Yoy anas o Sheber oun o Tirana ap i phoub. 
1Chronicles2:49 Oun yoy las ninna o Shaaf. Koleskre čave his o Madmanna, oun o Sheva. O Sheva his o dad kol morshendar Makbena oun Gibea. Oun i Aksa his o Kalebeskri čay." 
1Chronicles2:50 Kolla his i čave ko morshestar Kaleb. O Hour his o phoureder leskri romyatar Efrata. Leskre čave his: o Shobal, o Salma oun o Haref. O Shobal kras ko foro Kiryat-Yearim. O Salma kras ko foro Betlehem. Oun o Haref kras ko foro Bet-Gader." 
1Chronicles2:51  
1Chronicles2:52 Oun o Shobal, – kova, kay kras o foro Kiryat-Yearim, lestar vas i familya Reaya, kolla his o paash kolendar, kay djivenn an o foro Menouhot." 
1Chronicles2:53 An Kiryat-Yearim djivan: i Yeterarya oun i Poutarya, oun i Shoumatarya oun i Mishrarya, kolendar venn i menshe, kay djivenn an i forya Zora oun Eshtaol." 
1Chronicles2:54 O Salma, leskre čave his: Kolla, kay djivenn an i forya Betlehem, Netofa, Atrot-Bet-Yoab, oun i paash kolendar, kay djivenn an Manahat. Kolla van dran Zora." 
1Chronicles2:55 Ko morshestar Salma van ninna kol činepangre, kay činan an lila, hoy djas an o them. Yon djivan an o foro Yabez. Kolla his i Tirarya, i Shimatarya, i Soukarya. Kolla hi i Kenarya, oun van pal o Hammat. Kova his o phouro dad kolendar dran o kheer Rekab." 
1Chronicles3:1 Oun kolla his i čave o rayestar David, kolla kay van leske boldo an o foro Hebron: leskro phoureder his o Amnon. Leskri day his i Ahinoam dran Yesreel. Ko douyto his o Daniel. Leskri day his i Abigayil dran Karmel." 
1Chronicles3:1 Oun kolla his i čave o rayestar David, kolla kay van leske boldo an o foro Hebron: leskro phoureder his o Amnon. Leskri day his i Ahinoam dran Yesreel. Ko douyto his o Daniel. Leskri day his i Abigayil dran Karmel." 
1Chronicles3:2 O triinto his o Absalom. Leskri day his i Maaka, kolakro dad his o Talmay. Kova his o ray pral Geshour. O starto his o Adoniya. Leskri day his i Haggit." 
1Chronicles3:3 O pančto his o Shefatya. Leskri day his i Abital. O shobto his o Yitream. Leskri day his i Egla. 
1Chronicles3:4 Kolla shob van leske an o foro Hebron boldo. Kote his lo o baro ray efta bersha oun shob čon. Palle djivas lo an o foro Yerusalem. Kote his lo triyanda bersha o baro ray. 
1Chronicles3:5 Oun kalla van leske an o foro Yerusalem boldo: o Shimea oun o Shobab oun o Natan oun o Salomo: Kol starendar hi i Batsheba i day. Kolakro dad his o Ammiel. 
1Chronicles3:6 O Davideskre vavar čave his: o Yibhar, o Elishama, oun o Elifelet," 
1Chronicles3:7 oun o Noga, o Nefeg, oun o Yafia," 
1Chronicles3:8 oun o Elishama, o Elyada, oun o Elifelet. Khetne his le enya." 
1Chronicles3:9 Koy pashel van i čave leskre vavar djouvyendar. Oun i Tamar his lengri pheen. 
1Chronicles3:10 O Salomo his o dad o morshestar Roboam, koleskro čavo his o Abiya, koleskro čavo his o Asa, koleskro čavo his o Yosafat." 
1Chronicles3:11 Koleskro čavo his o Yoram, koleskro čavo his o Ahasya, koleskro čavo his o Yoash," 
1Chronicles3:12 koleskro čavo his o Amazya, koleskro čavo his o Asarya, koleskro čavo his o Yotam," 
1Chronicles3:13 koleskro čavo his o Ahas, koleskro čavo his o Hiskiya, koleskro čavo his o Manasse," 
1Chronicles3:14 koleskro čavo his o Amon, koleskro čavo his o Yosia." 
1Chronicles3:15 Oun i čave o morshestar Yosia his: o phoureder his o Yohanan, o douyto his o Yoyakim, o triinto his o Sedekya, o starto his o Shalloum." 
1Chronicles3:16 Oun i čave o morshestar Yoyakim his o Yekonya, oun o Sedekya." 
1Chronicles3:17 O Yekonya vas pandles anlo an o them Babilonia. Leskre čave his: o Shealtiel," 
1Chronicles3:18 o Malkiram oun o Pedaya oun o Shenazzar, o Yekamya, o Hoshama, oun o Nedabya." 
1Chronicles3:19 O Pedaya his o dad douy čavendar: o Zorobabel oun o Shimi. O Zorobabel his o dad kol douy morsh čavendar, o Meshoullam oun o Hananya. Oun i Shelomit his lengri pheen." 
1Chronicles3:20 Les his ninna panč vavar čave: o Hashouba, o Ohel, o Berekia, o Hasadya oun o Yushab-Hesed." 
1Chronicles3:21 Oun i čave o morshestar Hananya his: O Pelatya oun o Yeshaya, o Refaya, o Arnan, o Obadya oun o Shekanya." 
1Chronicles3:22 O Shekanya, les his shob čave: o Shemaya, o Hattoush oun o Yigal, oun o Baria oun o Nearya oun o Shafat." 
1Chronicles3:23 O Nearya, les his triin čave: o Elyoenay oun o Hiskiya, oun o Asrikam." 
1Chronicles3:24 O Elyoenay, les his efta čave: o Hodavya oun o Elyashib, oun o Pelaya oun o Akkoub oun o Yohanan, oun o Delaya, oun o Anani." 
1Chronicles4:1 O Youda: leskre čave his: o Perez, o Hesron, o Karmi, o Hour oun o Shobal." 
1Chronicles4:2 O Shobaleskro čavo his o Reaya. Koleskro čavo his o Yahat. Koleskre čave his o Ahoumay oun o Lahad. Kolla lauter hi i menshe dran o kheer Zora. 
1Chronicles4:3 O Hour his o phoureder čavo o morshestar Kaleb oun leskro romyatar Efrata. Leskre čave kran o foro Betlehem. O Hour, les his triin čave: o Etam, o Penouel oun o Eser. O Etam, les his triin čave: o Yesreel, o Yishma, o Yidbash. Oun lengri pheen his i Hazlelponi. O Penouel kras o foro Gedor, oun o Eser kras o foro Housha." 
1Chronicles4:4  
1Chronicles4:5 Oun o Ashehour, kova, kay kras o foro Tekoa, koles his douy romya: i Hela oun i Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Oun i Naara anas leske o Ahoussam ap i phoub, ninna o Hefer oun o Temni oun o Ahashtari ap i phoub." 
1Chronicles4:7 Oun i Hela las: o Seret, o Sohar, oun o Etnan." 
1Chronicles4:8 O morshestar Koz vas o Anoub oun o Sobeba, ninna i menshe dran o kheer Aharehel, koleskro dad o Haroum his." 
1Chronicles4:9 Oun o Yabez his an-dikleder har leskre phrala. Har lo boldo vas, das les leskri day ko lab Yabez, oun penas: Me anom les boud doukentsa ap i phoub." 
1Chronicles4:10 Oun o Yabez das gole ap o Israeleskro Debleste oun penas: Čip tiri barht ap mande, oun kre miro them bareder har lo kanna hi. Ab mantsa, oun rike tiro vast pral mande, te vell nay kek douk pral mande! Oun o Devel moukas te vell, hoy yob poučas peske lestar." 
1Chronicles4:11 Oun o Keloub, koleskro phraal o Shouha his, las i čavo. Kova his o Mehir. Leskro čavo his o Eshton." 
1Chronicles4:12 Koleskre čave his: o Bet-Rafa, oun o Pasea oun o Tehinna. O Tehinna kras o foro Nahash. Kolestar van i morsha, kay djivan an Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 O Kenas, les his kal čave: o Otniel oun o Seraya. I čave o morshestar Otniel his: o Hatat oun o Meonotay." 
1Chronicles4:14 Oun o Meonotay vas o dad o morshestar Ofra. O Seraya vas o dad o morshestar Yoab. Yob kras ko gab, hoy vell kharedo: Tala kolendar, kay boudrenn o kashteha. Yon his lauter lače vastengre boudepangre." 
1Chronicles4:15 O Kaleb, koleskro dad o Yefunne his, las kal čave: o Irou, o Ela, oun o Naam. Oun o Ela vas o dad o morshestar Kenas." 
1Chronicles4:16 O Yehallelel, les his star čave: o Sif oun o Sifa, o Tirya oun o Asarel." 
1Chronicles4:17 O Esra, les his star čave: o Yeter, oun o Mered, oun o Efer, oun o Yalon. Oun o Mered romedineras i Bitya, kolakro dad o baro ray pral Egiptia his. Oun len his yek čay, i Miryam, oun douy morsh čave, o Shammay oun o Isheba. O Isheba kras ko foro Eshtemoa. O Mered romedineras ninna i romyat dran o them Youda. Oun khetne lah his les triin čave: o Yered, o Heber oun o Yekoutiel. O Yered kras o foro Gedor. O Heber kras o foro Soko. Oun o Yekoutiel kras o foro Zanoa." 
1Chronicles4:18  
1Chronicles4:19 Oun o Hodiya romedineras koy pheen o morshestar Naham. Lendar van i Garmarya, kay djivenn an o foro Kehila, oun i Maakatarya, kay djivenn an o foro Eshtemoa." 
1Chronicles4:20 O Shimon, leskre čave his: O Amnon oun o Rinna, o Ben-Hanan, oun o Tilon. O Yishi, leskre čave his: o Sohet oun o Ben-Sohet." 
1Chronicles4:21 O Shela, koleskro dad o Youda hi, leskre čave his: o Er, kova kras o foro Leka, oun o Lada, kay kras o foro Maresha, ninna i menshe, kay djivan an Ashbea. Kolla kran lačo layntikro than." 
1Chronicles4:22 O morshestar Shela van ninna o Yokim oun i morsha dran Koseba, ninna o Yoash oun o Saraf, kolla, kay pralstoune his pral o them Moab. Kote djivan le yek tsiro oun van pale pale an Betlehem, – yaake vell penlo." 
1Chronicles4:23 Yon kran pirya oun djivan an i forya Netayim oun Gedera pash o baro rayeste oun boudran leske. 
1Chronicles4:24 O Simeon, leskre čave his: o Nemouel, oun o Yamin, o Yarib, o Zera, o Shaul," 
1Chronicles4:25 koleskro čavo his o Shalloum, koleskro čavo his o Mibsam oun koleskro čavo his o Mishma." 
1Chronicles4:26 Oun i čave o morshestar Mishma his: o Hamuel, koleskro čavo his o Zakour, koleskro čavo his o Shimi." 
1Chronicles4:27 Oun o Shimi, les his deesh-te-shob morsh čave oun shob ča. Leskre phralen his gar yaake boud čave. O kheer Simeon vas gar yaake baro har o kheer Youda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Kol menshe, kay van o Simeonestar djivan an i forya Beersheba, Molada oun an Hazar-Shoual," 
1Chronicles4:29 an Bilha, Ezem oun Tolad," 
1Chronicles4:30 an Betouel, Horma oun an Siklag," 
1Chronicles4:31 an Bet-Markabot, Hazar-Zouzim, Bet-Biri oun an Shaarayim. Kolla his lengre forya, bis te vas o David lengro baro ray." 
1Chronicles4:32 Ninna his lenge kol panč forya Etam, Ayin, Rimmon, Token oun Ashan," 
1Chronicles4:33 koy pashel kol tsele gaba troul lengre forya bis pash Baal. Yaake hi pre-činlo an kol lila, kay lengre familyengre laba dren tardo hi." 
1Chronicles4:34 Lengre pralstoune pral i familye his: o Meshobab, oun o Yamlek oun o Yosha, koleskro dad o Amazya his," 
1Chronicles4:35 oun o Yoel oun o Yehou, koleskro dad o Yoshibya his, koleskro dad o Seraya, koleskro dad o Asiel his;" 
1Chronicles4:36 ninna o Elyoenay oun o Yakoba oun o Yeshohaya oun o Asaya oun o Adiel oun o Yesimiel oun o Benaya; 
1Chronicles4:37 oun o Sisa, koleskro dad o Shifi his, koleskro dad o Allon his, oun koleskro dad o Yedaya his, oun koleskro dad o Shimri his, oun koleskro dad o Shemaya his." 
1Chronicles4:38 Kal morsha, kolengre laba pre činlo hi, his i pralstoune pral pengre menshende. Oun lengre familye van baro oun bareder." 
1Chronicles4:39 Oun yon djan dour an i tala ap koy rig an i tala, kay o kham pre djal, bis pash Gedor, te nay hatsenn le zenlepen lengre bakrenge oun bouzyenge." 
1Chronicles4:40 Oun kote hatsan le lačo pesso zenlepen. Oun ko them his bourhlo ap hake douy rigya, oun shoukar. Kek kourepen his koy. Kol menshe, kay glan lende koy djivan, his save, kay van o morshestar Ham." 
1Chronicles4:41 Oun an ko tsiro, kay o Hiskiya o baro ray pral Youda his, van kolla, kay o labeha pre činlo his, oun djan ap kol menshende Ham pre, kay kote an pengre plarhtene khera djivan, oun ninna pral i Meounarya, kay kote djivan. Oun yon maran len lauteren. Yaake djivenn yon kote bis ap kava dives. Kote his boud zenlepen lengre bakrenge oun bouzyenge." 
1Chronicles4:42 Mank kolende, kay van pal o Simeon, his ninna save – yaake panč-sheel morsha – kolla djan pash i berga Seir: Lengre pralstoune his o Pelatya oun o Nearya oun o Refaya oun o Usiel, kolengro dad his o Yishi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Oun yon maran kolen, kay ačan pral kolendar dran Amalek, kay nashan penge kote. Oun kate djivenn le gomme kava dives." 
1Chronicles5:1 O Ruben his o Yakobeskro phoureder čavo. Doleske his les o čačepen, hoy o phoureder čaveske hi. Kova nashras lo, har sovas lo peskro dadeskri romyah. Oun o Rubeneskro čačepen vas i čavenge leskro phralestar Yosef dino. Ninna te his kova yaake, vas gar činlo an i familyakro liil, te his o Yosef o phoureder." 
1Chronicles5:2 O zorleder mank peskre phrala his o Youda. Doleske vas yek dran o kheer Youda o baro ray pral Israel, ninna te his o Yosefes o čačepen, hoy i phoureder čaveske hi." 
1Chronicles5:3 O Ruben his o Yakobeskro phoureder čavo. Leskre čave his: o Henok, o Pallou, o Hesron oun o Karmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 O Yoel, leskre čave his: o Shemaya, koleskro čavo his o Gog, koleskro čavo his o Shimi," 
1Chronicles5:5 koleskro čavo his o Mika, koleskro čavo his o Reaya, koleskro čavo his o Baal," 
1Chronicles5:6 koleskro čavo his o Beera. Koles anas o Tiglat-Pileser, o baro ray pral o them Assour, pandles an leskro them. Ap ko tsiro his lo o pralstouno pral o kheer Ruben." 
1Chronicles5:7 Vavar i menshendar Ruben his pengre menshentsa pre-činlo an o familyakro liil. Kolla his o pralstouno o Yehiel, palle o Zakarie," 
1Chronicles5:8 oun o Bela, koleskro dad o Asa his, koleskro dad o Shema his, koleskro dad o Yoel his. I menshe dran o kheer Ruben djivan an o them troul Aroer bis pash o Nebo oun Baal-Meon." 
1Chronicles5:9 Oun kote, kay o kham pre djala djivan le bis an o moulo them dren, hoy pash o lengsto pani Eufrat čiddo hi. Len his boud firhe an o tselo them Gilead." 
1Chronicles5:10 An ko tsiro, kay o Saul djivas, djan le an o kourepen i menshentsa, kay kharenn Hagararya, oun van zorleder har yon. Oun yaake djivan yon an kolengre plarhtene khera ap kay tseli rig o themestar Gilead, kay o kham pre djala." 
1Chronicles5:11 Oun i menshe dran o kheer Gad djivan vergel i menshende dran o kheer Ruben, an o them Bashan bis pash Salka." 
1Chronicles5:12 Lengro pralstouno his o Yoel. Ko douyto his o Shafam. Pal lende van o Yanay oun o Shafat. Kolla djivan an Bashan. 
1Chronicles5:13 Oun lengre phrala pengre familyentsa his: o Mikael, o Meshoullam, o Sheba, o Yoray, o Yakan, o Sia oun o Eber. Khetne his le efta." 
1Chronicles5:14 Kolengro dad his o Abihayil, koleskro dad his o Houri, koleskro dad o Yaroa, koleskro dad o Gilead, koleskro dad o Mikael, koleskro dad o Yeshishay, koleskro dad o Yado, koleskro dad o Bouz." 
1Chronicles5:15 Lengro pralstouno his o Ahi, koleskro dad o Abdiel his, koleskro dad o Gouni his." 
1Chronicles5:16 Kal menshe djivan an Gilead, an o them Bashan oun an kol forya, kay kote his, oun ap kol tsele platse, kay lengre firhe his an o tselo them Sharon bis ap leskre rigya." 
1Chronicles5:17 An ko tsiro, kay o Yotam o ray pral o them Youda his, oun o Yerobeam o ray pral o them Israel his, van i laba kal tsele morshendar pre-činlo an o familyakro liil." 
1Chronicles5:18 I lourde dran i khera Ruben oun Gad oun dran i paash familya Manasse his 44.760 (star-deesh-te-star-zerya-efta sheel-te-shob-deesh) morsha. Kolen his shilte, rhare oun boge oun his lače kourepangre." 
1Chronicles5:19 Yon kouran pen i menshentsa dran i khera Yetour oun Nafish oun Nodab. Kolla his Hagararya. 
1Chronicles5:20 Oun i lourde dran i khera Ruben oun Gad oun Manasse dikan ap o baro Debleste oun dan gole ap leste, te vell lo lenge ap i rig. Oun yob shounas ap lende, oun das i Hagararya an lengre vasta oun lauteren, kay pash lende his." 
1Chronicles5:21 Oun yon tapran lengre firhe: 50.000 (paash-sheel zerya) khamele, 250.000 (douy-sheel-te-panč-deesh zerya) bakre, 2.000 (douy zerya) bourike, oun yon lan penge 100.000 (sheel zerya) morshen oun djouvyen oun kran lendar pandepangre." 
1Chronicles5:22 Ninna ačan boud maredes čiddo. Kava kourepen vas o Deblestar. Oun i Israelitarya djivan an lengro them ap lengri phoub bis te van le pandles krik anlo. 
1Chronicles5:23 Oun koy paash familya Manasse djivas an o them mank Bashan oun Baal-Hermon oun bis pash o Senir oun i berga Hermon. Oun yon van boud oun boudeder. 
1Chronicles5:24 Oun kalla his i pralstoune pral pengre dadengre khera: o Efer, o Yishi, o Elyel, o Asriel, o Yeremia, o Hodavya oun o Yadiel. Yon lauter his zoreles an o kourepen oun morsha o labestar." 
1Chronicles5:25 Oun yon peran tele lengro dadengro Deblestar, oun mangan i deblen kol vavar menshendar an, kolen o Devel glan lende vin tradas dran o them." 
1Chronicles5:26 Kote bičras o Israeleskro Devel pral lende o baro rayes dran o them Assour, o Poul, – leskro lab hi ninna Tiglat-Pileser – oun yob moukas i menshen dran o kheer Ruben oun Gad oun i paash familya dran o kheer Manasse pandles krik te anell, oun anas len an i themma troul i forya Hala oun Habor oun Hara oun pash o lengsto pani Gosan. Kote hi le gomme kava dives." 
1Chronicles5:27 O Levi: Leskre čave his: o Gershon, o Kohat oun o Merari." 
1Chronicles5:28 O Kohat, leskre čave his: o Amram, o Yizhar, o Hebron, oun o Usiel." 
1Chronicles5:29 O Amram, leskre čave his: o Aron oun o Mose, yaake har ninna i Miryam. O Aron, leskre čave his: o Nadab oun o Abihu, o Elazar oun o Itamar." 
1Chronicles5:30 O Elazar his o dad o morshestar Pinhas, leskro čavo his o Abishoua," 
1Chronicles5:31 koleskro čavo his o Boukki, koleskro čavo his o Usi," 
1Chronicles5:32 koleskro čavo his o Zeraya, koleskro čavo his o Merayot," 
1Chronicles5:33 koleskro čavo his o Amarya, koleskro čavo his o Ahitoub," 
1Chronicles5:34 koleskro čavo his o Zadok, koleskro čavo his o Ahimaaz," 
1Chronicles5:35 koleskro čavo his o Asarya, koleskro čavo his o Yohanan," 
1Chronicles5:36 koleskro čavo his o Asarya. Kova hi ko rashay, kay kras i rashayeskri boudi an o Debleskro kheer, hoy o Salomo moukas te krell an o foro Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles5:37 O Asarya his o dad o morshestar Amarya, koleskro čavo his o Ahitoub," 
1Chronicles5:38 koleskro čavo his o Zadok, koleskro čavo his o Shalloum," 
1Chronicles5:39 koleskro čavo his o Hilkiya, koleskro čavo his o Asarya," 
1Chronicles5:40 koleskro čavo his o Seraya, koleskro čavo his o Yozadak," 
1Chronicles5:41 Oun o Yozadak vas pandles krik anlo kol menshentsa dran Youda oun Yerusalem. Kolen das o baro Devel an o vast o baro rayestar Neboukadnezar, oun kova moukas len pandles krik te anell." 
1Chronicles6:1 O Levi: Leskre čave his: o Gershon, o Kohat oun o Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 O Gershon, leskre čave his: o Libni oun o Shimi." 
1Chronicles6:3 O Kohat, leskre čave his: o Amram oun o Yizhar oun o Hebron oun o Usiel." 
1Chronicles6:4 O Merari, leskre čave his: o Mali oun o Moushi. Oun kalla hi i menshe, kay van pal o Levi pal lengre dadengre khera:" 
1Chronicles6:5 O Gershon: leskro čavo his o Libni, koleskro čavo his o Yahat, koleskro čavo his o Simma," 
1Chronicles6:6 koleskro čavo his o Yoa, koleskro čavo his o Iddo, koleskro čavo his o Zera, koleskro čavo his o Yeatray." 
1Chronicles6:7 O Kohat: leskro čavo his o Amminadab, koleskro čavo his o Korah, koleskro čavo his o Assir," 
1Chronicles6:8 koleskro čavo his o Elkana, koleskro čavo his o Abiasaf, koleskro čavo his o Assir," 
1Chronicles6:9 koleskro čavo his o Tahat, koleskro čavo his o Ouriel, koleskro čavo his o Usiya, koleskro čavo his o Shaul." 
1Chronicles6:10 O Elkana his o dad kol morshendar: o Amasay oun o Ahimot," 
1Chronicles6:11 oun o Elkana, koleskro čavo his o Souf, koleskro čavo his o Nahat," 
1Chronicles6:12 koleskro čavo his o Eliab, koleskro čavo his o Yeroham, koleskro čavo his o Elkana, koleskro čavo his o Samuel." 
1Chronicles6:13 Koleskre čave his: o Yoel, leskro phoureder, oun o Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:14 O Merari, leskre čave his: o Mali, koleskro čavo his o Libni, koleskro čavo his o Shimi, koleskro čavo his o Ouza," 
1Chronicles6:15 koleskro čavo his o Shimea, koleskro čavo his o Haggiya, koleskro čavo his o Asaya." 
1Chronicles6:16 Mank i Levitarya his kalla, kolen o David i boudi das, te givenn le an o Debleskro kheer. Kova his an ko tsiro, har o Debleskro morhton kol deesh labentsa khere anlo vas, oun an o Debleskro kheer dren čiddo vas." 
1Chronicles6:17 Oun yon givan pengre gilya yaake har lenge penlo vas glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer bis ap ko dives, kay kras o Salomo o baro Debleske i kheer an o foro Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles6:18 Oun kalla hi kol gipangre oun lengre čave: dran o kheer Kohat his o Heman ko gipaskro, koleskro dad his o Yoel, koleskro dad his o Samuel," 
1Chronicles6:19 koleskro dad his o Elkana, koleskro dad his o Yeroham, koleskro dad his o Elyel, koleskro dad his o Toa," 
1Chronicles6:20 koleskro dad his o Souf, koleskro dad his o Elkana, koleskro dad his o Mahat, koleskro dad his o Amasay," 
1Chronicles6:21 koleskro dad his o Elkana, koleskro dad his o Yoel, koleskro dad his o Asarya, koleskro dad his o Sefanya," 
1Chronicles6:22 koleskro dad his o Tahat, koleskro dad his o Assir, koleskro dad his o Abiasaf, koleskro dad his o Korah," 
1Chronicles6:23 koleskro dad his o Yizhar, koleskro dad his o Kohat, koleskro dad his o Levi, koleskro dad his o Israel." 
1Chronicles6:24 Oun leskro phraal, kay ap leskri čači rig tardo his, his o Asaf. Koleskro dad his o Berekia, koleskro dad his o Shimea," 
1Chronicles6:25 koleskro dad his o Mikael, koleskro dad his o Baseya, koleskro dad his o Malkiya," 
1Chronicles6:26 koleskro dad his o Etni, koleskro dad his o Zera, koleskro dad his o Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:27 koleskro dad his o Etan, koleskro dad his o Simma, koleskro dad his o Shimi," 
1Chronicles6:28 koleskro dad his o Yahat, koleskro dad his o Gershon, koleskro dad his o Levi." 
1Chronicles6:29 Oun lengre phrala, i Merarya, his ap i servi rig tardo: o Etan, koleskro dad his o Kishi, koleskro dad his o Abdi, koleskro dad his o Mallouk," 
1Chronicles6:30 koleskro dad his o Hashabya, koleskro dad his o Amazya, koleskro dad his o Hilkiya," 
1Chronicles6:31 koleskro dad his o Amzi, koleskro dad his o Bani, koleskro dad his o Shemar," 
1Chronicles6:32 koleskro dad his o Mali, koleskro dad his o Moushi, koleskro dad his o Merari, koleskro dad his o Levi." 
1Chronicles6:33 Oun kol vavar Levitarya, lengre phrala, van an koy tseli boudi an o Debleskro kheer dren čiddo." 
1Chronicles6:34 O rashayeskri boudi his kokres o Aroneske oun leskre čavenge. Yon rhačran i firhen ap o Debleskri sasterni rhačepaskri, ninna soungepaskro koova ap o Debleskro sonakaskro bob. Yon kokres nay djan an o Debleskri kouč isema, te krenn le o Debleskro koova, te vell o Israeleskri doosh krik lino, lauter yaake, har penas o Mose, koles o Debleskro vast his." 
1Chronicles6:35 Oun kalla hi o Aroneskre čave: leskro čavo o Elazar, koleskro čavo hi o Pinhas, koleskro čavo hi o Abishoua," 
1Chronicles6:36 koleskro čavo hi o Boukki, koleskro čavo hi o Usi, koleskro čavo hi o Zeraya," 
1Chronicles6:37 koleskro čavo hi o Merayot, koleskro čavo hi o Amarya, koleskro čavo hi o Ahitoub," 
1Chronicles6:38 koleskro čavo hi o Zadok, koleskro čavo hi o Ahimaaz." 
1Chronicles6:39 Oun kalla his lengre forya oun gaba, kay čivan o Aroneskre menshe pengre plarhtene khera pre. Kolla his dran o kheer Kohat. Har i Israelitarya tikne barra čivan, te hatsenn le vin, koon have gaba lell, his i Kohatarya i glanstoune, kay lan pengre gaba." 
1Chronicles6:40 Oun yon dan len o foro Hebron an o them Youda oun koy tseli phoub troul Hebron lengre firhengre, te nay rhan le." 
1Chronicles6:41 Ko harhetikri phoub pash o foro oun kol gaba trouyel dan le o Kaleb, koleskro dad o Yefunne his." 
1Chronicles6:42 O Hebron his yek kol foryendar, kay nashte nashenn kolla, kay yekes moulo dan. Kava fores lan o Aroneskre čave, ninna i forya Libna, Yattir, Eshtemoa, Holon, Debir, Ashan oun Bet-Shemesh oun koy tseli phoub troul kol forya, te nay rhan lengre firhe." 
1Chronicles6:43  
1Chronicles6:44  
1Chronicles6:45 Oun an o them Benyamin dan yon len i forya Geba; Alemet oun Anatot oun i tseli phoub trouyel lengre firhenge. Lengre tsele forya his khetne deesh-te-triin lengre tsele familyenge. 
1Chronicles6:46 Kol vavar menshende dran o kheer Kohat, dan le deesh forya. Kal forya his an o them Efrayim, an o them Dan oun an ko them, kay i paash familya Manasse djivas. Kol forya lan le yaake har kol tikne barra sikran, hoy vitsran le." 
1Chronicles6:47 Kol menshende dran o kheer Gershon dan le deesh-te-triin forya. Kal forya his an i themma, kay i menshe Issakar, Asser, oun Naftali djivan, oun an o them Bashan, kay i paash familya Manasse djivas." 
1Chronicles6:48 Kol menshende dran o kheer Merari dan le deesh-te-douy forya. Kol forya his an i themma, kay i menshe Ruben, Gad oun Zabulon djivan. Kal forya lan le yaake, har kol tikne barra sikran, hoy vitsran le." 
1Chronicles6:49 Oun yaake dan i Israelitarya i menshen dran o kheer Levi forya oun phoub troul kol forya, te nay rhan lengre firhe." 
1Chronicles6:50 [Kol forya an i themma Youda, Simeon oun Benyamin his lende ninna yaake dino, har kol tikne barra sikran, hoy vitsran le.]" 
1Chronicles6:51 His familye koy dran o kheer Kohat, kolla lan forya oun phoub lengre firhenge an o them Efrayim:" 
1Chronicles6:52 o foro Sichem ap i berge Efrayim, kova his i foro, kay nay khatran pen i naashepangre, ninna kol forya Geser," 
1Chronicles6:53 Yokmeam, Bet-Horon," 
1Chronicles6:54 Ayalon oun Gat-Rimmon. 
1Chronicles6:55 Oun kol menshende, kay pral ačan dran o kheer Kohat, dan le i forya Aner oun Bileam an o them koy paash familyatar Manasse, khetne koy phoub troul i forya i firhenge." 
1Chronicles6:56 I menshende dran o kheer Gershon dan le kal forya khetne koy phoub trouyel i firhenge: an o them i paash familyatar Manasse: o foro Golan an o them Bashan, oun o foro Astarot;" 
1Chronicles6:57 an o them Issakar: i forya Kadesh oun Daberat," 
1Chronicles6:58 Ramot oun Anem; 
1Chronicles6:59 an o them Asser: Mashal, Abdon," 
1Chronicles6:60 Houkok oun Rehob; 
1Chronicles6:61 an o them Naftali: Kedesh an Galilea, Hammon oun Kiryatayim." 
1Chronicles6:62 Kolla, kay ačan pral i menshendar dran o kheer Merari lan kol forya khetne i phoub trouyel i firhenge: an o them Zabulon: Rimmon oun Tabor;" 
1Chronicles6:63 an o them Ruben, ap i vavar rig o panyestar Yordan, vergel o foro Yericho, kote, kay o kham pre djala: o foro Bezer an o moulo them, oun o foro Yahaz;" 
1Chronicles6:64 oun Kedemot oun Mefaat; 
1Chronicles6:65 oun an o them Gad: Ramot an Gilead oun Mahanayim," 
1Chronicles6:66 Heshbon oun Yaser. 
1Chronicles7:1 O Issakar: Leskre čave his: O Tola, o Pouva, o Yashoub oun o Shimron; lauter khetne his star." 
1Chronicles7:2 O Tola: Leskre čave his: o Usi, o Refaya, o Yeriel, o Yamay, o Yibsam, oun o Samuel. Kolla his pralstoune pral pengre familye oun bare kourepangre. An o tsiro, kay o David djivas, his kolla, kay van pal o Tola, 22.600 morsha. Yaake his dren činlo an i familyakro liil." 
1Chronicles7:3 O Usi: Les his yek čavo, o Izrahia. Leskre čave his: o Mikael, o Obadya, o Yoel, oun o Issia; lauter khetne his panč. Kolla his pralstoune pral pengre familye." 
1Chronicles7:4 Len his yaake boud romya oun čave, kay van dran lengre familye 36.000 morsha, kay his kourepangre. Yaake his dren činlo an i familyakro liil." 
1Chronicles7:5 Oun lengre phrala an i vavar familye, kolengro phouro dad o Issakar his, kolla his lauter zorele kourepangre. Khetne his le 87.000, kay his dren činlo an i familyakro liil." 
1Chronicles7:6 O Benyamin: Leskre čave his: o Bela, o Beker, o Yedjael, lauter khetne his triin." 
1Chronicles7:7 O Bela: Leskre čave his: o Ezbon, o Usi, o Usiel, o Yerimot oun o Ir; lauter khetne his panč. Yon his pralstoune pral pengre familye oun zorele kourepangre. Lendar van 22.034 morsha, kay his dren činlo an i familyakro liil." 
1Chronicles7:8 O Beker, leskre čave his: o Semira, o Yoash, o Eliyeser, o Elyoenay, o Omri, o Yeremot, o Abiya, o Anatot, oun o Alemet." 
1Chronicles7:9 Yon his dren činlo an i familyakro liil pal pengre familye. Lendar van 20.200 morsha, kay his zorele kourepangre." 
1Chronicles7:10 O Yedjael: Leskro čavo his o Bilhan. Leskre čave his: O Yehoush, o Benyamin, o Ehoud, o Khenaana, o Setan, o Tarsis oun o Ahishahar." 
1Chronicles7:11 Kolla his pralstoune pral pengre familye. Lendar van 17.200 morsha, kay his zorele kourepangre oun nay djan an o kourepen." 
1Chronicles7:12 I čave o morshestar Ir his o Shouppim oun o Houppim. O Houshim his o čavo o morshestar Aher. 
1Chronicles7:13 O Naftali, leskre čave his: o Yassiel, o Gouni, o Yesser, oun o Shalloum. I Bilha his lengri mami." 
1Chronicles7:14 O Manasse, leskre čave his: o Asriel oun o Makir; lengri day his i djouvel dran o them Syria. O Makir vas o dad o morshestar Gilead." 
1Chronicles7:15 Oun o Makir las peske i romni, koya his i pheen kol morshendar Houppim oun Shouppim. Lakro lab his Maaka. Leskro vavar čavo his o Selofad. O Selofad, koles his ča oun kek čave." 
1Chronicles7:16 Oun i Maaka, koy romni o morshestar Makir, anas leske douy čave ap i phoub, ko yekes kharas li Peresh, ko vavar kharas Sheresh, oun koleskre čave his o Oulam oun o Rekem." 
1Chronicles7:17 Oun o Oulam, les his yek čavo: o Bedan. Kalla hi i morsha, kay van pal o Gilead; leskro dad his o Makir oun leskro papo his o Manasse." 
1Chronicles7:18 Oun leskri pheen his i Moleket. Koya his i day kol morshendar Ishod, o Abiyeser oun Mala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Oun i čave o morshestar Shemida his: o Ahian, o Shekem, o Likhi oun o Aniam." 
1Chronicles7:20 O Efrayim: Leskre čave his: o Shoutelak, o Eser oun o Elada. O čavo o morshestar Shoutelak hi o Bered, koleskro čavo hi o Tahat, koleskro čavo hi o Sabad, koleskro čavo hi o Shoutelak. Oun kol morsha, o Eser oun o Elad, djan an o foro Gat, te lenn le kol menshendar dran Gat lengre firhen penge. Oun i morsha dran Gat maran len." 
1Chronicles7:21  
1Chronicles7:22 Oun lengro dad, o Efrayim, rovas i rah tsiro, oun leskre phrala van, te rakrenn leha lače laba." 
1Chronicles7:23 Oun yob djas pash peskri romyate, oun yoy vas an vavar koova, oun anas i čaves ap i phoub. Oun dran koy bibarht, hoy ap leskro kheer čiddo hi, das yob ko čaves ko lab Beria." 
1Chronicles7:24 Oun o Efrayim, les his ninna i čay. Koya his i Sheera. Yoy moukas triin forya pre te čivell: o telstouno Bet-Horon, ko pralstouno Bet-Horon, oun ninna Usen-Sheera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Oun leskre čave his: o Refa oun o Reshef. Koleskro čavo his o Tela, koleskro čavo o Tahan," 
1Chronicles7:26 koleskro čavo o Ladan, koleskro čavo o Ammihoud, koleskro čavo o Elishama," 
1Chronicles7:27 koleskro čavo, o Noun, oun koleskro čavo, o Yosua." 
1Chronicles7:28 Oun lengro kotar phoub oun lengre forya his: o foro Betel oun kol gaba koy trouyel; oun kote, kay o kham pre djal: o foro Naaran; kote, kay o kham tele djal: o foro Geser oun kol gaba koy trouyel; o foro Sichem oun kol gaba koy trouyel, bis pash Aya oun kol gaba koy trouyel;" 
1Chronicles7:29 oun ap koy rig ko themestar, kay i menshe dran o kheer Manasse djivenn, his kol forya: Bet-Shean, oun kol gaba koy trouyel, Taanak oun kol gaba koy trouyel, Megiddo oun kol gaba koy trouyel, Dor oun kol gaba koy trouyel. I menshe, kay djivan an kal forya oun gaba, his i čave o morshestar Yosef, koleskro dad o Yakob his." 
1Chronicles7:30 O Asser: Leskre čave his: o Yimna, o Yishva, o Yishvi, o Berya, oun i Zera, lengri pheen." 
1Chronicles7:31 O Berya, leskre čave his: o Heber, o Malkiel, kova hi o dad o morshestar Birsayit." 
1Chronicles7:32 O Heber, leskre čave his: o Yaflet, o Shomer, o Hotam, oun i Shoua, lengri pheen." 
1Chronicles7:33 o Yaflet, leskre čave his: o Pasak, o Bimhal, o Ashvat." 
1Chronicles7:34 o Shemer, leskre čave his: o Ahi, o Rohga, o Yeshoubba oun o Aram." 
1Chronicles7:35 Oun kol čave leskro phralestar, o Helem, his: o Sofa, o Yimna, o Shelesh, oun o Amal." 
1Chronicles7:36 O Sofa, leskre čave his: o Soua, o Harnefer, o Shoual, o Beri, o Yimra," 
1Chronicles7:37 o Bezer, o Hod, o Shamma, o Shilsha, o Yitran oun o Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Oun i čave o morshestar Yeter his: o Yefunne, o Pishepa oun o Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 O Oulla, leskre čave his: o Ara, o Hanniel, oun o Rizya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Kolla halauter his čave o morshestar Asser. Yon his pralstoune pral pengre familye, vi-rodede zorele kourepangre, lače pralstoune. Lendar van 26.000 morsha, kay his kourepangre oun dren činlo an i familyakro liil." 
1Chronicles8:1 O Benyamin: Leskro phoureder čavo his o Bela, leskro douyto o Ashbel, leskro triinto o Ara," 
1Chronicles8:2 leskro starto o Noha, leskro pančto o Rafa." 
1Chronicles8:3 O Bela, leskre čave his: o Addar, o Gera, o Abihoud," 
1Chronicles8:4 o Abishoua, o Naaman, o Ahoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 o Gera, o Shefufan oun o Houram." 
1Chronicles8:6 O Ehoud, leskre čave his: o Naaman, o Ahia oun o Gera. Kolla his pralstoune pral i menshende an o foro Geba. Oun yon van pandles anlo an o foro Manahat. O Gera his kova, kay anan len kote. Leskre čave his o Ouza oun o Ahihoud." 
1Chronicles8:7  
1Chronicles8:8 O Shaharayim: Yob djivas an o them Moab, oun moukas peskre douy romyen, i Houshim oun i Baara." 
1Chronicles8:9 Leskri vavar romyah, i Hodesh his les čave: Kolla his o Yobab, o Sibya, o Mesha, o Malkam," 
1Chronicles8:10 o Yehouz, o Sakya oun o Mirma. Kolla his pralstoune pral pengre familye." 
1Chronicles8:11 Leskri romyah, i Houshim, his les kol čave, o Abitoub oun o Elpaal." 
1Chronicles8:12 O Elpaal, leskre čave his: o Eber, o Misham, oun o Shemed, kova čivas i forya Ono oun Lod pre, oun kol gaba trouyel." 
1Chronicles8:13 O Berya oun o Shema his i pralstoune pral pengre familye, kay an o foro Ayalon djivan. Yon tradan i menshen, kay djivan an o foro Gat, dran o foro vin." 
1Chronicles8:14 Lengre phrala his o Ahio, o Shashak oun o Yeremot." 
1Chronicles8:15 I čave o morshestar Berya his: o Sebadja, o Arad, oun o Eder," 
1Chronicles8:16 oun o Mikael, oun o Yishpa, oun o Yoha." 
1Chronicles8:17 I čave o morshestar Elpaal his: o Sebadja, o Meshoullam, o Hishi, o Heber," 
1Chronicles8:18 o Yishmeray, o Yislia, oun o Yobab." 
1Chronicles8:19 I čave o morshestar Shimi his: o Yakim, o Zikri, o Sabdi," 
1Chronicles8:20 o Elyenay, o Silletai, o Elyel," 
1Chronicles8:21 o Adaya, o Beraya, oun o Shimrat." 
1Chronicles8:22 I čave o morshestar Shashak his: o Yishpan, o Eber, o Elyel," 
1Chronicles8:23 o Abdon, o Zikri, o Hanan," 
1Chronicles8:24 o Hananya, o Elam, o Antotiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 o Yifdeya oun o Penouel. 
1Chronicles8:26 I čave o morshestar Yeroham his: o Shamsheray, o Zakarie, o Atalya," 
1Chronicles8:27 o Yaareshya, o Eliya, oun o Zikri." 
1Chronicles8:28 Kalla hi pralstoune pral pengre familye, kay djivan an o foro Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles8:29 Oun an o foro Gibeon djivas o Yeyel. Yob his o dad o morshestar Gibeon. Oun o lab leskri romyatar his Maaka. 
1Chronicles8:30 Leskro phoureder čavo his o Abdon. Leskre vavar čave his o Sur, o Kish, o Baal, o Nadab," 
1Chronicles8:31 o Gedor, o Ahio, o Zeker oun o Miklot." 
1Chronicles8:32 O čavo o morshestar Miklot his o Shima. Ninna yon djivan an o foro Yerusalem, ap i vavar rig lengre phralendar." 
1Chronicles8:33 O Ner, leskro čavo his o Kish. Koleskro čavo his o Saul, oun koleskre čave his o Yonatan, o Malkishoua, o Abinadab oun o Eshbaal." 
1Chronicles8:34 O Yonatan, leskro čavo his o Merib-Baal, koleskro čavo his o Mika." 
1Chronicles8:35 O Mika, leskre čave his o Piton, o Melek, o Tarea oun o Ahas." 
1Chronicles8:36 O Ahas, les his i čavo, kova his o Yoadda, koleskre čave his o Alemet, o Asmavet oun o Simri. O čavo o morshestar Simri his o Moza." 
1Chronicles8:37 Koleskro čavo his o Bina, koleskro čavo his o Rafa, koleskro čavo his o Elasa, koleskro čavo his o Azel." 
1Chronicles8:38 O Azel, les his shob čave: o Asrikam, o Bokrou, o Ismael, o Shearya, o Obadya, oun o Hanan." 
1Chronicles8:39 Oun leskro phrales o Eshek his čave: o phoureder his o Oulam, o douyto his o Yehoush, leskro triinto čavo his o Elifelet." 
1Chronicles8:40 Oun i čave o morshestar Oulam his zorele kourepangre, kay hayvan mishto o bogeha karye te dell. Len his boud čave oun čavengre čave, khetne 150 (sheel-te-paash-sheel). Kal tsele familye venn pal o Benyamin." 
1Chronicles9:1 Oun i tsele Israelitarya van pengro labeha dren činlo an familyengre lila. Kal lila hi khetne lino an o liil i bare rayendar pral Israel. Oun i menshe dran o them Youda moukan pengro Debles oun van doleske pandles anlo an o them Babilonia. 
1Chronicles9:2 Oun mank kol erste menshe, kay pale van, oun pale an pengro them oun pengre forya djivan, his Israelitarya, rashaya, Levitarya oun save, kay boudran an o Debleskro kheer." 
1Chronicles9:3 An o foro Yerusalem djivan menshe dran o kheer Youda, oun dran o kheer Benyamin oun dran o kheer Efrayim oun dran o kheer Manasse." 
1Chronicles9:4 Dran o kheer Youda: o Utay, koleskro dad o Ammihoud hi, koleskro dad o Omri hi, koleskro dad o Imri hi, koleskro dad o Bani hi. Yon hi menshe, kay van o morshestar Perez, koleskro dad o Youda his." 
1Chronicles9:5 O Shela les his čave: leskro phoureder čavo his o Asaya oun leskre čave. 
1Chronicles9:6 Kol menshendar Zera vas o Yehouel oun leskre phrala, khetne 690 (shob-sheel-te-enya-deesh) morsha." 
1Chronicles9:7 Dran o kheer Benyamin: o Sallou, koleskro dad o Meshoullam hi, koleskro dad o Hodavya hi, koleskro dad o Senua hi," 
1Chronicles9:8 oun o Ibneya, koleskro dad o Yeroham hi, oun o Ela, koleskro dad o Usi hi, koleskro dad o Mikri hi, oun o Meshoullam, koleskro dad o Shefatya hi, koleskro dad o Regouel hi, koleskro dad o Ibnia hi." 
1Chronicles9:9 Khetne pengre phralentsa dran i vavar familye his le 956 (enya-sheel-te-panč-deesh-te-shob) morsha. Kolla lauter his pralstoune pral pengre familye. 
1Chronicles9:10 I rashayendar van pale an o them Youda: O Yedaya, o Yoyarib, o Yakin," 
1Chronicles9:11 o Asarya, koleskro dad o Hilkiya hi, koleskro dad o Meshoullam hi, koleskro dad o Zadok hi, koleskro dad o Merayot hi, koleskro dad o Ahitoub hi, ko pralstouno pral o Debleskro kheer," 
1Chronicles9:12 ninna o Adaya, koleskro dad o Yeroham hi, koleskro dad o Pashour hi, koleskro dad o Malkiya hi, oun o Maasai, koleskro dad o Adiel hi, koleskro dad o Yasera hi, koleskro dad o Meshoullam hi, koleskro dad o Meshillemot hi, koleskro dad Immer hi." 
1Chronicles9:13 Khetne pengre phralentsa his le 1.760 morsha. Kolla his pralstoune pral pengre familye, oun hayvan mishto pengri boudi te krell an o Debleskro kheer." 
1Chronicles9:14 I Levitarendar van pale an o them Youda: Dran o kheer Merari: o Shemaya, koleskro dad o Hashoub hi, koleskro dad o Asrikam hi, koleskro dad o Hashabya hi," 
1Chronicles9:15 ninna o Bakbakar, o Heresh, o Galal, oun o Mattanya, koleskro dad o Mika hi, koleskro dad o Zikri hi, koleskro dad o Asaf hi," 
1Chronicles9:16 ninna o Obadya, koleskro dad o Shemaya hi, koleskro dad o Galal hi, koleskro dad o Yedoutoun hi, oun o Berekia, koleskro dad o Asa hi, koleskro dad o Elkana hi, kova kay an i gab i familyatar Netofa djivas." 
1Chronicles9:17 Oun kolla, kay denn garda ap i voudya, his: o Shalloum, o Akkoub, o Talmon oun o Ahiman; lengro phraal, o Shalloum, his o pralstouno lendar." 
1Chronicles9:18 Oun bis kanna denn kolla garda ap o baro rayeskro voudar, hoy hi kote, kay o kham pre-djal. Lengre phoure his kolla, kay dan garda ap koy platsa, kay i Levitaryen pengre plarhtene khera his." 
1Chronicles9:19 O Shalloum his o čavo ko morshestar Kore, koleskro dad o Abiasaf his, koleskro dad o Korah his. O Shalloum oun vavar morsha dran o kheer Korah dan garda ap o voudar glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer, yaake har lengre phoure garda dan pash o voudar ap o baro Debleskri platsa an o moulo tato them." 
1Chronicles9:20 Glan kava tsiro his o Pinhas, koleskro dad o Elazar his, o pralstouno pral lende, – o baro Devel mou vell leha!" 
1Chronicles9:21 O Zakarie, koleskro dad o Meshelemya his, das garda ap o voudar glan o Debleskro plarhteno kheer." 
1Chronicles9:22 Kolla lauter his vin rodedo, te denn le garda ap i voudya. Yon his 212 (douy-sheel-deesh-te-douy) morsha, kolengre laba his dren činlo an lila kol gabendar, kay yon djivan. O David oun o Samuel, ko dikepaskro, čivan len an lengri boudi dren," 
1Chronicles9:23 te denn yon oun lengre čave garda ap i voudya glan o baro Debleskro plarhteno kheer. 
1Chronicles9:24 Yon his tardo troul o Debleskro plarhteno kheer oun dan garda ap hake star rigya: glan oun palla, serves oun čačes." 
1Chronicles9:25 Star morsha lendar hounte kran pengri boudi hako dives. Lenge van pengre phrala ap i rig, hakeno efta divessa. Kava tsireske van le dran lengre gaba, kay yon djivenn, te boudrenn le lentsa. Kol star his lengre pralstoune. Mank i Levitarya his ninna save, kay his pralstoune pral i iseme oun kouč koova an o Debleskro kheer, oun kay dan garda koy pre." 
1Chronicles9:26  
1Chronicles9:27 Oun yon ačan pral i rat troul o Debleskro kheer. Yon hounte dan garda koy pre, oun yon klidevan haki taysarla i voudya pre." 
1Chronicles9:28 Mank lende his save, kay dan garda ap kol čare, pirya oun vavar koola, kolentsa boudran le an o Debleskro kheer. Te van kol koola vin oun dren hidjedo, hounte dikenn le pal, kitse yon his." 
1Chronicles9:29 Oun vavar lendar dan garda ap o yarro oun ap i mool oun o djet oun o soungepaskro koova. 
1Chronicles9:30 Koy his ninna rashaya, kay kran ko soungepaskro djet." 
1Chronicles9:31 Oun o Mattitya, yek kol Levitarendar, – yob his o phoureder čavo o morshestar Shalloum dran o kheer Korah – kova das garda, te vas hako tsiro o maro peklo, hoy vas o Debleske dino oun rhačedo." 
1Chronicles9:32 Lengre phrala, kolla kay van dran o kheer Kohat, lendar his save koy, kay hounte dan yak, te van hako Debleskro dives neve mare ap i rhapaskri čiddo an o Debleskro kheer." 
1Chronicles9:33 I menshendar dran o kheer Levi, his ninna save koy, kay his gipangre. Lengre familyakre pralstoune djivan an i iseme pash o Debleskro plarhteno kheer. Dives oun rati his le an pengri boudi." 
1Chronicles9:34 Kol tsele pralstoune pral pengre familyende, kay dran o kheer Levi hi, kolla djivan an o foro Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles9:35 Oun an o foro Gibeon djivas o Yehiel. Lestar van kolla, kay an kava foro djivan. Oun o lab leskri romyatar his Maaka." 
1Chronicles9:36 Leskro phoureder čavo his o Abdon. Leskre vavar čave his o Sur, o Kish, o Baal, o Ner, o Nadab," 
1Chronicles9:37 o Gedor, o Akyo, o Zeker oun o Miklot." 
1Chronicles9:38 O čavo o morshestar Miklot his o Shima. Ninna yon djivan an o foro Yerusalem, ap i vavar rig lengre phralendar." 
1Chronicles9:39 O Ner, leskro čavo his o Kish. Koleskro čavo his o Saul, oun koleskre čave his o Yonatan, o Malkishoua, o Abinadab oun o Eshbaal." 
1Chronicles9:40 O Yonatan, leskre čave his o Merib-Baal, koleskro čavo his o Mika." 
1Chronicles9:41 O Mika, leskre čave his o Piton, o Melek, o Tarea oun o Ahas." 
1Chronicles9:42 O Ahas, les his i čavo, kova his o Yoadda, koleskre čave his o Alemet, o Asmavet oun o Simri. O čavo o morshestar Simri his o Moza." 
1Chronicles9:43 Koleskro čavo his o Bina, koleskro čavo his o Refaya, koleskro čavo his o Elasa, koleskro čavo his o Azel."
