1Chronicles9:44 O Azel, les his shob čave: o Asrikam, o Bokrou, o Ismael, o Shearya, o Obadya, oun o Hanan." 
1Chronicles10:1 I Filistarya maran pen i Israelentsa. Oun i Israelitarya nashan glan lende, oun boud lendar van ap i berga Gilboa moulo dino." 
1Chronicles10:2 Oun i Filistarya lan o Saules palla, oun dan leskre morsh čaven, o Yonatan, o Abinadab oun o Malkishoua moulo." 
1Chronicles10:3 Oun o marepen troul o Saul vas zorleder oun zorleder. Oun i kourepangre, kay denn i faylentsa karye, hatsan les oun doukran les phares." 
1Chronicles10:4 Oun yob penas ap koleste, kay leskro kourepaskro koova hidjrell: “Le tiro rharo oun de man moulo, yaake te venn gar kalla pash mande, kay gar činle hi ap pengro mass, oun krenn mantsa, hoy yon kamenn!” Oun ko lourdo, kay leskro kourepaskro koova hidjrell, kamas gar. Les his bari daar. Kote las o Saul o rharo, oun moukas pes an leste perell." 
1Chronicles10:5 Oun har ko hidjepaskro lourdo dikas, te hi o Saul moulo, moukas yob pes ninna an peskro rharo te perell oun meras." 
1Chronicles10:6 Yaake meras o Saul oun leskre triin čave, oun leskro tselo kheer." 
1Chronicles10:7 Har shounan kol Israelitarya, kay djivan vergel i tala Yesreel, te nashan penge i Israelengre lourde, oun kay meras o Saul oun leskre čave, kote nashan yon dran pengre forya oun nashan penge ninna. Oun i Filistarya van koy oun djivan an kol forya." 
1Chronicles10:8 Oun ap ko dives pal o kourepen van i Filistarya, te randenn le lauter kolendar, kay kote moulo čiddo hi. Oun koy pashel hatsan le o Saules oun leskre čaven moules ap koy berga Gilboa čiddo." 
1Chronicles10:9 Oun yon randan les vin, oun lan leskro shero oun leskro sasterno ripen, oun bičran morshen koleha lautereha an o tselo them Filistia trouyel, te sikrenn le i menshende oun lengre rhorhene deblen, hoy djas." 
1Chronicles10:10 Oun yon čivan leskro rharo oun leskro vitsepaskro čouri an o kheer pengro deblestar. Oun leskro shero dan le sasterentsa ap i massouri o kherestar pengro deblestar Dagon. 
1Chronicles10:11 Har shounan halauter, kay djivenn an o foro Yabesh an o them Gilead, hoy i Filistarya o Sauleha kran," 
1Chronicles10:12 kran pen i tsele čače morsha ap o drom, oun lan o moulo Saules oun leskre moule čaven, oun anan len an o foro Yabesh, oun paskran len tel ko baro rouk pash o foro Yabesh, oun rhan či efta divessa." 
1Chronicles10:13 O Saul meras doleske, kay yob gar kras, hoy o baro Devel leske penas, oun kay yob pash koy djouvyate djas, kay i moulentsa rakras, oun lat poučas." 
1Chronicles10:14 O baro Debles poučas lo gar. Doleske moukas o baro Devel les merell, oun kras, te vas o David baro ray, koleskro dad o Isay hi." 
1Chronicles11:1 Oun pash o Davideste an o foro Hebron van morsha dran o tselo them Israel, oun penan leske: “Shoun, mer ham tire menshendar, tiro mass oun rat." 
1Chronicles11:2 Glan i rah tsiro har o Saul baro ray his, anal tou o Israel an o kourepen oun pale khere. Oun tiro baro Devel penas touke ninna: Tou dess yak ap mire menshende Israel, oun tou vess o ray pral o Israel. ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Har kol tsele phoureder dran Israel pash o baro rayeste an o foro Hebron his, kras kote o David lentsa vin, te vell lo lengro baro ray. Oun yon dan ap o baro Debleste gole, te shounell yob kova. Oun yon čoran djet pral o Davideskro shero, te vell yob baro ray pral o Israel, yaake har glan i tsiro o baro Devel ap o Samuel penas." 
1Chronicles11:4 Palle djas o David i tsele morshentsa dran Israel glan o foro Yerusalem, kay kharas an ko tsiro Yebous. Kote djivan i Yebousarya." 
1Chronicles11:5 Kolla penan ap o Davideste: “Tou veh kay gar dren.” O David las ko zorelo kheer Sion peske dren. Kova hi kanna o Davideskro foro. 
1Chronicles11:6 Oun o David penas: “Koon o ersto hi, kay dell kol Yebousaryen, kova vella o pralstouno lourdo!” Kote djas o Yoab, koleskri day i Serouya hi, glan i vavarende pre an o foro, oun vas o pralstouno lourdo." 
1Chronicles11:7 Oun o David djivas an kava zorelo kheer. Doleske vell ko kheer kharedo Davideskro foro. 
1Chronicles11:8 Oun yob kras boudeder khera oun kras o foro bourhleder kotar, kay o Millo his. Oun o Yoab čivas ko vavar kotar o forestar pale pre." 
1Chronicles11:9 Oun o David vas bareder oun zorleder. Oun o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub his leha." 
1Chronicles11:10 Kalla hi kol laba o Davideskre zorele morshendar, kay rikran zoreles pash leste. Khetne i tsele menshentsa Israel kran le les baro ray pral Israel, yaake har o baro Devel penas pral Israel." 
1Chronicles11:11 Oun kolla hi kol laba o Davideskre zorele morshendar: o Yashobam kol menshendar Hakmoni, ko pralstouno kol trinendar. Kova das peskro rhareha 300 (triin-sheel) lourden ap yek kopo moulo." 
1Chronicles11:12 Pal koleste vas o Elazar, koleskro dad o Dodo hi, dran o gab Ahoa. Yob his yek kol trinendar," 
1Chronicles11:13 kay pash o Davideste an Pas-Dammim his, har kol Filistarya kote khetne van, te kourenn le pen i Israelentsa. Kote his i kotar phoub, kay djob bares vas. Oun i Israelitarya nashan penge glan i Filistarya." 
1Chronicles11:14 Oun yob djas mashkral ap ko kotar phoub, tserdas pes gar pale, oun maras kol Filistaryen. Oun o baro Devel das bari barht." 
1Chronicles11:15 Har his i Filistarya an i tala Refayim tardo, koy van triin kol triyanda zorele morshendar pash ko baro bar, kay his o David an koy grotta pash o foro Adullam." 
1Chronicles11:16 Kote his o David an peskro khatepen an i berga. Oun kol Filistarya, kay yak dan, his an o foro Betlehem." 
1Chronicles11:17 Oun o Davides his troush, oun penas: “Koon kamell mange pani pipaske te lell dran koy brounna pash o foreskro voudar an o foro Betlehem?”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Koy čoran pen kol triin dren ap i platsa, kay kol Filistarya his, oun lan pani dran koy brounna pash ko foreskro voudar an Betlehem, oun anan kova pash o Davideste. Yob kamas gar te piyell, oun čoras ko pani vin o baro Debleske," 
1Chronicles11:19 oun penas: “Miro Devel mou moukell man kova gar te krell! Kova hi har te piyoms ko rat kol morshendar, kay len kek traash his pengro djipaske, oun djan koy, te lenn le ko pani mange.” Oun yob kamas gar te piyell. Kava baro koova kran kol triin zorele kourepangre." 
1Chronicles11:20 O Abishay, koleskro phraal o Yoab hi, oun kolengri day i Serouya hi, kova his ko pralstouno kol triin-deshendar. O Abishay las leskro vitsepaskro čouri, oun das triin-sheel lourden moulo, oun les his i baro lab mank kol triin-deshende." 
1Chronicles11:21 Oun yob vas boudeder an-diklo har kol vavar kol triin-deshendar, oun his lengro pralstouno. Yaake an-diklo har kol triin, hi yob gar." 
1Chronicles11:22 O Benaya, koleskro dad o Yoyada his, dran o gab Kabzeel, his i vavar kourepaskro morsh, kay baro koova kras. Kova das kol douy zorele morshen moulo, kay van kharedo leve dran Moab. Ap i dives, kay gib das, djas lo an i brounna, oun das koy i leves moulo." 
1Chronicles11:23 Yob maras ninna i morshes, i Egiptari. Kova his pral douy metarya baro. Oun les his o vitsepaskro čouri an o vast. Oun ko kotar kasht, hoy ko vitsepaskro čouri rikrella, his yaake pesso har i tikno rouk. O Benaya djas pash leste tele, i kasht an o vast, oun tserdas ko vitsepaskro čouri dran kol Egiptareskro vast, oun das les kolah tele čourye." 
1Chronicles11:24 Kova kras o Benaya, koleskro dad o Yoyada his. Yob his bares an-diklo mank kol vavar triyanda zorele kourepangre." 
1Chronicles11:25 Oun vas boudeder an-diklo har i vavar kol triin-deshendar. Yob his gar yaake an-diklo har kol triin. Oun o David kras, te vell yob o pralstouno pral leskre lourdende, kay denn yak ap leskro djipen." 
1Chronicles11:26 I zorele kourepangre hi kolla: o Asahel, koleskro phraal o Yoab hi, o Elhanan, koleskro dad o Dodo his dran Betlehem." 
1Chronicles11:27 O Shammot dran Harod. O Helez dran Pelon," 
1Chronicles11:28 o Ira, koleskro dad o Ikkesh hi, dran Tekoa, o Abiyeser dran Anatot" 
1Chronicles11:29 o Sibkay dran Housha o Ilay dran Ahoa," 
1Chronicles11:30 oun o Marai dran Netofa, o Heled, koleskro dad o Baana hi, dran Netofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 o Itay, koleskro dad o Ribay hi, dran Gibea an o them Benyamin, o Benaya dran Piraton," 
1Chronicles11:32 o Houray dran Nahale-Gaash, o Abiel dran Bet-Araba," 
1Chronicles11:33 o Asmavet dran Bahourim, o Elyaba dran Shaalbon," 
1Chronicles11:34 o Hashem dran Gison, o Yonatan, koleskro dad o Shage hi, dran Harar," 
1Chronicles11:35 o Ahiam, koleskro dad o Sakar hi, dran Harar, o Elifal, koleskro dad o Our hi," 
1Chronicles11:36 o Hefer dran Mekera, o Ahia dran Pelon," 
1Chronicles11:37 o Hezro dran Karmel, o Naaray, koleskro dad o Esbay hi," 
1Chronicles11:38 o Yoel, koleskro phraal o Natan hi, o Mibhar, koleskro dad o Hagri hi," 
1Chronicles11:39 o Zelek, ko Ammonari, o Naray dran Beerot. Kova hidjras o rharo o morshestar Yoab, koleskri day i Serouya hi." 
1Chronicles11:40 O Ira oun o Gareb dran Yattir," 
1Chronicles11:41 o Uriya, ko Hetari, o Sabad, koleskro dad o Alayi hi," 
1Chronicles11:42 o Adina, koleskro dad o Shiza hi; o Adina his yek kol pralstunendar dran o kheer Ruben, oun his i pralstouno pral triyanda morshende." 
1Chronicles11:43 o Hanan, koleskro dad o Maaka hi, O Yosafat, dran Meten," 
1Chronicles11:44 o Usiya, dran Astarot, o Shama oun o Yehiel, kolengro dad o Hotam hi, dran Aroer," 
1Chronicles11:45 o Yedjael, koleskro dad o Shimri hi, oun o Yoha, leskro phraal, dran Tiz," 
1Chronicles11:46 o Elyel, dran Mahavim, o Yeribay oun o Yoshavya, kolengro dad o Elnaam hi, o Yitma, ko Moabari," 
1Chronicles11:47 o Elyel, o Obed oun o Yaasiel dran Soba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Oun kolla hi i morsha, kay van pash o Davideste an o foro Siklag, an ko tsiro, kay hounte rikras yob pes dour krik o Saulestar, koleskro dad o Kish hi. Yon his zorele kourepangre, kay his pash leste an o kourepen." 
1Chronicles12:2 Len his boge oun fayle, oun hayvan mishto i faylentsa karye te dell. Kova nay kran le pengro čačo vasteha oun pengro servo vasteha. Kalla hi i laba kolendar, kay van pash o Davideste dran o kheer Benyamin, kay ninna o Saul dran vas:" 
1Chronicles12:3 O pralstouno, o Ahiyeser, oun o Yoash, lengro dad his o Shemaa dran Gibea; o Yesiel oun o Pelet, lengro dad his o Asmavet; o Beraka oun o Yehou, dran Anatot;" 
1Chronicles12:4 O Yishmaya dran Gibeon; yob his o pralstouno pral i triyanda zorele kourepangre; 
1Chronicles12:5 o Yirmeya, o Yaziel, o Yohanan, o Yosabad, dran o foro Gedera;" 
1Chronicles12:6 o Elouzay, o Yerimot, o Bealya, o Shemarya, o Shefatya, dran o foro Harouf;" 
1Chronicles12:7 o Elkana, o Issia, o Asarel, o Yoezer, o Yashobam, dran o kheer Korah;" 
1Chronicles12:8 o Yoela, oun o Sebadja, kolengro dad o Yeroham hi dran o foro Gedor." 
1Chronicles12:9 Kalla hi i laba kolendar, kay van pash o Davideste dran o kheer Gad, an ko tsiro, har his yob pral ap i berga an peskro zorelo kheer an o moulo them. Yon his zorele morsha oun kourepangre. Len his shilte oun vitsepangre čourya, oun yon kouran pen har leve, oun his sik har i tserfe ap i berge." 
1Chronicles12:10 O ersto his o Eser, o douyto his o Obadya, o triinto his o Eliab," 
1Chronicles12:11 o starto his o Mishmanna, o pančto his o Yirmeya," 
1Chronicles12:12 o shobto his o Attay, o eftato his o Elyel," 
1Chronicles12:13 o orhtato his o Yohanan, o enyato his o Elsabad," 
1Chronicles12:14 o deshto his o Yirmeya, o deesh-te-yekto his o Makbannai." 
1Chronicles12:15 Kolla his dran o kheer Gad. Yon lauter his pralstoune lourde. O tikneder lendar his o pralstouno pral sheel lourdende, oun ko bareder his o pralstouno pral i zero lourdende." 
1Chronicles12:16 Yon djan vergel o pani Yordan an o ersto čon, har o pani yaake boud his, te djas lo pral peskre douy rigya, oun kol telstoune themma kay kote čiddo hi, tele činlo his." 
1Chronicles12:17 Ninna morsha dran kol khera Benyamin oun Youda van pash o Davideskro zorelo kheer ap i berga. 
1Chronicles12:18 Oun o David djas pash lende vin, oun penas ap lende: “Van t'mer an o kamlepen pash mande, te rikrenn pash mande, palle hi miro dji t'mentsa yek! Te van te phoukrenn ap mande pash kolende, kay kamenn man te marell, palle mou dikell o Devel mare dadendar koy pal, oun mou dell t'men i phagi. Yob djinell, kay krom kek čilačo koova.”" 
1Chronicles12:19 Kote vas o Debleskro dourho pral o Amasay, ko pralstouno pral i triyanda zorele kourepangre, oun yob penas: David, tire ham mer! ap toute rikrah men, tou o Isayeskro čavo! Lačepen oun barht mou vell pral toute, oun ninna pral kolende, kay pash toute hi! Tiro Devel hi ap tiri rig! Koy las len o David pash peste, oun kras lendar pralstoune pral peskre lourdende." 
1Chronicles12:20 Ninna dran o kheer Manasse van morsha pash o Davideste. Kova his an ko tsiro, har djas lo khetne i Filistarentsa an o kourepen, te kourenn le pen o Sauleha. O David his ap i Filistarengri rig. Lengre pralstoune penan penge: “Yob nay nashals an o kourepen pash leskro rayeste, o Saul, ap i rig, palle nashrah mare sherya.” Oun yon bičran o Davides krik." 
1Chronicles12:21 Har djas o David pale an o foro Siklag, van morsha dran o kheer Manasse pash leste: o Adna, o Yosabad, o Yedjael, o Mikael, o Yosabad, o Elihou, oun o Silletai. Hakeno lendar his i pralstouno pral yek zero lourdende i menshendar Manasse." 
1Chronicles12:22 Oun yon van o Davideske ap i rig, oun kouran pen kol morshentsa, kay dan pen kote trouyel oun čoran i menshen vin. Kol morsha dran o kheer Manasse his halauter lače kourepangre oun van pralstoune pral i lourdende." 
1Chronicles12:23 Yaake van hako dives boudeder morsha pash o Davideste, te venn le leske ap i rig, bis te his le boud boud lourde." 
1Chronicles12:24 Oun kalla hi kol kourepangre, kay van pash o Davideste, har lo an Hebron his, te krenn le les o baro ray pal o Sauleskro merepen, yaake har o baro Devel penas." 
1Chronicles12:25 Dran o kheer Youda: 6.800 lourde, kay hidjran shilte oun vitsepangre čourya;" 
1Chronicles12:26 Dran o kheer Simeon, 7.100 zorele kourepangre;" 
1Chronicles12:27 Dran o kheer Levi: 4.600 morsha; 
1Chronicles12:28 koy pashel o Yoyada, ko pralstouno pral o kheer Aron, leha his 3.700 morsha;" 
1Chronicles12:29 o Zadok, i terno zorelo kourepaskro, oun leskre menshendar 22 (biish-te-douy) pralstoune." 
1Chronicles12:30 Dran o kheer Benyamin, o Sauleskre menshendar: 3.000; bis ap ko tsiro rikran boud i menshentsa dran o Sauleskro kheer." 
1Chronicles12:31 Dran o kheer Efrayim: 20.800 zorele kourepangre, kay an-dikle his pash pengre familyende." 
1Chronicles12:32 Dran o paash kheer Manasse: 18.000 morsha, kolla van o labeha vin rodedo, te djan le koy, te krenn le o Davides o baro ray." 
1Chronicles12:33 Dran o kheer Issakar, 200 pralstoune, kay dikan nay, hoy o Israel hounte krella, oun kaana o čačo tsiro koleske vas. Lengre tsele phrala shounan ap lengro lab." 
1Chronicles12:34 Dran o kheer Zabulon, 50.000 lourde. Len his kourepaskro koova pash pende. Yon rikran pengro tselo djiyeha pash o Davideste." 
1Chronicles12:35 Dran o kheer Naftali: 1.000 pralstoune, oun pash lende his 37.000 lourde, kay hidjran shilte oun vitsepaskre čourya." 
1Chronicles12:36 Dran o kheer Dan: 28.600 morsha; len his kourepaskro koova pash pende. 
1Chronicles12:37 Dran o kheer Asser: 40.000 lourde; len his kourepaskro koova pash pende. 
1Chronicles12:38 Dran i familye Ruben oun Gad oun dran i paash familya Manasse, – yon hi kolla kay ap i vavar rig o panyestar Yordan djivan: 120.000 morsha; len his kourepaskro koova pash pende." 
1Chronicles12:39 Kal tsele kourepangre van an o foro Hebron te krenn le o Davides baro ray. Yon his yaake pre tardo har djans le an o kourepen. Pengro tselo djiyestar kaman le, te vell o David baro ray pral o tselo them Israel. Len oun i vavar Israelitaryen his yek dji, te krenn le kova." 
1Chronicles12:40 Oun yon his kote pash o David triin divessa oun rhan oun piyan, lengre phrala anan lenge rhapen." 
1Chronicles12:41 Ninna kol menshe, kay djivan gar dour, anan lenge rhapen. Yon van yaake dour har dran kol themma Issakar, oun Zabulon oun Naftali, oun anan ko rhapen ap bourike, khamele, maultikre bourike oun groumya: rhapen dran yarro, fayge oun pekle drake, mool, djet, ninna boud groumya oun bakre. I Israelitarya givan oun bashran." 
1Chronicles13:1 Oun o David beshas pes khetne kol pralstunentsa pral i zero lourdende oun kolentsa pral sheel lourdende oun kol vavar bare lourdentsa oun rakras lentsa. 
1Chronicles13:2 Palle penas lo ap i tsele Israelitarya, kay kote his: “Te hi t'menge mishto, oun lačo glan maro baro Debleskre yaka, palle bičras mer bičepangre pash mare phralende an i tsele kotya o themestar Israel, ninna pash i rashayende oun i Levitarya, kote kay yon djivenn. Oun mer moukah lenge te penell, te venn le pash mende khetne." 
1Chronicles13:3 Mer khetne kamah ko morhton, kay o Debleskre deesh laba dren hi, pale pash mende te lell. An ko tsiro, har o Saul djivas, poučam gar pal leste.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Kote penan i tsele Israelitarya, kay kote khetne his: “Kova hi mishto. Mer krah kova.”" 
1Chronicles13:5 Yaake moukas o David i tsele Israelitaryen khetne gole te dell, kotar, kay o pani Sihor hi an o them Egiptia, bis kotar, kay djal pash o foro Lebo-Hamat, te lenn le ko morhton o deesh labentsa o Deblestar dran o foro Kiryat-Yearim." 
1Chronicles13:6 Oun o David djas i tsele Israelentsa pral an o foro Baala. Kava hi i vavar lab o foreske Kiryat-Yearim, oun hi an o them Youda čiddo. Kote his o morhton tardo o baro Deblestar, kay beshdo hi pral i bolepangre, kay kharenna Keroubim, oun kay vell yob an-mangedo." 
1Chronicles13:7 Oun yon moukan ko morhton ap i nevo vourdin dran o kheer te anell, kay o Abinadab djivell. Oun o Ouza oun leskro phraal djan o vourdineha oun dan ap leste yak." 
1Chronicles13:8 O David oun i tsele menshe an Israel khelan barhteles glan o Debleste, givan gilya, oun kran bashepen ap doryengre bashepangre, ap pauke, ap phourdepangre oun vavar bashepangre." 
1Chronicles13:9 Har van le pash ko djobeskri platsa o morshestar Kidon, kaman i groumya vin te phagell, oun o Ouza rikras o morhton, te perell lo gar." 
1Chronicles13:10 Kova hounte krals lo gar. Yob hounte tapras gar o Debleskro morhton an. Koy vas o baro Debleskri rholi pral o Ouza. Oun o Devel maras les koy. Oun yob meras kote glan o Debleste. 
1Chronicles13:11 Koy vas o David rhoyedo, kay o baro Devel o Ouzaes yaake krik las. Doleske kharell koy platsa Perez-Ouza gomme kay dives." 
1Chronicles13:12 Oun o David trashas o Deblestar ap ko dives, oun penas: “Har nay lau me o Debleskro morhton pash mande?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Oun yob moukas les gar pash peste te anell an o Davideskro foro. Na-a, yob moukas les an ko kheer te anell, kay djivell o Obed-Edom. Kova his i morsh dran o foro Gat." 
1Chronicles13:14 Yaake ačas o baro Debleskro morhton triin čon an koleskro kheer. Oun o baro Devel čivas peskri barht oun zoor ap leste oun ap halauter, hoy les his." 
1Chronicles14:1 O baro ray pral o foro Tirus, o Hiram, bičras morshen pash o Davideste, kay anan leske cedertikro kasht, ninna boudepangren, kay hayvan mishto i barrentsa oun o kashteha te boudrell. Kolla kran o Davideske i shoukar baro kheer." 
1Chronicles14:2 O David hayvas, te kras o baro Devel, te vell oun ačell yob baro ray pral Israel. Kova kras yob peskre menshenge, i Israelenge." 
1Chronicles14:3 Oun o David las peske boudeder romya an o foro Yerusalem, Oun leske van boudeder čave oun ča boldo." 
1Chronicles14:4 Kalla hi kol laba kol čavendar, kay van an o foro Yerusalem boldo: o Shamoua, o Shobab, o Natan, o Salomo," 
1Chronicles14:5 o Yibhar, o Elishoua, o Elpelet," 
1Chronicles14:6 o Noga, o Nefeg, o Yafia," 
1Chronicles14:7 o Elishama, o Beelyada, oun o Elifelet." 
1Chronicles14:8 Har kol Filistarya shounan, kay vas djet pral o Davideskro shero čoredo, te vell yob baro ray pral Israel, djan yon lauter koy, te rodenn le les. Har o David kova shounas, djas yob vin te kourell lo pes leha." 
1Chronicles14:9 Oun i Filistarya van, oun his an koy tseli tala Refayim." 
1Chronicles14:10 O David poučas o baro Deblestar: “Djap me pral pash kol Filistarya? Kameh len an mire vasta te dell?” Oun o baro Devel penas ap o Davideste: “Dja pral! Me dau kol Filistaryen an tire vasta.” 
1Chronicles14:11 Oun o David vas an Baal-Perazim, oun kote das lo i Filistaryen, oun penas: “Yaake har i zorelo pani peske i drom krell, kras mange o baro Devel i drom mashkral kolende, kay kaman mange čilačepen.” Doleske kharell koy platsa “Baal-Perazim.”" 
1Chronicles14:12 Har i Filistarya nashan penge, lan le pengre rhorhene deblen gar pentsa. Oun o David penas, te venn kolla rhačedo." 
1Chronicles14:13 Kol Filistarya djan pale koy pral, oun his an koy tseli tala." 
1Chronicles14:14 Oun o David poučas pale o Deblestar, oun o Devel penas ap leste: “Tou djas gar pral pal lende. Tou vess koy vavar rigyatar pral lende, koy rigyatar, kay i balsamtikre rouka čidde hi." 
1Chronicles14:15 Tou te shouneh i gole, har te djal yek pral an i rouka, palle am vin! Palle djal o Devel glan toute, te marell yob i Filistarengre lourden.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Oun o David kras yaake, har o Devel leske penas. Oun yon dan kol Filistaryen oun tradan len pale o tselo drom dran Gibeon bis pash o foro Geser." 
1Chronicles14:17 Oun o David his i sharedo morsh an i tsele themma. Oun o baro Devel kras, te vas i traash glan leste ap i tsele themma." 
1Chronicles15:1 Oun o David moukas peske khera te krell an o Davideskro foro. Yob rodas ninna i kotar phoub vin, kay te vell o morhton o Debleskre deesh labentsa pre čiddo, oun moukas leske i plarhteno kheer pre te čivell." 
1Chronicles15:2 An ko tsiro penas o David: “Kek hounte hidjrell o morhton o Debleskre deesh labentsa, har kokres i Levitarya, kolen rodas o baro Devel vin, te hidjrenn yon ko morhton, oun te boudrenn yon leske hako tsiro.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Oun o David moukas i tsele Israelitaryen an o foro Yerusalem khetne te vell, te nay anenn le o morhton o baro Debleskre deesh labentsa ap ko kotar phoub, kay vas leske vin rodedo." 
1Chronicles15:4 Oun o David moukas ninna i čave o rashayestar Aron khetne te kharell oun i Levitarya: 
1Chronicles15:5 i čavendar o morshestar Kohat: o Ouriel, ko his o pralstouno, oun leskre phrala; khetne his le 120 morsha;" 
1Chronicles15:6 i čavendar o morshestar Merari: o Asaya, ko his o pralstouno, oun leskre phrala; khetne his le 220 morsha;" 
1Chronicles15:7 i čavendar o morshestar Gershon: o Yoel, ko his o pralstouno, oun leskre phrala; khetne his le 130 morsha;" 
1Chronicles15:8 i čavendar o morshestar Elizafan: o Shemaya, ko his o pralstouno, oun leskre phrala; khetne his le 200 morsha;" 
1Chronicles15:9 i čavendar o morshestar Hebron: o Elyel, kova his o pralstouno, oun leskre phrala; khetne his le 80 morsha;" 
1Chronicles15:10 i čavendar o morshestar Usiel: o Amminadab, ko his o pralstouno, oun leskre tsele phrala; khetne his le 112 morsha;" 
1Chronicles15:11 Oun o David moukas i rashayen o Zadok oun o Abyatar pash peste te vell, ninna i Levitaryen, o Ouriel, o Asaya, o Yoel, o Shemaya, o Elyel, oun o Amminadab." 
1Chronicles15:12 Oun yob penas ap lende: “T'mer han i pralstoune pral t'mare menshende dran o kheer Levi. Krenn t'men djoudjo o Debleske, t'mer oun t'mare phrala, te nay anenn o morhton o deesh labentsa o baro Deblestar, kay o Israeleskro Devel hi, ap ko kotar phoub, hoy me rodom leske vin!" 
1Chronicles15:13 Ko vavar kopo hans t'mer gar koy pashel. Doleske das men o baro Devel i pharo dap. Mer poučam lestar gar yaake har hounte vals.” 
1Chronicles15:14 Koy kran pen i rashaya oun i Levitarya djoudjo o Debleske, te nay anenn le o morhton koy pral." 
1Chronicles15:15 Oun i Levitarya hidjran o morhton ap pengre phika i hidjepaskre kashtentsa, yaake har o baro Devel penas kova o Moseske, oun kova les i Israelenge penas." 
1Chronicles15:16 Oun o David penas i pralstunenge pral i Levitarya, te rodenn yon gipangren vin dran pengre phralende. Kalla hounte givenn i barhtyatar i bari golyah, oun bashrenn ap i doryengre bashepangre oun vavar bashepangre." 
1Chronicles15:17 Koy rodan i Levitarya o gipaskres o Heman vin, koleskro dad o Yoel hi, oun leskro phrales, o Asaf, koleskro dad o Berekia hi. Ninna rodan le o Etan vin, koleskro dad o Koushaya hi, dran i familya Merari." 
1Chronicles15:18 Oun lenge ap i rig van: o Zakarie, o Ben-Yaziel, o Semiramot, o Yehiel, o Ounni, o Eliab, o Benaya, o Maasseya, o Mattitya, o Elifelehu, o Mikneya, o Obed-Edom, o Yehiel, kolendar, kay dan garda ap i voudya." 
1Chronicles15:19 Oun i gipangre his: o Heman, o Asaf, oun o Etan. Kolla dan ap i sasterne patria dran lolo saster." 
1Chronicles15:20 Oun kolla, kay bashrenn ap i harfa, his o Zakarie, o Yaasiel, o Semiramot, o Yehiel, o Ounni, o Eliab, o Maasseya, oun o Benaya." 
1Chronicles15:21 Oun kolla, kay bashrenn ap orhta-doryengre bashepangre his: O Mattitya, o Elifelehu, o Mikneya, o Obed-Edom, o Yehiel, oun o Asasya." 
1Chronicles15:22 O Kenanya, o pralstouno pral i Levitarya, his o pralstouno pral o gipen, yob hayvas kova mishto, oun sikras i vavarende, har te givenn le." 
1Chronicles15:23 Oun o Berekia oun o Elkana, his douy kolendar, kay dan yak ap o morhton o Debleskre deesh labentsa." 
1Chronicles15:24 Glan o morhton djan i rashaya: o Aba, o Shebanya, o Yosafat, o Netanel, o Amasay, o Zakarie, o Benaya, oun o Eliyeser. Yon phourdan an bare phourdepangre. Oun o Obed-Edom oun o Yehiya djan pal o morhton oun dan yak ap leste." 
1Chronicles15:25 Oun o David oun i phoureder dran Israel djan kote, te anenn le o morhton o Debleskre deesh labentsa pre dran o kheer o morshestar Obed-Edom. Lentsa djan i pralstoune pral i lourdende, kolla pral yek zero oun kolla pral yek sheel. Halauteren his barhtele djia." 
1Chronicles15:26 Oun o Devel his i Levitarentsa, kay o morhton hidjrenn, kay o baro Debleskre deesh laba dren hi, oun lauter djas mishto. Doleske maran le leske efta terne gourma oun efta morsh bakre." 
1Chronicles15:27 Oun o Davides his i plaashka dran biyalo layntikro than ap peste. Oun yaake his ninna i tsele Levitarya an-rido, kay o morhton hidjrenn, ninna i gipangre oun o Kenanya, ko pralstouno pral i gipangre. Oun o David his ninna i layntikri damdira ap peste, har i rashaya hidjrenn." 
1Chronicles15:28 Yaake anan i tsele Israelitarya o morhton o baro Debleskre deesh labentsa pral an Yerusalem. Yon dan gole i barhtyatar, givan oun bashran ap phourdepangre, doryengre bashepangre oun vavar bashepangre." 
1Chronicles15:29 Oun har vas o morhton o baro Debleskre deesh labentsa an o Davideskro foro anlo, dikas i Mikal, kolakro dad o Saul his, dran i vorhni. Oun har dikas li o baro rayes, o David, har yob stas oun khelas, dikas li tele ap leste an lakro dji." 
1Chronicles16:1 Har yon o Debleskro morhton dren anan, čivan yon les an ko plarhteno kheer, hoy o David leske pre čivas, oun rhačran firhen o baro Debleske, oun maran vavar firhen, te rhan le len khetne glan o Debleste." 
1Chronicles16:2 Oun pal kova rakras o David pral i menshende i barht o baro Deblestar vin. 
1Chronicles16:3 Oun yob das hako menshes, kay kote hi, morshen oun djouvyen, hakenes, yek maro, yek kotar mass oun yek drakengri merkli." 
1Chronicles16:4 Oun yob rodas gipangre vin dran i Levitarya, te hi le tardo glan o baro Debleskro morhton, te sharenn le o baro Debles oun parkrenn pen pash leste pengre gilyentsa." 
1Chronicles16:5 Kolla his: o Asaf, lengro pralstuno; o Zakarie his o douyto; pal leste o Yasiel, o Semiramot, o Yehiel, o Mattitya, o Eliab, o Benaya, o Obed-Edom oun o Yehiel. Yon te givenn oun bashrenn ap pengre doryengre bashepangre. Oun o Asaf te dell ap i sasterne patria." 
1Chronicles16:6 I rashaya, o Benaya oun o Yaziel, lengri boudi his, te phourdenn le ap pengre phourdepangre hako tsiro glan o morhton o Debleskre deesh labentsa." 
1Chronicles16:7 Ap ko dives moukas o David o ersto kopo o Asafes oun leskre phralen kay gili te givell, te parkrenn le pen pash o baro Debleste." 
1Chronicles16:8 Parkrenn t'men pash o baro Debleste, oun hadenn leskro lab! Penenn i menshenge an vavar themma kova, hoy yob kras!" 
1Chronicles16:9 Givenn oun bashrenn leske! Rakrenn pral ko tselo baro koova, hoy yob lauter kras!" 
1Chronicles16:10 Sharenn koles, koon kokres o čačo Devel hi! Avenn barhteles pral leste, t'mer, kay rodenn o baro Debles!" 
1Chronicles16:11 Poučenn pal o baro Debleste, oun pal leskri zoor! Avenn glan leste hako tsiro!" 
1Chronicles16:12 T'mer, kay venn pal o Israel, o Debleskro boudepaskro, t'mer čave o Yakobestar, koles yob vin rodas, ma bistrenn, hoy yob lauter kras an peskri bari zoor, kova, hoy kek vavar nay kras! Ma bistrenn, har yob o čačepen pral i menshende vin rakras!" 
1Chronicles16:13  
1Chronicles16:14 O baro Devel hi maro Devel, oun o čačepaskro ray pral i tseli phoub." 
1Chronicles16:15 Ma bistrenn, hoy yob mentsa vin kras! Leskro lab, hoy das lo, ačella yaake rah har menshe ap i phoub djivenna." 
1Chronicles16:16 Kova hi ko lab, hoy das lo o Abrahameste, koy sovel, hoy das lo o Isaakeste," 
1Chronicles16:17 oun pal leste o Yakobeste, oun das peskro vast pre, te ačell kava lab i Israelenge hako tsireske." 
1Chronicles16:18 Yob penas: “Touke dau kava them Kanaan, kova hi ko them hoy t'menge vell.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 An ko tsiro his le gar boud, gar boudeder har i vast pherdo, oun his vi-themarya an o them." 
1Chronicles16:20 Oun yon djan yek themestar an o vavar, djan trouyel an boud rayengre themma." 
1Chronicles16:21 Oun o Devel das yak, te taprell len kek an. Oun i bare rayen pral kol themma das lo trad oun penas lenge:" 
1Chronicles16:22 “Lenn i vasta krik mire menshenge, kolen mange vin rodom! Ma krenn čilačepen kolenge, kay mire rakepangre hi!”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Givenn leske, o baro Debleske, t'mer menshe an i tsele themma! Penenn i menshenge, te hi yob kova, kay lell vin dran o čilačepen." 
1Chronicles16:24 Penenn kolenge, kay les gar prindjrenna, havo raylepen les hi. Penenn i menshenge an hake themma havo baro koova yob kras." 
1Chronicles16:25 O baro Devel hi o pralstouno, oun hakeno hounte sharell les. Mank i tsele vavar debla hi yob kova, konestar daras mer." 
1Chronicles16:26 I debla i vavar menshendar hi rhorhene debla. O baro Devel hi kova, kay o bolepen kras." 
1Chronicles16:27 Yob hi bareder har hako vavar. Shoukapen hi troul leste, Leskri zoor oun leskri barht hi an leskro kheer." 
1Chronicles16:28 T'mer dran i vavar themma, sharenn o baro Debles! Sharenn leskro raylepen oun leskri zoor!" 
1Chronicles16:29 Krenn leskro lab bares yaake har yob moldo hi! Avenn glan leste, oun anenn leske shoukar koova! Mangenn o baro Debles an ap ko dives, kay vell lo an shoukar oun kouč ripya." 
1Chronicles16:30 I tseli phoub hounte trissell glan leste. Yob kras i phoub, te vell li zoreles tardo." 
1Chronicles16:31 O bolepen vell barhtelo, oun i phoub sala. Penenn i tsele menshenge: O baro Devel hi o baro ray." 
1Chronicles16:32 O baro pani stell i barhtyatar oun lauter, hoy an leste hi. O them vell barhtelo oun lauter, hoy ap leste baro vas." 
1Chronicles16:33 I tsele rouka an o veesh givenna i barhtyatar glan o baro Debleste. Yob vella, oun anell o čačepen ap i phoub." 
1Chronicles16:34 Sharedo vell o baro Devel! Parkrenn t'men pash o baro Debleste! Yob hi i lačo Devel. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske. 
1Chronicles16:35 Penenn: Maro Devel, ab ap mari rig! tou hal kova, kay lell men vin dran o čilačepen. Doleske le men vin dran i vasta kol vavar menshendar! An men pale lauter khetne, te sharas tout oun parkras men pash toute, kay kokres o čačo Devel hal." 
1Chronicles16:36 Sharedo vell o baro Devel, kay o Israeleskro Devel hi, kanna oun hako tsireske! Oun i tsele menshe penan: “Amen! Sharedo vell o baro Devel!”" 
1Chronicles16:37 Oun yaake har o David lenge penas, ačan o Asaf oun leskre phrala glan o morhton o baro Debleskre deesh labentsa, te krenn le kote koy boudi, hoy hako dives hounte kerdo vell." 
1Chronicles16:38 Ninna o Obed-Edom, koleskro dad o Yedoutoun his oun leskre 68 (shob-deesh-te-orhta) phrala ačan kote. O Obed-Edom oun o Hosa dan garda ap i voudya." 
1Chronicles16:39 I rashaya, o Zadok oun leskre phrala, kran pengri boudi pash o baro Debleskro plarhteno kheer ap i berga pash o foro Gibeon." 
1Chronicles16:40 Yon hounte anan o baro Debleske hako dives firhen, kay leske tseles rhačedo venn ap i sasterni rhačepaskri, taysarlakro oun ratsyakro. Yaake his glan činlo an o Moseskre lila, kay tardo hi, hoy o baro Devel peskre menshendar Israel kamella." 
1Chronicles16:41 Ninna ačan kote vi-rodede gipangre, kay pengro labeha pre kharedo van, te parkrenn le pen pash o baro Debleste, kay leskro lačepen an hako tsiro kay hi. Mank lende his o Heman oun o Yedoutoun." 
1Chronicles16:42 Yon sharan o Debles pengro bashepah, oun bashran ap i phourdepangre oun doryengre bashepangre oun vavar bashepangre. I čaven o morshestar Yedoutoun das o David koy boudi, te denn le garda ap i voudya." 
1Chronicles16:43 Oun i tsele menshe djan penge, hakeno an peskro kheer. Oun ninna o David djas khere, te penell lo peskri familyake lačo dives." 
1Chronicles17:1 Har kanna o David an peskro kheer djivas, penas lo ap o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Natan: “Me djivau an i kheer dran cedertikro kasht, oun o morhton, kay i deesh laba o baro Deblestar dren hi, hi tardo an i plarhteno kheer. Hi kova mishto?”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Penas o Natan ap leste: “Dja koy oun kre lauter, hoy tout ap o dji hi! O baro Devel hi pash toute!”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Oun an koy rati penas o baro Devel ap o Nataneste: 
1Chronicles17:4 Dja koy oun pen ap miro boudepaskro, o David: Yaake penell o baro Devel: “Tou hal kova gar, kay krell mange i kheer, te djivap koy." 
1Chronicles17:5 Me djivom an kek kheer, foun ko dives, kay me kol Israelitaryen vin anom dran o them Egiptia bis kay dives. Man his či har i plarhteno kheer, har djom lentsa foun yek platsa ap i vavar." 
1Chronicles17:6 An ko tselo tsiro penom me kekeske, kay das garda ap mire menshende Israel: Hoske kreh tou mange kek kheer dran cedertikro kasht? ”" 
1Chronicles17:7 Doleske hounte peness tou ap miro boudepaskro, o David: Yaake penell o baro Devel, kay hi o ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub: “Me lom tout i bakrendar krik, kay tou pre garda dal, te vess tou ray pral mire menshende Israel." 
1Chronicles17:8 Me homs pash toute, kay tou ninna djal, oun marom kolen lauteren glan toute, kay kouran pen touha. Me krom tiro lab bares, yaake prindjedo har i laba kol bare rayendar ap i phoub." 
1Chronicles17:9 Oun me kamau mire menshen Israel i them te dell, kay nay ačenn yon. Oun koy djivenn le, kay trashenn yon bouder gar, oun kay venn yon gar bouder tele rikedo kol čilače menshendar, har an ko tsiro," 
1Chronicles17:10 kay rodom me čačepangre raya mire menshenge vin. Oun me krau kolen tiknes glan toute, kay kourenn pen touha. Me moukau touke kanna te penell: Tou kreh mange kek kheer. Me krau touke i kheer." 
1Chronicles17:11 Te hi tiro tsiro trouyel, oun tou mereh, hadau yekes tire čavendar, kay pal toute venna, te vell lo baro ray, oun ačell kova." 
1Chronicles17:12 Kova krell mange i kheer. Oun me krau, te ačell lo hako tsiro baro ray." 
1Chronicles17:13 Me kamau leskro dad te vell. Oun yob vell miro čavo. Miro lačepen lau gar lestar krik, har me miro lačepen kolestar krik lom, kay glan toute o baro ray his." 
1Chronicles17:14 Me čivau les pral mire menshende, te ačell lo baro ray pral lende hako tsireske. Oun tiro rayengri beshepaskri ačell hako tsiro.”" 
1Chronicles17:15 Har o Natan kol tsele laba, hoy o Devel leske sikras, o Davideske penas," 
1Chronicles17:16 djas o baro ray David an o Debleskro plarhteno kheer, vitsras pes tele glan o baro Debleste oun penas: “Baro Devel, miro ray, koon hom me, oun hoy hi miro kheer, kay tou kral yaake boud mange?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Oun kanna hi kova touke gar doha, miro Devel. Tou penal mange, hoy mire čavende kameh te dell an ko tsiro, hoy dour glan mende hi. Oun tou dikal ap mande har ap i baro mensheste, miro baro Devel." 
1Chronicles17:18 Tou kral man, tiro boudepaskres, yaake raylo! – Hoy nay rakrau me gomme boudeder? Tou djineh, hoy an miro dji hi." 
1Chronicles17:19 Baro Devel, mange kral tou kava tselo baro koova. Kova his yaake an tiro dji, te sikress tiro tselo raylepen." 
1Chronicles17:20 Baro Devel, kek hi yaake har tou! Oun dell kek devel har tou, pal lauter, hoy mer mare kandentsa shounam." 
1Chronicles17:21 Oun kay hi menshe ap i phoub har tire menshe Israel? Kolenge djal tou koy, te less len dran o pandepen vin. Ko baro oun zorelo koova, hoy tou lenge kral, kras, te val prindjedo ap i phoub. Tou tradal vavar menshen vin glan tire menshende, kay tou vin lal dran Egiptia." 
1Chronicles17:22 Tou rodal touke kol menshen Israel vin, te venn yon tire menshe hako tsireske. Oun tou, baro Devel, val lengro Devel." 
1Chronicles17:23 Oun kanna, baro Devel, mouk ko lab čačo te vell hako tsireske, hoy tou pral mande oun pral miro kheer penal. Oun kre yaake, har tou penal," 
1Chronicles17:24 te djinenn i menshe, kay kova, hoy tou penal, ninna yaake vell, oun tiro lab sharedo vell an hake tsirya, oun i menshe penenna: O baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, koles i Israelitarya an-mangenn, yob hi o Israeleskro Devel. Oun o kheer David, kay tiro boudepaskro hi, ačell tardo glan toute." 
1Chronicles17:25 Tou, miro Devel, sikral man, hoy kameh te krell – oun penal mange: Me krau touke i kheer. Doleske lom man khetne oun rakrom touha." 
1Chronicles17:26 Baro Devel, tou hal o čačo Devel, oun dal man tiro lab, te dess kava lačo koova mande, tiro boudepaskro." 
1Chronicles17:27 Kanna čip tiri barht pral mande oun mire menshende, te ačenn le glan toute hako tsiro. Ap koneste tou tiri barht čival, ap koleste ačell tiri barht čiddo hako tsireske.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Pal kova kouras pes o David i Filistarentsa oun his zorleder har yon, oun las o foro Gat oun i gaba troul Gat dran lengro vast." 
1Chronicles18:2 Ninna das lo i Moabarya. Oun yon van o Davideskre boudepangre oun hounte playsran ap leste, hoy lo lendar kamas." 
1Chronicles18:3 O David kouras pes ninna o baro rayeha pral o them Soba. Leskro lab his Hadad-Eser. Har o Hadad-Eser koy djas, te lell lo o them pash ko pani Eufrat dren, vas o David peskre lourdentsa, oun das les oun leskre lourden pash o foro Hamat." 
1Chronicles18:4 Oun o David las lestar yek zero vourdya, 7.000 (efta zerya) klissepangre, oun 20.000 (biish-zerya) lourden, oun kras i tsele grayen bango. Kokres sheel lendar moukas lo pral." 
1Chronicles18:5 Koy van kol Syrarya dran o them Damaskus pash o Hadad-Eser, ko baro ray pral o them Soba, te venn le leske ap i rig. Oun o David maras lendar 22.000 (biish-te-douy-zerya) morshen." 
1Chronicles18:6 Oun yob čivas moskre dren an lengro them. Oun o Davides vas penepaske pral i Syrarya, oun yon hounte playsran ap leste, hoy lo lendar kamas. Yaake his o baro Devel o Davideske ap i rig, kay lo ninna djas." 
1Chronicles18:7 Kol lourden o baro rayestar Hadad-Eser his sonakangre shilte. Kolen anas o David an o foro Yerusalem. 
1Chronicles18:8 Oun boud lolo saster las lo dran i forya Tibhat oun Koun. Kal forya his an o them, kay his o Hadad-Eser o baro ray. Kolestar moukas o Salomo o panyeskro čaro oun kol douy turme oun vavar koola dran lolo saster o Debleskro khereske te krell." 
1Chronicles18:9 Ko ray pral o foro Hamat – leskro lab his Toy, – his an o kourepen o baro rayeha Hadad-Eser. Har o Toy kanna shounas, kay maras o David koleskre tsele lourden, bičras lo peskro čaves, o Hadoram, pash o baro rayeste David, oun parkras pes pash leste, oun moukas leske te penell, te vell les boud barht. Oun o Hadoram anas peha sonakangre koola oun roupene koola oun save dran lolo saster." 
1Chronicles18:10  
1Chronicles18:11 Kova lauter das o baro ray David o baro Debleste, oun čivas kova an leskro kheer, ninna ko roup oun sonakay, hoy las yob kol menshendar dran i themma Edom, Moab, Ammon, Filistia oun Amalek." 
1Chronicles18:12 Oun o Abishay, koleskri day i Serouya hi, das i Edomarya ap ko kotar phoub, hoy kharell Londi Tala. Oun yob maras an koy tala 18.000 (deesh-te-orhta-zerya) lourden." 
1Chronicles18:13 Oun o David čivas moskre dren an hako foro an o them Edom. Oun o Davides his penepaske pral o tselo them Edom. O baro Devel his ap o Davideskri rig, kay yob ninna djas." 
1Chronicles18:14 Yaake his o David baro ray pral o tselo them Israel, oun kras, te lell hakeno peskro čačepen." 
1Chronicles18:15 O Yoab, koleskri day i Serouya hi, his o pralstouno pral i tsele lourdende, oun o Yosafat, koleskro dad o Ahiloud his, his o baro rayeskro rakepaskro." 
1Chronicles18:16 O Zadok, koleskro dad o Ahitoub hi, oun o Ahimelek, koleskro dad o Abyatar hi, his rashaya. O Shavsha his kova, kay činas i lila." 
1Chronicles18:17 O Benaya, koleskro dad o Yoyada hi, his o pralstouno pral kol Kretarya oun Pletarya, kay his troul o baro rayeste tardo, te denn le ap leste yak. Oun o Davideskre čave his i glanstoune ap i rig o baro rayestar." 
1Chronicles19:1 Pal ko tsiro meras o Nahash, ko baro ray pral kol Ammonarya. Oun leskro čavo, o Hanoun, vas baro ray pal leste." 
1Chronicles19:2 Koy penas peske o David: “Me kamau o čaveha o Nahashestar, o Hanoun, maal te vell, yaake har leskro dad miro maal his.” Oun o David bičras morshen koy, oun moukas leske kamle laba te penell pral leskro dadeste, te vell leske gar bouder ropaske. Har kanna kolla, kay o David bičras, an ko them Ammon van pash o Hanoun, te penenn le leske kamle laba," 
1Chronicles19:3 koy penan kol pralstoune pral kol Ammonarya ap o Hanoun: “Patseh tou čačepah, kay bičras o David morshen, te sharenn le tiro dades glan tire yaka, oun te penenn le touke kamle laba pral leste? Patseh tou gar, kay yob doleske morshen pash toute bičras, te dikenn le pal, har zorelo maro them hi, oun hoy koy glan djala, te lell lo les dren?”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Koy tapras o Hanoun kolen, kay o David bičras, oun moukas lenge i balla oun i čor tele te činell, oun i koola paash tele činell, bis pral i herya, oun moukas len te djal." 
1Chronicles19:5 Oun yon djan penge. Kova, hoy lentsa kerdo vas, his i bari ladj kol morshenge. Har o Davideske kova penlo vas, bičras yob morshen pash lende, oun moukas lenge te penell: “Ačenn an o foro Yericho, bis te t'mari čor pale bares vas! Koy pal avenn pale!”" 
1Chronicles19:6 Har o Hanoun oun kol Ammonarya dikan, kay kran le o Davides moulo rhoyedo, lan le yek zero centnari roup, oun bičran kava roupeha morshen an i themma Mesopotamia oun Syria, oun kote an i tikne themma Maaka oun Soba, te ginenn le kote lourden oun kourepangre vourdya oun klissepangre." 
1Chronicles19:7 Oun yon lan penge 32.000 kourepangre vourdya, oun o baro rayes dran Maaka oun leskre lourden. Kolla van oun čivan pengre plarhtene khera pre glan o foro Medeba. Oun i Ammonarya van ninna dran pengre forya oun van khetne kourepaske." 
1Chronicles19:8 Har kova o David shounas, bičras yob o Yoabes pash lende peskre tsele zorele lourdentsa." 
1Chronicles19:9 Oun kol Ammonarya djan vin an o kourepen, oun ačan tardo pash ko baro voudar lengro forestar. Kol raya dran Syria his kokres penge tardo ap i kotar phoub." 
1Chronicles19:10 Oun o Yoab dikas, kay kolla kaman pen leha te kourell, oun van foun glan oun pal. Koy rodas yob peskre feteder morshen vin, te kourenn pen kolla kol lourdentsa dran o them Syria." 
1Chronicles19:11 Kol vavar lourden čivas yob tel o vast peskro phralestar Abishay, te kourenn pen kolla kol Ammonentsa." 
1Chronicles19:12 Oun penas ap leste: “Te hi kol Syrarya zorleder har me, veh tou ap mari rig. Te hi kol Ammonarya zorleder har tou, vau me ap tiri rig." 
1Chronicles19:13 Ma dare, las men khetne te kouras kek daryah mare menshenge oun kol foryenge maro Deblestar! O baro Devel krella, hoy mishto hi an leskre yaka.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 O Yoab vas kol lourdentsa, kay pash leste hi, te kourenn le pen kolentsa dran Syria. Kolla nashan penge lendar." 
1Chronicles19:15 Har kol Ammonarya dikan, kay kol Syrarya nashan, nashan yon ninna glan o Abishay, oun tserdan pen pale an o foro dren. Oun o Yoab vas pale pale an o foro Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles19:16 Har i Syrarya dikan, kay yon i Israelendar dino his, bičran le morshen pash i Syrarya, kay djivenn vergel o pani Eufrat, oun moukan len gole te dell, te djan yon ninna an o kourepen. Oun o Shobak, ko pralstouno lourdo ko baro rayestar Hadad-Eser, djas glan lende." 
1Chronicles19:17 Oun o Davideske vas kova penlo. Oun yob las o tsele Israelitaryen khetne oun djas pral o pani Yordan. Oun har yob pash lende vas, čivas lo peskre lourden vergel lendar pre. Oun i Syrarya kouran pen leha." 
1Chronicles19:18 Oun kol Syrarya hounte nashan penge i Israelendar. Oun o David maras lendar 7.000 (efta-zerya) morshen, kay ap i kourepangre vourdya his, oun 40.000 (star-deesh-zerya) lourden. Oun o Shobak, ko pralstouno lourdo o baro rayestar Hadad-Eser, koles maras lo ninna." 
1Chronicles19:19 Oun kol tsele raya, kolengro pralstouno o Hadad-Eser hi, dikan, kay i Israelitarya i zorleder hi pral lende. Koy moukan le tele, te kourenn le pen o Davideha. Oun les vas penepaske pral lende. Oun kol Syrarya kaman bouder gar i lourdenge dran Ammon ap i rig te vell." 
1Chronicles20:1 Oun ko bersh djas trouyel. Oun an ko tsiro, kay kol bare raya an o kourepen djan, djas o Yoab peskre lourdentsa an o kourepen. Oun yon kouran pen i Ammonentsa, kran lengro them paash oun čivan pen troul o foro Rabba. O David ačas an Yerusalem. Oun o Yoab las o foro Rabba dren oun das les an kotya." 
1Chronicles20:2 Palle vas ninna o David oun las o baro rayeske dran o them Ammon leskro shereskro sonakay tele. Kova his 35 (triyanda-te-panč) kilogramme pharo, oun ap leste his kouč barra. Oun kava shereskro sonakay čivan yon ap o Davideskro shero. Oun yob anas boud bravlepen dran ko foro krik." 
1Chronicles20:3 Kol menshen dran ko foro anas lo vin. Oun kolla hounte boudran phares ap i činepangre, te činenn le bar, oun ap i sasterne tover oun vavar sasterne koola. Yaake kras o David kol tsele foryentsa kol Ammonendar. Pal kova djas o David peskre tsele lourdentsa pale an o foro Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles20:4 Koy pal vas i vavar kourepen kol Filistarentsa pash o foro Geser. Koy das o Sibkay dran o gab Housha i vavar morshes kol bare menshendar moulo. Koleskro lab his Sippay. Yaake van i Filistarya dino. 
1Chronicles20:5 Pal kova vas pale i kourepen i Filistarentsa. Koy das o Elhanan, koleskro dad o Yayr his, o morshes Lami moulo. Kova hi i phraal o Goliatestar dran Gat. Koles his i lengsto vitsepaskro čouri. Oun ko kotar kasht, hoy ko vitsepaskro čouri rikrella, his yaake pesso har i tikno rouk." 
1Chronicles20:6 Pal kova vas pale i kourepen pash o foro Gat. Mank i Filistarya his i vavar baro morsh. Koles his shob goushte ap hako vast, oun shob tsebe ap hako piro." 
1Chronicles20:7 Oun yob praasas o Israel. Oun o Yonatan, koleskro dad o Shimea his, das les moulo. O Shimea his i phraal o Davidestar." 
1Chronicles20:8 Kolla his bare morsha oun djivan an o foro Gat. Oun kolla van moulo dino o Davidestar oun leskre lourdendar. 
1Chronicles21:1 Oun o beng kamas čilačepen te krell ap i menshende Israel. Yaake das lo o Davideske an o dji, te hatsell lo vin, har boud morsha an Israel hi, kay nay djan an o kourepen." 
1Chronicles21:2 Oun o David penas ap o Yoab oun ap kol pralstunende pral Israel: “Djan trouyel pash kol tsele menshende an o tselo them Israel, yek rigyatar ap i vavar, oun hatsenn vin, har boud morsha koy hi, kay nay venn lourde mange! Oun penenn kova mange!”" 
1Chronicles21:3 O Yoab penas ap leste: “Miro baro ray, kamau o djiyestar, te dell tout o baro Devel sheel kope yaake boud menshen koy pashel, har kay hi. Yon halauter kamenn touke koy te vell oun rikrenn ap toute. Hoske kameh tou, miro ray, savo koova te krell oun djinell, har boud kolla hi? Hoske kameh te aness i doosh ap Israel?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 O baro rayeskro lab his zorleder har o kol laba o Yoabestar. Yaake djas o Yoab vin, oun nashas o tselo them Israel tele, oun vas pale an o foro Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles21:5 Oun yob penas o Davideske, har boud morsha koy hi. Oun an o tselo Israel his 1.100.000 (deesh-te-yek-sheel-zerya) morsha, kay hidjran i rharo oun an Youda 470.000 (star-sheel-efta-deesh-zerya) morsha." 
1Chronicles21:6 I morsha dran i khera Levi oun Benyamin his gar koy pashel. O Yoabeske his o Davideskre laba gar mishto. Doleske dikas lo gar pal, har boud morsha an kal douy bare familye hi." 
1Chronicles21:7 Kava tselo koova his djoungeles glan o Debleskre yaka. Doleske das lo i Israelenge i phagi. 
1Chronicles21:8 Oun o David penas ap o Debleste: “Kova hi i bari doosh, hoy anom ap mande. Me krom i čilačo koova. Oun kanna mangau tout, le mange koy doosh krik!”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Oun o baro Devel rakras ap o Gad. Kova his o Davideskro dikepaskro. Oun penas ap leste: 
1Chronicles21:10 Dja pash o Davideste oun pen leske: Kava penell o baro Devel: “Triin koova penau touke. Rode touke yek vin, oun kova krau me touke.”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Oun har o Gad pash o Davideste vas, penas lo ap leste: Kava penell o baro Devel: Rode vin:" 
1Chronicles21:12 “Kameh tou, te vell triin bersh i bari bok? Kameh, te nashess triin čon kolendar krik, kay kamenn tout te marell oun lenn tout o rhareha palla? Kameh, te vell triin divessa i baro nasslepen an o them? Kava nasslepen hi o baro Debleskro rharo, oun leskro bolepaskro marell boud menshen an o tselo them Israel. Kanna mouk kova an tiro shero trouyel te djal! Palle pen mange, hoy me ap koleste penap, kay bičras man!”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Oun o David penas ap o Gad: “Man hi bari traash. Mouk man an o baro Debleskro vast te perell! Leskro kamlepen hi baro. Me kamau gar an i menshengro vasta perell.” 
1Chronicles21:14 Koy moukas o baro Devel i baro nasslepen pral o Israel te vell, oun 70.000 (efta-deesh-zerya) menshe meran." 
1Chronicles21:15 Oun o Devel bičras ko bolepaskres an o foro Yerusalem, te marell lo len an o foro. Har vas ko nasslepen koy, khaytas o baro Debles koy bibarht. Oun yob penas ap ko bolepaskro, kay anas o merepen pral i menshende: “Kanna hi doha! Le tiro vast lendar krik!” O Debleskro bolepaskro his tardo ap koy djobeskri platsa o morshestar Arauna. Kova his i Yebousari." 
1Chronicles21:16 Oun o David dikas pral oun dikas ko bolepaskres o baro Deblestar tardo mashkral i phoub oun o bolepen. An leskro vast his i rharo, koleha sikras lo pral o foro Yerusalem. Kote peras o David oun i phoureder ap pengro mouy. Halauter his le an gone an-rido." 
1Chronicles21:17 Oun o David penas ap o baro Debleste: “Shoun, kova hom me, kay moukom pal te dikell, har boud morsha an o them hi. Me anom doosh ap mande oun krom i čilačo koova. Kol menshe kate kran kek čilačo koova. Yon hi har bakre, ap kolende kek doosh hi. Miro baro Devel, mangau tout, mouk koy phagi ap mande oun miro dadeskro kheer te vell, oun gar ap tire menshende! Kre lenge kek čilačepen!”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Oun o baro Debleskro bolepaskro penas ap o Gad: Pen o Davideske: “Dja koy pral ap koy djobeskri platsa ko morshestar Arauna, ko Yebousari! Oun kre kote o baro Debleske i rhačepaskri!”" 
1Chronicles21:19 Koy djas o David pral, yaake har o baro Devel lestar kamas, oun o Gad leske penas." 
1Chronicles21:20 Ap ko dives das o Arauna o djob, te perell o tikno djob vin. Oun yob rissras pes trouyel oun dikas ko bolepaskres. Oun yob oun leskre star čave khatran pen." 
1Chronicles21:21 Har vas o David pash o Arauna, dikas o Arauna pre oun dikas o Davides. Oun yob djas vin dran o djobeskri platsa oun djas pash o Davideste oun čivas pes glan leste ap peskro mouy tele ap i phoub." 
1Chronicles21:22 Oun o David penas ap o Arauna: “Bike mange tiri djobeskri platsa, te krap kote i rhačepaskri o baro Debleske, te djal koy nasslepen i menshendar krik. Me dau tout yaake boud love har koy platsa moldo hi.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 O Arauna penas ap o David: “Miro baro ray, le touke kova lauter, oun kre yaake har kameh. Dik, me dau tout i groumya rhačepaske, oun ko vourdin te vell tout kasht rhačepaske, ninna djob, hoy nay rhačreh o Debleske, kova lauter dau tout.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Oun o baro ray David penas ap o Arauna: “Yaake djal gar. Čačepah, me kamau toutar kova tele ginell, oun playsrau, hoy ko koova molella. Kamau gar kova te lell o baro Debleske, hoy tiro hi, kamau leske či te rhačrell, kay lom čičeske.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Yaake ginas o David ko kotar them oun playsras 600 (shob-sheel) sonakangre kotya. 
1Chronicles21:26 Oun o David kras koy o baro Debleske i rhačepaskri, oun anas firhen leske, saven kay van tseles rhačedo oun saven, kay rhan le khetne glan o baro Debleste. Oun har yob o baro Debles an-kharas, moukas yob yag dran o bolepen te perell ap i rhačepaskri, kay kol moule firhe čiddo hi." 
1Chronicles21:27 Oun ap o bolepaskro penas o baro Devel, te lell yob peskro rharo pale pale." 
1Chronicles21:28 O David hayvas, kay o baro Devel les shounas, oun te rhačrell lo nay firhen kote ap koy djobeskri platsa o morshestar Arauna, ko Yebousari." 
1Chronicles21:29 An ko tsiro his o Debleskro plarhteno kheer oun koy sasterni rhačepaskri ap i berga Gibeon. Kova his ko kheer, hoy kras o Mose, har his i Israelitarya an o moulo tato them." 
1Chronicles21:30 Kote, ap i berga Gibeon nay djas o David gar glan o Debleste, te poučell lo lestar, yaake baro his leskri traash glan o rharo, hoy o bolepaskres o baro Deblestar an peskro vast his." 
1Chronicles22:1 Oun o David penas: “Kate te vell o kheer o baro Debleske tardo. Kate krah leske i rhačepaskri, kay i Israelitarya nay rhačrenn firhen leske.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Oun o David moukas i vi-themaryen khetne te vell, kay djivenn an o them Israel. Oun yob das len koy boudi, te denn le barra o khereske o baro Deblestar." 
1Chronicles22:3 Oun o David moukas boud saster te anell, te venn lestar nagle i voudyenge oun sasterno pandepen kerdo, ninna boud lolo saster, yaake boud, te nashte kek penas, har boud ko lolo saster hi." 
1Chronicles22:4 I menshe dran Sidon oun Tirus anan o Davideske boud cedertikro kasht. Yaake his les yaake boud cedertikro kasht, kay kek nay penas har boud." 
1Chronicles22:5 O David penas peske: Miro čavo, o Salomo, hi terno oun djinell gomme gar, har te krell i kheer; ko kheer o baro Debleske hounte vell yaake baro oun raylo, te nay vell lo prindjedo oun sharedo an i tsele themma. Doleske kamau me leske doha koova koy te čivell. Oun yaake las o David boud koova khetne glan leskro merepen." 
1Chronicles22:6 Oun yob kharas peskro čaves, o Salomo, pash peste, oun penas leske, te krell lo i kheer o baro Debleske, kay o Israeleskro Devel hi." 
1Chronicles22:7 Oun o David penas ap o Salomo: “Miro čavo, an miro dji his, te krap i kheer o baro Debleske, kay miro Devel hi." 
1Chronicles22:8 Koy penas o baro Devel mange: Tou maral boud menshen, oun tout his baro kourepen. Dikom ko rat, hoy ap i phoub nashas. Doleske kress tou mange kek kheer." 
1Chronicles22:9 Dik, i čavo vell touke boldo, yob vell i morsh, kay djinell kek kourepen. Me krau te kourell pes kek leha kolendar halauterendar, kay troul t'mende djivenn. Yaake rah har yob djivell, nay djivenn i Israelitarya kek kourepah oun marepah. Doleske de les o lab Salomo." 
1Chronicles22:10 Kova te krell mange i kheer. Oun yob mou vell miro čavo, oun me kamau leskro dad te vell. Oun me krau, te vell hako tsiro yek leskre čavendar o ray pral Israel." 
1Chronicles22:11 Kanna, miro čavo, mou vell o baro Devel ap tiri rig, te nay kreh tiro baro Debleske i kheer, yaake har yob toutar penas." 
1Chronicles22:12 Mou dell lo tout gosvepen, te djiness, hoy te kress. Yob krell tout ray pral Israel, te djas ap leskro drom." 
1Chronicles22:13 Te rikreh tout ap kol laba, hoy o baro Devel o Moseske penas, te djivell o Israel koy pal, oun kreh pal o Debleskro čačepen, palle djal touke tiri boudi mishto. Ab zorelo! Oun ma traash! Ma dare či! Oun ma traash kekestar!" 
1Chronicles22:14 Oun kanna dik, me marom man tele te anom boud koova khetne o khereske o baro Deblestar: sheel zerya (100.000) centnarya sonakay oun i zero zerya (1.000.000) centnarya roup; koy pashel lolo saster oun vavar saster yaake boud, kay nay penau gar har boud kova hi. Ninna moukom kasht oun barra te anell. Oun tou nay čiveh gomme boudeder pashel." 
1Chronicles22:15 Oun boud boudepangre hi koy: save, kay denn barra, save kay boudrenn kashteha, ninna boud morsha, kay hayvenn mishto čomone te krell dran o sonakay, roup, lolo saster, oun vavar saster. Ste pre, oun kre tout ap i boudi! Oun o baro Devel te vell touha!”" 
1Chronicles22:16  
1Chronicles22:17 Oun o David penas ap i tsele pralstunende pral Israel, te venn le leskro čaveske Salomo ap i rig tardo." 
1Chronicles22:18 Yob penas: “T'maro baro Devel hi pash t'mende! Yob kras, te han an kek kourepen kol thementsa troul t'mende. Yob das len an miro vast, oun o baro Devel oun leskre menshe hi o ray pral lende." 
1Chronicles22:19 Kanna denn t'maro djipen oun t'maro dji o baro Debleste, kay t'maro Devel hi! Oun stenn pre oun krenn leske i kheer, kay leske kokres hi. Kote te vell o morhton o baro Debleskre deesh labentsa dren čiddo, ninna ko vavar Debleskro koova. Kava kheer krenn t'mer, te vell o baro Devel sharedo.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 O Davides his i lengsto djipen, oun his phouro, har kras lo peskro čaves, o Salomo, o ray pral Israel." 
1Chronicles23:2 Oun yob moukas i tsele pralstunen dran Israel oun i rashaya oun i Levitarya khetne te vell. 
1Chronicles23:3 Oun yob moukas pal te dikell, har boud morsha mank i Levitaryen his, kay hi triyanda bersha oun phoureder. Oun kolla his khetne 38.000 (triyanda-te-orhta zerya) morsha." 
1Chronicles23:4 Oun kolendar las o David 24.000 (biish-te-star zerya) morsha, te boudrenn le ap o kheer o baro Debleske, oun 6.000 (shob zerya) morsha, te venn le pralstoune oun čačepangre morsha." 
1Chronicles23:5 4.000 (star zerya) morsha van voudyengre morsha, kay hounte denn garda ap i voudya. Oun 4.000 (star zerya) morsha van gipangre, kay givenn gilya o baro Debleske, oun bashrenn koy pashel ap kol bashepangre, hoy moukas o David koleske te krell." 
1Chronicles23:6 I Levitarya his i menshe, kay van kol triin čavendar o morshestar Levi: o Gershon, o Kohat oun o Merari. Oun o David čivas dran kol triin familya morshen khetne, te boudrenn le khetne." 
1Chronicles23:7 O Gershon, leskre čave his: o Ladan oun o Shimi." 
1Chronicles23:8 O Ladan, les his triin čave: o phoureder his o Yehiel, palle vas o Setam oun o Yoel." 
1Chronicles23:9 O Shimi, les his triin čave: o Shelomit, o Hasiel, oun o Haran. Kolla his i pralstoune pral i familye, kolengro phouro dad o Ladan hi." 
1Chronicles23:10 O Shimi, les his star čave: o Yahat, o Sina, o Yehoush, oun o Benya." 
1Chronicles23:11 O Yahat his o phoureder, oun o Sisa his o douyto. O Yehoush oun o Benya, kolen his gar boud čave. Doleske van yon dikles har yek familya, kay khetne boudrenn." 
1Chronicles23:12 O Kohat, les his star čave: o Amram, o Yizhar, o Hebron, oun o Usiel." 
1Chronicles23:13 O Amram, leskre čave his: o Aron oun o Mose. Oun o Aron oun leskre čave van vin rodedo, te venn le rashaya hako tsireske. Yon kokres nay kran o baro Debleskri boudi: nay rhačran firhen ap leskri rhačepaskri, oun nay rakran o Debleskri barht vin pral i Israelitarya." 
1Chronicles23:14 I čave o Mosestar, ko Debleskro morshestar, van pash o kheer Levi kharedo." 
1Chronicles23:15 Leskre čave his o Gershon oun o Eliyeser. 
1Chronicles23:16 O Gershon, leskro phoureder čavo his o Shebouel." 
1Chronicles23:17 O Eliyeser, les hi kokres yek čavo, o Rekabya. Koles his boud čave." 
1Chronicles23:18 O Yizhar, leskro phoureder čavo his o Shelomit." 
1Chronicles23:19 O Hebron, leskro phoureder čavo his o Yeriya, palle vas o Amarya, o Yaziel, oun o Yekamam." 
1Chronicles23:20 O Usiel, leskro phoureder čavo his o Mika, o douyto his o Issia." 
1Chronicles23:21 O Merari, les his douy čave: o Mali oun o Moushi. o Mali, leskre čave his: o Elazar oun o Kish." 
1Chronicles23:22 O Elazar, les his kek čave, kokres ča; oun lengre neboude, kol čave lengro kakestar, o Kish, romedineran len." 
1Chronicles23:23 O Moushi, les his triin čave: o Mali, o Eder oun o Yeremot." 
1Chronicles23:24 Kolla hi i čave o morshestar Levi, kay his biish bersh oun phoureder. Lengre laba his pre činlo pal lengre familyende, kolengre pralstoune yon his. Yon van vin rodedo, te krenn le i boudi an o baro Debleskro kheer." 
1Chronicles23:25 Kolestar penas o David: O baro Devel, kay o Israeleskro Devel hi, das peskre menshen i them, kay le khere hi. Oun yob kamell hako tsiro an o foro Yerusalem te djivell." 
1Chronicles23:26 Yaake hounte hidjran i Levitarya bouder gar o Debleskro plarhteno kheer oun halauter, hoy koy dren his, har glan kova kerdo vas." 
1Chronicles23:27 I tsiro pal kova, glan peskro merepen, penas o David, te venn kol Levitarya pre činlo an i liil, kay hi biish bersh oun phoureder." 
1Chronicles23:28 Yon te venn o Aroneskre čavende pash o vast, pash i boudi an o baro Debleskro kheer, ap kol glanstoune platse, oun an i iseme. Yon hounte krenn ko tselo koova djoudjo, hoy o Debleske hi, oun ninna vavar boudi an o Debleskro kheer." 
1Chronicles23:29 Lengri boudi his, te dikenn le pal o Debleskre mare, pal ko lačo yarro, hoy leske rhačedo vell, oun pal o maro, hoy kek shoutlo yarro dren hi, oun pal o peklo rhapen, kay djet dren hi. Ninna hounte dikenn le, kay kol barra, hoy ap vaga čiddo venn, o čačo pharepen sikrenn, oun kol kashta, hoy o lengstepen sikrenn, kova čačes krenna." 
1Chronicles23:30 Oun haki taysarla hounte venn i Levitarya koy tardo, te givenn le o baro Debleske gilya, oun parkrenn pen pash leste. Oun yaake hounte vell ninna haki rati kerdo." 
1Chronicles23:31 Ninna hounte venn le glan o baro Debleste tardo, an kol divessa, kay marenn i rashaya o baro Debleske firhen, hoy leske tseles rhačedo venn. Kova his ap o Debleskro dives, oun ap ko dives, kay o nevo čon diklo vell, oun ap i tsele vavar bare divessa. Hako dives hounte venn yaake boud Levitarya glan o baro Debleste, har glan činlo hi." 
1Chronicles23:32 Yaake hounte krenn yon pengri boudi an o baro Debleskro plarhteno kheer, oun pal i tsiro an leskro baro kheer, hoy kerdo vell, oun hounte venn i rashayenge ap i rig pash lengri boudi an o baro Debleskro kheer. I rashaya hi lengre phrala dran o kheer Aron." 
1Chronicles24:1 Kolla hi i laba kol morshendar, kay his i pralstoune pral i rashayende, kay hako kopo khetne boudran an o baro Debleskro kheer. O Aroneskre čave his: o Nadab, o Abihu, o Elazar oun o Itamar." 
1Chronicles24:2 O Nadab oun o Abihu meran, har o Aron gomme djido his, oun len his kek morsh čave. O Elazar oun o Itamar van rashaya." 
1Chronicles24:3 Oun o David čivas dran kol douy familya i morshen yaake khetne, har hounte boudrenn le khetne. O Zadok dran o kheer Elazar oun o Ahimelek dran o kheer Itamar, van leske koy pashel ap i rig." 
1Chronicles24:4 Koy hatsan le vin, kay his boudeder morsha an o kheer Elazar har an o kheer Itamar. Oun yon lan 16 (deesh-te-shob) pralstoune dran o kheer Elazar oun orhta pralstoune dran o kheer Itamar." 
1Chronicles24:5 An kol douy khera his pralstoune pral o Debleskro kheer oun rashaya. Oun yon vitsran barra, te dikenn le, havi boudi hakeno hounte krella." 
1Chronicles24:6 Oun o Shemaya, ko Levitari, koleskro dad o Netanel his, činas lengre laba pre, hako kopo douy dran o kheer Elazar oun yek dran o kheer Itamar. Koy pashel his o baro ray, i pralstoune, o rashay Zadok, o Ahimelek, koleskro dad o Abyatar his, i pralstoune pral i familyende o rashayendar oun o Levitarendar." 
1Chronicles24:7 Oun yaake har i barra peran, van le vi-rodedo: 1. o Yoyarib; 2. o Yedaya; 3. o Harim; 4. o Seorim; 5. o Malkiya; 6. o Miyamin; 7. o Hakkoz; 8. o Abiya; 9. o Yeshoua; 10. o Shekanya; 11. o Elyashib; 12. o Yakim; 13. o Houppa; 14. o Yeshebab; 15. o Bilga; 16. o Immer; 17. o Hesir; 18. o Pizez; 19. o Petaya 20. o Yeheskel; 21. o Yakin; 22. o Gamul; 23. o Delaya; 24. o Maasya." 
1Chronicles24:8 Kalla hi i rashaya, kay van vi-rodedo, te venn le i pralstoune pral kol rashayende, kay hounte boudrenn khetne an o baro Debleskro kheer, yaake har lengro phouro dad, o Aron, lenge glan činas. Kova kras o Aron yaake, har penas leske o baro Devel, kay o Israeleskro Devel hi." 
1Chronicles24:9 Kalla hi vavar pralstoune dran i familye, kay van pal o Levi: dran i familya Amram: o Shebouel; dran i familya Shebouel: o Yedia;" 
1Chronicles24:10 dran i familya Rekabya: o Issia, ko phoureder čavo;" 
1Chronicles24:11 dran i familya Yizhar: o Shelomit; dran i familya Shelomit: o Yahat. 
1Chronicles24:12 I čave o morshestar Hebron his: o Yeriya, ko phoureder čavo, o Amarya, ko douyto čavo, o Yaziel, ko triinto, o Yekamam, ko starto;" 
1Chronicles24:13 dran i familya Usiel: o Mika; dran i familya Mika: o Shamir. 
1Chronicles24:14 O Mikaeskro phraal his o Issia; dran i familya Issia: o Zakarie. 
1Chronicles24:15 I čave o morshestar Merari his: o Mali oun o Moushi oun o Yaasiya; 
1Chronicles24:16 dran i familya Yaasiya: o Shoham, o Zakour oun o Ibri," 
1Chronicles24:17 dran i familya Mali: o Elazar; koles his kek morsh čave. 
1Chronicles24:18 dran i familya Kish, o Yerameel." 
1Chronicles24:19 I čave o morshestar Moushi his: o Mali, o Eder oun o Yeremot. Kolla hi i Levitarya, pre činlo an i liil pal pengre familye." 
1Chronicles24:20 Yaake har lengre phralenge, kol rashayenge dran o kheer Aron, van ninna kal morshenge barra vitsedo, te sikrenn le, havi boudi yon hounte krenna: i pralstunenge yaake har i ternenge. Oun o baro ray David his koy pashel, ninna o Zadok oun o Ahimelek oun i pralstoune pral i familyende i rashayendar oun i Levitarendar." 
1Chronicles25:1 Oun o David khetne i pralstunentsa pral i lourdende, rodas i gipangre oun bashepangre vin, te givenn le Debleskre gilya, bashrenn ap doryengre bashepangre, oun denn ap sasterne patria. Kolla van dran i khera Asaf, Heman oun Yedoutoun." 
1Chronicles25:2 I čave o morshestar Asaf: o Zakour, o Yosef, o Netanya, o Asarela. Lengro dad his lengro pralstouno. Koleske penas o David, te krell lo Debleskre gilya." 
1Chronicles25:3 I čave o morshestar Yedoutoun: o Gedalya, o Zeri, o Yesaya, o Hashabya, o Mattitya, o Shimi. Khetne his le shob. Lengro dad his lengro pralstouno, kay bashras ap i doryengri bashepaskri, har givas lo Debleskre gilya, te hadell lo oun sharell lo o baro Debles." 
1Chronicles25:4 I čave o morshestar Heman: o Boukkiya, o Mattanya, o Usiel, o Shebouel, o Yerimot, o Hananya, o Hanani, o Elyata, o Giddalti, o Romamti-Ezer, o Yoshbekasha, o Malloti, o Hotir oun o Mahasiot." 
1Chronicles25:5 Kalla lauter his o Hemaneskre čave. Yob his o baro rayeskro dikepaskro. O Devel penas leske, te krell lo les an-diklo, oun das les deesh-te-star morsh čave oun triin ča." 
1Chronicles25:6 Kalla lauter givan an o baro Debleskro kheer oun bashran ap sasterne patria oun doryengre bashepangre, yaake har o baro ray penas. Lengre dada, o Asaf, o Yedoutoun oun o Heman his i gipangre raya." 
1Chronicles25:7 Khetne lengre phralentsa, kay hayvan ninna mishto te givell o baro Debleske, his le 288 (douy-sheel-orhta-desh-te-orhta) morsha – lauter lače gipangre." 
1Chronicles25:8 Oun yon vitsran barra, te hatsenn le vin, koon pal koneste o gipaske oun bashepaske an o Debleskro kheer hounte djal." 
1Chronicles26:1 Kolla hi i morsha, kay dan garda ap i voudya. Dran o kheer Korah vas o Meshelemya, leskro dad his o Kore, leskro papo o Abiasaf." 
1Chronicles26:2 O Meshelemya, les his čave: o phoureder his o Zakarie, o douyto o Yedjael, o triinto o Sebadja, o starto o Yatniel," 
1Chronicles26:3 o pančto o Elam, o shobto o Yohanan, o eftato o Elyoenay." 
1Chronicles26:4 O Obed-Edom: O Devel his leske lačes oun das les boud čave: o phoureder his o Shemaya, o douyto o Yosabad, o triinto o Yoa, o starto o Sakar, o pančto o Netanel, o shobto o Ammiel, o eftato o Issakar, o orhtato o Pehoulletay;" 
1Chronicles26:5  
1Chronicles26:6 Oun leskro čaveske, o Shemaya, van ninna čave boldo. Yon his an-dikle morsha, oun van pralstoune pral pengre menshende." 
1Chronicles26:7 Yon his o Otni, o Refael, o Obed oun o Elsabad oun leskre phrala, o Elihou oun o Semakya. Kolla his an-dikle morsha." 
1Chronicles26:8 Kalla lauter his i morsha, kay van pal o Obed-Edom. Yon pengre čaventsa oun phralentsa his an-dikle morsha, kay hayvan mishto pengri boudi te krell. Khetne his le 62 (shob-deesh-te-douy) morsha." 
1Chronicles26:9 I morsh čave oun phrala o morshestar Meshelemya his 18 (deesh-te-orhta). 
1Chronicles26:10 Dran i familya Merari vas o Hosa. Koles his star čave: o ersto his o Shimri, o douyto o Hilkiya, o triinto o Tebalya, o starto o Zakarie. O phoureder his bouder gar koy. Doleske kras o Hosa, te vell peskro čavo Shimri o pralstouno. I tsele morsh čave oun phrala o morshestar Hosa his 13 (deesh-te-triin)." 
1Chronicles26:11  
1Chronicles26:12 Kal morsha dan garda ap i voudya glan o Debleskro kheer. Hako kopo boudras yek pralstouno kol morshentsa dran peskri familya khetne. Yaake har lengre phrala, i vavar Levitarya, kran le pengri boudi ap o baro Debleskro kheer." 
1Chronicles26:13 Oun yon vitsran barra, te dikenn le, havi familya dell garda ap havo voudar. Kova kran le i tikne har i bare familyentsa." 
1Chronicles26:14 O voudar, hoy ap i glanstouni rig hi, koleske peran i barra ap o Meshelemya. O voudar, hoy ap i servi rig hi, koleske peran i barra ap leskro čavo, o Zakarie. Kova his i gosevo morsh, kay djinas, hoy te krell." 
1Chronicles26:15 O Obed-Edom hounte das garda ap o voudar, hoy ap i čači rig his, oun leskre čave ap o djobeskro kheer." 
1Chronicles26:16 O Shouppim oun o Hosa hounte dan garda ap o voudar hoy ap i palstouni rig hi, ninna ap o voudar, hoy kharell Shalleket, kay o drom pre djal. Yaake hounte denn i morsha garda:" 
1Chronicles26:17 Ap i glanstouni rig hounte venn shob morsha tardo hako dives, ap i servi rig star morsha, ap i čači rig star morsha, pash o djobeskro kheer douy morsha," 
1Chronicles26:18 ap i palstouni rig, star pash o drom oun douy pash koy platsa, hoy kharell Parbar." 
1Chronicles26:19 Yaake hi glan činlo, har i voudyengre morsha hounte yak denn. Yon lauter van dran i familye Korah oun Merari." 
1Chronicles26:20 Vavar Levitarya dan yak ap o bravlepen an o Debleskro kheer oun ko kouč koova, hoy i menshe o Debleske dan." 
1Chronicles26:21 Mank lende his i čave o morshestar Ladan dran o kheer Gershon. Yon his i pralstoune mank pengre menshende. Mank lende his o Yehiel. 
1Chronicles26:22 Leskre čave, o Setam oun o Yoel, dan yak ap o bravlepen an o baro Debleskro kheer." 
1Chronicles26:23 Vavar morsha, kay dan garda ap o Debleskro bravlepen, his dran i familye Amram, Yizhar, Hebron oun Usiel." 
1Chronicles26:24 O Shebouel, koleskro dad o Gershon his, oun koleskro dad o Mose his, kova his o pralstouno pral o bravlepen." 
1Chronicles26:25 Leskro phraal, o Eliyeser, les his i čavo: o Rekabya; koleskro čavo his o Yesaya, koleskro čavo his o Yoram, koleskro čavo his o Zikri, koleskro čavo his o Shelomit." 
1Chronicles26:26 Kava morsh Shelomit oun leskre phrala his i pralstoune pral o kouč koova, hoy o Debleske dino vas. Kava koova anan o baro ray David oun i pralstoune pral i familyende, ninna i pralstoune pral i lourdende, kolla pral yek zero lourdende oun kolla pral yek shelende oun vavar bare lourde." 
1Chronicles26:27 Dran kova, hoy anan le pentsa khere dran o kourepen, dan le les, te vell o baro Debleskro kheer kerdo." 
1Chronicles26:28 O Shelomit oun leskre phrala his i pralstoune pral halauter, hoy o Debleske dino vas, ninna pral kova, hoy glan ko tsiro o dikepaskro o Samuel o Debleske anas, oun o Saul, koleskro dad o Kish his, oun o Abner, koleskro dad o Ner his, oun o Yoab, koleskri day i Serouya his." 
1Chronicles26:29 Dran o kheer Yizhar lan le o Kenanya oun leskre morsh čave, te venn yon pralstoune oun čačepangre morsha an Israel." 
1Chronicles26:30 Dran o kheer Hebron, lan le o Hashabya oun leskre phrala, te denn yon yak, te vell halauter mishto kerdo, hoy o baro Debleske oun o baro rayeske kerdo vell an o them ap i vavar rig o panyestar Yordan. Yon khetne his 1.700 an-dikle morsha." 
1Chronicles26:31 O pralstouno pral o kheer Hebron peskre tsele familyentsa his o Yeriya. Har his o David an o star-deshto bersh o baro ray, rodan le an-dikle morsha mank lende oun hatsan len an o foro Yaser an o them Gilead." 
1Chronicles26:32 O Yeria, les his 2.700 an-dikle morsha mank peskre menshende. Kolla his pralstoune pengre familyendar. Oun o David čivas len oun lengro pralstouno, o Yeriya, pral i familyende Ruben oun Gad oun pral i paash familya Manasse, te denn le yak, kay kolla pengri boudi o baro Debleske oun o baro rayeske mishto krenn." 
1Chronicles27:1 Kalla hi i morsha an Israel, kay djan o baro rayeske an o kourepen. Mank lende his familyengre pralstoune, ninna lourdengre pralstoune, kolla pral yek zero lourdende, oun kolla pral yek sheel lourdende, ninna vavar bare lourde. Hako kopo djan 24.000 (biish-te-star-zerya) lourde khetne. Yon hounte venn yek čon o baro rayeske koy. Hako čon his vavar 24.000 morsha koy. Yaake djas kova o tselo bersh." 
1Chronicles27:2 An o ersto čon his o Yashobam, koleskro dad o Sabdiel his, o pralstouno pral 24.000 lourdende." 
1Chronicles27:3 Yob vas dran o kheer Perez, oun his o pralstouno pral i tsele bare lourdende an o ersto čon." 
1Chronicles27:4 An o douyto čon his o Doday dran Ahoa o pralstouno pral 24.000 lourdende. Oun o Miklot his o baro lourdo pral lende. 
1Chronicles27:5 An o triinto čon his o Benaya, koleskro dad o baro rashay Yoyada his, o pralstouno pral 24.000 lourdende." 
1Chronicles27:6 O Benaya his yek kol triyanda bareder lourdendar oun o pralstouno lendar. Leskro baro lourdo his leskro čavo Ammisabad. 
1Chronicles27:7 An o starto čon his o Asahel, ko phraal o Yoabestar, o pralstouno pral 24.000 lourdende. Oun pal leste vas leskro čavo, o Sebadja, o pralstouno." 
1Chronicles27:8 An o pančto čon his o Shamhout dran o kheer Zera, o pralstouno pral 24.000 lourdende." 
1Chronicles27:9 An o shobto čon his o Ira dran Tekoa, koleskro dad o Ikkesh his, o pralstouno pral 24.000 lourdende." 
1Chronicles27:10 An o eftato čon his o Helez dran Pelon, dran o kheer Efrayim o pralstouno pral 24.000 lourdende." 
1Chronicles27:11 An o orhtato čon his o Sibkay, dran o foro Housha dran o kheer Zera o pralstouno pral 24.000 lourdende." 
1Chronicles27:12 An o enyato čon his o Abiyeser dran o foro Anatot dran o kheer Benyamin o pralstouno pral 24.000 lourdende. 
1Chronicles27:13 An o deshto čon his o Marai, dran o foro Netofa, dran o kheer Zera, o pralstouno pral 24.000 lourdende." 
1Chronicles27:14 An o deesh-te-yekto čon his o Benaya dran o foro Piraton, dran o kheer Efrayim, o pralstouno pral 24.000 lourdende." 
1Chronicles27:15 An o deesh-te-douyto čon his o Helday, dran o foro Netofa dran o kheer Otniel, o pralstouno pral 24.000 lourdende." 
1Chronicles27:16 Kalla his i pralstoune pral kol deesh-te-douy bare familye an Israel: pral i familya Ruben: o Eliyeser, koleskro dad o Zikri his; pral i familya Simeon: o Shefatya, koleskro dad o Maaka his;" 
1Chronicles27:17 pral i familya Levi: o Hashabya, koleskro dad o Kemuel his; pral i familya Aron: o Zadok;" 
1Chronicles27:18 pral i familya Youda: o Elihou, yek o Davideskre phralendar; pral i familya Issakar: o Omri, koleskro dad o Mikael his;" 
1Chronicles27:19 pral i familya Zabulon: o Yishmaya, koleskro dad o Obadya his; pral i familya Naftali: o Yeremot, koleskro dad o Asriel his;" 
1Chronicles27:20 pral i familya Efrayim: o Hoshea, koleskro dad o Asasya his; pral i paash familya Manasse: o Yoel, koleskro dad o Pedaya his;" 
1Chronicles27:21 pral i paash familya Manasse an o them Gilead: o Yiddo, koleskro dad o Zakarie his; pral i familya Benyamin: o Yaasiel, koleskro dad o Abner his;" 
1Chronicles27:22 pral i familya Dan: o Asarel, koleskro dad o Yeroham his. Kolla hi i pralstoune pral i khera Israel." 
1Chronicles27:23 O David moukas gar i laba kolendar pre te činell, kay his terneder har biish bersha. O baro Devel penas boud bersha glan kova, te krell lo i Israelitaryen yaake boud har i momlia an o bolepen." 
1Chronicles27:24 O Yoab, koleskri day i Serouya his, kras pes ap i boudi te činell i laba pre, oun hounte moukas tele, har vas o Debleskri rholi doleske pral o Israel. Oun yaake hi gar činlo an o familyakro liil o baro rayestar David, kitse morsha an o them Israel his, kay nay venn lourde." 
1Chronicles27:25 O pralstouno pral o rayeskro rhapen his o Asmavet, koleskro dad o Adiel his. O pralstouno pral o rhapen an o them, an i forya, gaba oun lourdengre khera his o Yonatan, koleskro dad o Usiya his." 
1Chronicles27:26 O pralstouno pral i harhende, kay boudran ap o baro rayeskri phoub, his o Esri, koleskro dad o Keloub his." 
1Chronicles27:27 O pralstouno pral i drakengre themma his o Shimi dran o foro Ramat. O pralstouno pral i mool ap i drakengre themma his o Sabdi dran o foro Shefam. 
1Chronicles27:28 O pralstouno pral i djeteskre rouka oun i faygetikre rouka an o bergetikro them his o Baal-Hanan dran o foro Geder. O pralstouno pral o djet his o Yoash. 
1Chronicles27:29 O pralstouno pral i groumyende an o them Sharon his o Shitray, kay dran o them Sharon his. O pralstouno pral i groumyende an i telstoune themma his o Shafat, koleskro dad o Adlay his." 
1Chronicles27:30 O pralstouno pral i khamele his o Obil, ko Ismaelari. O pralstouno pral i bourike his o Yedia dran o foro Meronot." 
1Chronicles27:31 O pralstouno pral i bakre his o Yasis, ko Hagarari. Kolla halauter his i pralstoune pral o rayeskro koova." 
1Chronicles27:32 O Yonatan, o Davideskro kako, yob his i gosevo oun siklo morsh, kay djinas, hoy te krell. O Yehiel, koleskro dad o Hakmoni his, his pash o baro rayeskre čavende." 
1Chronicles27:33 O Ahitofel his ninna yek, kay penas o baro rayeske, hoy vals mishto te krell. O Houshay i menshendar Arki, his o baro rayeskro maal." 
1Chronicles27:34 Har o Ahitofel meras, his douy morsha koy, kay penan o baro rayeske, hoy mishto vals te krell lo: Kolla his o Yoyada, koleskro dad o Benaya his, oun o Abyatar. O Yoab his o pralstouno pral i lourdende." 
1Chronicles28:1 O David moukas i tsele pralstunen khetne gole te dell an o foro Yerusalem: Kolla his: i pralstoune pral i deesh-te-douy bare familyende, i pralstoune pral i lourdende, kay his khetne lino, te venn le yek čon an o bersh o baro rayeske koy, i pralstoune pral yek zero lourdende oun kolla pral yek sheel lourdende, kol morsha, kay dan yak ap o bravlepen oun ap i firhende o baro rayestar oun leskre čavendar, i pralstoune pral o baro rayeskro kheer, i zorele kourepangre, oun i tsele an-dikle morsha." 
1Chronicles28:2 Oun o baro ray David stas pre oun penas: “Mire phrala, morshale mire menshendar, shounenn, hoy penau t'menge! An miro dji his, te krap i kheer, kay vell o morhton o deesh labentsa o baro Deblestar dren čiddo, oun kay nay ačell o morhton. Kova hi har i tikno banko tel i pire maro Deblestar. Oun me lom boud koova khetne kava khereske, hoy kamom pre te čivell." 
1Chronicles28:3 Koy moukas o Devel mange te penell: Tou hal i kourepaskro oun maral menshen. Doleske hal gar tou, kay krell mange i kheer." 
1Chronicles28:4 Kanna hi yaake, te rodas man o baro Devel vin dran miro dadeskro tselo kheer. Yob, o Israeleskro Devel kamas, te vap me o ray pral Israel hako tsireske. Yob rodas o Youda vin, te vell lo o pralstouno pral peskre phralende. Oun dran o kheer Youda rodas lo miro dadeskro kheer vin. Oun miro dadeskre čavendar hom me, ap koleste yob lačes dikas, te krell lo man ray pral o tselo Israel." 
1Chronicles28:5 Oun o baro Devel das man boud čave. Mank lende rodas yob miro čaves, o Salomo vin. Koleste das o baro Devel peskro čačo vast, te vell yob baro ray pral Israel." 
1Chronicles28:6 Oun ap mande penas lo: Tiro čavo, o Salomo, krell mange i kheer oun platse koy glan. Les rodom mange vin, te vell yob miro čavo, oun me vau leskro dad." 
1Chronicles28:7 Te djivell lo pal mire laba oun miro čačepen, yaake har lo kanna krell, krau me, te vell hako tsiro yek leskre čavendar, kay pal leste venna, o baro ray." 
1Chronicles28:8 Kanna penau t'menge glan i yaka i tsele Israelendar – yon hi o baro Debleskro kheer – oun glan i kanda maro Deblestar: Rikrenn t'men ap i tsele laba t'maro baro Deblestar, oun djivenn koy pal! Palle nay ačenn t'mer an kava lačo them, oun nay denn les doureder ap t'mare čavende, kay pal t'mende venna, hake tsirenge." 
1Chronicles28:9 Oun tou, miro čavo Salomo, pats ap o Debleste tiro dadestar, te vell yob tiro Devel. Kre tiro tselo djiyeha, hoy lo touke penell!
