Oun de len an o vast ko pralstunestar, o Hegay, kay dell yak ap i djouvyende. Oun yob moukell lauter ap lende te krell, hoy i djouvyat shoukar krell." 
Esther2:4 Palle le koy terni čay, hoy an tire yaka i shoukeder hi, te vell li rani, har i Vasti glan late rani his.” Oun kol laba his mishto an i yaka o baro rayestar. Oun yob kras kova yaake." 
Esther2:5 Oun an o zorelo kheer an Susa djivas i biboldo. Kova kharas Mordekay. Leskro dad his o Yayr, oun leskro papo his o Shimi. Koleskro dad his o Kish. Kova his i Benyaminari." 
Esther2:6 Leskri familya his mank kol menshende, kay pandlo van, har lengro baro ray, ko baro ray pral o them Youda, o Yekonya, pandlo vas. Oun o baro ray pral o them Babilonia, o Neboukadnezar, moukas len an peskro them te anell." 
Esther2:7 Oun pash o Mordekay djivas i terni čay, i Hadassa, kay ninna Ester kharedo vas. Yoy his leskro kakeskri čay, oun lat his bouder kek dad oun kek day. Oun yoy his i shoukar oun rayli čay. Oun har lakro dad oun lakri day meras, las o Mordekay lat pash peste oun vas lake har lakro dad." 
Esther2:8 Har kanna kol laba o baro rayestar trouyel djan, van boud ča anlo an o zorelo kheer an o foro Susa. Oun ninna i Ester his mank lende oun vas an o djouvyengro kheer anlo, oun an o vast ko morshestar Hegay dino, kay dell yak ap o djouvyengro kheer." 
Esther2:9 Oun yoy his shoukar an koleskre yaka, oun las yaake leskro lačepen. Oun yob dikas koy pre, te lell li sik kouč makepaskro djet oun sasto rhapen, hoy i djouvyat shoukar krell. Oun yob das lat efta vi-rodede djouvyen, te venn le lake koy. Oun anas lat oun lakre boudepaskretse an i feteder iseme an o djouvyengro kheer." 
Esther2:10 Glan kova penas o Mordekay ap i Ester, te penell li gar, dran havo them oun have menshendar yoy hi. Yaake penas i Ester či kolestar." 
Esther2:11 Oun o Mordekay djas hako dives glan ko djouvyengro kheer pre te tele, te nay hatsell lo vin, har i Esterake djal, oun hoy yon lah krenn." 
Esther2:12 Yek bersh rah vas haki čay shoukar kerdo ko diveske, kay djal li pash o baro rayeste dren: shob čonna vas li dren maklo o djeteha, kay myrrhe dren hi, oun pale shob čonna o djeteha, kay Balsam dren hi oun vavar kouč soungepaskro koveha." 
Esther2:13 Oun palle djas yek čay pal i vavar pash o baro rayeste dren. Oun lauter, hoy kamas li peha te lell, hounte vas lat dino. Oun yoy vas dran o djouvyengro kheer an o baro rayeskro kheer anlo." 
Esther2:14 Ap i rat djas li dren oun taysarlake djas li palle an i vavar djouvyengro kheer, tel i vasta ko pralstunestar, kay kharas Shaashgas. Kova das ap kol djouvyende yak, kay o baro rayeskre vavar djouvya his. Oun kek kol djouvyendar vas i douyto kopo pash o baro rayeste, kokres kolla, kay his shoukar an leskre yaka, oun kolen yob moukas pash pengro lab te kharell." 
Esther2:15 Ko tsiro vas, te djal i Ester pash o baro rayeste. Lakro dad his o Abihayil oun lakro kako o Mordekay, kay lat pash peste las, har vell li leskri čay. Oun yoy kamas či boudeder peha te lell, har o Hegay, ko pralstouno pral i djouvyende, lake penas. Oun an i yaka lauterendar, kay dikan lat, his li shoukar." 
Esther2:16 Oun yaake vas i Ester pash o baro rayeste Ahasveros an leskro rayeskro kheer anlo. Oun kova his an o deshto čon, har yob an o eftato bersh o baro ray his. Kava čon kharas Tebet." 
Esther2:17 Oun o baro ray kamas lat boudeder har i tsele vavar djouvyen. An leskre yaka his li shoukeder oun feteder har haki vavar terni čay. Oun yob čivas ko shereskro sonakay ap lakro shero, hoy i rani hidjrell. Oun kras latar i nevi rani, yaake har i Vasti glan late his." 
Esther2:18 Oun o baro ray kras i baro rhapen i tsele rayenge oun pralstunenge, te vell i Ester hadedo. Oun i tsele themenge moukas lo love palla, hoy yon leste hounte dans. Oun moukas djob čičeske vin te dell, yaake har bare raya krenna." 
Esther2:19 His an ko tsiro, har i douyto kopo terne ča khetne anlo van o baro rayeske. Koy his o Mordekay beshdo an o baro voudar glan o baro rayeskro kheer." 
Esther2:20 I Ester shounas ap o Mordekay yaake har an ko tsiro, har yoy gomme pash leste his. Oun yaake har lo lake penas, penas li gar dran havo them oun have menshendar yoy hi." 
Esther2:21 An kol divessa har o Mordekay an ko baro voudar glan o baro rayeskro kheer beshdo his, van douy boudepangre an i bari rholi. Kolla dan yak ap i voudya oun kharan Bigtan oun Teresh. Oun yon lan penge glan, te denn le o baro rayes Ahasveros moulo." 
Esther2:22 Oun ko koova shounas o Mordekay oun penas les ap i rani Ester, oun penas lake ninna, te penell li les o baro rayeske doureder. Oun i Ester kras kova." 
Esther2:23 Oun har dikan le palla, vas vin, te his kova čačo. Oun kol douy van ap o kasht bladedo. Oun o baro ray moukas kava koova dren te činell an o bershengro liil o themestar." 
Esther3:1 Pal i tsiro hadas o baro ray Ahasveros i morshes pral i tsele pralstunende, kay pash leste hi. Ko morsh kharas Haman. Leskro dad his o Hammedata i menshendar Agag." 
Esther3:2 Oun o baro ray penas, te djan i tsele pralstoune, kay an o baro voudar glan leskro kheer hi, ap i phoub glan o Haman oun parkrenn les. Oun yaake kran le. Kokres o Mordekay kamas gar, oun djas gar glan leste tele ap i phoub." 
Esther3:3 Kote poučan lestar i vavar pralstoune, kay an o voudar glan o baro rayeskro kheer his: “Hoske kreh tou kova gar, hoy o baro ray penas?”" 
Esther3:4 Oun yaake poučan le les hako dives. Oun yob penas lenge: “Me hom i biboldo oun nay vitsrau man gar tele glan o Haman.” Oun har yob gar ap lende shounas, djan le koy oun penan kova o Hamaneske. Yon kaman te dikell, hoy o Haman penell, te djinals lo, hoy o Mordekay kras." 
Esther3:5 Oun har o Haman dikas, te vitsrell o Mordekay pes gar glan leste tele, tapras les i bari rholi." 
Esther3:6 An leskre yaka his kova gar doha, te taprell lo peske o Mordekay kokres. Yob kamas ninna leskre menshen te marell. Har shounas lo, kay o Mordekay i biboldo hi, rodas lo, har nay marell lo i tsele bibolden, kay djivenn an kol themma, kay o Ahasveros o baro ray hi." 
Esther3:7 Oun an o ersto čon, kova hi o čon Nisan, an o deesh-te-douyto bersh ko baro rayestar Ahasveros, moukas o Haman peske tikne barra te vitsrell, hoy kharenna Pourim, te hatsell lo vin, havo dives an havo čon ko feteder hi, te krell lo, hoy lo peske glan las. Oun kol tikne barra Pourim peran ap o deesh-te-triinto dives oun ap o deesh-te-douyto čon. Kova hi o čon Adar." 
Esther3:8 Koy pal penas o Haman ap o baro rayeste Ahasveros: “Kate denna menshe, kay djivenn penge kokres mank i tsele vavar menshende kate te kote an tire tsele themma. Oun len hi i vavar čačepen har i tsele vavar menshen. Oun ap kova, hoy tou, baro ray, peneh, te vell kerdo, shounenn le gar. Kova hi gar mishto touke, te moukess len yaake doureder te krell." 
Esther3:9 Miro ray, te kameh, mouk i liil te činell, kay dren tardo hi, te venn le maredo. Oun me dau deesh-zerya kotar roup an i vasta i pralstunendar pral o rayeskro bravlepen.”" 
Esther3:10 O baro ray las peskri goustri o goushto tele. Oun das koy goustri an o Hamaneskro vast, kay kamas i bibolden te marell. Koleskro dad his o Hammedata kol menshendar Agag." 
Esther3:11 Oun o baro ray penas ap o Haman: “O roup nay rikreh, ninna venn touke kol menshe dino, te nay kress lentsa hoy tou kameh.”" 
Esther3:12 Ap o 13. (deesh-te-triinto) dives an o ersto čon van kol morsha kharedo, kay o baro rayeskre lila činenn. Oun kolla činan, hoy o Haman lenge penas, an lila ap i pralstunende ko themestar, ap i themeskre rayende oun i pralstunende pral hako them. Hako liil his yaake činlo, har an ko them činlo vas, oun an ko rakepen, har kote rakedo vas. An o lab o baro rayestar Ahasveros van kol lila činlo. Oun leskri goustyah vas leskro sikepen tel hako liil čiddo." 
Esther3:13 Koy dren his činlo: I tsele bibolde hounte venn maredo, terne oun phoure, ninna i čave oun djouvya, te ačell kek lendar bouder djido. Oun kova te vell ap yek dives, ap o deesh-te-triinto dives an o deesh-te-douyto čon. Kova hi o čon Adar. Oun i biboldengro koova nay lell hakeno peske. Oun naashepangre van kharedo, oun lenge vas penlo, te anenn le kol lila an i tsele themma, kay o Ahasveros baro ray hi." 
Esther3:14 Oun o baro ray penas ninna, te hounte venn kal činle laba prindjedo kerdo an hako them, yaake te rikrenn pen i menshe kote ap lende, oun djinenn, hoy te krenn le, te vell ko dives." 
Esther3:15 Oun kol naashepangre djan sik vin, yaake har o baro ray penas. Oun an o zorelo kheer an o foro Susa vas ko liil kote ap i kasht dino, kay nay dikell les hakeno. Oun o baro ray oun o Haman beshan pen tele, te rhan oun piyenn le. O tselo fores Susa tapras i daar." 
Esther4:1 Oun har o Mordekay shounas, hoy djas, kras lo peskre koola paash, hoy ap leste his. Oun rivas peske i gono an, oun čivas yagakri čik ap peste. Oun djas dren mashkral o foro oun rovas oun das gole." 
Esther4:2 Oun yaake vas lo bis glan o baro voudar o baro rayeskro kherestar. Oun kote ačas lo. Kek, kay his rido an gone, nay djas dren." 
Esther4:3 Oun an hako them, kay o liil o baro rayestar vas, his baro ropen mank i bibolde. Oun boud kaman bouder či te rhal, rovan oun rivan pen an gone oun čivan yagakri čik ap pende." 
Esther4:4 Oun i djouvya, kay i Esterake boudrenn oun kol pralstoune, kay lake koy hi, van pash late oun penan lake kava koova. Oun kote tapras i rani bari daar. Oun yoy bičras ripya pash o Mordekay, te rivell lo len an, oun te čivell lo o gono pestar tele. Oun yob kamas gar." 
Esther4:5 Kote moukas i Ester i morshes te kharell. Kova kharas Hatak oun his i pralstouno, koles o baro ray late das, te vell lo lake koy. Oun koles bičras li pash o Mordekay te poučell lo lestar, hoske yob yaake krell." 
Esther4:6 Oun o Hatak djas pash o Mordekay vin ap i platsa, hoy his glan o voudar o baro rayeskro kherestar." 
Esther4:7 Oun o Mordekay penas leske lauter, hoy leske djas, oun ninna har boud roup o Haman kamas te čivell lo pash o baro rayeskro bravlepen pashel, te venn i tsele bibolde maredo." 
Esther4:8 Oun o Mordekay das les i liil peha, kay kol laba tele činlo his, hoy an o foro Susa ap i kasht dino his, kay tardo hi, te venn i bibolde maredo. Kava liles te sikrell lo i Esterake, oun te penell lo lake lauter, oun mangell latar, te djal li pash o baro rayeste dren, oun mangell les i ropah, te krell lo peskro dji pre lakre menshenge." 
Esther4:9 Oun o Hatak djas oun penas i Esterake, hoy o Mordekay penas." 
Esther4:10 Kote bičras i Ester les pale pash o Mordekay, te penell lo leske:" 
Esther4:11 “I tsele pralstoune, kay o baro rayeske boudrenn, ninna i menshe an hako them, koles o baro ray hi, kolla prindjrenn ko činlo lab, te vell hako morsh oun haki djouvel maredo, kay djal dren pash o baro rayeste oun vell ap i platsa an leskro kheer, oun hi lestar gar kharedo. Kokres te lell o baro ray peskro sonakaskro raan oun sikrell ap leste, ačell lo djido. Me vom triyanda divessa bouder gar pash o baro rayeste dren kharedo.”" 
Esther4:12 Har shounas o Mordekay, hoy moukas i Ester leske te penell," 
Esther4:13 moukas lo lake pale te penell: “Ma pats, te nay veh tou tiro djipah krik, doleske, kay djiveh an o baro rayeskro kheer! Ma pats, te ačess tou kokres djido i tsele biboldendar!" 
Esther4:14 Tou te peneh či kanna an kava tsiro, palle vell i vavar, kay men bibolden vin lell. Oun tou oun tiro dadeskro kheer venn maredo. Oun koon djinell, te val tou gar rani savo tsireske har kava kanna hi?”" 
Esther4:15 Kote moukas i Ester ap o Mordekay te penell: 
Esther4:16 “Dja koy oun de i tsele bibolden an o foro Susa khetne gole! Rhan oun piyenn triin divessa či, gar ap o dives, vitar gar an i rati. Krenn kova mange, te dikell o Devel lačes ap mande! Oun me oun kol djouvya, kay mange boudrenn, mer kamah kova ninna yaake te krell. Oun pal kova kamau pash o baro rayeste dren te djal, ninna te hi khatar o činlo lab. Oun te denn le man moulo, palle denn le man moulo.”" 
Esther4:17 Oun o Mordekay djas peske oun kras lauter yaake har i Ester leske penas. 
Esther5:1 Oun ap o triinto dives rivas i Ester rayengre ripya an oun djas ap koy platsa, hoy hi dren an o baro rayeskro kheer, vergel koy bari isema, kay o baro ray hi. Oun yob his beshdo ap peskri rayli beshepaskri vergel o voudar." 
Esther5:2 Oun har dikas o baro ray i rani Ester tardo ap koy platsa, dikas lo lačes ap late, oun sikras o sonakaskro raneha, hoy an leskro vast hi, ap late. Kote vas i Ester pash leste oun tapras o glanstouno kotar ko ranestar peskre goushtentsa an." 
Esther5:3 Oun o baro ray poučas: “Hoy hi touke, rani Ester? Oun hoy kameh tou? Oun te kameh o paash lauterestar, hoy man hi, palle vell kova tout dino.”" 
Esther5:4 Koy penas i Ester: “Miro ray, te hi mishto an tire yaka, palle ab tou oun o Haman kava dives pash ko rhapen, hoy me t'menge krau.”" 
Esther5:5 Oun o baro ray penas: “Djan sik oun anenn o Hamanes, te kras kova, hoy i Ester penas!” Oun o baro ray oun o Haman van pash ko rhapen, hoy i Ester lenge kras." 
Esther5:6 Oun har le i mool piyan, poučas o baro ray: “Hoy hi kova, hoy tou mandar mangeh? Me dau les toute. Hoy kameh tou? Oun te kameh o paash lauterestar hoy man hi, kova vell tout dino!”" 
Esther5:7 Koy penas i Ester: “Kova, hoy me kamau oun toutar mangau, hi kava:" 
Esther5:8 Te hal mange lačes, oun te hi mishto an tire yaka, miro ray, mange kova te dell, hoy me toutar mangau, palle ab tou oun o Haman pash o rhapen, hoy me t'menge taysar krau. Oun taysar penau touke, hoy kamau toutar.”" 
Esther5:9 Har o Haman ko dives dran o kheer djas, his lo barhtelo oun peskro dji sanas. Koy dikas lo o Mordekayes beshdo an o baro voudar glan o baro rayeskro kheer. Oun kova stas gar pre, oun vitsras pes gar glan leste tele. Koy tapras o Hamanes i bari rholi pral o Mordekay." 
Esther5:10 Yob rikras lat pale oun djas doureder an peskro kheer. Kote moukas lo peskre malen oun peskri romyat Seresh te vell. 
Esther5:11 Glan lende phourdas pes o Haman pre oun penas lenge, har baro leskro bravlepen hi, oun kitse morsh čave les hi, oun har hadas les o baro ray oun čivas les pral i tsele pralstunende oun pral i tsele rayeskre boudepangre." 
Esther5:12 Oun o Haman penas: “Oun pash kova lauter kamas i rani Ester, te vell kek vavar pash o rhapen pashel, hoy yoy o baro rayeske kras, har man kokres. Oun ninna taysar kamell li, te vap me o baro rayeha pash late te rhal." 
Esther5:13 Kova lauter hi mange či moldo, yaake rah me ko biboldes Mordekay dikau an o baro voudar glan o baro rayeskro kheer.”" 
Esther5:14 Kote penas leskri romni Seresh oun leskre tsele mala ap leste: “Mouk i kasht pre te čivell, hoy hi i paash-sheel (50) moussya bares! Oun taysarlakro pen ap o baro rayeste, te moukell lo o Mordekayes ap ko kasht pre te bladell. Oun palle dja leha barhteles pash o rhapen.” Oun kol laba his o Hamaneske lačes, oun yob moukas savo kasht pre te čivell." 
Esther6:1 An koya rat nay sovas o baro ray gar, oun moukas peske glan te draverell dran o bershengro liil o themestar." 
Esther6:2 Oun koy hatsas pes dren činlo, har kaman kol douy morsha, o Bigtan oun o Teresh, o baro rayes moulo te dell. Kol douy his pralstoune, kay dan yak glan o voudar o baro rayeskro kherestar. Ninna his kote činlo, kay o Mordekay kova vin hatsas oun an-sikras." 
Esther6:3 Kote poučas o baro ray: “Hoy las o Mordekay koleske? Har vas lo bares kerdo?” Oun kol boudepangre, kay leske koy hi, penan: “Leske vas či kerdo.”" 
Esther6:4 Kote poučas o baro ray: “Koon hi vin ap i glanstouni platsa?” Oun kote his o Haman ap ko tsiro ap i glanstouni platsa glan o baro rayeskro kheer, te penell lo o baro rayeske, te moukell yob o Mordekayes pre te bladell ap ko kasht, hoy lo koleske pre-čivas." 
Esther6:5 Oun kol boudepangre o baro rayestar penan ap leste: “O Haman hi ap i platsa tardo.” Oun o baro ray penas: “Yob vell dren!” 
Esther6:6 Oun o Haman vas dren. Oun o baro ray poučas les: “Hoy te krap ko morsheske, koles me, o baro ray, kamau o djiyestar te hadell?” Kote penas o Haman an peskro dji: “Kones kamell o baro ray boudeder te hadell har man?”" 
Esther6:7 Oun o Haman penas ap o baro rayeste: “Ko morsheske, koles kamell o baro ray o djiyestar te hadell," 
Esther6:8 mou venn rayeskre koola anlo, ninna i rayeskro gray. Oun ap leskro shero vell i rayeskri stadi čiddo." 
Esther6:9 Oun yek o pralstunendar o baro rayestar rivell ko morshes an, oun anell les ap o gray pral i foreskri platsa, oun moukell glan leste vin te kharell: Yaake krell o baro ray ko morsheha, koles yob kamell o djiyestar te hadell. ”" 
Esther6:10 Kote penas o baro ray ap o Haman: “Le sik kol koola oun o gray, yaake har tou penal. Oun kre kova yaake ko biboldeha, o Mordekay. Kova hi beshdo an o voudar glan o baro rayeskro kheer. Oun mouk či kolestar lauterestar krik, hoy tou penal!”" 
Esther6:11 Kote las o Haman kol koola oun ko gray oun djas pash o Mordekay oun rivas leske kol koola an, oun anas les pral ko foreskri platsa, oun kharas glan leste vin: Yaake krell o baro ray ko morsheha, koles yob kamell o djiyestar te hadell." 
Esther6:12 Palle djas o Mordekay pale an o voudar pale glan o baro rayeskro kheer. Oun o Haman ladjas pes oun khatras peskro shero, oun djas sik khere." 
Esther6:13 Oun yob penas peskri romyake, i Seresh, oun peskre tsele malenge, lauter hoy leske djas. Kote penan leskre mala oun leskri romni, i Seresh, ap leste: “Te peral tou kanna glan o Mordekay, koon i biboldendar hi, palle nay kreh tou bouder či khatar leste. Na-a, tou djah tele oun nashreh lauter.”" 
Esther6:14 Oun har yon gomme leha rakran, van o baro rayeskre boudepangre oun anan les sik pash o rhapen, hoy i Ester lenge kras." 
Esther7:1 Oun o baro ray oun o Haman van pash o rhapen, hoy i rani Ester kras." 
Esther7:2 Oun o baro ray poučas ninna ap kava douyto dives, har yon i mool piyan: “Hoy hi kova, hoy tou mandar mangeh, rani Ester? Me dau les toute. Hoy kameh tou? Oun te kameh o paash lauterestar hoy man hi, kova vell tout dino!”" 
Esther7:3 Kote penas i rani Ester: “Miro baro ray, te hal mange lačes, oun te hi mishto an tire yaka, mange kova te dell, hoy me toutar mangau, palle, miro baro ray, mouk man te djivell, man oun mire menshen. Kova hi, hoy me kamau." 
Esther7:4 Mer vam bikedo, me oun mire menshe, te vas mer maredo, yaake te ačell kek mendar djido. Te vams mer kokres bikedo, morsha oun djouvya, te vas ginle boudepangre, kroms miro mouy gar pre. Kova vals gar phares doha, te vap koleha pash o baro rayeste.”" 
Esther7:5 Kote poučas o baro ray Ahasveros i ranyatar Ester: “Koon hi kova? Oun kay hi lo, koles an o shero vas, te krell lo sau koova?”" 
Esther7:6 Oun i Ester penas: “Kova, kay lell men palla oun kamell men te marell, kava hi ko čilačo morsh Haman!” Kote tapras o Haman i daar glan o baro rayeste oun i ranyate." 
Esther7:7 Oun o baro ray stas rhoyedo pre kotar, kay le mool khetne piyan. Oun djas vin an i baar pash peskro kheer. Oun o Haman ačas pash i ranyate Ester, te mangell lo latar peskro djipen. Yob dikas koy bibarht, hoy pral leste vell, hoy o baro ray peske glan las." 
Esther7:8 Har vas o baro ray dran i baar pale pale an koy isema, kay yon khetne mool piyan, dikas lo o Haman, kay glan i divana čiddo his, kay i rani hi. Koy das lo gole: “Kamell lo kanna pash mande an miro kheer i ranyake čomone te krell?” Kol laba his gomme gar dran o baro rayeskro mouy tseles vin, koy čakran i boudepangre o Hamaneskro shero." 
Esther7:9 Oun yek o pralstunendar, o Harbona, penas: “Ake, kote pash o Hamaneskro kheer hi o kasht tardo, hoy hi i paash-sheel moussya baro, koles o Haman moukas pre te čivell o Mordekayeske. Kava hi ko morsh, kay o baro rayeske penas, kay morshen glan his, te marenn le les.” Kote penas o baro ray: “Bladenn les koy pre!”" 
Esther7:10 Yaake bladan le o Hamanes ap ko kasht pre, koles yob o Mordekayeske moukas pre te čivell. Oun i rholi o baro rayestar djas pale." 
Esther8:1 Ap ko dives das o baro ray, o Ahasveros, i ranyate Ester ko kheer, hoy his o Hamanes, kay i bibolden kamas te marell. Oun i Ester penas o baro rayeske, kay o Mordekay lakro kako hi. Oun o baro ray moukas les glan peste te vell." 
Esther8:2 Oun las peskri goustri, hoy yob o Hamanestar krik las, oun das lat o Mordekay. Oun i Ester čivas o Mordekayes pral o Hamaneskro tselo kheer." 
Esther8:3 Oun i Ester rakras i vavar kopo o baro rayeha, oun vitsras pes glan leskre herya tele, oun rovas ap leste oun mangas lestar, te vell ko čilačepen gar pral i biboldende, hoy kamas o Haman i menshendar Agag, pral lende te anell." 
Esther8:4 Oun o baro ray las peskro sonakaskro raan oun sikras leha ap i Ester. Kote stas i Ester pre oun vas glan leste," 
Esther8:5 oun penas: “Miro baro ray, te hi mishto oun čačo glan tire yaka, oun te hal mange lačes oun dikeh kamles ap mande, palle le kol lila pale, hoy činas o Haman, koleskro dad o Hammedata hi dran o kheer Agag, an kolende činlo hi, te venn i bibolde maredo an hako them, kay tou baro ray hal." 
Esther8:6 Har nay dikap me savi bari bibarht, hoy mire menshenge vell? Oun har nay vap me kote pashel tardo, te denn le mire tsele menshen moulo, oun krau či?”" 
Esther8:7 Kote penas o baro ray Ahasveros ap i rani Ester oun ap o Mordekay, ko biboldo: “Djinenn, o Hamaneskro kheer dom i Esterate, te vell lo lakro. Oun les moukom ap ko kasht pre te bladell doleske, kay kamas lo i bibolden te marell." 
Esther8:8 Kanna činenn t'mer i vavar liil, hoy te vell i biboldenge, yaake har mishto hi an t'mare yaka! Činenn ko liil an miro lab oun čivenn miri goustyah miro sikepen koy pre! I liil, hoy an o lab o baro rayestar činlo vas oun ap koleste leskro sikepen hi, nay vell gar pale lino.”" 
Esther8:9 Yaake van kol morshen kharedo, kay o baro rayeskre lila činenn. Kova his an o triinto čon, – kova hi o čon Sivan – ap o biish-te-triinto dives. Oun i lila van yaake činlo, har o Mordekay penas: ap i biboldende, oun ap i pralstunende ko themestar, ap i themeskre rayende oun i pralstunende pral i tsele themma mank o pani Indus oun o pani Nil. Kolla his 127 (yek-sheel-te-biish-te-efta) themma. Oun činlo vas yaake har an hako them činlo vas, oun an o rakepen kol menshendar, kay kote djivan, oun ninna ap i bibolde yaake har yon činenn oun rakrenn." 
Esther8:10 Oun i lila van činlo an o baro rayeskro lab, oun leskro sikepen vas pre-čiddo. Oun klissepangre ap sik graya anan len kote, kay le bičedo van." 
Esther8:11 Oun an kol lila his činlo: O baro rayeske hi mishto, te venn i bibolde khetne an hako foro, kay djivenn le, te kourenn le pengro djipaske, oun marenn kolen, kay ap lende djan, ninna lengre čaven oun djouvyen, yaake te ačell lendar kek djido. Oun lauter, hoy kolenge his, nay lenn le penge, te vell lengro." 
Esther8:12 Oun kova nay krenn le an i tsele themma, kay o Ahasveros baro ray hi, ap o deesh-te-triinto dives an o deesh-te-douyto čon, – kova hi o čon Adar." 
Esther8:13 Oun an kol tsele themma hounte van kal činle laba prindjedo kerdo, yaake te djinan i menshe kote, te krenn pen i bibolde zoreles ko diveske, te djan le ap kolende, kay kamenn len te marell." 
Esther8:14 Oun kol bičepangre i lilentsa klissan sik vin ap o rayeskre graya, yaake har o baro ray penas. Oun ko činlo lab vas ninna an o baro rayeskro kheer an o foro Susa ap i kasht dino, te vell lo prindjedo." 
Esther8:15 Oun o Mordekay djas vin o baro rayestar, rido an rayeskre koola. Kolla his blaueto oun parno. Oun ap leskro shero his shereskro sonakay. Leskri baya his dran layntikro than oun lolo bakrengro bal. Oun i menshe an o foro Susa stan oun dan gole i barhtyatar." 
Esther8:16 I biboldenge his o djipen pale shoukar. Barht oun sapen vas ap lende. Oun yon van hadedo oun an-diklo. 
Esther8:17 Oun an hako them oun an hako foro, kay o baro rayeskro lab vas, his barht oun sapen pash i biboldende. Oun yon kran baro rhapen oun van barhteles khetne. Oun boud menshe i vavar menshendar lan daar i biboldendar oun van bibolde." 
Esther9:1 Oun palle vas o 13. (deesh-te-triinto) dives an o 12. (deesh-te-douyto) čon. Kova hi o čon Adar. Ap ko dives hounte vals kerdo pal o baro rayeskro činlo lab. Oun i menshe, kay i bibolden gar kaman, patsan, te nay marans le i bibolden ap ko dives. Kanna vas kova vavarčandes: I bibolde van zorleder har i vavar menshe," 
Esther9:2 oun van khetne an pengre forya an i tsele themma, kay o Ahasveros baro ray hi, te djan le ap kolende pre, kay lengri bibarht kaman. Oun kek nay ačas tardo glan lende. Oun i bari daar glan lende peras ap i menshende an i tsele themma." 
Esther9:3 I daryatar glan o Mordekay čivan pen i pralstoune an kol themma ap i rig i biboldendar, ninna i raya, i themeskre raya oun i rakepangre o baro rayestar." 
Esther9:4 Yon shounan, kay vas o Mordekay i baro morsh an o kheer o baro rayestar. An i tsele themma vas prindjedo, har lo baro oun bareder vas." 
Esther9:5 Yaake maran i bibolde lauteren o rhareha, kay ap lende djan, oun moukan kekes djido, oun kran yaake lentsa, har yon kaman." 
Esther9:6 Oun an o zorelo kheer o baro rayestar an o foro Susa dan le panč-sheel (500) morshen moulo. 
Esther9:7 Oun ninna maran le o Hamaneskre deesh čaven: o Parshandata, o Dalfon, o Aspata, o Porata, o Adalya, o Aridata, o Parmashta, o Arisay, o Ariday oun o Vayesata. O Haman his kova, kay kamas i bibolden te marell. Leskro dad his o Hammedata. Ko koova, hoy lenge his, čoran le penge gar." 
Esther9:8  
Esther9:9  
Esther9:10  
Esther9:11 Ap ko dives vas o baro rayeske penlo, kitse moule das an o rayeskro zorelo kheer an o foro Susa." 
Esther9:12 Oun o baro ray penas ap i rani Ester: “Kokres an miro zorelo kheer an Susa dan i bibolde panč-sheel morshen moulo. Ninna i deesh čaven o Hamanestar maran le. Poučau man, hoy kran le an mire vavar themma? Hoy mangeh tou boudeder, te vell tout dino? Oun hoy kameh tou? Kova vell kerdo.”" 
Esther9:13 I Ester penas: “Te hi miro rayeske mishto, palle mouk i bibolden taysar an o foro Susa gomme yek kopo pal ko lab te krell, hoy kava diveske činlo his. Oun kol deesh čave o Hamanestar venn ap deesh bare kashta pre bladedo.”" 
Esther9:14 Oun o baro ray penas, te vell kova yaake kerdo. Oun ko lab vas činlo oun prindjedo kerdo an o foro Susa. Oun kol deesh moule čave o Hamanestar van ap kashta pre pandlo." 
Esther9:15 Oun i bibolde an o foro Susa van ap o 14. (deesh-te-starto) dives an o čon Adar gomme yek kopo khetne, oun dan an Susa 300 (triin-sheel) morshen moulo. Lengro koova čoran le penge gar." 
Esther9:16 Oun ninna i tsele vavar bibolde, kay an i themma o baro rayestar djivenn, van penge khetne, oun kouran pen pengro djipaske, te perenn le bouder gar an i čilače vasta. Oun yon dan 75.000 (efta-deesh-te-panč-zerya) morshen moulo. Lengro koova čoran le gar penge." 
Esther9:17 Oun kova his ap o 13. (deesh-te-triinto) dives an o čon Adar. Oun ap o 14. (deesh-te-starto) dives kran yon či. Oun kran lestar i dives, kay venn le khetne, rhan oun piyenn oun hi barhtelo." 
Esther9:18 Kol bibolde, kay an o foro Susa djivan, kolla djan an o marepen ap o 13. (deesh-te-triinto) oun ap o 14. (deesh-te-starto) dives an ko čon. Oun ap o 15. (deesh-te-pančto) dives kran le či. Oun kran lestar i dives, kay krenn le či oun venn khetne, rhan oun piyenn oun hi barhtelo." 
Esther9:19 Doleske hi o 14. (deesh-te-starto) dives an o čon Adar i baro dives kol biboldenge, kay djivenn vin ap o them oun an i gaba. Oun yon rhan oun piyenn oun denn yek o vavareste lačo rhapen." 
Esther9:20 Oun o Mordekay činas kava lauter an i liil, oun bičras lila ap i tsele biboldende, kay dour hi oun kay gar dour hi, an hako them o baro rayestar Ahasveros." 
Esther9:21 An kol lila his činlo, te vell o 14. oun o 15. dives an o čon Adar i baro dives. Koles hounte rikrenn le hako bersh," 
Esther9:22 te bistrenn le gar, kay an kol divessa i bibolde vin lino van dran i čilače vasta, oun kay kava o čon hi, kay vas barht dran lengre douka, oun sapen dran lengro ropen. Doleske hounte rikrenn le kol divessa bares, oun venn khetne, rhan oun piyenn oun hi barhtelo. Oun yek te dell o vavareste lačo rhapen. Oun ninna i čorvele hounte venn gar bistedo oun hounte lenn čomone." 
Esther9:23 Oun i bibolde kran yaake har o Mordekay lenge an o liil činas. An hako bersh rikran le kal bare divessa yaake har kran le o ersto kopo. 
Esther9:24 An ko liil, hoy o Mordekay lenge bičras, činas lo lenge, hoy o Haman kras, koleskro dad o Hammedata his i menshendar Agag: Yob kamas i bibolden te marell, oun moukas kol tikne barra te vitsrell, hoy kharenna Pourim, te hatsell lo vin, havo dives o feteder ko marepaske hi." 
Esther9:25 An ko liil his ninna tardo, har i Ester pash o baro rayeste djas oun har kova an i liil penas, te vell o Hamaneha ko čilačo koova kerdo, hoy yob kamas i biboldentsa te krell. Oun yaake vas o Haman oun peskre čave ap i bare kashta pre bladedo." 
Esther9:26 Doleske van kol bare divessa Pourim kharedo, yaake har kol tikne barra kharenna, hoy vitsedo van. Oun yaake har o Mordekay lenge an o liil činas, oun doleske, hoy yon kokres dikan oun kran," 
Esther9:27 lan pen i bibolde glan, te rikrenn le kol douy divessa bares, oun moukenn gar tele, te rikrenn le len hako bersh yaake har glan činlo vas. Oun yaake vas kova pash lende kerdo. Oun kova his ninna moldo lengre čavenge, kay pal lende venna, oun kolenge, kay kek bibolde hi oun pash lende rikrenna." 
Esther9:28 Ap hako tsiro hounte rikrenn i bibolde kal divessa Pourim an hako them oun hako foro, te bistrenn lengre čavengre čave gar, hoy an kol divessa djas." 
Esther9:29 Oun i rani Ester, kolakro dad o Abihayil his, činas i douyto liil, khetne lakro kakeha, o biboldeha Mordekay. An kava liil činas li, te hounte vell lauter yaake kerdo har an ko liil, hoy o Mordekay činas pral kol divessa Pourim." 
Esther9:30 Oun lakro liil djas ap i tsele biboldende an kol 127 (yek-sheel-te-biish-te-efta) themma, kay o Ahasveros o baro ray his. An ko liil his tardo: “Barht oun čačepen t'menge!" 
Esther9:31 Mer, o biboldo Mordekay oun i rani Ester, mangah t'mendar, te rikrenn kol divessa Pourim ap o čačo tsiro yaake dren, har mer kova glan činam. Kal laba hi t'menge oun t'mare čavenge, kay pal t'mende venna.” An kava liil penan le lenge ninna, har te rikrenn le ko ropaskro tsiro dren, kay rovenn le oun rhan či." 
Esther9:32 Oun yaake har i Ester an kava liil činas, van kol o bare divessa Pourim dren čiddo. Oun lakre laba van an i baro liil činlo." 
Esther10:1 Oun o ray Ahasveros čivas ap o them oun ap i panyengre themma i siyaan, hoy i menshe hounte playsrenna." 
Esther10:2 Ko tselo baro raylo koova, hoy lo kras oun leskri zoor pral kol boud themma, kova hi činlo an i familyakro liil kol bare rayendar pral o them Media oun Persia. Kote hi ninna činlo, har o baro ray o Mordekayes hadas oun bares kras," 
Esther10:3 yaake te vas o biboldo Mordekay o douyto pal o baro rayeste Ahasveros. Oun yob his baro pash i biboldende oun lačes an-diklo pash i tsele biboldende. Yob rodas o lačepen lenge oun rakras, hoy leskre menshenge ko feteder his." 
Job1:1 An o them Ous djivas i morsh, kova kharas Hiob. Yob his an o čačepen tardo, oun kek doosh his ap leste. Yob mangas o Debles an, oun rikras pes dour krik o čilačepastar." 
Job1:2 Oun les his efta morsh čave oun triin ča. 
Job1:3 Ninna his les boud firhe: 7.000 (efta-zerya) bakre oun 3.000 (triin-zerya) khamele, oun yek zerya groumya, kolendar hako kopo douy khetne boudran, oun 500 (panč-sheel) djouvelkane bourike. Oun les his boud boud boudepangre. Kek mensho his bravleder har o Hiob an ko them, hoy hi kote čiddo, kay o kham pral djal." 
Job1:4 Oun leskre morsh čave, hakeno lendar, kras i baro rhapen an peskro kheer ap peskro dives. Oun yon moukan pengre triin phenyen te vell, te rhan oun piyenn le khetne." 
Job1:5 Oun har kol divessa trouyel his, kay le rhan oun piyan, palle bičras o Hiob pash lende, te venn le pash leste. Oun yob stas sik taysarlakro pre, oun maras hakeneske lendar i firho, oun rhačras les o Debleske, te vell lengri doosh krik lino. Yob penas peske: Nay djals, te lan mire morsh čave doosh ap pende, oun rakran djoungeles pral o Debleste an pengre djia. Oun yaake kras o Hiob pal hako baro rhapen, hoy leskre morsh čave kran." 
Job1:6 Oun vas i dives, kote van i tsele bolepangre pash o baro Debleste khetne, oun čivan pen tardo glan leste. Ninna o beng his mashkral lende." 
Job1:7 Oun o baro Devel poučas o benges: “Kay veh tou?” Oun o beng penas ap o baro Debleste: “Vau i phoubyatar. Kote djom trouyel.” 
Job1:8 Oun o baro Devel poučas o bengestar: “Dal tou ninna yak ap miro boudepaskro, o Hiob? Kek vavar hi ap i phoub, kay hi yaake har kova. Yob hi an o čačepen tardo, oun kek doosh hi ap leste. Yob mangell man an, oun rikrell pes dour krik o čilačepastar.”" 
Job1:9 Oun o beng penas ap o baro Debleste: “Patseh, te mangell lo tout čičeske an?" 
Job1:10 Tou deh yak ap leskro kheer oun ap lauter, hoy les hi. Tou čival tiri barht ap lauter, hoy yob an-taprell. Oun leskre firhe van boud oun boudeder an o tselo them." 
Job1:11 Hoy hi, te leh tou lestar krik, hoy leskro hi? Čačepah palle praasell lo tout!”" 
Job1:12 Kote penas o baro Devel ap o beng: “Mishto! Halauter, hoy les hi, dau an tiro vast. Les kokres ma tape an!” Pal kova djas o beng krik o baro Deblestar." 
Job1:13 Ap yek dives his o Hiobeskre čave khetne an o kheer kolestar, kay o phoureder lendar hi. Oun yon rhan oun piyan mool khetne." 
Job1:14 Kote vas i bičepaskro pash o Hiob oun penas: “I groumyentsa rissram i phoub trouyel, oun i bourike rhan kote pash lende." 
Job1:15 Kote peran kolla dran o them Saba pral mende, oun randan i firhen oun dan tire boudepangren o rhareha moulo. Oun me nay nashom, me kokres, te nay penap kova touke.”" 
Job1:16 Ko boudepaskro rakras gomme, koy vas i vavar oun penas ap o Hiob: “Yag dran o bolepen peras tele, oun rhačras i bakre oun i bouzya oun tire boudepangre, kay ap lende yak dan. Oun me nay nashom, me kokres, te penap kova touke.”" 
Job1:17 Har ko boudepaskro gomme rakras, vas i vavar oun penas: “I Kaldearya van ap triin rigya oun peran pal tire khamele dren oun lan len penge krik, oun dan tire boudepangren o rhareha moulo. Oun me nay nashom, me kokres, te nay penap kova touke.”" 
Job1:18 Kova rakras gomme, koy vas i vavar oun penas: “Tire morsh čave oun tire ča his pash o rhapen beshdo, oun piyan mool an o kheer pengro phoureder phralestar." 
Job1:19 Koy vas i phourdepen dran o moulo tato them oun das ap ko kheer ap leskre star rigya. Oun ko kheer peras khetne pral kol terne menshende. Oun yon meran. Oun me nay nashom, me kokres, te nay penap kova touke.”" 
Job1:20 Kote stas o Hiob pre, oun zoryah tserdas lo peskre pralstoune koola pestar tele, oun kras len paash, yaake boud doukas leskro dji. Yob činas peskre balla tele, moukas pes ap i phoub te perell oun mangas o Debles an." 
Job1:21 Oun yob penas: “Har boldo vom, his kek koola ap mande. Oun ap ko dives, kay merau, lau kek koola mantsa. O baro Devel das man lauter, hoy man hi. Oun o baro Devel las les pale mandar. Yob vell sharedo!”" 
Job1:22 Ninna te vas kova lauter yaake, anas o Hiob kek doosh ap peste, oun vitsras o Debleske kek čilačepen glan." 
Job2:1 Oun vas o dives, kay van i bolepangre pale khetne pash o baro Debleste oun čivan pen tardo glan leste. Oun o beng his ninna pale mashkral lende." 
Job2:2 Oun o baro Devel penas ap o beng: “Foun kay veh tou?” Oun o beng penas ap leste: “Vau i phoubyatar. Kote djom trouyel.” 
Job2:3 Oun o baro Devel poučas o bengestar: “Dal tou ninna yak ap miro boudepaskro, o Hiob? Kek vavar hi ap i phoub, kay hi yaake har kova. Yob hi an o čačepen tardo, oun kek doosh hi ap leste. Yob mangell man an, oun rikrell pes dour krik o čilačepastar. Ninna kanna anell lo kek doosh ap peste, kay tou mandar kamal, te anap les an i bibarht, ninna te kras lo či.”" 
Job2:4 Oun o beng penas ap o baro Debleste: “Lauter, hoy i menshes hi, dell lo peskro djipaske." 
Job2:5 Hade tiro vast oun tape leskre kokale oun leskro mass an! Palle dikeh, te praasell lo tout glan hake menshende!”" 
Job2:6 Kote penas o baro Devel ap o beng: “Mishto, dau les an tiro vast. Leskro djipen ma tape an!”" 
Job2:7 Kote djas o beng vin o baro Deblestar, oun das o Hiobes i djoungelo nasslepen ap peskro mass, hoy rhandjras oun doukas leske foun o shero bis tele pash i pire." 
Job2:8 Oun o Hiob las i kotar i paash-dino khorestar, te rhandjrell lo pes koleha. Oun yob his beshdo mashkral i yagakri čik." 
Job2:9 Kote penas leskri romni ap leste: “Rikreh tou gomme ap tiro patsepen? Pen tout o Deblestar tele oun mere!” 
Job2:10 O Hiob penas ap late: “Tou rakreh yaake har i dineli čay rakrell. O lačepen lam o Deblestar. Las mer gar ninna o čilačo koova lestar?” Ninna te vas kova lauter yaake, anas o Hiob kek doosh ap peste oun vitsras o Debleske kek čilačepen glan." 
Job2:11 O Hiobes his triin mala. Har shounan yon foun koy bibarht, hoy vas pral o Hiob, van le pash leste khetne, hakeno foun kotar, kay yob djivell: O Elifas dran o foro Teman, o Bildad dran o them Shoua, o Sofar dran o them Naama. Oun yon kran penge vin, te djan le pash leste, te sikrenn le leste, har khaytell lo len, oun te penenn le leske lače laba." 
Job2:12 Har dikan le les foun doural, prindjran le les gar bouder pale. Oun yon rovan phares. Oun zoryah tserdas hakeno lendar peskre koola pestar tele, oun kras len paash. Oun yon vitsran čik pre oun ap pengre sherya." 
Job2:13 Oun yon his kote pash leste ap i phoub beshdo efta divessa oun efta ratsya. Oun kek lendar rakras leha. Yon dikan, leskre douka his baro oun pharo." 
Job3:1 Pal kova kras o Hiob peskro mouy pre, oun praasas ko dives, kay lo boldo vas." 
Job3:2 Oun o Hiob penas: 
Job3:3 Nashedo hounte djal ko dives, kay me boldo vom, oun koy rat, kay miri day mantsa vavarčandes vas!" 
Job3:4 Mou vell ko dives kali rat, – kay kek bolepaskri momeli pre djal, – kay ninna o Devel an o pralstunepen ko dives bistrell!" 
Job3:5 Mou vell ko dives pherdo kalepen oun tamlepen! Kale volke mou ačenn pral leste! Oun o kham mou vell kalo ap ko dives, te vell i menshenge bari daar!" 
Job3:6 Koy rat, kay miri day mantsa vavarčandes vas, mou lell o tamlepen koy rat peske, te vell li gar kharedo mank i tsele divessa an o bersh, vitar gar mank i divessa an o čon!" 
Job3:7 Kek djouvel te vell vavarčandes an koy rat, Kek te dell gole i barhtyatar an koy rat!" 
Job3:8 I dourkepangre mou praasenn ko dives – kolla, kay hayvenn i bibarht pral i dives vin te rakrell, oun kay nay djangrell o Leviatan pre." 
Job3:9 Koy rati te ačell kalo, kek bolepaskri momeli djal pre taysarlakro. Koy rati mou dikell pal o dives – oun kova vell gar. O kham djal gar pre." 
Job3:10 Koy rati moukas miri day vavarčandes te vell, oun moukas man bari bibarht te dikell." 
Job3:11 Hoske merom me gar, har boldo vom, har me dran late vin vom?" 
Job3:12 Hoske las li man an i gali? Hoske das li man i čouči te piyap? 
Job3:13 Te voms moulo, voms koy čiddo, oun sovoms, oun voms pokones." 
Job3:14 Palle voms čiddo mank i bare rayende oun pralstunende ap kay phoub, kay kran pen shoukar moulengre khera." 
Job3:15 Voms čiddo mank i pralstunende, kolen sonakay his, oun kolengre khera pherdo roup his." 
Job3:16 Palle čivans le man tel i phoub har sau ternepen, hoy glan o tsiro moules boldo vas. Palle voms paskedo har savo čavo, hoy o kham kek tsireske dikas." 
Job3:17 Kote moukenn i čilače tele pengri divyi golyatar. Kote nay sovenn kolla, kay hounte maran pen tele." 
Job3:18 Ninna i pandle venn bouder gar tradedo, oun shounenn kekes bouder, kay dell len an-gole čilače labentsa." 
Job3:19 Kote hi o baro oun o tikno, lauter yek har o vavar. Oun o pandlo boudepaskres hi bouder kek ray pral peste." 
Job3:20 Hoske moukell o Devel kolen djido, kay len yaake phares hi? Hoske dell lo kolen o djipen, kolengro dji pherdo ropen hi?" 
Job3:21 Yon kamenn te merenn, oun o merepen vell gar. Yon rodenn les boudeder har bravlepen," 
Job3:22 oun givans oun sans i barhtyatar, te nay merans le." 
Job3:23 Hoske hounte djivell kova, koleskro drom khatedo hi, oun koles o Devel haki rigyatar dren pandas?" 
Job3:24 Mire sva hi miro rhapen. oun koy gole, hoy dau, vell dran mande vin har pani." 
Job3:25 Kova, hoy me darom, vas pral mande. Kolestar trashom, kova tapras man." 
Job3:26 Me hatsom kek rouha, oun nay lom kek nevi zoor. Dap ap dap vas ap mande." 
Job4:1 Oun o Elifas dran o foro Teman penas ap leste: 
Job4:2 Te rakrau ap toute, mouk kova touke gar rhoyedo te krell. Me nay rikrau gar mire laba pale." 
Job4:3 Tou sikral boud menshen o čačo drom, oun kral khine vasta pale zoreles." 
Job4:4 Tire laba hadan koles pale pre, kay peras. Tou kral kol herya pale zoreles, hoy trissan." 
Job4:5 Kanna, kay vas i bibarht pral toute, nashreh tiri zoor. Kanna, kay tout kova tapras, pereh tou khetne i trashatar." 
Job4:6 Tou rikreh touke o Debles glan i yaka pash halauter, hoy kreh, oun djah o čačo drom. Doleske nay leh nevi zoor, oun patseh, te vell lauter pale mishto touke." 
Job4:7 Rake tiro djiyeha, oun pen mange, kay maras o Devel yekes, ap koleste kek doosh his? Kay las lo o djipen yekestar krik, kay his an o čačepen tardo?" 
Job4:8 Yaake har me les dikom, vell čilačepen pral kolende, kay čilačepen kran, oun bibarht pral kolende, kay bibarht ap vavarende anan." 
Job4:9 O Devel phourdell ap lende, oun yon merenn. Leskri rholyakro dourho marell len." 
Job4:10 Yon nay denn bari gole har i leve, o Devel phagell lenge i danda vin." 
Job4:11 I leve merenn, te hi len či marepaske oun rhapaske. Oun lengre terne nashrenn pen kate te kote." 
Job4:12 Mange van čorrhanes laba penlo. I tikni golyah rakras yek an miro kand. 
Job4:13 Rati, har sovom zoreles dom djoungeles souni." 
Job4:14 Traash oun trisslepen vas ap mande. Mire tsele kokale trissan. 
Job4:15 I dourho phourdas ap miro mouy, oun mire balla ap mande his pre tardo." 
Job4:16 Glan mire yaka dikom yekes tardo, oun djinom gar koon kova his. Shounom či. Palle rakras yek oun penas:" 
Job4:17 Har nay vell i mensho an o čačepen tardo glan peskro Debleste? Har nay djivell i morsh i djoudjo djipen glan o Debleste, kay kras les?" 
Job4:18 O Devel nay patsell gar peskre boudepangren an o bolepen. Oun ap leskre bolepangre hatsell lo doosh. 
Job4:19 Har boud boudeder hatsell lo doosh ap kolende, kay van dran čik kerdo – ap kolende, kay nay venn khetne stakedo har i kirmo." 
Job4:20 An i tsalla djal lenge mishto, oun rati merenn le, oun hi bouder gar koy. Oun kek dell yak pre." 
Job4:21 Oun vavar lenn, hoy len his. Yon merenn oun hayvenn gar, hoy lenge djal." 
Job5:1 De gole oun dik: Hi yek koy, kay shounell ap toute? Havo bolepaskres kameh an te mangell, te vell lo ap tiri rig?" 
Job5:2 Koon rhoyrell pes pral halauter, hi dinelo. Leskri rholi tassrell les. Koon peskri rholi gar pale rikrell, hi narvelo. Yob merell ap peskri rholi." 
Job5:3 Me dikom i dineles, kay har i baro rouk zoreles tardo his. Sik rakrom bibarht vin pral leskro kheer." 
Job5:4 Leskre čaven his kek barht an pengro djipen. Har anas yek čomone ap lende pre, his kek koy, kay vas ap lengri rig, oun las lengro koova an o vast." 
Job5:5 Ko djob, hoy yob činas oun dren anas, kova rhan kolla pre, hoy bokenn. Ninna kova, hoy mank i soubyengre bourra bares vas, lan le penge. Bokle menshe rhan leskro bravlepen." 
Job5:6 Dran i phoub vell kek čilačepen vin, vitar kek bibarht dran o harhetikri phoub." 
Job5:7 Dran o mensheste kokres vell i bibarht, yaake har dran i yag tikne rhačede kotya pre phourdedo venn." 
Job5:8 Te djals mange har touke, rodoms o Debles, oun anoms miro koova glan leste." 
Job5:9 Yob hi kova, kay krell boud baro oun zorelo koova, hoy kek hayvell oun kek vavar nay krell." 
Job5:10 Yob dell brishin ap i phoub, oun moukell pani ap o them te perell." 
Job5:11 Yob krell kolen baro, ap kolende i vavar tele dikan. Oun kolenge ropaske hi, kolen krell lo barhtelo." 
Job5:12 Yob dell kova paash hoy penge kolla glan lan, kay kamenn i vavaren pral o kand te dell. Yaake nay krenn le či." 
Job5:13 Yob taprell i goseven an pengro gosvepen. Oun kova, hoy kolla douy čipyentsa mank pende vin kran, kova moukell lo gar te djal." 
Job5:14 Pral o dives moukell lo len an o tamlepen te nashell, oun mashkral dives dikenn le pengro drom gar, har te vals rati." 
Job5:15 O Devel lell o čorveles dran o čilačo rakepen vin, oun dran o vast o zorleder tserdell lo les vin." 
Job5:16 Yaake lell o čorvelo pale nevi zoor an peskro dji, oun o čilačepen hounte rikrell peskro mouy." 
Job5:17 Dik, barhtelo hi ko mensho, koleske o Devel leskri doosh sikrell! Doleske ma hade tout khatar leste, te dell tout o zorelo Devel." 
Job5:18 Yob doukrell, oun palle čivell lo i pandepen ap ko doukepen. Yob dell khetne, oun leskre vasta krenn pale sasto." 
Job5:19 Hako kopo, kay perell i bibarht ap toute, lell lo tout vin. Oun kek čilačepen nay taprell tout an." 
Job5:20 Te hi bari bok an o them, moukell lo tout gar te merell. Oun an o kourepen moukell lo tout gar i rhareha te marell." 
Job5:21 Yob khatrell tout glan o rakepen, hoy i čilače čipya rakrenn. Te vell i kourepaskro tsiro, hounte vell tout kek daar." 
Job5:22 Tou nay saneh, te vell kourepen oun bok, oun kol divye firhendar vell tout kek daar." 
Job5:23 I barra ap i harhetikri phoub hi tire mala, oun i divye firhe krenn touke či." 
Job5:24 Oun tou dikeh oun hayveh, te djal lauter mishto an tiro kheer. Ninna kote, kay tire firhe hi, hi kek lendar nashedo." 
Job5:25 Oun tou dikeh, har tire čave boud venna, ava, kolla, kay pal toute venna, venn yaake boud har o zenlepen ap i phoub." 
Job5:26 Oun tou mereh an o lačo phourepen, yaake har o djob dren anlo vell, te vas leskro tsiro." 
Job5:27 Dik, kava lauter hatsam mer vin. Yaake hi kova. Oun tou, shoun koy pre, oun de yak koy pre!" 
Job6:1 Oun o Hiob penas koy pre: 
Job6:2 Kamoms, te nay lals yek miri douk oun miri bibarht, oun čivals len ap i vaga!" 
Job6:3 Kolla hi phareder har i tseli santa glan o baro pani. Doleske rakrau har i dinelo rakrell. 
Job6:4 Mange djal yaake, har te dals o zorelo Devel karye ap mande, oun leskre fayle vans an mande, hoy anenn mange o merepen. Kova, hoy moukell o Devel ap mande te vell, krell man i bari daar." 
Job6:5 Kek bourika dell gole, te hi lat zenlepen te rhal. Kek groumni dell gole, te hi lat doha te rhal." 
Job6:6 Koon kamell i rhapen te rhal, kay kek loon dren hi? Koon kamell o parnepen i yalo yarestar te rhal?" 
Job6:7 Sau rhapen taprau gar an. Kova hi mange yaake djoungeles, te nay lau les gar tele." 
Job6:8 Ah, te shounell o Devel, hoy lestar mangau, oun krell kova, hoy lestar kamau!" 
Job6:9 Har kamoms, te vals leske shoukar, te dell lo man moulo, te lell lo miro djipen mandar." 
Job6:10 Kova krals koy douk an miro dji tikneder. An mire tsele bare douka djinau, te krom hako tsiro, hoy o Devel mange penas." 
Job6:11 Man hi bouder kek zoor, te nay rikrap doureder vin. Hoy ačell miro djipastar, te dikap ap ko tsiro, hoy vella?" 
Job6:12 Miri zoor hi gar dran bar. Oun miro mass hi gar dran saster. 
Job6:13 Čačepah, djinau bouder gar doureder. Kek hi koy, kay dell man nevi zoor." 
Job6:14 Kones kek dji hi peskro maleske, koles hi gar o zorelo Devel glan i yaka pash kova, hoy lo krell." 
Job6:15 Mire mala sikran pen, te hi le rhorhene. Har panya hi le, kay trouk venn." 
Job6:16 An o vend hi kol panya shila oun tamlo oun gib čakrell len. 
Job6:17 Te vell o niyal, djal boud oun boudeder pani krik. Te vell tato, hi bouder kek pani koy." 
Job6:18 I khamele oun lengre klissepangre djan pengro dromestar tele, te rodenn le kote pani. Yon nashenn an o moulo them trouyel oun merenn." 
Job6:19 Morsha pengre khamelentsa venn dran Tema oun Saba oun rodenn kal panya. 
Job6:20 Oun har venn le kote, his lauter čičeske: Kek pani hi koy." 
Job6:21 Yaake har kal panya, hoy bouder gar koy hi, yaake van t'mer kanna mange. T'mer dikenn, har djoungeles mange djal, oun t'men taprell i bari daar." 
Job6:22 Penom me ap t'mende: Denn man love? Playssrenn t'mer mange yekes t'maro bravlepastar? 
Job6:23 Lenn t'mer man vin dran i vasta kolestar, kay kamell man te marell? Lenn t'mer man vin dran i vasta kolestar, kay rikrell man tele? Čačepah, savo koova penom gar." 
Job6:24 Sikrenn mange, kay djom o čačo dromestar tele, oun me rikrau miro mouy. Sikrenn kova mange yaake, te hayvap les!" 
Job6:25 Čače laba rakrenn an o dji. T'mare laba hi či moldo. T'mer penenn mange gar, havo čilačepen me krom." 
Job6:26 Hi mare laba čilačo an t'mare kanda? Me hom i morsh, kay djinell bouder gar, hoy te krell lo, oun koleskro rakepen hi čičeske." 
Job6:27 T'mer han save, kay khelans troul i čaveste, koles kek dad bouder hi, oun bikrans t'maro males lovenge." 
Job6:28 Dikenn mange an i yaka! Rhorhoms me t'menge an o mouy dren? 
Job6:29 Moukenn tele, čilačepen ap mande pre te anell! Ava, moukenn tele koleha! O čačepen hi ap miri rig!" 
Job6:30 Rakrell miro mouy rhorhene laba? Na-a! Me djinau, hoy lačo oun hoy čilačo hi!" 
Job7:1 I menshe hounte boudrenn phares ap kay phoub. Pengro tselo djipen marenn le pen tele har i boudepangre, kay venn haki rati playsedo." 
Job7:2 Yaake har i boudepaskro, kay kamell, te vell rati, kay vell lo dran o kham, oun kay vell lo playsedo," 
Job7:3 yaake van mange i tsele čonna, kay djivom čičeske, oun boud ratsya pherdo daar oun douk." 
Job7:4 Te čivom man tele, penau me: Kaana nay stau pale pre? I rat kamell gar pre te herell, oun me rissrau man yek rigyatar ap i vavar, bis te vell o dives." 
Job7:5 Miro mass ap mande hi čakedo kirmentsa oun čik. Miri hauta phagell pre, oun djelto pani nashell vin." 
Job7:6 Mire divessa djan trouyel yaake sik har i soub, hoy pre oun tele djal. Oun kova hoy gomme glan mande hi, nay vell či, hoy shoukar hi." 
Job7:7 Ma biste, miro Devel, te hi miro djipen har i dourho. Mire yaka dikenn bouder kek barht." 
Job7:8 Tou, kay leh man kanna an o yak, nay dikeh man palle bouder gar. Te rodeh pal mande, hom me bouder gar koy." 
Job7:9 Yaake har i folka ap yek kopo bouder gar koy hi, yaake hi o mensho, kay merell. Yob vell bouder gar pale dran o moulengro them." 
Job7:10 Pash peskro kheer vell lo gar bouder pale Oun kote, kay djivas lo, vell lo bistedo." 
Job7:11 Doleske kamau me ninna gar miro mouy te rikrell, kamau te rakrap dran miro djiyeskri daar, oun miri bari douk vin gole te dell." 
Job7:12 Hom me o baro pani oder i baro panyeskro firho, te dess tou yaake yak ap mande, te krap či?" 
Job7:13 Te penau: Ap miro čiben djal mange feteder, an miro sopen vell miri douk tikneder," 
Job7:14 palle bičreh tou mange djoungele sounya, hoy krenn man daar oun traash." 
Job7:15 Mange vals feteder, te tassrals man yek. O merepen hi lačeder har sau djipen." 
Job7:16 Me kamau gar bouder, kamau gar bouder te djivell. Mouk tele mandar! Miro djipen hi sik trouyel." 
Job7:17 Hoy hi o mensho, te dikess tou ap leste, har te vell lo komone baro? Hoske rissreh tou tiro tselo dji pash leste?" 
Job7:18 Haki tsalla dikeh ap leste, oun moukeh les gar i tikno tsireske dran tiro yak, te dikess palla, har oun hoske yob kova kras, hoy lo kras?" 
Job7:19 Hoske dikeh gar krik mandar i tikno tsireske, yaake rah har me piyau miri čounger an miro mouy tele?" 
Job7:20 Tou hal kova, kay lell i menshen an o yak. Lom me doosh ap mande? Te vals kova yaake, hoy krom me koleha touke? Hoske hom me kova, ap koleste karye deh? Hom me touke i pharepen, hoy hounte hidjress?" 
Job7:21 Hoske leh tou ko čilačepen gar krik mandar, hoy krom, oun bistreh miri doosh? An i tikno tsiro vau tel i phoub. Te rodeh pal mande, hom me gar bouder koy." 
Job8:1 O Bildad dran o them Shoua penas koy pre: 
Job8:2 Har rah gomme kameh tou sau koova vin rakrell? Kova, hoy rakreh hi har i zorelo phourdepen." 
Job8:3 Patseh čačepah, te krell o zorelo Devel gar, hoy mishto oun čačo hi? Patseh, te rissrell lo peskre čačepaskre laba trouyel?" 
Job8:4 Tire čave kran, hoy čilačes his glan leskre yaka. Doleske das lo len pengri phagi." 
Job8:5 Te rodeh tou o Debles tiro tselo djiyeha, oun mangeh ropah o zorelo Deblestar, te vell lo touke pale lačes," 
Job8:6 oun djiveh i djoudjo djipen an o čačepen, palle stell lo touke pre, oun moukell les touke oun tiri familyake pale mishto te djal, yaake har čačo hi." 
Job8:7 Kova, hoy tout glan kova his, vell touke tiknes glan, te dikeh ko baro bravlepen, hoy dell tout o Devel an ko tsiro, hoy vella." 
Job8:8 Dik ap kova, hoy djinan i menshe an o phouro tsiro! De yak ap kova, hoy hatsan mare phoure vin!" 
Job8:9 Hi yaake har te vams boldo taysar. Mer djinah či. Maro tsiro, kay ham ap kay phoub, hi tikno har i souni." 
Job8:10 Tire phoure nay sikrenn tout, hoy le vin hatsan, oun hoy yon an pengro djipen dikan:" 
Job8:11 I shilftikro khass nay vell kokres kote baro, kay sapeno hi. Panyeskro zenlepen nay djal gar kote pre, kay kek pani hi." 
Job8:12 Te hi lo gomme zenelo oun gar bares doha, te vell lo tele činlo, marell lo sikeder tele har ko vavar zenlepen, te hi les kek pani." 
Job8:13 Yaake djal hakeneske, kay o Debles bistrella. Kova, kay gar o Debleha djivell, koleske ačell či, hoy dell les pale nevi zoor." 
Job8:14 Kova, hoy kamell lo te vell, kova vell gar. Ap koleste yob pes rikrell, kova hi yaake har i sano thab, hoy i spinna tserdell." 
Job8:15 Rikrell lo pes ap peskro kheer, phagell kova khetne. Rikrell lo pes ap kova, hoy les hi, ačell kova gar." 
Job8:16 I mensho kek Debleha hi har zenlepen, koles doha pani hi, glan te djal o kham pre, oun hoy bourhles vell, oun djal pral i tseli baar." 
Job8:17 Leskre draba tserdenn pen pral barra, oun rikrenn pen zoreles ap lende." 
Job8:18 Te tserdell yek les vin, djinell bouder kek, kay lo tardo his." 
Job8:19 Kaya hi leskri tseli barht an peskro djipen. Oun ap leskri platsa djan pale vavar pre. 
Job8:20 Penau touke, o Devel vitsrell kolen gar pestar, kay an o čačepen djivenn. Oun yob rikrell gar i čilačen pash o vast." 
Job8:21 Yob krell, te nay saneh pale, oun deh gole i barhtyatar." 
Job8:22 Kolla, kay kamenn touke čilačepen te krell, hounte ladjenn. Oun i khera i čilačendar ačenn gar tardo." 
Job9:1 O Hiob penas koy pre: 
Job9:2 Čačepah, djinau te hi yaake. Har nay vell i mensho an o čačepen glan o Debleste?" 
Job9:3 Te kamell lo pes leha te čingrell, nay poučals lestar o Devel yek zero koova. Oun o mensho nay penals gar yek pale." 
Job9:4 O Devel hi gosevo an peskro dji oun les hi bari zoor. Kekeske, kay las pes glan te čingrell lo leha, djas kova mishto." 
Job9:5 O Devel čivell i berge yek rigyatar ap i vavar, glan te hayvenn le kova. An peskri rholi vitsrell lo len trouyel." 
Job9:6 Yob taprell ap i phoub oun koya trissell, Ninna i barra, hoy hidjrenn lat, trissenn." 
Job9:7 Rakrell lo zoreles ap o kham, djal o kham gar pre. Oun i bolepangre momelentsa krell lo, te venn le gar diklo." 
Job9:8 Yob kokres kras o bolepen bourhles pral i phoub, oun djal pral o baro pani." 
Job9:9 Yob kras kol bolepangre momlia, hoy kharenna: Baro Vourdin, Orion, Efta Momelengre, ninna kol bolepangre ap koy rig, kay o kham pralstounes tardo hi." 
Job9:10 Yob krell savo baro oun zorelo koova, te nay hayvah les gar, savo boud baro koova, hoy kek vavar nay krell, te nay djinah gar, har boud kova hi." 
Job9:11 Yob djal glan mande doureder, oun me dikom les gar. Yob djal glan mande doureder, oun me hayvom gar, te his lo koy." 
Job9:12 Te lell lo yekes zoryah krik, koon kamell les pre te rikrell? Kek nay penell ap leste: Hoy kreh tou?" 
Job9:13 O Devel rikrell peskri rholi gar pale, oun vas zorleder har kolla, kay van o baro panyeskro sapeske Rahab ap i rig." 
Job9:14 Har nay hatsoms me laba, te nay penap čomone ap leste?" 
Job9:15 Ninna te vals man čačes, nay rakroms či ap leste, hoy yob mandar poučas. Me nay mangoms kokres lačepen lestar, kay miro čačepaskro ray hi." 
Job9:16 Ninna te moukals lo man leha te rakrell, patsau me gar, te shounals lo ap miro rakepen." 
Job9:17 Yob bičrell i zorelo phourdepen, te taprell lo pal mande, oun dell man boud doukepen, ninna te krom či." 
Job9:18 Yob moukell man gar yek kopo dourho te lell, na-a, yob krell man pherdo ropen oun douk." 
Job9:19 Te djoms ap leste zoryah, yob hi o zorleder! Te kamoms les glan i čačepangre te anell, penals lo: Kones kameh te bičrell, te anell lo man koy?" 
Job9:20 Ninna te vaus an o čačepen, miro rakepen anals i phagi pral mande. Ninna te vals kek doosh ap mande, dals lo man i doosh." 
Job9:21 Kek čilačepen krom me. Miro djipen hi mange bouder či moldo. Kamau bouder gar te djivell. Lauter hi mange yek. Doleske penau me: O Devel dell koles moulo, kay lačo oun čačo hi, oun ninna koles, kay čilačo hi." 
Job9:22  
Job9:23 Te vell i bari bibarht, oun marell menshen ap yek kopo, palle sal lo pral kova, ninna te hi kek doosh ap lende." 
Job9:24 Yob das i phoub an o vast i čilačendar. Oun kolla, kay o čačepen vin krenn, kolen kras lo korelo, te dikenn le či. Te his yob kova gar, koon vavar his kova?" 
Job9:25 Miro djipen nashell sikeder krik har i naashepaskro. Hako dives djal trouyel oun anas mange kek barht. 
Job9:26 Miro djipen nashell yaake sik doureder har i sik bero oun har i baro čirklo, hoy moukell pes tele te perell ap i tikno firho, te taprell lo les." 
Job9:27 Te penau mange: Kamau te bistrap miri tseli douk, oun kamau te krap i vavar mouy, oun pale te sanap," 
Job9:28 palle taprau pale daar i tsele doukendar. Oun djinau, glan o Debleskre yaka hi man doosh." 
Job9:29 Yob kamell i doosh ap mande te dikell. Hoske marap man palle čičeske tele? 
Job9:30 Ninna te thovoms man gibeha tele, oun mire vasta sapouneha," 
Job9:31 vitsrals lo man an i čikli rheb, te vans mire ripya djoungeles glan mande." 
Job9:32 O Devel hi kek mensho har me hom, te nay penoms leske i lab pale, te nay djams khetne pash yekeste, koon nay krals o čačepen mashkral mende vin." 
Job9:33 Kamoms te dals i čačepaskro morsh mashkral mende, koon o pralstouno pral mende douyende hi," 
Job9:34 te lell kova o kasht krik, koleha o Devel man dell, oun man bouder gar daar vals!" 
Job9:35 Palle nay rakroms oun man vals kek daar lestar. Yaake har kanna pash mande hi, nay krau kova gar." 
Job10:1 Kamau bouder gar te djivell. Doleske rikrau miro ropen ninna gar pale, oun rakrau yaake, har miro doukedo dji mange penell." 
Job10:2 Me penau ap o Debleste: Ma pen: Doosh hi ap toute! Pen mange, havi doosh tou ap mande hatsal?" 
Job10:3 Hoy aneh kava touke, te rikreh man zoryah tele? Hoske vitsreh man toutar krik, man, koles tire vasta kran, oun moukeh kova mishto te djal, hoy lan pen i čilače glan?" 
Job10:4 Hi tout mensheskre yaka? Dikeh tou yaake har i mensho dikell? 
Job10:5 Hi tiro djipen yaake tikno har i mensheskro djipen? Djan tire bersha yaake sik trouyel har i menshengre bersha? 
Job10:6 Hoske rodeh doosh ap mande, oun dikeh palla, havo čilačepen krom?" 
Job10:7 Tou djineh, te hi ap mande kek doosh, oun te hi kek koy, koon nay lell miro djipen dran tiro vast vin." 
Job10:8 Tou kral man tire vastentsa, lauter ap mande hi toutar kerdo; oun kanna rhah tou man pre!" 
Job10:9 Ma biste, te kral man dran čik. Kameh tou kanna, te vap pale čik?" 
Job10:10 Tou kral, te vas miri day mantsa vavarčandes, oun kral, te vom me i tikno mensho an late." 
Job10:11 Tou dal man kokale oun muskle, pandal len khetne, oun čakral mass oun hauta pral lende." 
Job10:12 Tou dal man djipen oun kral lačepen ap mande, oun dal mishto yak ap miro djipen." 
Job10:13 Ninna te his yaake, djinau, khatedo an tiro dji his tout čomone vavar mantsa glan:" 
Job10:14 Tou kamal yak ap mande te dell, te dikess, te loms me doosh ap mande. Palle kamal miri doosh ap mande te moukell." 
Job10:15 Te lom doosh ap mande, djal mange djoungelo! Ninna te lom kek doosh ap mande, hounte rikrap miro shero tele. Miri ladjatar oun miri doukatar hom har mato." 
Job10:16 Te hadau miro shero pre, palle leh tou man palla, har te vals i levo, oun sikreh tiri bari zoor, te doukress man." 
Job10:17 Tou čiveh menshen pre tardo, kay čomone ap mande pre anenn. Oun tiri rholi ap mande vell gomme bareder. Oun tou bičreh yek phagi pral i vavar ap mande." 
Job10:18 Hoske moukal man boldo te vell? Hoske moukal tou man gar glan kova te merell? Palle dikals man kek! 
Job10:19 Mange vals feteder, te voms har kolla, kay van moules boldo, oun paskedo." 
Job10:20 Kol divessa, hoy man gomme hi, hi bouder gar boud. Mouk mandar tele, dik krik mandar, te nay vap i tikno tsiro gomme barhtelo," 
Job10:21 glan te djau koy, kay vau bouder gar pale – an o tamlo them, kay hako tsiro kali rat hi" 
Job10:22 ava, an ko them pherdo tamlepen oun kali rat, kay lauter divyes trouyel čiddo hi, oun kay ninna i momeli tamlo hi." 
Job11:1 Pal kova rakras o Sofar dran o them Naama oun penas ap o Hiob: 
Job11:2 Patseh, te nay penah mer či pale ap kava boud rakepen? Sikrenn boud laba, te hi yek an o čačepen?" 
Job11:3 Tiro tselo rakepen nay rikrell men gar pale, te kras mer maro mouy pre. Te rikreh men dineleske, patseh, te čingras gar touha?" 
Job11:4 Tou penal: “Kova hoy me rakrom, hi halauter čačo. Me hom djoudjo glan o Debleskre yaka.”" 
Job11:5 Kamoms, te krals o Devel kanna peskro mouy pre oun rakrals kokres ap toute!" 
Job11:6 Yob djinell halauter pral halauter. Kamoms, te sikrals lo toute peskro gosvepen, hoy menge khatedo hi. Palle hounte hayvess, te dikell o Devel pral boud doosh toutar pral vergel!" 
Job11:7 Patseh, te djineh halauter, hoy an o Debleskro dji hi? Nay hayveh tou, har baro o zorelo Devel hi?" 
Job11:8 O Debleskro gosvepen hi doureder har o bolepen hi, oun doureder tele har o moulengro them. Kova hi bareder har i phoub oun bourhleder har o baro pani. Tou nay hayveh oun djineh gar halauter!" 
Job11:9  
Job11:10 Te vell yob oun pandell yekes, oun anell les glan i tsillo, te krell lo o čačepen pral leste vin, koon nay rikrals les pale?" 
Job11:11 Yob djinell, koon i či-molde hi, oun dikell o čilačo koova, hoy le krenn. Kova hi gar khatedo glan leste." 
Job11:12 Nay vell kova gosevo, koles či an o shero hi? Yaake rah gar, har i bourika kek menshes ap i phoub anell!" 
Job11:13 Tou, Hiob, hounte rissress tout tiri tseli zoryah pash o Debleste, oun hadess tire vasta pre leske." 
Job11:14 Te kral čilačepen, mouk tele kolestar, te vell kek čilačepen an tiro kheer hatslo." 
Job11:15 Palle nay hidjreh tou tiro shero pre, oun hounte ladjess gar. Palle hal zoreles tardo oun dareh či." 
Job11:16 Tiri bibarht nay bistreh. Te vell li touke an tiro shero, hi li har pani hoy krik nashas." 
Job11:17 Oun pral tiro djipen djal o kham pre, oun hi zorelo har mashkral dives. Ninna te hi kanna tamlo, vell i nevo dives." 
Job11:18 Oun tiro dji lell pale nevi zoor oun djineh, lauter vell mishto. Rati dikeh tout trouyel, oun čiveh tout pale tele kek daryah." 
Job11:19 Oun tou hal čiddo, oun kek vell pral toute, oun krell tout traash. Oun boud venna, kay mangenn toutar, te kress lenge lačepen." 
Job11:20 I čilače hayvenn gar, hoske lenge djoungeles djal, oun hatsenn gar vin dran lengri bibarht. Lenge ačell či har te dikenn le ap ko dives, kay merenn le." 
Job12:1 Koy rakras o Hiob oun penas: 
Job12:2 Čačepah, t'mer han kolla, ap kolende hakeno hounte shounals! T'mentsa merell o gosvepen vin!" 
Job12:3 Me ninna hom yaake gosevo har t'mer. An či krenn t'mer mange čomone glan. Hakeno djinell kova, hoy t'mer penan." 
Job12:4 Hoske vom mire malenge sapaske? Me dom gole ap o Debleste, oun yob shounas man. Ninna te hom an o čačepen tardo oun djau o čačo drom, sanenn le man vin." 
Job12:5 Kolla, kay lenge mishto djal, dikenn tele ap koleste, kay an i bibarht hi, oun stakrenn kolen gomme, kolengre herya trissenn." 
Job12:6 I khera kolendar, kay i vavaren zoryah tele rikrenn, hi zoreles tardo. Oun kek krell kolenge daar, kay krenn savo koova te vell o Devel rhoyedo, Yon patsenn, te hi len o Devel an pengro vast." 
Job12:7 Pouč i firhen oun i čirklen, hoy djinenn le pral o Debleste. Oun yon penenn les touke." 
Job12:8 Pouč ninna i tikne firhen ap i phoub, oun i mače an o baro pani, oun yon penenn les touke." 
Job12:9 Koon hi kova, kay djinell gar, te kras o baro Debleskro vast kova lauter?" 
Job12:10 An leskro vast hi o djipen halauterestar, hoy djivella, ninna o djipaskro dourho i tsele menshendar!" 
Job12:11 Te shounell i mensho, hoy rakedo vell, poučell lo pes gar, hoy čačo oun hoy gar čačo hi? Kova hi yaake har peskro mouy djinell, havo rhapen lačo oun havo rhapen gar mishto hi." 
Job12:12 Phoure menshen hi gosvepen. Kolla, kay boud bersha djivan, hayvenn boud." 
Job12:13 O Debles hi gosvepen oun ninna zoor. Yob hayvell halauter, oun nay penell, hoy te vell kerdo." 
Job12:14 Kova, hoy yob tele phagas, nay čivell kek pale pre. Kones yob dren pandas, koleske nay krell kek pale pre." 
Job12:15 Rikrell yob o brishin pale, vell o tselo them trouk. Moukell lo boud brishin te perell, čakrell boud pani o them, oun krell les paash." 
Job12:16 Pash leste hi i zoor oun o čačo gosvepen. Les hi ninna i zoor pral koleste, kay perell o čačo dromestar tele, oun pral koleste, kay anell les o čačo dromestar tele." 
Job12:17 Kol pralstoune, hoy i rayenge penenn, hoy te krenn le, kolendar lell lo lengro gosvepen krik, oun krell i čačepangre rayen dinelo." 
Job12:18 I pandlen kol bare rayendar anell lo dran o pandepen vin, oun anell i bare rayen an o pandepen." 
Job12:19 I rashayenge lell lo lengre rashayengre ripya krik, oun i zorelenge lengri zoor pral i vavarende." 
Job12:20 Kolla, kay nay rakrenn lačes glan i vavarende, kolenge lell lo i laba krik, oun i phourentsa krell lo, te djinenn le bouder gar hoy čačo hi oun hoy gar čačo hi." 
Job12:21 Bari ladj anell lo ap i an-dikle pralstunende. Oun i zorelendar lell lo lengro kourepaskro koova krik. 
Job12:22 Yob anell kova glan, hoy khatedo his an o kalo telstunepen, oun krell, te vell o tamlepen diklo." 
Job12:23 Yob krell, te venn i natsyone baro, oun ninna, te venn le pale tikno. Oun yob dell i menshen i baro them, oun tradell len pale kote vin." 
Job12:24 Yob krell, te venn lengre raya dinelo, oun krell, te nashenn le trouyel kote, kay kek drom hi." 
Job12:25 Har korele rikrenn le pengre vasta vin, te hatsenn le pengro drom an i kali rat, kay kek momeli hi, oun har i mate nashrenn le pen." 
Job13:1 Kava lauter dikan mire yaka, oun shounan mire kanda. Oun me hayvom les." 
Job13:2 Yaake boud har t'mer djinenn, djinau me ninna, An či krenn t'mer mange čomone glan." 
Job13:3 Gar t'mentsa, na-a, o zorelo Debleha kamau te rakrell. glan leste kamau miro koova glan te anell." 
Job13:4 T'mer čakrenn o čačepen o rhorhepah, han dramangre, kay či-moldo hi, – t'mer halauter." 
Job13:5 Kamoms, te rikrans t'mare mouya! Palle dikans yaake vin, har te vans gosevo." 
Job13:6 Shounenn mishto, har me miro koova glan anau! Oun denn yak, hoy miro mouy penell!" 
Job13:7 Kamenn t'mer o Debleske te rhorhell, oun rhorhepen te rakrell, te vell lo an o čačepen?" 
Job13:8 Kamenn t'mer t'men ap leskri rig te čivell? Kamenn t'mer leske mantsa an o čingepen te djal? 
Job13:9 Patsenn t'mer, te djal kova t'menge mishto, te lell lo t'men an o yak? Moukell lo pes t'mendar te rhorhell, har te vals lo i mensho?" 
Job13:10 Te čivenn t'mer t'men čorrhanes ap leskri rig, čačepah, palle sikrell lo t'men i zorelo rakepah, te hounte vell kova gar yaake kerdo." 
Job13:11 Te hadell lo pes, taprell t'men i traash! Oun bari daar moukell lo ap t'mende te perell." 
Job13:12 T'maro gosevo rakepen hi gar boudeder moldo har yagakri čik. Kova hoy t'mer kate glan anenn, rikrell gar feteder har khera dran čik." 
Job13:13 Rikrenn t'mare mouya, oun moukenn man te rakrell! Oun kova, hoy palle pral mande vell, mou vell lo!" 
Job13:14 Hoske rikrap ap miro djipen? Me dau gar yak ap miro djipen. 
Job13:15 Mou marell lo man, man hi či te nashrell. Me djom čače dromma; oun kova kamau me leske an o mouy te penell." 
Job13:16 Te vap me glan leste, sikrell kova, te hi kek doosh ap mande. Kek douy djiyentsa vell glan leste." 
Job13:17 Shounenn mishto, hoy penau! Denn yak ap hako lab!" 
Job13:18 Me anom kava pre, te vell vin kerdo, hoy o čačepen hi. Me djinau, te hi man čačo." 
Job13:19 Koon hi, kay nay sikrell, te hi i doosh ap mande? Palle kamaus miro mouy te rikrell, oun te merell." 
Job13:20 Miro Devel, kal douy koova kre mantsa, palle khatrau man ninna gar glan tire yaka:" 
Job13:21 Le tiri phagi mandar krik, kre mange bouder gar daar oun traash!" 
Job13:22 Palle de ap mande gole, oun me dau pale gole. Oder mouk man tout te poučell, oun tou peneh mange pale!" 
Job13:23 Har boud doosh lom me ap mande? Havo čilačepen krom me? Mouk man te djinell, kay me tiro dromestar tele djom, oun krom, hoy tou gar kameh!" 
Job13:24 Hoske khatreh tou tiro mouy glan mande? Hoske rikreh man yekeske, kay kamell touke čilačepen te krell?" 
Job13:25 Hoy hom me? – I patri, hoy o roukestar tele phourdedo vas, oun i kotar phouss, hoy i dourho krik hidjrell. Hoske kreh mange daar oun leh man palla?" 
Job13:26 Tou aneh djoungelo koova ap mande pre oun čineh les an i liil. Ninna koy doosh, hoy anom ap mande, har terno homs, aneh tou ap miro shero pale." 
Job13:27 Mire herya čival an shelle, oun deh yak ap hako drom mandar, oun leh mire pire an o yak, kay le djan." 
Job13:28 Yaake perau khetne har phouro kasht, har kol ripya, kolen i kirme paash rhan." 
Job14:1 O mensho, boldo i djouvyatar, djivell i tikno tsiro, oun marell pes tele peskro tselo djipen." 
Job14:2 Har i blouma vell lo baro oun merell tele. Yaake har i shatto, hoy vell bouder gar diklo, te djal o kham tele, hi lo bouder gar." 
Job14:3 Oun savo hom me. Oun tou leh man an o yak, oun aneh man glan i tsillo, te kress o čačepen vin pral mande." 
Job14:4 I tsele menshen hi doosh ap pende. Har nay vell lendar yek, koles kek doosh ap peste hi?" 
Job14:5 Tou penal, har phouro i mensho vell, kitse čonna yob djivell. Oun penal, ap havo dives leskro djipaskro tsiro trouyel hi." 
Job14:6 Palle dik lestar krik, mouk les kokres, te nay krell lo peskro diveskri boudi!" 
Job14:7 Te dell yek i rouk tele, hi leske gar lauter trouyel. Dran leste nay venn pale neve tikne kashta vin, oun venn boud oun boudeder." 
Job14:8 Ninna te venn leskre draba phouro an i phoub, oun o telstouno kotar merell tele an i čik," 
Job14:9 te perell pani ap leste, vell lo pale zenelo, ninna te hi kova gar boud pani. Oun neve tikne kashta venn dran leste, har te vals lo i terno rouk." 
Job14:10 Merell i morsh, hi lo bouder gar. Kek dourho ačell an leste. Kay hi lo?" 
Job14:11 Dran o baro pani nashell o pani vin. Oun o lengsto pani nashrell boud oun boudeder pani, bis te hi lo trouk." 
Job14:12 Yaake hi ko mensho, kay čivell pes tele oun merell. Yob stell gar bouder pre. Yaake rah har o bolepen koy hi, vell lo bouder gar djangelo, oun kek djangrell les pre dran peskro sopen." 
Job14:13 Har kamoms, te khatress tou man an o moulengro them, te pandess man kote dren, bis te tiri rholi trouyel hi. Kamoms te moukals man yek tsiro koy, oun palle voms touke pale an o shero!" 
Job14:14 Te merell i mensho, vell lo palle pale djido? Palle bistroms, har djoungeles mange kanna djal, oun dikoms ap ko tsiro, kay mange feteder djal." 
Job14:15 Tou dals ap mande gole, oun me shounaus oun daus pale gole. Oun tiro dji nashals pal mande, koles tou tire vastentsa kral." 
Job14:16 Tou dals yak ap mire dromma, dals gar yak, havi doosh me ap mande laus!" 
Job14:17 Ko čilačepen, hoy krom, pandals khetne har an i possita. Koy doosh, hoy ap mande lom, čakrals tou, te vell li bouder gar diklo." 
Job14:18 I berga nay phagell an peste khetne, oun i baro bar hi bouder gar koy, kay lo his." 
Job14:19 O pani thovell i barra yaake rah tele, bis te či lendar ačell. Yaake har hidjrenn zorele panya i čik krik, yaake leh tou kova krik, hoy i mensho glan-vi dikell peskro djipaske." 
Job14:20 Tou vitsreh les tele, te stell lo bouder gar pre. An o merepen hi leskro mouy bouder gar shoukar. Tou bičreh les krik – yob vell bouder gar pale." 
Job14:21 Te venn leskre čave an-dikle menshe, yob djinell kova gar. Te vell tele diklo ap lende, yob hayvell kova gar." 
Job14:22 Kokres peskro mass doukrell les. Oun les hi ropaske troul peste kokres. 
Job15:1 Koy penas o Elifas dran o them Teman ap o Hiob: 
Job15:2 Te vals čačepah gosevo, rakrals gar save pre-phourde laba! Kava, hoy tou kate rakreh, hi či har i tato dourho." 
Job15:3 Tou rakreh touke save labentsa, hoy kekeske mishto hi. Tiro rakepen hi či moldo." 
Job15:4 Čačepah, tou kreh har te vals o patsepen ap o Debleste či moldo, oun kreh, te mangell les bouder kek an." 
Job15:5 Pal boud laba khatreh tiri doosh, oun rakreh har i rhorheno rakrell." 
Job15:6 Hi tiro mouy, hoy penell, te hi doosh ap toute. Me hounte penap kova gar. Hako lab, hoy rakreh, sikrell kova." 
Job15:7 Hal tou o ersto mensho, kay boldo vas? Hals tou koy, har kras o Devel i berge?" 
Job15:8 Hals tou pashel, har o Devel peskre bolepangre khetne his, oun shounal, hoy kote rakedo vas? Patseh, te hal tou kokres gosevo?" 
Job15:9 Hoy djineh, hoy mer gar djinah? Oun hoy hayval, hoy mer gar hayvam?" 
Job15:10 Mank mende hi ninna phoure morsha, morsha parne ballentsa, kay phoureder van har tiro dad." 
Job15:11 Dran mende rakras o Devel kamles touha. Yob kamell o douk dran tiro dji krik te lell. Hi kova touke gar doha? 
Job15:12 Hoske kereh tou pral har thoud ap i yag? An tire yaka rhačell tiri rholi. 
Job15:13 Ap o Debleste hal rhoyedo. Doleske vell savo rakepen dran tiro mouy. 
Job15:14 Hoy hi o mensho, te nay vals lo erligo glan o Debleste? Kek ap kay phoub hi an o čačepen tardo glan leste." 
Job15:15 Ninna leskre bolepangren nay patsell lo gar. Oun o bolepen hi gar djoudjo glan leskre yaka. 
Job15:16 Har boud boudeder hatsell lo doosh ap o mensheste. O mensho krell djoungelo koova oun hi či-moldo. O čilačepen krell lo, har te piyals lo pani." 
Job15:17 Me kamau touha te rakrell. Shoun ap kova, hoy me penau! Kova, hoy me dikom, kamau te penell:" 
Job15:18 Shounom les goseve menshendar. Lengre phoure rikran les lenge gar pale. 
Job15:19 Lenge kokres his o them dino. Kek vi-themari djas mashkral lende peha. 
Job15:20 I čilačo mensho marell pes tele i daryatar peskro tselo djipen. Kova, kay i vavaren tele rikrell, hi gar boud bersha glan leste." 
Job15:21 An leske kanda shounell lo i gole, hoy krell leske daar. An ko tsiro, kay leske lačes djal, vell o marepaskro pral leste." 
Job15:22 Yob nay patsell gar, te vell lo dran o tamlepen pale vin. oun dikell o rharo pral leskro shero." 
Job15:23 Yob djal kate te kote oun rodell rhapen, oun hatsell či. Oun yob hayvas, te vell i kalo dives pral leste." 
Job15:24 Daar oun traash perenn ap leste, oun pandenn les dren, har i baro ray an o kourepen i foro dren pandell." 
Job15:25 Yaake djal ko morsheske, kay hadas peskro vast ap o zorelo Debleste, oun kras pes bares ap leste," 
Job15:26 oun nashell peskro shereha ap leste, peskro shilto an o vast." 
Job15:27 Leske djal mishto, oun leskro per hi thoullo." 
Job15:28 Oun yob djivell an moukle forya, an khera, hoy khetne perenn, kay kek hounte djivell." 
Job15:29 Yob ačell gar bravelo. Leskro bravlepen ačell gar. Kova, hoy les hi, vell gar bareder ap kay phoub." 
Job15:30 Yob nay vell gar vin dran o tamlepen, oun hi har ko rouk, koleskre zenele kashta rhačedo venn an i yag. Oun o Devel phourdell ap leste, oun krik hi lo." 
Job15:31 Koon rikrell pes ap čomone, hoy či moldo hi, kova rhorhell pes kokres. oun lell pale, hoy či moldo hi." 
Job15:32 Yob hi har i rouk, hoy vell djelto glan peskro tsiro, oun hidjrell an kek tsiro bouder zenele patria." 
Job15:33 Har i drakengro rouk hi lo, kolestar i drake tele perenn an i tsiro, kay hi le gomme tikno. Oun har ko djeteskro rouk hi lo, koleskre bloume tele perenn, glan te venn drake lendar." 
Job15:34 Yaake djal i familyenge kolendar, kay djivenn kek Debleha. Yon ačenn kek čaventsa. Oun i yag rhačrell lengre khera pre, hoy kran le kol loventsa, hoy lenge playsedo vas te rhorhenn le." 
Job15:35 An lengre sherya hi midjak koova. Pral pende oun i vavarende anenn le bibarht. Oun lengre djia hi pherdo phoukepen. 
Job16:1 Oun o Hiob penas koy pre: 
Job16:2 Boud sau koova shounom me. T'mare lače laba, hoy t'men mange hi, t'mer halauter, krenn les mange gomme phareder!" 
Job16:3 Nay herenn t'mer kanna pre kava dinelo rakepah! Elifas, hoy anell tout yaake pre te hounte rakress palpale?" 
Job16:4 Te vans t'mer ap miri platsa, palle nay rakroms me yaake har t'mer nay kroms bare laba pral t'mende, oun trissloms miro shero pral t'mende." 
Job16:5 Boud labentsa doms t'menge pale nevi zoor. Oun kova, hoy penoms, krals t'mari douk tikneder." 
Job16:6 Či, hoy penau, krell miri douk tikneder. oun te rakrau gar, djal mange vitar gar feteder." 
Job16:7 Čačepah, o Devel las mange miri zoor krik. Tou, miro Devel, lal mange miri tseli familya krik!" 
Job16:8 Oun tou pandal man dren, har te kroms i čilačo koova. Me hom či har hauta oun kokale. Doleske patsenn i menshe, te lom doosh ap mande." 
Job16:9 Leskri rholi dandras man khetne oun las man palla. Yob sikrell peskre danda, oun peskre yaka dikenn ap mande har te vans le čourya." 
Job16:10 Menshe venn khetne troul mande, oun dikenn ap mande pre-kerde mouyentsa. Te vell len čomone sapaske denn le man čamedinya." 
Job16:11 Miro Devel das man o čilačenge an i vasta, kolenge, kay kamenn lestar či te djinell." 
Job16:12 Djivom an o lačepen, har o Devel das man khetne. Yob tapras man ap miri meen, oun vitsras man tele. Yob čivas man yaake pre, te dell lo ap mande karye." 
Job16:13 Leskre fayle djan haki rigyatar ap mande. Yob dell man karye an mire bouke dren. Oun les khaytau gar. Miri galla čorell lo vin ap i phoub. 
Job16:14 Yek dap pal i vavar dell lo an mande dren. Har i kourepaskro nashell lo ap mande. 
Job16:15 Me sivom mange i gono troul mande, oun hom čiddo kek zoryah an i čik." 
Job16:16 Miro tselo shero hi lolo miro boud ropah. Tel mire yaka hi kalepen. 
Job16:17 Yaake hi kova, ninna te krom kek čilačepen, oun mangom miro Debles i djoudjo djiyeha an." 
Job16:18 Me hom har i morsh, kay vas maredo. I phoub te khatrell gar miro rat, te vell leskri gole hako tsiro shounlo." 
Job16:19 Ninna kanna hi yek an o bolepen, kay stell mange pre oun vell ap miri rig. Kova, kay mange mishto rakrell, hi an o pralstunepen." 
Job16:20 Mire mala sanenn pral mande. Mire yaka hi pherde sva, har dikau me pre pash miro Debleste." 
Job16:21 Yaake har i mensho peskro maleske mishto rakrell, kamoms te rakrell yek mange mishto glan o Debleste." 
Job16:22 Gar boud bersha hi gomme glan mande, oun me djau ko drom, kolestar kek palpale vell." 
Job17:1 Man hi bouder kek zoor. miro djipen hi trouyel. Ap mande lourell o handako. 
Job17:2 Hakeno sal pral mande. Oun me hounte dikap, har čingran le ap mande." 
Job17:3 Hi yaake, har te voms an o stilepen. Mangau tout, playse tou kol love, te vap vin lino! Man hi kek vavar, kay mange mishto rakrell." 
Job17:4 I djia mire malendar kral tou korelo, yaake te nay dikenn le či dren. Doleske moukeh len tou gar zorleder te vell har me." 
Job17:5 Hi penlo: Yek rhal khetne peskre malentsa, oun leskre čave hounte bokenna." 
Job17:6 Kanna vom yek, pral koleste i menshe sapaskre gilya givenn, oun koleske yon an o mouy čoungrenn." 
Job17:7 Mire yaka dikenn bouder gar mishto i doukatar oun ropastar. Mire moussya oun herya hi sano har i kasht. 
Job17:8 Te dikenn man kolla, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, ačell lenge o rakepen krik i trashatar. Oun kolla, an kolende kek doosh hatslo vell, penenn rhoyedes: “Kova djivell gar o Debleha." 
Job17:9 Yek, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, moukell gar tele peskro dromestar. Oun koon i djoudjo djipen djivell, vell zorleder oun zorleder.”" 
Job17:10 Ninna te vans yon halauter kay glan mande, hatsoms kek gosevo morshes mank lende." 
Job17:11 Miro djipaskro tsiro hi trouyel. Kova, hoy me mange lauter glan lom, oun hoy miro dji kamas, vas čičeske." 
Job17:12 Te hi rati, penenn le, te vals dives. Te vell tamlo, penenn le, te vals o dives sik." 
Job17:13 Hi bouder či, ap kova nay dikaus. Glan mande hi o moulengro them. Kote an o kalepen nay čivau man tele." 
Job17:14 Ap i grufta penau: Tou hal miro dad! Ap i kirme: T'mer han miri day oun mire phenya. 
Job17:15 Ap havo vavar koova dikap? Koon dikell lačepen mange te vell? 
Job17:16 Ko lačepen, ap hoy dikom, djal mantsa an o moulengro them tele, oun vell mantsa khetne an i čik čiddo." 
Job18:1 Oun o Bildad dran Shoua penas koy pre: 
Job18:2 Har rah kamenn t'mer gomme doureder te rakrell? Rakrenn t'mare djiyentsa! Oun palle kamah mer khetne te rakrell! 
Job18:3 Hoske rikreh tou men yaake narvelo har firhe? Hoske ham mer dinelo an tire yaka? 
Job18:4 An tiri rholi doukreh tout kokres! Patseh, i phoub hounte vell i moulo them, oun i bare barra hounte djan yek rigyatar ap i vavar, te vell diklo, kay hal tou an o čačepen?" 
Job18:5 Na-a, o djipaskri momeli o čilačestar djal vin. Oun leskri yag rhačell bouder gar." 
Job18:6 An leskro kheer vell tamlo. Oun koy momeli pral leste djal vin.
