Job18:7 Leskre herya, kolentsa yob zoreles pre stakras, hi palle bouder kek zoor an lende. Oun yob perell pral kova, hoy las lo pes glan." 
Job18:8 Leskre pire taprenn pen an i netsa, oun yob perell an i čakedi grouba." 
Job18:9 Pandle dorya rikrenn leskro piro zoreles oun moukenn les gar bouder vin. 
Job18:10 Khatedo ap ko drom, kay lo djal, hi i dori vin čiddo, te taprell lo les." 
Job18:11 Troul leste trouyel vell haki rigyatar bari traash, oun lell les palla, kay yob ninna stakrell." 
Job18:12 I bok lell leske leskri zoor krik. I bibarht hi tardo pash leste, har te vals li leskro maal." 
Job18:13 O nasslepen rhal les pre, i merepaskro nasslepen rhal leskre moussya oun herya krik." 
Job18:14 O merepen tserdell les vin dran o kheer, kolestar yob patsas, te nay djal leske či. Oun yob vell anlo glan koleste, kay hi o ray pral i moulende." 
Job18:15 An leskro kheer djivenn palle kolla, kay gar lestar venn. Oun ap leskro kheer venn yagakre barra vitsedo." 
Job18:16 Yob hi har i rouk: Tella merell leskro drab tele, oun pral venn leskre patria djelto." 
Job18:17 Kek ap i tseli phoub djinell gomme, koon yob his. Pash hakeneste vell lo bistedo." 
Job18:18 I phoubyatar, kay i djide djivenn, vas lo tradedo an ko tamlo them, kay i moule hi." 
Job18:19 Leske ačell kek čavo, vitar kek čavengro čavo mank peskre menshende. Kote, kay djivas lo, ačell kek lendar djido." 
Job18:20 Te vell o dives, kay vell leskri phagi pral leste, lenn kolla traash, kay kote djivenn, kay o kham pre djal. Oun kolenge ačell o rakepen krik i daryatar, kay kote djivenn, kay o kham tele djal." 
Job18:21 Čačepah, yaake djal i čilačenge oun kolenge, kay kamenn či o Deblestar te djinell." 
Job19:1 Oun o Hiob penas koy pre: 
Job19:2 Har rah kamenn t'mer mange miro dji te phagell, oun man t'mare labentsa paash te krell?" 
Job19:3 Deesh kope praasan man kanna, oun ladjenn t'men gar, te doukrenn man." 
Job19:4 Ninna te vals man čačepah gar čačes, vals kova miro koova." 
Job19:5 Čačepah, t'mer patsenn, te han feteder har me, oun kamenn mange te sikrell, te hi miri doosh, hoy anas man an i ladj!" 
Job19:6 Dikenn t'mer gar dren, te hi kova o Devel, kay djas gar mishto mantsa trouyel? Hi yaake, har te taprals lo man an i netsa." 
Job19:7 Te dau vin gole Avenn ap miri rig, shounell man kek. Ninna te dau zoreles gole, dell kek man miro čačepen." 
Job19:8 Ap miro drom čivas lo yaake boud barra, te nay djau gar pral vergel. Oun yob moukell man an o kalepen miro drom te hatsell." 
Job19:9 Yob las miro tselo bravlepen mandar, ninna miro an-dikepen pash i menshende." 
Job19:10 Yob dell man khetne haki rigyatar, sik hom gar bouder. Yob kras, te patsap bouder gar ap o lačepen, te dell lo man kova." 
Job19:11 Oun peskri rholi moukas lo pral mande pre rhačell, oun rikrell man har savo morsheske, kay kamell leske čilačepen te krell." 
Job19:12 Hi yaake, har te bičrals yob peskre lourden, te djan le ap mande. Yon kran penge i drom pash mande, oun čivan pen pre troul miro kheer." 
Job19:13 Yob rikras mire phralen dour mandar krik. Oun kolen, kay me lačes prindjrom, krenn yaake, har prindjrans le man gar." 
Job19:14 Mire menshe venn gar pash mande, oun mire mala bistran man." 
Job19:15 Kolla, kay mantsa an miro kheer djivenn oun kol djouvya, kay mange boudrenn, an lengre yaka hom har i vi-themari, har yek, koles prindjrenn yon gar." 
Job19:16 Te dau gole ap miro boudepaskro, shounell lo gar, ninna te mangap les zoryah." 
Job19:17 Miro dourho dran miro mouy khandell yaake, te rissrell pes miri romni mandar krik. Ninna mire phralenge hom i khand." 
Job19:18 Ninna i čavenge hom či moldo. Te kamau me pre te stell, sanenn le pral mande." 
Job19:19 Mire lače mala dikenn tele ap mande. Oun kolen, kay me o djiyestar kamom, sikrenn mange o doumo." 
Job19:20 Mire moussya oun herya hi sane har kashta. nashrom halauter, kokres miro djipen ačas." 
Job19:21 Mire mala, krenn t'mare djia mange pre! Avenn mange lačes! O Debleskro vast das man!" 
Job19:22 Hoske lenn t'mer man palla har o Devel kova krell? Kran t'mer mange gomme gar doha douka? 
Job19:23 Kamoms, te vans mire laba an i liil činlo, te venn le gar bistedo." 
Job19:24 Kamoms, te venn le i sasteha dino an i baro bar, te ačenn le hako tsireske!" 
Job19:25 Me djinau, te djivell o Devel, kova, kay miro koova an peskro vast lell. Oun an o tsillo, kay o čačepen vin rakedo vell pral kay phoub, hi yob miro rakepaskro." 
Job19:26 Ninna te hi miro mass yaake doukedo oun vom yaake sano, vell ko tsiro, kay dikau miro Debles." 
Job19:27 Ava, dikau les mire yakentsa. Oun yob hi mange kek, kay prindjrau gar. Miro dji nashell leste palla." 
Job19:28 Te poučenn t'mendar: “Har nay lah les palla? Havo koova nay anah ap leste pre?” 
Job19:29 Palle darenn t'men o rharestar! Yek, kay savi doosh ap peste anell, pral leste vell o rharo. Palle djinenn t'mer, te hi o Devel o čačepaskro morsh." 
Job20:1 Oun o Sofar dran o them Naama penas koy pre: 
Job20:2 Mange djan yaake boud laba an o shero trouyel; doleske hounte rakrap me touha pale: 
Job20:3 Tou praasal man tiro čingepah. Shoun, me djinau, hoy te penap touke koy pre." 
Job20:4 Djinal tou gar hako tsiro, yaake rah har i mensho ap kay phoub hi," 
Job20:5 vell koy barhteli gole kol čilačendar kokres i tikno tsiro shounlo. Oun koy barht kolestar, kay kamell či o Deblestar te djinell, djal sik trouyel." 
Job20:6 Ninna te vell lo yaake baro, te djal lo bis pash o bolepen pre, oun leskro shero pral bis pash i volke," 
Job20:7 vell lo krik lino, oun vell pale čik. Kek tsireske vell lo bouder hatslo. Oun kolla, kay prindjran les poučenn palle: Kay hi lo?" 
Job20:8 Yob djal krik har i souni, oun vell bouder gar hatslo. Har kova, hoy yek souni das, bouder gar koy hi, yaake ačell či lestar." 
Job20:9 Kolla, kay dikan les, dikenn les bouder gar. Kote, kay djivas lo, hi lo bouder gar." 
Job20:10 Leskre čave hounte denn kova pale, hoy lengro dad i čorvelendar čoras." 
Job20:11 Ninna te hi lo gomme terno oun zorelo, hounte merell lo, oun vell an i čik čiddo." 
Job20:12 An leskro mouy hi o čilačepen har i goudlo rhapen, hoy yob khatrell tel peskri čip," 
Job20:13 oun rikrell les kote yaake rah har djala, te piyell lo i rah tsiro leskro goudlepen." 
Job20:14 Te vell ko rhapen an leskro per, nashrell lo peskro goudlepen, oun vell har i sapeskro čounger, hoy anell o merepen." 
Job20:15 Leskro randedo koova hi har i rhapen, hoy hounte čadell lo pale vin. O Devel lell ko randedo koova lestar krik." 
Job20:16 Ko čilačo koova, hoy lo kras, hi an leste har sapeskro čounger, oun marell les har i čilačo sap, kay dandras les." 
Job20:17 Yob dikell bouder či o bravlepastar an kava them, ko boud gvin oun thoud, hoy har lengste panya nashenn." 
Job20:18 Kova, hoy lo peske khetne anas, hounte dell lo pale, oun nay rikrell les gar. Oun kova, hoy lo dren paras, krell les gar barhtelo." 
Job20:19 I čorvelen rikras lo tele, oun vas lenge gar ap i rig. Yob tradas menshen dran pengre khera, te lell lo peske kol khera, hoy yob gar kras." 
Job20:20 An kek tsiro nay las lo doha. Doleske ačell leske ninna či foun leskro kouč koova. 
Job20:21 Yob rhas lauter an peste dren, moukas či pral i vavarenge. Doleske ačell leskro shoukar djipen gar." 
Job20:22 An ko tsiro, kay les an lauter boudeder har doha hi, vell i daar pral leste. I phari bibarht dell les tele." 
Job20:23 Ap ko tsiro, kay krell lo peskro per pherdo, bičrell o Devel peskri zoreli rholi ap leste, oun moukell lat har brishin tele ap leste te perell." 
Job20:24 Ninna te nay nashell lo glan o sasterno rharo, dell les yek tele karye." 
Job20:25 Ko faylo vell an leskro bouko karye dino, oun dran o doumo djal lo vin. Bari traash taprell les." 
Job20:26 Leskro tselo kouč koova vell paash kerdo. Oun i yag, hoy kek mensho čivas, rhačrell les pre, oun kolla, kay an leskro kheer pral ačan." 
Job20:27 O bolepen rakrell vin, havi doosh yob ap peste anas, oun i phoub hadell pes oun penell: Tou hal čilačo." 
Job20:28 Leskro tselo bravlepen an leskro kheer vell krik lino – ap ko dives, kay vell o Debleskri rholi pral i čilačende har divye panya." 
Job20:29 Kava hi, hoy o Debles i čilačenge hi, kova, hoy lo lenge glan dikas." 
Job21:1 Koy pre penas o Hiob: 
Job21:2 Shounenn mishto, hoy penau! Te shounenn t'mer man, palle djal mange feteder an miro dji." 
Job21:3 Mangau t'men, moukenn man te rakrell! Pal kova nay sanenn pral mande!" 
Job21:4 Čačepah, miro čingepen hi gar i mensheha. Ninna te vals yaake, hoske te vap me gar rhoyedo?" 
Job21:5 Dikenn ap mande! Oun t'mer krenn bare yaka i trashatar, oun čivenn t'maro vast glan o mouy!" 
Job21:6 Te vell mange an miro shero, har djoungeles mange djal, taprell man i daar, oun moukell man te trissell." 
Job21:7 Hoske ačenn kol čilače djido venn phouro, oun lengri zoor vell bareder?" 
Job21:8 Lengre čave djivenn troul lende trouyel. Oun yon dikenn, har lengre čavengre čave baro venn." 
Job21:9 Yon djivenn an lačepen an lengre khera kek daryah. Oun o Devel dell len kek phagi. 
Job21:10 Lengre gourma stenn ap i groumya, oun kolla lenn terne, kolendar kek merell." 
Job21:11 I čilače bičrenn lengre čaven vin khelepaske. Oun yon stenn trouyel har tikne bakre. 
Job21:12 Oun givenn pash o bashepen ap i tikne pauke oun doryengre bashepangre, oun khelenn barhteles pash o bashepen ap i tikne phourdepangre." 
Job21:13 Kol čilačen hi i shoukar djipen. Oun kek doukentsa merenn le, oun djan an o moulengro them." 
Job21:14 I čilače penenn ap o Debleste: “Dja touke mendar! Mer kamah či tire dromendar te djinell. 
Job21:15 Koon hi o zorelo Devel, te boudras mer leske? Hoy hi kova menge moldo, te mangas les an?”" 
Job21:16 Kal menshe penenn, te hi len pengri barht an pengre vasta. Me patsau gar, te hi kova čačo, hoy rakrenn yon penge dren." 
Job21:17 Gar boud kope meras i čilačo, glan te vas lo phouro. Gar boud kope vas i bibarht pral leste. Gar boud kope anas o Devel i phagi pral leste an peskri rholi," 
Job21:18 oun phourdas les krik, har phourdell i dourho o phouss krik, oun har hidjrell i zorelo phourdepen o čik krik." 
Job21:19 T'mer penenn, te anell o Devel i phagi pral i čavende ko čilačestar. Me penau: Yob hounte dals koy phagi koleste, kay čilačo koova kras, te hayvell yob kova," 
Job21:20 oun dikell peskre yakentsa peskri bibarht, oun hayvell kokres, har kova hi, te vell o zorelo Debleskri rholi ap leste." 
Job21:21 Hi lo moulo, hi leske yek, har djal leskre čavenge." 
Job21:22 Nay penell i mensho o Debleske, har čomone hounte vell – leske, kay hi o čačepaskro ray pral halauterende, ninna pral i pralstunende?" 
Job21:23 Ko yek merell, te hi lo sasto oun zorelo, oun djivell i shoukar djipen kek daryah." 
Job21:24 Yob hi thoullo lačo rhapastar, oun leskre kokale hi zorelo." 
Job21:25 Ko vavar merell pal i pharo djipen oun dikas kek barht. 
Job21:26 Khetne hi le tel i phoub, oun i kirme čakrenn len." 
Job21:27 Me hayvau, havo koova an t'mare sherya trouyel djal, oun har kamenn man te doukrell." 
Job21:28 T'mer penenn: “Hoy vas dran o kheer ko rayestar, kay yaake boud čilačepen kras?”" 
Job21:29 Poučan t'mer gar kolen, kay ap t'maro drom van? Patsenn t'mer gar, hoy yon dikan oun shounan?" 
Job21:30 Ap ko dives, kay vell i bibarht, kay vell o Debleskri rholi pral i menshende, ačell o čilačo djido." 
Job21:31 Kek penell o čilačeske an o mouy dren, havo djoungelo koova yob kras. Kek dell les ko čilačepen pale, hoy lo ap i vavarende kras." 
Job21:32 Ap ko dives, kay vell lo ap o handako anlo, denn morsha yak ap leskri grufta." 
Job21:33 Te vell lo kote anlo, djan boud boud menshe pal leste oun glan leste. Oun yaake har lo paskedo vell, hi kova leske shoukar." 
Job21:34 Patsenn t'mer, kay t'mare laba krenn, te djal mange feteder an miro dji? T'mare laba hi či-moldo! Kova, hoy mange penenn, hi či har rhorhepen!" 
Job22:1 Oun o Elifas ko Temanari penas koy pre: 
Job22:2 Nay vell kova, hoy i mensho krell, o Debleske čomone moldo? Te hi i menshes gosvepen, hi kova leske kokres čomone moldo." 
Job22:3 Te hal tou i lačo oun čačo morsh, oun kek doosh hi ap toute, hi o zorelo Debles čomone kolestar?" 
Job22:4 Čingrell o Devel touha, oun dell tout i phagi doleske, kay djiveh leha!" 
Job22:5 Na-a! Tiro čilačepen hounte vals baro – doleske krell lo kova! Kreh tou gar pale te pale čilačo koova? 
Job22:6 Har tiro phraal toutar patsas, lal touke čomone lestar, te rikress les, bis te yob peskri siyaan playsras. Leskre koola lal lestar, oun moukal leske kek an-ripaske." 
Job22:7 Koles, kay troush his, dal kek pani. Koles, kay bokas, dal kek maro." 
Job22:8 O morsh, koles boud penepaske hi, las peske o them, oun o an-diklo djivell kote dren." 
Job22:9 Koy djouvel, kolakro rom meras, bičral tou toutar krik, oun dal lat či an o vast. Oun djal kol čaventsa čilačes trouyel, kolengro dad meras." 
Job22:10 Doleske djal touke kanna, har te vals pandlo an i netsa. Oun tou trisseh i daryatar, hoy tout ap yek kopo tapras." 
Job22:11 Tamlepen hi troul toute, te nay dikeh či. Oun bare panya djan pral toute." 
Job22:12 Hi o Devel gar dour pre an o bolepen? Dik pre pash i bolepangre momlia, dik, har dour pre kolla hi!" 
Job22:13 Oun tou poučeh: “Hoy nay djinell o Devel? Hi lo gar khatedo pal kale volke? Har nay rakrell lo o čačepen pral mende vin? 
Job22:14 Yob nashell kote, kay o bolepen oun i phoub khetne venn, oun pesse volke hi troul leste, yaake te nay dikell lo či.”" 
Job22:15 Kameh tou o phouro drom te djal, kay i čilače pre djan?" 
Job22:16 Kolla meran, har his le gomme gar phouro – van krik thodo har i kheer i zorelo panyestar." 
Job22:17 Oun yon penan ap o Debleste: “Dja touke mendar!” Oun: “Hoy nay krell menge o zorelo Devel?” 
Job22:18 Oun yob his kova, kay kras lengre khera pherdo lačo koova! Hoske i čilače sau koova rakrenna an pengre djia, hayvau me gar." 
Job22:19 I lače menshe hi barhtelo, te dikenn le, har lenn i čilače pengri phagi, Oun kolla, ap kolende kek doosh hi, sanenn pral lende:" 
Job22:20 “Čačepah, halauter, hoy i čilačen his, hi paash, Oun kova, hoy pral ačas, rhačras i yag.”" 
Job22:21 Yaake, ab o Debleha pale an o lačepen! Oun ma činge leha! Palle vell pale barht an tiro djipen." 
Job22:22 Mouk touke dran leskro mouy čomone te penell, oun rike leskre laba an tiro dji!" 
Job22:23 Te veh tou pale pash o zorelo Debleste, krell lo tout pale zorelo. Čip o čilačepen dour krik dran tiro kheer!" 
Job22:24 Te hi touke tiro sonakay gar boudeder moldo har čik, tiro lačeder sonakay gar boudeder har kol barra an i tikne panya," 
Job22:25 palle vell touke o zorelo Devel har tiro sonakay oun kouč roup. 
Job22:26 Palle hal barhtelo pral o zorelo Debleste. Oun tou hadeh tiro shero pre pash leste. 
Job22:27 Tou mangeh les an, oun yob shounell ap toute. Oun tou aneh leste kova, hoy tou leske sovel dal." 
Job22:28 Hoy tou touke glan lal, kova djal touke mishto. Oun i momeli djal pre pral tire dromma." 
Job22:29 Ap kolende, kay hounte djan i telstouno drom, peneh tou: Stenn pre! Oun o Devel hadell koles pale pre, kay hidjrell peskre yaka gar pre." 
Job22:30 Ninna koles, kay doosh ap peste hi, lell lo dran o merepen vin, dran kova, kay tou kek čilačepen kreh." 
Job23:1 Oun o Hiob penas koy pre: 
Job23:2 Ninna kava dives rakrau me dran i doukedo dji. O Debleskro vast hi phares ap mande čiddo, te hounte lap phares dourho." 
Job23:3 Kamoms te djinap, har nay hatsau les, oun har nay vau kote, kay lo o čačepen vin rakrell!" 
Job23:4 Palle anoms miro koova glan leste, oun penoms leske kova lauter, hoy nay rakrell mange mishto." 
Job23:5 Kamoms te djinap, hoy yob koy pre penell, oun te shounap, hoy les hi mange te penell." 
Job23:6 Čingrals lo mantsa an peskri bari zoor? Na-a, yob shounals mishto ap mire laba." 
Job23:7 Palle anoms miro čingepen glan leste, oun sikroms, te hom an o čačepen tardo. Oun o Devel, miro čačepaskro ray, dikals, te hi kek doosh ap mande, oun moukals man te djal hako tsireske." 
Job23:8 Te rodau me o Debles glan mande, hi lo gar koy, te rodau les pal mande, hayvau me lestar či." 
Job23:9 Te djau serves, dikau či, hoy yob krell, te rissrau man ap i čači rig, dikau les kote vitar gar." 
Job23:10 Yob djinell havo drom me djau. Dikals lo palla, har djivau, hatsals lo vin, te hom djoudjo har sonakay." 
Job23:11 Me rikrom mire pire ap leskro drom, oun ačom ap leste, oun djom gar tele lestar." 
Job23:12 Me rikrom man ap hako lab, hoy vas dran leskro mouy. Oun rikrom halauter an miro dji, hoy lo rakras." 
Job23:13 Yob ačell koon yob hi. Koon nay anell les kolestar krik, hoy lo kamell te krell? Kova, hoy kamell lo te krell, kova krell lo." 
Job23:14 Ava, yob krell kova doureder, hoy les mantsa glan his. Oun les hi boud koova mange an peskro dji." 
Job23:15 Doleske taprell man i traash glan leste. Te vell kova mange an o shero, darau zoreles lestar." 
Job23:16 Ava, o Devel kras miro dji darenes, o zorelo Devel kras mange bari traash." 
Job23:17 Hi gar i kali rat, vitar gar ko tamlepen glan mande, te merap i daryatar. Na-a, darau o Deblestar." 
Job24:1 Hoske dell o zorelo Devel kek tsirya, kay rakrell lo o čačepen vin pral i čilačende? Kolla, kay les prindjrenn, dikenn gar, har oun kaana yob kova krell." 
Job24:2 O čilače čivenn kol barra ap i rig, hoy sikrenn har baro yekeskro them hi. Oun yon čorenn bakre oun anenn len ap pengro kotar phoub." 
Job24:3 Yon lenn penge i bourika kolendar, kay len kek dad bouder hi, oun lenn koy groumni kolatar, kolakro rom meras, bis te playsrell li peskri siyaan." 
Job24:4 Yon tradenn i čorvelen o dromestar tele. Oun kolen či hi, kolla hounte khatrenn pen lendar." 
Job24:5 Yaake har i divye bourike hounte djan le an o moulo tato them, te rodenn le rhapen, kote, kay gar boud bares vell, te hi len čomone, hoy denn le pengre čaven te rhal." 
Job24:6 Ap i harhetikri phoub vavarendar rodenn le djob, hoy pral ačas. Oun i drakengre roukendar, hoy i bravelen hi, lenn le penge kol drake, hoy bistedo van." 
Job24:7 An i rati hi len kek koola, te čakrenn le pen, kek plarhta, hoy len tato rikrell an o shil." 
Job24:8 Te dell bari brishin an i berge, venn le sapeno, oun hounte beshenn tel i bare barra, te khatrenn le pen glan o brishin." 
Job24:9 Čilače menshe lenn zoryah i čorveli dake o ternepen dran i moussya krik, koleskro dad meras. Oun yon penenn ap late: Me dau les touke pale, te playsral mange tiri siyaan." 
Job24:10 I čorvele djan trouyel, oun len hi či an-ripaske, oun hounte bokenna, ninna te hidjrenn le o khetne pandlo djob." 
Job24:11 Mank barra krenn le djet, oun stakrenn i drake, te krenn le mool, oun koy pashel hounte troushenn le." 
Job24:12 An i forya denn kolla gole, kay hi doukedo oun merenn. Oun o Devel dell kek yak ap ko narvelo koova, hoy i čilače krenn." 
Job24:13 Čilače menshe kamenn gar o dives, oun djan gar ap dromma, ap kolende o kham perell. Save dromendar djan le tele." 
Job24:14 Glan te djal o kham pre, stell o marepaskro pre oun marell o čorveles, koles či hi. Oun rati djal o marepaskro trouyel, te čorell lo." 
Job24:15 Kova, kay kamell pash o vavareskri romyate te djal, lourell ap i rat. Yob penell peske: An i rat nay dikell man kek yak. Oun čivell i diklo glan peskro mouy." 
Job24:16 An i rat phagenn i čorepangre an i khera dren. Oun te vell o dives, khatrenn le pen, oun kamenn gar, te venn le diklo." 
Job24:17 Kali rat hi lenge lauterenge har vavarenge i tsalla. An i rati hi len kek daar. 
Job24:18 O čilačo vell sik krik hidjedo har i patri ap o pani. Ap leskro kotar phoub hi i praasepen čiddo. Pash peskre drakengre rouka djal lo bouder gar. 
Job24:19 Yaake har o gib krik djal, te vell o kham oun o tatepen, yaake djan kolla an o moulengro them, kay o Debleskro dromestar tele djan." 
Job24:20 Saves bistrell ninna leskri day. I kirme rhan pen čales ap leste. Kekeske vell lo bouder an o shero. Yaake phagell o čilačepen khetne har kasht. 
Job24:21 Yob randas kolatar, kay kek čave nay las, kolake kek čavo boldo vas. Oun kolake o rom meras, lake kras lo kek lačepen." 
Job24:22 Peskri zoryah lell o Devel o djipen krik kolendar, kay boud penepaske hi. Te stell lo pre, hounte darenn le pengro djipaske." 
Job24:23 Yob moukell len te patsell, te djal lenge či. Oun lell hako koova an o yak, hoy le krenn." 
Job24:24 Kol an-dikle van baro i tikno tsireske. Oun ap yek kopo hi le bouder gar koy. Yon čivenn pengro shero tele har i blouma hoy merell. Oun har o shero ap o djob venn le tele činlo. 
Job24:25 Hi kova gar yaake? Koon kamell man kanna i rhorheneske te krell, oun sikrell, te his kova gar čačo, hoy me penom?" 
Job25:1 O Bildad dran Shoua penas koy pre: 
Job25:2 O Debles hi i zoor pral halauter, oun hakeno hounte trashell lestar. I zorelo vasteha krell lo, te vell kek čingepen an peskro bolepaskro them." 
Job25:3 Kek nay ginell kitse bolepangre lourde les hi. Kek hi koy, pral koleste leskro kham gar pre djal." 
Job25:4 Glan o Debleskre yaka hi kek mensho an o čačepen tardo. Kek mensho hi erligo glan leste. 
Job25:5 Ninna o čon oun i bolepangre momlia hi gar djoudjo glan leskre yaka. 
Job25:6 Te dikell lo ap i mensheste, hi kova glan leste gar boudeder har i kiri oun i kirmo!" 
Job26:1 Oun o Hiob penas koy pre: 
Job26:2 Patseh, kava rakepah val ap i rig mange, i morsheske, koles kek zoor bouder hi, oun kay nay rikrell pes bouder gar ap i herya?" 
Job26:3 Har shoukar penal mange, hoy te krap, mange, i morsheske, koles kek gosvepen hi! Oun sikral mange boud koova, hoy hounte djinap oun hayvap!" 
Job26:4 Koon penas touke, te rakress yaake? Koon čivas touke kal laba an o mouy?" 
Job26:5 An o moulengro them, an i panya tel i phoub trissenn i moule i daryatar." 
Job26:6 O moulengro them hi pre čakedo čiddo glan o Debleste. Či khatrell les glan leskre yaka. 
Job26:7 O Devel kras o bolepen bourhles pral kova, kay či hi, oun pandas i phoub kote pre, kay či hi." 
Job26:8 Yob pandell o brishin dren an i volke, oun kolla djan gar paash, fothe pharo o pani ninna hi." 
Job26:9 Yob khatrell peskri beshepaskri pal pesse volke. 
Job26:10 Yob čivas i bogo pral o baro pani yek rigyatar ap i vavar, te vell o dives oun i rati gar khetne." 
Job26:11 Te dell o Devel kol bergen trad, hoy hidjrenn o bolepen, trissenn le i daryatar." 
Job26:12 Peskri zoryah kras lo o baro pani, te vell lo divyo, oun yob hayvas, har nay das lo o Rahab moulo." 
Job26:13 Yob phourdas i volke krik, oun o bolepen vas shoukar. Oun leskro vast das ko sik panyeskro sap moules čourye." 
Job26:14 Dik, kava hi či har i tikno kotar kolestar, hoy yob kras. Oun hoy lestar shounam, hi gar boudeder har i tikno lab. Kek nay hayvell, har baro leskri zoor čačepah hi!" 
Job27:1 Oun o Hiob rakras pale oun penas kal laba: 
Job27:2 O Devel kras, te lap gar miro čačepen. O zorelo Devel kras miro djipen shoutlo. Me dau man sovel pash o djido Debleste:" 
Job27:3 Yaake rah har an mande gomme djipen hi, oun o dourho o Deblestar an miro nak hi," 
Job27:4 rakrell miro mouy kek rhorhepen, oun miri čip kokres kova, hoy čačo hi." 
Job27:5 An kek tsiro kamau, te dap t'men čačes. Bis te merau, penau me: Kek doosh anom ap mande." 
Job27:6 Me hom an o čačepen. Ap kova rikrau man zoreles, oun ačau koy pashel. Kek dives penell miro dji mange: Kova hoy kral, his gar mishto." 
Job27:7 Koon kamell mange čilačepen, leske te djal har i čilačenge! Koon stakrell khatar mande pre, leske te djal har kolenge, kay gar an o čačepen hi!" 
Job27:8 Ap hoy nay rikrell pes kova, kay kamell či o Deblestar te djinell, te vell ko tsiro, kay lo hounte merell, oun o Devel leskro djipen lestar lell?" 
Job27:9 Te vell i pharo tsiro pral leste, oun yob dell gole ap o Debleste, shounell o Devel palle? Na-a!" 
Job27:10 Yob hi gar savo mensho, kay hatsell peskri barht pash o zorelo Debleste, oun dell hako tsiro gole ap leste." 
Job27:11 Me kamau t'mende te sikrell, hoy o zorelo Devel krell. Kamau vin te rakrell, hoy an leskro dji hi." 
Job27:12 T'mer dikan kava lauter ninna! Hoske rakrenn t'mer palle savo dinelo koova? 
Job27:13 Kova hi koy phagi, hoy dell o zorelo Devel i čilačeske, koleske, kay i vavaren zoryah tele rikras:" 
Job27:14 Te venn leskre čave ninna boud, merenn boud lendar an o kourepen. Vavaren hi gar doha te rhal." 
Job27:15 Kolla lendar gomme pral ačenn, kolen marell i djoungelo nasslepen. Oun lengre romya nay rovan gar pral pengre moule romende." 
Job27:16 Ninna te las yob peske yaake boud roup khetne har čik, oun boud boud koola an-ripaske," 
Job27:17 vell i vavar, yek, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, oun hidjrell kol koola. Oun ko roup lenn kolla, ap kolende kek doosh hi." 
Job27:18 Leskro kheer, hoy lo peske kras, hi gar zorelo tardo – hi har i spinnakri netsa, oun har sau patyengro kheer, hoy yek peske kras, kay dell garda ap i kotar phoub." 
Job27:19 Braveles čivell lo pes tele, – i letsto kopo! Te krell lo peskre yaka pale pre, hi bouder či koy." 
Job27:20 I daar vell pral leste har i zorelo pani. An i rat lell les i bari phourdepen peha. 
Job27:21 I tato zorelo dourho hadell les pre, hidjrell les krik, oun phourdell les krik dran peskro kheer." 
Job27:22 Ko dourho phourdell ap leste peskri tseli zoryah, oun moukell gar tele. Oun ko mensho marell pes tele, te nashell lo peske glan leskri zoor." 
Job27:23 Ko dourho hi har yek, kay dell i vasta pral leste khetne, oun dell shol har te sals lo pral leste, kay lo ninna djal." 
Job28:1 Tel i phoub nay hatsenn le roup. Oun o sonakay, les hi i platsa, kay thovenn le les vin." 
Job28:2 Dour dran i phoub lenn le saster vin, oun lolo saster dran i barra, hoy venn tato kerdo, te vell o lolo saster vin." 
Job28:3 O mensho lell i momeli peha, te nay boudrell lo tel i phoub, oun rodell kote an i barra, yaake dour har djala, pal kova, hoy khatedo hi an o tamlepen." 
Job28:4 Dour krik foun kotar, kay menshe djivenn, krenn le i grouba, hoy djal dour tele, kote kay kek mensho ap i raysa djal. Oun pandenn pen ap i shello, oun moukenn pen tele an koy grouba, dour krik i vavar menshendar." 
Job28:5 Pral ap i phoub vell djob baro. Oun tella an i phoub rissrenn le lauter trouyel, yaake te dikell kova vin har pal i yag." 
Job28:6 An kol bare barra an i phoub hatsenn le kouč blauete barra, oun an i čik sonakay." 
Job28:7 Kek adlari prindjrell o drom pash kol barra, oun kek čirklo, koles i feteder yaka hi." 
Job28:8 Kek levo oun kek vavar divyo firho djas ap ko drom, hoy kote djal." 
Job28:9 O mensho phagell an kol bare zorele barra, oun rissrell i tsele berge trouyel." 
Job28:10 Dren an kol barrengre berge krell lo dromma, oun hatsell kote boud kouč koova." 
Job28:11 Yob dikell kol tikne panya, hoy venn dran i phoub, oun venn lengste panya. Oun ko kouč koova an i phoub, hoy kek dikas, lell lo vin, oun anell les kote, kay vell lo diklo." 
Job28:12 Koon nay penell mange, kay nay vell o gosvepen hatslo? Kay nay hatsah vin, har te djivas i gosevo djipen?" 
Job28:13 Kek mensho djinell, har boud o gosvepen moldo hi. Ap i phoub, kay i menshe djivenn, vell lo gar hatslo." 
Job28:14 O telstunepen penell: An mande hi lo gar! Oun o baro pani penell: Pash mande hi lo vitar gar. 
Job28:15 I menshe nay ginenn gar o gosvepen, nay denn kek roup vitar kek sonakay, te playsrenn le leske." 
Job28:16 O gosvepen hi boudeder moldo har o lačeder sonakay oun kouč blauete barra. 
Job28:17 O sonakay oun kouč glaso hi gar yaake kouč har o gosvepen. Vitar kek shoukar sonakangre čare nay dell yek, te lell lo o gosvepen." 
Job28:18 Koralle oun kristallo hi gar doha moldo, te ginell yek lentsa o gosvepen. Kones gosvepen hi, hi bravleder har kones kouč mirklia hi." 
Job28:19 Ninna ko kouč djelto bar dran o them Etiopia oun ko lačeder sonakay hi gar yaake boud moldo har o gosvepen. 
Job28:20 O gosvepen, foun kay vell lo? Oun kay nay hatsah mer vin, har te djivas i gosevo djipen?" 
Job28:21 Khatedo hi lo glan i yaka halauterendar, kay djivenn. Ninna i čirkle an o bolepen nay dikenn les gar." 
Job28:22 Oun an o moulengro them vell penlo: Mer shounam mare kandentsa, har vas pral leste rakedo." 
Job28:23 O Devel kokres hi kova, kay djinell o drom, hoy anell pash o gosvepen. Oun yob kokres djinell, kay o gosvepen khere hi." 
Job28:24 Yob hi kova, kay dikell ap i tseli phoub, yaake dour har djal li, oun lauter, hoy ap late hi." 
Job28:25 Har yob o dourho peskri zoor das, har lo penas, bis kay ko baro pani nay djal," 
Job28:26 har yob o brishin peskre tsirya das, oun o bolepaskri yag peskro drom sikras," 
Job28:27 koy dikas lo, har boud moldo o gosvepen hi. Yob las les an i yak oun penas: O gosvepen hi lačo!" 
Job28:28 Yob penas ap o mensheste: Savo mensho hi gosevo, kay rikrell pes o Debles glan i yaka pash kova, hoy lo krell. Savo mensho hayvas, har te djivell lo o gosevo djipen, kay rikrell pes pale o čilačepastar." 
Job29:1 Oun o Hiob rakras pale oun penas kal laba: 
Job29:2 Ah, te voms pale har an ko tsiro, hoy pal mande hi, har an kol bersha, kay o Devel ap mande yak das," 
Job29:3 har leskri momeli pral miro shero his, oun me yaake an i kali rat nay trouyel djom," 
Job29:4 har his man gomme miri tseli zoor, oun o Devel miro maal his, oun yak das ap miro kheer," 
Job29:5 har o zorelo Devel mantsa his, oun mire čave troul mande his," 
Job29:6 har dan mire groumya oun bouzya boudeder har doha thoud, oun mire djeteskre rouka yaake boud djet dan, te nashas lo har pani vin dran o bar, kay van i djeteskre drake tiknes kerdo!" 
Job29:7 Har djom me pre an o foreskro baro voudar, oun beshom man pash i pralstunende," 
Job29:8 dikan man i terne oun djan ap i rig, oun i phoure stan pre oun ačan tardo." 
Job29:9 I pralstoune rikran pengre laba pale, oun čivan pengro vast ap o mouy." 
Job29:10 Ninna i bare morsha o forestar rakran bouder gar, oun rikran pengro mouy." 
Job29:11 Hakeno, kay shounas man, sharas man. Oun koon man dikas, rakras lačo koova pral mande." 
Job29:12 Me vom ko čorveleske ap i rig, kay ap mande gole das. Oun ko čavo, koleskro dad meras, oun leske kek bouder koy his, koleske homs me koy." 
Job29:13 Kolla, kay merans, te voms gar koy, rakran i barht pral mande vin. Oun me krom, te givas o dji kolatar, kolakro rom meras." 
Job29:14 Hako tsiro krom, hoy čačo hi. Oun miro čačepen his ap mande, har te vals lo miro ripen oun miri stadi." 
Job29:15 O koreleske homs me har i yak, oun i heri koleske, kay nay nashell gar." 
Job29:16 O čorveleske homs me har i dad, oun lom koleskro koova an o vast, kay i vi-themari his." 
Job29:17 I čilačeske dom i danda paash, oun tserdom koles dran leskro mouy, hoy kamas lo te rhal." 
Job29:18 An ko tsiro patsom, te vau i phouro morsh, oun merau an o lačo phourepen mank mire čavende." 
Job29:19 Me homs har i rouk, koleskre draba djan bis pash o pani, oun koleskre kashta venn sapeno haki rat." 
Job29:20 Pash i menshende homs hako tsiro an-diklo, oun lom pale te pale nevi zoor." 
Job29:21 Yon shounan, hoy man penepaske his. Oun rakran či, bis te penom lenge, hoy te krenn le." 
Job29:22 Pal mande penas bouder kek vavar čomone. Mire laba peran ap lende tele har lačo brishin. 
Job29:23 Yon dikan ap mande, te rakrap, har kamenn le, te vell brishin. oun piyan mire laba, har i harhetikri phoub o brishin piyell." 
Job29:24 Te his lenge ropaske, som kamles ap lende. Oun har dikom lačes ap lende, lan le pale nevi zoor." 
Job29:25 Me homs lengro pralstouno, oun rodom lenge o drom vin. Oun djivom mank lende har i baro ray mashkral peskre lourdende. Oun rakrom lačes kolentsa, kolenge ropaske his." 
Job30:1 Kanna sanenn le pral mande, kolla, kay terneder hi har me, kolengre dada an mire yaka gar doha moldo his, te denn le yak ap mire bakre khetne mire djouklentsa." 
Job30:2 Len his bouder kek zoor an pengre moussya. Hoy vals man kolestar, te boudrans le mange?" 
Job30:3 Čorvele his le, oun i bokatar dandran le ap kova trouyel, hoy le an o moulo divyo them hatsan, kay kek djivell." 
Job30:4 Kote rodan le pen o londo zenlepen khetne mashkral i bourra, oun rhan ninna i draba kol bourrendar, hoy kharenn Ginster." 
Job30:5 Foun kotar, kay i menshe khetne djivenn, van yon vin tradedo. Yon dan pal lende gole, har pal i čorepaskro." 
Job30:6 An i barrengre berge, hoy djan ap i rigya i lengsto panyestar dour pre, hi le khere, ninna tel i phoub, oun mank i bare barra." 
Job30:7 Mashkral i bourra denn le gole, oun tel i soubyengre bourra venn le khetne." 
Job30:8 Či-molde hi le, kolengre laba kek prindjrell, oun kay van vin tradedo dran o them." 
Job30:9 Oun kanna givenn lengre čave sapaskre gilya pral mande. Me vom lenge rakepaske. 
Job30:10 Lenge vell djoungeles glan mande, oun rikrenn pen dour krik mandar, oun čoungrenn mange an o mouy." 
Job30:11 O Devel phagas miri zoor, oun kras man tiknes. Doleske krenn le mantsa, hoy le kamenn." 
Job30:12 Ap miri čači rig hadenn pen čilače terne morsha, oun stakrenn mange mire herya krik. Oun kran mange save dromma, te hounte perap ap lende." 
Job30:13 Yon kran bare rhebya an miro drom, te nashap mange gar. Oun kek hi koy, kay len pale rikrell." 
Job30:14 Har lourde i foreskri massouri paash krenna, oun tel i barra, hoy tele peran, dren venna, venn yon pash mande." 
Job30:15 Bari daar tapras man. Miro an-dikepen djas peske, har te phourdals les i dourho krik. Oun miri barht djas krik har i folka." 
Job30:16 O djipen an mande nashell krik har pani. Čilače divessa van pral mande. 
Job30:17 Rati dell i douk čourye an mire kokale. oun koy douk, hoy man rhal, sovell gar." 
Job30:18 Peskri zoryah krell li miri hauta phouro. Koya hi mange har miro gad, hoy mange bourhlo troul i meen hi." 
Job30:19 Yob vitsras man an i čik. Kanna hom me ninna bouder či har čik. 
Job30:20 Me dau ap toute gole oun tou rakreh ap mande gar pale. Me hom kay tardo, oun tou deh gar yak ap mande." 
Job30:21 Tou val mange har i čilačo, oun tiri tseli zoryah leh man palla." 
Job30:22 Tou moukeh i dourho te vell, hoy hadell man pre oun phourdell man krik, oun vitsrell man pre oun tele an i baro phourdepen." 
Job30:23 Me djinau kanna, tou kameh man an o moulengro them te anell, kay i tsele djide khetne venn pal lengro merepen." 
Job30:24 Te peras yekeskro kheer khetne, oun yob hi čiddo tel i barra, rikrell lo gar peskro vast vin? Te vell i bibarht pral yekeste, dell lo gar gole?" 
Job30:25 Me rovom kolenge, kay len save phare divessa his. Oun miro dji doukas, har dikom ko čorveles." 
Job30:26 Me patsom, te vell lačepen ap mande, oun čilačepen vas. Mire yaka rodan pal i momeli, oun kalepen vas." 
Job30:27 Lauter an mande rhačella, oun i douk moukell gar pale. Phare djoungele divessa peran pral mande dren." 
Job30:28 Ropah djau me trouyel, oun kek kham dikau me bouder. Kote kay i menshe khetne venn, stau me pre oun dau gole." 
Job30:29 Miri gole hi har i gole i divye djouklendar oun kol bare čirklendar, kay kharenn autruches." 
Job30:30 Miri hauta vas kalo ap mande, oun perell mandar tele. Oun o fibro rhačell an mire kokale." 
Job30:31 Miri doryengri bashepaskri bashrell kokres ropaskre gilya. Oun o bashepen ap miri tikni phourdepaskri hi har o ropen pral yekeste, kay meras." 
Job31:1 Me djom i sovel mire yakentsa dren, te dikap gar loubekanes i terni čake palla." 
Job31:2 Te rikroms me gar ap kova, hoy krals palle mantsa o Devel an o pralstunepen? Čačepah o zorelo Devel, kay hi an o pralstouno bolepen, dals man kek lačo koova koleske!" 
Job31:3 Pral i čilačo vell bibarht, oun koleske, kay krell djoungelo koova, djal či mishto." 
Job31:4 O Devel dikell halauter, hoy krau, oun djinell, havo drom mire pire djan." 
Job31:5 Djom me i rhorheno drom? Rakrom douy čipyentsa? 
Job31:6 Me mangau o Debles, te dikell lo palla an o čačepen: Lom me doosh ap mande oder gar? Palle dikell lo, te hom an o čačepen tardo." 
Job31:7 Te djan mire herya tele leskro dromestar, oun te nashas miro dji mire yakenge palla, oun te kran mire vasta čomone, hoy gar mishto hi," 
Job31:8 palle kamau djob an i phoub te vitsrell, oun i vavar nay rhal kova, hoy kolestar bares vas. Oun kova, hoy mange dran i phoub vin vas, tserdenn palle i vavar dran i phoub vin." 
Job31:9 Te moukas pes miro dji i vavareskri djouvyake dren, oun te louroms me ap late pash koleskro voudar," 
Job31:10 palle te kerell miri romni i vavareske, oun vavar morsha te sovenn lah!" 
Job31:11 Kova vals i vi-ladjedo koova, oun i doosh, hoy hounte vell glan i čačepaskre morshende anlo." 
Job31:12 Savi doosh vals har i yag, hoy man tseles rhačrell, oun ninna halauter, hoy man hi, pre rhals." 
Job31:13 Te doms miro boudepaskres – nay vell i morsh, nay vell i djouvel – gar čačes an i čingepen, kay les čačes his," 
Job31:14 hoy kroms me nay palle, te hadals pes miro Devel pre, oun dikals ko koova palla? Hoy nay penoms me leske?" 
Job31:15 Yob, kay kras man an miri dakro per, hi kova, kay kras ninna kolen, kay mange boudrenn." 
Job31:16 Dom me gar o čorveles kova, hoy lo mandar mangas? Vom me gar koy djouvyake ap i rig, kolakro rom meras, oun kay gar doha djipaske his?" 
Job31:17 Rhom me miro rhapen kokres, oun dom kolen či, kolen bouder kek dad his?" 
Job31:18 Foun tiknes pre dom me ap lende yak, har te voms me lengro dad. Oun miro tselo djipen vom kol djouvyenge ap i rig, kolengro rom meras." 
Job31:19 Te dikom yekes, kay yaake čorvelo his, te his les kek ripen, te tatsrell lo pes," 
Job31:20 dom me leste koola kerdo dran i balla mire bakrendar, te vas leske tato. Oun yob parkras pes pash mande o tselo djiyestar." 
Job31:21 An kek tsiro hadom me miro vast pre ap i čaveste, koles kek dad bouder hi, ninna te djinom, te hi halauter ap miri rig, kay his an o foreskro voudar beshdo." 
Job31:22 Te kroms me sau koova, palle mou phagell miri moussi, oun vin tserdedo vell dran miri phik!" 
Job31:23 Sau koova nay kroms me gar, me trashau o Deblestar, oun hounte daroms, te vell leskri rholi pral mande!" 
Job31:24 Miro sonakay vas gar miro devel. Ap leste penom me gar: Tou hal kova, hoy man hounte vell!" 
Job31:25 Me stom gar i barhtyatar, te vas miro bravlepen baro, oun mange yaake boud khetne lom." 
Job31:26 Me mangom gar o kham an peskro raylepen an, vitar gar o čon an peskro shoukapen." 
Job31:27 Miro dji rissras pes gar čorrhanes pash lende, te vitsroms me lenge i vasteskri čoum koy!" 
Job31:28 Kova vals i doosh, hoy hounte vals glan o čačepangre morshende anlo. Koleha phoukroms ap o Debleste an o pralstunepen." 
Job31:29 Me vom gar barhtelo koy pral, har djas koleske djoungeles, kay mange čilačepen kamas. Vitar gar dom gole i barhtyatar, har vas i bibarht pral leste." 
Job31:30 Me anom kek doosh ap mande, te rakroms i bibarht pral leste vin, te merell lo." 
Job31:31 Na-a, lauter kay pash mande djivenn, djinenn, hakeno, kay pash mande vas, las lačes oun doha te rhal." 
Job31:32 Kolla, kay ap pengro drom pash miro voudar van, kolenge krom me pre. Kek vi-themari hounte sovas vin ap o drom." 
Job31:33 An kek tsiro kamom miri doosh te khatrell, har vavar menshe krenn." 
Job31:34 Man his kek daar kolestar, hoy nay rakrens i menshe pral mande, vitar kek traash i ladjatar, hoy nay anens mire menshe ap mande, te penoms doleske či, oun djoms gar glan miro voudar." 
Job31:35 Ah, te vals yek koy, kay ap mande shounell! Hoy penom, tel kova nay činau miro lab. O zorelo Devel te rakrell pale! Kay hi ko liil, an koleste kova miri doosh pre-činas, kay penell, te lom doosh ap mande?" 
Job31:36 Čačepah me hadaus kava liil ap miri phik pre, oun hidjraus les har i rayeskri stadi ap miro shero." 
Job31:37 Me penaus leske hako koova, hoy krom an miro djipen, oun har i ray vaus me glan leste." 
Job31:38 Te das miri harhetikri phoub gole pral mande, oun leskri čik hounte rovas," 
Job31:39 te rhom ko djob, oun playsrom koleske či, oun moukom i harhen i bokatar te merell," 
Job31:40 palle te vell bouder kek gib oun djob vin dran miri phoub! Na-a, palle te anell i phoub soubyengre bourra oun djoungelo zenlepen vin! Kate herell o Hiobeskro rakepen pre." 
Job32:1 Oun kol triin morsha penan bouder či pale ap o Hiob doleske, kay his yob an peskre yaka an o čačepen tardo." 
Job32:2 Kote vas i rholi an o Elihou, koleskro dad o Barakel his i menshendar, kay kharenn Bouzarya, dran i familya Ram. O Elihou vas rhoyedo doleske, te patsas o Hiob, te vals yob boudeder an o čačepen har o Devel." 
Job32:3 Ninna vas lo rhoyedo pral o Hiobeskre triin mala: Ninna te hatsan yon či, hoy nay penenn le o Hiobeske pale, patsan le, te his doosh ap leste." 
Job32:4 O Elihou rikras pes o tselo tsiro pale peskro rakepah, bis te rakran kol vavar o Hiobeha. Yon his phoureder har yob." 
Job32:5 Har yob kanna dikas, te his len či bouder te penell, moukas lo peskri rholi vin." 
Job32:6 Oun o Elihou, koleskro dad o Barakel his, ko Bouzari, penas: Me hom terno. T'mer han phoure morsha. Doleske darom t'menge te penell, hoy djinau." 
Job32:7 Me penom mange: Mouk i phouren te rakrell. Yon hi kolla, kay nay sikrenn, hoy gosvepen hi." 
Job32:8 Hi čačo, kova, hoy krell i menshes gosevo, hi o dourho o zorelo Deblestar, koles yob an i mensheste dren čivas." 
Job32:9 I phoure hi gar hako tsiro i gosveder. Lengro phourepen krell gar, te djinenn le, hoy čačo hi." 
Job32:10 Doleske penau me: Shounenn kanna, hoy man penepaske hi! Me kamau ninna te sikrap, hoy djinau." 
Job32:11 Me moukom t'men vin te rakrell, oun dom yak have laba t'mer hatsans, oun har t'mer kava koova dikenn." 
Job32:12 Oun me shounom mishto, hoy penan. Oun kek his mank t'mende, kay nay sikrals o Hiobeste, te his les gar čačo. Kek penals leske ap leskro rakepen čomone pale." 
Job32:13 Ma penenn: “Mer hatsam vin, hoy gosvepen hi. Kova hi o Devel, kay hounte sikrell leste leskri doosh, oun kek mensho!”" 
Job32:14 Ap mande rakras o Hiob gar. Oun me rakrau vitar gar kol labentsa, hoy t'mer rakran ap leste pale." 
Job32:15 Hiob, tire triin malenge ačas o rakepen krik. Yon djinenn bouder gar, hoy te penell touke." 
Job32:16 Har nay rikrap man kanna pale, kay yon gar bouder doureder rakrenn? Kote hi le tardo oun nay penenn či pale." 
Job32:17 Me kamau ninna te penell, hoy me djinau, oun kova, hoy me hayvom, t'menge doureder te dell." 
Job32:18 Man hi boud laba te penell. Me nay rikrau gar mire laba pale, hoy an mande hi oun vin kamenn." 
Job32:19 Te nay rakrau gar, djal mange har i molyakro gono, kay nevi mool dren hi, hoy nay vell gar vin, oun o gono pre phagell." 
Job32:20 Me hounte rakrap, te nay lap pale dourho. Ava, kamau vin te rakrell, hoy kamau t'menge te penell." 
Job32:21 Me vau ap kekeskri rig tardo, oun kek mensheske rakrau pal o mouy." 
Job32:22 Me hayvau man gar koy pre, te rakrap yekeske pal o mouy. Te kroms kova, lals kova, kay mange miro djipen das, sik miro djipen pale mandar krik." 
Job33:1 Tout Hiob mangau, shoun miro rakepen, oun de yak, hoy man touke penepaske hi!" 
Job33:2 Dik, me krom miro mouy pre, oun mire laba hi mange ap i čip čidde." 
Job33:3 Mire laba venn dran miro dji, oun hi čačo. Kova hoy djinau, rakrau i djoudjo djiyeha." 
Job33:4 O dourho o Deblestar kras man. Ava, o dourho o zorelo Deblestar das man o djipen." 
Job33:5 Pen mange pale, te hayveh kova! Mouk touke an o shero te vell, hoy kameh glan te anell, oun stake glan mande!" 
Job33:6 Dik, glan o Debleste hom me yaake boud har tou hal. Oun me ninna hom dran i čik kerdo." 
Job33:7 Tout hounte vell kek daar mandar. Oun miro vast vell gar phares ap toute čiddo. 
Job33:8 Tou rakral glan mire kanda. Oun me shounom kol laba dran tiro mouy, har tou penal:" 
Job33:9 “Me djivom i djoudjo djipen, oun krom kek čilačo koova. Kek doosh hi ap mande. O čačo dromestar djom gar tele." 
Job33:10 O Devel anell čomone ap mande pre, hoy me gar krom. Yob rikrell man har savo morsheske, kay kamell leske čilačepen te krell." 
Job33:11 Yob čivell mire pire an shelle, oun dell yak ap hako drom, kay me djau.”" 
Job33:12 Dik, Hiob, me hounte penap touke, kate hal tou gar an o čačepen. O Devel hi bareder har i mensho." 
Job33:13 Hoske hal tou rhoyedo leha, te rakras lo či pale ap kova, hoy penal?" 
Job33:14 Pale te pale rakrell yob, yek kopo yaake, oun yek kopo yaake. Oun mer menshe dah gar yak koy pre." 
Job33:15 An i rat, te perell o sopen ap i menshende, dell lo len sounya. Te hi le čiddo ap pengro čiben," 
Job33:16 krell lo lenge i kanda pre, te denn le pen yak. Oun zoreles dell lo len trad," 
Job33:17 te anell lo len tele pengro čilačo dromestar, oun te rikrell lo len pale, te venn le pre-phourdo." 
Job33:18 Yaake rikrell lo o menshes pale, te nashrell lo gar peskro djipen, oun merell." 
Job33:19 Nay vell, te bičrell o Devel i mensheske douka, te dell lo les yaake trad – save douka, hoy vitsrenn les ap o čiben oun djan leske an leskre tsele kokale." 
Job33:20 Oun leske vell djoungeles glan o rhapen, ninna glan ko rhapen, hoy lo yaake kamas." 
Job33:21 Yob vell sano, kek mass hi bouder ap leskre kokale, yaake te stakrenn i tsele kokale glan." 
Job33:22 Yob hi gar dour o merepastar oun o themestar, kay i moule hi." 
Job33:23 Te vell palle i bolepaskres pash leste, kova ap leskri rig hi, yek kol zeryendar, kolen o Devel vin bičrell, te penenn le menge, hoy menge mishto hi," 
Job33:24 palle krell o bolepaskro peskro dji leske pre, oun penell ap o Debleste: “Le les vin, te hounte djal lo gar tele pash i moulende. Me hatsom leske i love, hoy les dran o merepen vin ginenn.”" 
Job33:25 Pale lell lo pale nevi zoor, vell sasto oun zorelo, har an ko tsiro, kay lo terno his." 
Job33:26 Yob mangell o Debles, oun kova dikell lačes ap leste, oun moukell les barhteles glan peste te vell. Oun o Devel čivell les pale an o čačepen." 
Job33:27 Ko mensho givell palle glan i menshende oun penell: “Me lom doosh ap mande, oun rissrom mange o čačepen yaake har me kamom. Oun miro Devel moukas kova gar ap miro shero pale te vell." 
Job33:28 Yob las miro djipen vin dran o merepen, te djap gar pash i moulende. Oun me hom barhtelo te ačom djido.”" 
Job33:29 Dik, kava lauter krell o Devel douy, triin kope an o djipen i menshestar," 
Job33:30 te anell lo leskro djipen tele ko dromestar, hoy anell an o moulengro them, oun te vell lo pale barhtelo pral peskro djipen." 
Job33:31 Dik Hiob, shoun ap mande! Ma rake tou, mouk man te rakrell!" 
Job33:32 Te hi tout čomone te penell, palle pen mange ap kava čomone pale. Rake, kamoms o djiyestar, te dap tout čačes!" 
Job33:33 Te hi tout či te penell, palle shoun tou ap mande oun ma rake, te sikrap toute, har te vess gosevo." 
Job34:1 Oun o Elihou rakras pale oun penas: 
Job34:2 T'mer goseve morsha, shounenn miro rakepen! T'mer, kay sikle han, shounenn, hoy kamau t'menge te penell." 
Job34:3 Yaake har o mouy hayvell, hi o rhapen lačo oder gar, yaake hounte hatsell o kand vin, hi ko rakepen mishto oder gar." 
Job34:4 Mer te hatsas kanna khetne vin, hoy an kava koova čačo oun mishto hi." 
Job34:5 O Hiob penas: “Me hom an o čačepen tardo. Oun miro čačepen las o Devel mandar krik. 
Job34:6 Hounte rakrap rhorhepen oun penap: Me lom doosh ap mande? Mange vas i baro doukepen dino, ninna te hi kek doosh ap mande.”" 
Job34:7 Koon hi savo morsh har o Hiob, kay rikrell pes gar pale te praasell lo i vavaren? Kova hi leske har te piyals lo pani." 
Job34:8 Oun yaake hi lo har yek kolendar, kay djoungelo koova krenn, oun djal ap o drom, kay i čilače djan." 
Job34:9 Yob penas kokres: Či hi yekes kolestar, te kamell lo o Debleskro maal te vell!" 
Job34:10 Doleske, t'mer morsha, kay yaake boud hayvenn, shounenn ap mande! An kek tsiro krell o zorelo Devel i čilačo koova. Hako tsiro hi lo an o čačepen tardo!" 
Job34:11 Yob dell o menshes ap o shero pale, hoy yob kras, oun yaake, har djivas lo, vell kova ap leste." 
Job34:12 Čačepah, o zorelo Devel krell kek čilačo koova, oun o čačepen rissrell lo gar trouyel." 
Job34:13 Koon his, koon les i phoub an leskre vasta das? Kek! Yob kras i phoub. Kek hi pral leste tardo." 
Job34:14 Te lals yob peske glan, te lell lo peskro djipaskro dourho palpale o menshestar," 
Job34:15 palle merans halauter, hoy djivenn, ap yek kopo, oun o mensho vals pale čik." 
Job34:16 Hiob, te hayveh, hoy penau, palle shoun kava! De mishto yak ap miro rakepen!" 
Job34:17 Nay vals o Devel o ray pral i phoub, te stakrals lo peskre pirentsa ap o čačepen? Kameh doosh ap o zorelo Debleste te anell, kay hako tsiro an o čačepen tardo hi?" 
Job34:18 Yob nay penell ap i baro rayeste tou či-moldo oun ap i pralstuneste tou čilačo! 
Job34:19 Yob dikell gar i pralstounes feteder an har i vavares, oun tserdell o braveles gar o čorveleske glan. Leskro vast kras len halauter." 
Job34:20 Ap yek kopo merenn le. Mashkral an i rat trissenn le oun hi gar bouder. Kol zorele venn krik lino kek mensheskro vasteha. 
Job34:21 O Devel lell hako koova an o yak, hoy i mensho krell, oun dikell les, kay lo ninna djal." 
Job34:22 Kek rat oun kek kalepen hi yaake tamlo, te nay khatrans pen i čilače kote dren." 
Job34:23 O Devel hounte čivell kek tsiro dren, te anell lo i menshes glan peste, te rakrell lo o čačepen pral leste vin." 
Job34:24 Yob dell i zorele rayen khetne, oun hounte hatsell gar vin, hoy yon kran. Ap lengri platsa čivell lo vavaren." 
Job34:25 Čačepah, yob djinell ko koova, hoy le kran. Rati moukell lo len te perell, te venn le khetne stakedo." 
Job34:26 Ap i platsa, kay i čilače pengri phagi lenna, oun hakeno nay dikell len, dell lo len lengri phagi." 
Job34:27 Kova krell lo doleske, kay djan yon leskro dromestar tele, oun dan gar yak ap kova, hoy yob lendar kamas." 
Job34:28 Yon djan yaake čilačes i čorvelentsa trouyel, te dan yon gole ap o Debleste. Oun yob shounas koy gole kolendar, kay tele rikedo van." 
Job34:29 Te rikrell pes o Devel pale, nay penell kek leske: Tou anal doosh ap toute! Te khatrell lo pes, nay dikell les kek. Hoy nay krenn i menshe, hoy nay krell i natsyona," 
Job34:30 te čivals o Devel i čilačes pral lende, te vell lo lengro ray, oun kova anell len o čačo dromestar tele?" 
Job34:31 I mensho hounte penals ap o Debleste: “Me hidjrau miri doosh, oun kamau bouder gar čilačo koova te krell." 
Job34:32 Sike tou man, hoy me gar dikau! Te his kova čilačes, hoy me krom, krau me les palle bouder gar.”" 
Job34:33 Kameh, te anell o Devel ap saveste i phagi? Kameh tou kova gar? Tou hounte peness, hoy kameh, oun gar me. Pen menge kanna, har kava koova dikeh!" 
Job34:34 Goseve morsha oun save, kay hayvenn boud, oun shounan, hoy penom, kolla penenn ap mande:" 
Job34:35 O Hiob djinell gar, hoy lo rakrell. Oun leskre laba sikrenn, te hayvas lo gar boud." 
Job34:36 Kamoms, te vals o Hiob glan i čačepangre morshende anlo, te lenn yon hakenes leskre labendar an o yak, hoy yob rakras, Yob rakrell har i čilače rakrenna." 
Job34:37 Gar kokres doosh anas lo ap peste, na-a, yob hadas pes ninna pral o Debleste. Glan mare kanda krell bare laba oun rikrell o Debles dineleske." 
Job35:1 Oun o Elihou penas palle: 
Job35:2 Patseh, te hi kova čačo, hoy penal? Tou penal: “Me hom an o čačepen glan o Debleste.”" 
Job35:3 Oun tou poučeh: “Hoy hi man kolestar, te lau kek doosh ap mande? Havo lačepen lom koleske?”" 
Job35:4 Kova kamau touke te penell, touke oun tire malenge pash toute:" 
Job35:5 Dik pre, dik an o bolepen pre! Dik ap i volke dour pral toute!" 
Job35:6 Koy doosh, hoy tou ap toute leh, kolah nay kreh tou či ap o Debleste. Te kral boud čilačo koova, nay kreh tou leske či koleha." 
Job35:7 Te hal tou an o čačepen tardo, hoy hi les kolestar? Na-a, tou nay deh leske či dran tiro vast, hoy leske čomone moldo hi." 
Job35:8 Kolla hi i vavar menshe, kolenge kova djoungeles hi, te kreh čilačo koova, oun kolenge kova lačo hi, te kreh lačo koova." 
Job35:9 Te krenn i zorele i vavarenge boud čilačo koova, rovenn kolla, oun denn gole pal yekeste, kay lell len vin dran i vasta kol zorelendar." 
Job35:10 Oun kek lendar poučell pal o Debleste, kay les kras. Oun yob hi kova, kay krell, te nay givell i mensho gilya an i kali rat." 
Job35:11 Yob kras, te djinas mer boudeder har i firhe ap i phoub, oun kras men gosveder har i čirklen tel o bolepen." 
Job35:12 Te denn i čilače palle gole, kolla, kay pen yaake bares kran, penell o Devel lenge či pale." 
Job35:13 Lengri gole hi čičeske! O zorelo Devel shounell lat gar, oun dell kek yak koy pre." 
Job35:14 Tou Hiob peneh, tou nay dikeh les gar! Tiro koova hi glan leste čiddo. Mouk gar tele, te dikess ap leste!" 
Job35:15 Tou peneh, o Devel moukell peskri rholi gar te vell. Dell lo vitar gar yak ap o narvelo rakepen?" 
Job35:16 O Hiob hi i baro mouyeskro, yob rakrell, hoy či-moldo hi, krell bare laba, oun djinell gar, hoy lo rakrell." 
Job36:1 Oun o Elihou rakras doureder oun penas: 
Job36:2 Rike gomme i tikno tsiro mantsa vin, oun me kamau touke boudeder te sikrell! Man hi čomone boudeder te penell o Deblestar." 
Job36:3 Me sikrau touke ko boud koova, hoy me djinau, te sikrap, te hi kova čačo oun mishto, hoy kras o Devel, kova, kay man kras." 
Job36:4 Čačepah miro rakepen hi kek rhorhepen. I morsh, kay djinell, kolestar yob rakrell, hi glan toute tardo." 
Job36:5 O Devel hi baro oun zorelo, oun dikell ap kekeste tele. Koy hi či, hoy hayvell oun djinell yob gar." 
Job36:6 Yob moukell o čilačes gar djides, oun vell koleske ap i rig, kay tele rikedo vell, te lell yob peskro čačepen." 
Job36:7 Yob dell yak ap kolende, kay hi an o čačepen tardo, oun moukell len khetne i rayentsa ap rayengre beshepangre te beshell. Hako tsiro hi le baro." 
Job36:8 Te hi le pandles čiddo an shelle, oun lenge djal djoungeles an o stilepen," 
Job36:9 palle sikrell yob len, hoy le kran, oun havi doosh yon ap pende anan, har phourdan le pen pre." 
Job36:10 Oun yob krell lenge i kanda pre, te shounenn le, har yob len trad dell. oun penell lenge, te moukenn le pengre čilače dromma." 
Job36:11 Te shounenn le ap leste, oun krenn, hoy yob lendar kamell, palle djal lenge mishto, oun yon hi barhtelo an kol tsele bersha, hoy glan lende hi." 
Job36:12 Te shounenn le gar ap leste, nashrenn le pengro djipen, oun hayvenn gar, hoske kova lenge yaake djal." 
Job36:13 Kolla, kay kamenn či o Deblestar te djinell, rikrenn pengri rholi an lengre djia. Ninna te dell o Devel len i phagi, denn le gar gole, te vell lo lenge ap i rig." 
Job36:14 Doleske merenn le an ladj, an i tsiro, kay hi le gomme terno." 
Job36:15 Phare tsirya oun douka hi ko Debleskro drom, har rakrell o Devel i mensheha. Koy krell lo leske i kanda pre, te shounell lo ap leste." 
Job36:16 Ninna tout anals o Devel vin dran i bibarht, oun anals tout kote kay bouder kek daar hi, oun dals tout lauter, hoy tout hounte vell djipaske. Oun t'mari rhapaskri vals pherdo lačo koova." 
Job36:17 Kanna lal tou i phagi har i čilače lenna. I čačepaskre laba hi vin rakedo pral toute, oun tiri phagi vas." 
Job36:18 De yak, te anell tout tiri rholi gar ap i djoungelo drom! O Debles nay gineh tou gar, kitse love tou ninna deh!" 
Job36:19 Tiro bravlepen oun tiro sonakay hi gar doha. Vitar gar kova, hoy tou tiri zoryah nay kreh." 
Job36:20 Ma pen: Mou vell sik rati! Kova hi o tsiro, kay i natsyone ap yek kopo bouder gar koy hi." 
Job36:21 De tou yak, te vess gar ap i čilačo drom! Tire douka van ap toute, te rikress tou tout pale o čilačepastar." 
Job36:22 Dik, har baro o Devel hi! Leskri zoor hi bareder har halauter! Koon hi i sikepaskro har yob?" 
Job36:23 Kek nay penell leske, hoy te krell lo! Kek nay penell leske: Hoy kral, hi gar mishto." 
Job36:24 Ma biste, te sharess o Debles koleske, hoy yob kras, har ninna vavar menshe sharenn les pengre gilyentsa!" 
Job36:25 I tsele menshe dikenn ap kova, hoy lo kras, ninna te nay dikenn le les kokres foun doural." 
Job36:26 Dik, o Devel hi yaake baro, te nay hayvah gar, har baro yob hi. Oun kek nay hatsell vin, har phouro yob hi." 
Job36:27 Yob tserdell o pani pre pash o bolepen, oun lell les khetne, te vell brishin," 
Job36:28 hoy tele perell dran o bolepen ap kol boud menshende. 
Job36:29 Yaake dell lo lenge boudeder har doha te rhal. Kek nay hayvell, har o Devel i volken ap o bolepen čivas, oun har vell koy bari gole dran leskro bolepaskro kheer, te dell i yag ap o bolepen karye troul leste trouyel. O telstunepen o baro panyestar ačell an o tamlepen." 
Job36:30  
Job36:31  
Job36:32 An leskro vast rikrell lo koy yag, oun moukell lat kote karye te dell, kay yob kamell." 
Job36:33 Koy bari gole, hoy vell koy pashel, sikrell, te vell i zorelo phourdepen. Oun ninna i firhe hayvenn kova." 
Job37:1 Koy pral trissell miro dji, oun dell sik oun divyo." 
Job37:2 Shounenn, har bares yob gole dell, har rhoyedo koya gole dran leskro mouy vell!" 
Job37:3 Tel o tselo bolepen moukell lo koy yag karye te dell, oun koya djal pral i tseli phoub yek rigyatar ap i vavar." 
Job37:4 Pal kova vell koy bari zoreli gole shounlo, hoy hi har o baro Debleskro rakepen. Oun yob rikrell peskri yag gar pale, te moukell lo peskro rakepen te shounell." 
Job37:5 Te moukell o Devel peskro rakepen te shounell, krell lo kova savi bari golyah, te ačell menge o rakepen krik. Yob krell baro koova, hoy nay hayvah mer gar." 
Job37:6 Ap o gib penell lo: Pere ap i phoub! Ap i volke: De zorelo brishin! 
Job37:7 Yaake krell lo, te moukenn i menshe pengri boudi čiddo, te dikell hakeno, hoy yob nay krell." 
Job37:8 I divye firhe djan an pengro khatepen, oun čivenn pen kote tele." 
Job37:9 O zorelo phourdepen vell foun čačes dran peskro kheer, oun o shil vell foun serves." 
Job37:10 Dran o dourho, hoy dran o Debleskro mouy vin djal, djayell o pani. Oun kol bourhle bare panya venn zorelo har bar." 
Job37:11 Yob krell i volke pharo oun pherdo pani, oun dran lende dell i yag karye." 
Job37:12 Kol volke djan kate te kote, yaake har yob len bičrell, te krenn le halauter yaake, har yob les kamell ap i tseli phoub." 
Job37:13 Nay vell, te bičrell lo o brishin, te dell lo o themes i phagi, ninna nay vell, te bičrell lo les, te sikrell lo peskro lačepen." 
Job37:14 Hiob, shoun kava mishto! Ač, oun de yak ap kova, hoy o Devel an peskri zoor krell!" 
Job37:15 Djineh tou, har o Devel i volkenge penell, kay te djan le? Oun har lo i yag dran lende karye vin dell?" 
Job37:16 Hayveh tou, har i volke tel o bolepen djan, oun gar tele perenn? Savo koova nay krell kokres kova, kay halauter djinell." 
Job37:17 Tou, koleske tel i koola tato vell, te phourdell i tato dourho pral o them," 
Job37:18 nay kreh tou o bolepen bourhles pral i phoub, har yob kova kras, te vell o bolepen zoreles har i dikepaskri?" 
Job37:19 Pen tou menge, hoy penas mer leske? Mer djinah či. Oun men hi či, te anas glan leste!" 
Job37:20 Penell yek leske: Dik, kate hi yek, kay kamell touha te rakrell? Na-a! Kova vals yaake, har te kamals lo maredo te vell." 
Job37:21 Kanna nay dikell kek an o kham, yaake zorelo hi o kham, te phourdas o dourho i volke krik." 
Job37:22 Foun kotar, kay norden hi, vell čomone har sonakay. O Devel vell an peskro raylepen. Ko raylepen troul leste krell men daar." 
Job37:23 Pash leste, ko zoreleste, nay vah mer gar. Leskri zoor hi baro. Hako tsiro krell lo, hoy mishto hi, oun dell hakeneske peskro čačepen." 
Job37:24 Doleske dikenn i menshe pre ap leste. Yob dikell kekes an, kay rikrell pes yekeske, kay hi gosevo." 
Job38:1 Palle rakras o baro Devel o Hiobeha dran i baro phourdepen vin, oun penas ap leste:" 
Job38:2 Koon hal tou, te poučeh dineles: Hi kova gosevo, hoy o Devel krell?" 
Job38:3 Kanna ste pre har i morsh! Oun me poučau toutar. Oun tou peneh mange, hoy kamau te djinell." 
Job38:4 Kay hals tou, har me i phoub krom? Pen les mange, te djineh les tou?" 
Job38:5 Koon his, kay penas, har bares i phoub vell? Koon his kova, kay čivas i dori pral late, te dikell lo, har bares i phoub vell? Djineh tou kova?" 
Job38:6 Ap hoy hi kol hidjepangre tardo, hoy hidjrenn i phoub? Koon čivas ko telstouno bar, hoy rikrell i phoub ap peskri platsa?" 
Job38:7 Har lo čiddo vas, givan i tsele bolepangre momlia, hoy tsalla pre djan, oun i bolepangre dan gole i barhtyatar." 
Job38:8 Har o baro pani vin phagas dran i phoub, koon pandas les dren, te djal lo gar pral o tselo them?" 
Job38:9 Me homs kova, kay leske i ripen dran volke kras, oun kale volke pral leste čivas." 
Job38:10 Oun me sikrom leste, har dour, oun bis kay yob nay djal, oun krom leske voudya oun pandom les dren." 
Job38:11 Oun me penom: “Bis kate, oun gar doureder vess! Tire zorele panya hounte djan gar pral vergel!”" 
Job38:12 Penal tou yek kopo an tiro djipen ap i tsalla: “Ab pre!” Oun sikral tou lake lakri platsa? 
Job38:13 Penal lake, te djal li pral i tseli phoub yek rigyatar ap i vavar, yaake te nashenn penge i čilače oun khatrenn pen?" 
Job38:14 Te djal o kham pre, venn i berge oun tale mishto diklo. Oun i phoub hi tardo shoukar an-rido." 
Job38:15 Te vell dives, nay krenn i čilače bouder kek čilačo koova an o tamlepen, oun nay doukrenn bouder gar vavar menshen." 
Job38:16 Hals tou an o telstunepen kay i bare panya boldo van? Oun hatsal vin, hoy kote khatedo hi an o telstunepen?" 
Job38:17 Hals tou tardo pash i voudya an o moulengro them? Oun dikal tou i voudya glan koy platsa, kay hi baro kalepen." 
Job38:18 Djineh tou, har dour oun bourhlo i phoub hi? Pen les mange, te djineh kova lauter!" 
Job38:19 Kay hi ko drom, ap koleste veh pash o kham? Kay hi koy platsa, kay o kalepen hi?" 
Job38:20 Nay aneh tou len ap pengre dromma, oun pale khere ap lengri platsa, kay le vin djan." 
Job38:21 Tou djiness kova lauter, yaake phouro har hal, oun boldo hals, har kova krom!" 
Job38:22 Val tou yaake dour, kay garau o gib pre? Dikal, kay rikrau i brishineskre barra i tsireske hoy vella?" 
Job38:23 Kolla rikrau pale ko tsireske, kay douka, kourepen oun marepen venna." 
Job38:24 Kay hi ko drom kote, kay dell i yag karye ap o bolepen? Oun kay phourdell ko dourho vin, hoy vell foun kotar, kay o kham pre djal?" 
Job38:25 Koon kras i drom o brishineske, kay perell lo tele? Koon kras ko drom, kay o bolepaskri yag pre te tele karye dell?" 
Job38:26 Koon dell o brishin ap o moulo tato them, kay kek mensho djivell," 
Job38:27 te lell o divyo them, kay či bares vas, pani, yaake te vell zenlepen vin." 
Job38:28 Hi o brishin har i mensho, koles i dad hi? Oun ko pani, hoy haki tsalla ap o zenlepen čiddo hi, hi koles i dad?" 
Job38:29 Dran koneste vin vas o djayedo pani? Koon hi leskri day? Konestar vas o shil boldo, hoy vell tele dran o bolepen," 
Job38:30 oun krell, te vell o pani har bar, oun o baro pani yaake zoreles, te nay stakrell yek pre?" 
Job38:31 Pandal tou nay i bolepangre momlia khetne, kay kharenn efta momelengre? Nay pandeh tou i dorya pre, hoy rikrenn kol momlia khetne, hoy kharenn Orion?" 
Job38:32 Nay moukeh tou i bolepangre momlia vin te vell, te hi lengro tsiro? Nay sikreh tou kolende, hoy kharenn Baro Vourdoun oun Tikno Vourdoun pengro drom, hoy le hounte djan?" 
Job38:33 Prindjreh tou kol laba, ap kolende o bolepen shounell? Peneh tou leske, har te vell lo ray pral i phoub?" 
Job38:34 Deh tou ap i volke gole, te čorenn le brishin ap toute tele?" 
Job38:35 Bičreh tou o bolepaskri yag tele ap i phoub, oun poučell koya toutar: Kay kameh, te dap pre te tele karye?" 
Job38:36 Koon čivas o gosvepen kote, kay lo khatedo hi? Oun koon krell, te nay hayvell i mensho čomone?" 
Job38:37 Koon hi yaake gosevo, te djinell lo, har boud volke koy hi? Koon čorell lengro pani ap i phoub tele?" 
Job38:38 Palle vell dran i stauba zoreli čik, oun i pre-phagedi phoub vell pale yek tselo kotar phoub." 
Job38:39 Te hi i levetsa oun lakre čave an o khatepen čiddo oun lourenn ap i firho, nay hatseh tou lake yekes marepaske, te venn lakre čave čalo?" 
Job38:40  
Job38:41 Koon hi kova, kay dell o korakeske leskro rhapen, te denn leskre čave pash o Debleste gole, oun i bokatar kate te kote nashenna?" 
Job39:1 Prindjreh tou o tsiro, kay i divyi bouzni peskro ternepen lell? Dikal tou, har i vesheskri groumni peskro ternepen las?" 
Job39:2 Nay peneh tou, kitse čonna yon hounte hidjrenn, oun djineh o tsiro, kay le pengro ternepen ap i phoub anenn?" 
Job39:3 Yon beshenn tele, te perell o ternepen gar ap i phoub, te vell lo boldo." 
Job39:4 Lengre čave venn bares vin ap o them, oun venn zoreles, oun djan penge, oun venn gar bouder pale pash lende." 
Job39:5 Koon moukas i divyi bourika kote te nashell, kay li kamell, oun pandas lat gar dren?" 
Job39:6 Me dom lat i divyo trouk them, te hi li kote khere, oun ko londo them, te djivell li kote." 
Job39:7 Koy divyi bourika rikrell pes dour krik koy bari golyatar, hoy krenn le an i forya, oun hounte shounell gar ko morshes, kay dell gole: Sikeder! Sikeder!" 
Job39:8 Koy divyi bourika hatsell peskro rhapen ap i berge, oun rodell pal halauter, hoy zenelo hi." 
Job39:9 Kamell o divyo gouroum touke te boudrell, kamell lo rati kote te ačell, kay tou tire firhenge rhapen deh?" 
Job39:10 Nay pandeh tou leske i shello trouyel, te boudrell lo touke ap i harhetikri phoub, oun tserdell ko saster, hoy i phoub pre phagell?" 
Job39:11 Fothe zorelo yob hi, nay deh tou leske tiri boudi an o vast, oun nay djineh, te krell lo, hoy tou lestar kameh?" 
Job39:12 Nay patseh leske, te anell lo tiro djob khere ap tiri djobeskri platsa?" 
Job39:13 Barhteles dell koy bari karhni, hoy kharell straussa, peskre moussyentsa. Lakre moussya hi gar har kol moussya oun phora, kolen o storko hi." 
Job39:14 I straussa moukell peskre yare ap i phoub čiddo, an koy čik moukell li len tates te vell." 
Job39:15 Oun yoy bistrell, te nay stakrell i heri len khetne, oun te nay stakrenn i divye firhe len paash." 
Job39:16 Yoy djal pengre čaventsa yaake zoreles trouyel, har te vans yon gar latar. Te merenn le, oun yoy peskre yare čičeske čivas, krell kova lake ninna či vin." 
Job39:17 O Devel das lat kek gosvepen, oun kras, te hayvell li či." 
Job39:18 Te hadell li pes oun nashell, hi li sikeder har i gray oun leskro klissepaskro, oun nay sal pral lende." 
Job39:19 Dal tou o grayes peskri zoor? Čival tou lengste balla pral ap leskri meen? 
Job39:20 Dal tou leske i zoor, te stell lo har i stepaskro? Te phourdell lo zoreles vin dran peskro nak, darenn i menshe." 
Job39:21 O gray stakrell peskre heryentsa an i phoub, oun hi barhteles pral peskri zoor, te nashell lo an o kourepen." 
Job39:22 O gray prindjrell kek daar, oun lell kek traash, oun djal glan o rharo gar pale." 
Job39:23 Ap leskri rig hi i possita, an kolate stenn i fayle, oun i lengste čourya dikenn vin har yag, te perell o kham pre." 
Job39:24 Te shounell o gray i phourdepaskri, vitsrell lo pes bari zoryah glan, oun moukell pes gar tele te rikrell." 
Job39:25 Hako kopo, kay shounell lo i phourdepaskri, dell lo pre gole: Houi! Oun soungell o kourepen foun doural – koy kourepaskri gole i lourdendar oun lengre pralstunendar." 
Job39:26 Sikral tou o baro čirkles, har djal lo dour pre an o bolepen, oun har te krell lo peskre moussya bourhlo oun djal kote, kay o kham pralstounes tardo hi?" 
Job39:27 Penal tou ap o adlari, te djal lo dour pre ap i berge, te krell lo kote peskro kheer?" 
Job39:28 Ap i bare barra hi lo khere, pral pre ap i berge oun bare barra djivell lo." 
Job39:29 Foun kotar dikell lo tele, oun rodell peskro rhapen. Foun doural dikenn les peskre yaka." 
Job39:30 Leskre čave troushenn pal rat, oun kote, kay i moule čiddo hi, kote hi yob ninna." 
Job40:1 Oun o baro Devel poučas o Hiobes: 
Job40:2 Tou kameh tout mantsa te čingrell – mantsa, kay o zorelo Devel hom? Tou, kay doosh ap mande hatsal, oun mange penal, hoy gar mishto krom, pen kanna čomone kay pre!" 
Job40:3 Oun o Hiob penas ap o baro Debleste: 
Job40:4 Dik, me hom či moldo! Hoy penap me touke? Me čivau miro vast ap miro mouy." 
Job40:5 Yek kopo rakrom, oun me kamau či bouder te penell. Oun douy kope rakrom, oun me kamau les gar bouder te krell." 
Job40:6 Oun o baro Devel rakras pale o Hiobeha dran i baro phourdepen vin, oun penas ap leste:" 
Job40:7 Kanna ste pre har i morsh! Oun me poučau toutar. Oun tou peneh mange, hoy kamau te djinell." 
Job40:8 Kameh tou čačepah te penell, me djau gar pal o čačepen? Peneh, te anom me doosh ap mande, te nay vess tou koy tardo, har te vals tout čačes?" 
Job40:9 Hi tout savi bari zoor har man? Nay rakreh tou savi zoryah har me? 
Job40:10 Sike, har baro oun an-diklo hal! Mouk tout an tiro shoukapen oun raylepen te dikell!" 
Job40:11 Čore tiri tseli rholi vin, dik ap lauterende, kay pre-phourdo hi, oun vitse len tele!" 
Job40:12 Ava, dik ap kol pre-phourde, oun kre len tiknes! Oun stake i čilačen ap yek kopo khetne!" 
Job40:13 Paske len halauteren an i phoub, oun pande len dren an o moulengro them!" 
Job40:14 Te kral tou kova lauter, palle sharau ninna me tout, oun penau, te das tiro čačo vast touke i zoor, te hal tou o zorleder." 
Job40:15 Dik ap ko baro firho, o Behemot, koles me krom, har me tout ninna krom! Yob rhal zenlepen har i groumni." 
Job40:16 Dik, havi bari zoor les an peskre herya hi, oun havi zoor an leskro per!" 
Job40:17 Leskri pori hi yaake zorelo har i cedertikro rouk. Leskre muskle an leskre herya hi zorelo har pesse shelle. 
Job40:18 Leskre herya hi har dran saster, leskre kokale har dran lolo saster." 
Job40:19 Yob his o glanstouno kol firhendar, hoy krom. Me, kova kay les kras, das les ninna leskro rharo." 
Job40:20 Ap i berge vell o zenlepen baro, hoy leske rhapaske hi, kote, kay i tsele divye firhe penge khelenn." 
Job40:21 Tel soubyengre bourra čivell lo pes tele, oun khatrell pes mank shilftikro khass an i sapeni čik." 
Job40:22 Kol pesse soubyengre bourra khatrenn les glan o kham. Oun kol rouka, hoy pash o pani tardo hi, hi troul leste trouyel." 
Job40:23 Ninna te vell ko lengsto pani zorleder oun divyeder, nashell lo gar darenes krik. Ninna te dell o pani Yordan leske an o mouy, krell leske kova či." 
Job40:24 Kek nay taprell leske an i yaka, oun tserdell leske i shello an o nak." 
Job40:25 Tserdeh tou o Leviatanes i ranyah pash toute, oun pandeh i shello troul leskro mouy?" 
Job40:26 Tserdeh tou leske i shello an o nak, oun čiveh leske i goustri an o kokalo tel leskro mouy?" 
Job40:27 Mangell yob toutar, te kress tiro dji leske pre, oun rakrell touha lače labentsa?" 
Job40:28 Krell lo touha vin, te vell lo tiro boudepaskro hako tsireske?" 
Job40:29 Kheleh tou leha, har te vals lo i tikno čirklo, oun pandeh les ap i shello i čenge an tiro kheer?" 
Job40:30 Kamenn les i starepangre te bikrell? Činenn les i parepangre an kotya oun bikrenn leskro mass? 
Job40:31 Nay deh tou an leskri hauta oun an leskro shero čourye čouryentsa, har te taprals i baro mačo?" 
Job40:32 Čip tiro vast ap leste! Tou kreh kova gar i douyto kopo. Kava kourepen bistreh tou gar. 
Job41:1 Hakeno, kay patsell, te nay vell lo zorleder har o Leviatan, hounte dikell dren, te djal kova gar. Hi gar yaake, te perell kova i daryatar ap i phoub, kay dikell les?" 
Job41:2 Kek hi yaake dineles, te rhoyrell lo les. Oun koon hi kova, kay nay ačell tardo glan mande?" 
Job41:3 Koon nay djal i rholyah ap mande, oun me anau kova gar ap leskro shero pale? Tel o tselo bolepen hi kek savo!" 
Job41:4 Me kamau ninna pral kova te rakrell, have herya o Leviatanes hi, oun har zorelo oun shoukar yob kerdo hi." 
Job41:5 Kek nay rivell leske leskri baya vin, hoy hi kerdo har dran saster! Oun kek nay dell čourye koy dren." 
Job41:6 Nay krell yek leskro baro mouy pre? Na-a! Te dikell lo leskre danda, taprell les i bari daar." 
Job41:7 Leskro doumo čakrenn shouppe, hoy hi zorelo har bar. Yek shouppa pal i vavar hi le pandlo ap leste." 
Job41:8 Oun yek shouppa čivell pes yaake ap i vavar, te nay djal kek dourho mashkral lende dren." 
Job41:9 Yon hi yaake khetne kerdo, te taprell yek an o vavar, oun kek nay tserdell yek dran o vavar vin." 
Job41:10 Te phourdell lo dran o nak, vell tikno pani vin, hoy dikell vin har brishin an o kham. Leskre yaka hi lolo har o kham, hoy pre djal." 
Job41:11 Dran leskro mouy vell yag, ava, yagakre kotya denn vin karye." 
Job41:12 Tampa vell dran leskro nak har dran i piri, hoy hi pral i yag tardo, oun an kolate čomone kerell." 
Job41:13 Leskro dourho moukell kasht te rhačell, oun yag djal dran leskro mouy." 
Job41:14 Leskri meen hi zorelo. Kay lo ninna djal, taprell i menshen i daar." 
Job41:15 Leskro per hi masselo oun zorelo har saster. 
Job41:16 Leskro dji hi har bar, ava, yaake zorelo har i baro bar." 
Job41:17 Te stell lo pre, taprenn ninna i zorleder bari daar, oun i trashatar tserdenn le pen pale." 
Job41:18 Dell yek o rhareha pal leste, krell kova leske či. Kek lengsti čouri, kek vitsepaskro čouri, kek faylo nay doukrell les." 
Job41:19 Leske hi saster yaake, har te vals lo phouss, oun lolo saster har phouro sapeno kasht." 
Job41:20 Kek faylo nay tradell les krik, oun vitsepaskre barra hi leske har phouss." 
Job41:21 Ninna i depaskro kasht hi leske gar boudeder har i phousseskri halma. Oun pral i lengsti čouri, hoy ap leste vitsedo vas, sal lo." 
Job41:22 Leskro per čakrenn save shouppe, hoy činenn har i paash-dino čaro. Te tserdell lo pes pral koy sapeni phoub, dikell kova vin, har te djals i činepaskro vourdin koy pral." 
Job41:23 Te djal lo an o baro pani, krell lo les divyo, har pani, hoy kerell, oun har djet, hoy an i piri pre kerell." 
Job41:24 Pal leste moukell lo i parno drom. hoy dikell vin, har te vans roupene balla." 
Job41:25 Ap i phoub hi kek vavar har yob, yaake kerdo, te nay krell leske či daar." 
Job41:26 Yob dikell halauterenge an i yaka, oun hi o ray pral i tsele divye firhende." 
Job42:1 Oun o Hiob penas koy pre ap o baro Debleste: 
Job42:2 Me hayvom kanna, te nay kreh tou halauter. Oun halauter, hoy kameh te krell, kova kreh tou ninna." 
Job42:3 Tou poučal: “Koon hal tou, kay poučeh dineles: Hi kova gosevo, hoy o Devel krell?” Ava, tout hi čačo: Rakrom, hoy dinelo his, oun hoy gar hayvom oun kolestar či djinom." 
Job42:4 Shoun, penal tou, me poučau toutar. Oun tou peneh mange, hoy kamau te djinell." 
Job42:5 Ap ko tsiro djinom či toutar, har kova hoy mange penlo vas. Kanna dikom tout mire yakentsa." 
Job42:6 Doleske lau pale, hoy rakrom oun hom beshdo an i čik oun an i yagakri čik, te sikrap, kay khaytell man kova, hoy rakrom." 
Job42:7 Oun har o baro Devel kol laba rakras o Hiobeha, penas yob ap o Elifas dran Teman: “Kova hoy o Hiob, koles miro čačo vast hi, pral mande rakras, hi čačo. Kova, hoy tou oun tire douy mala mandar rakran, hi gar čačo. Doleske hom rhoyedo ap t'mende." 
Job42:8 Kanna lenn efta terne gourma oun efta bakre oun djan pash o Hiob, oun marenn kol firhen kote, oun rhačrenn len mange! Oun o Hiob, koles miro čačo vast hi, hounte mangell man t'menge. Ap koleste shounau oun krau t'mentsa gar, har hounte kroms. T'mer rakran gar o čačepen pral mande har yob kras.”" 
Job42:9 Kote djas o Elifas peskre douy malentsa, o Bildad dran Shoua oun o Sofar dran Naama, pash o Hiob, oun yon kran, hoy o baro Devel lenge penas. Oun o baro Devel shounas ap kova, hoy o Hiob lestar mangas." 
Job42:10 Oun har o Hiob peskre malenge mangas, las o baro Devel koy bibarht o Hiobestar krik, oun kras les pale bravelo, oun das les douy kope yaake boud, har les his." 
Job42:11 Oun leskre tsele phrala oun phenya oun kolla, kay les glan ko tsiro prindjran, van pash leste, oun rhan khetne leha, oun rakran lačes leha, oun penan har koy bibarht lenge doukas, hoy moukas o baro Devel pral leste te vell. Oun hakeno das les i sonakaskri bema oun i goustri." 
Job42:12 Oun o baro Devel čivas boudeder barht ap o Hiob har glan kova. Oun yob las 14.000 (deesh-te-star-zerya) bakre oun 6.000 (shob-zerya) khamele oun 2.000 (douy zerya) groumya oun 1.000 (yek zero) bourike. 
Job42:13 Oun leske van efta morsh čave boldo oun triin ča. 
Job42:14 Oun i phoureder čat das lo o lab Yemima oun i douyti čat o lab Kezia oun i triinti čat o lab Keren-Happouk. 
Job42:15 Oun an o tselo them his kek djouvya yaake shoukar har o Hiobeskre ča. Oun lengro dad das len ninna dran leskro bravlepen yaake har lengre phralen, te lenn le kova pal leskro merepen." 
Job42:16 Oun o Hiob djivas pal kova gomme 140 (sheel-te-star-deesh) bersha. Oun yob dikas peskre čaven oun čavengre čaven, oun kolengre čaven oun kolengre čaven." 
Job42:17 Oun yob meras pal i lengsto djipen. 
Psalms1:1 Barhtelo hi kova, kay shounell gar ap kova, hoy i čilače penenna, Barhtelo hi kova, kay djal gar kolentsa, kay moukan o Debleskro drom. Barhtelo hi kova, kay beshell gar pash kolende, kay sanenn pral o Debleste." 
Psalms1:2 Kova hi barhtelo, kay kamell o baro Debleskre laba, oun moukell kol laba peske an o shero trouyel te djal ap o dives oun an i rat." 
Psalms1:3 Kova hi har i rouk, hoy tardo hi pash o pani. Ap o čačo tsiro venn leskre roukengre baro. Oun leskre patria ačenn zenelo. Lauter, hoy yob krella, djala mishto." 
Psalms1:4 Yaake hi i čilačentsa gar. Yon hi har čik, hoy i dourho krik phourdell." 
Psalms1:5 Ap ko dives, kay i phagi vin penlo vella, nay ačenn i čilače gar tardo. Oun kolla, kay o Debleskro drom moukan, nay ačenn gar kote, kay kolla khetne venna, kay an o čačepen tardo hi." 
Psalms1:6 O baro Devel prindjrell o drom kolendar, kay an o čačepen tardo hi. Oun o drom i čilačendar anell len an i bibarht." 
Psalms2:1 I menshe an i vavar themma hi divyo. Hoy kamenn le? Yon hadenn pen pral o baro Debleste! Hoske? Hoy le krenn, hi čičeske!" 
Psalms2:2 I bare raya ap kay phoub stakrenna pre, oun i pralstoune beshenn khetne, oun krenn vin, har nay hadenn le pen pral o baro Debleste oun pral koleste, kones yob vin rodas." 
Psalms2:3 “Mer kamah bouder gar te venn le ray pral mende”, penenn le. “Vitsras lengre shelle mendar, kolentsa yon men pandan!”" 
Psalms2:4 O Devel, kay an o bolepen beshdo hi, sal pral lende oun lengro dinelo rakepen." 
Psalms2:5 Vell i dives, kay rakrell lo lentsa i rholyah. Ava, leskri rholyah krell lo lenge daar, te penell lo:" 
Psalms2:6 “Ap i berga Sion, kay mange hi, čivom me i baro rayes, koles me vi-rodom.”" 
Psalms2:7 Kava baro ray penell: “Moukenn man t'menge kova te penell, hoy o baro Devel kamell te krell. Yob penas ap mande: Miro čavo hal tou. Kava dives vom tiro dad." 
Psalms2:8 Te mangeh mandar i tsele themma, dau me len toute. Ava, i tseli phoub dau me toute, te vell li tiro." 
Psalms2:9 Ab ray pral lende i sasterno vasteha, tou phageh len nay har čare.”" 
Psalms2:10 Doleske avenn gar dinele, t'mer bare raya ap kay phoub! Shounenn mishto ap kova, hoy penau, t'mer, kay han čačepangre raya ap kay phoub!" 
Psalms2:11 Boudrenn o baro Debleske oun darenn lestar, perenn glan leste tele oun čoumrenn leskre pire!" 
Psalms2:12 Čoumrenn o čaves, te vell lo gar rhoyedo ap t'mende, oun t'mer ap o drom merenna. Leskri rholi nay rhačella sik. Barhtele hi kolla lauter, kay khatrenn pen pash leste." 
Psalms3:1 I gili o Davidestar, hoy lo kras an ko tsiro, har hounte nashas lo peske glan peskro čaveste, o Absalom." 
Psalms3:2 Baro Devel, dik, har boud hi kolla, kay ap mande djan! Dik, har boud hadenn pen ap mande!" 
Psalms3:3 Boud penenn mandar: “O Devel hi gar ap leskri rig.” 
Psalms3:4 Tou, baro Devel, rike tiro vast pral mande! Tou hal kova, kay miro shero pale hadell, te hounte ladjap man gar." 
Psalms3:5 Dau me gole ap o baro Debleste, shounell lo man ap peskri berga, kay yob djivell." 
Psalms3:6 Me čivom man tele oun sovom, oun djinom, har djangrom, o baro Devel das yak ap mande i tseli rat." 
Psalms3:7 Me darau gar deesh-zerya lourdendar, kay djan ap mande hake rigyendar." 
Psalms3:8 Ste pre, baro Devel, oun le man vin, mo Devel! Hakenes, kay ap mande djal, deh tou ap i čam. Ava, i čilačenge deh tou i danda paash." 
Psalms3:9 Baro Devel, tou hal kova, kay lell man vin dran i bibarht. Te vell tiri barht ap tire menshende!" 
Psalms4:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell pash o bashepen ap i doryengri bashepaskri. O David kras kay gili." 
Psalms4:2 Shoun man, te dau ap toute gole! Miro Devel, kay deh man čačo! An miri daar kral tou miro dji zoreles. Ab lačes ap mande oun shoun har me tout mangau!" 
Psalms4:3 Morshale, har rah tserdenn t'mer miro lab an i čik! T'mer rodenn pal kova, hoy či moldo hi, oun kamenn o rhorhepen." 
Psalms4:4 Dikenn oun hayvenn: O baro Devel rodas kolen vin, kay kamenn les o tselo djiyestar. O baro Devel shounell man, te dau ap leste gole." 
Psalms4:5 Te vell i rholi an t'mende pre, palle anenn kek doosh ap t'mende! Rakrenn an t'mare djia, te han an t'maro čiben čiddo, oun rakrenn kek lab!" 
Psalms4:6 Denn kova o Debleste, hoy mishto oun čačo hi! Oun patsenn, te krell o baro Devel lauter mishto!" 
Psalms4:7 Boud penenna, koon moukell men lačepen dikell? Tou, baro Devel, mouk tiro lačepen har i momeli pral mende pre te djal!" 
Psalms4:8 Tou kral miro dji barhtleder har o dji kolendar, kolen boud djob oun mool hi." 
Psalms4:9 Me čivau man tele oun sovau kek daryah. Tou kokres, baro Devel, deh yak ap mande, te nay krell mange kek i čilačo koova." 
Psalms5:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell pash o bashepen ap i tikni phourdepaskri. O David kras kay gili." 
Psalms5:2 Baro Devel, shoun mire laba! Shoun, har me ap toute rovau!" 
Psalms5:3 De yak ap miri gole! Tou hal miro baro ray oun miro Devel, koles me mangau." 
Psalms5:4 Baro Devel, sik taysarlakro dau gole ap toute. Sik taysarlakro vau pash toute oun penau touke, hoy mange ap o dji hi. Oun dau palle yak, hoy tou mange peneh."
