Psalms5:5 Tou hal i Devel, kay čilače dromma gar kamella. Pash toute nay ačell i čilačo gar." 
Psalms5:6 Kol pre-phourden kameh tou gar glan tire yaka te dikell, oun tou rhoyreh tout ap hakeneste, kay i vavarenge čilačepen krella." 
Psalms5:7 Tou mareh kolen, kay o rhorhepen rakrenna. Praasedo hi glan o baro Debleste kolla, kolen doosh ap o rat i vavarendar hi, oun kay i vavaren rhorhenn." 
Psalms5:8 Mange hal lačes oun moukeh man an tiro kheer dren te djal. Me nay vitsrau man tele glan tiro raylo kheer, oun nay mangau tout an." 
Psalms5:9 Baro Devel, sike man o drom, hoy čačo hi glan toute! Kre mange o drom, hoy te djap! Mouk kolen te dikell, kay mange čilačepen kamenna, kay hal tou ap miri rig!" 
Psalms5:10 Ap lengro lab nay dell yek či. An lende hi čilačepen. Lengro rakepen anell o merepen. Yon rakrenn douy čipyentsa. 
Psalms5:11 Čip lengri doosh ap lengre shere, mo Devel! Mouk len te perell an pengre netse, hoy yon i vavarenge kran! Trade len toutar krik! Boud kope kran le o čilačepen. Pral toute hadan le pen." 
Psalms5:12 Barhtele venn kolla, kay khatrenn pen pash toute! Kolla denn gole i barhtyatar o tselo tsiro. Tou rikreh tiro vast pral lende. Doleske sanenn oun givenn le – kolla, kay tiro lab kamenna." 
Psalms5:13 Tou, baro Devel, čiveh tiri barht ap kolende, kay an o čačepen tardo hi. Tou čiveh tiro lačepen troul lende har i plaashka, yaake te nay doukrell len či." 
Psalms6:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell pash o bashepen ap i bashepaskri orhta doryentsa. O David kras kay gili." 
Psalms6:2 Baro Devel, tou hal rhoyedo ap mande. Ma de man savi bari phagi! Ma de man gar an tiri rholi!" 
Psalms6:3 Baro Devel, ab lačes ap mande, mange djal gar mishto! Baro Devel, kre man pale sasto! Man hi bouder kek zoor an mande." 
Psalms6:4 Man hi bari traash. Ah, baro Devel, har rah hal tou rhoyedo ap mande?" 
Psalms6:5 Risse trouyel, baro Devel, oun le man vin! Tou hal yaake lačo, le man vin!" 
Psalms6:6 Te hom moulo, nay sharau me tout bouder gar. Pash i moulende parkrenn le pen gar pash toute." 
Psalms6:7 Khino hom o ropastar. I tseli rat nashenn mire sva, oun miro čiben hi sapenes lendar." 
Psalms6:8 Me dikau bouder gar mishto, – yaake pharo hi miro dji. Mire yaka hi pesso o ropastar kol boudenge, kay mange o djipen phares krenna." 
Psalms6:9 Djan t'menge, t'mer lauter, kay han čilačes! O baro Devel shounas miro ropen." 
Psalms6:10 Ava, o baro Devel shounas miri gole. Miro mangepen las lo an." 
Psalms6:11 Ladj ap kolende, kay mange čilačepen kamenna! Sik te vell i bari traash ap lende, te hounte nashenn le oun ladjenn pen!" 
Psalms7:1 I ropaskri gili, hoy givas o David o baro Debleske, har o Benyaminari Koush leske o djipen phares kras." 
Psalms7:2 Baro Devel, tou hal miro Devel, pash toute khatrau man. Le man vin dran i vasta kolendar, kay man palla lenna! Te veh tou gar ap miri rig," 
Psalms7:3 venn le har i levo oun taprenn man oun dandrenn man. Oun kek nay tserdell man mank lengre danda vin. 
Psalms7:4 Baro Devel, tou hal miro Devel, me te krom savo koova, hoy penan le, oun te hi doosh ap mande," 
Psalms7:5 te homs čilačes ap kolende, kay mange lačes kaman, oun kolendar čoroms, kay les mange phares kran, ninna te krom me lenge či," 
Psalms7:6 palle mou lenn man palla kolla, kay hi rhoyede ap mande! Mou taprenn le man, oun vitsrenn man ap i phoub, oun moukenn le man an i čik čiddo!" 
Psalms7:7 Ab rhoyedo, baro Devel, oun hade tout ap kolende, kay rhoyede hi ap mande oun ap mande djan. Oun ab ap miri rig, oun rake o čačepen vin!" 
Psalms7:8 De i menshen dran i tsele themma khetne gole troul toute, oun besh tout dour pral lende ap tiro čačepaskro stamin!" 
Psalms7:9 Baro Devel, tou hal o baro čačepaskro ray pral i menshende dran i tsele themma. De man miro čačepen! Tou djineh, me hom tardo an o čačepen oun kek doosh hi ap mande." 
Psalms7:10 Tou hal i Devel, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, oun dikeh an hakeneskro dji oun shero. Kanna kre, te nay krenn i čilače kek čilačepen bouder! Kre kolen zorelo, kay an o čačepen tardo hi!" 
Psalms7:11 O Devel rikrell peskro vast pral mande. Yob lell kolen dran i bibarht vin, kay shounenn ap leste pengro tselo djiyeha." 
Psalms7:12 O Devel hi i čačepaskro ray, kay an o čačepen tardo hi. Yob hi i Devel, koleskri rholi nay rhačella hako dives." 
Psalms7:13 Čačepah, pale las o čilačo peskro rharo, oun hadell peskro bogo, te dell lo karye." 
Psalms7:14 Dik, peskro merepaskro rharo oun i fayle, hoy rhačenna, hadas lo pre, te dell lo karye!" 
Psalms7:15 Les hi čilačepen an o shero, oun midjak koova an o dji. Oun dran leste vell rhorhepen." 
Psalms7:16 Yob hadas i rheb vin, hoy djas dour tele, oun peras palle kokres dren, – an koy rheb, hoy yob i vavareske vi-hadas." 
Psalms7:17 Koy bibarht, hoy kamas lo ap i vavareste te anell, vas ap leskro shero pale. Ko čilačo koova, hoy kamas lo i vavareske te krell, peras ap leste pale." 
Psalms7:18 Me parkrau man pash o baro Debleste, te hadas lo o čačepen pre, oun sharau o baro Debles, ko Debles pral halauter." 
Psalms8:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell pash o bashepen ap i bashepaskri orhta doryentsa. O David kras kay gili." 
Psalms8:2 Baro Devel, maro ray, har raylo hi tiro lab ap i tseli phoub! Tiro raylepen hi bareder har o bolepen." 
Psalms8:3 Dran o mouy i čavendar oun tikne čavendar venn kol laba, hoy sharenn tout. Yaake hounte rikrenn pengro mouy kolla, kay kamenn tout gar oun hi rhoyedo ap toute." 
Psalms8:4 Me te dikau o bolepen, hoy tou tire goushtentsa kral, o čon oun i momlia an o bolepen, hoy tou kral," 
Psalms8:5 palle poučau mandar: Hoy hi o mensho? Hoske vell lo touke an o shero? Hi lo touke yaake kouč, te veh ap leskri rig?" 
Psalms8:6 Tou kral les gar boud tikneder har tout kokres. Baro oun raylo kral tou les. 
Psalms8:7 Tou kral les ray pral halauter, hoy tire vasta kran. Lauter čival tou tel leskre herya:" 
Psalms8:8 Bakre, bouzya oun groumya, oun i divye firhe ninna," 
Psalms8:9 i čirkle an o bolepen oun i mače an o baro pani, oun lauter, hoy an o pani djivell." 
Psalms8:10 Baro Devel, maro ray, har raylo hi tiro lab ap i tseli phoub!" 
Psalms9:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell har koy gili Muth labben. O David kras kay gili." 
Psalms9:2 Baro Devel, me parkrau man pash toute o tselo djiyeha, oun rakrau pral ko tselo baro koova, hoy tou kral." 
Psalms9:3 Pral toute hom barhtelo, oun miro dji givell toutar, oun sharau tiro lab, tou Devel pral halauter!" 
Psalms9:4 Glan toute hounte tserdan pen kolla pale, kay his rhoyedo ap mande. Yon peran oun meran glan toute." 
Psalms9:5 Ava, tou lal miro koova an tiro vast, oun beshal tout ap tiro čačepaskro stamin oun dal man čačes. Tou hal i čačepaskro ray, kay an o čačepen tardo hi." 
Psalms9:6 Tou dal trad kol menshen an vavar themma, oun maral kolen, kay kaman toutar či te djinell. Lengre laba hi bistedo kanna oun hako tsireske." 
Psalms9:7 Ava, kolla, kay kaman tout gar, hi bouder gar koy. Krik hi le hako tsireske. Lengre forya kral tou paash. Hako tsireske hi le bistedo." 
Psalms9:8 O baro Devel ačella hako tsireske. Leskro čačepaskro stamin hi tardo. 
Psalms9:9 Yob hi o čačepaskro ray pral i tseli phoub. Oun pral i tsele themma rakrell yob o čačepen vin. 
Psalms9:10 I bibarhtele nay khatrenn pen pash leste, oun yob rikrell peskro vast pral lende, oun dell yak ap lende an phare tsirya." 
Psalms9:11 Doleske rikrenn kolla ap toute, kay tiro lab prindjrenna. Koon tout, o baro Debles, rodella, koles moukeh tou gar kokres." 
Psalms9:12 Givenn o baro Debleske, kay ap i berga Sion khere hi! Penenn i menshenge an vavar themma, hoy yob lauter kras!" 
Psalms9:13 Kova, kay bistrell gar te dell lo kolen i phagi, kay lan i rateskri doosh ap pende. Yob shounell i gole oun o mangepen kolendar, kay čorvelo oun palla lino hi." 
Psalms9:14 Ab lačes ap mande, baro Devel! Dik o čilačepen, hoy kolla mantsa krenna, kay hi moulo rhoyedo ap mande! Oun tserde tou man vin dran o merepaskro vast!" 
Psalms9:15 Palle djau an i voudya tiro forestar Sion dren, oun rakrau lauterentsa pral ko lačepen, hoy tou ap mande kral, oun sharau tout i barhtelo djiyeha, kay tou man dran i bibarht vin lal." 
Psalms9:16 I menshe an vavar themma, peran an koy rheb, hoy yon i vin hadan. An koy netsa, hoy yon vin čivan, tapran le pen kokres." 
Psalms9:17 O baro Devel sikras, koon yob hi, oun das i čilačende pengri phagi. I čilače pandan pen an koy netsa, hoy yon pengre vastentsa kran." 
Psalms9:18 Kamau, te djan le lauter pash i moulende, – kalla, kay kamenn o Deblestar či te djinell, oun bistrenn, kay hi yob o Devel." 
Psalms9:19 O Devel bistrell o čorveles gar – an kek tsiro. I bibarhtele nay djinenn, te vell i tsiro, kay venn le barhtelo." 
Psalms9:20 Baro Devel, ste pre! Mouk i menshen gar te hadenn le pen pral toute! An i menshen dran i tsele themma glan toute! Oun rake o čačepen pral lende vin!" 
Psalms9:21 Čip i daar ap lende, baro Devel, oun sike lende, te hi le či har menshe!" 
Psalms10:1 Baro Devel, hoske hal tou yaake dour mandar krik? Hoske khatreh tou tout mandar an o čilačo tsiro?" 
Psalms10:2 O čilačo hi pre-phourdo oun lell i čorvelen palla, oun krell lentsa ko čilačo koova, hoy leske an leskro shero trouyel djal." 
Psalms10:3 Yob sharell pes pral kova, hoy lo kamell te krell. Oun kova, kay i meen gar pherdo lell, praasella o baro Debles oun sal pral leste." 
Psalms10:4 O čilačo rikrell o nak pral oun penell peske: O Devel poučell gar palla. Lauter, hoy leske an o shero trouyel djala, hi: Dell kek Devel." 
Psalms10:5 Lauter djal leske, har yob kamella. Te deh tou leste i phagi, patsell lo kova gar, yaake dour hal tou lestar krik. Yob čoungrell ap lauterende, kay leske an o drom tardo hi." 
Psalms10:6 Yob penell peske an peskro dji: Či nay vitsrell man trouyel. Kek bibarht vell ap mande. 
Psalms10:7 Yob koshell, rhorhell oun dell trad. Leskro rakepen anella douka oun bibarht." 
Psalms10:8 Khatemen pal i khera hi lo beshdo, oun čorrhanes dell lo kolen moulo, kay ap lende kek doosh hi. Leskre yaka djan o čorveleske palla." 
Psalms10:9 Čorrhanes khatedo har i levo an i bourra, yaake lourell yob ap o čorveleste, oun taprell les an peskri netsa oun tserdell les krik." 
Psalms10:10 Yob djal tele ap i čanga oun stell ap o čorveleste, oun peskri zoryah vitsrell lo les an i čik." 
Psalms10:11 An peskro dji penell lo peske: “O Devel djinell kova gar. Yob das gar yak pre oun dikell či.” 
Psalms10:12 Ste pre, baro Devel! Mo Devel, hade tiro vast! Ma biste i čorvelen!" 
Psalms10:13 Hoske nay praasell tout kova, kay kamell toutar či te djinell? Hoske nay penell lo an peskro dji: “O Devel poučella gar palla.”" 
Psalms10:14 Tou dikal les. Tou deh yak ap kolende, kolenge le o djipen phares krenn, oun djineh lengre douka, oun leh lengro koova an tiro vast. Ava, i čorvele čivenn pengro djipen an tiro vast. Tou hal ap i rig kolendar, kolen kek dad bouder hi." 
Psalms10:15 Phage i zoor kol čilačendar oun midjak menshendar, hoy len pral i vavarende hi! De len pengri phagi, te krenn le bouder kek čilačo koova!" 
Psalms10:16 O baro Devel hi o baro ray kanna oun hako tsiro. Kolla, kay gar ap leste patsenna, djan penge dran leskro them." 
Psalms10:17 Kova, hoy i čorvele toutar mangenna, shouneh tou, mo baro Devel. Tou kreh lengro dji zorelo, oun tiro kand hi lenge pre." 
Psalms10:18 Oun tou deh o čačepen i čorvelenge oun kolenge, kay len kek dad bouder hi, yaake te nay krell bouder kek mensho i vavarenge daar ap kay phoub." 
Psalms11:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. O David kras kay gili. Me čivau miro tselo patsepen ap o baro Debleste. Har nay penenn t'mer palle ap mande: “Naash har i čirklo an i berge! 
Psalms11:2 Dikeh tou gar, te tserdenn i čilače o bogo oun čivenn pengre fayle koy pre, yaake te denn le khatemen karye ap kolende, kay shounenn pengro tselo djiyeha ap o Debleste." 
Psalms11:3 Te perell lauter an kotya, nay krell kova či, kay an o čačepen tardo hi.”" 
Psalms11:4 O baro Devel hi an peskro raylo baro kheer. Leskro rayeskri beshepaskri hi an o bolepen. Leskre yaka dikenna tele ap i menshende, oun yob lell len an o yak." 
Psalms11:5 Yob rodell an i djia i lačendar oun i čilačendar. Koon o čilačepen kamell, ap koleste hi lo peskro tselo djiyeha rhoyedo." 
Psalms11:6 Mou dell lo i čilačen i phagi: Yag oun yagakri khand moukell lo pral lende te perell, oun i tato dourho phourdell ap lende." 
Psalms11:7 O baro Devel hi an o čačepen tardo, oun kamell hakenes, kay o čačepen krella. Koon ap leste shounella peskro tselo djiyeha, kova dikell les peskre yakentsa." 
Psalms12:1 I gili o Davidestar te givess lat pash o bashepen ap i orhta-doryengri bashepaskri. 
Psalms12:2 Baro Devel, ab ap miri rig! Tire menshe hi bouder gar boud. Ava, kolla, kay patsle hi mank i menshende, hi gar boud." 
Psalms12:3 Hakeno rhorhell o vavares. Yon rakrenn douy čipyentsa oun dran douy djia. 
Psalms12:4 Baro Devel, kre, te rikrenn le pengre mouya, kolla, kay rakrenn douy čipyentsa! Pande kolenge o mouy, kay yaake bares rakrenna," 
Psalms12:5 oun penenna: “Mer hayvah te rakrell. Maro rakepah ham zoreles. Koon hi o pralstouno pral mende?” 
Psalms12:6 “Kanna”, penell o baro Devel, “stau me pre. Ap i čorvelende djan le zoryah. Me shounom lengro ropen. Kanna rikrau mire vasta pral hakeneste, kay peskro tselo djiyeha kamell, te vap ap leskri rig.”" 
Psalms12:7 O baro Debleskre laba hi djoudjo har roup, thodo an i yagakro bob efta kope." 
Psalms12:8 Tou, mo baro Devel, rikreh tiro lab, oun rikreh tiro vast pral mende hako tsiro, te nay krenn kol menshe menge kek čilačepen," 
Psalms12:9 ninna te nashenn kolla trouyel, kay kamenn toutar či te djinell, oun o čilačepen bareder vell mank i menshende." 
Psalms13:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. O David kras kay gili. 
Psalms13:2 Baro Devel, har rah bistreh tou man? Kameh tou man hako tsiro te bistrell?" 
Psalms13:3 Har rah darap an miro dji? Har rah poučap man darenes hako dives: Har rah hadell pes kova pral mande, kay kamell mange čilačepen te krell?" 
Psalms13:4 Tou, mo Devel, dik ap mande oun shoun miro mangepen! Mouk man i momeli te dikell, te merap gar!" 
Psalms13:5 Kova, kay kamell mange čilačepen, nay sharals pes oun penals, te vals lo zorleder har me. Kolla, kay hadenn pen ap mande, vans barhtelo pral miro perepen." 
Psalms13:6 Me dikau ap tiro lačepen, miro dji bashrell koy pral, kay tou man vin leh dran i čilače vasta. Me kamau te givap o baro Debleske, kay mange yaake lačes hi." 
Psalms14:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. O David kras kay gili. Dinele hi le, kay rakrenn penge: “O Devel dell pes gar!” Či-molde hi le! I ladj hi kova, hoy yon krenn. Kek hi koy, kay krell lačepen." 
Psalms14:2 O baro Devel dikell dran o bolepen tele ap i menshende, te dikell lo: Dell yek, kay gosevo hi oun pal leste poučella?" 
Psalms14:3 Halauter rissran pen lestar krik, oun djivenn i djoungelo djipen, yek har ko vavar. Kek hi koy, kay krell o lačepen, ava, kek!" 
Psalms14:4 “Djinenn kol čilače gar, hoy yon krenna”, penell o baro Devel, – “kolla, kay rhan mire menshen har i kotar maro? Oun ap mande denn le gar gole.”" 
Psalms14:5 Sik vell ko tsiro, kay perenn le an i daar. O Devel rikrell pash kolende, kay an o čačepen tardo hi." 
Psalms14:6 “T'mer kaman i čorvelenge čilačepen te krell, oun kova paash te krell, hoy yon kaman. O baro Devel rikrell peskre vasta pral lende.”" 
Psalms14:7 Har kamaus me, te vals kova koy berga Sion tele, kay lell o Israel vin dran i bibarht! Ava, har kamaus me, te anell o baro Devel peskre pandle menshen pale! Palle stenna o Yakobeskre čave i barhtyatar, ava, o tselo Israel vell barhtelo." 
Psalms15:1 I gili o Davidestar. Baro Devel, koon nay vell an tiro kheer? Kones moukeh tou ap koy berga te djivell, kay tou khere hal?" 
Psalms15:2 Koles kokres, kay i djoudjo djipen djivell, oun hako tsiro krell, hoy čačo hi. Kova, kay kek rhorhepen rakrella," 
Psalms15:3 vitar kek djounglepen pral yekeste penella. Kova, kay peskro maleske kek čilačepen krella, oun kolen gar praasella, kay pash leste djivenna." 
Psalms15:4 Kova, kay hadell gar kolen, kay kova krenna, hoy o baro Devel gar kamella, Na-a, yob hadell kolen, kay o baro Debleha djivenna. Yob krell, ap hoy yob pes sovel das, ninna te vell kova leske phares." 
Psalms15:5 Te patsas lo peskre love, lell lo gar boudeder love pale. Ninna te denn le les shoukar koova, anell lo kek rhorhepen ap koleste, kay kek čilačepen kras. Koon yaake djivella, kova hi zoreles tardo an peskro djipen." 
Psalms16:1 I gili o Davidestar. Rike tiro vast pral mande, miro Devel! Me čivau miro tselo patsepen ap toute." 
Psalms16:2 Me penom ap o baro Debleste: Tou hal miro ray. Hako lačo koova, hoy man hi, vell toutar." 
Psalms16:3 I Debleskre menshe an o them hi raylo. Yon krenn miro dji barhteles. 
Psalms16:4 Boud hi i douka kolendar, kay nashenn i vavar debleske palla. Me kamau kol rhorhene deblenge kek rat vin te čorell. Vitar gar kamau lengro lab an miro mouy te lell." 
Psalms16:5 Tou, baro Devel, hal miro bravlepen, oun deh man lauter, hoy man hounte vell djipaske. Miro tselo djipen hi an tiro vast." 
Psalms16:6 Kova, hoy yob mange vi-rodas, hi an i shoukar them. Ava, kova, hoy yob man dell, hi shoukar." 
Psalms16:7 Me sharau o baro Debles, kay mange penell, hoy hounte krap. Ninna an i rat rakrell miro dji mantsa, te bistrap gar, hoy yob kamella." 
Psalms16:8 Miro baro Devel hi man hako tsiro glan mire yaka. Yob te hi ap miri čači rig, nay hom me zoreles tardo." 
Psalms16:9 Doleske hi miro dji barhtelo, oun halauter an mande stell i barhtyatar. Ava, me nay čivau man tele kek daryah." 
Psalms16:10 Tou moukeh man gar an o merepen, oun kameh gar, te merell miro mass tele an i phoub." 
Psalms16:11 Tou sikreh o drom, kay an o djipen anell. Pash toute hom barhtelo. Te hom kote, kay tou hal, bashrell miro dji hako tsiro." 
Psalms17:1 I mangepen o Davidestar. Baro Devel, shoun, hoy toutar mangau: De man miro čačepen! De yak, har dau ap toute gole! Shoun miro mangepen, hoy vell dran i mouy, hoy gar rhorhella!" 
Psalms17:2 Rake tou mange lačes! Tou dikeh, ap havi rig o čačepen hi." 
Psalms17:3 Tou djineh, hoy mange an o shero djal. Ninna an i rati dikal palla, har an miro dji vi-dikella, oun hatsal či an mande, hoy gar mishto hi. Ninna kek čilačo lab vas dran miro mouy vin." 
Psalms17:4 Yaake har i menshe krenna, krau me les gar. Me rikrau man ap tire laba, oun djau gar ap čilače dromma." 
Psalms17:5 Mire pire djan ap tiro drom oun peran gar tele. 
Psalms17:6 Me dau ap toute gole, oun tou, mo Devel shouneh man. Risse tiro kand pash mande, oun shoun, hoy me ap toute rakrau!" 
Psalms17:7 Sike tiro lačepen, tou, kay leh kolen dran i čilače vasta vin, kay pen pash toute khatrenna," 
Psalms17:8 Rike tiro vast pral mande, yaake har te voms tiri yak. Khate man yaake har i čirklo peskre čaven tel peskre moussya khatrell!" 
Psalms17:9 Tou dikeh kol čilačen, kay i zoryah ap mande pre djan, kolla, kay haki rigyatar ap mande venna, te denn le man." 
Psalms17:10 Lengre djia pandenn le, te khaytell len kek, oun pengro mouyeha krenn le pen bares." 
Psalms17:11 Kay mer ninna djah, yon hi troul mende oun lenn men an i yak, te stakrenn le men an i phoub." 
Psalms17:12 Yon hi har i levo, hoy khatedes beshdo hi, oun ap yekeste lourella, hoy yob nay rhal." 
Psalms17:13 Baro Devel, ste tou pre, čip tout lenge an o drom! Stake len khetne! Ab oun le tiro rharo, oun le miro djipen vin dran i vasta kol čilačendar." 
Psalms17:14 Baro Devel, tiro vasteha le man vin dran o vast kol menshendar, kay djivenn i phoubyake. Lengro bravlepen lenn yon an kava djipen! Tou kreh lengro per pherdo ko koova, hoy tou lenge deh. Ninna lengre čave venn čalo, oun moukenn pral pengre čavenge." 
Psalms17:15 Me krom, hoy čačo hi. Doleske nay dikau tout. Te djangrau pre, dikau me tout oun hom čalo i barhtyatar." 
Psalms18:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. O David, kay o baro Debleskro boudepaskro hi, kras kay gili oun givas lat o baro Debleske ap ko dives, har o baro Devel les vin las dran i vasta lauterendar, kay leske čilačepen kaman, oun ninna dran i vasta o baro rayestar Saul." 
Psalms18:2 Oun yob penas: Baro Devel, miro tselo djiyestar kamau tout. Tou kreh man zoreles." 
Psalms18:3 Baro Devel, tou hal mange har i baro zorelo bar, kay nay khatrau man, har i zorelo kheer, kay nay krell kek mange čilačepen. Miro Devel, tou hal kova, pash koleste nay vau oun man khatrau. Tire vasta rikreh tou pral mande. Tou hal ko zorelo ap miri rig, oun hal mange har i zorelo kheer pral ap i berga." 
Psalms18:4 Me sharau o baro Debles! Te dau ap leste gole, lell lo man vin dran i vasta kolendar, hoy mange čilačepen kamenna." 
Psalms18:5 O merepen pandas man an peskre shelle, oun merepaskri daar djas pral mande har zorele panya." 
Psalms18:6 I moulengro them pandas peskre shelle troul mande, oun o merepaskre shelle tserdan man tele." 
Psalms18:7 An miri daar kharom ap o baro Debleste. Ava, bari gole dom ap miro Debleste. An peskro raylo kheer shounas lo man, oun miri gole vas glan leskre kanda." 
Psalms18:8 Koy trissas i phoub, pral oun tele djan i berge o Debleskri bari rholyatar." 
Psalms18:9 Yagakro dourho djas dran leskro nak pre, baro tatepen vas dran leskro mouy vin, ninna yag das karye lestar vin." 
Psalms18:10 Oun yob tserdas o bolepen ap i rig, oun vas tele. Kali rat his tel leskre herya." 
Psalms18:11 Oun yob beshas ap i keroub oun hadas pes har i čirklo; ava, yob moukas pes te hidjrell ap i moussya o dourhestar." 
Psalms18:12 Kali rat his leskro ripen, An kalo pani oun pesse volke his lo khatedo." 
Psalms18:13 Dran o raylepen glan leste djan leskre volke doureder, brishineskre barra oun barra, hoy rhačran, peran dran lende." 
Psalms18:14 Oun o baro Devel moukas o bolepen bari gole te dell, ava, o Devel pral halauter moukas pes te shounell bari golyah." 
Psalms18:15 Oun yob das yag karye dran o bolepen kate te kote, oun tradas i volke krik." 
Psalms18:16 Kote vas o telstunepen tel i panya diklo, oun i telstouni phoub vas pre-čakedo, har tou, baro Devel, čingral oun trad dal an tiri rholi." 
Psalms18:17 Dran o bolepen tapras man tiro vast, oun tserdas man dran o baro pani vin." 
Psalms18:18 Tou lal man vin dran o vast kol zorelendar, kay kaman miro merepen, ava, dran ko vast kolendar, kay his yaake rhoyedo ap mande oun boud zorleder har me." 
Psalms18:19 Ap o dives, kay i bibarht pral mande vas, peran le pral mande. Koy vas o baro Devel ap miri rig." 
Psalms18:20 Yob las man vin dran lengre vasta oun anas man an i bourhlo them. Yob kamell man, doleske kras lo kova." 
Psalms18:21 O baro Devel djinas, te homs an o čačepen tardo. Doleske kras lo mange lačepen. Kek doosh his ap mande. Doleske his lo mange lačo." 
Psalms18:22 Me rikrom man ap i dromma o baro Deblestar, oun moukom gar miro Debles." 
Psalms18:23 Ava, leskro tselo čačepen hi glan mire yaka, oun rikrau ap lauter, hoy yob kamell, te krap." 
Psalms18:24 Yaake te hatsell lo či ap mande, kay nay čingrell lo mantsa, oun dau yak, te vell kek doosh ap mande." 
Psalms18:25 Miro čačepen his glan leskre yaka. Oun kek doosh his ap mande. Doleske kras o baro Devel mange lačepen. 
Psalms18:26 Tou rikreh ap koleste, kay ap toute rikrell, oun kreh, hoy mishto hi koleske, kay krella, hoy tou lestar kameh." 
Psalms18:27 Tou hal lačo ap koleste, kay hi lačo ap i vavarende oun hal gosveder har kova, kay ap bange dromma djal." 
Psalms18:28 Tou veh ap i rig i čorvelenge, oun kol pre-phourden kreh tou tiknes." 
Psalms18:29 Miro baro Devel, tou kreh miri momeli zoreles, oun kreh miri rat yaake har vals dives." 
Psalms18:30 Ava, khetne touha nay djau me an o kourepen. Khetne miro Debleha nay stau me pral bare pre-čidde barra." 
Psalms18:31 I tsele dromma, kay o Devel man anella, hi lačo. Leskre laba hi lačo oun čačo. Yob rikrell peskro vast pral hakeneste, kay vell pash leste." 
Psalms18:32 Yek kokres hi o Devel. Kova hi o baro Devel. Yek kokres hi har i baro zorelo bar menge, kay nay khatrah men. Kova hi maro Devel." 
Psalms18:33 Yob hi kova, kay dell man zoor oun krell i lačo drom glan mande." 
Psalms18:34 Yob krell mire herya yaake sik, har te vans le i herya i vesheskri groumyatar, te vap zoreles tardo ap i pralstoune berge." 
Psalms18:35 Yob sikrell man, har mire vasta hounte kourenn pen, oun har miri moussi rikrell o sasterno bogo." 
Psalms18:36 Baro Devel, tou rikreh tiro vast pral mande, te doukrell man kek. Tiri čači moussi dell man zoor, oun tou dikeh lačes ap mande oun kreh man bares." 
Psalms18:37 Tou kral, te nay stakrau zoreles pre, oun kral mange o drom dour pre." 
Psalms18:38 Me lom kolen palla, kay ap mande pre djan, oun taprom len, oun moukom gar tele, bis te his le moulo dino." 
Psalms18:39 Me doukrom len yaake, te nay stan le gar bouder pre, oun stakrom len tel mire herya." 
Psalms18:40 Tou dal man i zoor, te nay kourom man lentsa oun vitsral kolen ap i phoub glan mande, kay hadan pen ap mande." 
Psalms18:41 Tou kral, te hounte nashan le mandar. Yaake nay marom kolen, kay mange čilačepen kaman." 
Psalms18:42 Fothe dan le gole, his kek koy, kay nay lals len dran miro vast vin. Ap o baro Debleste dan le gole, oun yob rakras gar pale ap lende." 
Psalms18:43 Oun me dom len khetne, dom len tiknes har čik, hoy i baro dourho krik phourdell. Har čik čorom len vin ap o drom." 
Psalms18:44 Tou lal man vin dran o čingepen mire menshentsa, oun kral man o ray pral i menshende dran vavar themma, Menshe, kolen me gar prindjrom, boudrenn mange." 
Psalms18:45 I vi-themarya rakrenn shoukar ap mande, oun shounenn ap mande oun krenn sik, hoy penau." 
Psalms18:46 Len hi bouder kek zoor an pende. Daryah venn le dran pengre zorele rayengre khera vin. 
Psalms18:47 O baro Devel djivella! Les sharau: har i baro zorelo bar hi lo mange. Miro Debles hadau: yob das ap mande yak," 
Psalms18:48 oun kras man zorleder har kolla, kay kouran pen mantsa, oun vitsras i menshen dran vavar themma tel mande." 
Psalms18:49 Tou lal man vin dran i vasta kolendar, kay kaman miro merepen. Tou hadal man pral kolende, kay hadan pen ap mande, oun moukal man gar an i čilače vasta." 
Psalms18:50 Doleske sharau tout mank kolende, kay hi gar tire menshendar, baro Devel, oun givau gilya touke." 
Psalms18:51 Tou kreh baro koova o Davideske, koles tou vi-rodal, te vell lo o baro ray. Oun hal yaake lačes ap leste oun kolende, kay lestar venn. Tiro kamlepen lenge ačell hako tsireske." 
Psalms19:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. O David kras kay gili. 
Psalms19:2 O bolepen sikrella, har baro oun raylo o Devel hi, oun i bolepangre momlia sikrenna, hoy yob lauter kras." 
Psalms19:3 Yek dives penell les o vavareske oun yek rat i vavarake. 
Psalms19:4 Kek labentsa rakrenn le. Oun lengri gole vell gar shounlo. 
Psalms19:5 Lengro rakepen djal an hako them, oun vell shounlo ap i tseli phoub. O Devel kras i kheer o khameske an o bolepen." 
Psalms19:6 Taysarlake djal o kham vin har i biyabeskro dran peskri isema, oun har i zorelo naashepaskro hi lo barhtelo, te nashell peskro drom." 
Psalms19:7 O kham djal pre ap koy yek rig o bolepastar, oun nashell peskro drom bis ap i vavar rig, oun glan leskro tatepen ačella či khatedo." 
Psalms19:8 O baro Debleskre laba hi lauter čačo oun krenn mare djia zorelo. O baro Debleskro rakepen hi lačo, oun krell i dinelen gosevo." 
Psalms19:9 Kova, hoy o baro Devel menge penell, te kras mer, hi čačo, oun krell maro dji barhtelo. Kova, hoy lo mendar kamell, nay hayvell hakeno. Kova hi har i momeli, hoy sikrell men o drom." 
Psalms19:10 Te hadau o baro Debles pre, hi kova mishto. Hako tsiro vell lo hadedo. O čačepen, hoy o baro Devel vin rakrella, hi lauter lačo oun čačo." 
Psalms19:11 Leskro čačepen hi koučeder har o sonakay, har o rayleder sonakay, oun goudleder har o gvin, har o djoudjeder gvin." 
Psalms19:12 Miro ray, me moukau tire laba ap miro dji te rakrell. Koon rikrell pes ap lende, koleske djal mishto." 
Psalms19:13 Kek mendar djinell haki doosh, hoy lo ap peste anas. Le koy doosh mandar krik, hoy anom ap mande oun djinau kova gar!" 
Psalms19:14 Mouk man gar khetne kolentsa te djal, kay hi pre-phourde, te tserdenn le man gar ap lengri rig. Yaake vell kek doosh ap mande, oun me krau kek baro čilačo koova." 
Psalms19:15 Mouk o rakepen, hoy vell dran miro mouy, oun kova, hoy rakrau an miro dji, shoukar te vell touke! Baro Devel, tou rikreh man, oun hal kova, kay man vin las dran o čilačepen." 
Psalms20:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. O David kras kay gili. 
Psalms20:2 Mangau o baro Debles, o Yakobeskro Debles, te shounell lo tout ap o dives, kay i bibarht pral toute vell. Mou rikrell yob peskro vast pral toute!" 
Psalms20:3 Mou vell lo dran leskro kheer ap tiri rig! Oun dran o foro Sion bičrell lo touke zoor! 
Psalms20:4 Mou bistrell lo kek lačo koova, hoy tou leske anal, oun dikell lačes ap kol firhen, hoy tou leske rhačral!" 
Psalms20:5 Mou dell lo tout lauter, hoy tiro dji kamella, oun krell, te djal touke lauter mishto, hoy tou touke glan lal!" 
Psalms20:6 Palle kamah mer te givell i barhtyatar. Oun sharah maro Debles oun hidjrah o themeskri plarhta, te sikras, kay yob tout zoreles kras pral kolende, kay kouran pen touha. O baro Devel mou dell tout lauter, hoy tou lestar mangeh!" 
Psalms20:7 Kanna djinau, kay vell o baro Devel ap i rig kolestar, koles yob vin rodas, te vell lo baro ray. Dran o bolepen, kay yob khere hi, shounell lo ap leste, oun peskri bari zoryah vell lo ap leskri rig." 
Psalms20:8 Vavar menshe patsenna ap i zoor pengre grayendar oun vourdya. Mer dah gole ap maro baro Debleste. 
Psalms20:9 Yon hi kolla, kay phagenn khetne oun perenn. Mer ačah tardo oun dah gar palla." 
Psalms20:10 Baro Devel, ab o baro rayeske ap i rig! Mou shounell lo men ap o dives, kay dah ap leste gole!" 
Psalms21:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. O David kras kay gili. 
Psalms21:2 Baro Devel, har barhtelo hi o baro ray pral tiri zoor! Tou hal ap leskri rig. Doleske bashrell leskro dji." 
Psalms21:3 Kova, hoy yob o djiyestar kamas, dal tou les, oun kova, hoy yob toutar mangas, rikral gar pale." 
Psalms21:4 Tou čoral pral leste barht pral barht, čival shereskro sonakay ap leskro shero." 
Psalms21:5 Djipen mangas lo toutar, oun tou dal les leste: o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella, dal tou les." 
Psalms21:6 Tou hal ap leskri rig oun kral leskro raylepen bares. Shoukapen oun barepen čival tou ap leste. 
Psalms21:7 Tiri barht hi ap leste hako tsiro. Tou hal pash leste. Doleske bashrell leskro dji. 
Psalms21:8 O baro ray patsell ap o baro Debleste, ko Debleste pral halauter. Oun dran o Debleskro lačepen nay ačell o baro ray zoreles tardo." 
Psalms21:9 Tiro vast hatsell hakenes, kay kamell touke čilačepen te krell. Tiro čačo vast hatsell kolen, kay pen ap toute rhoyrenna." 
Psalms21:10 Tou rhačreh len har an i bobeskri yag, an ko tsiro, kay tou moukeh tout te dikell. Tiri rholi rhačrell har i yag, oun rhal len pre." 
Psalms21:11 Kek lengre čavendar ačenn djido, gar yek lendar ačell ap kay phoub." 
Psalms21:12 Yon van khetne oun rakran, har nay krenn le touke čilačepen. Či, hoy kamenn le touha te krell, djal lenge mishto." 
Psalms21:13 Tou leh tiro bogo oun rikreh ap lende, oun kreh, te rissrenn le pen trouyel oun nashenn penge." 
Psalms21:14 Baro Devel, hade tout an tiri zoor! Palle givah touke gilya oun sharah tiri zoor." 
Psalms22:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell har koy gili I vesheskri groumni, hoy sik ap o dives tradedo vella. O David kras kay gili." 
Psalms22:2 Mo Devel, mo Devel, hoske moukal tou man? Me dau gole ap toute, oun tou veh gar ap miri rig. Hoske ačeh dour mandar?" 
Psalms22:3 Mo Devel, ap o dives dau ap toute gole, oun tou shouneh man gar, ninna rati kharau tout, oun hatsau kek sopen." 
Psalms22:4 Tou hal ko yek čačo Devel, oun hal beshdo ap tiri rayeskri beshepaskri, oun o Israel givell touke gilya." 
Psalms22:5 Ap toute dikan mare phoure, oun tou val ap lengri rig." 
Psalms22:6 Ap toute dan le gole, oun tou lal len vin. Ap toute dikan le, oun tou moukal len gar kokres." 
Psalms22:7 I kirmo hom me oun bouder kek mensho. I menshe praasenn man, oun dikenn tele ap mande." 
Psalms22:8 Hakeno, kay dikell man, sal pral mande, rissrell peskre yaka, oun čivell peskro shero ap i rig oun penell:" 
Psalms22:9 “De gole ap o baro Debleste! Te kamell lo tout, palle lell lo tout vin oun rikrell peskro vast pral toute.”" 
Psalms22:10 Tou, mo Devel hals kova, kay kras te vom boldo, tou moukal man kek daryah te sovell ap o beč miri datar." 
Psalms22:11 Foun tiknes pre, deh tou yak ap mande, Yaake rah har djivau, hal tou miro Devel." 
Psalms22:12 Ač gar dour mandar, man hi daar, oun kek hi ap miri rig tardo." 
Psalms22:13 Boud gourma hi troul mande, ava, divye zorele gourma pandan man dren." 
Psalms22:14 Pengre bare mouya krenn le pre, oun denn bari gole ap mande har i levo glan peskro rhapen." 
Psalms22:15 Miri zoor hi vin čoredo har pani, mire tsele kokale rikrenn bouder gar khetne, Miro dji nashras peskri zoor, har i momeli hoy tele rhačras." 
Psalms22:16 Miri meen hi trouk. Ninna miro čip hi bouder gar sapeno, oun tou čival man an o merepaskri čik." 
Psalms22:17 Čilače menshe čivan pen khetne oun djan troul mande, har djoukle, kay moukenn man gar vin te djal. Yon denn čourye an mire vasta oun an mire pire." 
Psalms22:18 Me hom yaake sano, te nay dikenn le mire tsele kokale. Oun kol čilače dikenn ap mande, oun lenn man an i yak." 
Psalms22:19 Yon lenn penge mire koola oun khelenn vin, koon miri plaashka lell." 
Psalms22:20 Ač gar dour mandar, mo baro Devel! Tou, miri zoor, ab sik ap miri rig!" 
Psalms22:21 Le man vin, te dell man o rharo gar moulo, te rhan kol djoukle gar miro djipen!" 
Psalms22:22 Tserde man vin dran o leveskro mouy! Oun le man krik glan i shinga divye gourmendar! Tou shounal man. 
Psalms22:23 Toutar kamau me te rakrell pash mire phralende. Kote, kay venn le khetne, kamau me tout te sharell." 
Psalms22:24 T'mer, kay o baro Debles an-mangenna, sharenn les! T'mer lauter dran o kheer Yakob, hadenn les pre! Oun darenn lestar, t'mer lauter dran o kheer Israel!" 
Psalms22:25 Yob dikas gar krik o čorvelestar oun leskre douka, oun khatras gar peskro mouy lestar, Na-a, har yob ap leste gole das, shounas lo les." 
Psalms22:26 Tout kamau me te sharell, kote, kay boud khetne venna. Glan kolende, kay tout an-mangenna, kamau me touke te dell, hoy sovel dom." 
Psalms22:27 Mou rhan i čorvele oun venn čalo! Oun kolla, kay ap o baro Debleste gole denna, mou sharenn les! Lenge te vell i djipen, hoy gar pre-herella!" 
Psalms22:28 Mou rodenn i menshe ap i tseli phoub o baro Debles, oun venn pash leste! Mou mangenn le les an, an hako them!" 
Psalms22:29 O baro Devel hi o ray pral i tseli phoub. Ava, o baro ray hi lo pral i tsele themma." 
Psalms22:30 Ninna i bravele ap kay phoub, kolen hako tsiro boudeder hi har doha rhapaske, hounte vitsrenn pen tele glan leste. Ninna hakeno, kay meras oun pale čik vas, hounte perell ap i čanga glan leste." 
Psalms22:31 Ninna kolla, kay bolde venna, venn leske koy. Oun yon rakrenn ap pengre čavende oun čavengre čavende o baro Deblestar." 
Psalms22:32 Ko čačo koova, hoy yob kras, penenn le doureder ap kolende, kay bolde venna." 
Psalms23:1 I gili o Davidestar. O baro Devel dell yak ap mande har i bakrengro dell yak ap peskre bakre. Man hi lauter, hoy man hounte vell djipaske." 
Psalms23:2 Yob moukell man tele te čivell ap i phoub pherdo zenlepen, oun anell man pash lačo pani." 
Psalms23:3 Yob dell miro djipen nevi zoor. Yob anell man ap o čačo drom, yaake har yob peskro lab koy pre das." 
Psalms23:4 Ninna te nashau me mashkral i tamli tala, darau me glan kek bibarht. Tou hal pash mande. Tiro kashteha aneh tou man pale, oun rikreh i divye firhen mandar krik, yaake hounte trashap gar." 
Psalms23:5 Glan i yaka kolendar, hoy mange čilačepen kamenn, čiveh tou mange lačo rhapen pre. Miro shero makeh o djeteha, hoy mishto soungella. Miro khoro nashella pral." 
Psalms23:6 Čačepah, tiro lačepen djal mange palla, oun hako dives kreh tou tiro dji mange pre, yaake rah, har me djivau. Oun me ačau an o baro Debleskro kheer hako tsiro." 
Psalms24:1 I gili o Davidestar. O baro Debleske hi i phoub oun lauter, hoy koy pre hi, ava, i tseli phoub oun kolla, kay kote djivenna." 
Psalms24:2 Yob kras lat oun čivas lat pral o baro pani, oun rikras lat zoreles pral i panya." 
Psalms24:3 Koon hi kova, kay ap o baro Debleskri berga nay djal? Koon hi kova, kay an leskro kheer nay tardo ačella?" 
Psalms24:4 Kava, ap koleskre vasta kek doosh hi, oun koles i djoudjo dji hi. Kova, kay djivell gar peskro djipen ap rhorhepen, oun dell pes gar rhorheni sovel." 
Psalms24:5 Savo lell barht o baro Deblestar. Leskro Devel hi ap leskri rig oun dell les čačepen. 
Psalms24:6 Yaake hi i menshe, kay pal leste poučenna, oun pash leste venna. Yon hi i čače čave o Yakobestar." 
Psalms24:7 Krenn i bare voudya bourhles pre! Ava, krenn kol phoure voudya bares pre, te nay djal o baro ray dren, kones o tselo raylepen hi." 
Psalms24:8 Koon hi kava baro ray, kones o tselo raylepen hi? Kova hi o baro Devel, ko zorelo kourepaskro, ava, o baro Devel hi zorelo an o kourepen." 
Psalms24:9 Krenn i bare voudya bourhles pre ava, krenn kol phoure voudya bares pre, te nay djal o baro ray dren, kones o tselo raylepen hi!" 
Psalms24:10 Koon hi kava baro ray, kones o tselo raylepen hi? Kova hi o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub. Yob hi o baro ray, kones o tselo raylepen hi." 
Psalms25:1 I gili o Davidestar. Baro Devel, miro mangepah vau pash toute." 
Psalms25:2 Ap toute rikrau man, miro Devel. Mouk man gar čičeske ap toute te dikell, te nay san kolla pral mande, kay kamenn mange čilačepen." 
Psalms25:3 Kek, kay pes ap toute rikrell, hounte ladjell pes. Kolla, kay phoukrenn ap toute čičeske, hounte ladjenn pen." 
Psalms25:4 Baro Devel, sike man tiro drom, oun hoy tou mandar kameh!" 
Psalms25:5 Sike mande, har te djivap miro djipen an tiro čačepen! Tou hal miro Devel, kay rikrell man! Hako dives dikau ap toute." 
Psalms25:6 Miro baro Devel, ma biste tiro kamlepen oun tiro lačepen, hoy hako tsiro ap tire menshende sikral." 
Psalms25:7 Biste miri doosh, hoy ap mande lom, har terno homs, oun miro čilačo koova! Kre mange tiro dji pre, miro baro Devel!" 
Psalms25:8 Lačo oun čačo hi o baro Devel. Doleske sikrell lo kolen, kay doosh ap pende lan, o čačo drom." 
Psalms25:9 Kolen, kay tele rikedo hi, anell lo ap o čačo drom, oun sikrell lende, hoy lo lendar kamella." 
Psalms25:10 I tsele dromma hi lačo oun čačo, kay o baro Devel kolen anell, kay rikrenn pen ap leskre laba oun krenn, hoy yob lenge penell." 
Psalms25:11 Baro Devel, kre tiro lab baro, oun le miri doosh mandar krik, hoy yaake bares hi!" 
Psalms25:12 Hoy hi ko morsheha, kay djivell o baro Debleha? Koleste sikrell lo havo drom yob te djal." 
Psalms25:13 Kova djivella an i barht, oun leskre čavenge hi o them." 
Psalms25:14 O baro Devel hi o maal kolenge, kay djivenn leha, oun lende sikrell lo, te hi lo lengro Devel oun yon peskre menshe." 
Psalms25:15 Mire yaka dikenn hako tsiro ap o baro Debleste, yob lell mire pire dran i netsa vin, kay yon dren pandle hi." 
Psalms25:16 Risse tout pash mande, oun kre tiro dji mange pre, me hom yaake mouklo oun kokres." 
Psalms25:17 I daar an miro dji hi baro. Le man vin dran miri bibarht! 
Psalms25:18 Dik ap miro pharo djipen, oun har djoungeles mange djala, oun biste miri tseli doosh!" 
Psalms25:19 Dik, har boud kolla hi, kay kamenn mange čilačepen, oun havi bari rholyah yon pen ap mande rhoyrenna!" 
Psalms25:20 Rike tiro vast pral miro djipen, oun le man dran lengre vasta vin! Mouk man gar čičeske pash toute te vell oun ap toute te dikell!" 
Psalms25:21 Me rikrau man ap toute miro tselo djiyestar. Doleske mouk man te djivap miro djipen an djoudjepen oun čačepen. 
Psalms25:22 Miro Devel, le o Israel vin dran kava tselo parepen, hoy ap leste hi!" 
Psalms26:1 I gili o Davidestar. Baro Devel, de man miro čačepen! Kek doosh hi ap mande. Oun me patsau tout, mo baro Debles, oun perom gar toutar tele." 
Psalms26:2 Le man an i yak, baro Devel! Dik palla, hoy an miro dji hi, oun hoy mange an o shero trouyel djal!" 
Psalms26:3 Tiro lačepen hi glan mire yaka, oun me djivau miro djipen an tiro čačepen." 
Psalms26:4 Me beshau gar khetne rhorhene menshentsa. Oun kolentsa, kay rakrenn douy čipyentsa, hom gar khetne." 
Psalms26:5 Me kamau gar kote te djal, kay i čilače khetne venna, oun kolendar, kay midjak koova krenna, rikrau man pale." 
Psalms26:6 Me thovau mire vasta, te sikrap, kay hi kek doosh ap mande, oun djau kote, kay venn firhe touke rhačedo," 
Psalms26:7 oun parkrau man pash toute, oun rakrau pral ko tselo baro koova, hoy tou lauter kral." 
Psalms26:8 Me kamau o kheer, kay tou djiveh, miro tselo djiyestar, oun koy platsa, kay tiro raylepen diklo vella." 
Psalms26:9 Ma de man moulo khetne i čilačentsa! Le mange gar o djipen khetne kolentsa, kay ap rat vin djan," 
Psalms26:10 kolengre vasta pherdo midjak koova hi, oun yon i lovenge rhorheno koova krenn." 
Psalms26:11 Me djivau an kek čilačepen. Ab mange lačes oun le man vin dran o merepen! 
Psalms26:12 Mire herya hi zoreles tardo oun perenn gar o čačo dromestar tele. Me kamau miro baro Debles te sharell, kote, kay leskre menshe khetne venna." 
Psalms27:1 I gili o Davidestar. O baro Devel hi mange i momeli, oun yob hi kova, hoy man vin lella dran i vasta čilače menshendar. Kekestar hounte darap man. O baro Devel rikrell man an o djipen. Kekestar hounte trashap me." 
Psalms27:2 Te venn i čilače ap mande har divye firhe, kay kamenn man te rhal, kolla, hoy les mange phares krenn oun mange čilačepen kamenn, palle hi yon kolla, kay nashrenn pengri zoor oun perenn." 
Psalms27:3 Ninna te venn boud lourde troul mande trouyel, taprell miro dji kek daar. Ninna te djan le an o kourepen khatar mande, hom me pherdo patsepen ap miro baro Debleste." 
Psalms27:4 Yek koova mangau miro baro Deblestar, kova kamaus me lestar, te nay ačoms an leskro kheer yaake rah har me djivau, te nay dikap o tselo tsiro leskro shoukapen, oun nay poučap pal leskro kamlepen an leskro kheer." 
Psalms27:5 An o čilačo tsiro lell lo man an peskro kheer. Ava, an peskro kheer khatrell lo man, pral ap i baro bar hidjrell lo man." 
Psalms27:6 Oun kanna hadell pes miro shero pre pral kolende, kay troul mande hi oun mange čilačepen kamenn, O baro Debleske kamau me firhen te rhačrell, oun dau gole i barhtyatar oun parkrau man pash leste an leskro kheer; i gipah oun bashepah sharau les." 
Psalms27:7 Shoun, baro Devel! Ap toute dau me gole. Ab mange lačes oun shoun miro mangepen!" 
Psalms27:8 Tire laba van mange an o shero, hoy tou penal: “Avenn pash mande!” Doleske vau pash toute." 
Psalms27:9 Ma dja touke mandar! Biče man, tiro boudepaskres, gar toutar krik an tiri rholi! Tou hal kova, kay vas mange ap i rig hako tsiro. Miro Devel, tou hal kova, kay man vin lell. Ma mouk man! Ma de man pre!" 
Psalms27:10 Te moukenn man miro dad oun miri day, leh tou, baro Devel, man pash toute pre." 
Psalms27:11 Baro Devel, sike man tiro drom! Oun an man ap o čačo drom, te hounte rikrenn kolla pengro mouy, kay mange čilačepen kamenna." 
Psalms27:12 Ma de man an lengre vasta! Dik, menshe hi koy, kay rhorhepen ap mande pre anan, oun ladjenn pen gar, te denn le man trad." 
Psalms27:13 Me djinau, te dikau me o lačepen o baro Deblestar an kava djipen." 
Psalms27:14 Rike tout ap o baro Debleste tiro tselo djiyeha! Ab zoreles, oun ma traash, oun rike tout ap o baro Debleste!" 
Psalms28:1 I gili o Davidestar. Tou, baro Devel, hal mange har i baro zorelo bar, kay nay khatrau man. Ap toute dau me gole. Ma risse tire kanda mandar! Tou te shouneh gar, har gole dau, palle hom yaake har kolla, kay pash i moulende an o moulengro them djan." 
Psalms28:2 Shoun ap miro ropen! Shoun, har ap toute gole dau! Dik ap mire vasta, hoy me pre-hidjrau pash tiro kheer, kay tou hal!" 
Psalms28:3 Ma kre mantsa har i čilačentsa oun kolentsa, kay krenn i vavarenge čilačepen, kay rakrenn lačes, oun an lengro dji hi čilačepen!" 
Psalms28:4 Kre lentsa pal kova, hoy yon kran, pal lengro čilačepen, hoy yon kran, pal kova, hoy yon pengre vastentsa kran! De len pale pal kova, hoy kran le i vavarenge!" 
Psalms28:5 Yon dikenn gar ap kova, hoy o baro Devel krell, vitar gar ap kova, hoy yob peskre vastentsa kras. Doleske vitsrell lo len ap i phoub, te nay stenn le bouder gar pre." 
Psalms28:6 Sharedo vell o baro Devel, yob shounas miro ropen." 
Psalms28:7 O baro Devel hi miri zoor, oun rikras peskro vast pral mande. Ap leste patsau miro tselo djiyeha. Oun yob vas ap miri rig. Kanna stell miro dji, oun hi barhteles, oun me kamau les sharell oun leske givell." 
Psalms28:8 O baro Devel hi o zorelo ap i rig peskre menshendar. Oun o baro rayeske, hoy yob vi-rodas, hi lo har i baro zorelo kheer." 
Psalms28:9 Ab ap i rig tire menshenge! Čip tiri zoor oun tiri barht ap mende, kay tiro ham! Ab hako tsiro har i bakrengro menge, kay dell yak ap peskre bakrende oun dell len lauter, hoy len hounte vell djipaske!" 
Psalms29:1 I gili o Davidestar. T'mer bolepangre, sharenn o baro Debles! Sharenn leskro raylepen oun leskri zoor!" 
Psalms29:2 Krenn leskro lab baro! Avenn oun vitsrenn t'men tele glan o baro Debleste, te vell lo an peskre shoukar oun kouč ripya!" 
Psalms29:3 O baro Debleskro rakepen vell shounlo pral i panya. Te dell o zorelo Devel gole, hi kova har koy bari gole, hoy dell o bolepen, te dell baro brishin. O baro Devel hi o ray pral i tsele bare panya." 
Psalms29:4 Leskro rakepen hi pherdi zoor, oun sikrell havo baro ray yob hi." 
Psalms29:5 O baro Debleskro rakepen phagella zorele rouka, ninna kol cedertikre rouka ap i berga Libanon." 
Psalms29:6 Yob moukell len te stell har i terne groumya, I berga Libanon moukell lo te stell har i terni groumni stell, oun i berga Siryon har i terno divyo gouroum." 
Psalms29:7 Te rakrell o baro Devel, dell yag karye dran o bolepen." 
Psalms29:8 Te rakrell o baro Devel, trissell o moulo tato them. O baro Devel moukell te trissell o moulo tato them, hoy kharella Kadesh." 
Psalms29:9 Te rakrell o baro Devel, anenn i vesheskre groumya pengre terne ap i phoub. Ninna nashrenn i rouka pengre patria an i vesha. An o Debleskro kheer dell hakeno gole: “Har baro hi o Devel!”" 
Psalms29:10 O baro Devel hi beshdo pral i panya. O baro Devel hi o baro ray hako tsireske. 
Psalms29:11 O baro Devel dell peskre menshende zoor, ninna barht oun lačo koova." 
Psalms30:1 I gili o Davidestar, te givenn le ap kol bare divessa, kay o Debleskro kheer kerdo vas." 
Psalms30:2 Me hadau tout, miro baro Devel, tou tserdal man pre, har me dour tele homs, oun moukal gar kolen pral mande te sal, kay mange čilačepen kaman." 
Psalms30:3 Miro baro Devel, har dom gole ap toute, kral tou man sasto." 
Psalms30:4 Baro Devel, tou lal miro djipen vin dran o merepen, te djom gar an o moulengro them. Tou dal man miro djipen pale." 
Psalms30:5 Bashrenn o baro Debleske, t'mer, kay han leskro! Sharenn les, oun bistrenn gar, te hi lo o Devel." 
Psalms30:6 I tikno tsiro kokres hi lo rhoyedo. O tselo djipen hi lo menge lačo. Rati vell o ropen dren, oun taysarlakro hi pale sapen koy." 
Psalms30:7 Har mange mishto djas, penom: “Či nay vell, hoy nay krell mange čomone.”" 
Psalms30:8 Tou, baro Devel, hals mange lačo, oun kral man yaake zorelo har i baro bar. Ap yek kopo khatral tou tout mandar, oun man tapras i daar." 
Psalms30:9 Ap toute, baro Devel, dom gole, ap toute, miro ray, rovom oun penom:" 
Psalms30:10 “Hoy hi tout miro merepastar, te merau? Te vom paskedo oun vom pale čik, nay sharau tout bouder gar, vitar gar nay rakrau pral tiro čačepen." 
Psalms30:11 Shoun, baro Devel, oun ab mange lačo! Ab ap miri rig, miro baro Devel!”" 
Psalms30:12 Dran miro ropaskri gili kral tou mange i barhtyakro khelepen. Tou pandal mange ko gono tele, hoy miro ropaskro ripen his, oun čival barht har i ripen ap mande." 
Psalms30:13 Yaake kamau te givap touke gilya, oun moukau gar tele, te sharap tout. Miro baro Devel, me kamau man pash toute te parkrell kanna oun hako tsiro." 
Psalms31:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. O David kras kay gili. 
Psalms31:2 Baro Devel, pash toute vau, te rikress tire vasta pral mande. Mouk man gar čičeske pash toute te vell! Tou hal lačo oun čačo. Doleske le man dran i čilače vasta vin!" 
Psalms31:3 Shoun, har dau ap toute gole, oun ab sik ap miri rig! Ab mange har i baro zorelo bar, kay nay khatrau man! Ab mange har i zorelo kheer, te nay hatsell man kek!" 
Psalms31:4 Ava, tou hal mange har i zorelo kheer ap i baro bar. Dja mantsa oun an man ap i drom, kay kek nay taprell man, te vell tiro lab sharedo." 
Psalms31:5 Tserde man dran koy netsa vin, hoy kran le, te perap dren. Tou hal o zorelo, kay ap miri rig hi." 
Psalms31:6 Me dau man an tire vasta. Tou leh man dran i čilače vasta vin, baro Devel. Tou hal i Devel, kay rikrell peskro lab." 
Psalms31:7 Me nay dikau kolen gar glan i yaka, kay mangenn vavar deblen an. Me rikrau man ap toute, baro Devel." 
Psalms31:8 Miro dji sal oun me stau i barhtyatar pral tiro lačepen. Tou dikal, har mange djoungeles djas, oun djinal, har pharo miro djipen his." 
Psalms31:9 Tou dal man gar an i vasta kolendar, kay mange čilačepen kaman. Kanna nay djau, kay me kamau." 
Psalms31:10 Baro Devel, ab lačes mange! Me djivau an i daar, mire yaka hi pesso o ropastar. Oun kek zoor hi bouder an mande." 
Psalms31:11 I daar rhas miro djipen pre, oun mire bersha his pherdo ropen. Miri doosh lell miri zoor mandar, yaake te djap bango." 
Psalms31:12 Kolla, kay mange čilačepen kamenn, san pral mande. Gomme djoungleder kran mange kolla, kay djivenn langs mande. Mire mala trashenn mandar. Te dikenn le man ap o drom, nashenn le penge mandar." 
Psalms31:13 Boud bistran man, har te voms moulo oun paskedo. Lenge hom har i phagedo čaro, hoy krik vitsedo vas." 
Psalms31:14 Me shounau, har rakrenn le djoungeles pral mande. I traash hi troul mande. Yon čivenn pen khetne, oun rodenn i drom, har te denn le man moulo." 
Psalms31:15 Baro Devel, me rikrau man ap toute. Miro Devel hal tou." 
Psalms31:16 Miro djipaskro tsiro hi an tire vasta. Le man vin dran i vasta kolendar, kay mange čilačepen kamenn, oun man palla lenn." 
Psalms31:17 Dik lačes ap mande! Me hom tiro boudepaskro! Ab kamles mange oun tserde man dran lengre vasta vin! 
Psalms31:18 Baro Devel, mouk man gar čičeske gole te dell ap toute! Kre, te ladjenn pen i čilače! Yon mou djan tele oun merenn! Palle nay rakrenn le bouder gar," 
Psalms31:19 kolla rhorhene, kay hi pre-phourde oun praasenn kolen, kay an o čačepen tardo hi." 
Psalms31:20 Har baro hi tiro lačepen, miro Devel, kolenge, kay djivenn touha! Hakeneste sikreh tou, har lačo tou kolenge hal, kay rikrenn pen ap toute." 
Psalms31:21 Tou khatreh len pash toute kol menshendar, kay čivenn pen khetne, te krenn le lenge čilačepen. Tou moukeh kek praasepen pral lende te vell." 
Psalms31:22 Baro Devel, parkrau man pash toute. Tou sikral tiro baro lačepen ap mande, har homs har i foro, troul koleste boud lourde tarde his." 
Psalms31:23 Me homs yaake dareno, te penom: “Mo Devel, tou kameh mandar bouder či te djinell!” Kova his gar yaake: Tou shounal man, har rovom ap toute." 
Psalms31:24 Kamenn o baro Debles o tselo djiyestar, t'mer kay leskre han! Koon ap leste patsella, hi an leskro vast. Koon pes pre phourdell, ap koleste vell leskri rholi." 
Psalms31:25 Avenn zoreles an t'maro dji, oun ma darenn, t'mer halauter, kay dikenn ap o baro Debleste." 
Psalms32:1 Laba o Davidestar. Barhtelo hi kova, koleske o čilačepen, hoy ap leste his, krik lino hi, oun leskri doosh bistedo hi." 
Psalms32:2 Barhtelo hi ko mensho, koneske o baro Devel i doosh gar glan-rikrell, oun an koleste kek rhorhepen hi." 
Psalms32:3 Har kamom miri doosh gar vin te rakrell, nashrom me miri zoor oun rovom hako dives." 
Psalms32:4 Miro Devel, dives oun rati his tiro vast phares ap mande čiddo, oun miri djipaskri zoor djas yaake peske mandar, har o zenlepen peskri zoor nashrella an o tato niyal." 
Psalms32:5 Doleske penom me touke miri doosh, oun khatrom gar o čilačepen, hoy me krom. Me penom mange: “Me kamau o baro Debleske ko čilačepen te penell, hoy krom.” Oun tou lal miri doosh mandar krik." 
Psalms32:6 Doleske mangenn tout lauter kolla an, kay tiro hi, an ko tsiro, kay taprell len i daar. Palle, te venn i bare panya, nay taprenn le len gar." 
Psalms32:7 Pash toute nay khatrau me man, glan kova, hoy mange daar krell. Doleske sharau tout i barhtelo djiyeha pral kova, har tou man vin lal dran i bibarht." 
Psalms32:8 “Me kamau toute te sikrell havo drom tou hounte djas, oun penau touke, har tou les djas, oun dau yak ap toute,” penell o baro Devel." 
Psalms32:9 “Ma avenn dinele har i graya, oun i maultikre bourike! Lenge hounte čivess i shello trouyel oun i saster an o mouy, te nay aness len kote, kay kameh.”" 
Psalms32:10 Ap i čilače menshende venn boud douka. Koon čivell peskro tselo patsepen ap o baro Debleste, troul koleste čivell yob peskro lačepen." 
Psalms32:11 T'mer, kay an o čačepen tardo han, avenn barhtelo pral t'maro baro Debleste! Moukenn t'mare djia san oun bashrenn! Denn gole i barhtyatar, t'mer lauter, kay shounenn o tselo djiyeha ap o Debleste." 
Psalms33:1 T'mer, kay an o čačepen tardo han, denn gole i barhtyatar pral kova, hoy o baro Devel krell. Hi mishto, te sharenn les, t'mer, kay t'maro tselo djiyeha ap leste shounenn!" 
Psalms33:2 Parkrenn t'men pash o baro Debleste, oun bashrenn leske ap doryengre bashepangre! Givenn leske gilya, oun bashrenn leske ap i bashepaskri i deesh doryentsa!" 
Psalms33:3 Givenn leske i nevi gili! Krenn shoukar bashepen oun denn gole i barhtyatar! 
Psalms33:4 O baro Debleskro lab hi čačo. Oun kova, hoy krell lo, hi zorelo." 
Psalms33:5 Yob kamell i čače dromma oun i čače laba. Oun i tseli phoub hi pherdo lačepen o baro Deblestar. 
Psalms33:6 Dran o lab o baro Deblestar vas o bolepen kerdo. Dran o dourho, hoy dran leskro mouy djas, van i tsele bolepangre momlia kerdo." 
Psalms33:7 Yob rikrell i bare panya khetne har an i gono, oun čivell i bare panya khetne har an i kheer." 
Psalms33:8 I tseli phoub hounte darell o baro Deblestar, hakeno, kay ap i phoub djivella, hounte penell leske: “Tou hal o Devel.”" 
Psalms33:9 Yob te rakrell, palle vell, hoy yob penas, yaake har lo kova penas, yaake hi kova koy tardo." 
Psalms33:10 O baro Devel moukell kova gar te vell, hoy kol menshe an i vavar themma kamenn te krell. Lenge čivell lo barra an o drom." 
Psalms33:11 Kova, hoy o baro Devel kamell te krell, ačell zoreles tardo, oun kova, hoy les an peskro dji hi, te krell lo, ačell yaake rah har menshe koy hi." 
Psalms33:12 Barhtele hi kol menshe, kolengro Devel o baro Devel hi, kol menshe, kay yob peske vi-rodas, te venn le leskre menshe." 
Psalms33:13 O baro Devel dikell tele dran o bolepen, oun dikell i tsele menshen." 
Psalms33:14 Yob hi beshdo ap peskri rayeskri beshepaskri oun dikell ap lauterende, kay ap i phoub djivenna." 
Psalms33:15 Yob čivell lenge an o dji, hoy te krenn le, oun dell yak ap lauter, hoy yon krenna." 
Psalms33:16 I baro ray boud lourdentsa vell gar dran peskri zoor o zorleder an o kourepen. Oun i čačo morsh, koles boud zoor hi, vell gar dran peskri zoor vin lino dran o kourepen." 
Psalms33:17 Hi vitar gar i graya, kay nay lenn vin dran o kourepen, ninna te hi len bari zoor." 
Psalms33:18 Kova hi o baro Devel, kay dell garda ap kolende, kay djivenn leha, kolla, kay dikenn ap leste, te vell lo lenge lačo," 
Psalms33:19 oun lell lengro djipen dran o merepen vin. Ninna te vell bari bok pral o them, merenn le gar." 
Psalms33:20 Mer rikrah men ap o baro Debleste maro tselo djiyeha. Yob vell ap mari rig, oun rikrell peskro vast pral mende." 
Psalms33:21 An leste hi maro dji barhtelo, oun mer rikrah men ap leste, kay hi kokres o Devel." 
Psalms33:22 Dik, har mer dikah ap toute, baro Devel, yaake mouk tiro lačepen pral mende te vell!" 
Psalms34:1 I gili o Davidestar, hoy yob givas, har yob pash o Abimelek kras, har te vals lo dinelo, oun kova les krik tradas." 
Psalms34:2 Me kamau o baro Debles te sharell hako tsireske, oun kamau gar tele moukell, te parkrap man pash leste." 
Psalms34:3 Kova, hoy yob lauter kras an miro djipen, kamau me te sharell. Mou shounenn kova kolla, kay tele rikedo hi, oun venn barhtele!" 
Psalms34:4 Givenn mantsa gilya o baro Debleske! Krenn leskro lab mantsa khetne baro! 
Psalms34:5 Me rodom o baro Debles, oun yob shounas man. Yob las man vin dran miri tseli daar." 
Psalms34:6 Kolla, kay ap leste dikenna, lengre yaka venna har i momeli, oun yon hounte ladjenn pen gar." 
Psalms34:7 Ake hi yek, kay gole das ap o baro Debleste, har leske djoungeles djas, oun yob shounas les oun las les vin dran lauter, hoy leske o djipen phares kras." 
Psalms34:8 O baro Debleskro bolepaskro hi troul kolende, kay djivenn o baro Debleha, oun lell len vin dran i bibarht." 
Psalms34:9 Hayvenn oun dikenn har kamles o baro Devel hi! Barhtelo hi kova, kay pes ap leste rikrella." 
Psalms34:10 T'mer, kay o baro Debleskre menshe han, djivenn leha! Kolen, kay djivenn leha, hi lauter o djipaske." 
Psalms34:11 I bare divye margodje hatsenn gar hako dives doha rhapaske oun hounte bokenna. Kol menshen, kay rodenn o baro Debles, hi lauter doha djipaske." 
Psalms34:12 Avenn, t'mer čave oun shounenn, hoy me penau! Me kamau t'men te sikrell, har djivenn t'mer o baro Debleha." 
Psalms34:13 Kamenn t'mer te djivenn i shoukar oun rah djipen? 
Psalms34:14 Palle denn garda ap t'mari čip, te rakrell li kek čilačepen oun kek rhorhepen!" 
Psalms34:15 Rikrenn t'men pale dran o čilačepen oun krenn o lačepen! T'mari tseli zoryah krenn lauter, te vell kek čingepen mank t'mende!" 
Psalms34:16 O baro Devel dikell ap kolende, kay an o čačepen tardo hi. Oun leskre kanda shounenn len, te denn le gole." 
Psalms34:17 O baro Devel hi gar kolentsa, kay o čilačepen krenna, oun krell, te venn le sik bistedo pal lengro merepen." 
Psalms34:18 Te denn kolla ap leste gole, kay rikrenn ap leste, palle shounell len o baro Devel, oun lell len vin dran lengri tseli bibarht." 
Psalms34:19 O baro Devel hi pash kolende, kay lengro dji phagedo hi. Oun kolenge, kay dikenn bouder kek momeli an pengro djipen, hi lo ap i rig tardo." 
Psalms34:20 Boud douka venna ap koleste, kay an o čačepen tardo hi. Dran kova lauter lell o baro Devel les vin." 
Psalms34:21 Yob dell yaake yak ap leste, te vell kek kokalo lestar phagedo." 
Psalms34:22 O čilačo merell dran peskro čilačepen. Oun kolla, kay kamenn čilačepen ap i lačende te anell, lenna pengri phagi." 
Psalms34:23 O baro Devel rikrell peskre boudepangre ap o djipen. Oun ap lauterende, kay rikrenn pen ap leste, vell kek doosh anlo." 
Psalms35:1 I gili o Davidestar. Baro Devel, le miro koova an tiro vast oun činge kolentsa, kay mantsa čingrenna! Koure tout kolentsa, kay kourenn pen mantsa!" 
Psalms35:2 Le tiro shilto an o vast, rib tiro sasterno ripen ap toute! Oun ab ap miri rig!" 
Psalms35:3 Le tiro rharo oun tiro tover, oun čip tout kolenge an o drom, kay man palla lenna! Pen mange: “Me hom ap tiri rig.”" 
Psalms35:4 Mou vell ladj oun praasepen ap kolende, kay kamenn miro merepen! Mou venn le pale-čiddo oun ladjenn pen, kolla, kay rodenn miri bibarht!" 
Psalms35:5 Mou tradell len o baro Debleskro bolepaskro krik, yaake te venn le har phouss, hoy i dourho krik phourdell!" 
Psalms35:6 Lengro drom te vell kalo oun sapeno, te dikenn le či oun perenn le! Oun o baro Debleskro bolepaskro te lell len palla!" 
Psalms35:7 Yon čivan mange i netsa vin, te perap dren, ninna te krom me lenge či. Čičeske hadan le mange i rheb vin, te perap dren." 
Psalms35:8 Mouk i bibarht pral lende te vell yaake sik har i dap! Mou perenn le an koy netsa, hoy yon čivan mange. Mou perenn le an koy rheb, hoy yon hadan mange vin!" 
Psalms35:9 Miro dji mou givell oun bashrell, te las man o baro Devel dran lengre vasta vin." 
Psalms35:10 Lauter, hoy an mande hi, penell: Baro Devel, koon hi yaake har tou? Tou leh o čorveles vin dran i vasta kolendar, kay zorleder hi har yob. Tou leh koles, kay bibarhtelo oun čorvelo hi, vin dran i vasta kolendar, kay čoran leskro koova." 
Psalms35:11 Rhorhene venna, oun anenn doosh ap mande. Yon poučenn mandar, hoy me gar djinau." 
Psalms35:12 Me homs ap lende lačes. Yon denn man čilačepen pale, oun krenn, te vap kokres." 
Psalms35:13 Har yek lendar nasselo his, rivom ropaskre ripya ap mande, rhom či oun bokom leske, oun pale te pale mangom o Debles leske," 
Psalms35:14 har te vals lo miro maal oun phraal. Mange vas ropaske yaake har te vals lo miri day. 
Psalms35:15 Hi vavarčandes lentsa. Har me perom, stan le i barhtyatar, oun čivan pen khetne, te djan le ap mande pre. Depangre van, kay prindjrom gar, oun dan man dava oun moukan gar tele." 
Psalms35:16 Khetne kol čilačentsa praasan le man oun sikran mange pengre danda. 
Psalms35:17 Ray, har rah kameh tou kova te dikell oun kreh či? Le miro djipen dran i vasta kolendar vin, kay peran pral mande har divye firhe." 
Psalms35:18 Palle kamau man pash toute te parkrell kote, kay boud menshe khetne venna an o Debleskro kheer. Ava, glan i tsele menshende sharau tout." 
Psalms35:19 Ma mouk, te sanenn kolla pral mande, kay kamenn mange čilačepen, ninna te krom me len či. Ma mouk len i yakentsa te dell pal mande!" 
Psalms35:20 Yon rakrenna, hoy doukepen anella. Oun anenn rhorhepen pre ap kolende, kay djivenn kek čingepah an kava them." 
Psalms35:21 Pengre mouya krenn le dour pre oun denn gole ap mande: “Ha! Ha! Koleske dam les!” 
Psalms35:22 Baro Devel, tou dikal kova. Rike tout gar pale, rake! Miro ray, ma ab kanna dour mandar krik!" 
Psalms35:23 Hade tout! Ste pre, oun de man miro čačepen! Le miro koova an tiro vast, mo Devel oun mo ray!" 
Psalms35:24 Baro Devel, tou hal an o čačepen tardo. De man miro čačepen! Miro Devel, mouk len gar pral mande te sal!" 
Psalms35:25 Mouk len gar an pengre djia te penell: “Dik! Men hi, hoy kamam. Kanna rhah mer les djides!”" 
Psalms35:26 Kre, te ladjenn le pen, oun nay hadenn pengro shero gar pral, kolla lauter, kay hi barhtelo pral miri bibarht! Mou vell praasepen oun ladj ap lende, kay hadenn pen pral mande." 
Psalms35:27 Kre, te stenn oun sanenn i barhtyatar kolla, kay kamenn, te lap miro čačepen. Mou penenn le pale te pale: “Har baro hi o baro Devel, kay hi yaake lačo ap peskro boudepaskro!”" 
Psalms35:28 Me kamau te rakrap pral tiro čačepen, oun sharau tout hako dives." 
Psalms36:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. O David, ko baro Debleskro boudepaskro, kras kay gili." 
Psalms36:2 O čilačepen hi o čilačeske an o rat. Yob kamell o Deblestar či te djinell oun darell lestar gar. 
Psalms36:3 An peskre yaka hi kova yaake shoukar, hoy lo krella, te hayvell lo gar, kay kova i doosh hi, kay hounte rikrals pes lo latar pale." 
Psalms36:4 Či har midjak oun rhorhene laba venn dran leskro mouy vin. Lačo koova hayvell lo bouder gar te krell. 
Psalms36:5 Te hi lo ap peskro čiben čiddo, djal o čilačepen an leskro shero trouyel. Oun yob rikrell zoreles ap i drom, hoy gar mishto hi, oun rikrell pes gar pale, te krell lo o čilačepen." 
Psalms36:6 Baro Devel, tiro lačepen hi yaake baro har o bolepen. Oun tiro kamlepen ap tire menshende djal bis pash i volke." 
Psalms36:7 Tiro čačepen djal yaake pre har i bare berge. Oun i čače laba, hoy tou vin rakreh, djan dour tele har o baro pani. Baro Devel, tou deh i menshen oun i firhen kova, hoy len hounte vell." 
Psalms36:8 Har raylo hi tiro lačepen, miro Devel! I menshe venn pash toute, te rikress tire vasta pral lende, har i čirklo rikrell peskre moussya pral peskre terne." 
Psalms36:9 Tou čoreh pral lende lačo koova dran o bravlepen an tiro kheer. Oun deh len tiro lačepen te piyell, har te piyans le lačo pani." 
Psalms36:10 Tou hal o djido pani, hoy nevo djipen della. Tou hal i momeli maro djipaske." 
Psalms36:11 Čip tiro lačepen ap kolende, kay tout prindjrenna, oun mouk tiro čačepen te vell kolenge, kay shounenn ap toute o tselo djiyestar." 
Psalms36:12 Mouk i pre-phourden gar te stakrenn le man tele. Kre te nay tradenn man i čilače gar dran miro kheer vin. 
Psalms36:13 Dikenn, i čilače peran! Yon hi čiddo ap i phoub, oun nay stenn gar bouder pre." 
Psalms37:1 I gili o Davidestar. Ma rhoye tout pral i čilačende! Te djal kolenge mishto, kay krenn čilačo koova, ma zilve ap lende!" 
Psalms37:2 Yon hi har khass, hoy merell, te dell kek brishin, oun har o zenlepen, hoy ačell gar." 
Psalms37:3 Dik ap o baro Debleste, te krell lo touke lačepen! Oun kre, hoy mishto hi! Ač an o them, oun djib kolestar, hoy tire vastentsa boudral!" 
Psalms37:4 Rode tiri barht pash o baro Debleste, palle dell yob tout lauter, hoy tiro dji kamella." 
Psalms37:5 De tiro djipen an o vast o baro Deblestar, oun pats ap leste! Palle krell yob lauter mishto." 
Psalms37:6 Oun yob moukell tiro čačepen pre te djal har o kham, oun moukell tiro čačepen diklo te vell har o kham mashkral o dives." 
Psalms37:7 Ač pokones oun dik ap o baro Debleste, te vell lo ap tiri rig! Ab gar rhoyedo pral koleste, kay leske mishto djala, ninna te hi les čilačepen an o shero." 
Psalms37:8 Mouk tele i rholyatar! Ma rhoye tout pral o čilačepen, hoy i vavar krenna! Kova nay anell tout yaake dour, te kreh tou ninna o čilačepen." 
Psalms37:9 I tsiro vella, kay hi bouder kek čilače ap kay phoub. Kolla, kay ap o baro Debleste dikenna, te vell leskro tsiro, kolenge hi palle o them." 
Psalms37:10 An i tikno tsiro hi o čilačo bouder gar koy. Oun kote, kay yob djivas, hatseh les bouder gar." 
Psalms37:11 I čorvele lenn ko them. Kote hi len boudeder barht har doha. 
Psalms37:12 O čilačo kamell midjak koova te krell ap koleste, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, oun sikrell leske i danda." 
Psalms37:13 O baro Devel sal pral leste, yob dikell leskro dives te vell." 
Psalms37:14 I čilače lenn pengro rharo, oun hadenn pengro bogo, te marenn le i čorvelen oun kolen, kay nay kourenn pen gar, ninna lauteren, kay djan ap o čačo drom." 
Psalms37:15 Yon denn pen pengro rhareha kokres an pengro dji čourye, oun lengre boge venna phagedo." 
Psalms37:16 Ko tikno bravlepen, hoy koleskro hi, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, hi feteder har ko baro bravlepen boud čilačendar." 
Psalms37:17 Kolengri zoor vell phagedo. O baro Devel rikrell kolen, kay an o čačepen tardo hi." 
Psalms37:18 O baro Devel prindjrell i divessa kolendar, kay ap leste shounenna pengro tselo djiyeha, oun lengro them ačell lenge hako tsireske." 
Psalms37:19 An i čilačo tsiro moukell lo len gar, oun an i boklo tsiro dell yob len doha te rhal." 
Psalms37:20 I čilače merenna, oun kolla, kay o baro Debles gar kamenna, hi har kol shoukar divye bloume, hoy sik tele merenn, oun djan penge har i yagakro dourho, hoy pre djal." 
Psalms37:21 O čilačo patsell peske love, oun playsrell gar pale. Kova, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, krell peskro dji pre oun della." 
Psalms37:22 Kol menshe, ap kolende o baro Devel peskri barht čivas, lenn ko them. Kolla, ap kolende o baro Devel i bibarht čivas, kolendar ačell kek." 
Psalms37:23 O baro Deblestar vell, te djal i morsh o čačo drom. Pral koleste hi lo barhtelo." 
Psalms37:24 Ninna te perell lo, ačell lo gar čiddo, o baro Devel rikrell les ap peskro vast." 
Psalms37:25 Me homs terno oun vom phouro. An ko tselo tsiro dikom me kekes kokres mouklo, kay an o čačepen tardo hi; oun kekes leskre čavendar dikom, kay hounte mangas peske maro." 
Psalms37:26 O tselo tsiro krell yob peskro dji pre oun patsella, oun ap leskre čavende vell o Debleskri barht diklo." 
Psalms37:27 Mouk o čilačepen pal toute, oun kre o lačepen! Palle nay ačeh hako tsireske khere an o them." 
Psalms37:28 O baro Devel kamell o čačepen oun moukell peskre menshen gar kokres. Hako tsiro dell yob yak ap lende. Kolla, kay kamenn o Deblestar či te djinell, merenna, ninna lengre čave oun kolengre čave." 
Psalms37:29 Kolla, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, lenn o them, oun djivenn kote hako tsireske." 
Psalms37:30 Gosvepen vell dran o mouy i lačo menshestar, oun leskri čip rakrell o čačepen." 
Psalms37:31 O Debleskre laba hi an leskro dji. Oun yob perell gar o čačo dromestar tele. 
Psalms37:32 O čilačo lell koles an o yak, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, te hatsell lo i drom, te nay dell lo les moulo." 
Psalms37:33 O baro Devel moukell les gar an o čilačeskro vast. Te anenn le les glan i čačepangre, nay anenn yon kek doosh ap leste pre." 
Psalms37:34 Dik ap o baro Debleste, te vell lo ap tiri rig! Oun ač ap leskro drom! Palle hadell lo tout oun dell tout ko them. Oun tou dikeh, har venn i čilače maredo." 
Psalms37:35 Me dikom i čilačes, kay hadas pes pral i vavarende, oun kras pes bourhlo har i baro zorelo rouk." 
Psalms37:36 Oun har vom i vavar kopo koy, his lo bouder gar koy. Oun me rodom les, oun hatsom les gar." 
Psalms37:37 Kre yaake har kova, kay shounell ap o Debleste peskro tselo djiyeha! Oun djib yaake har kova, kay vell kek doosh ap leste hatslo. Savo mensheske djal mishto an ko tsiro, hoy vella." 
Psalms37:38 Kolla, kay o Deblestar tele peran, venna lauter moulo dino. Oun i čilačendar pengre čaventsa oun čavengre čaventsa ačell kek pral." 
Psalms37:39 O baro Devel vell ap i rig kolendar, kay ap leste rikrenna. An i pharo tsiro dell lo len zoor." 
Psalms37:40 Oun o baro Devel hi pash lende tardo, oun lell len vin, ava, dran o vast i čilačendar lell lo len vin. Yon nashenn pash leste, oun yob dell garda ap lende." 
Psalms38:1 I gili o Davidestar, te bistrell les o Devel gar." 
Psalms38:2 Baro Devel, ma činge ap mande an tiri rholi! Ma de man i phagi an tiri rholi!" 
Psalms38:3 Tou dal karye ap mande oun doukral man, oun tiro vast das man ap i phoub tele." 
Psalms38:4 Ap miro mass hi bouder či sasto dran tiri rholi. Ninna mire kokale doukrenna. Dran miri doosh vas kova ap mande. 
Psalms38:5 Miri doosh vas yaake bares an mande, te djal li pral miro shero. Me nay hidjrau lat gar, yaake pharo hi li." 
Psalms38:6 Miro boud doukepen khandella, oun i djelto pani djal dran o doukepen vin. Dran miro dinlepen vell kova ap mande." 
Psalms38:7 Me nashau bango i doukatar, har te loms dava. Oun o tselo dives rovell miro dji." 
Psalms38:8 An mande rhačrell i tatepen, oun či ap mande hi sasto." 
Psalms38:9 Kek zoor hi bouder an mande, oun me hom phagedo. Miro dji hi yaake dareno, kay dau gole i doukatar." 
Psalms38:10 Miro ray, tou djineh, hoy me miro djiyestar kamau, oun miro tselo ropen hi gar khatedo glan toute." 
Psalms38:11 Miro dji djal sikeder. Miri zoor moukas man. Oun mire yaka nashran pengri zoor. 
Psalms38:12 Mire mala oun mire menshe darenn glan miro nasslepen. Oun kolla, kay pash mande djivenna, hi dour mandar krik tardo." 
Psalms38:13 Kolla, kay kamenn man te marell, čivenn mange dorya vin, te perap dren. Kolla, kay rodenn miri bibarht, rakrenn khetne, hoy nay krenn le mantsa. O tselo dives rodenn le pal kova, har nay rhorhenn le man." 
Psalms38:14 Me krau har nay shounoms či, oun krau miro mouy gar pre har yek, kay bouder gar nay rakrell." 
Psalms38:15 Ava, me vom har i morsh, kay bouder či shounell, kay les bouder kek lab an o mouy hi, hoy yob pale nay rakrell." 
Psalms38:16 Čačepah, me čivau miro tselo patsepen ap toute, baro Devel, te rakress tou mantsa, mo ray oun mo Devel." 
Psalms38:17 Oun me penom touke: “Ma mouk len te sal pral mande!” Me te peroms, sharans yon pen pral mande." 
Psalms38:18 Hi bouder gar dour, te perap, oun mire douka hi hako tsiro glan mire yaka." 
Psalms38:19 Doleske penau touke, havo čilačo koova me krom, oun miri doosh khaytell man." 
Psalms38:20 Kolla, kay mange čilačepen kamenna, hi zoreles oun hi boud. Boud rhoyrenn pen ap mande, ninna te krom len či." 
Psalms38:21 Ava, yon denn man čilačepen ap o lačepen pale. Oun čingrenn ap mande, kay krom o lačepen." 
Psalms38:22 Ma biste man, baro Devel! Miro Devel, ab gar dour mandar!" 
Psalms38:23 Ab sik ap miri rig! Miro ray, tou hal kova, kay man dran lengre vasta vin lell." 
Psalms39:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, o Yedoutoun. O David kras kay gili." 
Psalms39:2 Me penom mange: Me dau ap mande yak, te rakrap kek čilačepen. Me čivom miro vast ap miro mouy yaake rah har o čilačo his troul mande." 
Psalms39:3 Oun me rikrom miro mouy, oun homs pokones. Har penom či, vitar kek lačo lab, vas i daar an mande baro." 
Psalms39:4 Oun miro dji rhačras i doukatar, oun miro shero vas tato, oun me nay rikrom man bouder gar pale, oun penom:" 
Psalms39:5 Baro Devel, sike mande, har sik o djipen trouyel hi, oun kay miro merepen vella, te djinap, te nay ačau gar hako tsiro kay." 
Psalms39:6 Miro djipen hi yaake tikno har i vast bourhlo hi. Kova hi har či pash toute. Har zorelo i mensho ninna tardo hi, leskro djipen hi har i dourho." 
Psalms39:7 O mensho vell oun djal pale har i souni. O mensho boudrella boud čičeske oun krell boud gole troul či. Yob anell peske boud bravlepen khetne, oun djinell gar, koon kova lella." 
Psalms39:8 Kanna, miro ray, hoy vell ap mande? Me dikau ap toute," 
Psalms39:9 te less man vin dran miri tseli doosh! Ma mouk i dinelen pral mande te sal! 
Psalms39:10 Me penau bouder či. Miro mouy ačell pandlo. Toutar vell kova, hoy pral mande vas." 
Psalms39:11 Me mangau tout: Le tiro vast mandar krik. Te deh tou man doureder, hounte merap." 
Psalms39:12 Tou te deh o menshes i phagi, te anas lo doosh ap peste, palle djal lo yaake paash har i ripen, hoy rhalo vell i kirmestar. Ava, o mensheskro djipen hi či bouder har i dourho." 
Psalms39:13 Baro Devel, shoun miro mangepen! Oun shoun, har dau ap toute gole! Dik mire sva oun rake mantsa! Me hom gar khere ap kay phoub, djivau har i vi-themari pash toute, yaake har ninna mire phoure djivan." 
Psalms39:14 Mouk man kanna, te lap nevi zoor, bis te hounte merap, oun me gar bouder hom." 
Psalms40:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. O David kras kay gili. 
Psalms40:2 Miro tselo djiyeha dikom ap o baro Debleste, oun yob rissras peskro kand pash mande, oun shounas, har ap leste gole dom." 
Psalms40:3 Yob hadas man vin dran i grufta, dran o merepen oun i čik, oun čivas mire pire ap i baro bar, te vap zoreles tardo." 
Psalms40:4 An miro mouy čivas lo i nevi gili, i gili, hoy maro Debles sharell. Boud, kay dikenn kova, hayvenn, te hi o baro Devel o ray, oun yon patsenn ap leste." 
Psalms40:5 Barhtelo hi ko mensho, kay rikrell pes ap o baro Debleste, oun djal gar kolentsa, kay hi pre-phourde oun rhorhene." 
Psalms40:6 Miro baro Devel, har boud hi ko baro koova, hoy tou ap mende kral, hoy kek vavar nay krals, har tou kokres. Te kamoms pral kova lauter te rakrell, nay kroms kova gar, yaake boud hi kova." 
Psalms40:7 Kol firhen oun ko rhapen, hoy i menshe touke anenna, kameh tou gar. Tou dal man kanda, te hayvap, hoy kameh: kek firhen, hoy i menshe touke rhačrenna, vitar kek, hoy marenn le, te less tou lengri doosh lendar krik." 
Psalms40:8 Doleske penom touke: Ake hom. Me krau, hoy mandar činlo hi an o liil:" 
Psalms40:9 “Miro Devel, me kamau te krap o djiyestar, hoy tou kameh. Oun tiro lab hi an miro dji.”" 
Psalms40:10 Kote, kay lauter khetne venna, penau me lenge, kay tou leh vin dran o čilačepen. Miro mouy pandau me gar. Tou, baro Devel, djineh kova." 
Psalms40:11 Me rikrau man gar pale te penap lenge, hoy tou mendar kameh, oun kay tou rikreh tiro lab, oun leh i doosh krik. Oun me rikrau man gar pale, te rakrap pral tiro lačepen oun čačepen kote, kay boud menshe khetne venna." 
Psalms40:12 Baro Devel, mouk tiro dji hako tsiro mange pre te vell! Tou kameh man oun hal mange lačes. Doleske rike tiro vast pral mande hako tsiro!" 
Psalms40:13 Haki rigyatar vas bibarht ap mande, yaake boud, te djinau gar, har boud kope i bibarht man das. Miri doosh tapras man, oun hi yaake boud, te nay dikap lat gar lauter. O čilačo koova, hoy krom, hi boudeder har mire balla ap miro shero, oun miro dji hi dareno." 
Psalms40:14 Baro Devel, dik lačes ap mande, oun le man vin dran o čilačepen! Ab sik ap miri rig!" 
Psalms40:15 Kre, te ladjenn le pen, oun lenn i lolo shero, kolla lauter, kay kamenn man moulo dell! Kre len tikno, te ladjenn le pen, kolla, kay hi barhtelo pral miri bibarht!" 
Psalms40:16 Mou vell ladj oun daar ap lende, kay pral mande sanenn oun gole denn: “Ava, Ava, Ava!”" 
Psalms40:17 Kolla lauter, kay tout rodenna, mou venn le barhtelo pral toute oun givenn i barhtyatar! Kolla, kay mangenn toutar, te less len vin dran o čilačepen, mou penenn le hako tsiro: “Sharedo vell o baro Devel!”" 
Psalms40:18 Me hom čorvelo. Oun man hi kek zoor an mande. Miro Ray, biste man gar! Tou hal kova, kay vell ap miri rig oun lell man vin dran o čilačepen. Am sik miro Devel!" 
Psalms41:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. O David kras kay gili. 
Psalms41:2 Barhtelo hi kova, kay dell yak ap kolende, kay gar zoreles hi. Ap ko dives, kay les i bibarht taprella, lell o baro Devel les vin." 
Psalms41:3 O baro Devel rikrell peskre vasta pral leste, oun rikrell leskro djipen, oun krell, te djal leske mishto ap i phoub. Oun yob moukell les gar an i čilače vasta te perell." 
Psalms41:4 O baro Devel dell les nevi zoor ap o nasslengro čiben, oun krell les sasto." 
Psalms41:5 Me penom: “Baro Devel, kre tiro dji mange pre! Me anom doosh ap mande. Kre man sasto!”" 
Psalms41:6 Kolla, kay kamenn mange čilačepen, rakrenn djoungeles pral mande oun penenna: “Kaana merell lo, te vell leskro lab bistedo?”" 
Psalms41:7 Te vell yek lendar pash mande, te dikell lo pal mande, palle vell lo i čilačo djiyeha. Yob rodell i doosh, hoy nay anell lo ap mande pre. Te djal lo palle mandar vin, rakrell lo rhorhepen pral mande." 
Psalms41:8 Kolla, kay kamenn mange čilačepen, čivenn pengre shere khetne, oun rakrenn djoungeles pral mande." 
Psalms41:9 “I bibarht hi ap leste”, penenn le. “Koon yaake čiddo hi, stell bouder gar pre.”" 
Psalms41:10 Ninna miro lačeder maal, kova, kay mantsa khetne rhas, phoukras ap mande." 
Psalms41:11 Tou, baro Devel, kre tiro dji mange pre! Hade man pale pre! Palle dau len lauter pale, hoy yon mange kran." 
Psalms41:12 Mouk len gar pral mande te sal! Palle dikau, te dikeh tou lačes ap mande." 
Psalms41:13 Me shounau ap toute miro tselo djiyeha. Doleske rikreh tou miro djipen, oun moukeh man te djivell pash toute hako tsiro." 
Psalms41:14 Sharas o baro Debles, ko Debles pral o Israel, kanna oun hako tsiro. Amen! Ava, Amen!" 
Psalms42:1 I gili yekestar, kay hi dran i familya Korah. Kay gili hi o rayeske pral i gipangre." 
Psalms42:2 Har i vesheskri bouzyat bari troush hi pal shila pani, yaake nashell miro dji pal toute miro Devel." 
Psalms42:3 Ava, man hi troush pal o Debleste, pal ko djido Debleste. Kaana nay vau glan toute an tiro kheer, te dikap tout?" 
Psalms42:4 I vavar penenn ap mande hako dives: “Kay hi tiro Devel?” Doleske rovau o tselo dives oun haki rati; mire sva van miro pipen. 
Psalms42:5 Miro dji phagell an mande, har moukau mange an miro shero trouyel te djal, har djom boud menshentsa ap o drom oun anom len an o Debleskro kheer. Ap o drom sharam les bari golyah, te parkras men pash leste, oun hams boud, kay givan leske gilya i barhtelo djiyeha." 
Psalms42:6 Hoske rovell miro dji, oun hi yaake pharo an mande? Ap miro Debleste kamau te dikell. Me djinau, te vell i tsiro, kay sharau les, miro Debles, te vas lo ap miri rig." 
Psalms42:7 Kanna, mo Devel, rovell miro dji. Doleske dikau ap toute kote, kay hom: an o them pash o pani Yordan, pash i berge Hermon oun Misar." 
Psalms42:8 Tire panya perenn bari zoryah oun golyah tele. Yek baro pani pal o vavar djal pral mande vergel. 
Psalms42:9 Pral o dives bičrell o baro Devel mange peskro lačepen, oun rati givau leske gilya, oun mangau o Debles, kay les miro djipen an o vast hi." 
Psalms42:10 Me penau ap miro Debleste, kay hi mange har i zorelo kheer, kay nay khatrau man: Hoske bistral tou man? Hoske hounte rovap me? Kolla djan ap mande, kay mange o djipen phares krenna." 
Psalms42:11 Yon sanenn pral mande oun poučenn mandar hako dives: “Kay hi tiro Devel? Kay ačell lo?” Lengro praasepen hi mange har i merepaskro doukepen an mire kokale. 
Psalms42:12 Me penau mange: Hoske roveh tou, miro dji, oun hal yaake pharo an mande? Ap mo Debleste kamau te dikell. Me djinau, te vell i tsiro, kay sharau les, miro Debles, te vas lo ap miri rig." 
Psalms43:1 Miro Devel, kre te lap miro čačepen! Le miro koova an tiro vast, oun rake mange lačes pash kol menshende, kay kamenn či toutar te djinell! Le man vin dran o vast i rhorhenendar oun čilačendar!" 
Psalms43:2 Tou hal o zorelo Devel ap miri rig. Hoske moukal tou man? Hoske djal mange yaake djoungelo? Hoske nay krenn kolla mange o djipen pharo, kay mange čilačepen kamenn?" 
Psalms43:3 Biče tiri momeli, te dikap tiro čačepen, hoy anell man ap o drom pash tiri Debleskri berga, kay tou djiveh." 
Psalms43:4 Kote kamau me glan tiri Debleskri rhačepaskri te vell, glan toute, miro Debleste, kay kreh, te givap i barhtyatar. Miro bashepah ap i doryengri bashepaskri kamau man te parkrap pash toute, miro Devel."
