Psalms43:5 Hoske rovell miro dji oun hi yaake pharo an mande? Ap miro Debleste kamau te dikell. Me djinau, te vell i tsiro, kay parkrau man pash leste, miro Debleste, te vas lo ap miri rig." 
Psalms44:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. Kay gili hi yekestar dran i familya Korah. 
Psalms44:2 Maro Devel, mare kandentsa shounam mer, har mare phoure menge penan, hoy tou kral an lengre divessa glan i rah tsiro." 
Psalms44:3 Tou tradal tiro vasteha i vavar menshen vin dran lengro them, oun dal ko them mare phourende. Kol vavar menshen dal tou paash, te nay djivan mare phoure an ko them." 
Psalms44:4 Yon lan o them gar dren pengre rharentsa, vitar gar pengri zoryah. Na-a! Kova kras tiri čači moussi oun tiri zoor. Tou hals pash lende oun dikal kamles ap lende." 
Psalms44:5 Tou hal miro baro ray, miro Devel. Tou hal kova, kay krell, te venn o Yakobeskre čave o zorleder an o kourepen." 
Psalms44:6 Khetne touha vitsrah mer kolen ap i phoub, kay kourenn pen mentsa. Tiri zoryah stakrah mer kolen paash, kay hadenn pen ap mende." 
Psalms44:7 Me djinau, miro bogo krell man gar zoreles, oun miro rharo nay lell man gar vin dran i čilače vasta." 
Psalms44:8 Tou hal kova, kay lell men vin dran i čilače vasta. Oun tou kreh kolen tikno, kay kamenn menge čilačepen." 
Psalms44:9 Hako dives ham barhtelo pral toute, maro Debleste, oun sharah tout kanna oun hako tsiro." 
Psalms44:10 Kanna čival men pale oun vitsral men an i ladj. Tou djah gar mare lourdentsa an o kourepen. 
Psalms44:11 Tou moukal men pale te djal glan kolende, kay kouran pen mentsa. Yaake nay čoran kolla mare koola, kay pral mende van." 
Psalms44:12 Har firhe, hoy venn maredo, dal tou men pre. Oun an i tsele themma trouyel tradal tou men, yaake te ačam gar khetne." 
Psalms44:13 Hi yaake har te bikrals tire menshen čičeske, oun lals gar boud love lenge dren, har bikral len." 
Psalms44:14 Tou kral, te hounte ladjas men glan i menshende, kay djivenn an i themma troul mende; yon sanenn pral mende oun praasenn men." 
Psalms44:15 I menshe an vavar themma rakrenn laba sapaske pral mende, oun čivenn pengre shere yek rigyatar ap i vavar pal mende." 
Psalms44:16 O tselo dives hi miri ladj glan mande, oun miro mouy rhačrell glan ladj." 
Psalms44:17 Me shounau, har sanenn le pral mende oun praasenn men, oun hounte dikap kolen, kay menge čilačepen kamenn oun menge o djipen phares krenn." 
Psalms44:18 Kava lauter vas pral mende, ninna te bistram tout gar oun kram, hoy tou mentsa vin kral." 
Psalms44:19 Mare djia moukan tout gar, vitar gar djan mare herya tiro dromestar tele." 
Psalms44:20 Fothe kram kova gar, hi kova yaake, har te dals tou men khetne, oun moukals men mank divye djoukle te djivell. Kek momeli hi glan mende." 
Psalms44:21 Bistrams mer tout, maro Debles, oun mangams i vavar debles an," 
Psalms44:22 palle djinals tou kova. Tou dikeh, hoy pash hakeneste an o dji khatemen hi, oun hoy kek vavar djinell." 
Psalms44:23 Tire menshe ham mer. Doleske vah mer o tselo tsiro moulo dino, har vams firhe, hoy venn maredo." 
Psalms44:24 Ste pre! Hoske soveh tou, mo ray? Ste pre oun čip men gar pale hako tsireske!" 
Psalms44:25 Hoske dikeh tou gar ap mende? Bistral tou, har djoungeles menge djala, har phares yon menge o djipen krenna?" 
Psalms44:26 An i čik ham vitsedo. Oun mer nay stah gar pre. 
Psalms44:27 Ste pre oun ab ap mari rig! Le men dran i čilače vasta vin! Mer dikah ap tiro lačepen. 
Psalms45:1 I biyabeskri gili yekestar, kay hi dran i familya Korah. Koy gili hi o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell pash o bashepen ap i shob-doryengri bashepaskri." 
Psalms45:2 Miro dji hi pherdo shoukar laba i gilyake, hoy kamau te givap miro baro rayeske. Miri čip hi har i činepaskro yekestar, kay hayvell mishto laba te činell." 
Psalms45:3 Tou hal shoukeder har i vavar menshe. Dran tiro mouy venn lače laba. Čačepah o Devel čivas peskri barht ap toute, te ačell li hako tsireske ap toute." 
Psalms45:4 Čip tiro rharo ap tiri rig, tou čačo morsh, oun sike tiro raylepen oun zoor!" 
Psalms45:5 Besh tout ap tiro gray! Dja trouyel an o them oun kre o čačepen zoreles! Le i čorvelengro koova an tiro vast oun kre, te lenn le pengro čačepen! Yaake krell tiri čači moussi baro zorelo koova." 
Psalms45:6 De tire fayle karye, te djan le an o dji kolendar, kay kourenn pen touha. Yaake perenna i vavar themma glan toute." 
Psalms45:7 Miro Devel, tiri rayeskri beshepaskri ačell hako tsireske. Tou hal i čačo oun lačo ray pral tire menshende." 
Psalms45:8 Tou kameh o čačepen, oun nay dikeh gar kolen glan tire yaka, kay o čilačepen krenna. Doleske rodas tout o Devel, tiro Devel, vin oun čoras boud barht pral toute vin, boudeder har pral hako vavar rayeste." 
Psalms45:9 Tire ripya soungenn mishto pal myrrhe, Aloe oun Kassia. Bashepangre bashrenn touke an tire rayengre khera, hoy shoukar oun kouč kerdo hi." 
Psalms45:10 I bare rayengre ča hi pash toute, oun ap tiri čači rig hi tiri pirni tardo, oun ap late hi o lačeder sonakay." 
Psalms45:11 Shoun miri čay! Dik oun shoun mishto: Biste tire menshen oun tiri tseli familya! 
Psalms45:12 Tou hal yaake shoukar, te kamell tout o baro ray. Yob hi tiro ray. Doleske dja ap i čanga glan leste!" 
Psalms45:13 I menshe dran o foro Tirus venn pash toute oun anenn touke shoukar koova. I bravele dran o tselo them venna, oun rodenn te dikess kamles ap lende." 
Psalms45:14 I baro rayeskri čay vell dren, shoukar oun raylo kerdo, oun an-rido an sonakangre ripya." 
Psalms45:15 Pral i kouč stakepangre anenn le lat pash o baro rayeste. Oun pal late djan kol terne ča, lakre mala, kolen anenn le pash toute." 
Psalms45:16 Har djan le an o baro rayeskro kheer, denn i menshe gole i barhtyatar." 
Psalms45:17 Miro ray, mou vell ko tsiro, kay beshenn tire morsh čave ap o rayeskri beshepaskri, kay tire phoure dada beshdo his; oun tou kreh len rayen pral i tseli phoub." 
Psalms45:18 Me kamau toutar te rakrell, te prindjrenn tout ninna kol menshe, kay pal mende venna. Yaake sharenn tout i menshe an hake themma kanna oun hako tsiro." 
Psalms46:1 I gili yekestar, kay hi dran i familya Korah. Kay gili hi o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell lo lat har koy gili terne ča." 
Psalms46:2 O Devel hi menge har i zorelo kheer, kay nay khatrah men. Yob hi ap mari rig an phare tsirya." 
Psalms46:3 Doleske hi men kek traash, ninna te djals kay phoub tele, oun perens i berge an o baro pani," 
Psalms46:4 ninna te vals o baro pani divyo oun rhoyedo, oun djals savi zoryah pre, te perenn i berge khetne." 
Psalms46:5 Lačo djoudjo pani nashella an o Debleskro foro, kay o Devel pral halauter djivell oun leskro kheer hi, Ko pani krell ko fores barhtelo." 
Psalms46:6 O Devel hi mashkral leste, doleske perell o foro gar khetne. O Devel vell ap leskri rig sik taysarlakro." 
Psalms46:7 Yob te dell gole, darenna i menshe an i vavar themma, oun bare rayenge vell i zoor krik lino pral pengre themma. I tseli phoub trissella i daryatar." 
Psalms46:8 O baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, hi ap mari rig. Yob hi o Yakobeskro Devel oun rikrell peskre vasta pral mende." 
Psalms46:9 Avenn oun dikenn ko baro koova, hoy o baro Devel kras! Dareno koova krell lo ap i phoub:" 
Psalms46:10 Ap o marepen penell lo: “Mouk tele ap i tseli phoub!” Kol kashta, kolentsa dan le karye, phagell lo khetne, oun lengre rhare dell lo paash, i kourepangre vourdya rhačrell lo pre." 
Psalms46:11 “Moukenn tele”, dell lo gole, “oun hayvenn, te hom me o Devel. Me hom o pralstouno pral i menshende an i tsele themma, ava, o pralstouno pral i tseli phoub.”" 
Psalms46:12 O baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub hi pash mende. Yob, o Yakobeskro Devel, rikrell peskre vasta pral mende." 
Psalms47:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. Kay gili hi yekestar dran i familya Korah. 
Psalms47:2 T'mer menshe dran i tsele themma, denn an i vasta! Sharenn o Debles oun denn leske barhteles gole!" 
Psalms47:3 O baro Devel hi o pralstouno, lestar darenna lauter. Yob hi o baro ray pral i tseli phoub." 
Psalms47:4 Yob vitsras menge i menshen dran vavar themma tel mare pire, oun čivas men pral lende." 
Psalms47:5 Yob rodas menge o them vin, oun das les mende, te djivas kote. Pral kova ham barhtelo, mer, i čave o Yakobestar, kolen yob boud kamell." 
Psalms47:6 O Devel djal pre pash peskri rayeskri beshepaskri, oun i menshe denn barhteles gole oun phourdenn an i phourdepaskri, har o baro Devel pre djal." 
Psalms47:7 Givenn o Debleske! Givenn oun sharenn les, givenn maro baro rayeske! Givenn!" 
Psalms47:8 O Devel hi o baro ray pral i tseli phoub. Givenn oun sharenn les i gilyentsa! 
Psalms47:9 O Devel hi o baro ray pral i tsele themma. O Devel beshas pes ap peskri rayeskri beshepaskri, hoy leske kokres hi." 
Psalms47:10 I raya pral i vavar themma van khetne oun hi kanna khetne o Debleskre menshentsa. Lengro Devel hi o Abrahameskro Devel. Leske hi kol tsele zorele ap i phoub koy. Yob hi pral hakeneste. 
Psalms48:1 I gili yekestar dran i familya Korah. 
Psalms48:2 O baro Devel, zorelo hi lo! Maro Devel, moldo hi lo, te sharas les an peskro foro, hoy hi pral ap koy berga, kay yob djivella." 
Psalms48:3 Shoukar hi o foro ap i berga Sion. I barht hi i tseli phoubyake. An kava foro hi o Devel o baro ray. 
Psalms48:4 Yob hi an i zorele khera an kava foro. Oun i menshe kote djinenn, te dell lo garda ap lende." 
Psalms48:5 Bare raya dran vavar themma van khetne oun djan khetne pengre lourdentsa pash o foro pre. 
Psalms48:6 Yon dikan kova oun lenge ačas o dji tardo. Len tapras i daar oun yon nashan penge. 
Psalms48:7 Lengri daar his yaake baro, te trissan le. Lengri traash his har i traash i djouvyatar, kay lell li i ternepen." 
Psalms48:8 Lengre kokale djan, har i bare shiffe phagenn, te djal i zorelo dourho pral o baro pani." 
Psalms48:9 Yaake har mer kova shounam, yaake dikam les an o foro o baro Deblestar, kay hi o ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub. Yob rikrell o foro oun moukell les gar tele te djal an kek tsiro." 
Psalms48:10 Maro Devel, kate an tiro kheer moukah menge tiro lačepen an o shero trouyel te djal." 
Psalms48:11 Yaake baro har tiro lab, maro Devel, yaake baro hi tiro raylepen ap i tseli phoub. Tiro čačo vast hi pherdo čačepen." 
Psalms48:12 Pral kova hi kol menshe ap i berga Sion barhtelo. Tou dal men maro čačepen. Doleske denn le gole i barhtyatar an i tsele forya an o them Youda. 
Psalms48:13 Nashenn troul i berga Sion trouyel! Dikenn, kitse bare turme koy hi!" 
Psalms48:14 Denn yak ap i pre-čidde barra troul o foro oun i zorele khera an o foro, yaake te nay penenn kova t'mare čavenge." 
Psalms48:15 Penenn lenge: Ava, kava Devel hi maro Devel kanna oun hako tsireske. Yob djal mentsa an maro tselo djipen." 
Psalms49:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. Kay gili hi yekestar dran i familya Korah. 
Psalms49:2 T'mer menshe an hake themma, shounenn mishto! T'mer lauter, kay ninna han, krenn t'mare kanda pre!" 
Psalms49:3 An-dikle menshe oun save, kay gar an-diklo hi, bravele oun čorvele, t'mer lauter, shounenn!" 
Psalms49:4 Miro mouy rakrell goseve laba, oun dran miro dji vell kova, hoy mishto hayvom." 
Psalms49:5 Miro kand shounell ap goseve laba, oun hoy kolla kamenn te penell, kamau me t'mende te sikrell pash o bashepen ap i doryengri bashepaskri." 
Psalms49:6 Hoske te darap an i čilače divessa, kay kolla troul mande hi, kay mange čilačepen kamenna?" 
Psalms49:7 Yon čivenn pengro patsepen ap pengro bravlepen, oun sharenn pen har bravele yon hi." 
Psalms49:8 Kek menshes hi doha love, te nay ginell lo peskro phraleskro djipen o Deblestar, oun peskro djipen vitar gar." 
Psalms49:9 I mensheskro djipen hi yaake kouč, te nay playsrell lo les gar. An kek tsiro hi les doha te dell," 
Psalms49:10 te nay djivell lo hako tsiro, oun hounte merell gar." 
Psalms49:11 Na-a, mer dikah: O gosevo hounte merell, yaake har o narvelo oun o dinelo ninna. Oun lauter, hoy len his, hounte moukenn le pale i vavarenge." 
Psalms49:12 Paskedo venn le oun ačenn an lengre moulengre khera hako tsiro, ninna te das i tsiro, kay dan le pengro them pengro lab." 
Psalms49:13 Fothe bravelo i mensho ninna hi, yob hounte merell yaake har i firho ninna." 
Psalms49:14 Dikenn har kolenge djala, kay hi yaake dinelo oun kamenn pengro rakepen te shounell!" 
Psalms49:15 Har bakre djan le an o moulengro them. Lengro bakrengro, kay anell len ap o drom, hi o merepen. Sik vell ko dives, kay venn o Debleskre menshe i raya pral kolende, kolengro mass tele merell an i phoub, kay hounte ačenn le pash i moulende." 
Psalms49:16 Miro djipen lell o Devel vin dran o merepaskri zoor. Ava, yob lell man pash peste." 
Psalms49:17 Ma rhoye tout, te vell yek bravelo, oun leskro kheer bareder oun shoukeder vella!" 
Psalms49:18 Te merell lo, lell lo či peha. Leskro tselo bravlepen hounte ačell pale." 
Psalms49:19 Ninna te sharell lo pes pral peskro shoukar djipen, oun i vavar penenn leske shoukar laba, te djal leske mishto," 
Psalms49:20 hounte merell lo oun djal kote, kay leskre moule phoure hi, kolla, kay bouder gar i momeli dikenna." 
Psalms49:21 I mensho, kay hayvell gar, te nay ačell lo gar ap i phoub, hounte merell har i firhe, ninna te his lo bravelo." 
Psalms50:1 I gili o Asafestar. O Devel rakrell, o baro oun zorelo Devel dell i menshen ap i tseli phoub gole, kotar, kay o kham pre djas bis kote, kay lo tele djal." 
Psalms50:2 Ap i berga Sion, an o shoukeder foro, sikras pes o Devel an peskro raylepen." 
Psalms50:3 Maro Devel vella oun moukell pes te shounell. Glan leste nashell i yag oun rhal lauter pre. Oun troul leste phourdell i baro zorelo dourho. 
Psalms50:4 O Devel vell te rakrell lo o čačepen vin pral peskre menshende. Ap o bolepen oun i phoub dell yob gole: 
Psalms50:5 “Anenn mange mire menshen khetne, kay mantsa vin kran, te vap me lengro Devel, oun mange firhen anan.”" 
Psalms50:6 O bolepen kharell: O Devel hi o čačepaskro ray! Oun lauter hoy yob vi-rakrell, hi čačo." 
Psalms50:7 “Mire menshe, shounenn! Me kamau rakrell. Israel, shoun, har me, tiro Devel penau touke, kay kova, hoy kral, gar mishto hi." 
Psalms50:8 Čingrau gar, te anals tou mange kek firhen. Kol firhen, hoy tou mange rhačral, hi hako dives glan mire yaka." 
Psalms50:9 Man hounte vals kek gouroum dran tiri stanya, vitar kek bakre." 
Psalms50:10 I tsele firhe an o veesh hi mire, oun ninna kol firhe ap i zerya berge hi mire." 
Psalms50:11 Me prindjrau i tsele čirkle ap i berge. Oun kova, hoy ap i phoub yaake trouyel nashella, prindjrau me lauter." 
Psalms50:12 Te vals man bok, me penoms touke kova gar. I tseli phoub hi miro oun lauter, hoy ap late hi, ninna." 
Psalms50:13 Rhap me groumyakro mass? Piyap me o rat i bakrendar? Na-a! 
Psalms50:14 Kova, hoy toutar kamau, hi, te parkress tout pash mande, tiro Debleste, oun te rikress tiri sovel, hoy dal tou mande, o pralstuneste." 
Psalms50:15 Oun de gole ap mande ap ko dives, kay hal an i bibarht! Palle lau tout vin, oun tou sharess man.”" 
Psalms50:16 Ap o čilačeste penell o Devel: “Hoske leh tou mire laba an o mouy? Hoske peneh, me voms tiro Devel?" 
Psalms50:17 Kova rhoyrell tout, te hounte rikress tout ap mire laba. Kova, hoy touke penom, kameh tou gar te krell." 
Psalms50:18 Hako kopo, kay dikeh tou i čorepaskres, kreh tou tout leskro maal, oun hal beshdo khetne kolentsa, kay djan i vavar romyentsa." 
Psalms50:19 Dran tiro mouy vell praasepen vin. Oun tiri čip rakrell rhorhepen. 
Psalms50:20 Tou rakreh djoungeles pral tire phralende. Pral tiri dakro čaveste aneh tou rhorhepen pre. 
Psalms50:21 Kova kral tou, oun me penom kek lab. Koy rikral tou man har yek, kay hi yaake har tou. Me sikrau tout koy doosh, hoy anal ap toute, oun anau touke tiro čilačo koova glan tire yaka." 
Psalms50:22 T'mer, kay kamenn či mandar te djinell, hayvenn, hoy penom, te vap gar oun dap t'men, oun kek hi koy, kay lell t'men vin dran miro vast." 
Psalms50:23 Kova, kay pes pash mande parkrella, hi kova, kay sharell man. Kova hi o drom, kay sikrau leste, har lačo leske hom.”" 
Psalms51:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. O David kras kay gili," 
Psalms51:2 har o Debleskro rakepaskro Natan pash leste vas, pal kova o David i vavareskri romyat, i Batsheba, las." 
Psalms51:3 Miro Devel, tou hal yaake lačo, oun tiro kamlepen hi baro! Dik lačes ap mande! Oun le ko čilačo koova, hoy krom, mandar krik!" 
Psalms51:4 Thob miri doosh mandar tele, oun le ko tselo čilačepen mandar krik, te vap pale djoudjo!" 
Psalms51:5 Ava, djinau, kay anom doosh ap mande. Oun ko čilačo koova, hoy krom, hi man o tselo tsiro glan mire yaka." 
Psalms51:6 Ap toute kokres krom, hoy čilačo hi. Ava me krom, hoy midjak hi glan tire yaka. Doleske hi tout čačes an tiro rakepen. Tou kreh o čačepen, te deh man i phagi." 
Psalms51:7 Doosh hi ap mande, yaake rah har hom ap kay phoub, ninna har boldo vom, his o čilačepen ap mande." 
Psalms51:8 Tou rodeh o čačepen an o mensheskro dji. An miro dji sikreh tou, har te vap gosevo." 
Psalms51:9 Le miri doosh mandar krik! Palle hom djoudjo an miro dji. Thob man! Oun me vau parneder har gib. 
Psalms51:10 Mouk man pale barht te hayvell! Tou phagal man, kanna mouk man pale te stell!" 
Psalms51:11 Ma dik ap miri doosh, oun le o čilačo koova, hoy krom, mandar krik!" 
Psalms51:12 Miro Devel, de man i nevo dji, hoy hi djoudjo oun touke kokres koy!" 
Psalms51:13 Ma trade man toutar krik! Ma le tiro dourho mandar krik! 
Psalms51:14 Mouk man te dikell, kay hal pash mande, te sal miro dji pale! De man i dji, hoy shounell ap toute!" 
Psalms51:15 Kolen, kay shounenn gar ap toute, kamau me tiro drom te sikrell, te moukenn le pengro čilačo drom, oun venn pale pash toute." 
Psalms51:16 Me anom rat ap mande, ma de man moulo, miro Devel! Tou hal o Devel, kay lell man vin dran o merepen. Oun me kamau tiro čačepen te sharell." 
Psalms51:17 Baro Devel, kre miro mouy pre, te rakrap, hoy sharell tout!" 
Psalms51:18 Fiche, hoy anenn le touke, kameh gar. Te vals yaake, doms len toute. Fiche, hoy touke rhačedo venna, krenn tiro dji gar barhtelo." 
Psalms51:19 Kova, hoy tou kameh te vell touke anlo, hi i phagedo dji. Ap i mensheste, kay rovell pral peskri doosh, dikeh tou, miro Devel, lačes." 
Psalms51:20 Kre lačepen ap o foro Sion! Ab ap i rig kol menshenge an o foro Yerusalem, te venn i barra o forestar pale neves pre-čiddo!" 
Psalms51:21 Palle anenn le touke lačo koova an o čačepen, ninna firhe, hoy touke tseles rhačedo venn. Ava, palle venn touke terne gourma rhačedo ap tiri rhačepaskri. Oun tou dikeh lačes ap kova lauter." 
Psalms52:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. O David kras kay gili," 
Psalms52:2 har o Doeg, ko morsh dran o them Edom, pash o Saul vas, oun leske penas: “O David hi pash o Ahimelek.”" 
Psalms52:3 Hoske shareh tou tout tiro čilačepah, tou, kay kameh te vell tout penepaske pral halauter! O lačepen o Deblestar hi o tselo dives kay." 
Psalms52:4 Tou rodeh, har te doukress yekes, oun tiri čip činella har i lači čouri, tou rhorheno!" 
Psalms52:5 Tou kameh o čilačepen boudeder har o lačepen. Oun o rhorhepen kameh tou boudeder har o čačepen. 
Psalms52:6 Tou kameh laba, hoy phagenn, oun rakreh douy čipyentsa." 
Psalms52:7 Doleske phagell tout ninna o Devel hako tsireske. Yob stakrell tout khetne, vitsrell tout vin dran tiro kheer, lell tout krik kay phoubyatar, kay djivah." 
Psalms52:8 Oun kolla, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, dikenn kova oun darenn oun sanenn pral leste:" 
Psalms52:9 “Dikenn ko morshes! Kova čivas gar peskro patsepen ap o Debleste. Na-a! Yob patsas ap peskro baro bravlepen, oun leskro čilačepen kras les zorelo.”" 
Psalms52:10 Me hom har i zenelo djeteskro rouk an o Debleskro kheer. Me patsau ap o lačepen miro Deblestar kanna oun hako tsiro. 
Psalms52:11 Me kamau man hako tsireske pash toute te parkrell, hoy tou lauter mange kral. Miro Devel, me dikau ap toute glan i yaka tire menshendar, tou hal yaake lačo." 
Psalms53:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell har koy gili Mahalat. O David kras kay gili." 
Psalms53:2 Dinele hi le, kay rakrenn penge: “Hi kek Devel.” Či-molde hi le. Lauter, hoy le krenna, hi djoungelo oun rhorheno koova. Kek hi koy, kay krell o lačepen." 
Psalms53:3 O Devel dikell dran o bolepen tele ap i menshende, te hatsell lo yekes, kay gosevo hi oun pal o Debleste poučella." 
Psalms53:4 Halauter rissran pen lestar krik, oun djivenn i djoungelo djipen, yek har ko vavar. Kek hi koy, kay krell o lačepen, ava kek!" 
Psalms53:5 “Kolla, kay o čilačo koova krenna, hayvenn či”, penell o Devel, – “kolla, kay mire menshen rhana har i kotar maro. Man denn le gar an-gole.”" 
Psalms53:6 Ap yek kopo taprenn le i traash, ninna te hi či koy, hoy len nay traash krella. O Devel marell kolen, kay ap peskre menshende pre djan. Oun lengre kokale ačenn čiddo oun venn gar paskedo. O Devel čivas len pale." 
Psalms53:7 Har kamaus me, te vals kova koy berga Sion tele, kay lell o Israel vin dran i bibarht! Ava, har kamaus me, te anell o Devel peskre pandle menshen pale! Palle stans o Yakobeskre čave i barhtyatar, ava, o tselo Israel vals barhtelo." 
Psalms54:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te bashrell ap i doryengri bashepaskri. O David činas koy gili, har kol morsha dran Sif pash o Saul van oun penan: “O David rikrell pes pash mende khatemen.”" 
Psalms54:2  
Psalms54:3 Miro Devel, sike koon tou hal oun ab ap miri rig! Sike tiri zoor oun kre, te lap miro čačepen!" 
Psalms54:4 Miro Devel, shoun miro mangepen! Shoun o rakepen, hoy dran miro mouy vella!" 
Psalms54:5 Menshen, kay me gar prindjrau, kolla hadenn pen ap mande, depangre kamenn man te marell. O Devel hi len gar glan i yaka." 
Psalms54:6 Tou, miro Devel, veh ap miri rig. Tou, miro ray, hal kova, kay man rikrella." 
Psalms54:7 Tou deh kolen ko čilačepen pale, hoy yon kaman ap mande te anell. Sike mande, te hal mantsa, oun le len krik kay phoubyatar!" 
Psalms54:8 Palle anau me touke lačo koova i barhtelo djiyeha, oun sharau tout, baro Devel, tou hal yaake lačo." 
Psalms54:9 Tou lal man vin dran o tselo koova, hoy mange o djipen phares kras. Kanna nay dikau tele ap kolende, kay kaman man te marell." 
Psalms55:1 I gili o rayeske pral o gipangre, glan te givell pash o bashepen ap i doryengre bashepangre. O David kras kay gili." 
Psalms55:2 Miro Devel, shoun miro mangepen! Me rovau ap toute. Ma khate tout mandar!" 
Psalms55:3 Dik ap mande oun shoun, har gole dau oun rovau." 
Psalms55:4 Kolla, kay kamenn man čilačepen, krenn bare laba, oun o čilačo dell man trad. Yon kamenn bibarht pral mande te anell, oun djan ap mande pre bari rholyah." 
Psalms55:5 Miro dji kamell i trashatar tardo te ačell. Oun me darau, te hounte merap." 
Psalms55:6 I daar tapras man yaake, te trissau, oun o shil čivas pes ap mande." 
Psalms55:7 Kamoms moussya har i čirklo, te nay hadoms man pre oun djoms krik, oun hatsoms i platsa, kay nay krell man kek čomone." 
Psalms55:8 Dour krik djoms oun ačoms an o moulo tato them. 
Psalms55:9 Sik nashoms, te khatrap man glan o baro oun zorelo dourho, hoy pral i phoub phourdell, oun glan o baro brishin." 
Psalms55:10 Miro ray, kre, te rakrenn le boud čipyentsa, te hayvenn le pen bouder gar! An o foro dikau či har čilačepen oun čingepen," 
Psalms55:11 hoy kolla krenn, kay djan hako dives oun haki rat trouyel pral ap i barra, hoy djan troul o foro. Oun an o foro hi bibarht oun čorvlepen." 
Psalms55:12 O čilačo koova hi baro mank lende. Ap i dromma, kay parenn oun bikrenn le, venn i menshe tikno rikedo oun rhorhedo." 
Psalms55:13 Kova, kay praasell man kanna, hi gar yek kolendar, kay kaman mange čilačepen. Palle hidjroms kova. Yob, kay hadell pes pral mande, hi gar kolendar, kay djan ap mande pre. Palle khatroms man glan leste." 
Psalms55:14 Na-a! Tou hal kova, yek mendar, miro maal, kova, kay leske lauter penoms." 
Psalms55:15 Mer hayvam men yaake mishto, oun djam khetne an o Debleskro kheer." 
Psalms55:16 Mou taprell o merepen sik kolen, kay kamenn man te marell! Mou vell lo sik pral lende, te djan le djides an o moulengro them! O čilačepen hi an lengre djia khere." 
Psalms55:17 Me dau ap miro Debleste gole. Oun o baro Devel lell man vin dran lengre vasta. 
Psalms55:18 Rati oun taysarlakro oun mashkral o dives, anau miro mangepen oun miro ropen glan leste, oun yob shounell ap mande." 
Psalms55:19 Yob lell miro djipen vin dran i vasta kol boudendar, kay ap mande djan. Oun krell, te moukenn le tele mandar." 
Psalms55:20 O Devel, kay hako tsiro o Devel hi, kova shounell miro mangepen oun stakrell len tele, kolen, kay kamenn pal pengro shero te djivell, oun kamenn lestar či te djinell." 
Psalms55:21 O phoukepaskro djal ap peskro maleste pre oun rikrell gar peskri sovel, hoy das lo leste glan o Debleste." 
Psalms55:22 Leskro rakepen hi goudlo har gvin. An leskro dji kamell le o kourepen. Leskre laba hi har djet, oun činenn har rhare." 
Psalms55:23 Vitse kova, hoy touke phares hi, ap o baro Debleste! Yob hi kova, kay lell tiro koova an peskro vast. An kek tsiro moukell yob koles te perell, kay an o čačepen tardo hi." 
Psalms55:24 I marepangren oun rhorhenen vitsreh tou, miro Devel, dour tele an o telstunepen. Glan ko tsiro, kay lengro djipen paash trouyel hi, merenn le. Me kamau ap toute te dikell oun man te rikrell." 
Psalms56:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell har koy gili I tauba an i dour them. Kay gili kras o David, har tapran les i Filistarya an o foro Gat." 
Psalms56:2 Miro Devel, ab lačes ap mande, i menshe lenn man palla! Hako dives djan le ap mande pre, oun krenn mange o djipen phares." 
Psalms56:3 Kolla, kay kamenn mange čilačepen, lenn man hako dives palla. Boud djan pre-phourdemen ap mande." 
Psalms56:4 Ap ko dives, kay man i daar taprella, dikau me ap toute, mo Devel, oun rikrau man ap toute." 
Psalms56:5 Me kamau o Debleskro lab te sharell, man ap leste te rikrell, oun man gar te darell. Hoy nashte krenn man i menshe?" 
Psalms56:6 O tselo dives rissrenn le mire laba trouyel. Yon rodenn, har nay doukrenn le man." 
Psalms56:7 An pengro khatepen hi le čiddo, lenn le man an o yak, oun djinenn hako djapen mandar. Yon rodenn, har nay denn le man moulo." 
Psalms56:8 Miro Devel, kameh len kek phagi te dell lengro čilačepaske? De kal menshen an tiri rholi khetne!" 
Psalms56:9 Dik, har boud divessa hom me ap o naashepen! Le mire sva an i čaro khetne! Pash toute hi le lauter pre-činlo an i liil." 
Psalms56:10 Ap ko dives, kay dau ap toute gole, hounte djan kolla pale, kay kamenn man te marell. Kava hi, hoy djinau: Tou hal mantsa, miro Devel." 
Psalms56:11 Me kamau o Debleskro lab te sharell. Ava, o baro Debleskro lab kamau te sharell." 
Psalms56:12 Ap leste dikau oun rikrau man, oun darau gar. Hoy nashte krenn man i menshe?" 
Psalms56:13 Miro Devel, me dom man sovel, te parkrap man pash toute." 
Psalms56:14 Tou lal man vin dran o merepen. Ava, glan o perepen rikral tou mire herya pale, yaake te nay djivap glan toute, miro Devel, khetne kolentsa, kay djide hi." 
Psalms57:1 I gili o rayeske pral o gipangre, te givell har koy gili Ma mare men. O David činas kay gili an ko tsiro, har yob glan o Saul ap o naashepen his, oun pes an koy grotta khatras." 
Psalms57:2 Kre tiro dji mange pre, miro Devel! Kre tiro dji mange pre! Pash toute vau, te khatrap man. An tire moussya nashau, bis te kay bibarht krik djas." 
Psalms57:3 Ap o Debleste, ko pralstuneste, dau me gole, ap koleste, kay miro koova mishto krella." 
Psalms57:4 Dran o bolepen mou vell lo mange ap i rig, oun lell man vin dran o praasepen kolestar, kay man palla lell. O Devel mou sikrell man, te hi lo mange lačo, oun te rikrell lo pash mande." 
Psalms57:5 Me hom čiddo mank menshe, kay hi har leve, kay kamenn man pre te rhal. Lengre danda hi har čourya oun fayle, oun lengri čip dell čourye har i rharo." 
Psalms57:6 Sike tiro barepen, hoy bareder hi har o bolepen, miro Devel! Tiro raylepen mou vell pral i tseli phoub!" 
Psalms57:7 I netsa čivan le glan mire pire, te perap dren. I dori pandan le troul miri meen. Ap miro drom hadan le i rheb vin, – oun yon peran kokres dren." 
Psalms57:8 Zorelo vas miro dji, miro Devel, zorelo vas miro dji. Me kamau touke te givell oun te bashrell." 
Psalms57:9 Ste pre miro dji! Kamau te bashrap ap i doryengre bashepangre. Kava dives kamau me o khames pre te djangrell! 
Psalms57:10 Mank i menshende dran boud themma kamau tout te sharell, miro ray. Glan i natsyone kamau touke te givell." 
Psalms57:11 Tiro lačepen hi yaake baro har o bolepen. Oun tiro čačepen djal bis pash i volke. 
Psalms57:12 Sike tiro barepen, hoy bareder hi har o bolepen, miro Devel! Tiro raylepen mou vell pral i tseli phoub!" 
Psalms58:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell har koy gili Ma mare men. O David činas kay gili." 
Psalms58:2 T'mer zorele, rakrenn t'mer čačepah o čačepen vin pral i menshende? Denn t'mer hakeneste peskro čačepen?" 
Psalms58:3 Na-a, kova krenn t'mer gar. T'mer kamenn o čilačepen te krell. T'mare vastentsa krenn djoungelo koova." 
Psalms58:4 I čilače peran o čačo dromestar tele, yaake rah har yon boldo van. Foun tiknes pre djan le i rhorheno drom." 
Psalms58:5 Lengro rakepen marell har i čip i čilačo sapestar. Yon hi har i sap, hoy nashte shounell gar." 
Psalms58:6 Yon pandenn pengre kanda har i sap, kay kamell gar te shounell, hoy o dourkepaskro ap leste rakrell, ninna te hayvell lo mishto i sapentsa te rakrell." 
Psalms58:7 De lenge i danda dren, miro Devel! Phage lengre levengre danda vin, miro baro Devel!" 
Psalms58:8 Kre te ačenn le gar djido, oun hounte krik djan har pani, hoy an i phoub nashell. Te čivenn le pengre fayle an, mouk len tele phagenn." 
Psalms58:9 Yaake har i momeli tele rhačrell, oun bouder gar koy hi, oun yaake har i ternepen, hoy moulo boldo vell oun o kham gar dikas, yaake te ačenn yon vitar gar." 
Psalms58:10 Lenge djal har i soubyengre bourra: I baro dourho tserdell len dran i phoub vin. Yaake phourdell o Devel len krik an peskri bari rholi. 
Psalms58:11 O dji kolendar vell barhtelo, kay hi an o čačepen tardo, te dikenn le, kay lenn i čilače pengri phagi. An kolengro rat thovenn le pengre pire." 
Psalms58:12 Oun i menshe penenna: “Kova, kay o čačepen kras, lell peskro playsepen. Ava, o Devel hi o čačepaskro ray pral i phoub.”" 
Psalms59:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell har koy gili Ma mare men. O David činas kay gili an ko tsiro, har o Saul peskre lourden troul leskro kheer tardo čivas, te denn le les moulo." 
Psalms59:2 Le man vin dran i vasta kolendar, kay kamenn mange čilačepen, miro Devel! An man krik kolendar, kay ap mande djan!" 
Psalms59:3 Le man vin dran i vasta kol čilačendar, kol menshendar, kay kamenn te dikell, har miro rat nashell." 
Psalms59:4 Dik, baro Devel, har yon lourenn, te marenn le man! Fothe krom me či, oun kek doosh ap mande hi, djan zorele morsha khetnes ap mande." 
Psalms59:5 Ninna te krom me kek čilačepen, nashenn le kay, te denn le man moulo. Ste pre! Ab oun dik les touke kokres an!" 
Psalms59:6 Baro Devel, tou, kay hal o ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, oun o Israeleskro Devel, ste pre oun de kol menshen an i tsele vavar themma pengri phagi! Ma ab lačes ap kolende, kay phoukepangre hi!" 
Psalms59:7 Haki rat venn le pale oun nashenn čorrhanes troul o foro. Har djoukle denn le gole. 
Psalms59:8 Čilačepen vell dran lengro mouy vin. Lengre laba činenn har rhare. Yon patsenn, te shounell len kek." 
Psalms59:9 Tou, mo baro Devel, tou saneh pral lende. Ava, tou saneh pral kol menshende an kol tsele vavar themma." 
Psalms59:10 Tou hal miri zoor. Ap toute kamau me man te rikrell. Miro Devel, tou hal mange i zorelo kheer." 
Psalms59:11 Tou hal lačes ap mande. Tou hal ap miri rig oun moukeh man zorleder te vell har kolla, kay kamenn man te marell." 
Psalms59:12 Ma de len moulo, te bistrenn kova mire menshe gar! Trade len tiri zoryah, te nashenn le kate te kote! Stake len tele, tou, kay rikreh tiro vast pral mende." 
Psalms59:13 Yon praasenna oun rhorhenna. Hako labeha, hoy yon penenn, doukrenn le tout. Mouk lengro pre-phourdepen i shello lenge te vell, yaake te hounte perenn le, oun venn kokres dren pandlo." 
Psalms59:14 De len moulo an tiri bari rholi! De len moulo, te ačell lendar či, yaake te dikell hakeno ap i tseli phoub, kay tou, maro Devel, o ray hal pral o Israel." 
Psalms59:15 Oun haki rat venn le pale, nashenn troul o foro trouyel, oun denn gole har i djoukle," 
Psalms59:16 hoy nashenn trouyel, te rodenn le penge rhapen. Oun te venn le gar čalo, sikrenn le pengre danda." 
Psalms59:17 Me kamau tiri zoryatar te givell. Taysarlakro sharau tiro lačepen. Tou hal mange i zorelo kheer, oun i khatepen an kol divessa, kay mange ropaske hi." 
Psalms59:18 Tou hal miri zoor. Touke kamau te bashrell, miro Devel. Tou hal mange i zorelo kheer. Tou hal ko Devel, kay mange lačes hi." 
Psalms60:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre te givell pash o bashepen ap i doryengri bashepaskri. O David kras kay gili, te sikrell lo mende čomone." 
Psalms60:2 Yob kras lat an ko tsiro, har lo an o marepen his i menshentsa Aram dran Mesopotamia oun Soba. Har vas lo pale, maras o Yoab i Edomarya an i Londi Tala: deesh-te-douy zerya morshen." 
Psalms60:3 Miro Devel, tou čival men pale, oun tradal men kate te kote. Bari rholi hi tout ap mende. Rake mentsa pale lačes!" 
Psalms60:4 Tou kral, te trissas i phoub yaake, te phagas li. Kre lat pale tseles, te phagell li gar khetne!" 
Psalms60:5 Tou moukal tire menshen pharo koova te dikell. Tou dal men savi mool te piyell, te vam mato." 
Psalms60:6 Kolen, kay touha djivenna oun ap toute shounenna, sikral, har te nay nashenn le penge glan i lourdende." 
Psalms60:7 Ab ap mari rig tiro zorelo vasteha oun le men, tire malen, vin! Shoun, har dah ap toute gole!" 
Psalms60:8 O Devel penas an peskro kheer, kay yob djivell: “Me vom o zorleder”, “Me dau o foro Sichem mire menshende, oun ninna i tala Soukot." 
Psalms60:9 O them Gilead hi miro oun o them Manasse hi miro. O them Efrayim hi miri sasterni stadi, oun o them Youda hi kova, koles penepaske hi." 
Psalms60:10 O them Moab hi miro thopaskro čaro. Ap o them Edom vitsrau miro kirarh. Pral i Filistarya dau gole: Me hom o zorleder!” 
Psalms60:11 Koon anell man an ko zorelo foro? Koon anell man an o them Edom? 
Psalms60:12 Koon nay krell kova, har tou kokres, maro Devel? Tou moukal men oun djah gar vin mare lourdentsa an o kourepen." 
Psalms60:13 Ab tou ap mari rig oun le men vin dran i čilače vasta! Te hi menshe ap mari rig, hi kova čičeske oun či moldo." 
Psalms60:14 Maro Debleha krah mer baro koova. Oun yob stakrell kolen khetne, kay yaake zoreles ap mende djan." 
Psalms61:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell pash o bashepen ap i doryengri bashepaskri. O David kras kay gili." 
Psalms61:2 Shoun, miro Devel! Shoun miri gole! Shoun, har me tout mangau!" 
Psalms61:3 Dour kotar, kay khere hom, dau me ap toute gole, miro dji tapras i daar. Le tou man oun an man pre ap i baro zorelo bar." 
Psalms61:4 Pash toute nay khatrau man. Ava, har i baro zorelo kheer val tou mange, kay me man khatrau glan kolende, kay man palla lenn." 
Psalms61:5 Mouk man an tiro kheer te djivell hako tsiro, tel tire moussya man te khatrell, har i tikno čirklo khatrell pes tel peskri dakre moussya." 
Psalms61:6 Kova, hoy touke sovel dom, shounal tou, miro Devel, oun deh dran tiro bravlepen kolende, kay djivenn touha." 
Psalms61:7 De o baro rayes i rah djipen, de les boud bersha, te djivell lo gomme i rah tsiro." 
Psalms61:8 Yob te ačell o baro ray glan toute, miro Devel, hako tsiro! De tou an tiro lačepen oun čačepen yak ap leste!" 
Psalms61:9 Yaake kamau touke te givell hako tsiro, oun miri sovel te rikrell hako dives." 
Psalms62:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, o Yedoutoun. Kay gili kras o David." 
Psalms62:2 Pash o Debleste kokres hi miro djiyes kek daar, Yob vell ap miri rig." 
Psalms62:3 Yob hi mange har i baro zorelo kheer ap i barreskri berga, kay man khatrau, oun yob ap mande yak della, yaake te perap gar." 
Psalms62:4 Har rah djan t'mer lauter ap yek morsheste, te denn les moulo? Hom bouder či har i bango kheer, hoy kamell dren te phagell, oun koleskre barra bouder gar khetne rikrenna." 
Psalms62:5 T'menge djal an o shero trouyel, har nay krenn te perap khetne. O rhorhepen hi t'menge shoukar. T'mare mouyentsa rakrenn t'mer i barht vin pral yekeste, oun an t'mare djia rakrenn i bibarht pral leste." 
Psalms62:6 Pash o Debleste kokres hi miro djiyes kek daar! Djinau, yob hi, kay krell halauter mishto." 
Psalms62:7 Yob hi har i baro zorelo kheer ap i barreskri berga, kay man khatrau, oun yob ap mande yak della, yaake te perap gar." 
Psalms62:8 Miro Deblestar vell, te vap vin lino dran o čilačepen, oun te vap an-diklo. Lestar vell miri zoor, pash miro Debleste khatrau man." 
Psalms62:9 Dikenn ap leste hako tsiro, t'mer, leskre menshe! Čorenn t'mare djia vin glan leste! Pash o Debleste nay khatrah men." 
Psalms62:10 I menshe hi či har i dourho. Tikne har bare hi či moldo. Te vans le ap i vaga čiddo, vans le lauter khetne lino gar phareder har i dourho." 
Psalms62:11 Ma patsenn, te lenn bravlepen, te djan ap yekeste i zoryah pre! Ma patsenn, te krell t'men kova bravelo, hoy čoran! Ninna te venn bravleder oun bravleder, ma čivenn t'mare djia pre!" 
Psalms62:12 Boudeder har yek kopo shounom: O Devel kokres hi zorelo," 
Psalms62:13 oun leskro lačepen hi baro. Tou, miro ray deh hakenes pal kova, hoy yob kras." 
Psalms63:1 I gili o Davidestar. Yob kras kay gili an o moulo tato them Youda. 
Psalms63:2 Devel, tou hal miro Devel. Tout rodau me o djiyestar. Miro dji djal pal toute. Man hi troush pal toute har i trouk tato them troushell pal o pani." 
Psalms63:3 An tiro kheer rodau tout, kamoms te dikap tiri zoor oun tiro raylepen." 
Psalms63:4 Tiro lačepen hi mange boudeder moldo har o djipen. Doleske sharau tout. 
Psalms63:5 Me parkrau man pash toute yaake rah har me djivau. Oun me hadau mire vasta pre, te mangap tout an." 
Psalms63:6 Tou kreh miro dji yaake čalo oun barhtelo, har te rhap i shoukar rhapen. Miro mouy givell touke i gili oun sharell tout." 
Psalms63:7 Me te hom ap o čiben čiddo, veh tou mange an o shero. An i rat, kay me sovau gar, rakrau touha an miro dji." 
Psalms63:8 Tou val ap miri rig, Tou rikreh tiro vast pral mande, har i čirklo rikrell peskre moussya pral peskre ternende. Kote givau touke i barhtyatar i gili." 
Psalms63:9 Miro dji rikrell pes ap toute. Tiro čačo vast rikrell man. 
Psalms63:10 Kolla, kay kamenn man moulo te dell, mou merenn le, oun djan tele an o moulengro them!" 
Psalms63:11 Mou dell len o rharo moulo, oun i divye djoukle te rhan len!" 
Psalms63:12 O baro ray hi barhtelo pral o Debleste. Koon dell pes sovel glan o Debleste, kova nay sharell pes. Oun i rhorhenenge vell o mouy pandlo." 
Psalms64:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. O David kras kay gili. 
Psalms64:2 Miro Devel, shoun har ap toute rovau. Man hi daar glan kolende, kay kamenn man te marell. De yak ap miro djipen!" 
Psalms64:3 Kol čilače venn khetne oun rakrenn, har yon nay krenn mange čilačepen. Khate man, miro Devel, glan lengri rholi!" 
Psalms64:4 Lengre čipya hi har rhare, hoy mishto činenna, lengre laba doukrenn har fayle." 
Psalms64:5 Ap yek kopo denn le karye dran pengro khatepen ap koleste, kay o čačo drom djal, oun ladjenn pen gar." 
Psalms64:6 Yek krell o vavares zoreles an lengro čilačo koova. Oun yon rakrenn pen tele, har nay čivenn le dorya vin, te perenn i vavar dren, oun penenn pashel: “Koon dikell kova?”" 
Psalms64:7 Len hi čilačepen an o shero, oun penenn čorrhanes: “Yaake krah mer kova. Yaake djal kova mishto. Har goseve ham mer!”" 
Psalms64:8 O Devel dell ap lende karye. Sik hi le ap i phoub čiddo. 
Psalms64:9 Lengre laba kokres krenn, te san kolla pral lende, kay dikenn len." 
Psalms64:10 Oun lauteren taprell i daar, oun yon penenn: “Kava kras o Devel”, oun hayvenn, te vas kova lestar." 
Psalms64:11 Kolla, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, hi barhtelo pral o baro Debleste, oun rikrenn pen ap leste. Oun hakeno, kay shounell ap o Debleste o djiyestar, sharell pes leha." 
Psalms65:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. Kay gili kras o David. 
Psalms65:2 Tou, Devel, kay djiveh ap i berga Sion, tou hal moldo, te sharas tout, oun rikras mare sobya, hoy touke dam." 
Psalms65:3 Tou shouneh, hoy toutar mangah. Doleske venn i tsele menshe pash toute." 
Psalms65:4 Ko čilačepen, hoy krom, hi phares ap mande čiddo. Tou hal kova, kay i doosh krik lell." 
Psalms65:5 Har barhtelo hi kova, koles tou touke vin rodal, oun moukeh les pash toute te vell, te djivell lo ap i platsa glan tiro kheer. Kova vell čalo o lačepastar an tiro raylo kheer, kay tou djiveh." 
Psalms65:6 Tou rakreh mentsa dran baro koova, hoy tou kreh an tiri zoor oun an tiro čačepen. Tou, Devel, leh men vin dran o čilačepen. Ap toute dikenn i menshe ap i tseli phoub. Ninna kolla dikenn pal toute, kay djivenn pash i bare panya, hoy yaake dour krik hi." 
Psalms65:7 Tiri zoryah čival tou i berge zoreles ap i phoub, oun čival tiri bari zoor troul toute har i ripen." 
Psalms65:8 Tou peneh ap o divyo pani: “Mouk tele”, oun ap o pani, hoy dour pre djal: “Čip tout”, oun ap koy divyi gole, hoy i menshe an vavar themma krenna: “Ač kanna!”" 
Psalms65:9 Oun i menshenge ap i tseli phoub ačell o rakepen krik glan ko baro koova, hoy tou kral. Kotar, kay o kham pre djal bis kote, kay lo tele djal, moukeh tou halauteren te sal oun barhteles te vell." 
Psalms65:10 Tou djineh, hoy o themes hounte vell, oun deh yak, te vell les doha pani, oun kreh les braveles. Miro Devel, tout hi hako tsiro doha pani. Tou moukeh boud djob bares te vell i menshenge." 
Psalms65:11 Koy harhetikri phoub deh tou doha te piyell, oun kreh i phoub sapeno, oun deh brishin, te vell lauter bares." 
Psalms65:12 Tou deh boud lačo koova oun kreh, te vell o bersh i lačo bersh. Kote kay tou brishin dal, vell yaake boud lačo koova vin, te hi boudeder har doha koy." 
Psalms65:13 Kote, kay i bakre djan, hi lauter pherdo zenlepen, oun ap i berge shounah khelepen oun bashepen." 
Psalms65:14 O pralstouno them hi pherdo bakre. Oun ap o telstouno them hi o djob tardo pesso oun thoullo. Oun lauter stenn oun givenn. 
Psalms66:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. Sharenn o Debles ap i tseli phoub! 
Psalms66:2 Givenn leske, te vell leskro lab hadedo! Rakrenn vin, har raylo yob hi!" 
Psalms66:3 Penenn ap o Debleste: Har baro hi kova lauter, hoy tou kral. Kolla, kay tout gar kaman, hounte čivenn pen tele glan toute, glan tiri bari zoor!" 
Psalms66:4 Mou mangell tout i tseli phoub an oun sharell tout i gilyentsa, ava, mou sharenn le tiro lab." 
Psalms66:5 Avenn oun dikenn, hoy o Devel kras. I menshenge ačell o rakepen krik, te dikenn le, hoy kras lo ap lende." 
Psalms66:6 Dran o baro pani kras yob i trouk phoub. Yon nay djan mashkral ap i vavar rig. Pral kova givam i barhtyatar. 
Psalms66:7 Yob hi o baro ray hako tsireske. Leskri zoor pral i menshenge hi baro. Hake themma lell yob an o yak, te nay hadenn pen kolla gar, kay lestar tele peran." 
Psalms66:8 T'mer menshe an hake themma, sharenn maro Debles! T'mari sharepaskri gili te vell dour shounlo!" 
Psalms66:9 Yob rikras men ap o djipen, oun das yak, te peras gar." 
Psalms66:10 Tou, maro Devel, kamal te dikell, har maro dji ap toute rikrell. Doleske kral tou mentsa har o roupeha, hoy an yag thodo vell, te vell lo djoudjo." 
Psalms66:11 Tou moukal men pandlo te vell, oun čival menge pharo koova pre." 
Psalms66:12 Tou moukal menshe pral mende te vell, moukal men an i yag oun an o pani te djal. Oun palle anal tou men dran lauter vin oun dal men nevi zoor." 
Psalms66:13 Doleske kamau an tiro kheer te djal, te anap touke firhen, hoy touke rhačedo venna. Kamau te dap tout, hoy dom man sovel glan toute." 
Psalms66:14 Anau, hoy penom oun vin rakrom, har mange o djipen phares his." 
Psalms66:15 I thoulle bakrendar anau me touke, te venn le touke rhačedo. Ninna groumya oun bouzya anau glan toute. Te venn le rhačedo ap tiri rhačepaskri, djal i yagakro dourho pre pash toute." 
Psalms66:16 Avenn oun shounenn, t'mer lauter, kay ap o Debleste patsenna, te penap t'menge, hoy yob mange kras." 
Psalms66:17 Miro mouyeha dom gole ap leste, miri čipyah sharom les." 
Psalms66:18 Yob shounas miri gole, oun das yak ap kova, hoy lestar mangom. Te vals man čilačepen glan an miro dji, shounals man o Devel, miro ray, gar." 
Psalms66:19  
Psalms66:20 Sharedo vell miro Devel! Yob rissras pes gar krik miro mangepastar, oun las peskro lačepen gar mandar." 
Psalms67:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell pash o bashepen ap i doryengre bashepangre." 
Psalms67:2 Devel, kre tiro dji menge pre, oun čip tiri barht ap mende! Dik tou lačes ap mende!" 
Psalms67:3 Palle dikenn i menshe ap i tseli phoub, har tou sikreh men tiro drom. Oun i menshe an i tsele themma dikenn har tou leh men vin dran o čilačepen." 
Psalms67:4 Maro Devel, mou parkrenn pen pash toute i menshe dran hake themma, mou sharenn le tout halauter!" 
Psalms67:5 Mou stenn oun givenn le i barhtyatar: Te rakreh tou o čačepen vin pral lende, djah tou pal o čačepen. Pral hake themma ap i phoub hal tou o ray." 
Psalms67:6 Maro Devel, mou parkrenn pen pash toute i menshe dran hake themma, mou sharenn le tout halauter!" 
Psalms67:7 I phoub moukas lačo rhapen bares te vell; o Devel, maro Devel das men barht." 
Psalms67:8 Ava, o Devel das men barht. Mou hadenn les hake menshe ap i phoub!" 
Psalms68:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. O David kras kay gili. 
Psalms68:2 O Devel stell pre, oun tradell kolen krik, kay kamenn les gar; ava, kolla, kay hi rhoyedo ap leste, hounte nashenn lestar." 
Psalms68:3 Yaake har i yagakro dourho krik phourdedo vell, yaake phourdell yob len krik. Yaake har i momeli rhačrell tele oun bouder gar koy hi, yaake venn kol čilače bouder gar diklo glan o Debleste." 
Psalms68:4 Hi vavarčandes kolentsa, kay an o čačepen tardo hi: Yon venn barhtelo, stenn oun sanenn i barhtyatar glan o Debleste." 
Psalms68:5 Givenn o Debleske! Bashrenn oun hadenn leskro lab! Krenn leske i drom, koleske, kay oulerell ap o bolepen. Baro Devel hi leskro lab. Avenn barhtelo oun givenn glan leste!" 
Psalms68:6 O Devel, kay djivell an peskro raylo kheer, yob hi i dad kolenge, kolen kek dad bouder hi. Oun yob vell kol romyenge ap i rig, kolengro rom meras." 
Psalms68:7 Kolen, kay kokres hi, anell lo khere, kolen, kay stilde hi, lell lo vin dran o stilepen, te djal lenge pale mishto. Hi vavarčandes kolentsa, kay kamenn či lestar te djinell: Kolla hounte ačenn an o moulo them." 
Psalms68:8 Maro Devel, har djal tou glan tire menshende, oun anal len ap o drom mashkral o moulo tato them," 
Psalms68:9 kote trissas i phoub, oun o bolepen das baro brishin glan toute, o Debleste ap i berga Sinay, ava, glan o Debleste pral o Israel." 
Psalms68:10 Tou, maro Devel, dal doha brishin, oun moukal tiro tato themes pale pre te djivell," 
Psalms68:11 te djivan nay tire menshe kote. Tou, maro Devel, hal yaake lačo, te moukal kol čorvelen kote khere te vell." 
Psalms68:12 O baro Devel penas i lab; oun boud djouvya nashan oun penan ko shoukar koova, hoy djas:" 
Psalms68:13 “I bare raya nashenn penge, lengre lourde hi ap o naashepen, oun kova hoy yon hounte moukan čiddo, hi boudeder har boud. Oun khere denn i djouvya hakenes kolestar." 
Psalms68:14 Kamenn t'mer vin ap o them pash i bakre te ačell? Kote hi čomone čiddo, hoy vi-dikell har i roupene oun sonakangre čirklengre moussya.”" 
Psalms68:15 An ko tsiro, har o zorelo Devel i bare rayen dran o them tradas, peras gib ap i berga Zalmon." 
Psalms68:16 Baro hi i berga Bashan. Lat his boud bergetikre sherya. 
Psalms68:17 T'mer berge, t'mer bergetikre sherya, hoske zilverenn t'mer ap koy berga, kolat o Devel peske vin rodas, te djivell yob kote? Ava, hako tsireske ačell o baro Devel koy." 
Psalms68:18 Boud zerya vourdya hi o Debles. Lentsa vas lo ap i berga Sinay, oun djal dren an peskro kheer." 
Psalms68:19 Tou, Devel, djal pre an o pralstunepen oun lal stilde touha. Tou lal kouč koova kol menshendar, kay kaman či toutar te djinell. Tou, baro Devel, djiveh kote." 
Psalms68:20 Sharedo vell o Devel, maro ray, hako dives! Yob hidjrell menge o pharo koova, oun vell menge ap i rig." 
Psalms68:21 Men hi i Devel, kay menge koy hi. Yob hi o baro Devel, maro ray, kay lell men vin dran o merepen." 
Psalms68:22 Kolenge, kay les gar kamenna, stakrell lo o shero dren, hake čilačenge, kay moukenn gar pengro čilačepen." 
Psalms68:23 O Devel, miro ray, penas: Me anau len pale i bergatar Bashan, ninna dran o telstunepen o baro panyestar anau len pale pale." 
Psalms68:24 Yaake te thoveh tire herya an o rat kolendar, kay kaman tout te marell, oun tire djoukle piyenn les." 
Psalms68:25 Miro Devel, tou hal miro baro ray. Halauter dikenn har tou veh an tiri zoor, oun dren djah an tiro Debleskro kheer." 
Psalms68:26 I gipangre djan glan toute oun i bashepangre pal toute. Oun mashkral dren djan i terne ča oun denn pengre pauke. 
Psalms68:27 “Sharenn o Debles kote, kay peskre menshe khetne venna! Sharenn o baro Debles, t'mer, kay han dran o Israel.”" 
Psalms68:28 I menshe dran o kheer Benyamin, ko terneder čavo o Yakobeskre čavendar, djan glan i vavarende. Pal lende venn i pralstoune dran o kheer Youda pengre boud menshentsa, pal lende i pralstoune dran o kheer Zabulon oun dran o kheer Naftali." 
Psalms68:29 Biče tiri zoor, maro Devel, tiri zoor, hoy tou ap mende sikral!" 
Psalms68:30 Dran tiro Debleskro kheer an o foro Yerusalem, kay anenn touke i bare raya kouč koova," 
Psalms68:31 de ko themes Egiptia trad, ko divyo firhes pash o pani. Činge kol zorelentsa oun rayentsa pral boud menshende! Čip tout kolenge an o drom, kay pal o roup nashenna. Trade kol natsyone, kolenge o marepen shoukar hi." 
Psalms68:32 Dran o them Egiptia venn bičepangre pash toute, oun kolla dran o them Etiopia hadenn pengre vasta pre pash o Debleste." 
Psalms68:33 T'mer themma ap kay phoub, givenn o Debleske, bashrenn leske, maro rayeske!" 
Psalms68:34 Yob oulerell pral pre ap o bolepen, hoy hako tsiro koy his. Shounenn, har zoreles yob gole dell!" 
Psalms68:35 Hadenn o Debles! Yob hi o bareder. Leskro raylepen hi pral o Israel, oun leskri zoor djal bis ap i volke." 
Psalms68:36 Har baro hi o Devel an peskro Debleskro kheer! Yob hi o Israeleskro Devel, oun krell peskre menshen zoreles, oun dell len zoor pral vavar menshende. Sharedo vell o Devel!" 
Psalms69:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell pash o bashepen ap i shob-doryengri bashepaskri. Kay gili kras o David." 
Psalms69:2 Le man vin, mo Devel! O pani djal mange bis pash i meen." 
Psalms69:3 Me tassau an sapeni čik, mire herya hatsenn kek phoub, kay yon nay tardo ačans. Hom an pani, hoy dour tele djal. Oun zorele panya kamenn man tele te tserdell." 
Psalms69:4 Me dom gole, bis te man kek zoor bouder an mande his, oun miri meen doukas. Mire yaka van khino, yaake rah dikau pal miro Debleste." 
Psalms69:5 Boudeder har mire balla ap miro shero hi kolla, kay hi rhoyedo ap mande, ninna te krom me len či. Oun kolen, kay kamenn mange čilačepen, hi bari zoor, oun kamenn man te marell. Me krom len či, oun hounte dap kova pale, hoy me gar čorom." 
Psalms69:6 Miro Devel, tou djineh, har dinelo homs, oun prindjreh miri doosh, hoy ap mande anom." 
Psalms69:7 Ma mouk kolen pengro patsepen te nashrell, kay pen ap toute rikrenna, te dikenn le har djoungeles mange djala. Tou, baro Devel, kay hal o ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, ma mouk man te anap ladj ap kolende, kay tout rodenna, o Debles pral o Israel." 
Psalms69:8 Dran toute hi i bari ladj ap mande, oun miro shero hi lolo i ladjatar." 
Psalms69:9 Vom har i gadjo mire phralenge. I čave miri datar prindjrenn man bouder gar. 
Psalms69:10 Kamau tiro kheer yaake boud, te rhačell miro dji an mande har i yag. Oun kolla, kay praasenn tout, praasenn man ninna." 
Psalms69:11 Rovom oun kamom či te rhal, oun yon san man doleske vin." 
Psalms69:12 Har rivom i gono an, te sikrap har pharo miro dji hi, kran le i sapaskri gili pral mande." 
Psalms69:13 Ap i platsa, kay le khetne venn, rakrenn le pral mande. Oun mate givenn gilya pral mande." 
Psalms69:14 Me mangau tout, baro Devel, o tsiro hi kay, te vess mange lačes. Mo Devel, tiro lačepen hi baro! Shoun man, rike tiro lab oun ab ap miri rig!" 
Psalms69:15 Le man vin dran kay sapeni čik, te tassap gar dren, Le man vin dran i vasta kolendar, kay kamenn man te marell! Tserde man vin dran o pani, kay hi man bouder kek phoub tel i herya," 
Psalms69:16 te tserdenn man i zorele panya gar tele, oun me tassap. Ma mouk man te merell!" 
Psalms69:17 Shoun man, mo baro Devel, tiro lačepen hi mishto mange. Kre tiro dji mange dour pre oun dik ap mande!" 
Psalms69:18 Ma khate tout mandar, kay tiro boudepaskro hom! Me hom an bari daar, shoun man sik!" 
Psalms69:19 Ab pash mande oun le man vin! Le man vin dran i vasta kolendar, kay kamenn miro merepen." 
Psalms69:20 Tou prindjreh i ladj, hoy ap mande peras, tou djineh, har yon man praasan oun pal mande rakran. Kolla, kay mange o djipen phares krenn, hi lauter glan tire yaka." 
Psalms69:21 Kay ladj phagell miro dji, oun krell man nasselo. Patsom, te khaytoms me yekes, te vals yek kay, kay mange mire sva tele khossals. Na-a, kote his kek, gar yek, kay kova krals." 
Psalms69:22 Yon dan man i shoutlo rhapen, oun har his man troush, dan le man shout te piyell." 
Psalms69:23 An kol divessa, kay venn le khetne te rhan shoukar rhapen, mouk lengro rhapen lenge te vell i netsa, kay perenn le dren!" 
Psalms69:24 Lengre yaka te venn korelo, te nay dikenn le bouder či! Le lendar lengri zoor, te djan le bango." 
Psalms69:25 De lenge i phagi! Oun tiri bari rholi mou taprell len. 
Psalms69:26 Mou vell koy platsa paash dino, kay lengre plarhtene khera tardo hi, te djivell bouder kek mensho koy." 
Psalms69:27 Yon lenn koles palla, koles tou dal, oun lenge hi shoukar, te rakrenn le pral i douka oun dava, hoy tou les dal." 
Psalms69:28 Čin haki doosh lendar an i liil; yaake te moukess len tou gar an tiro čačepen te vell. 
Psalms69:29 Le lengre laba vin dran tiro liil, kay kolla dren činlo hi, kay o djipen lenna, te hi yon gar dren činlo khetne kolentsa, kay an o čačepen tardo hi." 
Psalms69:30 Me hom čorvelo oun man hi boud douka. Mo Devel, ab ap miri rig oun de ap mande yak!" 
Psalms69:31 I gilyah kamau tout te sharell, oun tiro lab te hadell, oun man pash toute te parkrell." 
Psalms69:32 Kova hi touke feteder har te anap touke i groumni, ava, i zorelo gouroum, te vell lo touke rhačedo." 
Psalms69:33 Te dikenn kova kolla, kay tele rikedo hi, venn le barhtelo. Oun kolenge, kay o Debles rodenna, djivell lengro dji pale pre." 
Psalms69:34 O baro Devel shounell i gole kolendar, kay tele-rikede hi, oun bistrell peskre pandle menshen gar." 
Psalms69:35 O bolepen oun i phoub sharenn les! Ninna i bare panya oun halauter, hoy dren djivell." 
Psalms69:36 O Devel vell o foreske Sion ap i rig, oun krell i forya an o them Youda pale neves. Leskre menshe djivenn kote, oun o them hi lengro." 
Psalms69:37 Oun i čave kolendar, kay hi o Debleske koy, lenn ko them. Oun kolla, kay o Debles o djiyestar kamenna, djivenn koy." 
Psalms70:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. O David kras kay gili, te bistrell les o Devel gar." 
Psalms70:2 Kre sik, mo Devel, te vess ap miri rig! Baro Devel, le man vin dran i čilače vasta!" 
Psalms70:3 Praasepen oun ladj mou vell ap kolende, kay kamenn man te marell! Kre, te djal kolenge gar, hoy yon penge glan lan, kay kamenn mange čilačepen. Kre, te sanenn i vavar pral lende!" 
Psalms70:4 Mou vell lengri ladj yaake baro, te hounte rissrenn le trouyel oun djan pale, – kolla lauter, kay sanenn pral mande." 
Psalms70:5 Barhtelo pral toute mou venn kolla lauter, kay pal toute poučenna, oun lengre djia mou givenna. Kolla, kay kamenn tout, kay tou lal len dran o čilačepen vin, te penenn le hako tsiro: Baro hi o Devel!" 
Psalms70:6 Me hom čorvelo oun bibarhtelo. Miro Devel, ab sik pash mande! Tou hal kova, kay hal ap miri rig, oun leh man vin dran lengre vasta. Baro Devel, mouk tout kek tsiro oun ab sik pash mande!" 
Psalms71:1 Baro Devel, me rikrau man ap toute. Mouk man gar čičeske pash toute te vell!" 
Psalms71:2 Tou kreh, hoy čačo hi. Doleske ab tou ap miri rig oun le man vin dran i čilače vasta! Shoun miri gole oun rike man!" 
Psalms71:3 Ab mange har i baro zorelo bar, pash koleste nay nashau oun man khatrau! Tou dal tiro lab, te vess ap miri rig. Tou hal mange har i baro zorelo kheer ap i barreskri berga, kay nay khatrau man." 
Psalms71:4 Miro Devel, le man vin dran i vasta i čilačendar, oun kolendar, kay o čačepen stakrenna, oun i vavaren i zoryah tele rikrenna." 
Psalms71:5 Miro ray, tou baro Devel, ap toute dikau, foun tiknes pre patsom ap toute." 
Psalms71:6 Miro tselo djipen rikrom man ap toute. Yaake rah har boldo vom, rikral tou tire vasta pral mande. Tout kamau me te sharell hako dives." 
Psalms71:7 Ninna te patsenn boud, kay praasal tou man, hal tou mange har i zorelo kheer, kay nay khatrau man." 
Psalms71:8 O tselo dives kamau te sharap tout oun givap touke gilya. 
Psalms71:9 Kanna, kay phouro hom, ma mouk mandar! Ma dja mandar kanna, kay hi bouder kek zoor an mande!" 
Psalms71:10 Kolla, kay mange čilačepen kamenn, rakrenn pal mande. Kolla, hoy kamenn mange o djipen te lell, rakrenn khetne," 
Psalms71:11 oun penenn: “O Devel djas peske lestar. Las les palla oun tapras les! Kek hi koy, kay les dran mare vasta vin lell.”" 
Psalms71:12 Miro Devel, ab gar dour mandar! Kre sik, oun ab ap miri rig!" 
Psalms71:13 Mou venn le tele vitsedo oun merenn, kolla, kay mange o čilačepen kamenn. Praasepen oun ladj mou vell ap kolende, kay kamenn miri bibarht." 
Psalms71:14 Me dikau hako tsiro ap toute oun sharau tout boud oun boudeder. 
Psalms71:15 Me penau i vavarenge, har čačo tire dromma hi. Hako dives rakrau pral o lačepen, hoy tou lauter kral. Kova hi boudeder har nay hayvau." 
Psalms71:16 Me vau oun rakrau pral o zorelo koova, hoy tou kral, miro ray, baro Devel, oun sharau či vavar har tiro čačepen." 
Psalms71:17 Miro Devel, tou hal miro sikepaskro foun tiknes pre, oun ninna kanna rakrau me pral ko baro koova, hoy tou lauter kral." 
Psalms71:18 Ninna kanna, kay phouro vom, oun mire balla parno van, ma dja mandar, miro Devel! Kamau te penap i čavengre čavenge oun lauterenge, kay pal lende venna, har zorelo tou hal." 
Psalms71:19 Miro Devel, tiro čačepen djal bis pash o bolepen. Tou, kay kreh baro koova, koon hi yaake har tou, miro Devel?" 
Psalms71:20 Tou moukal boud oun bari daar ap mande te vell. Oun tou deh man pale nevo djipen, oun aneh man pale vin dran o telstunepen i phoubyatar." 
Psalms71:21 Tou kreh man an-diklo, oun khosseh mire sva tele." 
Psalms71:22 Yaake kamau me man pash toute te parkrell o bashepah ap i doryengri bashepaskri, kay rikral tou tiro lab, miro Devel. O bashepah ap i harfa kamau touke gilya te givell. Tou kokres hal o čačo Devel, ko Devel pral o Israel." 
Psalms71:23 Tou lal miro djipen vin dran o merepen. Doleske dau gole i barhtyatar oun givau touke gilya. 
Psalms71:24 Hako dives penau doureder, har tou rikral pash mande. Oun kolla, kay kaman miri bibarht, hounte venn tikno oun ladjenn pen." 
Psalms72:1 I gili o Salomestar. Mo Devel, de tiro čačepen o baro rayeste an o dji, te rakrell lo o čačepen yaake har tou o čačepen rakrals." 
Psalms72:2 Kre lestar i čačepaskro ray, kay dell koles o čačepen, kones čačo hi, ninna te hi lo čorvelo." 
Psalms72:3 Kote, kay yob o baro ray hi, djivenn i menshe i lačo djipen o Debleha, oun čačepen vell an o tselo them, ninna ap peskre tikne oun bare berge." 
Psalms72:4 O baro ray mou rakrell i čorvelenge mishto, oun vell ap i rig kolendar, kay tele rikedo venn, oun stakrell kolen khetne, kay len doukrenna." 
Psalms72:5 Mouk les te djivell yaake rah har o kham oun o čon ap o bolepen hi, oun yaake rah har menshe ap i phoub hi!" 
Psalms72:6 Mouk les te vell har o brishin, hoy perell ap i phoub, har o pani, hoy krell o them sapeno." 
Psalms72:7 Palle djal mishto kolenge, kay an o čačepen tardo hi. Oun i menshe djivenn lačes khetne, bis te o čon bouder gar koy hi." 
Psalms72:8 Oun yob vell o baro ray pral i tsele themma, foun yek baro pani bis pash o vavar baro pani." 
Psalms72:9 Glan leste moukenn pen kolla tele te perell, kay an o moulo tato them djivenna. Oun kolla, kay les gar kamenna, hounte čivenn pen glan leste an i čik." 
Psalms72:10 I bare raya, kay djivenn an o foro Tarsis oun an i panyeskre themma, kolla anenn leske kouč koova. Ninna i bare raya pral i forya Saba oun Seba bičrenn leske shoukar koova." 
Psalms72:11 I tsele bare raya perenn tele ap i phoub glan leste. Oun i tsele natsyone boudrenn leske. 
Psalms72:12 Yob hi kova, kay shounell o čorveles, kay dell gole, oun lell les dran i bibarht vin, oun vell ap i rig kolestar, kones kek hi, hoy leske koy hi." 
Psalms72:13 Kolen, kay kek zoor hi oun kolla, kay čorvelo hi, ap kolende hi lo lačo oun dell yak, te ačenn le djido." 
Psalms72:14 Yob lell len vin dran o vast kolendar, kay lenge o djipen phares kran. Oun kolendar, kay len dava dan, lell lo len krik. Lengro djipen hi leske boud moldo." 
Psalms72:15 Rah djivell o baro ray! Denn les o sonakay dran o them Saba! Mangenn leske lačepen o Deblestar hako tsiro! Rakrenn o Debleskri barht vin pral leste hako dives! 
Psalms72:16 An o them mouk boud djob bares te vell, te hi lo tardo bis pral ap i berge, yaake har o veesh ap i berga Libanon. An i forya mou venn yaake boud menshe har o zenlepen ap o them!" 
Psalms72:17 Leskro lab mou ačell hako tsireske. Yaake rah har o kham ap o bolepen hi, mou vell leskro lab sharedo! Lestar mou vell lačepen ap i menshende an i tsele themma. Oun yon te rakrenn i barht pral leste vin." 
Psalms72:18 Sharas o baro Debles, ko Debles pral o Israel. Yob kokres krell baro oun zorelo koova!" 
Psalms72:19 Sharas leskro baro raylo lab hako tsiro! Leskro raylepen mou vell diklo an i tsele themma! Amen, yaake te vell kova!" 
Psalms72:20 Kate herenn pre o Davideskre gilya, kolentsa yob o Debles an-mangas. O Davideskro dad his o Isay." 
Psalms73:1 I gili, hoy o Asaf kras. O Devel hi lačo ap o Israel, ap lauterende, kolen i djoudjo dji hi." 
Psalms73:2 Vals sik, kay peroms o Debleskro dromestar tele. Mire herya his bouder gar zoreles tardo," 
Psalms73:3 har dikom, te djal i čilačenge yaake mishto. Me zilverom ap kolende, kay krenn pen baro." 
Psalms73:4 Kek douka hi len, sasto oun pesso hi le." 
Psalms73:5 Lenge djal gar djoungeles har i vavar menshenge. Yon hounte marenn pen gar tele har i vavar menshe. 
Psalms73:6 Doleske hi le pre-phourdo, Lengro sharepen hi har i verkli troul i meen. Oun lengro čilačo koova hi lengro ripen." 
Psalms73:7 Dran lengre djia vell čilačepen. Oun yon krenn lauter pal pengro shero. 
Psalms73:8 Lenge hi či moldo. Yon rakrenn pral lauter čilačes. Bare labentsa rikrenn le i menshen tele. 
Psalms73:9 Yon krenn pengro mouy pre, te čingrenn le ap o bolepen. Oun hoy le penenn, hounte vell kerdo ap i phoub." 
Psalms73:10 Doleske nashenn lenge leskre menshe palla, oun piyenn lengre laba har pani." 
Psalms73:11 Yon penenna: “Har shounell nay o Devel kava? Har hayvell lo kova, yob, kay pral an o bolepen hi?”" 
Psalms73:12 Yaake hi kol čilače. Len hi i shoukar djipen. Bravleder oun bravleder venn le. 
Psalms73:13 His kova čičeske, kay rikrom miro dji djoudjo, oun anom kek doosh ap mande?" 
Psalms73:14 Man hi douka hako dives, haki tsalla hayvau tire dava." 
Psalms73:15 Te penoms me: Kamau ninna yaake te rakrell har yon, palle phoukroms o Debleskre čaven." 
Psalms73:16 Koy lom mange tsiro, te nay hayvap kava, oun phares his kova an mire yaka," 
Psalms73:17 bis te djom an o Debleskro kheer. Kote hayvom, hoy ap lende vella:" 
Psalms73:18 Čačepah, tou čival len ap i sapeni phoub, kay hounte perenn le." 
Psalms73:19 Ap yek kopo hi le bouder gar koy. Lengro merepen nay vals gar djoungleder! 
Psalms73:20 Yon hi har i souni, hoy yek bistrell, te stell lo pre. Yaake bistreh tou len ap ko tsiro, kay hadeh tout tou, baro Devel." 
Psalms73:21 Har doukas man an miro dji, oun čourye das an mire bouke," 
Psalms73:22 koy homs dinelo oun hayvom či. Ava, dinleder har i firho homs glan toute." 
Psalms73:23 Kanna ačau hako tsiro pash toute. Tou rikreh man pash miro čačo vast. 
Psalms73:24 Tou aneh man ap ko drom, hoy tout mange hi. Oun pal miro djipen ap kay phoub leh tou man pash toute an tiro raylepen." 
Psalms73:25 Te hi man tout, poučau či pal o bolepen, oun vitar gar pal i phoub." 
Psalms73:26 Te djal i zoor peske dran mande, oun miro dji bouder gar zorelo hi, palle ačeh tou, miro Devel, hako tsiro miri zoor oun miro bravlepen." 
Psalms73:27 Koon toutar krik djal, djal tele. Oun koon moukell tout, koles aneh an o moulengro them." 
Psalms73:28 Mange hi mishto, te rikrap man ap miro Debleste. Te vap pash toute, miro ray, baro Devel, kova hi miri barht, te rakrap halauterestar, hoy tou kral." 
Psalms74:1 Givede laba o Asafestar. Maro Devel, hoske čival tou men pale hako tsireske? Hoske hal tou yaake rhoyedo pral mende? Tou hal maro bakrengro, oun mer ham tire bakre!" 
Psalms74:2 Ma biste gar, te ham kol menshe, kay tou touke glan i rah tsiro vi-rodal. Tou ginal men vin dran i vasta kolendar, kay men tele rikran. Tou kamal, te vas mer tiro. Ma biste i berga Sion, hoy touke vi-rodal, te djivess kote." 
Psalms74:3 Ab kay oun dik kol barra čiddo, hoy tiro kheer his. Halauter hi paash dino kolendar, kay hadan pen pral toute." 
Psalms74:4 Bari gole dan le an tiro kheer, oun čivan kol plarhte pre, hoy sikrenn, te hi yon i zorleder." 
Psalms74:5 Mer dikam, har hadan le pengro tover, har te dans le kasht tiknes an o veesh." 
Psalms74:6 Ko tselo kouč koova, hoy dran o kasht vi-činlo vas, dan le paash. Pengro tover oun o saster dan le dren." 
Psalms74:7 Tiro raylo kheer rhačran le tele. Ko kheer, kay tou khere hals, kran le pale-čiddo," 
Psalms74:8 oun penan penge an pengre djia: “Kras lenge yaake, te ačell lendar bouder či.” An o tselo them rhačran le o Debleskre khera tele." 
Psalms74:9 Kek sikepen hi bouder kay, hoy men sikrell, te hal tou pash mende. Kek Debleskro rakepaskro hi bouder kay. Oun kek djinella, har rah kova yaake ačell." 
Psalms74:10 Miro Devel, har rah moukeh tou len pal toute te sal? Moukeh tou len hako tsiro tiro lab te praasell?" 
Psalms74:11 Har rah rikreh tou tout pale, oun sikreh len gar tiro vast?" 
Psalms74:12 Miro Devel, foun tiknes pre hal miro baro ray. Toutar vell, te venn i menshe vin lino dran i bibarht." 
Psalms74:13 Tiri bari zoryah phagal o baro pani pre, stakral i sherya kol bare panyeskre sapendar dren." 
Psalms74:14 Tou stakral i sherya ko baro firhestar Leviatan paash, oun dal leskro mass i divye firhenge te rhal." 
Psalms74:15 Tou moukal pani te nashell, kay kek his. Oun kote, kay zorele panya nashan, hi le kanna bouder gar koy." 
Psalms74:16 Tiro hi o dives, oun tiro hi i rat. Tou dal o kham oun o čon pengro drom, kay te djan le." 
Psalms74:17 Tou penal, har baro i phoub te vell. I niyal oun o vend kral tou." 
Psalms74:18 Kanna, baro Devel, mouk touke an o shero te vell, har praasenn tout kolla, kay hadan pen pral toute. Dik, har dinele menshe tiro lab an i čik tserdenna." 
Psalms74:19 Mer ham har i tikno čirklo. De men gar i divye firhen te rhal! Ma biste men gar hako tsireske, men, tire menshen, kay palla lino venn!" 
Psalms74:20 Biste gar koy sovel, hoy tou men dal, te rikreh tou pash mende! An o tselo them vell djoungelo oun čilačo koova kerdo an o khatepen." 
Psalms74:21 Ma mouk kolen i ladjah penge te djal, kay palla lino hi! Kre, te sharenn i čorvele oun tikne tiro lab!" 
Psalms74:22 Ste pre, miro Devel, oun kre o čačepen vin! Dik ko praasepen, koleha tout kol dinele hako dives praasenna." 
Psalms74:23 Ma biste gar koy bari gole kolendar, kay hadan pen pral toute! Shoun, har divyo yon hi! Lengri gole vell bareder oun bareder." 
Psalms75:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell har koy gili Ma mare men. Kay gili kras o Asaf." 
Psalms75:2 Mer sharah tout, maro Devel. Mer parkrah men pash toute, te hal pash mende, oun rakrah halauterestar, hoy tou kral an tiri bari zoor." 
Psalms75:3 “Te vas miro tsiro”, penell o Devel, “rakrau o čačepen vin pral hakeneste." 
Psalms75:4 Ninna te trissell i phoub oun lauter, kay djivell koy pre, me rikrau lat, te ačell li zoreles tardo.”" 
Psalms75:5 Me penom ap kolende, hoy pen bares krenn: Ma phourdenn t'men yaake pre! Oun ap i čilačende penom: Ma hadenn t'men!" 
Psalms75:6 Ačenn! Ma hadenn t'men! Moukenn tele t'maro čilačo rakepah! 
Psalms75:7 Čačo barepen vell gar kotar, kay o kham pre-djala, oun gar kotar, kay o kham tele djala, vitar gar dran o moulo tato them." 
Psalms75:8 Na-a, o Devel hi o čačepaskro ray, kay ko yekeske i zoor krik lell, oun o vavares bares krell." 
Psalms75:9 O baro Debles hi o khoro an o vast pherdo zoreli mool, hoy yob dren čoras. Oun i tsele čilače ap kay phoub hounte piyenn lat, bis te bouder kek mool an o khoro hi." 
Psalms75:10 Me kamau o Deblestar te rakrell hako tsiro. Oun leske, ko Yakobeskro Debleske, givau oun bashrau." 
Psalms75:11 Maro Devel, tou phageh i zoor i čilačendar, oun deh i zoor kolen, kay an o čačepen tardo hi." 
Psalms76:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell pash o bashepen ap i doryengre bashepangre. O Asaf kras kay gili." 
Psalms76:2 An o them Youda prindjrell hakeno o Debles, an o tselo them Israel hi lo prindjedo." 
Psalms76:3 An o foro Yerusalem vas leskro kheer kerdo, kote ap i berga Sion djivell lo." 
Psalms76:4 Kote phagas yob o marepaskre koola: i fayle, i shilte oun i rhare." 
Psalms76:5 Tou hal rayleder oun bareder har i berge, hoy hako tsiro ačenna." 
Psalms76:6 I zorele morsha van vi-čoredo oun meran. Oun i kourepangre lan pengre moussya gar pre. 
Psalms76:7 Har dal tou len trad, tou, o Yakobeskro Devel, peran i graya oun kolla, kay ap lende beshdo hi, an o sopen." 
Psalms76:8 Glan toute kokres hounte vell men daar. Koon nay ačell tardo glan toute, tou te rhoyreh tout?" 
Psalms76:9 Tou rakral dran o bolepen i phagi vin pral i phoub. Oun i phoub trashas oun penas kek lab," 
Psalms76:10 har o Devel pre stas, te rakrell lo o čačepen vin, oun te vell lo halauterenge ap i rig, kay tikno rikedo van ap kay phoub." 
Psalms76:11 Te hadenn pen rhoyede menshe pral toute, maro Debleste, vell diklo, har baro tou hal. Oun kova, hoy pral ačell lengri rholyatar, hi touke har i shoukar ripen, hoy riveh." 
Psalms76:12 Denn t'men sovel, te denn čomone o baro Debleste, kay t'maro Devel hi. Oun rikrenn t'mari sovel! Anenn leske kouč koova, t'mer dran i tsele themma, kay troul leste hi. Yob hi kova, kolestar hakeno darella." 
Psalms76:13 Yob pandell i pralstunenge pengro baro mouy, oun i bare rayenge ap kay phoub krell lo traash." 
Psalms77:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, o Yedoutoun. Kay gili kras o Asaf." 
Psalms77:2 Me dau gole ap miro Debleste, dau bari gole ap leste. Ava, ap o Debleste dau gole, bis te shounell lo man." 
Psalms77:3 An miri bari daar rodom me o baro Debles. Rati rikrom miro vast pre pash leste oun moukom gar tele. Miro dji rovas oun kamas gar tele te moukell. 
Psalms77:4 Har djas mange o Devel an o shero, phagas miro dji. Har rakrom miro djiyeha, van mange i sva." 
Psalms77:5 Mire yaka rikral tou pre, yaake te nay sovom me gar. Me djinom gar doureder, oun man his bouder kek laba." 
Psalms77:6 Mange vas o phouro tsiro an o shero, kol bersha, hoy glan i rah tsiro his, stan an mande pre." 
Psalms77:7 Rati djas mange boud an o shero trouyel, rakrom miro djiyeha oun rodom te hayvap:" 
Psalms77:8 Bistras o baro Devel men hako tsireske? Vell lo menge bouder gar lačo? 
Psalms77:9 Hi leskro lačepen menge gar bouder koy? Las yob peskro lab pale? 
Psalms77:10 Krell o Devel bouder gar peskro dji menge pre? Hi lo yaake rhoyedo, te pandas lo peskro dji menge?" 
Psalms77:11 Kote penom me: Kava hi miro nasslepen, te kras pes o Devel vavarčandes. I zoor o pralstunestar vell bouder gar diklo." 
Psalms77:12 Kanna moukau mange kova an miro shero te djal, hoy tou, baro Devel, kral, ava, penau mange ko baro oun zorelo koova, hoy kral an tiri bari zoor." 
Psalms77:13 Oun rakrau miro djiyeha pral kova lauter, hoy tou kral, pale te pale penau mange kova." 
Psalms77:14 Miro Devel, halauter, hoy tou kreh, hi čačo. Kek vavar devel hi yaake zorelo har tou." 
Psalms77:15 Tou hal ko Devel, kay savo baro koova krell, hoy kek vavar nay krella. Tou sikral tiri bari zoor pash i menshende an vavar themma." 
Psalms77:16 Tiri zoryah lal tou tire menshen vin dran lende. Ava, kolla, kay van pal o Yakob oun pal o Yosef lal tou vin." 
Psalms77:17 I bare panya dikan tout, mo Devel. Har dikan le tout, tapras len i daar, oun yon trissan. Ninna an o telstunepen vas o pani divyo." 
Psalms77:18 Dran o bolepen das baro zorelo brishin. O bolepen das bari gole, oun i yag das karye ap o bolepen kate oun kote." 
Psalms77:19 Tou kral bari gole ap o bolepen. Koy yag ap o bolepen kras i rat har te vals dives. I phoub trissas i daryatar. 
Psalms77:20 Tou djal mashkral o baro pani. Tire herya djan an o telstouno pani. Oun kek nay dikas, kay tire herya stakran." 
Psalms77:21 Tou djal glan tire menshende yaake har i bakrengro djal glan peskre bakrende, oun rodal o Moses oun o Arones vin, te djan le glan lende ap o drom." 
Psalms78:1 Givede laba o Asafestar. Mire menshale, shounenn, hoy t'menge penau! Shounenn mishto ap mire laba!" 
Psalms78:2 Me kamau te rakrap i goseve labentsa pral i phoure tsirya. 
Psalms78:3 Kova, hoy mer shounam oun djinah, oun hoy mare phoure menge penan," 
Psalms78:4 kova kamah gar te khatrell glan mare čavende; na-a, kolenge, kay pal mende venna, kamah te penell, har zorelo o baro Devel hi oun havo baro koova yob kras an peskri zoor." 
Psalms78:5 Yob sikras o Yakobeskre čavende, har te djivenn le. Oun sikras i Israelende peskro drom. Mare phourenge penas lo, te sikrenn yon pengre čavende, har te djan le leskro drom." 
Psalms78:6 Yaake te djinenn les kolla, kay pal lende venna, kolla, kay gomme gar bolde hi. Yon ninna sikrenn o Debleskro drom pengre čavende," 
Psalms78:7 yaake te rikrenn yon pengro tselo djiyeha ap o Debleste, oun bistrenn gar, hoy o Devel lauter kras, oun rikrenn lauter, hoy yob penas," 
Psalms78:8 yaake te venn le gar har pengre phoure, kay o Debleskro dromestar tele peran, oun kaman gar te shounell. Kolengre djia his gar zorelo, oun yon his gar pengro tselo djiyeha pash o Debleste." 
Psalms78:9 Yaake his i morsha dran o kheer Efrayim: Ninna le hayvan le mishto o bogeha trouyel te djal, nashan le penge ap o dives, kay o kourepen hi." 
Psalms78:10 Yon rikran pen gar ap o Debleskre laba, hoy yob lentsa vin kras, oun kaman gar ap leskro drom te djal." 
Psalms78:11 Yon bistran, hoy yob lauter kras, – ko tselo baro koova, hoy yob ap lende kras oun hoy kek vavar nay krella." 
Psalms78:12 Glan lengre phourende kras yob baro zorelo koova an o them Egiptia, pash o foro Soan." 
Psalms78:13 Yob kras i drom an o baro pani, oun moukas len mashkral ap i vavar rig te djal. Ap kol douy rigya his o pani pral tardo har i kheer." 
Psalms78:14 Ap o dives djas lo glan lende an i folka, oun rati an i yag, te vas len i momeli." 
Psalms78:15 An o moulo tato them phagas lo bare barra, oun das len pani te piyell, boudeder har doha hakeneske." 
Psalms78:16 Yob moukas panya te vell dran i bare barra, te nashan le tele har bare lengste panya." 
Psalms78:17 Ninna te kras lo kova lauter lenge, shounan le gar ap leste, oun an o moulo tato them hadan le pen ap leste, ko pralstuneste." 
Psalms78:18 An pengre djia patsan le gar, te nay dals len o Devel ko rhapen, pal kova len bok his." 
Psalms78:19 Oun yon rakran pal o Debleste oun penan: “Nay dell men o Devel rhapen kate an o moulo tato them? 
Psalms78:20 Kova hi čačo: Yob phagas o baro bar, oun boud pani vas vin oun nashas tele kate te kote pral o them. Nay dell lo men ninna maro? Hayvell lo peskre menshenge mass te anell?”" 
Psalms78:21 Har o baro Devel kova shounas, vas lo rhoyedo ap o Yakobeskre čavende. Peskri rholi vas ap o Israel har i yag." 
Psalms78:22 Yon patsan gar, te hi lengro Devel ap lengri rig, oun dikan gar ap leste, te dell lo len, hoy len hounte vell." 
Psalms78:23 Oun yob rakras zoreles ap i volke oun kras i bolepaskre voudya pre," 
Psalms78:24 oun das len bolepaskro djob te rhal, hoy kharell Manna. Kova peras tele ap lende, har brishin tele perell ap i phoub." 
Psalms78:25 Ava, maro, hoy i bolepangre rhan, das lo lende lauterende. Boud rhapen das lo len oun kras len čalo." 
Psalms78:26 Yob bičras i baro dourho, hoy phourdas kotar, kay o kham pre djal. Oun peskri zoryah tradas lo i vavar dourho pash lende, hoy phourdas kotar, kay o kham pralstounes hi," 
Psalms78:27 Oun o dourho anas boud boud čirklen peha, te vell len mass te rhal, yaake boud čirkle har i santa pash o baro pani." 
Psalms78:28 Mashkral ap i platsa peran le, kote, kay lengre plarhtene khera tardo hi." 
Psalms78:29 Kote das lo len, hoy yon kaman, oun yon rhan oun van čalo," 
Psalms78:30 Har his le gomme pash o rhapen oun mass an lengro mouy," 
Psalms78:31 koy vas o Debleskri rholi pral lende, oun yob maras lengre pralstunen, oun i terne zorele morshen i Israelendar moukas lo te merell." 
Psalms78:32 Ninna te dikan le kova lauter, anan le pale te pale doosh ap pende, oun patsan gar ap lauter, hoy kras yob an peskri bari zoor." 
Psalms78:33 Koy kras lo, te djal lengro djipen sik trouyel, oun lengre bersha his pherdi daar." 
Psalms78:34 Te anas lo o merepen pral lende, rodan le o Debles, oun poučan pale pal leste." 
Psalms78:35 Oun lenge vas an o shero, te hi o Devel kova, kay rikrell len, oun kay yob, o Devel pral halauter, kova hi, kay len vin lell dran o merepen." 
Psalms78:36 Kova, hoy le leske penan, his rhorhedo. oun lengre laba his rhorhepen." 
Psalms78:37 Pengre djiyentsa his le gar pash leste, oun ap leskre laba, hoy le leha vin kran, rikran le gar pengro tselo djiyeha." 
Psalms78:38 Yob kras lenge peskro dji pre, oun maras len gar. Na-a, yob las lendar i doosh tele. Boud kope rikras yob peskri rholi pale, oun moukas gar peskri tseli rholi ap lende te vell." 
Psalms78:39 Yob djinas, te hi le menshe, kay hounte merenn, oun hi sik bouder gar koy, yaake har i dourho, hoy djal oun gar pale vella." 
Psalms78:40 Boud kope hadan le pen ap leste an o moulo tato them, oun doukran leskro dji." 
Psalms78:41 Pale te pale kaman le te dikell, hoy yob hayvella. Yaake dan le leske an o dji, koleske, kay kokres o čačo Devel hi, o Devel pral o Israel." 
Psalms78:42 Yon bistran leskri bari zoor oun ko dives, har las lo len vin dran i čilače vasta." 
Psalms78:43 Lenge vas gar an o shero, har sikras lo peskri bari zoor an o them Egiptia, oun havo baro koova yob kras pash o foro Soan." 
Psalms78:44 Kote kras lo, te vas o pani an o Nil rat, te nay piyan i Egiptarya gar dran pengre panya." 
Psalms78:45 Oun yob bičras matsille an lengro them, hoy len dandran, oun djambe, hoy o them khandlo kran." 
Psalms78:46 Lengro djob rhan i stepangre pre. Kolla rhan lauter, hoy ap lengri phoub bares vas." 
Psalms78:47 Oun lengre drakengre rouka das i barrengro brishin paash, oun lengre faygetikre rouka o djayedo pani." 
Psalms78:48 I brishineskre barra dan lengre groumyen moulo, oun koy yag, hoy pral oun tele djas ap o bolepen, das i bakren moulo." 
Psalms78:49 Yaake bičras o Devel peskri bari rholi ap i Egiptarya. Leskri rholi his har i yag, hoy rhačras, oun i bari phagi pral lende anas. I bibarht tapras len har te vals lat bičedo i bolepangrendar, kay anenn o merepen." 
Psalms78:50 Oun o Devel rikras peskri rholi gar pale, oun las len gar vin dran o merepen, oun moukas len te merell ap i djoungelo nasslepen." 
Psalms78:51 Yob maras i tsele phoureder morsh čaven an o them Egiptia, kol čaven kolendar, kay venna pal o Ham, an kolende pengre dadengri bareder zoor hi." 
Psalms78:52 Palle anas yob peskre menshen vin, oun djas glan lende har i bakrengro djal glan peskre bakre, oun sikras len o drom an o moulo tato them." 
Psalms78:53 Yob rikras peskre vasta pral lende. Oun len hounte vas kek daar. Oun kolla, kay len palla lan, an o baro pani yon tassan." 
Psalms78:54 Yob anas len an o them, hoy yob peske vi-rodas, pash kay berga, hoy yob peskri zoryah dren las." 
Psalms78:55 Yob tradas i tsele vavar menshen glan lende vin, oun das lengro them peskre menshende, hakeneste kol deesh-te-douy bare familyendar das lo lengro kotar, te vell ko them lengro. An i plarhtene khera kol vavar menshendar moukas lo i Israelitaryen te djivell." 
Psalms78:56 Kolla hadan pen pale te pale ap o Debleste, ko pralstuneste, oun kaman gar ap leste te shounell, oun rikran gar leskre laba." 
Psalms78:57 Yon peran lestar tele. Oun yaake har lengre phoure menshe kran, kran yon ninna, oun kaman o Deblestar bouder či te djinell. Či-moldo his le har i bogo, koleskri dori bouder gar zorelo hi." 
Psalms78:58 Yon mangan i vavarengre deblen an. Oun rhoyran o Debles, har kran le penge rhorhene deblen." 
Psalms78:59 Har o Devel kova shounas, vas lo yaake rhoyedo, te das lo o Israel pre."
