Psalms78:60 Oun yob moukas peskro kheer an o foro Shilo, kote, kay yob mank peskre menshende djivas." 
Psalms78:61 Oun ko sonakaskro morhton, hoy sikras peskri zoor oun peskro raylepen, moukas lo an i vasta kolendar te perell, kay kouran pen peskre menshentsa." 
Psalms78:62 Oun peskre menshen das yob an lengre vasta, te marenn le len o rhareha. Yaake rhoyedo his lo ap lende." 
Psalms78:63 I terne morshen rhas i yag. Oun i terne ča nay hatsan bouder kek romes. 
Psalms78:64 I rashaya van maredo o rhareha, oun lengre romya nay rovan gar pral pengre moule romende." 
Psalms78:65 Koy stas o baro Devel pre, har yek, kay sovas oun pre djangras. Zorelo his lo har yek, kay pash i pipen barhtelo vas." 
Psalms78:66 Oun yob das kolen, kay kouran pen peskre menshentsa oun tradas len pale. Lengri ladj ačas hako tsireske ap lende." 
Psalms78:67 O Yosefeskre čaven las yob gar, te venn lendar i pralstoune pral o Israel, vitar gar rodas lo peske i menshen dran o kheer Efrayim vin." 
Psalms78:68 Na-a, i menshen dran o kheer Youda rodas lo peske vin, oun koy berga Sion, hoy yob o djiyestar kamella." 
Psalms78:69 Kote pre čivas lo peskro kheer, dour pral djal lo pre – har o bolepen, oun hi zoreles tardo har i phoub, hoy lo kras hako tsireske." 
Psalms78:70 Oun yob rodas peske o Davides vin, te vas lo leskro boudepaskro, oun las les kotar krik, kay das lo yak ap i bakrende." 
Psalms78:71 Kolendar kharas lo les krik, te vell lo o baro ray pral o Israel, te dell lo yak ap o Debleskre menshende, har i bakrengro dell yak ap peskre bakrende." 
Psalms78:72 Oun peskro tselo djiyeha das o David yak ap lende, oun gosvepah sikras lo len o drom." 
Psalms79:1 I gili, hoy o Asaf kras. Maro Devel, menshe dran vavar themma peran an tiro them dren; tiro kheer, hoy touke kokres his, kran le pale-čiddo. Oun o foro Yerusalem dan le paash." 
Psalms79:2 Tire boudepangren dan le moulo, oun lengro mass dan le i čirklende tel o bolepen te rhal. Kolen, kay tou touke vi-rodal, maran le, oun lengro mass dan le i divye firhen te rhal." 
Psalms79:3 Lengro rat nashas har pani troul o foro Yerusalem, oun kek his koy, kay len paskras." 
Psalms79:4 Mer ham praasedo kolenge, kay troul mende djivenn, ham lenge sapaske, oun yon rikrenn men dineleske." 
Psalms79:5 Baro Devel, har rah ačell tiri rholi ap mende? Har rah rhačrell li har i yag?" 
Psalms79:6 Čore tiri rholi ap kol menshende vin, kay tout gar prindjrenna, ap kol themma, kay tout gar an-gole denna!" 
Psalms79:7 Yon rhan o Yakobes pre, oun stakran leskro them paash." 
Psalms79:8 De men kek phagi koleske, hoy mare phoure kran! Kre sik tiro dji menge pre! Dik, men hi bouder kek zoor!" 
Psalms79:9 Ab ap mari rig, maro Devel! oun le men vin! Le men vin dran lengre vasta, te vell tiro lab hadedo! Oun le mari doosh mendar krik, te vell tiro lab pale baro!" 
Psalms79:10 Hoske nay penenn i vavar menshe: Kay hi t'maro Devel? Mouk men te dikell, har tou len khetne stakreh koleske, kay maran le tire boudepangre!" 
Psalms79:11 Shoun, har i stilde rovenn! Tou hal yaake zorelo, rike kolen ap o djipen, kay hi yaake mishto har moulo." 
Psalms79:12 Kolla, kay an i themma troul mende djivenn, praasan tout, maro rayes. De len kova efta kope pale, hoy kran le ap toute!" 
Psalms79:13 Mer ham tire menshe. Tou hal menge har i bakrengro, kay anell peskre bakre kote, kay hatsenn le rhapaske. Mer parkrah men pash toute hako tsiro, oun sharah tout kanna oun an ko tsiro, hoy vella." 
Psalms80:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell pash o bashepen ap i shob-doryengri bashepaskri. Kay gili kras o Asaf." 
Psalms80:2 Shoun ap mende, tou, kay deh yak ap i Israelende. Har i bakrengro yak dell ap peskre bakre, deh tou yak ap o Yosefeskre čavende. Tou, kay hal beshdo pral i keroubim, ab, oun sike tout" 
Psalms80:3 glan tire menshende dran o kheer Efrayim, Benyamin oun Manasse! Sike tiri bari zoor oun ab ap mari rig!" 
Psalms80:4 Baro Devel, hade men pale pre! Dik lačes ap mende, yaake djal menge pale mishto." 
Psalms80:5 Tou, baro Devel oun ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, har rah kameh tou mentsa rhoyedo te vell, kanna, kay tire menshe tout an-mangenn?" 
Psalms80:6 I sva hi maro rhapen, dran i khoro pherde sva deh tou men te piyell." 
Psalms80:7 Kolla, kay troul mende djivenna, čingrenn pen pral maro them. Kolla, kay kamenn men krik te tradell, praasenn men." 
Psalms80:8 Tou, Devel oun ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, hade men pale pre! Dik lačes ap mende, yaake djal menge pale mishto." 
Psalms80:9 Dran o them Egiptia anal tou i drakengro rouk; tradal vavar menshen dran lengre themma, oun čival les an i phoub." 
Psalms80:10 Tou kral leske boud platsa, leskre draba nay djan dour an i phoub, oun yob vas bourhlo an o tselo them." 
Psalms80:11 Peskre kashtentsa čakras lo i berge. Leskre lengste kashta čakran i bare cedertikre rouka. 
Psalms80:12 Leskre moussya djan bis pash o baro pani ap koy yek rig, oun bis pash ko zorelo lengsto pani ap koy vavar rig." 
Psalms80:13 Hoske phagal tou kol barra tele, hoy troul leste pre-čiddo van? Kanna nay lell hakeno peske drake lestar tele, kay kote djal." 
Psalms80:14 I divye bale rhan les pre, oun divye firhe moukenn či pral." 
Psalms80:15 Ab pale pash mende, tou, o Devel pral o bolepen oun i phoub! Dik dran o bolepen ap mende, oun de pale yak ap tiro drakengro rouk!" 
Psalms80:16 Rike tiro vast pral leste, hoy tou an i phoub čival, pral ko terno drakengro rouk, hoy tou bares oun zoreles kral." 
Psalms80:17 Dik, har hi lo tele dino oun pre-rhačedo! Činge yaake ap kolende, kay kova kran, te phagenn le khetne." 
Psalms80:18 Rike tiro vast pral koleste, kay hi beshdo ap tiri čači rig, pral ko morsheste, koles tou zoreles kral." 
Psalms80:19 Yaake kamah mer gar tiri rigyatar te djal. Mouk men te djivell! Oun mer dah tiro lab an-gole. 
Psalms80:20 Tou, baro Devel oun ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, hade men pale pre! Dik lačes ap mende, yaake djal menge pale mishto!" 
Psalms81:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell ap i bashepaskri, hoy kharella gittit. O Asaf kras kay gili." 
Psalms81:2 Givenn i barhtyatar o Debleske! Yob hi mari zoor. Sharenn o Yakobeskro Debles! 
Psalms81:3 Givenn leske Debleskre gilya! Denn ap i pauka! Bashrenn ap i doryengre bashepangre! 
Psalms81:4 Phourdenn an i phourdepaskri ap ko dives, kay vell o čon pale diklo, ninna ap ko dives, kay vell o tselo čon diklo. Kova hi o baro dives, kay vah barhteles khetne." 
Psalms81:5 Ap kava lab hounte rikrenn pen i Israelitarya. Kava hi i čačepaskro lab, hoy o Yakobeskro Devel lende das." 
Psalms81:6 Kova penas o Devel o Yosefeskre menshenge, har djas lo an o kourepen khatar i Egiptarya. Shounau i rakepen, hoy me gar prindjrom:" 
Psalms81:7 Me lom t'mendar ko pharo koova tele, hoy ap t'mare phika his, oun t'mare vasta hounte hidjrenn bouder gar kol phare barra." 
Psalms81:8 Har touke ropaske his, oun tou pal mande gole dal, vom me oun lom tout vin. Tou poučal mandar, oun me rakrom touha dran koy folka. Pash o pani Meriba lom tout an i yak, te dikap, har tou shouneh ap mande." 
Psalms81:9 Mire menshe, shounenn ap mande, me dau t'men trad. Israel, shouness, hoy me touke penau:" 
Psalms81:10 Pash t'mende hounte vell kek vavar devel, oun tou mangess kek vavar debles an!" 
Psalms81:11 Me hom tiro baro Devel, kay tout dran o them Egiptia vin anas. Kre tiro mouy dour pre, oun me dau tout boud rhapen." 
Psalms81:12 Mire menshe shounan gar ap mande. O Israel kamas man gar. 
Psalms81:13 Yaake moukom len kova te krell, hoy yon kaman, oun moukom len pal pengro shero te djal." 
Psalms81:14 Har kamoms me, te shounans mire menshe ap mande, te djals o Israel ap miro drom!" 
Psalms81:15 Sik anoms ladj ap kolende, kay ap lende djan, oun čivoms miro vast phares ap lende." 
Psalms81:16 Kolla, kay pen ap o baro Debleste rhoyrenn, hounte vitsrens pen tele glan leste. Lengri phagi ačals hako tsireske." 
Psalms81:17 Oun i Israelende doms o lačeder djob rhapaske, oun o feteder gvin, te vans le čalo." 
Psalms82:1 I gili o Asafestar. O Devel hi tardo mashkral o bolepaskro tsillo, oun rakrell o čačepen vin pral i debla." 
Psalms82:2 “Har rah djan t'mer gar pal o čačepen? Har rah denn t'mer koleste peskro čačepen, koles gar čačo hi?" 
Psalms82:3 Dikenn, te lenn i čorvele pengro čačepen, ninna kolla, kolen kek dad bouder hi! Avenn ap i rig kolendar, kolen či hi oun gar an-diklo hi, oun dikenn, te lenn le pengro čačepen!" 
Psalms82:4 Avenn ap i rig i čorvelenge, oun kolenge, kay tikno rikedo venna, oun lenn len vin dran i vasta i čilačendar!" 
Psalms82:5 T'mer moukenn t'menge či te penell. Dinele han t'mer, oun djan t'maro drom, har te vals kali rat, kay dikenn či. Doleske dell kek čačepen bouder ap kay phoub." 
Psalms82:6 Ava, me penom: T'mer han debla, t'mer lauter han čave o pralstunestar." 
Psalms82:7 Kanna penau: T'mer hounte merenna yaake har i menshe merenna, ava, yaake har zorele raya perenna, perenn t'mer ninna. ”" 
Psalms82:8 Ste pre, maro Devel oun rake o čačepen vin pral i tseli phoub! Tire hi i menshe an i tsele themma." 
Psalms83:1 I gili o Asafestar. 
Psalms83:2 Miro Devel, rake! Mouk tout te shounell! Ma ač pokones!" 
Psalms83:3 Dik! Kolla, kay rhoyrenn pen ap toute, hi divyo. Kolla, kay kamenn touke čilačepen, hadenn pengro shero pral toute." 
Psalms83:4 Yon čivenn pen khetne oun rakrenn, har nay krenn le tire menshenge čilačepen. Pal o doumo krenn le vin, te djan le ap kolende, kay khatrenn pen pash toute." 
Psalms83:5 “Avenn”, penenn le, “Stakras len khetne, kol Israelitaryen! Kal menshenge hi kek platsa ap kay phoub. Ko lab Israel hounte vell bistedo!”" 
Psalms83:6 Yon hi yek dji oun yek djipen oun kran vin, te djan le ap toute:" 
Psalms83:7 Kolla hi i menshe dran o Edom oun dran o Ismael, dran o Moab, dran i Hagar," 
Psalms83:8 dran o Gebal, o Ammon, oun o Amalek, ninna i Filistarya oun kol menshe dran o foro Tirus." 
Psalms83:9 Ninna o Assour čivas pes ap lengri rig. Yon van yek moussi i menshentsa, kay venna pal o Lot." 
Psalms83:10 Miro Devel, kre lenge, har kral ap i Midianarya, ap o Sisera, oun ap o Yabin pash ko tikno pani Kishon." 
Psalms83:11 Kolla van moulo dino pash En-Dor, oun ačan koy čiddo, oun van čik." 
Psalms83:12 Kre lengre pralstunenge har kral kol morshentsa o Oreb oun o Seeb. Ap lengre tsele rayende kre yaake har kral ap o Zeba oun o Zalmunna. 
Psalms83:13 Kolla penan: “Mer kamah o Debleskro them menge te lell.” 
Psalms83:14 Miro Devel, phourde len krik har patria, har phouss an i baro dourho!" 
Psalms83:15 Ab lenge har i yag, hoy o veesh tele rhačrell, oun pes an i berge doureder rhal!" 
Psalms83:16 Biče i baro phourdepen oun trade len krik! Kre lenge daar tiro zorelo dourheha! 
Psalms83:17 Kre, te venn lengre sherya lolo i ladjatar, te poučenn le pal toute, baro Devel." 
Psalms83:18 An ladj oun traash ap lende hako tsireske, te merenn le an i ladj." 
Psalms83:19 Mou dikenn le, te hal tou kokres o baro Devel oun o pralstouno ray ap i tseli phoub." 
Psalms84:1 I gili yekestar dran i familya Korah. Kay gili hi o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell pash o bashepen ap i bashepaskri, hoy kharella Gittit." 
Psalms84:2 Tou, baro Devel oun ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, har kamau me tiro kheer o djiyestar!" 
Psalms84:3 Miro dji nashell pal tiro kheer, baro Devel. Kamau te vap dren ap i platsa glan tiro kheer. Miro tselo djiyeha givau barhtele gilya touke, o djido Debleske." 
Psalms84:4 O čirklo hatsas peske i kheer, oun o khereskro čirklo kras peske i kheer peskre čavenge, gar dour kotar, kay tou sharedo vell. Tou baro Devel oun ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, tou hal miro baro ray oun miro Devel." 
Psalms84:5 Barhteles hi kolla, kay djivenn an tiro kheer. Hako tsiro hadenn le tout." 
Psalms84:6 Barhteles hi kol menshe, kolengri zoor an toute hi, oun kay o djiyestar pash tiro kheer djan." 
Psalms84:7 Te djan le an o tato them, nashell kote pani lenge vin. Oun o brishin moukell lauter zenelo oun baro te vell." 
Psalms84:8 Pale te pale lenn le nevi zoor, bis te dikenn le o čačo Debles ap i berga Sion." 
Psalms84:9 Tou baro Devel oun ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, shoun miro mangepen! Mouk les glan toute te vell, tou o Yakobeskro Devel!" 
Psalms84:10 Dik lačes ap o baro rayeste, koles menge ap mari rig čival! Dik ap leste, koles vin rodal, te vell lo maro ray!" 
Psalms84:11 Yek dives ap i platsa glan tiro kheer hi feteder har i zerya vavar divessa. Me kamau boudeder te vap tardo pash o voudar glan tiro kheer, har te djivap pash i čilačende." 
Psalms84:12 Maro baro Devel hi o kham maro djipaske. Yob rikrell peskre vasta pral mende. O baro Devel dell men lačepen oun raylepen. Kolen, kay o djiyestar ap leste shounenna, dell lo hako lačepen, hoy len hounte vella." 
Psalms84:13 Tou baro Devel oun ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, barhtelo hi ko mensho, kay rikrell pes ap toute." 
Psalms85:1 I gili yekestar dran i familya Korah. Kay gili hi o rayeske pral i gipangre. 
Psalms85:2 Baro Devel, tout his i dji tiro themeske, oun lal o Yakobeskre pandle menshen vin dran i čilače vasta." 
Psalms85:3 Tou lal o čilačepen, hoy tire menshe kran, lendar krik! Lengri tseli doosh bistral tou." 
Psalms85:4 Tou rikral tiri rholi pale, oun rhačral bouder gar i rholyatar." 
Psalms85:5 Maro Devel, kay tou lauter menge mishto kreh, ab ninna kanna ap mari rig! Mouk tele tiri rholyatar, hoy tout ap mende hi!" 
Psalms85:6 Kameh i tsele tsirya ap mende rhoyedo te ačell? Moukeh tou bouder gar tiri rholyatar tele? 
Psalms85:7 Kameh men bouder gar nevi zoor te dell, te venn tire menshe pale barhtelo pral toute?" 
Psalms85:8 Baro Devel, ab menge lačes, oun kre lauter menge pale mishto!" 
Psalms85:9 Kamoms te shounap, har o baro Devel penell, te vell an leskro them oun leskre menshenge kek kourepen, yaake te djas mer gar ap dinele dromma." 
Psalms85:10 Čačepah, yob hi ap kolengri rig, kay leha djivenna oun ap leste shounenna. Oun leskro raylepen ačell an maro them." 
Psalms85:11 Palle vell leskro lačepen ap mende, oun mer rikrah zoreles ap leste. Mer krah hoy čačo hi, oun yob dell men barht an o dji." 
Psalms85:12 Kate ap kay phoub rikrah mer zoreles ap o Debleste. Oun dran o bolepen vell o Debleskro čačepen ap mende. 
Psalms85:13 Ava, o baro Devel moukell menge mishto te djal, oun mari phoub anell menge boud rhapen." 
Psalms85:14 Hako tsiro oun ap hake dromma djal o baro Devel pal o čačepen. 
Psalms86:1 O David mangas o Debles kol labentsa: Baro Devel, me hom čorvelo, oun mange djal gar mishto. Shoun, har dau ap toute gole, oun rake mantsa!" 
Psalms86:2 De garda ap miro djipen! Me hom tiro. Ab ap miri rig, miro Devel, me hom tiro boudepaskro, oun rikrau man ap toute." 
Psalms86:3 Baro Devel, ab mange lačes! Ap toute dau gole hako dives." 
Psalms86:4 Miro dji djal pal toute, baro Devel. Kre man pale barhtelo. Me hom tiro boudepaskro." 
Psalms86:5 Tou hal lačo, miro baro Devel, oun leh i doosh krik. Tiro lačepen hi baro kolenge, kay ap toute gole denn." 
Psalms86:6 Baro Devel, shoun miro mangepen! Shoun, har rovau ap toute!" 
Psalms86:7 Ap ko dives, kay mange ropaske hi, dau ap toute gole, oun tou shouneh man." 
Psalms86:8 Miro ray, dell kek debles har tout. Kek nay krell kova, hoy tou kreh." 
Psalms86:9 I tsele natsyone, kolen tou kral, kolla venna oun mangenn tout an, maro rayes, oun sharenn tiro raylepen." 
Psalms86:10 Tou hal baro oun kreh baro koova, hoy kek vavar nay krella. Tou kokres hal o Devel." 
Psalms86:11 Baro Devel, sike man tiro drom, te djap an tiro čačepen. Rike miro dji pash toute, te krap, hoy tou kameh!" 
Psalms86:12 Mo Devel oun mo ray, parkrau man miro tselo djiyestar pash toute, oun hadau tout hako tsiro." 
Psalms86:13 Tiro lačepen mange hi baro. Tou lal miro djipen vin dran o merepen. 
Psalms86:14 Miro Devel, pre-phourde morsha hadenn pen ap mande. Kolla, kay zorelo oun čilačo hi, čivan pen khetne, oun kamenn man te marell. Pal toute poučenn le gar." 
Psalms86:15 Tou, baro Devel, hal i lačo Devel, oun kreh tiro dji tire menshenge pre. Tou veh gar sik rhoyedo, Tiro lačepen hi baro oun tou rikreh pash tire menshende." 
Psalms86:16 Risse tout pash mande, oun ab mange lačes! Hom tiro boudepaskro, – de man tiri zoor! Ninna miri day his tiri boudepaskretsa, doleske ab ap miri rig!" 
Psalms86:17 Sike mande, te hal tou mantsa lačes, baro Devel! Palle hounte ladjenn pen kolla, kay kamenn mange čilačepen, te dikenn le, kay tou ap miri rig hal, oun mire sva tele khosseh." 
Psalms87:1 I gili yekestar dran i familya Korah. O baro Devel kras o foro Sion zoreles, pral ap peskri berga." 
Psalms87:2 O djiyestar kamell lo o foro Sion peskre shoukar voudyentsa. Boudeder kamell lo ko foro har i tsele khera, kay djivenn o Yakobeskre čave." 
Psalms87:3 Shoun, tou o Debleskro foro, havo shoukar rakepen o Devel pral toute rakrell:" 
Psalms87:4 Mank kolende, kay man prindjrenna, hi i menshe dran i themma Egiptia oun Babilonia, ninna i Filistarya oun i menshe dran Tirus, ninna kolla dran o them Etiopia, kay kate boldo hi." 
Psalms87:5 Pral o foro Sion nay peness: Hakeno hi kate khere; o Devel, ko pralstouno, kokres rikrell o fores zoreles." 
Psalms87:6 An o liil, kay i menshe dran hake themma dren činlo venn, činell o baro Devel pal hako lab: Kava hi kate khere." 
Psalms87:7 Oun pash o khelepen givenn le lauter: Dran toute, tou foro Sion, vell ko tselo lačepen, hoy men hi." 
Psalms88:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre, te givell har koy gili Mahalat Leannoth. Kay gili kras yek dran i familya Korah. O Heman dran i familya Esra činas kal laba." 
Psalms88:2 Baro Devel, tou hal o Devel, kay mange lauter mishto krell. Ap toute dau me gole hako dives oun haki rat." 
Psalms88:3 Mouk miro mangepen glan toute te vell. Shoun, har ap toute rovau!" 
Psalms88:4 Man hi doha kol tsele doukendar. Hom gar dour o merepastar. 
Psalms88:5 Hom lauterenge har yek, kay ap o merepen čiddo hi. Hom har i morsh, koles kek zoor bouder hi." 
Psalms88:6 Man dan le pre har i moules. Mange djal har kolenge, kay moulo dino oun paskedo van, oun kolen bistral, oun lenge bouder či kreh." 
Psalms88:7 Tou čival man an i phoub, an o telstunepen, kay kali rat troul mande hi." 
Psalms88:8 Tiri rholi hi phares ap mande čiddo, oun yaake har boud pani yekes tele tserdell, tserdeh tou man tele." 
Psalms88:9 Tou kral, te moukan man mire mala. Hom lenge djoungelo. Me hom dre-pandlo an i bibarht oun vau gar vin." 
Psalms88:10 I doukatar vell mange kales glan i yaka. Ap toute, baro Devel, dau me gole hako dives. Mire vasta hadau me pash toute pre." 
Psalms88:11 Kreh tou baro zorelo koova ap i moulende? Stenn i moule pre oun sharenn tout? 
Psalms88:12 Rakrenn le pral tiro lačepen pash i moulende? – Pral tiro čačepen an o moulengro them? 
Psalms88:13 Djinenn le kote, kay kali rat hi, havo baro koova tou kral an tiri zoor? Hayvenn le tiro čačepen kote an ko them, kay lauter bistedo hi?" 
Psalms88:14 Me dau ap toute gole, baro Devel. Sik taysarlakro anau miro mangepen glan toute." 
Psalms88:15 Hoske čival man pale oun khatreh tout glan mande? 
Psalms88:16 Foun tiknes pre hom nasselo, oun gar dour o merepastar. Hoske čiveh tou pale te pale i traash ap mande? Me nay hidjrau lat bouder gar." 
Psalms88:17 Tiri rholi vas pral mande har i yag. Tire dava phagenn man. 
Psalms88:18 Yon venn ap mande haki rigyatar, har baro divyo pani hi le troul mande o tselo dives." 
Psalms88:19 Mire tsele malen tserdal tou mandar krik, mire menshen rikreh tou mandar pale, oun hom kokres har an i kali rat." 
Psalms89:1 Givede laba, hoy o Etan dran i familya Esra pre-činas." 
Psalms89:2 Hako tsiro kamau te givell pral o lačepen, hoy o baro Devel men dell. Lauterenge kamau te penell, har yob pash peskre menshende rikrell." 
Psalms89:3 Kova hi hoy me penau: Hako tsireske ačell leskro lačepen, yaake rah har dell o bolepen, rikrell yob peskro lab." 
Psalms89:4 Yob penas: “Miri sovel dom man koleste, koles me mange vin rodom: Me dom miro lab miro boudepaskro, o Davideste:" 
Psalms89:5 I menshe, kay toutar venna, hako tsireske yon ačenna. Dran tiro kheer i bare raya venna, oun hako tsiro i raya ačenna.”" 
Psalms89:6 Baro Devel, o bolepen sharell, hoy tou an tiri zoor lauter kral, I bolepangre sharenn, har hako tsiro pash tire menshende rikral." 
Psalms89:7 Koon an o bolepen hi yaake har tou, maro baro Devel? Havo Devel nay vell yaake har maro baro Devel?" 
Psalms89:8 Kote, kay i bolepangre khetne venn, o Deblestar yon darenn. Kolla lauter, kay hi troul leste, hi dareno tardo glan o baro Debleste." 
Psalms89:9 Tou baro Devel oun ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, koon hi yaake zorelo har tou? Koon rikrell yaake pash peskre menshende har tou?" 
Psalms89:10 Tou hal o ray pral o baro divyo pani. Yob te hadell pes, kreh tou, te djal lo tele." 
Psalms89:11 O baro panyeskro sap Rahab dal tou moulo, oun kolen, kay touke čilačepen kaman, tradal tou krik." 
Psalms89:12 O bolepen, tiro hi lo, oun i phoub, tiri hi li, oun tou kral lauter, hoy dren hi." 
Psalms89:13 Ko them, kay o kham gar tardo hi, tou kral les. Ninna ko them, kay o kham pral tardo hi, tou kral les. Koy berga Tabor oun i berga Hermon sharenn tout i barhtyatar." 
Psalms89:14 Tout hi i zoreli moussi, tiro vast hi zorelo, oun pre hadedo tiro čačo vast, te sikress tiri zoor pral i menshende." 
Psalms89:15 O čačepen pral i menshende rakreh, oun čačepaskre laba lenge peneh. Doleske ačeh tou o baro ray. An lauter, hoy kreh, dikah tiro lačepen, oun har pash mende rikreh." 
Psalms89:16 Baro Devel, har barhtelo hi kol menshe, kay sharenn tout i gilyentsa, kay djivenn an tiro lačepen!" 
Psalms89:17 O tselo dives hi le barhtelo pral toute. O čačepen, hoy tou len deh, krell len baro." 
Psalms89:18 Tou kokres hal lengro raylepen oun lengri zoor, oun dran tiro lačepen nay hadah mare sherya." 
Psalms89:19 Baro Devel, tou dal men koles, kay ap mende garda della. Tou, o Devel pral o Israel, rodal les vin, te vell lo maro baro ray." 
Psalms89:20 Glan i rah tsiro rakral tou ap yekeste tire menshendar an i visiona oun penal: “Me dom miro vast i čačo morsheste, te vell lo ap t'mari rig. Me rodom les vin dran mire menshende, te vell lo baro ray." 
Psalms89:21 Me hatsom o Davides, miro boudepaskro. Me makom les miro djeteha, te vell lo baro ray." 
Psalms89:22 Miro vast rikrell les, oun miri moussi krell les zoreles." 
Psalms89:23 Kek, kay ap leste djal, vell o zorleder pral leste, oun kek čilačo nay hadell pes pral leste." 
Psalms89:24 Me kamau kolen khetne te stakrell, kay ap leste djan, oun kolen, kay leske čilačepen kamenn, dau me an i phoub." 
Psalms89:25 Hako tsiro rikrau pash leste, oun hom leske lačo. Me krau les bareder har kolla, kay troul leste hi." 
Psalms89:26 Me dau les penepaske pral ko tselo them mank o baro pani oun o lengsto pani Eufrat. 
Psalms89:27 Yob penell ap mande: Tou hal miro dad, miro Devel, kova, kay rikrell peskre vasta pral mande oun vell ap miri rig." 
Psalms89:28 Oun me krau, te vell lo miro phoureder čavo, oun o pralstouno pral i bare rayende ap kay phoub." 
Psalms89:29 Hako tsiro ačell miro lačepen ap leste, oun miro lab, hoy leske sovel dom, rikrau me." 
Psalms89:30 Hako tsiro vell yek leskre čavendar, kay pal leste venna, o baro ray pral o them, yaake rah har o bolepen koy hi." 
Psalms89:31 Leskre čave, te moukenn le miro drom, oun djan gar pal miro čačepen," 
Psalms89:32 oun krenn gar, hoy lendar kamau, oun rikrenn pen gar ap mire laba," 
Psalms89:33 palle dau len dava lengri doshake, oun douka lengro čilačepaske." 
Psalms89:34 Miro lačepen lau lendar gar krik, oun miro lab, hoy len dom, phagau me gar." 
Psalms89:35 Koy sovel, hoy lenge dom, phagau gar. Oun kol laba, hoy dran miro mouy djan, krau me gar vavarčandes." 
Psalms89:36 Yek kopo dom me man sovel, oun rhorhau o Davides gar: Yaake har čačo hi, kay hom o Devel, yaake hi čačo," 
Psalms89:37 te venn o Davidestar bare raya an hake tsirya, yaake rah har o kham koy hi," 
Psalms89:38 oun o čon ap o bolepen tardo hi, oun dikell, hoy ap kay phoub djala.”" 
Psalms89:39 Kanna, baro Devel, čival tou les pale, koles tou vin rodal, te vas lo baro ray, Tou moukal les te perell, oun hal rhoyedo ap leste." 
Psalms89:40 Tou phagal tiri sovel, hoy tiro boudepaskres dal. Leskri rayeskri stadi vitsral ap i phoub, an i čik." 
Psalms89:41 Leskro foro kral tou paash, oun kol bare zorele khera dal an kotya paash." 
Psalms89:42 Lauter, kay ap o drom djan oun les dikan, čoran les vin. Kolla, kay langs leste djivenn, san pal leste." 
Psalms89:43 Kolla, kay ap leste djan, moukal, te hadenn le pen. Oun kral kolen barhtelo, kay leske čilačepen kamenn." 
Psalms89:44 An o kourepen his leskro rharo bouder gar zorelo. Oun tou moukal o Davides gar o zorleder te vell. 
Psalms89:45 Tou lal lestar o raylepen, oun leskri rayli beshepaskri stakral an i phoub." 
Psalms89:46 Glan o tsiro moukal tou les phouro te vell, oun anal ladj ap leste." 
Psalms89:47 Baro Devel, har rah kameh tout gomme te khatrell? Har rah moukeh tiri rholi te rhačrell har i yag?" 
Psalms89:48 Tou djineh, har tikno miro djipen hi. Ma biste, har sik i mensho bouder gar kay hi! Tou kokres kral les yaake." 
Psalms89:49 Kek mensho hi koy, kay hounte merell gar. Kek nay lell peskro djipen vin dran o merepen." 
Psalms89:50 Baro Devel, glan i rah tsiro dal tou men tiro lab, te čivess tiro lačepen ap mende. Hoske rikreh tou gar koy sovel, hoy dal o Davideste?" 
Psalms89:51 Ma biste koy ladj, hoy hi ap mande, tiro boudepaskro! Dik, har hidjrau ko tselo praasepen kolendar, kay tout gar prindjrenna." 
Psalms89:52 Baro Devel, kolla, kay tout gar kamenna, praasenn man, o baro rayes, koles tou touke vin rodal." 
Psalms89:53 Sharedo vell o baro Devel hako tsireske. Amen. Ava! Amen. 
Psalms90:1 O mangepen o Mosestar, ko Debleskro morshestar. Baro Devel, maro ray, tou hal kova, pash koleste nay vah oun khere ham." 
Psalms90:2 Glan i berge kerdo van, oun tou i phoub kral, hals tou, o Devel, koy. Oun tou ačeh hake tsirya." 
Psalms90:3 Tou penell menge: “Avenn pale, t'mer menshe!” Oun moukeh men pale čik te vell." 
Psalms90:4 Yek zero bersha hi pash toute har yek dives, har ko dives, hoy taysar his, oun bouder gar koy hi, oun har i tikno tsiro an i rat." 
Psalms90:5 Har i lengsto pani sik doureder nashell, yaake moukeh mare divessa doureder te nashell. Maro djipen hi tikno har i sopen. Mer ham har i zenlepen, hoy taysarlakro dran i phoub vell," 
Psalms90:6 bares vell oun shoukar hi, oun rati tele merell oun trouk vell." 
Psalms90:7 Dran tiri rholi merah yaake sik. Tiri rholi khossell men krik. 
Psalms90:8 Maro čilačo koova hoy kram, čival tou glan toute tardo. Mari khatedi doosh čakreh tou pre." 
Psalms90:9 Dran tiri rholi djan mare divessa čičeske trouyel. Mare bersha djan yaake sik har te phourdell yek o dourho vin. 
Psalms90:10 Maro djipen hi 70 (efta-deesh) bersha, te hi boud, 80 (orhta-deesh) bersha. Oun kova, hoy menge shoukar his, hi či har boudi oun pharepen. Oun sikeder har sik hi lauter trouyel." 
Psalms90:11 Koon patsell, te nay vell tiri rholi yaake baro? Oun koon darell tiri rholyatar?" 
Psalms90:12 Sike men, har sik maro djipen trouyel hi, te vas mer gosevo." 
Psalms90:13 Baro Devel, har rah kameh te rhoyreh tout ap mende? Dik pale lačes ap mende, tire boudepangre!" 
Psalms90:14 Haki tsalla kre maro djipen pherdo tiro lačepen! Palle sharah tout oun givah touke gilya yaake rah har djivah. 
Psalms90:15 I rah tsiro hams tele rikedo. De men kanna yaake boud barhtele bersha, har hams an i bibarht." 
Psalms90:16 Mer tire boudepangre kamah te dikas o baro koova, hoy tou kreh. Mouk mare čaven tiro raylepen te dikell!" 
Psalms90:17 Tou ray, maro Devel, dik lačes ap mende, oun čip tiri barht ap kova, hoy mare vastentsa krah. Ava, mouk mari boudi mishto te djal!" 
Psalms91:1 Kova, kay beshell tel o vast o Deblestar, ko pralstunestar, oun ačell pash leste, ko zorelo Debleste," 
Psalms91:2 kova penell ap o baro Debleste: “Pash toute hom khere. Tou hal mange har i baro zorelo kheer, miro Devel, ap toute dikau.”" 
Psalms91:3 O baro Devel dell yak ap toute, te peress gar an i dorya, hoy čivell kova touke, kay kamell tout te taprell. Ninna lell o Devel tiro djipen vin dran o nasslepen, hoy anell an o merepen." 
Psalms91:4 Har i karhni peskre ternen tel leskre moussya khatrell, yaake khatrell o Devel tout tel leskre zorele moussya. Kote nay djal touke či. Yob rikrell tout yaake har lo penas. Doleske nay vell kek čilačepen ap toute." 
Psalms91:5 Tou hounte tapress kek daar glan kova, hoy rati nay vella, vitar gar glan kol kashta, hoy ap o dives karye dino venna," 
Psalms91:6 vitar gar glan ko nasslepen, hoy čorrhanes an i rat vell, vitar gar glan ko čilačepen, hoy ap o dives marell." 
Psalms91:7 Ninna te perenn i zerya menshe ap tiri rig, oun deesh zerya ap tiri čači rig, touke djal či." 
Psalms91:8 Ava, tire yakentsa dikeh tou les. Tou dikeh har i čilače lenn pal kova, hoy yon kran." 
Psalms91:9 Tou penal: “Pash o baro Debleste hom khere.” Tou khatral tout pash o Debleste, ko pralstuneste." 
Psalms91:10 Doleske vell kek bibarht ap toute, oun kek nasslepen nay vell an tiro kheer." 
Psalms91:11 Yob kokres penas ap peskre bolepangre, te denn le yak ap toute ap tire tsele dromma," 
Psalms91:12 te hidjrenn le tout ap pengre vasta, yaake te nay doukress tiri heri ap kek bar." 
Psalms91:13 I leve oun i sapa nay doukrenn tout gar. Tou stakreh len lauter khetne. 
Psalms91:14 O Devel penell: “Yob kamell man o tselo djiyestar. Doleske lau les dran kova lauter vin. Yob prindjrell man. Doleske dau yak ap leste. 
Psalms91:15 Yob dell ap mande gole. Doleske shounau me ap leste, oun hom pash leste, te djal leske gar mishto. Me lau les vin dran i bibarht oun krau les bares." 
Psalms91:16 Me dau les i lengsto djipen oun sikrau les, te hom kova, kay les vin lell dran i bibarht.”" 
Psalms92:1 I gili, te givell ap o Debleskro dives." 
Psalms92:2 Har shoukar hi, te parkrau man pash toute, o baro Debleste, te givau gilya touke, o pralstuneske," 
Psalms92:3 te rakrau pral tiro lačepen taysarlakro, oun pral tiro čačepen an i rat," 
Psalms92:4 te bashrau touke ap i deesh-doryengri bashepaskri oun ap i harfa. 
Psalms92:5 Kova, hoy tou kral, baro Devel, moukell man barhteles te givell. Kova, hoy tire vasta lauter kran, sharau me." 
Psalms92:6 Baro Devel, havo baro koova kral tou! Hi phares menge te hayvas, hoy touke an o shero djal." 
Psalms92:7 I dinelo patsell kova gar; oun i narvelo hayvell les gar: 
Psalms92:8 I čilače venn baro har o zenlepen. Kolenge, kay čilačo koova krenna, djal mishto. Kova lauter vell, te venn le krik lino hako tsireske." 
Psalms92:9 Tou, baro Devel, hal o pralstouno, oun ačeh hake tsirenge." 
Psalms92:10 Mer djinah, lauter, kay tout čilačepen kamenn, hounte merenn. Oun lauter, kay čilačo koova krenna, venn krik tradedo." 
Psalms92:11 Man kral tou zorelo har i divyo gouroum, oun makal man nevo djeteha, hoy pral mande čoral." 
Psalms92:12 Me dikau tele ap kolende, kay mange čilačepen kaman, oun shounau i gole kol čilačendar, kay hadan pen ap mande." 
Psalms92:13 Kolla, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, venn zorelo har i zenele palmtikre rouka. Yon vell baro har i cedertikre rouka ap i berga Libanon." 
Psalms92:14 Yon hi har rouka, kay hi tardo an o baro Debleskro kheer, oun kay venn zenelo ap i platsa glan o Debleskro kheer." 
Psalms92:15 Ninna te venn le phouro, hi le zenele, pherdi zoor, oun roukengre venn ap lende baro." 
Psalms92:16 Yaake dikah: O baro Devel krell lauter čačes. Yob hi har i baro zorelo bar, kay nay khatrau man, oun kek rhorhepen hi ap leste." 
Psalms93:1 O baro Devel hi o baro ray. Raylepen oun zoor hi troul leste har i ripen. Yob kras i phoub yaake te hi li zoreles tardo. 
Psalms93:2 Baro Devel, yaake rah har o bolepen oun i phoub koy hi, hal tou o baro ray. Glan hako tsiro hals tou koy." 
Psalms93:3 Baro Devel, i bare panya hadenn pen. O pani vell divyo oun dell zoreli gole. Divyo oun zorelo djal lo pre." 
Psalms93:4 Ninna te hi o baro pani divyo oun leskri gole zorelo, bareder hi o baro Devel an o bolepen." 
Psalms93:5 Tiro lab hi o čačepen, oun tiro kheer hi hako tsiro touke kokres, baro Devel, yaake rah har i phoub koy hi." 
Psalms94:1 Baro Devel, tou hal o Devel, kay o čilačepen pale deh kolenge, kay vavaren čilačepen kran. Ab, oun sike tout!" 
Psalms94:2 Tou hal o čačepaskro ray pral i tseli phoub, de kol pre-phourden pengri phagi!" 
Psalms94:3 Baro Devel, har rah nay krenn pen i čilače bares? Har rah?" 
Psalms94:4 Bare laba krenn le, sharenn pen kokres, kolla lauter, kay krenn i vavarenge čilačepen." 
Psalms94:5 Tire menshen, baro Devel, rikrenn le tikno. Tire menshenge krenn le o djipen phares." 
Psalms94:6 Kol djouvyen, kolengro rom meras, marenn le, ninna i vi-themaryen, oun kol čaven, kolen kek dad bouder hi, denn le moulo." 
Psalms94:7 “O baro Devel”, penenn le, “dikell kova gar, o Yakobeskro Devel dell gar yak pre.”" 
Psalms94:8 Denn yak, t'mer dinele mank i menshende, t'mer narvele, kamenn gar gosevo te vell?" 
Psalms94:9 Kova, kay kras o kand, nay shounell kova gar? Kova, kay kras o yak, nay dikell kova gar?" 
Psalms94:10 Kova, kay i menshen an i vavar themma čingrell, dell lo t'men kek phagi? Yob hi o sikepaskro halauterendar – hi les kek gosvepen?" 
Psalms94:11 O baro Devel djinell, hoy an i menshengre sherya hi: lauter či-moldo koova." 
Psalms94:12 Barhtelo hi kova, koneste tou, baro Devel, leskri doosh sikreh, koleste tou sikreh, har te djivell lo." 
Psalms94:13 Yaake rikreh les pale te djal lo an peskri bibarht, bis te vell o čilačeske i phoub vin hadedo, te perell lo dren." 
Psalms94:14 O baro Devel čivell peskre menshen gar pale, oun moukell gar len kokres." 
Psalms94:15 I čačepangre morsha djan pale pal o čačepen. Oun lauter, kay o čačo drom djan, rikrenn pen ap kova." 
Psalms94:16 Koon vell ap miri rig, te kouras men i čilačentsa? Koon vell pash mande, te djas mer khetne ap kolende, kay krenn midjak koova?" 
Psalms94:17 Vals o baro Devel gar ap miri rig, voms me yaake mishto har moulo." 
Psalms94:18 Har penom, te perom, rikral man tou, baro Devel, an tiro lačepen." 
Psalms94:19 Har his mange ropaske, rakral tou lačes ap miro dji, oun kral les pale zoreles." 
Psalms94:20 Tou čival tout gar khetne kolentsa, kay čačepangre morsha hounte vans, oun yon djan gar pal o čačepen, oun penenn ap o rhorhepen: “Kova hi o čačepen.”" 
Psalms94:21 Yon čivenn pen khetne, te anenn le doosh ap koleste pre, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, oun denn koles i phagi, koles kek doosh hi, te vell lo maredo." 
Psalms94:22 Miro baro Devel vas mange har i zorelo kheer. Pash leste, miro Debleste, nay vau oun khatrau man." 
Psalms94:23 Yob moukell lengro midjak koova ap lende pale te perell, oun dran lengro čilačepen marell lo len. Ava, maro baro Devel marell len!" 
Psalms95:1 Avenn, te givenn gilya o baro Debleske! Denn gole i barhtyatar glan leste! Yob hi maro rikepaskro, kay menge lauter mishto krella." 
Psalms95:2 Avenn glan leste, te parkras men pash leste, te givas leske gilya oun sharas les!" 
Psalms95:3 O baro Devel hi o pralstouno Devel, o baro ray pral i tsele debla." 
Psalms95:4 An leskro vast hi o telstunepen i phoubyatar, oun i bareder berge hi ninna leskre." 
Psalms95:5 Leskro hi o baro pani. Yob kras les. Ninna o them, yob kras les leskre vastentsa." 
Psalms95:6 Avenn, mangas les an! Te djas ap mare čanga, oun peras tele glan o baro Debleste! Yob hi kova, kay kras men." 
Psalms95:7 Yob hi maro Devel, oun mer ham leskre menshe. Yob dell yak ap mende har i bakrengro dell yak ap peskre bakre, oun anell len kote, kay hi len doha te rhal. Kava dives rakrell yob ap t'mende. Shounenn ap leskre laba:" 
Psalms95:8 Ma pandenn t'mare djia, har t'mare phoure kran ap i platsa Meriba oun Massa an o moulo tato them." 
Psalms95:9 Fothe dikan le lauter, hoy lenge krom, patsan le gar, te hom me, o Devel, mank lende, oun nay dau len lauter, hoy len hounte vell djipaske." 
Psalms95:10 Star-deesh bersha vas mange djoungeles, te dikom ap kol menshende, oun penom: “Kalla hi menshe, kay peran ap pengre sherya oun djinenn gar, hoy čačo hi. Ap miro drom kamenn le gar te djal.”" 
Psalms95:11 Doleske dom man sovel an miri rholi: “Yon te djan gar dren an miro them, kay nay vans le khere!”" 
Psalms96:1 Givenn o baro Debleske i nevi gili! T'mer menshe ap i tseli phoub givenn gilya o baro Debleske! 
Psalms96:2 Givenn leske, o baro Debleske! Sharenn les! Penenn i menshenge, te hi yob kova, kay lell vin dran o čilačepen." 
Psalms96:3 Penenn kolenge, kay les gar prindjrenna, havo raylepen les hi. Penenn i menshenge an hake themma havo baro koova yob kras." 
Psalms96:4 O baro Devel hi o pralstouno, oun hakeno hounte sharell les. Mank i tsele vavar debla hi yob kova, konestar daras mer." 
Psalms96:5 I debla i vavar menshendar hi rhorhene debla. O baro Devel hi kova, kay o bolepen kras." 
Psalms96:6 Yob hi bareder har hako vavar. Shoukapen hi troul leste, Leskri zoor oun leskro raylepen venn diklo an leskro kheer." 
Psalms96:7 T'mer dran i vavar themma, sharenn o baro Debles! Sharenn leskro raylepen oun leskri zoor!" 
Psalms96:8 Krenn leskro lab bares yaake har yob moldo hi! Avenn glan leskro kheer, oun anenn leske shoukar koova!" 
Psalms96:9 Mangenn o baro Debles an ap ko dives, kay vell lo an shoukar oun kouč ripya. I tseli phoub hounte trissell glan leste." 
Psalms96:10 Penenn i tsele menshenge: O baro Devel hi o baro ray. Yob kras i phoub, te vell li zoreles tardo. Yob hi o čačepaskro ray pral i tsele themma oun djal pal o čačepen." 
Psalms96:11 O bolepen vell barhtelo, oun i phoub sala. O baro pani stell i barhtyatar oun lauter, hoy an leste hi." 
Psalms96:12 O them vell barhtelo oun lauter, hoy ap leste baro vas. I tsele rouka an o veesh givenna i barhtyatar" 
Psalms96:13 glan o baro Debleste. Yob vella. Ava, yob vella, oun anell o čačepen ap i phoub. Yob rakrell o čačepen vin pral i menshende an hake themma. Oun hi lengro čačepaskro ray, kay djal pal o čačepen." 
Psalms97:1 O baro Devel hi o baro ray! Doleske te givell i phoub oun sal! Ninna kol boud panyengre themma te venn le barhtelo! 
Psalms97:2 Kale volke hi troul leste trouyel. Yob hi i baro ray, kay djal pal o čačepen, oun rakrell o čačepen vin pral i menshende." 
Psalms97:3 Glan leste djal i yag, oun rhačrell halauteren, kay ap leste djan." 
Psalms97:4 I yag dran o bolepen, hoy tele ap kay phoub karye dell, moukell i rat vin dikell har o dives. Oun i phoub dikell kova oun trissell." 
Psalms97:5 Yaake har i momeli tele rhačrell, venna bare berge tikno glan o baro Debleste. Yob hi o baro ray pral i tseli phoub." 
Psalms97:6 O bolepen sikrell leskro čačepen, oun leskro raylepen dikenn i tsele menshe." 
Psalms97:7 Ladj ap kolende, kay krenn penge vavar debla, oun sharenn pen pengre moule deblentsa! Perenn tele ap i phoub, t'mer vavar debla, glan o baro Debleste!" 
Psalms97:8 Tou, baro Devel, hal i ray, kay djal pal o čačepen. Kova shounenn i menshe an o foro Sion oun hi barhtelo. Oun kolla an o them Youda sanenn oun khelenn i barhtyatar." 
Psalms97:9 Tou, baro Devel, hal o pralstouno pral i tseli phoub. Tou hal bareder har i tsele debla." 
Psalms97:10 T'mer, kay o baro Debles kamenna, stakrenn o čilačepen khetne. O baro Devel rikrell peskre vasta pral o djipen kolendar, kay leskre hi, oun lell len vin dran o vast i čilačendar." 
Psalms97:11 I momeli djal pre koleske, kay an o čačepen tardo hi. Oun barhtelo vell kova, kay o čačo drom djal." 
Psalms97:12 Avenn barhtelo pral o baro Debleste, t'mer, kay an o čačepen tardo han! Oun parkrenn t'men pash leste, kay kokres o čačo Devel hi!" 
Psalms98:1 I gili Givenn o baro Debleske i nevi gili! Yob kras baro koova. Peskro vasteha oun Debleskri zoryah vas lo o zorleder pral o čilačepen. 
Psalms98:2 Yob moukell i menshenge an i tsele themma te penell, te lell lo len vin dran o čilačepen. Glan lende moukell lo peskro čačepen te dikell." 
Psalms98:3 Yob bistras gar peskro lačepen o khereske Israel, oun rikrell peskro lab, hoy das lo lende. I tseli phoub dikas, har las lo len vin dran o čilačepen." 
Psalms98:4 Givenn o baro Debleske, t'mer lauter, kay ap kay phoub han! Denn gole i barhtyatar, sharenn les i gilyentsa!" 
Psalms98:5 Bashrenn leske ap i harfa! Sharenn les o bashepah ap i doryengre bashepangre! 
Psalms98:6 Bashrenn ap i phourdepangre oun shinga! Denn gole i barhtyatar glan o baro Debleste! Yob hi t'maro baro ray. 
Psalms98:7 Mou vell o baro pani divyo i barhtyatar, oun lauter, hoy an leste djivell, ninna i tseli phoub, oun kolla, kay ap late djivenn." 
Psalms98:8 T'mer bare lengste panya, denn an i vasta! T'mer berge, givenn i barhtyatar" 
Psalms98:9 glan o baro Debleste! Yob vella oun rakrell o čačepen vin pral i tseli phoub. Yob hi o čačepaskro ray pral i tsele themma, oun dell hakeneste pal kova, hoy lo kras." 
Psalms99:1 O baro Devel hi o baro ray. Yob hi beshdo pral i Keroubim. Lestar darella i phoub, oun hake themma trissenna." 
Psalms99:2 Zorelo hi o baro Devel an o foro Sion, o pralstouno hi lo pral i tsele themma." 
Psalms99:3 Mou hadenn le lauter tiro baro oun raylo lab! Tou kokres hal o čačo Devel. 
Psalms99:4 Touke hi bari zoor. Tou hal o baro ray, kay kamell o čačepen o djiyestar. Tou penal, hoy čačo hi, oun čival o čačepen pre an o them Israel, te djan i čačepangre morsha pal o čačepen." 
Psalms99:5 Hadenn maro baro Debles! Oun perenn ap i phoub glan i beshepaskri, kay yob peskre herya pre čivella. O baro Devel kokres hi o čačo Devel." 
Psalms99:6 O Mose oun o Aron his leskre rashaya, oun o Samuel his mank kolende, kay les an-mangan. Yon dan ap o baro Debleste gole, oun yob shounas len." 
Psalms99:7 Dran i folka rakras lo lentsa, oun yon rikran leskre laba, oun kran, hoy yob lendar kamas." 
Psalms99:8 Baro Devel, tou hal maro Devel. Tou shounal len, oun lal i doosh tire menshendar krik, ninna te dal len i phagi koleske, hoy yon kran." 
Psalms99:9 Hadenn maro baro Debles! Mangenn les an ap leskri berga, kay yob djivella. Maro baro Devel kokres hi o čačo Devel." 
Psalms100:1 I gili, te parkras men pash o Debleste. Givenn o baro Debleske, t'mer lauter, kay han ap kay phoub!" 
Psalms100:2 Mangenn o baro Debles barhteles an! Avenn glan leste oun denn gole i barhtyatar! 
Psalms100:3 Ma bistrenn: O baro Devel kokres hi o Devel! Yob kras men, oun leskre ham mer. Leskre menshe ham, oun yob hi menge har i bakrengro, kay djal glan leskre bakre oun anell len kote, kay len doha rhapaske hi." 
Psalms100:4 Avenn an i voudya glan leskro kheer oun parkrenn t'men! Avenn ap i platsa glan leskro kheer oun sharenn les i gilyentsa! Parkrenn t'men pash leste oun sharenn les. 
Psalms100:5 Kamlo hi o baro Devel. Leskro lačepen ačell hako tsireske. Oun leskro čačepen herell gar pre. 
Psalms101:1 I gili o Davidestar. Pral o lačepen oun o čačepen kamau me te givell. Tout, mo baro Debles, kamau me te sharell." 
Psalms101:2 Me dau yak, te djap o čačo drom. Kamau te vess pash mande. I djoudjo djiyeha djivau khetne lauterentsa an miro kheer." 
Psalms101:3 Rikrau man pale te krap rhorheno koova, oun kamau gar khetne te vell kolentsa, kay bango koova krenn. Savo koova kamau gar glan i yaka te dikell." 
Psalms101:4 Kones i rhorheno dji hi, kova hounte djal peske mandar. I čilačen kamau me gar te prindjrell." 
Psalms101:5 Koon rakrell čorrhanes djoungelo koova pal o doumo kolendar, kay troul leste hi, koles pandau leskro mouy. Kamau koles gar, kay pre-phourdo hi, oun ap vavar menshende tele dikell." 
Psalms101:6 Mire yaka rodenn pal kolende an o them, kay rikrenn pen ap tire laba, te djivenn yon pash mande. Kolen, kay o čačo drom djan, lau me pash mande, te boudrenn le mange." 
Psalms101:7 Kolla, kay rakrenn douy čipyentsa, nay ačenna gar an miro kheer, oun i rhorhene hounte djan mange dran i yaka." 
Psalms101:8 Hako dives čivau i tsele čilačen an o them pale. Kolen, kay i vavaren čilačepen kran, moukau bouder gar an o baro Debleskro foro te djivell." 
Psalms102:1 I mangepen yekestar, koleske gar mishto djal, oun koles bouder kek zoor hi, oun kay glan o baro Debleste peskri dji vin čorella." 
Psalms102:2 Baro Devel, shoun miro mangepen! Shoun, har dau ap toute gole!" 
Psalms102:3 Ma dja krik mandar ap kava dives, kay mange ropaske hi! Risse tout pash mande ap kava dives, kay ap toute gole dau! Shoun man sik!" 
Psalms102:4 Mire divessa djan trouyel har i tampa hoy djal dran i yag pre. Mange hi tato, har vals i yag an mande." 
Psalms102:5 Miro dji hi phagedo, oun les hi bouder kek zoor yaake har o khass, hoy tele dino vas. Bistrau ninna miro maro te rhal." 
Psalms102:6 Me hom yaake sano, kay nay dikeh i kokale, yaake boud rovau oun dau gole." 
Psalms102:7 Me vom har i divyo čirklo an o moulo them, har i ratsyakro čirklo, hoy djivell mank i barra i paash-dino forestar." 
Psalms102:8 Rati sovau gar, dau gole har i čirklo, hoy kokres hi oun pral ap o kheer beshdo hi." 
Psalms102:9 Hako dives sanenn kolla pral mande, kay kamenn mange čilačepen, oun praasenn man." 
Psalms102:10 An tiri rholi dal tou man trad, hadal man pre oun vitsral man pale tele ap i phoub. Doleske rhau yagakri čik har maro. Oun mire sva perenn an miro pipen." 
Psalms102:11  
Psalms102:12 Miro djipen djal peske har o dives, te vell i rat, har o khass, hoy tele merell an o kham." 
Psalms102:13 Tou, baro Devel, ačeh hake tsirenge, tout denn le an-gole an ko tsiro, hoy vella." 
Psalms102:14 Ste pre oun ab pale kamles ap i menshende an o foro Sion. O tsiro vas, te less lengri doosh lendar krik. Kanna hi o čačo tsiro kay." 
Psalms102:15 Tire boudepangre kamans, te vell o foro neves kerdo. Lenge hi ropaske pral i barra ko tele-phagedo forestar." 
Psalms102:16 I menshe an i tsele themma trashenn palle glan toute, o baro Debleste. Oun i tsele bare raya ap kay phoub vitsrenn pen tele glan tiro raylepen." 
Psalms102:17 O baro Devel čivell o foro Sion pale pre, oun moukell pes te dikell an peskro raylepen." 
Psalms102:18 Yob shounell o mangepen kolendar, hoy mouklo van. Ap lengro mangepen dikell yob lačes." 
Psalms102:19 Činenn kal laba pre kolenge, kay pal mende venna, yaake te sharenn ninna kolla menshe o baro Debles!" 
Psalms102:20 O baro Devel dikas pral tele dran o pralstunepen, kay lo khere hi. Dran o bolepen dikas lo tele ap i phoub," 
Psalms102:21 te shounell lo o ropen kolendar, hoy stilde hi, te krell lo i shelle pre kol menshendar, kay an o merepen hi." 
Psalms102:22 Yaake te sharenn le o baro Debles ap i berga Sion, an o tselo foro Yerusalem hadenn le leskro lab," 
Psalms102:23 ap ko tsiro, kay venn menshe dran i tsele rayengre themma kote khetne, te mangenn le o baro Debles an." 
Psalms102:24 Har homs gar doureder har mashkral ap miro drom, phagas yob miri zoor, moukas man sikeder phouro te vell." 
Psalms102:25 Me penom: Mo Devel, le man gar krik ap o paash drom miro djipastar! Tiro djipen herell gar pre, an kek tsiro." 
Psalms102:26 Tou kral i phoub glan rah tsirya, oun tire vasta kran o bolepen." 
Psalms102:27 Yon ačenna gar. Tou hal kova, kay ačella. Yon venn phouro oun djan paash har i ripen. Tou čiveh len ap i rig har phoure ripya oun leh touke neve. I phoure hounte djan penge." 
Psalms102:28 Tou ačeh yaake har tou hal, oun djiveh hako tsiro." 
Psalms102:29 Mare čaven moukeh tou an o them te djivell, oun ninna lengre čave venn bares glan toute." 
Psalms103:1 O Davidestar. Miro tselo djiyestar sharau o baro Debles. Lauter, hoy an mande hi, sharell leskro Debleskro lab!" 
Psalms103:2 Miro tselo djiyestar sharau o baro Debles, oun bistrau gar o lačepen, hoy yob mange kras." 
Psalms103:3 Yob hi kova, kay miri tseli doosh mandar krik lella, kova, kay miro tselo nasslepen krik lella oun man sastes krella," 
Psalms103:4 kova, kay man dran o merepen vin lella, kova, kay peskro lačepen oun kamlepen pral mande vin čorella," 
Psalms103:5 kova, kay man čales krella peskro lačepah, oun man pale terno krella, oun zorelo har i adlari." 
Psalms103:6 O baro Devel čivell o čačepen pre, oun dell kolende pengro čačepen, kay venn tele rikedo." 
Psalms103:7 Yob moukas o Moses te djinell, hoy yob krella, oun kras glan i Israelende baro koova, kay kek vavar nay krella." 
Psalms103:8 O baro Devel hi i lačo Devel, kay krell peskro dji pre peskre menshenge. Yob vell gar sik rhoyedo. Oun leskro lačepen herell gar pre." 
Psalms103:9 Yob čingrell gar hako tsireske, oun ačell gar hako tsireske rhoyedo." 
Psalms103:10 Yob dell men gar i phagi pal kova, hoy kram, oun dell men maro čilačepen gar pale." 
Psalms103:11 Yaake dour har o bolepen pral i phoub hi, yaake baro hi leskro lačepen kolenge, kay djivenn leha." 
Psalms103:12 Koy rig, kay o kham pre djal, hi dour krik kolatar, kay lo tele djal. Yaake dour har kay yek rig hi koy vavaratar, yaake dour čivas yob mari doosh mendar krik." 
Psalms103:13 Yaake har i dad peskro dji pre krell peskre čavenge, yaake krell o baro Devel peskro dji pre kolenge, kay djivenn leha." 
Psalms103:14 Yob djinell, kay menshe ham; te ham dran čik kerdo, bistrell lo gar." 
Psalms103:15 I mensho hi har khass, har zenlepen, hoy pre-djas." 
Psalms103:16 Palle phourdell i dourho pral vergel, oun krik hi lo, oun koy platsa, kay lo his, prindjrell les bouder gar." 
Psalms103:17 O lačepen o baro Deblestar hi gar yaake. Kova ačella hako tsireske. An kek tsiro lell lo les krik kolendar, kay djivenn leha. Ninna lengre čavenge oun kolengre čavenge rikrell yob peskro lab," 
Psalms103:18 kolenge, kay bistrenn gar, hoy yob lengre phourentsa vin kras, oun rikrenn pen ap leskre laba." 
Psalms103:19 O baro Devel čivas peskri rayli beshepaskri an o bolepen. Oun yob hi o ray pral halauter. 
Psalms103:20 Sharenn o baro Debles, t'mer bolepangre, kay han leskre zorele kourepangre, oun krenn, hoy yob penell, oun shounenn ap leskre laba!" 
Psalms103:21 Sharenn o baro Debles, t'mer leskre bolepangre lourde, kay boudrenn leske oun krenn, hoy yob kamell!" 
Psalms103:22 Sharenn o baro Debles, t'mer lauter, kay van lestar kerdo! Sharenn les, kay t'mer ninna djivenna an leskro them! Ninna tou, miro dji, share o baro Debles!" 
Psalms104:1 Miro tselo djiyestar sharau o baro Debles. Miro baro Devel, har baro hal tou! An shoukapen oun raylepen hal tou rido." 
Psalms104:2 Har i baya čival i bari momeli troul toute. Tou tserdal o bolepen bourhlo har i bari plarhta," 
Psalms104:3 oun kral touke i kheer pral i panya. Tou oulereh ap i volke har ap i vourdin, oun i vinta hidjreh tout." 
Psalms104:4 O dourho, hoy phourdell tel o bolepen, hi tiro bičepaskro. Oun i yag hi tiro boudepaskro." 
Psalms104:5 Tou čival i phoub zoreles tardo, te ačell li tardo hako tsireske." 
Psalms104:6 I panya čakran lat har i ripen, oun o pani his pral haki berga tardo." 
Psalms104:7 Har čingral ap leste, djas o pani pale, glan tiri gole nashas lo peske," 
Psalms104:8 oun nashas i berge pral tele an i tala, yaake dour har tou penal." 
Psalms104:9 Tou penal, har dour i panya nay djan, oun doureder nay djan le gar. I douyto kopo hounte djal o pani gar pral i tseli phoub." 
Psalms104:10 An o telstouno them moukeh tou tikne panya dran i phoub te vell, te nashenn le mank i berge." 
Psalms104:11 Yaake vell i vesheskre firhen te piyell, oun i divye bourike nay piyenn, bis te hi len bouder kek troush." 
Psalms104:12 Pral lende an i rouka hi i čirkle beshdo oun givenna. 
Psalms104:13 Dran o bolepen deh tou brishin ap i berge, oun kreh te vell i phoubyat doha pani." 
Psalms104:14 Tou moukeh i firhenge o khass bares te vell, oun djob oun zenlepen i menshenge. Yaake anell lenge i phoub lengro rhapen vin:" 
Psalms104:15 i mool, hoy o mensheskro dji barhteles krella, o djet, hoy leskro mouy shoukar krella, oun o maro, hoy o menshes zoreles krella." 
Psalms104:16 Ninna i bare rouka lenn doha pani, kol cedertikre rouka ap i berga Libanon, hoy tou, baro Devel, kote an i phoub čival." 
Psalms104:17 An kol rouka krenn i tikne čirkle pengre khera, oun i storke beshenn pral ap i rouka." 
Psalms104:18 An i bare berge djivenn i divye bouzya. Oun mank i barra hi i bergetikre shoshoya khere. 
Psalms104:19 Tou kral o moonto, te sikrell lo men i deesh-te-douy čonna an o bersh. O kham djinell peskro tsiro, har lo tele djala." 
Psalms104:20 Tou peneh, te vell rati, oun koy venn i tsele veshengre firhe vin." 
Psalms104:21 Kol terne divye margodje denn gole pal mass, oun mangenn o Deblestar pengro rhapen." 
Psalms104:22 Te djal o kham pre, tserdenn le pen pale, oun čivenn pen tele an pengro khatepen." 
Psalms104:23 Palle djan i menshe vin ap pengri boudi oun boudrenna bis ap i rat. 
Psalms104:24 Baro Devel, har baro oun boud hi kova, hoy tou halauter kral! Har goseves kral tou halauter! I phoub hi pherdo o tselo koova, hoy tou kral." 
Psalms104:25 Kote hi o baro pani, baro oun bourhlo. Oun firhe hi dren: bare oun tikne, yaake boud, te nay djinell kek har boud." 
Psalms104:26 I shiffe oulerenn pengro drom; oun koy hi o baro panyeskro firho, o Leviatan, hoy touke kral, te kheless tou leha." 
Psalms104:27 Kolla lauter denn yak, kaana tou veh, te dess len te rhal ap o čačo tsiro." 
Psalms104:28 Tou deh len, oun yon lenn les. Tou kreh tiro vast pre, oun yon lauter venn čalo." 
Psalms104:29 Tou te djah lendar krik, taprell len i daar. Tou te leh lendar o dourho, merenn le, oun venn pale čik." 
Psalms104:30 Tou te bičreh tiro djipaskro dourho, venn le kerdo, oun tou deh nevo djipen ap i phoub." 
Psalms104:31 O Debleskro raylepen mou ačella hako tsiro! Mou vell lo barhtelo pral kova, hoy yob kras!" 
Psalms104:32 Yob dikell i phoub an, oun yoy trissella. Yob taprell i berge an, oun i yagakri tampa djal pre dran lende." 
Psalms104:33 Kamau te givell o baro Debleske, yaake rah har djivau, kamau te bashrell miro Debleske, yaake rah me hom." 
Psalms104:34 Mou vell miri gili leske shoukar! Me hom barhtelo pral miro baro Debleste. 
Psalms104:35 Mou ačenn kolla gar djido ap i phoub, kay o Debleskro drom moukan. Mou vell ko tsiro, kay hi bouder kek čilače koy! Miro tselo djiyestar sharau o baro Debles. Sharedo vell o baro Devel!" 
Psalms105:1 Parkrenn t'men pash o baro Debleste, oun hadenn leskro lab! Penenn i menshenge an i vavar themma kova, hoy yob kras!" 
Psalms105:2 Givenn oun bashrenn leske! Rakrenn pral ko tselo baro koova, hoy yob lauter kras!" 
Psalms105:3 Sharenn koles, koon kokres o čačo Devel hi! Avenn barhteles pral leste, t'mer, kay rodenn o baro Debles!" 
Psalms105:4 Poučenn pal o baro Debleste, oun pal leskri zoor! Avenn glan leste hako tsiro!" 
Psalms105:5 T'mer, kay venn pal o Abraham, o Debleskro boudepaskro, t'mer čave o Yakobestar, koles yob vin rodas, ma bistrenn, hoy yob lauter kras an peskri bari zoor, kova, hoy kek vavar nay kras! Ma bistrenn, har yob o čačepen pral i menshende vin rakras!" 
Psalms105:6  
Psalms105:7 O baro Devel hi maro Devel, oun o čačepaskro ray pral i tseli phoub." 
Psalms105:8 An kek tsiro bistrell lo peskri sovel, hoy lo mentsa dren djas. Peskro lab, hoy das lo, ačella yaake rah har menshe ap i phoub djivenna." 
Psalms105:9 Kova hi ko lab, hoy das lo o Abrahameste, koy sovel, hoy das lo o Isaakeste," 
Psalms105:10 oun pal leste o Yakobeste, oun das peskro vast pre, te ačell kava lab i Israelenge hako tsireske." 
Psalms105:11 Yob penas: “Touke dau kava them Kanaan, kova hi ko them, hoy t'menge vell.”" 
Psalms105:12 An ko tsiro his le gar boud, gar boudeder har i vast pherdo, oun his vi-themarya an o them." 
Psalms105:13 Oun yon djan yek themestar an o vavar, djan trouyel an boud rayengre themma." 
Psalms105:14 Oun o Devel das yak, te taprell len kek an. Oun i bare rayen pral kol themma das lo trad oun penas lenge:" 
Psalms105:15 “Lenn i vasta krik mire menshenge, kolen mange vin rodom! Ma krenn čilačepen kolenge, kay mire rakepangre hi!”" 
Psalms105:16 Oun yob moukas i bari bok an o them te vell, te das bouder kek maro." 
Psalms105:17 [Oun yon djan an o them Egiptia.] Glan lende bičras lo i morshes. Kova his o Yosef. Yob vas i ginlo boudepaskro. 
Psalms105:18 Leskre herya pandan le an sasterne shelle, oun troul leskri meen čivan le saster," 
Psalms105:19 bis te vas ko tsiro, kay ko lab čačo vas, hoy o Yosef o baro Deblestar las oun glan-vi penas." 
Psalms105:20 Oun o baro ray bičras yekes koy, te moukell lo les vin dran o stilepen. Oun o baro ray pral menshende an boud themma moukas les vin." 
Psalms105:21 Oun kras, te vas o Yosef o pralstouno pral leskro kheer, oun čivas lauter, hoy les his, an leskre vasta." 
Psalms105:22 Yob te sikrell o baro rayeskre boudepangre, hoy te krenn le. Kol pralstunende pral o them sikras lo, har te krenn le o feteder o themeske." 
Psalms105:23 Palle vas o Yakob an o them Egiptia, oun o Israel his i vi-themari an o them o Hameskre čavendar." 
Psalms105:24 O baro Devel moukas peskre menshen boud oun boudeder te vell. Yaake van le bareder oun zorleder har kolla, kay len tikno rikrenn." 
Psalms105:25 Kolenge das lo an o dji, te dikenn le čilače yakentsa ap o Debleskre menshende, oun kran lenge midjak koova." 
Psalms105:26 Yob bičras peskro boudepaskres, o Moses, oun o Arones, koles yob peske vi-rodas." 
Psalms105:27 Oun yon kran baro koova an o Debleskri zoor mank i Egiptarya, savo koova, hoy kek vavar nay kras an o them o Hameskre čavendar." 
Psalms105:28 O baro Devel bičras i tamlepen, te vas kales, har rati. I Egiptarya shounan gar ap leskre laba." 
Psalms105:29 Yob kras rat dran i tsele panya i Egiptarendar, oun moukas i mače kote dren te merell." 
Psalms105:30 Yob kras o tselo them pherde djambe, ninna kote, kay i bare raya sovenna, his le." 
Psalms105:31 Yob penas, te venn matsille, hoy čourye denn, oun boud matsille van an o tselo them." 
Psalms105:32 Har dikan i Egiptarya ap brishin, bičras lo lenge barrengro brishin an lengro them, ninna yag, hoy pral oun tele djas ap o bolepen." 
Psalms105:33 Lengre drakengre rouka oun faygetikre rouka das lo tele, oun phagas i tsele rouka an lengro them." 
Psalms105:34 Yob penas, te venn stepangre, oun stepangre van, yaake boud, te nay penas kek, kitse yon hi." 
Psalms105:35 Oun kolla rhan lauter pre, hoy baro vas an lengro them, ninna o djob ap i harhetikri phoub." 
Psalms105:36 Yob das o phoureder morsh čaves moulo haki datar an o them Egiptia. Kolla his lengre dadengri feteder zoor. 
Psalms105:37 Har anas o baro Devel i Israelitaryen vin, lan le roup oun sonakay pentsa. Oun kek lendar his nasselo oun hounte ačas pale." 
Psalms105:38 I Egiptarya daran lendar, oun his barhtele, har djan yon penge." 
Psalms105:39 O baro Devel khatras peskre menshen tel i folka, oun rati sikras len i yag o drom." 
Psalms105:40 Yon mangan lestar mass, oun yob moukas pesse čirkle te vell. O mareha dran o bolepen kras lo len čalo." 
Psalms105:41 Yob phagas i baro bar, oun pani nashas vin, oun nashas an o moulo them har i lengsto baro pani." 
Psalms105:42 Yob bistras gar peskro Debleskro lab, hoy das lo peskro boudepaskres, o Abraham." 
Psalms105:43 Har anas lo peskre vi-rodede menshen vin, sanas lengro dji. Oun yon givan i barhtyatar." 
Psalms105:44 Yob das len o them vavar menshendar, oun halauter, hoy kolen his, das lo lende, te vell kova lengro." 
Psalms105:45 Kava kras lo, te rikrenn le leskre laba, oun shounenn ap kova, hoy yob lenge penas. Sharedo vell o baro Devel!" 
Psalms106:1 Sharedo vell o baro Devel! Parkrenn t'men pash o baro Debleste! Yob hi i lačo Devel. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske. 
Psalms106:2 Koon nay penella ko tselo baro koova, hoy o baro Devel lauter kras? Koon nay sharell les doha?" 
Psalms106:3 Barhteles hi kolla, kay leskre laba rikrenna, oun hako tsiro o čačepen krenna." 
Psalms106:4 Baro Devel, tou dal tire menshende tiro lab, te vess ap lengri rig. Biste man gar oun ab mange lačo!" 
Psalms106:5 Te nay dikap i barht, hoy tou kolen dal, hoy touke vi-rodal, te nay vap barhteles khetne tire menshentsa, te nay sharas men, te ham tire." 
Psalms106:6 Mer anam doosh ap mende yaake har mare phoure, oun kram gar, hoy čačo hi. Na-a, mer kram čilačo koova." 
Psalms106:7 Mare phoure hayvan gar ko baro zorelo koova, hoy tou an o them Egiptia kral, oun bistran har boud lenge lačes hals, oun hadan pen pral toute pash o Baro Lolo Pani." 
Psalms106:8 O baro Devel sikras, te hi lo lengro Devel, oun vas ap lengri rig, te sikrell lo peskri zoor." 
Psalms106:9 Yob čingras ap o Baro Lolo Pani. Koy djas o pani pale, oun i phoub his bouder gar sapeno. Oun yob moukas len mank o pani te djal har te vals trouk them." 
Psalms106:10 Yaake las lo len vin dran i vasta kolendar, kay kaman len te marell." 
Psalms106:11 Oun o pani tassas lauteren, kay len palla lan. Kek ačas djido." 
Psalms106:12 Palle patsan le leskre laba, oun givan leske gilya." 
Psalms106:13 Sik bistran le lauter, hoy yob kras, oun poučan gar, hoy yob lendar kamell." 
Psalms106:14 An o moulo them lan le bok pal o mass, oun patsan gar, te nay dell o baro Devel len lauter, hoy len hounte vell djipaske." 
Psalms106:15 Kote das lo len, hoy yon mangan, oun das len yaake boud, te vas lenge kova dran o nak vin." 
Psalms106:16 Ap lengri platsa hadan le pen pral o Moseste, oun pral o Aroneste, koles o baro Devel peske vin rodas." 
Psalms106:17 Koy djas i phoub pre, oun rhas o Datan, oun čakras tel peste o Abiram peskre menshentsa." 
Psalms106:18 Oun i yag rhačras mank lende oun rhačras kolen, kay kava čilačo koova kran." 
Psalms106:19 Pash i berga Horeb kran le penge i sonakaskri terni groumni, vitsran pen glan late tele oun mangan lat an." 
Psalms106:20 Yon moukan o raylo baro Debles, oun mangan i figura i groumyatar an, hoy khass rhal." 
Psalms106:21 Yon bistran ko Debles, kay lengro djipen dran o merepen vin las, oun baro koova an o them Egiptia kras," 
Psalms106:22 savo koova, hoy kek vavar nay kras, ninna savo zorelo koova pash o Baro Lolo Pani, kay lenge o rakepen krik ačas." 
Psalms106:23 Doleske kamas lo len moulo te dell, te vals kote gar o Mose, koles yob peske vi-rodas. Kova stas pre, te rikrell lo o Debles leskri rholyatar tele, yaake te dell lo len gar moulo." 
Psalms106:24 Oun lenge his ko shoukar them či moldo, oun patsan gar ap ko lab, hoy o Devel len das." 
Psalms106:25 An pengre plarhtene khera rakran le djoungeles pral leste, oun shounan gar ap o baro Debleste." 
Psalms106:26 Kote hadas lo peskro vast oun das pes sovel, te marell lo len an o moulo tato them," 
Psalms106:27 oun tradell lengre čaven an vavar themma, te djivenn yon mank vavar menshende." 
Psalms106:28 Pal i tsiro vitsran pen i Israelitarya glan kol vavarengro debleste Baal tele ap i berga Peor, oun rhan ko mass kol firhendar, hoy van maredo i moulenge." 
Psalms106:29 O baro Debles tapras i bari rholi pral kova, hoy peskre menshe kran. Oun yob moukas i pharo nasslepen pral lende te vell." 
Psalms106:30 Kote stas o Pinhas pre, oun das len i phagi, oun ko nasslepen djas krik." 
Psalms106:31 Kova, hoy o Pinhas kras, his shoukar glan o Debleskre yaka. Doleske kras o Devel les čačo glan peskre yaka hako tsireske." 
Psalms106:32 Pash o pani Meriba rhoyran le pale o Debles, oun anan o Moses an i bibarht:" 
Psalms106:33 Yon kran les yaake rhoyedo, te rakras yob sik, oun leskre laba his gar gosevo." 
Psalms106:34 Mare phoure maran gar kol vavar menshen an o them, har o baro Devel lenge penas." 
Psalms106:35 Na-a, yon romedineran pen kolentsa, kay o Debles gar prindjrenn, oun kran sau koova har yon kran," 
Psalms106:36 oun mangan lengre deblen an. Yaake peran le o baro Debleskro dromestar tele. 
Psalms106:37 Yon maran pengre čaven oun čen i bengenge. 
Psalms106:38 Ava, yon dan pengre čaven oun čen moulo, kay kek doosh ap pende anan, oun dan len kol moule deblen, kolen i Kanaanitarya an-mangan. Yaake anan le rateskri doosh ap o them Kanaan," 
Psalms106:39 oun kran pen pale-čiddo koleha, hoy yon kran, oun peran o baro Debleskro dromestar tele." 
Psalms106:40 Kote rhoyras pes o baro Devel ap peskre menshende, oun nay dikas len bouder gar glan peskre yaka." 
Psalms106:41 Yob das len an o vast i menshendar an vavar themma, te venn kolla ray pral lende, kay dikan čilače yakentsa ap lende." 
Psalms106:42 Oun kolla, kay lenge čilačepen kaman, rikran len tikno, oun zoreles his lengro vast ap lende čiddo." 
Psalms106:43 Boud kope las lo len dran lengre vasta vin. Oun pale te pale kran le kova, hoy rhoyras les, oun moukan gar tele pengro čilačo koova, oun van boud oun boudeder koy dren." 
Psalms106:44 Oun te dan le gole ap leste an pengre douka, oun yob dikas, har djoungeles lenge djal," 
Psalms106:45 palle vas an leskro shero, hoy kras lo lentsa vin, te hi lo lengro Devel. Oun an peskro baro lačepen khaytan le les." 
Psalms106:46 Oun yob kras, te dikan lauter kolla lačes ap lende, kay len pandan." 
Psalms106:47 Baro Devel, le men vin dran i vasta kol vavar menshendar, maro Devel! An men pale lauter khetne an o them Israel, te parkras men pash toute, kay kokres o čačo Devel hal. Mari barht hi, te nay sharah tout." 
Psalms106:48 Sharedo vell o baro Devel, kay o Israeleskro Devel hi, kanna oun hako tsireske! Mou penenn i tsele menshen: “Amen! Sharedo vell o baro Devel!”" 
Psalms107:1 Sharenn o baro Debles. Yob hi lačo. Leskro lačepen ačell hako tsireske. 
Psalms107:2 Kova te penenn i vi-line menshe, kolen o baro Devel vin las dran i vasta kolendar, kay len pandan." 
Psalms107:3 Yob anas len khetne dran boud themma, kotar, kay o kham pre-djala, kotar, kay o kham tele djal, kotar, kay o kham gar vell, oun kotar, kay o kham pralstounes tardo hi." 
Psalms107:4 Mank lende his save menshe, kay his nashedo an o moulo tato them. Kek drom hatsan le, vitar kek foro, kay menshe djivenna." 
Psalms107:5 Yon bokan oun troushan, oun patsan bouder gar, te venn le vin." 
Psalms107:6 Har lenge yaake djoungeles djas, dan le gole ap o baro Debleste. Oun yob las len vin dran lengri daar." 
Psalms107:7 Oun yob sikras len o čačo drom, yaake te van le an i foro, kay menshe djivenna." 
Psalms107:8 Yon hounte parkrenn pen pash o baro Debleste, te vas lo yaake lačes ap lende, oun kras baro shoukar koova ap i menshende." 
Psalms107:9 Kolen, kay his len troush, das lo doha te piyell, oun kolen, kay his len bok, das lo boud lačo rhapen." 
Psalms107:10 Vavar his beshdo an o stilepen, kay his kek momeli, kokres kali rat. Lengre vasta oun herya his pandle an saster oun doukran len." 
Psalms107:11 Yon shounan gar ap o Debleste, kay hi o Devel pral halauter, oun čivan leskre laba ap i rig." 
Psalms107:12 Doleske moukas lo len khetne te phagell. Yon his koy čiddo, oun kek his koy, kay hidjrals len pre." 
Psalms107:13 Har lenge yaake djoungeles djas, dan le gole ap o baro Debleste. Oun yob las len vin dran lengri daar," 
Psalms107:14 oun anas len vin dran i kali rat, kay kek momeli his, oun kras lengre sasterne shelle pre." 
Psalms107:15 Yon hounte parkrenn pen pash o baro Debleste, te vas lo yaake lačes ap lende, oun kras baro shoukar koova ap i menshende," 
Psalms107:16 te das lo sasterne voudya dren, oun phagas sasterne pandepangre." 
Psalms107:17 Vavar kran dinelo koova, peran o Debleskro drom tele, oun anan doosh ap pende. Doleske djas lenge yaake djoungeles," 
Psalms107:18 te nay rhan le bouder či, oun his boudeder moulo har djido." 
Psalms107:19 Har lenge yaake djoungeles djas, dan le gole ap o baro Debleste. Oun yob las len vin dran lengri daar," 
Psalms107:20 oun rakras i lab, oun yon vas sasto. Oun yob las len vin dran o merepen." 
Psalms107:21 Yon hounte parkrenn pen pash o baro Debleste, te vas lo yaake lačes ap lende, oun kras baro shoukar koova ap i menshende." 
Psalms107:22 Ninna hounte anenn le leske shoukar koova, te parkrenn le pen pash leste. Oun i barhtelo djiyeha hounte rakrenn le kolestar, hoy yob lenge kras." 
Psalms107:23 Vavar ouleran ap i shiffe vin ap o baro pani, te bikrenn oun parenn le." 
Psalms107:24 Kolla dikan, hoy o baro Devel nay krell, oun havi zoor les pral o baro pani hi." 
Psalms107:25 Yob rakras, oun i zorelo dourho phourdas, hoy o pani pral oun tele das." 
Psalms107:26 Oun o shiffo vas pre hidjedo an o bolepen, oun peras pale tele an o telstunepen. Oun i morsha an o shiffo dan gole i daryatar," 
Psalms107:27 oun nay rikran pen gar ap i herya, har te vans le mate, oun djinan bouder gar, hoy te krenn le." 
Psalms107:28 Har lenge yaake phares his, dan le gole ap o baro Debleste, oun yob las len vin dran pengri daar," 
Psalms107:29 oun kras, te phourdas o zorelo dourho bouder gar. Oun o pani čivas pes pale." 
Psalms107:30 Oun yon van barhtelo, te čivas pes lauter. Oun yob anas len pash o them, kay yon nay ačan." 
Psalms107:31 Yon hounte parkrenn pen pash o baro Debleste, te vas lo yaake lačes ap lende, oun kras baro shoukar koova ap i menshende." 
Psalms107:32 Yon hounte sharenn les kote, kay yon khetne venna, oun hadenn les kote, kay i phoureder khetne venna." 
Psalms107:33 Dran o them, kay pani nashell, kras lo i moulo them, oun moukas kol lengste panya bouder gar te nashell." 
Psalms107:34 Yaake vas i phoub, kay boud djob oun zenlepen baro vas, i moulo londo them. Kova kras lo dran o čilačepen kol menshendar, kay kote djivenn." 
Psalms107:35 Oun pale moukas lo an o moulo them boud pani te nashell, oun dran i trouk phoub pani te vell." 
Psalms107:36 Oun moukas kolen, kay bokenn, kote te djivell, oun kolla kran penge kote i foro," 
Psalms107:37 oun čivan djob an i phoub, ninna drakengre rouka, oun anan boud rhapen dren." 
Psalms107:38 Oun yob das len barht, oun yon van boud oun boudeder. Oun yob das len ninna boud firhen." 
Psalms107:39 Pale van le tikno rikedo, oun i bibarht his zoreles ap lende. Oun yon van tikno oun tikneder." 
Psalms107:40 Koy moukas lo ladj ap lengre raya te perell, oun yon hounte nashan an o moulo them trouyel, kote kay kek drom hi." 
Psalms107:41 I čorvelen las lo vin dran lengri bibarht, oun kras, te van yon pale boud, yaake har bakre, hoy venn boud oun boudeder." 
Psalms107:42 Kova dikenn kolla, kay o čačo drom djan, oun hi barhteles, oun i čilačenge vell o mouy pandlo." 
Psalms107:43 Koon gosevo hi, bistrell kova gar, oun hayvell, har lačo o baro Devel hi." 
Psalms108:1 I gili o Davidestar. 
Psalms108:2 Miro Devel, miro dji hi pale zorelo. Me kamau touke te givell oun te bashrell, ava, kova kamau me." 
Psalms108:3 Bashrenn, t'mer miri harfa oun miri gitarra! Kava dives kamau me o kham pre te djangrell." 
Psalms108:4 Baro Devel, me kamau tout te sharell, mank i menshende dran boud themma touke gilya te givell." 
Psalms108:5 Tiro lačepen hi yaake baro, te djal lo pral o bolepen, oun tiro čačepen yaake dour har i volke nashenn." 
Psalms108:6 Sike tiro barepen ap o bolepen, miro Devel, oun tiro raylepen ap i tseli phoub!" 
Psalms108:7 Ab ap mari rig tiro zorelo vasteha oun le men, kolen tou kameh, vin dran i čilače vasta! Shoun, har dau ap toute gole!" 
Psalms108:8 O Devel rakras an peskro kheer, kay yob djivell: “Me vom o zorleder”, dell lo gole i barhtyatar. “Me dau o foro Sichem mire menshende, oun ninna i tala Soukot." 
Psalms108:9 O them Gilead hi miro, oun o them Manasse hi miro. O them Efrayim hi miri sasterni stadi, oun o them Youda hi kova, koles penepaske hi." 
Psalms108:10 O them Moab hi miro thopaskro čaro. Ap o them Edom vitsrau miro kirarh. Pral i Filistarya dau vi-gole, te vom lengro ray.”" 
Psalms108:11 Koon anell man an ko zorelo foro? Koon sikrell man o drom an o them Edom? 
Psalms108:12 Koon nay krell kova, har tou kokres, mo Devel, kay moukal men? Djah tou gar vin mare lourdentsa an o kourepen?" 
Psalms108:13 Ab tou ap mari rig oun le men vin dran i čilače vasta! Te hi menshe ap mari rig, hi kova čičeske oun či moldo." 
Psalms108:14 Maro Debleha krah mer baro koova. Oun yob stakrell kolen khetne, kay yaake zoreles ap mende djan." 
Psalms109:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. Kay gili kras o David. Tou, miro Devel, tout sharau oun givau gilya touke, ma rike tout pale! Kre čomone!" 
Psalms109:2 Čilače menshe rakrenn djoungeles pal mande, oun anenn rhorheno koova ap mande pre." 
Psalms109:3 Pengre čilače čipyentsa doukrenn le man, oun čingrenn ap mande, ninna te krom me lenge či." 
Psalms109:4 Yon kamenn mange čilačepen, ninna te hom kamlo ap lende. Me mangau toutar lačepen lenge." 
Psalms109:5 Har homs lenge lačo, dan le man čilačepen pale. Har sikrom len miro kamlepen, dikan le čilače yakentsa ap mande." 
Psalms109:6 Čip i čilačes pral leste, kay dell les gar o čačepen. Čip yekes ap leskri čači rig, kay anell doosh ap leste pre!" 
Psalms109:7 Te vell lo glan i čačepangre raya anlo, mouk kolen i phagi pral leste vin rakrell. Te mangell lo tout, dik ap leskro mangepen, har te vals kova i doosh." 
Psalms109:8 Mouk les sik te merell, oun leskri boudi te lell i vavar dren." 
Psalms109:9 Leskre čaven vell kek dad, oun leskri romyat vell bouder kek romes." 
Psalms109:10 Kre, te venn leskre čave vin tradedo dran pengro kheer, hoy paash dino vas, oun hounte nashenn trouyel, oun mangenn penge maro." 
Psalms109:11 Kova, kay leske love patsas, kova lell lestar lauter, hoy les hi. Menshe, kay gar lestar hi, lenn lauter, koleske yob boudras." 
Psalms109:12 Kek te krell leske lačepen, oun kek krell peskro dji pre leskre čavenge." 
Psalms109:13 Kre, te merenn kolla vin, kay pal leste venna. Leskre čavengre čaven venn kek čave bouder, yaake te vell lengro lab bistedo." 
Psalms109:14 Baro Devel, ma biste i doosh leskre phourendar! Ma biste o čilačo koova, hoy leskri day kras!" 
Psalms109:15 Mouk kova, hoy le kran, hako tsiro glan tire yaka te vell! Kre, te vell leskro lab bistedo an o tselo them!" 
Psalms109:16 Yob kras kek lačepen i vavarenge. I čorvelen oun bibarhtelen las yob palla, ninna koles, kay les kek zoor bouder his, te dell lo les moulo." 
Psalms109:17 Yob kamas o praasepen. Yaake mou vell kova ninna ap leste! Yob kamas gar te rakrell i barht pral yekeste vin. Kanna, mou ačell i barht dour lestar!" 
Psalms109:18 Yob rivas o praasepen an har i gad. Doleske mou djal o praasepen an leste dren har pani, hoy piyell lo, oun har djet, koleha makell lo pes dren." 
Psalms109:19 Mou ačell o praasepen ap leste čiddo har i ripen, oun har i pereskri dori, hoy yob hako dives troul peste čivella." 
Psalms109:20 Kova vell i phagi o baro Deblestar kolenge, kay doosh ap mande pre anenn oun čilačo koova pral mande rakrenn." 
Psalms109:21 Tou, miro baro Devel, ab mantsa, te hadap tiro lab. Me rikrau ap tiro lačepen. Ab ap miri rig oun le man vin dran i čilače vasta!" 
Psalms109:22 Me hom čorvelo oun kek hi ap miri rig. Miro dji hi phagedo. 
Psalms109:23 Miro djipen nashella mandar yaake har o dives, te vell i rat. Oun me vau krik phourdedo har i stepaskro." 
Psalms109:24 Rhom či yaake boud divessa, te hi mire heryen bouder kek zoor, oun man hi kek thulepen ap i kokale." 
Psalms109:25 Kolla, kay anan doosh ap mande pre, san pral mande. Te dikenn le man, rissrenn le pengre yaka." 
Psalms109:26 Miro baro Devel, ab ap miri rig! Tou hal yaake lačo. Sike tiro lačepen ap mande!" 
Psalms109:27 Mouk len te dikell, te kreh tou kova, te vell kova lauter toutar." 
Psalms109:28 Yon te praasenn man, palle de tou man barht! Yon te hadenn pen ap mande pre, palle kre, te hounte ladjenn le pen! Yaake te nay sau me pale!" 
Psalms109:29 An i ladj ap kolende lauterende, kay anan doosh ap mande pre. Lengri ladj mou vell yaake baro, te venn le latar čakedo har i bayah." 
Psalms109:30 Me kamau man te parkrap pash o baro Debleste o tselo djiyestar, oun les sharell glan boud menshende." 
Psalms109:31 Yob vell o čorveleske ap i rig, oun lell les vin dran i vasta kolendar, kay penenn: “Yob hounte vell maredo.”" 
Psalms110:1 I gili o Davidestar. O baro Devel penas ap miro baro rayeste: “Besh tout ap miri čači rig! Kamau te čivap kolen tel tire herya, kay touke čilačepen kamenn.”" 
Psalms110:2 O baro Devel kras, te val tou baro ray ap i berga Sion, oun yob krell tiro them baro oun bareder. “Ab ray”, penell lo, “pral lauterende, kay hadan pen ap toute.”" 
Psalms110:3 Tou te deh tire lourden gole, venn le lauter o djiyestar touha. Shoukar an-rido hi kol terne morsha, kay venn pash toute ap o Debleskri berga, raylo har o dives, te djal o kham pre." 
Psalms110:4 O baro Devel das pes sovel, oun yob las lat gar pale. Yob penas: “Tou hal rashay hako tsireske, savo har o Melkisedek his.”" 
Psalms110:5 O baro Devel hi ap tiri čači rig tardo, oun dell bare rayen khetne ap ko dives, kay leskri rholi vella," 
Psalms110:6 oun yob o čačepen vin rakrella, oun an hake themma boud menshen i phagi della. Palle hi boud menshe moulo čiddo ap o bourhlo them. Boud pralstoune venn khetne dino." 
Psalms110:7 O baro ray piyell dran o pani, hoy pash leskro drom nashell, oun lell nevi zoor oun vell o zorleder." 
Psalms111:1 Sharedo vell o baro Devel! Miro tselo djiyestar sharau o baro Debles kote, kay kolla khetne venna, kay o čačo drom djan." 
Psalms111:2 Baro hi kova, hoy o baro Devel lauter kras. Koneske kova an o shero trouyel djal, kova vell barhtelo." 
Psalms111:3 Kova, hoy o baro Devel krella, hi raylo oun shoukar. Oun leskro čačepen ačella hako tsireske." 
Psalms111:4 Yob moukell men gar te bistrell, hoy lo an peskri bari zoor kras. Lačo oun kamlo hi lo." 
Psalms111:5 Rhapen dell lo kolen, kay djivenn leha. An kek tsiro bistrell lo ko lab, hoy das lo lengre phourende." 
Psalms111:6 Yob sikras peskre menshende, har zorelo yob hi, oun das len i themma vavar menshendar, te venn le lengre." 
Psalms111:7 Yob rikrell peskro lab, oun lauter, hoy krell lo, hi čačo. Oun mer nay rikrah men ap leskre laba." 
Psalms111:8 Kal laba ačenna hako tsireske. Čačo hi le, oun mer te rikras men ap lende." 
Psalms111:9 O baro Devel las peskre menshen vin dran i čilače vasta, oun kras lentsa vin, te venn le leskre menshe hako tsiro. Yob kokres hi lengro Devel. Baro hi lo!" 
Psalms111:10 Koon djivell o baro Debleha, kova lell gosvepen. Gosevo hi hakeno, kay ap o baro Debleskre laba shounella. Te sharas les hako tsiro!" 
Psalms112:1 Sharedo vell o baro Devel! Barhtelo hi kova, kay djivell o baro Debleha, oun rikrell pes o tselo djiyestar ap leskre laba." 
Psalms112:2 Koleskre čave venn zoreles an o tselo them. O baro Devel čivell peskri barht ap kolengre čavende, kay o čačo drom djan." 
Psalms112:3 Lengre familye venn bravelo. Len hi lauter, hoy len hounte vell djipaske. Oun lengro čačepen ačell hako tsireske." 
Psalms112:4 Ninna an i kali rat vell i momeli kolenge, kay o čačo drom djan, kolenge, kay hi lačo oun kamlo oun djan pal o čačepen." 
Psalms112:5 Mishto djal koleske, kay krell peskro dji pre, oun patsell i vavaren vin, oun krell peskro koova yaake har čačo hi." 
Psalms112:6 Yob ačell zoreles tardo hako tsireske. Kova, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, vell an kek tsiro bistedo." 
Psalms112:7 Les vell kek daar, te shounell lo, kay čilačo koova vella. Yob dikell peskro tselo djiyeha ap o baro Debleste." 
Psalms112:8 Zoreles ačell leskro dji, oun darell gar, bis te yob tele dikell ap kolende, kay leske čilačepen kaman." 
Psalms112:9 Yob dell boud i čorvelen. Leskro čačepen ačell hako tsireske. Leskri zoor oun leskro raylepen vell baro. 
Psalms112:10 O čilačo dikell kova oun rhoyrell pes. I rholyatar dandrell lo i danda khetne. Yob merell, oun kova, hoy kamas lo te krell, hi čičeske." 
Psalms113:1 Sharedo vell o baro Devel! Sharenn o baro Debles, t'mer, kay han leskre boudepangre! Sharenn leskro lab!" 
Psalms113:2 Mou vell o baro Debles sharedo kanna oun hako tsireske! 
Psalms113:3 Mou vell lo sharedo kotar, kay o kham pre djala bis kote, kay o kham tele djala!" 
Psalms113:4 O baro Devel hi o ray pral i menshende an hake themma. Leskro raylepen djal dour pral o bolepen. 
Psalms113:5 Koon an o bolepen oun ap i phoub hi yaake har maro baro Devel? 
Psalms113:6 Yob hi beshdo an o pralstunepen, oun dikell tele ap o bolepen oun i phoub." 
Psalms113:7 Koles, kay či hi, hadell lo dran i čik vin, oun o čorveles hadell lo pre dran i yagakri čik," 
Psalms113:8 oun dell les i beshepaskri pash i pralstunende leskre menshendar. 
Psalms113:9 Kolat, kay kek čave nay las, hadell lo, te vell li i barhteli day. Sharedo vell o baro Devel!" 
Psalms114:1 Har o Israel dran o them Egiptia vin djas, har o Yakobeskre menshe kol menshen moukan, kolengro rakepen yon gar hayvan," 
Psalms114:2 koy vas o them Youda kova them, kay le o baro Debles an-mangan. Oun o Israel vas kova them, pral koleste yob o baro ray hi." 
Psalms114:3 Har van le pash o baro pani, nashas o pani peske. Har van le pash o pani Yordan, djas o pani pale." 
Psalms114:4 I berge stan har bakre, oun i tikne berge har terne bakre." 
Psalms114:5 “Tou baro pani, hoy his touha, te nashal touke, oun touha, tou pani Yordan, te djal pale?" 
Psalms114:6 Oun t'mer berge, hoy his t'mentsa, te stan har i bakre? Hoy his t'mentsa, t'mer tikne berge, te stan har terne bakre?”" 
Psalms114:7 O baro Devel his koy. Doleske vas kova yaake. Hakeno ap i phoub hounte trissell glan o baro Debleste, ko Debleste o Yakobestar." 
Psalms114:8 Yob hi kova, kay kras pani dran i baro bar, oun moukas dran barra tikne panya te nashell."
