Psalms115:1 Tou kokres, baro Devel, vess sharedo! Tou hounte vess sharedo, gar mer! Tou hal kova, kay lačo hi oun hako tsiro peskro lab rikrell." 
Psalms115:2 Hoske penenn i vavar menshe: “Kay hi lengro Devel?” 
Psalms115:3 Maro Devel hi an o bolepen, oun yob nay krell lauter, hoy lo kamella." 
Psalms115:4 Lengre debla hi dran roup oun sonakay. Menshengre vasta kran len. 
Psalms115:5 I mouy hi len, oun yon nay rakrenn gar. Yaka hi len oun yon nay dikenn gar." 
Psalms115:6 Kanda hi len, oun yon nay shounenn gar. I nak hi len, oun yon nay soungenn gar." 
Psalms115:7 Len hi vasta, oun yon nay taprenn či an. Herya hi len, oun yon nay djan gar. Kek gole vell dran lengri meen." 
Psalms115:8 Kol menshe, kay save deblen kran, oun ap lende patsenn, mou venn le yaake har yon!" 
Psalms115:9 T'mer Israelitarya, rikrenn t'men ap o baro Debleste! Yob vell ap t'mari rig, oun rikrell peskre vasta pral t'mende." 
Psalms115:10 T'mer rashaya dran o kheer Aron, rikrenn t'men ap o baro Debleste! Yob vell ap t'mari rig, oun rikrell peskre vasta pral t'mende." 
Psalms115:11 T'mer, kay djivenn o baro Debleha, rikrenn t'men ap leste! Yob vell ap t'mari rig, oun rikrell peskre vasta pral t'mende." 
Psalms115:12 O baro Devel bistras men gar, oun čivell peskri barht ap mende. Yob čivell peskri barht ap o kheer Israel. Yob čivell peskri barht ap i rashayende dran o kheer Aron." 
Psalms115:13 Yob čivell peskri barht ap hakeneste, kay djivell leha, ava, ap i tiknen oun ap i baren." 
Psalms115:14 Mou dell t'men o baro Devel boud čave, t'menge oun t'mare čavenge!" 
Psalms115:15 Mou vell ap t'mende i barht kolestar, kay o bolepen oun i phoub kras." 
Psalms115:16 O bolepen hi o baro Debleske kokres. I phoub das yob i menshende. 
Psalms115:17 Baro Devel, i moule sharenn tout gar, kek, kay an o moulengro them djal, kote, kay či bouder rakedo vella." 
Psalms115:18 Mer, i djide, sharah tout kanna oun hako tsireske. Sharedo vell o baro Devel!" 
Psalms116:1 Me kamau o baro Debles o djiyestar, yob shounas man, har rovom me ap leste." 
Psalms116:2 Leskro kand hi mange pre. Doleske rakrau leha yaake rah har djivau. 
Psalms116:3 O merepen pandas man an peskre shelle. Djinom bouder gar dren oun vin, yaake baro his miri daar te hounte meroms oun djoms pash i moulende." 
Psalms116:4 Kote dom gole ap o baro Debleste: “Me mangau tout, baro Devel, le miro djipen vin dran o merepen!”" 
Psalms116:5 O baro Devel hi lačo oun čačo, oun o djiyestar kamlo hi maro Devel." 
Psalms116:6 O baro Devel dell yak ap kolende, kay nay denn gar kokres ap pende yak. Har his man kek zoor, vas lo mange ap i rig." 
Psalms116:7 Me penau ap miro dji: “Ma dare bouder! O baro Devel his lačo ap toute.” 
Psalms116:8 Tou lal man vin dran o merepen. Mire sva khossal tou, oun ap mire herya dal yak, te perap gar." 
Psalms116:9 Yaake djivau glan toute kate ap kay phoub, kay i menshe djide hi." 
Psalms116:10 Me patsom o Debles, ninna te penom: “Man hi kek zoor bouder.”" 
Psalms116:11 Homs yaake phagedo, te penom: “I tsele menshe hi rhorhene.”" 
Psalms116:12 Har nay krau me kova pale mishto miro baro Debleske, hoy yob lauter mange kras?" 
Psalms116:13 Me anau les i khoro mool, te parkrap man pash leste, kay las lo man vin dran o merepen." 
Psalms116:14 Glan peskre tsele menshende anau o baro Debleske kova, hoy dom man sovel glan leste." 
Psalms116:15 O baro Devel dikell i doukentsa ap o merepen peskre menshendar. 
Psalms116:16 Ah, baro Devel, me hom yek kolendar, kay touke boudrenn. Ava, tiro boudepaskro hom oun boudrau touke har miri day kras. Tou kral i shelle pre, hoy pandan man." 
Psalms116:17 Pash toute kamau me man te parkrell, oun tout an-mangell." 
Psalms116:18 Glan tire tsele menshende anau touke, hoy dom man sovel glan toute," 
Psalms116:19 oun dau les toute kote ap i platsa glan tiro kheer an o foro Yerusalem. Sharedo vell o baro Devel! 
Psalms117:1 Sharenn o baro Debles, t'mer menshe ap i tseli phoub! Sharenn les, t'mer menshe an i tsele themma!" 
Psalms117:2 Leskro lačepen oun čačepen hi ap mende čiddo yaake rah har i phoub koy hi. Sharedo vell o baro Devel! 
Psalms118:1 Parkrenn t'men pash o baro Debleste! Yob hi kamlo, oun leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske." 
Psalms118:2 Yaake hounte penenn i Israelitarya: Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske. 
Psalms118:3 Yaake hounte penell o Aroneskro kheer: Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske. 
Psalms118:4 Yaake hounte penenn kolla, kay djivenn o baro Debleha: Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske." 
Psalms118:5 Har tapras man i daar, dom me gole ap o baro Debleste, oun yob shounas man, oun kras miro dji zoreles." 
Psalms118:6 O baro Devel hi pash mande. Me darau gar. Hoy nay krell man i mensho? 
Psalms118:7 O baro Devel hi pash mande, te vell lo ap miri rig tardo. Yaake dikau mire yakentsa, har čivell lo kolen tel mande, kay kamenn mange čilačepen." 
Psalms118:8 Hi feteder te rikras men ap o baro Debleste, har te rikras men ap i menshende." 
Psalms118:9 Hi feteder te rikras men ap o baro Debleste, har te rikras men ap i rayende." 
Psalms118:10 Boud menshe his troul mande, kay kaman mange čilačepen. An i zoor o baro Deblestar nay tradom len pale." 
Psalms118:11 Haki rigyatar van le ap mande pre. An i zoor o baro Deblestar nay tradom len pale. 
Psalms118:12 Yon peran ap mande pre har i bine. An i zoor o baro Deblestar nay tradom len pale. Har i yag sik vin djal, hoy an i soubyengre bourra rhačell, yaake sik his le krik." 
Psalms118:13 Har dan le man i zoreli dap, te perap, vas o baro Devel ap miri rig." 
Psalms118:14 Lestar vell miri zoor. Leske givau miri gili. Yob vas oun las man vin dran i čilače vasta. 
Psalms118:15 Shoun koy gili, hoy givenn o Debleskre menshe barhteles an pengre khera: “O baro Devel hi o zorleder. Yob hi o zorleder an o kourepen." 
Psalms118:16 Leskro čačo vast hi hadedo: Yob hi o zorleder an o kourepen.” 
Psalms118:17 Me merau gar. Na-a, ačau djido, oun penau i menshenge, hoy o baro Devel lauter kras." 
Psalms118:18 Ninna te das lo man zoreles, moukas lo man gar te merell." 
Psalms118:19 Krenn mange i bare voudya pre an o Debleskro kheer, te djap dren, te parkrap man pash miro baro Debleste." 
Psalms118:20 Kate hi o baro Debleskro voudar: i Debleskre menshe djana kote dren. 
Psalms118:21 Me parkrau man pash toute, te shounal tou man, oun val ap miri rig." 
Psalms118:22 Ko bar, hoy i boudepangre ap i rig vitsran, kova vas ko zorelo bar, ap koleste o kheer tardo hi." 
Psalms118:23 O baro Devel kras kova. Oun kova hi menge i baro koova, hoy hayvah gar." 
Psalms118:24 Kava hi o dives, hoy o baro Devel kras. Givenn oun khelenn i barhtyatar pral leste!" 
Psalms118:25 Baro Devel, ab ap mari rig! De men barht, te djal lauter mishto!" 
Psalms118:26 Sharedo vell kova, kay vell an o baro Debleskro lab. Kate, dran o Debleskro kheer rakrah o Debleskri barht pral t'mende vin." 
Psalms118:27 O baro Devel hi kokres o Devel. Kamles dikell lo ap mende. Avenn, lenn palmtikre patria an o vast, oun djan khelepah glan o Debleskri rhačepaskri!" 
Psalms118:28 Tou hal miro Devel. Pash toute kamau man te parkrell. Miro Devel, tout kamau me te sharell." 
Psalms118:29 Parkrenn t'men pash o baro Debleste! Yob hi kamlo, oun leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske." 
Psalms119:1 Har barhtelo hi kolla, kay yaake djivenna, te hounte čingrell o Devel gar lentsa, kolla, kay ap o baro Debleskro drom djana." 
Psalms119:2 Har barhtelo hi kolla, kay yaake djivenn, har yob lenge sikras, oun pengro tselo djiyestar ap leste shounenn." 
Psalms119:3 Kolla krenn kek čilačepen oun djan ap o Debleskre dromma. 
Psalms119:4 Tou, baro Devel, penal menge, hoy te kras mer, te rikras mer kova hako tsiro." 
Psalms119:5 An miro tselo djipen kamoms te krap, hoy mandar kameh." 
Psalms119:6 Te dau yak ap tire laba, krau či te hounte ladjap man." 
Psalms119:7 Me parkrau man pash toute o tselo djiyestar, te sikreh tou mange tire čačepaskre laba." 
Psalms119:8 Me kamau te krap, hoy mandar kameh. Ma mouk man kokres!" 
Psalms119:9 Har nay djal i terno morsh peskro drom yaake, te ačell peskro djipen djoudjo? Kova nay krell lo, te rikrell lo pes ap tiro lab." 
Psalms119:10 Miro tselo djiyeha rodau tout. Ma mouk man te moukap tire laba. 
Psalms119:11 Me rikrau tiro lab an miro dji, te anap kek doosh ap mande." 
Psalms119:12 Sharedo vess tou, mo baro Devel! Tou sikral mange, hoy mandar kameh." 
Psalms119:13 Me penau i vavarenge, har tou o čačepen vi-rakral." 
Psalms119:14 Me hom yaake barhtelo pral tiro drom, kay tou mange sikral, har te djivap. Kova hi mange shoukeder har i baro bravlepen." 
Psalms119:15 Me rakrau kolestar, hoy tou menge penal, te kras kova, oun dau yak, te ačap ap tiro drom." 
Psalms119:16 Mange hi shoukar, te krap, hoy tou mandar kameh, oun bistrau tire laba gar." 
Psalms119:17 Ab lačes ap mande, tiro boudepaskro, te djivap oun rikrap tiro lab." 
Psalms119:18 Kre mange i yaka pre, te nay dikap har shoukar hi te djap tiro drom." 
Psalms119:19 Me hom gar khere ap kay phoub. Mouk man te hayvap tire laba! 
Psalms119:20 Miro dji rhačrell, te dikap har tou rakreh o čačepen vin." 
Psalms119:21 Tou čingreh pral kolende, kay phourdenn pen pre. Praasedo hi kolla, kay moukan tire laba." 
Psalms119:22 Mouk kek ladj ap mande te vell! Mouk len gar pral mande te sal! Me djau miro drom yaake har tou mange sikral. 
Psalms119:23 I raya hi khetne beshdo, oun rakrenna, har te krenn le mange čilačepen. Me hom tiro boudepaskro oun bistrau gar, hoy tou mandar kameh." 
Psalms119:24 Tire laba, hoy sikrenn mange, har te djivap, krenn man barhtelo. Yon hi mange har i lačo maal, ap koleste me shounau." 
Psalms119:25 An i čik hom vitsedo. De man pale nevi zoor yaake har tou mange penal! 
Psalms119:26 Me penom touke lauter dran miro djipen, oun tou shounal man. Sike mande, hoy mandar kameh!" 
Psalms119:27 Mouk man te hayvap, hoy tire laba mange kamenn te penell. Yaake te rakrap pral ko baro zorelo koova, hoy tou kral." 
Psalms119:28 Miro dji rovell yaake te hi man bouder kek zoor. De man pale nevi zoor, yaake har penal." 
Psalms119:29 Rike man pale i rhorheno dromestar! An tiro lačepen sike man, har te djap ap tiro drom." 
Psalms119:30 Me kamau tiro drom an o čačepen te djal, oun yaake djivell har tire čačepaskre laba menge penenn." 
Psalms119:31 Me rikrau man zoreles ap tire laba, hoy mange sikrenn, har te djivap. Baro Devel, ma mouk i vavaren pral mande te sal!" 
Psalms119:32 Miro dji hi dour pre, te krap lauter yaake har tou mandar kameh." 
Psalms119:33 Sike tou man, baro Devel, har te krap kova lauter yaake, har tou mandar kameh, te djivap miro tselo djipen yaake, har tou kameh." 
Psalms119:34 Mouk man lauter hayvell, te dap yak ap tiro drom, oun shounap ap toute o tselo djiyestar." 
Psalms119:35 Ab mange ap i rig, te rikrap tire laba! Shoukar hi le mange." 
Psalms119:36 Kre te dikap ap tire laba, hoy mange sikrenn, har te djivap, oun dikap gar ap o bravlepen!" 
Psalms119:37 Kre, te dikap gar ap kova, hoy či moldo hi, oun de man pale nevi zoor ap tiro drom!" 
Psalms119:38 Me hom tiro boudepaskro. Rike mange tiro lab, ko lab, hoy tou lauterenge dal, kay moukenn tout pengro ray te vell." 
Psalms119:39 Le mandar koy ladj krik, kolatar darau. Yaake har tou o čačepen an o vast leh, hi mishto." 
Psalms119:40 Pen mange, hoy te krap touke! Tou hal an o čačepen tardo. De man pale nevi zoor an miro djipen!" 
Psalms119:41 Baro Devel, ab mange lačes, oun ab mange ap i rig yaake har tou penal," 
Psalms119:42 te vell man i lab, hoy penau koleske, kay praasell man. Me lau tout pash tiro lab." 
Psalms119:43 Kre te penap hako tsiro o čačepen! Me dikau ap toute, har tou o čačepen an o vast leh." 
Psalms119:44 Me kamau tiro drom te djal kanna oun hako tsiro. 
Psalms119:45 Hoy tou mange penal, krau me. Doleske djau barhteles miro drom." 
Psalms119:46 Glan i bare rayende rakrau kolestar, hoy tou menge penal, hoy te kras mer, oun ladjau man gar." 
Psalms119:47 Kamau tire laba o djiyestar, oun hom barhtelo te rikrap man ap lende." 
Psalms119:48 Me hadau tire laba pre, oun kamau len o djiyestar, oun moukau len an miro shero trouyel te djal." 
Psalms119:49 Ma biste tiro lab, hoy dal tou man, tiro boudepaskres! Dikau ap tiro lab, te vell yaake har tou les penal." 
Psalms119:50 Har mange o djipen phares his, dal tou man nevi zoor. Tiro lab moukas man pre djivell." 
Psalms119:51 Ninna te sanenn pre-phourde menshe pral mande, moukom gar tiro drom." 
Psalms119:52 Baro Devel, te vell mange an o shero, har lal tou an o phouro tsiro o čačepen an o vast, palle krell kova miro dji pale zorelo." 
Psalms119:53 I rholi taprell man, te dikau, har i čilače moukan tiro drom." 
Psalms119:54 Kate ap kay phoub, kay me gar khere hom, givau gilya pral tire laba." 
Psalms119:55 Rati veh tou mange an o shero, baro Devel, te djap ap tiro drom." 
Psalms119:56 Mange hi shoukar te krap kova, hoy tou menge penal." 
Psalms119:57 Me penom mange: O baro Devel hi o pralstouno an miro djipen. Pal leskre laba kamau te djivell. 
Psalms119:58 Miro tselo djiyeha rodau me tiro kamlepen. Ab mange lačes yaake har tou les penal. 
Psalms119:59 Me dau yak, har me miro djipen djivap, oun djau tiro drom yaake har tou les menge sikral." 
Psalms119:60 Me tradom man, oun krau sik, hoy tou mandar kameh." 
Psalms119:61 I čilače čivan dorya vin troul mande, te perap dren. Me bistrau tiro drom gar." 
Psalms119:62 Mashkral an i rat stau me pre, te sharap tout, kay lal tou o čačepen an o vast." 
Psalms119:63 Me rikrau man pash kolende, kay djivenn touha oun krenn, hoy tou peneh." 
Psalms119:64 Baro Devel, lačo hal i menshenge ap i tseli phoub. Sike mande, hoy tou mandar kameh!" 
Psalms119:65 Tou hals lačes ap mande, tiro boudepaskro, yaake har tou kova penal." 
Psalms119:66 Sike mande te hayvap oun djinap, hoy te krap! Tire laba hi mishto. Kova patsau." 
Psalms119:67 Har djom tiro dromestar tele, dal tou man i phagi. Kanna rikrau tiro lab." 
Psalms119:68 Tou hal lačo oun kamlo. Sike mande, hoy tou mandar kameh!" 
Psalms119:69 Kol pre-phourde anan rhorhepen pre ap mande. Miro tselo djiyestar krau me kova, hoy tou menge penal." 
Psalms119:70 Kolla menshe pandan pengre djia, te hayvenn le gar tiro lab. Me hom barhtelo, te djap tiro drom." 
Psalms119:71 His mishto mange, te dal man i phagi, te shounap ap toute oun krau hoy tou mandar kameh." 
Psalms119:72 Tiro drom kamau me boudeder har boud zerya kotya sonakay oun roup. 
Psalms119:73 Tire vasta kran man oun rikran man. Kre, te hayvap tire laba!" 
Psalms119:74 Kolla, kay djivenn touha, venn barhtelo, te dikenn le, har patsau ap tiro lab." 
Psalms119:75 Baro Devel, me djinau, tou te deh i phagi, djah tou pal o čačepen. Touke his čačo har dal man i phagi." 
Psalms119:76 Kre miro dji pale zorelo dran tiro lačepen, yaake har tou penal ap mande, tiro boudepaskro." 
Psalms119:77 Kre tiro dji mange pre, te djivap! Me hom barhtelo, te djap tiro drom." 
Psalms119:78 Kre, te hounte ladjenn pen kol pre-phourde, kay rhorhepen ap mande pre anan. Miro djiyeha rakrau pral kova, hoy tou menge penal, te kras mer." 
Psalms119:79 Ah, te rikrens kolla pash mande, kay djivenn touha oun prindjrenn tire laba, hoy menge sikrenn, har te djivas." 
Psalms119:80 Mouk miro dji ap tiro drom te ačell, te krap, hoy mandar kameh, yaake te hounte ladjap man gar." 
Psalms119:81 Miro dji nashell pal toute: Ab ap miri rig! Me dikau ap toute, te rakress mantsa." 
Psalms119:82 Me dikau mange i yaka vin pal kova, hoy tou mange penal. Kaana veh tou, oun khosseh mange i sva tele?" 
Psalms119:83 Me perom an mande khetne har i molyakro gono, hoy pash i yag čiddo hi. Ninna te hi man bouder kek zoor, bistrau me gar, hoy tou mandar kameh." 
Psalms119:84 Har rah, baro Devel, rikreh tout pale, bis te deh kolen i phagi, kay man, tiro boudepaskres, palla lenn." 
Psalms119:85 Kol pre-phourde kran rhebya, te perap dren, kolla, kay djan gar ap tiro drom." 
Psalms119:86 Tire tsele laba hi o čačepen. Kol pre-phourde lenn man palla oun anenn rhorhepen ap mande pre. Ab ap miri rig! 
Psalms119:87 His bouder gar boud, palle marans le man an kava them. Me moukom gar tire laba, hoy menge penenn, hoy te kras mer." 
Psalms119:88 Tou hal yaake lačo, de man pale nevi zoor, te rikrap tire laba, hoy sikrenn menge har te djivas." 
Psalms119:89 Baro Devel, tiro lab ačella hako tsireske, oun hi zoreles tardo an o bolepen." 
Psalms119:90 Tiro čačepen ačell yaake rah har menshe koy hi. Tou kral i phoub oun yoy ačella tardo. 
Psalms119:91 Yaake har tou kamal, hi li gomme kava dives tardo. Lauter ap i phoub hounte krell, hoy tou kameh." 
Psalms119:92 Te voms gar barhtelo te djap tiro drom, palle meroms, yaake phares his miro djipen." 
Psalms119:93 An kek tsiro kamau te bistrap hoy tou menge penal, te kras mer. Dran tire laba rikreh tou man djido." 
Psalms119:94 Me hom tiro oun kamau te krap, hoy mange peneh. Doleske ab ap miri rig!" 
Psalms119:95 I čilače lenn man an i yak, te denn le man moulo. Me dau yak ap tire laba, hoy menge sikrenn, har te djivas mer." 
Psalms119:96 Me dikom te ačell či, vitar gar kova, hoy mishto hi. Tiro lab kokres ačella tardo." 
Psalms119:97 O djiyestar kamau tiro drom te djal. O tselo dives hi tire laba an miro shero. 
Psalms119:98 Tire laba hi hako tsiro miro bravlepen, oun krenn man gosveder har kolen, kay mange čilačepen kamenn." 
Psalms119:99 Me rakrau miro djiyeha pral tire laba, hoy menge sikrenn, har te djivas. Doleske hayvau boudeder har mire sikepangre." 
Psalms119:100 Me krau, hoy tou menge penal. Doleske hayvau boudeder har i phoure." 
Psalms119:101 Hako čilačo dromestar rikrom mire herya pale, te rikrap tiro lab." 
Psalms119:102 Me krau pal tire čačepaskre laba. Tou hals miro sikepaskro. 
Psalms119:103 Tiro lab hi har i goudlo rhapen mange, ava, goudleder har gvin hi lo." 
Psalms119:104 Tiro lab krell man gosevo. Doleske nay dikau gar rhorhene dromma glan i yaka. 
Psalms119:105 Tiro lab hi har i momeli, hoy sikrell, kay te djap, ava, i momeli ap miro drom." 
Psalms119:106 Me dom man sovel, oun me kamau lat te rikrell: Kamau te djap pal tire čačepaskre laba." 
Psalms119:107 Miro dji hi phares doukedo, baro Devel. De man pale nevi zoor yaake har tou mange penal!" 
Psalms119:108 Baro Devel, dik lačes ap mire laba, kolentsa parkrau man pash toute. Sike mande tire čačepaskre laba." 
Psalms119:109 Miro djipen hi hako tsiro gar dour o merepastar. Tiro drom bistrau me gar. 
Psalms119:110 I čilače čivan dorya vin, te taprenn le man. Me moukau gar tire laba, hoy menge penenn, hoy te kras mer." 
Psalms119:111 Tire laba, hoy menge sikrenn, har te djivas, hi mange kouč oun ačenna mange hako tsiro. Ava, yon hi kolla, hoy miro dji barhteles krenn." 
Psalms119:112 Me krau miro dji pre, te krap, hoy tou mandar kameh kanna oun hako tsiro." 
Psalms119:113 Me rhoyrau man ap kolende, kolen douy djia hi, tiro drom kamau me o djiyestar." 
Psalms119:114 Tou hal kova, pash koleste man khatrau, oun koon peskre vasta pral mande rikrella. Doleske dikau ap tiro lab, hoy tou man dal." 
Psalms119:115 Djan pale mandar, t'mer, hoy krenn o čilačepen! Me rikrau ap i laba miro Deblestar." 
Psalms119:116 Rike man ap o djipen yaake har dal man tiro lab. Ma mouk man čičeske ap toute te dikell. 
Psalms119:117 Hade man pre, te nay taprell man kek, oun me kamau hako tsiro te krell, hoy mandar kameh." 
Psalms119:118 Kolen, kay gar krenna, hoy lendar kameh, tradeh tou toutar. Lengro rhorhepen hi čičeske." 
Psalms119:119 I čilačen khosseh tou krik kay phoubyatar har čik. Doleske kamau me tire laba, hoy menge sikrenn, har te djivas." 
Psalms119:120 Toutar darau yaake, te trissau. Tou deh i phagi kolen, kay shounan gar ap toute." 
Psalms119:121 Me krau o čačepen, oun djau o čačo drom. De man gar an o vast kolendar, kay kamenn ap mande pre te djan." 
Psalms119:122 Me hom tiro boudepaskro. Rake mange mishto, te nay djan gar i pre-phourde i zoryah ap mande pre." 
Psalms119:123 Mire yaka nashenn pal toute: Le man vin dran o čilačepen, yaake har tou penal an tiro čačepen." 
Psalms119:124 Ab lačes mange, kay tiro boudepaskro hom, oun sike mange, hoy tou mandar kameh." 
Psalms119:125 Tiro boudepaskro hom me. Mouk man tire laba te hayvell, hoy menge sikrenn, har te djivas." 
Psalms119:126 Kanna hi o tsiro, kay o baro Devel hounte krell čomone. Yon peran tiro dromestar tele." 
Psalms119:127 Me kamau tire laba boudeder har o sonakay, ava, boudeder har o lačeder sonakay." 
Psalms119:128 Tire tsele laba, hoy menge penal, hi mange mishto. Kamau či te djinell i rhorheno dromestar." 
Psalms119:129 Tire laba, hoy sikrenn menge, har te djivas, kolla sikrenn tiri bari zoor. Doleske rikrau len o djiyestar." 
Psalms119:130 Te hayvah tiro lab, palle krell men kova barhtelo, oun ninna kolla, kay či djinenn, venn gosevo." 
Psalms119:131 Me krau miro mouy dour pre, oun piyau tiro lab, yaake boud troush hi man pal tire laba." 
Psalms119:132 Risse tout pash mande, oun ab mange lačes, yaake har kolenge hal, kay kamenn tout o djiyestar." 
Psalms119:133 Mouk te ačap zoreles ap tiro drom, yaake har tou penal, te vell o čilačepen kek ray pral mande!" 
Psalms119:134 Le man vin dran i vasta kolendar, kay man tikno rikrenn, oun me kamau kova te krell, hoy tou menge penal." 
Psalms119:135 Dik lačes ap mande, tiro boudepaskro, oun sike mange, hoy tou mandar kameh!" 
Psalms119:136 Rovau boud sva pral kolende, kay moukenn tiro drom." 
Psalms119:137 Baro Devel, tou hal an o čačepen tardo, oun tire čačepaskre laba hi mishto." 
Psalms119:138 Tire laba, hoy sikrenn menge, har te djivas, kolla lauter hi čačo oun mishto." 
Psalms119:139 I rholi tapras man oun kamas man pre te rhačrell, har dikom, kay bistran kolla tire laba, kay mange o djipen phares krenna." 
Psalms119:140 Tire laba hi lačo oun čačo, oun me, tiro boudepaskro, kamau len miro tselo djiyeha." 
Psalms119:141 Ninna te hom gar an-diklo, oun i menshe dikenn tele ap mande, bistrau me či, hoy menge penal, te kras mer." 
Psalms119:142 Tiro čačepen ačella hako tsiro, oun tiro drom hi čačo." 
Psalms119:143 Ninna te hi miro djipen pharo oun i daar tapras man, hom barhtelo pral tire laba." 
Psalms119:144 Tire laba, hoy menge sikrenn, har te djivas, ačenna hako tsiro čačo. Sike mande, har te hayvap len! Palle djivau." 
Psalms119:145 O tselo djiyeha dom me gole. Shoun man, mo baro Devel! Me kamau lauter te krell, hoy tou mandar kameh." 
Psalms119:146 Ap toute dom me gole. Ab ap miri rig! Me kamau man te rikrap ap tire laba, hoy mende sikrenn, har te djivas." 
Psalms119:147 Sik taysarlakro dau me gole ap toute, te vess ap miri rig, oun dau yak, te rakreh ap mande." 
Psalms119:148 Ninna an i rat djangrau pre, oun rakrau miro djiyeha pral tire laba." 
Psalms119:149 Shoun man, hoy me penau! Baro Devel! Tou hal yaake lačo! De man pale nevi zoor tire čačepaskre labentsa!" 
Psalms119:150 Kol čilače, kay man palla lenn, hi bouder gar dour mandar. Tiro dromestar hi le dour." 
Psalms119:151 Baro Devel, tou hal pash mande. Oun tire tsele laba hi o čačepen." 
Psalms119:152 I rah tsiro prindjrau tire laba, hoy menge sikrenn, har te djivas. Tou kral, te ačenn le hako tsireske." 
Psalms119:153 Dik, har djoungeles mange djal oun le man vin dran i bibarht! Tiro drom bistrom me gar." 
Psalms119:154 Le tou miro koova an tiro vast, oun le man vin dran i čilače vasta! De man pale nevi zoor yaake har tou mange penal!" 
Psalms119:155 I čilače krenn gar, hoy tou lendar kameh. Doleske čiveh tou len gar an o čačepen." 
Psalms119:156 Baro Devel, tou kreh tiro dji dour pre menge. De man pale nevi zoor tire čačepaskre labentsa!" 
Psalms119:157 Boud hi kolla, kay man palla lenna, oun les mange phares krenna. Me moukau gar tire laba, hoy menge sikrenn, har te djivas." 
Psalms119:158 Me nay dikau kol phoukepangren gar glan i yaka, kay rikrenn pen gar ap tire laba." 
Psalms119:159 Dik, har me kamau tire laba, hoy menge penenn, hoy te kras mer. Baro Devel, tou hal yaake lačo, de man pale nevi zoor!" 
Psalms119:160 Tiro tselo lab hi o čačepen. Oun tire tsele čačepaskre laba ačenna hako tsireske. 
Psalms119:161 Raya lenn man palla, ninna te krom me lenge či, tire laba kokres hi kolla, kay me darau man lendar." 
Psalms119:162 Pral tiro lab hom yaake barhtelo har yek, kay las boud bravlepen." 
Psalms119:163 Rhorhepen hi mange djoungelo, oun me nay dikau les gar glan i yaka. Tiro drom kamau me o djiyestar." 
Psalms119:164 Yaake har tou o čačepen vi-rakreh, hi kova mishto. Oun me sharau tout koleske efta kope an o dives." 
Psalms119:165 I bari barht hi kolen, kay tiro drom kamenna. Yon perenn gar tiro dromestar tele." 
Psalms119:166 Baro Devel, dikau ap toute, te čivess man an o čačepen, oun krau, hoy mandar kameh." 
Psalms119:167 Miro tselo djiyeha rikrau man ap tire laba, hoy menge sikrenn, har te djivas, oun kamau len boud oun boudeder." 
Psalms119:168 Me rikrau tire laba, hoy menge penenn, hoy te kras oun har te djivas; lauter, hoy krau, dikeh tou." 
Psalms119:169 Baro Devel, shoun miro ropen! Mouk man tire laba te hayvell, yaake har tou penal!" 
Psalms119:170 Shoun koy gole miro djiyestar! Le miro djipen vin dran i bibarht yaake har tou mange penal! 
Psalms119:171 Tou sikreh mange, hoy mandar kameh. Doleske kamell miro mouy touke te givell." 
Psalms119:172 Miri čip kamell tiro lab te givell. Tire tsele laba hi mishto oun čačo. 
Psalms119:173 De man tiro vast, hoy hadell man! Me krom miro dji pre, te rikrap tire laba, hoy menge penenn, hoy te kras mer." 
Psalms119:174 Baro Devel, miro tselo djiyeha kamau, te čivess man an o čačepen. Me hom barhtelo te djap tiro drom." 
Psalms119:175 Mouk man te djivell, te sharap tout, kre man zoreles tire čačepaskre labentsa." 
Psalms119:176 Me hom har i bakro, hoy nashedo djas. Rode man, tiro boudepaskres, me bistrom tire laba gar!" 
Psalms120:1 I gili te givell ap o drom an Yerusalem. Har djas mange djoungeles, dom gole ap o baro Debleste, oun yob shounas man." 
Psalms120:2 “Baro Devel” penom, “ab oun le man vin dran i vasta kol rhorhenendar, kay douy čipyentsa rakrenna.”" 
Psalms120:3 Hoy te krell lo t'mentsa, t'mer rhorhene? Havi phagi anell lo ap t'mende?" 
Psalms120:4 Yagengre fayle dell i kourepaskro karye ap t'mende! 
Psalms120:5 Havi bibarht hi mange, te hounte djivap mank i vi-themarya, pash i menshende, kay prindjrenn gar miro Debles." 
Psalms120:6 O tsiro vell mange rah, kay djivau pash kolende, kay kamenn o čingepen." 
Psalms120:7 Me kamau kek kourepen. Te penau kova lenge, krenn yon o čingepen." 
Psalms121:1 I gili te givell ap o drom an Yerusalem. Me dikau pre ap i berge. Kay vell kova, kay vell mange ap i rig?" 
Psalms121:2 Kova, kay vell ap miri rig, hi o baro Devel, yob, kay o bolepen oun i phoub kras." 
Psalms121:3 Yob moukell tout gar te perell. Yob sovell gar oun rikrell peskre vasta pral toute. 
Psalms121:4 Kova, kay rikrell peskre vasta pral o Israel, vell gar khino oun sovell gar." 
Psalms121:5 O baro Devel rikrell peskre vasta pral toute, oun ačell ap tiri rig." 
Psalms121:6 Yaake rhačrell tout gar o kham ap o dives, oun o čon nay krell touke či an i rat." 
Psalms121:7 O baro Devel rikrell peskre vasta pral tiro djipen, te taprell tout kek bibarht." 
Psalms121:8 O baro Devel rikrell peskre vasta pral toute ap tire tsele dromma, kote kay veh oun kote kay djah kanna oun hako tsiro." 
Psalms122:1 I gili o Davidestar te givell ap o drom an Yerusalem. Miro dji givas, har yon penan: Mer djah pash o baro Debleskro kheer." 
Psalms122:2 Kanna hi mare herya tardo an o bare voudya o forestar Yerusalem. 
Psalms122:3 Yerusalem hi i zorelo kerdo foro, kay i menshe khetne venna." 
Psalms122:4 Kote djan boud menshe pre, kol tsele menshe, kay o baro Debles an-mangenn. Kote sharenn le les, yaake har yob lenge penas." 
Psalms122:5 Kote hi beshdo ap pengre rayengre beshepangre kol bare raya, kay venna dran o kheer David, te rakrenn le o čačepen vin pral i menshende." 
Psalms122:6 Mangenn o Deblestar i barht pral o foro Yerusalem oun penenn: “Kolenge, kay kamenn tout, Yerusalem, mou djal mishto!" 
Psalms122:7 Kek kourepen te vell an toute! An tire shoukar khera te vell bravlepen!” 
Psalms122:8 Kamau, te djal mishto mire phralenge oun malenge. Doleske penau: “Mou vell kek kourepen an o foro!”" 
Psalms122:9 Kote hi maro baro Debleskro kheer tardo. Doleske mangau maro Debles, te djal lauter mishto i menshenge an Yerusalem." 
Psalms123:1 I gili te givell ap o drom an Yerusalem. Ap toute dikau pre, kay tou an o bolepen khere hal." 
Psalms123:2 Yaake har i boudepaskro ap o vast peskro rayestar dikella, oun i boudepaskretsa ap i vasta peskri ranyatar dikella, yaake dikah mer ap maro baro Debleste, bis te krell lo menge peskro dji pre." 
Psalms123:3 Kre tiro dji menge pre, baro Devel, kre tiro dji menge pre! Har rah dikenn le ap mende, har te vams či moldo!" 
Psalms123:4 Dik, har rah sanenn i bravele pral mende! Har rah dikenn kolla ap mende tele, kay pre-phourde hi." 
Psalms124:1 I gili o Davidestar te givell ap o drom an Yerusalem. Hoy vals, te vals o baro Devel gar ap mari rig? Pen les mange, tou Israel!" 
Psalms124:2 Te vals o baro Devel gar ap mari rig, har i menshe pre djan ap mende," 
Psalms124:3 palle rhans le men djides pre an pengri bari rholi ap mende. 
Psalms124:4 Palle tassals men o pani, hoy pral mende vas, oun tserdals men peha," 
Psalms124:5 oun čakrals men tel peste. 
Psalms124:6 Sharedo vell o baro Devel! Yob moukas men gar mank lengre danda. 
Psalms124:7 Mer nay nasham menge har i čirklo, dran koy netsa, hoy i čirklengro pral leste vitsras. Koy netsa vas paash kerdo, oun mer vam vin." 
Psalms124:8 Kova hi o baro Devel, kay las men vin, yob, kay o bolepen oun i phoub kras." 
Psalms125:1 I gili te givell ap o drom an Yerusalem. Kolla, hoy ap o baro Debleste patsenna, hi har i berga Sion, hoy zoreles tardo hi, oun ačell hake tsirenge." 
Psalms125:2 Yaake har i berge troul o foro Yerusalem hi, yaake hi o baro Devel troul peskre menshende kanna oun hako tsiro." 
Psalms125:3 I čilače ačenn gar i raya pral o them kolendar, kay an o čačepen tardo hi. Te vals yaake, nay krans kolla ninna o čilačepen." 
Psalms125:4 Ab lačo, baro Devel, kolenge, kay lačo hi, kolenge, kay o djiyestar ap toute shounenna." 
Psalms125:5 Kolen, kay tiro drom moukenn oun djan ap bange dromma, deh tou, baro Devel, i phagi khetne kolentsa, kay i vavarenge čilačepen krenna. Barht te vell pral o Israel!" 
Psalms126:1 I gili te givell ap o drom an Yerusalem. Har anas men o baro Devel pale pash i berga Sion, hams mer har save, hoy souni denna." 
Psalms126:2 Kote sanas maro mouy, oun mari čip das gole i barhtyatar, oun pash i tsele vavar menshende penan le: “O baro Devel kras baro koova ap lende.”" 
Psalms126:3 Ava, o baro Devel kras baro koova ap mende, oun maro dji givas i barhtyatar." 
Psalms126:4 Baro Devel, an pale lauteren mendar, kay pandle hi, yaake har tou aneh kol tikne panya pale, an o them, kay o kham pralstounes hi." 
Psalms126:5 Koon ropah o djob an i phoub vitsrella, kova dell gole i barhtyatar ap ko dives, kay lell lo o djob dren." 
Psalms126:6 Yob djala ropah, te vitsrell lo o djob vin, oun vell barhteles khere, i gonentsa pherdo djob." 
Psalms127:1 I gili o Salomestar te givell ap o drom an Yerusalem. Te krell o baro Devel gar o kheer, palle boudrenn i boudepangre čičeske. Te dell o baro Devel gar yak ap o foro, palle hi čičeske, te denn morsha yak ap o foro." 
Psalms127:2 Čičeske hi, te stenn t'mer sik taysarlakro pre, oun han beshdo bis an i rat, oun marenn t'men tele, te lenn t'maro rhapen. Kova dell o baro Devel peskre malen an o sopen." 
Psalms127:3 T'mare čaven das o baro Devel t'mende. Hi i kouč koova, te nay lell yek čave." 
Psalms127:4 Zorele morsh čave hi pengro dadeske har fayle, hoy i kourepaskro an o vast hidjrell, te dell lo karye." 
Psalms127:5 Barhtelo hi kova, koles boud kolendar pash peste hi. Te vell i doosh ap leste anlo, venn le leske ap i rig, te lell lo peskro čačepen." 
Psalms128:1 I gili te givell ap o drom an Yerusalem. Barhtelo hi hakeno, kay djivell o baro Debleha, oun djal ap leskro drom." 
Psalms128:2 Tou rhah kolestar, hoy tire vasta boudran. Mishto touke! Touke djal lačo." 
Psalms128:3 Khere hi tiri romni. Oun yoy hi har i drakengro rouk, hoy boud drake hidjrella. Oun tire čave hi beshdo troul tiri rhapaskri har terne djeteskre rouka." 
Psalms128:4 Savi barht hi ko morshes, kay djivell o baro Debleha." 
Psalms128:5 O baro Devel dell tout barht kotar, kay lo khere hi, ap i berga Sion. Yaake rah har djiveh, dikeh koy barht, hoy vell dran o foro Yerusalem." 
Psalms128:6 Oun ninna dikeh i čave tire čavendar. Barht te vell pral o Israel! 
Psalms129:1 I gili te givell ap o drom an Yerusalem. Boud kope kran le mange o djipen phares yaake rah har djivau, – kova hounte penell o kheer Israel –" 
Psalms129:2 boud kope kran le mange o djipen phares. Moulo nay dan le man gar. 
Psalms129:3 Miro doumo dan le pre, har i harho i phoub pre dell oun lengste činepangre krell." 
Psalms129:4 An peskro čačepen das o baro Devel kol shelle paash, kolentsa i čilače man pandan." 
Psalms129:5 Kolla, kay rhoyrenn pen ap o foro Yerusalem, kamoms, te tserdenn le pen pale oun hounte ladjenn pen!" 
Psalms129:6 Lenge te djal har o khass, hoy pral ap o kheer pre djal: Kova hi gomme gar baro, koy vell lo trouk." 
Psalms129:7 Kek harho činell les tele, oun vitar kek pandell les khetne." 
Psalms129:8 Oun kek, kay kote ap o drom djal, penell ap lende: “O baro Debleskri barht vell ap t'mende! Mer rakrah barht pral t'mende an o baro Debleskro lab.”" 
Psalms130:1 I gili te givell ap o drom an Yerusalem. Dran o telstunepen miro djiyestar dau me gole ap toute, baro Debleste." 
Psalms130:2 Miro ray, shoun man! Shoun, har ap toute rovau!" 
Psalms130:3 Te činals tou, baro Devel, mari doosh an i liil, koon nay ačals palle glan toute tardo?" 
Psalms130:4 Tou hal kova, kay i doosh krik lella. Doleske dikah pre ap toute oun shounah ap toute." 
Psalms130:5 Ap toute, baro Devel, rikrau me, miro tselo djiyestar dikau ap toute, te rakress mantsa." 
Psalms130:6 Miro dji dikell ap o Debleste, miro rayeste, te vell lo ap miri rig. Oun o tsiro vell mange rah, boudeder har kolenge, kay rati yak denn ap o foro oun kamenn, te vell sik o dives. Ava, boudeder har kolla!" 
Psalms130:7 Tou, Israel, dik ap o baro Debleste! Yob hi lačes menge, oun leskro dji hi hako tsiro pre, te lell lo men vin dran o čilačepen." 
Psalms130:8 Ava, yob lell o kheer Israel vin dran leskri tseli doosh." 
Psalms131:1 I gili o Davidestar te givell ap o drom an Yerusalem. Baro Devel, me hom gar pre-phourdo, oun mire yaka dikenn gar tele ap i vavarende. Me kamau gar baro koova, vitar gar savo koova, hoy dour pral mande hi." 
Psalms131:2 Na-a, miro dji hi pokones oun čalo, yaake har i tikno čavo čalo hi an i moussi peskri datar, ava, yaake čalo hi miro dji." 
Psalms131:3 Israel, dik ap o baro Debleste, kanna oun hako tsiro." 
Psalms132:1 I gili te givell ap o drom an Yerusalem. Baro Devel, ma biste o Davides oun ko tselo pharo koova, hoy lo ap peste las." 
Psalms132:2 Yob das pes sovel glan toute, o Yakobeskro zorelo Debleste, oun penas:" 
Psalms132:3 “Me djau gar an miro kheer, oun čivau man gar tele an miro čiben," 
Psalms132:4 pandau gar mire yaka, te sovap gar dren," 
Psalms132:5 bis te hatsom i platsa o baro Debleske, oun krom i kheer o Yakobeskro zorelo Debleske.”" 
Psalms132:6 Har hams an Efrata, shounam kay o sonakaskro morhton hi, ko sikepen, kay o Devel khere hi. Kova hatsam mer pash o foro Yaar." 
Psalms132:7 Avenn, mer djah an leskro kheer, oun perah tele glan o stamin, kay čivell lo peskre herya pre." 
Psalms132:8 Baro Devel, ste pre, oun dja pash koy platsa, kay khere hal, tou oun ko morhton, hoy men tiri bari zoor sikrell." 
Psalms132:9 Čip o čačepen pral tire rashaya har i ripen! Mou denn tire menshe gole i barhtyatar! 
Psalms132:10 Tou rodal o Davides vin, te vell lo baro ray. Ma biče les toutar krik, tiro boudepaskres!" 
Psalms132:11 O baro Devel das o Davideste i sovel, oun yob lell koy sovel gar pale. Oun yob penas: Me rodau yekes tire čavendar vin, te vell lo baro ray pal toute." 
Psalms132:12 Te rikrenn tire čave ap mande oun mire laba oun krenn, hoy me lenge penau, palle venn ninna lendar bare raya, yaake te vell hako tsiro yek tire čavendar baro ray." 
Psalms132:13 O baro Devel rodas peske i berga Sion vin. Oun leske hi shoukar te djivell lo kote. 
Psalms132:14 “Kaya hi i platsa, kay khere hom hako tsiro” penell lo. “Kate kamau te djivell.”" 
Psalms132:15 Me dau i menshen an o foro Yerusalem lauter, hoy len hounte vell djipaske. Ninna i čorvelende, kay kote djivenn, dau doha rhapen." 
Psalms132:16 Lengre rashayenge dau an o dji, te penenn le miro lačepen doureder. Oun kol menshe, kay mire hi, denn gole i barhtyatar." 
Psalms132:17 Kote vell yek o Davideskre čavendar i zorelo baro ray. Ko baro ray, koles mange vi-rodom, vell i menshenge har i momeli, hoy hako tsiro rhačella." 
Psalms132:18 Leskro raylepen vell baro oun bareder. Oun ap kolende, kay leske čilačepen kamenn, čivau bari ladj." 
Psalms133:1 I gili o Davidestar te givell ap o drom an Yerusalem. Dikenn, har mishto oun shoukar hi, te djivenn phrala an o lačepen khetne." 
Psalms133:2 Kava hi yaake har ko lačo makepaskro djet, hoy ap o Aroneskro shero čoredo vell, oun tele nashella ap leskri čora, oun kotar doureder ap i meen leskro gadestar." 
Psalms133:3 Kava hi yaake har o taysarlakro pani, hoy i berga Hermon tele nashella ap i berge Sion! Kote kamell o baro Devel peskri barht te dell, oun o djipen, hoy hako tsiro ačella." 
Psalms134:1 I gili te givell ap o drom an Yerusalem. Stenn pre! Sharenn o baro Debles, t'mer tsele boudepangre o baro Deblestar, kay han tardo rati an o baro Debleskro kheer!" 
Psalms134:2 Hadenn t'mare vasta pre an leskro Debleskro kheer, oun sharenn o baro Debles!" 
Psalms134:3 O baro Devel, kay o bolepen oun i phoub kras, hi khere ap i berga Sion. Foun kotar mou čivell lo peskri barht ap toute!" 
Psalms135:1 Halleluya! Sharenn o baro Debles! Sharenn les, t'mer boudepangre o baro Deblestar," 
Psalms135:2 t'mer, kay tardo han an o baro Debleskro kheer, ap koy platsa glan o kheer maro Deblestar." 
Psalms135:3 Sharenn o baro Debles! Lačo hi o baro Devel. Hadenn les t'maro bashepah. Kamlo hi lo menge. 
Psalms135:4 O baro Devel rodas peske o Yakobeskre menshen vin, ava, o Israel las lo, te vell lo leskro." 
Psalms135:5 Kanna djinau: O baro Devel hi o pralstouno. Maro baro Devel hi bareder har hako vavar devel. 
Psalms135:6 Lauter, hoy yob kamell te krell, krell lo an o bolepen oun ap i phoub, an o baro pani, oun an o telstunepen." 
Psalms135:7 Yob moukell volke pral i phoub pre te djal, dell brishin ap i phoub, ninna koy yag, hoy ap o bolepen pre oun tele karye dell. Yob anell o baro dourho vin, hoy pral i phoub phourdell." 
Psalms135:8 Yob hi kova, kay das i phoureder morsh čaven moulo an o them Egiptia pash i menshende, ninna pash i firhende," 
Psalms135:9 oun sikras baro koova oun peskri bari zoor ap toute, Egiptia, oun ap tiro baro ray oun leskre tsele boudepangre." 
Psalms135:10 O baro Devel hi kova, kay vas zorleder har boud themma, oun zorele bare rayen moulo das:" 
Psalms135:11 O Sihon, ko baro ray pral i Amorarya, oun o Og, ko baro ray pral Bashan, oun i tsele bare raya an o them Kanaan." 
Psalms135:12 Lengre themma das lo peskre menshende Israel, te venn le lengre." 
Psalms135:13 Baro Devel, tiro lab ačella hako tsirenge. Tiro barepen ačella yaake rah, har menshe koy hi." 
Psalms135:14 O baro Devel anell peskre menshenge o čačepen, oun krell peskro dji pre peskre boudepangre." 
Psalms135:15 I debla i vavar menshendar hi dran roup oun sonakay, Menshenge vasta kran len." 
Psalms135:16 I mouy hi len, oun rakrenn gar. Yaka hi len, oun dikenn gar." 
Psalms135:17 Kanda hi len oun shounenn gar. Len hi kek dourho an lengro mouy. 
Psalms135:18 Kolla, kay save deblen krenna, oun ap lende patsenna, venn yaake har yon." 
Psalms135:19 T'mer dran o kheer Israel, sharenn o baro Debles! T'mer rashaya dran o kheer Aron, sharenn o baro Debles!" 
Psalms135:20 T'mer dran o kheer Levi, sharenn o baro Debles! T'mer lauter, kay djivenn o baro Debleha, sharenn les!" 
Psalms135:21 Sharedo vell o baro Devel ap i berga Sion! An o foro Yerusalem hi lo khere. Halleluya! 
Psalms136:1 Sharenn o baro Debles! Yob hi kamlo! Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske. 
Psalms136:2 Sharenn o Debles, kay hi bareder har i tsele debla. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske!" 
Psalms136:3 Sharenn o Debles, kay hi o ray pral i tsele rayende. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske!" 
Psalms136:4 Yob kokres krell baro koova, hoy kek vavar nay krella. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske!" 
Psalms136:5 Yob kras o bolepen an peskro gosvepen. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske! 
Psalms136:6 Yob čivas i phoub pral o pani vergel. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske! 
Psalms136:7 Yob kras o kham oun o čon. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske! 
Psalms136:8 O kham, te vell lo ray pral o dives. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske!" 
Psalms136:9 O čon oun i bolepangre momlia, te venn le ray pral i rat. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske!" 
Psalms136:10 Yob maras i phoureder morsh čaven i Egiptarendar. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske! 
Psalms136:11 Oun anas o Israel dran o them Egiptia vin. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske! 
Psalms136:12 Peskro zorelo vasteha kras lo kova. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske! 
Psalms136:13 O Baro Lolo Pani kras lo an douy kotya. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske! 
Psalms136:14 Oun moukas o Israel mashkral vergel te djal. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske! 
Psalms136:15 O baro rayes pral o them Egiptia oun leskre tsele lourden vitsras lo an o Baro Lolo Pani. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske! 
Psalms136:16 Yob anas peskre menshen ap o drom mashkral o moulo tato them. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske! 
Psalms136:17 Yob vas zorleder har bare raya. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske! 
Psalms136:18 Oun maras zorele rayen. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske! 
Psalms136:19 O Sihon, o baro ray pral i Amorarya. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske!" 
Psalms136:20 Oun o Og, o baro ray pral o them Bashan. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske!" 
Psalms136:21 Oun das lengro them peskre menshende. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske! 
Psalms136:22 Te vell les i Israelenge, kay leskre boudepangre hi. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske!" 
Psalms136:23 Yob bistras men gar, har tele rikede hams. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske!" 
Psalms136:24 Oun las men vin dran i vasta kolendar, hoy menge o djipen phares kran. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske!" 
Psalms136:25 Yob dell rhapen hake menshende oun firhende. Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske! 
Psalms136:26 Sharenn o Debles pral o bolepen! Leskro lačepen ačella hako tsireske! 
Psalms137:1 Pash i panya an o foro Babilon hams beshdo oun rovan, har menge o Sion an o shero vas." 
Psalms137:2 Mare harfe čivam kote ap kol rouka. 
Psalms137:3 Kolla, kay men tapran, kaman, te givas lenge i gili: “Givenn menge i gili pral o Sion”, penan le." 
Psalms137:4 Har nay givams o baro Debleske i gili an i vavar them? 
Psalms137:5 Bistrau me tout, Yerusalem, mou merell tele miri čači moussi!" 
Psalms137:6 Miri čip te ačell pral an miro mouy, me te bistraus tout, Yerusalem, me te kamaus čomone boudeder har tout." 
Psalms137:7 Baro Devel, ma biste gar, hoy i Edomarya kran, har yon ap ko dives gole dan an i Yerusalem: “Phagenn o foro tele! Phagenn les tele bis ap o telstouno bar!”" 
Psalms137:8 Tou, foro Babilon, tou, kay lauter an kotya deh! Barhteles vell kova, hoy touke pale della kova, hoy tou menge kral!" 
Psalms137:9 Barhteles vell kova, kay tire čave taprella oun len ap i bare barra moulo vitsrella!" 
Psalms138:1 I gili o Davidestar. Parkrau man pash toute miro tselo djiyeha. Touke givau miri gili, oun kek vavar debleske." 
Psalms138:2 Glan tiro Debleskro kheer perau tele, oun parkrau man pash toute, te kral tiro dji mange pre oun rikral tiro lab. Ava, tou dal men boudeder har menge penal. Tiro lab hi rayleder har i tsele vavar." 
Psalms138:3 Ap ko dives, hoy me ap toute gole dom, shounal tou man, oun dal man pale bari zoor." 
Psalms138:4 Baro Devel, i tsele raya ap kay phoub sharenn tout, te shounenn le tire laba, hoy dran tiro mouy djana." 
Psalms138:5 Yon givenna pral kova, hoy tou kral: Tiro raylepen hi baro." 
Psalms138:6 Ava, ninna te hal yaake dour pral halauter, dikeh tou kolen, kay tele rikede hi. Oun kol pre-phourden prindjreh foun doural." 
Psalms138:7 Ninna te hom an i daar, deh tou man nevi zoor, oun čiveh tout kolenge an o drom, kay kamenn mange čilačepen te krell. Tiri zoryah veh tou ap miri rig." 
Psalms138:8 Baro Devel, tou leh miro koova an tiro vast. Baro Devel, tiro lačepen ačella hako tsireske. Ma mouk kova, hoy lal an tiro vast!" 
Psalms139:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. Kay gili kras o David. Baro Devel, tou dikeh an miro dji oun prindjreh man mishto." 
Psalms139:2 Tou prindjreh miro beshepen oun miro tardepen. Tou hayveh foun doural, hoy an miro shero trouyel djal." 
Psalms139:3 Te djau vin, oun te hom čiddo, tou hal pash mande. Mire tsele dromma, tou prindjreh len." 
Psalms139:4 O lab hi gomme gar ap miri čip, koy djineh tou, baro Devel, hoy kamau te rakrap." 
Psalms139:5 Haki rigyatar lal tou man trouyel, oun rikreh tiro vast pral mande." 
Psalms139:6 Tou prindjreh man yaake mishto, kova hi mange bares oun phares. Me nay hayvau kova gar." 
Psalms139:7 Kay djau me nay, te vap dour toutar? Kay nashap, kay tou man gar dikeh?" 
Psalms139:8 Te djoms an o bolepen pre, palle hal tou koy. Te čivoms man pash i moulende, ninna kote vals tou koy." 
Psalms139:9 Te hadoms man har i čirklo oun djoms kote, kay o kham pre-djala, oun moukoms man tele pal o baro pani, kay o kham tele djal," 
Psalms139:10 ninna kote taprals man tiro vast oun rikrals man. 
Psalms139:11 Oun penaus me: “Kali rat te khatrell man, oun tamlepen te vell troul mande”," 
Psalms139:12 palle vals touke i rat gar kali, ava, i rat vals har o dives, oun o tamlepen har i momeli." 
Psalms139:13 Tou kral lauter, hoy an mande hi. An miri date čival man khetne." 
Psalms139:14 Me parkrau man pash toute, te kral man yaake shoukar. Ap mande dikau, lauter hoy kreh, hi yaake mishto, te ačell mange o rakepen krik." 
Psalms139:15 Me homs gar khatedo glan toute, har kral man kote, kay kek dikell, har vom i ternepen an miri dakro per." 
Psalms139:16 Tou dikal man, har gar kerdo homs, oun hako dives miro djipastar his činlo an tiro liil, har gomme kek lendar koy his." 
Psalms139:17 Phares te hayvell hi mange kova, hoy tou an tiro shero rakreh, mo Devel. Har boud hi kova!" 
Psalms139:18 Te kamoms les tele te ginell, vals kova boudeder har i santa pash o baro pani. Te stau pre o vavar dives, hom gomme pash toute." 
Psalms139:19 Mo Devel, kamoms te dess tou i čilačen moulo! Kamoms, te djan penge kolla, kolen doosh ap o rat i vavarendar hi!" 
Psalms139:20 Yon, kay praasenn tout oun hadenn pen ap toute, lenn tiro lab an o mouy te rhorhenn le." 
Psalms139:21 Baro Devel, hounte rhoyrap man gar ap kolende, hoy pen ap toute rhoyrenn? Mange vell djoungeles, te dikau kolen, kay hadenn pen ap toute." 
Psalms139:22 Kolla, kay kamenn tout gar, kamau me vitar gar. Ava, nay dikau len gar glan mire yaka." 
Psalms139:23 Dik an miro dji, miro Devel, oun dik, hoy lauter koy dren hi! Oun le man an o yak, oun dik, hoy mange an o shero trouyel djala!" 
Psalms139:24 Oun te dikeh, te hom ap i drom, hoy toutar krik djala, palle ab oun le man pale ap ko drom, hoy pash toute djala!" 
Psalms140:1 I gili o rayeske pral i gipangre. Kay gili kras o David. 
Psalms140:2 Baro Devel, le man vin dran i vasta kol čilačendar! Khate man glan i marepangre!" 
Psalms140:3 Kolen hi čilačepen an o dji, oun krenn čingepen hako dives." 
Psalms140:4 Lengre čipya denn čourye har sapengre čipya, lengre laba anenn o merepen." 
Psalms140:5 Baro Devel, de ap mande yak, te taprenn man i čilače gar! Khate man glan i marepangre, glan kolende, kay kamenn te perap!" 
Psalms140:6 Kol pre-phourde čivan mange dorya vin, te stakrap dren oun perap. Yon čivan i netsa vin ap miro drom, te taprenn le man." 
Psalms140:7 Me penom ap o baro Debleste: Tou hal miro Devel. Baro Devel, shoun, har ap toute rovau!" 
Psalms140:8 Baro Devel, miro ray, tou hal o zorelo ap miri rig. Tou rikreh tire vasta pral mande an o kourepaskro tsiro." 
Psalms140:9 De kol čilačen gar, hoy yon kamenna! Kova, hoy yon pen glan lan, mouk gar te djal, te hadenn le pen gar!" 
Psalms140:10 Kolla, kay troul mande hi, kamenn mange bibarht. Mouk koy bibarht ap lende pale te djal!" 
Psalms140:11 Mouk yagakre barra ap lende te perell! Vitse len an i yag! Mouk len te perell an o telstunepen, yaake te nay stenn le bouder gar pre!" 
Psalms140:12 Koles i čilači čip hi, koles te vell kek barht an kava them! Oun i marepangre, te venn le tradedo i bibarhtyatar oun hounte perenn!" 
Psalms140:13 Me djinau, te lell o baro Devel i čorvelengro koova an peskro vast, oun dell yak, te lenn le pengro čačepen." 
Psalms140:14 Ava, i tsiro vella kolenge, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, te sharenn le tout. Oun kolla, kay o čačo drom djan, djivenna pash toute." 
Psalms141:1 I gili o Davidestar. Baro Devel, ap toute dau me gole. Ab sik pash mande! Shoun ap mande ap ko tsiro, kay ap toute gole dau!" 
Psalms141:2 Mouk miro mangepen touke yaake shoukar te vell, har rhačroms me touke soungepaskro koova. Dik ap mire pre-hadede vasta yaake har ap i firho, hoy moukoms touke rati te rhačrell." 
Psalms141:3 Baro Devel, de yak ap miro mouy, de garda ap miri čip." 
Psalms141:4 Mouk miro dji gar o čilačepen palla te dell, te krap gar midjak koova khetne i čilačentsa. Mouk man gar te rhap lengro shoukar rhapen!" 
Psalms141:5 Lače menshe mou denn man i phagi, oun čingrenn mantsa an o lačepen. I čilačendar kamau gar, te sharenn le man. Oun me mangau o Deblestar, te krenn le mange kek čilačepen." 
Psalms141:6 Ap ko dives, kay vell i phagi pral lengre pralstunende vi-rakedo, venn yon i barrengri berga tele vitsedo. Palle vell diklo, har čačo mire laba pral lende his." 
Psalms141:7 Yaake har o harho i phoub pre phagell oun trouyel vitsrell, yaake hi lengre kokale trouyel čiddo. Oun o moulengro them krell peskro mouy lenge pre." 
Psalms141:8 Ap toute, baro Devel, dikenn mire yaka. Pash toute kamau me man te khatrell. Mouk man gar te merell!" 
Psalms141:9 De yak ap mande, te perap gar an i dorya, hoy yon mange vi-čivan, ava, te perap gar kote dren, kay i čilače kamenn man te taprell." 
Psalms141:10 Mouk len lauteren kokres te perell an pengri netsa, hoy yon mange vi-čivan, oun man mouk te nashap mange!" 
Psalms142:1 Givede laba o Davidestar. Har khatras yob pes an koy grotta, mangas yob o Debles kal labentsa." 
Psalms142:2 Ap o baro Debleste dau bari gole. Ap o baro Debleste rovau! 
Psalms142:3 Leske penau lauter, hoy ap miro dji hi, oun moukau les te djinell, hoy mange phares hi." 
Psalms142:4 Har djinom bouder gar, hoy te krap, djinal tou, har mantsa doureder djal. Ap ko drom, hoy me hounte djom, čivan le dorya vin, te perap dren." 
Psalms142:5 Dik tout trouyel: Kek kamell mandar čomone te djinell. Me nashte nashau gar mange. Kek poučell pal mande. 
Psalms142:6 Baro Devel, ap toute dau me gole, oun penau touke: Pash toute nay khatrau man. Tou hal kova, hoy man an miro djipen hounte vell." 
Psalms142:7 Shoun, har dau gole. Mange hi ropaske. Le man vin dran i vasta kolendar, kay man palla lenn! Yon hi zorleder har me." 
Psalms142:8 Le miro djipen vin dran kava stilepen, te nay sharap tiro lab mank kolende, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, te kral tou mange lačepen." 
Psalms143:1 I gili o Davidestar. Baro Devel, shoun miro mangepen! De yak ap miro ropen! Tou hal lačo oun čačo! Doleske shoun man!" 
Psalms143:2 De man, tiro boudepaskres, kek phagi; glan toute hi kek mensho an o čačepen tardo." 
Psalms143:3 Kova, kay mange čilačepen kamell, lell man palla, stakrell miro djipen an i phoub. Me hom har an i stilepen, kay kali rat hi, hom har kolla, kay meran glan i rah tsiro." 
Psalms143:4 Bari daar hi an miro dji. Miri tseli zoor, hoy an mande his, nashrom." 
Psalms143:5 Mange djal kova an o shero, hoy tou lauter kral glan i rah tsiro. Pral kova, hoy tire vasta kran, rakrau miro djiyeha." 
Psalms143:6 Mire vasta hadau pre pash toute. Har i trouk them troushella pal pani, yaake troushell miro dji pal toute." 
Psalms143:7 Baro Devel, shoun man sik! Man hi bouder kek zoor. Ma khate tout mandar, te vap gar har kolla, kay hounte merenn." 
Psalms143:8 Ap i tsalla mouk man tiro lačepen te shounell. Me dikau ap toute. Sike man havo drom me hounte djap. Miro dji nashell pal toute. 
Psalms143:9 Baro Devel, le miro djipen vin dran i vasta kolendar, kay ap mande djan. Pash toute vau, te khatrap man." 
Psalms143:10 Sike mange, hoy touke shoukar hi, te krap me, tou hal miro Devel. Tiro lačo dourho mou sikrell man o čačo drom." 
Psalms143:11 Baro Devel, rike tire vasta pral miro djipen yaake har penal. Tou hal an o čačepen tardo. Doleske le man vin dran i bibarht!" 
Psalms143:12 Tou hal yaake lačo ap mande. Doleske le kolen krik, kay ap mande djan, oun mare lauteren, kay mange miro djipen phares krenn. Me hom tiro boudepaskro!" 
Psalms144:1 I gili o Davidestar. Sharedo vell o baro Devel, kay rikrell peskre vasta pral mande. Yob sikrell mange, har te kourap man. Mire vastenge sikrell lo har te dap i rhareha." 
Psalms144:2 Yob vell ap miri rig, oun hi mange har i zorelo kheer, kay nay khatrau man, oun kek man an-taprell. Yob rikrell peskre vasta pral mande, Ap leste rikrau man. Yob stakrell i menshen dran vavar themma tel mire herya." 
Psalms144:3 Baro Devel, hoy hi o mensho, tou te deh yak ap leste? Hoy hi o mensho, kay hounte merell, tou te dikeh ap leste?" 
Psalms144:4 Har i dourho hi lo. Leskro djipen djal trouyel har i souni. 
Psalms144:5 Baro Devel, čip o bolepen ap i rig oun ab tele! Tape i berge an, te vell yagakro dourho vin!" 
Psalms144:6 Biče tiri yag, hoy ap o bolepen pral oun tele djal! De tire fayle karye ap kolende, kay ap mande djan!" 
Psalms144:7 Rike mange tiro vast dran o bolepen! Tape man, oun le man vin dran kava baro pani, dran i vasta kol vavar menshendar!" 
Psalms144:8 Kolengro mouy rhorhepen rakrella, ninna te denn le pen sovel." 
Psalms144:9 Miro Devel, me kamau touke i nevi gili te givell. Ap i deesh-doryengri bashepaskri kamau touke te bashrell." 
Psalms144:10 Tou kreh, te vell yek themeskro ray zorleder har ko vavar. Oun tou kreh, te vell tiro boudepaskro, o David, gar maredo o rhareha." 
Psalms144:11 Tape man, oun le man vin dran i vasta kol vavar menshendar! Kolengro mouy rhorhepen rakrella, ninna te denn le pen sovel." 
Psalms144:12 Mouk mare morsh čaven har rouka te vell, hoy baro venna an pengri terni zoor. Oun mare čen mouk shoukar te vell, har kol shoukar figure an o rayeskro kheer." 
Psalms144:13 Mouk mare djobengre khera pherdo te vell, te vell men boud lačo rhapen te rhal. Mouk mare bakren zerya terne te lell, ava, deesh-zerya an mare gaba." 
Psalms144:14 Mare groumya te nashrenn kek pengre ternendar, hoy gar boldo hi. Kek ropaskri gole te vell shounlo ap mare dromma!" 
Psalms144:15 Barhteles hi kol menshe, kolenge yaake djala! Ava, barhteles hi kol menshe, kolengro Devel o baro Devel hi!" 
Psalms145:1 Kay gili kras o David te sharell lo o Debles. Me kamau tout te hadell, miro Debles. Tou hal o baro ray. Tout kamau me te sharell kanna oun hako tsiro." 
Psalms145:2 Hako dives kamau man pash toute te parkrell. Kanna oun hako tsiro kamau tout te sharell. 
Psalms145:3 Zorelo hi o baro Devel oun boud moldo, te vell lo sharedo. Kek hayvell, har baro yob hi." 
Psalms145:4 Ninna mare čavengre čave sharenn, hoy tou kral, oun rakrenn pral tiro zorelo koova." 
Psalms145:5 Yon rakrenn pral tiro raylepen oun barepen. Oun me moukau mange an o shero te vell, hoy tou kral oun hoy kek vavar nay krella." 
Psalms145:6 Yon rakrenn pral tiri zoor, hoy yaake baro hi, te vell men daar. Oun me rakrau pral tiro raylepen." 
Psalms145:7 Yon sharenn tiro baro lačepen, oun givenn pral tiro čačepen." 
Psalms145:8 Lačes hi o baro Devel oun krell i menshenge peskro dji pre. Yob vell gar sik rhoyedo. Oun leskro kamlepen hi baro. 
Psalms145:9 O baro Devel hi lačes ap hakeneste. Oun krell peskro dji pre halauterenge, kolen yob kras." 
Psalms145:10 Kolla lauter, kay tou kral, mou sharenn le tout, baro Devel, mou parkrenn pen pash toute kolla, kay tire hi," 
Psalms145:11 oun sharenn, havo raylo oun lačo baro ray tou hal. Mou penenn le, har baro tiri zoor hi," 
Psalms145:12 te shounenn i tsele menshe, havo baro koova tou kral, oun havo raylo oun lačo ray tou hal pral mende." 
Psalms145:13 Tou hal oun ačeh o baro ray kanna oun hako tsireske. O baro Devel rikrell peskre tsele laba, oun hi lačo an halauter, hoy krell lo." 
Psalms145:14 O baro Devel rikrell hakenes, kay perell, oun hadell hakenes pale pre, kay tele dino hi." 
Psalms145:15 Menshe oun firhe denn yak ap toute, te dess len pengro rhapen ap o čačo tsiro." 
Psalms145:16 Tou kreh tiro lačo vast pre, oun deh lauteren, hoy djivenna, yaake boud te rhal, te venn le čalo." 
Psalms145:17 An lauter, hoy o baro Devel krell, djal lo pal o čačepen. An lauter, hoy krell lo, hi lo lačo." 
Psalms145:18 O baro Devel hi gar dour hakenestar, kay dell les an-gole, hakeneske, kay dell les an-gole an o čačepen." 
Psalms145:19 Kolenge, kay o djiyestar ap leste shounenna, krell lo, hoy yon mangenna, oun shounell, har denn le gole, oun vell ap lengri rig." 
Psalms145:20 Kolla, kay les o djiyestar kamenna, pral kolende rikrell lo peskre vasta. Kolla, kay čilačo koova krenna, moukell lo te merell." 
Psalms145:21 Miro mouy te sharell o baro Debles! Lauter, hoy djivella, mou sharell koles, kay kokres o čačo Devel hi, – kanna oun hako tsiro!" 
Psalms146:1 Halleluya! Miro dji sharell o baro Debles. 
Psalms146:2 Yaake rah har me djivau, kamau o baro Debles te sharell. Yaake rah har hom ap kay phoub, kamau leske te bashrell." 
Psalms146:3 Rikrenn t'men gar ap t'mare pralstunende! Menshe hi le oun nay lenn t'men gar vin dran i bibarht. 
Psalms146:4 O menshengro djipen ačell gar. Oun yob vell pale čik i phoubyatar. Ko dives, kay merell lo, djala lauter nashedo, hoy yob peske glan las." 
Psalms146:5 Barhtelo hi kova, koleske o Yakobeskro Devel ap i rig vell, ava, kova hi barhtelo, kay kokres ap peskro baro Debleste dikell." 
Psalms146:6 Yob hi o Devel, kay o bolepen oun i phoub kras, oun o baro pani, oun kova, hoy dren hi. Yob hi kova, kay hako tsiro peskro lab rikrell," 
Psalms146:7 oun kolen pengro čačepen dell, kay tele rikedo venn. Kolen, kay bokenn, dell lo te rhal. O baro Devel hi kova, kay i stilde vin lell dran o stilepen." 
Psalms146:8 O baro Devel krell, te nay dikenn i korele pale. O baro Devel hadell kolen pale pre, kay tele dino hi. O baro Devel kamell kolen o djiyestar, kay an o čačepen tardo hi." 
Psalms146:9 O baro Devel dell ap i vi-themarya yak, oun hi ap i rig kol čavendar, kolen kek dad bouder hi, oun ap i rig kol djouvyendar, kolengro rom meras. I čilačenge čivell lo barra an lengro drom." 
Psalms146:10 O baro Devel hi o baro ray hako tsireske. Yob hi tiro Devel, Sion, kanna oun hako tsiro. Sharedo vell o baro Devel!" 
Psalms147:1 Halleluya! Sharenn o baro Debles! Lačo hi, te givas gilya maro Debleske! Shoukar oun mishto hi, te bashras leske." 
Psalms147:2 O baro Devel čivella Yerusalem pale pre, oun lauteren, kay krik tradedo van, anell yob pale khetne." 
Psalms147:3 Kolen, kay lengro dji phagedo hi, krell lo pale sasto, oun kolenge, kay doukedo hi, čivell lo i pandepen pre." 
Psalms147:4 Yob ginell i bolepangre momlia tele oun kharell lengre laba. 
Psalms147:5 Baro hi o Devel, maro ray, oun les hi bari zoor. Kova lauter, hoy yob an peskro gosvepen krella, hayvah nay gar." 
Psalms147:6 O baro Devel hadell kolen pre, kay tele rikedo hi, oun i čilačen vitsrell lo tele ap i phoub." 
Psalms147:7 Givenn i gili o baro Debleske! Parkrenn t'men pash leste! Bashrenn maro Debleske ap i harfa! 
Psalms147:8 Yob čivell volke ap o bolepen, dell brishin ap i phoub, moukell o zenlepen bares te vell ap i berge." 
Psalms147:9 I firhende dell lo pengro rhapen, ninna i terne korake, hoy pal rhapen gole denna." 
Psalms147:10 I grayengri zoor hi leske gar shoukar, vitar gar i morshengri zoor." 
Psalms147:11 O baro Debleske hi kolla shoukar, kay leha djivenna oun ap leste dikenna, te vell lo lenge lačes." 
Psalms147:12 T'mer menshe an o foro Yerusalem, sharenn o baro Debles! T'mer dran o foro Sion, hadenn t'maro Debles!" 
Psalms147:13 Kol bare foreskre voudya krell lo zoreles, oun ap t'mare čavende čivas lo peskri barht." 
Psalms147:14 Kek kourepen vell an t'maro them, oun o lačeder djob dell lo t'men te rhal." 
Psalms147:15 Yob penell, hoy te djal ap i phoub. Oun sik djal kova, hoy penas lo." 
Psalms147:16 Yaake moukell lo gib te perell, parno har bakrengro bal, oun vitsrell djayedo pani har yagakri čik." 
Psalms147:17 Bare brishineskre barra vitsrell lo ap i phoub; oun bičrell baro shilapen. Koon nay ačell an kava shilapen? 
Psalms147:18 Yob penell i lab, oun o gib vell pani; yob bičrell i dourho, hoy phourdell pral i phoub, oun o pani, hoy djayedo his, nashella palle." 
Psalms147:19 O Yakobeskre menshen moukell lo peskro lab te shounell; oun ap i Israelitarya penell lo, hoy lo lendar kamell, oun dell len peskre čačepaskre laba." 
Psalms147:20 Kova kras lo kek vavar menshenge. Leskre čačepaskre laba prindjrenn yon gar. Sharedo vell o baro Devel! 
Psalms148:1 Halleluya! Sharenn o baro Debles, t'mer an o bolepen! Sharenn les, t'mer kay han dour pral an o bolepen!" 
Psalms148:2 T'mer tsele bolepangre, sharenn les! T'mer leskre kourepangre, sharenn les!" 
Psalms148:3 T'mer, kham oun čon, sharenn les! Ninna t'mer bolepangre momlia, sharenn les!" 
Psalms148:4 Tou, o pralstouno bolepen, share les! Tou, o pani, hoy pral o bolepen hi, share les!" 
Psalms148:5 T'mer lauter, sharenn o baro Debles! Yob rakras, oun yon van kerdo." 
Psalms148:6 Yob čivas len ap pengro drom. Oun kote ačenn le hako tsireske. Yob penas lenge, har dour nay djan le, oun yon nay stakrenn gar vergel." 
Psalms148:7 Sharenn o baro Debles, t'mer kay han tele ap i phoub: bare panyengre firhe oun lauter, hoy an i telstoune panya djivella;" 
Psalms148:8 yag, brishineskre barra, gib oun yagakro dourho, oun o zorelo phourdepen, hoy krell, hoy yob penell." 
Psalms148:9 Sharenn les, t'mer bare oun tikne berge; t'mer rouka, ap kolende roukengre baro venna rhapaske, ninna t'mer soubyengre rouka," 
Psalms148:10 t'mer divye firhe oun khereskre firhe, tikne firhe oun čirkle!" 
Psalms148:11 Sharenn les, t'mer bare raya ap kay phoub t'mare menshentsa, t'mer pralstoune oun čačepangre raya;" 
Psalms148:12 terne morsha oun terne ča, phoure oun terne!" 
Psalms148:13 Kolla lauter mou sharenn o baro Debleskro lab. Leskro lab hi bareder har i tsele vavar laba. Leskro raylepen djal pral i phoub oun o bolepen. 
Psalms148:14 Yob das peskre menshende i zoor pral i vavar menshende. Sharenn les, t'mer, leskre menshe, t'mer dran o Israel, kay han pash leste. Sharedo vell o baro Devel!" 
Psalms149:1 Sharedo vell o baro Devel! Givenn o baro Debleske i nevi gili! Sharenn les kote, kay leskre menshe khetne venna!" 
Psalms149:2 Tou Israel, tiro dji mou bashrell pral koleste, kay kras tout. T'mer menshe dran Sion, givenn i barhtyatar pral t'maro baro rayeste." 
Psalms149:3 Sharenn leskro lab an t'maro khelepen! Bashrenn leske ap i pauka oun i harfa! 
Psalms149:4 O baro Devel dikell lačes ap peskre menshende. Yob vell kolenge ap i rig, kay tele rikedo hi oun hadell len pre." 
Psalms149:5 Kolla, kay leskre hi, mou givenn i barhtyatar! Ninna an i rati mou sharenn le les oun hadenn le les." 
Psalms149:6 Lengre mouya denn bari gole, te sharenn le pengro Debles. An lengre vasta vell len i rharo, hoy ap douy rigya činella," 
Psalms149:7 yaake te denn le i menshen an vavar themma pale, hoy kolla ap lende kran, oun anenn i phagi pral i natsyone." 
Psalms149:8 Lengre bare rayen pandenn le an shelle, lengre pralstunen an sasterne shelle," 
Psalms149:9 oun anenn o čačepen pral lende, har kova činlo hi an o Debleskro lab. Yaake vell o raylepen o Debleskre menshendar diklo. Sharedo vell o baro Devel!" 
Psalms150:1 Halleluya! Sharenn o Debles an peskro baro kheer! Sharenn les, ko zoreles an o bolepen!" 
Psalms150:2 Sharenn les koleske, hoy yob lauter kras! Sharenn leskro baro raylepen!" 
Psalms150:3 Sharenn les o bashepah ap i bare phourdepangre! Sharenn les o bashepah ap i doryengre bashepangre! 
Psalms150:4 Sharenn les o bashepah ap i pauke, oun khelenn leske! Sharenn les o bashepah ap i doryengre bashepangre oun tikne phourdepangre!" 
Psalms150:5 Sharenn les o bashepah ap i cymbale, hoy denn savi gole, har te givell i djouvel oun har te givell i morsh." 
Psalms150:6 Lauter, koles dourho hi, sharell o baro Debles! Halleluya!" 
Proverbs1:1 An kava liil hi i goseve laba o Davideskro čavestar, o Salomestar. Yob his i baro ray pral o Israel." 
Proverbs1:2 Kal laba sikrenn mende, hoy čačo gosvepen hi, te nay hayvas, hoy men doureder anell, oun hoy gosevo rakepen kamell te penell." 
Proverbs1:3 Kol laba sikrenn mende, har te djivas mishto oun čačo, har te djivas i djipen kek rhorhepah, oun har te djas ap o čačo drom." 
Proverbs1:4 Yaake venn ninna kolla gosevo, kolen či an o shero hi. Oun terne morsha hayvenn, hoy hounte krenn le, oun dikenn dren, hoy mishto hi." 
Proverbs1:5 Kolla, kay gosevo hi, shounenn, har te venn le gomme gosveder. Kolla, kay siklo hi, hatsenn, har te djan le pengro drom." 
Proverbs1:6 Yon nay hayvenn goseve laba, oun rakepen, kay o čačepen dren khatedo hi, ava, laba, kay goseve menshe penan, oun save, kay hounte rodess, hoy yon kamenn te penell." 
Proverbs1:7 Glan halauter hounte djivess o baro Debleha, te kameh gosevo te vell. Koneske o gosvepen či moldo hi, oun koon kamell či te djinell, hi dinelo." 
Proverbs1:8 Miro čavo, shoun ap i laba, hoy tiro dad touke penell! De yak ap kova, hoy tiri day toutar kamell!" 
Proverbs1:9 Kova hi touke har i shoukar stadi ap tiro shero, har i verkli troul tiri meen." 
Proverbs1:10 I čilače, te penenn le: Dik, hoy krah! Palle dja gar koy!" 
Proverbs1:11 Yon nay penans: “Am mentsa! Mer lourah yekes pre oun marah les. Mer nay hatsams saven, kay kek čilačepen an lengro shero hi. Kolen lah palla, te vell men čomone sapaske." 
Proverbs1:12 Mashkral dran lengro djipen las len vin, oun bičras len tele pash i moulende an o moulengro them!" 
Proverbs1:13 Čoras kouč koova menge, te kras mare khera pherdo kolestar." 
Proverbs1:14 Ab mentsa! Hakeno mendar lell yaake boud har ko vavar.” 
Proverbs1:15 Miro čavo, ma dja lentsa ap lengro drom! Rike tout krik lendar!" 
Proverbs1:16 Yon denn an i herya, te krenn le čilačepen. Sik nashenn le, te marenn le menshen." 
Proverbs1:17 Čičeske vell i netsa glan i čirkle pre-pandlo. Yon dikenn lat oun djan gar dren. 
Proverbs1:18 Hi gar yaake kal morshentsa: Yon kamenn i vavaren te marell, oun hayvenn gar, te perenn le kokres an pengri netsa." 
Proverbs1:19 Yaake djal hakeneske, kay kamell o vavareskro bravlepen te lell. Savo mensho lell peske kokres o djipen." 
Proverbs1:20 O gosvepen hi har i day, kay kharell ap i dromma, oun dell gole ap i foryengre platse." 
Proverbs1:21 Yoy moukell pes glan i bare voudya an o foro te shounell, oun kote, kay boud menshe khetne venn:" 
Proverbs1:22 T'mer, kolen či an o shero hi: Har rah kamenn t'mer dinelo koova te krell? T'mer sapangre, har rah kamenn t'mer pral o vavareste te sal oun les praasell? T'mer dinele, har rah penenn: Mer kamah gar te djinell, hoy čačo hi?" 
Proverbs1:23 Te shounans ap mande, har dom t'men trad, sikroms t'mende, hoy an miro dji hi, oun moukoms t'men mire laba te hayvell." 
Proverbs1:24 Har kharom t'men, kaman gar te shounell. Har hadom miro vast, dan t'mer gar yak." 
Proverbs1:25 T'mer moukan t'men či te penell, oun dan gar yak ap kova, hoy penom." 
Proverbs1:26 Yaake kamau me ninna te sal, te vell i bibarht pral t'mende, ava, me sau, te vell kova, hoy darenna," 
Proverbs1:27 oun vell pral t'mende har i zorelo baro dourho; te vell i bibarht pral t'mende har i phourdepen, hoy lauter khetne phagell; te vell i pharo tsiro oun bari daar pral t'mende." 
Proverbs1:28 Palle denn le pal mande gole, oun me moukau či mandar te shounell. Palle rodenn le man oun hatsenn man gar." 
Proverbs1:29 Yon kaman o čačepen gar te djinell, oun gar o baro Debleha te djivell." 
Proverbs1:30 Har penom lenge, hoy lenge lačo hi, kran le kova gar. Har dom len trad, dikan le krik." 
Proverbs1:31 Doleske hounte rhan le, hoy ap lengre dromma bares vas. oun venn čalo kolestar, hoy an lengre sherya trouyel djas." 
Proverbs1:32 Kolen či an o shero hi, kolla rissrenn o Debleske o doumo; oun kova anell lenge o merepen. Oun lengro pre-phourdepen marell len." 
Proverbs1:33 Koon ap mande shounell, nay djivell kek daryah, oun leskro dji hounte darell kek bibarht." 
Proverbs2:1 Miro čavo, shoun ap mire laba, oun rike tout ap kova, hoy me touke penom," 
Proverbs2:2 de yak ap o gosvepen, oun kre tiro dji pre, te hayvess lauter mishto!" 
Proverbs2:3 Mange mandar gosvepen, oun pouč man, hoy te kress!" 
Proverbs2:4 Rode pal miro gosvepen, har te rodals roup oun i khatedo bravlepen!" 
Proverbs2:5 Palle hayveh, har nay djiveh o baro Debleha, oun prindjreh les boud oun boudeder." 
Proverbs2:6 O baro Devel hi kova, kay dell gosvepen. Lestar vell, te djinell oun hayvell i mensho boud koova." 
Proverbs2:7 Kolen, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, dell lo, hoy len hounte vell. Oun dell yak ap kolende, kay leskro drom djan, te krell lenge kek čomone." 
Proverbs2:8 Yob vell ap i rig kolenge, kay krenn o čačepen, oun rikrell peskre vasta pral kolende, kay djan ap leskro drom." 
Proverbs2:9 Palle hayveh, hoy glan o Debleste mishto oun čačo hi, har nay djah ap leskro drom, oun djiveh i djipen, hoy an leskre yaka lačo hi." 
Proverbs2:10 O Debleskro gosvepen vell an tiro dji, oun hoy yob toute sikrell, hi touke shoukar." 
Proverbs2:11 Oun tou deh yak, har te djivess, oun djineh, hoy mishto hi," 
Proverbs2:12 oun veh gar ap i čilačo drom, oun shouneh gar ap i menshende, kay rhorhepen rakrenna," 
Proverbs2:13 oun o čačo drom moukan, oun i djipen an o čilačepen djivenn." 
Proverbs2:14 Lenge hi shoukar, te krenn le čilačo koova, oun yon sanenn, te krenn le djoungelo koova." 
Proverbs2:15 Lengre dromma hi bango, o čačo dromestar djan le tele." 
Proverbs2:16 Ma kre har yon, te peress gar dren ap i shoukar laba i djouvyatar kay i vavareskri romni hi," 
Proverbs2:17 oun moukas peskro romes, koleha li khetne djas har li terno his, oun bistras, hoy li peskro romeste sovel das glan lakro Debleste." 
Proverbs2:18 Te djah an lakro kheer, veh ap i drom, hoy djal an o merepen. Lakre dromma djan an o moulengro them." 
Proverbs2:19 Hakeno, kay djal pash late dren, vell gar bouder pale, oun vell gar ap o drom, hoy an o djipen anell." 
Proverbs2:20 Doleske dja tou o drom, kay i lače djana, oun ač an o čačepen tardo." 
Proverbs2:21 Kolla, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, oun o Debleskro drom djan, djivenn an kava them oun ačenn koy dren." 
Proverbs2:22 Kolla, kay o čilačepen krenn oun o Debles moukenn, venn vin tradedo dran o them, yaake te hatseh bouder kek lendar." 
Proverbs3:1 Miro čavo, ma biste kova, hoy touke sikrom, rike mire laba an tiro dji!" 
Proverbs3:2 Yaake vell tout i lengsto djipen, oun tire djipaskre bersha venn pherdo lačepen." 
Proverbs3:3 Djib hako tsiro an o lačepen oun an o čačepen! Pande mire laba har i verkli troul tiri meen, oun čin len an tiro dji!" 
Proverbs3:4 Palle hal lačo oun gosevo glan i yaka o Deblestar oun i menshendar. 
Proverbs3:5 Čip tiro tselo dji ap o baro Debleste! Ma pats, kay djineh kokres, hoy mishto oun čačo hi!" 
Proverbs3:6 Rike tout ap o baro Debleste, hoy tou ninna kreh! Oun yob krell tiro drom čačo glan toute." 
Proverbs3:7 Ma ab gosevo an tire yaka! Mouk o baro Devel tiro ray te vell, oun rike tout krik i čilače dromma!" 
Proverbs3:8 Kova dell tout sastepen oun nevi zoor. 
Proverbs3:9 De o baro Debleste tiro bravlepastar oun ko feteder kolestar, hoy touke khetne anal, yaake hadeh leskro lab." 
Proverbs3:10 Palle venn tire djobengre khera pherdo djob, oun tiri bari molyakri piri yaake pherdo, te nashell i mool pral." 
Proverbs3:11 Miro čavo, ma dik čilačes, te dell tout o baro Devel i phagi! Ma naash lestar krik, te dell lo tout trad." 
Proverbs3:12 Kones o baro Devel o djiyestar kamell, koles dell lo, yaake har i dad peskro čaveha krell, ap koleste yob lačes dikell." 
Proverbs3:13 Har barhtelo hi ko mensho, kay o gosvepen hatsas, kova, kay djinell, hoy mishto hi." 
Proverbs3:14 Te hi tout gosvepen, hi kova boudeder moldo, har te vell tout roup oun sonakay." 
Proverbs3:15 O gosvepen hi koučeder har mirklia. Ava, či, hoy kamals, te vell tout, hi yaake boud moldo har o gosvepen." 
Proverbs3:16 An peskro čačo vast, rikrell o gosvepen i lengsto djipen touke, peskro servo vasteha dell lo tout bravlepen oun raylepen." 
Proverbs3:17 O gosvepen anell ap shoukar dromma, kay dell kek čingepen." 
Proverbs3:18 Har i rouk, hoy o djipen dell, hi o gosvepen hakeneske, kay les an peste pre-lell. Barhtele hi lauter, kay o gosvepen an pengre djia rikrenn." 
Proverbs3:19 O baro Devel kras i phoub o gosvepah, oun o bolepen yaake, har yob djinas, kay kova mishto his." 
Proverbs3:20 Leskri gosvepah moukas lo pani te vell dran i phoub oun brishin dran o bolepen. 
Proverbs3:21 Miro čavo, mouk o gosvepen gar dran tire yaka! Rike tout ap kova, hoy mishto oun gosevo hi!" 
Proverbs3:22 Kova dell tiro djipen zoor oun krell les shoukar har i verkli troul tiri meen. 
Proverbs3:23 Yaake nay djah zoreles tiro drom, oun pereh gar pral i barra, hoy kote čiddo hi." 
Proverbs3:24 Rati čiveh tout tele kek daryah, oun tou nay soveh mishto." 
Proverbs3:25 Tout hounte vell kek daar glan i bibarht, hoy vell sik, vitar gar glan o merepen, hoy vell pral kolende, kay kamenn o Deblestar či te djinell." 
Proverbs3:26 O baro Devel hi pash toute. Yob dell yak ap toute, te stakress gar an i khatede dorya, hoy kamenn tout te taprell." 
Proverbs3:27 Te hi tout lačo koova, de ninna koleste, koles či hi." 
Proverbs3:28 Te nay deh les kova kanna, ma pen ap leste: Dja touke oun ab o vavar dives pale! Palle kamau tout čomone te dell." 
Proverbs3:29 Ma le touke glan, te kress čilačepen koleske, kay pash toute an o lačepen djivell!" 
Proverbs3:30 Ma činge čičeske yekeha, kay touke či kras!" 
Proverbs3:31 Ma dik zilve yakentsa ap yekeste, kay las pes i zoryah, hoy i vavareske his. Ma kre har yob!" 
Proverbs3:32 O baro Devel dikell rhoyedes ap kolende, kay bange dromma djan. I maal hi lo kolenge, kay ap o čačo drom djan." 
Proverbs3:33 O baro Devel čivell i bibarht ap o kheer i čilačendar, oun barht ap o kheer kolendar, kay an o čačepen tardo hi." 
Proverbs3:34 Kolla, kay praasenn i vavaren, kolen praasell lo ninna. Kolla, kay krenn pen gar bares, ap kolende dikell lo lačes." 
Proverbs3:35 Kolla, kay čačepah gosevo hi, venna sharedo. Kolla, kay dinelo koova krenn, hounte hidjrenn pengri ladj." 
Proverbs4:1 Mire čave, shounenn ap kova, hoy me, t'maro dad, t'menge pashel anau. Denn yak ap mire laba, te venn gosevo!" 
Proverbs4:2 Mire laba hi lačo. Doleske ma bistrenn len! 
Proverbs4:3 Har me gomme i tikno čavo homs pash miro dad, kek vavar čavo his miri dat har man," 
Proverbs4:4 kote sikras lo man, har te djivap, oun penas: An tiro dji le mire laba pre oun biste len gar! Rike ap mire laba, palle djiveh." 
Proverbs4:5 Kre lauter, te vess gosevo oun hayvess, hoy mishto hi. Ma biste mire laba! Kre yaake, har touke penom!" 
Proverbs4:6 Ma mouk o gosvepen! Te hal gosevo, veh tou vin lino dran o čilačepen. Te kameh o gosvepen, hi lo har i zorelo kheer troul toute." 
Proverbs4:7 O feteder koova, hoy nay leh, hi o gosvepen. Doleske kre lauter, te less les!" 
Proverbs4:8 Hidje o gosvepen pral an tiro djipen, palle krell lo tout bares. Rike o gosvepen zoreles, palle dikenn i vavar pre ap toute." 
Proverbs4:9 Har i rayeskri stadi ap tiro shero hi o gosvepen touke. Ava, har i rayeskri stadi krell lo tout shoukar." 
Proverbs4:10 Shoun miro čavo, oun de yak ap miro rakepen, yaake te djivess i lengsto djipen." 
Proverbs4:11 Me anau tout ap o drom, kay dikeh, har te djivess goseves. Me sikrau tout o čačo drom." 
Proverbs4:12 Ap kava drom hi touke kek barra čiddo, hoy tire herya nay pale rikrenn. Ninna te nasheh sik, hi či koy, pral koleste tou nay pereh." 
Proverbs4:13 Ač pash kova, hoy touke siklo vas, mouk kova gar! Rike tout ap kol goseve laba! Dran lende vell tout i lačo djipen." 
Proverbs4:14 Ma dja ap o drom, kay i čilače djan! Ma kre har yon!" 
Proverbs4:15 Mouk lengro drom ap i rig čiddo, ma dja ap leste! Risse tout lestar krik, oun dja doureder!" 
Proverbs4:16 Kol menshe nay sovenn gar yaake rah bis te kran le čomone čilačo. Lenge vell o sopen randedo, te anan le gar yekes an i bibarht." 
Proverbs4:17 Lengro čilačo koova hi lengro rhapen, hoy krell len čalo. Yon djan i zoryah ap i vavarende pre. Oun kova hi lenge shoukar har te piyenn le mool." 
Proverbs4:18 O drom kolendar, kay o čačepen krenn, hi har o kham, hoy taysarlakro pre djal, oun o dives anell oun zorleder vell bis te hi lo pralstounes tardo." 
Proverbs4:19 O drom kolendar, kay o čilačepen krenn, hi har i kali rat; yon nay dikenn gar, pral hoy yon perenn." 
Proverbs4:20 Miro čavo, de yak ap kova, hoy rakrau! Shoun mishto ap mire laba!" 
Proverbs4:21 Ma biste len! Rike len an tiro dji! 
Proverbs4:22 Kol laba anenn o djipen oun o sastepen kolenge, kay len pre lenn." 
Proverbs4:23 De yak ap kova, hoy patseh dour an tiro dji! Kolestar vell o djipen." 
Proverbs4:24 Mouk kek rhorhene laba dran tiro mouy te vell! Tiro rakepen te vell mishto oun čačo! 
Proverbs4:25 Mouk touke či an i yaka te vell! Dik glan toute oun gar čačes oun serves! 
Proverbs4:26 De yak te djas i čačo drom! Oun rake tiro djiyeha pral lauter hoy kreh! 
Proverbs4:27 Dja gar tele kava dromestar, gar čačes oun gar serves. Rike tire herya pale o čilačo dromestar!" 
Proverbs5:1 Miro čavo, de yak ap kol goseve laba, hoy touke penau! Shoun ap kova, hoy touke pashel anau." 
Proverbs5:2 Palle hayveh hoy mishto hi, oun tire laba sikrenn, kay hal gosevo." 
Proverbs5:3 O rakepen o vavareskri romni hi goudlo har gvin. Oun lakre laba hi touke shoukar har lačo djet. 
Proverbs5:4 Pal kova hi kova, hoy tout latar hi, har i djoungelo pipen oun har i rharo hoy ap douy rigya činell." 
Proverbs5:5 Yoy tserdell tout peha an o merepen. Ko drom, kay li djal, anell an o moulengro them." 
Proverbs5:6 Yoy djal gar ap o drom, kay anell o djipen. Lakro drom hi bango, oun yoy dikell kova gar." 
Proverbs5:7 Doleske, mire čave, shounenn ap mande, oun krenn, hoy t'menge penau!" 
Proverbs5:8 Rike tiro drom dour krik latar! Ma dja pash o voudar lakro kherestar! 
Proverbs5:9 Te kreh tou kova gar, nay vell kova yaake, te boudreh i vavarenge, oun deh tire feteder bersha kolende, kolen kek dji touke hi." 
Proverbs5:10 Palle djivenn vavar menshe tiro bravlepastar. Oun kova, hoy tou touke yaake phares khetne lal, vell an o vavareskro kheer." 
Proverbs5:11 Palle leh tou phares dourho, pereh khetne," 
Proverbs5:12 oun peneh: “Har dinelo homs, har dom gar yak, hoy mange penlo vas. Hoske shounom gar ap koleste, kay das man trad?" 
Proverbs5:13 Hoske shounom gar ap mire sikepangre, oun dom yak ap lengro rakepen?" 
Proverbs5:14 Har sik nay voms an i bibarht! Oun mire tsele menshe dikans kova!” 
Proverbs5:15 Pi dran tiri brounna! Tout hi lačo pani, hoy nashella. Pi kolestar!" 
Proverbs5:16 Kameh, te nashell tiro pani vin ap o drom oun an o foro?" 
Proverbs5:17 Touke kokres hi lo, oun kek vavareske." 
Proverbs5:18 Ap tiro pani hi o Debleskri barht čiddo. Ab barhtelo pral tiri romyate, kolat romedineral, har terno hals." 
Proverbs5:19 I kamli vesheskri groumni hi li, i shoukar divyi bouzni. Kokres mank lakre čoučya čivess tout. Kokres an lakre moussya hatseh tiri barht." 
Proverbs5:20 Miro čavo, hoske rodeh tiri barht pash i vavareskri romni? Hoske kameh i vavar romyat trouyel te taprell?" 
Proverbs5:21 O baro Devel dikell, har hakeno djivell. Kova, hoy hakeno krella, djinell lo." 
Proverbs5:22 O čilačo koova pandell koles, kay kova krella. Leskri doosh hi har shelle, hoy les pandenn." 
Proverbs5:23 Savo merella doleske, kay moukas yob peske či te penell. Dran leskro dinlepen djal lo nashedo." 
Proverbs6:1 Miro čavo, dal tou tiro dadeskro vast i vavareske oun penal, te playsreh koleskri siyaan?" 
Proverbs6:2 Pandal tout tiro labeha? Hal tou pandlo an tiro rakepen, hoy dran tiro mouy vas?" 
Proverbs6:3 Palle hal tou an o vavareskro vast, miro čavo. Kanna kre lauter, te vess pale vin! Dja pash leste, rake ap leste dren! Mouk gar tele, te mangess lestar, te moukell lo tout vin." 
Proverbs6:4 Rode kek sopen! Mouk tire yaka gar dren te sovell!
