Proverbs6:5 Tserde tout vin dran leskre vasta har i vesheskri bouzni dran i pandle dorya, oun har i čirklo dran o vast kolestar, kay tapras les." 
Proverbs6:6 Tou či-moldo, kay kameh gar te boudrell, touke penau: Dja pash i kiri, dik havi boudi yoy krell! Oun ab gosevo!" 
Proverbs6:7 Kolat hi kek pralstouno, kek ray, kek, kay lake penell, hoy te krell li." 
Proverbs6:8 An i niyal anell li peskro rhapen khetne. Oun an ko tsiro, kay o djob dren anlo vell, lell li peskro rhapen khetne o tsireske, kay či dell." 
Proverbs6:9 Tou či-moldo, kay kameh gar te boudrell, har rah kameh gomme čiddo te ačell? Kaana kameh tou pre te stell?" 
Proverbs6:10 Tou peneh: “Mouk man gomme i tikno tsiro te sovell, i douyto kopo i yaka te pandell, oun i vasta an i gali te čivell.”" 
Proverbs6:11 Oun yaake vell o čorvlepen pral toute har i čorepaskro, kay lell touke lauter krik, hoy tout hi." 
Proverbs6:12 I čilačo mensho oun i či-moldo hi kova, kay rhorhepen rakrell," 
Proverbs6:13 kay i yakentsa dell, peskre heryentsa i sikepen krell, oun i goustyentsa khatemen sikrell." 
Proverbs6:14 An peskro dji hidjrell lo čilačepen, oun hako tsiro anell lo čingepen." 
Proverbs6:15 Doleske vell leskri bibarht sik pral leste. Sik hi lo doukedes ap i phoub čiddo, oun kek sastepen hi leske koy." 
Proverbs6:16 Shob koova hi, ap kolende dikell o baro Devel rhoyedes; oun i eftato koova hi leske o djoungleder:" 
Proverbs6:17 yaka, kay dikenn tele ap i vavarende; i mouy, hoy rakrell rhorhepen; vasta, hoy marenn saven, kay kek čilačepen kran;" 
Proverbs6:18 i dji, hoy čilačo koova peske glan lell; herya, hoy sik čilačo koova palla nashenn;" 
Proverbs6:19 yek, kay čomone ap i vavareste pre anell, hoy gar čačo hi; yek, kay anell čingepen mank phralende." 
Proverbs6:20 Miro čavo, rike tout ap i laba tiro dadestar! Ma biste ko drom, hoy tiri day toute sikras." 
Proverbs6:21 Čip lengre laba an tiro dji, pande len touke troul tiri meen har i verkli." 
Proverbs6:22 Te djah, sikrenn le touke o drom, te čiveh tout, denn le ap toute yak. Oun te steh pale pre, venn le touke an o shero." 
Proverbs6:23 Kova, hoy tiro dad oun tiri day touke pashel anan, hi har i momeli ap tiro drom. Te denn le tout trad, rikrenn le tout ap o drom, hoy o djipen anell." 
Proverbs6:24 Lengre laba rikrenn tout pale, te djas gar pash i romyate i vavarestar, te shouness gar ap i shoukar laba i vavar djouvyatar." 
Proverbs6:25 Mouk tiro dji gar lakro shoukapen palla te nashell! Mouk tout gar lakre shoukar yakentsa te taprell! 
Proverbs6:26 Tou djineh, i loubyake hounte dess gar boudeder har yek maro. I romyake i vavar morshestar hounte dess tiro djipen." 
Proverbs6:27 Nay hidjrell yek i yag tel peskre koola yaake te rhačenn le gar? 
Proverbs6:28 Nay nashell yek ap kasht, hoy rhačell, oun rhačrell peskre pire gar?" 
Proverbs6:29 Yaake djal koleske, kay pash i romyate i vavarestar djal. Hakeno, kay lat an-taprell, lell peskri phagi." 
Proverbs6:30 I ladj koleske, kay bokas oun doleske čoras" 
Proverbs6:31 oun palle tapedo vas, hi gar yaake baro har koy ladj koleske, kay las pes i vavareskri romni. Ko čorepaskro hounte dell efta kope yaake boud pale, har čoras lo, ninna te hi kova lauter, hoy les hi. Kova, kay las peske i vavareskri romni, kova hi narvelo. Savo koova krell kokres yek, kay kamell bouder gar te djivell." 
Proverbs6:32  
Proverbs6:33 Dava oun ladj perenn ap leste, oun ko praasepen ap leste djal gar bouder krik." 
Proverbs6:34 I rom, kay zilverell, leskri rholi vell baro. Oun te vell ko dives, kay nay dell lo leske pale, hoy yob leske kras, palle krell lo kova oun rikrell pes gar pale." 
Proverbs6:35 Yob lell kek love, har boud les ninna kameh te dell, či nay deh, hoy les nay pale rikrell." 
Proverbs7:1 Miro čavo, rike mire laba, oun hoy touke penom, khate an tiro dji!" 
Proverbs7:2 Rike mire laba oun tou djiveh, de yak ap lende har ap tiro yak!" 
Proverbs7:3 Pande len troul tiro goushto, čin len an tiro dji!" 
Proverbs7:4 Dik ap o gosvepen, har te vals lo tiri pheen, oun ap gosevo rakepen, har te vals lo tiro feteder maal." 
Proverbs7:5 Te hal gosevo, rikreh tout pale i vavareskri romyatar, ava, i vavar djouvyatar, kay shoukar laba rakrell." 
Proverbs7:6 His i dives, kay homs tardo pash i vali miro kherestar oun dikom vin." 
Proverbs7:7 Ap o drom dikom boud terne morshen, oun mank lende yek, koles či an o shero hi." 
Proverbs7:8 Yob djas ap o drom kote, kay i dromma khetne venna pash i kheer, kay i djouvel djivell." 
Proverbs7:9 His tamlo oun i rati vas. 
Proverbs7:10 Koy dikom lat, koy djouvel, rido an i ripen har i loubni. Yoy djal pash leste oun djinell mishto, hoy lat glan hi." 
Proverbs7:11 Divyo his li oun bipandlo, te rikrell lat nay či an lakro kheer." 
Proverbs7:12 Ap i dromma, ap i platse oun kote, kay i dromma khetne venna vas li diklo, har rodell li pal yekeste." 
Proverbs7:13 Oun yoy taprell ko terno morshes, čoumrell les, dikell leske an i yaka oun penell ap leste:" 
Proverbs7:14 Kava dives anom o Debleske i firho, yaake har leske sovel dom. Ko mass hi khere pash mande." 
Proverbs7:15 Doleske djom vin, te rodap tout, oun kate hatsom tout!" 
Proverbs7:16 Me čivom shoukar plarhte ap miro čiben, save plarhte, hoy van kerdo dran kouč than, hoy dran Egiptia vella." 
Proverbs7:17 Lom kouč panya, hoy lačes soungenna pal myrrhe, Aloe oun Cinnamome, oun čorom len ap o čiben." 
Proverbs7:18 Ab, te kamas men i tseli rat, te vas mer douy barhtelo hakeno an i moussya o vavarestar." 
Proverbs7:19 Miro rom hi gar khere; yob djas krik ap i dour drom. 
Proverbs7:20 Leskri ladetsa boud loventsa las lo peha, oun vell gar khere bis te o čon pale pherdo hi." 
Proverbs7:21 Fothe yoy ap leste dren rakras, kran kol boud laba les har mato, oun lakro shoukar rakepah tserdas li les peha." 
Proverbs7:22 Oun yob nashas lake palla, har i groumni, hoy gar djinell, te vell li maredo, oun yaake har i vesheskri bouzni, hoy stakrell an i dorya, hoy lat taprenn," 
Proverbs7:23 kay i faylo lake an o dji čourye dell. Ko terno morsheske djal yaake har i čirklo, hoy an i netsa djal, oun gar djinell, te hounte merell lo." 
Proverbs7:24 Doleske, mire čave, shounenn ap mire laba! Denn yak ap miro rakepen!" 
Proverbs7:25 Ma nashe tiro dji ap savi djouvyate! Ma dja lake palla! 
Proverbs7:26 Boud morsha kras li paash. Boud nashran dran late pengro djipen. 
Proverbs7:27 Lakro kheer hi o voudar an o moulengro them. Koon pash late djal, hi ap o drom an o merepen." 
Proverbs8:1 O gosvepen hi har i day, kay dell tout gole, har i pheen, kay moukell pes te shounell." 
Proverbs8:2 Pral pash o drom, hi li tardo, kote, kay i dromma khetne venna." 
Proverbs8:3 Pash i foreskre voudya dell li gole, kote kay yek dran o foro vin djal, oun kote, kay yek an o foro dren djal:" 
Proverbs8:4 Ap t'mende lauterende dau gole, miro rakepen hi hakeneske ap kay phoub." 
Proverbs8:5 Hayvenn t'mer či? Palle denn yak ap goseve laba! Han t'mer dinelo? Palle dikenn dren, hoy t'menge mishto hi!" 
Proverbs8:6 Shounenn, hoy rakrau! Me penau t'menge kouč laba. Oun miro mouy rakrell, hoy čačo hi." 
Proverbs8:7 Ava, miro rakepen hi o čačepen. Kamau te rakrap kek čilačepen. Kova vals djoungeles an mire yaka." 
Proverbs8:8 Lauter, hoy rakrau, hi čačo. An miro rakepen hi kek rhorhepen, či hoy gar čačo hi." 
Proverbs8:9 Koon hayvell, hoy mishto oun gar mishto hi, kova hayvell, te hi mire laba čačo. Oun koon boud djinell, kova dikell, te hi le o čačepen." 
Proverbs8:10 Moukenn t'men mandar te penell, har te djivenn! Kova hi t'menge feteder har te nashenn o roup palla! Rodenn, har te djinenn boudeder. Kova hi t'menge feteder har kouč sonakay." 
Proverbs8:11 O gosvepen hi boudeder moldo har kouč mirklia. Oun či, koleske tiro dji nay palla nashell, hi yaake boud moldo har o gosvepen." 
Proverbs8:12 Me hom o gosvepen, oun djinau, hoy čačo hi. oun nay penau vavarenge, hoy lenge mishto hi." 
Proverbs8:13 Kova, kay kamell o baro Debleha te djivell, kova kamell o čilačepen gar glan peskre yaka te dikell, kova dikell gar tele ap o vavareste oun phourdell pes gar pre, kova djal gar i čilačo drom, oun rakrell kek rhorhepen." 
Proverbs8:14 Mire labentsa sikrau yekeste o drom, oun krau leskre yaka pre. Djinau, hoy mishto oun gar mishto hi, oun man hi i zoor." 
Proverbs8:15 Mandar vell i zoor, hoy dau i bare rayenge. Mandar vell, te nay rakrenn i čačepangre raya o čačepen vin." 
Proverbs8:16 Mandar lenn i pralstoune pengri zoor, te penenn le i menshenge, hoy te krenn le. Mandar lenn i čačepangre raya pengri zoor, te rakrenn le o čačepen vin pral i menshende." 
Proverbs8:17 Me kamau kolen, kay man kamenn. Oun kolla, kay rodenn man o djiyestar, kolla hatsenn man ninna." 
Proverbs8:18 Bravlepen oun barepen dau me, bravlepen, hoy ačella, oun o čačepen vell mandar." 
Proverbs8:19 Hoy t'mer mandar lenn, hi feteder har o lačeder sonakay, koučeder har o lačeder roup." 
Proverbs8:20 Kote, kay i menshe ap o čačo drom djan, oun an o čačepen tardo hi, kote hom me ninna," 
Proverbs8:21 te dap kolen, kay man o djiyestar kamenn, yaake boud, te nay djivenn le mishto, te krap lengre khera pherdo bravlepen." 
Proverbs8:22 O baro Devel kras man glan i rah tsiro. Glan hako vavar koova kras lo man. 
Proverbs8:23 Me homs koy glan hako tsiro, har i phoub gomme gar kerdo vas." 
Proverbs8:24 Har i bare panya gomme gar koy his, vom boldo. Har i tikne panya gomme gar nashan, homs me." 
Proverbs8:25 Har i bare berge gomme gar tardo his, oun i tikne berge gar kerdo his, vom me boldo." 
Proverbs8:26 O baro Devel kras gomme gar i phoub oun o them, vitar gar i čik koy pre." 
Proverbs8:27 Me homs pashel, har kras lo o bolepen oun koy platsa, kay dikell vin, har te vans o bolepen oun o baro pani kote khetne." 
Proverbs8:28 Har čivas lo i volke ap o bolepen, oun kras o pani an o telstunepen zoreles," 
Proverbs8:29 har lo i panyenge penas bis kate oun gar doureder, har lo i phoub tardo kras," 
Proverbs8:30 kote homs leskro čavo an leskri gali. Oun yob his barhtelo pral mande hako dives. Oun me khelom mange glan leste hako tsireske. 
Proverbs8:31 Ap i phoub, hoy yob kras, khelom, oun miro dji sanas, har homs mashkral i menshende." 
Proverbs8:32 Doleske, mire čave, shounenn ap mande! Barhtele hi kolla, kay ap miro drom djana!" 
Proverbs8:33 Shounenn, te dau t'men trad! Lenn kova ap o dji oun krenn, hoy penom!" 
Proverbs8:34 Barhtelo hi ko mensho, kay shounell ap mande, kay hi tardo pash miro voudar hako dives, oun dell yak ap miro kheer." 
Proverbs8:35 Ko mensho, kay man hatsas, kova hatsas o djipen, oun o baro Devel dikell lačes ap leste." 
Proverbs8:36 Kova, kay gar pash mande vell, krell peskro djipen paash. Hakeno, kay kamell či mandar te djinell, hi ap o drom, hoy anell an o merepen." 
Proverbs9:1 O gosvepen hi har i djouvel, kay moukas efta bare pesse kashta te činell oun pre te čivell, oun peskro kheer ap lende te krell." 
Proverbs9:2 Yoy maras i groumyat, kras i mool mishto, oun čivas čare, khore, čourya ap i rhapaskri." 
Proverbs9:3 Palle bičras li djouvyengre boudepangre ap i pralstouni platsa an o foro, te denn le gole:" 
Proverbs9:4 “Kones či an o shero hi, kova vell kate pash mande!” Ap o narveleste, penell li:" 
Proverbs9:5 Ab, rha miro maro oun pi i mool, hoy me krom!" 
Proverbs9:6 Ma dja kolentsa, kolen či an o shero hi! Palle djiveh. Dja kolentsa, kay goseve hi!" 
Proverbs9:7 Te kameh i pre-phourdes čomone pashel te anell, palle praasell lo tout. Te peneh i čilačeske, te kras lo, hoy gar mishto hi, palle doukell lo tout." 
Proverbs9:8 Te peneh i pre-phourdes, kay kova, hoy lo kras, gar mishto hi, palle vell lo rhoyedo ap toute. Te peneh i goseves, kay kova, hoy lo kras, gar mishto hi, palle kamell lo tout." 
Proverbs9:9 Pen i goseveske kova, hoy yob gar mishto kras! Palle vell lo gomme gosveder. An koleske čomone pashel, kay an o čačepen tardo hi! Palle djinell lo gomme boudeder." 
Proverbs9:10 Glan halauter hounte djivess o baro Debleha, te kameh goseves te vell. Te prindjreh koles, kay o čačo Devel hi, hal tou čačepah gosevo." 
Proverbs9:11 Me, o gosvepen, dau tout i lengsto djipen, krau, te djiveh boud bersha." 
Proverbs9:12 Te hal gosevo, hi kova touke boud moldo. Te hal pre-phourdo, hounte hidjress kokres, hoy kova touke anell." 
Proverbs9:13 O dinlepen hi har i narveli, bipandli djouvel, kolat či an o shero hi." 
Proverbs9:14 Glan o voudar peskro kherestar hi li beshdo, pral ap i platsa an o foro." 
Proverbs9:15 Oun penell ap hakeneste, kay koy djal oun ap o čačo drom hi:" 
Proverbs9:16 “Koles či an o shero hi, kova vell pash mande!” Oun ap koleste, kay narvelo hi, penell li:" 
Proverbs9:17 “Čoredo pani hi goudlo! Oun maro, hoy rhah khatedo, hi o lačeder!”" 
Proverbs9:18 Oun yob djinell gar, te hi kote i moule. Kolla, kay pash late venn, hi ap ko drom, kay an o merepen djal." 
Proverbs10:1 Kalla hi i goseve laba o Salomestar. I gosevo čavo krell peskro dades oun peskri dat barhtelo. I dinelo čavo krell, te vell lenge ropaske." 
Proverbs10:2 Čoredo bravlepen hi čičeske. O čačepen lell tout dran o merepen vin. 
Proverbs10:3 O baro Devel moukell i lačes gar te bokell. Krik pestar tradell lo ko čilačes, koles bok pral boud koova hi." 
Proverbs10:4 Koon peskre vasta an i gali čiddo moukell, kova vell čorvelo. Koon boud boudrell, kova vell bravelo." 
Proverbs10:5 Koon niyaleske peskro djob dren anell, hi i gosevo čavo. Koon sovell an ko tsiro, kay o djob dren anlo vell, kova hi i čavo, koleske peskro dad pes hounte ladjell." 
Proverbs10:6 O Debleskri barht hi čiddo ap koleste, kay an o čačepen tardo hi. An o rakepen i čilačendar hi lengro djoungelo koova khatedo." 
Proverbs10:7 Lače menshe venn gar bistedo. Kova, hoy le kran, hi o Debleskro lačepen. I čilače venn bistedo." 
Proverbs10:8 Koles, kay i gosevo dji hi, rikrell pes ap kol laba, hoy leske penlo van. yek, kay dinelo koova rakrell, nashrell halauter." 
Proverbs10:9 Kova, kay an o čačepen djivell, hounte darell gar. Kova, kay ap bange dromma djal, vell tapedo." 
Proverbs10:10 Kova, kay i yakentsa dell, doukrell i vavaren. Kova, kay dinelo koova rakrell, nashrell halauter." 
Proverbs10:11 Har i brounna dran kolate djido pani nashell, yaake hi i laba kolestar, kay an o čačepen tardo hi. Pal i laba i čilačendar hi lengro djoungelo koova khatedo." 
Proverbs10:12 Dran rholi vell čingepen. Koon o vavares o djiyestar kamell, bistrell leskro tselo čilačo koova." 
Proverbs10:13 Kova, kay hayvell, hoy mishto oun gar mishto hi, rakrell goseve laba. Koles, kay či an o shero hi, kova lell dava." 
Proverbs10:14 Goseve menshe rodenn pal kova, te djinenn le boud koova. O rakepen i dinelestar anell sik an i bibarht." 
Proverbs10:15 O bravlepen i bravelestar hi leske har i zorelo kheer. I bibarht o čorvelestar hi leskro čorvlepen. 
Proverbs10:16 I boudi kolestar, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, anell leske doha djipaske. I rhorheno kras peskro bravlepah čilačo koova." 
Proverbs10:17 Kova, kay shounell ap koleste, kay dell les trad, kova djal ap o drom, hoy anell o djipen. Kova, kay kamell gar te shounell, hi ap i drom, kay djal lo nashedo." 
Proverbs10:18 Koles hi i rhorheno mouy, kay peskri rholi ap i vavareste khatrell. Oun kova, kay rhorhepen pral i vavareste rakrell, hi i dinelo." 
Proverbs10:19 Koon boud laba krell, anell ninna doosh ap peste. Koon peskro mouy rikrell, hi gosevo." 
Proverbs10:20 O rakepen kolestar, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, hi har kouč roup. Kova, hoy i čilačes an o shero hi, hi či moldo." 
Proverbs10:21 O rakepen kolestar, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, dell boud menshen nevi zoor. Kolen či an o shero hi, kolla merenn dran ko dinelo koova, hoy le kran." 
Proverbs10:22 Te čivell o baro Devel peskri barht ap toute, veh tou bravelo. Oun kova, hoy tou koy pashel kreh, hi čičeske." 
Proverbs10:23 O dineleske hi shoukar, te krell lo vi-ladjedo koova. O gosevo morsheske hi shoukar, te hayvell lo gomme boudeder." 
Proverbs10:24 Kolestar i čilačo darell, kova vell pral leste. Oun kova, hoy i lače mangenna, kova vell lenge dino." 
Proverbs10:25 Har i zorelo dourho pral i phoub phourdas, his o čilačo bouder gar koy. Kova, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, ačell hako tsireske." 
Proverbs10:26 Har shout i dandenge, oun yagakro dourho i yakenge, yaake hi o či-moldo, kay kamell gar te boudrell, kolenge, kay les ap i boudi bičran." 
Proverbs10:27 Kova, kay djivell o baro Debleha, djivell boud bersha. O djipen o čilačestar vell tikneder." 
Proverbs10:28 Kova, kay i lače pre dikenna, te vell len, kova vell lenge dino; oun yon venn barhtelo. Kova, kay i čilače pre dikenn, te vell len, kova vell gar." 
Proverbs10:29 O drom o baro Deblestar hi har i zorelo kheer kolenge, kay an o čačepen tardo hi. I čilačen anell lo an o merepen." 
Proverbs10:30 Kova, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, ačell hako tsiro zoreles tardo. I čilače ačenn gar an o them." 
Proverbs10:31 Dran o mouy kolestar, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, venn goseve laba. I rhorheni čip vell tele činlo." 
Proverbs10:32 O rakepen kolestar, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, krell barhtelo. O rakepen i čilačendar doukrell." 
Proverbs11:1 I vaga, hoy sikrell gar čačes, har pharo čomone hi, hi i djoungelo koova glan o baro Debleskre yaka. Yob hi barhtelo pral koleste, kay playsrell pal o čačo pharepen." 
Proverbs11:2 I pre-phourdo dji vell sik an i ladj. I dji, hoy hadell pes gar, hi gosevo." 
Proverbs11:3 Lengro djoudjo dji anell i lačen ap o čačo drom. Ko midjak koova, hoy i phoukepangre krenn, vell ap lende pale oun phagell len." 
Proverbs11:4 O bravlepen hi i bravelenge či moldo ap ko dives, kay o Debleskri rholi pral i menshende vell. Kol menshe, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, venn vin lino dran o merepen." 
Proverbs11:5 Ko čačo koova, hoy o Debleskre menshe krenna, krell lengre dromma čačo. Ko čilačo nashrell pes an peskro čilačo koova." 
Proverbs11:6 Ko čačo koova, hoy o Debleskre menshe krenna, lell len vin dran o merepen. I phoukepangre venn tapedo an pengri bok pal i love." 
Proverbs11:7 Ap ko dives, kay merell o čilačo, merell ninna kova, kay lo peskro dji pre čivas. Kova, hoy leske boud moldo his, hi čičeske." 
Proverbs11:8 Kova, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, vell vin lino dran i bibarht. Oun pal leste vell ko čilačo koy dren." 
Proverbs11:9 Yek, kay kamell či o Deblestar te djinell, anell peskro rakepah i vavaren o Debleskro dromestar tele. Kolla, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, lenn pengro gosevo rakepah vavaren dran o merepen vin." 
Proverbs11:10 Te djal i lačenge mishto, palle hi i menshe an o tselo foro barhtelo. I čilače, te merenn le, denn le an o foro gole i barhtyatar." 
Proverbs11:11 O Debleskre menshe anenn o Debleskri barht pral o foro. Oun o foro vell zorelo. Dran o mouy i čilačendar vell sau rakepen, hoy phagell o foro tele." 
Proverbs11:12 Koon praasell o vavares, hi narvelo. I gosevo morsh rikrell peskro mouy." 
Proverbs11:13 Kova, kay djoungelo koova pral i vavarende rakrell, phoukrell, hoy lo čorrhanes shounas. I morsh o labestar rikrell kova peske." 
Proverbs11:14 Kote, kay kek an o them hi, kay i menshenge o drom sikrell, djan le tele. Kote, kay boud penenn, har nay doureder djal, djal i menshenge mishto." 
Proverbs11:15 Kova, kay peskro dadeskro vast das, te playsrell lo i vavareskri siyaan, koles khaytell kova, hoy lo kras. Koon kova gar kamell te krell, koleske djal feteder." 
Proverbs11:16 I kamli djouvel vell sharedo. Oun i morsh, kay hayvell pes te kourell, vell bravelo." 
Proverbs11:17 Kova, kay lačo ap o vavareste hi, krell peske kokres mishto. Kova, kay o vavares doukrell, doukrell pes kokres." 
Proverbs11:18 I čilačo mensho lell peske sau koova khetne, hoy leske gar ačell. Koon an o čačepen peskri boudi krell, lell i playsepen, hoy ačell." 
Proverbs11:19 Te kreh o čačepen, hal ap o drom an o djipen. Te nasheh o čilačepen palla, djah ap o drom an o merepen." 
Proverbs11:20 O baro Devel dikell rhoyedes ap kolende, kolen douy djia hi. Lačes dikell lo ap kolende, kay o čačo drom djan." 
Proverbs11:21 Tou nay deh tiro vast koy pre: O čilačo lell peskri phagi. Kolla, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, venn vin lino dran o merepen." 
Proverbs11:22 I shoukar djouvel, kay djinell gar, hoy čačo hi, hi har i sonakaskri goustri an o nak i balestar." 
Proverbs11:23 Kova, hoy kolla kamenn, kay o čačepen krenn, anell lenge lačepen. Oun kova, hoy i čilače kamenn, anell lenge o Debleskri rholi." 
Proverbs11:24 Kote hi yek, kova dell oun dell; oun yob lell boudeder oun boudeder. Oun kote hi i vavar, kova hi činlo oun dell či; oun vell čorvleder." 
Proverbs11:25 Kones i baro dji i vavarenge hi, koleske vell yaake boud dino, te vell lo boudeder har čalo. Oun kova, kay i trousheles pani dell, koles vell ninna pani dino." 
Proverbs11:26 Kova, kay djob pale rikrell, pral koleste rakrenn le bibarht vin. Oun barht rakrenn le vin pral koleste, kay djob bikrell." 
Proverbs11:27 Kova, kay kamell o tselo djiyeha o lačepen te krell, ap koleste dikenn le lačes. Kova, kay o čilačepen rodell, ap koleste vell kova." 
Proverbs11:28 Kova, kay čivell peskro dji ap peskro bravlepen, merell tele har patria. Kolenge, kay krenn o čačepen, djal mishto har i zenelo rouk." 
Proverbs11:29 Kova, kay gar yak dell ap peskro kheer oun ap peskri familya, pral koleste vell i phourdepen, hoy lauter krik phourdell. Oun ko dinelo vell palle o boudepaskro kolestar, koles i gosevo dji hi." 
Proverbs11:30 Kova, hoy i lačo oun čačo mensho krell, hi har i rouk, hoy o djipen dell. Ko mensho, kay gosevo hi, tserdell vavar menshen ap peskri rig." 
Proverbs11:31 Djiness, i lačo mensheske ap kay phoub vell o lačepen pale dino, hoy lo kras. Har boud boudeder vell palle o čilačepen pale dino kolenge, kay o čilačepen kran oun o Debleskro drom moukan." 
Proverbs12:1 Koleske, kay kamell gosevo te vell, hi shoukar, te vell leske penlo, hoy lo gar mishtes kras. Kova, kay moukell pes či te penell, ačell dinelo." 
Proverbs12:2 Ap i lačo mensheste dikell o baro Devel lačes. Pral koleste, koles o čilačepen glan hi, rakrell lo i phagi vin." 
Proverbs12:3 O čilačepen dell kekes i zoor, te ačell lo zoreles tardo. Kova, kay an o čačepen hi, ačell zoreles tardo har i rouk bare drabentsa." 
Proverbs12:4 I romni, kay peskri boudi mishto krell, hi peskro romeske har shereskro sonakay. I romni, kay anell ladj ap peskro romeste, hi har i djoungelo nasslepen an leskre kokale." 
Proverbs12:5 O Debleskre menshe kamenn o čačepen te krell. Čilače menshen hi či an o shero har rhorhepen. 
Proverbs12:6 I čilačengre laba kamenn yekes an o merepen te anell. O rakepen kolendar, kay o čačo drom djan, lell len dran o merepen vin." 
Proverbs12:7 I čilače venn tele vitsedo oun hi gar bouder koy. O kheer kolendar, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, ačell tardo." 
Proverbs12:8 Kones gosevo koova an o shero hi, kova vell sharedo. Kones dinelo koova an o shero hi, ap koleste dikenn le tele." 
Proverbs12:9 Hi feteder, te hi yek čorvelo oun hounte djal ap i boudi, har te krell pes yek bares oun les hi gar doha rhapaske." 
Proverbs12:10 Kova, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, les hi i dji peskre firhenge. I čilačen hi kek dji lenge." 
Proverbs12:11 Koon ap peskro kotar phoub boudrell, koleske vell boud maro. Koon savo koova pal nashell, hoy či moldo hi, kova hi narvelo." 
Proverbs12:12 Čilače menshenge hi shoukar, te krenn le midjak koova. Kolla, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, hi zoreles tardo oun krenn lačo koova." 
Proverbs12:13 O čilačo taprell pes kokres an peskre rhorhene laba. Kolla, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, venn vin dran i bibarht." 
Proverbs12:14 Koon lačepen rakrella, djivell ninna lačes. I mensho lell pale, hoy lo peskre vastentsa krell." 
Proverbs12:15 O drom, kay o dinelo djal, hi an leskre yaka čačo. I gosevo mensho shounell ap kova, hoy vavar leske penenn, te krell lo." 
Proverbs12:16 Koon peskri rholi sik sikrell, hi dinelo. Koon krell, har te shounals lo o praasepen gar, kova hi gosevo." 
Proverbs12:17 I morsh o labestar rakrell o čačepen vin. I rhorheno, kay dell glan, te penell lo, hoy lo dikas oun shounas, anell rhorhepen pre." 
Proverbs12:18 Laba, hoy sik vin rakedo venna, nay denn čourye har i rharo. O rakepen i goseve menshendar anell sastepen." 
Proverbs12:19 O čačo rakepen ačell hako tsireske. Rhorhene laba rikrenn gar rah. 
Proverbs12:20 Rhorhepen hi an i djia kolendar, kay čilačo koova vin krenn. Kolla, kay yaake rakrenn, te vell kek čingepen pre, venn barhtelo." 
Proverbs12:21 Kek čilačo koova vell ap kolende, kay an o čačepen tardo hi. Ap i čilačende vell boud bibarht." 
Proverbs12:22 O baro Devel dikell rhoyedes ap kolende, kay rhorhenna. Lačes dikell yob ap kolende, kay krenn o čačepen." 
Proverbs12:23 Yek, kay gosevo hi, sikrell gar, har boud yob djinell. I dinele denn pengro dinlepen vin gole." 
Proverbs12:24 Koon boud boudrell, vell o ray pral vavar. Koon peskre vasta an i gali čiddo moukell, vell i boudepaskro, oun hounte boudrell tel dava." 
Proverbs12:25 I pharo dji tserdell i menshes tele. I lačo lab krell les barhtelo. 
Proverbs12:26 Kova, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, hatsell peskro drom. I čilačen anell pengro drom kote, kay djan le nashedo." 
Proverbs12:27 Koon peskre vasta an i gali čiddo moukell, hatsell či, hoy yob nay rhals. Koles, kay boud boudrell, hi boud rhapaske." 
Proverbs12:28 O djipen hi kote, kay djan le ap o čačo drom. Kava drom hi mishto kerdo oun anell gar an o merepen." 
Proverbs13:1 I gosevo čavo shounell ap peskro dadeste, te penell yob leske, hoy lo gar mishto kras. I pre-phourdo sal oun shounell ninna gar, te vell lo trad dino." 
Proverbs13:2 I lačo mensho djivell ko lačepastar, hoy dran leskre laba vella. I phoukepangre bokenna pal o kourepen." 
Proverbs13:3 Kova kay ap peskro rakepen yak dell, kova dell yak ap peskro djipen. Koles i baro mouy hi, kova tserdell bibarht ap peste." 
Proverbs13:4 Kova, hoy yek kamell, kay kamell gar te boudrell, vell les gar. Kolenge, kay boud boudrenn, hi doha koy." 
Proverbs13:5 O rhorheno rakepen hi djoungeles glan i yaka kolestar, kay an o čačepen tardo hi. O čilačo krell praasedo koova oun vi-ladjedo koova." 
Proverbs13:6 Lengro čačo koova anell kolen dran i bibarht vin, kay kek doosh ap lende hi. I doosh i čilačendar anell len an i bibarht." 
Proverbs13:7 Kote hi yek, kay krell, har te vals lo bravelo. Oun les hi či. Oun kote hi yek, kay krell, har te vals lo čorvelo. Oun les hi boud bravlepen." 
Proverbs13:8 I bravelo nay ginell peskro djipen vin. I čorveleste dell kek trad. Pash leste hi či te lell. 
Proverbs13:9 Koon an o čačepen tardo hi, hi har i momeli, hoy barhteles rhačell, oun i čilačo har i momeli, hoy djal vin." 
Proverbs13:10 Mank i pre-phourde hi hako tsiro čingepen. Te hal gosevo, moukeh touke čomone te penell." 
Proverbs13:11 O bravlepen, hoy sik khetne lino vas, djal ninna sik pale krik. Kova, kay anell lokes peskre love khetne, lell boudeder oun boudeder." 
Proverbs13:12 Te dikell yek i rah tsiro ap čomone, oun kova vell gar, vell leskro dji pharo. Te vell kova, ap hoy yek yaake rah dikas, palle djivell leskro dji pale pre." 
Proverbs13:13 Koleske, kay i lačo lab i heryentsa stakrell, djal djoungeles. Koleske, kay rikrell pes ap ko lab, djal mishto." 
Proverbs13:14 I laba, hoy i gosevo rakrell, hi har djipaskro pani, oun sikrenn havo drom yek hounte djal, te perell lo gar an o merepaskre shelle." 
Proverbs13:15 Kol menshe, kay hayvenn, hoy hounte kerdo vell, hatsenn mala. I phoukepangre djan i drom, kay anell len an i bibarht." 
Proverbs13:16 Hakeno, kay gosevo hi, krell či, te rakras lo gar peskro djiyeha pral kova. I dinelo mensho dell peskro narvlepen vin gole." 
Proverbs13:17 I čilačo bičepaskro anell bibarht. I bičepaskro o labestar rakrell yaake, te vell lauter pale mishto." 
Proverbs13:18 An čorvlepen oun ladj vell kova, kay moukell pes či te penell. An-diklo vell kova, kay shounell, te vell lo trad dino." 
Proverbs13:19 Te vell kova, hoy yek yaake rah kamas, hi lo barhtelo. I dinele rhoyrenn pen, te hounte moukenn le pengro čilačo drom." 
Proverbs13:20 Kova, kay khetne hi kolentsa, kay gosevo hi, kova vell ninna gosevo. Kova kay i maal hi i dinelentsa, kova vell bibarhtelo." 
Proverbs13:21 Kolla, kay o Debleskro dromestar tele djan, kolen lell i bibarht palla oun taprell len. Kolla, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, lenn lačo koova." 
Proverbs13:22 Kova, hoy i lačo morsh pale moukell, vell doureder dino leskre čavende oun čavengre čavende. O bravlepen kolestar, kay an o čilačepen djivas, lell kova, kay an o čačepen tardo hi." 
Proverbs13:23 Boud djob vell bares ap i phoub i čorvelenge. Lengro čačepen lenn le gar, oun boud merenn i bokatar." 
Proverbs13:24 I dad, kay peskro čaveste kek phagi dell, krell leske gar mishto. Koon les kamell o djiyestar, kova rikrell pes gar pale, te dell lo les i phagi." 
Proverbs13:25 Koles, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, hi doha rhapaske. O per i čilačestar bokella." 
Proverbs14:1 I gosevi djouvel krell, te vell lakro kheer zoreles tardo. I dineli djouvel phagell les peskre vastentsa tele." 
Proverbs14:2 Kova, kay kamell o baro Debleha te djivell, djal o čačo drom. Koon či lestar kamell te djinell, djal ap bange dromma." 
Proverbs14:3 O rakepen o dinelestar sikrell peskro pre-phourdepen. I laba i gosevendar hi har vasta troul leste, hoy rikrenn len." 
Proverbs14:4 Kote, kay kek groumya hi, vell kek djob dren anlo. I zoryah i groumyendar aneh boud djob dren." 
Proverbs14:5 Te penell i morsh o labestar, hoy lo dikas oun shounas, rakrell lo o čačepen. Te penell i rhorheno, hoy lo dikas oun shounas, anell lo rhorhepen pre." 
Proverbs14:6 I pre-phourdo, te rodell lo o gosvepen, hatsell lo les gar. Kova, kay peskro djiyeha rakrell, koleske hi gar phares čomone dren te dikell." 
Proverbs14:7 Ma dja khetne i narveleha! Tou shouneh lestar či vavar har dinelo koova. 
Proverbs14:8 O gosevo dell yak har lo djivell, doleske hi lo gosevo. I narvele perenn hako kopo ap dinlepen dren. Oun yaake rhorhenn le pen kokres." 
Proverbs14:9 I dinele sanenn pral i doosh, hoy yon ap pende anan. O Devel dikell lačes ap kolende, kay o čačo drom djan." 
Proverbs14:10 Ko mensho, koleskro dji rovell, hi kokres. Oun ninna te stell leskro dji i barhtyatar, nay hayvell kek vavar čačepah leskri barht." 
Proverbs14:11 O kheer o čilačestar vell tele phagedo, i familyake kolestar, kay djal o čačo drom, djal mishto oun vell bareder." 
Proverbs14:12 Hi menshe koy, kay patsenn, kay lengro drom o čačo drom hi, oun djinenn gar, kay anell lo len an o merepen." 
Proverbs14:13 Ninna te sal yek, nay rovell o dji. Oun pal o sapen vell o ropen." 
Proverbs14:14 Koon bange dromma djal, koleske djal yaake, har lo djivas. Ninna i lačo morsheha hi yaake: yob lell pale pal kova, hoy yob kras." 
Proverbs14:15 Koles či an o shero hi, kova patsell hako lab, hoy yek ap leste rakrell. Kones i gosevo dji hi, kova dell yak, hoy lo krell oun kay lo djal." 
Proverbs14:16 O gosevo darella oun rikrell pes pale o čilačepastar. O dinelo vell sik rhoyedo oun patsell, te nay djal leske kek čilačepen." 
Proverbs14:17 Koon sik an i rholi vell, krell yek dinelo koova pal o vavar. Oun koon lell pes čilačepen glan, pral koleste hi le rhoyedo." 
Proverbs14:18 Kolen či an o shero hi, lenna pale, hoy dran lengro dinlepen vell. O gosevo djinell boud. Kova hi leske har i rayeskri stadi, hoy krell les shoukar." 
Proverbs14:19 I čilače hounte vitsrenn pen tele glan i lačende. Ava, yon hounte vitsrenn pen tele glan i voudya kolendar, kay an o čačepen tardo hi." 
Proverbs14:20 Kek kamell o čorveles, vitar gar kova, kay pash leste hi. O braveles hi boud mala." 
Proverbs14:21 Kova kay ap o vavareste tele dikell, anell doosh ap peste. Barhtelo vell kova, koles i dji i čorvelenge hi." 
Proverbs14:22 Kolen, kay čilačepen an o shero hi, kolla djan nashedo. Kolla, kay kamenn o lačepen te krell, kolenge hi i vavar menshe lačes oun rikrenn ap lende." 
Proverbs14:23 Kote, kay boudrenn le, venn le ninna playsedo. Kote, kay rakepen hi oun či vavar, hi len gar doha djipaske." 
Proverbs14:24 O gosvepen hi har shereskro sonakay i gosevenge. Ap o shero i narvelendar hi lengro dinlepen har i stadi. 
Proverbs14:25 Kova, kay doureder penella an o čačepen, hoy lo dikas oun shounas, kova lell menshen dran o merepen vin. Kova, kay anell rhorhepen ap i vavareste pre, hi i rhorheno." 
Proverbs14:26 Kova, kay djivell o baro Debleha, koles hi zoor an o dji. Ninna pral leskre čavende rikrell o baro Devel peskre vasta." 
Proverbs14:27 Kova, kay o baro Debleha djivell, nay djivell kek daryah. Yob rikrell peskre herya pale, te perell lo gar an i dorya, hoy tserdenn les an o merepen." 
Proverbs14:28 Te hi i baro rayes boud menshe, palle hi lo zorelo. Te hi les gar boud menshe, djal lo tele." 
Proverbs14:29 Kova, kay gar sik rhoyedo vell, hi gosevo. Koon sik rhoyedo vella, sikrell har dinelo yob hi." 
Proverbs14:30 Shoukapen an o dji krell o tselo menshes sasto. I dji, hoy zilverell, hi har i nasslepen, hoy i kokale pre rhal." 
Proverbs14:31 Koon zoryah i čorveles tele rikrell, kova praasell koles, kay o čorveles kras. Kones leske i baro dji hi, sharell o Debles." 
Proverbs14:32 O čilačo vell tele vitsedo dran leskro čilačepen. Kova, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, koleskro patsepen rikrell les ninna gomme an o merepen." 
Proverbs14:33 O gosvepen hi khere an o dji kolestar, kay hayvell, hoy mishto oun gar mishto hi. An i dinelengre djia hi kek gosvepen." 
Proverbs14:34 Te vell hakeneste peskro čačepen dino an yek them, palle vell kava them an-diklo. Kote, kay i menshe o čačo dromestar tele djan, hounte ladjenn le pen." 
Proverbs14:35 I baro ray dikell lačes ap peskro boudepaskro, kay lauter mishto hayvell. Oun leskri rholi vell ap koleste, kay vi-ladjedo koova krell." 
Proverbs15:1 I kamlo lab krell te djal o vavareskri rholi pale. I lab, hoy o vavares doukrell, krell les rhoyedo." 
Proverbs15:2 O gosevo rakrell yaake, te hayvenn i vavar, hoy mishto hi. Dran o narveleskro mouy vell či har dinlepen." 
Proverbs15:3 I yaka o baro Deblestar dikenn lauter, kova, hoy i čilače krenna, oun kova, hoy i lače krenna." 
Proverbs15:4 I lačo lab, hoy i vavares zoor dell, hi har o rouk, hoy djipen della. I midjak lab phagell leskro dji." 
Proverbs15:5 O dinelo shounell gar ap leskro dadeste, te dell lo les trad. Kova, kay shounell koy pre, hi gosevo." 
Proverbs15:6 Kova, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, les hi boudeder har les hounte vell djipaske. Kova, hoy i čilačo khetne lell, anell leske bibarht." 
Proverbs15:7 I gosevengro rakepen sikrell i vavarende, hoy lenge mishto hi. Kova, hoy i dinelen an o shero hi, hi či moldo." 
Proverbs15:8 O baro Devel dikell rhoyedes ap kova, hoy o čilačo leske anell. Te mangenn les kolla an, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, dikell lo lačes ap lengro mangepen." 
Proverbs15:9 O baro Devel dikell rhoyedes ap kova, hoy i čilače krenn. Koon peskro tselo djiyeha o čačepen krell, koles kamell yob." 
Proverbs15:10 Kolla, kay o Debleskro drom moukenn, lenn i phari phagi. Koon moukell pes či te penell, hounte merell." 
Proverbs15:11 O baro Devel djinell, hoy hi an o telstunepen oun an o moulengro them. Har boud boudeder djinell yob, hoy an i menshengre djia hi." 
Proverbs15:12 O pre-phourdo rhoyrell pes pral koleste, kay leske penell, hoy lo gar mishto kras. Oun yob djal gar pash kolende, kay gosevo hi." 
Proverbs15:13 I barhtelo dji moukell o mouyes te sal. Kones i pharo dji hi, koles hi či sapaske." 
Proverbs15:14 Yek, kay hayvell, hoy mishto oun gar mishto hi, kova rodell, har te djinell lo gomme boudeder. O narvelo bokell pal dinelo koova." 
Proverbs15:15 Kolen, kay i pharo dji hi, kolenge hi hake divessa čilače. Yekes, kay shoukapen an o dji hi, leskro dji givell oun bashrell hako dives." 
Proverbs15:16 Hi feteder, te hal čorvelo oun djiveh o baro Debleha, har te hi tout i baro bravlepen oun hounte daress halautereske." 
Proverbs15:17 Hi feteder te hi tout sharha te rhal tire malentsa, har lačo groumyengro mass kolentsa, kay hi rholi an lende." 
Proverbs15:18 I morsh an koleste rholi hi, anell čingepen. Yek, kay gar sik rhoyedo vell, kova lell i yag dran o čingepen." 
Proverbs15:19 O drom kolendar, kay kamenn gar te boudrell, hi pherdo soubyengre bourra. Kolenge, kay o čačepen krenn, hi kek barra an o drom čiddo." 
Proverbs15:20 I gosevo čavo krell peskro dades oun peskri dat barhteles. I dinelo sal pral lende. 
Proverbs15:21 Kones či an o shero hi, kova kamell narvelo koova. I morsh, kay hayvell, hoy mishto oun gar mishto hi, ačell ap o čačo drom." 
Proverbs15:22 Kova, hoy yekes an o shero hi, djal gar mishto, te poučell lo gar i vavarendar, hoy yon patsenna. Kote, kay boud menshe hi, kay denn pengro gosvepen pashel, kote djal mishto." 
Proverbs15:23 Barhtelo hi o morsh, te djinell lo, hoy te rakrell lo. Har lačo hi o čačo lab ap o čačo tsiro." 
Proverbs15:24 Kova, kay hayvell, hoy mishto oun gar mishto hi, koleske djal peskro drom pre an o djipen. Oun yob rikrell pes pale o dromestar, kay djal tele pash i moulende." 
Proverbs15:25 O baro Devel phagell o kheer kolestar, kay pre-phourdo hi. Yob dell yak, te lell kek koy phoub i romyatar krik, kolakro rom meras." 
Proverbs15:26 O baro Devel dikell rhoyedes ap ko midjak koova, hoy lell pes i čilačo glan. Lačes dikell lo ap koleste, kay rakrell lače laba." 
Proverbs15:27 Koon rhorhepah peskro bravlepen khetne lell, anell peskri familya an i bibarht. Koon moukell pes gar te ginell, savo djivell." 
Proverbs15:28 Koon an o čačepen tardo hi, rakrell peskro djiyeha glan kova yob čomone penell. Dran o mouy o čilačestar venn čilače laba vin har divyo pani." 
Proverbs15:29 O baro Devel hi dour krik kolendar, kay čilačo hi. Yob shounell kova, hoy kolla lestar mangenna, kay an o čačepen tardo hi." 
Proverbs15:30 Te dikeh lačes ap yekeste, vell lo barhtelo. Te peneh leske i lačo lab, vell lo zorelo." 
Proverbs15:31 Te shouneh ap yekeste, kay penell touke, hoy touke mishto hi, palle hal mashkral i gosevende." 
Proverbs15:32 Koon gar shounell, te vell lo trad dino, činell pes an peskro mass. Koon moukell pes čomone te penell, kova vell gosveder." 
Proverbs15:33 Kolla, kay djivenn o baro Debleha, dikenn dren, hoy lenge mishto hi, oun venn gosveder. Kolenge, kay krenn pen gar bares, vell ko tsiro, kay sharenn len i vavar." 
Proverbs16:1 O mensho lell pes čomone glan an peskro dji. Hoy čačepah vella, penell o baro Devel." 
Proverbs16:2 Hako drom hoy i morsh djal, hi an leskre yaka čačo, o baro Devel dikell dour an leskro dji." 
Proverbs16:3 Čip kova, hoy tou kameh te krell an o baro Debleskro vast, oun yob moukell kova yaake te vell, har touke glan lal." 
Proverbs16:4 Lauter, hoy o baro Devel kras, hi čomoneske, ninna kras lo o čilačo menshes ko diveske, kay i bibarht vella." 
Proverbs16:5 O baro Devel dikell rhoyedes ap hakeneste, koles i pre-phourdo dji hi. O vast pre, kova lell peskri phagi." 
Proverbs16:6 Ab lačes oun rike pash o Debleste, oun yob bistrell tiri doosh. Te djiveh leha, rikreh tout pale o čilačepastar." 
Proverbs16:7 Te dikell o baro Devel lačes ap kova, hoy yek krell, palle krell lo, te venn ninna kolla leskre mala, kay kaman leske čilačepen." 
Proverbs16:8 Hi feteder, te hi tout gar boud, oun kova lal touke khetne kek rhorhepah, har te vell tout boud bravlepen, hoy anal khetne o rhorhepah." 
Proverbs16:9 O mensheskro dji lell peske čomone glan, o baro Devel hi kova, kay anell leskre herya ap ko drom, har yob kamell." 
Proverbs16:10 Te rakrell i baro ray, hoy o Devel leske an o mouy čivell, palle rakrell lo o čačepen vin pral i mensheste yaake har čačo hi." 
Proverbs16:11 I vaga, hoy o čačo pharepen sikrell, vell o baro Deblestar. Yob penas, har pharo i saster hounte vell, hoy o pharepen sikrell." 
Proverbs16:12 Te krenn bare raya čilačo koova, hi kova i djoungelo koova glan o Debleste. Te krenn le o čačepen, ačell lengri rayeskri beshepaskri zoreles tardo." 
Proverbs16:13 I mensho, kay o čačepen rakrell, krell, te dikell o baro ray lačes ap leste. Yob kamell o morshes o labestar." 
Proverbs16:14 I baro ray, kay rhoyrell pes, nay bičrell yekes an o merepen. Oun i gosevo morsh krell lauter, te bistrell yob peskri rholi." 
Proverbs16:15 Te dikell o baro ray lačes ap yekeste, nay djivell kova pre. Oun leskro kamlepen hi har i brishin, hoy moukell o djob bares te vell." 
Proverbs16:16 Hi boudeder moldo te less gosvepen har te less sonakay. Te hayveh, hoy mishto oun gar mishto hi, hi kova touke feteder har roup." 
Proverbs16:17 Kolla, kay ap o čačo drom djan, ačenn dour krik o čilačepastar. Koon yak dell, havo drom yob djal, kova dell yak ap peskro djipen." 
Proverbs16:18 Koon pes bares krell, vell phagedo. Oun i pre-phourdo mensho perell." 
Proverbs16:19 Hi feteder te veh gar an-diklo oun djiveh i čorvelentsa, har te vess yek kolendar, kolen i baro mouy hi, oun djiveh foun lengro čoredo koova." 
Proverbs16:20 Kova, kay dell yak ap o lab, hoy leske penlo vas, hatsell barht, oun kova hi barhtelo, kay čivell peskro dji ap o baro Debleste." 
Proverbs16:21 Kova kay hayvell, hoy mishto oun gar mishto hi, kova vell kharedo gosevo morsh. Oun yek, kay lače laba hatsell, hi i lačo sikepaskro." 
Proverbs16:22 Čačo gosvepen hi har djido pani koleske, kay les hi. O dinlepen hi i phagi kolenge, kay dinelo hi." 
Proverbs16:23 I mensho i gosevo djiyeha rakrell laba, hoy mishto hi. Oun kova, hoy lo penell, sikrell i vavarende, hoy te krenn le." 
Proverbs16:24 Kamle laba hi har gvin, rakrenn kamles an o dji oun denn nevi zoor." 
Proverbs16:25 Kote dell i drom, kova i morsheske čačes vin dikell, pal i tsiro anell lo les an o merepen." 
Proverbs16:26 Te hi i boudepaskres bok, boudrell lo boudeder. Leskri bok penell leske, te krell lo doureder." 
Proverbs16:27 I čilačo mensho rodell i drom, har nay doukrell lo i vavaren. Hoy lo rakrell, rhačell har yag." 
Proverbs16:28 I midjak mensho anell čingepen. Oun kova, kay djoungelo koova pral vavarende rakrell, krell, te čingrenn pen lače mala." 
Proverbs16:29 I čilačo marepaskro anell peskro rakepah peskro males ap i drom, hoy gar mishto hi." 
Proverbs16:30 Kova kay i yakentsa dell oun peskro mouy khetne tserdell, koles hi čilačepen an o shero." 
Proverbs16:31 Parne balla hi har i kouč rayeskri stadi, hoy o Devel kolen dell, kay leskro drom djan." 
Proverbs16:32 Yek, kay gar sik rhoyedo vella, hi feteder har i čačo kourepaskro. Oun koon o ray pral peste hi, hi boudeder moldo har yek, kay i tselo foro dren lell." 
Proverbs16:33 O mensho vitsrell tikne kashta, te djinell lo, hoy te krell. Har le perenn, kova vell o baro Deblestar." 
Proverbs17:1 I trouk kotar maro oun kek čingepen hi feteder har i kheer pherdo mass o čingepah. 
Proverbs17:2 I boudepaskro, kay djinell, hoy te krell, kova vell o ray pral o čaveste ko kherestar, kay ladj ap peste anas. Ko boudepaskro lell palle ninna kolestar, hoy i čave lenna pral pengro dadeskro merepen." 
Proverbs17:3 Yaake har o roup an i yag čiddo vell, oun o sonakay an i bob, yaake lell o baro Devel i menshengre djia an o yak." 
Proverbs17:4 Kova, kay čilačo koova krell, shounell ap midjak rakepen. Oun i rhorheno shounell ap save laba, hoy bibarht anenn." 
Proverbs17:5 Kova kay pral i čorveleste sal, kova praasell koles, kay les kras. Kova, kay barhtelo hi pral o vavareskri bibarht, savo lell peskri phagi." 
Proverbs17:6 Čavengre čave hi har i rayeskri stadi i phourenge. Oun i čave sharenn pen pengro papeha oun pengri mami. 
Proverbs17:7 Kova djal gar, te krenn i narvele bare oun shoukar laba. Vitar gar djal, te rakrell i an-diklo morsh rhorhepen." 
Proverbs17:8 Kova, kay vavaren čorrhanes love dell, te krenn le, hoy yob kamell, an koleskre yaka hi peskre love har dourkepangre barra, hoy anenn leske barht an hako koova." 
Proverbs17:9 Kova, kay i doosh i vavarendar bistrell, krell peske mala. Kova, kay pale te pale pral koy doosh rakrell, nashrell peskre malen." 
Proverbs17:10 Te čingreh yekeha, kay moukell pes čomone te penell, lell yob kova peske boudeder an o dji, har te dell yek sheel kope an i dineleste dren." 
Proverbs17:11 I čilačo mensho rodell hako tsiro čingepen. Doleske vell yek pash leste bičedo, ko dell les i phari phagi." 
Proverbs17:12 Hi touke feteder, te vess pash i bari divyi margodja, kolake i terne krik lino van, har te vess i dineleha khetne, kay narvelo koova krell." 
Proverbs17:13 Koleske lačepen kerdo vas, oun yob čilačepen pale das, dran koleskro kheer djal i bibarht bouder gar krik." 
Proverbs17:14 Mouk tele o čingepah yaake rah har lo gomme tikno hi! Čingepen hi har pani, hoy dran i phoub vin phagell. Mouk tele glan kova yob zorleder vell!" 
Proverbs17:15 Kova hi douy kope i djoungelo koova glan o baro Debleskre yaka: te rakrell yek koles čačes, kay doosh ap peste las, oun ninna, te čivell yek doosh ap koleste, kay o čačepen kras." 
Proverbs17:16 Hoske hounte dals i dinelo love vin, te nay djal lo an i sikepaskri? Leske djal či an leskro shero." 
Proverbs17:17 I maal sikrell hako tsiro pengro kamlepen. Oun i phraal vell boldo, te vell lo touke ap i rig an phare tsirya." 
Proverbs17:18 Narvelo hi kova, kay dell peskro dadeskro vast oun penell, te playsrell lo i siyaan i vavareske." 
Proverbs17:19 Kova, kay čingepen kamell, kova kamell ninna o čilačepen. Kova kay hadell pes kokres pral, nay perell sik." 
Proverbs17:20 Yek douy djiyentsa hatsell kek lačepen. Oun yek douy čipyentsa perell an i bibarht. 
Proverbs17:21 Kones i čavo hi, hoy narvelo koova krell, koles hi i pharo djipen. I dineleskro dades hi či sapaske." 
Proverbs17:22 I barhtelo dji hi mishto tiro sastepaske. Te hi touke hako tsiro ropaske, nashreh tiri zoor." 
Proverbs17:23 O čilačo kamell i love, hoy leske čorrhanes dino vell, te rissrell lo o čačepen trouyel." 
Proverbs17:24 Kova, kay hayvell, hoy mishto oun gar mishto hi, moukell pes gar tele te rikrell, te lell lo gomme boudeder gosvepen. I dinelo dikell kate te kote." 
Proverbs17:25 I dinelo čavo krell peskro dadeske rholi. Oun leskri date vell ropaske pral leste. 
Proverbs17:26 Kova hi gar mishto, te lell kova i phagi, kay kek doosh ap peste anas. Gomme djoungleder hi, te rhal i an-diklo mensho dava." 
Proverbs17:27 Kova, kay peskre laba pale rikrell, sikrell, te djinell lo, hoy mishto hi. Kova, kay gar sik an i rholi vell, sikrell, te hi lo gosevo." 
Proverbs17:28 Ninna i dinelo, kay rikrell peskro mouy, nay vell yaake an-diklo, har te vals lo gosevo. Te krell lo peskro mouy gar pre, hi lo i vavarenge har i gosevo." 
Proverbs18:1 Koon pes i vavarendar krik rikrella, rodell, hoy peske kokres shoukar hi, oun kamell gar dren te dikell, hoy lačo leske vals." 
Proverbs18:2 I dinelo kamell či te hayvell, yob kamell te sikrell, hoy yob lauter djinell." 
Proverbs18:3 Čilačepen oun ladj djan khetne. Oun kay ladj hi, koy i ninna praasepen." 
Proverbs18:4 I laba i gosevo menshestar hi har telstoune panya, hoy nashenna an i phoub oun denn djipen." 
Proverbs18:5 Hi gar mishto, te dell i čačepaskro morsh koles čačepen, kay i doosh ap peste anas, oun shounell gar ap koleste, kay an o čačepen tardo hi." 
Proverbs18:6 Kova, hoy i dinelo rakrell, anell čingepen. Oun leskro mouy dell pal dava gole." 
Proverbs18:7 O rakepen o dinelestar anell les an i bibarht. Oun yob taprell pes kokres an peskre laba. 
Proverbs18:8 Te shounah djoungelo rakepen pral i vavarende, hi kova menge har shoukar rhapen, oun djal menge tele har djet." 
Proverbs18:9 I či-moldo, kay kamell gar te boudrell, hi gar feteder har kova, kay marepen oun merepen anell." 
Proverbs18:10 O baro Devel hi har i baro zorelo kheer. Kova, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, nashell pash leste oun khatrell pes pash leste." 
Proverbs18:11 Glan i braveleskre yaka hi leskro bravlepen har i zorelo foro oun har i bari massouri troul leste. 
Proverbs18:12 Pre-phourdepen vell glan o perepen. Kolenge, kay krenn pen gar bares, vell ko tsiro, kay sharenn len i vavar." 
Proverbs18:13 Shoun! Oun palle rake! Te kreh vavarčandes, hal dinelo oun hounte ladjess tout." 
Proverbs18:14 I mensho kay zorelo an peskro dji hi, nay hidjrell peskro nasslepen. Te hi leskro dji phagedo, har nay hidjrell lo peskro pharepen?" 
Proverbs18:15 I gosevo mensho kamell boud te djinell, oun krell peskre kanda pre, te hayvell lo, hoy čačo hi." 
Proverbs18:16 I mensho, kay i vavaren shoukar koova dell, krell peske i voudya pre pash i pralstunende." 
Proverbs18:17 An i čingepen dikell vin, har te vals koles čačo, kay glanstounes rakrell. Te vell palle o vavar, vell vin, kones čačepah čačes hi." 
Proverbs18:18 Te čingrenn pen douy zorele, oun tikne kashta venn vitsedo, te vell diklo, kones čačo hi, djal o čingepen krik, oun yon moukenn pendar tele." 
Proverbs18:19 I phraal, kay doukedo vas an peskro dji, moukell gar peha te rakrell, oun hi pandlo har i foro, kay hi i zoreli massouri troul leste. Oun o čingepen hi har ko kashteskro, hoy o foreskro voudar pandell." 
Proverbs18:20 I morsh lell, hoy leskro mouy rakras. Dran leskre laba lell lo doha djipaske." 
Proverbs18:21 Kol laba, hoy yek rakrell, nay anenn leske o merepen oun ninna o djipen. Oun kova, kay boud rakrell, dikella, hoy leskre laba leske dren anenn." 
Proverbs18:22 Koon i romyat hatsas, hatsas i barht. O baro Devel dikas lačes ap leste." 
Proverbs18:23 O čorvelo mangell o ropah, o bravelo rakrell pale i djiyeha, hoy hi har i bar." 
Proverbs18:24 Dell mala, kay anenn tout an i bibarht. I čačo maal rikrell boudeder ap toute har i phraal." 
Proverbs19:1 Hi feteder te hal an o čačepen tardo oun djiveh an čorvlepen, har te vess i dinelo, kay rakrell rhorhepen." 
Proverbs19:2 Yek, kay peskro koova gar hayvell, hi či moldo, ninna te boudrell lo sik. Kova, kay sik nashell, perell." 
Proverbs19:3 O mensheskro dinlepen anell les ap i drom, kay nashrell lo pes. Oun palle dell lo o baro Debleste i doosh." 
Proverbs19:4 Bravele menshe hatsenn boud mala. I čorveleskre mala djan penge lestar. 
Proverbs19:5 Kova, kay rhorhras, har penas lo, hoy lo dikas oun shounas, kova lell peskri phagi. Oun kova kay rhorhepen pre anas, kova vell tapedo oun nay nashell gar peske." 
Proverbs19:6 Boud makenn o braveleske gvin troul o mouy, oun hakeno hi o maal kolestar, kay dell čomone čičeske." 
Proverbs19:7 I phrala i čorvelestar kamenn či lestar te djinell. Oun har boud boudeder rikrenn pen leskre mala lestar krik. Te kamell lo lentsa te rakrell, hi le bouder gar koy." 
Proverbs19:8 Kova, kay peske boud pashel anas, kras peske lačepen. Kova, kay lauter mishto hayvell, hatsell barht." 
Proverbs19:9 Kova, kay rhorhras, har penas lo, hoy lo dikas oun shounas, kova lell peskri phagi. Oun kova hoy rhorhepen pre anell, kova nashrell peskro djipen." 
Proverbs19:10 I lačo djipen hi gar i dinelenge. Har boud boudeder djal gar, te vell i boudepaskro o ray pral i pralstunende." 
Proverbs19:11 Koles čačo gosvepen hi an o dji, kova vell gar sik rhoyedo, oun dikell gar ap i doosh i vavarendar. Doleske dikenn le pre ap leste." 
Proverbs19:12 Har koy gole, hoy i levo dell, hi i rholi o baro rayestar. Oun leskro lačepen hi har o brishin ap i phoub, hoy krell lat pale sapeno." 
Proverbs19:13 I dinelo anell peskro dades an i bibarht. Oun i djouvel, kay i tselo tsiro čingepen rodell, hi har i kheer, kay dren della." 
Proverbs19:14 I kheer oun love lell o čavo peskro dadestar pal koleskro merepen. I romni, kay an peskro dji dikell, glan te rakrell li, vell o baro Deblestar." 
Proverbs19:15 Kova, kay kamell gar te boudrell, vell khino. Moukell lo peskre vasta an i gali čiddo, vell ko tsiro, kay hounte bokell lo." 
Proverbs19:16 Kova, kay rikrell pes ap o činlo lab, dell yak ap peskro djipen. Kova kay gar yak dell ap peskre dromma, merella." 
Proverbs19:17 Kova, kay peskro dji pre krell oun i čorveles dell, kova hi har yek, kay patsals o baro Debleske. Oun o baro Devel dell les ko lačepen pale, hoy lo kras." 
Proverbs19:18 Činge tiro čaveha yaake rah har yob terno hi, oun ap toute shounella. De yak, te dess les gar yaake, te merell lo." 
Proverbs19:19 Kova, kay dran i bari rholi čomone kras, mouk les peskri phagi te lell. Veh tou ap leskri rig, hounte kress tou kova pale te pale." 
Proverbs19:20 Shoun ap kova, hoy yek ap toute penell, oun mouk touke čomone te penell, te vess pal kova gosevo." 
Proverbs19:21 Boud koova hi, hoy i morsh peske glan lell an peskro dji; kokres kova vella, hoy o baro Debles glan hi yekeha." 
Proverbs19:22 Kova, hoy i mensho rodell, hi kamlepen. Hi feteder te hal čorvelo har te vals i rhorheno." 
Proverbs19:23 Te djiveh o baro Debleha, hi tout o djipen: tout hi doha rhapaske; tou nay soveh mishto; kek bibarht vell ap toute." 
Proverbs19:24 I či-moldo, kay kamell či te krell, čivell peskro roy an o čaro, oun anell peskro vast gar pash o mouy." 
Proverbs19:25 Te deh tou yekes, kay pral halauter sal, palle venn kolla gosevo, kolen či an o shero hi. Oun te čingreh koleha, kay hayvell, hoy mishto oun gar mishto hi, palle hayvell lo gomme boudeder." 
Proverbs19:26 Kova, kay peskro dades dell oun peskri dat tradell, kova hi i čavo, hoy ladj ap peste oun lende anell." 
Proverbs19:27 Miro čavo, te moukeh touke či bouder te penell, palle djineh tou sik bouder gar, hoy čačo hi." 
Proverbs19:28 Yek, kay hounte penell, hoy lo dikas oun shounas, oun kay či moldo hi, leske hi o čačepen sapaske. Oun čilače menshe rhan o čilačepen har maro." 
Proverbs19:29 Pral kol pre-phourden, kay pral halauter sanenn, vell i phagi vin rakedo; oun dava ap o doumo lell o dinelo." 
Proverbs20:1 Te piyeh i zorelo pipen, veh divyo oun saneh pral lautereske. Kova, kay yaake boud piyell, te vell lo mato, koles hi kek gosvepen." 
Proverbs20:2 I baro ray, te dell lo trad, palle hi kova, har te dell i levo gole. Kova, kay leskri rholi ap peste tserdell, nashrell peskro djipen." 
Proverbs20:3 O morsh, kay rikrell pes o čingepastar krik, vell sharedo. Kolla, kay rodenn o čingepen, hi halauter dinele." 
Proverbs20:4 Ko či-moldo, kay kamell gar ap peskri phoub te boudrell an o čačo tsiro, kova hatsell či an ko tsiro, kay o djob dren anlo vell." 
Proverbs20:5 Kova, hoy i mensho peske glan lell, hi dour tele an peskro dji har pani an i brounna. I gosevo anell kova nay pre." 
Proverbs20:6 Boud menshe sharenn pen pengro lačepah. Nay hatseh čačepah i morshes o labestar? 
Proverbs20:7 Kova, kay an o čačepen tardo hi oun o Debleskro drom gar moukell, barhtelo hi leskre čave, kay pal leste venna." 
Proverbs20:8 I baro ray, kay o čačepen vin rakrella pral i menshende, hatsell kolen vin, kay čilačo hi." 
Proverbs20:9 Koon nay penell pestar: Me rikrom miro dji djoudjes, man hi kek doosh?" 
Proverbs20:10 I vaga, hoy gar čačes sikrella, har pharo čomone hi, oun i khoro, kay gar yaake boud dren hi, har penlo vas, kol douy hi i djoungelo koova glan o baro Debleskre yaka." 
Proverbs20:11 An kova, hoy i tikno čavo krell, moukell pes te dikell, har yob vella: i morsh, kay djivell i djoudjo djipen oun djal o čačo drom oder gar." 
Proverbs20:12 O kand, hoy shounell oun i yak hoy dikell, kol douyen kras o baro Devel." 
Proverbs20:13 Te kameh o sopen, veh čorvelo. Kre sik taysarlakro tire yaka pre, palle vell tout doha rhapaske." 
Proverbs20:14 “Kava hi či moldo”, penell o ginepaskro. Oun te djal lo peske, palle sharell lo les!" 
Proverbs20:15 Dell sonakay oun boud kouč barra. I koučeder koova hi i mouy, hoy rakrell, hoy mishto oun čačo hi." 
Proverbs20:16 Yek, kay dinelo doha hi, te dell lo peskro dadeskro vast oun penell, te playsrell lo i vavareskri siyaan, kolestar le leskri baya oun gar ko vavareskri baya, te hi tout čomone an o vast, bis te yob playsrell." 
Proverbs20:17 Čoredo maro hi goudlo. Pal i tsiro hi kova har tikne barra an o mouy. 
Proverbs20:18 Rake i vavarentsa pral kova, hoy touke glan lal, te vell kova mishto. Kova hounte kress, hoy tout ninna glan hi, har boud boudeder te kameh i kourepen te krell." 
Proverbs20:19 Kova, kay djal trouyel oun rakrell djoungelo koova pral vavarende, phoukrell ninna vin, hoy i vavar leske čorrhanes penan. Doleske rike tout pale kolestar, kay nay rikrell gar peskro mouy." 
Proverbs20:20 Kova, kay pral peskro dades oun peskri date bibarht vin rakrell, koleske djal har yek, koleskri momeli vin djal an i kali rat." 
Proverbs20:21 Te kameh sik kova te lell, hoy yek tire phourendar peskre menshenge pale moukell, palle anell kova touke kek barht." 
Proverbs20:22 Ma le touke glan, te dess o čilačepen pale, hoy yek ap toute kras. Dik ap o baro Debleste! Kova lell tiro koova an peskro vast." 
Proverbs20:23 I bikepaskro, kay čivell pash yekeste sau saster ap i vaga oun pash i vavareste i vavar saster, kova krell i djoungelo koova glan o baro Debleskre yaka. I vaga, hoy i rhorheno pharepen sikrell, hi gar mishto." 
Proverbs20:24 O baro Deblestar vell, har o djipen hakenestar djal. Har djinell i mensho, kay leskro drom les anell?" 
Proverbs20:25 Kova, kay sik penell: “Me dau man sovel pash o baro Debleste, te dap les kava te kova”, oun moukell les peske gar glan kova an o shero trouyel te djal, har nay rikrell lo peskro lab, koleske hi peskre laba har dorya, an kolende yob dren stakrell oun perell." 
Proverbs20:26 I baro ray, kay gosevo hi, hatsell i čilačen dran peskre menshende vin, oun les hi kek dji lenge oun dell len pengri phagi." 
Proverbs20:27 O mensheskro dourho hi har i momeli o baro Deblestar. Koleha nay dikell o mensho an peste dren oun dikell, hoy an peskro dji hi." 
Proverbs20:28 O baro rayeske ačell leskri rayeskri zoor yaake rah har lo o lačepen oun o čačepen krella. 
Proverbs20:29 O raylepen i terne morshendar hi lengri zoor. Oun parne balla hi o shoukapen i phourenge. 
Proverbs20:30 Ratle dava lenn o čilačepen krik. Oun dava djan koleske, kay dino vell, an o dji." 
Proverbs21:1 O baro rayeskro dji hi har i lengsto pani an o baro Debleskro vast, hoy moukell lo kote te nashell, kay yob kamell." 
Proverbs21:2 Hako drom i menshestar hi mishto an peskre yaka. O baro Devel dikell palla, havo dji koy palla tardo hi." 
Proverbs21:3 Te djah o čačo drom oun djiveh pal o Debleskro čačepen, hi kova o baro Debleske boudeder moldo har te anals leske firhen." 
Proverbs21:4 I čilačen hi i pre-phourdo dji oun yaka, hoy tele dikenn ap i vavarende. Kova hi lengri doosh." 
Proverbs21:5 Rake tiro djiyeha pral kova, hoy kameh te krell, oun palle kre les tiri tseli zoryah. Oun tout vell boud djipaske. Kova, kay lauter sik sik krella, koles hi či." 
Proverbs21:6 Ko bravlepen, hoy khetne anlo vas o rhorhepah, hi har o dourho, hoy sik krik djal kolendar, kay o merepen rodenna." 
Proverbs21:7 I čilače kamenn gar te djivell pal o čačepen. Ko čilačo koova, hoy krenn le ap i vavarende, anell len yaake dour, te nashrenn le halauter." 
Proverbs21:8 Kova, kay doosh ap peste anas, djal bange dromma. Koles, kay i djoudjo dji hi, krell o čačepen." 
Proverbs21:9 Hi feteder te djivell yek vin ap i dacha, har dren an o kheer khetne i romyah, kay o tselo tsiro čingepen rodell." 
Proverbs21:10 Čilače menshen hi o tselo tsiro bok pal o čilačepen. Len hi kek dji i vavarenge. 
Proverbs21:11 Te lell i pre-phourdo peskri phagi, venn ninna kolla gosevo, kolen či an o shero hi. Te aneh i goseveske čomone pashel, djinell lo boudeder." 
Proverbs21:12 O Devel hi an o čačepen tardo, oun lell o čilačeskri familya an i yak, oun vitsrell i čilačen an i bibarht." 
Proverbs21:13 Kova, kay yaake krell, har te shounell lo gar koy gole ko čorvelestar, leske djala yaake, kay dell yob ninna gole oun kek shounell les." 
Proverbs21:14 Te hi yek rhoyedo ap toute, oun tou deh les čomone khatedo, kreh tou yaake, te djal leskri bari rholi pale." 
Proverbs21:15 Te vell o čačepen kerdo, hi kolla barhtelo, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, oun i čilače darenn pen." 
Proverbs21:16 I mensho, kay kamell gar te djinell, hoy gosevo hi, djal ap o drom pash i moulende." 
Proverbs21:17 Kova, kay kamell i shoukar djipen oun dell boud love koleske vin, kova vell čorvelo. Oun kova, kay kamell mool oun kouč djet makepaske, vell gar bravelo." 
Proverbs21:18 Ap i čilačende oun i phoukepangre vell koy bibarht anlo, hoy kaman le te anell ap i lače oun čače menshende." 
Proverbs21:19 Hi feteder te djivell yek an o moulo tato them har khetne i romyah, kay o tselo tsiro čingepen rodell oun rhoyedo hi." 
Proverbs21:20 I shoukar bravlepen oun kouč djet hi an o kheer kolestar, kay gosevo hi. I dinelo dell peskre love sikeder vin, har lell lo len." 
Proverbs21:21 Kova, kay o čačepen oun o lačepen palla nashell, kova hatseh o djipen oun vell an-diklo." 
Proverbs21:22 I gosevo morsh nay djal pre ap i foro, kay lauter čače kourepangre dren hi, oun phagell ko foro tele, kolestar yon patsan, te hi lo zoreles tardo." 
Proverbs21:23 Kova, kay nay rikrell peskro mouy oun dell yak ap peskri čip, savo rikrell bibarht pestar krik." 
Proverbs21:24 Ko baro-mouyeskro, kay dikell tele ap i vavarende, vell pre-phourdo kharedo. Yob patsell, te nay krell lo lauter oun kek les pale rikrell." 
Proverbs21:25 Kol či-molde, kay kamenn gar te boudrell, merenna i bokatar." 
Proverbs21:26 O tselo dives djal lenge kova an o shero trouyel, hoy kamenn le te lell. Kova, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, kova dell oun rikrell gar pale." 
Proverbs21:27 Kova, hoy anenn i čilače o baro Debleske, hi djoungeles glan leskre yaka. Har boud boudeder, te krenn le kova dran i čilačo dji." 
Proverbs21:28 Kova, kay rhorhras, har penas lo, hoy lo dikas oun shounas, ap koleskro shero vell leskro rhorhepen pale. Ko morsh, kay mishto shounas, hoy leske penlo vas, koles moukenn le rakrell, oun hoy yob penell, ačell lenge an o shero." 
Proverbs21:29 O čilačo stakrell zoreles pre i baro mouyeha. Kova, kay o čačepaske tardo hi, moukell gar peskro drom." 
Proverbs21:30 Kote dell kek gosvepen, či hoy yek feteder nay djinals oun penals, har nay krell o baro Devel." 
Proverbs21:31 Tou nay leh i kourepaskro gray oun djah an o marepen. Kova, kay krell, te vess o zorleder, hi o baro Devel." 
Proverbs22:1 Te rakrenn le pral toute lačo koova, hi kova feteder har baro bravlepen. Te dikenn le lačes ap toute, hi kova feteder har roup oun sonakay." 
Proverbs22:2 Bravelen oun čorvelen hi yek koova khetne: Kol douyen kras o baro Devel. 
Proverbs22:3 Koles i gosevo dji hi, kova dikell, har i bibarht vella oun khatrell pes. Kolen či an o shero hi, kolla nashenn doureder, oun i bibarht vell ap lende." 
Proverbs22:4 Kova, kay krell pes gar bares oun djivell o baro Debleha, lell bravlepen oun sharepen oun o čačo djipen." 
Proverbs22:5 O drom, kay i čilače djana, hi pherde soubyengre bourra oun shelle, kay nay stakrenn le dren. Kova, kay ap peskro djipen yak dell, djal kote gar." 
Proverbs22:6 Sike i tikno čaves peskro drom, palle djal yob gar kolestar krik, ninna te vell lo phouro." 
Proverbs22:7 O bravelo hi o ray pral o čorveleste. Oun kova, kay patsell peske love, hounte boudrell koleske, pash koleste yob siyaan hi." 
Proverbs22:8 Kova, kay rhorhepen vin vitsrell har djob, kova anell bibarht dren. Palle nay djal lo bouder gar i vavarentsa yaake trouyel har yob kamell." 
Proverbs22:9 Kova, kay lačes ap i vavarende dikell, dell peskro maro i čorveleste. Ap leste vell barht vi-rakedo." 
Proverbs22:10 Trade ko pre-phourdes vin, kay sal pral halauter. Palle djal o čingepen leha. Oun kol čilače laba oun o praasepen djan ninna krik." 
Proverbs22:11 Kova, koles i djoudjo dji hi oun lačepen rakrell, koleskro maal hi o baro ray." 
Proverbs22:12 O baro Devel dell yak, te vell diklo, haveskre laba mishto oun čačo hi. Oun yob čakrell kol laba pre, hoy i phoukepaskro rakras." 
Proverbs22:13 Ko či-moldo, kay kamell gar te boudrell, penell: I levo hi vin ap o drom, kay nay rhals man." 
Proverbs22:14 O mouy i vavareskro romyatar hi har i grouba, hoy dour tele an i phoub djal. Oun kolla perenn dren, pral kolende o baro Devel rhoyedo hi." 
Proverbs22:15 Tikne čave krenn dinelo koova. Te rhan le dava, krenn le kova bouder gar." 
Proverbs22:16 Kova, kay rikrell i čorveles tele, te vell yob kokres bravleder, ninna kova, kay dell i braveles čomone, kova krell, te vell lo kokres čorvelo." 
Proverbs22:17 Shoun mishto oun de yak ap i laba kol gosevendar! Le mire laba an o dji, hoy touke sikrenn, hoy mishto oun čačo hi." 
Proverbs22:18 Ma biste len! Har shoukar hi, te nay peneh len doureder!" 
Proverbs22:19 Kamoms, te dikess oun rikress ap o baro Debleste. Doleske penau me touke kova kava dives." 
Proverbs22:20 Me činom touke 30 (triyanda) laba pre, hoy touke penenn, hoy te kress, hoy touke mishto hi," 
Proverbs22:21 te sikrap toute, hoy o čačepen hi, yaake te nay peness koleske, kay tout bičras, hoy lo kamell te djinell." 
Proverbs22:22 Ma rande o čorveles vin, doleske kay lo čorvelo hi! Te hal leha glan i čačepangre, ma le leskro čačepen krik." 
Proverbs22:23 O baro Devel lell lengro koova an o vast. Oun kova, kay len vin randas, koleske lell yob o djipen krik." 
Proverbs22:24 Mouk tout gar dren yekeha, kay sik an bari rholi vell. Ma ab leha khetne beshdo!" 
Proverbs22:25 Palle nay djal touke yaake, te veh har yob, oun pereh an i bibarht." 
Proverbs22:26 Ma ab yek kolendar, kay denn pengro dadeskro vast oun penenn, te playsrenn le i siyaan i vavarenge." 
Proverbs22:27 Te nay playsreh lat palle gar, lenn le ninna tiro čiben tel toute krik." 
Proverbs22:28 Ma čip kol phoure barra krik, hoy sikrenn har baro tiro them hi, oun hoy tire phoure kote čivan." 
Proverbs22:29 Dikeh i morsh, kay peskri boudi hayvella, palle djiness, kova nay boudrell bare rayenge. Savenge, kay gar an-diklo hi, boudrell lo gar." 
Proverbs23:1 Te vell, te beshess pash i rayeste ap i rhapaskri, palle biste gar, koon glan toute beshdo hi." 
Proverbs23:2 Ma pere pral o rhapen, har bari ninna tiri bok hi." 
Proverbs23:3 Mouk tiro dji gar pal leskro lačo rhapen te nashell! Kova nay vell i rhorheno rhapen. 
Proverbs23:4 Ab yaake gosevo, te maress tout gar tele, bravelo te vell." 
Proverbs23:5 Te dikeh tire yakentsa pre, hi o bravlepen gar bouder koy, yaake sik hi lo krik har i čirklo, hoy hadell peskre moussya oun hadell pes an o bolepen." 
Proverbs23:6 Ma rha ko maro, hoy i činlo toute dell. Mouk tiro dji gar pal leskro lačo rhapen te nashell!" 
Proverbs23:7 Les hi douy djia. Ap toute penell lo: “Rha oun pi”, an leskro dji kamell lo toute či te dell." 
Proverbs23:8 Kova, kay tou tele dandral oun rhal, koles hounte čadess tou pale vin. Oun tire lače laba his čičeske." 
Proverbs23:9 Ma rake an i kanda i dinelestar! Ap tiro gosvepen dikell yob tele. 
Proverbs23:10 Ma čip kol phoure barra krik, hoy sikrenn, har baro tiro them hi. Ma le i phoub kol čavendar krik, kolen kek dad bouder hi." 
Proverbs23:11 O baro Devel vell lenge zoreles ap i rig, oun lell lengro koova an o vast, oun krell o čačepen pral toute vin." 
Proverbs23:12 De yak ap kova, hoy tiro sikepaskro touke penell, oun shoun ap kova, hoy mishto oun čačo hi." 
Proverbs23:13 Ma rike tout pale, te dess tiro čaves i phagi. Te deh les o kashteha, merell lo kolestar gar." 
Proverbs23:14 Tou deh les o kashteha, oun rikreh les yaake pale, ap o merepaskro drom te vell." 
Proverbs23:15 Miro čavo, te hi tiro dji čačes gosevo, palle hi miro dji ninna barhtelo." 
Proverbs23:16 Te rakreh, hoy mishto hi, sal miro dji." 
Proverbs23:17 Ma zilve ap kolende, kay o Debleskro drom moukan. Hako dives de yak, te djivess o baro Debleha." 
Proverbs23:18 Palle hi tout i lačo djipen glan toute, oun kova vella, hoy tou o djiyestar kamal." 
Proverbs23:19 Shoun, miro čavo oun ab gosevo, oun dja o djiyestar o čačo drom!" 
Proverbs23:20 Ma ab mank kolende, kay pen mates piyenn, vitar gar mank kolende, kay boudeder mass an pende dren rhan har mishto hi." 
Proverbs23:21 Ko pipaskro oun ko rhapaskro venn čorvelo, oun kolenge, kay kamenn gar te boudrell, vell ko tsiro, kay hi len či te rivell har koola hoy paash hi." 
Proverbs23:22 Shoun ap tiro dadeste oun tiri date! Yon dan tout o djipen. Ma dik tele ap lende, te van le phouro." 
Proverbs23:23 Mouk touke o čačepen oun o gosvepen boud moldo te vell! Mouk touke hako tsiro čomone te penell, te hayvess lauter mishto." 
Proverbs23:24 Barhtelo hi i dad, te hi leskro čavo an o čačepen tardo oun les i gosevo dji hi." 
Proverbs23:25 Doleske kre tiro dades oun tiri day barhteles! Kre, te givenn le i barhtyatar pral toute." 
Proverbs23:26 Miro čavo, kre tiro dji mange pre, oun dja ap mire dromma!" 
Proverbs23:27 Ma dja pash i loubyate, vitar gar pash o vavareskri romyate. Kolla hi har i brounna, hoy dour tele djal, kay veh gar bouder vin." 
Proverbs23:28 Yon hi har čorepangre, kay lourenn khatemen pash o drom, oun anenn boud morshen yaake dour, te rhorhenn le pengre romyen." 
Proverbs23:29 Koneske hi ropaske? Koneske djal djoungelo? Koon krell čingepen? Koon hi bibarhtelo? Kones hi douk kek nasslepah? Kones hi mate yaka? 
Proverbs23:30 Kova hi kolla, kay dour an i rati gomme pash i mool beshdo hi, oun zorelo vavar pipen khetne čorenn oun piyenn." 
Proverbs23:31 Ma dik i mool an, te hi li yaake shoukar loles an o khoro, oun djal tele har djet." 
Proverbs23:32 O vavar dives djal touke yaake, har te dandrals tout i čilačo sap." 
Proverbs23:33 Tire yaka dikenn kova, hoy gar koy hi. Oun tiro dji penell touke dinelo koova." 
Proverbs23:34 Oun tou hal har yek, kay hi čiddo an i shiffo, hoy djal pral oun tele ap o baro pani, oun har savo, kay hi kote beshdo pral pre ap o pesso kasht." 
Proverbs23:35 Palle peneh: “Mange hi, har dans le man, ninna te hayvom kek douk, har te marans le man khetne, ninna te doukell mange či. Te hom vi-sodo, palle djau pale koy.”" 
Proverbs24:1 Ma zilve ap čilače menshende, ma rode lengro maal te vell!" 
Proverbs24:2 Lengre djia lenn penge savo koova pherdo marepen glan, oun hoy le rakrenn, anell bibarht." 
Proverbs24:3 Tout hounte vell gosvepen, te čivess i kheer pre, oun tou hounte hayvess mishto, hoy te kress, te ačell ko kheer zoreles tardo." 
Proverbs24:4 Koon boud djinell, kova hayvell, har te krell lo peskre tsele iseme pherdo kouč shoukar koova." 
Proverbs24:5 I gosevo morsh hi har i zorelo, oun yek, kay boud djinell, an koleste hi pherdi zoor." 
Proverbs24:6 Te kamell lo i kourepen te krell, hounte hayvell lo mishto, har te djal glan. Oun kote, kay boud morsha pengro gosvepen khetne čivenn oun pral rakrenn, hoy mishto vals, djal lengro kourepen mishto." 
Proverbs24:7 I dinelo hayvell gar goseve laba. Kote, kay i čačepangre khetne venna, nay krell lo peskro mouy gar pre." 
Proverbs24:8 Kova, kay peske glan lell te krell lo čilačo koova, koles denn le čilačo bedo gole." 
Proverbs24:9 Kova, kay moukell pes či te penell, lell peske savo koova glan, hoy anell les o Debleskro dromestar tele. Oun i menshe dikenn rhoyedes ap koleste, koles i pre-phourdo dji hi." 
Proverbs24:10 Kova hi gar zorelo, kay an phare tsirya gar zoreles tardo hi." 
Proverbs24:11 Dja oun le kolen dran o merepen vin, kay venn pandles ap koy platsa tserdedo, kay venn le maredo. Rike kolen pale, kay koy djan." 
Proverbs24:12 Te peneh tou: Mer djinam kova gar! Palle djiness: Kova, kay an i djia dikell, hayvell les. Oun kova, kay ap tiro djipen yak dell, kova djinell les. Oun yob dell o menshes kova pale, hoy lo kras." 
Proverbs24:13 Rha gvin, miro čavo! lačo hi lo, oun goudlo an tiro mouy." 
Proverbs24:14 Yaake hi o gosvepen lačo tiro djipaske. Te hatsal les, palle hi tout i lačo djipen glan toute, oun kova vella, hoy o djiyestar kamal." 
Proverbs24:15 Ma loure har i čilačo ap o kheer kolestar, kay an o čačepen tardo hi! Ma de koy platsa khetne, kay čivell lo pes sopaske!" 
Proverbs24:16 Kova, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, nay perell efta kope, hako kopo stell lo pale pre. I čilače perenn an i bibarht." 
Proverbs24:17 Te perell kova, kay touke čilačepen kamell, ma ab barhtelo! Tiro dji te sal gar pral leskri bibarht!" 
Proverbs24:18 O baro Devel nay dikals kova i rholyah, oun palle rissrals lo peskri rholi kolestar tele!" 
Proverbs24:19 Ma ab rhoyedo ap kolende, kay midjak koova krenn! Ma zilve ap i čilačende!" 
Proverbs24:20 Kolenge, kay čilačo hi, vell kek lačo tsiro. Lengro djipen hi har i momeli, hoy djal vin." 
Proverbs24:21 Miro čavo, djib glan o baro Debleskre yaka oun kre, hoy o baro ray toutar kamella! Ma dja kolentsa, kay vavaren ap lende pre anenn!" 
Proverbs24:22 Sik vell i bibarht pral savende. Nay djineh tou, havi bibarht o baro Deblestar oun o baro rayestar nay vell?" 
Proverbs24:23 Ninna kolla hi laba, hoy i goseve penan: Kova hi gar mishto, te dikenn i čačepangre morsha yekes feteder an har o vavares." 
Proverbs24:24 Kova, kay ap koleste penell, kay doosh ap peste las tout hi kek doosh, koles praasenn i menshe oun rakrenn i bibarht vin pral leste." 
Proverbs24:25 Kol čačepangre morsha, kay djan pal o čačepen, kolenge djal mishto. Oun bari barht vell ap lende." 
Proverbs24:26 Te deh tou i lačo lab pale, hi kova har te dess i čoum." 
Proverbs24:27 Dja vin ap tiri phoub oun kre tiri boudi! Pal kova le i romni, te vell tout i familya!" 
Proverbs24:28 Ma an rhorhepen pre ap i vavareste! Pen o čačepen! 
Proverbs24:29 Ma pen: “Yaake har yob mange kras, krau me leske ninna. Hakeneste dau pale, har yob mange kras.”" 
Proverbs24:30 Me djom glan vergel ko kotar phoub savestar, kay kamell gar te boudrell, oun dikom i drakengro them yekestar, koles či an o shero hi." 
Proverbs24:31 Oun soubyengre bourra his koy tardo oun lauter djoungelo zenlepen, oun i massouri troul ko kotar them his tele peredo." 
Proverbs24:32 Oun me dikom kova, oun moukom les an miro dji te djal; oun kova sikras mange:" 
Proverbs24:33 Te kameh o sopen oun pandeh i yaka oun čiveh i vasta an i gali oun kreh či," 
Proverbs24:34 palle vell o čorvlepen lengste heryentsa pral toute. Oun tout venn phare tsirya. 
Proverbs25:1 Ninna kalla hi goseve laba o Salomestar. I sikepangre an o kheer o baro rayestar Hiskiya lan kal laba khetne. O Hiskiya his o baro ray pral o them Youda. 
Proverbs25:2 O Devel vell sharedo koleske, hoy yob khatedo rikrell. O baro ray vell sharedo koleske, hoy yob pre čakrell." 
Proverbs25:3 O bolepen djal dour pre, oun i phoub djal dour tele, oun kek nay djinell, hoy an o baro rayeskro dji hi." 
Proverbs25:4 Le i čik dran o roup vin, palle nay krell kova, kay boudrell o roupeha, i shoukar čaro kolestar." 
Proverbs25:5 Le o čilačes krik o baro rayestar, palle ačell yob i baro ray, kay an o čačepen tardo hi." 
Proverbs25:6 Ma kre tout bares glan o baro rayeste, oun pash i pralstunende ab gar tardo!" 
Proverbs25:7 Hi feteder, te penenn le ap toute ab kate pre, har te bičrenn le tout tele kotar, kay beshal tout, oun denn tiri beshepaskri i vavareste, kay boudeder an-diklo hi." 
Proverbs25:8 Ma dja sik pash i čačepangre morshende, te peness lenge, hoy dikal. Te vell palle i vavar oun sikrell, kay hi tout gar čačo, hoy kreh tou palle?" 
Proverbs25:9 Te hi tout i čingepen i vavareha oun moukeh o čačepen vin te krell mashkral t'mende, ma rake pral kova, hoy djineh khatedes lestar." 
Proverbs25:10 Te kreh tou kova, shounenn vavar menshe kolestar oun kharenn tout phoukepaskro. Oun kova vell touke gar bouder bistedo." 
Proverbs25:11 I lab rakedo an o čačo tsiro, hi har sonakangre phabya an i roupeno čaro." 
Proverbs25:12 I gosevo mensho, kay trad dell, oun i kand, hoy ap leste shounell, kolla hi har i sonakaskri goustri oun i sonakaskri verkli troul i meen." 
Proverbs25:13 I morsh o labestar hi koleske, kay les bičras, har shila pani an ko tato tsiro, kay o djob dren anlo vell, oun dell les nevi zoor." 
Proverbs25:14 Kolla, kay penenn, te denn le čomone, oun palle denn le kova gar, kolla hi har volke oun i phourdepen, hoy denn kek brishin." 
Proverbs25:15 Boud lače labentsa nay tserdeh pralstunen ap tiri rig. Oun i kamlo rakepen phagella kokale khetne. 
Proverbs25:16 Te hatsal gvin, palle rha gar boudeder har touke mishto hi, te vess gar čalo lestar oun hounte čadess les pale vin." 
Proverbs25:17 Ma dja hako kopo pash tiro maleste khere. Les nay vals o nak toutar pherdo oun vals rhoyedo ap toute. 
Proverbs25:18 Kova, kay ap i vavareste rhorhepen pre anell, savo hi har i tover, oun i rharo, oun činell har i čouri." 
Proverbs25:19 Te hi tout i kalo dives oun dikeh ap i maleste, te vell lo ap tiri rig, oun yob hi kek morsh o labestar, palle hi kova, har te dandals ap i tele phagedo dand, oun har te nashals ap yek heri." 
Proverbs25:20 Te giveh gilya yekeske, koleskro dji rovella, palle hi kova leske, har te randjell yek i baya vin ap i shil dives, oun har te čorell yek shout an i doukepen." 
Proverbs25:21 Te hi koles bok, kay kamell touke čilačepen, palle de les maro te rhal. Oun te hi les troush, de les pani te piyell!" 
Proverbs25:22 Palle rhačell les an leskro dji oun les khaytell, hoy lo kras. Oun o baro Devel dell tout tiro lačepen pale." 
Proverbs25:23 I phourdepen oun kale volke anenn brishin, oun i čip, hoy pal o vast rakrell, anell rholi." 
Proverbs25:24 Hi feteder te beshess ap i dacha, har an o kheer khetne i romyah, kay hako tsiro čingepen rodell." 
Proverbs25:25 I liil dran i dour them lače labentsa hi har shil pani koleske, kay troushella." 
Proverbs25:26 Har i djoungelo pani oun i brounna, hoy khandella, hi yek, kay an o čačepen tardo hi oun glan i čilačeste trissella." 
Proverbs25:27 Boud gvin hi gar mishto. Yaake hi ninna, te shareh tou i vavares boud shoukar labentsa." 
Proverbs25:28 Yaake har i foro, kay kek massouri troul leste hi, yaake hi i morsh, kay nay rikrell gar peskri rholi pale." 
Proverbs26:1 Har gib an i niyal oun har depen an ko tsiro, kay anenn le o djob dren, yaake djal gar, te vell o dinelo sharedo!" 
Proverbs26:2 Har i čirklo, hoy hadell pes an o bolepen, oun vell gar tele pash i mensheste, yaake hi o praasepen, hoy vas vin rakedo pral yekeste, kay kek doosh ap peste anas. Ko praasepen taprell les gar." 
Proverbs26:3 I čoupni o grayeske, oun i ledertikri rima troul i meen i eslatar, oun i kasht ap o doumo i dinelestar." 
Proverbs26:4 Ma rake dinlepen ap i dineleste pale, te vess gar har yob!" 
Proverbs26:5 Rake i dineleha, kay rakrell dineles ap toute, yaake te hayvell lo, har dinelo yob hi." 
Proverbs26:6 Kova, kay i dinelo bičepaskres bičrell, kova hi har yek, kay dell peske kokres i herya tele oun rhal dava." 
Proverbs26:7 Har i herya i bango menshestar kek zoor an lende hi, yaake hi i gosevo lab an o mouy i dinelestar." 
Proverbs26:8 Yek, kay sharell o dineles hi har yek, kay pandell i bar yaake zoreles an i vitsepaskri, te nay vitsrell lo les gar." 
Proverbs26:9 I soubyengro kasht an o vast kolestar, kay mato hi, yaake hi i gosevo lab an o mouy i dinelestar." 
Proverbs26:10 Har yek, kay troul peste karye dell, oun hakenes doukrell, yaake hi kova, kay lell i dineles, te boudrell lo leske, oder saven, kay djan ap o drom." 
Proverbs26:11 Har i djouklo, hoy pale rhal, hoy lo vin čadas, yaake hi o narvelo, kay krell pale te pale dinelo koova." 
Proverbs26:12 I dinelo nay vell sikeder gosevo har yek, kay pestar kokres patsell, te hi lo gosevo." 
Proverbs26:13 Ko či-moldo, kay kamell gar te boudrell, kova penell: Vin hi i levo, ava, mashkral ap o drom hi i levo." 
Proverbs26:14 Yaake har i voudar rissrell pes an i rikepangre, yaake rissrell pes an peskro čiben ko či-moldo, kay kamell či te boudrell." 
Proverbs26:15 I či-moldo, kay kamell či te krell, čivell peskro roy an o čaro, oun anell peskro vast gar pash o mouy." 
Proverbs26:16 I či-moldo, kay kamell gar te boudrell, hi an peskre yaka gosveder har efta, kay djinenn, hoy mishto oun čačo hi." 
Proverbs26:17 Kova, kay pes dren moukell an i vavarengro čingepen, kova hi har yek, kay taprell i djoukles pash i kanda." 
Proverbs26:18 Har i baro dinelo, kay troul peste karye dell oun menshen moulo karye dell," 
Proverbs26:19 yaake hi ko morsh, kay peskro males rhorhell, oun palle penell: Hoy krom, his sapaske." 
Proverbs26:20 Kote, kay bouder kek kasht hi, kote djal i yag vin, oun kote, kay kek bouder hi, kay rhorhepen ap vavarende pre anell, kote djal o čingepen krik." 
Proverbs26:21 Yaake har krell o kasht, te rhačell i yag doureder, yaake krell i morsh, hoy čingepen rodell, te djal o čingepen doureder." 
Proverbs26:22 Kol laba kolestar, kay rhorhepen ap vavarende pre anell, hi har lačo rhapen, oun djan tele har djet." 
Proverbs26:23 Har čare dran rhačedi čik, pral kolende roup maklo vas, yaake hi o mouy, hoy shoukar laba rakrella, hoy venn dran i čilačo dji." 
Proverbs26:24 I midjak mensho hi pherdo rhorhepen. Kova khatrell lo pal shoukar laba. 
Proverbs26:25 Te rakrell lo ninna yaake kamles, ma pats leske! Les hi efta bengeskro koova an leskro dji." 
Proverbs26:26 Ninna te khatrell lo peskri rholi ap i vavarende pal shoukar laba, vell ko dives, kay dikell hakeno leskro čilačepen." 
Proverbs26:27 Kova, kay i vavareske i grouba vin hadas, kova perell kokres dren. Oun yek, kay vitsrell i bar, ap koleste perell lo pale tele." 
Proverbs26:28 Kova, kay rhorhepen rakrell, kamell o vavareske čilačepen te krell oun les doukrell. Oun kova, kay goudle labentsa rakrell, anell i bibarht." 
Proverbs27:1 Ma share tout pral kova, hoy hi tout glan o vavar dives! Tou djineh gar, hoy touke ko dives anell."
