Proverbs27:2 Mouk i vavaren tout te sharell oun gar tiro mouy! Hi feteder te sharell tout i vavareskro mouy har tiro mouy. 
Proverbs27:3 Phares hi barra oun čik. Douy kope phareder hi i rholi, hoy yekes hi pral i dinelestar." 
Proverbs27:4 I rholi hi divyo oun zorelo har i zorelo pani, hoy lauter peha krik tserdell. Koon nay ačell tardo te zilverell i morsh?" 
Proverbs27:5 Feteder hi, te vell yekeske an o mouy penlo, hoy lo gar mishto kras, har te penell yek leske gar, te kamell lo les o djiyestar." 
Proverbs27:6 Laba, hoy doukrenn har dava oun venn tiro malestar, hi feteder har i čoumma kolestar, kay touke čilačes hi." 
Proverbs27:7 Kova, kay čalo hi, moukell o feteder gvin tardo. Koles bok hi, koleske hi shoutlo koova har te vell lo goudlo." 
Proverbs27:8 Har i čirklo, hoy krik djal dran peskri nesta, yaake hi ko morsh, kay hounte nashell peske dour krik dran peskro foro." 
Proverbs27:9 Djet oun soungepaskre kashta krenn o dji barhteles. Feteder hi o djiyeskro kamlepen i malestar. 
Proverbs27:10 Ma mouk tiro males, vitar gar tiro dadeskro males! Te djal touke djoungeles, ma dja an o kheer tiro phralestar. Hi feteder, te djas pash yekeste, kay gar dour toutar djivell, har pash tiro phraleste, kay dour toutar krik djivell." 
Proverbs27:11 Ab gosevo, miro čavo! Oun kre miro dji barhteles, yaake te nay rakrau ap kolende pale, kay man praasenn." 
Proverbs27:12 Koles i gosevo dji hi, kova dikell i bibarht te vell, oun khatrell pes. Kolen či an o shero hi, kolla nashenn doureder, oun i bibarht vell ap lende." 
Proverbs27:13 Yek, kay dinelo doha hi, te dell lo peskro dadeskro vast oun penell, te playsrell lo i vavareskri siyaan, kolestar le leskri baya oun gar ko vavareskri baya, te hi tout čomone an o vast, bis te yob playsrell." 
Proverbs27:14 Kote hi yek, kay sik taysarlake bares gole dell lačo dives ap koleste, kay pash leste djivell. Kova hi koleske har te rakras lo bibarht pral leste vin." 
Proverbs27:15 I romni, kay hako tsiro čingepen rodell, hi har i kheer, kay dren dell, te hi brishin." 
Proverbs27:16 Kova, kay kamell lat pale te rikrell, hi har yek, kay kamell i phourdepen pre te rikrell, oun har yek, kay kamell djet an o vast te rikrell." 
Proverbs27:17 Te dell saster ap saster, venn hake douy har i čouri, hoy mishto činell. Kay menshe khetne hi, sikell yek o vavarestar, har te djan le mishto khetne trouyel." 
Proverbs27:18 Kova, kay ap peskro faygetikro rouk yak della, kova rhal lestar ninna. Oun kova, kay ap peskro rayeste lačepen krell, vell lestar sharedo." 
Proverbs27:19 An o pani nay dikeh tiro mouy. Oun an tiro dji nay dikeh, har hal." 
Proverbs27:20 O moulengro them vell gar čalo. Yaake hi ninna i menshengre yaka: Yon lenn gar doha. 
Proverbs27:21 An i yag vell diklo, har boud o roup moldo hi, oun an o bob sikrell pes, har boud o sonakay moldo hi. Hoy i morsh moldo hi, sikrell pes ap kova, hoy pral leste rakedo vell." 
Proverbs27:22 I kashteha vell djob tiknes kerdo an i piri. Ninna te krals yaake i dineleha, perals leskro dinlepen gar lestar tele." 
Proverbs27:23 De mishto yak ap tire bakre oun bouzya, te hi len lauter, hoy len hounte vell." 
Proverbs27:24 Bravlepen ačell gar, oun i themeskro ray ačell gar ray hako tsiro." 
Proverbs27:25 Anal o phouss dren oun o nevo zenlepen vell pale vin, oun lal khetne ko zenlepen ap i berge," 
Proverbs27:26 palle hi tout bakrengro bal tire ripyenge, oun nay bikreh tire bouzyendar. Oun kol loventsa nay gineh touke i harhetikri phoub." 
Proverbs27:27 Oun tout hi doha bouzyengro thoud touke oun tiri familyake, oun ninna i djouvyenge, kay boudrenn touke." 
Proverbs28:1 O čilačo hi ap o naashepen, ninna te lell les kek palla. Kova, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, hi har i terno levo oun darell či." 
Proverbs28:2 Te hi boud čilačepen an o them, venn ninna boud raya pre. Te vell savo morsh o ray, kay djinell boud oun hayvell lauter mishto, palle hi o čačepen i rah tsiro an o them." 
Proverbs28:3 I čorvelo morsh, kay vas baro oun rikrell i čorvelen tele, hi har depen, hoy lauter krik thovell oun o djob paash krell." 
Proverbs28:4 Kolla, kay moukan o Debleskro drom, sharenn i čilačen. Kolla, kay djan ap o Debleskro drom, kourenn pen lentsa." 
Proverbs28:5 Čilače menshe hayvenn gar, hoy o čačepen hi. Kolla, kay o baro Debles rodenn, kolla hayvenn lauter mishto." 
Proverbs28:6 Hi feteder te hal čorvelo oun djiveh i djoudjo djipen, har te vals bravelo oun djals ap bange dromma." 
Proverbs28:7 Kova, kay o Debleskro drom djal, hayvell, hoy mishto oun gar mishto hi. Kova, kay i maal kolentsa hi, kay či-molde hi, anell ladj ap peskro dadeste." 
Proverbs28:8 Kova, kay bare love kolendar lell, kolen pash leste siyaan hi, oun krell pes koleha braveles, koleskro bravlepen lell savo mensho, koles i baro dji i čorvelenge hi oun lende dell." 
Proverbs28:9 Kova, kay kamell či o Debleskro dromestar te djinell, oun palle mangell lo čomone o baro Deblestar, koleskro mangepen hi djoungelo glan o Debleskre yaka." 
Proverbs28:10 Kova, kay anell o Debleskre menshen ap i čilačo drom, kova perell kokres an i grouba. Kolla, kay kek doosh ap pende anan, lenna lačo koova." 
Proverbs28:11 O bravelo hi gosevo an peskre yaka, oun o čorvelo, kay čačepah gosevo hi, dikell, koon glan leste hi, oun perell gar ap leste dren." 
Proverbs28:12 Te hi kolen penepaske, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, palle hi barhtelo tsiro. Te vell i čilačen penepaske, palle khatrenn pen i menshe." 
Proverbs28:13 Kova, kay peskri doosh khatrell, kova vell gar dour an peskro djipen. Kova, kay penell, hoy lo kras, oun moukell peskri doosh, hatsell o Debleskro kamlepen." 
Proverbs28:14 Barhtelo hi kova, kay hako tsireske o Debleha djivell! Kova, kay moukell peskro dji har i bar te vell, perell an i bibarht." 
Proverbs28:15 I čilačo, kay hi o baro ray pral čorvele menshende, hi har i levo, hoy bares gole dell, oun har i divyo firho, hoy bokell ap peskro rhapen." 
Proverbs28:16 I ray, kay hayvell gar mishto peskre menshentsa trouyel te djal, krell boud doosh. Koles, kay kamell gar rhorhepah braveles te vell, koles vell i lengsto djipen." 
Proverbs28:17 I mensho, kay i vavares moulo das, kova ačell ap o naashepen, yaake rah har djivell lo. Kek te rikrell les pre!" 
Proverbs28:18 Kova, kay i djoudjo djipen djivell, vell vin lino dran i bibarht. Kova, kay ap douy dromma djal, perell ap yekeste." 
Proverbs28:19 Kova, kay ap peskri phoub boudrell, les hi doha maro. Kova, kay či-moldo koova krell, vell čorvelo." 
Proverbs28:20 I morshes o labestar hi barht an boud koova. Kova, kay kamell sik braveles te vell, anell ninna doosh ap peste." 
Proverbs28:21 Te dikeh lačeder ap o braveleste har ap o čorveleste, hi kova gar mishto. I kotar mareske nay anell i morsh doosh ap peste." 
Proverbs28:22 Koles, kay bok pal i love hi, nashell o bravlepen palla, oun djinell gar, te vell yaake o čorvlepen pral leste." 
Proverbs28:23 Te peneh yekeske, hoy yob gar mishto kras, palle vell ko tsiro, kay parkrell lo pes pash toute. Oun kova boudeder, har te rakrals leske pal o mouy." 
Proverbs28:24 Koon peskro dades oun peskri dat vi-randell oun penell kova hi kek doosh, savo hi gar feteder har i čorepaskro." 
Proverbs28:25 Kova, kay bokell pal i love, savo anell čingepen pre. Kova, kay rikrell pes ap o baro Debleste, lell boudeder har doha te rhal." 
Proverbs28:26 Dinelo hi kova, kay krell kokres, hoy peskro dji leske penell. Koon djivell gosvepah, vell dran i bibarht vin lino." 
Proverbs28:27 Kova, kay dell i čorveleste, koles vell doha djipaske. Kova, kay yaake krell, har te dikell lo o čorveles gar, pral koleste rakrenn boud i bibarht vin." 
Proverbs28:28 I čilače, te venn le raya, palle khatrenn pen i menshe. Yon te merenn, palle venn kolla boudeder, kay o čačepen krenn." 
Proverbs29:1 Koon moukell pes či te penell, oun djal hako tsiro pal peskro shero, savo vella ap yek kopo phagedo, oun kek hi palle koy, kay hadell les pale pre." 
Proverbs29:2 Te hi boud menshe koy, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, palle hi i tsele menshe barhtelo. Te hi i čilačo o ray pral lende, palle hi i tsele menshenge ropaske." 
Proverbs29:3 Kova, kay kamell o gosvepen, krell peskro dades barhtelo. Kova, kay pes loubyentsa dren moukell, nashrell peskro bravlepen." 
Proverbs29:4 I baro ray, kay rikrell pes ap o čačepen, kova krell, te djal o themeske lačes. Kova, kay lell boud themeskre love peskre menshendar, kova krell o them paash." 
Proverbs29:5 Kova, kay makell i vavareske gvin troul o mouy, kova čivell i netsa khatedo vin glan koleskre pire." 
Proverbs29:6 I čilačo taprell pes an peskro čilačepen. Kova, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, djal barhteles peskro drom." 
Proverbs29:7 Kova, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, kova dell ninna yak, te lell o čorvelo peskro čačepen. I čilače djinenn gar, hoy čačo hi." 
Proverbs29:8 Kol pre-phourde, kay djinenn lauter feteder, krenn i tselo fores divyes. I goseve hayvenn, har te lenn le lengro čingepen krik." 
Proverbs29:9 Te vell i gosevo khetne i dineleha pash o čačepaskro morsheste, te vell o čačepen vi-kerdo, palle vell o dinelo divyo oun sal. Či dikell lo dren." 
Proverbs29:10 I marepangre hi rhoyedo pral koleste, kay kek doosh ap peste anas. Kolla, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, denn yak ap koleskro djipen." 
Proverbs29:11 I dinelo rikrell peskri rholi gar pale. I gosevo hi o ray pral peskri rholi. 
Proverbs29:12 I ray, kay ap rhorhene laba shounella, koleskre boudepangre venn lauter rhorhene." 
Proverbs29:13 O čorvelo oun kova, kay les tele rikrell, kol douyen hi yek koova khetne: Kol douyende das o baro Devel yaka." 
Proverbs29:14 I baro ray, kay dell i čorvelen lengro čačepen, ačell ray i rah tsiro." 
Proverbs29:15 Te lell i čavo i phagi oun vell leske penlo, hoy lo gar mishto kras, palle vell lo gosevo. I čavo, kay ap peste kokres yak hounte dell, savo anell ladj ap peskri date." 
Proverbs29:16 Kote, kay boud čilače hi, kote hi ninna boud doosh. Vell ko tsiro, kay dikenn kolla, kay an o čačepen tardo hi, har i čilače perenn." 
Proverbs29:17 Sike tiro čaves zoreles, hoy lo gar mishto kras. Palle krell lo tout barhtelo. Oun tou hounte ladjess leske gar." 
Proverbs29:18 Te hi kek Debleskro rakepen koy, palle venn i menshe divyo oun bipandlo. Barhtelo hi kova, kay shounell ap o Debleskre laba." 
Proverbs29:19 I labentsa moukell pes o boudepaskro či te sikrell. Ninna te hayvals yob, rikrell lo pes gar ap kova." 
Proverbs29:20 Dikeh tou i morshes, kay sik ap o rakepen hi, i dineleske nay djal feteder har saveske." 
Proverbs29:21 Te deh tou tiro boudepaskres lauter, hoy kamell lo, foun tiknes pre, palle vell ko dives, kay shounell lo bouder gar ap toute." 
Proverbs29:22 I morsh, kay hako tsiro an i rholi hi, savo krell čingepen, oun anell boud doosh ap peste." 
Proverbs29:23 O pre-phourdepen i menshestar krell, te perell lo. Kova, kay hadell pes gar, vell an-diklo." 
Proverbs29:24 Kova, kay djal khetne yekeha, kay čorell, činell pes an peskro mass: yob djinell, o praasepen hounte vals ap leste, te penell lo či. Oun yob kamell či te penell." 
Proverbs29:25 Kova, kay darell i menshendar, perella. Kova, kay rikrell pes ap o baro Debleste, pral koleste rikrell lo peskre vasta." 
Proverbs29:26 Boud rodenn i rayes pre, te rakrenn le leha. Kova, kay dell o menshes peskro čačepen, hi kokres o baro Devel." 
Proverbs29:27 Rhoyedo pral kolende, kay čilačo koova krenn, hi kolla, kay o čačepen krenn. Oun rhoyedo pral koleste, kay o čačepen krell, hi kolla, kay čilačo koova krenn." 
Proverbs30:1 Kolla hi laba, hoy rakras o Agour, koleskro dad o Yake his, dran Massa. Kava morsh penas: Me marom man tele, mo Devel, me marom man tele, mo Devel, oun djinau gar bouder doureder." 
Proverbs30:2 Har i firho hom, oun menshengro gosvepen hi man kek." 
Proverbs30:3 Kek sikras man har te vap gosevo, oun djinau či o Deblestar." 
Proverbs30:4 Koon djas pre an o bolepen oun pale tele? Koon las o phourdepen an peskre vasta? Koon pandas i tsele panya an i baya? Koon penas, har dour i phoub te djal? Har kharell lo? Har kharell leskro čavo? Djineh tou kova?" 
Proverbs30:5 O Devel rikrell hako lab, hoy das lo. Yob rikrell peskre vasta pral kolende, kay venn pash leste, te dell lo yak ap lende." 
Proverbs30:6 Čip kek lab pash kova pashel, hoy yob penas, te dell lo tout gar trad, oun hakeno dikell, kay hal i rhorheno." 
Proverbs30:7 Mo Devel, douy koova mangau me toutar. De len mande yaake rah har djivau:" 
Proverbs30:8 Rike man pale, te rhorhap! Oun ma kre, te vap čorvelo oun vitar gar, te vap bravelo. De man kokres, hoy man hounte vell o djipaske." 
Proverbs30:9 Te vals man boudeder har man hounte vell, nay penaus: “Koon hi o baro Devel?” Oun te vals man gar doha, nay čoraus oun anaus ladj ap miro Debleste." 
Proverbs30:10 Ma an rhorhepen pre ap i boudepaskro pash leskro rayeste, te rakrell yob kek bibarht pral toute vin, oun tou hounte playsress koleske." 
Proverbs30:11 Hi menshe koy, kay rakrenn pral pengro dad bibarht vin, oun penenn kek lačo lab pral pengri date." 
Proverbs30:12 Hi menshe koy, kay an pengre yaka djoudjo hi, oun lengro djoungelo koova vas gar tele thodo." 
Proverbs30:13 Hi menshe koy, kay patsenn pendar, har lačo yon hi, oun dikenn tele ap hako vavareste." 
Proverbs30:14 Hi menshe koy, kolengre danda doukrenn har rhare oun činenn har čourya. Oun yon rhan i čorvelen an o them, oun kolen, kay lenge kek ap i rig vell." 
Proverbs30:15 Hi menshe koy, kay hi har ko kirmo, hoy o rat piyell. Koles hi douy ča. Kolla kharenna: “De kay! De kay!” Triin hi koy, kay gar čalo venn, oun star penenn an kek tsiro: “Kanna hi man doha”:" 
Proverbs30:16 o moulengro them; o per i djouvyatar, kay lell kek čave; i phoub, kay gar boud brishin dell; oun i yag, hoy gar gole dell Kanna hi doha!." 
Proverbs30:17 Kova, kay praasell peskro dades, oun kamell gar ap peskri date te shounell, koleske hounte dens i korake i yaka vin, oun i bare čirkle hounte rhans len." 
Proverbs30:18 Triin koova hi mange yaake baro, te hayvau len gar. Oun o startestar djinau me či:" 
Proverbs30:19 O drom o baro čirklestar, har hadell lo pes an o bolepen; o drom o sapestar ap i bare barra; o drom foun i shiffo ap o baro pani; oun o drom o morshestar pash i terni djouvyate." 
Proverbs30:20 I djouvel, kay rhorhell peskro romes oun sovell i vavareha, thovell pes pal kova oun penell: “Me krom kek čilačepen”, yaake har te rhals li oun thovals peske o mouy tele." 
Proverbs30:21 Tel triin koova trissell i phoub, oun tel o starto rikrell li les gar vin:" 
Proverbs30:22 Tel i boudepaskro, kay i baro ray vas; oun tel i narvelo, kay bravelo vas;" 
Proverbs30:23 tel i čilači djouvel, kay vell romedino. Oun tel i boudepaskretsa, kay las koy platsa peskri rayetsa dren." 
Proverbs30:24 Star firhe hi i tikneder ap kay phoub, oun hi gosveder har i goseve menshe:" 
Proverbs30:25 I kirya: Ninna te hi len kek zoor, anenn le pengro rhapen khetne an i niyal." 
Proverbs30:26 I bergetikre shoshoya: Len hi vitar gar boud zoor oun krenn pengre khera an i bare barra. 
Proverbs30:27 I stepangre: Len hi kek ray oun djan vin har kourepangre, kolenge penlo vas, har le hounte djan." 
Proverbs30:28 I aideksa: Tou nay taprell lat i vastentsa, oun hatseh lat ninna an i zorele shoukar khera i bare rayendar." 
Proverbs30:29 Triin hi, kay rayles pre stakrenn, oun o starto hi o rayleder:" 
Proverbs30:30 O levo, ko zorleder mank i firhende: Glan kekeste djal lo pale;" 
Proverbs30:31 o bashno, har djal lo pre-phourdemen trouyel; o morsh bouzni; oun o baro ray, har djal lo glan peskre lourdende." 
Proverbs30:32 Te hals yaake dinelo, te hadal tout pre, oun lal tout čilačo koova glan, ač oun čip o vast ap tiro mouy!" 
Proverbs30:33 Te deh thoud, vell kolatar khil. Te deh yekes ap o nak, ratell kova. oun te moukeh i rholi vin, vell čingepen." 
Proverbs31:1 Kolla hi i laba, hoy rakras i day o baro rayestar Lemouel ap leste. O Lemouel his o baro ray pral Massa." 
Proverbs31:2 Miro čavo, koles me ap i phoub anom, tou, ko čavo, koles o Deblestar mangom, hoy penap touke?" 
Proverbs31:3 Ma de tiri zoor i djouvyenge! Ma dja ko drom, ap koleste i bare raya nashedo djan." 
Proverbs31:4 Ma pi tout mates! Mool oun rhačedo pipen hi či bare rayenge oun pralstunenge. 
Proverbs31:5 Te piyenn le, nay bistrans le, hoy o Devel lendar kamell, oun dikenn bouder gar koy pre, te lenn i čorvele pengro čačepen." 
Proverbs31:6 Denn zorelo pipen kolenge, kay ap o merepen čiddo hi, oun mool kolenge, kay lenge ropaske hi." 
Proverbs31:7 Save nay piyenna, te nay bistrenn le pengri bibarht oun kova, hoy lengre djia doukrell." 
Proverbs31:8 Kre tou tiro mouy pre kolenge, kay gar nay rakrenna, hakeneske, koles gar i zoor hi, te anell lo peske kokres peskro čačepen dren." 
Proverbs31:9 Kre tiro mouy pre, kre o čačepen yaake vin, te lell hakeno peskro čačepen, ninna i čorvele oun bibarhtele." 
Proverbs31:10 I lači romni, koon hatsell lat? Yoy hi boudeder moldo har kouč barra." 
Proverbs31:11 Lakro rom nay patsell lat oun djinell, te rikrell li pash leste. Oun dran kova hoy les hi, krell li gomme boudeder." 
Proverbs31:12 Yoy krell leske lačepen oun kek čilačepen, yaake rah har djivell li." 
Proverbs31:13 Yoy lell bakrengro bal oun layntikre thaba, oun boudrell barhteles peskre vastentsa." 
Proverbs31:14 Yoy anell rhapen khetne foun doural har i shiffo, hoy paredo koova anell." 
Proverbs31:15 Yoy stell pre, kote hi gomme rati, oun krell o rhapen peskro khereske, oun penell i djouvyenge, kay lake boudrenn, hoy te krenn le." 
Proverbs31:16 Yoy rodell i harhetikri phoub oun ginell lat, oun kol loventsa, hoy lakre vasta dren anan, čivell li terne drakengre rouka an i phoub." 
Proverbs31:17 Yoy boudrell phares oun krell peskre moussya zoreles. 
Proverbs31:18 Yoy hayvell, te anell lakri boudi čomone dren. Ninna rati djal pash late i momeli gar vin." 
Proverbs31:19 Yoy lell koy thabeskri spindla an o vast, oun krell peskre thaba." 
Proverbs31:20 Yoy krell peskro vast pre i čorvelenge, oun dell kolende, kolen gar doha hi." 
Proverbs31:21 Yoy darell gar peskro khereske, te vell o vend. Hakenes an lakro kheer hi tate koola." 
Proverbs31:22 Plarhte krell li peske, rido hi li an lačo layntikro than oun lolo bakrengro bal." 
Proverbs31:23 Lakro rom hi an-diklo an o foro, te rakrell lo pes tele i phourentsa." 
Proverbs31:24 Kouč gada krell li oun bikrell len, oun i parepangre lenn latar kol pereskre dorya, hoy yon bikrenn." 
Proverbs31:25 Yoy hi zorelo oun an-diklo, oun yoy darell gar o tsirestar, hoy vella." 
Proverbs31:26 Lakro rakepen hi pherdo gosvepen, oun lače labentsa sikrell li, har čomone djal." 
Proverbs31:27 Yoy dikell pal lauter, hoy an o kheer kerdo vell. Oun ko mareske, hoy li rhal, boudras li." 
Proverbs31:28 Lakre morsh čave stakrenn glan oun sharenn lat. Oun lakro rom sharell lat kal labentsa: 
Proverbs31:29 “Boud romya hi boud moldo, tou hal i lačeder lendar lauterendar!”" 
Proverbs31:30 O shoukapen ačell gar, oun i shoukar djouvel vell ninna phouro. I romni, kay djivell o baro Debleha, kolat sharenn le." 
Proverbs31:31 Parkrenn t'men pash late lautereske, hoy yoy kras! Givenn kolestar ap i platse an o foro!" 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Kalla hi i laba, hoy o sikepaskro rakras. Yob hi i Davideskro čavo oun o baro ray an o foro Yerusalem." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Phares te hayvell hi halauter, penas o sikepaskro, halauter an o djipen hi phares te hayvell." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Hoy lell o mensho peske dran peskri tseli phari boudi, hoy les hi ap kay phoub?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Menshe venna oun djana. Kokres i phoub ačell, har li hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 O kham djal pre oun djal pale tele, oun nashell kote, kay lo pale pre djal." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 O dourho tel o bolepen phourdell an yek rig, oun palle rissrell lo oun phourdell an i vavar rig, kay his lo." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 I tsele tikne panya nashenn an o baro pani. Oun o baro pani vell gar pherdo. Oun o pani vell pale kote, kay lo his, oun kotar nashell lo pale." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Khines krell man halauter, hoy i menshe rakrenna, oun kek nay hatsell i čače laba. O yak nay dikell pes gar čales, oun o kand nay shounell pes gar čales." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Hoy koy his, hi hoy vella, oun hoy kerdo vas, hi hoy kerdo vella. Kek nevo koova hi tel o kham!" 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Dik kova, penenn le, ko hi nevo! Ninna kova his glan maro tsiro koy, an kol tsirya kay glan mende his." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Mer bistrah kol menshen, kay glan mende djivan. Oun kolla, kay pal mende venn, venn bistedo kolendar, kay pal lende venn." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Me, o sikepaskro, me homs o ray pral o them Israel oun djivom an o foro Yerusalem." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Miri tseli djiyeskri zoryah oun gosvepah rodom, te hayvap o tselo koova, hoy ap i phoub halauter kerdo vella. Havo pharepen das o Devel i menshende, te marenn le pen tele koleha." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Me dikom halauter, hoy kerdo vas ap kay phoub, oun nay penau t'menge, halauter hi čičeske, oun yaake har te nashals yek pal o dourho, hoy djal pral i phoub." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Tou nay kreh gar čačo, hoy bango hi. Oun hoy gar koy hi, nay vell gar ginlo." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Me penom mange: Me vom i baro morsh, gosveder har hakeno, kay glan mande o baro ray an Yerusalem his. Man hi i gosevo dji oun hayvau boud." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Miri tseli djiyeskri zoryah kamom te hatsap vin, hoy čačepah gosvepen hi, oun hoy dinelo oun narvelo hi. Oun kote hatsom vin, kay kova yaake hi, har te nashoms pal o dourho, hoy djal pral i phoub." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Kones boud gosvepen hi, koleske djal ninna boud an o shero trouyel. Koon boud djinell, koleske vell ropaske pral kova." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Me penom mange: Mishto palle, me kamau lačes te djivell oun moukau les mange mishto te djal! Kote hayvom, kay kova ninna čičeske hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Me hatsom vin, kay ninna o sapen dinlepen hi! Oun o gipen an tiro dji anell touke či." 
Ecclesiastes2:3 An miro rodepen pal o gosvepen rakrom miro djiyeha, oun penom mange: Pi touke i mool, te vess barhtelo. Oun yaake har i dinelo vom mato. Koy poučom mandar: Hi savo koova mishto o mensheske an peskro tikno djipen?" 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Me krom baro koova: Me krom mange khera oun drakengre themma," 
Ecclesiastes2:5 oun vavar kotya them, kay čivom shoukar bourra oun rouka an i phoub, ninna save rouka, kay hidjrenn roukengre." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Me krom mange tikne panya, te vell man doha pani kol boud roukenge." 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Me ginom mange boudepangren, morshen oun djouvyen. Oun man his ninna boudepangre, kay van boldo an miro kheer. Man his boudeder groumya oun bakre har halauter, kay glan mande i bare raya an o foro Yerusalem his." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Me lom mange ninna roup oun sonakay khetne, oun hoy vavar raya oun themma man dan. Me moukom gipangren pash mande khetne te vell, morshen oun djouvyen. Oun man his yaake boud djouvya har kamom, te krenn le man barhtelo." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Oun me vom baro oun bareder har hakeno, kay glan mande o ray an o foro Yerusalem his. Oun ko tselo koova, hoy kote krom, krom o gosvepah." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Halauter hoy mire yaka kaman, kova dom len. Oun miro djiyeske dom halauter, hoy moukas les te bashrell. Yaake vom barhtelo pral halauter hoy krom. Oun halauter, koleske man tele marom, anas mange čačepah barht an o dji." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Oun har dikom ko tselo koova, hoy mire vasta kran, oun koy boudi, hoy man koy pashel his, kote hayvom, lauter hi čičeske, har te nashoms pal o dourho, hoy djal pral i phoub. Oun či vell vin dran halauter, hoy krom an miro djipen." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Kote djom trouyel, te dikap, hoy vell dran o gosvepen vin? Hi kova vavarčandes har kova, hoy vell dran o narvlepen oun o dinlepen vin? Hoy krell ko morsh, kay pal mande o baro ray hi? Kova hoy glan leste kerdo vas, krell yob ninna!" 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Me dikom, o gosvepen hi feteder har o dinlepen, yaake har o dives feteder hi har i rati." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Kova, kay gosevo hi, dikell, kay lo djal. O dinelo nashell an i rati. Oun ninna hayvom, yekeske djal har o vavareske." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Kote penom mange: Te djal mange har o dineleske, hoske rodom palle pal o gosvepen? Ninna kova hi čičeske." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 I goseve hounte merenn, oun i dinele ninna. Oun ko gosevo vell yaake sik bistedo har ko dinelo. An i tsirya kay venna, hi halauter bistedo." 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Kote his mange miro djipen bouder gar shoukar. Kova, hoy i menshe krenna ap kay phoub, hi čičeske. Halauter hi čičeske, oun yaake har te nashals yek pal o dourho, hoy djal pral i phoub." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Oun kova halauter, koleske man tele marom an miro djipen, hounte moukap yekeske, kay pal mande vell. Doleske his mange kova vitar gar shoukar." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Koon djinell, koon kova hi, kay pal mande vell, i gosevo morsh oder i dinelo morsh? Vell har vella! Yob vell o ray pral halauter, koleske man tele marom oun goseves pre čivom an miro djipen. Yaake hi kova ninna čičeske." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Ava, miro dji peras an i rati pral koleste me man tele marom an miro djipen." 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Kova, hoy i mensho gosvepah oun lače vastentsa kras, hounte moukell lo halauter i vavareske, kay kras či koleske. Kova hi ninna čičeske oun i bari bibarht." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Hoy ačell o mensheske, kay pes tele boudras oun tele maras pash peskri boudi?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Leskro tselo djipen hi pherde douka, oun leskro boudepen pherdo ropen. Ninna an i rati nay sovell lo gar. Kova hi ninna čičeske." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Či hi feteder o mensheske, har te rhal lo oun piyell lo oun vell barhtelo pral kova, hoy lo krell. I barhtelo dji, kova dikom, vell dran o Debleskro vast." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Kekes hi rhapen, oun kek nay moukell les peske mishto te djal, te dell les o Devel kova gar!" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Kol menshe, kay djivenn yaake har glan o Debleste mishto hi, kolla lenna lestar gosvepen oun barht an o dji. Kolla, kay djan o Debleskro dromestar tele, kolen moukell lo te boudrell oun bravlepen khetne anell, hoy pal i tsiro i vavareske vell, yekeske, kay djivell yaake har glan o Debleste mishto hi. Palle his leskri tseli boudi čičeske, oun yaake har te nashals lo pal o dourho, hoy djal pral i phoub." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Halauter, hoy djal ap i phoub, koles hi peskro tsiro. Halauter, hoy krah, djal an o čačo tsiro:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Yek tsiro hi koy, kay o mensho boldo vella, oun yek tsiro hi koy, kay o mensho merella; yek tsiro, kay čivah zenlepen an i phoub, oun yek tsiro, kay vell ko zenlepen pale vin tserdedo." 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Dell yek tsiro, kay vell maredo, oun yek tsiro, kay vell o doukepen sasto; yek tsiro, kay vell o kheer tele phagedo, oun yek tsiro, kay vell o kheer pre-čiddo." 
Ecclesiastes3:4 O ropaske hi yek tsiro, oun o sapaske hi yek tsiro. Dell tsirya, kay rovell maro dji, oun vavar tsirya, kay khelah i barhtyatar." 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Yek tsiro hi koy, te vitsras barra, oun yek tsiro, te čivas barra khetne. Dell yek tsiro, kay taprah men trouyel, oun yek tsiro, kay taprah men bouder gar trouyel." 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Yek tsiro hi koy, te rodas čomone, oun yek tsiro, kay rodah bouder gar. Yek tsiro hi koy, kay rikrah čomone, oun yek tsiro, kay vitsrah les krik." 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Koy hi yek tsiro, kay krenn i menshe pengre koola paash, oun yek vavar tsiro, kay sivenn le penge neve koola. Koy hi yek tsiro, kay rakrah gar, oun i vavar tsiro, kay rakrah." 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Koy hi tsirya, kay i menshe kamenn pen, oun tsirya, kay čingrenn le ap i vavarende. Dell tsirya, kay djivah an o kourepen, oun vavar tsirya, kay dell kek kourepen." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Hoy vell koleske vin, kay krell peskri boudi oun marell pes tele?" 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Me lom koy boudi an o yak, hoy das o Devel i menshende, kolah marenn le pen tele." 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Hako koova, hoy o Devel krell, krell lo ap o čačo tsiro. Oun yob čivas o mensheske an o dji, te hayvell lo, kay hi čomone koy, hoy ačell hako tsiro. Ninna te hi kova yaake, nay hayvell o mensho gar ko tselo koova, hoy o Devel krell, kokres tikne kotya kolestar." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Doleske penom mange: Či hi feteder o mensheske, har te djivals lo i shoukar djipen oun hi barhtelo koy pashel." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Yaake nay penah: Mer te rhas, piyas oun boudras i barhtelo djiyeha. Kova lauter vell men o Deblestar." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Me hayvom, kay halauter, hoy o Devel krella, hako tsireske ačella. Kek mendar nay krell čomone pashel, oun kek mendar nay lell čomone krik. Kova halauter krell o Devel, te sharas mer les." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Hoy kanna koy hi, his glan mende koy. Oun hoy pal mende vella, his ninna koy. Oun o Devel anell pale, hoy yek kopo koy his." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Ninna dikom ap i phoub, kote kay hounte rakrans i čačepangre o čačepen, his o čilačepen o ray. Oun kote, kay hounte djans le pal o čačepen, rakran le rhorhepah." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Kote penom mange: O Devel rakrell o čačepen vin pral koleste, kay djivell an o čačepen, oun pral koleste, kay djivell an o čilačepen. Hako koova, oun halauter, hoy yek krell, koleske dell i čačo tsiro." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Me penom mange: Halauter djal yaake, te dikell o Devel, har hako mensho pes rikrella. Oun yob kamell les te sikrell, te hi lo gar feteder har i firho." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 O mensheske djal har o firheske: I firhe merenna, yaake merenn ninna i menshe. Oun len halauter hi i dourho. Oun o menshes hi či glan-vi glan o firho. Čačepah, kova hi phares te hayvell." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Halauter hounte merell, hako djipen vas dran i čik, oun hako djipen vell pale čik." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Kek nay djinell, te djal o mensheskro dourho pral an o bolepen oun o firheskro dourho tele an i phoub." 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Yaake dikom dren, či hi feteder, har te krell i mensho barhteles peskri boudi; i barhtelo dji hi leskro bravlepen. Kek nay penell o mensheske, hoy ap i phoub djala, te hi lo bouder gar koy." 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Palle dikom halauter, hoy gar čačo hi ap i phoub. Me dikom i sva kolendar, kay dan le lenge gar lengro čačepen, oun kolenge kek ap i rig vas. Kolla, kay kran lenge čilačepen, his zorelo. Doleske vas kek ap lengri rig." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Kote penom mange, barhteles hi kolla, kay meran oun paskedo hi, kolenge hi feteder har kolenge, kay kanna djivenna." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Oun feteder har kol douyenge hi koleske, kay vas gar boldo oun dikas gar ko tselo čilačepen, hoy vell kerdo ap i phoub." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Oun me dikom, har marenn pen i menshe tele oun krenn lači boudi, te venn le feteder har kol vavar, yaake te zilverenn kolla ap lende. Kova hi ninna či-moldo, oun yaake har te nashals yek pal o dourho, hoy djal pral i phoub." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Koon kamell gar te boudrell, čivell peskre vasta glan peskri beč khetne. Yob hi dinelo oun leske ačell či te rhal." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Feteder i vast pherdo djipaske oun tsirya, kay kreh či, har douy vasta pherdo djipaske oun boud boudi oun i naashepen pal o dourho, hoy djal pral i phoub." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Oun palle dikom i vavar koova ap i phoub, hoy hi phares te hayvell." 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Kote hi yek kokres, oun kek hi pash leste. Kek čavo hi les oun kek phraal. Oun yob boudrell oun boudrella, te vell lo bravelo. Yob hounte poučals pestar: Koneske boudrau man tele, oun moukau les mange gar mishto te djal? Savo koova hi phares te hayvell oun i bibarht." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Douyenge djal feteder har yekeske. Te boudrenn douy khetne, vell yek o vavareske pash o vast." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Te perell yek, hadell les ko vavar pre. Har djoungeles djal koleske, kay kokres hi, oun perella! Palle hi kek vavar koy, kay hadell les pre." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Ninna, douy te hi an o čiben čiddo, nay tatsrenn le pen khetne. Har nay tatsrell pes yek, te hi lo kokres?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Yek te hi lo kokres, nay vell sik khetne dino. Douy te hi khetne, nay venn le zorleder har kova, kay djal ap lende pre. Triin pesse thaba krenn i dori, hoy djal gar sik paash." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 I terno morsh, kay gosevo hi, ninna te hi lo gar bravelo, hi feteder har i phouro baro ray, kay dinelo hi, oun moukell peske či te penell." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Kova hi čačo, ninna te his ko terno morsh i pandlo boudepaskro oun vas vin ginlo, te vell lo baro ray, ninna te vas lo boldo an i čorveli familya an ko them, pral leste yob o ray vell." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Oun me dikom, har i tsele djide menshe ap kay phoub pengro djipen djivenn. Ninna dikom i vavar terno morshes, kay pal leste o baro ray vals." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Oun me dikom boud menshe, yaake boud te penau nay gar, kitse yon hi. Kolla kay his glan leste, oun kolla, kay van pal leste, kek lendar his barhtelo pral kova, hoy yob kras. Kova hi ninna či-moldo, oun yaake har te nashals yek pal o dourho, hoy djal pral i phoub." 
Ecclesiastes4:17 De garda, hoy kreh, te djah tou an o Debleskro kheer! Ab glan o Debleste oun shoun ap leskre laba! Kova hi feteder, har te aneh leske firhen kokres, har dinele menshe krenn. Kolla djinenn gar, kay krenn le dinelo koova." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Ma kre tiro mouy sik pre, te rakreh glan o Debleste. O Devel hi an o bolepen, oun tou hal ap i phoub. Doleske kre gar boud laba, te rakreh." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Koneske boud an o shero trouyel djal, kova dell phare sounya. Oun koon boud laba krell, rakrell sik dinelo koova." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Te deh tou tout sovel glan o Debleste, palle mouk tout čičestar pale te rikrell, te kress kova, hoy glan leste penal! O Devel dikell gar lačes ap ko dineleste, kay nay rikrell gar, hoy lo sovel das." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Feteder hi, te deh tout gar sovel, har te deh tout sovel oun rikreh gar, hoy penal." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 De garda te rakress gar savo koova, hoy nay rikreh gar dren! Ma pen glan i Debleskro morsheste: Kova kamom gar te penell. O Debles nay vell i rholi pral tire laba, oun yob nay moukals kova gar mishto te djal, hoy tire vastentsa kral." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Čačepah, boud sounya oun boud laba molenn či. Dran kova kre kova, hoy o Debles sharell!" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Te dikeh tou, har an o them o čorvelo tele rikedo vell, oun o čačepen tele stakedo vell, oun kek peskro čačepen lell, palle kre kek bare yaka: I pralstoune rikrenn khetne, oun pral lende hi vavar pralstoune, kay rikrenn i vasta pral kolende." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Hi feteder o themeske, te hi les i baro ray, kay dikell koy pre, te vell ap o harhetikro them boudedo, te vell i menshen doha djipaske." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Kova, kay i love kamella, koles nay vell gar doha love. Oun kova, kay lell pes bravlepen khetne, koles nay vell vitar gar doha. Ninna kava koova hi čičeske." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Kote kay boud bravlepen hi, kote hi ninna boud, kay rhan o bravlepen pre; oun koles, kay kova lauter hi, leske ačell či, har te dikell lo les an!" 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Goudlo hi o sopen koleske, kay boudrella, te rhas lo boud oder gar boud; o bravlepen o bravelestar moukell les gar te sovell." 
Ecclesiastes5:12 I djoungelo koova dikom ap i phoub: Hi menshe koy, kay garenn pengro bravlepen pash peste oun denn mishto yak ap kova." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Oun i bibarht vell oun yon nashrenn halauter. Oun te hi i čavo koy, ačell leske či an o vast." 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Yaake har yek nanges boldo vas, yaake djal lo pale, har lo vas. Ninna te boudras lo boud, nay lell lo či pestar peha, te merell lo." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Yob hounte djal, har lo vas. Kova hi i bari bibarht leske. Leskri phari boudyatar ačell leske či. Kova hi, har te marals lo pes tele čičeske." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Peskro tselo djipen moukas lo pes gar mishto te djal. Boud pharo koova djas leske an o shero trouyel oun kras leske daar. Oun koy pashel vas nasslepen oun rholi an leskro djipen. 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Kova hi, hoy me dikom dren, oun hoy mishto hi, oun ko feteder, hoy nay krah an maro tikno djipen, hoy o Devel men das, te rhas mer oun piyas oun kras i barhtelo djiyeha mari boudi. Yaake kamell kova o Devel mendar." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Te dell o Devel i menshes bravlepen oun lačo kova, te nay rhal lo oun piyella, oun te nay moukell lo peske mishto te djal, oun leskro dji sal pral halauter, hoy leske dran peskri phari boudi vas, palle hi kova čomone, hoy o Deblestar vas." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 O Devel das les barht an o dji. Doleske hounte krell lo peske kek shero pral o tikno tsiro, kay hi lo ap kay phoub." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Kote hi i bibarht, hoy me dikom ap kay phoub, koya vell pale te pale pral i menshende." 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Kote hi yek, koles kras o Devel baro oun an-diklo, das les bravlepen oun boud lačo koova. Yaake hi les halauter, hoy o dji kamella. Oun palle moukell les o Devel gar kolestar te rhal oun barhteles te vell. I vavar lell kova halauter oun rhal les pre. Savo koova hi ninna phares te hayvell oun krell man nasselo." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Nay vell i morsh, koleske venn sheel čave boldo, oun yob djivell boud bersha. Te vals lo yaake phouro oun vals gar barhtelo pral o lačepen an peskro djipen, oun leske vals vitar kek paskepen kerdo, kolestar penau me: I ternepen, kay moulo boldo vas, djal feteder har leske." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Ko ternepen vas boldo kek djipah, oun an i rati djal lo koy. Kek nay djinell, hoy lestar vals." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 O kham dikas lo gar oun prindjras o djipen gar. Yob sovell i lačo sopen, feteder har ko bravelo." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Ninna te vals kova douy zerya bersha phouro, les vals či peskro djipastar – hake douy hounte meran." 
Ecclesiastes6:7 O mensho marell pes tele peskro rhapaske. Oun pale te pale lell lo bok oun vell gar čalo hako tsireske. 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Hoy hi o goseves o dineleske glan-vi an kava koova? Hoy molell kanna o čorveleske, te djinell lo, har te djal lo peskro drom mishto?" 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Vell penlo: Feteder hi te dikas ap kova, hoy men hi, har te nashas vavar koova palla. Kova hi ninna čičeske, oun yaake har te nashams pal o dourho, hoy djal pral i phoub." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Halauter, hoy koy hi, las peskro lab. Mer djinah, har i menshe hi. Doleske nay čingrell i mensho gar koleha, kay zorleder hi har yob." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Yaake boud rakrell lo, yaake boudeder hi leskro rakepen či-moldo. Hoy anell kova o mensheske?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Kek djinella, hoy o mensheske mishto hi an peskro djipen, hoy yaake tikno hi. Kava dives hi lo koy oun o vavar dives bouder gar. Oun koon nay penell o mensheske, hoy pal leste vella ap kay phoub?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Vell penlo: Hi feteder, te vell yek lačes an-diklo mank i menshende, har te makell lo pes lačo djeteha. Me penau: O dives, kay i mensho merella, hi feteder har ko dives, kay i mensho ap kay phoub vella." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 O mensheske hi feteder te djal lo an i kheer, kay yek meras oun i menshe rovenna, har te djal lo an i kheer, kay krenn le i biyab. Kote, kay yek meras, vell diklo, kay hako mensho hounte merella. Oun koon gomme djido hi, moukell pes kova an o dji te djal." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Ropen hi feteder har sapen; pash o ropen nay vell yekeskro dji feteder. 
Ecclesiastes7:4 O gosevo djal kote, kay yek meras oun i menshe rovenna. O dinelo djal kote, kay sapaske hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 O mensheske hi feteder te shounell lo ap i goseveste, kay čingrell leha, har te shounell lo ap i gilya, kolentsa i dinele les sharenn." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 O sapen i dinelendar hi menge gar boudeder moldo har i gole, hoy denn sane kashta tel i piri, te venn le rhačedo." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Ninna o gosevo vell har i dinelo, te moukell lo pes te ginell. Dell yek leste love, te krell lo, hoy gar čačo hi, oun yob lell kol love an, palle nay djal lo bouder gar pal o čačepen." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Feteder hi, te pandess tiro mouy, har te kress tiro mouy pre o rakepaske. Feteder hi, te dess gar sik pre, har te vess pre-phourdo." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 De garda te vess gar sik rhoyedo! Koon rhoyrell pes pral halauter, hi dinelo." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Ma pen: An o phouro tsiro his halauter feteder har kanna! Te vals tou gosevo, penals tou kova gar!" 
Ecclesiastes7:11 O gosvepen hi yaake mishto har i bravlepen, hoy o dad peskro čaveske moukas. Hakeneske ap kay phoub hi o gosvepen boud moldo." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 O gosvepen hi har love. Kones kolestar doha hi, kova hounte darell gar. Leskro gosvepen rikrell o goseves an o djipen." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Dik, hoy o Devel halauter kras! Kek nay krell vavarčandes, hoy yob bango kras!" 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Te hi tout i lačo tsiro, palle mouk les touke lačes te djal. Te hi tout i djoungelo tsiro, palle dikess dren: O Devel kras ko yek tsiro har ko vavar, te djinell o mensho gar, hoy vella an kol divessa, kay venna." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Me dikom boud koova an miro djipen, hoy hayvom me gar: Koy hi i lačo morsh, kay djivas i čačo djipen, oun yob merella glan te vas lo phouro. Oun koy hi i rhorheno morsh, ko djivell an o čilačepen, oun yob djivell i rah djipen." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Ma rike o čačepen zorleder dren har činlo hi! Oun ma kre tout gosveder har hal! Hoske kameh tout paash te krell? 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Rike tout pale o čilačepastar! Oun ma ab har i dinelo! Hoske kameh te merell glan tiro tsiro? 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Mishto hi, te rikreh tout ap ko yek lab, oun bistreh vitar gar ko vavar lab. Koon djivell o Debleha, rikrell pes ap kova lauter." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Leskro gosvepen krell o goseves zorleder har deesh zorele pralstoune, kay an o foro garda denna." 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Kek mensho hi yaake an o čačepen tardo, te krell lo kokres lačo koova oun anell kek doosh ap peste." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 De či ap ko tselo rakepen, hoy i menshe rakrenna! Nay vals te shouneh, har tiro boudepaskro pral toute čingrell." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Tou djineh, boud kope čingral pral vavarende." 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Kova halauter kamom te hayvell i gosevo djiyeha. Me penom mange me kamau gosevo te vell. Oun me nay hayvom les gar. 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Lauter, hoy koy hi, hi phares te hayvell. Oun hoske kova yaake hi, djinell kek." 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Palle penom mange, tou hounte rodess boudeder, te hatsess vin, hoske čomone yaake hi. Yaake lom boud koova an i yak, te hayvap len. Kamom te djinap, vell o čilačepen dran o dinlepen oun o pre-phourdepen dran narvlepen?" 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Oun me hatsom čomone, hoy shoutleder hi har o merepen, – i djouvel, kay i morshen taprell; kolakro kamlepen hi har dorya, kolentsa len pandell li; lakre moussya, hoy le troul lende čivell hi har shelle. I morsh, kay mishto hi glan o Debleskre yaka, kova nay nashell peske latar; o dinelo vell latar tapedo." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Dik, penell o sikepaskro, kova hi, hoy hatsom vin, har dikom ap yek koova pal o vavar, te hayvap kava tselo koova feteder." 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Har rodom kate te kote, hatsom vin: Me nay hayvau gar halauter. Yek koova dikom: Mank zerya menshe hatsom yek morsh, kay his, har hounte vals lo. Savi djouvel hatsom me gar mank kol boud djouvyende." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Dik, kova kokres hatsom: O Devel kras o menshes yaake, te djivell lo an o čačepen; i menshe rodenn penge boud dromma, kay nay krenn le čilačepen." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Kay hi ko mensho, kay hi čačepah gosevo? Kay hi kova, kay hayvell te penell, hoske čomone yaake hi har kova hi? Dik i menshes an i yaka, palle nay peneh, hi lo gosevo oder gar. Te hi lo gosevo, palle dikell lo lačes ap i vavareste. Leskro gosvepen lell leskri rholi krik." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Te dan t'men sovel glan o baro Debleste, te shounenn ap kova, hoy o baro ray t'menge penell, palle rikrenn t'men ap kova!" 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Ma djan sik lestar krik! Ma krenn, hoy djoungeles hi glan leskre yaka! O baro ray nay krella, hoy yob kamella." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 An o baro rayeskro lab hi zorlepen, oun kek nay penell ap leste: Hoske kreh tou kova?" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Kova, kay rikrell pes ap o baro rayeskro lab, kova djal gar khetne kolentsa, kay hadenn pen pral o baro rayeste. O gosevo djinell, o tsiro vell, kay lenn le i phagi." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Lautereske, hoy i mensho krella, vell o tsiro, kay vell o čačepen pral leste vi-rakedo. Oun o mensheskro čilačepen hi phares ap leste čiddo." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Mer djinah gar, hoy vella. Koon nay penell menge, har halauter vella?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 O menshes hi kek zoor, te nay rikrell lo o phourdepen pre. Oun les hi kek zoor pral ko dives, kay merell lo. Ninna glan o kourepen nay nashell peske kek. Oun peskro čilačo koova nay lell gar o čilačes vin dran i bibarht." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Kova halauter dikom, oun lom halauter an o yak, hoy vell kerdo ap kay phoub, kay hadell pes yek pral o vavareste oun krell les bibarhtelo." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Oun pale dikom, har čilače menshe shoukar paskedo van. Oun kolla, kay o čačo koova kran, hounte moukan o Debleskro kheer, oun van bistedo an o foro. Kova hi ninna phares te hayvell." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Ko mensho, kay kras čilačo koova, lell gar sik pal kova peskri phagi. Doleske rikrenn pen i menshe gar pale, te krenn le pengro djoungelo koova doureder." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Ninna te djivell kova i lengsto djipen, kay krell sheel kope foullo koova, djinau me, te djal kolenge kokres mishto, kay djivenn o Debleha oun moukenn les lengro ray te vell." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 O čilačeske djal gar mishto. Oun yaake har i shatto gar rah koy hi, djivenn kolla gar rah, kay kamenn či o Deblestar te djinell." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Phares te hayvell hi kova, hoy hi kerdo ap kay phoub: Kote hi menshe kay djivenn an o čačepen, oun kolenge djal har i menshenge, kay djivenn i djoungelo djipen. Oun pale hi menshe koy, kay djivenn i foullo djipen, kolenge djal har te djivans le an o čačepen. Kote penom: Kova hi ninna phares te hayvell." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Doleske penau me: Men hounte vals i dji, hoy barhtelo hi. O mensheske dell či ap kay phoub, hoy feteder hi, har te rhal lo oun te piyell lo, oun te moukell lo les peske mishto te djal. Kova hi, hoy nay krah pash mari tseli boudi an maro djipen, hoy o Devel men das ap kay phoub." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Me kamom vin te hatsell, har te nay vau gosevo, oun lom halauter an o yak, hoy i menshe ap kay phoub krenna. Dives oun rati nay sovom gar." 
Ecclesiastes8:17 Oun me dikom halauter, hoy o Devel kras. Čačepah, i menshe nay hayvenn gar halauter, hoy yob kras ap kay phoub. Ninna te rodell o mensho phares, te hayvell lo ko koova, nay hatsell lo gar vin, hoske halauter yaake hi. Oun ninna o gosevo, te penell lo: “Me djinau les”, nay hatsell lo les gar vin." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Kova halauter lom ap miro dji, te hayvap kova: Čače oun goseve, oun halauter hoy yon krenna, hi an o Debleskro vast. Kek djinella, venn i vavar lačes ap leste? Venn le rhoyedo ap leste? Kova lauter vell diklo an ko tsiro, hoy vella." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Halauter hounte merenna. Kova djal yaake yekeske har ko vavareske, koleske, kay shounell ap o Debleste har koleske, kay kamell či o Deblestar te djinell, koleske, kay krell o lačepen oun koleske, kay krell o čilačepen, koleske, kay hi erligo oun koleske, kay hi pale-čiddo, koleske, kay rhačrell firhen o Debleske har koleske, kay rhačrell kek firhen leske. Yaake har o lačeske djal, yaake djal o čilačeske. Oun kova, kay dell pes sovel, koleske djal yaake har koleske, kay kamell pes gar sovel te dell." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Kova hi koy bibarht pash halauter, hoy djal ap kay phoub, te djal ko yekeske har ko vavareske djala. Oun koy pashel hi o dji o menshendar pherdo čilačepen oun pherdo dinlepen, yaake rah har yon djivenna; pal kova merenn le!" 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Kova, kay gomme djido hi, dikell ap ko tsiro, hoy vella. I djido djoukleske djal feteder har i moulo leveske." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 I djide djinenna, kay hounte merenn le, i moule djinenn či. Koleske, hoy le kran, vell len vitar bouder či. Bistedo hi le." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Har i menshe kaman len, oun har rhoyran le pen pral lende, oun har zilveran yon ap lende, kova lauter hi bouder gar koy. Len hi či bouder i menshentsa ap kay phoub khetne, oun koleha, hoy kerdo vell ap kay phoub." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Doleske rha tiro maro oun pi tiri mool i barhtelo djiyeha; kova kamell o Devel yaake toutar. 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Rib shoukar ripya oun čip soungepaskro djet ap tire balla! 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Mouk les touke mishto te djal an tiro djipen tiri romyah, kay tou kameh, yaake rah har tout kava djipen hi, hoy tout o Devel das, oun hoy yaake sik trouyel hi. Savi barht vas touke o Deblestar pash tiri tseli boudi, hoy tou hounte kress kate ap kay phoub." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Halauter, hoy touke glan o vast vell, te kress, kova kre o tselo djiyestar! Pash i moulende, kay tou ninna hounte djas, kote vell bouder či kerdo. Oun kek krell peske kote i shero, hoy nay krell lo, har nay djinell lo čomone, oun har nay vell lo gosevo." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Pale dikom, har ap kay phoub djala: O sikeder naashepaskro vell gar glanstounes an. O zorleder kourepaskro hi gar o feteder lourdo. Sikle menshe hi gar kolla, konen o boudeder rhapen hi. I goseve hi gar i bravele. Kova, kay čomone mishto hayvell, hi gar kova, kay an-diklo hi. O tsiro oun i barht penenn, har hakeneske djal." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Ninna djinell o mensho peskro tsiro gar, oun vell tapedo an o čilačo tsiro, hoy ap yek kopo pral leste perell, yaake har i mače tapedo venn an i netsa, oun i čirkle an pandle dorya." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ninna dikom ap kay phoub, hoy i gosevo kras, oun kova his mange bares:" 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Kote his i tikno foro, oun gar boud lourde his an ko foro. Oun palle vas i baro zorelo ray, oun čivas pes oun peskre lourden troul ko tselo foro trouyel, oun kras phoubyakre dromma, hoy djan ap o foreskre massurya, te djal lo an o foro dren." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Oun an ko foro his i čorvelo, gosevo morsh. Peskro gosvepah nay lals kova ko foro vin dran o vavareskro vast. Oun kek his koy, kay rakras leha oun poučas ko čorvelo morshes." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Kote penom mange: Ninna te hi o gosvepen feteder har o zorlepen, vell o čorveleskro gosvepen gar an-diklo, oun ap leskre laba vell gar shounlo." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 I gosevo rakepen, hoy kek golyah rakedo vas, hi boudeder moldo har i rayeskri bari gole mashkral i dinelendar." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 O gosvepen hi boudeder moldo har i zorelo rharo; oun yek dinelo koova krell boud lačo koova paash. 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Moule matsille an o soungepaskro djet krenn o lačo djet foulles. I tikno dinlepen nay krell o tselo gosvepen oun an-dikepen i menshestar paash. 
Ecclesiastes10:2 O goseveske penell leskro dji, te krell lo, hoy čačo hi. O dineleske penell leskro dji, te krell lo, hoy gar čačo hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 I narveleskro drom sikrell, har dinelo yob hi. Lauter penenn lestar: Havo narvelo hi lo!" 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Te vell o rayeskri rholi pral toute, palle ma dja toutar; yek kay hayvell te rikrell lo pes pale, rakrell yaake, te djal i rholi krik." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 I djoungelo koova dikom ap kay phoub, kova anenn i zorele pale te pale ap pende:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 I dineleske denn le peskri beshepaskri kote, kay i pralstoune beshenna, oun i bravele hounte beshenn pen ap i telstoune beshepangre." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Boudepangren dikom, kay ap graya beshde hi, oun pralstoune hounte nashan har boudepangre." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Koon i rheb vin hadella, nay perell koy dren. Oun koon i massouri khetne phagella, koles nay dandrell i sap." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Koon barra khetne phagella, kova nay doukrell pes koy pashel. Oun kova, kay kasht tiknes krella, nay doukrell pes, te dell lo gar garda." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Te hi yekes i tover, hoy činell bouder gar, hounte boudrell yob peskri tseli zoryah. Te hi lo gosevo, dikell lo palla, te činell o tover mishto." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 I morshes, kay hayvell mishto o sapeha te rakrell, hi či kolestar, te vell yob dandedo, glan te dourkras lo o sap." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 O rakepen hoy dran o goseveskro mouy vin vella, anell leske an-dikepen, o dineleskro rakepen rhal les pre." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Hako lab, hoy penell lo, hi foun glanstounes bis palstounes dinelo rakepen." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Ko dinelo krell boud laba oun hayvas gar, kay kek mensho djinella, har halauter vella. Oun kek nay penell leske, hoy pal leste vella." 
Ecclesiastes10:15 I boudi krell o dineles khino, oun yob djinell gar, har te hatsell lo o drom an o foro." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Djungeles djal i menshenge an i them, koleskro baro ray i čavo hi, oun kay i pralstoune taysarlakro rhapangre hi!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Barhtelo hi ko them, kay o baro ray i an-diklo morsh hi, oun i pralstoune an o čačo tsiro lačes rhana, har an-dikle morsha oun gar har mate." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Te kamell yek gar te boudrell, perell leskro kheer khetne, oun o brishin vell dren." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Kones rhapen hi, nay sal. Koon mool piyell, nay givell. I loventsa nay vell tout kova halauter." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Ma praase o baro rayes, vitar gar an tiro dji! Oun ma praase i braveles, vitar gar an tiro čiben, kay tou tout pasheh. I tikno čirklo nay shounals tout, oun penals doureder, hoy penal." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Vitse tiro maro ap o pani; oun tou hatseh les pale pal boud divessa. 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Phage tiro maro an kotya, oun de les efta, orhta menshenge; tou djineh gar, havi bibarht vell pral kay phoub." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Te hi i volke pherdo pani, palle denn le brishin ap i phoub. Oun te perell i rouk – nay vell ap i čači rig, nay vell ap i servi rig – kote kay lo perella, kote ačell lo čiddo." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Koon ap o phourdepen garda della, ko čivell kek djob an i phoub, te vell kova baro. Oun koon ap i volke garda della, ko anell gar o baro djob an peskro kheer dren." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Tou djineh gar havo drom o phourdepen djala, oun har i kokale kerdo venna an i dakro per. Yaake nay djineh tou vitar gar, hoy o Devel halauter krella, oun har yob halauter krella." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Doleske čip o djob taysarla an i phoub, oun mouk gar tele bis an i rati. Tou djineh gar, hoy bares vella, kava te kova, oder hake douy." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Shoukar hi menge, te dikas i momeli. Oun mare yakentsa hi mishto, te dikenn le o kham." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 I mensho, te djivell lo boud bersha, mou vell lo barhtelo pral hako bersh, kay djivell lo. Mou bistrell lo gar, te venn kale divessa. Ninna kolla hi boud. Halauter, hoy vella, hi menge khatedo." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Terno morsh, mouk tiro dji te givell an tire terne bersha! Ab barhtelo yaake rah, har terno hal. Kre, hoy tiro dji touke penella oun tire yakentsa mishto hi; oun biste gar, te vell i dives, kay rakrell o Devel o čačepen vin pral toute oun halauter, hoy kral." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Dja koleske dran o drom, hoy anell touke rholi oun douka. Ko tsiro, kay hal i čavo oun i terno morsh, hi sik trouyel." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Yaake rah har terno hal, ma biste koles, kay tout kras! Oun djin, te venn kol čilače divessa oun kol bersha, kay tou peneh: “Yon hi mange gar mishto”!" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Palle hi touke, har te vals o kham tamlo, ninna o čon oun o bolepangre momlia. Oun pal hako brishin, venn pale neve volke." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Palle trissenn tire moussya, hoy yaake zorelo his. Oun tire herya, hoy hidjran tout, len hi bouder kek zoor. I danda perenn touke vin, yek pal o vavar. Tire yaka dikenn bouder gar mishto," 
Ecclesiastes12:4 oun tire kanda shounenn bouder gar mishto. Te deh tou gole, hi kaya har i čirklengro ropen. Oun tou hayveh bouder gar te givell." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Tout hi traash glan i treppa. Oun ap o drom nay pereh. Tire balla venn parno. Oun tou tserdeh tout yek rigyatar ap i vavar. Tout hi bouder gar boud bok. O mensho hounte djal peske kote, kay ačell lo hako tsiro. Oun i vavar paskrenn les oun rovenn ap o drom." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Maro djipen hi har i roupeni verkli, hoy perell an kotya, har i sonakaskro čaro, hoy phagell, har o khoro, hoy djal an kotya pash i brounna, oun har o shello, hoy djal paash, te tserdeh pani dran i brounna pre." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 O mensho vell pale phoub, kolatar yob kerdo vas. Oun o dourho hounte djal pale pash o Debleste, kay das o dourhes o mensheste." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Halauter hi čičeske, penell o sikepaskro, čičeske hi halauter." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Kava koova ačell oun hounte vell penlo: O sikepaskro his i gosevo morsh oun penas i menshenge čače laba. Yob moukas peske boud goseve laba an o shero trouyel te djal. Yob rodas, hoy kaman le te penell oun činas len tele." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Yob rodas, te hatsell lo kamle laba. Oun yob činas pre, har čomone čačepah hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 I laba, hoy i goseve rakrenna, hi har soubya. Oun kova, hoy le penenn, djal dour an o mensheskro dji. Kova, kay rakras len, hi har i bakrengro, kay dell garda ap peskre bakre." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Miro čavo, koy hi i vavar koova, hoy hounte djiness: Yek, kay kamell lila te činell, las pes boud phari boudi glan. Oun yek, kay kamell boud te hayvell oun te djinell, vell khino." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Kova lauter, hoy kate penlo vas, hi khetne lino kova: Shoun ap o Debleste oun rike leskre laba! Kova molell i tsele menshenge." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 O Devel rakrell o čačepen vin pral halauter, hoy kram, ko lačo oun ko čilačo koova, ninna te hi kova kanna khatedo." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Kate hi i shoukester gili, činlo o Salomeske." 
SongOfSongs1:2 Ab oun čoumme man! Tiro kamlepen hi lačeder har mool. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Tiro soungepaskro djet soungell yaake lačo. Hakeno prindjrell tout. I tsele ča kamenn tout. 
SongOfSongs1:4 Le miro vast, tradas men! Miro pirno mou anell man khere pash peste! Mer kamah khetne te sanell oun barhteles te vell. Tiro kamlepen hi mange shoukeder har mool. Kol čen hi čačo, kay tout kamenna." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Kales hom oun shoukar hom, t'mer ča dran o foro Yerusalem, kalo har i plarhtene khera an o them Kedar oun har o Salomeskre stakepangre." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Ma dikenn tele ap mande, har kalo hom! O kham rhačas man kales. Mire phrala his rhoyedo ap mande, oun kaman te dap garda ap i drakengre rouka. Ap miro shoukapen nay dom kek garda." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Tou, koles miro dji kamell, pen mange, kay aneh tire bakre, te rhan le? Kay besheh tou tout tele mashkral o dives? Te nashap gar trouyel mank i bakre, te rodap tout pash i vavar bakrengre!" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Djineh tou kova gar, tou shoukester mank i djouvyende, palle dja vin, oun naash pal i bakre oun le tire tikne bouzya touha, te rhan le pash o plarhtene khera, kay i bakrengre djivenn!" 
SongOfSongs1:9 Tou, miri pirni, hal shoukar har i gray glan o vourdin o baro rayestar an o them Egiptia." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Tire čamya hi shoukar mank i kanengre, oun tiri meen hi shoukar an verklia dran mirklia." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Sonakangre verklia kamah mer touke te krell, kay roupene mirklia dren hi." 
SongOfSongs1:12 Miro pirno, miro ray, his čiddo ap peskro čiben, oun miro soungepaskro djet soungas lačes." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Miro pirno hi mange har i tikno gono pherdo soungepaskro kasht, čiddo ap miro beč." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Har i divye bloume mank i drakengre rouka an En-Gedi hi lo mange. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Har shoukar tou hal, miri pirni, tou hal yaake shoukar, tire yaka hi har taube." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Oun tou, miro pirno, har shoukar hal tou! Har kreh man barhtelo! Maro čiben hi an o zenlepen." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Shoukar zorele rouka hi maro kheer, oun rouka boud zenele patyentsa krenn pen bourhles pral mende." 
SongOfSongs2:1 I tikni blouma hom me, har hi le tardo ap o telstouno them Sharon, i lilya an i tala." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Ava, har i lilya – i lilya mank i soubyengre bourra, yaake hi miri pirni mank i čende." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Har i phabyengro rouk mank i divye rouka an o veesh, yaake hi miro pirno mank i terne morshende. Barhteles hom beshdo an leskro shatto, oun leskre phabya hi goudlo mange." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Yob anas man an o molyengro kheer, oun čakras man peskro kamlepah." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Krenn man pale zoreles drakentsa, denn man nevi zoor phabyentsa! Miro kamlepen touke krell man nasselo." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Leskro servo vast hi tel miro shero čiddo, oun leskro čačo vast taprell man trouyel." 
SongOfSongs2:7 T'mer ča dran o foro Yerusalem, i vesheskre bouzya oun i tserfe shounenn, har mangau t'men: Moukenn men kokres yaake rah har khetne ham, bis te stah pre." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Miro pirno dell gole pal mande! Dik, oke vell lo, oun stell pral i bare oun tikne berge." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Miro pirno hi har i terni vesheskri bouzni har i terno tserfo. Kate hi lo! Pal maro kheer! Oun dikell an i vorhni, mank i kashta dren." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Miro pirno dell pal mande gole: Ste pre, miri pirni, miri shoukester, oun ab!" 
SongOfSongs2:11 Dik, o vend hi bouder gar, oun o brishin djas peske." 
SongOfSongs2:12 I bloume djan pre an o them, O tsiro o gipaske hi koy, oun i čirkle moukenn pen te shounell an maro them." 
SongOfSongs2:13 I fayge venn baro ap o rouk, oun i drakengre rouka soungenna yaake goudlo. Ste pre, miri pirni, miri shoukester, oun ab mantsa!" 
SongOfSongs2:14 Miri tauba, ma khate tout glan mande, har i čirklo khatrell pes mank i bare barra, an o khatepen ap i berge! Mouk man tout te dikell, mouk man tout te shounell! Goudlo hi tiro rakepen, oun kamles dikeh tou vin." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Taprenn menge i divye djoukle, kol tikne divye djoukle, hoy krenn o molyengro them paash! Mare drakengre rouka hidjrenn knospe." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Miro pirno hi miro, oun me hom leskri. Yob hatsell peskri barht mank i lilya." 
SongOfSongs2:17 O dives te vell shila, oun o kham djal tele, ab pash mande, miro pirno! Ab sik har i vesheskri bouzni, har i terno tserfo ap i barrengre berge!" 
SongOfSongs3:1 Ap miro čiben an i ratsya rodom les, koles miro dji kamell, me rodom les oun hatsom les gar." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Kamau pre te stell, kamau an o foro te nashell, ap i dromma oun ap i platse kamau les te rodell, koles miro dji kamell. Me rodom les oun hatsom les gar." 
SongOfSongs3:3 I lourde hatsan man, kolla, kay ap o foro garda denna oun kote trouyel djan: Dikan t'mer les, koles miro dji kamell?" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Har me lendar i tikno kotar doureder djom, hatsom les, koles miro dji kamell. Me taprom leskro vast, oun moukom les bouder gar mandar te djal, lom les khere pash mande, an miri dakri isema, kay boldo vom." 
SongOfSongs3:5 T'mer ča dran o foro Yerusalem, i vesheskre bouzya oun i tserfe shounenn, har mangau t'men: Moukenn men kokres, yaake rah har khetne ham, bis te stah pre." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Koon hi kolla, kay venn pre dran o moulo tato them, har i yagakro dourho, hoy pre djal, te vell soungepaskro koova rhačedo? Lačo khand vell pash mende, dran ko soungepaskro koova, hoy i parepangre anenn." 
SongOfSongs3:7 Dikenn mishto kote! Kova hi o Salomeskro čiben! Shob-deesh čače morsha hi troul leste, kol zorleder morshendar an Israel." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Lače kourepangre hi le halauter, oun hayvenn mishto te kourenn le pen o rhareha. Hakeno lendar hidjrell peskro rharo ap i rig, te kourell lo pes koleha, kay čorrhanes nay vell an i rati." 
SongOfSongs3:9 O baro ray Salomo moukas pes kava čiben te krell dran kouč kasht," 
SongOfSongs3:10 i pire dran roup, o palstouno kotar dran sonakay, oun i pernitse dran lolo than, shoukar khetne sido kamlepah i djouvyendar an o foro Yerusalem." 
SongOfSongs3:11 T'mer ča dran o foro Yerusalem, avenn vin! T'mer ča dran Sion dikenn o baro rayes, o Salomes! Dikenn leskri rayeskri stadi, hoy leskri day leske ap o shero čivas, ap ko dives, kay lo romedineras, oun leskro dji i barhtyatar bashras." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Har shoukar hal tou, heyo! har shoukar hal! Tire yakentsa dikeh lačes vin har i tauba pal tiro diklo! Tire balla hi har kale bouzya, kay stenn tele i berga Gilead." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Tire danda hi parno har bakre, kay van neves činlo oun thodo. Tire tsele danda hi shoukar tardo; oun i tsele pralstoune danda oun telstoune danda hi koy." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Har i loli dori hi tiro mouy, oun tiro rakepen hi kamlo. Lolo har i phabi hi tire čamya pal tiro diklo." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Har o Davideskro turmo, barra ap barra pre-čiddo, oun zerya shilte an-pandlo, yaake shoukar hi tiri meen kol verkyentsa, hoy hi trouyel pandlo yek pral o vavar." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Tire douy čoučya hi har douy terne vesheskre bouzya, kay hi čiddo mank i lilya." 
SongOfSongs4:6 O dives te djal peske oun i rati vell, kamau pash tire berge te djal, hoy yaake lačo soungenna." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Halauter ap toute hi shoukar, heyo! Oun kek djounglepen hi ap toute." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Ab mantsa, miri pirni! Mouk o Libanon, ab mantsa! Ab tele i berge, kay hi yaake dour mandar, – kol berge Amana, Senir oun Hermon! Naash krik kotar, kay i leve djivenn, oun i bare divye margodje pen khatrenn!" 
SongOfSongs4:9 Tou čoral mange miro dji, heyo, miri pirni. Tou čoral mange miro dji tire yakentsa, har dikal ap mande, oun yek verkliah, hoy troul tiri meen pandlo hi." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Har shoukar hi tiro kamlepen, heyo, miri pirni! Har boud kope shoukeder hi tiro kamlepen har mool! Oun tiro soungepaskro djet hi feteder har i tsele vavar lače djeta." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Miri pirni, tire čoumma hi har gvin, goudlo har gvin oun thoud. Oun tire koola, hoy ap toute hi, soungenna lačes har o Libanon soungella." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Heyo, miri pirni, tou hal har i baar, kay o voudar pandlo hi, ava har i baar, har i brounna pandlo i tsele vavarenge." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Har i baar hal tou pherde rouka goudle phabyentsa, oun roukengre, hoy mishto soungenna, oun o rhapen lačes krenna: Henna oun Narda, Safrano, goudlo soungepaskro khass oun cinnamome, encens, myrrhe oun aloe, halauter lače kashta oun patria." 
SongOfSongs4:14  
SongOfSongs4:15 I pani, hoy an i baar nashella hal tou, i djido pani, hoy dran o Libanon tele nashella." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Ab, tou phourdepen, ab foun serves oun ab foun čačes, oun phourde an miri baar, te djal o lačo soungepen an miri baar pre! Miro pirno mou vell an peskri baar, oun rhal lakre lače phabya!" 
SongOfSongs5:1 Me vau an miri baar, heyo, miri pirni. Oun lau mire soungepaskre roukengre, kashta oun patria. Oun rhau miro goudlo gvin, oun piyau miri mool oun miro thoud. Rhan, mala, oun piyenn! Oun venn mate an t'maro kamlepen!" 
SongOfSongs5:2 Me sovom, miro dji his djangelo. Shoun, miro pirno dell ap o voudar: Kre mange pre, heyo, miri pirni, miri tauba, miri goudli! Mire balla hi sapeno." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Rivom miro ripen vin, hoske te rivap les kanna pale an? Thovom mire pire, hoske te krap len kanna pale čikles?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Miro pirno čivas peskro vast an o voudareskri vorhni, oun halauter, hoy an mande hi, kamas pash leste." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Me stom pre, te krap miro pirneske o voudar pre, oun mire vasta his pherdo soungepaskro djet. O djet nashas mire goushte tele, har len ap i pandepaskri čivom." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Me krom o voudar miro pirneske pre, koy hi lo bouder gar koy – djas peske doureder. Miro dji kamas tardo te ačell, har djas yob peske. Me rodom les, oun hatsom les gar. Me kharom les, oun shounom kek rakepen lestar." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Koy hatsan man kol morsha, kay denn garda an o foro oun kay kote trouyel nashenn. Yon dan man dava oun doukan man. Kal morsha tserdan i plaashka mandar tele." 
SongOfSongs5:8 T'mer ča dran Yerusalem, mangau t'men o tselo djiyestar: Te hatsenn t'mer miro pirnes, penenn leske, kay nasselo hom pal leste, yaake boud kamau les." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Hoske hi tiro pirno feteder har vavar morsha? Pen kova menge, tou shoukester mashkral i djouvyende! Hoske hi tiro pirno feteder har vavar morsha, te mangeh tou mendar yaake zoreles kava koova?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Miro pirno hi sasto oun zorelo, kokres yek mank zeryende hi har yob." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Leskro shero hi shoukar har dran lačeder sonakay. Leskre balla hi čiddo har bakrengro baal, oun hi kalo har i korako." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Leskre yaka hi har taube pash i panya, – taube, kay hi yaake biyalo har thoud oun beshdo kote, kay boud pani hi." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Leskre čamya soungenna mishto har i phoub, kay soungepaskre bourra tardo hi. Leskre vushte hi har lilya, sapeno lačo djeteha." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Leskre goushte hi har dran sonakay, Ap lende hi goustria kouč barrentsa. Yob hi har i kouč figura dran elefantikro dand, shoukar kerdo kouč blauete barrentsa." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Leske herya hi har dran parno marmor, zoreles tardo ap pire dran sonakay. Baro hi lo har o Libanon, zorelo har i cedertikre rouka." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Leskro rakepen hi goudlo, oun halauter ap leste hi kamlo. Kova hi miro pirno; ava, kova hi miro maal, t'mer ča dran o foro Yerusalem!" 
SongOfSongs6:1 Kay djas kanna tiro pirno koy, tou shoukester mashkral i djouvyende? Havo drom nashas tiro pirno, te nay rodas les touha?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Miro pirno djas tele an peskri baar, kote, kay i soungepaskre bourra tardo hi, te vell lo barhtelo koy, oun te lell lo peske lilya khetne." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Miro pirno hi miro, oun me hom leskri. Yob hatsell peskri barht mank i lilya." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Shoukar hal tou, miri pirni, har ko rayeskro foro Tirza, oun kamlo har ko foro Yerusalem. Te dikau tout, ačell mange o rakepen krik." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Ma dik yaake ap mande! Tire yaka krenn man dineles! Tire balla hi har i kale bouzya, kay stenn tele i berga Gilead." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Tire danda hi parno har bakre, kay venn vin kotar, kay le thodo van. Tire tsele danda hi shoukar tardo, oun i tsele pralstoune danda oun telstoune danda hi koy." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Lolo har i phabi hi tire čamya pal tiro diklo. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Shob-deesh romya hi o baro rayes, oun orhta-deesh vavar djouvya, oun yaake boud ča, te nay djinell kek, kitse yon hi." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Yek kokres hi miri tauba, miri goudli. Lakri dat hi kek vavar čay. Lake hi li i lačeder čay. I vavar ča dikan lat oun penan: Har barhteli hi li! O baro rayeskre romya oun vavar djouvya dikan lat oun sharan lakro shoukapen." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Dikenn kolat, kay stell pre har o nevo dives, shoukar har o čon hi li, oun djoudjo har o kham! Koon dikell lat, koleske ačell o rakepen krik." 
SongOfSongs6:11 An i roukengro baar djom tele, te dikap, har i rouka zenelo venn, oun har i drakengre rouka neve patria lenn, oun har i phabyengre rouka tikne phabya hidjrenn." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Hoy djal mantsa? Miro dji nashell pal toute, har te djoms an o rayeskro vourdin." 
SongOfSongs7:1 Risse tout trouyel, risse tout trouyel, Sulamit! Risse tout pash mende, te nay dikas tout! Hoy kamenn t'mer ap i Sulamit te dikell, har khelell li mank i vavarende?" 
SongOfSongs7:2 Har shoukar hi tire pire an tire kirrha, tou čay i pralstunestar! Tire herya hi shoukar har i verkli troul tiri meen, kerdo yekestar, kay hayvas, hoy lo kras." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Tiro gali hi har i čaro, kay hako tsiro mool dren hi. oun har i berga sonakaskro djob. Oun lilya hi koy trouyel tardo." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Tiro beč hi har terne vesheskre bouzya. 
SongOfSongs7:5 Tiri meen hi har i turmo dran elefantikre danda. Tire yaka hi har kol tikne panya an o foro Heshbon pash o voudar Bat-Rabbim. Tiro nak hi har ko turmo ap o Libanon, hoy dikell ap o foro Damaskus." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Har i berga Karmel rikreh tiro shero pral. Oun tire balla hi har feteder phar. Tiro baro ray hi pandlo an lengro shoukapen. 
SongOfSongs7:7 Har shoukar hal tou, har kamlo! Tou hal kaya, kay miri barht hi." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Baro har i palma hal tou. oun tire čoučya hi har drake. 
SongOfSongs7:9 Me kamau pre te djal ap koy palma oun taprau pal lakre patria. Tire čoučya mou venn mange har drake ap i drakengro rouk! Oun tiro dourho soungell har phabya. 
SongOfSongs7:10 Tire čoumma hi mange har i lači mool, hoy nashell pral miro mouy oun mire danda." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Me hom miro pirneskri pirni, oun pal mande nashell leskro dji." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Ab, miro pirno, te djas mer vin glan o foro, oun ačah pral i rati mank i divye bloume." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Taysarlake nashah menge kote, kay i drakengre rouka tardo hi, te dikas, har venn le zenelo oun hidjrenn bloume, oun har i phabyengre rouka tikne phabya hidjrenn. Kote dau tout miro kamlepen." 
SongOfSongs7:14 I kamlepaskre phabya soungenna mishto. Oun pash maro voudar hi lauter lačo koova, nevo oun phouro koova, kay me, miro pirno, touke pre garom." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Kamoms te vals mange har i phraal, i čavo miri datar! Hatsoms tout kaymone vin, nay čoumroms tout, oun kek nay vals rhoyedo ap mande." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Me loms tout pash o vast, oun anoms tout khere pash mande, an miri dakri isema, kay boldo vom. Me doms tout miri feteder mool, oun miri phabyengri mool." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Leskro servo vast hi tel miro shero čiddo, oun leskro čačo vast taprell man trouyel." 
SongOfSongs8:4 T'mer ča dran o foro Yerusalem, me mangau t'men o djiyestar: Moukenn men kokres, yaake rah har khetne ham, bis te stah pre." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Koon hi koya, kay vell pre dran o moulo tato them, moussi an moussi peskri pirneha? Tel o phabyengro rouk djangrom tout, kote, kay tiri day touha vavarčandes vas, oun tou boldo val." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Čin miro lab ap tiro dji! Mouk man har i goustri ap tiro vast te vell! Te kamenn pen douy, hi lengro kamlepen zoreles har o merepen, oun rikrell len pandles har o moulengro them. Len hi i dji yek o vavareske, hoy rhačell zoreles har i yag o baro Deblestar." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Ninna boud panya nay krenn o kamlepen gar vin, oun i zorele panya nay hidjrenn o kamlepen gar krik. Te kamals yek o kamlepen te ginell, oun dals peskro tselo bravlepen koleske, sans i menshe les vin." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Men hi i tikni pheen, koy hi yaake terno, te nay romedinerell li gar, Hoy te kras mari phenyah ap ko dives, kay vell yek te romedinerell lo lat?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Te hi li har i massouri, krah lat shoukar kouč roupeha. Te hi li har i voudar, pandah ko voudar zorele činle kashtentsa." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Me hom i massouri, oun mire čoučya hi har turme. Doleske dikell lo ap mande har ap yekate, kay anell leske barht." 
SongOfSongs8:11 O Salomes hi i kotar phoub ap i berga Baal-Hermon, Kote hi drakengre rouka tardo. Koy kotar them das lo kol harhende an i vasta. Hakeno lendar hounte playsrals i drakenge, hoy bikrals lo, i zero kotya roup." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Salomo, tout nay vell kol zero kotya roup, oun douy-sheel nay venn i harhen! Man hi miro kotar them mire drakentsa!" 
SongOfSongs8:13 Tou, kay hal beshdo an i baar, de man gole pash toute! Mire mala hi koy oun kamenn tout te shounell." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Naash, miro pirno! Ab sik har i vesheskri bouzni oun har i terno tserfo ap i berge, kay i bourra tardo hi, hoy soungenna lačo." 
Isaiah1:1 Kova hi, hoy moukas o baro Devel o morshes Yesaya te dikell pral o them Youda oun pral o foro Yerusalem. O Yesaya his o čavo ko morshestar Amoz. Kova his an ko tsiro, kay his o Usiya, o Yotam, o Ahas, oun o Hiskiya i bare raya pral o them Youda." 
Isaiah1:2 Tou, o bolepen, oun tou, i phoub, shounenn, hoy me, o baro Devel, penau: Me tserdom čaven bares. Oun har yon baro van, phagan le mantsa." 
Isaiah1:3 Haki groumni prindjrell koles, koneske yoy hi. Oun haki bourika djinell koy platsa, kay lakro ray dell lat te rhal. O Israel prindjrell kova gar. Mire menshe hayvenn kova gar." 
Isaiah1:4 T'menge djal djoungelo, t'mer čilače menshe, kay anan yaake boud doosh ap t'mende! T'mer han bede, čave, kay molenn či! T'mer moukan o baro Debles, kamenn či bouder te djinell o Israeleskro Deblestar, kay kokres o Devel hi, oun sikran leske t'maro doumo." 
Isaiah1:5 Han gomme gar doha dino? Hoske rikrenn t'mare djia pandlo oun djan doureder ap t'maro čilačo drom? T'maro tselo shero hi pherdo doukepen, oun t'maro tselo dji hi nasselo." 
Isaiah1:6 Foun o shero bis pash i pire hi kek kotar ap t'mende, hoy sasto vals. T'maro mass hi pherdo doukepen, phouro oun nevo doukepen, kay dino van. T'maro činepen hi gar vi-thodo, vitar gar dren pandlo. Kek djet vas pre čiddo." 
Isaiah1:7 T'maro them hi i moulo them, t'mare forya van tele rhačedo. Glan t'mare yaka rhan i vi-themarya kova, hoy ap t'mari phoub bares vas. Lauter hi moulo oun paash, har te perans i divye koy pral." 
Isaiah1:8 Kokres o foro Yerusalem ačas pral, i foro troul koleste i lourde tardo hi. Ko foro hi kokres har i tikno kheer an i drakengro them, har i kheer, kay yek yak dell an i rati ap kova, hoy ap peskri phoub bares vell." 
Isaiah1:9 Te moukals o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, gar mendar pral, djals menge har i foryenge Sodom oun Gomorra." 
Isaiah1:10 T'mer raya dran Sodom, shounenn o lab o baro Deblestar! T'mer menshe dran Gomorra, shounenn, hoy kamell maro Devel t'menge te penell!" 
Isaiah1:11 “Hoy krap me kol tsele firhentsa, hoy t'mer mange anenn”, poučell o baro Devel. “Man hi doha t'mare bakrendar, hoy mange rhačran, hom čalo ko thulepastar i pesse groumyendar. Ko rat i morshkane groumyendar oun tikne bakrendar oun bouzyendar kamau me gar." 
Isaiah1:12 Te venn t'mer glan mande, glan miro kheer, stakrenn t'mer i platsa glan miro kheer khetne. Koon penas t'menge te krenn t'mer kova?" 
Isaiah1:13 Ma anenn bouder kek rhapen rhačepaske! Kova hi čičeske. Ma rhačrenn mange bouder kek soungepaskro koova! Man hi o nak doha. T'mer venn mange khetne ap o nevo čon, ap o Debleskro dives oun ap vavar bare divessa. Kova hi mange gar mishto, yaake rah har moukenn t'mer gar t'maro djoungelo koova." 
Isaiah1:14 Kol bare divessa, kay t'mer rikrenn, te vell i nevo čon, oun ninna i vavar bare divessa nay dikau gar bouder. Yon van mange phares te hidjrap len, oun me vom khino tel lende." 
Isaiah1:15 Oun te hadenn t'mer t'mare vasta pre, te mangenn man an, palle čakrau me mire yaka tele, te dikap t'men gar. Oun ninna te mangenn mandar pale te pale, me shounau t'men gar: T'mare vasta hi pherdo rat." 
Isaiah1:16 Thovenn t'men, krenn t'men djoudjo! Anenn t'maro čilačo koova, hoy kran, dran mire yaka krik. Moukenn o čilačepen!" 
Isaiah1:17 Dikenn, har te krenn o lačepen, denn yak, te lell hakeno peskro čačepen. Avenn ap i rig kolenge, kay tele rikedo venn. Kol čave, kolen kek day oun kek dad hi, kolenge krenn o čačepen vin. Oun kol djouvya, kolenge o rom meras, kolengro koova lenn an t'maro vast!”" 
Isaiah1:18 “Avenn”, penell o baro Devel, “te kras men tel mende o čačepen vin! Te hi i doosh, hoy t'mer ap t'mende anan yaake lolo har o rat, palle vell li parno, yaake parno har gib. Oun te hi li lolo har i jag, palle vell li yaake parno har o bakrengro bal." 
Isaiah1:19 Kamenn t'mer ap mande te shounell? Palle nay rhan t'mer o tselo lačepen, hoy o them vin anell." 
Isaiah1:20 Kamenn t'mer gar te shounell, oun pandenn t'mare djia glan mande, palle venn o rhareha moulo dino. Kova penau me, o baro Devel!”" 
Isaiah1:21 Har nay vas kova? Kava foro, hoy rikras pes ap mande peskro tselo djiyeha, vas har i loubni! O foro his pherdo čačepen, oun i menshe djivan pal o Debleskre čačepaskre laba. Oun kanna djivenn kate lauter marepangre, kay vavaren moulo denn!" 
Isaiah1:22 Tou Yerusalem, hals har djoudjo roup, kanna val har čik, hoy roupenes vin dikell. Tou hals har lači mool, kanna hal har mool, kay pani dren hi." 
Isaiah1:23 Tire pralstoune hadan pen pral mande oun djan khetne i čorepangre. Oun hakeno lendar moukell pes te ginell. Oun kol čave, kolen kek day oun kek dad hi, kolenge krenn le kek čačepen vin. Oun ko koova kol djouvyendar, kolengro rom meras, moukenn le gar glan pende te vell." 
Isaiah1:24 Doleske penell o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, kay hi o Israeleskro zorelo Devel: Dikenn t'men glan! Me dau t'men pale, hoy ap mande kran, t'men, kay kamenn man gar. Miri bari rholi vell pral t'mende, kay krenn lauter vavarčandes, har me kamau." 
Isaiah1:25 Yerusalem, miro vast hadau ap toute, te dap tout, te rhačap i čik toutar vin, har kova o roupeha kerdo vell, yaake te ačell o lačo roup pale." 
Isaiah1:26 Me dau tout pale čačepangre morshen oun rakepangren, kay o čačepen vin krenn, yaake har an i phoure tsirya his. Oun palle kharenn le tout čačepaskro foro oun foro kolendar, kay ap o Debleste patsenna." 
Isaiah1:27 T'mer menshe an Sion, te djivenn pale pal o čačepen, oun djan pale ap o Debleskro drom, playsrom t'menge, te venn vin lino dran o pandepen." 
Isaiah1:28 Khetne phagedo venn kolla, kay o Debleskro dromestar tele djan, khetne kolentsa, kay doosh ap pende anan. Oun kolla, kay o baro Debles moukan, hounte merenn." 
Isaiah1:29 T'mer, kay mangan i bare rouka an, hounte ladjenn t'men koleske. Ava, t'mer venna lolo an o mouy dran ladj pral kol vavar deblen, hoy rodan vin oun mangan len an ap lengre shoukar platse." 
Isaiah1:30 Oun t'mer kokres venn har i rouk, koleskre patria bouder gar zenelo hi, oun har i baar, an kolate kek pani bouder hi." 
Isaiah1:31 Oun ko morsh, hoy zorelo his har i rouk, vell har moulo kasht. Oun ko zorelo koova, hoy lo kras, vell har i yag, hoy ko moulo kasht pre rhačell. Yaake djal lauter an i yag pre, oun kek nay krell koy yag vin." 
Isaiah2:1 Kava hi, hoy dikas o Yesaya, pral o them Youda oun o foro Yerusalem. Leskro dad hi o Amoz." 
Isaiah2:2 Vell i tsiro, koy hi koy berga, kay o baro Debleskro kheer tardo hi, bareder har i tsele vavar berge, oun dikell tele ap i tsele tikne berge. Oun i menshe dran boud themma nashenn pash kay berga,"
