Isaiah65:21 Yon čivenn penge khera pre tardo, oun djivenn dren. Oun yon čivenn penge drakengre rouka an i phoub oun rhan lengre drake." 
Isaiah65:22 Yon čivenn kek kheer pre tardo, oun i vavar djivell palle dren. Oun yon čivenn či an i phoub, oun i vavar rhal les palle. Yaake phouro i rouk vell, yaake phouro venn ninna mire menshe. Oun mire vi-rodede menshe venn i rah tsiro barhteles pral kova, hoy lengre vasta kran." 
Isaiah65:23 Yon boudrenn gar čičeske, oun lengre čave venn gar boldo, te merenn le sik. Yon hi menshe, ap kolende o baro Debleskri barht čiddo hi, – ap lende, ninna ap lengre čavende." 
Isaiah65:24 Oun kava vell yaake: Yon dan gomme gar gole, koy dom man glan, oun yon rakrenn gomme, koy shounau me." 
Isaiah65:25 O divyo djouklo oun o terno bakro rhan khetne yek pash o vavar. Oun o levo rhal phouss har i groumni, oun o sap hounte rhal čik. Kek krell čomone, hoy douka anell, vitar či, hoy čilačo hi ap miri tseli berga, kay djivau, penell o baro Devel." 
Isaiah66:1 O baro Devel penell: O bolepen hi miri rayli beshepaskri, oun i phoub i tikno banko, kay me mire herya pre čivau. Havo kheer kamenn t'mer mange pre te čivell, An havo kheer kamenn t'mer, te djivap?" 
Isaiah66:2 Me, o baro Devel, krom miro vasteha kova lauter, hoy koy hi. Oun me dikau kamles ap koleste, kay hi tele rikedo oun phagedo an peskro dji, oun kay darell glan miro lab." 
Isaiah66:3 Kova, kay mange i gouroum marell, marell ninna i menshes i rhorheno debleske. Kova, kay mange i terno bakro temerl dell, marell ninna i djoukles i rhorheno debleske. Kova, kay mange rhapen glan anell, anell ninna balengro rat i rhorheno debleske. Kova, kay mange soungepaskro koova rhačrell, parkrell pes ninna pash i rhorheno debleste. Yon djan pengre dromma yaake har yon les kamenna. Oun shoukar hi an lengre yaka, hoy an mire yaka djoungeles hi." 
Isaiah66:4 Doleske hi mange shoukar, te anap len an i bibarht. Oun anau kova pral lende, glan leste yon yaake darenna. Me dom ap lende gole, oun kek shounas oun kek rakras pale. Me dom len trad, oun kek das pre yak. Ava, yon kran kova, hoy an mire yaka čilačo hi, oun lenge his shoukar, te krenn le kova, hoy an mire yaka djoungelo hi." 
Isaiah66:5 Shounenn, hoy o baro Devel penell, t'mer, kay glan leskro lab darenna. T'mer rikrenn pash mande, doleske rhoyrenn pen t'mare phrala pral t'mende, oun čivenn t'men pale, oun praasenn t'men oun penenn: Mou sikrell o baro Devel peskro barepen oun peskri zoor, te dikas mer, har yob t'men barhteles krell! Kolla hounte ladjenn pen palle." 
Isaiah66:6 Shounenn i divyi gole dran o foro, i kourepaskri gole dran o Debleskro kheer! Shounenn, o baro Devel rakrell i phagi vin pral kolende, kay rhoyran les!" 
Isaiah66:7 Miro foro hi har i djouvel, kay las i ternepen kek bare doukentsa." 
Isaiah66:8 Koon shounas sau koova? Koon dikas sau koova? Vas i them ap yek dives boldo? Van lengre menshe ap yek dives ap i phoub? Yaake sik har i Sion douka las, anas li peskre čaven ap i phoub." 
Isaiah66:9 Me moukau gar yaake dour te vell, te kamell o ternepen vin te vell, oun palle moukau les gar, penell o baro Devel." 
Isaiah66:10 Avenn barhteles o foreha Yerusalem, oun givenn oun khelenn leske, t'mer lauter, kay les o djiyestar kamenn. Avenn barhteles leha, t'mer lauter, kay pral leste rovan." 
Isaiah66:11 Kanna nay venn t'mer čalo leskro bravlepastar, yaake har piyell pes i ternepen čalo pash peskri date, oun piyell barhteles yaake boud thoud har nay piyell lo." 
Isaiah66:12 Kava penell o baro Devel ap o foro Yerusalem: Dik, me moukau boud lačepen pral toute te vell har i lengsto pani. Oun o bravlepen dran vavar themma nashell an toute har i divyo pani. Me dau garda ap toute har i day ap peskro ternepen, hoy hidjrell li ap i vasta, oun čivell les ap peskre herya oun khelell leha." 
Isaiah66:13 Ava, yaake har i day peskro čaveske i sva tele khossell, yaake krau me les t'mentsa, oun khossau t'mare sva tele an o foro Yerusalem." 
Isaiah66:14 T'mer dikenn kova, oun t'mare djia givenna. Oun t'mer lenn nevi zoor, yaake har o zenlepen, te dell brishin. Oun i menshe dikenn, te hi o baro Debleskri zoor pash peskre boudepangre, oun leskri rholi ap kolende, kay shounenn gar ap leste." 
Isaiah66:15 Dik, o baro Devel vell an i yag, oun leskre vourdya hi har i zorelo phourdepen. Yob dell len lengro čilačepen pale i bari rholyah, oun leskro čingepen hi har yag, kay rhačrell." 
Isaiah66:16 I yagah oun peskro rhareha krell o baro Devel o čačepen vin pral i tsele menshende, oun boud lendar venn yaake maredo." 
Isaiah66:17 Kolla hi save, kay krenn pen djoudjo, te mangenn le i rhorheno debles an, hoy hi tardo mashkral ap i shoukar platsa. Kolla hi ninna save, kay rhan ko mass i balendar oun i kermuse oun vavar pale-čidde firhendar. Kolla lauter venn khetne trouyel, penell o baro Devel." 
Isaiah66:18 Me djinau kova, hoy yon kran, oun kova, hoy an lengre sherya glan djas. Oun me vau, te lap i menshen khetne dran i tsele themma oun dran hako rakepen. Oun yon venna oun dikenn miro raylepen." 
Isaiah66:19 Oun me čivau i sikepen pre mank lende. Oun kolendar, kay djides ačan, bičrau me pash i menshende an themma Tarsis, Poul oun Loud, Meshek, Rosh, Toubal, Yavan oun pash kolende dour vergel o baro pani, kay mandar gomme či shounan, oun miro raylepen gomme gar dikan. Oun mire bičepangre penenn kol menshenge, har raylo me hom." 
Isaiah66:20 Oun kolla anenn t'mare phralen dran i tsele themma pale, te denn le len o baro Debleske. Ap miri berga an Yerusalem anenn le len ap graya, oun ap vourdya, hoy pre hi, oun an vourdya, hoy pandlo hi, ap maultikre bourike oun ninna ap khamele, penell o baro Devel. Yon anenn len yaake har i Israelitarya anan djob an djoudje čare an o baro Debleskro kheer." 
Isaiah66:21 Oun ninna kolendar lau mange, te venn le mange rashaya oun Levitarya, penell o baro Devel." 
Isaiah66:22 T'mare čave oun t'maro lab ačenn glan mande, yaake rah har o nevo bolepen oun i nevi phoub, hoy me krau, glan mande ačenna, penell o baro Devel." 
Isaiah66:23 Oun hako čon, ap ko dives, kay vell o nevo čon diklo, oun hako kourko ap o Debleskro dives, venna menshe dran hake themma glan mande, te vitsrenn le pen glan mande tele, penell o baro Devel." 
Isaiah66:24 Oun yon djan vin, te dikenn le penge kol moule menshen an, kay mantsa phagan. Kolengro kirmo merell gar, oun lengri yag djal gar vin. Oun yon hi čadepaske halauterenge, kay dikenn le." 
Jeremiah1:1 Kalla hi kol laba, hoy o Yeremia rakras. Leskro dad his o Hilkiya. Kova his yek kol rashayendar an o gab Anatot an o them Benyamin." 
Jeremiah1:2 O baro Devel rakras ap o Yeremia, har o Yosia, koleskro dad o Amon his, an o 13 (deesh-te-triinto) bersh o baro ray pral o them Youda his." 
Jeremiah1:3 An ko tsiro pal kova, har koleskro čavo, o Yoyakim, o baro ray his, rakras o baro Devel pale ap o Yeremia bis ko tsiro vas, kay i menshe dran Youda pandles an i vavar them anlo van. Kova his an o pančto čon an ko deesh-te-yekto bersh, har o Sedekya, koleskro dad o Yosia his, o baro ray pral Youda his." 
Jeremiah1:4 Oun o baro Devel penas ap mande: 
Jeremiah1:5 Me prindjrom tout, glan te krom tout an tiri dakro per, oun rodom tout vin, glan te val boldo, te vess miro rakepaskro i menshenge dran i tsele themma." 
Jeremiah1:6 Oun me penom: Baro Devel, miro ray, me hom gar mishto doha te penap tiro lab. Me hom gar phouro doha." 
Jeremiah1:7 O baro Devel penas ap mande: Pen gar: Me hom gar phouro doha! Tou hounte djas, kay me tout bičrau. Oun pen halauter, hoy me touke penau." 
Jeremiah1:8 Ma traash lendar. Me hom pash toute, oun rikrau mire vasta pral toute. Ko penau me, o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah1:9 Oun o baro Devel čivas peskro vast ap miro mouy, oun penas ap mande: Dik, me čivau mire laba an tiro mouy." 
Jeremiah1:10 Dik kay! Me dau tout kay dives penepaske pral boud menshende oun themma, te tradess len vin, phagess len khetne, dess len tele oun kress len paash, oun moukess len pale bares te vell, oun kress len zoreles." 
Jeremiah1:11 Oun o baro Devel penas ap mande: “Yeremia, hoy dikeh tou?” “Dikau i kasht i mandeltikro roukestar,” penom me." 
Jeremiah1:12 Oun o baro Devel penas ap mande: “Tou dikal mishto. Me dau garda ap miro lab, te krap kova.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Oun o baro Devel penas o douyto kopo ap mande: “Hoy dikeh tou?” Penom: “Me dikau i piri pherdo pani, hoy kerell pral kotar, kay norden hi.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Oun o baro Devel penas ap mande: Kotar, kay norden hi, vell i bibarht pral halauterende, kay djivenn an kava them." 
Jeremiah1:15 Shoun mishto: Me dau gole i tsele menshen an kol themma, hoy an o norden čiddo hi, te venn yon, penell o baro Devel. Lengre raya čivenn pengre beshepangre glan kol voudya o forestar Yerusalem, oun troul leskre massurya oun troul kol tsele forya an o them Youda." 
Jeremiah1:16 Oun me dau i menshen an Youda i phagi lengro čilačepaske, hoy yon kran. Yon djan krik mandar oun anan firhen vavar deblenge oun mangan kol figuren an, hoy le pengre vastentsa kran." 
Jeremiah1:17 Ab zoreles! Oun kre tout ap o drom! Oun pen lenge halauter, hoy me touke penau! Ma traash lendar, te krap me gar, te trashess tou glan lende!" 
Jeremiah1:18 Kava dives dau me tout i zoor, te vess yaake zorelo har i zorelo foro, i sasterno rouk, oun i massouri dran lolo saster. Hakeno an kava them vell rhoyedo ap toute: i bare raya oun pralstoune pral o them Youda, ninna i rashaya oun i menshe an kava them." 
Jeremiah1:19 Ninna te čingrenn le touha, nay krenn le touke či. Me hom pash toute, te lap tout dran lengre vasta vin. Kova penau me, o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah2:1 O baro Devel penas ap mande: 
Jeremiah2:2 Dja koy, oun rake glan i tsele menshende an o foro Yerusalem, oun pen: Kova penell o baro Devel: Israel, me djinau, har ap mande rikral har terno hals, oun har kamal man har i pirni peskro pirnes, oun har tou mantsa djal an o moulo tato them, an ko them, kay či bares vell an i phoub." 
Jeremiah2:3 An ko tsiro hals mange kokres koy, yaake har o nevo djob mange hi. Koon tout an-tapras, anas doosh ap peste, oun i bibarht vas pral leste. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah2:4 Shounenn o baro Debleskro lab, t'mer Israelitarya, t'mer, o Yakobeskre menshe!" 
Jeremiah2:5 Kova penell o baro Devel: Havo djoungelo koova hatsan t'mare phoure ap mande, kay djan yon mandar krik, oun mangan figuren an, kay kek devel hi. Oun yaake djan le tele." 
Jeremiah2:6 Oun poučan pen gar: Kay hi o baro Devel, kay anas men dran o them Egiptia vin, oun djas glan mende an o moulo tato them, an ko divyo oun trouk them, kay či har santa oun barra hi, kay kek drom hi, oun kek mensho djivell?" 
Jeremiah2:7 Oun me anom t'men an i lačo them, kay boud rhapen hi, te rhan ko tselo lačo koova, hoy kote baro vella. Oun har t'mer an ko them djan, kran les t'mer pale-čiddo. Oun miro them vas djoungeles glan mire yaka." 
Jeremiah2:8 T'mare rashaya poučan gar: Kay hi o baro Devel? Har penan le i menshenge, hoy te krenn le, rikran le pen gar ap mire laba. Oun kol pralstoune pral mire menshende hadan pen pral mande, oun shounan bouder gar ap mande. Oun mire rakepangre, kay hounte penans mire laba doureder, rakran an o lab ko rhorheno deblestar Baal, oun mangan figuren an, kay kek devel hi." 
Jeremiah2:9 Doleske hounte anap t'mari doosh ap t'mende, oun ap t'mare čavende oun kolengre čavende." 
Jeremiah2:10 Djan pral o baro pani pash i panyeskre themma, kay kol Kitarya djivenn, oun dikenn t'men trouyel! Bičrenn morshen an o them Kedar oun lenn i menshen kote ninna an o yak! Krenn yon savo koova har t'mer kran?" 
Jeremiah2:11 Ninna te hi lengre debla kek čače debla, lenn yon kek vavar deblen an! Mire menshe, kay miro raylepen dikan, yon paran man dren yekeha, kay kek devel hi, oun koles kek zoor hi." 
Jeremiah2:12 Dare tou, bolepen, oun tout vell traash pral kava koova, penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah2:13 Mire menshe kran čomone, hoy douy kope čilačo hi: Man, ko djido pani moukan yon, oun hadan penge panyeskre rhebya vin, kay paash hi, oun nay rikrenn kek pani." 
Jeremiah2:14 Hi o Israel i ginlo boudepaskro? Hi lo i boudepaskro, kay pandles boldo vas, kay nay hakeno krell leha, hoy kamella?" 
Jeremiah2:15 O levo dell gole pral leste, dell zorelo gole oun krell leskro them paash. Oun leskre forya venn pre rhačedo yaake, kay nay djivenn kek koy dren." 
Jeremiah2:16 Ninna činenn kol menshe dran Memfis oun Tapanes touke i tsele balla tiro sherestar tele. 
Jeremiah2:17 Kova lauter hi tiri doosh! Boud kope kamas o baro Devel, tiro ray, tout ap o čačo drom te anell. Oun tou moukal les!" 
Jeremiah2:18 Hoy hi tout kolestar, te djah an o them Egiptia, oun kameh koy dran o pani Nil te piyell? Oun hoy hi tout kolestar, te djah tou an o them Assour oun kameh dran o pani Eufrat te piyell?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Dran tiro čilačepen vell kova ap toute. Tou shounal gar. Doleske leh tou savi phagi. Tou hounte djiness oun hayvess, havo pharo koova oun douka ap koleste venna, kay djal peskro baro Deblestar krik, oun kamell lestar bouder či te djinell. Kova penell o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub." 
Jeremiah2:20 O baro Devel penell: Hako tsiro hadal tout pral mande, oun kamal mange gar palla te djal. Tou penal: Me kamau kek ray pral mande. Oun čival tout koy har i loubni ap i berga tel hako zenelo rouk." 
Jeremiah2:21 Me čivom tout dren har i vi-rodedo drakengro rouk, i lačo shoukar rouk. Oun hoy vas kanna dran toute? I divyo djoungelo rouk!" 
Jeremiah2:22 Tou nay thoveh tout yaake boud har kameh, oun leh ko zorlester sapouni! Ko čilačepen, koleha tout pale-čiddo kral, ačell glan mire yaka, penell o baro Devel, maro ray." 
Jeremiah2:23 Har nay peneh tou: Me krom man gar pale-čiddo? Me nashom gar kol deblenge palla, hoy kharenn Baal. Dik ap toute, hoy tou kreh an i tala! Ma biste, har djival! Har i khamela, kay hi bipandlo, nasheh tou trouyel," 
Jeremiah2:24 har i divyi bourika an o moulo them, te dell yoy gole oun nashell trouyel an lakro bipandlo tsiro, oun kek nay rikrella pre. Koon lat kamell, hounte rodell gar dour. Yoy moukell pes sik te hatsell an ko tsiro." 
Jeremiah2:25 Israel, de garda ap tire herya, te nashess len gar doukenes, oun ap tiro mouy, te vell lo gar trouk! Tou peneh: Rike man gar pre! Me kamau kol menshen dran vavar themma, oun hounte nashap lenge palla." 
Jeremiah2:26 Har i čorepaskro hounte ladjell peske, te vell yob tapedo, yaake hounte ladjenn penge kol menshe an o them Israel, ninna kol bare raya, oun pralstoune oun rashaya oun Debleskre rakepangre," 
Jeremiah2:27 kolla, kay ap i debla penenna: “Tou hal miro dad!” oun ap i barrengre debla: “Tou anal man ap i phoub.” Mange sikran le pengro doumo oun gar pengro mouy. Te vell kanna i bibarht pral lende, denn le gole: “Ray! Ab ap mari rig!”" 
Jeremiah2:28 Kay hi t'mare debla, kay t'menge kran? Mou stenn yon pre, oun lenn t'men vin dran t'mari bibarht! T'mer menshe an o them Youda, t'men hi yaake boud debla har forya!" 
Jeremiah2:29 T'mer kamenn man i doosh te dell. T'mer han kolla, kay peran lauter mandar tele, penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah2:30 Koy tseli phagi, hoy dom t'men, his čičeske. T'mer moukan t'men gar te tserdell. Mire rakepangren, kay pash t'mende bičrom, maran t'mer. T'maro rharo rhas len har i rhoyedo levo." 
Jeremiah2:31 O baro Devel penell: T'mer čilače menshe! Denn garda ap kova, hoy me t'menge penau! Hom me i Israelenge i moulo them, i them, kay kek pani hi? Hoske penenn mire menshe: Mer nay djah, kay kamah, oun hounte nashas touke gar bouder gar pal." 
Jeremiah2:32 Nay bistrell i terni čay peskro sonakay, i terni djouvel, kay kamell romedinerell, peskro biyabeskro ripen? Na-a! Mire menshe bistrenn man pale te pale." 
Jeremiah2:33 Har sik hatseh tou i drom, te less touke i vavar pirnes! Oun yaake djas tou pale te pale ap čilače dromma." 
Jeremiah2:34 Ninna hatsan le ap tire koola o rat i čorvelendar, kay kran kek čilačepen, oun kay tou gar koy pashel tapral, kay phagan le an tiro kheer dren. Ninna te kral tou kova lauter," 
Jeremiah2:35 peneh tou: Me krom či. O baro Devel hi bouder gar rhoyedo ap mande. Djiness, me dau tout i phagi koleske, kay tou penal: Me krom kek čilačepen." 
Jeremiah2:36 Har sik djal tou kay te koy, te rodess touke menshen, kay krenn pen touha khetne? O them Egiptia nay vell tout gar feteder ap i rig har o them Assour." 
Jeremiah2:37 O tsiro vella, kay djah tou kotar krik, oun deh tire vasta pral o shero khetne i ladjatar; o baro Devel kamell či lendar te djinell, ap konende tiro dji čival, oun lentsa hi tout kek barht." 
Jeremiah3:1 O baro Devel penas: Te bičras i morsh peskri romyat krik, oun yoy djal pash i vavar morsheste, nay lell yob lat gar pale. Palle vals ko them pale-čiddo. Tou dal tout trouyel boudentsa, oun kameh pale pash mande te vell?" 
Jeremiah3:2 Ap havi berga hals tou gomme gar i morsheha čiddo? Ap o drom hal tou beshdo, oun loureh ap lende, har i Arabari an o moulo tato them. Oun tou kreh ko them pale-čiddo tiro vi-ladjedo oun djoungelo koveha." 
Jeremiah3:3 Doleske dell kek brishin an o vend, vitar gar an o niyal. Tou dikeh vin har i loubni oun kameh tout gar te ladjell." 
Jeremiah3:4 Oun kanna peneh ap mande: Kamlo dad, tou hal miro maal yaake rah har djivau." 
Jeremiah3:5 Kameh tou hako tsiro rhoyedo ačell oun čilačes ap mande te dikell? Yaake rakreh oun kreh čilačepen, oun moukeh touke či te penell." 
Jeremiah3:6 An ko tsiro, kay o Yosia o baro ray his, penas o baro Devel ap mande: Dikal tou, hoy i Israelitarya kran? Yon hi har i djouvel, kay moukas peskro romes, oun djas ap kol tsele berge oun tel hake zenele rouka oun das pes trouyel vavar morshentsa." 
Jeremiah3:7 Oun me patsom, har yoy kova lauter kras, vell yoy pash mande pale. Kova kras yoy gar. Lakri pheen, i Youda, kay man ninna rhorhras, dikas," 
Jeremiah3:8 har me lakri phenyat, i Israel, krik bičrom koleske, kay das li pes vavar morshentsa trouyel, oun dom lat i liil, kay činlo hi, te bičrom lat krik. Kova kras i rhorheni Youdake kek daar. Yoy djas koy oun das pes ninna trouyel vavar morshentsa." 
Jeremiah3:9 Oun lakro vi-ladjedo koveha kras yoy o them pale-čiddo. Kasht oun barra mangell li an. 
Jeremiah3:10 Oun an ko tselo koova vas i Youda, lakri pheen, gar pash mande o tselo djiyestar, kokres o mouyeha, penas o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah3:11 Oun o baro Devel penas ap mande: I Israel, kay djas mandar krik, hi feteder har i rhorheni Youda." 
Jeremiah3:12 Dja koy oun de kol laba gole ap kolende, kay djivenn an o norden oun pen: “Tou Israel, kay djal mandar krik, am pale”, penas o baro Devel. Palle kamau bouder gar rhoyedo ap t'mende te dikell. Man hi i dji t'menge, oun kamau gar hako tsiro rhoyedo te vell ap t'mende." 
Jeremiah3:13 Tou hounte kress či, har te dikess dren, kay anal doosh ap toute, har hadal tout pre pral o baro Debleste, kay tiro Devel hi. Tou nashal kay te koy trouyel, te mangess vavar deblen an tel hake zenele rouka, oun shounal gar ap mire laba, penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah3:14 Avenn pale, t'mer čave, kay nashan mandar krik, penell o baro Devel. Me hom t'maro ray. Me kamau t'mendar te lell yekes dran hako foro oun douy dran haki familya, oun kamau t'men an Sion te anell." 
Jeremiah3:15 Me kamau t'men save pralstunen te dell, kay denn garda ap t'mende, har me kova krau. Kolla sikrenn t'men t'maro drom gosvepah, oun hayvenn, hoy t'menge mishto hi." 
Jeremiah3:16 Oun an ko tsiro, kay van t'mer boud menshe, oun djivenn an o tselo them, koy penell bouder kek t'mendar: Anenn o Debleskro morhton, te vell o baro Devel pash mende. Kekeske vell kova an o shero, kek poučell koy pal, oun t'menge hi yek, kay hi lo krik. Oun kek krell i nevo. Ko penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah3:17 An ko tsiro vell o foro Yerusalem kharedo: O baro Debleskri beshepaskri. Oun i tsele menshe venn koy khetne. Oun yon djan bouder gar pal pengro shero oun pengro čilačo dji. 
Jeremiah3:18 Ap ko dives djan kol menshe dran o kheer Youda pash kol menshende dran o kheer Israel: Oun yon djan khetne khere dran o norden an ko them, hoy dom me t'mare phourende, te ačell kova lengro." 
Jeremiah3:19 Me, o baro Devel penom, har nay rikrau me tout, har te vess tou miro čavo? Kamoms te dap tout ko lačo them, ko shoukester kotar them i tsele themendar. Oun patsom, tou peness palle ap mande kamlo tata, oun djals bouder gar mandar krik." 
Jeremiah3:20 Čačepah, har i romni, kay rhorhras peskro romes i vavar morsheha, yaake rhorhras man o kheer Israel. Me, o baro Devel, penau kova." 
Jeremiah3:21 I gole oun i ropen vell shounlo ap o pralstouno them: Kolla hi i Israelitarya, kay djivan i čilačo djipen, oun bistran lengro baro Debles." 
Jeremiah3:22 Avenn pale pale, t'mer kay djan t'menge mandar! Oun me kamau lauter bistrell, hoy kran. Dik, mer vah pash toute. Tou hal o baro Devel, maro ray." 
Jeremiah3:23 Čačepah, har dam gole pal kol deblende ap kol berge, van le gar ap mari rig. Kokres tou, maro baro Devel, nay leh men čačepah vin dran mari bibarht." 
Jeremiah3:24 Har mangam ko djoungelo debles Baal an, nashram lauter, hoy mare phoure penge khetne lan, har terne hams: bakre, groumya, čave oun ča." 
Jeremiah3:25 Mer hounte ladjams men, oun mari ladj hounte čakrals men har i plarhta! Maro tselo djipen djivam yaake, har o baro Devel, maro ray, gar kamas. Mer oun mare phoure djivam yaake, oun shounam gar ap kova, hoy yob menge penas, te kras mer." 
Jeremiah4:1 O baro Devel penell: T'mer Israelitarya, te kamenn t'maro čilačo drom te moukell, palle avenn pash mande! Te lenn t'mer kol djoungele deblen glan mire yaka krik, hounte nashenn bouder gar yek rigyatar ap i vavar." 
Jeremiah4:2 Te denn t'men sovel oun penenn: Me dau man sovel pash o djido Debleste … oun t'mer rhorhenn gar koy pashel, oun rikrenn t'maro lab, palle poučenn mandar i menshe an i vavar themma, te čivap miri barht ap lende, oun yon sharenn pen, kay prindjrenn yon man." 
Jeremiah4:3 Kova hi, hoy penell o baro Devel i menshenge an Youda oun an Yerusalem: Lenn i nevo kotar phoub oun phagenn i phoub pre! Ma vitsrenn o djob mank i soubyengro zenlepen!" 
Jeremiah4:4 Rikrenn t'men ap i laba, hoy t'mentsa vin krom! Oun krenn t'mare djia mange pre, t'mer menshe an Youda oun Yerusalem. Te krenn kova gar, vell miri rholi pral t'mende har yag, oun rhačella yaake, te nay krell kek koy yag vin." 
Jeremiah4:5 Denn zoreles gole an Youda, kharenn vin an Yerusalem, oun penenn: Phourdenn koy phourdepaskri an o tselo them! Denn vin gole, te venn le an i zorele forya khetne!" 
Jeremiah4:6 Čivenn i sikepen pre ap o drom, hoy sikrell o drom an Sion! Nashenn oun ačenn gar tardo, me anau bari bibarht oun baro ropen, hoy vell kotar, kay norden hi." 
Jeremiah4:7 I marepaskro, hoy marell i menshen an boud themma, stas pre. Har i levo, hoy vell dran o veesh, kras lo pes ap o drom, te dell yob t'maro them paash oun rhačrell t'mare forya yaake, kay nay djivell kek koy dren." 
Jeremiah4:8 Doleske rivenn t'men an i gono! Rovenn oun denn gole! O baro Devel las peskri bari rholi gar mendar krik. 
Jeremiah4:9 O baro Devel penell: Ko dives vella, kay trashenn o baro ray oun i pralstoune pral Israel. O Debleskre rakepangre oun leskre rashaya djinenn gar bouder, hoy te penenn le." 
Jeremiah4:10 Koy penom me: Baro Devel, miro ray, tou rhorhral kol menshen an Yerusalem an, har tou penal, kay kek kourepen mashkral lende vell. O rharo hi koy oun kamell len moulo te dell." 
Jeremiah4:11 An ko tsiro vell kol menshenge an Yerusalem penlo: I zorelo tatepen vell dran kol berge dran o moulo tato them pash t'mende. Kova hi kek phourdepen, hoy phourdell o phouss oun o čik krik," 
Jeremiah4:12 na-a, ko phourdepen, hoy lenge bičrau, hi boud zorleder. Palle dau len lengri phagi." 
Jeremiah4:13 Dik, har volke vell ko marepaskro. Leskre kourepangre vourdya hi sik har i phourdepen, oun leskre graya hi sikeder har i adlari. Havi bibarht! Mer ham nashedo!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Yerusalem, te kameh vin lino te vell, palle thob tiro čilačepen tiro djiyestar tele! Har rah kameh tou ko čilačepen an tiro shero te rikrell?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Shounenn, bičepangre venna dran o foro Dan oun dran i berge Efrayim, oun rakrenn pral ko čilačo koova, hoy vella." 
Jeremiah4:16 Denn i menshen trad! Penenn kolenge an o foro Yerusalem: kourepangre venna dran dour themma, oun denn pengro kourepaskri gole vin, te lenn le i forya an o them Youda dren." 
Jeremiah4:17 Yon čivenn pen trouyel o foro Yerusalem, har kol morsha, kay denn garda ap i kotar phoub. T'mer menshe an Yerusalem moukan t'menge či mandar te penell. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah4:18 Hoy t'mer kran oun har djivan, anas t'menge kova dren. Kova vell dran t'maro čilačepen, te djal t'menge yaake djoungelo, oun djal t'menge an t'maro dji." 
Jeremiah4:19 Har doukell man kova, havi daar hi an mande! Miro dji djal zoreles an miro beč, me nay ačau gar pokones; me shounau koy phourdepaskri, oun ko kourepaskri gole." 
Jeremiah4:20 Yek foro pal i vavar vell dino. O tselo them denn le paash. Ap yek kopo hi mire oun plarhtene khera khetne dino. 
Jeremiah4:21 Har rah hounte dikap me kol kourepangro sikepen, oun shounap koy phourdepangri gole?" 
Jeremiah4:22 O baro Devel penell: Mire menshe hi divyo, oun patsenn man gar. Dinelo hi le, man prindjrenn le gar. Har dinele čave hi le, kay či hayvenn. Gosevo doha hi le, te krenn le čilačepen. Har yon lačepen krenna, djinenn le gar." 
Jeremiah4:23 Me dikom ap kay phoub. Koya his moulo. Kek djipen his koy. Me dikom an o bolepen. Kova his tamlo. 
Jeremiah4:24 Me dikom ap kol bare oun tikne berge. Kolla trissan. 
Jeremiah4:25 Me dikom pal i menshende. Oun kek his bouder koy. Ninna kol čirkle djan penge krik. 
Jeremiah4:26 Me dikom pal ko lačo them. Kova vas i moulo them. Oun i tsele forya his paash čiddo glan o baro Debleste oun leskri zoreli rholi. 
Jeremiah4:27 O baro Devel penas: Ninna te vell kay tseli phoub har i moulo them, kamau gar lauter paash te krell." 
Jeremiah4:28 I phoub rovella, oun o bolepen rivell pes an kalepen. Me, o baro Devel penom, hoy kamau te krell, oun kova khaytell man gar, oun moukau gar kolestar tele." 
Jeremiah4:29 Dran kol tsele forya nashenn le penge glan koy gole kol lourdendar, kay klissenn ap i graya, oun kolendar, kay denn karye, oun nashenn an pesse vesha oun khatrenn pen mashkral i barra. Hako foro vell mouklo čiddo. Kek djivell bouder koy dren." 
Jeremiah4:30 Yerusalem, tou hal dino! Hoy kreh tou? Tou riveh kouč lole koola ap toute, čiveh sonakay ap toute, oun makeh tire yaka an. Tou kreh tout shoukar čičeske! Tire pirne kamenn tout gar bouder, oun kamenn tout moulo te dell." 
Jeremiah4:31 Me shounau i gole, har i djouvyatar, kay lell o ersto kopo i ternepen. Kaya hi koy gole o forestar Sion, kay taprell pal dourho, oun peskre vasta pre hadell, oun gole dell: Me hom nashedo! Kolla venna oun denn man moulo!" 
Jeremiah5:1 Djan kol dromma an Yerusalem pral oun tele! Krenn t'mare yaka pre oun rodenn ap kol dromma o forestar! Te hatsenn yekes, kay djivell an o čačepen, oun rikrell pes ap o Debleste, palle bistrau i doosh o tselo forestar." 
Jeremiah5:2 Ninna te denn yon pen sovel pash o djido Debleste, hi kova rhorhepen." 
Jeremiah5:3 Baro Devel, tire yaka dikenn ap i djipen an o čačepen. Tou dal len i phagi. – Yon hayvenn kova gar. Tou kral len paash moulo. – Oun yon ačan, har yon hi. Yon djan pal pengro shero. oun kamenn gar pengro čilačo drom te moukell." 
Jeremiah5:4 Me penom mange: Kolla hi čorvele menshe, kay či djinenna, oun prindjrenn gar o Debleskro drom oun leskro čačepen." 
Jeremiah5:5 Me kamau pash i pralstunende te djal, te rakrap lentsa. Kolla djinenn o Debleskro drom oun nay penenn mange, hoy an i yaka lengro Deblestar mishto hi. Palle hayvom: Ninna kolla kaman gar, te vell yob lengro ray, oun kaman gar ap leste te shounell." 
Jeremiah5:6 Doleske venna leve dran o veesh oun marenn len; divye djoukle dran o divyo oun trouk them dandrenn len an kotya, oun bare divye margodje lourenn glan lengre forya. Hakeno, koon vin vella, vella an kotya dandedo. Lengri doosh hi boud oun phari. Boud kope djan le mandar krik." 
Jeremiah5:7 Hoske bistrap i doosh mire menshendar? Yon djan mandar krik, oun denn pen sovel pash koleste, kay kek devel hi. Har me len čalo krom, phagan le mantsa, oun djan an i loubyengro kheer." 
Jeremiah5:8 Hakenes hi rhanč ap kol vavareskri romyate har i gray, kay divyo hi pal haki djouvyate." 
Jeremiah5:9 Oun me hounte dap len kek phagi? penell o baro Devel, oun dap have menshen har kalla gar pale, hoy yon kran?" 
Jeremiah5:10 Nashenn pre, kay lengre drakengre rouka tardo hi, oun krenn len paash! Ma tserdenn i tsele bourra vin! Moukenn čomone tardo! Tserdenn i kashta i drakentsa vin, kolla hi gar mange." 
Jeremiah5:11 Yon sikran mange o doumo, penell o baro Devel, kol menshe an Israel oun kol menshe an Youda." 
Jeremiah5:12 Yon penan rhorhepen pral o baro Debleste, oun penan: Kova krell yob gar! Yaake djoungelo djal menge gar! Kourepen oun bok vell gar pash mende." 
Jeremiah5:13 O Debleskre rakepangre rakrenn, hoy či moldo hi. Hoy yon penan, vell gar o Deblestar. Mou perell ap lende, hoy le penan." 
Jeremiah5:14 Doleske penell o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub: Savo koova rakrenn t'mer! Doleske kamau me mire laba an tiro mouy, Yeremia, har yag te krell, oun i menshen har kasht rhačepaske, oun koy yag rhal kol kashta pre." 
Jeremiah5:15 Pen kol menshenge an Israel: Me anau menshen foun doural pash t'mende, penell o baro Devel, menshe, kolengro rakepen, oun hoy yon penenna, hayvenn t'mer gar. I phouri natsyona hi le. Oun len hi bari zoor." 
Jeremiah5:16 Lengre fayle anenn o merepen. Yon hi halauter čače morsha, kay hayvenn pen te kourell." 
Jeremiah5:17 Yon rhan tiro djob oun tiro maro, tire čaven, tire čen, tire bakren oun groumyen, tire drake, tire faygetikre rouka. T'mer patsenn, te djal t'menge či an t'mare zorele forya. Kolen lenn yon t'mendar o rhareha krik." 
Jeremiah5:18 Me, o baro Devel, kamau mire menshen gar lauteren te marell an ko tsiro." 
Jeremiah5:19 Oun te poučenn yon: Hoske krell maro baro Devel kova menge lauter?, hounte peness tou lenge: Yaake har t'mer mandar krik djan, oun van vavar deblenge koy an t'maro them, yaake hounte boudrenn t'mer vavar menshenge an i them, kay gar t'maro hi." 
Jeremiah5:20 O baro Devel penas ap mande: Pen ap kol menshende dran o kheer Yakob, oun ap kol menshende an o them Youda:" 
Jeremiah5:21 Shounenn kay, t'mer menshe, kay t'men či an o shero hi, kay len yaka hi, oun dikenn či, kay len kanda hi oun shounenn či!" 
Jeremiah5:22 Hi t'men kek traash mandar, poučell o baro Devel. Trissenn t'mer gar glan mande? Me krom, te ačell o baro pani ap yek platsa, oun čivom santa koy glan. Koy hounte ačell o pani hako tsiro, oun doureder nay nashell lo gar. Ninna te vell ko pani yaake divyo, oun djal pral oun tele, nay djal lo gar doureder." 
Jeremiah5:23 Kal menshe djan pal lengro shero, oun kamenn gar te shounell. Yon djan mandar krik oun djan pengro drom." 
Jeremiah5:24 An pengro dji penenn le gar: Mer te dikas pre ap maro baro Debleste! Yob bičrell menge o brishin an o čačo tsiro, brishin an o vend oun brishin an i niyal, te vell men o djob rhapaske an ko čačo tsiro." 
Jeremiah5:25 T'mari doosh, hoy ap t'mende anan, oun ko čilačepen, hoy krenna, rikras ko lačepen t'mendar pale, yaake te van phare tsirya ap t'mende." 
Jeremiah5:26 O baro Devel penella: Mashkral mire menshende hi čilače menshe, kay lourenn ap vavarende, te taprenn le len, har kolla, kay tapenn i čirklen dren," 
Jeremiah5:27 oun kolen čirklengre khera pherde čirkle hi. Yaake hi lengre khera pherdo čoredo koova. Doleske van yon baro oun bravelo. 
Jeremiah5:28 Thoullo oun pesso hi le, oun moukenn gar tele te krenn le čilačepen. O čačepen lenn le gar an o vast, te lenn kolendar pengro čačepen, kay čorvelo hi, ninna kol čavendar, kay len kek dad bouder hi." 
Jeremiah5:29 Moukap me len kova te krell oun penap či koy pre, penell o baro Devel. Dap me save menshen kek phagi?" 
Jeremiah5:30 An kava them djal boud čilačepen oun djoungelo koova. 
Jeremiah5:31 O Debleskre rakepangre rakrenn rhorhepen, oun kol rashaya rodenn penge ko feteder vin, oun mire menshe kamenn kova yaake. Hoy kamenn t'mer te krell, te hi t'maro tsiro trouyel?" 
Jeremiah6:1 T'mer menshe dran o kheer Benyamin, nashenn dran Yerusalem! oun phourdenn koy phourdepaskri an Tekoa! Krenn i yag ap i berga Bet-Kerem, te vell o yagakro dourho i sikepen! Bari bibarht oun merepen vell kotar, kay norden hi." 
Jeremiah6:2 Tou, shoukar foro Yerusalem, ko tsiro hi koy, kay veh paash dino." 
Jeremiah6:3 Bare raya pengre lourdentsa venna pral toute har bakrengre pengre bakrentsa. Kolla čivenn pengre plarhtene khera troul toute pre. Hakenes hi i platsa peskre lourdenge. 
Jeremiah6:4 Yon penenna: Stas pre, te kouras men o foreha! Te djas pre yaake rah har mashkral o dives hi! – Na-a, i rati kamell te vell, oun sik vell tamlo." 
Jeremiah6:5 Palle djas ap i rati, oun kras lengre rayle khera paash." 
Jeremiah6:6 Kava penell o baro Devel, o ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub: Denn i rouka tele an o foro Yerusalem, oun krenn i drom, hoy djal pre ap o foreskri massouri o forestar Yerusalem! An kava foro hi či har čilačepen dren. Doleske lell lo peskri phagi." 
Jeremiah6:7 Yaake har dran i brounna o pani vella, yaake vell dran o foro o čilačepen. I gole kolendar, kay venn zoryah tele rikedo oun doukedo, shounau. Menshe lenn glan mande dava oun venn maredo." 
Jeremiah6:8 Yerusalem, mouk tout trad te dell! Te shouneh tou gar, krau me miro dji touke pandlo. Oun dran toute krau i nango them, kay kek nay djivell bouder." 
Jeremiah6:9 O baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, penas ap mande: Yaake har i harho douy, triin kope peskre drake tele činell, te lell lo ninna kolla tele, hoy pral ačan, yaake djas tou pale pash kolende, kay an Israel pral ačan, te aness len pash mande." 
Jeremiah6:10 Koneha rakrap me? Koneske penap toutar? Koon shounella koy pre? Lengre kanda hi pandlo. Yon nay shounenn gar, hoy tou lenge kameh te penell, oun san pral tire laba, oun rhoyrenn pen pral lende." 
Jeremiah6:11 Tiri rholi pral lende rhačell ninna an mande. Me nay rikrau lat gar pale. Koy penas o baro Devel ap mande: Palle čore miri rholi pral lende vin: pral kol čavende ap o drom, oun pral kol terne morshende. Yon lauter, morsha oun djouvya, ninna kol phoure oun an-dikle, venn pandles krik anlo." 
Jeremiah6:12 Lengre khera lenn kol vavar, ninna lengre themma oun lengre djouvyen. Me hadau miro vast, te marap kolen, kay djivenn an kava them, penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah6:13 Kol baren oun kol tiknen hi bok ap bravlepen, hoy gar lengro hi. Oun o Debleskre rakepangre oun i rashaya rhorhenn i menshen," 
Jeremiah6:14 oun krenn yaake, har te vans kol douka mire menshendar gar yaake pharo. Yon penenna: Lauter hi mishto, lauter hi mishto, ninna te hi či mishto." 
Jeremiah6:15 Yon hounte ladjans pen ko djoungelo koveha, hoy yon kran. Kova krenn le gar. Yon ladjenn gar. Yon djinenn gar, hoy ladj hi. Doleske venn yon maredo khetne kol vavarentsa. Te vau me, oun dau len i phagi, ačell kek lendar djido, penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah6:16 O baro Devel penas lenge: Ačenn tardo ap ko drom, kay t'mer djan! Dikenn oun poučenn pal i phoure dromma! Hatsenn vin, havo drom anell t'menge lačepen! Oun djan kava drom! Palle vell shoukapen an t'mare djia. Yon penan: Kova kamah mer gar te krell." 
Jeremiah6:17 Ninna dom t'men menshen, kay denn yak ap t'mende. Denn garda koy pre, te phourdenn le i phourdepaskri, hoy sikrella: Bibarht vella … Yon penan: Mer kamah len gar te shounell." 
Jeremiah6:18 Doleske shounenn, t'mer menshe an i tsele themma: Denn garda, hoy kal menshentsa krau!" 
Jeremiah6:19 I menshe ap i tseli phoub hounte shounenn kova. Me kamau bibarht pral kal menshende te anell. Ap mire laba denn le kek garda, oun djan gar ap miro drom. Doleske lenn le pengri phagi." 
Jeremiah6:20 Me poučau či pal o soungepaskro koova dran o them Saba, oun pal ko goudlo soungepaskro djet, hoy vell dran i dour them. Kol firhe, hoy t'mer mange rhačrenna, kamau me gar. Oun ap kol firhe, hoy t'mer mange marenna, dikau gar lačes." 
Jeremiah6:21 Doleske penell o baro Devel: Me kamau kal menshenge boud barra an o drom te čivell, te perenn i morsha oun lengre čave koy pral. Oun ninna kolla, kay djivenn pash lende, oun lengre mala venn maredo." 
Jeremiah6:22 Kova penell o baro Devel: Denn garda: Boud menshe venna dran lengro them, hoy kote čiddo hi, kay norden hi. Ava, boud menshe krenn pen ap o drom an ko dour them, te djan le an o kourepen." 
Jeremiah6:23 Lengre lourde kourenn pen i bogentsa oun i rharentsa. Yon hi midjak oun len khaytell kek. Ap graya klissenn le i golyah, hoy yaake baro hi har i gole, hoy o baro pani krell. Yon venna, te kourenn le pen touha, tou foro Sion!" 
Jeremiah6:24 Mer shounam lendar, oun mare moussya peran menge tele. Oun i bari traash vas ap mende. Men hi bare douka har i djouvel, kay i ternepen lella." 
Jeremiah6:25 Ma djan ap t'maro kotar them, kharell yek ap o vavareste! Ma nashenn ap i drom! I lourde venna haki rigyatar oun marenn hakenes pengre rharentsa." 
Jeremiah6:26 T'mer, mire menshe, t'menge penau: Rivenn gone ap t'mende! Čivenn t'men an i yagakri čik! Rovenn har te merals t'maro čavo, oun t'men kek vavar hi! Givenn i ropaskri gili! Kol marepangre perenn ap yek kopo pral mende." 
Jeremiah6:27 O baro Devel penas ap mande: Me kamau, te djas tou pash mire menshende, oun dikess, hoy yon krenna, oun har yon djivenna." 
Jeremiah6:28 Yon djan lauter penge krik mandar, oun rakrenn djoungeles yek pral o vavareste. Djia dran saster hi len. Yon lauter djivenn an o rhorhepen." 
Jeremiah6:29 Mire menshe hi har čiklo roup. O bob rhačas zoreles, kay o roup djoudjo kerdo hounte vals. Ko čik vas gar vin. Djoudjo roup ačas gar pral. Lauter his čičeske. Mire menshe hi yaake čilačo, te vell nay o čilačepen gar dran lende vin." 
Jeremiah6:30 Doleske venn le kharedo: Ko roup, hoy molell či. O baro Devel kamell bouder či lendar te djinell." 
Jeremiah7:1 O baro Devel rakras ap o Yeremia oun penas: 
Jeremiah7:2 Dja oun čip tout an ko voudar o baro Debleskro kherestar, oun pen i menshenge kal laba: T'mer lauter dran o them Youda, kay djan kate dren, te mangenn o baro Debles an, shounenn o baro Debleskro lab!" 
Jeremiah7:3 Kova penell o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, – yob hi o Israeleskro Devel: Moukenn t'maro phouro drom oun t'maro phouro djipen, palle moukau t'men an kava them te djivell." 
Jeremiah7:4 Ma patsenn kol rhorhene laba, te penenn yon: Kate hi o baro Debleskro kheer, kay djivell lo. Ava, kate hi o baro Debleskro kheer!" 
Jeremiah7:5 Moukenn t'maro phouro drom oun t'maro phouro djipen, oun avenn lačo ap hakeneste!" 
Jeremiah7:6 Ma rikrenn kolen tele, kay hi dran i vavar them, vitar gar kol čaven, kay len kek dad bouder hi, oun kol romyen, kay len kek rom bouder hi! Ma denn kol menshen ratles, kay kek čilačepen kran! Ma nashenn vavar deblenge palla. Yon anenn t'men an i bibarht." 
Jeremiah7:7 Palle kamau me hako tsiro pash t'mende djivell ap kay platsa, an kava them, hoy me t'mare phourende dom." 
Jeremiah7:8 T'mer patsenn rhorhene laba. Kova hi čičeske. 
Jeremiah7:9 T'mer han čorepangre oun marepangre, kay denn vavaren moulo, t'mer morsha rhorhenn t'mare romyen vavar djouvyentsa, t'mer djouvya, rhorhenn t'mare romen, vavar morshentsa, t'mer denn t'men sovel oun rikrenn koya gar dren, t'mer rhačrenn firhen o rhorheno debleske Baal oun nashenn pal vavar deblende." 
Jeremiah7:10 Oun palle venn t'mer glan mande an kava kheer, hoy mange kerdo vas, oun penenn: Menge nay djal či. Oun krenn savo koova doureder, hoy rhoyran man." 
Jeremiah7:11 Kava kheer, hoy mange kerdo vas, hi kava t'menge i kheer, kay i čorepangre pengro čoredo koova khatrenn? Mishto, palle dikau me kova ninna yaake, penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah7:12 Djan pash ko foro Shilo, kay glan rah tsiro miro kheer tardo his. Oun dikenn, hoy me kote krom doleske, kay mire menshe Israel čilačepen kran." 
Jeremiah7:13 T'mer kran ninna lauter savo koova, penell o baro Devel. Oun me rakrom pale te pale t'mentsa, oun t'mer kaman gar te shounell. Oun me dom t'men gole, oun t'mer penan koy pre či." 
Jeremiah7:14 Doleske krau me kava khereha, har me ko foreha Shilo krom, ninna te vas kava kheer mange kerdo, oun t'mer patsenn, kote nay djal t'menge či. Me krau koy platsa paash, hoy dom t'men oun t'mare phouren." 
Jeremiah7:15 Oun me tradau t'men mandar krik, har me t'mare phralen krik tradom, oun kol tsele menshen dran Efrayim." 
Jeremiah7:16 Tou, Yeremia, mangess gar oun rovess gar glan mande kal menshenge, vitar gar peness mange, hoy len ap o dji hi, oun hoy len hounte vell, oun stakress lenge pash mande vitar gar dren. Me kamau t'men gar an-shounell." 
Jeremiah7:17 Dikeh tou gar, hoy yon krenna an kol forya an Youda oun ap kol dromma an Yerusalem?" 
Jeremiah7:18 Kol čave rodenn kasht, kol dada krenn yag, i djouvya krenn merklia koy bolepaskri rayetsake. Oun kol vavar deblenge anenn yon pipaske, te rhoyrap me man koy pral." 
Jeremiah7:19 Mange krenn yon koveha kek douka, penell o baro Devel. Ap pende kokres anenn le ladj." 
Jeremiah7:20 Doleske penell o baro Devel, maro ray: Miri bari rholi vell pral kava foro, pral i menshende oun pral i firhende, pral kol rouka an o veesh oun pral ko djob an kava them. Miri rholi hi har i yag, hoy kek nay krell vin." 
Jeremiah7:21 Kova penell o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, kay hi o Israeleskro Devel: Hoske rhačrenn t'mer firhen mange? Čivenn len pash kol vavarende, hoy rhan t'mer khetne glan mande! Rhan ko tselo mass!" 
Jeremiah7:22 Ap ko dives, har anom t'mare phouren dran o them Egiptia, penom lenge gar, te anenn yon mange firhen rhačepaske, vitar kek, hoy hounte rhan le glan mande." 
Jeremiah7:23 Me penom lenge: Shounenn ap miro lab, palle kamau me t'maro Devel te vell, oun t'mer han mire menshe. Djan ap ko drom, kay me t'menge penom, palle djal t'menge mishto." 
Jeremiah7:24 Yon shounan gar ap mande, oun lengre kanda pandan le, oun djivan pal lengro shero, oun kran hoy lengro čilačo dji penella, oun sikran mande pengro doumo, oun gar pengro mouy." 
Jeremiah7:25 Foun ko dives, har me t'mare phouren dran Egiptia anom bis kay dives, bičrom pale te pale mire boudepangren pash t'mende, kol rakepangren, kay mire laba doureder penan." 
Jeremiah7:26 T'mer shounan gar ap mande, oun dan kek garda ap mire laba. T'mer djan pal t'maro shero, oun kran boudeder čilačepen har t'mare phoure." 
Jeremiah7:27 Te peneh tou, Yeremia, lenge kova lauter, shounenn yon gar ap toute. Te deh tou len gole, penenn yon či koy pre." 
Jeremiah7:28 Doleske pen ap lende: t'mer han kal menshe, kay shounan gar ap lengro baro Debleste. Oun t'mer moukenn t'men či te penell. O čačepen hi moulo. Kek rakrell bouder pral o čačepen." 
Jeremiah7:29 Čin tire lengste balla tele, oun vitse len toutar krik! Gib i ropaskri gili ap i berge! O baro Devel hi rhoyedo pral kal menshende, oun tradell len pendar krik, oun kamell lendar či te djinell." 
Jeremiah7:30 Kol menshe an o them Youda krenn, hoy mange djoungeles hi, penell o baro Devel. Yon čivan kol djoungele deblen an kava kheer, hoy mange kerdo vas, oun kran les pale-čiddo." 
Jeremiah7:31 Oun kran an koy tala Ben Hinnom i rhačepaskri, hoy kharell Tofet, te rhačrenn yon pengre čaven oun čen. Savo koova penom me lenge gar. Oun kova vas mange gar an o shero." 
Jeremiah7:32 “Doleske vell ko tsiro”, penell o baro Devel, “kay penenn le gar bouder Tofet oun Ben Hinnom ap koy tala. Palle kharell koy tala tala, kay van le maredo. Kote paskrenn le pengre moulen, kek vavar platsa hi bouder koy." 
Jeremiah7:33 Čirkle oun divye firhe rhan kol moule menshen pre, oun kek tradell len krik." 
Jeremiah7:34 Oun o them Youda vell i moulo them. An lengre forya oun ap kol dromma an Yerusalem givell oun sal kek bouder i barhtyatar. Oun koy barhteli gole o pirnestar oun i pirnyatar shounah mer bouder gar.” 
Jeremiah8:1 O baro Devel penell: An ko tsiro venn kol kokale kol bare rayendar dran o them Youda kote vin lino, kay le paskedo hi, ninna kol kokale kol pralstunendar oun rashayendar, kol kokale o Debleskre rakepangrendar, oun kol kokale kol menshendar an Yerusalem." 
Jeremiah8:2 Oun kol kokale venn koy trouyel vitsedo glan o kham oun o čon oun i tsele bolepangre momlia, kolen kaman kol menshe, oun mangan len an, oun nashan lenge pal. Kolendar poučan yon oun sharan len. Kol kokale venn gar pre hadedo oun venn gar paskedo. Yon venn foul i phoubyake." 
Jeremiah8:3 Oun lauter kolla, kay pral ačan kal čilače menshendar, kay djivenn kote, kay me len tradom, lenge vals o merepen feteder har o djipen. Kova penell o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub." 
Jeremiah8:4 Ap mande penas lo: Pen ap lende: Kova penell o baro Devel: Te perell yek, stell yob sik pale pre. Te nashrell pes yek, rissrell yob sik pale trouyel." 
Jeremiah8:5 Hoske nashrenn pen kal menshe an o foro Yerusalem pale te pale, oun rissrenn gar trouyel? Yon ačenn pash kol rhorhene deblende, oun kamenn gar palpale pash mande te vell." 
Jeremiah8:6 Me dikau oun shounau, kay rakrenn yon gar o čačepen. Koy hi kek, kay khaytell les havo čilačepen yob kras. Kek poučella: Hoy krom me? Hakeno nashella doureder ap peskro drom, har i gray an o kourepen." 
Jeremiah8:7 O storko tel o bolepen djinell peskro tsiro, oun kol vavar čirkle rikrenn o tsiro dren, kay venn le pale." 
Jeremiah8:8 Har nay penenn t'mer: Mer ham gosevo. Men hi o baro Debleskro lab pash mende. Rhorhepen hi kova lauter, hoy kol sikepangre dran kova krenna." 
Jeremiah8:9 Kol goseve vitsran o Debleskro lab pal pende. Havo gosvepen ačell lenge? O dives vell, kay vell ladj oun daar pral lende. Yon venn tapedo oun pandles krik anlo." 
Jeremiah8:10 Lengre djouvyen dau vavar morshende. Oun lengre kotya them dau kolende, kay tradan len krik. Halauter, tikne oun bare, rhorhenna, te venn le bravelo. Ninna i Debleskre rakepangre oun rashaya rhorhenn i menshen," 
Jeremiah8:11 oun krenn yaake, har te vans kol douka mire menshendar gar yaake pharo. Yon penenna: Lauter hi mishto, lauter hi mishto, ninna te hi či mishto." 
Jeremiah8:12 Yon hounte ladjans koleske hoy yon kran, koveha man rhoyran. Kova krenn le gar. Yon ladjenn gar. Hoy ladj hi, djinenn le gar. Doleske venn yon maredo khetne kol vavarentsa. Te vau me, oun dau len i phagi, hounte perenn le, penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah8:13 Te kamau pash mire menshende lačepen te hatsell, hom har i harho, kay kamell drake oun fayge dren te lell, oun kay hatsell kek drake oun kek fayge ap i rouka. Ninna kol patria peran tele, penell o baro Devel. Doleske dom kal menshen pre. Vavar menshe lenn penge lengro them." 
Jeremiah8:14 Hoske ham mer kay trouyel beshdo? [poučenn i menshe dran Youda.] Mer vas khetne, te djas mer an kol zorele forya, te vas koy maredo! Mer moukam o baro Debles, maro rayes. Doleske kamell lo maro merepen, oun dell men savo pani te piyell, hoy marell men." 
Jeremiah8:15 Mer patsam, kay vell lauter mishto. Či vas mishto! Mer kamams, te vell i tsiro, kay kova, hoy an mende nasselo hi, sasto vals. Kova vas gar. I daar vas." 
Jeremiah8:16 Kolla, kay kamenn te kourenn pen mentsa, hi pash o foro Dan tardo. Foun kotar shounah koy gole lengre grayendar. O tselo them trissell koy golyatar hoy i graya denn. Yon venna oun rhan ko tselo them pre, lauter, hoy ap ko them hi, kol forya oun lauter, hoy koy dren djivella." 
Jeremiah8:17 Me, o baro Devel penau: Me bičrau čilače sapa pash t'mende, save, kay anenn o merepen. Kolen nay rikrell kek pre. Kolla dandrenn t'men." 
Jeremiah8:18 Miro dji phagell. Man hi ropaske. Hoy nay krell man pale zorelo? 
Jeremiah8:19 Dran o tselo them shounau me, har denn mire menshe gole. Kamell o baro Devel bouder gar o Devel an Sion te vell? Hi o fores Sion bouder kek baro ray? Hoske kran yon man yaake rhoyedo [penell o baro Devel], har mangan le pengre figuren oun rhorhene deblen an, kay kekeske ap i rig venna?" 
Jeremiah8:20 O tsiro hi trouyel, kay o djob dren anlo vell. O niyal hi trouyel, oun kek vas, kay men dran i bibarht vin las." 
Jeremiah8:21 Mire menshe phagan khetne. Doleske rovell miro dji. Mange hi, har te merap, oun djinau gar, hoy te krap." 
Jeremiah8:22 Hi an o them Gilead kek doukepaskro djet? Hi kek dramaskro koy? Hoske dell kek sastepen mire menshenge? 
Jeremiah8:23 Ah, te vals man doha pani an miro shero, oun mire yaka te vans har i kvella, te rovap nay ap o dives oun ap i rati, pral kolende mire menshendar, kay van moulo dino!" 
Jeremiah9:1 Te vals man an o moulo tato them i kheer, kay nay ačau, moukoms me mire menshen, oun djoms mange. Yon lauter hi har romma, kay moukan pengre romyen beshdo. Yaake moukan kal phoukepangre o baro Debles." 
Jeremiah9:2 Lengri čip hi har i čouri. Lengro rhorhepah van le zoreles an o them. O čačepen rakrenn le gar. Yek čilačo koova pal o vavar krenn le. Man prindjrenn yon gar, penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah9:3 Hakeno mou dell pes garda peskro malestar, oun ninna peskro phralestar! Yek phraal dell kol vavar phrales pral i kanda. Oun i maal rakrell djoungeles pral o vavareste." 
Jeremiah9:4 Yon lauter rhorhenn pengre malen. Oun kek rakrell laba, hoy čačo hi. Yon penan pengre čipya, te rakrenn le rhorhepen. Pale te pale krenn le čilačepen ap i vavarende," 
Jeremiah9:5 Oun moukenn gar tele, te rikrenn le i vavaren tele, oun te rhorhenn le len. Man kamenn le gar te prindjrell, penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah9:6 Doleske penell o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub: Har o roup an i yag djoudjes kerdo vell, yaake kamau mire menshen doukentsa djoudjes te krell. Dell či vavares, hoy krap me nay mire menshenge." 
Jeremiah9:7 Lengro rakepen hi har fayle, hoy anenn o merepen. Peskro mouyeha rakrell hakeno kamles, an o dji lourell yob, har te taprell lo o vavares." 
Jeremiah9:8 Dap me save menshen kek phagi, penell o baro Devel. Moukap me kal menshen yaake te djal, oun krap lenge či?" 
Jeremiah9:9 Me kamau pral kava them an i berge rovell, oun pral ko zenelo pralstouno them i ropaskri gili te givell. Lauter hi pre-rhačedo. Kek mensho djal koy trouyel. Kek groumya oun bakre denn kote gole. Ninna kol čirkle oun i divye firhe nashan penge, oun moukenn pen bouder gar te dikell." 
Jeremiah9:10 O baro Devel penell: Me kamau Yerusalem tele te phagell, yaake te ačenn kokres barra pral, oun kay divye djoukle dren djivenna. Oun dran kol forya an Youda krau i moulo them, kay nay djivell kek bouder dren." 
Jeremiah9:11 Me poučom: Baro Devel, hoske rhačell ko them oun vell moulo, yaake kay nay djal kek bouder koy trouyel? Koon hi gosevo oun hayvell kova? Ap koneste penal tou kova, yaake te penell yob kova i vavarenge?" 
Jeremiah9:12 O baro Devel penell koy pre: Me sikrom len miro drom, oun yon moukan les, oun shounan gar ap mire laba, oun djivan gar koy pal." 
Jeremiah9:13 Yon kran, hoy lengre čilače djia lenge penan, oun djan o debleske Baal palla, yaake har lengre phoure lende sikran." 
Jeremiah9:14 Doleske penell o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, kay o Israeleskro Devel hi: Me dau kal menshen shoutlo zenlepen rhapaske, oun pani, kolestar merenn le." 
Jeremiah9:15 Me tradau len krik pash menshende, kay prindjrenn yon gar, vitar gar lengre phoure, oun kamau o rharo pal lende bičrell, bis te yon lauter moulo hi." 
Jeremiah9:16 O baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, penell: Denn garda ap kova, hoy vella! Denn kol djouvyen gole, kay i baro ropen krenna! Bičrenn pal kolende, kay hayvenn ropaskre gilya te givenn!" 
Jeremiah9:17 Pen lenge, te venn yon sik, oun givenn i ropaskri gili pral mende, te nashenn i sva dran mare yaka, oun mare yaka sapeno hi i ropastar." 
Jeremiah9:18 Shounenn, o ropen vell shounlo an o foro Sion: Ah, har djan yon zoryah ap mende! I ladj vas ap mende! Mer hounte djas dran kava them. Mare khera rhačran yon tele." 
Jeremiah9:19 Shounenn, t'mer djouvya, o baro Debleskro rakepen! Denn garda ap leskre laba! Sikrenn t'mare čende, har te givenn le koy ropaskri gili; yek te anell i vavarat kay gili pashel:" 
Jeremiah9:20 An mare khera vas o merepen, an i vorhya djas lo dren. I čave ap i dromma meran, oun i terne morsha hi moulo čiddo ap i platse." 
Jeremiah9:21 O baro Devel penell: Kol moule menshe ačenn čiddo har foul ap i harhetikri phoub, har o djob, hoy činlo vas, oun čiddo ačas pal o činepaskro, oun kek las les khetne." 
Jeremiah9:22 I gosevo te sharell pes gar, kay yob gosevo hi. I zorelo te sharell pes gar, kay yob zorelo hi. I bravelo te sharell pes gar, kay yob bravelo hi." 
Jeremiah9:23 Koon kamell pes te sharell, kova te sharell pes, kay yob prindjrell man, oun te hayvell yob, kay me o baro Devel hom. Me krau miro dji pre i menshenge, oun krau, hoy čačo oun mishto hi ap i phoub. Savo koova hi mishto glan mire yaka. Kova penau me, o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah9:24 Shounenn, penell o baro Devel, ko tsiro vell, kay dau hakenes i phagi, kay činlo hi ap peskro mass, oun djivell, har te vals lo gar činlo:" 
Jeremiah9:25 kol menshe an i themma Egiptia, Youda, Edom, Ammon oun Moab, oun lauter kolla, kay činenn pengre balla trouyel tele, oun djivenn an o moulo tato them. Ninna te hi yon oun i tsele Israelitarya činlo ap pengro mass, djivenn le, har te vans le gar činlo." 
Jeremiah10:1 T'mer Israelitarya, shounenn, hoy o baro Devel t'menge penella!" 
Jeremiah10:2 Kova penell o baro Devel: Ma djan i dromma, hoy i menshe an vavar themma djana! Yon darenn glan o sikepen, hoy krenn i momlia ap o bolepen. T'mer hounte darenn kova gar." 
Jeremiah10:3 Lengro patsepen ap i moule deblende hi či moldo. Yon denn i rouk tele an o veesh, te krenn le i figura. Oun kova, kay hayvell o kashteha te boudrell, lell peskri čouri, oun krell dran o kasht i figura peskre vastentsa." 
Jeremiah10:4 Palle čivell lo roup oun sonakay koy pre, oun čivell koy figura ap pire, dell nagle an late, te ačell li nay tardo." 
Jeremiah10:5 Save debla hi či vavar har kol figure, hoy i harhe ap pengro kotar phoub čivenn, kay zenlepen bares vell, te tradenn le i čirklen krik. Yon nay rakrenn gar, vitar gar nay djan le, yaake hounte venn yon hidjedo. Doleske hounte trashenn t'mer lendar gar. Yon nay krenn kekeske čilačepen, vitar kek lačepen." 
Jeremiah10:6 Baro Devel, kek hi har tou hal! Tou hal baro oun zorelo! Oun tiri bari zoor dikan i menshe." 
Jeremiah10:7 Hakeno hounte trashell toutar oun hounte hadell tout. Tou hal o baro ray pral i themma! Ap toute hounte shounenn le. Mashkral kol tsele gosevende oun bare rayende ap kay phoub hi kek yaake har tou hal. 
Jeremiah10:8 Lauter hi yon dinelo oun narvelo, kolla, kay mangenn o kasht an. Kol debla nay sikrenn lende či." 
Jeremiah10:9 Yon hi kerdo menshendar, kay hayvenn mishto pengre vastentsa te boudrell. Rupeno saster dran o them Tarsis oun sonakay dran o foro Oufas tserdenn le pral kol figuren, oun rivenn len an blaueto oun lolo ripya." 
Jeremiah10:10 O baro Devel hi o čačo Devel, ko djido Devel, kay hako tsireske o baro ray ačell. Te vell yob rhoyedo, trissell i phoub, oun i menshe nay rikrenn leskri rholi gar vin." 
Jeremiah10:11 Pen lenge: Kol deblenge, kay kran gar o bolepen, vitar gar i phoub, hi kek platsa ap kay phoub oun tel o bolepen, oun nay ačenn gar." 
Jeremiah10:12 Yob, o baro Devel, kras i phoub peskri zoryah. Dran peskro gosvepen čivas lo i phoub zoreles tardo, oun kras o bolepen koy pral." 
Jeremiah10:13 Te dell yob gole, vell boud pani khetne an o bolepen; i volke moukell yob te vell foun doural, oun moukell yag pral oun tele karye te dell an o brishin. Ninna o phourdepen vell vin dran peskro kheer." 
Jeremiah10:14 Glan sau baro koova hi hako mensho dineles koy tardo. Savo koova nay hayvell lo gar te krell. Kolla lauter, kay kran figure, te mangenn le len an, hounte ladjenna pen. Lengre figure hi kek čače debla, kek djipen hi an lende." 
Jeremiah10:15 Yon molenn či, oun hi sapaske. An ko tsiro, kay rakrell o baro Devel o čačepen vin, hounte djan yon tele." 
Jeremiah10:16 Har vavarčandes hi ko Devel, koles o Yakobeskre čave an-mangenna! Yob hi kova, kay kras halauter. Oun i Israelitarya hi leskre menshe. Yob kharell: o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub." 
Jeremiah10:17 Le tiro koova khetne, Yerusalem! I lourde hi troul toute tardo ap hake rigya." 
Jeremiah10:18 O baro Devel penell: Kava kopo kamau me kal menshen krik tradell dran lengro them, te venn yon an i traash, oun lenn bare douka." 
Jeremiah10:19 Ah, har doukell man miro dji! Miro doukepen kamell gar sasto te vell. Patsom, kova hi har i nasslepen oun me rikrap kova vin." 
Jeremiah10:20 Miro plarhteno kheer vas paash dino, oun mire shelle hi an kotya činlo. Mire čave djan mandar krik, oun hi gar bouder koy. Kek čivell miro kheer pale pre, kek čivell i plarhta koy pral." 
Jeremiah10:21 Kol pralstoune his dinele, oun poučan gar pal o baro Debleste. Doleske his lauter čičeske, hoy yon kran. Oun kolla, kay denn yon garda pre, hi bouder gar khetne, oun djan kate te kote." 
Jeremiah10:22 Shounenn, hoy gole dino vell! Bari gole – har kourepangre vourdyendar – vell dran ko them, hoy kote čiddo hi, kay norden hi. Lourde venna oun krenn i forya an Youda yaake paash, te vell o them i moulo them, kay djivenn i divye djoukle dren." 
Jeremiah10:23 Baro Devel, me djinau, kova, hoy pral i mensheste vella, hi gar an ko mensheskro vast čiddo. Kova hi gar yob, kay krell peskro djipah, hoy yob kamella." 
Jeremiah10:24 Baro Devel, de man i phagi an o čačepen, oun gar an tiri rholi, te maress man gar!" 
Jeremiah10:25 Tiri rholi mouk te vell pral kol menshende, kay kamenn toutar či djinell, pral kolende, kay tout gar sharenn! Har divye firhe vavar firhen rhan, yaake rhan yon o Yakobeskre menshen pre, bis te bouder či pral ačas, Oun dran leskro them kran yon i moulo them." 
Jeremiah11:1 O baro Devel rakras ap o Yeremia oun penas: 
Jeremiah11:2 Rake kol menshentsa dran Youda oun kol menshentsa dran Yerusalem, oun pen lenge: Rikrenn, hoy t'mentsa vin krom!" 
Jeremiah11:3 Pen lenge: O baro Devel, kay hi o Israeleskro Devel, penell: Bibarht vell pral hakeneste t'mendar, kay rikrell gar kol laba, hoy me t'mentsa vin krom." 
Jeremiah11:4 Har me t'mare phouren dran o them Egiptia lom, har dran i sasterno yagakro bob, krom me lentsa vin, te shounenn le ap mande, oun krenn har lenge penom, palle hi yon mire menshe, oun me hom lengro Devel." 
Jeremiah11:5 Palle rikrap nay koy sovel dren, hoy dom len, oun dap len ko them, kay thoud oun gvin nashenna, yaake har kova kay dives hi. Me penom: Ava, baro Devel, yaake hi kova." 
Jeremiah11:6 Oun o baro Devel penas ap mande: Dja an kol forya an o them Youda, oun ap kol dromma an o foro Yerusalem, oun pen: Shounenn kol laba, hoy me t'mentsa vi-krom, oun krenn kova ninna!" 
Jeremiah11:7 Me dom t'mare phouren trad ap ko dives, har anom len dran Egiptia vin, bis ap kava dives, oun penom lenge pale te pale: Shounenn ap miro rakepen!" 
Jeremiah11:8 Yon shounan gar ap mande, oun dan gar yak ap mire laba. Hakeno djas pal peskro shero, oun kras kova, hoy leskro midjak dji leske penas. Me penom lenge, te hounte rikrenn le dren, hoy lentsa vin krom. Kova kran le gar. Doleske moukom pral lende koy tseli bibarht te vell." 
Jeremiah11:9 Oun o baro Devel penas ap mande: Me djinau, kay hadan pen kol menshe an o them Youda oun an o foro Yerusalem pral mande." 
Jeremiah11:10 Yon krenn savo čilačo koova har lengre phoure kran, kay glan lende his, oun kaman ap mire laba vitar gar te shounell, oun nashan kol vavar deblen palla oun mangan len an. Yaake rikran kol menshe dran o kheer Israel oun dran o kheer Youda kol laba gar dren, hoy krom lengre phourentsa vin." 
Jeremiah11:11 Doleske penell o baro Devel: Me anau bibarht pral lende, kolatar nay nashenn le gar krik. Yon denn pal mande gole, oun me kamau len gar te shounell." 
Jeremiah11:12 Palle denn kol menshe an o them Youda oun an Yerusalem gole pal kol deblende, kay rhačran yon lenge soungepaskro koova. Kal debla nay hayvenn len gar dran lengri bibarht vin te anell." 
Jeremiah11:13 Yaake boud forya t'men hi, yaake boud deblen hi t'men, t'mer menshe an Youda. Oun yaake boud dromma an Yerusalem hi, yaake boud rhačepangre kran t'mer, kay rhačrenn firhen o djoungelo debleske Baal." 
Jeremiah11:14 Tou Yeremia, mangess gar kal menshenge, oun rovess gar kolenge glan mande! Te denn yon gole pal mande an koy pharo tsiro, kamau me len gar te shounell." 
Jeremiah11:15 Kal menshe, kay len kamau, hoy krenn le an miro kheer? Yon krenn čilačepen oun penenna: Koy doosh, hoy ap mende anam, vell mendar krik lino, te dah mer sovel, te anah o Debleske firhen. Oun te krenn yon djoungelo koova, hi le barhtelo koy pral." 
Jeremiah11:16 His i tsiro, kay penas o baro Devel t'mendar: Yon hi har i shoukar zenelo djeteskro rouk, kay boud djeteskre drake baro venna. Kanna čivas yob ap leste i yag, hoy bari golyah leskre patria rhačrell oun leskre kashta phagell." 
Jeremiah11:17 Me, o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, krom dran o kheer Israel oun dran o kheer Youda i natsyona. Oun yon kran čilačo koova oun rhoyran man, har rhačran le firhen o debleske Baal. Doleske dau len trad, te vell bari bibarht pral lende." 
Jeremiah11:18 O baro Devel penas mange, hoy len glan hi, te djinap me kova." 
Jeremiah11:19 Me homs har i terno bakro, kay djinell gar, te vell lo kote anlo, kay vell lo maredo. Yaake djinom gar, kay rakran le khetne, har te krenn le mange čilačepen. Yon penan mandar, har te voms i rouk: Mer dah ko rouk tele, yaake rah har hi lo sasto. Maras les, te vell lo bistedo!" 
Jeremiah11:20 Koy penom: Baro Devel, tou ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, djineh, hoy an o mensheskro dji oun shero glan djala. Tou hal i čačepaskro, kay djal pal o čačepen. An tire vasta dau miro koova. Mouk man dikell, har tou len ko čilačepen pale deh, hoy yon kamenn mange te krell." 
Jeremiah11:21 I menshe an Anatot kaman man moulo te dell, oun penan mange: Mouk tele, te rakress, hoy o baro Devel touke penas, te kameh gar, te maras tout mare vastentsa! Doleske penell o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub: Me kamau kol menshen an Anatot i phagi te dell: Lengre terne morsha venn o rhareha moulo dino, oun lengre čave oun ča hounte merenn i bokatar." 
Jeremiah11:22  
Jeremiah11:23 An ko bersh, kay dau i menshende an Anatot i phagi, oun anau i bibarht pral lende, ačell kek lendar djido." 
Jeremiah12:1 Baro Devel, kamoms gar te penap, kay tou doosh ap toute anal. Djinau, tou hal an tiro čačepen. Ninna te hi yaake, kamau te poučap toutar, har nay hayvap tiro čačepen. Hoske djal kolenge mishto, kay djivenn i čilačo djipen? Hoske hi kolen, kay toutar krik djan, halauter, hoy len hounte vell?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Yon hi har rouka, kay tou čival an i phoub. Yon van baro oun zorelo, oun hidjrenn boud roukengre. Lengro mouy rakrell lačepen toutar, lengro dji hi dour toutar krik." 
Jeremiah12:3 Baro Devel, tou dikeh oun prindjreh man, oun djineh, kay miro dji hako tsiro pash toute his. Kol vavaren tserde krik har bakre krik tserdedo venn, te venn yon maredo! Oun čip len ap i rig, te venn yon moulo dino!" 
Jeremiah12:4 I rah tsiro hi kava them kek brishineha, oun ko tselo zenlepen meras tele. I firhe oun i čirkle meran. Kova lauter vas dran o čilačepen kol menshendar, kay kate djivenn. Yon penenna: O Devel dikell gar, hoy krah." 
Jeremiah12:5 Te kras tout kova khino, har nashal khetne vavar menshentsa, har kameh khetne i grayentsa te nashell? Te kameh tou tout ninna kate an o them te khatrell, kay boud menshe hi, hoy kameh tou an o pesso veesh te krell, hoy pash o pani Yordan hi?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Ninna tire phrala oun i menshe dran tiro dadeskro kheer moukan tout te perell, oun dan čilačes gole pal toute har kol vavar. Dik tout glan lendar, ninna te rakrenn yon kamlo touha." 
Jeremiah12:7 Me moukom mire menshen, ko kheer Israel. Kolen, kay mange vin rodom, tradom mandar krik. Kol menshen, kay o djiyestar kamau, dom an i vasta kolendar, kay kamenn len te marell." 
Jeremiah12:8 Mire menshe van mange har i levo an o veesh, kay kras o mouy pre, oun das man čilačes an-gole. Doleske kamau len bouder gar." 
Jeremiah12:9 O them mire menshendar vas i them, kay i divye djoukle khetne van. Oun troul lende hi save čirkle, kay rhan mass: Avenn khetne t'mer tsele divye firhe! Kate hi rhapen!" 
Jeremiah12:10 Boud raya dran vavar themma van, oun kran miro drakengro them paash, oun stakran miro kotar phoub khetne. Dran miro shoukar kotar them kran yon i moulo them." 
Jeremiah12:11 Hi ropaske, har paash ko them glan mande čiddo hi, kek djivell bouder koy. O tselo them hi paash, oun kek khaytell les." 
Jeremiah12:12 Pral ko nango pralstouno them venn kol kourepangre, kay denn lauter khetne. O baro Devel anas len kay, te kourenn le pen i menshentsa an o tselo them, yek rigyatar bis ap i vavar. Oun kek nay nashell peske lendar." 
Jeremiah12:13 Mire menshe čivan djob an i phoub, oun soubyengro zenlepen lan le khetne. Yon maran pen tele, oun lan či dran lengri phari boudi. Lauter his čičeske! His koy bari rholi o baro Deblestar, hoy kras lauter paash." 
Jeremiah12:14 O baro Devel penella: Kol čilače menshe, kay djivenn troul mire menshende, oun tapran lengro them an, hoy dom mire menshende Israel, te vell ko them lengro hako tsireske, kolen lauter tradau dran lengro them vin. Oun o kheer Youda lau dran lengre vasta vin." 
Jeremiah12:15 Pal kova, kay anom kol vavar menshen dran lengro them, krau me lenge miro dji pale pre, oun anau len pale an lengro them, kote, kay yon glan ko tsiro djivan." 
Jeremiah12:16 Yon sikran mire menshende, har te denn le pen sovel ap o debleste Baal. Kanna vell yaake: Te moukenn yon pen mire menshendar te sikrell, har te denn yon pen ap miro lab sovel, oun penenn: Pash o djido Debleste … palle moukau len mashkral mire menshende te djivell." 
Jeremiah12:17 Te hi yek natsyona koy, hoy kamell gar ap mande te shounell, lau lake lakro them hako tsireske krik, oun kay natsyona djal tel. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah13:1 O baro Devel penas mange: Dja oun gin touke i layntikro pereskro pandepen! Oun pande kova troul toute! Mouk les gar sapeno te vell! 
Jeremiah13:2 Oun me ginom kova oun pandom les troul mande, har o baro Devel penas." 
Jeremiah13:3 Pal i tsiro rakras o baro Devel o douyto kopo mantsa: 
Jeremiah13:4 Le ko pereskro pandepen, hoy tou ginal oun čival troul toute, oun dja pash o lengsto pani Eufrat oun khate les mashkral kol bare barra." 
Jeremiah13:5 Me djom koy oun khatrom kova pash o Eufrat, yaake har o baro Devel mange kova penas." 
Jeremiah13:6 Pal i rah tsiro penas o baro Devel ap mande: Dja pash o Eufrat oun le ko pereskro pandepen pale, hoy moukom tout kote khatrell." 
Jeremiah13:7 Me djom pash o Eufrat oun lom ko pandepen kotar, kay khatrom les. O pandepen his gar bouder tselo, oun či bouder moldo." 
Jeremiah13:8 Koy rakras o baro Devel mantsa oun penas: 
Jeremiah13:9 Kova penell o baro Devel: Ninna kamau me o tselo pre-phourdepen i menshendar dran Youda oun Yerusalem paash te krell. 
Jeremiah13:10 Kalla čilače menshe, kay kamenn mire laba gar shounell, djan pal pengro shero, oun djan vavar deblenge pal, anenn lenge firhen, oun mangenn len an. Yon hounte venn har ko pereskro pandepen, hoy bouder či molella." 
Jeremiah13:11 Yaake har i morsh ko pandepen troul peste pandella, yaake pandom me kol tsele menshen dran Israel oun kol tsele menshen dran Youda troul mande, te venn yon mire menshe. Kamom, te vap dran lende sharedo oun miro lab bares oun prindjedo vell; yon kaman gar ap mande shounell, penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah13:12 O baro Devel penas mange: Pen kal menshenge: Kova penell o baro Devel, kay o Israeleskro Devel hi: An i tsele khore vell mool čoredo. Oun te penenn yon ap toute: Koon djinell kova gar, kay an i khore mool dren čoredo vella?" 
Jeremiah13:13 Palle pen lenge: Kova penell o baro Devel: Me kamau lauteren mato te krell, kay djivenn an kava them: kol bare rayen, kay ap o Davideskri beshepaskri beshdo hi, i rashayen oun o Debleskre rakepangren oun i tsele menshen, kay djivenn an o foro Yerusalem." 
Jeremiah13:14 Yaake har kol khore phagenn, te venn le khetne dino, yaake krau, te phagell yek ap o vavareste, ninna i dada ap lengre čavende. Yon khaytenn man gar, oun i dji hi man vitar gar lenge, oun rikrau man gar pale, te marap len lauter. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah13:15 O baro Devel rakras t'mentsa. Doleske krenn t'mare kanda pre, oun venn gar pre-phourdo!" 
Jeremiah13:16 Hadenn t'maro baro Debles, yaake rah har o dives hi, oun t'men t'mare pire gar an o tamlepen ap i berge doukrenna. Ninna te lourenn t'mer ap koy momeli, anell o baro Devel tamlepen oun kali rat pral t'mende." 
Jeremiah13:17 Te kamenn t'mer kova gar te shounell, hounte rovap čorrhanes pral t'mare pre-phourde djia. O Debleskre menshe venna pandles krik anlo. Oun mire sva herenn gar pre te nashell." 
Jeremiah13:18 Pen o baro rayeske oun leskri dake: Avenn tele t'mari beshepaskri! I rayli rayeskri stadi peras t'maro sherestar tele. 
Jeremiah13:19 Kol forya an o moulo tato them Negev hi pandlo, oun koy hi kek, kay krenn len nay pre. Kol tsele menshe dran Youda van halauter krik anlo." 
Jeremiah13:20 Yerusalem, dik hoy vella! Kourepangre venna kotar, kay norden hi! Hoy vell kanna dran kol forya an Youda? Tou hals lenge har i bakrengro, oun i menshe koy dren har tire bakre, kolentsa sharal tout." 
Jeremiah13:21 Hoy peneh tou, te kamell o baro Devel, te venn kolla ray pral toute, kay an tire yaka tire mala his? I doukatar deh tou gole har i djouvel, kay lell i ternepen." 
Jeremiah13:22 Oun te poučeh tou toutar: Hoske vell koy bibarht pral mande, palle penau touke: Kova vell pral toute ko boud čilačepaske, hoy kral. Oun kolla hadenn tiro ripen oun djan zoryah ap toute." 
Jeremiah13:23 Nay krell i kalo mensho peskri kali hauta vavarčandes? Na-a! Nay krell i divyi margodja peskre balla vavarčandes? Na-a! Yaake nay krenn t'mer kek lačepen, ko čilačepen djas t'menge an o mass oun o rat." 
Jeremiah13:24 Doleske tradau t'men kate te kote, te ačenn gar bouder khetne, yaake har phourdell o dourho dran o moulo tato them o phouss kate te kote." 
Jeremiah13:25 T'mer bistran man oun djan rhorhene deblen palla. Doleske vell kay phagi pral toute, Yerusalem, hoy me, o baro Devel tout dau." 
Jeremiah13:26 Kova vell yaake har te hadaus me tiro ripen pral tiro shero, te dikell hakeno, kay nango hal." 
Jeremiah13:27 Yerusalem, me dikom, har moukal man, dikom tiri rhanč pal vavar deblen, tiro vi-ladjedo koova, tire figure, kolentsa rhoyral man ap i berge oun ap o them. Tou bibarhteli, hal pale-čiddo glan mande! Har rah kameh tou kova te ačell?" 
Jeremiah14:1 O baro Devel penas ap o Yeremia pral ko them, kay i rah tsiro kek brishin das." 
Jeremiah14:2 O them Youda hi bibarhtelo koy čiddo. I menshe an i forya merenna i bokatar. Lenge hi ropaske oun yon beshenn pen ap i phoub. Oun an Yerusalem denn le i vasta pral o shero khetne. 
Jeremiah14:3 Kol bravele bičrenn pengre boudepangren pal pani. Kolla djan pash i brounna, oun hatsenn kek pani. Lengre khore anenn le kek panyeha pale. Lenge hi ropaske, oun khatrenn pengro mouy i ladjatar." 
Jeremiah14:4 I phoub hi trouk oun dell gole pal brishin. Doleske hi kol harhenge ropaske, oun khatrenn pengro mouy." 
Jeremiah14:5 Ninna koy vesheskri groumni, kay las peskro ternepen, hatsell kek zenlepen, moukell peskro ternepen čiddo oun djal peske." 
Jeremiah14:6 Kol divye bourike hi tardo ap nange berge, oun lenn pharo dourho, har divye djoukle, kay troushenna. Yon hatsenn kek zenlepen bouder, oun lengre yaka venn korelo." 
Jeremiah14:7 Baro Devel, mari doosh hi glan mare yaka tardo. Boud kope djam toutar krik, oun shounam gar ap toute. Ab pale ap mari rig, te dikell hakeno, har kamlo hal!" 
Jeremiah14:8 Ap toute dikenn i Israelitarya, te vess ap lengri rig, oun leh len vin dran kay bibarht. Hoske kreh tou, har te vals i vi-themari an maro them, oun har yek, kay ačell yek rati oun djal palle doureder?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Hoske kreh tou, har te djinals gar, hoy te kress, har te vals i kourepaskro kek zoryah? Čačepah, baro Devel, tou hal pash mende. Mer ham tire menshe. Ma mouk men!" 
Jeremiah14:10 Yaake penas o baro Devel kal menshendar: Yon nashenn yek rigyatar ap i vavar, yaake har kamenn le. Doleske dikell o baro Devel gar lačes ap lende. Leske vell an o shero, havo čilačo koova yon kran. Oun lengri doshake dell yob len i phagi." 
Jeremiah14:11 Oun o baro Devel penas ap mande: Tou mangess gar kal menshenge, te vap lačes ap lende." 
Jeremiah14:12 Yon nay rikrenn pen pale o rhapastar, oun rovenn ap mande yaake boud har kamenn le, me shounau len gar. Ninna te rhačrenn yon mange firhen oun rhapen, dikau gar lačes ap lende. Me marau len an o kourepen, ninna i bok oun o nasslepen marenn le." 
Jeremiah14:13 Koy penom me: Baro Devel, miro ray, tire rakepangre penan lenge: Kek kourepen oun kek bok vell pash t'mende. O baro Devel krell, te vell kek kourepen pash t'mende an kek tsiro." 
Jeremiah14:14 O baro Devel penas ap mande: Kol rakepangre rakran rhorhepen an miro lab. Me bičrom len gar. Oun me penom lenge či, hoy te krenn le, oun rakrom lentsa vitar gar. Yon rakrenn pral kova, hoy dikan le, – kova vas gar mandar. Oun kova, hoy le glan-vi penan, hi rhorhepen oun dourkepen, oun hi či moldo oun vell dran lengre djia." 
Jeremiah14:15 Kova hi, hoy me, o baro Devel, krau ap kol rakepangre, kay penenn, te rakrenn le an miro lab, ninna te bičrom len gar. Yon penenn ninna, te vell kek kourepen oun kek bok an kava them. Save rakepangre hounte merenn an o kourepen oun i bokatar." 
Jeremiah14:16 Yaake djal ninna kol menshenge, kay shounenn ap lende. Yon hi moulo čiddo ap i dromma an Yerusalem. I bok oun o rharo maras len. Oun kek paskrell len, lengre romyen oun lengre čaven. Me anau čilačepen pral lende, yaake har yon čilačepen kran." 
Jeremiah14:17 Oun tou peness lenge kal laba: Me rovau ap o dives oun ap i rati, oun nay moukau gar tele. Mire menshe, kolen kamau har miri čay, hi khetne dino, oun lengro doukepen vell gar bouder sasto." 
Jeremiah14:18 Djau me vin ap o them, dikau me menshen, kay peran an o kourepen. Vau me an o foro, hi koy menshe čiddo, kay meran i bokatar. Ninna Debleskre rakepangre oun rashaya nashenn trouyel an o them, oun djinenn gar, hoy te krenn." 
Jeremiah14:19 Dal tou kol menshen an Youda pre? Kameh tou o forestar Sion či bouder djinell? Hoske dal tou men yaake, kay nay krell men kek bouder sasto? Mer patsam, kay vell lauter mishto. Či vas mishto! Mer kamam, te vell i tsiro, kay kova, hoy an mende nasselo hi, sasto vals. Kova vas gar. I daar vas." 
Jeremiah14:20 Baro Devel, mer dikah dren, kay djivam gar touha, oun mare phoure čilačepen kran. Mer lam doosh ap mende glan toute." 
Jeremiah14:21 Biče men gar toutar krik, te vell gar djoungeles rakedo pral toute! Mouk kek te sal pral Yerusalem, kay tiri rayli beshepaskri tardo hi! Ma biste, hoy tou mentsa vin kral, oun le tire laba gar pale!" 
Jeremiah14:22 Kek devel, koles i menshe an vavar themma an-mangenna, nay bičrell brishin! Vitar gar dell o bolepen dran peste brishin! Na-a, maro baro Devel, tou hal kova, kay krell savo koova. Doleske dikah ap toute." 
Jeremiah15:1 Oun o baro Devel penas ap mande: Ninna te vals o Mose oun o Samuel glan mande tardo, kroms me kal menshenge miro dji gar pre. Trade len krik mandar, oun mouk len te djal!" 
Jeremiah15:2 Oun te poučenn yon toutar: Kay djas mer, pen lenge: O baro Devel penell: Ap koneste o merepen vella, ap koleste vell lo. Koon moulo dino vella i rhareha, kova vell moulo dino. Pral koneste i bok vella, kova merella i bokatar. Koon pandlo vella, kova vell pandlo." 
Jeremiah15:3 Me, o baro Devel, lom man glan, te anap star kope pharo koova pral lende: o rhareha te venn le moulo dino, i djoukle tserdenn len krik, i čirkle rhan len, oun kova hoy lendar pral ačell, rhan i divye firhe pre." 
Jeremiah15:4 I tsele menshe ap i phoub denn i vasta pral o shero khetne, te dikenn yon kova. Koya hi koy phagi koleske, hoy ko baro ray Manasse an Yerusalem kras. Leskro dad hi o Hiskiya, ko baro ray pral Youda." 
Jeremiah15:5 Koon krell peskro dji touke pre, Yerusalem? Kones khayteh tou? Oun koon vella oun poučella, har touke djala?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Tou djal mandar krik, penell o baro Devel, oun kamal mandar či bouder djinell. Doleske hadom me miro vast ap toute, te marap tout. Me hom khino, te krap miro dji touke pre." 
Jeremiah15:7 An hako foro an o them Youda krom me i menshentsa yaake har yek, kay vitsrell o djob pral, te perell o phouss vin. Yaake tradom len kate te kote. Oun mire menshe moukan gar pengre čilače dromma. Koy marom lengre čaven, oun moukom len tele te djal." 
Jeremiah15:8 Koy hi boudeder djouvya, kolengre romma meran, har barra pash o baro pani. I daya shounan, kay meran lengre čave mashkral o dives. Koy vas i bari traash oun daar pral lende." 
Jeremiah15:9 Koy djouvyat, kay efta čave his, lake ačas kek bouder djido. Lakro dji phagas. Lakro kham djas tele mashkral ap o dives. Lakro sharepen oun lakri barht hi bouder gar koy. Oun hoy kol menshendar pral ačas, dau me an i vasta kolendar, kay denn len moulo o rhareha. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah15:10 Me bibarhtelo, hoske das miri day mande o djipen? Hakeno dikell čilačes ap mande. An o tselo them čingrenn le ap mande. Ninna te patsom kekestar love, oun kek patsas man love, praasell man hakeno." 
Jeremiah15:11 Baro Devel, te mangom toutar gar lačepen lenge, te mangom toutar gar, te less len vin dran i čilače vasta an lengre phare tsirya oun an lengri daar, palle moukess koy bibarht te vell, hoy kamenn yon ap mande te anell." 
Jeremiah15:12 Kek nay phagell saster, saster oun lolo saster dran ko them, hoy kote čiddo hi, kay norden hi!" 
Jeremiah15:13 [O baro Devel penas:] Youda, me kamau te vell tiro tselo bravlepen touke čoredo, yaake playsreh tou ko čilačepaske, hoy kral an tiro tselo them." 
Jeremiah15:14 Oun me kamau, te vess tou i boudepaskro kolenge, kay rikrenn tout tele an lengro them – i them, hoy tou gar prindjreh. Miri rholi rhačell har i yag, oun vell pral toute." 
Jeremiah15:15 Baro Devel, tou djineh halauter! Ma biste man, oun ab ap miri rig! De kolen lengro čilačepen pale, kay man palla lenna! Rike tiri rholi ap lende gar yaake rah pale, te vap gar maredo! Tou djineh, me hom touke koy. Doleske čingrenn le ap mande." 
Jeremiah15:16 Baro Devel, tou ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, me hom tiro. Yaake vas tiro lab miro rhapen hako kopo, kay me kova shounau. Te shounau tiro lab, givell miro dji, oun vell pale zorelo." 
Jeremiah15:17 Me nay hom gar vavar menshentsa barhteles khetne beshdo, oun sau lentsa, tou čival tiro vast ap mande, oun hom kokres. Tiri rholi pral kal menshende vas ninna an mande." 
Jeremiah15:18 Hoske venn mire douka gar sasto? Hoske hi miro doukepen yaake djoungelo, te vell lo gar sasto? Tou val mange har i brounna, kay an o niyale kek pani dren hi." 
Jeremiah15:19 Doleske penell o baro Devel: Te rikreh tou tout ap mande, rikrau me man ap toute, oun tou ačeh miro rakepaskro. Te rakreh tou, hoy mishto hi, oun rakreh gar, hoy či-moldo hi, hal tou miro mouy. Yon hounte venn pash toute, tou djas gar pash lende!" 
Jeremiah15:20 Me krau tout kal menshenge har i zoreli massouri. Ninna te djan le ap toute, nay vitsrenn le tout gar trouyel. Me, o baro Devel, hom pash toute, te vap ap tiri rig, oun te lap tout vin dran lengre vasta, –" 
Jeremiah15:21 ava, dran i vasta kolendar, kay čilačo ap toute hi, oun kay djan zoryah ap toute pre." 
Jeremiah16:1 O baro Devel penas ap mande: 
Jeremiah16:2 Tou hounte less touke kek romni oun less kek čaven an kava them. 
Jeremiah16:3 Me, o baro Devel penau touke, hoy djal kol čavenge, kay van kate boldo, oun lengre dayenge oun lengre dadenge an kava them." 
Jeremiah16:4 Lendar hounte merenn ap pharo nasslepen, oun kek rovell pral lende oun paskrell len. Yon ačenn čiddo ap i harhetikri phoub har firhengro foul. Vavar merenn an o kourepen. Oun ninna vavar merenn i bokatar. Oun i čirkle oun i divye firhe rhan len pre." 
Jeremiah16:5 O baro Devel penas ap mande: Tou djas an kek kheer, kay rovenn le pral yekeste, kay meras. Tou rovess gar lentsa, vitar gar peness lenge lače laba; me hom bouder gar i maal kal menshendar, hom lenge bouder gar lačo, oun krau miro dji lenge pandlo. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah16:6 Kol bare oun kol tikne hounte merenn an kava them, oun venn gar paskedo. Oun kek rovell pral lende. Oun kek činell pes ratles lenge oder činell peskre tsele balla lenge tele." 
Jeremiah16:7 Koy hi kek bouder, kay dell rhapen kolen, kay pral ačan oun rovenn. Ninna te meras lengro dad oun lengri day, hi kek koy, kay dell len čomone te piyell, te venn le pale zoreles." 
Jeremiah16:8 Tou djas vitar gar an i kheer, kay krenn le i biyab, te vess pash lende beshdo, te rhas oun piyess!"
