Jeremiah48:44 Kova kay nashell peske glan koy bari traash, kova perell an i rheb dren, oun kova kay nay stakrell dran i rheb vin, kova vell i doryentsa pandlo. Ava, ko bersh vella, kay dau i menshenge an o them Moab pengri phagi. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah48:45 Khine naashepangre dran vavar forya venn pash o foro Heshbon, te ačenn le koy. Koy vell i yag vin dran Heshbon, oun i bari yagakri čip djal dran o kheer o baro rayestar Sihon vin, oun rhačrell o them, kay kol bare mouyengre djivan, foun vin bis mashkral dren ap i berge." 
Jeremiah48:46 Har djoungeles djal touke, tou them Moab! Nashedo hi kol menshe, kay o debles Kemosh an-mangan; tire čave oun tire ča van anlo an o pandepen." 
Jeremiah48:47 I dives vell, kay krau me, te vell i menshenge dran o them Moab pale lauter mishto, penell o baro Devel. Kate herell pre, hoy o Yeremia pral o them Moab penas." 
Jeremiah49:1 Laba pral i Ammonarya. Kava penell o baro Devel: Hi o Israeles kek čave? Hi les kek čave, kay nay lenn o them pengre phourendar dren? Hoske las ko devel, koles i Ammonarya an-mangenn, o Milkom, o them Gad dren? Oun hoske djivenn leskre menshe kote?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Doleske penell o baro Devel: Ko tsiro vell, kay moukau i kourepaskri gole te shounell: Lourde venna pral o foro Rabba, ko baro foro foun i Ammonarya. O forestar Rabba ačell či pral har barra. Oun kol vavar forya koy trouyel venn pre rhačedo. O Israel vell o ray pral kolende, kay lan penge leskro them. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah49:3 Rob, tou foro Heshbon! O foro Ai hi khetne phagedo. Denn gole, t'mer djouvya an o foro Rabba, oun rivenn i gono pral t'mende! denn ropaskri gole, oun nashenn kate te kote! O Milkom peskre rashayentsa oun i pralstoune venn pandles krik anlo." 
Jeremiah49:4 Rabba, tou foro, hoy hadal tout pral o baro Debleste, hoske shareh tout tiro themeha, kay yaake boud pani nashell? Tou rikreh tout ap tiro bravlepen oun peneh touke an tiro dji: Koon nay djal ap mande pre?" 
Jeremiah49:5 O baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub penell: Me anau bari traash pral t'mende. I menshe dran i themma troul t'mende, kolla perenn pral t'mende, oun t'mer venn vin tradedo ap hake rigya. Oun kek lell t'men pale khetne." 
Jeremiah49:6 Pal ko tsiro vell yaake, te moukau i menshen dran o them Ammon pale pale te vell. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah49:7 Laba pral i Edomarya. Kava penell o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub: Hi kanna bouder kek gosvepen an o foro Teman? Djinenn i goseve bouder gar, hoy te krenn le? Tserdas pes o gosvepen lendar krik?" 
Jeremiah49:8 T'mer menshe an o foro Dedan! Nashenn t'menge sik, khatrenn t'men tele an i phoub! Me anau i bibarht pral kolende, kay venn pal o Esau, Kanna dau len pengri phagi." 
Jeremiah49:9 Kolla, kay i drake tele lenna, venna pral lende. Či moukenn le pral! Čorepangre venn rati pral lende, oun čorenn len vin, har lengro dji les lenge penella!" 
Jeremiah49:10 Me dom o kheer Esau an lengre vasta, oun čakrom lengro khatepen pre, te nay khatrenn le pen gar. Lengre čave, lengre phrala oun kol menshe, kay djivan lentsa khetne, venn maredo. Oun kek lendar hi koy, kay nay penell:" 
Jeremiah49:11 “Te hal bouder gar koy, dau me tire čaven, hoy len hounte vell, djipaske. Oun kol djouvya, kolengro rom meras, yon nay djinenn: Me vau lenge ap i rig.”" 
Jeremiah49:12 Shounenn mishto, t'mer Edomarya, penell o baro Devel. Dran ko khoro, kay hi pherdo miri rholi, hounte piyan ninna kolla, kay kek čilačepen kran. Oun t'mer kamenn, te vell kek phagi ap t'mende? Na-a, t'mer lenn t'mari phagi. T'mer hounte piyenn ko khoro ninna!" 
Jeremiah49:13 Me, o baro Devel, dom man pash mande kokres sovel, te vell t'maro foro Bozra i foro, kolestar i menshe i trashatar pengro shero krik rissrenn. Pral koleste ladjenn le pen, yaake paash dino vell ko foro. Te kamell yek o vavares te praasell, penell lo: Mou djal touke har o foreske Bozra! Ninna i tsele vavar foryendar an o them Edom ačell či pral har barra hako tsireske!" 
Jeremiah49:14 O baro Devel bičras peskro bičepaskres pash i menshende an vavar themma. Oun me shounom, har yob penas: Avenn khetne! Mer djas an o kourepen, oun kouras men i menshentsa an o them Edom!" 
Jeremiah49:15 O baro Devel penell ap o them Edom: Tou djiveh pral an i berge mank i bare barra. Kal berge hi tire. Oun i vavar menshe darenn toutar. Doleske phourdal tou tout pre, oun penal touke: Me hom o bareder. Kanna shoun, tiro dji rhorhras tout. Ninna te kreh tiro kheer yaake dour pral ap i berga har i adlari, vitsrau me tout kotar tele. Me krau tout tikno mank i natsyone. Oun i menshe an vavar themma dikenn tele ap toute. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah49:16  
Jeremiah49:17 Me kamau o them Edom yaake paash te krell, kay hakeneske, kay dikell kova, o rakepen krik ačella, oun yob pral kova sala, har kava themeske djas." 
Jeremiah49:18 Yaake har djas i foryenge Sodom oun Gomorra oun kol foryenge troul lende, yaake djal ninna o themeske Edom: Ko them vell yaake paash dino, kay nay djivell bouder kek mensho koy. Oun kek mensho krell pes kote i kheer. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah49:19 Har i levo vin vell dran i bourra pash o pani Yordan, vau me, oun tradau i Edomaryen sik dran lengro them, oun čivau koles pral o them, kones me vin rodom. Kek hi har me! Kek hounte penell mange, hoy te krap! oun kek ray hi zorleder har me!" 
Jeremiah49:20 Shounenn, hoy o baro Devel peske glan las, te krell lo ap i Edomarya, oun hoy kamell lo te krell i menshentsa an o foro Teman. Čačepah, yon halauter venn krik tradedo har bakre, ninna lengre tikne čave venn krik tserdedo. Hakeneske, kay dikell kova, ačell o rakepen krik." 
Jeremiah49:21 Te phagell o Edom khetne, trissell i phoub tel leste. Oun lengre golya venn shounlo pash ko Baro Lolo Pani." 
Jeremiah49:22 Dik, yob vella pral o them har i adlari, oun čivell peskre moussya pral o foro Bozra. An ko tsiro hi i djia kol čače morshendar an o them Edom yaake dareno, har ko dji i djouvyatar, kay anell i ternepen ap i phoub." 
Jeremiah49:23 Laba pral o foro Damaskus. I menshe an i forya Hamat oun Arpad shounan čilačo koova. Yon lan bari daar oun djinenn gar, hoy te krenn. I traash vell pral lende har o baro pani, hoy gar tardo ačell." 
Jeremiah49:24 I menshe an Damaskus hi dareno oun nashenn penge. Yon trissenna, oun bari traash oun douka hi an lende, har i djouvyat hi, kay anell i ternepen ap i phoub." 
Jeremiah49:25 Har hi lo kanna kokres mouklo, ko bravelo oun barhtelo foro!" 
Jeremiah49:26 Leskre terne morsha venn maredo ap leskre dromma. Ap ko dives nashrenn leskre tsele kourepangre pengro djipen. Kova penell o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub." 
Jeremiah49:27 Me čivau yag ap i massurya o forestar Damaskus, te venn i bravele khera, kay o Ben-Hadad djivas, pre rhačedo." 
Jeremiah49:28 Laba pral i menshende an Kedar oun pral o them Hazor, hoy o Neboukadnezar, ko ray pral o them Babilonia, peskre lourdentsa dren las. Kava penell o baro Devel ap i Babilonarya: Djan an o kourepen i menshentsa an Kedar! Oun marenn kolen, kay djivenn kote, kay o kham pre djal!" 
Jeremiah49:29 Palle čorenn le lenge lengre plarhtene khera oun lengre firhe, ninna lengre plarhte, oun lengro tselo koova oun lengre khamele. Oun pral lende vell kharedo: Traash troul lende!" 
Jeremiah49:30 Me, o baro Devel, penau i menshenge an o them Hazor: Nashenn t'menge, hadenn t'men sik krik kava themestar, khatrenn t'men dour an i phoub dren! O Neboukadnezar, ko ray dran o them Babilonia, koles hi an o shero, te krell lo t'menge čilačepen, oun moukell pes kolestar gar tele te anell." 
Jeremiah49:31 Me, o baro Devel, penom ap i Babilonarya: Djan pre an o kourepen! Kourenn t'men i menshentsa, kay djivenn kek daryah an pengro them, oun kolenge kek čilačepen kamell. Yon djivenn kokres, oun lengre forya, len hi kek massurya, vitar kek voudya." 
Jeremiah49:32 Lenn t'menge lengre khamele oun lengre boud firhen! Kolla, kay lengro baal troul o shero tele činenn, kolen tradau ap hake rigya. Haki rigyatar anau bibarht pral lende. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah49:33 O them Hazor vell i moulo them hako tsireske. Divye djoukle djivenn koy, oun bouder kek menshe. Kek mensho krell pes kote i kheer." 
Jeremiah49:34 Kava hi ko lab, hoy penas o baro Devel ap peskro rakepaskro, o Yeremia, pral o them Elam. Kova his i tikno tsiro palla, kay vas o Sedekya o baro ray pral o them Youda." 
Jeremiah49:35 Kova penell o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub: I Elamarya denn mishto karye pengre bogentsa. Doleske hi le yaake zorele. Me phagau lengre boge." 
Jeremiah49:36 Hake star rigyendar moukau i phourdepen te vell, hoy vell pral lende, oun tradell len ap hake rigya, yaake te hi kek them ap kay phoub, kay hi kek menshe dran o them Elam tradedo." 
Jeremiah49:37 Oun me krau, te lenn i Elamarya traash kolendar, kay kourenn pen lentsa oun kamenn len te marell. Miri rholi pral lende hi baro. Doleske anau bibarht pral lende. Oun bičrau o rharo pal lende, bis te bouder kek lendar pral ačell." 
Jeremiah49:38 Lengro baro rayes oun lengre pralstunen marau me, oun čivau miri rayeskri beshepaskri kote an o them Elam. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah49:39 Pal i rah tsiro krau me, te vell i menshenge dran o them Elam pale lauter mishto. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah50:1 Kava hi ko lab, hoy penas o baro Devel ap peskro rakepaskro, o Yeremia, pral o them Babilonia oun leskro foro Babilon:" 
Jeremiah50:2 Denn vin gole an i vavar themma! Halauter hounte shounenn! Hadenn t'mari themeskri plarhta pre! Hakeno te shounell kova! Rikrenn les gar pale! Penenn: O foro Babilon hi dren lino, Lengro devel Bel nay kras či, lengro devel Marduk hi khetne phagedo; lengre moule debla nay kran či, lengre figure hi pash kerdo!" 
Jeremiah50:3 Lourde venna dran ko them, hoy kote hi, kay norden hi, oun djan an o kourepen lentsa. Kolla krenn, te vell lengro them i moulo them, yaake kay kek nay djivell kote. I Menshe oun i firhe hounte nashenn penge dran ko them." 
Jeremiah50:4 An kol divessa oun ap ko emligo tsiro, penell o baro Devel, venn kol menshe dran o them Israel, khetne kol menshentsa dran o them Youda oun djan trouyel o ropah, oun rodenn man, pengro Debles." 
Jeremiah50:5 Yon poučenn pal o drom ap i berga Sion, kote kamenn le te djal: “Avenn, te kras men ap o drom pash o baro Debleste! Mer kamah pale leskre menshe te vell, oun yob te vell maro Devel! Kova te ačell yaake hako tsiro, mer kamah les gar te bistrell.”" 
Jeremiah50:6 Mire menshe hi har nashede bakre. Lengre bakrengre anan len o čačo dromestar tele. Yaake nashran le pen ap i berge. Pral tikne oun bare berge hounte nashan le, oun bistran, kay le khere hi." 
Jeremiah50:7 Halauter, kay len hatsan, rhan len pre. Oun kolla, kay his rhoyedo ap lende, penan: Mer krah či, hoy gar čačo hi! Yon anan doosh ap pende, har moukan le o baro Debles, kay das len lauter, hoy len hounte vell djipaske, oun ap koleste lengre phoure patsan." 
Jeremiah50:8 Nashenn sik dran o foro Babilon, moukenn ko them! Oun krenn har i morsh bakre, kay nashenn glan kol vavar bakre!" 
Jeremiah50:9 Shounenn, me bičrau boud lourden dran boud themma, kay foun kotar venna, kay norden hi, te kourenn le pen i menshentsa an Babilon. Yon venna oun lenn ko foro dren. Kal lourde denn mishto karye, oun taprenn hako kopo kova, hoy kamenn le te taprell." 
Jeremiah50:10 Yon čorenn o tselo them Babilonia vin. Halauter kay kote randenna, venn čalo. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah50:11 Ninna te han barhtelo oun sharenn t'men, kay randan miro them vin, oun stenn har o terne groumya an o zenlepen, oun denn gole har i zorele graya," 
Jeremiah50:12 o tsiro vell, kay hi t'maro themes, kay boldo van, bouder či sapaske. Menshe dran vavar themma san pral leste. Mank i tsele natsyone vell o them Babilonia o čorvleder, i moulo tato them, kek panyeha, kay či bares vell." 
Jeremiah50:13 Miri rholi vell yaake pral o foro Babilon, te djivell nay kote kek mensho bouder. Či har barra ačell lestar pral. Hakeneske, kay dikell kova, ačell o rakepen krik. Yob trissell peskro shero pral i tseli bibarht hoy kava foro tapras." 
Jeremiah50:14 T'mer, kay i bogentsa karye denn, čivenn t'men troul o foro Babilon pre! Lenn boud fayle oun denn pal leste karye! Kava foro kras čilačepen ap o baro Debleste." 
Jeremiah50:15 Denn i kourepaskri gole haki rigyatar! Dikenn, o foro dell pre! Leskre turme phagenn khetne. Leskre massurya hi tele phagedo. O baro Devel dell o foro Babilon peskri phagi. Denn o foreske halauter pale pale, hoy kava foro ninna kras!" 
Jeremiah50:16 Moukenn kekes djido, kay čivell djob an i phoub, oun kekes, kay činell o djob tele an ko tsiro, kay hi lo baro! Lauter kolla, kay hi gar khere an kava them, nashenn penge glan o marepaskro rharo, oun nashenn pash pengre menshende an pengro them." 
Jeremiah50:17 O Israel his har i nashedo bakro, hoy lan i leve palla. Ko ersto his o baro ray dran o them Assour, kova rhas les. Pal leste vas o baro ray pral o them Babilonia, o Neboukadnezar. Kova dandras ko mass tele, hoy ap leskre kokale ačas." 
Jeremiah50:18 Doleske penell o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, kay o Israeleskro Devel hi: Čačepah, me dau o rayes pral o them Babilonia oun leskro them pengri phagi, yaake har dom o rayes pral o them Assour peskri phagi." 
Jeremiah50:19 O Israel anau me pale khere, te djivenn le pale ap i berga Karmel oun an o them Bashan, oun hatsenn doha rhapen, oun venn čalo ap i berge Efrayim oun an o them Gilead." 
Jeremiah50:20 An ko tsiro oun an kol divessa vell koy doosh rodedo, hoy o Israel oun o Youda ap pende anan. Oun kote vell kek doosh hatslo. Me lau lat kolendar krik, kay moukom pral ačell. Kova penau me, o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah50:21 Djan an o kourepen i menshentsa an o them Meratayim; kourenn t'men i menshentsa an o them Pekod; Marenn len oun denn lauter paash, hoy len hi, penell o baro Devel. Krenn halauter yaake, hoy me t'menge penom!" 
Jeremiah50:22 Shounenn i kourepaskri gole an o them Babilonia, oun o baro ropen." 
Jeremiah50:23 Babilonia, tou hal har i depaskro saster, kay das vavar themma an kotya. Kanna veh tou ninna tele phagedo oun an kotya dino. I menshenge an i vavar themma ačell o rakepen krik, te dikenn le tout." 
Jeremiah50:24 Me čivom dorya pral tiro drom, te peress dren, Babilon, oun sikeder har tou dikal, moukal tout te taprell. Pral mande, o baro Debleste, hadal tout. Doleske val tapedo oun pandlo." 
Jeremiah50:25 O baro Devel kras peskro kourepaskro kheer pre, oun las o marepaskre koola vin, kolentsa yob an peskri rholi ap o them Babilonia pre djal. Yob, o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, les hi kote boud te krell." 
Jeremiah50:26 Avenn pral kava them haki rigyatar, krenn leskre djobenge khera pre, vitsrenn halauter khetne ap i phoub, oun rhačrenn les pre, te ačell či pral!" 
Jeremiah50:27 Marenn i tsele terne morshen, denn len tele čourye har terne gourma! Har djoungeles djal lenge! Lengro dives vas, ko tsiro, kay lenn le pengri phagi!" 
Jeremiah50:28 I bari gole vell shounlo kolendar, kay hounte nashenn penge sik, kolendar, kay van vin dran o them Babilonia. An Yerusalem ap i berga Sion penenn le, hoy maro baro Devel ap i Babilonarya kras, te dell lo lenge pale, hoy yon leskro khereha kran." 
Jeremiah50:29 Kharenn kolen khetne, kay hayvenn pengre bogentsa karye te dell! Yon halauter hounte čivenn pen pre troul o foro Babilon, oun moukenn kekes te nashell peske krik oun djivell! O foro Babilon phourdas pes pre oun hadas pes pral mande, o baro Debleste, kay o Israeleskro čačo Devel hi. Doleske denn o foreske o čilačepen pale pale, hoy lo kras! Yaake har yob ap i vavarende kras, yaake krenn leske ninna!" 
Jeremiah50:30 Leskre terne morsha venn maredo ap leskre dromma. Ap ko dives nashrenn leskre tsele kourepangre pengro djipen, penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah50:31 Dik, tou pre-phourdo, me kamau ap toute te vell, penell o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub; tiro dives vas, ko tsiro, kay tiri phagi leh." 
Jeremiah50:32 Kote perell ko pre-phourdo oun ačell čiddo. Oun kek hi koy, kay čivell les pale ap peskre pire. Me kamau an leske forya yag te čivell, kova te rhal halauter pre, hoy kote trouyel hi." 
Jeremiah50:33 Kava penell o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub: Kanna hi yaake: I menshe dran o them Israel khetne kol menshentsa dran o them Youda venn tele rikedo. Oun halauter, kay pandan len oun anan len vin dran lengro them, rikrenn len zoreles pash pende, oun kamenn len gar pale pale an pengro them te moukell." 
Jeremiah50:34 O dives vell, kay lau len kote vin, me hom zorelo. Me, o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, lau lengro koova an miro vast, oun lau o kourepen krik i phoubyatar, Pral i menshende an o them Babilonia anau traash." 
Jeremiah50:35 O baro Devel penell: O rharo mou vella pral o them Babilonia, oun pral o foro Babilon peskre pralstunentsa oun goseve morshentsa!" 
Jeremiah50:36 O rharo mou vell pral lengre dourkepangre, te vell diklo, havo dinelo rakepen yon rakran! O rharo mou vell pral lengre zorele morsha, te darenn le!" 
Jeremiah50:37 O rharo mou vell pral lengre graya oun lengre kourepaskre vourdya, oun pral hake lourdende, kay venn dran vavar themma, te venn le har djouvya! O rharo mou vell ninna pral lengro bravlepen, kova vell lenge krik lino!" 
Jeremiah50:38 O brishin te vell pale rikedo, te nashenn kek panya bouder an o them! O them Babilonia hi pherdo moule debla, oun lengro patsepen ap kal čilače moule debla kras i menshen narvelo." 
Jeremiah50:39 Doleske vell ko tsiro, kay djivenn divye firhe dran o moulo them kote, ninna divye djoukle oun kol bare čirkle, kay kharenn autruche. Kek mensho djivell bouder koy, An kek tsiro krenn i menshe penge kote khera." 
Jeremiah50:40 Yaake har das o Devel i forya Sodom oun Gomorra khetne, ninna kol forya troul lende, yaake djal ninna o themeske Babilonia: Ko them vell yaake paash dino, kay nay djivell bouder kek mensho koy. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah50:41 Denn garda: Boud menshe venna dran lengro them, hoy kote čiddo hi, kay norden hi. Ava, boud menshe pengre bare rayentsa krenn pen ap o drom dran ko dour them, te djan le an o kourepen." 
Jeremiah50:42 Len hi boge oun rhare. Yon hi midjak oun len khaytell kek. Ap graya klissenn le i golyah, hoy yaake baro hi har i gole, hoy o baro pani krell. Yon venna, te kourenn le pen touha, tou foro Babilon." 
Jeremiah50:43 Te shounell o baro ray an Babilon lendar, perenn leskre vasta ap leskre herya tele. Oun i bari traash vell ap leste har i traash i djouvyatar, kay i ternepen lella." 
Jeremiah50:44 Har i levo vin vell dran i bourra pash o pani Yordan, vau me oun tradau i Babilonaryen sik dran lengro them, oun čivau koles pral o them, kones me vin rodom. Kek hi har me! Kek hounte penell mange, hoy te krap! oun kek ray hi zorleder har me!" 
Jeremiah50:45 Shounenn, hoy o baro Devel peske glan las te krell lo ap o foro Babilon, oun hoy kamell lo te krell i menshentsa an o them Babilonia. Čačepah, yon halauter venn krik tradedo har bakre. Ninna lengre tikne čave venn krik tserdedo. Hakeneske, kay dikell kova, ačell o rakepen krik." 
Jeremiah50:46 Te vell o foro Babilon dren lino, trissell i phoub koy golyatar. Oun koy ropaskri gole vell shounlo an i vavar themma." 
Jeremiah51:1 Kava penell o baro Devel: Dik, me bičrau i dourho, hoy anell o merepen pral o them Babilonia oun pral kolende, kay kote djivenna – kolla, kay hadan pen pral mande." 
Jeremiah51:2 Me bičrau an o them Babilonia vi-themarya, kay tradenn i Babilonaryen vin dran pengro them, har i dourho, hoy phourdell o phouss krik, bis te o them djoudjo hi. Ap ko čilačo dives venn le haki rigyatar pral lende." 
Jeremiah51:3 Me penau lenge: Denn kol lourden an Babilon kek tsiro, te denn le karye! Ma moukenn len pengro kourepaskro gad ap pende te rivell! Lengre terne morsha te khaytenn t'men gar! Marenn lengre tsele lourden halauter khetne!" 
Jeremiah51:4 Palle hi i moule lourde čiddo an o tselo them Babilonia, oun tele čourye-dine ap i dromma." 
Jeremiah51:5 I Babilonarya kran baro čilačepen ap o Israeleskro Debleste. O Israel oun o Youda van gar mouklo pengro Deblestar, ko baro Deblestar, kay hi o ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub." 
Jeremiah51:6 Nashenn sik dran o foro Babilon, nashenn t'maro djipaske! te djan gar halauter tele an koy doosh, hoy kava foro ap peste anas! Kova hi o baro Debleskro tsiro, kay dell lo i Babilonaryen ko čilačepen pale, hoy kolla kran." 
Jeremiah51:7 O foro Babilon his har i sonakaskro khoro an o baro Debleskro vast, i khoro, hoy pherdi mool his, kolestar i menshe an i tsele themma piyan oun mato van. Doleske van yon yaake narvelo." 
Jeremiah51:8 Har i khoro tele perell oun an kotya phagell, yaake sik peras o foro Babilon oun khetne phagedo. Rovenn pral o foro Babilon! Anenn leske doukepaskro djet, Nay vell, te vell lo pale sasto!" 
Jeremiah51:9 [I vi-themarya, kay kote djivenn, penenn:] Mer kamam o foro Babilon sastes te krell, oun yob kamas gar sasto te vell. Palle moukenn les, har yob kamella! Mer djas halauter pale an mare themma! Leskri phagi hi yaake baro, te djal li bis an o bolepen." 
Jeremiah51:10 [I Israelitarya penenn:] O baro Devel sikras, kay ham an o čačepen tardo. Avenn, te djas ap i berga Sion, te penas, hoy maro baro Devel lačo koova kras." 
Jeremiah51:11 I Babilonarya kran o baro Debleskro kheer paash. Doleske las pes o baro Devel glan, te phagell lo o foro Babilon tele. Yob das i rayende dran o them Media boud zoor an lende, te djan le ap o foro Babilon pre. Činenn t'mare fayle! Lenn t'mare sasterne bečeskre patria an o vast!" 
Jeremiah51:12 Hadenn o kourepaskri plarhta pre, te sikrenn, kay djan t'mer an o kourepen o foreha Babilon. Čivenn boud kourepangren troul o foro! Čivenn ninna kol lourden kote koy, kay garda denn! Čivenn ninna lourden khatemen pal o foro, te nay perenn le i Babilonaryen an o doumo. O baro Devel krell, hoy yob pes glan las, oun hoy lo pral i menshende an o foro Babilon rakras." 
Jeremiah51:13 Tou foro, kay hal kote, kay bare panya hi, tou, kay tout baro bravlepen hi, tiro tsiro hi trouyel, tiro djipaskro thab vell tele činlo." 
Jeremiah51:14 O baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub das pes sovel pash peste: Čačepah, me anau boud lourden an tiro foro – yaake boud har stepangre! Oun yon denn bari gole i barhtyatar, te lenn le tiro foro dren." 
Jeremiah51:15 Yob, o baro Devel, kras i phoub peskri zoryah, oun kras lat zoreles an peskro gosvepen, oun kras o bolepen koy pral." 
Jeremiah51:16 Te dell yob gole, vell boud pani khetne an o bolepen; i volke moukell yob te vell foun doural, oun moukell yag pral oun tele karye te dell an o brishin. Ninna o phourdepen vell vin dran peskro kheer." 
Jeremiah51:17 Glan sau baro koova hi hako mensho dineles koy tardo. Savo koova nay hayvell lo gar te krell. Kolla lauter, kay kran figure, te mangenn le len an, hounte ladjenna pen. Lengre figure hi kek čače debla, kek djipen hi an lende." 
Jeremiah51:18 Yon molenn či, oun hi sapaske. An ko tsiro, kay rakrell o baro Devel o čačepen vin, hounte djan yon tele." 
Jeremiah51:19 Har vavarčandes hi ko Devel, koles o Yakobeskre čave an-mangenna! Yob hi kova, kay kras halauter. Oun i Israelitarya hi leskre menshe. Yob kharell: o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub." 
Jeremiah51:20 Oun yob penell: Tou, foro Babilon, hals miro depaskro saster, miro kourepaskro tover; vavar natsyone dom touha khetne, oun vavar rayengre themma krom touha paash." 
Jeremiah51:21 Tiri zoryah dom me grayen oun klissepangren paash, ninna vourdya oun kol kourepangre, kay koy pral tardo hi." 
Jeremiah51:22 Tiri zoryah dom morshen oun djouvyen moulo, phoure oun terne, čave oun ča." 
Jeremiah51:23 Tiri zoryah dom bakrengre oun lengre bakre moulo, harhe oun lengre groumya, kay i vourdya tserdan, ninna themeskre raya oun vavar raya." 
Jeremiah51:24 Kanna dikenn t'mer, har playsrau o foreske Babilon oun i tsele menshenge, kay an o them Babilonia djivenn, lengro tselo čilačepen pale pale, hoy yon ap i berga Sion kran. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah51:25 Babilon, tou marepaskri berga, tou, kay o merepen anal pral i tseli phoub, dik, me vau pral toute, penell o baro Devel. Me taprau tout miro vasteha, oun vitsrau tout i berga tele. Hoy toutar ačell hi rhačede barra." 
Jeremiah51:26 Kek barra hi mank lende, kay hi yaake lačo, te čivenn le i kheer ap lende pre, oun hoy nashte hidjrenn i kheer. Hako tsireske ačell toutar či har barra pral. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah51:27 Hadenn o kourepaskri plarhta pre ap i phoub! Phourdenn an i phourdepaskri an i tsele themma! Denn i rayen pral i vavar themma gole, te djan le an o kourepen o foreha Babilon! Penenn i bare rayenge pral i themma Ararat, Minni oun Ashkenas, te bičrenn le lourden, te kourenn le pen i menshentsa an Babilon! Rodenn lourdengre pralstunen vin! Anenn yaake boud graya khetne har stepangre!" 
Jeremiah51:28 Denn i rayen pral i vavar themma gole, te djan le an o kourepen o foreha Babilon, kol bare rayen dran o them Media, lengre themeskre rayen oun kol vavar pralstunen, ninna kol tsele lourden an kol themma, kay yon penepaske hi." 
Jeremiah51:29 I phoub trissella oun darella! Kova, hoy o baro Devel pes glan las, vell yaake: O foro Babilon oun o tselo them Babilonia vell i moulo them, kay bouder kek nay djivella." 
Jeremiah51:30 Kol zorele kourepangre an o them Babilonia ačenn an lengre zorele khera, oun djan gar an o kourepen. Lengri zoryah hi či bouder, yon van har djouvya. O foreskre voudya hi pre-phagedo, oun i khera rhačenna." 
Jeremiah51:31 Bičepangre venn haki rigyatar, yek pal o vavar, te penenn le o baro rayeske pral o foro Babilon: “Tiro foro vas dren lino haki rigyatar." 
Jeremiah51:32 Lourde hi tardo pash o lengsto pani, te nashell nay bouder kek vergel. I zorele khera hi tele rhačedo. Oun mare kourepangre van dareno.”" 
Jeremiah51:33 Kava penell o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, kay o Israeleskro Devel hi: O foro Babilon hi har i djobeskri platsa, hoy vell i pirentsa zoreles stakedo, te denn le nay kote o djob vin. Sik vell o tsiro o foreske, kay vell lo khetne stakedo." 
Jeremiah51:34 O foro Yerusalem penell: O Neboukadnezar, ko baro ray dran o them Babilonia, rhas man pre oun maras man. Har i baro panyeskro sap rhas lo man, oun kras peskro per pesso miro bravlepah. Palle vitsras lo man krik har i khoro, kay či dren hi. “Mou vell pral o foro Babilon ko čilačepen, hoy vas menge ninna kerdo”, penenn i menshe ap i berga Sion. “I Babilonarya moukan maro rat te nashell. Kanna mou nashell lengro rat!”" 
Jeremiah51:35  
Jeremiah51:36 Doleske penell o baro Devel ap o foro Yerusalem: Dik, me kamau tiro koova an miro vast te lell. Me krau, te vell lengro lengsto pani Eufrat trouk, oun te nashell an lengre vavar panya bouder kek pani." 
Jeremiah51:37 Či te ačell o forestar Babilon har barra, oun divye djoukle djivenn kote. Kolenge, kay dikenn ko foro, ačell o rakepen krik i trashatar. O foro vell lenge sapaske. Oun kek mensho djivell bouder kote." 
Jeremiah51:38 Kanna denn le khetne gole har i leve, oun sikrenn i danda har i terne leve." 
Jeremiah51:39 Len hi bari bok – oun me krau lenge i rhapen, oun krau, te piyenn le pen mates, oun lenge hi halauter sapaske. Palle sovenn le dren hako tsireske, oun stenn bouder gar pre. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah51:40 Me kamau len kote te anell, kay venn le tele čourye dino har terne bakre, morsh bakre oun bouzya." 
Jeremiah51:41 O foro Sheshak hi khetne phagedo! Ko foro, hoy ap i tseli phoub bares an-diklo his, hi dren lino! Har nay vas kova? I menshenge an i vavar themma ačell o rakepen krik i trashatar." 
Jeremiah51:42 I baro pani vas pral o foro Babilon, zorele panya čakran o foro tel pende." 
Jeremiah51:43 I vavar forya an o them hi paash dino. O them Babilonia vas i moulo tato them kek panyeha, i divyo trouk them, kay kek mensho djivell, oun kek mensho ap i raysa djal." 
Jeremiah51:44 O baro Devel penell: Ava, me dom o rhorheno debles Bel an o them Babilonia peskri phagi, oun tserdom dran leskro mouy kova, hoy yob pre rhas. I menshe dran vavar themma nashenn leske bouder gar palla. I massurya o forestar Babilon peran khetne." 
Jeremiah51:45 T'mer Israelitarya, mire menshe, djan vin dran ko them! Hakeno t'mendar mou nashell peskro djipaske! Miri bari rholi vell pral o foro." 
Jeremiah51:46 Te shounenn t'mer, hoy an o them rakedo vell, nay darans t'mer, oun nay nashrans t'mare djia pengri zoor. Hako bersh vell vavar djoungelo koova rakedo: Bari zoryah djan le ap i tiknende an kava them, oun yek ray djal ap o vavareste." 
Jeremiah51:47 Dikenn, ko tsiro vella, kay krau me kol moule deblen an Babilonia paash. O them Babilonia djal tele an ladj. Oun kolla, kay van maredo, ačenn kote ap i phoub čiddo." 
Jeremiah51:48 O bolepen oun i phoub, oun halauter, hoy kote dren hi, denn gole i barhtyatar, te perell o foro Babilon an i vasta kolendar, kay venn dran ko them, hoy kote čiddo hi, kay norden hi, te denn le o foro Babilon paash. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah51:49 I lourde dran Babilon maran boud boud menshen ap i tseli phoub. Kanna hounte vell o foro Babilon maredo doleske, kay maran leskre lourde kol menshen dran Israel." 
Jeremiah51:50 T'mer i menshendar Israel, kay van gar maredo, djan vin dran o foro Babilon! Oun rikrenn t'men gar pre! Ninna te han an i dour them, ma bistrenn o baro Debles, vitar gar o foro Yerusalem!" 
Jeremiah51:51 T'mer penenn: I ladj vas pral mende. Menshe dran vavar themma praasan men oun san pral mende. Vi-themarya peran an o kheer o baro Deblestar dren. 
Jeremiah51:52 O baro Devel penell: Doleske penau t'menge: Ko tsiro vella, kay krau i rhorhene deblen an Babilon paash. Oun an o tselo them hi kolla čiddo, kay an o kourepen doukedo van, oun denn i bari gole." 
Jeremiah51:53 Ninna te stakrals o foro Babilon pral an o bolepen, oun te krans le pengre massurya yaake baro, te nay stakrals kek pral vergel, bičrau me marepangre, kay venn pral lende. Kova penell o baro Devel." 
Jeremiah51:54 Bari gole vell shounlo dran o foro Babilon, oun zorelo ropen dran o them Babilonia." 
Jeremiah51:55 O baro Devel krell o foro Babilon paash, oun marell kol boud menshen, kay kote djivenn. Har i baro zorelo pani, hoy bari gole dell," 
Jeremiah51:56 venn kolla pral o foro Babilon, kay phagenn o foro tele. Kol zorele kourepangre an Babilon venn pandlo, lengre boge venn phagedo. O baro Devel hi i Devel, kay dell lenge ko čilačepen pale, hoy le kran." 
Jeremiah51:57 O baro Devel penell: Me krau len mato, kol pralstunen an Babilon, kol goseve morshen, themeskre rayen, pralstoune lourden, oun kol vavar lourden an Babilon, te perenn le an i sopen, kolestar yon bouder gar pre stenn. Kova penell o baro ray, koleskro lab hi: baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub." 
Jeremiah51:58 Kava penell o baro Devel, ko ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub: I massurya ko baro forestar Babilon venn tele phagedo bis ap i phoub, oun o foreskre bare voudya venn rhačedo. Palle hi koy boudi čičeske kerdo, hoy menshe dran vavar themma kran. Koleske yon pen tele maran, kova rhačrell pre." 
Jeremiah51:59 Kal tsele laba, kay penenn, havi bibarht pral o foro Babilon vell, činas o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yeremia, an i liil. Kava liil das lo i morsheste, kova kharas Seraya. Leskro dad his o Neriya, koleskro dad his o Maasseya. Kova his an ko tsiro, har o Sedekya an o starto bersh baro ray pral o them Youda his, oun an o foro Babilon djas. O Seraya djas leha. Oun an leskro vast his, te dikell lo, kay lauter mishto djas ap o drom." 
Jeremiah51:60  
Jeremiah51:61 Oun o Yeremia penas ap o Seraya: Te veh tou an o foro Babilon, palle dik, te draveress kal tsele laba glan." 
Jeremiah51:62 Oun palle pen: “Baro Devel, tou penal, kay kreh kava foro paash, yaake kay kek nay djivella bouder kate, kek mensho oun kek firho. Tou penal, te vell kava foro i moulo foro hako tsireske.”" 
Jeremiah51:63 O Yeremia penas doureder ap o Seraya: Te draveral kava liil vin, palle pande i bar koy trouyel, oun vitse les an o Pani Eufrat," 
Jeremiah51:64 oun pen: “Yaake hounte djal o foro Babilon tele, oun vell bouder gar pre dran koy bari bibarht, hoy o baro Devel pral kava foro anell.” Palle hi ko foro bouder gar koy. Kalla his o Yeremiyeskre laba." 
Jeremiah52:1 Biish-te-yek bersh his o Sedekya, har lo baro ray vas; oun deesh-te-yek bersha his lo baro ray an o foro Yerusalem. Leskri day kharas Hamoutal. Lakro dad his o Yirmeya dran Libna." 
Jeremiah52:2 Oun o Sedekya kras, hoy djoungeles his glan o baro Debleskre yaka, yaake har o Yoyakim ninna kras." 
Jeremiah52:3 Kova halauter kras o baro Debles yaake rhoyedo pral i menshende an o foro Yerusalem oun an o them Youda, te tradas lo len pestar krik. Oun o Sedekya phagas o baro rayeha pral o them Babilonia, oun kras bouder gar, hoy kova kamas." 
Jeremiah52:4 Har o Sedekya an o enyato bersh baro ray his, vas o baro ray pral o them Babilonia, o Neboukadnezar, peskre tsele lourdentsa glan o foro Yerusalem. Kova his ap o deshto dives an o deshto čon. Oun yob čivas peskre lourden troul o tselo foro, oun moukas čik pre te vitsrell troul o foro, te krell lo i drom, hoy djal pral ap o foreskri massouri." 
Jeremiah52:5 Oun ko foro ačas dren pandlo bis an o deesh-te-yekto bersh, kay o Sedekya baro ray his." 
Jeremiah52:6 Ap o enyato dives an o starto čon vas i bok bares an o foro, oun i menshen his bouder či te rhal." 
Jeremiah52:7 Kote phagan i Babilonarya an o foro dren. Oun an koy rati nashan i tsele kourepangre vin dran o foro, oun djan dran ko voudar mashkral kol douy massurya, ap o drom, hoy djal pash o rayeskri baar. Oun i Babilonarya his troul o foro čiddo. Har djan i kourepangre ko drom, hoy djal an o telstouno them, kay o pani Yordan nashell," 
Jeremiah52:8 koy nashan i lourde dran o them Babilonia sik o baro rayeske Sedekya palla. Oun yon lan les dren oun tapran les an o telstouno them pash o foro Yericho. Oun kol tsele kourepangre, kay pash leste his, nashan penge krik." 
Jeremiah52:9 I lourde dran o them Babilonia lan o baro rayes Sedekya, oun pandan les oun anan les pash o baro rayeste pral o them Babilonia an o foro Ribla, hoy an o them Hamat čiddo hi. Oun yob rakras i phagi pral leste vin." 
Jeremiah52:10 Oun o baro ray dran o them Babilonia moukas i morsh čaven o rayestar Sedekya glan leskre yaka te marell. Oun moukas ninna i tsele pralstunen dran o them Youda te marell. Kova kras lo kote an o foro Ribla. 
Jeremiah52:11 O Sedekyeske moukas lo i yaka vin čourye te dell, oun les sasterne shellentsa te pandell. Palle moukas les o baro ray pral Babilonia an o foro Babilon te anell. Kote vas lo stildo bis te meras lo." 
Jeremiah52:12 O baro rayes pral o them Babilonia, o Neboukadnezar, his i baro lourdo, koles boud penepaske his. Koleskro lab his Nebouzaradan. Yob his o pralstouno pral i lourdende. Har his o Neboukadnezar an o deesh-te-enyato bersh o baro ray pral o them Babilonia, koy vas o Nebouzaradan ap o deshto dives an o pančto čon an o foro Yerusalem." 
Jeremiah52:13 Oun yob rhačras o baro Debleskro kheer tele, ninna ko kheer o baro rayestar oun kol vavar khera an o foro Yerusalem; ava, hako baro kheer rhačras lo tele." 
Jeremiah52:14 Oun kol tsele lourde dran o them Babilonia, kay leha van, phagan i tsele massurya troul o foro Yerusalem tele." 
Jeremiah52:15 Oun kol menshe, kay pral ačan an o foro Yerusalem, kolen anas o Nebouzaradan pandles an o them Babilonia. Mank lende his čorvele, ninna kolla, kay dan pen an o vast o baro rayestar pral o them Babilonia, oun save, kay pral ačan kol boudepangre menshendar, kay glan i tsiro koy djivan." 
Jeremiah52:16 Kokres i čorvelendar an o them moukas lo save koy, te boudrenn le ap o drakengro them oun ap o harhetikro them." 
Jeremiah52:17 Oun i lourde dran Babilonia phagan i bare turme paash, hoy dran lolo saster kerdo van oun glan o kheer o baro Deblestar tardo his. Ninna phagan le kol vourdya an kotya oun ko baro thopaskro čaro, hoy dran lolo saster kerdo vas, oun hoy an o baro Debleskro kheer tardo his. Oun ko tselo lolo saster anan i Babilonarya an o them Babilonia." 
Jeremiah52:18 Ninna lan le pentsa krik kol pirya, bare roya, i činepangre, kolentsa i dorya an i momlia tele činlo venn, oun bare oun tikne čare oun o tselo vavar koova dran lolo saster, kay boudran le leha an o Debleskro kheer." 
Jeremiah52:19 Ninna kova, hoy dran sonakay oun roup kerdo his, las ko pralstouno, o Nebouzaradan, peha: khore, čare, an kolende o soungepaskro koova rhačedo vell, bare čare, pirya, momelengre, roya oun tikne čare." 
Jeremiah52:20 Kolla douy turme, ko baro thopaskro čaro, kol deesh-te-douy groumya, ap kolende ko thopaskro čaro tardo his, oun kol vourdya, kay o baro ray Salomo moukas te krell o baro Debleskro khereske, kolla lauter his dran yaake boud lolo saster kerdo, te djinas kek, har phares kova his." 
Jeremiah52:21 Orhta metarya his kol douy turme bares tarde. I dori, hoy panč-te-paash metarya lengsto hi, djals yek kopo troul hakeneste. O lolo saster ap hako turmo his star goushte pesso. Dren an i turme his či." 
Jeremiah52:22 Oun lengre sherya his ninna dran lolo saster kote pre kerdo. Hako shero his boudeder har douy metarya baro. Oun troul hako shero his i shoukar pandepen phabyentsa, halauter dran lolo saster. Yek turmo his har ko vavar." 
Jeremiah52:23 Vin his 96 (enya-deesh-te-shob) phabya pre pandles; halauter khetne his sheel phabya ap ko pandepen trouyel pandlo. 
Jeremiah52:24 Oun o pralstouno lourdo las o pralstouno rashayes, o Seraya, pandlo, ninna ko rashayes Sefanya, kay vas pal o Seraya, oun ninna kol triin morshen, kay dan yak ap o voudar." 
Jeremiah52:25 Oun dran o foro las lo: ko pralstounes pral i lourdende; vavar efta morshen, kay an hako tsiro troul o baro rayeste trouyel hounte venn; ko činepaskro, kay i laba i lourdendar pre činas oun i lourden vin rodas; oun shob-deesh vavar bare morsha, kay an Yerusalem his." 
Jeremiah52:26 Kolen las o Nebouzaradan, ko pralstouno lourdo, pandlo, oun anas len pash o baro rayeste dran o them Babilonia. Kova his an o foro Ribla." 
Jeremiah52:27 Oun o baro ray pral o them Babilonia moukas len temerl te dell an o foro Ribla, hoy an o them Hamat čiddo hi. Yaake hounte djan i menshe dran o them Youda an o pandepen." 
Jeremiah52:28 Kalla hi kol menshe, kay moukas o Neboukadnezar pandles an Babilonia te anell: Har lo an o eftato bersh o baro ray his: 3.023 (triin-zerya-biish-te-triin) menshe dran o them Youda;" 
Jeremiah52:29 har lo an o deesh-te-orhtato bersh baro ray his: 832 (orhta-sheel-triyanda-te-douy) menshe dran o foro Yerusalem. 
Jeremiah52:30 Har lo an o biish-te-triinto bersh baro ray his, anas o Nebouzaradan, ko pralstouno lourdo, 745 (efta-sheel-star-deesh-te-panč) menshe dran o them Youda krik. Halauter khetne his 4.600 (star-zerya-shob-sheel)." 
Jeremiah52:31 Har o Evil-Merodak o baro ray pral Babilonia vas, moukas lo gomme an kava bersh o Yoyakin, ko rayes pral o them Youda dran o stilepen te lell. Kova his an o 37. (triyanda-te-eftato) bersh, har o Yoyakin krik anlo vas, ap o 25. (biish-te-pančto) dives an o deesh-te-douyto čon." 
Jeremiah52:32 Oun o Evil-Merodak rakras kamles leha, oun hadas les pral kol vavar raya, kay pash leste his an o them Babilonia." 
Jeremiah52:33 Oun o Yoyakin čivas kol ripya pestar krik, hoy les an o stilepen ap leste his, oun rhas peskro tselo djipen pash o baro rayeste ap leskri rhapaskri." 
Jeremiah52:34 Oun yaake har o baro ray dran Babilonia kova kamas, vas leske dran o baro rayeskro vast hako dives kova dino, hoy les hounte vell djipaske, yaake rah har yob djivas." 
Lamentations1:1 Yerusalem, har mouklo hal koy čiddo, tou, kay hals pherde menshe! An-diklo hals pash i tsele themma. Kanna hal kokres har i romni, kolakro rom meras. I rayetsa hals pral vavar themma. Kanna hounte boudress i vavarenge." 
Lamentations1:2 An i rati roveh, oun tire sva nashenn touke i čamya tele. Kek tire tsele pirnendar vell, oun penell touke i kamlo lab. Tire tsele mala moukan tout, oun van čilačes ap toute." 
Lamentations1:3 I menshe dran Youda hi pandle boudepangre, hounte boudrenn tel dava, oun djivenn an vavar themma. Ninna kote hounte vell len daar. Halauter, kay len palla lenn, venna oun rikrenn pengro vast ap lengri meen." 
Lamentations1:4 I dromma pash i berga Sion hi mouklo. Kek vell an o foro an kol bare divessa. I tsele foreskre voudya hi pre, i rashayenge hi ropaske, i terne ča rovenna. Har pharo hi kova lauter o foreske!" 
Lamentations1:5 Kolla, kay kamenn o foreske čilačepen te krell, len hi kanna penepaske pral leste, oun lenge djal mishto. O baro Devel anas koy bibarht pral o foro te dell lo les i phagi leskri boud doshake. Oun kolla, kay lan o foro dren, lan i čaven pandles, oun tradan len glan pende vin dran o them." 
Lamentations1:6 O foro Sion nashras peskro tselo shoukapen! Leskre pralstoune hi har tserfe. kay hatsenn kek zenlepen. Oun vi-bokedo hi len kek zoor, te nashenn le penge glan kolende, kay len palla lenn." 
Lamentations1:7 An kava tsiro, kay i menshenge dran Yerusalem djoungeles djal, oun yon kate te kote tradedo hi, vell lenge ko boud lačo koova an o shero, hoy len an o phouro tsiro his. Har yon an i vasta kol čilačendar peran, vas lenge kek ap i rig. Kol vavar menshe dikan ap lende tele, oun san, har o foro tele djas." 
Lamentations1:8 Yerusalem anas doosh ap peste, doleske hi kava foro har i rhačedi djouvel. Halauter, kay hadan lat an o bolepen, praasenn lat kanna. Yon dikenn, har nango yoy hi. Yoy rovella oun khatrell peskro mouy." 
Lamentations1:9 Lakro ripen hi pherdo čik. Oun yoy patsas gar kay lake yaake djala. Dour tele peras li, oun kek hi lake koy, kay penell lake i kamlo lab. “Dik, baro Devel, har djoungeles mange djala, oun kolla, kay man khetne dan, krenn pen bares.”" 
Lamentations1:10 Oun yon čivan pengre vasta ap lakro tselo kouč koova. Yoy hounte dikas peske yakentsa, har i vavar menshe an lakro Debleskro kheer dren djan. Oun tou, baro Devel, penal, te hounte djan yon gar kote dren." 
Lamentations1:11 I menshe an Yerusalem rovenna oun rodenn pal maro. Lengro kouč koova denn le koy, te vell len rhapaske, te hounte merenn le gar. Yerusalem rovell: “Ah baro Devel, kre tire yaka pre, oun dik, har i menshe tele dikenn ap mande!”" 
Lamentations1:12 T'menge halauterenge, kay nashenn kate ap o drom, penau: Hadenn t'mare yaka oun dikenn! Hi yek doukepen har miro doukepen, hoy pral mande vas? O baro Devel anas les pral mande ap ko dives, kay leskri zoreli rholi pral mande vas." 
Lamentations1:13 Yob bičras i yag dran o bolepen an mire kokale, hoy an mande rhačell. Yob čivas i netsa vin, te taprenn pen mire pire dren, oun moukas man ap o doumo te perell. Yob moukas man kokres čiddo. O tselo tsiro hom nasselo." 
Lamentations1:14 Ko boud čilačo koova, hoy krom, hi phares ap mande čiddo. O baro Devel čivas les ap mire phika. Oun me phagom khetne tel kova. O baro Devel das man an i vasta kolendar, kay nay vau kokres bouder gar vin." 
Lamentations1:15 O baro Devel stakras mire zorele kourepangren khetne, kay pash mande his; Yob moukas i marepaskro rhapen vin te kharell, te nay venn mare terne morsha maredo. Yaake har drake khetne stakedo venn, te vell i mool vin, stakras lo i menshen dran Youda khetne." 
Lamentations1:16 Doleske rovau, oun mire yaka hi pherde sva. Man hi kek, kay penell mange lače laba, te lell miro dji pale nevi zoor. Mire čave hi kokres koy tardo, Kolla, kay dan men khetne, van i zorleder." 
Lamentations1:17 O foro Yerusalem hi har i djouvel, kay rikrell peskre vasta dour pre, oun kek hi koy, kay lake ap i rig vell. O baro Devel kharas haki rigyatar kolen khetne, kay kourenn pen o Yakobeskre čaventsa. O foro Yerusalem hi lenge har i rhačedi djouvel, ap kolate yon tele dikenn." 
Lamentations1:18 O baro Debles his čačo, har das lo man i phagi. Me shounom gar ap leskro lab. Shounenn, t'mer menshe an vavar themma, oun dikenn, har baro miri douk hi! Mire terne ča oun terne čave van pandles krik lino." 
Lamentations1:19 Me kharom mire pirnen, oun yon moukan man kokres. Mire rashaya oun i phoureder meran an o foro, har dikan le pal i kotar maro, te nay rikrenn le pen djido." 
Lamentations1:20 Ah, baro Devel, dik, har boud traash man hi, har i douk an mande rhačella! Miro dji rissrell pes an mande! Hoske shounom gar ap toute? Glan o kheer tapras o rharo mire čaven, oun an o kheer meran le dran i djoungelo nasslepen." 
Lamentations1:21 I menshe shounan, har dau phares dourho, oun kek vell, te penell lo mange lače laba. Kolla, kay hi rhoyedo ap mande, shounan miri bibarhtyatar, oun sanan, te kral tou kova mantsa. Mouk ko dives te vell, kolestar rakral, te djal lenge har mange kanna." 
Lamentations1:22 Mouk lengro tselo čilačepen glan toute te vell! Kre lentsa har mantsa kral, har dal mange miri phagi miro tselo čilačepaske! O tselo tsiro dau phares dourho, oun miro dji rovell." 
Lamentations2:1 Ah, o baro Debleskri rholi hi čiddo ap o foro Sion har i kali rati! Yerusalem, hoy sharedo vas bis an o bolepen, vas tele vitsedo ap i phoub. Ap ko dives, kay leskri rholi pral i berga Sion vas, his leske či, te his o foro i banko peskre pirenge." 
Lamentations2:2 I gaba oun i khera kras lo paash, an kolende o Yakobeskre čave djivan. Oun yon khaytan les gar. I zorele forya an o them Youda phagas lo tele an peskri rholi. Pral lengro them anas lo ladj, oun lengre raya vitsras lo an i čik." 
Lamentations2:3 An peskri zoreli rholi phagas lo halauter tele, hoy o themes Israel zorelo kras. Har i lourde dran vavar themma van, tserdas lo peskro čačo vast mendar pale. Oun o Yakobeskro them kras lo paash, yaake har i bari yag halauter pre rhačrella." 
Lamentations2:4 Yob rikras peskro bogo, oun las i faylo an peskro čačo vast, har yek, kay kourell pes mentsa. Oun har i kourepaskro maras lo halauteren, kay menge kamlo oun kouč his. Oun leskri rholi vas pral mende har i zoreli yag." 
Lamentations2:5 O baro Devel vas har yek, kay hi čilačo ap mende. Yob das o them Israel khetne. Yob phagas i tsele shoukar khera tele oun kras i zorele forya paash. Boud ropen oun doukepen anas lo pral o them Youda." 
Lamentations2:6 Yob phagas peskro kheer tele, har te vals lo i kashteno kheer an i baar, oun kras koy platsa paash, kay vam khetne glan leste. Yob kras, te vell bouder kek an o foro Sion ap i bare divessa oun ap o Debleskro dives. An peskri zoreli rholi čivas lo o baro rayes oun i rashayen pale." 
Lamentations2:7 Foun peskro altaro kamell lo bouder či te djinell. Peskro khereske sikrell lo o doumo. Leskre massurya das lo kolenge an o vast kay maro foro paash kran, oun koy pashel i bari gole dan an o baro Debleskro kheer, har an kol bare divessa, kay kote boud menshe khetne van." 
Lamentations2:8 O baro Devel las peske zoreles glan, te phagell lo i massurya o forestar Yerusalem tele, oun tserdas i dori pral lende, te dikell lo pal, har boud tele phagedo vella, oun las peskro vast gar krik, bis kek bar ap o vavar ačas. I massurya oun turme hi ropah čiddo ap i phoub, oun len hi bouder kek zoor." 
Lamentations2:9 O foreskre voudya peran oun hi čiddo an i čik. Lengre pesse pandepangre kashta phagas lo an kotya. Lengro baro ray oun lengre pralstoune djivenn an vavar themma. Kek hi koy, kay sikrell i menshenge o Debleskro drom. O Debleskre rakepangren hi bouder či te penell. O baro Devel sikras len či." 
Lamentations2:10 I phoure an o foro Yerusalem hi beshdo ap i phoub, oun penenn kek lab. Yon vitsran čik ap pengro shero, oun rivan gone ap pende. I terne čenge an o foro Yerusalem hi ropaske. Yon djan ap pengre čanga o mouyeha ap i phoub." 
Lamentations2:11 Mire yaka hi pherde sva, i douk an mande rhačella. Miro dji phagell, te dikau koy bibarht, hoy pral i menshende an miro them vas. Kol terne čave oun ternepen merenn i bokatar ap i dromma an o foro." 
Lamentations2:12 Ap pengre dayende penenn le ropah: “Man hi bok! Man hi troush!” oun perenn khetne ap i dromma har doukede lourde, oun merenn an i moussya pengre dayendar." 
Lamentations2:13 Ah, Yerusalem, hoy te penap touke? Miro foro, hoy yaake kamau, har nay dap tout kamle laba? Kekeske djas yaake djoungeles har touke! Hoy nay penoms touke, te djal touke feteder? Tiri douk hi yaake baro har o baro pani. Koon nay krell tout sasto?" 
Lamentations2:14 Kolla, kay hounte penans touke o Debleskre laba, penan touke rhorheno koova glan-vi, hoy či moldo hi. Oun sikran touke gar tiri doosh. Kova te krans le, perals gar yaake har kanna peral. Na-a, yon moukan tout rhorhene laba te shounell, oun anan tout o čačo dromestar tele." 
Lamentations2:15 Halauter, kay djan ap o drom, oun dikenn tout, denn i vasta khetne pral o shero, denn shol, oun čivenn o shero ap i rig, oun san pral kova, hoy toutar pral ačas, Yerusalem: “Hi kava kau foro, pral koleste penlo vas: Kek foro hi shoukeder har kava! I tseli phoub dikell barhteles ap leste.”" 
Lamentations2:16 Halauter, kay ap toute čilačo hi, krenn pengro mouy dour pre pral toute, denn shol, oun sikrenn touke pengre danda. “Mer dam les khetne”, penenn le. “Ava, kava hi kava dives, kay mer kamam, te vell lo! Mer lam, hoy kamam.”" 
Lamentations2:17 O baro Devel kras, hoy lo peske glan las. Oun kras kova, har lo menge glan i rah tsiro trad das. Les khaytal tou gar, har moukas lo tout khetne te dell, oun kolen, kay ap toute djan, i zorleder te vell. Har tou peral, nay san le." 
Lamentations2:18 Yerusalem, de zoreles o Debleske gole, pen leske, hoy touke phares hi! Ap o dives oun an i rati mouk tire sva tele te nashell har i lengsto pani, hoy nashella. Rob, oun ma mouk tele!" 
Lamentations2:19 Ste pre an i rati, oun de gole pale te pale ap o baro Debleste! Čore tiro dji vin glan o Debleste. Rike tire vasta glan leste pre oun mange lestar o djipen tire terne čavendar, kay i bokatar merenna ap hako dromeskri ekka." 
Lamentations2:20 Baro Devel, mouk tire yaka ap mende te dikell! Dik, koneha yaake trouyel djal! Hounte rhan i djouvya pengre čave, kolen yon ap i moussya hidjrenn? Hounte venn i rashaya oun tire rakepangre an tiro kheer moulo dino?" 
Lamentations2:21 Čave oun phoure hi čiddo an i dromma. Terne ča oun terne morsha van o rhareha maredo. Ap ko dives kay tiri rholi pral mende vas, hi tout kek dji lenge, oun maral len halauteren." 
Lamentations2:22 Haki rigyatar kharal kolen, kay kran menge daar oun traash. Yon van har pash i baro rhapen. Oun kek mendar nay nashas peske ap o dives, kay tiri rholi, baro Devel, pral mende vas, oun kek ačas pral. Kolen, kay me ap i vasta hidjrom oun bares tserdom, kolla van lendar maredo." 
Lamentations3:1 Me hom ko morsh, koon djinell, har kova hi, te dell o baro Devel dava an peskri rholi." 
Lamentations3:2 Man anas lo doureder oun doureder an i kali rati, oun kek momeli his koy." 
Lamentations3:3 Kokres ap mande hadas lo peskro vast o tselo dives. 
Lamentations3:4 Yob kras miro mass oun miri hauta phoures, oun mire kokale phagas lo an mande khetne." 
Lamentations3:5 Haki rigyatar pandas lo man dren, douka oun daar hi troul mande." 
Lamentations3:6 An kali rati moukell lo man te djivell, har kolla, kay meran glan i rah tsiro." 
Lamentations3:7 Yob čivas i massouri troul mande, te nay vau gar vin, oun čivas sasterne shelle troul mire pire." 
Lamentations3:8 Ninna te dau gole oun mangau les, kamell lo miro mangepen gar te shounell." 
Lamentations3:9 Ap miro drom čivas lo bare barra. Kay me ninna djau, vau gar doureder." 
Lamentations3:10 Yob louras mange pre, har te vals lo i čilačo divyo firho, oun har i levo an peskro khatepen." 
Lamentations3:11 Yob tserdas man tele o dromestar, dandras man an kotya, oun moukas man čiddo." 
Lamentations3:12 Yob tserdas peskro bogo pre, te dell lo karye ap mande." 
Lamentations3:13 Yob das peskre fayle an mire bouke karye. 
Lamentations3:14 I sapen hom mire tsele menshenge. I sapaskri gili hom lenge o tselo dives. 
Lamentations3:15 Shoutlo zenlepen das lo man rhapaske, oun shoutlo pipen te piyell." 
Lamentations3:16 Yob stakras man an i čik, te dandrap ap barra." 
Lamentations3:17 Me bistrom, hoy i lačo djipen hi. Oun djinau bouder gar, hoy barht hi." 
Lamentations3:18 Kote penom mange: Me nay djivau bouder gar, oun nay patsau bouder gar, te vell o baro Devel ap miri rig." 
Lamentations3:19 Te dikau, har djoungeles mange djal, oun har mouklo hom, hi kova mange har i shoutlo pipen, hoy nasselo krell." 
Lamentations3:20 An miro shero djal kova halauter trouyel, oun miro dji hi tele rikedo." 
Lamentations3:21 Yek koova bistrau gar – ap kova rikrau zoreles: 
Lamentations3:22 O baro Debleskro lačepen herell gar pre, leskro kamlepen hi hako tsiro menge koy." 
Lamentations3:23 Haki tsalla hi menge leskro kamlepen oun lačepen neves koy. Kova hi yaake čačo, har o kham pre djal!" 
Lamentations3:24 Me penau mange: O baro Devel hi halauter, hoy man hounte vell; doleske dikau ap leste." 
Lamentations3:25 Lačes hi o baro Devel koleske, kay dikell ap leste, oun rodell les o tselo djiyestar." 
Lamentations3:26 O feteder koova hi, te dikas mer pokones ap o baro Debleste, te vell yob menge ap i rig." 
Lamentations3:27 Mishto hi i mensheske, te hidjrell lo, hoy o Devel leske bičras, yaake rah har lo terno hi." 
Lamentations3:28 Te čivell o Devel i pharepen ap leste, mou beshell lo pes kokres oun rakrell gar." 
Lamentations3:29 Peskro mouy mou čivell lo tele an i čik, Nay vell i tsiro, kay djal leske pale feteder." 
Lamentations3:30 Te lell lo i čamedini, mou te rikrell lo peskri čam koleske koy, kay dell les. Mou rikrell lo o praasepen vin!" 
Lamentations3:31 O baro Devel moukell men gar hako tsireske. 
Lamentations3:32 Ninna te doukell lo yekes, vell lo leske pale kamles. Yaake baro hi leskro lačepen." 
Lamentations3:33 Yob hi gar barhtelo, te dell lo i menshes peskri phagi, oun anell o ropen pral leste." 
Lamentations3:34 Čačepah, o baro Devel dikell, te venn i tsele pandle an i them khetne stakedo. Les, o Debles pral halauter, hi glan i yaka, te vell i mensheske peskro čačepen krik lino, oun pral i mensheskro koova rhorhepen pre anlo vell." 
Lamentations3:35  
Lamentations3:36  
Lamentations3:37 Koon hi kova, kay penas Kova te vell oun yaake vas. Hi kova gar o Devel, kay penell, te vell čomone?" 
Lamentations3:38 Kova hi o Devel pral halauter, kay penell, te vell i bibarht oun ninna i barht." 
Lamentations3:39 Har nay penell i mensho i ropah: “O Devel djal gar mishto mantsa trouyel.” Vals feteder te rovals lo pral peskri doosh! 
Lamentations3:40 Dikas ap maro djipen, har mer djivah, oun rissras trouyel pash o baro Debleste." 
Lamentations3:41 Hadas mare djia, ninna mare vasta pre o Debleske an o bolepen!" 
Lamentations3:42 Mer anam doosh pral mende kokres, oun shounam gar ap toute. Kova bistral tou menge gar." 
Lamentations3:43 Tou čakral tout an tiri rholi, oun lal men palla, oun maral men. Oun tout khaytam mer gar." 
Lamentations3:44 Tou khatral tout an i folka, te nay vell maro mangepen gar glan toute." 
Lamentations3:45 Tou kral, te vam har čik oun foulepen i menshenge an i vavar themma." 
Lamentations3:46 Halauter, kay rhoyedo ap mende hi, praasenn men." 
Lamentations3:47 Traash oun daar vas ap mende. Troul mende phagell oun perell halauter khetne. 
Lamentations3:48 I sva nashenn dran mire yaka tele, te dikau har djoungeles mire menshenge djal." 
Lamentations3:49 Mire sva nashenn oun nashenna, oun me nay moukau gar tele miro ropah," 
Lamentations3:50 bis te dikell o baro Devel dran o bolepen tele, oun lell men pale an o yak." 
Lamentations3:51 Mire yaka doukenna, te dikau, har i djouvyenge an miro foro djala." 
Lamentations3:52 Kolenge či krom, kolla lan man palla, har te voms i čirklo." 
Lamentations3:53 Yon vitsran man djides an i brounna, oun vitsran barra ap mande." 
Lamentations3:54 Pani djas pral miro shero; kote penom: Kanna hom nashedo. 
Lamentations3:55 Baro Devel, tiro lab dom gole, dour tele dran i phoub shounal miri gole:" 
Lamentations3:56 “Ma khate tire kanda glan miro ropen oun glan mire golya!” 
Lamentations3:57 Har kharom tout golyah, val tou pash mande, oun penal: “Ma traash bouder gar!”" 
Lamentations3:58 Miro ray, tou lal miro koova an tiro vast, oun lal miro djipen dran o merepen." 
Lamentations3:59 Baro Devel, tou dikeh, har mange čilačepen kerdo vella! De tou mange miro čačepen!" 
Lamentations3:60 Tou dikeh, har yon kamenn man čilačepen pale te dell, oun tou prindjreh, hoy an lengro shero trouyel djala, oun hoy kamenn le mantsa te krell." 
Lamentations3:61 Baro Devel, tou shouneh lengro praasepen, oun halauter, hoy le khetne rakrenna, te krenn le mantsa." 
Lamentations3:62 Tou shounal o rakepen kolendar, kay hadenn pen ap mande, oun hoy le pal o vast pral mande rakrenna o tselo dives." 
Lamentations3:63 Dik koy: Te hi le beshdo, oun te hi le tardo, givenn le sapaskre gilya pral mande." 
Lamentations3:64 De lenge les pale, baro Devel, har yon mantsa kran!" 
Lamentations3:65 Kre lengre djia har i barra, oun čip tiro praasepen ap lende!" 
Lamentations3:66 Le len palla tiri tseli rholyah, te ačell kek lendar djido ap kay phoub!" 
Lamentations4:1 Har vas o sonakay yaake kalo, oun o lačo sonakay yaake djoungelo! Har nay van i kouč barra trouyel čiddo ap i dromma!" 
Lamentations4:2 I terne morsha dran o foro Sion, – kouč har o lačeder sonakay his le menge – kanna hi le gar boudeder moldo har pirya, hoy kerdo van dran čik!" 
Lamentations4:3 Ninna divye djoukle denn pengre čaven i čouči. I daya mank mire menshende sikrenn kek dji pengre čavenge. Har kol bare divye čirkle an o moulo them hi le, hoy moukenn pengre yare." 
Lamentations4:4 I tikne čaven hi yaake troush, te vell lengri čip trouk an o mouy. I čave mangenna i kotar maro, oun kek hi koy, te dell lo lenge i kotar." 
Lamentations4:5 Kolla, kay boud lačo rhapen rhayan, merenn kanna i bokatar vin ap i dromma. Kolla, kay ap kouč pernitse hidjedo van, hi kanna an i khandli čik čiddo." 
Lamentations4:6 Koy doosh, hoy mire menshe ap pende anan, hi bareder har koy doosh, hoy anan i menshe an o foro Sodom pral pende. Kolengro foro djas sik tele, oun kek vast vas lenge ap i rig." 
Lamentations4:7 I pralstoune pral Sion his djoudjeder har gib, oun parneder har thoud. Yon his sasto oun zorelo, oun shoukar har i kouč blaueto bar." 
Lamentations4:8 Kanna hi lengre sherya kalo har yagakri čik. Kek prindjrell len bouder ap o drom. Lengri hauta tserdas pes khetne ap lengre kokale, oun hi trouk har i kotar kasht." 
Lamentations4:9 Kolenge, kay o rhareha maredo van, djas feteder har kolenge, kay meran i bokatar. Har kek djob bouder bares vas, phagan le khetne i bokatar, bis te meran le." 
Lamentations4:10 I bibarht, hoy vas ap mire menshende, vas yaake baro, te keran i djouvya pengre čaven, – kol djouvya, kolengro dji pherdo kamlepen his – te nay vas len čomone te rhal." 
Lamentations4:11 O baro Devel moukas peskri tseli rholi vin te vell. Leskri tseli rholi vas pral lende. Oun an o foro Sion moukas lo i bari yag te vell, te rhačras o foro tele bis ap i telstoune barra." 
Lamentations4:12 Kanna vas, hoy i bare raya pral i themma gar patsans, vitar gar i tsele menshe ap kay phoub: Lourde dran vavar themma, kay kaman maro them dren te lell, djan an i voudya o forestar Yerusalem dren." 
Lamentations4:13 Kova vas pral o foro koy doshake, hoy o Debleskre rakepangre oun i rashaya ap pende anan. Yon moukan kote save menshen te marell, kay kek čilačepen kran." 
Lamentations4:14 Yon nashran pen an i dromma har korele, oun rat his ap lengre koola, te kamas kek len an te taprell." 
Lamentations4:15 “Djan t'menge, t'mer pale-čidde”, dan le lenge gole. “Djan t'menge, djan t'menge! Ma taprenn ap čomone!” Yaake nashan le penge, oun djinan gar, kay te djan. An i vavar themma vas lenge penlo: “Pash mende nay ačenn gar!”" 
Lamentations4:16 O baro Devel kamell len bouder gar te dikell. Yob hi kova, kay tradas len kate te kote. Ap kol rashayende dikas bouder kek pre, oun i phourentsa djan le gar kamles trouyel." 
Lamentations4:17 Pale te pale dikan mare yaka pen trouyel pal yekeste, kay menge ap i rig vell. Oun kek vas. Ko them, ap koleste dikam, nay las men gar dran i bibarht vin." 
Lamentations4:18 Yon lan men palla, te nay nasham bouder gar ap mare dromma. Mentsa hi trouyel. Mer ham nashedo. Maro djipen hi trouyel." 
Lamentations4:19 Kolla, kay men palla lan, his sikeder har i adlarya tel o bolepen. Ap o pralstouno them lan le men palla, oun an o moulo them louran le menge pre." 
Lamentations4:20 Maro rayes, koles o baro Devel vin rodas, lan le pandlo. Yob his kova, kolestar maro djipen vas, oun lestar patsam, te rikrell lo peskro vast pral mende, te nay krenn men i vavar themma či." 
Lamentations4:21 Ava, san t'menge oun khelenn, t'mer Edomarya an o them Ous! Pash t'mende vell ninna ko khoro pherdo o Debleskri rholi, hoy hounte piyenn, bis te venn mato oun rivenn t'men vin." 
Lamentations4:22 T'mer an o foro Sion, palle hi t'mari doosh t'mendar krik lino! O baro Devel moukell t'men bouder gar pandles krik te anell. Palle anell yob t'mari doosh, t'mer Edomarya, ap t'mare sherya pale, oun čakrell ko čilačo koova pre, hoy kran." 
Lamentations5:1 Baro Devel, ma biste, hoy mentsa djas! Dik ap mende oun dik mari ladj!" 
Lamentations5:2 Ko them, hoy men dal, hi an i vavarengro vast. Oun an mare khera djivenn vi-themarya." 
Lamentations5:3 Mouklo ham, mare dada hi bouder gar koy. Mare daya hi har djouvya, kolengro rom meras." 
Lamentations5:4 Maro pani hounte playsras mare loventsa, oun maro kasht hounte playsras ninna." 
Lamentations5:5 Kolla, kay men palla lenna, beshenn menge ap i meen. Ninna te ham khino, moukenn le men gar tele te beshell." 
Lamentations5:6 Mer hounte rikras mare vasta i themma Egiptia oun Assour koy, te vell men i kotar maro, te bokas gar." 
Lamentations5:7 Mare phoure anan doosh ap pende, oun djivenn bouder gar. Mer kitse kay ham, hounte hidjras lengri tseli doosh." 
Lamentations5:8 Boudepangre hi i raya pral mende, oun kek hi koy, kay lell men vin dran lengre vasta." 
Lamentations5:9 Te djah vin, te las rhapen dren, hounte daras maro djipaske. Kourepangre dran o moulo them kamenn men o rhareha te marell." 
Lamentations5:10 Har te hams an i bob, rhačell mari hauta koy bari bokatar." 
Lamentations5:11 I djouvyen an o foro Sion tapran le zoryah an, ninna i terne čen an i forya o themestar Youda." 
Lamentations5:12 I pralstoune morsha van lendar i doryentsa pre pandlo, oun ap i phourende dikan le gar pre." 
Lamentations5:13 Terne morsha hounte hidjran yarrengre barra, oun čave peran tel o boud kasht, hoy hounte hidjran le." 
Lamentations5:14 I pralstoune hi bouder gar beshdo an o foreskro voudar. Oun i terne morsha bashrenn bouder gar ap i doryengre bashepangre. 
Lamentations5:15 Mare djia givenn bouder gar, maro khelepen hi kanna maro ropen." 
Lamentations5:16 Mer nashram maro raylepen. Mari doosh, hoy anam ap mende, anas men an i bibarht!" 
Lamentations5:17 Doleske hi maro dji nasselo, oun mare yaka vi-rovedo," 
Lamentations5:18 te dikah mer ap i berga Sion, kay li yaake moulo koy čiddo hi, oun i divye djoukle pral late nashenna." 
Lamentations5:19 Tou, baro Devel, hal hako tsiro koy. Tou hal oun ačeh o ray hako tsireske." 
Lamentations5:20 Hoske kameh tou men te bistrell, oun maro tselo djipen či mendar te djinell?" 
Lamentations5:21 An men, baro Devel, pale pash toute, te vas pale khere! Kre, te djal menge pale lačes har an o phouro tsiro!" 
Lamentations5:22 Vitsral men toutar krik hako tsireske? Nay djal tiri rholi pral mende gar krik? 
Ezekiel1:1 An o 30. (triin-deshto) bersh djivom khetne vavar menshentsa, kay pandles krik anlo van, pash ko lengsto pani, hoy kharell Kebar. An o starto čon ap o pančto dives an ko bersh djas o bolepen pre, oun o baro Devel sikras pes mande." 
Ezekiel1:2 Kova his o pančto bersh, har vas o baro ray Yoyakin pandles krik anlo an o them Babilonia." 
Ezekiel1:3 Kote an o them Babilonia pash o lengsto pani Kebar rakras o baro Devel ap mande, oun leskri zoor vas pral mande. Me hom o Ezekiel. Miro dad hi o rashay, o Bouzi." 
Ezekiel1:4 Oun me dikom i baro zorelo phourdepen, hoy vas foun kotar kay norden hi, oun tradas i bari folka glan peste. Oun yag vas vin, hoy pre oun tele djas. Oun o bolepen koy trouyel his shoukar har o kham. Oun mashkral dren his čomone, hoy dikas vin har sonakay, hoy an i yag thodo vell." 
Ezekiel1:5 Oun kote dren dikom star bolepangre, hoy vin dikan har menshe." 
Ezekiel1:6 Hakenes lendar his star čirklengre moussya oun i shero, kay ap hake star rigya i mouy oun yaka his." 
Ezekiel1:7 Yon his tardo har menshe. Oun lengre pire his har groumyengre pire. Kolla his har lolo saster, hoy an i yag thodo vell." 
Ezekiel1:8 Ap lengre star rigya his len menshengre vasta tel lengre čirklengre moussya, tel haki čirklengri moussi yek vast. Hakenes kol starendar his yaka oun i mouy ap hake star rigya leskro sherestar. Oun hakenes his star čirklengre moussya." 
Ezekiel1:9 Kolentsa tapras yek ap o vavareste. Yon djan khetne ap hake rigya, oun hounte rissran pen gar. Hakeno dikas glan peste." 
Ezekiel1:10 Pash hakeneste kol starendar dikas o shero ap i glanstouni rig vin har i mensheskro shero, ap i čači rig har i leveskro shero, ap i servi rig har i gouroumeskro shero, oun ap i palstouni rig har o shero foun i adlari." 
Ezekiel1:11 Douy lengre čirklengre moussya his bourhles rikedo oun pre hadedo. Oun i moussi yekestar tapras koy moussi ko vavarestar. Kol douy vavar čirklengre moussyentsa čakran le pen. 
Ezekiel1:12 Hakenes his yaka ap hake star rigya. Yaake djan le hako kopo khetne kote, kay kaman le. Yon rissran pen gar trouyel." 
Ezekiel1:13 Mashkral kol star bolepangre his čomone, hoy dikas vin har kasht, hoy loles rhačell, oun har lengste kashta, hoy loles rhačenna oun yek rigyatar ap i vavar mank kol bolepangre nashenn. Oun koy yag his lolo, oun dran late das yag karye vin." 
Ezekiel1:14 Kol bolepangre nashan sik yek rigyatar ap i vavar, te dikas kova vin, har te dell yag karye ap o bolepen." 
Ezekiel1:15 Oun har dikom ap kol bolepangre, dikom star rade ap i phoub, yek rada glan hakeneste lendar." 
Ezekiel1:16 Kol rade dikan zenelo vin har i kouč zenelo bar. Yek rada dikas vin har koy vavar. Oun yon his yaake kerdo, te djas yek rada an i vavar dren." 
Ezekiel1:17 Te djan le, nay djan le ap hake star rigya, oun yon rissran pen gar trouyel." 
Ezekiel1:18 Oun kol rade his baro oun kran daar. Ap lende his yaka troul lende trouyel, oun kova pash hake starende." 
Ezekiel1:19 Te djan kol star bolepangre, palle djan ninna kol rade ap lengri rig pentsa. Oun te hadan pen kol bolepangre pre i phoubyatar, hadan pen kol rade ninna." 
Ezekiel1:20 Kote kay kaman le te djal, kote djan le. Oun kol rade hadan pen lentsa. I rade kran, hoy i bolepangre kaman." 
Ezekiel1:21 Te djan le, djan kol rade ninna. Te ačan le tardo, ačan kol rade ninna tardo. Oun te hadan le pen pre i phoubyatar, hadan pen i rade ninna pre. I rade kran, hoy i bolepangre kaman." 
Ezekiel1:22 Pral i sherya foun kol bolepangre his čomone har i bolepen dran kristallo. Kek nay dikas koy dren, te kamals lo gar korelo te vell." 
Ezekiel1:23 Tel kova his i bolepangre. Hakeno lendar rikras peskre douy čirklengre moussya yaake vin, te tapras lo o vavares ap peskri rig. Kol douy vavar čirklengre moussyentsa čakran le pen." 
Ezekiel1:24 Har djan le, dan lengre čirklengre moussya yaake bari gole, har i zorele panya gole denn. Koy gole his har i gole o zorelo Deblestar, oun har koy gole kote, kay boud menshe khetne hi, oun har koy gole, hoy boud lourde denn, kay djan an o kourepen. Oun te ačan i bolepangre tardo, palle moukan le pengre čirklengre moussya tele te djal. Oun me shounom i bari gole, hoy vas dran o bolepen pral lende." 
Ezekiel1:25  
Ezekiel1:26 Pral o bolepen, hoy pral lengre sherya his, his čomone, hoy vin dikas har i rayeskri beshepaskri dran kouč blaueto bar. Oun ap koleste his yek beshdo, kova dikas vin dikas har i mensho." 
Ezekiel1:27 Oun leskro shero oun leskro beč dikan vin har o sonakay, kay o kham pre perell. Oun troul kova trouyel his yagakre čipya. Oun o telstouno kotar, kova hoy vin dikas har leskre herya, his har yag. Oun troul leste his shoukar," 
Ezekiel1:28 har i brishineskro bogo, hoy vell diklo ap o bolepen pal i brishin. Yaake sikras pes o baro Devel an peskro raylepen mange. Oun har les dikom, moukom man glan leste ap i phoub te perell. Oun me shounom yekes, kay rakras." 
Ezekiel2:1 Oun yob penas ap mande: Tou, mensho ste pre! Me kamau touha te rakrell." 
Ezekiel2:2 Oun har yob mantsa rakras, vas o Debleskri zoor an mande, oun hadas man pre. Oun kova, kay mantsa rakras, penas:" 
Ezekiel2:3 Tou, mensho, me bičrau tout pash i Israelitarya. Kolla hadan pen oun peran mandar tele. Ninna lengre phoure hadan pen pale te pale pral mande. Oun kolla, kay kava dives djivenn, hi gar vavarčandes." 
Ezekiel2:4 Yon djan pal pengro shero, oun lengro dji hi dran bar. Pash kolende bičrau tout. Lenge peness: Kava penell o baro Devel, maro ray!" 
Ezekiel2:5 Yon nay shounenn oder shounenn gar ap toute. Ninna te moukenn le pen či te penell, hounte djinenn le, te hi i Debleskro rakepaskro mashkral lende." 
Ezekiel2:6 Oun tou mensho, tou daress gar lendar, vitar gar lengre labendar, hoy yon rakrenna. Tou djiveh mank lende har mank skorpione. Yon hi har soubyengre bourra troul toute. Ma mouk len touke daar te krell! Ma traash kolestar, hoy kolla rakrenna, kay moukenn pen či te penell!" 
Ezekiel2:7 Pen lenge mire laba! Nay vell, te shounenn le, nay vell, te shounenn le gar. Yon hi menshe, kay moukenn pen či te penell." 
Ezekiel2:8 Oun tou mensho, shoun, hoy me touke penau! Ab tou gar har kolla, kay kamenn lauter feteder te djinell! Kre tiro mouy pre oun rha kova, hoy me touke dau!" 
Ezekiel2:9 Oun me dikom i vast, hoy his vin rikedo ap mande. Oun an ko vast his i liil, hoy khetne lino his." 
Ezekiel2:10 Oun yob kras les glan mande pre. Oun laba his ap kol douy rigya činlo: ropangre gilya oun ropaskri gole oun doukedi gole. 
Ezekiel3:1 Oun yob penas ap mande: Tou, mensho, rha kova, hoy glan toute hi! Rha kava liil, oun dja pash i menshende Israel, oun rake ap lende!" 
Ezekiel3:2 Oun me krom miro mouy pre. Oun yob das man ko liil rhapaske," 
Ezekiel3:3 oun penas mange: Tou, mensho, rha kava liil, hoy tout dau! Oun kre tiro per pherdo leha! Oun me rhom les. Oun an miro mouy his lo goudlo har gvin." 
Ezekiel3:4 Oun yob penas ap mande: Tou, mensho, ste pre oun dja pash o kheer Israel! Oun pen lenge kol laba, hoy touke penau!" 
Ezekiel3:5 Me bičrau tout gar pash save menshende, kolen i vavar čip hi, kolengro rakepen tou gar hayveh. Na-a, pash o kheer Israel bičrau tout." 
Ezekiel3:6 Te bičroms tout pash save menshende, kolen i vavar čip hi, oun kolengro rakepen tou gar hayveh, kolla shounans ap toute." 
Ezekiel3:7 Kolla dran o kheer Israel kamenn gar ap mande te shounell. Doleske shounenn le vitar gar ap toute. Yon lauter djan pal pengro shero. Oun lengre djia hi har dran bar. 
Ezekiel3:8 Dik, me dau tout i zoor, te dikess lenge an o mouy, oun krau te vell tiro shero har saster, yaake har lengre sherya ninna hi." 
Ezekiel3:9 Ava, krau tout zorelo har i bar, ava yaake zorelo har i diamanto. Ma dare lendar, mouk touke kek traash te krell lendar. Yon hi menshe, kay moukenn pen či te penell." 
Ezekiel3:10 Oun pale penas yob ap mande: Tou, mensho, mire tsele laba, hoy me touke penau, de yak ap lende, oun le len an tiro dji!" 
Ezekiel3:11 Dja pash i menshende dran tiro them, kay pandles krik anlo van an o them Babilonia! Rake ap lende oun pen lenge, hoy me o baro Devel, lengro ray, kamell lenge te penell! Nay vell, te shounenn le. Nay vell, te shounenn le gar." 
Ezekiel3:12 Oun i dourho hadas man pre. Oun pal mande shounom me i bari zoreli gole, hoy penas: Sharenn o raylepen o baro Deblestar kote, kay lo khere hi!" 
Ezekiel3:13 Oun kol čirklengre moussya foun kol bolepangre kran i bari zoreli gole, har das yek moussi ap i vavareste. Ninna i rade pash lende kran yaake bari gole, har te trissals i phoub zoreles." 
Ezekiel3:14 Oun o dourho hadas man pre oun las man krik. Oun an mande his i bari rholi. Kova, hoy o baro Devel mande sikras, his phares čiddo ap mande." 
Ezekiel3:15 Oun me vom pash kolende, kay pandlo krik anlo his, oun an o gab Tel-Abib djivan pash o lengsto pani, hoy kharell Kebar. Efta divessa homs kote beshdo pash lende, oun homs har moulo kolestar, hoy dikom." 
Ezekiel3:16 Oun har kol efta divessa trouyel his, penas o baro Devel ap mande:" 
Ezekiel3:17 Tou, mensho, vess kova, kay dikell i bibarht te vell oun penell kova i Israelenge doureder, yaake har yek ap i foro yak dell, oun i menshenge penell, te venn lourde. Te penau me touke i lab, hounte peness kova lenge, te djinenn le, hoy kamau ap lende te anell." 
Ezekiel3:18 Te penau me ap i čilačeste: Tou hounte meress! Palle hounte peness tou leske kova, oun dess les trad, yaake te nay djal lo peskro čilačo dromestar tele, oun ačell djido. Te peneh či, lell lo peskri phagi oun hounte merell. Ap toute penau me palle: Tout hi doosh ap leskro merepen." 
Ezekiel3:19 Tou te dal les trad, oun yob djal gar tele peskro čilačo dromestar, oun djivell doureder an o čilačepen, palle lell lo peskri phagi, oun hounte merell. Tiro djipen lal tou dran o merepen vin." 
Ezekiel3:20 Te djal i lačo mensho peskro lačo dromestar tele, oun krell o čilačepen, oun tou deh les gar trad, krau, te perell lo. Peskri doshake hounte merell lo. Oun ko lačepen, hoy kras lo glan kova, vell bistedo. Ap toute penau me palle: Tout hi doosh ap leskro merepen." 
Ezekiel3:21 Tou te penal ap ko lačeste: Risse trouyel! Oun yob shounell ap toute oun moukell o čilačepen, čačepah palle ačell lo djido. Oun tiro djipen lal tou dran o merepen vin." 
Ezekiel3:22 Oun i zoor o baro Deblestar vas kote pral mande, oun yob penas ap mande: Kre tout ap o drom, oun dja vin an o telstouno them. Oun kote kamau me touha te rakrell." 
Ezekiel3:23 Oun me krom man ap o drom oun djom vin an o telstouno them. Oun kote dikom me pale o raylepen o baro Deblestar, yaake har dikom les, har homs pash o pani Kebar. Oun me moukom man ap i phoub te perell." 
Ezekiel3:24 Kote vas i zoor o Deblestar an mande dren, oun čivas man ap mire herya. Oun o baro Devel penas ap mande: Tou mensho, dja an tiro kheer oun pande tout dren!" 
Ezekiel3:25 Shoun, hoy touha djala! Tou veh pandlo shellentsa, te nay djah gar vin pash i menshende." 
Ezekiel3:26 Yon hi save menshe, kay moukenn pen či te penell. Doleske krau, te nay rakress bouder gar, oun nay dess len bouder gar trad." 
Ezekiel3:27 Ap ko tsiro kay rakrau pale touha, krau me tiro mouy pre. Oun tou peness palle ap lende: Kava penell o baro Devel, maro ray … Koon kamell te shounell, kova shounell ap toute. Koon kamell gar te shounell, kova shounell gar ap toute. Yon hi menshe, kay moukenn pen či te penell." 
Ezekiel4:1 Tou, mensho, le i bar dran rhačedi čik, oun čip les glan toute, čin dren, har o foro Yerusalem vin dikell!" 
Ezekiel4:2 Kava barreha sike, har ko foro dren lino vell! Kre bare turme troul leste, oun čip čik khetne, te kress i drom, hoy djal ap o foreskre massurya pre. Čip lourden troul o foro trouyel! Oun čip bare pesse roukengre kotya pash i massurya troul o foro, kolentsa i massurya paash dino venn." 
Ezekiel4:3 Oun le touke i bobeskro saster, oun čip les pre mank toute oun o foro, har te vals lo i massouri! Oun palle dik ap o foro, oun kre yaake, har te pandals les dren. Kova hi i sikepen i Israelenge, hoy sikrell lende, hoy pral lende vella." 
Ezekiel4:4 Oun tou čip tout ap tiri servi rig, oun me čivau i doosh o kherestar Israel ap toute pre. 390 (triin-sheel-te-enya-deesh) divessa hounte vess koy čiddo ap i phoub, oun hounte hidjress lengri doosh. Yaake boud bersha anas o Israel doosh ap peste. Yek dives hako bersheske hounte hidjress lengri doosh." 
Ezekiel4:5  
Ezekiel4:6 Oun te hi ko tsiro trouyel, palle čip tout i douyto kopo tele, kava kopo ap i čači rig, oun hidje i doosh o kherestar Youda 40 (star-deesh) divessa. Yek dives hi yek bersheske." 
Ezekiel4:7 Oun koy pashel dikess kote, kay o dren pandlo foro Yerusalem hi, oun dess les trad tiri pre čakedo moussyah, oun peness leske glan-vi, hoy pral o foro vella." 
Ezekiel4:8 Oun me čivau shelle ap toute, te nay rissress tou tout gar yek rigyatar ap i vavar, yaake rah har o foro Yerusalem dren pandlo hi." 
Ezekiel4:9 Oun le touke gib oun djob oun bohne oun linse oun hirsa oun dinkel. Oun čip len khetne an yek čaro, oun kre touke maro kolestar! Kova hi tiro rhapen, hoy rhah 390 divessa, yaake rah har ap tiri servi rig čiddo hal." 
Ezekiel4:10 Hako dives rhas tou i paash founto maro. Rha kova hako dives ap o emligo tsiro! 
Ezekiel4:11 Oun hako dives piyess tou i paash litari pani. Pi kova hako dives ap o emligo tsiro! 
Ezekiel4:12 Peke ko maro har sane mare dran djob. Peke les pral menshengro foul! Kre kova glan i menshende, te dikenn le kova." 
Ezekiel4:13 Oun o baro Devel penas doureder: Kova sikrell, te vell i tsiro, kay tradau i Israelitaryen an vavar themma mank vavar menshende. Oun kote hounte rhan le maro, hoy pale-čiddo hi." 
Ezekiel4:14 Kote penom me: Ah miro ray, baro Devel! An kek tsiro vom me pale-čiddo. Foun tiknes pre bis kava dives, rhom gar firhen, kay meran, vitar gar saven, kay khetne dandedo van. Kek mass, hoy pale-čiddo hi, vas an miro mouy." 
Ezekiel4:15 Oun yob penas ap mande: Mishto, palle le groumyengro foul oun kek menshengro foul, te pekess tiro maro koy pre!" 
Ezekiel4:16 Oun yob penas pale ap mande: Tou, mensho, me krau, te vell bouder gar doha maro an o foro Yerusalem. Palle hi hakenes kokres i tikno kotar maro, oun nay piyell kokres i tikno khoro pani. Oun yon lenn daar, te hounte merans le i bokatar." 
Ezekiel4:17 Ava, maro oun pani hi gar doha lenge. Oun an lengri traash venn le sano, oun yek pal o vavar merell. Kova hi i phagi lengri doshake." 
Ezekiel5:1 O baro Devel penas: Tou, mensho, le touke i rharo, hoy mishto činell, oun čin touke koleha i balla ap tiro shero tele oun tiri čor. Palle le i vaga, čip i balla pre, oun kre triin kotya lendar, hakeno yaake pharo har ko vavar." 
Ezekiel5:2 Ap ko tsiro, kay vell o foro dren lino, rhače yek triinto kotar foun kol balla mashkral an o foro. Oun i vavar triinto kotar de ko rhareha paash vin glan kol foreskre voudya. Oun ko vavar triinto kotar vitse pre, te lell len o dourho peha! Yaake lau me i menshen dran Yerusalem palla o rhareha." 
Ezekiel5:3 Rike kol ballendar čomone pale oun pande len tella an tiri baya. 
Ezekiel5:4 Oun kolendar less triin-star kotar oun vitse len an i yag oun rhače len pre! Foun kolendar djal i yag vin oun vell pral o tselo kheer Israel. 
Ezekiel5:5 Kava hi, hoy penau me, o baro Devel, t'maro ray: Kava bar hi o foro Yerusalem! Mashkral dren an i themma, kay vavar menshe djivenn, čivom kava foro." 
Ezekiel5:6 I menshe an Yerusalem moukan pen či mandar te penell, oun shounan gar ap mande. Yon van čilačeder har kol themma, kay troul lende hi. Mire čačepaskre laba vitsran le pal pende, oun djivan gar yaake har lendar kamom." 
Ezekiel5:7 Doleske penau me, o baro Devel, lengro ray, ap lende: T'mer hans čilačeder har i menshe an i themma troul t'mende, oun djivan gar yaake har t'mendar kamom, oun rikran gar mire čačepaskre laba dren. Ava, t'mer han yaake čilačo, te rikran t'men vitar gar ap o čačepen kol vavar menshendar, kay troul t'mende djivenn." 
Ezekiel5:8 Doleske shounenn, t'mer menshe an Yerusalem, hoy penau me, o baro Devel, t'maro ray: Kanna sikrau les t'menge! Oun dau t'men t'mari phagi glan i yaka kol vavar menshendar." 
Ezekiel5:9 Oun me kamau t'mentsa yaake te krell, har kova kekeha krom, oun vitar gar krau an ko tsiro, hoy vella. Kava krau doleske, kay kran savo boud djoungelo koova." 
Ezekiel5:10 I tsiro vell, kay rhan dada pengre čaven mashkral an Yerusalem, oun čave rhan pengre daden. Yaake pharo vell miri phagi, hoy dau t'mende. Oun halauter, kay t'mendar pral ačenn, venn vin tradedo ap hake rigya." 
Ezekiel5:11 T'mer kran miro kheer pale-čiddo kol rhorhene deblentsa oun djoungelo koveha, hoy kote kran, penau me, o baro Devel, t'maro ray. Doleske dau man sovel, me o djido Devel, te dap t'men paash. T'mer khaytenn man bouder gar oun me krau miro dji bouder gar t'menge pre." 
Ezekiel5:12 O triinto kotar t'mendar merell ap i pharo nasslepen oun i bokatar. Oun i triinto kotar t'mendar vell glan o foro o rhareha moulo dino. Oun i triinto kotar t'mendar tradau vin ap hake rigya, oun me lau len palla o rhareha." 
Ezekiel5:13 Te moukom miri tseli rholi ap t'mende vin, oun dom t'men pale, hoy kran, palle djal miri rholi krik, oun hom bouder gar rhoyedo pral t'mende. Oun t'mer djinenn, te homs me, o baro Devel, kay das t'men trad o tselo djiyeha."
